text: Thilsiam Thu Lei tuh lim leh mel nei lou in, avuak kia ahi a, tui thukpi tung mial in amial hi. Pathian Kha in tuite tung a-opkhum hi. Pathian in, “Vak om hen,” achi a, huchi in vak ahong omta hi. Pathian in vak a-en a, hoih asa hi. Huchi in Pathian in mial a pan vak akhenkheta hi. Pathian in vak, “Sun” achi a, mial, “Zan” achi hi. Huchi in ani khatna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. Pathian in, “Tuite kikal ah vansin om henla, huai in tuite a pan tuite khenkhia hen,” achi hi. Pathian in vansin abawl a, vansin tung a tui omte a pan vansin nuai a tui omte akhenkhia a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi. Pathian in vansin, “Van” achi hi. Huchi in ani nihna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. Pathian in, “Van nuai a tuite mun khat ah omkhawm uh henla, gamkeu hong dawk hen,” achi a; huchibang ahong hita hi. Pathian in gamkeu, “Lei” achi a; tui omkhawmte Tuipite achi hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. Pathian in, “Lei in loupate, anteh chi neite, thei sing lei a amau chi omdan ding bang zel a gah, agah sung a chi omte omsak hen,” achi a, huchibang ahong hita hi. Huchi in lei in loupate, anteh amau chi omdan ding bang a chi neite, sing amau chi omdan ding bang a gah, agah sung a chi omte a-omsak hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. Huchi in ani thumna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. Pathian in, “Sun leh zan khenna ding in vansin ah tanvakte om uhenla, huaite chiamtehnate, hunbite, nite leh kumte theihna hi uhen.

Lei tanvak ding in van a vansin ah vakte om uhen,” achi a, huchibang ahong hita hi. Pathian in tanvak thupi nih abawl a; tanvak thupizaw pen sun a vaihawm ding in, tanvak thupi louzaw pen zan a vaihawm ding in abawl hi. Aksite leng abawl hi. Pathian in huaite lei tanvak ding in van a vansin ah akoih a; sun tung leh zan tung a vaihawm ding leh vak leh mial khen ding in. Huchi in Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. Huchi in ani lina ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. Pathian in, “Tuite'n thilsiam tang thei hinna neite tampi pawtsak uhenla, vasate leng leitung a vansin hawm heuhou ah leng uhen,” achi hi. Pathian in ngapi liante asiam a, ganhing tang thei chiteng tui in apawtsak a, amaute chi omdan ding bang leh kha nei vasa chiteng amaute chi omdan ding bang in asiam hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi. Pathian in, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, tuipi tuite dimsak unla, vasate leng lei ah pung uhen,” chi in avualzawl hi. Huchi in ani ngana ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi. Pathian in, “Lei in ganhing amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in; gante, bokvak a pai ganhingte, gamsate, amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in pawtsak uhen,” achi a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi. Pathian in gamsa amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in, gante amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in, lei a thil bokvak a paite tengteng amau chi omdan ding bang chiat in abawl hi. Pathian in huai a-en a, hoih asa hi.

Pathian in, “I kibatpih in, eimah bang in mihing i bawl dia, tuipi a ngasate tung ah, tung a leng vasate tung ah, gante tung ah leh leitung tengteng tung ah thu i neisak ding,” achi hi. Pathian in ama kibatpih inmihing asiam a, akibatpihmah in ahi asiam;pasal leh numei asiamta hi. Pathian in amaute avualzawl hi. Pathian mah in akiang uah, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, leitung luahdim unla, na thuthu un omsak un. Tuipi a ngasate tung ah, tung a leng vasate tung ah, thil hing leitung a bokvak a pai tengteng tung ah thu nei un,” achi hi. Pathian mah in, “Ngai un, leitung tengteng a anteh chi nei om teng leh sing chiteng, sing chi nei gah omnate, ka hon pia hi; na an ding uh ahi. Lei a gamsa chiteng kiang ah, tung a leng vasa chiteng kiang ah, leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng kiang ah, hinna nei chiteng kiang ah a-an ding un loupa hing chiteng ka pia hi,” achi a; huan huchibang ahong hita hi. Pathian in athilsiam tengteng a-en a, ngai in, hoih asa mahmah hi. Huchi in ani gukna ah nitaklam a-om a, zinglam leng a-om hi.

Huan lei leh vante leh asung a om tengteng siam zoh ahita hi. Pathian in ani sagih ni in anasep azou a; huchi in ani sagih ni in anasep tengteng akhawlsanta hi. Huai ni a Pathian in asiam leh abawl, anasep tengteng akhawlsan tak ziak in, Pathian in ani sagih ni vualzawl in, atangta hi.Eden Huan Toupa Pathian in lei leh vante asiam ni a, lei leh vante siam ahih ua akisuansawndan uh hiai bang ahi. Leitung ah gamlak loupa himhim a-om nai kei a, sing-le-louhing leng apou nai kei hi. Toupa Pathian in leitung ah vuah azusak nai kei a, lei let ding in mihing leng a-om nai kei hi. Himahleh lei a pan tuihu ahong pawttou a, leitung tengteng anomsak hi. Toupa Pathian in lei a leivui in mi abawl a, anakvangte ah hinna hu ahalut a; huai mi, hinna nei mihing ahong hita hi. Toupa Pathian in suahlam a Eden ah huan abawl a; huai ah abawl pasal a-omsak hi. Toupa Pathian in lei a kipan sing mit hiptak leh nek tuak chiteng apousak hi. Hinna sing leh asia leh apha theihna sing leng huan laizang ah apousak hi. Eden a pan huan nomsak ding in lui aluang paisuak a; huai a kipan akazak a, ka li ahong hita hi. Akhatna min Pishon ahi a, hiai Havilah gam tengteng kualkhum lui ahi a; huai dangka-eng omna ahi. Huai gam a dangka-eng hoihtak ahi a, huai ah bedeli leh onik suang leng a-om hi. Lui nihna min Gihon ahi a; huai lui in Kush gam tengteng akualkhum hi. Lui thumna min Hiddekel ahi a; hiai Assuria gam suahlam a luang ahi. Lui lina bel Euphrates ahi. Toupa Pathian in pasal api a, Eden huan ah akem ding leh aveng ding in akoihta hi.

Toupa Pathian in pasal kiang ah, “Huan a singgah chiteng na ut-ut na ne thei hi. Asia leh apha theihna singgah bel na ne ding ahi kei. Na nekleh na nek ni mah in na si ngeingei ding hi,” chi in thu apia hi. Toupa Pathian in, “Pasal amah kia a-om ahoih kei. Amah panpihtu dia kilawm ka bawlsak ding,” achi hi. Toupa Pathian in leitung a kipan gamsa chiteng leh tung a leng vasa chiteng abawl hi. Amin ding ua bang sak ding ahia chih theihna ding in Adam kiang ah apikhawm hi. Ganhing chiteng amin uh Adam in ana phuah, huai amin uh ahi denta hi. Adam in ganhing tengteng, tung a leng vasa tengteng leh gamsa chiteng min aphuak chiat hi. Himahleh Adam panpihtu ding muh in a-om kei hi. Toupa Pathian in nuamtak in Adam a-ihmusak a, huchi in a-ihmuta a; anakguh khat alakhia a, alakkhiakna mun sa in adimsak hi. Toupa Pathian in Adam a pan alak nakguh a kipan in numei abawl a, Adam kiang ah apita hi. Adam in,“Hiai pen zaw ka guh a kipan guh,ka sa a kipan sa ahi.Pasal a kipan lakkhiakahih ziak in,Numei, chih ding ahi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in pasal in anu leh apa apaisan ding a, azi ah abelh ding. Huchi in sa khat ahong hita ding uh. Adam leh azi vuaktang ahi tuak ua, azum tuan kei uhi.

Huan Toupa Pathian in gamsa abawl tengteng lak ah gul agitlouhpil pen hi. Ama'n numei kiang ah, “Pathian in, ‘Huan a singgah himhim na ne ding uh ahi kei chi ahi maw? ” achi hi. Numei in gul kiang ah, “Chi lou e, huan a singgahte ne thei mah ung, himahleh huan laizang a singgah pen ahihleh Pathian in, ‘Na ne ding uh ahi kei, khoih leng na khoih ding uh ahi kei, huchi lou in zaw na si ding uh chi aka, ” achi hi. Mihing Thumanlouhna Gul in numei kiang ah, “Si zenzen lou e. Na nek ni ua pat na mit uh ahong vak dia, asia leh apha thei in Pathian na hong bang ding uh, chih Pathian in thei kilkel ei ve,” achi hi. Numei in singgah nek theih ahi chih leh mit hiptak ahi chih leh mi pilsak ding a singgah etlahhuai ahi, chih atheih in agah alou a, aneta hi. Akiang a om apasal leng apia a, ama'n leng aneta hi. Anih un amit uh ahong vakta a, vuaktang ahih lam uh hong kithei ua; theipi nah khuikhawm in, puan akibawltawm uhi. Toupa Pathian, nitaklam ninem a huan a vak thawmging aza ua; Adam leh azi in huan a sing lak ah Toupa Pathian ana kibuksan uhi. Toupa Pathian in Adam asam a, akiang ah, “Koi a om na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Huan ah na thawmging ka za a, vuaktang ka hih ziak in ka lau a; ka na kibuta,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Vuaktang na hih kua'n hon hilh ahia? Singgah nek louh ding ka chih ne na hita maw?” achi hi. Adam in, “Hon ompih dia na hon piak numei in singgah hon pia a, ka neta hi,” achi hi.

Toupa Pathian in numei kiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Numei in, “Gul in hon zekhem a, ka neta hi,” achi hi.Pathian Vaihawmna Toupa Pathian in gul kiang ah, “Hichibang a na hih ziak in ganhing tengteng leh gamsa chiteng lak ah hamsiat na hi tuanse ding a, bokvak in na pai gigeta ding a, na damsung in leivui na neta ding. Nang leh numei ka hon kidousak ding a, na suante leh asuante leng ka kidousak lai ding. Huai in na lutang asidupsak ding a, nang akhetul na sidupsak ding,” achi hi. Numei kiang ah, “Na haksatna leh na naupaina nakpi in ka pungsak ding a; haksatak in tate na nei ding. Huan na lunggulh na pasal a ahi ding a, ama'n na tung ah thu anei ding,” achi hi. Adam kiang ah, “Na zi thu na man a, singgah na ne ding ahi kei, chi a, ka hon thupiak na nek ziak in nang ziak in leitung hamsiat in a-omta. Na damsung teng in gimtak a sem in agah na neta ding. Ling leh louling neite leng ahon omsak ding a, lei a anteh na neta ding hi. Lei a na kik nawn masiah na mai a kho-ul luang puappuap in an na neta ding. Lei a pan lakkhiak na hi; leivui na hi a, leivui ah na kik nawn ding,” achi hi. Adam in azi, mihing tengteng' nu ahih ziak in, amin Evi asa hi.

Toupa Pathian in Adam a ding leh azi a ding in savun puanaktual bawlsak in, asilhsak hi.Huan A Kipan Adam Leh Evi Hawlkhiakna Toupa Pathian in, “Ngai un, mihing in asia leh apha thei in eite bang ahong hita, tu in akhut ua sawk in hinna singgah lou a ne in, tangtawn in ahing kha ding uh,” achi hi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in amah alakkhiakna lei let ding in Eden huan a kipan ahawlkheta hi. Mihingte adelhkheta a; hinna sing lampi veng ding in Eden huan suahlam pang ah cherubte leh mei namsau kilek zualzual a-omsakta hi.

Huan Adam in azi Evi athei a; huchi in agai a, Kain anei a, “Toupa panpihna in ta pasal ka neita,” achi hi. Asanggampa Abel ahon nei nawn hi. Abel belamchingmi ahi a, Kain bel leiletmi ahi. Anung in hichi ahong hi a, Kain in Toupa kiang a lat ding in lou a piang leigahte ahon tawi hi. Kain Leh Abel Himahleh Kain leh athillat akipahpih kei. Kain aheh mahmah a, amel aliap hi. Toupa'n Kain kiang ah, “Bangziak a heh na hia? Bangziak a na mel liap ahia? Hihhoih lechin pahtak na loh kei dia hia? Na hihhoih keileh kongkhak bul ah khelhna akual nilouh a, adeihlam nangmah ahi dia, atung ah thu na nei ding ahi,” achi hi. Kain in anau Abel ahoupih a, hichi ahong hi a, lou a a-om lai un Kain in anau Abel asual a, athatta hi. Toupa'n Kain kiang ah, “Na sanggampa Abel koi a om ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka thei kei, ka sanggampa dontu ka hi a hia?” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Bang hih na tamai a? Na sanggampa' sisan aw in lei a kipan hon sam ahi. Huaiziak in na khut a kipan na sanggampa' sisan sang ding a kam ana ka, lei a pan hamsiat na hita hi. Lei na leh in leng ahoihna ahon pe nawn kei ding a, leitung ah galtai leh vakvai na hita ding,” achi hi. Kain in Toupa kiang ah, “N'on gawtna ana mahmah a, ka thuakzou kei ding. “Ngai in, tuni in leitung a kipan na hon delhkheta a, na mitmuh phak louh a sel a om ding ka hita. Lei ah taimang leh vakvai hi ding ka hita hi. Hichi ahong hi ding a, kuapeuh kei hon mu in ahon that mai ding uh,” achi hi.

Toupa'n akiang ah, “Huchi ahihleh, Kain that kuapeuh amun sagih in atung ah phu lak ahi ding,” achi hi. Huan mi amah mu kuahiam in athahlouhna ding in Toupa'n Kain achiamtehta hi. Toupa kiang a kipan Kain apawt a, Eden suahlam a Nod gam ah atengta hi.Kain Suante Kain in azi athei a; huchi in agai a, Enok anei hi. Khua asat a, akho min atapa tamsak in Enok asa hi. Enok in tapa Irad anei a; Irad in tapa Mahujael anei hi. Mahujael in tapa Methusael anei a; Methusael in tapa Lamekh anei hi. Lamekh in zi nih anei a; khat min Adah ahi a, akhat pen min Zillah ahi. Adah in Jabal anei a; amah puanin a om ganvulmite suangpa ahi. Asanggampa' min Jubal ahi a, amah kaihging leh tamngai tummi tengteng suangpa ahi. Zillah in leng Tubal-kain, dal leh sik, tuzat-heizat chiteng sekmi anei hi. Tubal-kain sanggamnu Naamah ahi. Lamekh in azite kiang ah,“Adah leh Zillahte aw, ka aw za unla;Lamekh zite aw, ka thugen ngaikhia un.Ahon liamsak ziak in mi khat ka that a,ahon sidupsak ziak in valnou khat ka that hi. Kain' phu bawn amun sagih a lak ding ahihleh,Lamekh' phu amun sawmsagih-le-sagih a lak ahi ding,” achi hi.Seth Leh Enosh Adam in azi athei nawn a; tapa anei nawn a; amin Seth asa hi, “Pathian in Abel sik in chisuan ding ahon sehsakta; Kain in lah amah athatta ngal a,” achi hi. Seth in leng tapa anei a; amin Enosh asa hi. Huai a kipan mite'n Toupa min alou panta uhi.

Hiai Adam suante khangthubu ahi. Pathian in mihing asiam ni in Pathian batpih in amah abawl hi. Pasal leh numei in amaute asiam a; avualzawl a, siam a a-om ni un amin uh Adam asa hi. Adam in kum za-le-sawmthum ahih in amah mah bang, akibatpih ngei tapa anei a; amin Seth asa hi. Seth aneih nung in Adam kum zagiat adam lai a; tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Adam Suante Seth in kum za-le-nga ahih in, tapa Enosh anei hi. Enosh aneih nung in Seth kum zagiat-le-sagih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Seth damsung tengteng kum zakua sawm-le-nih ahi a; huchi in asita hi. Enosh in kum sawmkua ahih in tapa Kenan anei hi. Kenan aneih nung in Enosh kum zagiat sawm-le-nga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Enosh damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-nga ahi a, huchi in asita hi. Kenan in kum sawmsagih ahih in, tapa Mahalalel anei hi. Mahalalel aneih nung in Kenan kum zagiat-le-sawmli adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Kenan damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawm ahi a; huchi in asita hi. Mahalalel kum sawmguk-le-nga ahih in tapa Jared anei hi. Jared aneih nung in Mahalalel kum zagiat-le-sawmthum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Mahalalel damsung tengteng kum zagiat sawmkua-le-nga ahi a, huchi in asita hi. Jared in kum zakhat sawmguk-le-nih ahih in tapa Enok anei hi. Enok aneih nung in Jared kum zagiat adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Jared damsung tengteng kum zakua sawmguk-le-nih ahi a, huchi in asita hi. Enok in kum sawmguk-le-nga ahih in, tapa Methuselah anei hi. Methuselah aneih nung in Enok kum zathum sung Pathian toh atonkhawm ua, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Enok damsung tengteng kum zathum sawmguk-le-nga ahi.

Pathian toh Enok atonkhawm ua, amah a-omta kei a; Pathian in alata hi. Methuselah in kum zakhat sawmgiat-le-sagih ahih in tapa Lamekh anei hi. Lamekh aneih nung in Methuselah kum zasagih sawmgiat-le-nih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Methuselah damsung tengteng kum zakua sawmguk-le-kua ahi a, huchi in asita hi. Lamekh in kum zakhat sawmgiat-le-nih ahih in tapa anei hi. “Hiai ngei in Toupa hamsiatkhum leitung ziak a i nasepna leh khut a i sepgimna ah hon lungmuan ding,” chi in amin Noah asa hi. Noah aneih nung in Lamekh kum zanga sawmkua-le-nga adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Lamekh damsung tengteng kum zasagih sawmsagih-le-sagih ahi a; huchi in asita hi. Noah kum zanga a upa ahi. Noah in Shem, Ham leh Japheth anei hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, leitung a mite ahong pun ua, tanute ahon neih un, Pathian tapate'n mite tanute melhoih in amu ua; adeihlam chiat uh zi in anei uhi. Toupa'n, “Ka Kha in tangtawn in mi asual nilouh kei ding, amah lah sa ahi ngal a, himahleh kum za-le-sawmnih adam ding,” achi hi. Huai hun lai in lei ah miliante a-om ua; huai nung in leng Pathian tapate'n mite tanute thei a, amau toh tate aneih zel lai un, huaite mah nidanglai a mihat, miminthangte ahi uhi. Toupa'n lei ah mite gitlouhdan nasa ahi chih leh alungtang lunggeldan uh gilou ngen ahi ngitnget chih amu hi. Gitlouhna Toupa'n, “Leitung a kipan ka misiam ka hihmang mai ding. Mite, sate, ganhingte leh tung a leng vasate tan in; ka bawl ziak in ka kisik,” achi hi.Noah Noah in bel Toupa mitmuh in deihsakna atang hi. Noah suan hiaite ahi uh: Noah midik ahi a, adam tonpihte lak ah gensiatbei ahi a; Pathian toh Noah atonkhawm uhi. Noah in tapa thum Shem, Ham leh Japheth anei hi. Pathian' mitmuh in lei asia a, hiamgamna in lei adim khin hi. Huan Pathian in lei a-en a, ngai in, asegawp a; sa tengteng in leitung ah a-omdan uh ahihse khinta uhi. Pathian in Noah kiang ah, “Sa tengteng beina ka ma ah ahong tungta; amaute ziak in hiamgamna in leitung adim khinta ngal a. Ngai in, leitung toh amau ka hihmang ding. Nang a ding in meilah sing in long bawl inla; long ah dantante na bawl ding ahi. Asunglam leh apolam meilah nai in na zut vek ding hi. Hiai na bawldan ding ahi. Long dunglam tong zathum hi henla, availam tong sawmnga hi henla, asanlam tong sawmthum hi hen.

Long ah tohlet na bawl ding a, atunglam tong khat chiang a na zoh ding ahi. Apang ah long kongkhak na bawl ding a; chial nuainung leh chial nihna leh chial thumna nei in na bawl ding ahi. Ngai in, kei mahmah in, sa tengteng hinna hatna pai khempeuh, van nuai a kipan hihmangthang ding in leitung ah tuichim ka tungsak ding a; lei a thil chih omte asi vek ding uh. Himahleh nang toh ka thukhun ka kipsak ding a, long ah na lut ding ahi. Nang na lut ding a, na tapate leh na zi leh na tapate' zite leng na kiang ah alut ding uh ahi. Sa tengteng a thil hing chiteng lak a kipan, chi chih nihnih in, na kiang ah hinsak ding in long ah na pilut ding ahi. Amaute anu leh apa zel ahi ding uhi. Vasate amau chi omdan bang chiat in, gante amau chi omdan bang chiat in, chi chih nihnih in na hinsak ding in na kiang ah ahong pai ding uh ahi. Nek theih an chi tuamtuam kaikhawm inla, na kiang ah koih in. Nang leh amaute a ding in an ahi ding uh,” achi hi. Huchibang in Noah in ahih a; Pathian in akiang a thu apiak tengteng ahi bangbang in ahihta hi.

Huan Toupa'n Noah kiang ah, “Nang leh na inkuanpih tengteng long ah lutta un. Nang zaw hiai khang a ka ma ah midiktat na hih ka hon mu hi. Sa siang chiteng lak ah anu leh apa, kop sagih zel; sa siang lou lak ah anu leh apa chiat toh kop nih zel, na kiang ah na pi ding ahi. Tung a leng vasa lak ah leng, anu leh apa chiat, kop sagih zel in; leitung a chi khah ding a hinsak ding in. Ni sagih in asam lai a, huai khit chiang in leitung ah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung vuah ka zusak ding a; ka bawl thil hing chiteng leitung a kipan ka hihmang ding,” achi hi. Noah in Toupa'n akiang a thu apiak tengteng ahi bangbang in ahihta hi. Leitung a tuichim ahong tun lai in, Noah kum zaguk a upa ahita hi. Tuichim Sa siang lak ah leng, sa siang lou lak ah leng, vasa lak ah leng, leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng lak ah leng, Pathian in Noah kiang a thu apiak bang in, anu leh apa chiat, akopkop in, Noah kiang ah long ah alut uhi. Huan ni sagih nung in leitung ah tuichim atungta hi. Noah kum zaguk ahih kum, akha nihna, ani sawm-le-sagih ni in, huai ni mah in tui thuk zapi nak tengteng ahong puakzak a, van tohlette leng hong kihongta uhi. Ni sawmli leh zan sawmli sung teng leitung ah vuahpi azuta hi. Huai ni mah in long ah Noah leh Noah tapate Shem, Ham, Japheth leh Noah zi alut ua, atapate zi thumte leng akiang ah alut uhi.

Amaute alut ua, sa chiteng amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, ganhing leitung a bokvak a pai chiteng amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, vasa chiteng, amau chi omdan dungzui zel in, vasa chiteng, kha nei chiteng leng alut uhi. Sa tengteng hinna hatna pai himhimte, akopkop in Noah kiang ah long ah alut uhi. Alutte Pathian in akiang a thu apiak bang in, sa tengteng lak a anu leh apa zel in alut uhi. Huchi in Toupa'n amah akhakkhumta hi. Leitung ah ni sawmli sung teng tuichim atung a; tui ahong khang a, long alam a, leitung ah adomkangta hi. Tui ahong om zuazua a, leitung ah akhan in ahong khang a, tui tung ah long akilam hi. Leitung ah tui nakpi in ahong om zuazua a; van nuai a tang sang tengtengte atum khin vekta hi. Tong sawm-le-nga hial a sang in tui ahong om a; tangte tupmang in a-omta uhi. Lei a tang thei sa chiteng, vasate, gante, gamsate, ganhing lei a bokvak a pai chitengte, michih tengte toh asi khin vek uhi. Anak ua hinna kha hatna omna tengteng, gam a om tengteng asi khin vek uhi. Leitung a thil hing chiteng omte, mite, gante, ganhingte, tung a leng vasate toh hihmang in a-om ua; lei a kipan hihman in a-omta ua, long sung a om Noah leh akiang a omte kia hawi in a-om uhi. Ni za-le-sawmnga sung teng leitung ah tui avung hi.

Huan Pathian in Noah leh long sung a akiang a thil hing chiteng leh ganta om tengteng atheigige a; Pathian in leitung ah huih anungsak a, tui ahong dai panta hi. Tui thukpi nakte leh van tohlette hong kikhakta ua, van a kipan vuah leng theusak ahita. Lei a kipan tui akiam giaigiai a; ni za-le-sawmnga nung in tui hong tawm deuhta a, akha sagihna ani sawm-le-sagih ni in Ararat tang ah long ahong kinga hi. Akha sawmna tan in tui akiam giaigiai zel a; akha sawmna ani khat ni in mualvumte akimuta hi. Ni sawmli nung in hichi ahong hi a, Noah in abawl long tohlet ahongta hi. Va-ak khat akhahkhia a, leitung a kipan tui akan khit masiah huai va-ak avial lenlen hi. Tuichim Tawpna Himahleh vakhu in tukna ding himhim amu kei a, akiang ah long ah akik nawn a; tui lah leitung pumpi ah a-om lai ngal a. Polam ah akhut agolhkhia a, long sung ah akiang ah ana lalut nawn hi. Ni sagih dang angak lai a; long a kipan vakhu akhahkhe nawn hi. Nitaklam in akiang ah vakhu ahong lut nawn a; ngai in, amuk in olive nah khat ahon tuah hi. Noah in leitung ah tui atawmta chih atheita hi. Ni sagih dang angak nawn a; vakhu akhahkhe nawn a; akiang ah hong kik nawn kei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum zaguk-le-khatna, akha khatna, ani khat ni in, leitung a kipan tui akangta hi. Noah in long khuhna akoihsuan a, a-en a; ngai in, leitung ahulta hi. Akha nihna ani sawmnih-le-sagih ni in leitung ahulta hi. Pathian in Noah kiang ah thu agen a; “Long a kipan nang pawt inla, na zi leh na tapate leh na tapate' zite leng na kiang ah pawt uhen.

Sa tengteng lak a thil hing chiteng na ompihte, vasate, gante, leitung a bokvak a pai ganhing chitengte toh na kiang ah pikhia in, leitung a chiphatak a chi tampi suang a ahong puntheihna ding un,” achi hi. Noah apawt a, atapate leh azi leh atapate' zite leng akiang ah apawt uhi. Sa chiteng, ganhing chiteng, vasa chiteng, leitung a tang thei peuhmahte amau chi omdan dungzui zel in long a kipan apawtta uhi.Noah Kithoihna Noah in Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a; sa siang chiteng lak leh vasa siang chiteng lak a kipan ala a, maitam ah halmang pumpiaknate alanta hi. Toupa'n huai gim namtui aza a; Toupa'n alungsim in, “Mite ziak in leitung ka hamsiat nawn kei ding, mite lungsim ngaihtuahnate lah tuailai ahih a kipan gilou ahi ngal ua. Tua ka gawt bang in thil hing chiteng leng ka gawt nawn kei ding. “Leitung a-om lai tengbuhtuh leh buhlakte, khovot leh kholumte,nipi leh phalbite, sun leh zanteabei kei ding,” achi hi.

Huan Pathian in Noah leh atapate avualzawl a, akiang uah, “Chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, lei hon luahdim un. Leitung a sa chiteng leh tung a leng vasa chiteng in nou kihtakna leh lauhna anei ding uh. Hiaite leh lei a bokvak a pai tengteng leh tuipi a ngasa tengteng na khut ua piak ahita uhi. Thil hing tang thei chitengte nou a ding in nek ding ahi ding ua; anteh hing ka hon piak bang in bangkim ka hon pe vek hi. Himahleh sa, ahinna sisan toh zaw na nekhawm ding uh ahi kei. Na hinna sisan phu ka la ngeingei ding. Sa chiteng lak ah ka la ding a; mi lak ah leng. Michih asanggamte uh lak ah, mite hinna phu ka la chiat ding. “Mi sisan suahmi kuapeuh,huai mi mah in ama sisan asuah ding,Pathian batpih amihing bawl ahi ngal a. “Nou chi tampi suang in hong pung unla, ta leh nau tampi nei unla, leitung ah hong pung un,” achi hi. Pathian in Noah kiang leh akiang a om atapate kiang ah, “Ngai un, kei mahmah in na kiang uah leh na nung ua na suante uh kiang ah leng ka thukhun ka hihkip hi. Noah Toh Pathian Thukhun Na kiang ua om thil hing chiteng, na ompih uh vasate, gante, na ompih uh lei a sa chitengte kiang ah leng; long a kipan hong pawt tengteng, lei a sa chiteng kiang nangawn ah. Na kiang uah ka thukhun ka hihkip ding; sa tengteng leng tuichim a hihman in a-om nawn kei ding ua; lei hihse ding in tuichim atung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.

Pathian mah in, “Kei leh nou leh na kiang ua thil hing chiteng omte kal a, suan tawp nei lou a omte a ding in, hiai ka thukhun chiamtehna ahi ding hi. Meipi ah ka sakhituihup ka zamsak a, huai kei leh lei kal a thukhun chiamtehna ding ahi. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, leitung a meipi ka kaisak in meipi ah sakhituihup akimu ding hi. Kei leh nou leh sa tengteng lak a thil hing chitengte kal a, ka thukhun om ka theigige ding. Sa tengteng hihmang ding in tui alet nawn kei ding hi. Meipi a sakhituihup azam chiang in, Pathian leh leitung a sa om tengteng lak a thil hing chiteng kal a tangtawn thukhun om ka theihgige theihna ding in ka en zel ding,” achi hi. Pathian mah in Noah kiang ah, “Hiai kei leh leitung a sa om tengteng kal a ka thukhun hihkip chiamtehna ahi,” achi nawn hi.Noah Leh Atapate Noah tapa long a kipan pawtte Shem, Ham leh Japheth ahi uhi (Kanaan pa Ham ahi). Hiai mi thumte Noah tapate ahi ua, amaute a kipan pawtte'n leitung pumpi azelsuak uhi. Louneimi in Noah ahong om pan a, grephuan abawl hi. Uain adawn a, akham a; apuanin ah alumkhialta hi. Kanaan pa Ham in apa lumkhial amu a, inpua a om a-unau nihte ava hilh hi. Shem leh Japheth in puan ala ua, aliang ua kizawn in anung pai ua, apa uh lumkhial ava khuh uhi. Amai uh lehlam nga in apa uh lumkhial amu kei uhi. Noah, uain kham ahong halh a, atung a atapa naupangpen in ahihdan ahon theita hi. “Kanaan hamsiat in om hen.Asanggamte sikhate sikhaahi ding,” achi hi. “Shem ToupaPathian phat in om hen.Asikha in Kanaan om hen. Pathian in Japheth hihlian henla,Asikha in Kanaan om hen,” achi lai hi. Tuichim tun nung in Noah kum zathum-le-sawmnga adam hi. Noah damsung tengteng kum zakua-le-sawmnga ahi a; huchi in asita hi.

Hiaite Noah tapa Shem, Ham leh Japheth suante ahi uh. Tuichim tun nung in tapate anei chiat uhi. Japheth tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshek leh Tiras ahi uh. Gomer tapate: Ashkenaz, Riphath leh Togarmah ahi uh. Javan tapate: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim leh Dodanim ahi uh. Huaite a kipan in Zentelte, amau pau leh amau nam dungzui zel in, amau chite omna tuikulh gam, amau gamte ah akikhenzak uhi. Ham tapate: Kush, Mizraim, Put leh Kanaan ahi uh. Kush tapate: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah leh Sabtekhah ahi uh. Raamah tapate: Sheba leh Dedan ahi uh. Kush in tapa Nimrod anei hi. Amah leitung ah mihattak ahong hi panta hi. Toupa ma ah sabengmi hattak ahi a; huaiziak in ahi, “Toupa ma a sabet hattak Nimrod bang ahi,” achih zel uh. Noah Tapate Suante( Kro. ) Huai gam a kipan apawt a, Assuria gam ah alut a, Nineveh khua, Rehoboth-Ir khua leh Kalah khua asat hi. Nineveh leh Kalah kikal ah Resen khua asat a, huai Resen khua thupitak ahi. Mizraim in Ludte, Anamte, Lehabte, Naphtuhte, Pathruste leh Kasluhte, Philistiate leh Kaphtorte pawtna asuang hi. Kanaan in tapa masa Zidon anei a, Heth leng anei lai a, Jebuste, Amorte, Girgaste; Hivte, Arkate, Sinte; Arvadte, Zemarte, Hamathte asuang; huai nung in Kanaan namte akithehzakta uhi. Kanaante gamgi Zidon a kipan Gerar, Gaza, Sodom leh Gomorrah, Admah, Zeboim leh Lasa khua tan ahi. Huaite, anamte dungzui zel leh apaute, agamte leh anamte lak ua dungzui zel in Ham suante ahi uh. Shem, Eber ta tengteng suangpa, Japheth upa'n leng tate anei hi. Shem tapate: Elam, Asshur, Arpakshad, Lud leh Aram ahi uh. Aram tapate: Uz, Hul, Gether leh Mash ahi uh. Arpakshad in tapa Shelah anei a; Shelah in tapa Eber anei hi.

Eber in tapa nih anei a: khat min Peleg ahi a, adam lai a leitung akikhen ziak in; anau min Joktan ahi. Joktan in tapa Almodad, Seleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah; Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah; Obal, Abimael, Sheba; Ophir, Havilah leh Jobab anei a; huai tengteng Joktan tapate ahi uh. Atenna uh Mesha a kipan suahlam tang Sephar tan ahi. Huaite Shem suante ahi ua; anamte dungzui zel leh apaute dungzui zel in, agamte ah leh achite dungzui zel in. Huaite Noah suan namte ahi ua, asuante uh dungzui zel in achite uh lak ah; tuichim tun nung in huaite a kipan ahi a; lei a chi chih khenkhiak ahi uhi.

Huan lei a mi tengteng in pau khat leh paudan khat anei uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, suahlam a kipan akisuan zel lai un, Shinar gam ah phaizang amu ua; huai ah atengta uhi. “Kisa un, teklei i bawl ding a, hoihtak in i hal ding,” akichita uhi. Suang sik in teklei anei ua, suang hukna sik in longnai anei uhi. “Kisa un, khopi i bawl ding a, avum in van sun ding in insang i bawl ding ua, i min i thangsak ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw leitung pumpi ah thehdalh in i om kha ding,” achi uhi. Mite tate' khopi leh insang lam en ding in Toupa ahohsuk hi. Toupa'n, “Ngai dih ua, mite pum khat ahi ua, avek un lah pau khat anei ngal ua; hiai thil ahih pan uhi. Tu'n zaw athil hihtupte uh leng kham vual ahita kei ding. Kisa un, i va hohsuk ding ua, pau akitheihtuah louhna ding un, apau uh i va suk lamdangsak ding,” akichi uhi. Huchi in Toupa'n amaute huai a pan leitung tengteng ah adalhsak hi. Huchi in akhopi bawl uh atawpsanta uhi. Huaiziak in amin Babel achi ua; Toupa'n leitung tengteng ah amaute adalhsakta hi.Shem Suante( Kro. ) Hiaite Shem suante ahi uh. Shem kum zakhat a upa ahi a; tuichim tun nung kum nih nung in tapa Arpakshad anei hi. Babel Insang Arpakshad in kum sawmthum-le-nga ahih in tapa Shelah anei hi. Shelah aneih nung in Arpakshad kum zali-le-thum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Shelah in kum sawmthum ahih in tapa Eber anei hi. Eber aneih nung in Shelah kum zali-le-thum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Eber in kum sawmthum-le-li ahih in tapa Peleg anei hi.

Peleg aneih nung in Eber kum zali-le-sawmthum adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Peleg in kum sawmthum ahih in tapa Reu anei hi. Reu aneih nung in Peleg kum zanih-le-kua adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Reu in kum sawmthum-le-nih ahih in, tapa Serug anei hi. Serug aneih nung in Reu kum zanih-le-sagih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Serug in kum sawmthum ahih in tapa Nahor anei hi. Nahor aneih nung in Serug kum zanih adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Nahor in kum sawmnih-le-kua ahih in tapa Terah anei hi. Terah aneih nung in Nahor kum za-le-sawmkua adam lai a, tanute leh tapate anei lai hi. Terah in kum sawmsagih ahih in tapate Abram, Nahor leh Haran anei hi.Terah Suante Hiaite Terah suante ahi ua: Terah in tapa Abram, Nahor leh Haran anei a; Haran in tapa Lot anei hi. Haran ahihleh apianna gam, Kaldaite khua Ur ah, apa Terah ma in asi hi. Abram leh Nahor in zi anei ua; Abram zi min Sarai ahi a, Nahor zi min Haran tanu Milkah ahi. Haran ahihleh Milkah pa leh Iskah pa ahi. Sarai achiing a; ta himhim anei kei. Terah in atapa Abram, atapa Haran tapa Lot, amou, atapa Abram zi Sarai api a; Kanaan a hoh ding in Kaldaite khua Ur a kipan apawtkhekhawm uhi. Haran ahong tung ua, huai ah ateng uhi. Terah damsung kum zanih-le-nga ahi a, Haran ah Terah asi hi.

Huan Toupa'n Abram kiang ah, “Na khua a kipan leh na tanaute a kipan leh na pa inn a kipan pawt inla, ka hon etsak ding gam ah pai in. Chi thupi mahmah in ka hon bawl dia, ka hon vualzawl ding a, na min ka hih thupi ding. Nang vualzawlna na hi ding hi. “Nang hon vualzawl peuhmah ka vualzawl ding a,hon hamsiat peuhmah ka hamsiat ding.Nang ah leitung a nam chih vualzawl ina-om ding uh,” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang a agen bang in Abram akuankheta a; Lot in azui hi. Haran a kipan Abram apawt lai in kum sawmsagih-le-nga a upa ahi. Abram in azi Sarai leh asanggampa' tapa Lot leh athil kaihkhawm tengteng uh leh Haran khua a, ami neih tengteng uh api a; Kanaan gam a teng ding in apawt ua; Kanaan gam atung uhi. Abram huai gam a Shekem mun pha in, Moreh tosaw tan in apai zel hi. Huai lai in, huai gam ah Kanaante ateng uhi. Abram kiang ah Toupa akilak a, “Na suante kiang ah hiai gam ka pe ding,” achi hi. Huai ah akiang a kilak Toupa a ding in maitam adoh hi. Huai a kipan Bethel suahlam a tanggam ah akisuan a, huai ah apuanin akai hi. Atumlam ah Bethel a-om a, asuahlam ah Ai khua a-om hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh nawn a, Toupa min alou hi. Sim gam lam zuan in Abram akisuan lai hi.Aigupta Ah Abram Huai gam ah kial akia a; huai gam anak kial mahmah ziak in, Aigupta gam a om tadih ding in Abram apaisuk hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam lut ding a akisak lai un, azi Sarai kiang ah, “Ngai in, numei melhoihtak na hi, chih ka thei hi.

Pathian In Abram Asam Nang ziak a hoihtak a ka omtheihna ding in leh nang vang a ka hintheihna ding in, hehpih in asanggamnu ka hi chi zel in,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta a Abram alutleh, Aiguptate'n numei amu ua, amel hoih ana sa mahmah uhi. Pharaoh miliante'n leng amu ua, Pharaoh kiang ah ahoihdan agen uhi. Huchi in numei Pharaoh inn ah apilutta uhi. Ama'n Sarai ziak in Abram hoihtak in abawl a; belamte, bawngte, sabengtungpate, sikhapate, sikhanute, sabengtungnute leh sangawngsaute aneihloh hial hi. Toupa'n Abram zi Sarai ziak in Pharaoh leh a-inkuante tung ah hipi khawktak atungsak hi. Pharaoh in Abram asam a, “Ka tung a na thilhih bangchidan amai a? Na zi ahi chih bangziak a hon hilh lou na hia? Bangziak a, ‘Ka sanggamnu ahi, chi na hia? Huaiziak akei maw, ka zi ding a ka na neih hial, huaiziak in, tu'n en in, na zi pi inla, paimang in,” achi hi. Pharaoh in atungthu ah mi kiang ah thu apia a, azi leh aneih tengteng toh asawlkhia hi.

Aigupta gam a kipan Abram pawt in simlam ah apaitou a, akiang ah azi, aneih tengteng leh Lot leng apaitou hi. Abram tuh ganta, dangkate leh dangka-engte in ahausa mahmah hi. Negev a kipan Bethel tan in apai zel a, Bethel leh Ai khua kikal atung a, achil a apuanin akaihna mun tanpha, maitam adoh masakna mun mah ah Abram in Toupa min alou hi. Lot leng Abram kiang a pai in, belamhonte, bawnghonte leh puaninte anei hi. A-omkhawmna ding un gam akichingta kei a; avan neih uh atam mahmah ziak in, a-omkhawm thei nawnta kei uhi. Abram ganpute leh Lot ganpute kikal ah kiselna ahong omta a; huai lai in huai gam ah Kanaante leh Perizte ateng uhi. Abram in Lot kiang ah, “Hehpih in, nang leh kei kikal ah, na ganpute leh ka ganpute kikal ah leng kiselna om kei hen; unau lah i hi ngal a,” achi hi. “Gam pumpi na ma ah a-om kei a hia? Hehpih in ka kiang a kipan tuam om mai in. Nang veilam a na paileh, kei taklam ah ka pai ding, ahihkeileh, nang taklam a na paileh, kei veilam ah ka pai ding,” achi hi. Lot adak a, Zoar kholam zuan in, Jordan Phaizang tengteng, Toupa huan bang ahihkeileh Aigupta gam bang in, gam chih a tui tampi omna ahi chih athei hi: Toupa'n Sodom leh Gomorrah ahihsiat ma lah ahi ngal a. Lot in Jordan Phaizang tengteng atelta hi. Suahlam ah Lot akisuan a; huchi in akikhenta uhi. Kanaan gam ah Abram ateng a, phaizang khopite ah Lot ateng a, Sodom khua pha in apuanin akai hi. Abram Leh Lot Kikhenna Akiang a kipan Lot a-om tuam nung in, Toupa'n Abram kiang ah, “Dak inla, na omna a kipan mallam, simlam, suahlam leh tumlam en in.

Na gam muh tengteng na kiang ah leh na suante kiang ah tangtawn a ding in ka hon pe ding. Na suante lei a leivui bang in ka bawl ding hi. Mi'n lei a leivui asim seng uleh, na suante leng sim seng ahi ding uh. Thou inla, gam dung leh vai palsuak in; na kiang a hon pe ding ka hi,” achi hi. Abram in apuanin asuan a, Hebron a om Mamre tosaw kiang ah atengta a, huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh hi.

Huan Shinar kumpipa Amraphel, Ellasar kumpipa Ariok, Elam kumpipa Kedorla-omer, Goiim kumpipa Tidal dam lai in hichi ahong hi a; amau Sodom kumpipa Bera asim uhi. Gomorrah kumpipa Birsha, Admah kumpipa Sinab, Zeboiim kumpipa Semeber, Bela kumpipa leng asim uhi, huai tuh Zoar ahi. Hiai tengteng Siddim Phaizang ah apang uh, huai tuh Chi Tuipi ahi. Kum sawm-le-nih sung Kedorla-omer nuai ah ana om ua, akum sawm-le-thumna in ahelta uhi. Akum sawm-le-lina ah Kedorla-omer leh akiang a kumpipa omte ahong ua, Asteroth-karnaim ah Rephaimte athat ua, Ham ah Zuzimte athat ua, Shaveh-kariathaim ah Emimte athat uh; a-omna Seir tang a El-paran gamdai zul a Horte omna tanpha in. Akik nawn ua, Enmishpat atung ua, huai ahihleh Kadesh ahi a, Amalekte gam a mi teng leh Amorte, Hazezon-tamar a tengte leng athat nawn uhi. Sodom kumpipa, Gomorrah kumpipa, Admah kumpipa, Zeboiim kumpipa leh Bela (huai Zoar kichi) kumpipa apawt ua, Siddim Phaizang ah amau sual ding in apangta uhi. Elam kumpipa Kedorla-omer, Goiim kumpipa Tidal, Shinar kumpipa Amraphelte, Ellasar kumpipa Ariok sual ding in, Kumpipa li in kumpipa nga asual uhi. Longnai khuk in Siddim Phaizang adim a; Sodom leh Gomorrah kumpipate ataikekna lam uah, khenkhatte huai ah akia ua, akeloute tang ah ataitou uhi. Sodom leh Gomorrah mite sum tengteng leh anek ding tengteng uh la in apaita uhi. Sodom a om Abram unaupa tapa, Lot leh aneih teng toh alaksak ua, apaita uhi. Huai a pan suakta mi khat ahong pai a, Hebru mi Abram ahilh a, amah Amor mi Mamre tosaw kiang a teng ahi. Mamre ahihleh Eshkol leh Aner unaupih ahi a; huai mite Abram toh pangkhawm ahi uh. Abram In Lot Ahunkhia Zan in amau sual ding in amah leh asikhate akihawmzak ua, azou ua Hobah pha in adelh uh

Hobah bel Damaskas mallam a om ahi. Thil tengteng alakik nawn vek a, a-unaupa Lot leh aneih tengteng ban ah midang tengteng toh, numeite leng ahon pi nawn hi.Melkizedek In Abram Avualzawl Kedorla-omer leh akiang a om kumpipate zou a, apaikik lam in Shaveh Phaizang (huai Kumpipa Phaizang kichi) ah Abram dawn ding in Sodom kumpipa ahohsuk hi. Salem kumpipa Melkizedek in tanghou leh uain ahon tawi a; amah Pathian Tungnungpen siampu ahi. Ama'n Abram avualzawl a, “Lei leh van neipa, Pathian Tungnungpen, Abram vualzawl in om hen. Na melmate na khut a hon pepa, Pathian Tungnungpen phat in om hen,” achi hi. Abram in amah bangkim a sawm-a-khat apia hi. Sodom kumpipa'n Abram kiang ah, “Mite hon pia inla, thilte zaw nang kineih in,” achi hi. Abram in Sodom kumpipa kiang ah, “Lei leh van neipa, Toupa, Pathian Tungnungpen lam ah ka khut ka zakta hi. Khauzang khat lel leng, khedap khau khat lel leng, na neih himhim ka la kei ding, huchi lou in zaw, Abram, kei hauhsaksak ahi, na chi kha ding,” achi hi. “Tangvalte nekmang leh ka mi tonpihte tantuan kia lou zaw ka la kei ding, Aner, Eshkol leh Mamrete'n atantuan uh la uhen,” achi hi.

Huai thilte nung in, “Abram, lau ke'n, kei na phaw leh na kipahman thupitak ka hi,” chi in Abram kiang ah mengmuhna in Toupa thu ahong tung hi. Abram in, “Aw, Toupa Pathian, bang na hon pe dia, ta nei lou a ka om na mu a, ka goukempa lah Damaskas a Eliezer ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Abram mah in, “Ngai in, chi lah na hon suahsak kei a; en in, ka inn a piang pen mah ka gouluahpa hong hi ding ahi,” achi hi. “Ngai in, huai mi na gouluah ding ahi kei. Nangmah gil a hong gah ding ngei, na gouluah ahi zaw ding,” chi in akiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. Amah inpua ah apikhia a, “Van lam en inla, aksite na simtheihleh sim him in,” achi hi. Amah mah in akiang ah, “Na suante huchibang ahi ding uh,” achi hi. Ama'n Toupa agingta a, huchi in ama'n huai adiktatna in asehsakta hi. Akiang ah, “Hiai gam na luah ding a hon pe ding a Kaldaite khua Ur a kipan hon pikhia Toupa ka hi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Toupa Pathian aw, ka luah ding chih, bangchi in ka theithei dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, akiang ah, “Bawngla kum thum a upa, kelpi kum thum a upa, vakhu leh vapalnou hon la in,” achi hi. Huai teng ahon la a, alaitak ah aphelkhap chiat a, aphel khat, aphel khat lam doh in akoih chiat a; vasate bel aphelkhap kei hi. Sasial ne vasate'n saluangte tung abohsuk chiang un Abram in ana hawlkhe zel hi. Ni tum ding a akisak lai in, Abram a-ihmu hithit hi. Ngai in, amial a mial, thil mulkimhuai petmah in amah hon khuh hi.

Hiai thilte nung in Pathian in Abram kiang ah, “Na suante amau gam hilou ah mikhual in a-om ding ua, a-nna uh asepsak ding uh, chih teltak in thei in. Kum zali sung hihgentheih in a-om ding uh. A-nna uh asepsak nam uh ka vaihawmkhum ding hi. Huai khit chiang in thil tampi nei in ahong paikhe ding uh. Abram Toh Pathian Thukhun Himahleh, Amorte khelhnate akim nai louh ziak in, suan lina ah hiai ah ahong pai nawn ding uh,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni tum a, khua ahong mial in, ngai in, haltuina mei khu lunglung leh meisel kuang luahluah, huai sa kiphelkhapte kal a paipai ahong om hi. Huai ni mah in Toupa'n Abram toh thukhun bawl in, “Hiai gam, Aigupta lui a kipan lui lian, Euphrates Luipi pha in na suante kiang ah ka peta,” achi hi. Kente, Kenizte, Kadmonte, Hitte, Perizte, Rephate, Amorte, Kanaante, Girgaste leh Jebuste toh leng ka pe lai hi, chi in Abram toh thu akhungta hi.

Huan Abram zi, Sarai in ta aneihsak kei hi. Sarai in Aigupta mi sikhanu khat anei a, amin Hagar ahi. Sarai in Abram kiang ah, “Ngai dih ve, Toupa'n lah ta ka neih hon phal lou a; hehpih in ka sikhanu kithuahpih in. Amah a pan tate ka neih khakleh,” achi hi. Huchi in Abram in Sarai thu azuita hi. Kanaan gam a Abram kum sawm a-om nung in, Abram zi Sarai in asikhanu Aigupta mi api a, apasal Abram kiang ah azi ding in apia hi. Hagar athei a, huan agaita hi. Agai chih akitheihtak in, api asimmoh maimah hi. Sarai in Abram kiang ah, “Ka thil thuak amoh nang pua in. Ka sikhanu na kawi ding in ka hon pia a; agai chih akitheihtak in, hon simmoh maimah hi. Toupa'n nang leh kei kikal ngaihtuah hen,” achi hi. Abram in Sarai kiang ah, “Ngai in, na sikhanu na khut a om ahi, nang pha na sak bang in atung ah hih in,” achi hi. Sarai in ahihgentheih mahmah tak in ataimangsanta hi. Toupa angel in gamdai a tuikhuk kiang a, Shur zotna lampi a tuikhuk kiang ah ana mu hi. Akiang ah, “Hagar, Sarai sikhanu aw, koi a kipan hong pai a, koi a hoh dia kisa na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka pi Sarai kiang a kipan taimang ka hi,” achi hi. Toupa angel in akiang ah, “Na pi kiang ah kik nawn inla, athuthu in om in,” achi hi. Toupa angel in akiang ah, “Na suante sim seng louh khop hial a tam in ka pungsak ding,” achi nawn hi. Toupa angel mah in akiang ah, “Ngai in, nau na paita, tapa na nei ding a; Toupa'n na gimthuakna azak ziak in amin Ishmael na sak ding ahi. Amah gam-sabiltung bang ahi ding a

michih adou ding a, michih in leng amah adou ding uh. Asanggamte a kipan atuam ten ding,” achi nawn hi. Hagar in amah houpih Toupa min, “Nang muthei Pathian na hi,” chih asa hi. “Pathian mu a, hing lai ka hi maw?” achi ngal a. Huaiziak in huai tuikhuk Beer-lahai-roi sak ahita. Ngai in, huai Kadesh leh Bered kho kikal a om ahi. Hagar in Abram tapa aneihsak a; Abram in atapa, Hagar in aneihsak min Ishmael asata hi. Hagar Leh Ishmael

Abram kum sawmkua-le-kua a upa ahih in, Abram kiang ah Toupa akilak a, akiang ah, “Kei Pathian Bangkim hihthei ka hi; ka ma ah pai inla, hoihkim in om in. Nang toh i kal ah thu ka khung ding a, nakpitak in ka hon pungsak ding,” achi hi. Abram abokkhup a; Pathian in amah ahoupih hi. “Ngai in, ke'n zaw, na kiang ah ka thukhun ahi ka khun, nam tampite' Pa na hita ding. Na min leng Abram ahi nawnta kei ding a, na min Abraham ahi zawta ding; nam tampite' Pa ding a ka hon bawl tak ziak in. Nakpitak in ka hon chiphasak ding a, nang ah nam tampi ka bawl ding a, nang a kipan kumpipate ahong piangkhe ding uh. “Kei leh nang leh na suante, suan sawnsawnte tan in leng ka thukhun nang a ding leh na nung a na suante a ding a, a Pathian uh hi ding in, tangtawn thukhun ding in ka hihkip ding hi. Na kiang ah leh na nung a na suante kiang ah mikhual na hihna gam, Kanaan gam tengteng, tangtawn gou ding un ka hon pe ding, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding,” achi hi. Pathian mah in Abraham kiang ah, “Nang ka thukhun na zui ding ahi. Na nung a na suante suan sawnsawnte tan in leng azui ding uhi. Hiai kei leh nang leh na suante kal a ka thukhun na zuih ding uh ahi. Na lak ua pasal peuhmah in zek asum ding ahi. Na zekvun sa uh na sum ding ua, huai tuh nang toh i kal a thukhun chiamtehna ahi ding hi.

Na lak ua kuapeuh ni giat a upa, na suan sawnsawn tan un leng, na suan hi chitchiat lou leng na inn a piang hiam, mikhual kuapeuh a kipan dangka sum a na lei hiam leng, pasal peuhmah zek sum ding ahi. Na inn a piang leh na dangka sum a na leite leng zeksum ngeingei ding ahi. Ka thukhun tangtawn thukhun ding in na sa ah a-omta ding hi. Pasal zeksum louh leh azekvun sa a zeksum a om lou, achipihte lak a kipan satkhiak ahi ding; ama'n ka thukhun hihsia ahi,” achi nawn hi. Pathian mah in, Abraham kiang ah, “Na zi Sarai, amin Sarai na chi nawnta kei ding a, amin Sarah ahi zawta ding hi. Amah ka vualzawl ding a, huai lou leng amah ah tapa ka hon pe ding. Ahi, amah ka vualzawl ding a, namte nu ahita ding. Amah a kipan nam tuamtuam kumpipate ahong om ding uh,” achi hi. Thukhun Chiamtehna Zeksum Abraham mah in Pathian kiang ah, “Na ma ah Ishmael om thei maileh aw,” achi hi. Pathian in, “Hilou e, na zi Sarah in tapa ahon neihsak taktak ding a; amin Isak na sak ding ahi. Ka thukhun, anung a asuante a ding in tangtawn thukhun ding in akiang ah ka hihkip ding. Ishmael tungthu leng ka hon ngaihkhiaksak hi. Ngai in, amah ka vualzawlta a, chi tampi ka suangsak ding hi. Nakpitak in leng ka pungsak ding a, ama'n vaihawmmi sawm-le-nih asuang ding a, amah chi thupitak in ka bawl ding hi. Himahleh ka thukhun, Sarah in kum nawn hichi hun a ahon neihsak ding Isak kiang ah ahi ka hihkip ding,” achi hi. Akiang a thugen azoh in, Pathian in Abraham apaitouh santa hi.

Abraham in atapa Ishmael leh a-inn a piang tengteng leh dangka sum a alei tengteng, Abraham inkuante lak a pasal peuhmah api a, Pathian in akiang a agen bang in, huai ni mah in azekvun uh asumsak chiat hi. Abraham zekvun asum lai in kum sawmkua-le-kua a upa ahi. Atapa Ishmael azekvun asum lai un kum sawm-le-thum a upa ahi. Huai ni mah in Abraham leh atapa Ishmael zeksum ahita uh. A-inkuanpihte lak a pasal tengteng, a-inn a piangte leh mikhual a kipan dangka sum a aleite leng, amah toh zeksum ahi vekta uhi.

Huan sun nisat laitak a puanin kongkhak bul a Abraham atut lai in, Mamre a tosaw kiang ah Toupa ahong kilak hi. Abraham dak in a-en a, ngai in, akiang ah mi thum ana dingh uhi. Amuhtak in puanin kongkhak a kipan amaute tuak ding in ava tai a, lei lam ah akunsuk hi. “Ka toupa na deihsakna ka tan theihleh hehpih in na sikha hon paikheng mahmah ke'n. Tui tawmchik bek hon la uhenla, na khete uh sil unla, sing nuai ah khawl tadih un. Tanghou tawmchik bek ka va la ding a, na lungtang uh halhsak un. Huai khit chiang in na pai zom zel na ding uh. Huai ding a na sikha kiang a hong pai na hi peuhmah ding uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Na chih bang in va hih in,” achi uhi. Puanin sung a Sarah kiang ah Abraham ava lut pah a, “Tangbuang nel mahmah tehna thum bawl in, mek inla, tanghou pei in bawl in,” achi hi. Ganhon lam ah Abraham atai a, bawngnou hoihtak ava man a, asikha kiang ah apia a, ama'n abawl mengmeng hi. Nawituidat, nawitui leh bawngnou sa kibawl ala a, ama uah ava luita hi. Amau anek sung teng uh, sing nuai ah akiang uah adingh nilouh hi. Amau akiang ah, “Na zi Sarah koi a om ahia?” achi ua, “Ama'n pam a puanin ah,” achi hi. Amaute'n, “Hun ahong chin nawn peuhpeuh chiang in na kiang ah ka hong nawn ngeingei ding uh. Ngai in, na zi Sarah in tapa anei ding,” achi hi. Anung a puanin kongkhak bul a kipan Sarah in ana za hi. Abraham leh Sarah upapi, tektak ahita ua; numei dan ngeina Sarah ah akam khin thamta hi.

Sarah in tektak ka hih nung in nopsakna ka nei thei lai diam maw, ka toupa lah a-upata ngal a? chi in alungsim in anui hi. Toupa'n Abraham kiang ah, “Bang achia Sarah in, kei pitek in ta ka nei thei lai diam maw, chi a nui ahia? Toupa a ding in thil himhim haksa lua a-om a hia? Hun seh ahong tun chiang in, na kiang ah ka hong nawn ding a, Sarah in tapa anei ding,” achi hi. Sarah in alauh ziak in, “Ka nui kei,” chi in anial hi. Ama'n, “Zuau ahi, na nui tawk ve,” achi hi.Sodom A Ding In Abraham Athum Huai a kipan mite adingh ua, Sodom kholam a-en ua, amaute khakhe ding in akiang uah Abraham apai hi. Toupa'n, “Ka thilhih ding Abraham ka iim diam aw; Abraham Tapa Piak Ding Chiamna Anung a atate leh a-inkuanpihte'n diktatna leh thudik a Toupa lampi zui a, vaihawmna ding thu apiaktheihna ding in amah ka septa a; huchi a atungthu genpa Toupa'n Abraham tung a atunsak theihna ding in,” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Sodom leh Gomorrah kalh a kikou thawmging anasa a, agitlouh mahmah ziak un. Tu in ka hohsuk ding a, akikou ging uh ka kiang a hong tung bangbang in ahih uhia, hih lou, ka en ding a, ahih kei uleh ka thei mai ding,” achi hi. Huai a kipan mite akihei ua, Sodom kholam azuanta uhi. Abraham bel Toupa ma ah adingh lai hi. Abraham in ava naih a, “Mikhialte lak a midiktatte hihmangkhawm tel ding na hi maw? Khosung ah midiktat sawmnga bek a-om kha ding uh e. Asung a midiktat sawmnga omte ziak in akhua hawi lou in na hihmang ding maw?

Nang hial in zaw migiloute bang a midiktatte a-om samna ding ua migiloute lak a midiktatte hihlup zaw na hih tel kei ding hi. Leitung pumpi Vaihawmpa in diktattak in ahih kei dia hia?” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Sodom a midiktat sawmnga ka muhleh amau ziak in akho pumpi ka hawi ding,” achi hi. Abraham in, “Ngai in, kei leivui leh meivu lel in Toupa ka hon houpih thei hi. Midiktat nga in sawmnga chingzou lou ahi kha ding e; nga achin louh ziak in kho pumpi na hihmang ding maw? chi in adawng hi. Ama'n sawmli-le-nga ka muhleh ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi. Ama'n amah ahoupih zel a, “Huai ah sawmli kia na mu ahi kha ding e,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sawmli ziak in leng ka hihmang dah mai ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Toupa aw, heh ke'n, ka hon gen nawn lai ding. Huai ah sawmthum lel na mu ahi kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Huai a sawmthum leng ka muhleh ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ngai in, Toupa ka hon houpih theita a, huai ah sawmnih kia na mu ahi kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sawmnih ziak in leng ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Toupa aw, heh ke'n, khatvei kia ka hon gen lai ding. Huai ah sawm kia na mu ahi kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sawm ziak in leng ka hihmang kei ding,” achi hi. Abraham toh akihou khit un Toupa apaita a; Abraham leng amun ah akik nawnta hi.

Huan angel nih in nitaklam in Sodom khua aphasuk ua, Sodom khokulh kongkhak ah Lot ana tu hi. Lot in amaute ana mu a, va tuak ding in adingh a, amai a lei si in chibai abuk a, “Ngai un, ka toupate aw, hehpih in na sikha inn ah hong lut phot unla, giak unla, na khete uh sil un. Na thou baih ding ua, na pai nawn na ding uh,” achi hi. Huan amau, “Hilou e, kholak ah ka giak zaw ding uh,” achi uhi. Himahleh ama'n nakpitak in akun a; akiang ah api a, huchi in a-inn ah alutta uhi. Ama'n meh abawlsak a, tanghou silngou soh louh akang a, aneta uhi. Alup ma un khopi a mite, Sodom khomite, veng teng a mi tengteng, atek-akhang in a-inn ava umkimvel uhi. Lot kiang ah, “Tuzan a na inn a hong lut mite koi a om uh ahia? Amau ka kithuahpih theihna ding un ka kiang uah hon pikhia in,” ahong chi uhi. Kongkhak bul ah akiang uah Lot ava pawt a, kongkhak akhak hi. “Ka unaute aw, hehpih in, hichi tel in gilou dah un. Ngai un, pasal' kithuahpih ngei nai louh tanu nih ka nei hi. Hon hehpih unla, na kiang uah amaute ka hon pikhe ding a, hoih na sak bang un, atung uah na hih na ding uh. Hiai mite tung ah zaw bangmah hih mahmah kei un. Hiai ding a ka insung a hong lut lah ahi ngal ua,” achi hi. Amau, “Hon hon mai in,” achi uhi. Amau mah in, “Hiai mi sop lai hiai a teng ding in ahong pem lut a, vaihawmpa a om maw atup vial. Tu'n amaute tung a hih sang in nang tung ah ka hihse zaw sem ding uh,” achi uhi.

Lot abohta ua, kongkhak hihse ding in hon naih uhi. Himahleh mite'n akhut uh agolhkhia ua, akiang uah insung ah Lot akailut ua, kongkhak akhak bikbek uhi. Kongkhak bul a mite, aneu-alian mit atawsak ua, huchi in kongkhak amuzouta kei uh.Lot In Sodom Apawtsan Mite'n Lot kiang ah, “Hiai mite lou hiai ah inkuanpih dang na nei hia? Na makpate, na tapate, na tanute leh khosung a na neih peuhmahte khua a kipan pikhia in. Toupa ma a, akikou husa uh anasat luat tak ziak in hiai khua hihmang ding ka hi uh. Hihmang ding in Toupa'n hon sawl ahi,” achi uhi. Lot apaikhia a, atanute kitenpih, amakpate kiang ah ava gen hi. “Thou unla, hiai khua a kipan pawtkhia un, Toupa'n khua hihmang ding ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh amakpate ngaih in chiamnuih thu gen bang lel ahi. Phalvak in angelte'n, “Thou inla, na zi leh hiai a na tanu nih omte pikhia in. Huchi lou in zaw hiai khua gawtna ah na mangkhawm kha ding uh,” chi in Lot anohta uhi. Himahleh a-awltat mahmah lai a, Toupa'n amah ahehpih ziak in, mite'n ama khut leh azi khut leh atanu nihte khutte manbet in apikhia ua, kho polam ah akoihta uhi. Huan polam a apikhiak khit un, khat in akiang ah, “Na hinna ding in taikhia in; na nunglam nga ke'nla, phaizang himhim ah leng khawl ke'n. Huai tang sang ah suahtak san in, huchi lou in zaw na mangkhawm kha ding hi,” achi hi. Himahleh Lot in akiang uah, “Ka toupate aw, huai zaw hi kei hen. Sodom Mite Khelhdan Ngai in, hiai khua taina ding in anaipen a, kho neuchik leng ahi. Aw, huai ah, kho neuchik ahi kei a hia! Hon taisak zaw in, huchi in ka hing ding hi,” achi hi.

Ama'n, akiang ah, “Ngai in, hiai thil tungtang ah leng ka hon mang, na kho gen ka hihmang dah ding. Kin inla, huai ah tai in. Huai mun na tun mateng lah bangmah ka hihthei ngal kei a,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai kho min Zoar chih in a-omta hi.Sodom Leh Gomorrah Hihsiatna Zoar a Lot atun in leitung ah ni asuak khinta hi. Toupa'n Sodom leh Gomorrah kho tung ah van a Toupa kiang a kipan mei leh kaat azusak hi. Huai khuate, phaizang tengteng, khua a mite tengteng leh leitung a thilpoute tengteng ahihmang vekta hi. Himahleh Lot nung ah azi in nunglam a-en a, huchi in chikhuam ahong suakta hi. Toupa ma a adinna mun ah beltak in Abraham ahohtou hi. Sodom leh Gomorrah kholam leh phaizang gam lam tengteng a-en hi. Ngai in, huai gam a meikhu, haltuina meikhu bang mai in akhutou ngoingoi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian in phaizang khopite, Lot tenna mun ngei ahihman lai in, Pathian in Abraham atheigige a, manthatna lak a pan Lot asawlkhia hi.Moabte Leh Ammonte Kipatna Zoar a kipan Lot apaitou a, tang ah ateng a, atanu nihte leng akiang ah ateng uhi. Zoar ah lah ateng ngam kei a, amah leh atanu nihte kohawm ah atengta uhi. Huchi in atanu upazaw in anauzaw kiang ah, “I pa a-upata a, leitung tengteng dan bang a hon kithuahpih ding lei ah pasal khat leng a-om nawn kei hi. Kisa in, i pa uain i dawnsak ding a, huchi a i pa chisuan bei lou a i bawltheihna ding in akiang ah i va lum ding,” achi hi. Huai zan in apa uh uain adawnsakta uhi. A-upazaw alut a, apa kiang ah ava lum a

ama'n alup lam ana phawk kei a, athoh lam leng aphawk kei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, azing in a-upazaw in anaupangzaw kiang ah, “Ngai in, zan in ka pa kiang ah ka va lum a; tuzan in leng uain i dawnsak nawn ding a; nang va lut inla, huchi a i pa chisuan bei lou a i bawltheihna ding in akiang ah va lum in,” achi hi. Huai zan in leng apa uh uain adawnsak nawn ua; anaupangzaw athou a, akiang ah ava lumta hi. Ama'n alup lam aphawk kei a, athoh lam leng aphawk kei hi. Huchibang in Lot tanu nihte'n apa ua pan nau apai tuak uhi. A-upazaw in tapa anei a, amin Moab asa a, huai mi tulai a Moabte suangpa ahi. Anaupangzaw in leng tapa anei a, amin Ben-ammi asa a, huai mi tulai a Ammonte suangpa ahi.

Huai a kipan Negeb gam lam zuan in Abraham akisuan a, Kadesh leh Shur kho kikal ah ateng a, Gerar ah hun bang tan hiam a-om tadih hi. Abraham in azi Sarah, “Ka sanggamnu ahi,” achi hi. Gerar kumpipa Abimelek in mi asawl a, Sarah ava pisak hi. Himahleh, zan in amanglam in Abimelek kiang ah Pathian ahong kilak a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na numei pi ziak in misi leltak na hita, amah lah mi zi ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Abimelek in anaih nai tadih kei hi, “Toupa, nam diktat na that hial dia hia?” Amah mah in ka kiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu ahi,” chi in; amah ngei in leng ka sanggampa ahi, achih behlap ngal a. “Lungtang hoihtak pu leh khut siangthoutak nei kawm a hiai bang ka hih ahi,” achi hi. Pathian in amang in, “Ahi, hiai lungtang hoihtak pu kawm a na hih ahi chih ka thei, ke'n leng ka tung a na khelh ding ka hon kham hi. Huaiziak in amah na khoih ka phal louh ahi. Tu in huai mi zi pekik in; amah lah zawlnei ahi ngal a. Ahon thumsak ding a, na dam ding. Na piakkik keileh, na si ngeingei ding chih thei in; nang leh na neih tengteng toh,” achi hi. Abimelek beltak in athou a, asikha tengteng asam a, azak ding un huai thu tengteng ahilh a, mite'n alau mahmah uhi. Abimelek in Abraham asam a, akiang ah, “Ka tung ua na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Bang lam ah ahia na tung a ka khelh a, kei leh ka lalgam tung a thil gilou thupitak na hon tut? Thil hih tuak louhtak ka tung ah na hihta,” achi hi. Abimelek mah in Abraham kiang ah, “Bang na mu a, hichibang a thil hih na maizen a?” achi nawn hi.

Abraham in, “Hiai khua a Pathian launa himhim om lou a, ka zi ziak in ahon that mai ding uh, chih ka ngaihtuah ziak a hiai bang a na gamtang mah ka hi. Huai lou in ka sanggamnu leng ahi him a, ka pa tanu ahi a, ka nu tanu bel ahi kei. Himahleh amah ka zi ahong hita hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian in ka pa inn a kipan ahon vakvaihsak lai in akiang ah, ‘Hiai na hehpihna ka tung a na lahsak ding ahi. Ka tunna peuh uah, ka sanggampa ahi hon chi zel in’ ka chi him hi,” achi hi. Abimelek in belamte, bawngtalte, sikhapate leh sikhanute pi in Abraham kiang ah apia a, azi Sarah leng apekikta hi. Abimelek in, “En in, na ma ah ka gam zapi a-om, na utna peuh ah teng in,” achi hi. Sarah kiang ah, “En in, na sanggampa dangka sangkhat ka peta hi. Ngai in, na kiang a om tengteng leh nangmah a ding in amah na mit khuhna ahi ding. Hiai bang in amah taihilh in a-om hi.” Pathian kiang ah Abraham athum a, Pathian in Abimelek leh azi leh asikhanute adamsak nawn a, huchi in tate aneita uhi. Abraham zi Sarah ziak in Toupa'n Abimelek inkuante tengteng achiingsak vek ngal a. Abraham Leh Abimelek

Huan Toupa'n agensa bang in Sarah ava veh a, achiamsa bang in Sarah tung ah Toupa'n ahihta hi. Sarah agai a, Pathian in akiang a agen hun seh bang in, atek nung in Abraham tapa aneihsakta hi. Abraham in Sarah in aneihsak atapa min Isak asa hi. Abraham in Pathian in akiang a thu apiak bang in atapa Isak ni giat achin in azek asumsak hi. Atapa Isak apian lai in Abraham kum zakhat a upa ahita. Sarah in, “Pathian in hon nuisakta; aza kha peuhmah in hon nuihpih ding uh,” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Sarah in naungekte apom ding, chih kua'n ahia Abraham kiang a gen thei ding? Atek nung in tapa ka neihsakta,” achi hi. Naungek ahong khanglian a, nawinek atawpsakta uh. Isak nawinek atawpsak ni un, Abraham in ankuang thupitak alui hi.Hagar Leh Ishmael Sawlkhiakna Aigupta mi Hagar tapa, Abraham a ding a aneihsak pen in Isak asimmohbawl lai Sarah in amu hi. Huaiziak in Abraham kiang ah, “Hiai sikhanu leh atapa delhkhia in. Hiai sikhanu tapa in ka tapa Isak gou aluahpih thei kei ding,” achi hi. Hiai thu atapa mah toh kisai ahih ziak in Abraham ngaih in thil hoih loutak ahi. Himahleh Pathian in Abraham kiang ah, “Naupang tungtang thu leh na sikhanu tungtang thu na ngaih in thil hoih lou hi kei hen. Sarah in na kiang a thu agen tengteng zui in, Isak ah na suante kisim ding chih ahi ngal a, Sikhanu tapa ah leng, na suan ahih ziak in, nam chih tham ngial ka bawl ding,” achi hi. Beltak in Abraham athou a, tanghou leh tuithawl, tui a dim ala a, Hagar kiang a pia in, aliangkou ah asuan a, naupang toh asawlkhia hi. Apai a, Beer-sheba gamdai ah avakvakta hi.

Tuithawl a tui ahong beitak in, sawlbawk lim nuai khat ah naupang akoihta mai hi. “Naupang si ding ka en ngam kei,” achih ziak in gamla kuam, thal kap phakna ding ah, ava pai a, amazawn a tu in ngaihtak in akapta hi. Pathian in naupang aw aza a; Pathian angel in van a kipan Hagar asam a, akiang ah, “Bangchi na hia, Hagar? Lau ke'n, a-omna a naupang aw Pathian in aza hi. Thou inla, naupang phong in, na khut in len in, amah nam thupitak a bawl ding ka hi,” achi hi. Pathian in amit ahihvaksak a, huan tuileh amuta hi. Huai ah ava pai a, tuithawl dim in tui adim a, naupang adawnsak hi. Naupang kiang ah Pathian a-om a, ahong khanglian a; gamdai ah ateng zel a, thalkapmi ahong hita hi. Isak Pianna Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in Abimelek leh asepaih pawl a heutu Phikol in Abraham kiang ah, “Na thilhih peuh ah na kiang ah Pathian a-om. Tu in hiai ah Pathian min lou inla, kei leh ka tapa leh ka tapa' tapa leng khem lou in, ka hon hehpih khit tak sa bang in kei leh na tenna gam hehpih thuk sam ding in ka kiang ah kichiam in,” achi hi. Abraham in, “Ka kichiam ding,” achi hi. Abimelek sikhate'n tuileh asuhsak ziak un Abraham in Abimelek asal hi. Abimelek in, “Hiai thilhih pen kua ahia, ka thei himhim kei. Nang lah na hon hilh ngal kei a, tuni ngal lou in ka za kha himhim kei,” achi hi. Abraham in belamte leh bawngtalte api a, Abimelek kiang ah apia a; anih un thu akhungta uhi. Abraham in abelamhon lak a belamnou anu sagih akoihtuam hi.

Abimelek in Abraham kiang ah, “Belamnou anu sagih atuam a na koih bang na chihna ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai tuileh keimah leh ahi, chih na hon theihpihna ding in hiai belamnou anu sagih ka khut a kipan na lak ding ahi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai mun Beer-sheba asa hi; huai a anih ua akichiam ziak un. Beer-sheba ah thu akhungta uh. Abimelek athou a, asepaih pawl heutu Philok toh Philistiate gam ah apai nawnta uhi. Abraham in Beer-sheba ah meilah sing asuan a, huai ah Toupa, Tangtawn Pathian min alou hi. Philistiate gam ah Abraham sawtpi ataam hi.

Huai thilte nung in Pathian in Abraham a-enchian hi. Akiang ah, “Abraham,” achi a; ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na tapa, na tapa neihsun, na ittak, Isak tonpih inla, Moriah gam ah pai in, huai ah ka hon hilh ding tang khat ah halmang thillat in amah lan in,” achi hi. Beltak in Abraham athou a, sabiltung abawl a, akiang ah atapa Isak toh sikha tangval nih atonpih hi. Haltum thillat a ding in sing a-ek a, athou a, Pathian in ahilhna mun lam ah apaita hi. Ani thum ni in Abraham adak a, amun gamlapi a om amu hi. Abraham in asikha tangvalte kiang ah, “Hiai ah sabiltung toh ana om un. Kei leh naupang huai pam ah ka va hoh ding ua; huai ah Pathian ka va be ding ua; na kiang uah ka hong kik nawn ding uh,” achi hi. Abraham in halmang thillatna ding sing ala a, atapa Isak aposak hi. Ama'n mei leh temta atawi a; anih un apaikhawm uhi. Isak in apa Abraham ahoupih a, “Pa,” achi a, ama'n, “Bawi, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n, “En dih, mei leh sing a-om a; hileh leng halmang thillat ding belamnou lah koi ah?” achi hi. Abraham in, “Bawi, Pathian in amah a dia halmang thillat ding belamnou angaihtuah tawm ding hi,” achi a; anih un apaikhawm zel uhi. Pathian in ahilhna mun ava tungta ua, Abraham in huai ah maitam adoh a, sing chiangkhawm in, atapa Isak ahen a, maitam a sing tung ah alumsak hi. Abraham in akhut alik a, atapa thahna ding temta ala hi. Toupa angel in van a kipan amah asam a, “Abraham, Abraham,” achi a, ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Naupang tung ah na khut kha ke'n. Amah bangmah loh ke'n.

Na tapa, na neihsun mahmah leng kei a dia na it louh ziak in Pathian na lau chih tu in ka theita,” achi hi. Abraham adak a, a-en a, ngai in, anunglam ah belampa, singbawk a akii awk ana om hi. Abraham in huai belampa ava man a, atapa sik in halmang thillat in alan zawta hi. Abraham in huai mun min, “Jehovah Jireh,” asa hi; tuni tan a, “Toupa tang ah ngaihtuah hi na ve,” achih zel bang un. Toupa angel in anihveina ding in van a kipan Abraham asam nawn hi. “Hiai thil na hih ziak leh na tapa neihsun na it louh ziak in kei mahmah in ka kichiam hi. K'on vualzawl ngeingei ding a, van a aksite zah leh tuipi piau a piaunel zah in na suante ka pungsak ngeingei ding. Na suante'n adoute uh kulh kongkhak atang ding uhi. Ka thu na man ziak in na suan ah leitung a nam chih vualzawl in a-om ding uh,” achi hi. Asikha tangvalte kiang ah Abraham akik nawn a, athou ua, Beer-sheba lam manoh in apai uhi. Beer-sheba ah Abraham ateng hi.Nahor Suante Hichi in huai thilte nung in Abraham kiang ah, “Ngai in, Milkah in leng na sanggampa Nahor tate aneihsakta ve,” chi in Abraham ahilh uhi. Ata masa Huz ahi a; asanggampa Buz ahi, Aram pa Kemuel; Isak Lan Ding In Pathian In Abraham Thu Apia Bethuel in tanu Rebekah anei a; huai giatte Milkah in Abraham nau Nahor aneihsakte ahi uh. Amei, amin Reumah in leng Tebah, Gaham, Thahash leh Maakah anei hi.

Sarah damsung kum zakhat sawmnih-le-sagih ahi. Hiaite Sarah damsung kumte ahi uh. Kanaan gam a Kiriath-arba, Hebron kichi ah Sarah asi a, Sarah suun ding leh kah ding in Abraham ahong hi. Amisi luang ma a kipan Abraham adingtou a, Heth suante kiang ah, “Na lak uah mikhual leh khualtam lel ka hi a; ka misi luang muh louh dia ka vuitheihna ding in vuina mun hon pia un,” chi in angen hi. Heth suante'n Abraham adawng ua, akiang ah, “Ka toupa, hon ngaikhia in, nang ka lak ua vaihawm thupitak na hi a; ka hante uh lak a na deihna penpen ah na misi vui in. Na misi na vuina ding in ka lak uah kuamah in ka han uh hon piak ka it kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Huai gam mite leh Heth suante ma ah Abraham dingtou in akun hi. “Ka misi ka muh louh dia ka vui pha na sak uleh, hon ngaikhia unla, Zohar tapa Ephron kiang ah hon ngetsak un. Alou taw a om, aneih, Makpelah kokhuk hon pe ding in, na lak ua vuina mun ding ama'n hun asak zahzah la henla, hon pia hen,” achi hi. Heth suante lak ah Ephron atu a; Heth mi Ephron in Heth suante theih in akhokulh kong a lut peuhmah nangawn theih in Abraham adawng a, “Hilou e, ka toupa, hon ngaikhia in. Lou leh asung a om kokhuk leng ka hon pia hi. Ka chipihte tapate mitmuh in ka hon pia hi. Na misi vui in,” chi in. Huchi in huai gam mite ma ah Abraham akun hi. Huai gam mite theih in Ephron kiang ah, “Pha na sakleh hehpih in hon ngaikhia in

lou man ka hon pe ding, kei a kipan la in, huai mun kia ah ka misi ka vui ding,” achi hi. Ephron in Abraham adawng a, akiang ah, “Ka toupa, hon ngaikhia in. Lei mun dangka shekel zali ahi a, huai zaw, nang leh kei a ding in gen tham ahi a hia? Na misi vui mai in,” achi hi. Abraham in Ephron thu azuita a; Heth suante theih in Ephron in agen zah, dangka shekel zali, sumsinte zat zel abuk a, Ephron kiang ah apeta hi. Ephron lou, Mamre toh kizawn Makpelah gam a om, alou toh, asung a kokhuk om toh, lou a sing om tengteng toh, alou kim a sing om tengteng toh, Heth suante mitmuh in, akhokulh kong a om peuhmahte muh in, gou ding in Abraham kiang ah piakkip in a-omta hi. Huai nung in Kanaan gam a Mamre toh kizawn, Hebron kichihna, Makpelah lou a kokhuk ah Abraham in azi Sarah avuita hi. Lou leh asung a kokhuk om vuina mun ding in Abraham kiang ah Heth suante'n apekipta uhi. Sarah Sihna Leh Abraham In Han Aleina

Abraham upa in ahong tek mahmahta a, Toupa'n thil bangkim ah Abraham avualzawl hi. Abraham in asikha, a-inn a upapen, aneih tengteng tung a thuneipa kiang ah, “Hehpih in ka pheipi nuai ah na khut golh in, Toupa, van Pathian leh lei Pathian min lou in, ka tenna Kanaan mite nungak lak a mi ka tapa zi ding a neihsak lou ding in, ka hon kichiamsak ding. Ka gam lam a ka tanaute kiang ah hoh inla, ka tapa Isak zi na pisak ding ahi,” achi hi. Sikha in akiang ah, “Numei in hiai gam lam ah hon zui nuam kei taleh, na tapa na hong pawtna gam a pikik nawn ding ka hi diam?” achi hi. Abraham in akiang ah, “Huai a ka tapa pikik nawn lou ding in pilvang in. Toupa, van Pathian, ka pa inn a kipan leh ka pianna gam a kipan hon pikhepa leh hon houpihpa leh hiai gam na suante kiang ah ka pe ding, chi a ka kiang a kichiampa'n, amah ngei in na ma ah a-angel apaisak ding a, huai a kipan ka tapa zi na pisak ding ahi. Numei in hon zuih nop keileh, ka kiang a na kichiamna thu ah na siang ding. Akoi abang hitaleh, huai ah zaw ka tapa na pikik nawn ding ahi kei,” achi hi. Sikha in apu Abraham pheipi nuai ah akhut agolh a, akiang ah huai thu ah akichiamta hi. Sikha in apu sangawngsaute lak ah sangawngsau sawm akai a, apu thil hoih chiteng tawi in, apawtkheta hi. Athou a, Mesopotamia gam a Nahor khopi lam ah akipankheta hi. Nitaklam a tui tawi dia numeite akuan hun laitak un, dainawl a tuileh kiang ah asangawngsaute akhukdinsak hi.

“Aw Toupa, ka pu Abraham' Pathian, hehpih in tuni in hon lohchingsak in, ka pu Abraham tung ah hehpihna langsak in. En in, tuikhuk kiang ah ka dingh a, khua a mite tanute tui tawi ding in ahong kuan uhi. Huan hichi hi henla, nungak kuapeuh kiang a, ‘Hehpih in ka dawn ding in na tuibel niamsak dih ve, ka chih a, ama'n, ‘Dawn in, na sangawngsaute leng dawn ding ka pe ding, chi peuhmah, huai mi ngei na sikha Isak zi ding a na miseh hi hen. Hiai ah ka pu tung ah hehpihna na langsak, chih ka thei ding,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, agen khit ma in, ngai in, Abraham nau Nahor zi Milkah tapa Bethuel tanu Rebekah, aliangzang a tuibel pua in ahong kuan hi. Huai nungak amel hoih mahmah, nungak siangthou ahi a, pasal himhim akithuahpih ngei kei hi. Tuikhuk ah apaisuk a, atuibel adimsak a, apaitou nawn hi. Amah tuak ding in sikhapa atai a, “Hehpih in na tuibel a tui tawmchik hon dawnsak dih ve,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Dawn in, ka toupa,” achi a; kintak in akhut in atuibel adomkhesuk a, adawnsak hi. Adawn nung in, “Na sangawngsaute a ding leng, adawnkham masiah uh ka tawi ding,” achi hi. Kintak in gankuang ah atuibel atei a, tui tawi ding in tuileh lam ah atai nawn a, asangawngsau tengteng a ding leng atawisak hi. Sikha in alohchingsak leh sak louh theihna ding in adai dide hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, sangawngsaute'n adawnkhamtak un, sikha in dangka-eng bilbah shekel kimkhat a gik leh akhut a ding dangka-eng tau nih shekel sawm a gik asuahkhia hi. Akiang ah, “Kua tanu na hia? Hehpih in hon hilh in. Na pa inn ah ka giahna ding uh mun a-om diam?” achi hi.

Isak Zineihna Amah mah in akiang ah, “Buhpawl leh gan an ka hau tuak ua, giahna mun leng ka nei uh,” achi hi. Sikha in alu akunsak a, Toupa abia hi. “Ka pu tung ngei a azahngaihna leh athutakna tawp ngei lou, Toupa, ka pu Abraham' Pathian phat in om hen. Kei leng, Toupa'n ka pu unaute inn lam a hon na pi ahi ve,” achi hi. Nungak atai a, huai thute anu inkuanpihte ava hilh hi. Rebekah in sanggam pasal anei a, amin Laban ahi. Laban apawtkhia a, tuikhuk lam ah huai mi kiang ah ava tai hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, bilbah leh asanggamnu khut a taute amu a, huai mi'n, “Huchi khachi in ahon chi,” chi a, asanggamnu Rebekah thugente azaktak in, huai mi kiang ah ahohta hi. Ngai in, amah tuikhuk ah sangawngsaute kiang ah ana dingh gige hi. Laban in, “Nang, Toupa vualzawlpa, hong inla, ka inn uah hong lut in. Bangziak a inpua a dingh nilouh? Inn leh mun sangawngsaute a ding in ka bawl khinta,” achi hi. Huchi in inn ah alut a, Laban in sangawngsau van aphel a; sangawngsaute a ding in buhpawl leh gan an apia a, akhe leh alawmte khe silna ding tui apia hi. Abraham sikha ma ah nek ding alui a; himahleh ama'n, “Ka hong hohna san thu ka gen mateng ka ne kei ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Gen ve le,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Kei Abraham sikha ka hi. Toupa'n ka pu nakpitak in avualzawl a, miliantak ahong hita. Toupa'n akiang ah belamhon, bawnghon, dangka, dangka-eng, sikhapate, sikhanute, sangawngsaute leh sabiltungte leng apia hi. Ka pu zi Sarah in tek nungpi in ka pu a ding in tapa aneihsak a; akiang ah aneih tengteng ape vek hi.

Ka pu in, ka tenna gam a Kanaante nungak lak a ka tapa zi ding a na neihsak ding ahi kei. Ka pa inn lam ah, ka tanaute kiang ah hoh inla, ka tapa zi na pisak zaw ding ahi, chi in ahon kichiamsak hi.” Ke'n ka pu kiang ah, “Numei in hon zui nuam kei kha ding,” ka chi hi. Ama'n, ka kiang ah, “Toupa ama a ka om zelnapa'n na kiang ah a-angel ahon sawl ding a; na hohna ding ah hon lohchingsak ding. Ka tapa a ding in ka tanaute leh ka pa inkote lak a zi na neisak ding ahi. Ka tanaute kiang ngei na tun chiang in, ka kiang a na kichiamna a kipan na siang ding. Nungak ahon piak kei uleh ka kiang a na kichiamna a kipan na siang ding,” achi hi. “Tuni in tuikhuk ka hong tung a, ‘Aw, Toupa, ka pu Abraham' Pathian, ka paina a na hon lohchinsak dingleh, en in, tuikhuk kiang ah ka dingh hi. Hichi hi henla, tui tawi ding a nungak hong kuan kuapeuh kiang a, ‘Hehpih in dawn ding na tuibel a tui tawmchik hon pia in, ka chih a, ama'n ka kiang a, ‘Dawn in, na sangawngsaute a ding leng ka tawi ding, chi peuhmah, huai mi ngeingei ka pu tapa a ding a Toupa numei seh hi hen, ka chi hi. Ka lungsim a ka gen khit ma in, ngai in, Rebekah, atuibel pua in ahong kuan a; tuikhuk ah apaisuk a; tui atawi a; akiang ah, ‘Hehpih in tui hon dawnsak dih ve, ka na chi hi. Ama'n kintak in aliangzang a kipan tuibel adomkhia a, ‘Dawn in, na sangawngsaute leng dawn ding ka pe ding, achi hi. Ka dawn a, sangawngsaute leng adawnsak hi.

Ke'n, ‘Kua tanu na hia? chi in ka dong a; ama'n, ‘Nahor tapa, Milkah in aneihsakpa Bethuel tanu ka hi, achi hi. Abil ah bilbah ka batsak a, taute leng akhut ah ka bunsak hi. “Ka lu ka kunsak a, Toupa ka bia a, Toupa, ka pu Abraham' Pathian, ka pu sanggampa tanu ngei, atapa a dia azi ding a pisak ding a lampi diktak a hon pipa ka phat hi. Tu in ka pu na hehpih ua, atung a chihtak pet a na hih ding uleh hon hilh un. Na hih kei ding uleh leng hon hilh un. Taklam hiam, veilam hiam, ka nga thei ding,” achi hi. Laban leh Bethuel in adawng ua, “Hiai thil Toupa a kipan a pawt ahi. Kou na kiang ah asia-apha bangmah ka gen thei kei uh. En in, na ma ah Rebekah a-om, pi inla, paipih in, Toupa'n agensa bang in na pu tapa zi ding in om hen,” achi uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Abraham sikha in athu uh azaktak in lei si in Toupa abia hi. Abraham sikha in dangka suang kizepnate, dangka-eng kizepnate leh silh-le-ten alakhia a, Rebekah apia a; asanggampa leh anu kiang ah leng thil manpha pipi apia hi. Amah leh alawmte'n ne in adawn ua, huai ah agiakta uh. Zingsang in athou ua, “Ka pu kiang ah hon paisakta un,” achi hi. Asanggampa leh anu'n, “Nungak ni sawt lou chik, ni sawm lel bek, ka kiang uah om tadih hen. Huai khit in ahong pai na ding,” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon zekaisak kei dih ua, Toupa'n lah ka hohna ah ahon lohchingsakta ngal a. Ka pu kiang a ka paitheihna ding in, hon sawl zaw mai ve ua,” achi hi. Amau, “Nungak ka sam ding ua, ama kam mahmah kidongleh,” achi uhi.

Rebekah asam ua akiang ah, “Hiai mipa kiang ah na pai nuam maw?” achi ua. Ama'n, “Pai nuam ve ning e,” achi hi. Asanggamnu uh Rebekah leh adonnu leh Abraham sikha leh amite akhakheta uhi. Huan Rebekah avualzawl ua, akiang ah,“Ka sanggamnu uh aw, nang,sing ngenta sang tampite nuhong hi in!Na suante'n amauhote kulh kongkhakneihsak uhen!” achi uhi. Rebekah athou a, asikhanute toh sangawngsaute tung ah atuang ua, huai mi azuita uhi. Abraham sikha in Rebekah api a, apaita uhi. Huan Beer-lahai-roi tuikhuk lam a kipan Isak ahong a, amah sim gam a teng ahi. Nitaklam in loubuk ah kingaihtuah ding in Isak apawtkhia hi. Adak a, a-en a, ngai in, sangawngsau hong paite amu hi. Rebekah adak a, Isak amuhtak in sangawngsau tung a kipan akumkhia hi. Sikhapa kiang ah, “Gamlak a hon dawn ding a hong pai kua ahia?” achi a; sikha in, “Ka pu ahi,” achi hi. Kikhuhna puan ala a, akikhuhta hi. Sikha in athilhih tengteng Isak ahilh hi. Isak in anu Sarah puanin ah apilut a, Rebekah ala a, azi ahong hita hi. Amah a-it a, anu sih nung Isak khamuang in a-omta hi.

Huan Abraham in zi dang anei nawn a, amin Keturah ahi. Ama'n Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak leh Shuah aneihsak hi. Jokshan in tapa Sheba leh Dedan anei a, Dedan tapate Asshurim leh Letushim leh Leummim ahi uh. Midian tapate Ephah, Epher, Hanok, Abidah leh Eldaah ahi uh. Huai tengteng Keturah tate ahi uhi. Abraham in aneih tengteng Isak apia hi. Amei tapate kiang ah Abraham in thilpiakte apia a; amah dam lai ngei in atapa Isak a kipan amaute suahlam gam ah asawlkhia hi.Abraham Sihna Leh Vuina Abraham damsung kum zakhat sawmsagih-le-nga ahi. Abraham in akha akhahta a, lu a kelsam pou vek in tekkun a dam in asi a, achipihte kiang a pi in a-omta hi. Atapa Isak leh Ishmael in Hit mi Zohar tapa Ephron lou a, Mamre phak ma a Makpelah kokhuk ah avui uhi. Huai lou, Abraham in Heth suante a pan aleisa ahi a, huai mun ah azi Sarah kiang ah Abraham vui in a-om hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Abraham sih nung in, Pathian in atapa Isak avualzawl a; Beer-lahai-roi ah Isak ateng hi.Ishmael Suante( Kro. ) Hiaite Abraham tapa Ishmael, Sarah sikhanu, Aigupta mi Hagar in Abraham aneihsak suante ahi uh. Hiaite amin chiat uleh asuante uh dungzui zel in Ishmael tapate min ahi. Ishmael tapa upapen Nebajoth ahi a, huai ban ah Kedar, Adbeel leh Mibsam, Mishma, Dumah leh Massa, Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Naphish leh Kedemah ahi uh. Huaite Ishmael tapate ahi ua, huaite akhua uh bang leh agiahphual uh dungzui zel a amin uh gelh ahi a, anam uh bang zel in vaihawmmi sawm-le-nih ahi uhi. Ishmael damsung kum zakhat sawmthum-le-sagih ahi a; akha khah in asi a, achipihte kiang ah pi in a-omta hi.

Atapate Havilah gam a kipan Assuria gam lam a Aigupta gam phak ma a Shur tan in ateng ua, a-unau dang teng a kipan atuamten uhi.Esau Leh Jakob Pianna Hiaite Abraham tapa Isak suante ahi ua: Abraham in tapa Isak anei hi. Isak in Padan-aram gam a Siria mi Bethuel tanu, Aram mi Laban sanggamnu Rebekah zi a aneih lai in kum sawmli a upa ahi. Azi achiin ziak in Isak in Toupa kiang ah azi a ding in nget petmah in angetsak hi. Toupa'n angetna angaihkhiaksak a, azi Rebekah ahong gaita hi. Asung a anaupaite akisual ua; ama'n, “Hichibang ahih ngalleh, bangziak in ahia, ka hi chih?” achi a; Toupa dong ding in akuanta hi. Toupa'n akiang ah,“Na sul ah nam nih a-om ua,na gilsung a kipan nam nihakikhen ding uh,nam khat sang in nam khat ahatzaw ding a,a-upazaw in anaupangzawnna asem ding,” achi hi. Anau neih ahun in, ngai in, asul ah phik a-om hi. Abraham Suan Dangte( Kro. ) Huai nung in anau hong suakkhe nawn a, akhut in Esau khetul alenkip a; ama min Jakob asa uhi. Rebekah in amaute aneih lai in Isak kum sawmguk a upa ahi.Esau In Ta Masa Ahihna Azuak Naupangte hong khanglian ua; Esau sabetsiam, gamvakmi ahi a; Jakob mimelmawl, puaninte a tengmi ahi. Isak in asamatte anek zel ziak in Esau a-it a; Rebekah in bel Jakob a-it hi. Jakob in betang ahuan laitak in Esau gamkuan ahong tung a, atawl mahmah hi. Esau in Jakob kiang ah, “Hehpih in na betang huan hon nesak in; ka bah mahmah hi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in ahi amin Edom achih uh. Jakob in, “Na ta masa hihna hon leisak phot lechin,” achi hi. Esau in, “Ngai in, si dek ka hi ngal a; kei a ding in hiai ta masa hihna bang aphatuam dia?” achi hi. Jakob in, “Tuni in ka kiang ah kichiam phot in,” achi hi. Akiang ah akichiam a, Jakob kiang ah ata masa hihna akhawng maimah hi. Jakob in Esau tanghou leh abetang huan apia a; ama'n ne in adawn a, athou a, apaikheta hi. Huchibang in Esau in ata masa hihna angaineu hi.

Huan Abraham dam lai a kial ke masapen chih louh, huai gam ah kial ahong ke nawn a, Philistiate kumpipa Abimelek kiang ah Gerar ah Isak ava hohsuk hi. Akiang ah Toupa ahong kilak a, “Aigupta gam ah hohsuk ke'n. K'on hilh ding gam ah teng in. Hiai gam ah om tadih inla, na kiang ah ka om ding a, ka hon vualzawl ding hi. Hiai gam tengteng nang kiang leh na suante kiang a pia in, na pa Abraham kiang a ka kichiamna ka hihkip ding hi. Van a aksi zah in na suante ka pungsak ding a, hiai gam tengteng na suante kiang ah ka pe lai ding hi. Na suan ah leitung a nam tengteng vualzawl in a-om ding uh. “Abraham in ka thu amang a, ka thuhilhte, ka thupiakte, ka dan thusehte leh ka dante azuih ziak in,” achi hi. Huchi in Gerar ah Isak ateng hi. Huai khua a mite'n azi tungtang adong ua; ama'n, “Ka sanggamnu ahi,” achi hi. Amel ahoih ziak in hiai khua a mite'n Rebekah ziak in hon that kha ding uh, chi in “Ka zi ahi,” achi ngamta kei hi. Hichi a, huai a sawtpi a-om nung in, Philistiate kumpipa Abimelek in tohlet a kipan a-en a, ngai in, Isak in azi Rebekah athoh lai amuta hi. Abimelek in Isak asam a, “Ngai in, amah na zi ahi mah vele. Bangziak a ka sanggamnu ahi, chi maimah na hia?” achi hi. Isak in akiang ah, “Amah ziak in ka si kha ding ka chih ziak ahi,” achi hi. Abimelek in, “Ka tung ua na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Mite lak a mi kuapeuh in na zi kithuahpih kha thei uh akei maw, ka tung uah siamlouhna na hon tungsak dek vele,” achi hi.

Abimelek mah in, “Kuapeuh hiai mi hiam, azi hiam, khoih, hihlup ngeingei ding ahi,” chi in mi tengteng thu apia hi. Isak in huai gam ah buh aching a, huai kum in aleh za anei a, Toupa'n avualzawl hi. Ahong thupi mahmah a, nakpitak a mithupi hong suak hial in ahong lian huaihuai hi. Belamhon leh bawnghon anei a, inkuan leng tampi anei a, huaiziak in Philistiate'n amah ahaza uhi. Apa Abraham dam lai a, apa sikhate'n tuileh atoh tengteng uh Philistiate'n ahudim ua, lei in ahihdim vek uhi.
