Abimelek in Isak kiang ah, “Ka kiang ua kipan paimang in, kou sang in lah na hatzaw ngal a,” achi hi. Huai a kipan Isak apawtkhia a, Gerar Phaizang ah puanin akai a, huai ah atengta hi. Isak in apa Abraham dam lai a tuileh atohte uh atou nawn a; Abraham sih nung in Philistiate'n lah ana hudim vek ngal ua. Apa'n amin ana sak bangbang in amin asa chiat hi. Isak sikhate'n phaizang ah atou ua, huai ah tuileh nak nei amu uhi. Gerar a ganpute'n, “Kou tui ahi,” chi in Isak ganpute toh akisel ua, amah toh akisel ziak un tuileh min Eshek asata hi. Tuileh dang atou nawn ua; huai leng tuhkhiak tum in akiselpih nawn zel ua; amin Sitnah asa hi. Huai a kipan akisuan a, tuileh dang atou nawn hi. Huai ahihleh tuhkhiak tum in asubuai nawn ngal kei uhi. Tu in, “Toupa'n mun lianpi ahon bawlsakta a, hiai gam ah chi tampi i suang ding uh,” chi in amin Rehoboth asa hi. Huai a kipan Beer-sheba ah ahohtou hi. Huai zan mah in akiang ah Toupa akilak a, “Kei, na pa Abraham' Pathian ka hi. Lau ke'n, na kiang ah ka om hi.

Ka hon vualzawl ding a, ka sikha Abraham ziak a na suante pungsak ding ka hi,” achi hi. Huai mun ah maitam adoh a, Toupa min alou a, huai ah apuanin leng akai hi. Isak sikhate'n huai ah tuileh atou nawn uhi.Isak Leh Abimelek Kithukimna Gerar Ah Isak Ateng Isak in akiang ah, “N'on ngai kei ua, na kiang ua pan na hon paimangsak ngal ua, bangchidan in ahia ka kiang a na hong pai uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Na kiang ah Toupa a-om chih chiantak in ka thei ua, i kikal uah, kou leh nangmah kikal ah kichiam in thu i khung ding uh. Na zakdah ka hih ngei louh bang ua, thil hoih kia lou ngal na tung a ka hih louh ua, hoihtak a ka hon paimangsak bang un; nang leng ka siatna ding himhim uh na hihlouhna ding in. Tu in nang Toupa vualzawl na hita,” achi uhi. Huan amaute a ding in ankuang aluisak a, ne in adawn uhi. Zingsang in beltak in athou ua, akichiamtuah uhi. Isak in amau apaisak a, akiang a kipan khamuangtak in apawtta uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai ni mah in Isak sikhate ahong pai ua, tuileh toh thu ahong hilh ua, akiang ah, “Tui ka muta uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n huai tuileh Shebah asa hi. Huaiziak in tutan in huai kho min Beer-sheba akichi lai hi.Esau Namdang Zite Esau kum sawmli a upa ahih in, Hit mi Beeri tanu Judith leh Hit mi Elon tanu Basemath zi in anei hi. Huaite Isak leh Rebekah lunggimnate ahi uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Isak hong tek a, kho mu thei lou khop in amit ahong mialta hi. Atapa upazaw Esau asam a, akiang ah, “Ka tapa,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ngai in, ka tek mahmahta a, ka sih ni ding lah ka thei kei hi. Tu in hehpih in na vanzat, na thaltang leh na thalpeu tawi in, va gamvak inla, sa hon va matsak in. Ka sih ma a ka hon vualzawl theihna ding in, ka duh lamtak in meh ding in limtak hon bawlsak inla, ka nek ding in ka kiang ah hon tawi in,” achi hi. Isak in atapa Esau ahoupih lai Rebekah in ana za hi. Sa beng a hon po ding in Esau agamvakta hi. Rebekah in atapa Jakob kiang ah, “Ngai in, na pa'n na u Esau kiang a athugen ka za. Sa hon puak inla, ka nek a ka sih ma a Toupa ma a ka hon vualzawlna ding in, meh limtak hon bawlsak in, chi ahi. Ka tapa, tu in ka hon thupiak bang in ka thu zui in. Ganhon lak ah va hoh inla, kelnou nih hoihtak, huai a kipan hon la in. Aduh lamtak in na pa a ding in meh limtak in huai ka na bawl ding. Asih ma a hon vualzawlsak ding in, anek ding in na pa kiang ah na va paipih ding ahi,” achi hi. Jakob in anu Rebekah kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka u Esau mimulhau ahi a, kei lah minel ka hi. Ka pa'n hon na zawt vialvial kha ding a, amah a ding in khempa ka hong hi dia, vualzawl gen tak louh hamsiat kizon lel ka hi kei ding maw,” achi hi.

Anu'n akiang ah, “Ka tapa, ka tung ah na hamsiat muh ding tung hen. Ka thu zui inla, hon va lak in,” achi hi. Huchi in akuan a, ava la a, anu kiang ah apaipihta hi. Anu'n apa duh lamtak in meh limtak abawl hi. Rebekah in atapa upapen Esau puansilh hoihtak, akiang a inn a om ala a, atapa naupangzaw Jakob asilhsak hi. Huai ban ah kelnou vun leng akhut leh angawng nelna munte ah aphah hi. Meh limtak leh tanghou abawlte atapa Jakob khut ah apia hi. Amah apa kiang ah ava pai a, “Pa aw,” achi a; ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om, ka tapa, akua zaw pen na hia?” achi hi. Jakob in apa kiang ah, “Na tapa upazaw Esau ka hi; na hon sawl bang in ka hih khinta. Hehpih in thou inla, hon vualzawl ding in tu inla, ka samatsa ne in,” achi hi. Isak in atapa kiang ah, “Ka tapa, bangchidan ahia, hong man baih na tel chia?” achi a. Ama'n, “Toupa na Pathian in ahon lohchinsak ziak ahi,” achi hi. Isak in Jakob kiang ah, “Ka tapa, hehpih in hong pai nai dih, ka hon zawt vialvial ding, ka tapa Esau na hi na hiam,” achi hi. Jakob in apa Isak ava naih a; ama'n ana zawt vialvial a, “A-aw Jakob aw hiven, akhutte lah Esau khutte hiven,” achi hi. A-u Esau khut abang a, akhut amul ziak in amah atheitel kei hi. Huchi in amah avualzawlta hi. “Ka tapa Esau ngei na hi maw?” achi a; ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hon tawi nai in, ka hon vualzawlna ding in ka tapa samatsa ka ne ding,” achi hi. Ahon tawi nai a, aneta a, uain leng ahon la a, huai leng adawn hi.

Apa Isak in akiang ah, “Ka tapa hong pai nai in, hon tawp in,” achi hi. Isak In Jakob Avualzawl Pathian in van daitui,lei hoihna, buh tampi leh uaintampi hon pia hen. Namte'n na nnasem uhenla, na ma ah namte kun uhen.Na unaute tung ah toupa in om inla;na nu tapate na ma ah kun uhen.Hon hamsiatte hamsiat in om uhenla,hon vualzawl peuhmahvualzawl in om hen,” achi hi.Esau In Isak Vualzawlna Angen Huan hichi ahong hi a, Isak in Jakob avualzawl zohtak in, apa Isak kiang a kipan Jakob a pawtkhe man lel chih in a-unaupa, Esau sabeng ahong tung hi. Ama'n leng meh limtak abawl a, apa kiang ah, “Ka pa aw, hong thoukhia inla, na hon vualzawl theihna ding in na tapa samatsa neta in le,” achi hi. Apa Isak in akiang ah, “Kua na hia?” achi a; ama'n, “Na tapa, na tapa upazaw, Esau ka hi,” achi hi. Isak nakpi in aling zungzung a, “Sa va man a, ka kiang a, asa hon tawi, na hong tun ma a, ka na nek khit a, ka vualzawlpa kua ahia? Ahi, amah vualzawl in a-om ding,” achi hi. Esau in apa thugen azak in nakpitak leh khase mahmah in akapta a, apa kiang ah, “Pa aw, hon vualzawl in, kei leng hon vualzawl mahmah ve aw,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na nau in ahong khem a, na vualzawlnate ahong laksakta,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Amin Jakob achih uh dik mahmah hilou hia? Nihvei ahon suanta; ka ta masa hihna ahon laksak a; ngai in, tu in ka vualzawlna ahon laksak nawnta,” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Kei a dia vualzawlna hon sitsak lou maw?” achi hi.

Isak in adawng a, Esau kiang ah, “Ngai in, amah na toupa in ka bawlta, a-unau tengteng leng asikha ding in akiang ah ka pe vekta, buh leh uain in leng ka vakta hi. Nang a ding in, ka tapa, bang hon hihsak ding ka hia?” achi hi. Esau in apa kiang ah, “Pa aw, vualzawlna khat kia ahi maw na neih? Pa aw, kei leng hon vualzawl mahmah ve,” chi in ngaihtak in akapta hi. Huan apa Isak in adawng a, akiang ah,“Ngai in, na tenna ding lei hoihna tak,tunglam a kipan van daituikiakna mun ahi ding. Na namsau in ahina hin ding, himahleh na nau nnana sem ding hi.Hichi ahong hi ding a,na kitutkhiak hun chiang in na ngawng a kipan ahakkol na singkheta ding,” achi hi. Apa'n Jakob avualzawl ziak in Esau in amudah hi. Esau in alungsim in, “Ka pa suun ni ding anaita a, huai khit chiang in ka nau Jakob ka that mai ding,” achi hi. Atapa upazaw Esau thugen Rebekah ahilh ua; ama'n mi asawl a, atapa naupangzaw Jakob asam a, akiang ah, “Ngai in, na u Esau in na tungthu ah, nang hon thah tum in akikhamuan hi. Huaiziak in ka tapa, tu in ka thu mang in. Thou inla, Haran a ka sanggampa Laban kiang ah va tai in. Na u hehna adaih mateng akiang ah ni bangzah hiam va om tadih in; na u hehna na tung a adaih a, atung a na thilhih amangngilh mateng. Huai chiang mi ka hon sawl ding a, huai a kipan ka hong pikhesak ding. Bangziak a ni khat thu a na nih ua hon chan tel ding ka hia?” achi hi.Isak In Laban Kiang Ah Jakob Asawl Rebekah in Isak kiang ah, “Heth tanute ziak in hin ka chimtak mahmah. Jakob in hiai gam nungak, hiai Heth tanute lak a mi zi ding a aneih nawn ngial in zaw, kei a ding in hin bang phatuam ding ahia?” achi hi.

Huan Isak in Jakob asam a, avualzawl a, thu leng apia a akiang ah, “Kanaan gam nungakte lak a mi zi in na nei ding ahi kei. Thou inla, Padan-aram gam a na nu pa Bethuel inn ah hoh inla, huai a kipan na nu sanggampa Laban tanute lak a mi zi in va nei in. Pathian Bangkim hihthei in hon vualzawl in, mipi tampite na hong hihtheihna ding in chi tampi hon suangsak in, hon pungsak hen. Mikhual na hihna gam, Pathian in Abraham kiang a apiak na luahna ding in Abraham vualzawlna leng hon tangsak hen, nang leh na suante leng,” achi hi. Huchi in Isak in Jakob asawlkhia hi. Huan ama'n Padan-aram gam a, Jakob leh Esau nu Rebekah sanggampa Siria mi Bethuel tapa, Laban kiang azuanta hi.Esau In Zi Dang Anei Esau in, Isak in Jakob avualzawl a zi nei ding in Padan-aram gam ah asawlkhia, chih leh avualzawl lai a, Kanaan gam nungakte lak a mi zi in na nei ding ahi kei, chi in thu apia chih leh Jakob in anu leh apa thu mang in Padan-aram gam ah apaita chih athei hi. Esau in Kanaan gam nungakte'n apa Isak lung ahihkim kei uh chih athei hi. Ishmael kiang ah Esau ava hoh a, Abraham tapa Ishmael tanu, Nebajoth sanggamnu Mahalath, zi in anei a, zi aneihsate ban ah amah aneih behlap ahi.Bethel A Jakob Mang Beer-sheba a kipan Jakob apawt a, Haran kholam azuanta hi. Koi lai mun hiam atung a, ni atum tak ziak in huai ah agiakta hi. Huai ah suang khat ala a; lukham in anei a, huai ah ihmu ding in alumta hi. Mang anei a, ngai in, leitung ah lei ahong kidoh a, adawn in van asun hi. Ngai in, atung ah Pathian angelte kahtou in akumsuk uhi.

Ngai in, adawn ah Toupa adingh a, “Kei Toupa, na pu Abraham' Pathian leh Isak' Pathian ka hi. Na lupna gam nang leh na suante kiang ah ka hon pe ding. Na suante lei a leivui zah a tam ahi ding ua, tumlam, suahlam, mallam leh simlam ah na dalhzak ding uh. Nang ah leh na suan ah leitung a inkuan chih vualzawl in a-om ding uh. Ngai in, na kiang ah ka om, na paina peuh ah ka hon veng ding a, hiai gam ah ka hon pikik nawn ding. Na kiang a ka gen ka hih masak keileh ka hon nuse kei ding,” achi hi. Jakob ihmu ahong khanglou a, “Hiai mun ah Toupa a-om ngeingei hi. Ke'n lah ka na thei kei a,” achi hi. Huchi in alau a, “Hiai mun lauhuai hi na mai e! Hiai mun dang hilou in, Pathian inn na hi ei ve, hiai van kongpi na hi ei ve,” achi hi. Zingkhang in Jakob athou a, asuang lukham ala a, suangphuh in aphut a, adawn ah sathau abuak hi. Huai mun min Bethel asa a; akho min bel atung in Luz ahi. Jakob in, “Pathian ka kiang a om a, ka paina lampi a ahon ven a, nek ding tanghou leh silh ding puansilh Toupa'n ahon piak a, ka pa inn a lungmuangtak a ka hong pai nawnleh Toupa, ka Pathian ahi ding a, hiai suang ka phuh leng Pathian' inn ahi ding a; ka kiang a na hon piak ding tengteng a kipan sawm-a-khat ka hon pe ngeingei ding,” chi in akichiamta hi.

Huai nung in Jakob apai zel a, suahlam mite gam atungta hi. Huan a-etleh ngai in, gamlak ah tuileh ana om a, akiang ah belamhon thum akual uhi. Huai tuileh a kipan belamhonte, tui adawnsak uhi. Tuileh kong a suang om alian mahmah hi. Huai ah belamhon tengteng apaikhawm ua; tuileh kong a kipan suang akhuksuan ua, tuileh kong a, a-omna ngei ah suang akoih nawn uhi. Jakob in akiang uah, “Ka unaute aw, koilam mi na hi ua?” achi hi.Amau, “Haran khomi ka hi uh,” achi uh. Ama'n akiang uah, “Nahor tapa Laban na thei kha uhia?” achi a; amau, “Thei e,” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Dam lai ahi na maw?” achi a; amau, “Dam lai mah e, en in, atanu, Rakil leng belamte pi ding in ahong kuan,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Ngai un, ni asang lai mahmah ngal a, ganhonte pikhawm leng ahun nai kei. Belamte tui dawnsak unla, va khah lai un,” achi hi. Amau, “Ka hihthei kei ding uh, belamhon tengteng apikhawm ua, tuileh kong a kipan suang a khuksuan mateng uh. Huai khit chiang in belamte tui ka dawnsak zel uh,” achi uhi. Amau ahoupih lai in Rakil, apa belamte toh ahong tung a; ama'n huai belamte achin zel ahi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jakob in anu sanggampa Laban tanu Rakil leh anu sanggampa Laban belamhon amuh in ava naih a, tuileh kong a kipan suang akhuksuan a, anu sanggampa belamte tui adawnsak hi. Jakob in Rakil atawp a, ngaihtak in akapta hi. Jakob in apa tanau nai leh Rebekah tapa ahihdan Rakil ahilh hi. Rakil atai a, apa ava hilhta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Laban in asanggamnu tapa Jakob tanchin azaktak in, amah dawn ding in atai a, apom a, atawp a, a-inn ah apita hi.

Jakob in hiai thu tengteng Laban ahilh hi. Laban in akiang ah, “Ka guh mah leh ka sa mah na hi,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang ah kha khat ataam hi.Rakil Leh Leah Loh Ding In Jakob In Laban Nna Asem Huan Laban in Jakob kiang ah, “Ka tupa na hih ziak in amawk in ka nna na sem dia hia? Bang na loh dia? Hon hilh in,” achi hi. Laban in tanu nih anei a; a-upazaw min Leah ahi a, anaupangzaw min Rakil ahi. Leah mit anou a, Rakil bel chinou hoihtak ahi a, amel leng ahoih mahmah hi. Jakob in Rakil a-it a, “Na tanu naupangzaw Rakil toh kiteng ding in kum sagih nang nna ka hon sepsak ding,” achi hi. Laban in, “Amah ahihleh midang kiang a ka piak sang in nang kiang a ka piak mah ahoihzaw ve. Ka kiang ah om nilouh in,” achi hi. Jakob in Rakil kitenpih ding in kum sagih a-nna asepsakta hi. Himahleh Rakil a-it mahmah ziak in ni tam lou chik bang in athei hi. Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Ka kithuahpih theihna ding in ka zi hon peta in, ka hun lah akimta ngal a,” achi hi. Laban in huai khua a mi tengteng akaikhawm vek a, ankuang alui hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, khomial tung in atanu Leah api a, Jakob kiang ah apilut a; ama'n ana kithuahpih hi. Laban in atanu Leah kiang ah asikhanu ding in ama sikhanu Zilpah apia hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, zingsang ahong hih in, ngai in, Leah ana hi maimah hi. Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Ka tung a na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Rakil toh kiteng ding a na nna sem ka ahi kei maw? Bangziak a hon khem maimah na hia?” achi hi.

Laban in, “Ka gam uah huchibang a ta upazaw ma a anauzaw piak ngeina ahi kei. Hiai minu' nipikal zou phot inla, huchi in kum sagih dang ka nna na sep zoh chiang in anauzaw leng ka hon pe ding,” achi hi. Jakob in huchibang in ahih a, anipikal azouta a; atanu Rakil azi ding in apeta hi. Jakob, Laban Inn Atung Rakil leng akithuahpih a, Leah sang in Rakil a-itzaw a, Laban nna kum sagih dang asemta hi.Jakob Tate Toupa'n Leah pen huat in a-om chih athei a, asul ahonsak a; Rakil bel achiing hi. Leah agai a, tapa anei a, amin Reuben asa hi. “Toupa'n ka gimdan amuta. Tu'n zaw ka pasal in hon itta ding,” achi hi. Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a, “Toupa'n huat a ka om azak ziak in hiai leng ahon pia hi,” achi hi. Huchi in amin Simeon asa hi. Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a, “Tu in tapa thum ka neihsak ziak in, ka pasal in hon zuita ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Levi asa hi. Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a, “Tutung in zaw Toupa ka phat ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Judah asa a; ta anei nawn tadih kei hi.

Rakil in Jakob ta himhim aneihsak kei chih akitheih in asanggamnu ahazata hi. Jakob kiang ah, “Tate hon pia in, huchi ahihkeileh ka si ding,” achi hi. Rakil tung ah Jakob aheh a, “Gilgah hon pe lou Pathian bang ka hi a hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “En in, ka sikhanu Bilhah kithuahpih in. Huchi a ke'n leng amah a kipan tate ka neih sam theihna ding in ka phei tung ah ta ka hon nei ding hi,” achi hi. Huan azi ding in asikhanu Bilhah apia a, Jakob in amah ana kithuahpih hi. Bilhah agai a, Jakob ta aneihsakta hi. Rakil in, “Pathian in hon ngaihtuah a, ka aw leng aza, tapa ahon pia,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Dan asa hi. Rakil sikhanu Bilhah agai nawn a, Jakob tapa dang aneihsak nawn hi. Rakil in, “Nakpitak in ka sanggamnu ka buan a, ka zouta,” achi a; amin Naphtali asa hi. Leah in ta dang anei nawn kei chih akitheih in, asikhanu Zilpah api a, azi ding in Jakob kiang ah apia hi. Huan Leah sikhanu Zilpah in Jakob tapa aneihsak hi. Leah in, “Vangphathuai ei,” achi a; amin Gad asa hi. Leah sikhanu Zilpah in Jakob tapa dang aneihsak nawn hi. Leah in, “Hampha hi na tel ing e! Numeite'n hampha hon chi ding uh ei ve,” achi a, amin Asher asa hi. Buh lak hun lai in Reuben in gamlak ah zawl-ai ava mu a; anu Leah kiang ah hon tawi hi. Rakil in Leah kiang ah, “Hehpih in na tapa zawl-ai akhen hon pe dih ve,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ka pasal na hon suhsak thil namai ahi hia? Ka tapa zawl-ai leng hon suhsak na tum nawn lai maw?” achi hi. Rakil in, “Na tapa' zawl-ai sik in tuzan nang ahon kithuahpih ding,” achi hi.

Nitaklam in Jakob gamlak a kipan ahong tung a, adawn ding in Leah akuan a, “N'on kithuahpih ding ahi. Ka tapa zawl-ai in ka hon guaita ngal a,” achi hi. Huai zan in amah akithuahpih hi. Pathian in Leah thumna angaikhia a, agai a, Jakob tapa ngana aneihsak nawn hi. Leah in, “Ka sikhanu ka pasal kiang a ka piak ziak in Pathian in ka loh hon pia ei ve,” achi a; amin Issakar asa hi. Leah agai nawn a, Jakob tapa gukna aneihsak nawn hi. Leah in, “Pathian in thil hoihtak hon neisak a; tu in zaw ka pasal tapa guk ka neihsak tak ziak in, ka kiang ah atengta ding,” achi a; amin Zebulun asa hi. Huai nung in tanu anei nawn a, amin Dinah asa hi. Pathian in Rakil atheigige a, Pathian in athumna angaikhia a, asul ahonsak hi. Amah agai a, tapa anei a, “Pathian in ka minsia alamangta,” achi hi. “Toupa'n tapa dang hon piakbeh ding,” chi in amin Joseph asa hi.Laban Kiang A Jakob Thilnget Huan hichi ahong hi a, Rakil in Joseph aneih nung in, Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Kei ka omna ngei ah, ka gam ah hon paisakta in. Na nna ka sepsan ka zite leh ka tate hon pia inla, hon paisak in; na nna ka hon sepsakdan lah na thei ngal a,” achi hi. Laban in akiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh hehpih in om tadih lai ve. nang vang in Toupa'n kei ahon vualzawl, chih ka thiltuahte a kipan in ka sinkhia hi,” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Na thaman ding gen inla, hon hilh dih, ka hon pe ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Bangchi in na nna ka sem a, bangchi in ka kiang ah na gantate a-om ua, na thei akei hiam?

Ka hong ma in tawmchik kia na nei a, tu'n zaw tampi ahong phata uh. Ka kalsuanna peuh ah Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hi. Himahleh chikchiang in ahia ka inkuante a ding a ka sepkhiak sam ding?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Bang ka hon pe dia?” achi a. Jakob in, “Bangmah na hon piak ding ahi kei. Hiai thil na hon hihsakleh na gantate ka khah dia ka ching nawn ding hi. Tuni in na gantate ka va enkhe vek ding a, belam lak a, avom gial petmah a gial leh avom a gial zekzek leh avom peuhmah, kel lak a, akang a gial petmah agial leh akang a gial zekzekte huai a kipan ka pituam zel ding hi. Tuban huchibang a hong piang peuhmah ka loh ahita ding hi. Tunung a nang toh kal a ka thaman en ding a na hong pai hun chiang in, ka diktatna in ahon dawng mai ding. Kel lak a akang a gial petmah a gial lou leh akang a gial zekzek lou leh belam lak a avom lou ka kiang a na muh peuhmah ka guk in na sep mai ding,” achi hi. Laban in, “Ngai in, na gen bang geih in hi hen aw,” achi hi. Huai nitak in keltal akang a gial leh akang a gial zekzek teng leh kelnu akang gial petmah a gial leh akang a gial zekzek teng akanna om peuhmah, belam lak a avom tengteng toh apituam a, atapate khut ah apia hi. Amah leh Jakob kikal ah ni thum lam a-omsak a; Jakob in Laban ganhon dangte aching nawn hi. Jakob in hiangzau sing leh makha sing leh sesing chiang hing ala a, ahawng akhokngou chiat a, chiangte ah angoute akilangsak hi.

Achiang hawng khohte ganhonte'n tui ahong dawnna zel tuikuangte ah, tui luannate ah leh gantate mazawn zel ah akoih hi; tui dawn ding a ahong pai chiang ua againa ding un. Gantate chiangte ma ah agai panta ua, agialte, gial petmah a gialte, agial zekzekte hon neikhia uhi. Jakob in belamnoute akoihtuam a, ganhonte Laban ganhon lak a, agial leh avom tengteng lam angasak zel a; amah ganhonte akoihtuam zel a, Laban ganhon lak ah akoih kei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, gannu hatzawte ahuk chiang un, agaitheihna ding un Jakob in tuiluanna ah, ganhonte mitmuh in chiangte akoih zel hi. Himahleh gannu hatloute mai ah akoih kei hi. Anou hatloute Laban a ahi ua, ahatte Jakob a ahi zel uhi. Jakob nakpi in ahong pung a, ganhon thupitak, sikhanute, sikhapate, sangawngsaute leh sabiltungte aneita hi.

Huan Laban tapate'n, “Jakob in i pa neihsate lamang in, i pa neihsa a kipan hiai thupina tengteng amu,” achih uh Jakob in ana zata hi. Jakob in Laban mel a-en a, ngai in, tuma lam bang in atung ah ahoih nawn kei chih athei hi. Toupa'n Jakob kiang ah, “Na pipute gam ah leh na tanaute kiang ah pai nawnta in. Na kiang a om ding ka hi,” achi hi. Jakob in mi asawl a, gamlak a aganhon omna ah Rakil leh Leah asamsak a, akiang uah, “Na pa uh mel ka muh in, tuma lam bang in ka tung ah ahoih nawn kei chih ka thei hi. Himahleh ka kiang ah ka pa' Pathian a-om hi. Ka theihtawp in na pa uh nna ka sem chih na thei uh. Himahleh na pa un hon khem a, ka loh lah sawmveitak ahihlamdang a; himahleh Pathian in ka siatna ding akhoih aphal kei hi. Gial petmah a gialte na loh ahi ding, achihleh, ganta tengteng in gial petmah a gialte anei uh. Agialte na loh ahi ding achihleh, ganta tengteng in agialte anei zel uhi. Huchibang in Pathian in na pa gantate alaksak a, kei ahon peta hi. “Huan hichi ahong hi a, gantate agai pat lai un, ka mang in ka dak a, ngai in, apa, ganhonte, agialte, gial petmah a gialte, agial a gial iik-iakte ahi uh chih ka mu hi. Ka mang in Pathian angel in, ‘Jakob, hon chi a; ke'n, ‘hiai ah ka om’ ka chi hi. Ama'n, ‘dak inla, en in, apa gantate tengteng agialte, gial petmah a gialte, agial a gial iik-iakte ahi uh. Laban in na tung a athilhih tengteng ka mu hi. Kei, suangphuh a sathau na nilh a, ka kiang a thu na chiamna Bethel, huai Bethel Pathian ka hi.

Tu in thou inla, hiai gam a kipan pawt inla, na pianna gam ah pai nawnta in, ” achi hi. Rakil leh Leah in adawng ua, akiang ah, “Ka pa uh inn ah koute a ding in tantuan leh gouluah ding a-om lailai a hia? Ama'n mikhual bang lel a hon sim hita lou maw? Ahon khawng khinta a, ka man uh lah ane khinta hi. Pathian in ka pa uh hauhna alaksak tengteng ei leh i tate a ahi. Pathian in na kiang a agen peuhmah hih in,” achi uhi. Jakob athou a, sangawngsau tung ah atapate leh azite atuangsak hi. Kanaan gam a apa Isak kiang a pai ding in aganta tengteng leh alamkhiak tengteng, aganta muhte, Padan-aram gam a akholte apaipih vek hi. Laban, abelam mulmet ding in apawtkhia a; huan Rakil in apa milimte aguksak hi. Siria mi Laban theih louh kal in Jakob in aguk paimangsan a, apaimangsan ding thu ahilh kei hi. Huchi in aneih tengteng toh ataikheta hi. Athou a, Luipi akan a, Gilead tang lam zuan in apaita hi.Laban In Jakob Anungdelh Ani thum ni in Jakob ataikhia chih Laban ahilh uh. Asanggamte api a, ni sagih lam tan adelh a; Gilead tang ah adelhphata hi. Siria mi Laban kiang ah zan in amang in Pathian ahong a, akiang ah, “Jakob kiang ah asia hi in apha hitaleh bangmah gen lou ding in pilvang in,” achi hi. Laban in Jakob adelhphata hi. Jakob in tang ah apuanin akai khin a; Laban in leng asanggamte toh Gilead tang ah akai uhi. Laban in Jakob kiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Ka theih louh kal a na guk paimang a, namsau a lak salte bang mai a ka tanute na pimang?

Bangziak a hon taimangsan a, hon guk paisan a, nopsaknate toh, late toh, khuangtate toh, kaihgingte toh ka hon khaktheihna ding a na hon hilh louh? Ka tute leh ka tanute ka tawp na phal kei. Haihuaitak in thil na hih hi. Hon hihse thei ka hi a; himahleh na pa Pathian in tuzan in, ‘Jakob kiang ah asia, apha bangmah gen lou ding in pilvang in, chi in hon houpih hi. Na pa inn na ngaih mahmah tak ziak a, pai ut hi tawk lechin leng bang ding a ka pathiante hon guksak na hia?” achi hi. Jakob In Laban Ataisan Kuapeuh tung a na pathiante na muhna ahing kei ding. I unaute mitmuh in nang thilte ka kiang a om a-omleh, enchian inla, la in,” achi hi. Rakil in huaite na gu ahih lam Jakob in athei ngal kei a. Jakob puaninte ah, Leah puaninte ah leh sikhanu nihte puaninte ah Laban alut a; himahleh amu kei. Leah puanin a kipan apawtkhia a, Rakil puanin ah alut hi. Rakil in milimte ana la a, sangawngsau van lak ah ana koih a, ana tutkhum hi. Laban in apuanin sung tengteng amaisuak vek a, himahleh amu kei hi. Ama'n apa kiang ah, “Na ma a ka din ngap louh ziak in ka toupa, heh ke'n aw; numei omdan ngeina ka tung a a-om laitak ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Azongzong a, himahleh milimte amuzouta kei hi. Huchi in Jakob aheh a, Laban asalta hi. Jakob in Laban kiang ah, “Ka tatlekna bang ahia? Ka khelhna bang hi ahia, na hon hichi delh kin? Ka vante teng na pheklek nung in, na insung van bang na mu a? Ei gel kal a thu akhentheihna ding un ka unaute leh nang unaute ma ah na muh pen hon koihkhia in.

Kum sawmnih vingveng na kiang ah ka omta a; na belampite leh na kelpite'n nou aneikhial ngei kei uh. Na belamhonte lak a apate leng ka ne ngei kei. Gamsa keih leng na kiang ah ka hon tun ngei ngal kei a: amangte sik in ke'n ka thuak zaw zel a; sun a guk hiam, zan a guk hiam lah ka dit na hon phut gige zomah hi. Hichibang in ka om zel a; sun nisa leh zan khovot in hon hihgim thei mahmah a; ihmut leng ka mu ngei kei. Kum sawmnih sung teng na inn ah ka om a; na tanu nihte loh ding in kum sawm-le-li na nna ka sem a, na gante loh ding in kum guk ka sem nawn a; ka loh sawmvei na hihlamdang hi. Ka pa' Pathian, Abraham' Pathian leh Isak' Pathian lauhna ka kiang a om lou hileh houh, tu'n vuaktang lel a hon paisak ngeingei ding na hi. Pathian in ka haksat thuakdan leh ka sepgimdan amu a, tuzan a nang hon sal ahi,” achi hi.Jakob Leh Laban Kithukimna Laban in adawng a, Jakob kiang ah, “Hiai tanute ka tanute ahi ua, hiai naupangte ka naupangte ahi uh. Hiai gante kei gante ahi ua, na muh tengteng kei a vek ahi uh. Tuni in hiai ka tanute tung ah leh ata neihte uh tung ah bang ka hihthei dia? Kisa in, kei leh nang in thukhun i bawl ding; kei leh nang kikal ah theihpihna hi hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Jakob in suang ala a, suangphuh in aphut hi. Jakob in atanaute kiang ah, “Suang lakhawm un,” achi hi. Suang ala ua, achiangkhawm ua, asuang chiankhawm kiang ah an ane uhi. Laban in huai suang chiankhawm, Jegar-sahadutha asa a; Jakob in bel Galeed asa hi.

Laban in, “Hiai suang chiankhawm tu in kei leh nang kikal ah theihpihtu ahi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Galeed chih ahita hi. “Kikhen a i om hun chiang in Toupa'n hon veng tuaktuak hen,” achih ziak in Mizpah leng achi hi. “Ka tanute na sukgentheih a, ka tanute lou zi dang na neihleh, ka tanute chih louh kuamah i kiang ah a-om kei na ua, en in, Pathian, kei leh nang kal hon theihpihpa ahi,” achi ngal hi. Laban mah in, “Hiai suang chiankhawm en inla, keimah leh nangmah kikal a ka phuh, suangphuh leng en in. Poi kikhoihsak ding in, kei hiai suang pel in na kiang ah ka hong pai kei ding, chih leh nang leng hiai suang chiankhawm leh hiai suangphuh pel in ka kiang ah na hong pai kei ding, chih, hiai suang chiankhawm atheihpihtu hi henla, hiai suangphuh leng atheihpihtu mah hi hen. Abraham' Pathian, Nahor Pathian, apa uh Pathian in i kal ah thu khen hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Jakob in apa Isak lauhpa min lou in akichiamta hi. Jakob in tang ah kithoihna alan a, atanaute tanghou ne ding in asamkhawm a; tanghou ane ua, tang ah agiak chiat uhi. Zingsang in beltak in Laban athou a, atute leh atanute atawp a, avualzawl hi. Laban apaikhia a, amah omna ah akik nawnta hi.

Jakob apai zel a, Pathian angelte'n ana tuak uhi. Jakob in amaute amuh in, “Hiai Pathian giahphual ahi,” achi a; huai mun Mahanaim asa hi. Jakob in Edom gam, tua Seir gam ah ama ah thangkoute Esau kiang ah asawl hi. Akiang uah ka toupa Esau kiang ah hichi in na gen ding uh, “Na sikha Jakob in hichi in achi: Laban kiang ah mikhual ka hi a, tutan ka om nilouh hi. Bawngtalte, sabiltungte leh belamte, sikhapate leh sikhanute ka nei hi. Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan theihna ding a ka toupa hilh ding in mite ka hon sawl hi,” chi in. Jakob kiang ah thangkoute ahong kik nawn ua, “Na u Esau kiang ka va tung ua, mi zali toh nang dawn ding in ahong pai hi,” chi in agen uhi. Jakob in alau mahmah a, alungkhamta hi. Akiang a mi omte, belamhonte, bawnghonte leh sangawngsaute pawl nih in akhen hi. “Esau ahong pai a, pawl khat athahleh leng taimang thei ding pawl khat om lai,” achi hi. Jakob mah in, “Aw ka pa Abraham' Pathian, ka pa Isak' Pathian, Toupa, na gam ah leh na tanaute kiang ah pai nawnta in, ka hon hihhoih ding hon chipa, na sikha tung a hehpihna na muhsakleh thutak tengteng na muhsak lak a, aneupen leng mu tak ka hi kei. Hiai Jordan lui ka chiangkhun kia toh ka kan a; tu in zaw pawl nih hial ka hong hita uhi. Hehpih in ka u khut a kipan, Esau khut a kipan, hon humbit in. Huchi lou in zaw kei leh numei naupangte tan in ahon that kha ding, chih ka lau hi.

Nang ka hon hihhoih ngeingei ding a, na suante tuipi a piaunel sim zoh louh tan hial a atam bang in ka bawl ding na hon chi ngal a,” achi hi. Huai zan in huai ah agiakta a; aneihte lak a kipan a-u Esau a ding thilpiak alakhia hi. Kelpi zanih, keltal sawmnih, belampi zanih leh belampa sawmnih, sangawngsau zat lai sawmthum anoute toh, bawngpi sawmli leh bawngtal sawmkhat, sabiltungpi sawmnih leh sabiltungnou sawmkhat. Hiaite pawl chih atuam chiat in asikhate khut ah akemsak a, asikhate kiang ah, “Ka ma ah pai galkah unla, pawl chih kal neisak zel un,” achi hi. Amakaipa kiang ah, “Ka u Esau in ahon tuah a, na kiang a, kua na hia? Koi a hoh dek na hia? Na ma a om kuate ahi ua? chi a ahon dotleh, ‘Na sikha Jakob a ahi ua; hiaite ka pu Esau, nang ka toupa a ding a ahon khak thilpiakte ahi uh. Ngai in, amah ka nung uah a-om, na chi ding,” chi in thu apia hi. Anihna leh athumna leh ganhon hawlte tengteng kiang ah leng, “Esau na muh chiang un huchibang mah in na gen ding uh. ‘Ngai in, na sikha Jakob ka nung uah a-om, chi chiat un,” chi in thu ape chiat hi. “Thilpiak ka ma ah paileh alung ka damsak ding a, huai nung in amel ka mu ding. Huchi in ahon na kipahpih ding,” achi hi. Huchi in thilpiak ama ah apai masasak a; amah huai zan in apawlte lak ah agiak hi.Peniel Ah Jakob In Pathian Abuan Zan in athou a, azi nihte leh asikhanu nihte leh atapa sawm-le-khatte api a, Jabbok lui ngahna ah akanta hi. Amaute api a, lui akan ua, aneih tengteng leng akansak vek hi.

Jakob amah kia in a-omta a, mi khat toh phalvak tan akibuan uhi. Azou kei chih akitheih in Jakob pheipi guhtuah akhoihsak a, akibuan lai un Jakob pheipi guhtuah akilawita hi. Ama'n, “Hon khah in, phalvak ding ahita,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n, “N'on vualzawl keileh ka hon khah kei ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na min bang ahia?” achi a; ama'n, “Jakob,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na min Jakob ahi nawn kei ding a, Israel ahon chi zawta ding uh: Pathian leh mihingte na buan a, na zouta ngal a,” achi hi. Jakob in amah adong a, “Hehpih in na min hon hilh in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Bangziak in ahia ka min na hon dot?” achi hi. Huchi in huai ah avualzawlta hi. Jakob in huai mun min, “Peniel,” asa hi. “Pathian amai chin mahmah ah ka mu a; ka hinna ahawi ziak in,” achi hi. Peniel akhen lai in, ni ahong suak a, amah ahon sun a, apheipi ziak in abaita hi. Esau Tuak Ding In Jakob Akisakhol

Huan Jakob dakkhia a a-etleh, ngai in, akiang ah mi zali toh Esau ahong pai hi. Huchi in Leah, Rakil leh sikhanu nihte kiang ah atate a-omsak khipkhep hi. Sikhanute leh atate amakai in akoih a, azom in Leah leh atate, huan Rakil leh Joseph bel ananungpen in akoih hi. Amah ama uah apai a, a-u kiang chin atun masiah sagihvei lei si in akun hi. Himahleh Esau amah mu ding in atai a, apom a, angawng a kun in atawp a, akap uhi. Esau dakkhia a a-etleh, numeite leh naupangte amu a, “Hiai n'on tonpihte kuate ahi ua?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Pathian in hehpihtak a na sikha kiang a apiak naupangte ahi uh,” achi hi. Sikhanute leh atate uh ahong pai ua, akun uhi. Leah leng atate toh ahong pai nai ua, akun ua, huai khit in Joseph leh Rakil leng ahong pai nai ua, akun uhi. Esau in, “Ka ganhon kituahpih tengpi bang na chihna ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka toupa, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan theihna ding in ka chi a ahi,” achi hi. Esau in, “Ke'n leng hau veng e, bawi aw, na neih tengteng nang a hi hen,” achi hi. Jakob in, “Hilou e, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan theihleh hehpih in ka hon thilpiakte hon sansak in. Pathian mel mu bang in na mel ka mu a, ka tung ah lah na kipak ngal a. Pathian in hon hehpih ziak leh akiching ka neih ziak in ka hon thilpiakte sang in,” achi hi. Huchi in akun teitei a, ama'n asangta hi. Esau in, “Kisa in, pai ni, na ma ah ka pai ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Naupangte aneu laidan uleh belamhon ka kiang a omte anou ahihdan uh, ka toupa'n na thei hi.

Ni khat lel leng hat lua a, ahawl uleh ganhon tengteng si vek ding uh ahi. Ka toupa, hehpih in na sikha ma ah pai inla; ke'n Seir tang ah, ka toupa, na kiang ka tun mateng, ka ma a gante apai zoh dandan uleh naupangte apai theihdan bang zel un, awlawl in ka hon masuan zel ding,” achi hi. Esau in, “Ka kiang a om mi khenkhat hon nutsiat leng ake,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Apoimoh khol a hia? Ka toupa mitmuh in deihsakna hon musak in,” achi hi. Huai ni mah in Seir tang lam zuan in Esau akik nawnta hi. Sukkoth mun ah Jakob apai a, amah a ding in inn alam a, agante a ding in leng aidakbukte alam hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min Sukkoth asa hi. Padan-aram gam a kipan Jakob ahong paikhiak nung, lungmuangtak in Kanaan gam a om Shekem khua atung a, huai khopi ma ah apuanin azakta hi. Shekem pa Hamor tapate a kipan dangka zakhat in apuanin zakna mun alei hi. Huai ah maitam adoh a, amin El-Elohe-Israel asa hi. Jakob In Esau Akimuhpih

Huan Leah tanu Dinah, Jakob aneihsak, huai gam nungakte mu ding in apawtkhia hi. Hiv mi Hamor, huai gam vaihawmpa tapa Shekem in amah ana mu a, pummat in aluppih a, ahihninta hi. Jakob tanu Dinah tung ah alungsim a-omden a, huai nungak a-it mahmah a, kamsiamtak in ahoupih hi. Shekem in apa Hamor ahoupih a, “Ka zi ding in huai nungak hon pisak in,” achi hi. Jakob in atanu Dinah aninsak khin chih aza a, gamlak ah aganhonte lak uah atapate a-om uhi. Huchi in ahong tun mateng uh Jakob adai dide hi. Jakob houpih ding in Shekem pa Hamor akiang ah ahoh hi. Jakob tapate'n azaktak un gamlak a kipan ahong pai ua, Jakob tanu kithuahpih in Israelte lak a thil gilou haihuaitak, thilhih het louh ding, ahih ziak in adah ua, aheh mahmah uhi. Hamor in amau ahoupih a, “Ka tapa Shekem lungsim na tanu uh tung ah a-om tinten a, hehpih in azi ding in neisak ve ua. Kilatuah ve ni e; na tanute uh hon lasak unla, ka tanute uh leng la sam un. “Ka kiang uah na teng ding ua; gam leng akiching gige ding. Hiai ah teng unla, sum sin unla, hiai ah kihih inbul un,” achi hi. Shekem in nungak' pa leh asanggampate kiang ah, “Na deihsakna uh hon musak unla, huan ka kiang a na gen peuh uh ka hon pe ding. Man leh thilpiak zaw bangzah gen le uchin, na chih bangbang uh ka hon pe ding. Akoi abang hitaleh, nungak pen zi ding in hon neisak phot un,” achi hi. Jakob tapate'n asanggamnu uh Dinah anitsak ziak in Shekem leh apa Hamor khembawl in adawng ua, akiang uah, “Hiai thil zeksum louh mi kiang a ka tanu uh piak pen ka hihthei kei ding uh

huai lah koute a ding in minsiatna ahi ngal a. Hichibang a kichiam kia in na thu uh pha ka sa ding uh. Na lak ua pasal peuhpeuh koute bang a zeksum in om uhen. Huchi in ka tanute uh na nei ding ua, kou leng na tanute uh ka nei sam ding uh. Na kiang uah ka teng ding ua, chi khat i hi ding. Himahleh, zeksum thu a ka thu uh na zuih kei ding uleh, ka tanu uh ka pi ding ua, ka pai mai ding uh,” achi uhi. Athugen un Hamor leh Hamor tapa Shekem akipaksak hi. Tangval in Jakob tanu adeih mahmah ziak in huai thil sawt hal lou in ahihta hi. Amah apa inkuan tengteng lak a mite zahtak pen ahi. Hamor leh atapa Shekem in akhokulh kongkhak uh apha ua, akhote uh ahoupih uhi. “Hiai mite ei toh kilemtak in a-om uh. Huaiziak in hiai gam a teng in, hiai ah sum sin uhen. Ngai un, amaute a ding in gam lah aza ngal a. Atanute uh zi in nei lehang, i tanute uh leng neisak sam ni. Himahleh nam khat i hong hihna ding a i kiang a tentheihna ding un hichibang a i chiam kia in huai mite'n pha ahon sakpih ding uhi; zeksum ahih bang ua i lak ua pasal peuhpeuh zeksum hong hita lehang. Agante uh, asumte uh, asa tengteng uh ei a ahi vek kei dia hia? Athu uh pha sakpih mai ve ni e, huchi in i kiang uah ateng ding uh,” achi uhi. Hamor leh atapa Shekem thu a khokulh kongkhak a pawtkhe tengteng in azui ua; akhokulh kongkhak a pawtkhe tengteng, pasal peuhpeuh zek asumsak uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni a, nat athuak lai un, Jakob tapate lak a nih, Dinah sanggampa Simeon leh Levi in anamsau uh tawi tuak in aguk in khua ava sualta ua, pasal tengteng athatgam uhi. Namsau hiam in Hamor leh atapa Shekem athat ua, Shekem inn a kipan Dinah api ua, apawtta uhi. Jakob tapate'n amithahte uh ava pha nawn ua, atanu uh anitsak ziak un huai khua alokta uhi. Abelamhonte uh, abawnghonte uh, asabiltungte uh, akhua ua thil omte leh alou ua thil omte alaksak uhi. Asum tengteng uleh ata-anau neu chikchikte leh azite tengteng uh sal in ua, insung a om tengteng alok uhi. Jakob in Simeon leh Levi kiang ah, “Nou hiai gam a tengte lak a, Kanaante leh Perizte lak ah, huat na hon posak ua, na hon lungzingsak mahmah uh. Kei tawmchik ka hih ziak in hon sual ding in akikhawmkhawm ding ua, ahon that mai ding uhi. Huchi in hihmang in ka om ding, kei leh ka inkuanpihte toh,” achi hi. Amau, “Ka sanggamnu uh kizuak bang a abawl ding ahi a hia?” achi uhi. Dinah Sualluihna

Huan Pathian in Jakob kiang ah, “Thou inla, Bethel ah hohtou in, huai ah teng in. Na u Esau a kipan na taimang lai a, na kiang a kilak Pathian a ding in huai mun ah maitam doh in,” achi hi. Jakob in a-inkuanpihte leh akiang a om tengteng kiang ah, “Na lak ua om gamdang pathiante koihmang unla, kihihsiangthou unla, na puansilhte uh kheng un. I thou ding ua, Bethel ah i paitou ding uh. Ka lungzin lai a hon dawng, ka paina a ka kiang a om zel Pathian a ding in maitam ka doh ding,” achi hi. Huchi in gamdang pathiante akhut ua om tengteng leh abil ua bilbah abah tengteng uh Jakob kiang ah apekhe vek uhi. Jakob in Shekem kho kiang a tosaw nuai ah aphum hi. Apai ua, akim ua khuate'n alau mahmah ua, Jakob tapate adelh kei uhi. Jakob leh akiang a om tengteng toh, Kanaan gam a om Luz khua, huai Bethel kichi atung a, huai ah maitam adoh a, a-u a kipan ataimang lai a, akiang a Pathian akilak ziak in huai mun min El-bethel asa hi. Huan Rebekah donnu Deborah asi a, Bethel khang a tosaw nuai ah avui ua; tosaw min Allon-bakuth asa uhi. Padan-aram gam a kipan Jakob ahong tun in akiang ah Pathian akilak nawn a, avualzawl hi. Pathian in akiang ah, “Na min Jakob ahi a; na min Jakob ahi nawn kei ding a, na min Israel ahi zawta ding,” achi hi. Huchi in amin Israel asata hi. Pathian mah in akiang ah, “Kei Pathian Bangkim hihthei ka hi. Chi tampi suang in hong pung in. Nam, chih tham ngial leh nam tuamtuam omkhawmte leng nang ah ahong om ding ua, na khal a kipan kumpipate leng ahong pawt ding uhi.

Abraham leh Isak kiang a ka gam piak na kiang ah ka hon pe ding. Na om louh nung chiang in na suante kiang ah leng gam ka pe zel ding,” achi hi. Pathian in ahoupihna mun a kipan Jakob apaitouh santa hi. Ahoupihna mun ah Jakob in suangkhuam aphut a; atung ah dawn thillat abuak a, atung ah sathau leng abuak hi. Jakob in Pathian in ahoupihna mun min Bethel asa hi.Rakil Sihna Bethel a kipan apaikhia ua; Ephrath kho tunna ding gamlatak ahih lai in Rakil in nau avei a, anak vei mahmah hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, agim laitak in naudommi'n, “Lau ke'n, tapa nei nawn ding na hi,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, alaitah ding kuan in, (amah lah si dek ahi ngal a), amin Ben-oni asa a; himahleh apa'n Benjamin asa hi. Rakil asita a, Ephrath lampi ah avui uh; huai Ephrath khua Bethlehem ahi. Ahan tung ah Jakob in suang aphut a; huai tuni tan in Rakil hansuang ahiden hi. Israel apai zel a, Migdol Eder khen lam ah apuanin akai hi.Jakob Tapate( Kro. ) Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel huai gam a a-om lai in Reuben in apa mei Bilhah ava kithuahpih a; Israel in huai aza hi. Jakob tapate sawm-le-nih ahi uh. Leah tapate Reuben (Jakob tapa upapen), Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakar leh Zebulun ahi uh. Rakil tapate Joseph leh Benjamin ahi uh. Rakil sikhanu Bilhah tapate Dan leh Naphtali ahi uh. Leah sikhanu Zilpah tapate Gad leh Asher ahi ua; hiaite Jakob tapa, Padan-aram gam a aneihte ahi uhi.Isak Sihna Kiriath-arba a Abraham leh Isak omna Mamre ah apa Isak kiang ah Jakob atungta a; Kiriath-arba khua Hebron leng kichi ahi. Isak damsung kum zakhat-le-sawmgiat ahi. Isak in akha akhahta a, upapi tekkun a dam in asi a, huan achipihte kiang ah pi in a-omta hi. Atapate Esau leh Jakob in amah avui uhi. Bethel Ah Pathian In Jakob Avualzawl

Huan hiaite Esau suante ahi ua (huai tuh Edom kichi ahi). Esau in azite Kanaan gam a nungakte lak a aneih ahi: Hit mi Elon tanu Adah leh Hiv mi Zibeon tanu Anah tanu Aholibamah ahi ua; huan Ishmael tanu, Nebajoth sanggamnu Basemath toh. Adah in Esau a ding in Eliphaz aneihsak a; Basemath in Reuel aneihsak hi. Aholibamah in Jeush, Jaalam leh Korah anei a; hiaite Esau tapate, Kanaan gam a aneihte ahi uh. Esau in azite, atapate, atanute, a-inn a mi tengteng, agante tengteng, asa tengteng leh athil neih tengteng, Kanaan gam a amuhte apaipih a, anau Jakob kiang a kipan gamdang ah apaimangta hi. Athil neihte uh athupi lua a, a-omkhawm thei kei uhi. Agante uh ziak in mikhual a a-omna gam un achinta kei hi. Seir tang ah Esau atengta hi: Esau ahihleh Edom ahi. Hiaite Seir tang a Edomte suangpa Esau suante ahi uh. Hiai Esau tapate minte ahi: Esau zi Adah tapa Eliphaz; Esau zi Basemath tapa Reuel. Eliphaz tapate: Teman, Omar, Zepho, Gatam leh Kenaz ahi uh. Timna ahihleh Esau tapa Eliphaz mei ahi a; ama'n Amalek, Eliphaz aneihsak hi. Hiaite Esau zi Adah suante ahi uh. Hiaite Reuel tapate ahi uh: Nahath leh Zerah, Shammah leh Mizzah. Hiaite Esau zi Basemath suante ahi uh. Hiaite Zibeon tanu Anah tanu Esau zi Aholibamah tapate ahi uh: Ama'n Esau Jeush, Jaalam leh Korah aneihsak hi. Hiaite Esau tapate lak a hausa makaite ahi uh: Esau ta masapen Eliphaz tapate: hausa makai Teman, hausa makai Omar, hausa makai Zepho, hausa makai Kenaz, hausa makai Korah, hausa makai Gatam leh hausa makai Amalek. Hiaite Edom gam a Eliphaz a kipan pawt hausa makaite ahi ua, hiaite Adah suante ahi uh.

Hiaite Esau tapa Reuel suante ahi ua: Hausa makai Nahath, hausa makai Zerah, hausa makai Shammah leh hausa makai Mizzah. Hiaite Edom gam a Reuel a kipan a pawt hausa makaite ahi ua; Esau zi Basemath suante ahi uh. Hiaite Esau zi Aholibamah suante ahi ua: Hausa makai Jeush, hausa makai Jaalam leh hausa makai Korah. Huaite hausa makai Anah tanu Esau zi Aholibamah suante ahi uh. Huaite Edom leng kichi Esau tapate ahi ua; hiaite ahausa makaite ahi uh.Seir Suante( Kro. ) Hiaite Hor mi Seir tapa gam luahte ahi uh: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer leh Dishan. Huaite Edom gam a Seir tapa Horte hausa makaite ahi uh. Lotan tapate Hor leh Hemam ahi ua; Lotan sanggamnu Timna ahi. Hiaite Shobal tapate ahi uh: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho leh Onam. Hiaite Zibeon tapate ahi uh: Aiah leh Anah. Hiai Anah, apa Zibeon sabiltungte akhah lai a gamdai a tuisa khukte mukhepa ahi. Hiaite Anah tate ahi uh: Dishon leh Anah tanu Aholibamah. Hiaite Dishon tapate ahi uh: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran leh Cheran. Hiaite Ezer tapate ahi uh: Bilhan, Zaavan leh Akan. Hiaite Dishan tapate ahi uh: Uz leh Aran. Hiaite Horte hausa makaite ahi uh: Hausa makai Lotan, hausa makai Shobal, hausa makai Zibeon leh hausa makai Anah, hausa makai Dishon, hausa makai Ezer leh hausa makai Dishan. Hiaite Seir gam a hausa makai ahihdan bang a Horte hausa makaite ahi uh.Edom Kumpipate( Kro. ) Hiaite kumpipa kuamah in Israel suante tung a vai ahawm ma ua, Edom gam a vaihawm kumpite ahi uh. Beor tapa Bela inEdom gam ah vai ahawm a,akhopi min Dinhabah ahi. Bela asi a,Bozrah mi Zerah tapaJobab in asik in vai ahawm hi. Jobab asi a, Temante gam ami Husham in asik in vai ahawm hi.

Husham asi a, Bedad tapa Hadad,Moab loubuk a Midiante thatpa'n asik in vai ahawm a,akhopi min Avith ahi. Esau Suante( Kro. ) Samlah asi a, Luipi gei aRehoboth mi Saul inasik in vai ahawm hi. Saul asi a, Akbor tapa Baal-hanan in asik in vai ahawm hi. Akbor tapa Bal-hanan asi a,Hadar in asik in vai ahawm a,akhopi min Pau ahi.Azi min Mehetabel ahi a, amah Mezahab tanu Matred tanu ahi. Hiaite a-inkuan uh dungzui zel leh amun dungzui zel uh leh amin dungzui zel ua Esau suan hausa makaite min ahi. Hausa makai Timnah, hausa makai Alvah leh hausa makai Jetheth, hausa makai Aholibamah, hausa makai Elah, hausa makai Pinon, hausa makai Kenaz, hausa makai Teman, hausa makai Mibzar, hausa makai Magdiel leh hausa makai Iram. Hiaite agam neih uah a-omna uh dungzui zel in Edom suan hausa makaite ahi uh, amah Edomte pa Esau ahi.

Apa mikhual a a-omna gam, Kanaan ah Jakob ateng hi. Hiaite Jakob suante ahi uh. Joseph, kum sawm-le-sagih a upa ahih in, asanggamte toh ganhon akhah uhi. Amah naupang ahi lai a, apa' zite Bilhah leh Zilpah tapate kiang ah a-om a; Joseph in agitlouhna thu uh apa uh kiang ah atun hi. Israel in Joseph, atek lam ta ahih ziak in atapate tengteng sang in a-itzaw a; puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial abawlsak hi. Apa un asanggamte tengteng sang in amah a-itzaw chih asanggamte'n athei uhi; amah amudah ua, kampha himhim in ahoupih thei kei uhi. Joseph in mang anei a, asanggamte ahilh a, amah amudah semsem uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Hehpih in ka mang ngai dih uh. Ngai un, lou ah buhphalte i na gak ua, ngai dih uh, kei buhphal athoutou a, adingh nemnom hi. Ngai un, nou buhphalte'n ahong um ua, kei buhphal ma ah akun chiat uh,” achi hi. Asanggamte'n akiang ah, “Nang sop lai in ka tung uah vai na hawm mahmah ding maw? Nang sop lai in ka tung uah thu na nei mahmah ding maw?” achi uh. Huchi in amang ziak in amah amudah semsem uhi. Mang dang anei nawn a, asanggamte ahilh nawn hi, “Ngai un, mang ka nei nawn hi. Ni, kha leh aksi sawm-le-khatte ka mai ah akun uhi,” achi hi. Apa leh asanggamte ahilh hi. Apa'n atai a, akiang ah, “Mang na neih bangchi mang ahia? Kei leh na nu leh na sanggamte lei si in na mai ah ka kun taktak ding uh maw?” achi hi. Asanggamte'n amah ahaza ua, apa'n bel athugen alungsim in apai nilouh hi.Joseph Zuakna Leh Aigupta A Pina Asanggamte Shekem ah apa uh ganhon khah in ahoh uhi. Israel in Joseph kiang ah, “Na sanggamte'n Shekem ah ahi maw ganhon akhah uh?

Hong pai dih, akiang uah ka hon sawl ding,” achi hi. Huan ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na sanggamte adamdam na uhiam, ganhon leng adamdam na hiam va en inla, atanchin uh hong hilh nawn in,” achi hi. Hebron Phaizang a kipan asawlkhia a, Shekem ava pha hi. Mi kuahiam in amah gamlak a vakvak amu hi. Huai mi'n, “Bang zong na hia?” chi in adong hi. Ama'n, “Ka sanggamte zong ka hi. Hehpih in ganhon akhahna uh hon hilh ve,” achi hi. Huai mi'n, “Hiai a kipan pawt hi ve un, Dothan ah i hoh ding uh, achih uh ka za,” achi hi. Joseph in asanggamte adelhzui a, Dothan ah ava mu hi. Amau gamlapi a kipan ana galmuh ua, akiangnai uh atun ma in, amah thah ana sawm khin uhi. Amau, “En un, hiai ah mang neipa ahong pai. Hong un, i that ding ua, kokhuk khat ah i khe ding uh. Gamsa gilou in ane, chi na ni. Amangte bangchibang in a-om a, chih i thei mai ding uh,” akichi uhi. Reuben in huai ana za a, akhut ua pan ahunkheta hi. “Thah zaw i that hial kei ding uh,” achi hi. Reuben mah in apa uh kiang a, apitheihna ding a, akhut ua pan ahotkhiak theihna ding in, akiang uah, “Sisan zaw suah kei un, gamdai ah kokhuk ah khia un, atung ah khut kha kei un,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joseph asanggamte kiang atun in, Joseph puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial asilh, ana suahsak uhi. Amah api ua, kokhuk ah akheta uhi. Huai kokhuk avuak ahi a, tui om louhna ahi.

An ne ding in atu chiat ua, adak ua, a-en ua, ngai in, Gilead gam a kipan Ishmael khualzin mite, asangawngsau ua thil gimnamtui, singnai damdawi leh murrah pua in Aigupta gam a paisuk dingte ahong pai uhi. Judah in asanggamte kiang ah, “I naupa uh i thah ua, asisan suak i iim un bang phattuamna om ding ahia? Hong un, atung a khut kha lou in, Ishmaelte kiang ah i zuak zaw ding uh; amah lah i sanggam uh, i sa ngeingei uh ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in asanggamte'n athu azuita uhi. Midian sumsin mite ahong pai ua; kokhuk a kipan Joseph akaikhia ua, Ishmaelte kiang ah dangka sawmnih in Joseph akhawngta uhi. Amau Aigupta gam ah Joseph api uhi. Kokhuk ah Reuben ahong pai nawn a, ngai in, kokhuk ah Joseph ana omta kei a; apuansilhte abotkek hi. Asanggamte kiang ah ahong kik nawn a, “I naupa uh a-om nawn kei. Kei koi a paita ding ka hia oi?” achi hi. Joseph puanaktual ala ua, kelnou agou ua, asi ah apuanaktual adiah uhi. Huai puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial akhak ua, apa uh kiang ah ahon la ua, “Hiai lel ka mu ua, na tapa puanaktual ahi hia, hilou, en mah dih,” achi uh. Ama'n ana thei pah a, “Ka tapa puanaktual ahi ve. Gamsa gilou in ne ahi ve. Joseph bohnen vek a om hi mahmah ding ahi ve,” achi hi. Jakob in apuansilhte abotkek a, sai-ip puan ateng a, ni tamtak atapa asuun hi. Atapa tengteng leh atanu tengteng amah lungmuan ding in athou ua; himahleh amah lungmuan a-ut kei, “Suun kawm in han ah ka tapa kiang ah ka paisuk ding,” achi hi. Amah ngai in apa akap hi. Midiante'n Aigupta gam ah Joseph alutpih ua, Pharaoh nuai a heutu khat, vengmi pawl heutu Potiphar kiang ah azuak uhi. Joseph Leh Asanggamte

Huai lai in hichi ahong hi a, asanggamte kiang a kipan Judah apaisuk a, Adullam mi khat amin Hirah ava bel hi. Judah in huai ah Kanaan mi khat tanu amin Shuah amu a; akitenpih a, akithuahpih hi. Huchi in agai a, tapa anei a; Judah in amin Er asa hi. Agai nawn a, tapa anei nawn a; anu'n amin Onan asa hi. Tapa anei nawn a, amin Shelah asa a; amah aneih lai in Kezib ah Judah a-om hi. Judah in ata masa Er a ding in zi apisak a, amin Tamar ahi. Toupa mitmuh in Judah ta masa Er agilou a; Toupa'n amah athat hi. Judah in Onan kiang ah, “Na upa zi kitenpih inla kithuahpih in, na upa a ding in chi suahsak in,” achi hi. Onan in chisuah ding pen ama suan ahi kei ding chih athei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-upa zi akithuahpih teng in a-upa a ding a chi asuahsaklouhna ding in lei ah achi akesak zel hi. Athilhih in Toupa alungkimsak kei a, huaiziak in amah leng Toupa'n athat hi. Judah in amounu Tamar kiang ah, “Ka tapa Shelah apichin mateng na pa inn ah meithai in va om tadih phot in. Huchi lou in zaw amah leng asanggamte bang in asi kha ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Tamar apai a, apa inn ah ava omta hi. Anung in Shuah tanu Judah zi asi a; Judah ahong khamuantak in, Timnah ah abelam mulmette kiang ah alawm Adullam mi Hirah toh ahohtou uhi. Mi'n Tamar, “Na pasal pa, abelam mul met ding in Timnah ah ahohtou,” chi in ahilh uhi. Apasal suunna puansilhte asuah a, kikhuhna puan in akikhuh a, akituam bikbek a, Enaim kulh kongpi a Timnah kho lampi ah ana tu hi.

Shelah apichingta ngal a, apa'n azi ding in amah apisak kei, chih athei hi. Judah in amah amuh in kizuak hi in teh achi a; amai lah akikhuh bikbek ngal a. Lampi gei a om huai numei ava zuan a, “Kisa in, hehpih in i lumkhawm ding,” achi hi (amou mah ahi chih lah athei ngal kei a). Ama'n, “Hon kithuahpih leng bang na hon pe dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ganhon lak a kipan kelnou ka hon khak ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Huai na hon khak ma in kichiamna bang na hon pe dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Kichiamna bang ka hon pe dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na minsawnna leh na taute leh na chiangkhun,” achi hi. Huchi in hiaite apia a, akithuahpih a, amah a kipan nau apaita hi. Athou a, akikhuhna puan asuah a, ameithai puansilhte asilh nawnta hi. Judah in akichiamna numei khut a kipan la ding in alawmpa Adullam mi khut ah kelnou akhak a, himahleh ama'n huai numei ava muzouta kei hi. Huchi in numei omna mun a mite kiang ah, “Lampi gei a Enaim a kizuaknu koi a omta ahia?” chi in adong hi. Amau, “Hiai ah kizuak om kei,” achi uhi. Huchi in Judah kiang ah akik nawn a, “Amah ka muzou kei. Amun a mite'n leng kizuak mawngmawng hiai ah a-om kei ana chi uh,” achi hi. Judah in, “Ama'n nei den mai hen, huchi lou in zaw i zahlak kha ding. Ngai in, hiai kelnou khak ing a, amah lah muzou lou chin a,” achi hi. Kha thum vel nung in mi'n, “Judah, na mounu, Tamar kizuak ve aw; huai lou leng, ngai in, sawn apai hi,” chi in ahilh uhi. Judah in, “Pikhia unla, hallup in om hen,” achi hi.

Apikhiak uleh, Tamar in, “Hiai thilte neipa a kipan ahi nau ka pai,” chi in apasal pa kiang ah mi asawl hi. Amah mah in, “Hehpih in hiai minsawnna, taute leh chiangkhun, kua a ahia, ana enchian ding in ka hon ngen,” achi hi. Judah in huai thilte amah a ahi, chih ana thei hi. “Kei sang a amah diktatzaw ahi. Ka tapa Shelah lah amah toh ka na kitengsakta kei a,” achi hi. Huchi in Judah in amah akithuahpih nawn het kei hi. Huan anau suah hun ahong tun in hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, asul ah phik ana om uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, nau avei lai in khat in akhut ahon golhkhia a; naudommi in, “Hiai pen apawt masazaw ahi,” chi in ana len a, akhut ah khau san abunsak hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akhut alakkik toh kiton in, ngai in, asanggampa ahong suakkhia hi. Naudommi in, “Bangchidan a nang hon phusuak mawk na hia? Nang amoh khu in,” achi hi. Huaiziak in amin Perez asa uhi. Huai nung in asanggampa, akhut a khau san bun pen ahong pawt nawn a, amin Zerah asa uhi. Judah Leh Tamar

Huan Aigupta gam ah Joseph apisuk ua; Pharaoh nuai a heutu khat, vengtu pawl heutu, Aigupta mi, Potiphar in ahon pisuk Ishmaelte khut a kipan aleita hi. Joseph kiang ah Toupa a-om a, amah mi lohchingtak ahi a; apu Aigupta mi inn ah a-om hi. Apu in, Toupa akiang ah a-om a, athilhih peuhmah Toupa'n akhut ah alohchingsak chih athei hi. Huchi in Joseph in apu mitmuh in deihsakna atang a, a-inn ah nna asem zel hi. Ama'n a-inkuante tung ah heutu in abawl a, aneih tengteng akhut ah akoih vek hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-inn leh aneih tengteng tung a heutu ding a abawl nungsiah Joseph ziak in Toupa'n Aigupta mi insung avualzawlta hi. Inn lam leh gam lam a aneih tengteng ah Toupa'n avualzawl hi. Huchi in aneih tengteng Joseph khut ah akoih a, aneih teng, a-an nek kia lou ngal bangmah atheihpih kei hi. Joseph pianhoih leh melhoihtak ahi. Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, apu zi in Joseph angaih et a, “Hon kithuahpih in,” achi hi. Himahleh a-ut kei a, apu zi kiang ah, “Ka pu in hiai inn ah ka kiang ah bangbang a-om a chih lah athei ngal kei a, aneih tengteng ka khut ah akoih vek hi. Hiai insung ah kei sang a lianzaw kuamah a-om kei. Azi na hih ziak in nang kia lou ngal, kei a kipan bangmah it anei kei hi. Bangchi in hiai khelhna khawktak hih in Pathian tung ah thil ka hihkhial thei dia?” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, niteng in Joseph houpih zel mahleh amah kithuahpih lam thu hiam, ama kiang a om lam thu hiam alimsak nuam kei hi. Huchih lai in hichi ahong hi a, a-nna sem ding in insung ah ava lut a

insung ah mi himhim kuamah a-om kei hi. Huchi in ama'n, “Hon kithuahpih in,” chi in apuansilh ah ana man a, ama'n apuansilh akhut a nusia in ataikhia hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, apuansilh akhut a nusia in ataikhia, chih atheihtak in, A-inn a mite asam a, akiang uah, “En un, hon zahlaksak ding in Hebru mi khat i kiang ua hon pi ahita ve. Hon kithuahpih tum in ka kiang ah ahong lut a, huchi in ngaihtak in ka kikouta hi. Huan hichi ahi a, aw suah a ngaihtak a ka kikou azaktak in hiai ka kiang ah apuansilh anusia a, ataikheta,” achi hi. Joseph pu ahong tun masiah apuansilh akiang ah ana koih gige hi. Akiang ah hiai thu ana gen a, “Hebru sikha i kiang a na hon pi in hon zahlaksak tum in ka kiang ah ahong lut hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, aw suah a ka kikoutak in hiai apuansilh ka kiang a nusia in ataikheta,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahi a, Joseph pu in azi in akiang a, “Na sikha in hichi in ahon bawl,” chi a, athugen azak in, ahehna asou hi. Huchi in Joseph pu in amah api a, suangkul, kumpi suangkul tangte khumna mun ah akhum a; huchi in suangkul ah a-omta hi. Himahleh Joseph kiang ah Toupa a-om a, atung ah azahngai a, suangkul vengmi mitmuh in deihsakna atang hi. Huchi in suangkul vengmi in suangkul a tang tengteng Joseph khut ah akemsakta hi. Huchi in huai a thil kihih peuhmah ama hih ahong hita. Joseph kiang ah Toupa a-om a, athilhih peuhmah Toupa'n alohchinsak ziak in suangkul vengmi in akhut a thil om himhim a-enta kei hi. Joseph Leh Potiphar Zi

Huan huai thil khit in hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta kumpipa uain pepa leh atanghou bawlpa'n apu uh Aigupta kumpipa alungkimsak kei uhi. Pharaoh, asikha heutu nihte tung ah, a-uain pia heutupen tung ah leh atanghou bawl heutupen tung ah ahehta hi. Huchi in vengmi pawl heutu inn, Joseph hen a a-omna suangkul ah, atangsakta hi. Vengmi pawl heutu in amau Joseph akemsak a, amau a-nna asepsak ua, bang tan hiamtak atang uhi. Suangkul a hen a om, Aigupta kumpipa uain pepa leh tanghou bawlpa'n zan khat khiakna tuam tuak mang anei uhi. Azing in akiang uah Joseph ava lut a, amau ava mu a, ngai in, ana lungkham mahmah uhi. Ama'n, “Bangchi na hi ua, tuni in lungkham mel pu na tel uchia?” chi in Pharaoh sikha heutu suangkul a tangte adong hi. Amau akiang ah, “Mang ka nei tuak ua, hon hilhchiansak thei kuamah lah a-om ngal kei a ahi,” achi uh. Joseph in akiang uah, “Mang hilhchetnate Pathian a ahi kei maw? Hehpih in na mang uh hon hilh un,” achi hi. Huchi in uain pia heutupen in amang Joseph ahilh a, akiang ah, “Ngai dih, ka mang in, ka ma ah grepgui ahong om hi. Grepgui ah kahiang thum a-om a, ahong selnou ua, ahong pak ua, apakbomte'n grep minte ahon piangsak uhi. Huan ka khut ah Pharaoh nou ahong om a; grep gahte ka lou a, Pharaoh nou sung ah ka suk a, huai nou Pharaoh khut ah ka na pia,” achi hi. Joseph in akiang ah, ahilhchetna hiai ahi: “Kahiang thumte ni thum ahi. Tu a kipan ni thum in Pharaoh in na lutang adomkang ding a, na nasep mah ahon semsak nawn ding. A-uain pepa na hih lai a, na piak ngeina bang in akhut ah Pharaoh nou na pe nawn ding.

Himahleh na dinmun ahong hoih hun chiang in hon theigige inla, hehpih in hehpihna ka tung a langsak in, Pharaoh kiang ah ka tungtang hon gen inla, huan hiai inn a kipan hon pikhia in. Hebrute gam a kipan mi'n aguk a, ahon gukmang uh ka hi a; hiai gam ah leng kokhuk sung a ahon khumna ding in bangmah ka hihkhial kei,” achi hi. Tanghou bawlpa'n hilhchetna ahoih chih atheih in, Joseph kiang ah, “Ke'n leng mang ka nei a, ngai in, lohbeu thum ka lu in ka na pua hi. Lohbeu tungnungpen ah Pharaoh an, tanghou bawlpa bawl, chi chih ana om hi. Huaite vasate'n lohbeu ka lu a ka puak a kipan ana ne souhsouh uh,” achi hi. Joseph in adawng a, “Hiai ahilhchetna ahi: Lohbeu thum ni thum ahi. Tu a kipan ni thum in Pharaoh in na pumpi a kipan na lutang adomkang ding a, sing dawn ah akhai ding. Huchi in vasate'n na sa ane souhsouh ding uh,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni, Pharaoh pian champha ni in, ama'n asikha tengteng a ding in ankuang alui hi. Asikhate lak a uain pia heutupen lutang adomkangta hi. Uain pia heutupen uain pemi mah in apangsak nawn a; Pharaoh khut ah nou apeta hi. Himahleh Joseph in amau ahilhchet bangtak in, tanghou bawl heutupen akhailumta hi. Himahleh, uain pia heutupen in Joseph atheigige kei a, amangngilhta hi. Joseph In Hentate Mang Aletkhia

Huan kum nih vingveng nung in hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh in mang anei a; ngai in, lui gei ah ana dingh hi. Ngai in, bawngpi sagih hoih taktak, thau taktak ngen tui a kipan ahong pawtkhetou ua, loupa nou lak ah ahong gamta uhi. Ngai in, bawngpi dang sagih kil theuthou, gawng gemgom ahong pawtkhe nawn ua, bawngpi dangte kiang, lui gei ah adingh uhi.Joseph In Pharaoh Mang Hilhchian Huan bawngpi kil theuthoute'n bawngpi hoih taktak, thau taktakte anegai maimah uhi. Huchi in Pharaoh akhanglou a, a-ihmu nawn a, mang anei nawn hi. Ngai in, buh kung khat ah avui sagih lian pipi, hoih liahluah ahong omkhia hi. Ngai in, huai nung in vui sagih ngat giuhgeuh suahlam huih in anuai eksa nung ahong omkhe nawn hi. Avui ngat giuhgeuhte'n avui sagih lian pipi, hoih liahluahte avalh khin maimah uhi. Huchi in Pharaoh akhanglou a; ngai in, mang ana hi. Azingsang in hichi ahong hi a, alungsim abuai mahmah a; mi asawl a, Aigupta gam a mitkhialdawi siam tengteng leh mipil tengteng asamkhawm hi. Pharaoh in amang amau ana hilh a; himahleh Pharaoh mangte hilhchian thei kuamah a-om kei uhi. Huchih lai in uain pia heutupen in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Tuni in ka hihkhelh ka theikhia hi. Khatvei asikhate tung ah Pharaoh aheh a, huchi in vengmi pawl heutu inn ah kei leh tanghou bawl heutupen ahon tangsak hi. Kei leh ama'n zan khat mang ka nei ua, akhiakna tuam tuak ahi ka mat uh. Huai ah ka kiang uah vengmi pawl heutu sikha, Hebru mi, tangval khat a-om a; amah ka hilh ua, ama'n ka mangte uh ahilhchian hi. Ka mang uh toh kituak in ahon hilhchetsak hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, kei ka nasep mah ahon semsak nawn a, amah akhailumta hi,” achi hi.

Pharaoh in Joseph asamsak pah a, kintak in suangkul a kipan apikheta uhi. Amah akimet ngil a, apuansilh akhek a, Pharaoh kiang ah ava lut hi. Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Mang ka nei a, ahilhchian thei kuamah a-om kei uh. Nang mang thu na zak chiang in na hilhchian thei chih na tungtangmi gen ka na za hi,” achi hi. Joseph in Pharaoh adawng a, “Huai ahihleh kei a om ahi kei hi. Pathian in lungkimhuaitak in Pharaoh adawng zaw ding,” achi hi. Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Ka mang in, ngai in, lui gei ah ka na dingh hi. Ngai in, bawngpi sagih hoih taktak, thau taktak ngen tui a kipan ahong pawtkhetou ua, loupa nou lak ah ahong gamta uhi. Bawngpi dang sagih gina lou leh deihhuai lou leh gawng siatsuat, huchibang tel a hoih lou Aigupta gam tengteng a leng ka muh ngei louh, anung uah ahong pawtkhetou nawn uhi. Bawngpi gawng siatsuat deihhuai lou pipite'n bawngpi sagih thau taktak hong pawt masate anegai maimah uhi. Anekgaih khit nung un leng, ane uh chih akithei tuan kei hi. Atung lai mah bang in deihhuai loutak in a-om lailai uhi. Huchi in ka khanglouta hi. Ka mang in, ngai in, buh kung khat ah vui sagih lian pipi, hoih pipi ahong vuikhia hi. Ngai in, huai nung in vui sagih vuai ningniang, neu chikchik, suahlam huih in anuai hong vuikhe nawn hi. Avui ngat ngiungeute'n avui sagih hoih taktakte avalh khit maimah uh ka mu hi. Mitkhialdawi siamte ka hilh a, himahleh hon hilhchian thei kuamah a-om kei uh,” chi in agen hi. Joseph in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Pharoah mang khat ahi a, Pathian in hih ding a akisak Pharaoh theisak ahi. Bawng sagih hoih taktakte kum sagih ahi ua

vui sagih hoih taktakte leng kum sagih mah ahi uh. Huai mang khat ahi. Anung ua bawng sagih tek taktak, deihhuai lou taktak hong pawtkhetoute kum sagih ahi ua, vui sagih ahawm ngen suahlam huih nuaite toh; huaite kial kum, kum sagih ding ahi. Hiai ahi Pharaoh kiang a ka gen. Pathian in hih ding a akisak Pharaoh kiang a theisak ahi. Ngai in, Aigupta gamsung pumpi ah niang-le-tai a om kum, kum sagih ahong tung ding. Huai nung in kial kum, kum sagih ahong om nawn ding. Huchi in Aigupta gam ah niang-le-tai a omna mangngilh vek ahita ding. Kial in gam anegawp vek ding hi. Niang leh tai kum hon zui kial pen anasat mahmah ding ziak in mite'n hiai gam hauhsak lai hun athei nawnta kei ding uh. Pharaoh mang nihvei aneih tuansakna ahihleh hiai ziak ahi. Thilhih ding Pathian in ahihkip a, Pathian in atungsak pah ding hi. “Tu in Pharaoh in mi khat, teitak leh piltak zongkhia henla, Aigupta gam tung ah heutu in omsak hen. Pharaoh in hiai hih hen. Gam tung ah heutute sep henla, niang-le-tai a om kum, kum sagih sung Aigupta gam buh mun nga a khen mun khat zel kaikhawm hen. Amau huai kum hoih kum hong tung ding a buh tengteng kaikhawm in Pharaoh nuai a om ding in khuate ah tunung a nek ding in buh sungkhawm henla, kholkhawm hen. Kial ziak a gam amanlouhna ding in, buh kial kum, kum sagih Aigupta gam a hong tun hun a ding in hiai gam a ding a kiginkholhna ahi ding,” achi hi.Aigupta Ukpa A Joseph Bawl Ahi Pharaoh leh asikha tengteng in hiai thusawm hoih asaklamtak uh ahi. Pharaoh in asikhate kiang ah, “Hichibang Pathian kha omna mi i muzou ding ua hia?” achi hi.

Pharaoh mah in Joseph kiang ah, “Pathian in hiai tengteng hon theihsak ziak in, nang bang a tei leh pil himhim a-om kei uh. Nang ka inkote tung ah heutu in na om ding a, ka khua-le-tui tengteng na thu bang zel in a-om ding uh. Laltutphah a tut thu ah kia nang sang in ka lianzaw ding,” achi hi. Pharaoh mah in Joseph kiang ah, “En in, Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah heutu in ka hon bawl hi,” achi hi. Pharaoh in akhut a kipan aminsawnna zungbuh atolkhia a, Joseph khut ah abunsak a, puanmalngat a kibawl puansilhte asilhsak a, angawng ah dangka-eng khainiang a-oksak lai hi. Akangtalai neih nihna ah atuangsak a, “Ama ah khukdin un,” chi in mi akikousak hi. Huchi in Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah heutu in abawlta hi. Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Kei Pharaoh ka hi, na thu lou in Aigupta gamsung pumpi ah kuamah in akhut uh hiam, akhe uh hiam alik kei ding,” achi hi. Pharaoh in Joseph min Zaphnath-Paneah asa a; azi ding in On kho siampu Potiphera tanu Asenath apia hi. Joseph apawt a, Aigupta gamsung pumpi asiksuak hi. Aigupta gam kumpipa Pharaoh ma a Joseph adin lai in kum sawmthum a upa ahi. Pharaoh a kipan Joseph apawt a, Aigupta gamsung pumpi asiksuak hi. Hauh kum, kum sagih sung, lei in buh tampi atungsak hi. Aigupta gam ah hauh kum, kum sagih ahong tung a, buh tengteng adongkhawm a, huai buhte khuate ah asungkhawmta hi. Akim a om kho chih lou a buhte asungkhawm chiat hi. Joseph in buh tampi, tuipi piaunel zah bang in asungkhawm venvon a, asim leng atawp hial hi; sim zoh vual louh ahih tak ziak in.

Kial ahong tun ma in Joseph in tapa nih anei a, huaite On kho siampu Potiphera tanu Asenath in aneihsakte ahi uh. Joseph in atapa masa min Manasseh asa a, “Pathian in ka sepgimna leh ka pa insung mite tengteng ahon mangngilhsakta,” achi hi. Atapa nihna min Ephraim asa a, “Pathian in ka gimthuakna gam ah chi ahon suangsakta,” achi hi. Hauh kum, kum sagih Aigupta gam a hong tung abeita hi. Huan kial kum, kum sagih ding, Joseph gen bang in ahong tung panta hi. Gam chih ah kial ahong keta a; Aigupta gamsung teng ah bel nek ding a-om hi. Aigupta gam a mi tengteng akialtak un, Pharaoh kiang ah nek ding ngen in akikou uhi. Pharaoh in Aigupta mite kiang ah, “Joseph kiang ah hoh unla; na kiang ua agen peuhmah hih un,” achi hi. Leitung pumpi ah kial aketa hi. Joseph in sunkhawmna buh innte ahong a, Aigupta gam ah leng kial anak kiak mahmah hi. Leitung pumpi a kial anak kiak luat ziak in gam chih a mite buh lei ding in Aigupta gam a Joseph kiang ah ahong zel uhi.

Huan Jakob in Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih atheihtak in, Jakob in atapate kiang ah, “Bangziak a ki-en maimah na hi ua?” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Ngai un, Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih ka za hi. Si lou a i hinkhiak theihna ding in huai ah va hohsuk unla, huai a kipan ei a ding in buh va lei un,” achi hi. Joseph sanggam sawmte Aigupta ah buh lei ding in ahohsuk uhi. Jakob in asanggamte kiang ah Joseph nau Benjamin ahohsak kei; tuahsia ava tuak kha ding, achih ziak in. Huchi in Israel tapate mi ava hohte lak ah buh lei ding in ahoh ua; Kanaan gam ah leng kial ake ngal a. Aigupta gam tung a heutu Joseph ahi a; amah huai gammi tengteng kiang a buh zuakpa ahi. Joseph sanggamte ahong pai ua, lei si in amai ah akun uhi. Joseph in asanggamte ana mu a, amau ana thei lai hi. Himahleh akiang uah midang bang in akibawl a, khauhtak in amaute ahoupih hi. Akiang uah, “Koi a kipan a hong na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau, “Buh lei ding a Kanaan gam a kipan hong pai ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Joseph in asanggamte ana thei lai a, amaute'n ahihleh amah athei kei uh. Joseph in amau tungtang thu, mang a amatte atheikheta hi. Akiang uah, “Enkhe mite na hi uh. Gam venlouhna munte en ding a hong kuan na hi uh,” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “Ka toupa, hilou e, na sikhate buh lei ding a hong kuan ka hi uh. Mi khat ta vek ka hi ua, midiktak ka hi uh. Na sikhate enkhe mite ka hi zenzen kei uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka taksang kei, gam venlouhna munte en ding a hong pai himah uteh,” achi hi.

Amau, “Kou na sikhate unau sawm-le-nih, Kanaan gam a om, mi khat tapate ka hi uh. Ngai in, ka nautumpen uh tu in ka pa uh kiang ah a-om hi. Khat pen ahihleh a-om nawnta kei,” achi uhi. Joseph in akiang uah, “Enkhe mite na hi uh ka hon chih na hi mahmah uhi. Hichibang a ettel na hi ding uh. Na nautumpen uh hiai a ahong pai keileh Pharaoh hinna a kichiam in hiai a kipan na pawtkhe kei hial ding uh, ka hon chi ahi. Nou ah thutak a-om hia, om lou chetna ding in na lak ua khat kisawl unla, na nau uh hon pi hen. Nou bel hen in na om phot ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw Pharaoh hinna lou a kichiam in, enkhe mite na hi mahmah uh ka hon chi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in avek un ni thum atangsak chiat hi. Ani thum ni in Joseph in akiang uah, “Ke'n Pathian ka lau ziak in, hichi in hih le uchin na hing ding uh. Midiktat na hih ualeh na unau lak uah khat na suangkul tanin uah hen in om hen. Na nautumpen uh ka kiang ah hon pi un. Huchi in na thu uh atel ding a, na si kei ding uh,” achi hi. Huan huchibang in ahihta uhi. Amau, “I nau tung a i thilhih uh moh petmah i hi, hehpih ding a ahon nget ngutngut lai a, alungtang mangbatdan mu napi a, i ngaihkhiaksak nop louh uh. Huaiziak in hiai mangbatna in hon buak ahita,” akichi uhi. Reuben in, “Naupang tung ah thil hihkhial kei un, chi in na kiang uah ka gen kei maw? Na ngaikhe nuam kei ua ahi. Huaiziak in ngai un, asisan phu i tung ua lak ahita ve,” chi in amau adawng hi.

Akal ua paulet mi a-om ziak in Joseph in athugen uh athei chih athei kei uhi. Ama'n amau alehngatsan a, akapta hi. Akiang uah ahong kik nawn a, amau ahoupih a, alak ua pan Simeon apituam a, amitmuh un ahenta hi.Joseph Sanggamte Kanaan Ah Akik Nawn Uh Joseph in a-ipte uh buh a hihdim ding leh adangkate uh a-ip ua koih nawn chiat ding in leh lampi a nek ding pe ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in huchibang in ahihsakta hi. Abuh uh asabiltungte aposak ua, huai a kipan apawtkheta uhi. Alak ua mi khat in agiahbuk ua asabiltung an pe ding a a-ip ahonleh, adangka amuta hi. Ngai in, a-ipgong bul ah ana om hi. Asanggamte kiang ah, “Ka dangka na koih nawn uh hi veh e. Ngai un, ka ip sung ah ana om mawk hi,” achi hi. Alunglel ua, “Pathian in hichibang a eite ahon bawl bangchidan adiam aw?” chi in ling kawm in aki-entuah uhi. Kanaan gam a apa uh kiang ahong tung ua, atung ua thil tung tengteng ahilh uhi. “Huai mi, agam heutupa un, khauhtak in hon houpih a, enkhe mite ding in hon koih hi. Kou akiang ah, midiktak ka hi uh. ‘Enkhe mite ka hi zenzen kei uh. Unau sawm-le-nih ka hi ua, ka pa uh tapate ka hi vek uh. Khat a-om nawn kei a, ka nautumpen uh tu in Kanaan gam ah ka pa uh kiang ah a-om,” ka chi uhi. Huai mi, agam heutupa un ka kiang uah, “Hichi in midiktak na hi uh chih ka hon thei ding. Na sanggampa uh khat ka kiang ah nusia unla, na inkuanpih kialte a ding in buh pua unla, paita un. Na nautumpen uh ka kiang ah hon pi un.

Huchi in enkhe mite na hi kei ua, midiktak na hi zaw uh, chih ka thei ding. Huchi in na sanggampa uh ka hon pe nawn ding a, hiai gam ah sum na sinta ding uh,” ahon chi, achi uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-ipte uh abutkhiak lai un, ngai in, a-ipsung uah adangka tun chiat uh ana om hi. Amau leh apa un adangka tunte uh amuh un alau mahmah uhi. Apa uh Jakob in akiang uah, “Noute'n ka tate hon tansak na hi uh. Joseph a-om nawn kei. Simeon lah a-om nawn kei, Benjamin nangawn lah pimang na tum nawn ngal ua. Hiai thil tengteng in hon kiakkhum ahita ve,” achi hi. Reuben in apa kiang ah, “Na kiang a ka hon pikik nawn keileh ka tapa nihte that mai in. Amah ka khut ah hon kemsak inla, na kiang ah ka hon pikik nawn mai ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tapa na kiang uah ahong suk kei ding. A-upa asita a, amah kia lah ahita ngal a. Na paina lam lak ah tuahsia tuak taleh ka samkangpi toh lungkhamna in han ah na tumsak ding uh,” achi hi. Joseph Unaute Buh Lei Ding In Aigupta Ah Ahoh Uh

Huan gamsung ah kial anak kiak mahmah lai hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Aigupta gam a kipan a buh apuaktouh uh anekgaih nung un, apa un, akiang uah, “Kuan nawn unla buh tawmchik bek ei a ding in va lei nawn un,” achi hi. Huchi in Judah in akiang ah, “Huai mi'n, na naupa uh na hon tonpih kei uleh, ka mel na mu kei ding uh, chi in hon kalh giugeu hi. Ka naupa uh na hon zuihsak dingleh, buh ka hon va leisak ding uh. N'on zuihsak nop kei dingleh zaw, ka hoh dah mai ding uh. Huai mi'n ka kiang uah, na nau uh na hon tonpih kei uleh, ka mel na mu kei ding uh, achita ngal a,” chi in agen hi. Israel in, “Bangziak in ahia nau dang na neih lai tantan na hilh chitchiat uh? Kei a dia hoih lou na hih uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Huai mi'n, na pa uh dam lai hia? Unau dang na nei lai uhia? chi in i tanchin leh i tanaute tanchin ahon dong hi. Ahon thudot bang zel in ka hilh uhi. Na nau uh hon pisuk un, achi ding chih kua'n athei chitchiat dia?” achi uhi. Judah in apa Israel kiang ah, “Ka naupa uh hon zuisak in. Huchi in ka kisa ding ua, ka kuan ding uh. Kou leh nang leh ka taneu chikchikte uh leng si lou a i hintheihna ding un. Atungtang thu keimah in bultum na ning. Ka khut a kipan mahmah ah amah hon phut in. Amah na kiang a ka hon pikik nawn louh a, na ma a ka hon dinsak nawn keileh, tangtawn in amoh ka po ding hi. Om sawt lou hi le ung, anihveina hong tung nawn khinta ding hi ung a,” achi hi.

Apa uh Israel in akiang uah, “Huchibang ahih vanglakleh hichi in hih un. Na seng un hiai gam a thil hoih khenkhat singnai damdawi, khuaizu, gimnamtui, murrah, theihawk leh makha gah, neukha chiat bek huai mi a ding thilpiak tawisuk un. Dangka amun nih in tawi unla, na ipgong bul ua ahon dangka piak nawn leng tawi nawn un; amuhkhelh ahi kha ding. Na naupa uh leng pi un, thou unla, huai mi kiang ah va hoh nawn un. Na sanggampa uh khat pen leh Benjamin ahon khahsakna ding in Pathian Bangkim hihthei in huai mi hon zahngaisak hen. Ka tate suun ka hihleh suun ka hita mai kei dia,” achi hi. Huchi in thilpiak atawi ua, dangka leng amun nih atawi ua, Benjamin leng api uhi. Athou ua, Aigupta gam ah ahohsuk ua, Joseph ma ah adingh nawn uhi. Joseph in akiang ua Benjamin om amuhtak in, a-inkemmi kiang ah, “Huai mite insung ah pilut inla, gan gou inla, bawl in, huai mite'n sun chiang in ka kiang ah an ane ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n Joseph thupiak bang in ahihta a; Joseph inn ah apilutta hi. Joseph inn a pilut a a-om ziak un alau ua, “I hoh masak lai a, i ip ua dangka hong kik nawnte ziak in ei ve ahon pilut uh. I tung ua siatna zong a, hon sual in, ei leh i sabiltungte toh sikha ding a mat hon tum ahita ve,” achi uhi. Joseph inkemmi kiang ah ava hoh ua, kongbul ah ahoupih uhi. “Ka toupa aw, ka hong masak lai ua buh lei ding lel a hong suk ka hi uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, giahbuk ka tun un ka ipte uh ka hong ua, ngai in, ka dangka chiat uh ka ipgong bul uah ana om hi.

Ka dangka uh abuk ngeingei in ana om a, huchi in ka hon tawi uhi. Buh leina ding in dangka dang ka hon tawi ua, ka dangka uh lah kua'n ahia ka ip ua koih ka thei ngal kei ua,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Lungmuangtak in om unla, lau kei un. Na Pathian, na pa uh Pathian in na ipte uah gou ahon pia ahi mai ve. Na dangka uh lah ka mu ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang uah Simeon hon pikhia hi. Huai mi in Joseph insung ah amaute apilut a, tui apia hi. Akhe uh asil ua; asabiltungte uh leng an apia hi. Athilpiak tawi uh Joseph sun an ne ding a ahong pai ma in ana bawlkhol ua; huai ah an ane ding uh chih lah aza ngal ua. Joseph a-inn a ahong paitak in, akhut ua thilpiakte, insung ah akiang ah atawilut ua, lei si in amai ah akun chiat uhi. Ama'n atanchin uh adong a, “Na pa uh tanchin na gen uh, huai putek ahoih na maw? Adam lai hia?” achi hi. Amau, “Na sikha ka pa uh damtheihna ahoih in, adam laitak ahi,” achi uh. Huchi in alu uh akunsak ua, zahtakna apia uhi. Amah adak a, anau Benjamin, anu tapa amu a, “Hiai na nautumpen uh, atanchin na hon hilh uhia?” achi hi. Amah mah in, “Ka tapa, Pathian in hon hehpih hen,” achi hi. Joseph in anaupa amuh in akhase mahmah a, kintak in kahna ding mun azong pah a, adantan sung ah alut a, huai ah akapkheta hi. Amai aphiat a, ava pawt nawn a, akidek teitei a, “An nek bawl un,” achi hi. Huchi in amah a ding atuam in, amaute a ding atuam in, Aigupta mi anekpihte a ding atuam in abawlta uhi.

Aiguptate'n lah Hebrute anekpih thei ngal kei ua; huchibang hih lah Aiguptate a ding in thilsiang lou ahi. Huchi in a-upapen ta masa ahihna bang in, anaupangpen nautumpen ahihna bang dungzui zel in Joseph ma ah atu ua; huchi in lamdang asa chiat uhi. Joseph in ama a mite a kipan tantuan an aban piaksak a, Benjamin tantuan houh amaute tantuan tengteng sang in amun nga in atam tuam hi. Uain adawn ua, nuam asa chiat uhi.

Huan ama'n a-inkemmi kiang ah, “Huai mite ip in apuak zoh zahzah buh in dimsak inla, adangka chiat uh a-ipgong bul chiat uah koih in. Ka nou, huai dangka nou, anaupangpenpa ipgong bul ah koih in, abuh man dangka toh,” chi in thu apia hi. Huchi in ama'n Joseph thugen bang in ahihta hi. Khua avaktak in amau asabiltungte uh toh apaisakta hi. Khua a kipan apaikhiak ua gamla atun ma un, Joseph in a-inkemmi kiang ah, “Thou inla, huai mite va delh in. Na va phak chiang in akiang uah, ‘Bangchidan a thil hoih, thil hoih lou a thuk na hi ua? Huai ka pu uain dawnna leh a-aisanna mahmah hilou ahi maw? Hichibang na hih uh na gilou uhi, chi in,” achi hi. Huan adelhphaktak in, huai thute akiang uah agen hi. Amau akiang ah, “Pu, bangchidan ahia hiai bang thute na gen? Na sikhate'n huchibang thil ka hihlouhdan ding uh. Ngai in, ka ipgong bul ua dangka ka muhte uh leng Kanaan gam a kipan na kiang ah ka hon tawi ve ua oi. Bangchidan in na pu inn a dangka hiam dangka-eng hiam gu mawk ding ka hi ua? Na sikhate lak ah kuapeuh na muhna penpen si hen, huan kou leng ka pu uh sikha in ka om mai ding uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Hi hen, na thu bang zel un hi hen. Himahleh kuapeuh ka hon muhna penpen ka sikha in om hen. Nou ahihleh dembei na hi ding uh,” achi hi. Huaitak in amau ip chiat uh kintak in lei ah angakhia ua, amau ip chiat ahong uhi. Ama'n a-upapen ah apan a, anaupangpen pha in azong a; huchi in Benjamin ip ah nou amuta hi. Huaitak in apuansilhte uh abotkek ua, amau sabiltung chiat aposak nawn ua, khua ah akik nawnta uhi.

Judah leh asanggamte'n Joseph inn ava pha ua; amah huai ah ana om lai hi. Huchi in amai ah abokkhup chiat uh. Joseph in akiang uah, “Bang thil ahi mai a na hih uh? Kei bang mi in, aisan a hichibang thil mukhe thei ka hi, chih na thei kei ua hia?” achi hi. Judah in, “Ka toupa kiang ah bang ka genta ding ua? Bang ka hon hilhta ding ua? Bangchibang in ka kigenvengta ding ua? Pathian in na sikhate tatlekna amukheta. Ngai in, ka toupa sikhate ka hita mai uh. Kou leh akhut a nou amuhna pen uh leng,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Huchibang a ka hih louh ding dan. Akhut a nou amuhna pen kia ka sikha in a-om ding a, nou zaw lungmuangtak in na pa uh kiang ah paitouta un,” achi hi.Judah In Benjamin A Ding In Angetsak Huaitak in, Judah in Joseph ava naih a, “Ka toupa aw, hehpihtak in, kei na sikha, ka toupa bil a na zak ding in thu kam khat hon gensak inla, na hehna na sikha tung ah kuangsak ke'n, nang lah Pharaoh bang hial na hita ngal a. Ka toupa'n, ‘Pa hiam sanggam hiam na nei uhia? chi in na sikhate na hon dong hi. Ka toupa kiang ah, ‘Pa putektak leh atek lam a neih naupang chik ka nei uh. Huai mipa upa asita a, anu neih lak ah amah kia a-om lai a, apa'n lah amah a-it mahmah hi, ka chi uhi. Nang na sikhate kiang ah, ‘Ka mit a amah ka muhtheihna ding in ka kiang ah hon pisuk un, na chi hi. Ka toupa kiang ah, ‘Ka naupa un apa anuse thei kei ding; apa paisanleh apa asi mai ding, ka chi uhi.

Nang na sikhate kiang ah, ‘Na nautumpen uh na hon tonpih kei uleh, ka mel na mu nawn kei ding uh, na chi hi. “Huan hichi ahong hi a, na sikha ka pa uh kiang ka va tun un, ka toupa thute ka hilh uhi. Ka pa un, ‘Kuan nawn unla, buh tawmchik bek ei a ding in va lei nawn un, ahon chi hi. Kou, ‘Ka hohsuk thei nawn kei ding uh. Ka nautumpen uh ahong dingleh bel ka hohsuk ding ua, ka nautumpen un ahong pai keileh zaw huai mi mel mu thei lou ding ka hi uh, ka chi uhi. Na sikha ka pa un ka kiang uah, ‘Ka zi in tapa nih ahon neihsak chih na thei uhi. Akhat pen ka kiang a kipan apaikhia a, bohzan vek a om hi ngei ding ahi, ka chi hi. Huai nungsiah amah mu lou vengveng ka hi.
