Huchi in hiai mi leng ka kiang a kipan na pikhiak ua, tuahsia va tuak taleh lungkhamtak a han a ka samkangpi toh hon tumsak ding na hi uh, achi hi. “Huchi in ka nau in kou hon zui lou in, na sikha ka pa uh kiang va tung leng, ka nau uh hinna toh ahinna akizop ziak in, hichi ahong hi ding a, naupang in ahon zui kei, chih atheih chiang in asi mai ding. Huchi in na sikhate'n na sikha ka pa uh samkangpi toh lungkhamna a han a tumsak ding ka hi uh. Na sikha in na kiang a ka hon pikik nawn keileh, amoh tangtawn in ka pa lak ah ka po ding, chi in ka pa kiang ah ka nau uh tungtang thu ah abultumpa in ka kibawlta hi. Huchi in hehpih in na sikha ka nau uh sik in, ka toupa sikha in hon omsak zaw inla, ka nau asanggamte zuitousak in. Ka naupa'n hon zui lou in bangchi in ka pa kiang ah ka paitou thei dia? Atung a siatna tung mu ding ka kei hiam,” achi hi. Nou Mang

Huan akiang a dinghte ma ah Joseph akidek zouta kei, “Mi tengteng ka kiang a kipan pawtkhesak vek un,” chi in akikoukhia hi. Joseph asanggamte kiang a akigen sung teng akiang ah kuamah adingh kei uhi. Akap loloih a, Aiguptate'n aza ua, Pharaoh inkuanpihte'n leng aza uh. Joseph in asanggamte kiang ah, “Keimah Joseph ka hi. Ka pa adam lai na maw?” achi hi. Himahleh asanggamte'n adawng thei kei ua, ama ah buaitak in a-om uhi. Joseph mah in asanggamte kiang ah, “Hehpih in hon naih un,” achi hi. Huchi in ava naih ua, ama'n, “Na unaupa uh Joseph, Aigupta gam a lutpih ding a na khotpa uh ka hi. Himahleh hiai a pai ding a na hon khot ziak un lungkham kei unla, kihehkhum tuan sam kei un. Mite hinna hondam ding in Pathian in na ma ua hon sawl masa ahi. Hiai kum nih sung hiai gam ah kial aketa a; kum nga in asam lai hi. Huai sung in leileh a-om kei ding a, buhlak leng a-om kei ding. Tunung khang om zel ding hawisak ding leh noute hotdamna thupitak a hingdam a ka hon omsak theihna ding in Pathian in na ma uah kei ahon sawl masa hi. Huchi in hiai a hon sawl noute na hi kei ua, Pathian ahi zaw. Ama'n Pharaoh pa in leh a-inkuanpih tengteng heutu in leh Aigupta gam tengteng vaihawmtu in ahon bawlta hi. “Kintak in ka pa kiang ah va pai unla, akiang ah, na tapa Joseph in hichi in achi: Pathian in Aigupta gam tengteng heutu in ahon bawlta a, ka kiang ah hong paisuk in, sawt hon hal ke'n. Huchi in Goshen gam ah na teng ding a, ka kiang ngei ah na om ding

nang, na tate, na tute, na belamhonte, na bawnghonte leh na neih tengteng toh. Hiai ah keimah in ka hon vak ding; kial lah kum nga om lai ding ahi ngal a. Huchi lou in zaw nang leh na inkuanpihte leh na neih tengteng toh na kialgawp kha ding uh,” hon chi un. “Ngai un, noumau mit ngei leh ka nau Benjamin mit ngei in keimah kam mahmah in agen lai na mu kilkel uhi. Aigupta gam a ka thupina tengteng thu leh na thil muh tengteng thu uh ka pa na hilh ding ua; kintak in hiai ah ka pa na hon pisuk pah ding uh ahi,” achi hi. Anau Benjamin ngawng a kun in akap a; Benjamin leng ama ngawng a kun in akap hi. Asanggamte tengteng atawp a, akahkhum chiat a, huai khit in asanggamte'n thu vantang agenpih uhi. Joseph sanggamte ahong uh chih thu thuthang Pharaoh inkote'n ana za uhi. Huai in Pharaoh leh asikhate akipaksak mahmah hi. Pharaoh in Joseph kiang ah, “Na sanggamte kiang ah huchi in hih in. Na gante uh buh posak unla, pawt unla, Kanaan gam ah pai un. Na pa uh leh na inkuanpihte uh hon pi unla, ka kiang ah hong pai un. Aigupta gam a thil hoihte ka hon pe ding a, hiai gam a thil om hoihpente na ne ding uh. Thu ka hon pia ahi, ‘Hichibang in hih un: Na taneu chikchikte uh a ding leh na zite uh a ding Aigupta gam a kipan kangtalaite la unla, na pa uh pi ding in va kuan un. Na van uh leng ngaihtuah nuam dah un, Aigupta gam tengteng thil hoih peuhmah nou a ahi ngal a, ” achi hi.

Israel suante'n huchibang in ahih ua, Joseph in Pharaoh thupiak bang in akiang uah kangtalaite apia a, lampi a nek ding leng apia hi. Avek ua kiang ah puansilh kikhenna ding ape chiat a; Benjamin kiang ngial ah houh dangka zathum leh puansilh kikhenna ding nga apia hi. Apa kiang ah hiaite akhak hi: Aigupta gam a thil hoih pua sabiltung sawmkhat leh lampi a, apa a ding buh leh tanghou leh nek ding pua sabengtungnu sawmkhat toh. Huchi in asanggamte asawlkhia a, apaita uh. Ama'n akiang uah, “Lampi ah kina lou ding in pilvang un aw,” achi hi. Aigupta gam a kipan apaitou ua, huan Kanaan gam a apa uh Jakob kiang ava tungta uhi. Akiang ah, “Joseph adam lai a, huan Aigupta gam tengteng tung ah vaihawmpa in apang,” chi in ahilh uhi. Athugen uh agintak louh ziak in, alungtang abahta hi. Akiang ua Joseph thugente ahilh ua; atuanna ding kangtalai Joseph in akhakte amuh in Jakob lungtang ahong halh nawn hi. Israel in, “Ahunta; ka tapa Joseph hingdam a na om ahi maw. Ka sih ma in amah ka va mu ding,” achi hi. Joseph Asanggamte Kiang Ah Akipuangkhia

Huan Israel aneih tengteng toh apawtkhia a, Beer-sheba atung a, apa Isak' Pathian kiang ah kithoihnate alan hi. Pathian in zan a mengmuhna in Israel ahoupih a, “Jakob, Jakob,” achi hi.Ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Kei Pathian, na pa Pathian ka hi. Aigupta gam a hohsuk lau ke'n. Huai ah chi thupitak in ka hon bawl ding hi. Aigupta gam ah na kiang ah ka hong ding a; ka hon pitou nawn ngeingei ding, na sih chiang in Joseph in hon mitsisak ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Beer-sheba a kipan Jakob apawt a; Israel suante'n apa uh Jakob leh ataneu chikchikte uh leh azite uh tuanna ding a Pharaoh in kangtalai akhakte ah atuangsak uhi. Huchi in Jakob leh asuan tengteng in Kanaan gam a alamkhiak uh, gantate leh vante tawi in, Aigupta gam atungta uhi. Atapate, atupate, atanute, atunute leh asuan tengteng, Aigupta gam ah alutpihta hi. Hiaite Israel suan Aigupta gam a lut, Jakob leh atapate min ahi uh: Jakob ta masa Reuben ahi. Reuben tapate Hanok, Pallu, Hezron leh Karmi ahi uh. Simeon tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Johar leh Kanaan numei tapa Shaul ahi uh. Levi tapate: Gershon, Kohath leh Merari ahi uh. Judah tapate: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez leh Zerah ahi ua; (Kanaan gam ah Er leh Onan asita ua) Perez tapate Hezron leh Hamul ahi uh. Issakar tapate: Tola, Puah, Job leh Shimron ahi uh. Zebulun tapate: Sered, Elon leh Jahleel ahi uh. Hiaite tengteng Leah tapa, atanu Dinah toh Padan-aram gam a Jakob aneihsakte ahi ua; atapate leh atanute avek un sawmthum-le-thum ahi uh. Gad tapate: Ziphion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi leh Areli ahi uh. Asher tapate: Jimnah, Ishuah, Isui leh Beriah leh asanggamnu uh Serah ahi uh. Beriah tapate: Heber leh Malkiel ahi uhi.

Hiaite Zilpah Laban in atanu Leah kiang a apiak tapate, Jakob aneihsak mi sawm-le-guk ahi uh. Jakob zi Rakil tapate: Joseph leh Benjamin ahi uh. Joseph in Aigupta gam ah tapa Manasseh leh Ephraim anei a, huai mite On kho siampu Potiphera tanu Asenath in amah aneihsakte ahi uh. Benjamin tapate: Belah, Beker, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim leh Ard ahi uh. Hiaite Rakil tapa Jakob aneihsakte ahi ua, avek un sawm-le-li ahi uh. Dan tapa Hushim ahi. Naphtali tapate: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer leh Shillem ahi. Hiaite Bilhah tapate Laban in atanu Rakil kiang a apiak ahi uh. Hiaite Jakob aneihsak a, avek un sagih ahi uh. Jakob tapate' zite sim louh in Jakob kiang a Aigupta gam a lut, akhal a pawt tengteng avek un sawmguk-le-guk ahi uhi. Joseph in Aigupta gam a tapa aneihte nih ahi ua; Jakob inkote, Aigupta gam a lutte, avek un sawmsagih ahi uhi.Aigupta Ah Jakob Leh A-inkuante Jakob in Goshen gam lampi na kawkmuh ding in Joseph kiang ah Judah ahoh masasak hi. Huchi in Goshen gam ah alutta uhi. Joseph in akangtalai abawlkhol a, Goshen gam ah apa dawn ding in ahohtou hi. Akiang ah akigen a, angawng a kun in akap nilouh hi. Israel in Joseph kiang ah, “Dam in na om a, na mel ka muh nawn ziak in tu'n zaw si ding in ka kimanta,” achi hi. Joseph in asanggamte leh apa inkuanpihte kiang ah, “Ka va hohtou ding a, Pharaoh ka hilh ding a, akiang ah, ka unaute leh ka pa inkuanpihte, Kanaan gam a-omte ka kiang ahong tungta uh. Amaute ganvulmi, belamching mite ahi ua, abelamhonte uh, abawnghonte uh leh aneih tengteng uh ahon po vek uh, chi in ka va gen ding. Hichi ahong hi ding a, Pharaoh in nou ahon sap a, bang nasem na hi ua? ahon chih chiang in, na sikhate, hon suangtute a kipan naupang chik ka hih lai ua kipan tuni tanpha ganvulmi ka hi uh, na chi ding uh. Huchi in Goshen gam ah na teng thei ding uh,” achi hi; belamching mite himhim lah Aigupta mite kihlamtak ahi ngal ua. Aigupta Ah Jakob Leh A-inkuan Apai Uh

Huai khit in Joseph in Pharaoh ava hilh a, akiang ah, “Ka pa, ka sanggamte, abelamhonte uh, abawnghonte uh leh aneih tengteng uh toh Kanaan gam a kipan ahong tungsuk ua; ngai in, Goshen gam ah a-om uh,” achi hi. Huan asanggamte lak a kipan mi nga api a, Pharaoh ava lak hi. Pharaoh in asanggamte kiang ah, “Bang nasem na hi ua?” achi hi. Amau Pharaoh kiang ah, “Na sikhate, kou hon suangtute a kipan belamching mite ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Amau mah in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Hiai gam a om tadih ding a hong pai ka hi ua; ka gam uah lah na sikhate' belamhonte nek ding a-om nawnta kei a; kial lah Kanaan gam ah a-uang mahmah hi; hehpih in na sikhate Goshen gam ah hon tengsak in,” achi uhi. Pharaoh in Joseph ahoupih a, “Na pa leh na sanggamte na kiang ahongta ua; Aigupta gam akiching mahmah hi. Na pa leh na sanggamte gam hoihpenna mun ah tengsak in. Alak ua thilhihtheitak, theihna nei a-om ngialleh ka ganvulhte tung a makai ding in bawl in,” achi hi. Joseph in apa Jakob apilut a, Pharaoh ma ah adingsak a; Jakob in Pharaoh avualzawl hi. Pharaoh in Jakob kiang ah, “Kum bangzah na hita a?” achi hi. Jakob in Pharaoh kiang ah, “Ka khualzin nung zaw kum za-le-sawmthum ahita, ka damsung kumte atawm in ahaksa hi. Hon suangtute akhualzin lai ua adamsung kum uh leng phazou kei ing,” achi hi. Huchi in Jakob in Pharaoh avualzawl a, Pharaoh a kipan apawtkhia hi. Joseph in apa leh asanggamte tenna abawlsak a, Pharaoh thupiak bang in Aigupta gam a hoihpenna mun ah, agou ding un Rameses gam apeta hi.

Joseph in apa leh asanggamte leh apa' inkuanpih tengteng a-inkuan uh dungzui zel in nek ding apia a, avakta hi.Kial Huai gam tengteng ah nek ding himhim a-omta kei a; kial lah a-uang semsem hi. Kial ziak in Aigupta leh Kanaan gam abahta hi. Joseph in abuh leina man uh, Aigupta gam leh Kanaan gam a dangka om tengteng akhawmsak vek hi. Joseph in huai dangka Pharaoh inn ah atawilut hi. Aigupta gam leh Kanaan gam a dangka tengteng azatbei khit un, Aigupta mi tengteng Joseph kiang ah ahong ua, “Nek ding hon pia in. Na ma a si maimah ding ka hi ding uam? Dangka lah a-om nawn ngal kei a,” achi uhi. Joseph in, “Na gantate uh hon pe mai un. Dangka a-om nawn keileh na ganta man un nek ding ka hon pe ding,” achi hi. Joseph kiang ah agantate uh ahon pi ua; Joseph in sakol man ding, belamhon man ding, bawnghon man ding leh sabiltung man ding in nek ding ana pe zel hi. Huai kum in aganta tengteng uh man in nek ding apia a, avak chiat hi. Huai kum abei a, kum ahong thak nawn in akiang ah ahong nawn ua, “Ka dangka teng uh abei takdan ka toupa ka hon iim kei ding uh. Ka toupa'n ka gantate uh na neita hi. Ka toupa mitmuh in ka pumpi uh leh ka gam uh chih louh, bangmah ka nei nawn kei uh. Bangziak a na mitmuh a kou leh ka gam uh mangthang maimah ding ahia? Koumau mah ka gam uh toh an in hon lei mai in. Koumau leh ka gam uh Pharaoh sikhate ka hi ding uh. Si lou a dam a ka omtheihna ding un leh gam asiatlouhna ding in buhchi hon pia in,” achi uhi.

Huchi in Joseph in Pharaoh a ding in Aigupta gam tengteng aleisakta hi. Atung ua kial a-ot mahmah ziak in Aigupta mite'n lah alou uh azuak chiat uhi. Huchi in gam Pharaoh a ahi vekta hi. Aigupta gamgi tawp khat lam a kipan khat lam tawp pha in khuate ah mite akisuansakta hi. Siampute gam kia alei kei a, siampute'n Pharaoh a kipan tantuan anei ua, Pharaoh in apiak atantuan uh ane zel uhi. Huaiziak in agam uh azuak kei uhi. Huai nung in, Joseph in mite kiang ah, “Ngai un, tuni in na gam uh leh noute Pharaoh a ding in ka hon leita hi. Hiai ah nou a ding in buhchi a-om, lei ah na ching ding uhi. Buh lak hun chiang in hichi ahi ding a; Pharaoh a ding in seh nga suah seh khat zel na pe ding ua, aseh li pen noumau a ahi ding. Lou a achi ding, noumau na inkuanpihte uh leh na tanu neu chikchikte uh nek ding ahi ding,” achi hi. Amau, “Nang ka hinna uh na humbitta. Ka toupa'n pha asakleh adeihsakna hon musak henla, Pharaoh sikhate ka hi ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in Joseph in Pharaoh in seh nga suah seh khat amuh zel ding thu, Aigupta gam a ding in tuni tanpha in dan in abawlta hi. Siampute gam kia ahi, Pharaoh a hilou.Jakob Ngetna Nanung Israel in Aigupta gam a Goshen gam ah tenna abawlta a, huai ah akihih inbul a, chi tampi asuang a, nakpitak in apungta hi. Aigupta gam ah Jakob kum sawm-le-sagih ateng a, huchi in Jakob damsung kum zakhat sawmli-le-sagih ahi. Israel sih hun ahong naita a

atapa Joseph asam a, akiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, hehpih in ka pheipi nuai ah na khut golh inla, ka tung ah ginom leh diktak in gamta in, hehpih in Aigupta gam ah hon vui mahmah ke'n. Hon suangtute kiang a ka ihmut hun chiang in, nang Aigupta gam a kipan na hon pokhe ding a, amaute vuina mun ah na hon vui zaw ding ahi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Na chih bang in ka hih ding,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka kiang ah kichiam in,” achi a; akiang ah akichiamta hi. Huchi in lupna lukhung si in Israel akunta hi.

Huan hiaite nung in hichi ahong hi a, Joseph kiang ah, “Ngai in, na pa achi na,” achi uhi. Huchi in atapa nihte Manasseh leh Ephraim akiang ah atonpih hi. Jakob kiang ah, “Ngai in, na tapa Joseph na kiang ah ahong hi,” chi in ahilh uh. Israel akihalhsak a, lupna ah atutou hi. Jakob in Joseph kiang ah, “Pathian Bangkim hihthei, Kanaan gam a Luz ah ka kiang ah akilak a, ahon vualzawl hi. Ka kiang ah, chi tampi ka hon suangsak ding a, ka hon hihpung lai ding. Chi tuamtuam omkhawm in ka hon bawl ding. Hiai gam na nung a na suante kiang ah atangtawn gou ding un ka pe ding,” ahon chi hi. “Na tapa nihte, Aigupta gam a na neihte, kei' a ahi ua, Reuben leh Simeon mah bang in Ephraim leh Manasseh kei' a ahi ding uhi. Hiai mite nung a ta na neihte nang a ahi ding uh, agoutan uah asanggamte uh min akikoppih ding uh ahi. Kei tungthu ahihleh, Padan gam a kipan ka hong pai lai in Kanaan gam ah lamkal ah Ephrath khua gamla kuam ahih lai in, ka kiang ah Rakil asi hi. Huai ah Ephrath kho lampi ah ka vuita, huai tuh Bethlehem khua ahi,” achi hi. Israel in Joseph tapate a-en a, “Hiaite kuate ahi ua?” achi hi. Joseph in apa kiang ah, “Hiaite ka tapa, Pathian in ahon piakte ahi uh,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hehpih in ka kiang ah hon pi in, amau ka na vualzawl ding,” achi hi. Israel mit a-upat tak ziak in achiim nawn kei a, ama'n ana tawp a, ana pom hi. Israel in Joseph kiang ah, “Na mel muh ka kilamen nawn kei a, himahleh, ngai in, Pathian in na suante mel nangawn ahon musakta,” achi hi.

Joseph in amau apa khuk kal a kipan apikhia a, amai a lei si in akun hi. Joseph in anih un akai a, Ephraim pen akhut taklam in Israel khut veilam pang ah, Manasseh pen akhut veilam in Israel khut taklam pang a kai in apinai hi. Israel in asawkkalh teitei a, akhut taklam in asawk a, Ephraim anaupangzaw lusip ah anga a; Manasseh bel ata masa ahi. Joseph avualzawl a,“Hon suangpa Abraham leh Isak om zelna Pathian,tuni tan a ka damsungtengteng hon vakpa Pathian, thil hoih lou tengteng akipan hon tanpa Angel in naupangte vualzawl hen.Ka min leh hon suangpaAbraham leh Isak min pu uhen.Khovel ah thupitak hi ding inhong pung uhen,” achi hi. Joseph in apa'n akhut taklam Ephraim lusip a angak amuh in alungkim kei hial a; apa khut Ephraim lusip a kipan Manasseh lusip a suan ding in apa khut suansak a sawm hi. Joseph in apa kiang ah, “Pa, hichibang ding ahi kei. Hiai ahi ta masa, na khut taklam a lusip ah nga zaw in,” achi hi. Himahleh, apa a-ut kei a, “Ka thei hi, ka tapa aw, ka thei hi. Amah leng nam gen tham in a-om ding a, amah leng athupi ding hi. Himahleh amah sang in anaupa athupizaw ding a, asuante leng chi tuamtuam tamtak ahong hi ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in Jakob in, “Nang ah Israel vualzawl ahi ding, Pathian in Ephraim leh Manasseh bang in hon bawl hen,” chi in avualzawl hi. Huchibang in Manasseh ma ah Ephraim a-omsak hi. Israel mah in Joseph kiang ah, “Ngai in, si ding ka hita. Himahleh na kiang uah Pathian a-om ding a, nou hon suangtute gam ah ahon pilut nawn ding hi. Huai lou leng, na sanggamte tantuan sang in tan khat ka hon pe tuan hi, ka namsau leh ka thalpeu a Amorte khut a kipan ka laksak pen,” achi hi. Jakob In Ephraim Leh Manasseh Avualzawl

Huan Jakob in atapate asamkhawm a, hichibang in agen hi: “Ni nanungte a na tung ua thil hong tung dingte ka hon hilhtheihna ding in hong kikhawm un. “Nou Jakob tapate aw,hong kikhawm unla,ngaikhia un;na pa uh Israel thu ngai un. “Reuben, nang ka tapa masa, ka thilhihtheihna,ka hatna gah masapen na hi.Sanpenna leh thuneihpenna nang a ahi. Himahleh tui bang a kip lou na hi,tungnunpenna na nei kei ding;na pa lupnapi a na kal ziak in.Huai ah ka lupna a kal inna hihbuah hi. “Simeon leh Levi unau ahi ua,anamsaute uh sisan suahna vanzat ahi. Ka kha aw, nang zawakikupna uah va kigolh ke'n.Ka thupina, nang zaw akikhopna uah tel ke'n.Aheh un mi athat ua,agenhak un bawngtal thagui asattat uhi. Ahehna un hamsia dong hen,hangsantak ahi ngal ua.Athangpaihna un lenghamsia dong hen,hinsetak ahi ngal ua.Jakob ah amaute ka kikhensak ding a,Israel ah ka hihdalh ding hi. “Judah, nang na unaute'nahon phat ding uh.Na doute ngawng ah na khutna nga ding a; na ma ah na tapate akun ding uh. Judah humpinelkai nou ahi.Ka tapa, na sa keih na paitouhsanta.Na kun a, humpinelkai bang in na bok a,humpinelkainu bang inna kualsuk hi.Kua'n ahia hon thousak ngam ding? Judah a kipan lalchiang amang kei ding,vaihawmpa chiang akhekal akipan amang kei ding.Shiloh ahong pai mateng;mite'n ama thu amang ding uhi. Grepgui ah asakolnou akhih ding a,asabiltungnou grepgui hoih chi ah akhih ding hi.Apuansilhte uain in asawp ding a,grep sisan in apuan asawp lai ding hi. Amitte uain in asan ding ua,ahate nawitui in angou ding uhi. “Tuipi gei ah Zebulun ateng ding a,longkhawlna luipiau ahi ding a;agamgi Zidon ah ahi ding. “Issakar zaw sabiltung hattak ahi a,van-gik nih kal a kual ahi.

Khawl hoih in athei a,gam leng hoih in athei;huchi in van po ding in aliangzang aniamsak a,phutluih nasem in sikha in ahong omta hi. “Dan in Israel nam lak a khat bang inamite vai ahawmsak ding. Dan ahihleh lamlian gei a gul,lampi a gulgial, atung atuangmi thalkiak ek khop asakol khetul tu nakpa ahi ding. “Aw Toupa, na hotdamnaka ngak gige hi. “Gal in Gad asual ding a, himahlehama'n akhetul lam uahamaute asual zaw ding hi. “Asher, anek ahoih ding a,kumpi nekte apiangsak ding hi. “Naphtali, zukpi khah ahi.Thuhoih pipi agen zel hi. “Joseph hiang gah nuamtak ahi,tuikhuk kiang a hiang gah nuamtak;ahiang nawnsawnte'n baang atuam uhi. Thalkap mite'n nakpitak in amah ahihgenthei ua,akap ua, asimmoh uhi. Himahleh, amah thalpeukhauhtak in a-om gige a,abanthate Jakob' Pathian Mihatpa hatsak;belamchingmi, Israel suangpi a pan ahi. Na pa Pathian,nang hon panpih dingpa,Bangkim hihtheipa,tunglam van vualzawlnate,nuailam a om gige tui thuktakvualzawlnate,nawite leh sul vualzawlnate,nangmah hon vualzawl dingpa ngei hihhat in na om hi. Na pa vualzawlnate hon suangtutevualzawlna sang in tangtawn mualte tawpkhawk pha in athupizawta hi.Hiaite Joseph lutung ah a-om ding a,asanggamte a kipan hihtuam aompa lusip ah a-om ding hi. “Benjamin ngia duhgawl bang in,zingsang in asa matte ane ding a,nitaklam in agallak ahawm ding,” achi hi. Huaite tengteng Israel nam sawm-le-nihte ahi uh. Huai thute leng amaute vualzawlna akiang ua apa uh thugen ahi. Vualzawlna atan ding gun bang zel un avualzawl chiat hi.Jakob Sihna Leh Vuina Ama'n atapate thugou asiah a, akiang uah, “Ka chipihte kiang a pi a om ding ka hita. Hit mi Ephron lou a kokhuk a kei hon suangtute kiang ah hon vui un. Kanaan gam a Mamre ma a Makpelah lou a kokhuk, Abraham in kivuina mun ding a Hit mi Ephron a kipan alou toh alei ah. Huai ah Abraham leh azi Sarah avui ua; huai ah Isak leh azi Rebekah avui ua; huai mah ah Leah ka vui hi. Alou leh asung a kokhuk om Hit suante a kipan alei ahi,” achi hi. Jakob in atapate kiang a thugou asiah khit in akhete lupna ah angatou a, akha akhahta a, achipihte kiang ah pi in a-om samta hi. Jakob Thu Nanung

Huan Joseph in apa mai asi a, akah a, atawp hi. Joseph in asikha damdawi siamte apa luang muat thei lou a bawl ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in damdawisiamte'n Israel luang muat thei lou in abawl uhi. Aluang bawlna in ni sawmli azang ua; muat thei lou a bawlna ding a ni hiai zah lut zel mah ahi. Ni sawmsagih sung teng Aiguptate'n amah asuun uhi. Amah asuun nite uh abei nung in, Joseph in Pharaoh inkuante ahoupih a, “Na mitmuh ua deihsakna ka tanleh hehpih in Pharaoh bil a zak ding in, ‘Ka pa'n, ngai in, si ding ka hita. Kanaan gam a ka han ding a ka tohsa ngei ah na hon vui ding ahi, chi in ahon kichiamsak hi. Huaiziak in tu in hehpih in ka pa hon potousak inla, hon va vuisak in. Huchi in ka hong pai nawn ding, achi, chi in hon gensak un,” achi hi. Pharaoh in, “Ahon kichiamsak bang in na pa va potou ve,” achi hi. Joseph, apa vui ding in ava hohtou hi. Pharaoh sikha teng, a-inkuan lak a upate leh Aigupta gam upate tengteng leh, Joseph inkuanpih tengteng leh asanggamte leh apa inkuanpihte, akiang ah ava hohtou uhi. Ataneu chikchikte uleh abelamhonte uleh abawnghonte kia uh Goshen gam ah anusia uhi. Akiang uah kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite leng ahohtou ua, pawlching petmah ahi uh. Jordan lui gal a Atad phual atung ua, huai ah nakpitak in akah ua, ni sagih sung apa suunna anei uhi. Hiai gammi Kanaante'n, Atad phual a ami suun uh amuh un, “Hiai Aiguptate misi suunna thupitak ahi,” achi uhi. Huaiziak in huai mun Abel-mizraim asa ua, huai Jordan lui gal a om ahi. Atapate'n athupiak bang in ahihsak uhi.

Atapate'n Kanaan gam ah azawnglut ua, Abraham in kivuina mun ding a, Hit mi Ephron a kipan alou toh aleikhawm Mamre ma a Makpelah lou a kokhuk ah avuita uhi. Apa avui khit in Joseph leh asanggamte leh apa vui ding a amah toh hohtou tengteng Aigupta gam ah akik nawnta uhi.Joseph In Asanggamte Atheisak Thak Joseph sanggamte'n apa uh sita ahi chih amuh un, “Joseph in ahon mudah ding a, atung a i thilhihkhelh tengteng phu i tung uah akim in ahon la kha ding e,” achi uhi. Joseph kiang a hilh ding in mi asawl ua, “Na pa'n asih ma in hichi in thu apia hi. Joseph kiang ah, ‘Hehpih in na sanggamte tatlekna leh agitlouhna uh ngaidam in. Na tung ah thil hoih lou ahihta ngal ua. Tu in hehpih in na pa Pathian sikhate tatlekna ngaidam in, achi, chi in va gen un,” achi hi. Akiang a agentak un Joseph akap hi. Asanggamte leng ava hoh ua, ama ah abokkhup chiat ua, “Ngai in, na sikhate ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Joseph in akiang uah, “Lau kei un. Pathian sik a om ka hi a hia? Nou zaw ka tung ah thil gilou hih lungsim na pu ua; himahleh tuni in mi tampi hing leh dam a humbitna ding a thil hoih suahsak Pathian lungsim ahi zaw hi. Huaiziak in tu in lau kei un. Nou leh na taneu chikchikte uh ka hon vak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in amau alungmuan a, kamsiamtak in ahoupih hi.Joseph Sihna Joseph, amah leh apa inkuanpihte toh Aigupta gam ah ateng ua, Joseph kum za-le-sawmkhat adam hi. Joseph in Ephraim ta, tusawn thum chiang amu hi. Manasseh tapa Makir tate leng Joseph phei tung a khanglian ngen ahi uh. Joseph in asanggamte kiang ah, “Si ding ka hita hi.

Himahleh Pathian in ahong veh ngeingei ding a, hiai gam a kipan hon pikhia in, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob kiang a kichiam a, piak ding achiamsa gam ah ahon pitou ding,” achi hi. Joseph in Israel suante akichiamsak a, “Pathian in ahong veh ngeingei ding a, hiai a kipan ka guhte na potou ding uh ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in Joseph kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi. Aluang muat thei lou ding in abawl ua, Aigupta gam ah hankuang sung ah akoih uhi.

Kanaan Gam La Ding In Toupa'n Joshua Thu Apia Mosi kiang a ka gensa bang in na khepek ua na sikna peuhmah uh ka hon pe vek ding. Gamdai a pan leh hiai Lebanon tang a pan lui lianpi Euphrates Luipi pha a, Hitte gam tengteng, nitumna lam a tuipi zatak pha in na gam uh ahi ding. Na damsung teng kuamah himhim in hon nangzou kei ding. Mosi kiang a ka om bang in, nang kiang ah leng ka om ding hi. K'on zuausan kei dia, pai leng k'on paisan sam kei ding hi. Hattak leh hangsantak in om in; asuante uh kichiam a piak ka na chiamsa gam, hiaite luahsak ding na hi ngal a. Ka sikha Mosi in dan tengteng zui dia thu hon piak zui tinten ding in hattak leh hangsantak in om peuhmah phot in. Na paina teng a na lamzan zel theihna ding in na taklam ah hiam, na veilam ah hiam pialsan het ke'n. Hiai Dan Bu in na kam pawtsan het kei hen. Hiai a thu kigelh tengteng na zuih tinten theihna ding in sun leh zan in na ngaihtuah zaw ding ahi. Huchi in na lampite na tuahphasak dia, na hong lamzang ding hi. Thu ka hon pia hilou hiam? Hattak leh hangsantak in om in. Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n, Toupa na Pathian na paina teng ah na kiang a om ding ahi,” achi hi.Joshua In Mipite Thu Apia Joshua in mipi heutute thu apia a, “Giahphual va sik unla, mipite kiang ah, ‘Nek ding sutuah dih ua, ni thum sung a Toupa na Pathian un gam luah dia ahon piak luah ding a Jordan lui kan ding na hih ziak un, ” chi in thu ahon pia hi.

Reubente, Gadte leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang ah Joshua in, “Toupa na Pathian un khawlna ahon pia a, hiai hon pe ding chi a Toupa sikha Mosi in thu hon piak theigige un. Na zite uh, na taneu chikchikte leh na ganhonte uh zaw Jordan lui gal a Mosi in gam hon na piak ah a-om ding uh. Nou mihat leh hangsan teng kigalthuamsa in na pai masa ding ua, na unaute uh na panpih ding ua, Toupa'n na unaute uh noute bangmah a khawlna apiak a, Toupa na Pathian un hon gam piak amaute'n leng aluah mateng uh. Huchi in Toupa sikha Mosi in Jordan lui gal, nisuahna lam gam nou a tuam ding a hon na piakna lam ah na kik nawn ding ua, na luah ding uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Hih dia na hon thupiak tengteng ka hih ding uh, n'on sawlna teng ah leng ka pai ding uh. Bang lam peuh a Mosi thu ka zuih bang un, nang thu leng ka zui ding uh. Mosi kiang a Toupa na Pathian a-om bang in nang kiang ah leng om peuhmah phot hen. Kuapeuh na thupiak kalh a, hel a, thu na piak peuhmah zui nuam lou zaw hihlup ding ahi. Hattak leh hangsantak in om peuhmah phot in,” chi in Joshua adawng uhi.

Huan Nun tapa Joshua in, “Agam leh Jeriko khua va en mah dih ua,” chi in mi nih Sittim a pan asim a enkhe ding asawl hi. Ava hoh ua, kizuak khat, amin Rahab inn ah ava lut ua, huai ah ava zintung uhi. “Ngai in, tuzan in gam enkhe ding in Israel suante ahong uh,” chi in Jeriko kumpipa hilh in a-om hi. Joshua In Jeriko Ah Enkhe mite Asawl Jeriko kumpipa'n, “Na inn a hong tung mikhualte hon pekhia in. Gam pumpi enkhe ding a hong ahi uh,” chi ding in Rahab kiang ah mi asawl hi.Enkhia Mi Nihte Humbitna Numei in huai mi nihte api a, asel a, akiang uah, “Hi, ka kiang ah mite ahong ngei ngut ua, himahleh koi a pan hong pai ahi ua, chih zaw ka thei kei. Huan hichi ahong hi a, khomial, kulh kongpi khak hun lai in huai mite apawtkhe nawnta uh. Koilam ah ahia apai uh ka theita kei hi. Delh meng le uchin, na pha lai ding uh,” achi hi. Himahleh inn tung ah apitou a, inn tung a ziza kung siatkhawm lak a sel khin lah ahi ngal a. Mite'n Jordan lui lam ah, agalkaina tan in ava delh ua; adelh mite apawtkhiaktak un kulh kongpi akhak uhi.Enkhemite Lohchinna Alup ma un inn tung ah akiang uah ava hohtou hi. Akiang uah, “Hiai gam Toupa'n nou ahon peta, na lauhhuaina un hon delhkhum a, hiai gam a teng tengteng na ma uah azul khin uh, chih ka thei hi. Aigupta gam a pan na hong pawtkhiak un Toupa'n Tuipi San ahon hihkangsak a, Jordan lui gal a Amorte kumpi nih: Sihon leh Og tung a na hihdante uh, huchibang a na hihmangdante uh lah ka na zata ngal ua.

Huai ka na zaktak un, ka lungtangte uh azul khin a, noute ziak a lau lou himhim a-om kei hi. Toupa na Pathian u lah tunglam van ah leh nuailam lei ah Pathian ahi.Enkhe mite Leh Rahab Thukhun “Tu in na tung uah ka hehpihna ka langsakta hi, nou leng ka pa inkote tung ah na hehpihna uh langsak sam un. Ka nu leh ka pa, ka sanggam pasalte, ka sanggam numeite leh aneih teng uh hawi unla, sihna lak a pan ka hinna uh hon humbitsak ding in Toupa min in hehpih in ka kiang ah kichiam unla, chiamtehna dik hon pia un,” achi hi. Mite'n akiang ah, “Ka thilhih uh na genkhiak kei dingleh na sih tang in ka si ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n gam ahon piak hun chiang in, ka hon hehpih ding ua, na tung ah muanhuaitak in ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi. Tohlet ah khauhual azankhesuk a; khopi kulhbaang khou a a-inn om ahi a, huan amah kulhbaang tung a teng ahi. Akiang uah, “Tang lam zuan in pai un, huchi lou in zaw nou hon delhte'n ahon mu kha ding uh. Huai ah ni thum sung va kibu un; nou hon delhte ahong kik nawn masiah uh. Huai zoh chiang in na pai nawn na ding uh,” achi hi. Mite'n akiang ah, “Kichiamna a na hon kichiamsakna ah zaw dembei ka hi ding uh. Ngai in, hiai gam ka hong lut chiang un na hon khiakna tohlet ah hiai khau san na gak belh in. Insung ah na kiang ah na pa, na nu, na sanggam teng leh na pa inkote tengteng pilut vek in.

Huan hichi ahi ding a, na inn kongpi a pan kholak a pawtkhe peuhmah alutung ah asisan a-om dia, kou ahihleh moh in ka om kei ding uh. Kuapeuh insung a na kiang a om peuhmah atung ua khutkhak ahihleh, ka lutung uah asisan uh a-om ding hi. Himahleh ka thilhih uh na genkhiakleh na hon kichiamsakna ah moh in ka om kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Na thu bang zel uh hi hen,” achi a; huchi in amau akhakhia a, apaita uhi. Tohlet ah khau san agakden hi.Enkhe mite Paikikna Apai ua, huai tang ava tung ua, huai ah ni thum, amau delhte akik nawn masiah uh ava om uhi. Adelh mite'n lamtawn in azong ua, himahleh amuzou kei uh. Huai mi nihte akik nawn ua, huai tang a pan apaisuk ua, agalkah ua, Nun tapa Joshua kiang atung ua; atung ua thil tung tengteng ahilh uhi. Joshua kiang ah, “Toupa'n agam pumpi i khut uah ahon na pe petmah ve, huai kia leng hilou, huai gam a tengte i ma uah azul khin uh,” achi uhi.

Huan Joshua zingkhang in athou a, Israel suan tengteng toh Shittim a pan akisuan ua, Jordan lui atung uhi. Agalkah ma un huai ah agiak uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni thum nung in heutute'n giahphual ava tawn vialvial uhi. “Toupa na Pathian uh thukhun bawm leh siampute, Levi chite'n azawn uh na muh chiang un na omna ua kipan kisuan unla, na zui ding uh ahi. Israel Mipite'n Jordan Akan Uh Himahleh nou toh akal tehna tong sangnih vel ahi ding ahi. Naih kei unla, huchi in na paina ding lampi na theithei ding uhi. Hiai lampi lah tuma lam in na tawn ngei ngal kei ua,” chi in mipite thu apia uhi. Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kihihsiangthou un, zingchiang a Toupa'n na lak ua thillamdang mahmah hih ding ahi,” achi hi. Joshua in siampute kiang ah, “Thukhun bawm zawng unla, mipite ma ah galkah un,” achi hi. Huchi in thukhun bawm azawng ua, mipite ma ah apaita uhi.Joshua Kiang A Toupa Thu Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Mosi kiang a ka om bang in na kiang ah ka om ding, chih atheihtheihna ding un, tuni in Israel tengteng mitmuh in ka hon pahtawi pan ding hi. Thukhun bawm zawng siampute, Jordan lui gei na tun chiang un, Jordan lui ah dingden un, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi.Mipite Kiang A Joshua Thu Joshua in Israel suante kiang ah, “Hong pai unla, Toupa na Pathian uh thu hong ngaikhia un,” achi hi. Joshua in, “Hiai ah Pathian hing na lak uah a-om a, na ma uah Kanaante, Hitte, Hivte, Perizte, Girgaste, Amorte leh Jebuste adelhkhe ngeingei ding hi. Ngai un, leitung pumpi Toupa thukhun bawm in na ma uah Jordan lui akan hi.

Israel namte lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih sik in mi khat zel telkhia un. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa leitung pumpi Toupa bawm zawng siampute khepek Jordan tui a akingaktak in, saklam a pan Jordan tui hong luangte akitat dia; ahong kiching venvon ding,” achi hi.Jordan Lui Kanna Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipite Jordan lui kan dia apuanin ua kipan apawt lai un, mipite ma ah thukhun bawm zawng siampute apai uhi. Bawm zawngte Jordan lui ava tung ua, bawm zawng siampute khe in tui gei asiktak in, buhlak sung teng Jordan lui a kuang tengteng ah tui alet gige hi. Saklam a pan tuipi luang lai akhawlta a, gamla kuamtak a Zarethan gam chin a Adam ah ahong kiching hi. Arabah tuipi, Chi Tuipi lam a luangsuk lai akitat geih a; huchi in Jeriko khozawntak ah mipite agalkahta uhi. Jordan lui lai ah Toupa thukhun bawm zawng siampute leihul ah adingh ua, mipi tengteng Jordan lui agalkah vek uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, anam pumpi ua Jordan lui agalkah siang nung un, Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Mipite lak a mi sawm-le-nih, nam chih a mi khat zel telkhia inla, akiang uah, Jordan lui lai, siampute dinna laitak a suangte sawm-le-nih la unla, pophei unla, giahphual, tuzan a na giahna ding uah koih un, chi in thu pia in,” achi hi. Theihgigena Suangte Phuh Ahi Joshua in akiang uah, “Toupa na Pathian uh bawm ma ah Jordan lui lai ah galkah unla, Israel suante anam zah zel in, michih in suang khat chiat pua hen. Hiaite na lak uah chiamtehna ahong hi ding a, tunung chiang in na tate un, hiai suangte bang na chihna uh ahia? chi a ahon dot chiang un, Nou akiang uah, Toupa thukhun bawm ma a Jordan tuite ahong kan tak ziak in ahi. Jordan akan lai un, Jordan tuite ahong kitat a ahi. Hiai suangte Israel suante'n tangtawn a atheihgigena ding uh ahi, na chi ding uh,” achi hi. Israel suante'n Joshua thupiak bang in ahih ua, Israel suante'n anam zah zel in, Jordan lui lai a suang sawm-le-nih ala ua; agiahphual uah, apophei ua, huai ah akoih uhi. Thukhun bawm zawng siampute dinna laitak, Jordan lui lai ah Joshua in huai suang sawm-le-nihte aphut a; huaite tuni tan in a-om lai uhi. Mosi in Joshua thu ana piak tengteng bang a Toupa'n mipite kiang a hih dia Joshua thu apiak ahihzoh vek mateng uh siampu bawm zawngte Jordan lui lai ah adingh nilouh uhi. Mipite akinoh ua, agalkahta uhi.Jordan Lui Kante Kivolhdan Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng agalkah siang vek nung un, Toupa bawm leh siampute leng mipi mitmuh in agalkahta uhi.

Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte Mosi in akiang ua ana gen khitsa bang in, Israel suante ma ah kigalthuam in agalkah uhi. Galvan a kivan dimdiam mi singli vel galdou ding in Jeriko phaizang ah Toupa ma ah agalkah uhi. Huai ni in Toupa'n Israel tengteng mitmuh in Joshua atawisang a; Mosi alauh mah bang un adamsung teng in amah alau uhi. Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah thu agen a: “Siampute, thu theihpihna bawm zawngte Jordan lui a pan hong pawt ding in thu pia in,” achi hi. Joshua in siampute, “Jordan lui a pan hong pawtta un,” chi in thu apia hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, siampute, Toupa thukhun bawm zawngte Jordan lui lai a pan ahong pawt ua, siampute khete'n leihul asiktak in, Jordan tuite aluan ngeina bang un ahong luang nawn ua, ama a mah bang in akuang ah aluanglet nawn hi.Gilgal A Giahphual Bawlna Mipite akha khatna, ani sawm ni in Jordan lui a pan apawt ua, Jeriko suahlam pang Gilgal ah giahphual asatta uhi. Jordan lui a pan suang sawm-le-nih apuakkhiak uh, Joshua in Gilgal ah aphut hi. Israel suante kiang ah, “Tunung chiang a na suante un apate uh kiang a, hiai suangte bang chihna ahia? chi a hon dot chiang un, ‘Israelte'n Jordan lui leihul ah agalkah ua ahi, chi in na suante uh na theisak ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian un nidanglai a Tuipi San i galkah masiah ua, i ma ua ana kangtatsak mah bang in, Toupa na Pathian un Jordan tuite na galkah masiah uh na ma uah akangtatsak a ahi. Lei a nam chiteng in Toupa khut ana hat ngei, chih atheih ua, Toupa na Pathian uh tangtawn a alauhtheihna ding un,” chi in agen hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jordan lui khen suahlam a om Amorte kumpipa tengteng leh tuipi gei a om Kanaan gam kumpipa tengtengte'n, agalkah masiah uh Toupa'n Jordan tuite Israel suante ma ah akangtatsak, chih ana zak un, Israel suante ziak in alungtang uh ana zul khin a, lauthawng lou himhim a-om kei uhi. Huai lai in Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Temta hiam kibawl inla, Israel suante zek anihveina ding in sumsak in,” achi hi. Joshua in temta hiamte akibawl a, Israel suante Gibeth Haraloth ah azek uh asumsak hi. Joshua in azeksumna ziak hiai ahi: Aigupta gam a pan pawt tengteng, pasal galdoumi tengteng Aigupta gam a pan apawtkhiak nung un lamkal a gamdai a asih khit tak ziak uh ahi. Gilgal A Zeksumna Toupa aw angaihkhiak nop louh ziak ua mipi tengteng, Aigupta gam a pan hong pawt galdou mite tan hihman a a-om vek tan un Israel suante gamdai ah kum sawmli avialvak uhi. Toupa'n amau pi-le-pute kiang a nawitui leh khuaizu luanna gam kichiam a piak ana chiam, huai gam mu lou ding in akiang uah Toupa ana kichiamta hi. Asuante uh amau sik a akhanletsakte Joshua in azek uh asumsak hi. Lamkal a azek uh sum ahih louh ziak in zeksum louh ana hi him uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng zek asum khit un, adam mateng uh amau giahphual chiat uah a-om uhi. Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Tuni in Aiguptate'n nou hon muhsitna uh noumau a pan ka khukmangta,” achi hi. Huchi in tuni tan in huai mun Gilgal achi uhi. Israel suante'n Gilgal ah giahphual asat ua; Jeriko Phaizang ah huai kha, ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang alui uhi. Paikan khit azing mah in huai gam a tanghou silngou soh louh leh vaimim kan ane uhi.

Huai gam a buh anek ni zing ua pan manna aketa kei a; Israel suante'n manna leng amu nawn kei uhi. Huai kum in Kanaan gam a buh-le-bal ane zawta uhi.Joshua Leh Namsau Tawi Pasal Khat Huan Jeriko kho kiangchin a Joshua a-om lai in adak a, a-entou a, ngai in, hichi ahong hi a, amazawn chin ah mi khat anamsau phawisa tawi in ana ding hi. Joshua in ava naih a, akiang ah, “Kou lam a pang na hi hia, ka melmate uh lam a pang?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hilou e, Toupa sepaihte heutu dia hong pai ka hi zaw,” achi hi. Huchi in lei ah Joshua abokkhup a, amah abia a, akiang ah, “Ka toupa'n asikha kiang ah bang gen ding nei ahia?” achi hi. Toupa sepaihte heutu in Joshua kiang ah, “Na khepek a pan na khedap phel in. Na dinna mun siangthou ahi,” achi a; huchi in Joshua in aphelta hi.

Jeriko khua Israel suante ziak in akikhak bikbek a; kuamah apawt kei ua, kuamah leng alut kei uh. Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “En in, Jeriko leh akumpipa uh leh amihat hangsante uh na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. Galdoumi tengteng in khopi kimvel in khatvei na va velsuak phot ding uh. Huchibang in ni guk sung na hih ding uh ahi. Siampu sagih in bawm malam ah belampa kii pengkul sagih atawi ding ua, ani sagih ni in khopi sagihvei na velsuak ding ua, siampute'n pengkul amut ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, belampa kii amutging uh na zak chiang un, mipi tengteng ngaihtak in kikou uhen. Huchi in khopi kulhbaang achim dia, mipi amau mazawn chiat ah apaitou ding uh,” achi hi. Jeriko Kulh Sualna Ama'n mipite kiang ah, “Pai zel unla, khopi velsuak un, mi kigalthuamte Toupa bawm malam ah pai zel uhen,” achi hi.Jeriko Kulh Kimvelna Hichi ahong hita a, Joshua in mipite kiang a thu agen khit in Toupa ma a belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi siampu sagihte apai zel ua, pengkul amut ua; Toupa thukhun bawm in azui hi. Mi kigalthuamte pengkul mut siampute ma ah apai ua, nungdal mite'n bawm amasuan ua, siampute'n pai kawm in pengkul amut uhi. Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kikou kei unla, na aw uh leng zak hi kei hen. Kikou dia thu ka hon piak ni atun mateng na kam ua pan thu pawt kei hen. Huai hun chiang in na kikou ding uh,” chi in thu apia hi. Toupa bawm khopi khatvei velh in avelsuaksak a; giahphual ah apai ua, giahphual ah agiak nawn uhi. Joshua zingkhang in athou a, siampute'n Toupa bawm azawng uhi. Toupa bawm ma ah belampa kii pengkul sagih tawi siampu sagihte apai ua, pengkul amut uhi.

Ama uah mi kigalthuamte apai ua; nungdalte'n Toupa bawm ahon masuan ua, siampute'n apai kawm un pengkul amut uhi. Ani nih ni in khopi khatvei avelsuak nawn ua, agiahphual uah akik nawn uh. Huchibang in ni guk ahih uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in zingkhang, phalvak in athou ua, ahihdan ngei mah un sagihvei avelsuak ua; huai ni kia in khopi sagihvei avelsuak uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, asagihveina a siampute'n pengkul amuttak un Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Kikou un: Toupa'n khopi ahon pe khinta hi. Khopi leh asung a thil om tengteng Toupa hamsiat ahi. Rahab kizuaknu kia, amah leh a-insung a akiang a om tengteng bel i misawlte uh ana sel ziak in hinghawi ding ahi. Nou zaw hamsiat thilte a pan kihuikhe hiau un, huchi lou in zaw, hamsiat thilte la in noumau mah hamsiat in na omloh kha ding uhi. Israelte giahphual hamsiat a omsak in na buaisak kha ding uhi. Dangkasik, dangka-eng, dal leh sik tui-um belsuan teng ahihleh Toupa a tuam ahi vek hi. Toupa sum in akoih ding ahi,” achi hi.Jeriko Kulh Lakna Mipite akikou ua, siampute'n pengkul amut uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, mipite'n pengkul ging azaktak un, ngaihtak in akikou ua, kulhbaang achimta hi. Huchi in mipite amazawn chiat uah apaitou ua, khopi ah alut ua, khopi alata uhi. Khopi sung a mi tengteng, numei leh pasal, atek-akhang, bawngtal, belam leh sabiltung teng namsau in asatlum vek uhi.Rahab Inkuan Hotdamna Joshua in mi nih, gam va enkhete kiang ah, “Huai kizuaknu inn ah va lut unla, akiang a na kichiamsa bang un huai numei leh aneih teng hon pikhia un,” achi hi.

Enkhe mi tangvalte ava lut ua, Rahab, anu leh pa, asangamte leh aneih teng ahon pikhia ua, atanau teng leng ahon pikhia ua; Israelte giahphual polam ah a-omsak uhi. Khopi leh asung a thil om teng mei in ahal vek ua; dangkasik, dangka-eng, sum-eng leh sik tui-um belsuan teng kia Toupa' inn a sumkoihna ah akoih uhi. Himahleh Joshua in Jeriko khua enkhe dia amisawlte ana humbit ziak in, Rahab kizuaknu leh aneih teng leh apa inkuante Joshua in ahinghawi vek a; Israelte lak ah tuni tan in ateng lai uhi.Jeriko Hamsiatna( Kum. ) Huai lai in Joshua in,Hiai Jeriko khopi hon lam nawn peuhmah Toupa ma ah hamsiat in om hen.Asuangphum phummi ta masa leh akulhbaang kongpitetungkhemi ta tumpen leng hamsiat in om hen,chi in amaute ahilh chiatchiat hi. Joshua kiang ah Toupa a-om a; gam pumpi ah amin hong thangta hi.

Himahleh Israel suante hamsiat thilte ah ahong talekta ua, Judah nam a Zerah tapa Zabdi, huai tapa Karmi, huai tapa Akan in hamsiat thilte ana la a, Israel suante tung ah Toupa ahehta hi. Joshua in Jeriko a pan Bethel suahlam Beth-Aven chin a om Ai ah mi asawl a, akiang uah, “Va hohtou unla, gam va enkhia un,” chi in agen hi. Mite ava hohtou ua, Ai khua ava enkhia uhi. Joshua kiang ah akik nawn ua, akiang ah, “Mi tengteng hohtou chitchiat kei uhen. Mi sangnih hiam sangthum hiam va hohtou uhenla, Ai khua dou le uh. Mi tengteng va hihgim chitchiat ding ahi kei; tawmchik kia lah ahi ngal ua,” achi uhi.Israelte Vuallelhna Huchi in mipi lak a mi sangthum huai ah ahohtou ua, Aite ma ah ahong taikek uhi. Aite'n mi sawmthum-le-guk ana that ua; kulhbaang kongpi chin a pan Sebarim pha hial in adelh ua, akumsukna ah athat uhi. Huaiziak in mite lungtang azul khin a, tui bang ahong hita hi. Joshua in apuante abotkek a, Toupa bawm ma ah amah leh Israel upate amai ua lei si in nitaklam tan in abokkhup uhi. Alu uah leivui abuak uhi. Akan Khelhna Toupa aw, hichi a melmate delh a Israelte ataikek mawk uh bang ka lohta dia oi? Kanaante leh hiai gam a tengte'n aza ding ua, ahon um ding ua, lei a pan ka min uh hihmangthang ding ahita ve ua. Na min thupi bang na chihta dia le?” achi hi.Joshua Pathian Dawnna Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Thou in, Bang achia bokkhup nilouh na hia? Israelte'n thil ahihkhial ua; zuih dia ka piak ka thukhun ah atalek ua, hamsiat thilte ala ua, agu nalai ua, asim iim behlap ua, amau van lak mahmah ah asimsel uhi.

Huaiziak in ahi, Israel suante'n amelmate uh zou lou a, amelmate a pan ataikek uh. Hamsiat in a-omta ua ahi. Hamsiat a om pen na lak ua pan na hihmang keileh ka hon ompih nawn kei ding. ‘Thou inla, mipite hihsiangthou photmai in’. Akiang uah, zingchiang a ding in kihihsiangthou un. Toupa Israelte' Pathian in, Israelte aw, na lak uah hamsiat thil a-om a ahi. Na lak ua pan hamsiat thil na lakmang masiah uh na melmate uh na zou thei kei ding uh. Zingchiang in achichi a, na hong kilat ding uh ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n huai chi a na mat pen anam anam a ahong kilat ding uh ahi. Toupa'n huai nam a na mat pen a-inkuankuan ua ahong kilat nawn ding uh ahi. Toupa'n huai inkuan a na mat pen amalmal a ahong kilat nawn ding ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, kuapeuh hamsiat thil na la peuhmah, amah leh aneih tengteng mei a hal vek ding ahi. Toupa thukhun atatleksan ziak leh Israelte lak a thil gilou haihuaitak ahih ziak in, achi,” na chi ding hi.Khelhna Zonna Leh Akan Sihna Joshua zingkhang in athou a, Israelte achichi in ahong kilangsak a; Judah namte mat ahong hita uh. Judah namte ahong kilangsak nawn a; Zerah namte ana man a; Zerahte inkuante amalmal in ahong kilang nawn ua; Zabdi mat ana hita. A-inkuante amalmal in hong kilangsak nawn a; huchi in Judah chi a Zerah tapa Zabdi, huai tapa Karmi, huai tapa Akan mat ahong hita hi. Joshua in Akan kiang ah, “Ka tapa, Toupa, Israelte' Pathian thupina pia inla; akiang ah kipuang in. Na thilhih hon hilh in. Kei kiang ah iim ke'n,” achi hi.

Akan in Joshua adawng a, akiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian tung ah thil ka na hihkhialta, hichibang in ahi ka na hih: ‘Gallak lak a Babulon puan hoihtak leh dangka shekel zanih leh dangka-eng tang shekel sawmnga buk ka mu a, ka enlah lua a, ka lata mai hi. Ngai in, ka puanin sung a lei a selguk ahi a, dangka pen huai nuai ah a-om, ” achi hi. Joshua in mite asawl a, puanin sung ah ava tai ua; ngai in, apuanin ah selguk ahi ngei a, anuai ah dangka ana om hi. Puanin sung a kipan alakhia ua, Joshua leh Israel suan tengteng kiang ah ahon tawi ua; amau Toupa ma ah akoih uhi. Joshua leh Israel tengteng in Zerah tapa Akan dangka, puan, dangka-eng tang, atapate, atanute, abawngtal, asabiltungte, abelamte, apuanin leh aneih tengteng toh api ua; Akor Phaizang ah apaitouhpih uhi. Joshua in, “Bangziak a hon hihmangbang na hia? Toupa'n tuni in nang leng ahon hihmangbang ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel tengteng in suang in adeng ua; suang a aden khit un mei in ahal uhi. Atung ah suang achiangvum ua, tuni tan in a-om lai hi. Huchi in Toupa'n aheh petmahna akiheisan hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min tuni tan in Akor Phaizang achi lai uhi.

Huan Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Lau ke'nla, lunglel sam ke'n. Galdou thei tengteng tonpih inla, thou inla, Ai ah hohtou in. Ngai in, na khut ah Ai kumpipa, amite, akhua leh agam ka hon peta hi. Jeriko leh akumpipa uh tung a na hih bang in, Ai khua leh akumpipa tung ah leng na hih ding hi. Gallak leh gante kia nou a tuam ding in nei un. Khopi nung ah guktan un,” achi hi. Joshua leh galdou thei tengteng Ai a hohtou ding in akisata ua, huchi in Joshua in mihat hangsan singthum atelkhia a, zan in asawlkheta hi. Akiang uah, “Ngai un, khopi nunglam ah khopi dou ding in guktan un. Khopi a pan gamla lua ah pai kei unla, mansa in om gige un. Kei leh ka kiang a om tengteng in khopi ka hon zuan ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, tuma a mah bang in hong dou dia ahong pawt chiang un, ama uah i taikek ding uh. Hon delh ding in ahong pawt ding ua, khua a pan gamla sim i kihepkhiak tan in. Amau, ‘Tuma a mah bang in i ma uah taikek uh e, achi ding ua; ama uah i taikek ding uh. Guktanna a pan na hong pawtkhe ding ua, khopi na la ding uhi. Toupa na Pathian un na khut uah ahon pe ding hi. Ai Lakna Leh Hihsiatna Joshua in asawlkheta a, guktanna mun ah ahoh ua, Ai kho tumlam ah Bethel leh Ai kho kikal ah a-om uh. Joshua bel huai zan in mipite lak ah agiak hi. Zingkhang in Joshua athou a, mipite akaikhawm a, amah leh Israel upate mipite ma ah Ai kholam ah ahohtou uhi.

Mi tengteng, akiang a galdou thei omte tan in ahohtou ua, ava zuan ua, khopi chin ah ahohtou ua, Ai kho mallam pang ah agiaktou uhi. Ai khua toh akikal uah phaizang a-om hi. Mi sangnga atonpih a, khopi tumlam a Bethel leh Ai kho kikal ah aguktansak hi. Mite, khopi mallam a sepaihte panmun leh khopi tumlam a guktan mite panmun hoihtak in asep a; Joshua huai zan in phaizang lak ah apai hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ai kumpipa'n huai amuhtak in, kintak in zingkhang in athou a, huai khua a mite leh amah leh alawite tengteng toh, amun seh Arabah zawn ah Israelte dou ding in apawtta hi. Himahleh kho nunglam ah amah dou ding in guktanmi a-om uh chih athei kei hi. Joshua leh Israel tengteng zohsa bangtak in a-om ua, gamdai lampi ah atai uhi. Khopi a om tengteng amau delh ding in asamkhawm ua; huchi in Joshua adelh ua, khopi a pan gamla sim ah khemkhiak in a-omta uhi. Ai ah leh Bethel ah Israelte delh lou khat leng a-om kei ua; khopi bangmah lou kal a pawtsan in Israelte adelhta uhi. Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Na teipi tawi Ai kholam nga in lik in. Na khut a hon pe ding ka hi,” achi hi. Joshua in khopi lam nga in ateipi alikta hi. Guktan mite a-omna ua kipan ahong paikhe guih ua, akhut azaktak in atai ua, khopi ah alut ua, alata ua; khua ahal pah uhi. Aite'n anunglam uh a-et uleh, ngai in, khopi kang meikhu van lam a khutou amu ua, akoilam lam ah leng taitheihna himhim anei kei ua; gamdai a tai delhte'n ana lehdelh uhi. Joshua leh Israel tengteng in guktan mite'n khopi alak ua, khopi meikhu paitou amuhtak un akik nawn ua, Ai mite athat uhi.

Midangte amau dou ding in khopi sung a pan ahong pawtkhia ua Israelte'n akaltehta uhi. Akhen alangkhat ah, akhen alangkhat ah a-om uhi. Huchi in athat ua, khat lel leng hawi leh khah anei kei uhi. Ai kumpipa ahingmat ua, Joshua kiang ah ahon pi uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte'n Ai khomi gamlak a om tengteng, gamdai gam a amau ava delhna mun uah namsau in athat vek uhi. Huai khit in Israelte tengteng Ai ah akik nawn ua, asung a om tengteng namsau in ava that uhi. Huai ni a si tengteng numei leh pasal singkhat-le-sangnih ahi ua, Ai a pasal teng asi khin vek uhi. Joshua in lah ateipi likna khut Ai khomite tengteng ahihman keuhkeuh masiah akaikik kei hi. Toupa'n Joshua thu apiak a, hih dia achih bangbang in huai khopi a gante leh gallakte kia Israelte a tuam ding in atangta uhi. Joshua in Ai khua ahal a, tangtawn a ding in leivum in abawl a, tuni tan in loihsan ahita. Ai kumpipa nitak tan in sing dawn ah akhai a; nitum kuan in Joshua in thu apia a, huchi in aluang sing dawn a pan alakhia ua, khopi kulhbaang kongpi lutna ah apai ua, atung ah suang avum ua, tuni tan in a-om lai hi.Ebal Ah Dan Sim Ahi(Diu. ) Joshua in Ebal tang ah Toupa, Israel Pathian a ding in maitam adoh hi. Mosi Dan laibu a gelhsa bang in, Toupa sikha Mosi in Israel suante ana piaksa bang in, sek louh suangte, kuamah in sik a asek ngei nai hetlouhte in maitam abawl hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte alan a, lemna thillatte leng alan uhi. Huai ah Israel mite muh mah in Mosi Dan gelhsa huai suangte tung ah ateisawn hi.

Israel tengteng, gamdangmi hi in, tualsungmi hitaleh avekpi un, a-upate uh, amakaite uh leh vaihawmte toh Toupa thukhun bawm sik tuak ah adingh uhi. Amau huai bawm zawng Levi siampute mai ah huai bang in adingh uhi. Amau kikimkhen in, akimkhat Gerizim tang mazawn ah adingh ua, akimkhat dang Ebal tang mazawn ah adingh uhi. Toupa sikha Mosi in Israelte vualzawl dia thu ahilh lai in, hiai bang a hih ding in thu ana pe khinta hi. Huai khit in Joshua in dan thu teng, vualzawlna thu leh hamse thu tengteng asim a, dan laibu a kigelh tengteng bang in asimkhia hi. Mosi thupiak tengteng Israel omkhawm tengteng leh numeite leh naupang neuchikte leh alak ua namdang omte ma ah Joshua in sim louh himhim anei kei hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jordan gal a kumpipa tengteng, mual a omte, phaizang a omte, tuipi zatak dung teng a Lebanon pha a om tengteng, Hitte, Amorte, Kanaante, Perizte, Hivte leh Jebuste'n ana zak un, Joshua leh Israelte pheikhai khat a dou tum in akikhawm uhi. Himahleh Gibeon khomite'n Joshua in Jeriko khua leh Ai khua abawldan ana zak un, lepchiahpil in agamtang uhi. Palai a kibawl in ip lui pipi, uain thawl lui pipi, asesa kithuap nemnum sabiltungte a pua in mi akisawl uhi. Khedap lui thuap nennon abun ua, puan lui pipi asilh ua, anek ding tanghoute uh gaw gemgom, ap khetkhut ngen ahi. Gilgal giahphual ah Joshua kiang ah ava hoh ua, akiang leh Israelte kiang ah, “Gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi ua, huaiziak in tu in kou leh nou lemna thu khung ni,” achi uhi. Israelte'n huai Hivte kiang ah, “Ka lak ua teng hi kha ni uchia; bangchi in nou toh lemna thu i khung thei dia?” achi uh. Amau Joshua kiang ah, “Na sikhate ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Joshua in akiang uah, “Kuate na hi ua? Koilam a pan hong pai na hi ua?” achi hi. Gibeon Mite'n Joshua Akhem Uh Jordan lui gal a Amorte kumpipa nihte, Heshbon gam kumpipa Sihon, Bashan gam kumpipa Astaroth a om Og tung a athilhih tengteng ka na za uhi. Ka upate uh leh ka gam ua tengte'n ka kiang uah, ‘Lampi a nek ding tawi unla, amau va houpih un, akiang uah, ‘Na sikha ka hi uh. Nou toh kilem ni, na va chi ding uh, ” chi in ahon sawl uhi. “Hiai ka nek ding uh tanghoute na kiang a hong dia ka hong pawt ni ua ka inn ua kipan asa a ka hon puak uh ahi.

Himahleh tu in en dih, agaw gemgom a a-ap khetkhutta hi. Hiai thawl uain ka thunnate uh leng athak ahi. En dih, avang khin vekta hi. Hiai ka puante uh leh ka khedapte uh leng ka hong paina uh agamla mahmah a, aluigawpta hi,” achi uhi. Mite'n atawi uh nek-le-dawn dingte achiam ua, Toupa dong in thu akan masa kei uhi. Huchi in Joshua in amau toh kilemna abawl a, amaute hawi ding in amau toh thu akhungta hi. Omkhawm miliante leng akiang uah akichiam uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ua thu akhun ua kipan ni thum nung in, akhopite uh amau kiangnai a teng sam ahi uh, chih atheikheta uh. Israel suante akipankhia ua, ani thum ni in akhopite uh ava tung uhi. Akhopite uh Gibeon, Kephirah, Beeroth leh Kiriath-jearim ahi. Omkhawm heutute'n Toupa, Israelte' Pathian min lou a akiang ua ana kichiam tak ziak un, Israel suante'n akhoih kei uh. Huchi in mipi omkhawm tengteng heutute tung ah aphun uhi. Himahleh heutu tengteng in mipi omkhawm tengtengte kiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian min lou in akiang uah i na kichiamta ngal ua. Huaiziak in amaute i khoih uh siang lou ahi. Hichibang in atung uah hih ni. I hinghawi mai ding uh. Huchi lou in zaw i tung uah thangpaihna ahong tung kha ding, akiang uah lah i na kichiam khinta ngal ua,” achi uhi. Heutute mah in akiang uah, “Hinghawi in om uhen. Himahleh omkhawm tengteng a dia sing po mite leh tui tawi mite hi uhen,” achi uhi; heutute'n ana chiam khit tak sa bang un. Joshua in amaute asamsak a, akiang uah, “Bangdia, gamlapi a pan hong pai ka hi uh, chi a hon khem na hi ua? Ka kiangnai a teng sam lah na hi ngal ua.

Huaiziak in tu in hamsiat na hi uh, na lak ua mi kuamah ka Pathian inn a dia sing pomi leh tui tawimi na hihna ua pan asuakta ngei kei ding uh,” achi hi. Amau Joshua adawng ua, “Toupa na Pathian un asikha Mosi gam pumpi nou hon pe dia, agam luahmi tengteng na ma ua kipan ahihmang zel ding ahi, chih thu ana piak, na sikhate hon na hilhchian mahmah ua; huaiziak a noute ziak a ka hinna uh mansuah lau mahmah a, hichibang a na gamta ka hi uh. Tu in ngai in, na khut a om ka hi ua; na ngaihtuahna a hoih leh dik a na theih bang in ka tung uah hih mai in,” achi uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante a pan Joshua in hunkhia in, athatta kei uhi. Huai ni in Joshua in aseh bang in omkhawmte leh Toupa maitam a dia sing po mite leh tui tawi mite in asep a, tuni tan in hiaite in apang uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem kumpipa Adoni-zedek in Joshua in Ai khua ala a, ahihsegawp dimdem a, Jeriko khua leh akumpipa ahihsiat bang in Ai khua leh akumpipa leng ahihsegawp a, Gibeon a mite'n Israelte toh lemna bawl in, alak uah ateng sam uh, chih azak in, alauta mahmah hi. Gibeon khua bel lianpi, kumpipa khopite lak a khat bang a lian ahi. Ai khua sang a lianzaw leh amite leng hattak ahih ziak un alau mahmah uhi. Huaiziak in Jerusalem kumpipa Adoni-zedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham, Jermuth kumpipa Piram, Lakish kumpipa Japhia leh Eglon kumpipa Debir kiang ah, “Hong pai unla, hong panpih un, Gibeon i va dou ding uh. Joshua leh Israel suante toh lemna abawl ngal ua,” chi in athukhak hi. Amorte kumpipa ngate: Jerusalem kumpipa, Hebron kumpipa, Jermuth kumpipa, Lakish kumpipa leh Eglon kumpipa akikhawm ua, asepaih tengteng uh toh ahohtou ua, Gibeon kho zawn ah giahphual sat in adouta uhi.Gibeonte'n Joshua Ngetna Gibeonte'n Gilgal giahphual a om Joshua kiang ah mi asawl ua, “Na sikhate hon nuse ke'n. Kintak in ka kiang uah hong tou in, hong panpih inla, hong hondam in. Singtang gam a teng Amor kumpipate kou hong dou ding in akikhawm uh,” chi in ava hilh uhi. Joshua leh akiang a gal dou thei mi tengteng leh mihat hangsan tengteng Gilgal a pan ahohtou uhi. Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Amaute lau het ke'n. Na khut ah ka hon pe khinta hi. Alak ua mi kuamah na ma ah adingh zou kei ding uh,” achi hi. Huaiziak in Joshua in amaute adou guih a; zankhua a Gilgal a pan ana hohtousa ahi.

Amorte Zoh Ahi Uh Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israelte ma ah ataikek ua, Beth-horon a pan apaisukna mun a a-om lai un, Toupa'n van a pan gial lian pipi atung uah Azekah kho pha in akesak a, asi uhi. Israel suante'n namsau a asatlup sang un gial denlup atamzaw hi. Toupa'n Amorte Israel suante apiak ni in Joshua in Toupa kiang ah thu agen a; Israelte mitmuh in,“Ni, Gibeon kho tung ah dingh nilouh in;kha, nang leng,Aijalon Phaizang ah om nilouh in,” achi hi. Mite'n amelmate uh tung a phu alak masiah uh ni adingh kinken a,kha leng a-om nilouh hi.Hiai thu Jasar laibu a gelh hilou hia? Huchi in van lai ah ni a-om nilouh a, ni khat sung vengveng tum thu angaihtuah kei hi. Toupa'n huchibang a mihing aw angaihkhiak ni, ama in a-om ngei kei a anung in leng a-om ngei kei; Toupa'n lah Israelte adoupih ngal a. Joshua leh Israelte agiahphual uh Gilgal ah akik nawn vek uhi.Joshua In Amor Kumpipate Nga Huai kumpipa ngate ataimang ua, Makkedah kokhuk ah akibu uhi. “Makkedah kokhuk a kibu, kumpipa ngate muh ahi uh,” chi in Joshua hilh in a-om hi. Joshua in, “Kokhuk kam suang lianpi khuk in sin unla, veng mite leng omsak un. Noute bel om kei unla; na melmate uh delh unla, anungdalte that unla; akhua himhim uah lutsak kei un. Toupa na Pathian un na khut uah amau ahon peta ngal a,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joshua leh Israel suante'n athah bei khit ua, kulhbaangpi nei khuate a, a-omlaite atailut khit un, mi tengteng Joshua kiang Makkedah ah galmuangtak in ahong kik nawn ua. Israel suante dem in kuamah in lei alok ngam kei uh.

Joshua in, “Kokhuk kam hong unla, kokhuk a pan ka kiang ah kumpipa ngate hon kaikhia un,” achi hi. Hichibang in ahih ua, kumpipa ngate: Jerusalem kumpipa, Hebron kumpipa, Jermuth kumpipa, Lakish kumpipa leh Eglon kumpipa kokhuk a pan akiang ah ahon pikhia uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipate Joshua kiang a ahon pitak un, Joshua in Israel tengteng asamkhawm a, amah toh kuan galdou thei mite lak a heutute kiang ah, “Hong pai nai unla, hiai kumpipate ngawng sik un,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai nai ua, angawng uh ahong siksak uhi. Joshua in akiang uah, “Lau kei unla, lunglel sam kei un. Hattak leh hangsantak in om un. Na dou uh na melma tengteng tung ah Toupa'n hichibang in ahih ding,” achi hi. Huai khit in Joshua in amau asatzan a, athat a, sing dawn ah akhai a; nitaklam tan in sing dawn ah akikhai lai uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitum kuan in Joshua in thu apia a, sing dawn a pan alakhia ua, akibukna kokhuk uah apailut ua, akokhuk kam suang lianpi in asin ua, tuni tan in leng a-om lai hi.Joshua In Amorte Gam Alakbeh Lai Joshua in huai ni in Makkedah khua ala a, akumpipa uh tan in namsau in alok a; huai khua a om tengteng asatlum vek a, khat lel leng hawi anei kei. Jeriko kumpipa tung a ahih mah bang in, Makkedah kumpipa tung ah leng ahihta hi. Joshua Israel tengteng toh Makkedah a pan Libnah ah apai ua, Libnah khua adou uhi. Toupa'n huai khua kumpipa tan in Israelte khut ah apia hi. Huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng athat vek hi. Asung a om mi khat mah leng hinghawi anei kei hi.

Jeriko kumpipa tung a ahih mah bang in akumpipa tung ah ahih hi. Joshua Israel tengteng toh Libnah a pan Lakish ah apai ua, panmun khoh in asual uhi. Toupa'n Lakish khua Israelte khut ah apia a, ani nih ni in ala ua huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng namsau in athat vek ua, Libnah khote tung a ahih bang in ahihta uhi. Bezer kumpipa Horam, Lakish khua panpih ding in akuantou a; Joshua in amah leh aheute nangawn khat mah leng hawi lou in athatgam vek hi. Joshua Israel tengteng toh Lakish a pan Eglon ah apai ua, panmun akhoh ua; adou uhi. Huai ni in ala ua, huai ni mah in huai khua dou in asung a om tengteng namsau in athat bei sipsip hi. Lakish kho tung a ahih bang in ahihta hi. Joshua, Israelte tengteng toh Eglon a pan Hebron ah apai ua adou uhi. Ala ua, huai khua, akumpipa, akhopel tengteng leh asung a om tengteng namsau a dou in athat vek ua, Eglon kho tung a hih bang in khat mah leng hinghawi anei kei hi. Akhua nangawn hihse vek in asung a om tengteng athat bei sipsip hi. Joshua leh Israel tengteng Debir ah akihei nawn ua adou ua; huai khua, akumpipa leh akhopel tengteng ala ua; namsau in adou ua, asung a om tengteng athat bei sipsip ua; khat mah leng hawi anei kei uh. Hebron kho tung leh Debir khua leh akumpipa uh tung a ahih bang in ahihta hi. Huchi in Joshua in agam pumpi, tanggamte, simlam a phaizang leh mual gamte hihse vek in akumpipa tengteng uh athat vek a; khat mah hinghawi anei kei hi. Toupa, Israelte' Pathian thupiak bang in anak thei peuhmah ahihchimit vek hi. Joshua in Kadesh-barnea a pan Gaza pha in, Goshen gam tengteng toh Gibeon pha in ahihse vek hi. Huai kumpipate tengteng leh agam uh Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in Israelte adoupih ziak in, Joshua in hun khat a alak vek ahi uhi. Joshua leh Israel tengteng a giahphual Gilgal ah akik nawn vek uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hazor kumpipa Jabin in huai azak in, Madon kumpipa Jobab, Shimron kumpipa leh Akshaph kumpipa, Mallam tanggam kumpipate, Kineroth simlam a Arabah kumpipate, Phaigam kumpipate leh tumlam pang a Dor kumpipate, suahlam leh tumlam a om Kanaan mite, tanggam a om, Amorte, Hitte, Perizte, Jebuste, Mizpah gam Hermon tang nuai a om Hivte kiang ah mi asawl hi. Huan asepaih tengteng uh toh mi tampi, atamdan uh tuipi a piaunel zah mahmah sakol leh kangtalai tampi toh akisa uhi. Huai kumpipa tengteng akimukhawm ua Israelte dou ding in Merom tuite ah agiakkhawm uhi. Toupa'n Joshua kiang ah, “Amaute lau ke'n. Zingchiang in hichih hun in amaute hihlupsa vek in Israelte ka hon pe mai ding hi. Asakolte khukguh na kilawisak dia, akangtalaite uh na halsak ding uh,” achi hi. Joshua leh gal dou thei mi tengteng Merom tuite ah ava kuan guih ua adou uhi. Toupa'n Israelte khut ah apia a adou ua, Zidon lianzaw pha in, Misrephoth-maim munte pha in, suahlam pang a Mizpeh Phaizangte pha in adelh ua, khat leng hawi nei lou in athat vek uhi. Toupa'n asawl bang in Joshua in atung uah ahih a; asakolte khukguh akilawisak ua, akangtalaite uh ahalsak uhi. Huai hun in Joshua akilehhei a, Hazor khua ala a, akumpipa uh namsau in athat hi. Tuma in Hazor khua huai lai a hiai gamte tengteng lak a khopi pen ahi. Joshua In Jabin Leh Alawite Azou Huchi in Kumpipate khopi tengteng leh akumpipa tengteng uh Joshua in vek a, namsau a dou in athat a, ahihchimit vek a; Toupa sikha Mosi in thu apiak bang in. Mual pawng a khopi a na om khinsate, Hazor khua chih louh, Israelte'n khat mah leng ahal kei uh. Huai khua bel Joshua in ahal hi.

Hiai khopite a gallak tengteng leh gante Israel suante'n amau a tuam ding in anei ua; mihing bel ahihman vek masiah uh namsau in athat zel ua, ahing peuhmah hawi anei kei uhi. Toupa'n a sikha Mosi thu apiak bang in, Mosi in huai thu Joshua apesawn a; Joshua in huai bang in ahih zel hi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak tengteng hih louh himhim anei kei hi.Joshua Gam Lakte Huai bang in Joshua in huai gam tengteng, tanggamte, sim gam tengteng, Goshen gam tengteng, phaizang leh phaizang teng leh Israelte tangte leh phaizang teng toh ala vek hi. Seir va suntou Halak tang a pan Hermon tang nuai a Lebanon Phaizang a Baal-gad pha in akumpipate tengteng uh a that in ahihlum hi. Joshua in huai kumpipa tengteng sawtpitak adou hi. Gibeon a om Hivte kia chih louh Israelte toh lemna bawl khua a-om kei uh. Dou a lak vek ahi uhi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang a, ahihchimit vek a, deihsakna nei het lou a, ahihman theihna dia alungtang uh hihkhauhsak a Israelte dou sakpa Toupa ahi. Huai lai in Joshua akuan a, tanggamte a pan, Hebron a pan, Debir a pan, Anab khua leh Judia tanggam tengteng leh Israel tanggam tengteng a pan Anakte ahihmang vek hi. Israel suante gam ah Anakte khat lel leng atengta kei ua; Gaza, Gath leh Ashdod khuate kia ah bel a-om lai uhi. Huchi in Toupa'n Mosi kiang a, agen tengteng bang in Joshua in gam pumpi alata hi. Joshua in Israelte anam uh kikhendan bang zel in agouluah ding un gam ape chiat hi. Huchi in gam galmuang in a-omta hi.

Hiaite ahi uh huai gam kumpipate, Israel suante'n ahihman ua, agam uh Jordan lui gal, nisuahna lam gamte, Arnon Phaizang a pan Hermon tang tan, suahlam pang a Arabah tengteng toh aneihsak uh kumpipate: Amorte kumpipa Sihon, Heshbon a teng in Arnon Phaizang pang a om Aroer a pan vai ahawm a, phaizang laitak a khopite, Ammon suante gamgi Jabok lui pha in Gilead gam kimkhat tung ah vai ahawm hi. Suahlam ah Arabah ah Kineroth Tuipi tan in ahi a; suahlam ah Beth-jeshimoth hohna lampi lam ah Arabah Tuipi, Chi Tuipi tan in ahi a; simlam ah Pisgah tang nuai pha in ahi. Astaroth leh Edrei a om Rephaim nam khosuaksunte lak ah Bashan kumpipa Og in vai ahawm hi. Amah Hermon tang, Salkah khua leh Bashan tengteng, Geshurte leh Maakathte gamgi pha leh Heshbon kumpipa Sihon gamgi chiang Gilead gam kimkhat pha in vai ahawm hi. Toupa sikha Mosi leh Israel suante'n huaite athat ua; Toupa sikha Mosi in Reuben chite, Gad chite, Manasseh nam kimkhatte agouluah ding un ahawm hi.Joshua In Azoh Kumpipate Hiai gam kumpipate ahi, Joshua leh Israel suante'n Jordan lui gal tumlam pang a, athahte uh, Lebanon Phaizang Baal-gad a pan Seir tang suntou Halak tang pha in. Joshua in Israel suante akikhendan bang zel un, huai gam agouluah ding un ape chiatta hi. Tanggam a, phaizang gamte, Arabahte, tanggamte, gamdai gamte, sim gamte; huaite bel Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Periz mite, Hiv mite, Jebus mite gam ahi. Jeriko kumpipa khat; Bethel kho kiang a Ai kumpipa, khat; Jerusalem kumpipa, khat; Hebron kumpipa, khat; Jarmuth kumpipa, khat; Lakish kumpipa, khat; Mosi In Azoh Kumpipate Debir kumpipa, khat; Geder kumpipa, khat; Hormah kumpipa, khat; Arad kumpipa, khat; Libnah kumpipa, khat; Adullam kumpipa, khat; Makkedah kumpipa, khat; Bethel kumpipa, khat; Tappuah kumpipa, khat; Hepher kumpipa, khat; Aphek kumpipa, khat; Lasaron kumpipa, khat; Madon kumpipa, khat; Hazor kumpipa, khat; Shimron-meron kumpipa, khat; Akshaph kumpipa, khat; Taanak kumpipa, khat; Magiddo kumpipa, khat; Kedesh kumpipa, khat; Karmel tang a Jokneam kumpipa, khat; Dor tuipang a Dor kumpipa, khat; Gilgal a Goiim namte kumpipa, khat; Tirzah kumpipa, khat; kumpipa tengteng sawmthum-le-khat ahi uh.

Joshua ahong upata a, ahong tek mahmahta hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na hong upa in na hong tek mahmahta a, gam lak ding lah atam lai mahmah ngal a. Hiai gamte ahi lak louh: Philistia gam tengteng leh Geshur gam tengteng. Aigupta gam chin a om Shihor a pan mallam pang a Ekron gamgi tan in, huai tuh Kanaan mite gam a sim ahi; Philistiate vaihawmtu ngate, Gaza mite, Ashdod mite, Ashkelon mite, Git mite leh Ekron mite; simlam a Avi mite. Kanaan mite gam tengteng leh Zidon mite gam a Mearah, Amorte gamgi Aphek kho pha in. Gebal mite gam leh nisuahna lam Lebanon gam tengteng Hermon tang nuai Baal-gad a pan Hamath kholutna pha in. Lebanon a pan Misrephoth-maim mun pha in, tanggam a teng tengteng, Zidon mi tengteng. Amaute Israel suante ma ah ka delhkhe dia; ka hon thupiak bang in Israel gouluah ding in bawlsak in. Huchi in hiai gam nam kuate leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte gouluah ding in hawmsak in,” achi hi.Jordan Suahlam Gam Hawmna Toupa sikha Mosi in amau a dia asehsak bang in Reuben suante leh Gad suante'n Manasseh nam kimkhat dangte toh Mosi piaksa Jordan suahlam gam ah goutan aneita uhi. Huai gam ahihleh Arnon Phaizang gei a om Aroer a pan leh phaizang laitak a khopi leh Medeba phaigam tengteng, Dibon tan ahi. Amorte kumpipa Sihon, Heshbon a vaihawm a tu khopi tengteng Ammon suante gamgi tan ahi. Gilead gam leh Geshurte leh Maakathte gamgi chiang leh Hermon tang tengteng leh Bashan gam tengteng Salkah kho tan ahi. Astaroth leh Edrei a kumpipa a tu Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam tengteng toh, huaite Rephaim nam milian khosuaksunte ahi uh; huaite Mosi in ana dou a, ana delhkheta hi.

Gam Lak Lai Ding Levi namte kia ahi gouluah ding a piak louh. Akiang ua ana gensa bang in Toupa, Israelte' Pathian a dia mei a thillatte amau gouluah ahi.Reuben Gam Tan Reuben suante nam a-inkuan dungzui in Mosi in gam ana peta hi. Agamgi uh Arnon Phaizang a om Aroer a pan phaizang laitak a khopi leh Medeba phaigam tengteng a pan, Heshbon leh huai phaigam a khopi tengteng; Debon, Bamoth-baal leh Beth-baal-meon; Jahaz, Kedemoth leh Mephaath; Kiriathaim, Sibmah leh phaizang a tang a om Zereth-sahar; Beth-peor leh Ashdot-pisgah leh Beth-jeshimoth; Phaigam khopi tengteng, Heshbon a vaihawm Amorte Kumpipa Sihon lalgam teng, Mosi in ana thah khitsa Midiante kumpipate Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur leh Reba omna gam toh ahi. Beor tapa Balaam, aisan siam leng a-inkuante toh Israel suante'n athat uhi. Reuben suante gam chiang bel Jordan leh apang teng ahi. Hiai gam leh akhopite leh khuate ahi Reuben suante a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a gouluah dia asehsak uh.Gad Gam Tan Mosi in Gad suante a-inkuan dungzui un gam apia hi. Agamgi uh Jazer khua leh Gilead gam khopi tengteng leh Ammon suante gam kimkhat, Rabbah kho kiang a om Aroer pha in; Heshbon a pan Ramath-mizpeh leh Betonim pha in; Mahanaim a pan Debir gamgi pha in; Guam ah Beth-aram, Beth-nimrah, Sukoth, Zaphon, Heshbon kumpipa Sihon gam teng, Jordan leh agei a gamte, Jordan gal suahlam pang a Kinereth Tuipi tawp chiang tan in ahi. Hiai Gad suante a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a agouluah ding ua seh, akhopite uh leh akhuate uh ahi.Suahlam A Manasseh Gam Tan Mosi in Manasseh nam kimkhatte gam apia hi. Manasseh nam kimkhatte a dia a-inkuan omdan bang zel a piak ahi uh.

Agamgi uh Mahanaim a pan Bashan gam tengteng, Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam tengteng leh Bashan gam a Jair khopi tengteng toh, kho sawmguk ahi. Gilead gam kimkhat leh Bashan gam kumpipa Og gam a Astaroth, Edrei; huai Manasseh tapa Makir suan Makir suan kimkhatte a dia a-inkuan uh omdan bang zel a seh ahi. Hiaite Moab phai, Jeriko zawn, Jordan gal lehlam a, Mosi in gouluah dia a piak gamte ahi uh. Levi chite Mosi in gouluah ding ape kei hi. Akiang ua ana gensa bang in Toupa, Israelte' Pathian agouluah uh ahi.

Hiaite ahi Israel suante'n Kanaan gam alak ua, siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel suante nam inkuan lupente'n agouluah ding ua ana hawm uh. Nam kuate leh nam kimkhatte a tuam dia Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu ana piak bang in aisan in agouluah uh piak ahi. Mosi in nam nih leh nam kimkhatte Jordan gal ah agouluah ding uh ana peta hi. Levi chite bel alak uah gouluah ding ape kei hi. Joseph suante nam nih ahi ua, Manasseh leh Ephraim. Levi chite huai gam ah tantuam ape kei uh, a-omna ding uh khopite leh adaikim ua gantatna ding mun leh a-inn leh alou uh bawlna ding lou ngal piak ahi kei uhi. Toupa'n Mosi thu apiak bang in Israel suante'n ahih ua, gam ahawm uhi.Kaleb Kiang Ah Hebron Piak Ahi Judah suante Gilgal ah Joshua kiang ah ava hoh ua; Keniz mi Jephunneh tapa Kaleb in akiang ah, “Kadesh-barnea mun a Pathian mipa Mosi kiang a Toupa'n ka tungtang leh na tungtang thu ana gen na thei hi. Toupa sikha Mosi in Kadesh-barnea mun a pan gam va enkhe dia ahon sawl lai in kum sawmli a upa ka na hita a; ka lungsim a om bangtak akiang ah ka tun nawn hi. Himahleh ka unau ka kiang a pai samte'n mipite lungtang azulsuaksak ua; ke'n bel Toupa ka Pathian ka zui hi. Mosi in huai ni in, Toupa ka Pathian na zuih ziak in na khe in ana siksa gam tangtawn in nang leh na suante gouluah ahi ngeingei ding, chi in akichiam hi. Huchi in ngai in, Toupa'n Mosi kiang a huai thute agen nung Israelte gamdai a, avakvaih sung un Toupa'n agensa bang in kum sawmli-le-nga tak ahon damsak lai hi. Ngai in, tu in kum sawmgiat-le-nga ka hita.

Hichi pipi in leng Mosi in ahon sawl lai mah bang in ka hat lai a, nidanglai a kidouna ding leh nasep silbawlna dia thagui ka neih mah bang in tu in leng ka nei lai hi. Huaiziak in hiai tang, Toupa'n huai ni a agensa pen hon pia in, Anakte a-om ua, akhopite uh athupi a, kulhbaang a umsuak ahi uh, chih huai ni in na za a; Toupa'n ahon ompih dia, amaute ka delhkhe thei ding, Toupa'n ana gensa bang in,” achi hi. Joshua in avualzawl a; Jephunneh tapa Kaleb gouluah ding in Hebron khua apeta hi. Jordan Tumlam Gam Hawmna Hebron kho min ama in Kiriath-arba ahi. Arba ahihleh Anakte lak a mithupipen ahi. Huai khit in agam ahong galmuangta hi.

Hiai Judah suante a-inkuan dungzui a amau a tuam dia seh a om ahi: Edom gamgi chiang, simlam pang Zin gamdai tan hial in, simtawp tanpha in akizalhsuk hi. Simlam gamgi bel, chi Tuipi simtawp a tuipi gam geng a pan simlam doh ahi. Simlam zuan in Akrabbim tan in apai zel a, Zin ava tung hi. Kadesh-barnea simlam ah atungkah a, Hebron ava tung a, Adar ah atoupai a, Karka akualkhum hi. Azmon ah apai zel a, Aigupta luita ah atuakkhia a; tuipi ah gamgi atawp hi. Hiai bel simlam pang gamgi ahi. Suahlam pang gamgi bel Chi Tuipi ahi a, Jordan ah atawp hi.Mallam pang gamgi bel tuipi tuimeng a pan Jordan tun tawp chiang ahi. Beth-hoglah ah atoupai a, Beth-arabah mal ah apai zel a; Reuben tapa Bohan suang ah apaitou zel hi. Akor Phaizang a pan Debir ah apaitou a, lui simlam a om Adummim atungkahna chin ah Gilgal lam zuan in mallam ah apai zel a; En-shemesh tuite ah apaipai a, En-rogel ah asuakkhia hi. Hinam tapa phaizang ah Jebuste gam pang simlam, huai tuh Jerusalem ahi, pha in apaitou a; Hinnom tang lam pang phaizang chin a om tang vum ah apaitou a, huai tuh Rephaim mallam pang phaizang tawp mahmah ahi. Mualvum a pan Nephtoah a luituite pha in apaisuak a, Ephron tang a khopite ah apai zel a; gamgi Baalah, huai tuh Kiriath-jearim ahi, lam ah apaisuk hi. Baalah a pan tumlam pang ah Seir tang pha in akihekkual nawn a, mallam pang ah Jearim, huai tuh Kesalon ahi, Beth-shemesh ah apaisuk a, Timnah tawn in apai zel hi. Mallam pang Ekron zul ah apaikhia a, Shikron ah apaisuak a, Baalah tang ah apai zel a, Jabneel ah apawt a; tuipi ah atawp hi.

Tumlam pang gamgi bel tuipi azat a za leh apiau chiang teng ahi. Huai gam chiang ahi Judah suante a dia a-inkuan uh dungzui a sehsak a om.Kaleb In Hebron Leh Debir Azou(Vai. ) Jephunneh tapa Kaleb Toupa'n Joshua thu apiak bang in Judah suante lak ah tantuam abawlsak a, huai tuh Kiriath-arba ahi, Arba bel Anan pa ahi a, akhopi ahihleh Hebron ahi. Kaleb in huai khua a pan Anak tapate thum Sheshai, Ahiman leh Talmai adelhkhia hi. Judah Gam Tan Kaleb in, “Kuapeuh Kiriath-sepher va dou a, va la zou peuhmah, azi ding in ka tanu Aksah ka pe ding,” achi hi. Kaleb unaupa Kenaz tapa Othniel in ava la zou a; huchi in azi ding in atanu Aksah aneisakta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akiang ava tun in, apa gam ngen ding in akuan a; asabiltung a pan akumkhia hi. Kaleb in akiang ah, “Bang na deih a?” ana chi hi. Ama'n, “Hon vualzawl in. Simlam gam lah na hon peta ngal a. Tui nak neite leng hon pe tel lai in,” achi hi. Huchi in tui nak nei saknungte leh khangnungte apeta hi.Judah Khopite Hiai ahi Judah suante nam, a-inkuan uh dungzui a agouluah uh. Simlam a Edom gamgi zul a Judah suante aneih khopi hiaite ahi uh: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur, Kinah, Dimonah leh Adadah; Kadesh, Hazor leh Ithnan; Ziph, Telem, Bealoth, Hazor, Hadattah, Kerioth, Hezron (huai Hazor ahi,) Amam, Shema, Moladah, Hazar-gaddah, Hesmon, Beth-palet, Hazar-shual, Beer-sheba, Bizjothjah, Baalah, Ijim, Ezem, Eltolad, Kesil, Hormah. Ziklag, Madmannah leh Sansannah. Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain leh Rimmon ahi ua; khopi tengteng, akhotate uh toh sawmnih-le-kua ahi. Phaigam lam ah Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah, Zanoah, En-gannim, Tappuah, Enam, Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh, Azekah, Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah leh Gederothaim ahi ua, akhotate uh toh khopi teng sawm-le-li ahi uh. Zenan, Hadashah, Migdal-gad

Dilean, Mizpah leh Joktheel; Lakish, Bozkath, Eglon; Kabbon, Lahmas, Kitlish; Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah, Makkedah. Akhopel teng uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-guk ahi uh. Libnah, Ether, Ahsan, Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib, Keilah, Akzib leh Mareshah. Akhopel teng uh toh khopi tengteng kua ahi uh. Ekron leh akhopite leh akhotate toh, Ekron a pan tuipi tanpha in Ashdod zul a om tengteng, akhotate uh toh. Ashdod leh akhopite leh akhotate: Gaza leh akhopite leh akhotate; Aigupta lui leh tuipi za leh agei chiang pha in. Singtang gam lam ah Shamir, Jattir, Sokoh, Dannah leh Kirjath-sannah, huai tuh Debir ahi, Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim leh Gosen, Gosen, Holon leh Giloh; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-khat ahi. Arab, Dumah, Eshean, Janum, Beth-tappuah, Aphekah, Humtah leh Kiriath-arba, huai tuh Hebron ahi, huan Zior; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng kua ahi. Maon, Karmel, Ziph, Juttah, Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah, Kain, Gibeah leh Timnah; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm ahi. Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor, Maarath, Beth-anoth leh Eltekon; akhotate uh toh khopite tengteng guk ahi. Kiriath-baal, huai tuh Kiriath-jearim ahi, leh Rabbah; akhotate uh toh khopi nih ahi. Gamdai a Beth-arabah, Middin, Sekakah, Chi khopi Nibshan leh En-gedi; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng guk ahi. Jerusalem a teng Jebuste ahihleh Judah suante'n adelhkhe zou kei ua, tuni tan in Jerusalem ah Judah suante leh Jebuste atengkhawm uhi.

Joseph suante tantuam, Jeriko zawn a pan gamdai kiang, suahlam pang Jeriko tuite ah asuak a, Jeriko a pan singtang gam ah Bethel pha in apaitou zel hi. Bethel a pan Luz ah alut a, Arki mite gamgi a Ataroth pha in apai zel hi. Tumlam pang ah Japhlet suante gamgi, Beth-horon gamgi khangnungzaw, Gezer pha in apaisuk zel a; tupi ah asuak hi. Huchi in Joseph suante Manasseh leh Ephraim suante'n tantuam in alata uhi.Ephraim A-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Ephraim suante gamgi hiai ahi: Suahlam pang atantuam uh gamgi Ataroth-addar ahi a, Beth-horon saknungzaw apha hi. Mikmethath maltum lam pang ah asuak a, suahlam pang ah Taanath-shiloh pha in akihei nawn a, Janohah suahlam ah apai zel hi. Janohah a pan Ataroth ah, Naarah ah apaisuk a, Jeriko atung a, Jordan ah asuak hi. Tappuah a pan tumlam pang ah Kanah luita pha in apai a; tuipi ah asuak hi. Huaite ahi Ephraim suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a atantuam uh. Manasseh suante tantuam lak a Ephraim suante a dia khopi asehtuamsakte toh; akhopi tengteng leh akhotate leng. Gezer a teng Kanaante adelhkhe kei ua; Ephraimte lak ah Kanaante tuni tan in a-om lai ua, asikha un a-om uhi. Ephraim Leh Tumlam Manasseh Gam Tan

Manasseh suante tantuam hiaite ahi. Manasseh Joseph tapa masa ahi a, Gilead pa, Manasseh tapa masa Makir galhat ahih ziak in Gilead leh Bashan gam atang hi. Manasseh suan dang tengteng a ding in a-inkuan uh dungzui in tantuam leng a-om hi. Abiezer suante a ding, Helek suante a ding, Shekem suante a ding, Hepher suante a ding leh Shemida suante a ding. Huaite a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a Joseph tapa Manasseh suan pasalte ahi uhi. Manasseh tapa Makir, huai tapa Gilead, huai tapa Hepher, huai tapa Zelophehad in tapa nei lou in tanu ngen anei hi. Atanute min Mahlah, Noah, Hoglai, Milkah leh Tirzah ahi. Siampu Eleazar ma ah leh Nun tapa Joshua ma ah leh miliante ma ah ahoh ua, “Ka unaute uh lak a tantuam hon pe sam ding in Toupa'n Mosi thu apia hi,” chi in agen uhi. Toupa thupiak bang in apa uh unaute lak ah tantuam ape samta hi. Jordan gal ah Gilead leh Bashan gam sim louh in, Manasseh tantuam ding in mun sawm apuk a; Manasseh tanute'n atapate uh lak ah tantuam aneih sam ziak uh ahi. Gilead gam bel Manasseh tapa dangte'n atang uhi. Manasseh gamgi Shekem suahlam a om Asher a pan Mikmethath pha in ahi a; taklam pang ah En-tappuah mite tenna pha in apai hi. Tappuah gam Manasseh a ahi a; himahleh Manasseh gamgi chin a Tappuah ahihleh Ephraim suante a ahi. Gamgi kan in luita simlam pang ah apaisuk a, Ephraim suante gamgi asun hi. Ephraim suante khopite khenkhat Manasseh suante khopite lak ah a-om hi. Himahleh Manasseh suante gamgi bel Kanah kuam mallam pang ah apai a, tuipi ah atawp hi. Simlam pang Ephraim a ahi a, mallam pang pen Manasseh a ahi. Tuipi a gamgi ahi.

Mallam ah Asher pha in ahi a, suahlam ah Issakar pha in ahitou hi.
