Issakar leh Asher gam ah Manasseh in Beth-shean leh akim a khuate, Ibleam leh akim a khuate, Dor a tengte leh akim a khuate, Endor a tengte leh akim a khuate, Taanak a tengte leh akim a khuate, leh Meggiddo a tengte leh akim a khuate zou in, kho seh thum anei uhi. Kanaan mite'n huai gam luah asawm teitei ziak un, Manasseh suante'n huai khopi a tengte adelhkhe zou kei uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Israel suante ahong hat hiaihiai un, Kanaante nasem a goih ding in a-omsak ua, adelhkhe siang vek kei uhi.Ephraim Leh Tumlam Manasseh In Gam Angetbeh Uh Joseph suante'n Joshua kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia gouluah ding tantuam seh khat, tan khat kia na hon piak tuam, Toupa'n lah tutan in hon nak vualzawl mahmah ngal a?” achi uhi. Joshua in akiang uah, “Tam na hih uleh, Perizte leh miliante gammang na tenna ding un va vat un. Ephraim tanggam pen nou a dia aneu luatleh,” achi hi. Joseph suante'n, “Tanggam kou a ding in ahun kei. Phaigam a teng Kanaan tengteng, Beth-shean leh akhopi a tengte leh Jezreel phaizang a tengte'n sik kangtalai anei chiat tuamse uh,” achi uhi. Tumlam Manasseh

Huai nung in Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng Shiloh ah akikhawm ua, huai ah kihoupihna biakbuk akai uhi. Huai gam teng azou khinta uhi. Israel suante lak ah atantuam uh tang nai lou nam sagih a-om lai uhi. Joshua in Israel suante kiang ah, “Toupa na pipute uh Pathian in nou hon piaksa gam, bang tan ahia luah lou a na awltat lai ding uh? Nam chih a kipan mi thum zel telkhia unla; amau akuan ding ua, gam ava en vialvial ding ua, atantuam hun ding uh bang chiat zel in ava gelh ding ua; ka kiang ah ahong nawn ding uh. Mun sagih in akhen phot ding ua; Judah pawl simlam ah atantuam uah a-om ding ua, Joseph inkuante mallam ah atantuam uah a-om ding uh. Gam mun sagih in va khen unla, huai gelhna hon pia un. Huchi in hiai ah Toupa i Pathian ma ah ai ka hon sansak ding hi. Levi teng in na lak uah tantuam anei kei ding uh. Toupa mai a siampu nasep amau goutan ahi. Gad pawl, Reuben pawl leh Manasseh nam kimkhat bel Jordan gal suahlam ah amau tantuam Toupa sikha Mosi in apiak ana tangta uh,” achi hi. Huchi in huai mite apawtkheta ua, Joshua in, “Gam va en vialvial unla, hon gelhkhia unla, ka kiang ah hon tun nawn unla, hiai ah Shiloh ah Toupa ma ah ai ka hon sansak ding,” chi in thu apia hi. Mite akuan ua, gam ava en vialvial ua, mun sagih in akhen ua, laibu ah akhuakhua in agelhkhia ua, giahphual Shiloh ah Joshua kiang ah akik nawn uhi. Joshua in Shiloh ah Toupa ma ah ai ana sansak a

huai ah Joshua in Israel suante akikhendan bang zel un gam ahawmta hi.Benjamin Gam Tan Aisan a-inkuan uh dungzui in Benjamin suante tung ah aketa a; agamgi chiang uh Judah suante leh Joseph suante kikal ahi. Mallam pang a agamgi chiang uh Jordan a pan ahi a; Jeriko sik ah mallam pang ah apaitou a, tumlam pang ah tanggam ah apaitou zel a; Beth-Aven gamdai ah atawp hi. Hiai a pan Luz lam ah, Luz, huai tuh Bethel ahi, sik ah, simlam pang ah apai zel a; Beth-horon khang simlam pang a mual zul ah Ataroth-addar ah apaisuk hi. Apai zel a, Beth-horon simlam pang a tangchin a pan tumlam ah simlam pang ah akualphei a; Kiriath-baal, huai Kiriath-jearim ahi, Judah suante khopi ah atawp a; huai tumlam pang gamgi ahi. Simlam pang a gam Kiriath-jearim tawp a pan ahi a; tumlam ah apawt a, Nephtoah luituite ah apai zel hi. Rephaim mallam pang phaizang a Hinnom Tapa phaizang chin a tangmong ah apaisuk a; Jebuste sik ah, simlam pang a Hinnom Phaizang ah apaisuk a, En-rogel ah apaisuk hi. Mallam zuan in apai a, En-shemesh ah apai a, Adummim kahtouhna chin Geliloth ah apai a; Reuben tapa Bohan suang ah apaisuk a; Gam Om Lai Teng Hawmna Beth-hoglah sik, mallam pang ah apai zel a; atawpna bel Jordan simtawp, Chi Tuipi mallam tuipi meng ah ahi. Huai simlam gamgi ahi. Jordan suahlam pang, agamgi chiang ahi. Huai ahi Benjamin suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a atantuam gam in akolhkhum sung. Benjamin suante a-inkuan dungzui un akhopite uh, Jeriko, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz, Beth-arabah, Zemariam, Bethel, Avim, Parah, Ophrah, Kephar-haammonai, Ophni leh Geba; akhopel tengteng toh akhopi tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi. Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth, Mizpeh, Kephirah, Mozah, Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah; Zelah, Eleph, Jebus, huai Jerusalem ahi, Gibeah leh Kiriath, akhotate toh khopi sawm-le-li ahi. Hiaite ahi Benjamin suante a-inkuan uh dungzui ua atantuam ding ua kisepte.

Aisan nihveina Simeon suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam uh Judah suante tantuam lak ah atel hi. Atantuam ding ua pukte Beer-sheba, Sheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual, Balah, Ezem, Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah, Ziklag, Beth-markaboth, Hazar-susah, Beth-lebaoth leh Sharuhen; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-thum ahi. Ain, Rimmon, Ether leh Ashan: akhotate toh khopi li. Huai khopi kim akhopel tengteng Baalath-beer simlam a Ramah apha hi. Huaite Simeon suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a amau tantuam dia seh ahi. Simeon suante tantuam Judah suante tantuam lak a ahi. Judah suante tantuam amau a ding in aza lo ngal a; huaiziak in Simeon suante tantuam lak ah atel hi.Zebulun Gam Tan Aisan thumveina Zebulun suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam gamgi uh Sarid tan ahi. Agamgi uh tumlam pang ah Maralah pha in apai a, Dabeseth ava tung a; Jokneam kiang a luita tan ava tung hi. Sarid a pan suahlam pang nisuahna lam ah Kisloth-tabor gamgi pha in akawitou a; Daberath ah apawt hi. Huai a pan suahlam pang ah Gittah-hepher leh Eth-kazin ah apai zel a, Neah lam zuan in Rimmon ah apawt hi. Mallam ah Hannathon ah akualphei nawn a, apawtna Iphtah-el Phaizang ah ahi. Katath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah leh Bethlehem; akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-nih ahi. Hiaite ahi Zebulun suante a-inkuan uh dungzui a, atantuam ding ua seh; huai khopite leh khopelte toh.Issakar Gam Tan Aisan liveina Issakar suante tung ah a-inkuan uh omdan dungzui in apuk hi. Agamgi chiang uh Jezreel, Kesuloth, Shunem, Simeon Gam Tan Rabbith, Kishion, Abez, Remeth, En-gannim, En-haddah leh Beth-pazzez tan ahi. Tabor, Shahazimah leh Beth-shemesh ava pha a; apawtna Jordan ah ahi a, akhopel teng toh khopi tengteng sawm-le-guk ahi. Hiaite ahi Issakar suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, atantuam ding ua seh

khopite leh akhotate toh.Asher Gam Tan Aisan ngana Asher suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Gamgi chiang Helkath, Hali, Beten, Akshaph, Allammelek, Amad leh Mishal ahi a; tumlam pang ah Karmel tang leh Shihor-libnath aphasuk hi. Nisuahna lam pang ah Beth-dagon akualtou a, Zebulun leh mallam pang ah Jiphthah-el Phaizang ah Beth-emek leh Neiel ava pha a; veilam ah Kabul pha in apai a, Ebron leh Rehob, Hammon leh Kanah, Zidon thupi pha in apai zel hi. Gamgi Ramah leh Tura khopi kulhbaang nei ah akualphei a, Hosah ah akualphei nawn a, Akzib gam tuipi ah apawt hi. Ummah, Aphek leh Rehob; akhopel teng toh khopi tengteng sawmnih-le-nih ahi. Huaite ahi Asher suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, khopite leh akhotate atantuam uh.Naphtali Gam Tan Aisan gukna Naphtali suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Agamgi chiang uh Heleph leh Zaananim a singkung lianpi a pan Adami-nekeb, Jabneel leh Lakkum pha in apai a, Jordan ah atawp hi. Tumlam pang ah Aznoth-tabor ah apaisuk a; huai a pan Hukok ah apai a, simlam ah Zebulun ava tung a, tumlam ah Asher atung a, nisuahna lam ah Judia gam a Jordan aphatou hi. Khopi kulhbaang neite: Ziddim, Zer, Hamath, Rakkath, Kinneret, Adamah, Ramah, Hazor, Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor, Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath leh Beth-shemesh ahi a, akhotate uh toh khopi tengteng sawm ahi. Hiaite ahi Naphtali suante nam a-inkuan dungzui ua khopite leh akhotate atantuam uh.Dan Gam Tan Aisan sagihna Dan suante tung ah a-inkuan uh dungzui in apuk hi. Atantuam gamgi uh Zorah, Estaol leh Ir-shemesh, Shaalabbin, Aijalon leh Jethlah, Elon, Timnah, Ekron, Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath, Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon, Me-jarkon, Rakkon leh Joppa kiang a gamgi toh. Dan suante gamgi in huaite ava kheng a

Dan suante'n Lesem adou ua, ala ua, namsau in ahihmang ua, atangta uh. Huai ah ateng pah ua, apu uh Dan min tam in Lesem, Dan ana chi uhi. Hiaite ahi Dan suante nam a-inkuan uh dungzui a, huai khopi leh akhotate toh atantuam uh.Gam Hawmna Nanung Huchi in atantuam ding ua gamgi bawl bang zel a gam ahawm khit un, Israel suante'n Nun tapa Joshua alak uah tantuam abawlsak uhi. Toupa thupiak bang in Ephraim singtang gam a, akhopi ding in anget mah Timnath-serah apia ua; ama'n khopi asat a, huai ah ateng hi. Hiaite ahi siampu Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua leh Israel suante nam inkuan a lupente'n Shiloh a Toupa ma a kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak a ai san a, agoutan ding ua ana hawmte uh. Huchi in gam kihawm azouta uhi.

Huan Toupa'n Joshua ahoupih a, “Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Kihumbitna khuate bawl in, Mosi zang a na kiang ua ka gen khitsa ahi. Kuapeuh thei lou leh tumloupi a mi that kha, huai ah atailut thei ding hi. Huchi in sisan phulami a pan nou a ding in kihumbitna ahi ding. Huai khopite lak a akoi hiam pen a, atailut chiang in, khopi kulhbaang kongpi lutna ah ava dingh ding a, huai kho upate bil a zak in atanchin ava tun ding. Amau khopi sung ah akiang uah apilut ding ua, alak ua aten sam theihna ding in a-omna ding asehsak ding uhi. Sisan phulami in ahon delhleh athatmi pen akhut ah na pe ding uh ahi kei. A-invengte thei lou a, athah ahi; ama in aho ngal kei hi. Omkhawmte ma a vai hawmsak dia adin ma leh siampu lianpen a pangpa asih mateng, huai khopi ah ateng ding hi. Huai nung in mithat mi pen amah khosung mahmah, ataikhiaksan khua, amah mah insung ah alut nawn ding ahi, chi in gen in,” achi hi. Huchi in Naphtali tanggam a Galili a Kadesh, Ephraim tanggam a Shekem leh Judia singtang gam a Kirath Arba, (huai tuh Hebron ahi) asep uhi. Suahlam ah Jordan gal a Jeriko ah Reuben nam gam a gamdai phaizang a Bezer, Gad nam gam a Gilead gam a Ramoth, Manasseh nam gam a Bashan a Golan asepta uhi. Hiai khuate ahi Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng leh alak ua namdang tengte a dia seh a om. Kuapeuh mi that kha, hiai khuate a tailut in mipi mai a adin mateng sisan phulami khut ah si lou in a-om thei ding hi. Kihumbitna Khopite

Huchi in Levi chi inkuan a lupente siampu Eleazar kiang ah leh Nun tapa Joshua kiang ah leh Israel suante nam inkuan a lupente kiang ah ahoh uhi. “Kanaan gam a Shiloh khua ah, Toupa'n Mosi zang in ka tenna ding uh khopite, ka gante uh tatna ding akimvel toh na hon piak ding uh thu ana peta,” achi uhi. Huchi in Israel suante'n Toupa thupiak bang in atantuam ua kipan hiai khopite akimvel toh Levi chite apia uhi. Aisan Kohath suan tung ah apukta hi. Huchi in siampu Aaron suan Levi chi a mite'n Judah nam tantuam a pan, Simeon nam tantuam a pan leh Benjamin nam tantuam a pan khopi sawm-le-thum aisan in atangta uhi. Kohath suan dangte'n Ephraim nam suante tantuam a pan, Dan nam tantuam a pan leh Manasseh nam kimkhat tantuam a pan khopi sawm aisan in atangta uhi. Gershon suante'n Issakar nam suante tantuam a pan, Asher nam tantuam a pan, Naphtali nam tantuam a pan leh Bashan gam a Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan, khopi sawm-le-thum aisan in atangta uhi. Merari suante'n a-inkuan uh dungzui in Reuben nam tantuam a pan, Gad nam tantuam a pan leh Zebulun nam tantuam a pan khopi sawm-le-nih atangta uhi. Israel suante'n Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu apiak bang in Levi mite khopite leh akimvel a gantatna ding gamte aisan in apia uhi. Huchi in Judah suante nam tantuam a pan leh Simeon suante nam tantuam a pan hiai khopi minlohte apia uhi. Huaite Levi suan Kohath pawl a namte, Aaron suan pawl a ding ahi; amau tung ah aisan apuk masapen hi. Amau a ding in Judah tanggam a Kiriath-arba leh akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh apia uhi. Kiriath-arba Hebron kichi ahi a, Arba ahihleh Anak pa ahi.

Khopi kimvelte leh akhotate Jephunneh tapa Kaleb tantuam ding in apia uhi. Siampu Aaron suante Hebron, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Libnah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Jattir khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Eshtemoa khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Holon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Debir khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Ain khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Juttah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Beth-shemesh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; huai nam nihte tantuam a pan khopi kua apia uhi. Benjamin nam tantuam a pan Gibeon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Geba khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Anathoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Almon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li ape lai uhi. Aaron suan siampute khopi tengteng khopi sawm-le-thum ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh. Kohath suante inkuan, Levi pawl leh Kohath suan dangte'n leng atantuam khopite uh Ephraim nam tantuam a pan in ahi atan uh. Levite Khopite Kibzaim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Beth-horon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li apia uhi. Dan nam tantuam a pan Eltekeh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gibbethon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Aijalon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Gath-rimmon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li. Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan Taanak khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Gath-rimmon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi nih. Kohath suan dangte nam khopi tengteng kho sawm ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh.

Gershon suante pawl, Levi namte Manasseh nam kimkhatte tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Bashan gam a Golan khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Beeshterah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi nih apia uhi. Issakar nam tantuam a pan Kishion khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Daberath khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Jarmuth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, En-gannim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li. Asher nam tantuam a pan Mishal khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Helkath khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Rehob khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li. Naphtali nam tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Galili gam a Kadesh khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Hammoth-dor khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kartan khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi thum. Gershon pawl a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a, atantuam uh khopi tengteng sawm-le-thum ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh. Merari suante pawl inkuan, Levi pawl dangte bel Zebulun nam tantuam a pan Jokneam khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kartah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Dimnah khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Nahalal khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, khopi li. Reuben nam tantuam a pan Bezer khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Jahaz khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Kedemoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; khopi li. Gad nam tantuam a pan, mithat mite kihumbitna khopi, Gilead gam a Ramoth khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Mahanaim khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; Heshbon khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh, Jazer khua, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh; avek in khopi li.

Hiai tengteng Levi pawl inkuan dangte Merari suante pawl a-inkuan uh dungzui zel a, akhopite uh ahi. Huchi in atantuam uh khopi sawm-le-nih ahi. Israel suante pawl tantuam a pan Levi pawl khopi tengteng sawmli-le-giat ahi, akimvel a gantatna ding gamte toh. Hiai khopite'n akimvel anei chiat ua; khopi tengteng huchibang vek ahi uh.Israel In Gam Aluah Huchi in Toupa'n apipute uh kichiam a piak ana chiamsa gam tengteng Israelte apia hi. Amau huai gam aluah ua, asung ah atengta uhi. Toupa'n apipute uh kiang a kichiam a, ana chiamsa bang ngei in mun chih ah muanna apia a, amelma tengteng uh kuamah ama ua pangzou himhim a-om kei uhi. Toupa'n amelma tengteng akhut uah ape vek hi. Toupa'n Israel inkuante kiang a, ahoih lam thu a na gen tengteng vuaksuak khat leng a-om kei a, ahong tung vek hi.

Huai khit in Joshua in Reuben pawlte, Gad pawlte leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte asam hi. Akiang uah, “Toupa sikha Mosi in hon thupiak peuhmah na zuita ua, ke'n thu ka hon piak peuhmah leng na zuita uhi. Tuni tanpha in na unaute uh na taisan kei ua, Toupa na Pathian un hih dia thu ahon piak na zuita uhi. Toupa na Pathian un akiang ua ana gensa bang in, na unaute uh muanna apeta hi. Huaiziak in Toupa sikha Mosi in Jordan gal a na tantuam ding ua hon piaksa gam ah, na puanin kaihte uah pai nawnta un. Toupa sikha Mosi in Toupa na Pathian uh it a, alampi tengteng tawn a, athupiakte zui a, amah len tinten a, na lungtang tengteng uleh na kha tengteng ua amah nna sem chiatchiat dia hon thupiakte, huai thupiak leh dante pilvangtak in limsak un,” achi hi. Joshua in amau avualzawl a, apaisakta hi. Huchi in apuanin lam uah apaita uhi. Manasseh nam kimkhatte Mosi in Bashan gam ah tantuam apia a; akimkhat dangte Joshua in tumlam pang ah Jordan gal ah a-unaute lak ah tantuam ape zawta hi. Joshua in a-inn lam ua apaisak dek lai in avualzawl hi. Akiang uah, “Na puanin lam uah hauhsakna tamtak toh paita unla, ganta tampi toh, dangka toh, dangka-eng toh, dal toh, sik toh, silh-le-ten tampi toh. Na melmate ua pan na gallakte uh unaute toh kihawm dialdial un,” achi hi.

Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte akik nawn ua, Kanaan gam Shiloh a pan Israel suante kiang a pan Gilead gam, Toupa'n Mosi zang a thu a na piak bang in amau tantuam ding mawng a sehsa gam a pai ding in apawtkheta uhi.Jordan Pang A Maitam Kanaan gam a Jordan gamgi ava tun un Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Jordan lui gei ah maitam lianpi kholang mahmah khat adoh uhi. Ngai in, Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Kanaan gam chin tak, Jordan gamgi, Israel suante gam lam pang ah maitam adoh uh, chih Israelte kiang ah kuahiam khat in ava hilh hi. Israel suante'n hiai thu azak un, Israel suan mipi omkhawm tengteng amaute dou tum in Shiloh ah akikhawm uhi. Israel suante'n Gilead gam a Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang ah siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas asawl uhi. Milian sawmkhat, Israel nam a inkuan a lupente'n Phinehas azui uhi. Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte kiang Gilead gam ah ahoh ua, akiang uah, huchi in Toupa mi omkhawm tengteng in, “Bangziak a tuni a Toupa tung a hel tum a maitam doh a, Toupa lehngatsan na hi ua?” achi uhi “Peor mun a tatsiatnate, ei a dia neu lua a sim theih ahi maw? Tuni tan in leng huai a i khelhna ua pan silsiang i hi nai kei ua, Toupa mi omkhawmte lak ah hipi alen tanpha in leng. Tuni a Toupa lehngatsan na tup maizen uh? Huchi in tuni in Toupa tung ah na na helta maimah ua, zingchiang a zaw Israel mipi omkhawm tengteng tung a amah heh ding ahita ve.

Na gam luah uh siang lou ahihleh, Toupa gam, Toupa biakbuk omna mun ah hong pai unla, ka lak uah hong teng un. Himahleh Toupa i Pathian un achih louh maitam dang bawl in Toupa tung ah hel kei unla, kou tung ah leng hel kei un. Zer tapa Akan in hamsiat thil ah ana hihkhial a, Israel mipi tengteng tung ah hehna ahong om ahi kei maw? Huai mi tatsiatna ah amah kia amangthang tuam kei hi,” achi uhi. Reuben suante, Gad suante leh Manasseh nam kimkhatte'n Israel nam a intekpente adawng ua, akiang uah, “Toupa, pathiante' Pathian, pathiante Toupa Pathian in athei. Israel pawl in leng thei hen! Ka maitam doh uh Toupa lehngatsan a, hel tupna hiam thilhihkhelh tupna hiam a ka hih uleh, tuni in leng hon hawi kei un, halmang thillatna ding hiam, nek ding thillatna ding hiam, lemna thillatna ding hiam ahihleh, Toupa mahmah in thukhen hen. Joshua In Suahlam Namte A-inn Uah Asawl Tunung chiang in na suante un ka suante uh kiang ah, Nou Toupa, Israelte' Pathian na zat phakna uh bang om ahia? Nou Reuben suante leh Gad suante aw, Toupa'n kou leh nou a ding in Jordan gamgi ding in abawl hi. Toupa ah tantuam na nei sam kei uh, ahon chi kha ding uh, chi a, pilvan ziak a aziak neitak a ka hih uh ahi. Na suante un kou suante Toupa laudan thei lou in abawl kha thei uhi. Huaiziak in kisa un, maitam i bawl ding uh, halmang thillatna ding leh kithoihna ding bel hilou in.

Kou leh nou leh i nung ua i suante kikal ah theihpihna ahi dia, huchi in ka halmang thillatte uh leh ka kithoihnate uh leh ka lemna thillatte ua Toupa nna ka septheihna ding uh leh na suante un leng tunung chiang a ka suante uh kiang a Toupa ah tantuam na nei sam kei uh ahon chihlouhna ding un, ka chi ua ahi. Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, tunung chiang a ka kiang uh hiam, ka suante uh kiang uh hiam a huchibang a ahon chih chiang ua kou, ‘En ve ua, ka pipute un Toupa maitam abawl uh omdan, halmang thillatna ding leh kithoihna ding ahi kei a, kou leh nou kikal a theihpihna ahi zaw hi, ka chihna ding ua, ka hih uh ahi. Toupa tung a hel a Toupa lehngatsan a, Toupa ka Pathian uh maitam, abiakbuk chin a maitam kia lou halmang thillatna ding hiam, nek ding thillatna ding hiam, theihpihna ding hiam a maitam bawl ka hihlouhdan uh,” achi uhi. Siampu Phinehas leh akiang a omkhawmte' miliante, Israel pawl nam intekpente'n Reuben suante leh Gad suante leh Manasseh suan kimkhatte thugen azak un akipaksak mahmah hi. Siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas in Reuben suante leh Gad suante leh Manasseh suan kimkhatte kiang ah, “Toupa tung a thil na hihkhelh louh ziak un, tu'n zaw Toupa i lak ua om ngeina ahi, chih ka theita ve ua. Huchi in Israel suante Toupa khut a pan na hunkheta uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in siampu Eleazar tapa Phinehas leh milian pawl, Reuben suante leh Gad suante a pan leh Gilead gam a pan Kanaan gam ah Israel suante kiang ah akik nawnta ua, thu ava tun nawn uhi. Huai thute'n Israel suante akipaksak mahmah a; Israel suante'n Pathian aphatta uh. Huchi in Reuben suante leh Gad suante dou a, atenna gam uh suksiatsak ding in kuankhiak atum nawn kei uhi. Reuben suante leh Gad suante'n huai maitam pen, “theihpihtu,” achi uhi. “Toupa, Pathian a na hi ngei chih i kikal ua theihpihtu ahi ngal a,” achi uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa'n Israelte amelma tengteng a pan galmuanna apiak nung hun sautak a pai nung in Joshua ahong upa in, ahong tekta hi. Joshua in Israel tengteng, a-upate leh a-intekpente, avaihawmte leh aheutu teng uh asamsak a, akiang uah, “Ka upa in, ka tekta hi. Toupa na Pathian un noute ziak a hiai nam tengteng tung a athilhihte na muta ua; Toupa na Pathian un, amah mah in noute a ding in gal ahon dousak hi. Ngai un, Jordan lui leh tumlam Tuipi Lian kikal a nam omlaite zou in, aisan in na tantuam ding un ka hon pia hi. Toupa na Pathian un na ma uah amau adelhkhe dia, na muhbatlouhna uah ahawlmang vek ding. Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua agensa bang in agam uh na luah ding uhi. Huaiziak in Mosi Dan laibu a gelh tengteng taklam ah hiam veilam ah hiam a na pialsan hetlouhna ding un hangsantak in zui un. Hiai nam na lak ua omlaite toh tengkhawm kei un. Apathiante uh min gen kei unla, aminte un kichiam kei unla, a-nna uh leng sem kei unla, ama uah leng kun in a-nna uh sem kei un. Himahleh tuni tan a na hih gige bang un, Toupa na Pathian uh lenkip un. Toupa'n na ma uah nam thupitak leh hattakte adelhkhe khinta hi. Na ma uah tuni tan in kuamah pangzou himhim a-om kei uhi. Na lak ua mi khat in mi sangkhat adelh ding, na kiang ua agensa bang in, Toupa na Pathian un nou a ding in gal ahon dousak ngal a. Toupa na Pathian uh it ding in pilvang mahmah un.

Pilvang lou a, na lehngatsan himhim ua, hiai namte lak a khosuaksun, na lak ua omlaite ngei, na pawlmat ua, amaute toh pasal leh zi a na kineih ua, amaute na kithuahpih ua, amau leng nou ahon kithuahpih uleh zaw, Toupa na Pathian un hiai namte na mitmuh un ahon delhkhiaksak nawn kei ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un hiai gam hoihtak a hon piak a pan na manthat vek masiah uh amaute nou a ding in pial leh thang leh na pang ua ding in khetna chiang leh na mit ua ding in ling ahong hi zaw ding uh, chih teltak in thei un. “Ngai un, tuni in leitung pumpi dan bang in ka paita ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un na tungtang uh, ahoih lam, ana gensa tengteng vuaksuak khat lel leng a-om kei, chih na lungtang tengteng uh leh na lungsim tengteng un na thei uhi. Na tung uah ahong tungvekta a, khat lel leng vuaksuak a-om kei hi. Huaiziak in hichi ahi ding a, Toupa na Pathian un na kiang ua thil hoih agen tengteng na tung ua ahong tun vek tak mah bang in, Toupa na Pathian un ahon piak hiai gam hoihtak a pan ahon manthatsak vek masiah Toupa'n thil hoihloute na tung uah atungsak ding hi. Toupa na Pathian un ahon thupiak thukhun na tatlek san ua, pathian dangte nna sem a, kun a na biak uleh, Toupa hehna na tung uah a-om dia, ahon piak gam hoihtak a pan na mangthang pah ding uhi,” achi hi. Joshua Kikhakna Thugen

Huan Joshua in Israel nam tengteng Shekem ah asamkhawm a, Israel upate, a-intekpente, avaihawmte leh aheutute uh asamsak a; Pathian ma ah ahong kimusak chiat uhi. Joshua in mi tengteng kiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Na pipute uh nidanglai in lui khen lam ah ateng ua, Abraham pa leh Nahor pa Terah hialte leng, amaute'n pathian dangte nna asem uhi. Na pu uh Abraham huai lui gal a pan ka pikhia a, Kanaan gam teng tawnsuak in ka pi a, asuante ka pungsak a, Isak ka pia hi. Isak kiang ah Jakob leh Esau ka pia a; Esau tantuam ding in Seir tang ka pia a; Jakob leh atate Aigupta ah apaisuk uhi. Mosi leh Aaron ka sawl a, alak ua thillamdang hih in Aigupta ka gawt a: huai khit in amaute ka hon pikhia hi. Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhia a, tuipi na hong tung ua; Aigupta mite'n na pipute uh kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite toh Tuipi San tan in anungdelh uhi. Amau Toupa asam ua, Aigupta mite toh na kikal uh amialsak bikbek a, amaute tuipi tuamsak in akhuhkhumsak a; Aigupta gam a ka thilhih na mit un amu a; gamdai ah sawtpi na teng uhi. Jordan lui gal a om Amorte gam ah ka hon pi a; amau ahon dou uh. Na khut uah amaute ka hon pia a, agam uh na luahta uhi. Amau ka hon hihmangsakta hi. Moab kumpipa Zippor tapa Balak ahong kisa a, Israel adou a; Beor tapa Balaam nou hon hamsiat ding in asamsak hi. Himahleh Balaam thu ka ngaikhe kei hi. Huaiziak in nou ahon vualzawl zosopta hi. Huchi in akhut a pan ka hon hunkheta hi. Jordan lui na kan ua, Jeriko khua na tungtou ua

Jeriko khomite'n hon na dou ua, Amorte, Perizte, Kanaante, Hitte, Girgaste, Hivte leh Jebuste toh; amau na khut uah ka hon peta hi. Na ma uah tunpi ka sawl a, huai in na ma uah amau adelh a, Amorte' kumpipa nihte tan in leng. Himahleh na namsau un hiam, na thal un hiam in ahi kei hi. “Na sepkhiak het louh uh gam leh na bawl het louh uh khopite ka hon pia a, huaite ah na teng ua; na suan louh uh grephuan leh olive huan a pan na ne uhi. “Huaiziak in Toupa laudan siam unla, chitak leh thutak in ama nna sem un. Na pipute un Lui gal leh Aigupta gam a, a-nna asep uh pathiante koihkhia unla; Toupa nna sem un. Toupa nna sep hoih lou a na theih uleh tuni in kua nna ahia na sep ding uh, tel un. Na pipute un Lui gal a, a-nna asep uh pathiante hia, na luah uh gam a Amorte pathiante? Kei leh inkuante'n zaw Toupa nna ahi ka sep ding uh,” achi hi. Mipite'n, “Toupa Pathian paisan a, pathian dangte nna ka sep louh ding dan uh. Toupa i Pathian ngei ahi, i pipute toh Aigupta gam saltanna inn a pan hon pikhia a, i mitmuh a chiamtehna thupi taktak hih a, i paina teng leh mipi tengteng i nawk paisuakna ah leng hon vengbit hi. Toupa'n i ma ngei uah mi chih, huai gam a om Amorte ngei adelhkhe vek hi. Huaiziak in kou leng Toupa nna ahi ka sep ding uh; amah lah ka Pathian uh ahi ngal a,” chi in adawng uhi. Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “Toupa nna na sem thei kei ding uh. Amah lah Pathian siangthou ahi ngal a. Mullit hat Pathian ahi a

na tatleknate uh leh na khelhnate uh angaidam kei ding hi. Toupa na paisan ua, namdang pathiante nna na sep uleh, na tung ua thil hoih ahih khit nung in ahong kihei dia, hon hih na in ahon hihmangthang ding,” achi hi. Mipite'n, Joshua kiang ah, “Hilou e, Toupa nna ka sem kinken zaw ding uh,” achi uhi. Joshua in mipite kiang ah, “A-nna sep tum in Toupa na telta uh, chih atheihpihtute noumau mah na hi uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Theihpihtute ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Amah mah in, “Huchi ahihleh na lak ua namdang pathian omte koihmang unla, na lungtangte uh Toupa, Israelte' Pathian lam ah awnsak un,” achi hi. Joshua In Shekem Ah Mipite Kiang Ah Thu Agen Huai ni in Joshua in mipite toh kikal ah thu akhung a, Shekem ah dan thuseh leh thuseh asehsak hi. Joshua in hiai thu Pathian Dan Laibu ah agelh a; suang lianpi ala a, Toupa Mun Siangthou chin a tosaw nuai ah aphut hi. Joshua in mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai un, hiai suang i thu hon theihpihtu hi hen. Toupa'n i kiang ua thu agen tengteng aza vekta hi. Huaiziak in na thu uh hon theihpihtu ahi ding hi, huchi lou in zaw Pathian na kitheihmohbawl kha ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in Joshua in mipite atantuam gam chiat uah apaisakta hi.Joshua Leh Eleazar Sihna Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thilte khit in Nun tapa Joshua, Toupa sikha kum za-le-sawmkhat a upa ahih in asita hi. Gaash tang mallam pang, Ephraim tanggam a amah tantuam gamgi sung Timnath-serah ah avuita uhi. Joshua damsung leh amah khup a dam, Toupa'n Israelte a dia thil ahih tengteng theihpih mite damsung in Israelte'n Toupa nna asem uhi. Israel suante'n Aigupta gam a pan Joseph guhte apuaktouh uh Shekem a Shekem pa Hamor tapate a pan Jakob in dangka zakhat a aleina mun ah avui ua; huai mun Joseph suante tantuam ahita hi. Huan Aaron tapa Eleazar asi a; atapa Phinehas tantuam dia apiak Ephraim tang ah avui uhi.

Moab Ah Elimelek Leh A-inkuan Apem Uh Huai mi min Elimelek ahi, azi min Naomi ahi, atapate nih min Mahlon leh Kilon ahi. Amau Judah gam a Bethlehem, Ephrath mi ahi uh. Moab gam ah ahoh ua, huai ah a-om nilouh uhi. Elimelek, Naomi pasal asi a, amah leh atapate nih kia ahita uh. Amau Moab gam numei zi in anei ua, akhat pen min Orpah ahi a, akhat pen min Ruth ahi. Huai ah kum sawm a-omta uhi. Mahlon leh Kilon asi tuaktuak ua; huchi in huai numei atapate nih leh apasal in asihsanta uhi.Naomi Leh Ruth Jerusalem Kik Nawnna Huchi in amoute toh Moab gam a pan kik nawn ding in akisa uh; Toupa'n nek ding pia a mite avehdan Moab gam a pan ana zak ziak in. Huchi in a-omna a pan amoute nih toh apawt ua; Judah gam a kik nawn ding in apaita uhi. Naomi in amou nihte kiang ah, “Na nute uh inn tuak ah pai nawnta un. Misi tung leh ka tung a siamtak a na hih bang un Toupa'n na tung uah hih hen. Toupa'n na nih un na pasalte uh inn a khawlna na muhtheihna ding un hon hehpih hen,” achi hi. Huchi in atawp a, aw suah hial in akapta uhi. Amau akiang ah, “Pai kei ni ung, na chite kiang a na paina ah ka tel sam ding uh,” achi uhi. Naomi in, “Ka tanute aw, pai nawn zaw un. Bangziak a ka kiang a hong pai lai mahmah ding na hi ua? Na pasal ding uh tapate ka pai thei nawn dia hia? Ka tanute aw, kisa unla, pai un; pasal nei ding in lah ka upa lota ngal a.

Lametna ka nei chi mah leng, tuzan mahmah in leng pasal nei in tapate leng nei mah leng, apichin tan ua om ding na hi ding uam? Pasal lou in na om nilouh ding ua hia? Hi tel lou e, ka tanute aw; nou ziak in ka lungkhamna a-uang semsem hi. Toupa khut ka tung a tu ahita ve,” achi hi. A-aw uh suah in akap nawn leuleu uhi. Huchi in Orpah in api atawp a; Ruth in bel alen tinten hi. Ama'n, “Ngai in, na moupihnu achite kiang leh apathian kiang ah apaikik nawnta. Nang leng na moupihnu delh inla, pai nawnta in,” achi hi. Ruth in, “Nang khen ding leh nang zui lou a kik nawn ding in hon kun ke'n. Na paina peuh ah ka pai dia; na giahna peuh ah ka giak dia; na chite ka chite ahi ding ua, na Pathian ka Pathian ahi ding. Na sihna peuh ah ka si dia, huai ah na hon vui sam ding ahi. Nang leh kei sihna lou ngal thil dang in ahon khenleh Toupa'n ahihhih in hon hih henla, hiai sang a thupizaw in leng,” achi hi. Huchi in akiang a pai atum tinten chih atheih in adaihsanta hi. Huchi in Bethlehem tan apaikhawmta uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Bethlehem atun un, akhozang un aling ua, numeite'n, “Hiai Naomi ahi maw?” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Naomi hon chi kei un. Mara hon chi zaw un, Bangkim hihtheipa'n lah khatak in ahon hihta ngal a,” achi hi. “Buchingtak in ka pawt a, Toupa'n avuak in hon pi nawn hi. Toupa'n ka tung ah alungkimlouhna ahihlang a, Bangkim hihtheipa'n ahon hihgentheihdan theigige napi a bangziak a Naomi hon chi lailai na hi ua?” achi hi. Huchi in Naomi ahong kik a, amounu Moab mi Ruth toh Moab gam a pan ahong kik uhi. Barli buhlak pat tung lai in Bethlehem atung uhi.

Huan Naomi in apasal tanau, Elimelek beh, mineizoutak tanau anei a; amin Boaz ahi. Ruth In Boaz Lou Ah Asem Huchi in ahohta a, buh la mite lakmaih ava zong a; huchi in Elimelek beh Boaz lou ah ava hoh kha geih hi. Huchi in ngai in, Bethlehem a pan Boaz ava hoh a, buh la mite kiang ah, “Na kiang uah Toupa om hen,” achi hi. Amau, “Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hen,” chi in adawng uhi. Huchi in Boaz in asikha, buh la mite tung a heutu kiang ah, “Hiai kua nungaknou ahia oi?” achi hi. Abuh la mite tung a heutu asikha in, “Moab nungaknou, Moab gam a pan Naomi toh hong pai ahi. Ama'n, ‘hon hehpih inla, na buhsang ka zong dia, buh la mite'n abuhphal uh alakkhawm khit chiang un ka zong zel ding aw’ achi hi. Huchi in ahong pai a, inn a tomchik a-om chih louh zingsang a pan a-om nilouh hi,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in Boaz in Ruth kiang ah, “Ka tanu, ngai dih, buhsang zong in lou dang ah hoh ke'nla, hiai a pan paisuan ke'n. Ka sikha nungakte kiang ah om gige in. Abuhlak uh en gige inla, anung uh sui zel in. Tangvalte nang bangmah hon chih lou ding in thu ka pevekta hi. Na dangtak peuh chiang in tuibel a tangvalte tui tawisa dawn zel in,” achi hi. Huchi in akun a, lei si in abokkhup a, akiang ah, “Namdang hinapi ing a, nang hichibang a na hon theihnop a, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Boaz in adawng a, akiang ah, “Na pasal sih nungsiah na pi tung a na thilhihdan tengteng mi'n ahon hilh vek uh.

Na nu leh na pa leh na pianna gam paisan atum a lam a na mi theih ngeilouhte kiang a na hong paidante leng. Toupa'n na thilhih hon din henla, Toupa, Israelte' Pathian, kihumbitna dia akha nuai na muan in kipahman tampi hon pia hen,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka toupa, na mitmuh in deihsakna ka tang a, na hon lungmuan a, na sikha nungakte lak a mi hi kei mah leng, na sikhanu hoihtak in na hon houpihta ngal a,” achi hi. An nek hun in Boaz in akiang ah, “Hong pai inla, tanghoute hong ne sam inla, tanghou themte uain thuk ah hong diah in,” achi hi. Huchi in buh la mite kiang ah atu a; buhkan apia a; ane a, anek nung in leng akhamval lai hi. Buhsang zong dia adin nawn in, Boaz in atangvalte kiang ah, “Buhphalte lak ah leng tawmsak zel unla, tai kei un. Alomte leng dohkhiaksak unla, nutsiat zel unla, tom henla, tai kei un,” chi in thu apia hi. Huchi in lou a buhsang nitaklam tan in azong hi. Azonsa akhen a, barli buh ephah khat hiamtak apha hi. Avan kisuan in khopi ah apaita hi. Api in abuhsang zon ana mu a; ama'n anek kham val asitte asuahkhia a, apia hi. Api in akiang ah, “Tuni a koilam a buhsang zong na hia? Koi ah ahia na va sep? Ahon na theinuampa vualzawl in om hen,” achi hi. Ama'n kua kiang ah ahia ava sep chih api ahilh hi. “Tuni a nna ka va sepna pa min Boaz ahi,” achi hi. Naomi in amounu kiang ah, “Toupa, mihing leh misi tung a ahehpihna tawp tuan ngei lou in amah vualzawl hen,” achi hi. Naomi in akiang ah, “Huai mi, i kinaihpih, i tanau bul ei ve,” achi hi. Moab mi Ruth in, “Kei kiang a leng hon chi ei ve,” achi hi. Naomi in amounu Ruth kiang ah, “Ka tanu, lou dang a ahon muh hetlouhna ding in asikha nungakte lak ngen ah pai lechin ahoih ding,” achi hi. Huchi in barli buh leh buhpi lak khit mateng Boaz sikha nungakte lak kia ah buhsang zong in ahoh a, api kiang ah ateng hi.

Huan api Naomi, apasal nu'n akiang ah, “Ka tanu, nang a ding in khawlna ka hon zonsak kei dia hia, huchi in nang a ding in ahoih ding hi. I tanaupa Boaz, asikha nungakte toh nna na sepna pa om hilou hia? Ngai in, tuzan in phual ah barli buh azapsiang ding hi. Ruth In Pasal Amu Huan hichi ahi ding a, alup chiang in alupna chiamteh inla, lut inla, akhe lem inla, va lum in. Ama'n na hih ding ahon hilh ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na gen teng ka hih ding,” achi hi. Huchi in phual ah ahohsuk a, api hilh bang in ava hihta hi. Boaz in an ne a, adawn khit in alungtang akipak a, buhvum bul a lum ding in apaita a, huan, minu leng awlawl in ahong pai a, akhe alem a, alumta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ngai in, akhe kiang ah numei khat ana lumta mai a, zan lai in huai mipa kiguih in akihei hi. Ama'n, “Kua na hia?” achi hi.Ama'n, “Na sikhanu Ruth ka hi. Huchi in na sikhanu na puan hon zawn in, ka tanau bul lah na hi ngal a,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tanu, Toupa'n nang hon vualzawl hen. Tangval zawng hiam, hausa hiam na zuih louh in atung lai sang in anunglam ah hoihna na hihlang zaw hi. Huchi in ka tanu, lau ke'n. Na gen bang in na tung ah ka hih ding. I khua a mi tengteng in numei kizentak na hi chih athei vek ngal ua. Kitanau nai i hi ngut hi. Himahleh kei sang a naizaw a-om hi. Tuzan zaw om peuhmah inla, zingchiang zingsang in na tung a ama'n atanau hih ding ahihnopleh ahoih hi.

Himahleh tanau hih ding na tung a ahihnop keileh, tanau hih ding pen Toupa ahin bang in ke'n ka hih ding. Zingsang tan lum nilouh in,” achi hi. Huchi in zingsang tan in akhebul ah alum hi. Kuamah akimuh chet theih ma in athoukhia hi. Ama'n, “Phual ah numei a hong chih himhim kuamah in thei kei hen,” achi hi. Akiang ah, “Na puansilh la inla, doh in,” achi hi. Huchi in adoh a, barli buh tehna guk atehsak a, asuan a; huchi in khua ah apaita hi. Api kiang atun in, “Ka tanu, bang na hong chi a?” ana chi hi. Ama'n, huai mipa in atung a thil ana hih tengteng ahilhta hi. “Hiai barli buh tehna guk ahon pia a, ‘na pi kiang ah avuak in pai ke'n, ahon chi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tanu, bangchibang in ahia thil ahong om ding na theih ma in tu maimai in. Tuni a hiai thil ahih khit mateng huai mipa dai mai lou ding ahi,” achi hi.

Huchi in Boaz kulh kongpi ah ahohtou a, huai ah atu hi. Ngai in, atanau bul uh atungtang thu Boaz in agen ahong pai hi. Huai mi kiang ah, “Eh! Nang na hi maw! Hong pai inla, hong tu dih ve,” achi hi. Amah hong pai in atuta hi. Huai khua a upate lak a mi sawm api a, akiang uah, “Hiai ah tu dih ua,” achi a, huchi in amau atuta uhi. Atanau bul uh kiang ah, “Moab gam a pan hong kik Naomi in i unaupa Elimelek gam azuak hi. Boaz In Ruth Akitenpih Boaz in, “Naomi khut a pan huai gam na lei ni'n, misi zi, Moab numei Ruth a pan misi min bei lou a, agouluah ding mi a-om zel theihna ding in na lei tel ding ahi,” achi hi. Atanau bulpa in, “Kei a ding in zaw ka tan thei kei. Huchi lou in zaw keimah gouluah ka mansuah kha ding. Ka tattheihna nang tang mai in. Ke'n zaw tan thei lou ka himai hi,” achi hi. Nidanglai a Israelte lak a thil bangkim ahihkipna ding ua akitatdan uleh akikhendan uh hichi ahi. Khedap aphel ua, avengte uh apia ua, huai Israelte lak a ahihdan uh ahi. Huchi in atanau bulpa un Boaz kiang ah, “Nang a ding in lei zaw in,” achi hi. Huchi in akhedap aphelta hi. Boaz in upate leh mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Tuni in noute Elimelek thil neih tengteng leh Kilon leh Mahlon thil neih tengteng Naomi khut a pan ka lei chih theihpihtute na hi uh. Huai kia hilou in misi min amanlouhna ding in Moab numei Ruth, Mahlon zi ka zi ding in ka lei a, huai, tuni in noute atheihpihtute na hi uh,” achi hi. Kulh kongpi a mipi tengteng leh upate'n, “Theihpihtute ka hi uh.

Na inn a numei hong lut Rakil leh Leah, Israel inkuan dingsak nihte bang in Toupa'n bawl hen. Nang Ephrathah ah suanhuaitak in hong om inla, Bethlehem ah minthangtak in hong om in. Toupa'n hiai nungaknou a pan suan ahon bawlsak ding ziak in na inkuan uh Tamar in Judah asuansak Perez inkuan bang hong hi hen,” achi uhi.Boaz Leh Asuante Huchi in Boaz in Ruth api a, azi ahong hita hi. Huchi in akithuahpih a, Toupa'n nau apaisak a, tapa anei hi. Numeite'n Naomi kiang ah, “Tuni mahmah a tanau nai bei a hon omsak lou, Toupa phat in om hen. Israelte lak ah amin hong thang hen. Amah na hinna tungdingpa leh na tek lam a hon vakpa ahong hi dia; na mounu nang hon itnu, tapa sagihte sang a nang a dia hoih in amah lah asuangta ngal a,” achi uhi. Naomi in nau ala a, apom a, adonta hi. A-inveng numeite'n amin aphuak ua, “Naomi a ding in tapa ahong piangta,” chi in amin Obed asa uhi. Amah, David pa Jesse pa ahi. Hiaite Perez suante ahi uh. Perez in Hezron asuang; Hezron in Ram asuang; Ram in Amminadab asuang; Amminadab in Nashon asuang a, Nashon in Salmon asuang; Salmon in Boaz asuang a, Boaz in Obed asuang; Obed in Jesse asuang a, Jesse in David asuang hi.

Elkanah Leh A-inkuan Shiloh Ah Ama'n zi nih anei a, akhat min Hannah ahi, akhat min Peninnah ahi. Peninnah in tate anei a, Hannah in bel tate anei kei hi. Huai mi akhua ua kipan Shiloh ah Sepaihte' Toupa houpih ding leh kithoih ding in kum teng in ahohtou hi. Huai ah Eli tapate nih, Hophni leh Phinehas, Toupa siampute a-om uhi. Elkanah kithoih ni ahong tun in, azi Peninnah leh atapate leh atanute tengteng tantuan abawlsak hi. Hannah tan nih abawlsak a, Hannah lah a-it mahmah ngal a. Himahleh Toupa'n asul akhaksak hi. Toupa'n asul akhaksak ziak in alangnu'n alungkhamsak nak hi. Huchibang a kum teng a ahih ziak in Toupa inn ahohtouh teng in alungkhamna atokthou nak hi. Huchi in akapkap a, an leng ane kei. Apasal Elkanah in akiang ah, “Hannah, bang achia ahia na kah? Bang achia an ne lou na hia? Bang achia lungkham na hia? Tapa sawm sang in nang a ding in ka hoihzaw kei a hia?” achi hi.Hannah Leh Eli Huchi in Shiloh a anek ua adawn khit un Hannah adingh a, siampu Eli Toupa tempul kong khuambul a atutna ah atu hi, Hannah lungsim haksa mahmah in a-om a, Toupa kiang ah athum a, khase mahmah in akap hi. Thu achiam a, “Sepaihte' Toupa aw, na sikhanu gimna en a, na hon theihgige a, na sikhanu na hon mangngilh louh a, na sikhanu tapa na piakleh adamsung teng Toupa ka pe dia, alu ah mulmetna zat ahi kei ding,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa ma a athum san lai in Eli in amukphun ana chiamteh hi. Hannah in alungtang in agen a, amuk kia atangsak a, a-aw bel zak ahi kei hi. Huaiziak in Eli in zukham asa hi.

Huchi in Eli in akiang ah, “Bang tan ahia kham a na om nilouh ding? Na uain koihmang in,” achi hi. Hannah in, “Kham kei veng e, ka toupa. Lungsim lungkham mahmah numei ka hi. Uain leng, zu chik leng ka dawn kei, Toupa ma ah ka lungsim ka suahkhia ahi zaw. Na sikhanu Belial tanu in hon ngoh het ke'n. Ka lungsim a dimlet lunggimna leh ka lungkhamna genkhia ka hi zaw hi,” chi in adawng hi. Eli in, “Lungmuangtak in pai in, Israelte' Pathian in na thilnget nang hon pia hen,” chi in adawng hi. Ama'n, “Na sikhanu na mitmuh in deihsakna musak in,” achi hi. Huchi in numei apaita a, an ane a, lungkham mel aputa kei hi.Samuel Pianna Leh Latna Zingsangpi in athou ua, Toupa abia ua, apai ua, Ramah a a-inn uh atung nawnta uh. Elkanah in azi Hannah akithuahpih a, Toupa'n amah atheigige hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Hannah in nau apai a, ahun ahong tun in tapa anei hi. “Toupa ka nget ziak in,” chi in amin Samuel asa hi. Huchi in Elkanah leh a-inkote tengteng Toupa ma a kum teng a akithoihna uh lan ding leh athuchiam uh tangtun ding in ahong paitou uhi. Hannah bel ahohtou kei hi. Apasal kiang ah, “Kei zaw naupang in nawinek atawp masiah ka hohtou kei ding. Huai hun chiang in Toupa ma a akilat theihna ding in ka pi ding. Huai ah a-om nilouhta ding,” achi hi. Apasal Elkanah in akiang ah, “Hoih ding na chih bang zel in hih in. Anawinek na tawpsak tan in om in. Himahleh Toupa'n athu hihkip lel hen,” achi hi. Huchi in nawinek atawp masiah huai ah numei a-om a, atapa nawinek atawp masiah nawi anesak hi.

Nawinek atawptak in, tangbuang ephah khat leh uain thawl khat tawi in bawngtal kum thum a upa toh Shiloh a Toupa inn ah ata naupang chik paipih in, apitou hi. Bawngtal khat gou in, naupang Eli kiang ah api uhi. Ama'n, “Toupa, na hin bang in ka gen ahi, kei zaw, aw toupa, hiai lai a na kiang a dingh a Toupa kiang a thum numei ka hi. Hiai naupang ngen in ka thum a, Toupa'n ka nget ahon peta. Huaiziak in ke'n leng Toupa kiang ah ka lan hi. Adamsung teng Toupa a dia lat ahi,” achi hi.Huai ah ama'n Toupa abia hi.

Huan Hannah athum a, hichi in achi,“Ka lungtang Toupa tung ahakipak mahmah, Toupa ah ka kii pahtawi in a-om.Ka melmate tung ahka kam letsak in a-om;na hotdamna a ka kipah mahmah ziak in. Hannah Thumna Huchi tel a kisathei in thugen nawn kei unla; na kam ua pan pau uang himhim pawt kei hen. Toupa lah pilna Pathian ahi ngal a,ama'n thilhihte hoihtak in abuk zel hi. Mihat thalpeute akitansak a,akisuite taihatna a gak in a-om hi. Niang leh tai a omte nek dingzong in alohtawm ua,gilkialte kial nawn lou uhi.Achiingnu'n ta sagih aneita a,ta tampi neinu abahta hi. Toupa'n athat a, ahingsak hi.Han ah apaisuksak a, apikhetou hi. Toupa'n azawngsak a,ahausasak a,ahihniam a, ahihsang hi. Leivui a pan azawngte adingtousak a,ekvu a pan khutdohte adomtou hi.Miliante kiang a a-omsak theih a,thupina laltutphahatantheihna ding un.Lei kingaknate Toupa a ahi a,ama'n atung uah khovel angata ngal a. Amisiangthoute khe akem ding a,migiloute bel mial lak ahdaihsak in a-om ding uh.Hatna a kuamah inzou lou ding ahi ngal a. Toupa melmate a i tamgawp ding ua,van a pan vanpiging bang inamaute adou ding. Toupa'n kawlmong pha invai ahawm ding a;akumpipa kiang ah hatna ape dia,athaunilhpa kii apahtawi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Ramah ah a-inn ah Elkanah apaita hi. Huchi in naupang in siampu Eli ma ah Toupa nna asemta hi.Eli Tapate Eli tapate Belial tapate ahi ua; Toupa athei kei uh. Mite lak a siampute hihdan ngeina ahihleh mi'n kithoihna ahong lat chiang un, sa huan laitak in siampu sikha sa thukna sikkhut zum thum nei tawi in ahong pai zel hi. Belgongza hiam, belgong nei hiam, bel khaina nei hiam, bel hiam sung asunsuk a, huai sa thukna zum in ahon thukkhiak tengteng siampu in ala zel hi.

Huchibang in Israel mi huai a hong pai tengteng a pan Shiloh ah ana hihsak zel uhi. Huai ban ah, thau akhul ma un siampu sikha ahong pai a, kithoihmi kiang ah, “Siampu a ding haimin ding sa hon pia in. Na sa huanmin adeih kei, asial adeih hi,” achi hi. Mi'n akiang ah, “Athau pen khul phot uhenla, huai khit chiang in na hinna in adeih zahzah na la ding,” ana chih chiang un ama'n, “Hilou e, tu mah a na hon piak pah ding ahi. N'on piak keileh thagum in ka la ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa mitmuh in tangvalte khelhna athupi mahmah a, mite'n lah Toupa kiang a kithoihna lat thilkihhuai in angaita uhi.Shiloh Ah Samuel Himahleh Samuel in bel naupang chik in, puanmalngat siampu puanak silh in Toupa ma ah nna asem hi. Huai lou leng anu'n puanaktual neu akhuisak a, kum teng kithoihna uh lan dia apasal toh ahoh chiang un kum teng in atawisak zel hi. Eli in Elkanah leh azi avualzawl a, “Toupa a dia na thillat uh mun luah ding numei suan Toupa'n hon pia hen,” achi hi. Huchi in a-inn uah apaita uhi. Toupa'n Hannah aveh a, nau apai a, tapa thum leh tanu nih anei hi. Toupa ma ah naupang Samuel ahong khanglianta hi.Eli Leh Atapate Eli bel atek mahmahta hi. Israel mi tengteng tung a atapate thilhih tengteng leh kihoupihna biakbuk kongkhak bul a nasem numeite ana kithuahpih zel thute uh aza hi. Huchi in akiang uah, “Bangziak a hichibang thilhih na mai ua? Hiai mi tengteng a pan na thilhihdan hoihloute uh ka na za ngal a. Hichi ding hilou ahi, ka tapate aw, na tanchin uh ka zak ahoih lou lam ngen ahi. Toupa mite na taleksak uhi.

Mi khat, midang tung a akhelhleh Pathian in vai ahawmsak ding hi. Himahleh Toupa tung a mi akhelhleh kua'n amah a ding in angetsakta dia?” achi hi. Huchi pipi in leng apa uh aw angaikhe kei ua, Toupa'n amaute athah ding ziak in. Naupang Samuel akhanglian deuhdeuh a; Pathian leh mihing deihsak in a-om hi.Eli Inkuan Tungtang Genkholhna Eli kiang ah Pathian mipa khat ahong a, akiang ah, “Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Aigupta gam a Pharaoh inn a na om lai un na pa inkote kiang ah ka kilak kei maw? Israel nam tengteng lak a pan ka siampu hi ding, ka maitam a thil lan ding, gimlim hal ding leh siampu puanak silh dia amah ka tel ahi kei maw? Na pa inkote kiang ah Israel mite halmang thillat teng ka pia ahi kei maw? Bangziak in ahia ka tenna a na lat ding ua ka thupiak ka kiang a kithoihna leh kei a tuam dia thillat pen lei toh sikden a, kei sang a na tapate na zahtak zawk a, noumau na kisukthauna ding ua ka mi Israelte kithoihna ahoihpente na zat uh? Huaiziak in Toupa Israelte' Pathian in, ‘Ke'n zaw na inkote leh na pa inkote tangtawn in ka ma ah na om ding uh, ka na chi ngei hi. Himahleh tu in Toupa'n, ‘Na om het kei ding uh. Hon zahtak peuhmah ka zahtak dia, hon musit peuhmah ka musit ding, achi hi. Ngai in, ‘na bante leh na pa inkote bante ka tankhiak ni ahong tung, na inn ah tekkun a dam a-om kei ding uh. Ka tenna inn ah, Pathian in Israel hauhsakna apiak teng ah melma na mu dia, tangtawn in na inn ah tekkun a dam a-om kei ding uh.

Ka maitam a pan ka hihman louh ding na mi pen na mit hihkhamtu leh na lungsim lungkhamsaktu ahi ding. Na inn a hong piang peuhmah adawnsih zel ding uhi. Hiai, na tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas tung a thil tung ding nang a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding. Ni khat in anih un asi tuaktuak ding uhi. Kei a ding in siampu muanhuai ka dingkhesak dia, huai in ka lungtang leh ka lungsim toh kituak in nna asem ding. Inkuan kiptak in ka lamsak dia, tangtawn in ka thaunilhmi ma ah a-om ding. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, na inn a om lai tengteng dangka leh tanghou ngen in akiang ah akuan ding ua, tanghou tawmchik bek nek ding ka muhtheihna ding un siampu nna khat bek hon semsak ve aw, chi in ka hong thum hi, achi ding uh, ” achi hi.

Huan naupang Samuel in Eli ma ah Toupa nna asem hi. Huai lai in Toupa thu tung avang mahmah a; alangtang a kilaknate a-om kei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in, Eli amun a alup lai in, amit amial panta a, khua agina muhthei nawn ngel kei hi. Samuel Kiang Ah Toupa Kilak Eli kiang ah ava tai a, akiang ah, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Ama'n, “K'on sam kei; va lum nawn in,” achi hi. Huchi in apai a, ava lum nawn hi. Toupa'n Samuel asam nawn hi. Samuel athou a, Eli kiang ah ahoh a, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “K'on sam kei, ka tapa, va lum nawn in,” achi hi. Huai lai in Samuel in Toupa athei nai kei a, Toupa thu leng akiang a kilaksak ahi nai kei hi. Toupa'n Samuel asam nawn a, huai athumveina ahita. Amah athou a, Eli kiang ah ahoh a, “Hiai ah ka om, na hon sam a,” achi hi. Huchi in Eli in naupang Toupa'n sam ahi chih atheita hi. Huaiziak in Eli in Samuel kiang ah, “Pai inla, va lum nawn inla, ahon sap nawnleh, Toupa, thu gen in, na sikha in angaikhia, na chi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel apaita a, amun ah ava lum nawn hi. Toupa ahong pai a, hong dingh in, ama a asap bang in, “Samuel, Samuel,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in, “Thu gen in, na sikha in angaikhia hi,” achi hi. Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Ngai in, Israel gam ah aza peuhmahte bil langnih a aphuaitak in thil khat ka hih ding hi.

Huai ni in a-inkuan tungtang thu ka gen tengteng abul a pan atawp tan in Eli tung ah ka hih ding ahi. Atapate'n Pathian agensiatna khelhna uh theigige napi a, akham louh ziak in a-inkuan tangtawn a ding in ka hawmsak ding hi, chih ka hilh khinta ngal a. Huaiziak in Eli inkuan kiang ah Eli inkuan bohsiatna kithoihna in hiam, thillat in hiam, chikchiang in leng siansak theih ahi kei ding, chi in ka kichiam khinta hi,” achi hi. Zingsang tan in Samuel alum a, Toupa' inn kongkhakte ahong hi. Samuel in huai kilakna Eli theihsak alau hi. Huchi in Eli in Samuel asam a, “Samuel, ka tapa,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Bang thil ahia Toupa'n na kiang a agen? Ka kiang ah bangmah iim ke'n aw. Na kiang a agen tengteng ka kiang a iim na neihleh na tung ah Pathian in ahihhih in hih henla, huai sang a thupizaw in leng,” achi hi. Samuel in thil tengteng ahilh sipsip a, akiang ah bangmah iim anei kei. Huchi in ama'n, “Toupa thuthu ahi mah ve, hoih asak bang in hih hen aw,” achi hi. Samuel ahong khanglian deuhdeuh a, akiang ah Toupa a-om a, athu himhim lei lak ah akesak kei hi. Huchi in Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan in Israel mi tengteng in Toupa zawlnei dia Samuel hihkip ahi, chih ana theita uhi. Shiloh ah Toupa akilak nawn a; Toupa thu in Samuel kiang ah Shiloh a kilak lah ahi ngal a.

Huan Samuel thu Israel mi tengteng lak ah athangkheta hi. Israel mite Philistia mite dou ding in akuankhia uhi. Ebenezer kiang ah panmun akhoh ua, Philistia mite'n Aphek ah panmun akhoh uhi. Philistia mite Israel mite na dal ding in ana kiphalh uh. Ahong kidou uleh Philistia mite ma ah Israel mite azahlakta ua, kidouna mun ah sepaih sangli vel athat uhi. Mipite agiahmun ua ava pai uleh Israel upate'n, “Bangziak in ahia tuni a Toupa'n Philistia mite ma a hon zahlaksak mahmah? I kiang ua om a i melmate khut a pan hon hondam ding in Shiloh a pan Toupa thukhun bawm i va la ding uh,” achi uhi. Thukhun Bawm Suhsakna Huchi in Toupa thukhun bawm agiahmun uh ahong tun in, Israel mi tengteng ngaihtak in akikou zuazua ua, lei nangawn athawn ging zuazua hi. Philistia mite'n akikou husa uh azak un, “Hebrute giahmun a kikou husa gingta zuazua mai bang chihna ahia le?” achi uh. Agiahmun uah Toupa thukhun bawm ahong tung ahi, chih atheita uhi. Philistia, “Giahmun ah Pathian ahong hi,” achih ziak un mite'n alau uhi. “I tung agik hi! Tuma lam in huchibang a-om ngei ngal kei a, achi uhi. I tung agik hi! Huai Pathiante khut hattak a pan kua'n ahia hon hondam ding? Huai Pathiante ahi, Aigupta mite gamdai a hipi chiteng a that. Aw, nou Philistia mite aw, nou sikha ua a-om bang ua nou Hebrute sikha a na omlouhna ding un hattak in om unla, kipasalsak un. Kipasalsak unla sual un,” achi uhi. Huchi in Philistia mite'n asual ua, Israel mite azahlaksak ua, michih apuanin lam chiat uah ataikek uh. Anak thah mahmah ua, Israelte sepaih singthum asi uhi.

Pathian bawm alaksak ua, Eli tapa nih, Hophni leh Phinehas leng athat uhi.Eli Sihna Sepaih lak a Benjamin suan mi khat atai a, apuan khawng kikek nengnung in leh alu a lei kai niaunuau in huai ni mahmah in Shiloh ava tung hi. Ahong tun in, ngai in, Eli in lampi gei a tutna a tu kawm in ana en nilouh a, Pathian bawm ziak in alungtang aling ngal a. Mipa'n khua atun a tanchin agenleh akhomi teng akapkhia uhi. Eli in akikou husa uh azak in, “Tua thawm ging vengvung bang chihna ahia?” achi hi. Mi khat kintak in ava hoh a, Eli ava hilh hi. Eli bel kum sawmkua-le-giat a upa ahi a, amit amialta a, khua amu thei nawn kei. Huai mipa'n Eli kiang ah, “Sepaih lak a pan hong paikhia ka hi. Tuni a sepaih lak a pan hong taikhia ka hi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka tapa, bangchibang in thil a-om a oi?” achi hi. Tanchin hon tunpa'n adawng a, “Israel mite Philistia mite ma ah ataikek ua, mipi lak ah kithahna thupitak a-om lai a, na tapate nih Hophni leh Phinehas leng asi ua, Pathian bawm leng alaksak uh,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian bawm thu agentak in kongpi bul a tutphah a pan athalpuk a, amah tekta a kikhouh zou nawn lou ahih ziak in, angawng akitan a, asita hi. Israel tung ah kum sawmli sung vai ahawm hi.Phinehas Zi Sihna Amounu, Phinehas zi in nau apai a, neih ahun mahmahta hi. Ama'n Pathian bawm laksak ahih thu leh apu leh apasal si uh ahi chih azak in akunsuk a, nauvei nat in apha a, ta aneita hi. Asih dek lai in akiang a dingh numeite'n akiang ah, “Lau ke'n, tapa na neita,” achi uhi. Himahleh adawng het kei a, alimsak sam kei hi. “Thupina in Israel apawtsanta,” chi in nau min Ikabod asa hi. Pathian bawm lah alaksakta ua, apa leh apasal lah asita ngal ua. “Thupina in Israel apawtsanta, Pathian bawm lah alaksakta ngal ua,” achi hi.

Huan Philistia mite'n Pathian bawm ala ua, Ebenezer a pan Ashdod ah apaipih uhi. Philistia mite'n Pathian bawm ala ua, Dagon inn ah alalut ua, Dagon kiang ah akoih uhi. Ashdod khomite zingkhangpi a athoh uleh, ngai in, Toupa bawm ma ah Dagon amai a lei si in ana puk vialvual mawk hi. Dagon ala ua, a-omna mun ah akoih nawn uhi. Azing nawn zingkhangpi a athoh uleh, ngai in, Toupa bawm ma ah Dagon amai a lei si in ana puk vialvual mawk a; Dagon lu leh akhutpek bawm langnih kitankhia kongpi bul ah ana kikham hi. Philistiate Lak Ah Thukhun Bawm Huchi in Toupa khut Ashdod khua mite tung ah agik a, amaute ahihsia a, Ashdod khua leh akiang vel a omte zaangtan hipi in agawtta hi. Huchi in Ashdod a mite'n huchibang thil tung amuh un, “Israelte' Pathian bawm i kiang uah om gige kei hen, eimah leh i pathian Dagon tung ah akhut khak ana tel mai,” achi uhi. Huaiziak in Philistia hausa tengteng akiang uah asamkhawm ua, “Israelte' Pathian bawm bang i lohta dia?” achi uh. Amau, “Israelte' Pathian bawm Gath ah puak hi hen,” chi in adawng uhi.Huchi in Gath ah Israelte' Pathian bawm apaipihta uhi. Hichi ahong hi a, apaipih lai un Toupa khut in huai khua ahihseta hi. Kho mite aneu leh alian agawt vek a, atung uah zaangtan hipi alengsak hi. Huchi in Pathian bawm Ekron ah atun ua, Ekron khomite'n Israelte' Pathian bawm eite leh i mite that ding in i kiang ahon tunta uh, chi in akikou vengvung uhi. Huchi in Philistia hausa tengteng asamkhawm ua, “Israelte' Pathian bawm paimangsak unla, koute leh ka mite ahon thahlouhna ding in a-omna mun ngei ah pai nawn hen,” achi uh. Kho pumpi ah sihna khop siatna a-om a; Pathian khut lah huai khua ah agik mahmah ngal a. Asiloute'n zaangtan avei chiat ua, van ah huai kho kikou husa atungtou hi.

Huan Toupa bawm Philistia mite gam ah kha sagih sung a-om hi. Philistia mite'n, “Toupa bawm bang i loh ding ua? A-omna ngei mah apaisak nawndan hon hilh dih ve ua,” chi in asiampute leh aisan siamte asam uhi. Amau, “Israelte' Pathian bawm na paisak ding uleh leng avuak in paisak het kei un. Akiang ah tatlek kithoihna lan ngeingei un. Huchi in hihdam in na om ding uh. Huchi in bangziak a akhut nou a pan lakkhiak a om lou ahia chih na thei ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in amau, “Akiang a ka tatlekna thillat ding bang ahia?” achi uh. Amau, “Philistia hausate zah dangka-eng zaangtan lim nga leh dangka-eng sansim lim nga; na vek ua tung leh na hausate uh tung a leng hipi lah khat ahi ngal a. Huaiziak in na zaangtan lim uh leh na gam uh hihsetu sansim limte bawl un. Israelte' Pathian thupina pia un, huchi in akhut na tung uah, na pathiante uleh na gam uh tung ah azangsak nuam khamoh kei ding,” achi uhi. Thukhun Bawm Piakkikna Huaiziak in tu in kangtalai thak sutuah unla, bawngpi nih anawi suk lai, hakkol po ngei lou toh; huai bawngpite kangtalai ah khih unla, anoute uh amau a pan inn ah hon pi un. Toupa bawm la unla, kangtalai ah koih unla; tatlek thoihna dia na lat uh dangka-eng thil pen singlem ah thun in asik a koih in, paisak unla, khah un. Huchi in gamgi lam pang lampi tawn in Beth-shemesh ah apai hiam en un, apaileh i tung ua thil hoih loutak amah hih ana hi dia; apai keileh ei hon gawtpa amah khut ana hi kei chih i thei ding ua, i tung ua hong om himhim lel ahi ding, achi uhi. Mite'n huchibang in ahih ua

bawngpi anawi suk lai nih api ua, kangtalai ah akhih ua, anoute uh bel inn lam ah akhum uhi. Sansim lim dangka-eng leh zaangtan lim koihna singlem toh kangtalai ah Toupa bawm akoih uhi. Bawngpite'n Beth-shemesh lam zuan in lampi azui vengveng ua; huchi in ham kawmkawm in lampi azui ua, taklam ah hiam, veilam ah hiam apial het kei uh. Philistia hausate'n Beth-shemesh gamgi pha in azui uhi. Beth-shemesh khomite'n phaizang ah buh ana la ua, adaktou ua, bawm amu ua, akipahpih mahmah uhi. Huai kangtalai Beth-shemesh a mi Joshua lou ah alut a, suangpi lian mahmah omna tak ah akhawlta hi. Kangtalai sing a-ek ua, Toupa kiang ah bawngpite halmang thillat in alan uhi. Levi chite'n Toupa bawm dangka-eng thil omna singlem toh alakhia ua, suangpi tung ah akoih uhi. Beth-shemesh khomite'n huai ni mah in halmang thillatte leh kithoihnate Toupa kiang ah alan uhi. Huai Philistia hausa ngate'n amuh nung un, huai ni mahmah in Ekron kholam ah apai nawnta uhi. Philistia mite'n dangka-eng zaangtan lim Toupa kiang a tatlek thoihna dia alat uh, Ashdod kho tuam a ding in khat, Gaza kho tuam a ding in khat, Ashkelon kho tuam a ding in khat, Gath kho tuam a ding in khat, Ekron kho tuam a ding in khat ahi. Dangka-eng sansim lim ahihleh kho tengteng kulh nei khua leh singtang lam khua leng sim vek a hausa ngate a Philistia mite kho zah ahi. Toupa bawm angakna suangpi mahmah uh Beth-shemesh khomi Joshua lou ah tuni tan in a-om nilouh lai hi. Toupa bawm sung a-et ziak un Beth-shemesh khomite ama'n agawt a, alak ua mi sangnga-le-sawmsagih tak athat hi. Toupa'n anak thah ziak in mite'n asuun uhi. Beth-shemesh khomite'n, hiai Pathian siangthou Toupa ma ah kua adingh thei in ei a pan kua kiang ah ahia apaitouh ding? achi uh. Huchi in Kiriath-jearim khomite kiang ah, “Philistia mite'n Toupa bawm ahong koih nawn ua, hong suk unla na kiang uah latou dih ua,” chi a hilh ding in thupo mite asawlta uhi.

Huchi in Kiriath-jearim a mite ahohsuk ua, Toupa bawm alatou ua; mual a Abinadab inn ah alalut ua, atapa Eleazar Toupa bawm kemtu in aseptuam uhi.Samuel In Israel Tung Ah Vai Ahawm Huan hichi ahong hi a, Kiriath-jearim a bawm a-om sung sawtpi, kum sawmnihtak ahi. Huchi in Israel inkuan tengteng in Toupa alungzuan nawnta uhi. Samuel in Israel inkuan tengteng kiang ah, “Na lungtang tengteng uh toh Toupa lam hong nga na hih taktak uleh, gamdang pathiante leh Ashtaroth na lak ua kipan koihmang unla, na lungtang uh Toupa a ding in kisakholsak un. Amah kia nna sem un; huchi in Philistia mite khut a pan nou ahon tankhe ding hi,” chi in agen hi. Huchi in Israel mite'n Baal leh Ashtaroth akoihmang ua, Toupa nna kia asemta uhi. Samuel in, “Israel mi tengteng Mizpah ah samkhawm vek unla, Toupa kiang ah ka hon thumsak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Mizpah ah apaikhawm ua, tui atawi ua, Toupa ma ah asungbua uh. Huai ni in an angawl ua, huai ah Toupa tung ah i na khialta uh, achi uhi. Samuel in Mizpah ah Israel mite vai ahawmsak hi. Thukhun Bawm Kiriath-jearim Ah Huchi in Israel mite'n Samuel kiang ah, “Philistia mite khut a pan hon hondam dia Toupa i Pathian na hon sapsak tawp ke'n,” achi uh. Samuel in belamnou nawi ne lai ala a, halmang thillat in Toupa kiang ah alan hi. Israel mite a ding in Samuel in Toupa asam a, Toupa'n adawng hi. Samuel in halmang thillat alat laitak in Philistia mite'n Israel mite sual ding in ahon naih uhi. Himahleh huai ni in Toupa'n Philistia mite tung ah ngaihtak in van agingsak a, abuaisakgawp a, Israel mite ma ah zoh in a-om uhi.

Mizpah a pan Israel mite apawt ua, Philistia mite adelh ua, Beth-kar nuai atun tan un athat zel uhi. Huchi in Samuel in suang ala a, Mizpah leh Shen kikal ah aphut a, “Hiai tan Toupa'n hon panpih hi,” chi in amin “Ebenezer” asa hi. Huchi in Philistia mite azahlakta ua, Israel gam ah ahoh nawnta kei uh. Huchi in Samuel damsung tengteng Toupa khut in Philistia mite adou hi. Philistia mite'n Israel mite khua alakte uh Ekron a pan Gath tan in Israel mite ape nawn vek uh. Agam Israel mite'n Philistia mite khut a pan atankheta uhi. Israel mite leh Amor mite kal ah kilemna a-om hi. Huchi in adamsung teng Samuel in Israelte vai ahawmsak hi. Kum teng in Bethel leh Gilgal leh Mizpah aveh zel a; huai mun teng ah Israelte vai ahawmsak hi. A-inn omna ahih ziak in Ramah ah apai nawn zelzel hi. Huai ah Israel mite vai ahawmsak hi. Huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam khat adoh hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Samuel a-upata a, Israel mite tung a vaihawmmi in atapate abawl hi. Ata masapen min Joel ahi a, azom min Abijah ahi. Amaute Beer-sheba a vaihawmte ahi uh. Himahleh atapate'n ama omdan ala kei ua, sum-le-pai adelh ua, golhna ala ua, dik a vaihawmna akaikawi uhi. Huchi in Israel mite upate tengteng akikhawm ua, Ramah ah Samuel kiang ah ahoh uhi. Akiang ah, “Ngai in, na upa mahmahta a, na tapate'n lah na omdan ala kei hial uh. Namdang tengteng bang a ka tung ua vaihawm ding kumpipa hon bawlsak in,” achi uhi. Himahleh akiang a, “Ka tung ua vaihawm ding kumpipa hon pia in,” achih un Samuel akipaksak kei hi. Huchi in Toupa kiang ah Samuel athum hi. Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Mite'n na kiang a agen tengteng uh ngaikhia in. Nang hon deih lou ahi kei ua, atung ua kumpipa dia kei hon deih lou ahi zaw uhi. Mipite'n Kumpipa Angen Uh Huaiziak in athu uh ngaikhia in. Himahleh chitaktak in vauhilh inla, atung ua vaihawmmi kumpipa tatdan ding kawkmuh in,” achi hi. Samuel in Toupa thu tengteng kumpipa ngen mipite ahilh vek hi. “Na tung ua vaihawmmi ding kumpipa tatdan hichibang ahi ding. Na tapate uh ala dia, amah mah a ding, sakol kangtalai a ding leh asakol tungtuang mite ding in asep ding. Akhente asakol kangtalai ma ah atai ding uh. Asepaih sangkhatte heutu ding leh sawmngate heutu ding asep dia; khenkhatte alei let ding, abuh la ding, agalvante bawl ding, akangtalai van bawl ding in azang ding hi. Na tanute uh gimlim bawl ding, anhuan ding leh tanghou bawl ding in azang ding hi. Na lou, na grephuan, olive huan a ahoih tata ahon sut dia, asikhate ape ding hi. Na haichi leh na grephuan a sawm-a-khat ahon laksak dia

asikhate leh heutute ape ding hi. Na sikhapate, na sikhanute, na tangval hoihhoihte leh na bawngte ahon sut dia, anasem ding in azang ding. Na belamhon lak a sawm-a-khat ahon laksak dia; nou asikhate na hi ding uh. Huai hun chiang in na tel ding uh kumpipa ziak in na kapkhe ding uh. Himahleh huai hun chiang in Toupa'n ahon ngaikhe kei ding,” achi hi. Himahleh mipite'n Samuel thu azui nuam kei uh, “Ahi kei, kumpipa i neih ngeingei ding uh ahi. Huchi in namdang tengteng bang i hong hi dia, i kumpipa'n vai ahon hawmsak dia, i namte pi in galte ahon doupih ding,” achi uhi. Samuel in mipite thugen tengteng aza a, Toupa bil ah agensawn hi. Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Athu uh la inla, kumpipa bawlsak in,” achi hi. Samuel in Israel mite kiang ah, “Michih noumau khua chiat ah paita un,” achi hi.

Huan Benjamin gam a Benjamin suan a mi khat mihat leh hangsan mahmah a-om a, amin Kish ahi. Amah Abiel tapa, Zeror tapa, Bekorath tapa, Aphiah tapa ahi. Ama'n tapa khat anei a, amin Saul ahi. Tangval deihhuaitak ahi a, Israel mite lak ah amah sang a deihhuaizaw himhim a-om kei. Kuamah aliangzang khup leng a-om kei hi. Saul pa Kish sabiltungte amang hi. Kish in atapa Saul kiang ah, “Thou inla, sikha khat pi inla sabiltungte va zong dih ve,” achi hi. Huchi in Ephraim tanggam ah avak a, Shalisha gam ah avak hi. Himahleh amu kei uh. Huchi in Shalim gam ah avak ua, huai ah leng amu kei uh. Benjamin mite gam ah avak nawn ua, himahleh amu tuan kei uhi. Zuph gam atun un Saul in akiang a om asikha kiang ah, “Kisa dih, i pai nawn mai ding, ahuchih keileh ka pa'n sabiltungte awlmoh nawn lou in ei hon ngaihtuah zaw kha ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, hiai khua ah Pathian mipa a-om a, mizahtakhuaitak ahi. Agen peuhmah ahong tung ngeingei nak hi. Kisa in, huai ah i va hoh ding, i hohna lampi ahon hilhthei zenzen khakleh,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul in asikha kiang ah, “Ahi na a, ngai dih, hoh hita lehang, huai mi a ding in bang i tawi dia? I bawm ah lah tanghou a-om nawn kei. Pathian mipa kipahman tawi ding a-om het kei hi. Bang i nei a eita?” achi hi. Sikha in Saul adawng nawn a, “Ngai in, dangka shekel mun li a khen mun khat ka tawi lai hi. Hiai i hohna ding a hon hilh man ding in Pathian mipa ka pe ding,” achi hi.

Saul In Samuel Akimuhpih Huchi in Saul in asikha kiang ah, “Hoih geih e, va hoh peuhmah ni,” achi hi. Huchi in Pathian mipa omna khua ah ahohta uhi. Mual a kho zotna lampi a apaitouh lai un nungak tui tawi dia hong kuante amu ua, akiang uah, “Hiai ah mutheipa a-om hia?” achi uhi. Amau adawng ua, “Om mah e, ngai in, na ma uah apai, kin un, tuni in khua ah ana hoh hi. Tuni in mun sang ah mite akithoih uh. Khua a na luttouhtak un mun sang a an ne dia ahoh ma in na va mu ngal ding uh. Kithoihna vualzawlpa ding ahih ziak in atun mateng mipi'n an ane kei ding uh. Huai khit chiang in amisapte un an ane zel uhi. Huaiziak in hohtou meng unla, na va mu pah ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in khua ah ahohtou ua, khua alut uleh, ngai in, Samuel mun sang a hoh ding in amau akituahpih hi. Saul hong ma ni khat in Samuel kiang ah Toupa akilak a: “Zingchiang in hichi hun in Benjamin gam a pan na kiang ah mi khat ka hon hohsak dia, ka mi Israelte tung a heutu ding in thau na nilh ding ahi. Ama'n Philistia mite khut a pan ka mite ahondam ding. Akikou husa uh ka kiang ahong tun tak ziak in ka mite zaw ka limsak ahi,” achi hi. Samuel in Saul amuh in Toupa'n akiang ah, “En dih, na kiang a ka mi gen; amah mah in ka mite tung ah vai ahawm ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kulh kongpi ah Saul in Samuel ava naih a, “Mutheipa inn koi lai a om ahia, hon hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Samuel in Saul adawng a, “Kei huai mutheipa ka hi.

Ka ma ah mun sang lam zuan in pai inla, tuni in ka kiang ah an na ne ding hi. Zingchiang zingsang in ka hon paisak ding. Na lungtang a om tengteng leng ka hon hilh ding. Ni thum paita a mang na sabiltung thu lunghimoh ke'n. Muh ahita uh. Israelte lunggulh kua tung ah ahia a-om? Nang leh na pa inn a mi tengteng tung ah ahi kei maw?” achi hi. Saul in adawng a, “Israel nam lak a neupen, Benjamin nam ka hi kei maw? Ka inkuan leng Benjamin inkuan tengteng lak a neupen ahi kei maw? Bangchidan a hichidan ka kiang a gen na hia?” achi hi. Samuel in Saul leh asikha api a, mikhual indan ah apilut a, achialte uh, mi sawmthum lak ah mun zahtakhuai ah atusak hi. Samuel in anhuanmi kiang ah, “Na kiang a koihtuam ding ka chih, tantuan ka hon piak pen hon la dih,” achi hi. Huchi in anhuanmi in aphei leh atung a om ahon tawi a, Saul ma ah alui hi. Samuel in, “En dih, ka na koihtuam, um inla ne in. Ahun sehsa a dia hiai mite ka chialkhawm lai a ka hon sehsak him ahi, ka na chita ngal a,” achi hi.Huchi in huai ni in Saul in Samuel toh ankuang a-umkhawm uhi. Mun sang a pan khua ahong paisuk un intung ah Saul in Samuel ahoupih hi.Samuel In Saul Thuhilhna Zingkhangpi in athou a; nisuah kuan in Samuel in intung a om Saul asam hi. “Thou in, ka hon paisakta ding,” achi hi. Huchi in anih un apaikhia ua, Saul leh Samuel apawtta uh. Khonawl atunsuk un Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Sikhapa i malam ah paisak inla, ama'n hon paipel zoh chiang in, nang bel khawl tadih in, Pathian thu ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.

Huai khit in Samuel in sathau bawm lakhia in alu ah asung a, atawp a, “Toupa'n agoutante tung a heutu ding a sathau hon nilh ahi kei maw? Tuni a na hon nutsiat chiang in Zelzah ah Benjamin gamgi a Rakil han kiang ah mi nih na mu dia; amau na kiang ah, ‘Na sabiltung zonte amuta uh. Ngai in, na pa'n sabiltungte lungkhampih nawn lou in, nang hon lungkhampihta hi. Ka tapa a ding in bang ka hih dia, chichi ahi, achi ding uh’. Huai a pan pai zel inla, Tabor tosaw na va tung ding a, huai ah mi thum Bethel a Pathian kiang a hohtou dingte'n hon na kituahpih ding uh. Khat in kelnou apom dia, khat in tanghou pek khal thum atawi dia, khat in uain thawl atawi ding hi. “Chibai ahon buk ding ua, tanghou pek khal nih ahon pe ding ua; huai na la ding ahi. Huai khit in Philistia sepaihte omna Pathian mual na va tung ding ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, huai khua na va tun chiang in zawlnei pawl khat ama ua pekgingte, khuangtate, tamngaite leh kaihgingte tawimi pawl toh mun sang a pan hong paikhesuk na tuak dia, amaute'n thu agen ding uhi. Na tung ah Toupa Kha nakpitak in ahong tung ding a, nang leng amau toh thu na gen dia, huchi in mituam na suak ding hi. “ ‘Hiai chiamtehnate na tung a ahong tun chiang in, thil hong om in azil dungzui in na hih ding ahi. Pathian lah na kiang ah a-om ngal a. Kei ma in Gilgal ah hohsuk in.

Ngai in, kei leng halmang thillatte leh lemna kithoihnate lan ding in na kiang ah ka hong suk ding. Na kiang a ka hong a, na hih ding ka hon hilh ma ni sagih na taam ding,” achi hi. Huchibang ahong hi ngei a, Samuel paisan dia anungngattak in Pathian in lungtang dang apeta hi. Huai chiamtehna tengteng huai ni in ahong tung vek hi. Saul Thaunilhna Huan hichi ahong hi a, tuma lam a amah ana theisate'n zawlneite thugenna ah atel sam chih atheih un, akihou ua, “Kish tapa tung a thil hong om bangchidan ahita a? Saul leng zawlneite lak a tel samta ahi maw?” akichi uhi. A-omna khua ua mi khat in adawng a, “Apa uh kua ahi tuan a ahia?” achi hi. Huchi in Saul leng zawlnei ahi samta maw? chih paunak ahong hita hi. Athugen khit in mun sang atungta hi. Saul paneu in akiang ah leh asikha kiang ah, “Koi a hoh na hi ua?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sabiltung zong ka hi uh. Ka muh zoh louh ziak un Samuel kiang ah ka va hoh uhi,” achi hi. Saul paneu in, “Samuel in na kiang ua bang ahia agen hon hilh dih,” achi hi. Saul in apaneu kiang ah, “Sabengtungte amuta uh chih ahon hilh hi,” achi hi. Himahleh lalgam thu Samuel in agen pen ahilh kei hi.Saul Kumpipa A Puan Ahi Huchi in Samuel in mipite Mizpah ah Toupa mai ah asamkhawm hi. Huai ah Israel suante kiang ah, “Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte Aigupta a pan ka pikhia a, Aigupta mite khut a pan leh nou hon nuaisiah gam tengteng a pan ka hon hunkhia hi. Himahleh tuni in na mangbatna tengteng uleh na gimthuakna tengteng ua kipan nou hon humbitpa na Pathian uh na deih kei uh.

Akiang ah, ‘Ahi kei, kumpipa hon bawlsak in, na chi uh. Huaiziak in tu in anam a nam leh achi a chi in Toupa ma ah hong kilang un,” achi hi. Huchi a Samuel in Israel chi tengteng ahong kilat naisaktak in Benjamin chitel ahong hita. Benjamin chite bel a-inkuankuan in ahong kilak ua, Matri mite inkuan tel ahong hi a, Kish tapa Saul tel ahong hita hi. Amah azon uleh amuzou kei uh. Huaiziak in Toupa adong tuan nawn ua, “Hiai mi hong pai nai lou hiam,” achi uh. Toupa'n adawng a, “Ngai un, van lak ah akibu hi,” achi hi. Huchi in atai ua, ava pikhia ua, mipi lak a adinleh mi lak ah asangpen a, kuamah aliangzang khengzou a-om kei uhi. Samuel in mi tengteng kiang ah, “Toupa miseh na mu uhia? Mi tengteng lak ah amah bang mahmah a-om kei,” achi hi.Mite akikou ua, “Pathian in kumpipa hondam hen,” achi uhi. Huchi in Samuel in mipite lalgam omdan ding ahilh hi. Laibu ah agelh a, Toupa ma ah akoih hi. Samuel in mite amau inn chiat ah apaisakta hi. Saul leng Gibeah a a-inn ah apai sam hi. Pathian in alungtang uh akhoih mihangsante leng amah toh apaikhawm uhi. Himahleh Belial tapate'n, “Hiai mi'n bangchi in ahon hondam thei mahmah dia?” chi in amah angaineu ua, thilpiak ahong pe kei uh. Himahleh amah bel adai dide hi.

Huchi in Ammon mi Nahash ahong kisa a, Jabesh-gilead sual tum in ava giahkhum hi. Jabesh mi tengteng in Nahash kiang ah, “Kou toh thukhun bawl in, huchi in nang nna ka sem ding uh,” achi uh. Ammon mi Nahash in akiang uah, “Hichibang in ahi nou toh thu ka khun ding. Na mit taklam tengteng uh khelkhiak vek ahi dia; huai Israel mi tengteng minsiatna dia koih ahi ding,” achi hi. Jabesh khua upate'n akiang ah, “Israel gam tengteng a thupo mite ka sawltheihna ding un ni sagih sung hon hungaih in. Hon hondam ding kuamah a-om keileh na kiang ah ka hong paikhe ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in huai thupo mite Saul omna khua Gibeah ahong tung uhi. Mite bil azak in huai thute agen ua; mite aw suah in akap uhi. Ngai in, lou a pan bawng hawl in Saul ahong pai hi. Saul in, “Bang achi ua ahia mite akah uh?” achi hi. Jabesh a mite thugen ahilh uhi. Huai thu azaktak in Saul tung ah Pathian Kha ahong tung a nakpitak in ahehta hi. Huchi in bawngtal nih ala a, asemnen vek hi. Israel gam tengteng ah thupo mite ahawmsak a, “Kuapeuh Saul leh Samuel zui nuam lou peuhmah hiai bawngtal bang a hih ahi ding,” achi hi.Huchi in mipite'n Toupa alau ua, thukhat sat in ahong kuankheta uh. Bezek ah amaute asim a, Israel mite nuaithum ahi uh. Judah mite singthum ahi uh. Ahong pai thupo mite kiang ah, “Jabesh-gilead mite kiang ah, zingchiang in nisat san laitak mah in hotkhiak na hi ding uh va chi un,” achi hi. Thupo mite ava hoh ua, Jabesh mite ahilh ua, huchi in akipak mahmah uhi.

Huchi in Jabesh mite'n, “Zingchiang in na kiang uah ka hong pawtkhe ding ua, ka tung uah na ut-ut un hih mai un,” achi uhi. Saul In Ammonte Azou Mipite'n Samuel kiang ah, “Kuate ahia, Saul in i tung uah vai ahawm tel ding maw chi? Huai mite hon pi in ka that ding uh,” achi uhi. Saul in, “Tuni chitchiat in zaw kuamah that kei un. Tuni in Toupa'n Israelte lak ah hotdamna abawlta ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in mipite kiang ah, “Kisa dih uh, Gilgal ah i hoh ding ua, huai ah lalgam i thaksak nawn ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in mite tengteng Gilgal ah ahohta uhi. Saul Gilgal ah Toupa ma ah kumpipa in abawlta uhi. Huai ah Toupa ma ah lemna kithoihnate alan uhi. Huchi in huai ah Saul leh Israel mi tengteng akipak mahmah uhi.

Huan Samuel in Israel mi tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai dih ua, ka kiang a na thugen tengteng uh ngaikhia in, na tung uah kumpipa ka bawlta hi. Tu in, ngai dih ua, kumpipa in na ma uh akai hi. Kei zaw tek in ka sam leng akangta hi. Ngai dih ua, na kiang uah ka tapate a-om uh. Ka naupan a pan tutan na ma uh ka hon pi hi. Hiai ah ka om hi. Toupa ma leh asathau nilhpa ma ah hon sel un. Kua bawngtal ka suh ngei a? Kua sabiltung ahia ka suh ngei? Kua ka khem ngei a? Kua ka hihgenthei ngei a? Ka mit tawsak ding in kua a pan in golhna ka la ngei a? K'on din nawn vek ding,” achi hi. Amau, “Na hon khem ngei kei a, n'on hihgenthei ngei sam kei. Kuamah khut a pan lak tuak louh leng na la ngei kei,” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Ka khut ah bangmah kilawm lou na mu kei uh, chih tuni in Toupa na lak uah theihpihpa ahi a; asathau nilhpa atheipihpa ahi,” achi hi. Amau, “Amah hon theipihpa ahi,” achi uhi. Samuel in mite kiang ah, “Mosi leh Aaron seppa leh Aigupta a pan na pipute uh pikhepa Toupa ahi. Huchi in dingh kinken unla, Toupa ma ah Toupa'n na tung uh leh na pipute uh tung a thil dik ana hihte ka hon sutpih ding. Aigupta gam a Jakob alut nung in, na pipute un Toupa asam ua, huchi in Toupa'n Mosi leh Aaron asawl hi. Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a pan apikhia a, hiai mun ah atengsak hi. Himahleh, Toupa a Pathian uh amangngilh uh. Ama'n Hazor sepaih heutu Sisera khut, Philistia mite khut leh Moab kumpipa khut ah akhawng a, amaute'n adou uhi.

“Toupa asam ua, ‘Toupa i lehngatsan ua, Baal leh Ashtaroth nna i sep ziak un i na khialta uh. Himahleh tu in ka melmate khut a pan hon hunkhia inla, huchi in nang nna ka sem ding uh, achi uh. Toupa'n Jerubbaal, Bendan, Jephthah leh Samuel asawl a, khat lam khat lam a na melmate uh khut a pan ahon hunkhia hi. Huchi in bittak in na tengta uhi. Samuel In Mipite Kiang Ah Thu Agen Toupa laudan na siam ua, a-nna na sep ua, a-aw na zuih ua, Toupa thupiak na helsan louh ua, nou leh na tung ua vaihawm kumpipa toh Toupa na Pathian uh zuite na hih uleh ahoih ding hi. Himahleh, Toupa aw zui lou a, Toupa thupiak na helsan uleh na pipute un Toupa khut athuak mah bang un nou leng na thuak ding uhi. Huchi in ding kinken unla, Toupa'n na mitmuh ua thil thupitak ahih ding en un. Tuni in huit buh ala uh ahi kei maw? Van gingsak ding leh vuah zusak ding in Toupa ka sam ding. Huchi in kumpipa na nget thu uah Toupa mitmuh a thil na hihkhelh uh athupidan thei in na mu ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in Toupa asam a, Toupa'n huai ni in van agingsak a, vuah azusak hi. Huchi in mite'n Toupa leh Samuel alau mahmah uhi. Mi tengteng in Samuel kiang ah, “Ka sihlouhna ding un, Toupa na Pathian kiang ah na sikhate hon thumsak in. Hiai thil hoih loutak, kumpipa ka na nget uh, ka gitlouhna tengteng uh behlap ka na hita uh,” achi uhi. Samuel in mite kiang ah, “Lau kei un, hiai thil giloutak na hihta uhi. Himahleh Toupa na zuih uh pialsan kei unla, na lungtang tengteng un Toupa nna sem zaw un. “Lampial kei un.

Manna bei thilte leh nou hon hunkhe theiloute zui kei un; amaute bangmah lou ahi ngal ua. Amin thupitak ziak in Toupa'n amite alehngatsan kei dia; amah mite hi ding a noute hon bawl Toupa kipah lam ahi. Huai phet leng ahi kei a, nou a dia thum tawp in Toupa tung ah thil ka hihkhial het kei ding. Himahleh lampi hoih leh dik ka hon kawkmuh zaw ding ahi. Toupa laudan siam photphot un. Na lungtang tengteng un chihtaktak in amah nna sem unla; nou a dia athilhih thupitakte ngaihtuah un. Himahleh giloutak a thil na hih lailai uleh nou leh na kumpipa uh na mangthang ding uh,” achi hi.

Saul kum sawmthum ahih in vaihawm apan a; Israelte tung ah kum nih vai ahawm in, Saul in Israelte lak ah mi sangthum atel hi. Huai teng lak a sangnih Mikmash ah leh Bethel tang ah Saul kiang ah a-om uh. Sangkhat Benjamin gam a Gibeah ah Jonathan kiang ah a-om uh. Adang teng apuanin uah apaisak vek hi. Jonathan in Gibeah a om Philistia galvil sepaihte ava sual hi. Huai Philistia mite'n ana za uhi. Huchi in Saul in, “Hebru mite'n na za uhen,” chi in agam tengteng ah pengkul amutsak hi.
