Israel tengteng in, Saul in Philistia galvil sepaihte asual chih leh Israelte'n leng Philistia mite huat in a-om uh chih thute ana zata uh. Huchi in mite Saul kiang ah Gilgal ah akikaikhawm uhi. Philistia mite Israelte sual ding in akikaikhawm uhi. Kangtalai singthum, sakol tungtuangmi sangguk, mihing tuipi piau a piaunel zah mahmah a tam ahi uh. Huchi in akuantou ua, Beth-aven suahlam pang ah Mikmash ah panmun akhoh uhi. Israel mite'n umbit in a-om uh chih akitheih un, mite lah alunghimoh mahmahta ua, mite kokhuk ah, lounok ah, suangpi pang ah, kulh ah leikohawm ah akibu uhi. Hebru mi khenkhatte Jordan gal ah Gad leh Gilead gam ah atai uhi.Saul bel Gilgal ah a-om lailai a, mite'n ling kawmkawm in amah azui uhi. Samuel hun seh bang in ni sagih ataam hi. Himahleh Samuel lah Gilgal ah ahong pai kei hi. Huchi in mite'n ataizaksanta uh. Saul in, “Haltum thillat ding leh lemna thillat dingte hiai ah ka kiang ah hon la un,” achi hi. Huchi in halmang thillat alan hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, halmang thillat alan khin lel a, ngai in, Samuel ahong tung hi. Amah mu ding in Saul akuan hi. Samuel in, “Bang na hih na hia?” achi hi.

Saul in, “Mite'n ahon paimangsan khin ua, nang lah niseh ni in na hong tungta kei hi. Philistia mite lah Mikmash ah akikaikhawm uh chih ka thei hi. Huaiziak in ‘Philistia mite'n Gilgal ah hon sual dekdek uhi. Toupa hehpihna lah ka ngen nai kei a, ka chi hi. Huaiziak in halmang thillat lan lou thei ka hi kei,” achi hi. Philistiate Toh Kidouna Himahleh na lalna amongta ding; Toupa'n thu ahon piak na zuih louh ziak in Toupa'n ama lungtang bang pumi azong a, mite tung a heutu ding in Toupa'n amah asepta hi,” achi hi.Galdou Ding A Kisakkholhna Samuel athou a, Gilgal a pan Benjamin gam a Gibeah ah ahohtou hi. Saul in akiang a mi omte asim a, zaguk tak ahi uh. Saul leh atapa Jonathan leh akiang ua mi omte Benjamin gam a Gibeah ah a-om uh. Himahleh Philistia mite'n Mikmash ah panmun akhoh uhi. Lok mite Philistia mite panmun a pan pawl thum ahong kuan ua, pawl khat in Shual gam a Ophrah lam zuan lampi azui uhi. Pawl khat in Beth-horon lam zuan lampi azui ua, pawl dang in gamdai zul Zeboim Phaizang lam zuan gamgi lampi azui uhi. Philistia mite'n, “Hebru mite'n namsau hiam, tei hiam abawl kha zenzen ding uh,” achih ziak un Israel gam pumpi ah siksekmi akimu kei hi. Himahleh Israel mi tengteng, michih aleilehna, asuanggal, aheipi, atupi tat-hiam ding in, Philistiate kiang ah ahohsuk zel uhi. Himahleh tupite, suanggalte, sikkhutte leh heipite tat-hiamna ding sik-hat leh chiang mukzumte bawlna ding anei uhi. Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, akidou ni un Saul leh Jonathan kiang a om mite'n namsau hiam, tei hiam anei kei uh. Saul leh atapa Jonathan in bel anei uhi. Philistia galvil sepaihte Mikmash kuam ah apaikheta uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni khat Saul tapa Jonathan in agalvan tawipa tangval kiang ah, “Kisa dih, gal langkhat a Philistia mi galvil sepaihte omna ah i va hoh ding,” achi hi. Himahleh apa ahilh kei hi. Saul bel Gibeah gam tawp lam pek a Migron a theibuhfai kung nuai ah a-om hi. Akiang a om mite zaguk ahi uh. Shiloh a Toupa siampu Eli tapa Phinehas tapa Ikabod unaupa Ahitub tapa Ahijah siampu puanak silh a-om hi. Jonathan ahoh chih mipite'n athei kei uhi. Jonathan in Philistia mi galvil sepaihte omna a hoh atupna phaizang leh phaizang kikal ah alang tuaktuak ah suangpi sangtak a-om hi. Akhat min Bozez ahi a, akhat min Seneh ahi. Suangpi sang khat pen Mikmash zawn mallam a om ahi a, adang khat pen Gebeah zawn simlam a om ahi. Jonathan in agalvan tawipa tangval kiang ah, “Kisa dih, zeksum louh sepaihte omna ah i va hoh ding. Toupa'n thil ahon hihsak kha mai hiam. Toupa a ding in atam hiam, atawm hiam ahotdamna ding bangmah dalna a-om tuan ngal kei a,” achi hi. Agalvan tawipa'n akiang ah, “Na lungsim a om bangtak in hih in. Ngai in, na lungsim bang geih ka lungsim ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in Jonathan in, “Kisa in, akiang uah i va hoh galkah dia, i va kimusak ding. I kiang a, ‘Na kiang ua ka hong matan uh na om un, ahon chih uleh i mun ah i dingh kinken dia, akiang uah i hohtou kei ding. “Ka kiang lam uah hong tou un, achih uleh bel i hohtou dia, Toupa'n i khut ah amaute ahon pia chih ei a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding,” achi hi. Anih un Philistia mi galvil sepaihte ava kimusak uhi.

Philistiate'n, “En dih uh, Hebru mite abukna leihawm a pan ahong paikhia uh,” achi uhi. Galvil sepaihte omna a mite'n Jonathan leh agalvan tawipa, “Hong paitou unla, thil banghiam ka hon ensak ding uh,” chi in ana sam uhi. Jonathan in agalvan tawipa kiang ah, “Hon zuitou dih. Toupa'n amaute Israelte khut ah apeta hi,” achi hi. Jonathan akhut leh khe toh pang in akaltou a, agalvan tawipa'n azui hi. Amau bel Jonathan ma ah apuk ua, ama nung in agalvan tawipa'n amaute athat hi. Jonathan Thilhih Hangsan Giahmun leh gamlak a mipi tengteng aling ua; galvil sepaihte leh lok mite leng aling sam uh. Huan ziin ahong ling a; huchi in nakpitak a linna a-om hi.Philistiate Tung A Vualzohna Benjamin gam Gibeah ah Saul galvil mite'n a-en vialvial uhi. Ngai in, mipite zul in azulkhe zungzung ua, khat lam khat lam ah akiphutuah muimui uhi. Huchi in Saul in akiang a mipi omte kiang ah, “Tu in kisim unla, kuate ahia kim lou hong ki-en dih ua,” achi hi. Ahong kisim uleh ngai in, Jonathan leh agalvan tawipa ana om kei uhi. Saul in Ahijah kiang ah, “Pathian bawm va la dih,” achi hi. Huai lai in Pathian bawm Israel suante kiang a om ahi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul in siampu ahoupih laitak in Philistia mite giahmun lam a thawmging angaih semsem hi. Saul in siampu kiang ah, “Na khut kaikik in,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul leh akiang a mipi om tengteng apaikhawm ua, kidouna ah ahohta uh. Ngai in, amau leh amau namsau in ana kisattuah ua, huchi in apumbuai uhi.

Hiai ban ah tuma lam a Hebru mite huai gam kim a pan Philistiate giahmun a amau toh va paitoute leng Saul leh Jonathan kiang a om in Israel mite lam ah ahong pang nawnta uhi. Huchi mah bang in Ephraim tanggam a Israel mi kibu tengteng in Philistia mite ataimang uh chih ana za ua, amau leng kidouna a pang sam in adelhzui uhi. Huchi in huai ni in Toupa'n Israelte ahumbitta hi. Beth-aven pha in asual uhi.Kidou Khit A Thil Tungte Huai ni in Israel mite alungkia ua, Saul in, “Ka melmate tung a phu ka lakna dia nitaklam ahih masiah kuapeuh in an anekleh hamsia thuak hen,” achih ziak in. Huchi in kuamah in an himhim achiam kei uhi. Mipi tengteng gamnuai ava tung ua, lei ah khuaizu ana om hi. Mipite gamnuai ava tun un, ngai in, khuaizu ana takkhia hi. Himahleh mipite'n hamsia alauh ziak un kuama'n khut a sawk in achiam ngam kei uhi. Himahleh apa'n mipite kichiam a, vau ahih lam Jonathan in thei lou in akhut a chiangmong in khuaikhak adawt a, akam a guang in aneta a, huchi in amit hah ahong chiangta hi. Mipi lak a mi khat in ahoupih a, “Na pa'n zaw mipite tuni a an ne peuhmah hamsethuak in om hen, chi a vau bikbek hiven. Huchi in mipite abah uhi,” achi hi. Jonathan in, “Ka pa'n mite buaisak lel ahi ve. Enta unla, khuaizu tawmchik ka chep ziak lel a ka mit ahong vak takdan. Mipite'n gallak thil amuh peuhpeuh uh tuni in a-utut uh ne thei le uh vakzaw na tel in chia! Huaiziak in Philistiate tamsem thah louh loh i hi ve ua,” achi hi. Huai ni in Mikmash a pan Aijalon tan in Philistia mite adou uh.

Huchi in mipite abah mahmah uhi.Israel Mite Khelhna Mipite'n agallak thil uh aboh in aboh uhi. Belamte, bawngtalte leh bawngnoute ua, leitual ah athat ua, mipite'n asisan toh ane uhi. “Ngai in, mipite'n sisan toh ne in Toupa tung ah akhialta uh,” chi in Saul ahilh uhi. Ama'n, “Na talekta uhi; ka ma ah suang lianpi khuk un,” achi hi. Saul in, “Mipi lak ah vakzak vek unla, akiang uah, michih in abawng hon kai hen. Michih in abelam hon kai hen. Hiai ah hong gou in ne hen. Asisan toh ne a Toupa tung a thil hihkhial lou in, va chi un,” achi hi. Huai zan in mi tengteng in amau bawngtal chiat uh ahon kai ua, huai ah agou uhi. Saul in Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a; huai pen Toupa a dia maitam abawl masakpen ahi. Saul in, “Zan chiang in Philistia mite va dou unla, zing khovak tan in i sual ding uh. Kuamah i hawi kei ding uh,” achi hi. Amau, “Hoih na sak peuhmah hih in,” achi uh. Siampu in ahihleh, “Pathian naih ni,” achi hi. Saul in Pathian adong a, “Philistia mite ka va sual diam? Israelte khut ah amaute na pe diam?” achi hi. Himahleh huai ni'n adawng kei. Saul in, “Nou mipi heutu tengteng hong nai dih ua. Tuni in akoi pen ah ahia i khelh uh theihkhiak tum dih uh. Israelte hondam zelpa Toupa ahin lai teng ka tapa Jonathan hilhial in ana hihkhelhleh amah asih ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh mipi lak a mi kuamah adawng himhim a-om kei uh. Israel tengteng kiang ah, “Noute atuam in omkhawm unla, kei leh ka tapa Jonathan atuam in ka omkhawm ding uh,” achi hi. Mipite'n Saul kiang ah, “Hoih na sak bang in hih in,” achi uhi.

Saul in Toupa Israelte' Pathian kiang ah, “Adiktak hon hihlang in,” achi a, aisan pen Jonathan leh Saul tung ah apuk a; mipite bel ahul uhi. Saul in, “Kei leh ka tapa kikal ah aisan un,” achi hi. Huchi in Jonathan tung ah apuk hi. Saul in Jonathan kiang ah, “Bang ahia na hih hon hilh in,” achi hi. Jonathan in ahilh a, “Ka chiang tawi mong in khuaizu neuchik ka na chiam hi. Ngai in, ka sih ding mah ahi,” achi hi. Saul in, “Pathian in ahihhih in hih mai hen. Huai sang a thupizaw in leng. Jonathan, na si ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi. Mipite'n Saul kiang ah, “Israelte lak a hiai hotdamna thupi mahmah hihpa Jonathan asi dia hia? Si lou hial ding. Toupa ahin lai teng asamzang khat leng lei ah ake het kei ding. Tuni in Pathian toh asemkhawm uhi,” achi uh. Mipite'n Jonathan ahondam ua, asi kei hi. Saul in Philistia mite adelh lai akiksanta a, Philistia mite amau om mun ah apaita uhi.Saul Vaihawmna Leh Inkuante Saul in Israelte tung ah vaihawmna ala a, aning teng ah amelmate, Moab, Ammon suante, Edom, Zobah kumpipate leh Philistia mite adou a; akiheina peuh ah avualzou zel hi. Hangsantak in gal adou a, Amalekte azou a, alok mite khut a pan Israelte ahonkhia hi. Saul tapate bel Jonathan, Ishvi leh Malki-shua ahi ua, atanu nihte min hiaite ahi; a-upazaw min Merab ahi a, anaupangzaw min Mikal ahi. Saul zi min Ahinoam ahi a, amah Ahimaaz tanu ahi. Asepaih heutu min Abner ahi a, amah Saul paneu Ner tapa ahi. Saul pa Kish ahi a, Abner pa Ner bel Abiel tapa ahi. Saul damsung teng in Philistia mite toh nakpitak in akidou uhi. Saul in mihat leh hangsan amuh peuhmah anuai a sem ding in ala zel hi.

Huan Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Toupa'n amite tung ah, Israelte tung ah kumpipa dia nang sathau hon nilh dia ahon sawl ka hi. Huaiziak in tu in Toupa thugen ngaikhia in. Sepaihte' Toupa'n, Amalek mite'n Israelte tung a athilhih uh, Aigupta gam a pan ahong pawtkhiak lai ua lampi a ana daldan ka theigige hi. Amalekte dou ding in kuan inla, athil neih tengteng uh hawi himhim nei lou in hihmang vek in. Numei leh pasal, naungek leh nawi ne lai, bawngtal leh belam, sangawngsau leh sabiltung tan in that vek in, achi,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul in mipite asamkhawm a, Telaim ah amaute asim a, sepaih nuainih leh Judah mi singkhat ahi uh. Saul Amalekte khua atungsuk a, phaizang ah ana buk hi. Saul in Kente kiang ah, “Hong pawt unla, Amalekte a pan kihuikhia un. Huchi lou in zaw, ka hon that tel kha ding. Nou zaw Israel suan tengteng Aigupta a pan ahong pawtkhiak lai un na na hehpih ua,” achi hi. Huchi in Kente Amalek mite lak a pan apawtkhia uhi. Saul in Amalek mite Havilah a pan Aigupta gam gei a Shur tan in adou hi. Amalek mite kumpipa Agag ahingmat a, mipi tengteng namsau in asatlum vek hi. Himahleh Saul leh mipite'n Agag ahawi ua, belam leh bawngtal hoihhoih, athauthau, belamnoute, ahoih tengteng athat nuam kei uh. Ahoih lou leh adeih louh peuhmah uh bel athat vek uhi.Saul Kumpipa Ahihna Nial Ahi Toupa thu Samuel kiang ah ahong tung hi. “Saul kumpipa dia ka seh ka kisik hi. Hon zui lai hon kinungngatsan in ka thupiak bang in ahih ngal kei a,” achi hi. Hiai in Samuel ahehsak a, zankhua in Toupa asam hi. Saul mu ding in Samuel zingkhangpi in athou a, Karmel ah Saul ahoh hi.

Ngai in, huai ah amah theihgigena suang aphut a, akik nawn a, apai zel a, Gilgal ah apaisukta, chih Samuel hilh in a-om hi. Saul kiang Samuel ahong tung a, akiang ah, “Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen. Toupa thupiak bang in ka hihta,” achi hi. Samuel in, “Tua belam ham ka bil a hong lut leh bawng ham ka zakte bangchidan ahi dia le?” achi hi. Amalek Mite Toh Kidouna Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Dai in, Toupa'n tuzan a ka kiang a athugen ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi.Ama'n akiang ah, “Gen dih ve,” achi hi. Samuel in, “Nang ngaih in mi neuchik himah lechin leng, Israel nam heutu dia bawl na hi kei maw? Toupa'n Israelte kumpipa ding in sathau ahon nilh hi. Toupa'n nang ahon sawlkhia a, kuan inla, mikhialte, Amalek mite that vek inla, amanthat sipsip masiah uh dou zel in, ahon chi hi. Bang ding a Toupa thu zui lou a, gallak thilte aboh a na boh a, Toupa mitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih mawk?” achi hi. Saul in Samuel kiang ah, “E, Toupa thu ka zui vo oi, Toupa'n hon sawlna ah ka hoh a, Amalek kumpipa Agag ka hon man a, Amalek mite ka that vek vo oi. Himahleh mipite'n gallak thil belam leh bawngtal hihman ding lak ah ahoihhoih Gilgal a Toupa na Pathian kiang a kithoihna ding in ahon tawi uh,” achi hi. Samuel in,“Toupa'n Toupa thu zuih akipahpih bang in halmang thillatte leh kithoihnate akipahpih a hia?Ngai in, kithoihna sang in thuman ahoihzaw a,belamtal thau sang in athu man ahoihzaw hi. Helna zaw aisan khelhna toh akibang a, engtatna zawmilim biakna toh akikim hi. Toupa thu na nial ziak inama'n leng kumpipa ding in nang ahon nialta,” achi hi.

Saul in Samuel kiang ah, “Mipite lau a, athu uh ka manna lam in Toupa thupiak leh nang thu ka na bohse maizen a; ka na khialta hi. Huaiziak in tu in ka khelhna ngaidam inla, Toupa ka biaktheihna ding in kei lam ah hong kihei nawn in,” achi hi. Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Toupa thu na nialta a, nang lam ah ka hong kihei nawn kei ding. Toupa'n Israelte kumpipa ding in ahon deih kei,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel pai dia akiheileh apuan mong ah alen a, akekta hi. Huchi in Samuel in akiang ah, “Tuni a pan Toupa'n Israel gam ahon sutta, nang sang a hoihzaw na inveng kiang ah apeta hi. Israelte thagui azuau kei dia, akisik sam kei ding. Mihing bang a kisik nawn themthum mi ahi ngal kei hi,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n, “Ka na khialta hi. Himahleh ka mite upate leh Israelte ma a hon zahtak ding in ka hon ngen hi. Toupa na Pathian ka biaktheihna ding in kei lam ah hong kihei in aw,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in Saul apaipih a, Saul in Toupa abia hi. Samuel in, “Amalek mite kumpipa Agag ka kiang ah hon pi un,” achi hi. Samuel kiang ah ling kawm in Agag ava hoh hi. Agag in, “Sihna mulkimhuai in hon paikhengta ahi ve,” achi hi. Samuel in, “Na namsau in numeite ta nei lou dia abawl bang in na nu leng numei lak a ta neiloumi ahi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Samuel in Gilgal ah Toupa ma ah Agag asatzanta hi. Huchi in Ramah ah Samuel apai a; Saul bel a-inn ah Saul omna khua Gibeah ah apaitou hi. Huchi in Samuel in asih ni pha in Saul amu nawnta kei hi. Samuel bel Saul ziak in alungkham hi. Israelte kumpipa dia Saul ana tel ziak in Toupa akisik hi.

Huan Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Israel mite kumpipa dia ka deih louhsa Saul ziak in bang tan ahia na lungkham ding? Na kii ah sathau thundim inla, kuan in. Bethlehem mi Jesse kiang ah ka hon sawl ding. Atapate lak a mi kumpipa ding in ka sep khinta hi,” achi hi. Samuel in, “Bangchi in ka kuan thei dia? Saul in ana zaleh hon that ding,” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Bawngla hon pi inla, Toupa kiang a kithoih dia hong ka hi,” chi in. “Kithoihna ah Jesse sam inla, na hih ding ka hon hilh ding. Amin ka hon hilh dingpa sathau hon nilhsak in,” achi hi. Samuel in Toupa gen bang in ahih a, Bethlehem ah ahohta hi. Khua a upate'n ling kawm in amah ana dawn ua, “Hoih lam thu a hong na hi maw?” achi uh. Ama'n, “Hoih lam thu ah hi e,” achi hi. “Toupa kiang a kithoih dia hong ka hi. Kisiangsak unla kithoihna ah hong pai sam un,” achi hi. Jesse leh atapate asiangsak a, kithoihna ah asam hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ahong pai un Eliab ana en a, “Toupa sathau nilhpa ama a ompa ahi mahmah ve,” achi hi. Himahleh Toupa'n Samuel kiang ah, “Amel in hiam, asandan hiam in en ke'n. Ke'n amah ka deih kei hi. Toupa'n mihing et bang in a-en kei. Mihing in polam a kilatdan a-en a, Toupa'n bel lungtang a-en zaw hi,” achi hi. Jesse in Abinadab asam a, Samuel ma ah apaisak hi. Ama'n, “Hiai leng Toupa tel ahi nai kei,” achi hi. Jesse in Shammah ava paisak nawn hi. Ama'n, “Hiai leng Toupa tel ahi nai kei lai,” achi hi. Huchi in Jesse in atapa sagihte Samuel ma ah apaisak nawn hi. Samuel in Jesse kiang ah, “Toupa'n hiaite atel kei,” achi hi.

Samuel in Jesse kiang ah, “Hiai ah na tapate a-om kim vek uhia?” achi hi.Ama'n, “Anaupangpen a-om lai, ngai in, ama'n belam aching hi,” achi hi.Samuel in Jesse kiang ah, “Va samsak dih ve; ahong tun masiah i tu kei ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in ava samsak a, amah ahon pi uhi. Amah bel san thiuhtheuh, mit hah kilawm leh melhoihtak ahi. “Toupa'n, thou inla, sathau nilh in, hiai amah ahi,” achi hi. Samuel in sathau bawm kii ala a, a-unaute lak ah amah sathau anilh hi. Toupa Kha huai ni a pan nakpitak in David tung ah ahong tungta. Samuel athou a, Ramah ah apaita hi.Kumpi Saul Inn Ah David Himahleh, Toupa Kha in Saul apawtsan a, Toupa sawl kha gilou in amah ahihbuai hi. Saul sikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, Pathian sawl kha gilou in nang hon hihbuai hi. David Kumpipa Dia Thaunilh Ahi Saul in asikhate kiang ah, “Tumsiamtak mi hon zonsak unla, ka kiang ah hon pi un,” achi hi. Asikhate lak a khat in adawng a, akiang ah, “Ngai dih, Bethlehem mi Jesse tapa khat ka muta a, huai mi tumsiamtak, mihangsantak, kidoumi, thugen siam, melhoihtak ahi a, akiang ah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi. Saul in Jesse kiang ah mi asawl a, “Na tapa David belamching a om ka kiang ah hon hohsak in,” achi hi. Jesse in sabiltung, tanghou leh uain thawl khat leh kelnou ala a, Saul piak ding in atapa David aposak hi. Saul kiang ah David ava tung a, ama ah ava dingh hi. Ama'n ana it mahmah a, agalvan tawipa in apangsak hi. Saul in Jesse kiang ah, “David ka kiang ah om hen, ka mit atung mahmah hi,” chi a hilh ding in mi asawl hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul tung a Pathian sawl dawi ahong om chiang in David in kaihging ala a, atum zel hi. Huchi in Saul ahong halh a, ahoih a; dawi in apawtsan hi.

Huan Philistia mite'n kidou ding in asepaihte uh akaikhawm ua, Judah gamsung Sokoh ah akikhawm uhi. Ephes-dammim mun ah Sokoh khua leh Azekah kho kikal ah panmun akhoh uhi. Saul leh Israel mite akikhawm ua, Elah Phaizang ah panmun akhoh uhi. Philistia mite na dal ding in akiphalh uhi. Philistia mite tang pang ah a-om ua, Israel mite bel alangkhat tang pang ah a-om ua, akikal uah phaizang a-om hi. Philistia mite panmun a pan amihat uh, amin Goliath, Gath khomi, tong guk leh khap khat a sang ahong pawtkhia hi. Dal lukhu akhu a, awmphaw asilh a; a-awmphaw gikdan dal shekel sangnga ahi. Angal ah dal ngalphaw abun a, anungzang ah dal teita akuah hi. Atei peu siamkol bang ahi a; atei lu bel sik shekel zaguk a gik ahi. Aphaw popa ama ah apai hi. Adingh a, Israel sepaihte asam a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a kidou dia hong kiphalh na hi ua? Kei Philistia mi, nou Saul sikha na hi kei uh maw? Mi kitel unla ka kiang ah hong paisuk hen. Hon sual a ahon thahleh na sikha un ka om ding uh. Himahleh ke'n ka zoh a ka thahleh ka sikha un na om ding ua, ka nna uh na sem ding uh,” achi hi. Philistia mi in, “Tuni in Israel sepaihte ka chou a, mi khat hon kuansak unla ka na kisual ding uh,” achi hi. Saul leh Israel tengteng in huai Philistia mi thugente azak un, alunglel ua, lauh petmah in alau uhi.Saul Giahphual Ah David Huchi in David tuh Judah gam a Bethlehem a Ephrath mi Jesse tapa ahi a, ama'n tapa giat anei hi. Saul hun lai in amah upa in tektak ahi khinta hi. Jesse tapa upazaw thum in kidouna ah Saul azui uhi.

Atapa thum kidouna a hohte min a-upapen Eliab, azom Abinadab, athumna Shammah ahi. David anaupangpen ahi a, a-u thumte'n Saul azui uhi. Bethlehem ah apa belam kem in Saul kiang a pan David ava hoh hi. Philistia mi in zingsang leh nitak teng in ava naih zel a, ni sawmli sung ava kitaklang zel hi. Goliath In Israelte Achou Bawngnawi dat khal sawm apawl ua sangkhat heutupa a ding in puak inla; na unaute bangchi in a-om ua va en inla, atanchin uh theihna banghiam hon pua in,” achi hi. Saul leh amau leh Israel mi tengteng Philistia mite dou ding in Elah Phaizang ah a-om uhi. Zingkhang in David athou a, belamte chingmi khat akemsak hi. Jesse in thu apiak dungzui in apua a, akuanta hi. Kidouna mun a pawtkhe lel sepaihte kidou dia akikou zuazua laitak un amah kangtalai omna mun ava tung hi. Israelte leh Philistia mite kidou ding in ana kikhung ua, sepaih leh sepaih ana kigalsai uhi. David in akemmi khut ah avan akoih a, sepaihte kiang lam ah ava tai a, asanggamte chibai ava buk hi. Amaute ahoupih laitak in ngai in, amihat uh Gath a Philistia mi amin Goliath, Philistia mite sepaih pawl lak a pan ahong paisuk a, athugen ngei mah hong gen nawn hi. Huai thu David in azata hi. Israel mi tengteng in huai mi amuh un, ataikek ua, lauh petmah in alau uhi. Israel mite'n, “Huai mihing hong kuankhia na mu hia? Israel mite chou dia hong kuankhia ahi. Kuapeuh amah that kumpipa'n nakpitak in sum lam in ahih hausa dia, atanu ape dia, apa inkuan Israelte lak ah azalensak ding,” achi uhi. David in akiang a dinghte kiang ah, “Hiai Philistia mi that a, Israelte minsiatna lamangmi bangchi bawl ahi dia?

Hiai zeksum louh Philistia mi kua ahia ahih, Pathian hing sepaihte achou vial mahmah,” achi hi. Mipite'n huchi in adawng ua, “Amah that peuhmah ka gen bang ua bawl ahi ding,” achi uhi. A-u upapen Eliab in mite kiang a, athugen lai ana za hi. David tung ah Eliab aheh guih a, “Bangziak a hong suk na hia? Gamdai a belam tam lou omte kua chingsak na hia? Na kisaktheihdan leh na lungsim hoihlouhdan ka thei. Kidou en ding bang in na hong mawkmawk a,” achi hi. David in, “Bang ka hih a ahia? Aziak om hilou ahi maw?” achi hi. Ama'n midang lam angatsan a, agen ngei mah agen hi. Mipite'n ama a mah bang in adawng nawn uhi. David thugen azak un Saul kiang ah agensawn ua; ama'n asam hi. David in Saul kiang ah, “Amah ziak in kuamah lungsim lunglel kei heh. Na sikha in huai Philistia mi ka va sual ding,” achi hi. Saul in David kiang ah, “Nang zaw huai Philistia mi sual ding in na kuan thei kei ding, valnou phet na hi a, amah lah avalnou tung a pan galdou siammi ahi ngal a,” achi hi. David in Saul kiang ah, “Na sikha in apa belamte achin lai in, humpinelkai hiam vompi hiam ahong kuan a, belamhon lak a pan belamnou hi. Ka delhzui a, ka sual a, akam a pan ka hunkhe zel hi. Amah hong sual tum in ahong dingh a, ke'n abaksam ah ka man a, ka sual a, ka that zel hi. Na sikha in humpinelkai leh vompi ka that tuaktuak hi. Huai zeksum louh Philistia mi amau bang in a-om sam ding hi. Pathian hing sepaihte achou vial a,” achi hi.

David in, “Humpinelkai khutbom a pan leh vompi khutbom a pan kei hon hunkhepa Toupa'n huai Philistia mi khut a pan hon hunkhe ding,” achi hi.Saul in David kiang ah, “Kuan in, na kiang ah Toupa om hen!” achi hi. Saul in amah galthuam David asilhsak a, dal lukhu akhusak a, awmphaw asilhsak hi. David in agalvan tung ah anamsau akuah a, pai ding in akisa hi. Huchibang achiamteh ngei nai kei hi. David in Saul kiang ah, “Ka paipih thei kei. Hichibang ka chiamteh ngei kei,” achi hi. Huchi in David in agalthuam asuahta hi. Achiangkhun atawi a, luita a suang mum mam pilhpelh nga atel hi. Abelam chinna kawlzal ah akuah hi. Akhut a avaisuanglot tawi in, Philistia mi ava zuan naita hi.David In Goliath Azou Philistia mi ahong pai zel a, David azuan nai hulhul a; ama ah alum tawipa apai hi. Philistia mi'n a-en vialvial a, David amuhleh asimmoh mahmah hi. Amah lah san chiuchiau, mit hah kilawmtak, valnou lel lah ahi ngal a. Philistia mi in David kiang ah, “Ui ka hi maw chiangte toh ka kiang a na hong pai?” achi hi. Philistia mi in apathiante lou in David ahamsiatkhumta hi. Philistia mi in David kiang ah, “Ka kiang ah hong pai in, tung a leng vasate leh gamsate na sa ka nesak ding,” achi hi. David in Philistia mi kiang ah, “Nang zaw namsau, tei leh lum tawi in na hong kuan a, himahleh kei zaw Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel Sepaihte' Pathian na kousiatpa min in ka hong kuan zaw hi. Tuni in Toupa'n ka khut ah nang ahon pe ding hi. Huchi in ka hon that dia, na lutang ka tan ding. Philistia sepaihte luangte tuni in tung a leng vasate leh gamsate ka nesak ding hi.

Huchi in leitung a mi tengteng in Israel ah Pathian a-om chih athei ding uh. Hiai a kikhawm tengteng in Toupa'n namsau leh tei in ahondam kei chih athei ding uh. Kidouna lah Toupa kidouna ahi ngal a. Ama'n ka khut uah noute ahon pe ding,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Philistia mi ahong kuan a, David sual dia ahon naihleh, sepaihte lam ah Philistia mi sual ding in David atai gepgep hi. David in a-ip asawk a, suang khat alakhia a, avaisuanglot in alawn a, Philistia mi taltangtak ah adeng hi. Ataltang ah suang alut a, akhup in apuk helhul maimah hi. Huchi in David in vaisuanglot leh suang in Philistia mi azou hi. Philistia mi adeng a, athatta hi. Himahleh David in namsau atawi kei. Huaiziak in David atai a, Philistia mi tung ah adingh hi. Anamsau ala a, apai a pan adokkhia a, huai in athat a, alu atanta hi. Philistia mite'n amihat uh sita ahi chih atheih un ataikekta uh. Israel mite leh Judah mite athou ua, akikou ua, Philistia mite Gath leh Ekron kulh kongkhak pha in adelh uh. Philistia mite lak a liamte Shaaraim lam tawn in Gath leh Ekron pha in apuk zengzung uhi. Huchi in Israel suante'n Philistia mite adelh uh atawpsan ua, ahong kik nawn ua, agiahmun uh alok uhi. David in Philistia mi lu ala a, Jerusalem ah apaipih a, agalvan bel apuanin ah akoih hi.David, Saul Kiang A Pi Ahi Saul in Philistia mi sual dia David kuankhe lai amuh in sepaih heutu Abner kiang ah, “Abner, hiai valnou kua tapa ahia?” achi hi. Abner in, “Na hin bang in ka gen, toupa aw, ka thei kei,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Hiai naupang kua tapa hiam dongkhia in,” achi hi. Philistia mi that David ahong pai in Abner in api a, Philistia mi lu tawi kawm in Saul kiang ah apaipih hi. Saul in akiang ah, “Tangval, kua tapa na hia?” achi hi.David in adawng a, “Bethlehem mi na sikha Jesse tapa ka hi,” achi hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul kiang a thu agen khit in Jonathan hinna leh David hinna ahong kipeh geih a, huchi in Jonathan in ama hinna a-it bang in amah a-it hi. Saul in huai ni in a-omsak ngal a, apa inn ah apaisak nawnta kei hi. Huchi in ama hinna bang geih a amah a-it ziak in Jonathan in David toh thu akhung hi. Jonathan in apuansilh lai asuah a, David apia a, akivatna leh anamsau leh athalpeu leh ataigakna nangawn apia hi. Saul in asawlna peuh ah David ahoh zel a, kizentak in agamtang hi. Saul in sepaihte heutu in amah abawl a, hiai tuh mi tengteng ngaih in leh Saul sikhate ngaih in ahoih hi.Saul In David Ahaza Ahong pai un hichi ahong hi a, Philistia mi that David ahong pai in Israel kho teng ah numeite lasa leh lam kawm in khuangta leh thil gingtheite toh, nuamsatak in kumpipa Saul dawn ding in ahong pawtkhia uhi. Numeite'n lam kawm ala a kidawngtuah in, “Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing,” achi uhi. Hiai lasak in Saul akipaksak kei a, aheh mahmah hi. David bel asing asing that in angai ua, kei ka hihleh asang asang kia that in ahon ngai uh. Kumpigam lou ngal atan ding dang bang ahia om? achi hi. Saul in huai ni a pan David ahazat bawlta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingsang in Saul tung ah Pathian sawl kha gilou ahong tung a, insung ah thu agen hi. David in nidang a ahih mah bang in kaihging atum hi. Saul in ateipi atawi hi. Saul in ateipi akhoh a, “Huai baang ah David ka khohden ding,” achi hi. David in nihvei akihepkhiaksan hi.

Akiang a Toupa a-om ziak leh Saul apaisan ziak in Saul in David alau hi. Huaiziak in Saul in amah a pan akisuansak a, asepaih sangkhat tung a heutu in abawl hi. Huchi in mipi lak ah David lut in apawt zel hi. David bel ahih peuhmah ah piltak in agamtang zel a; akiang ah Toupa a-om hi. Saul in piltak in agamtang chih amuh in alau hi. Himahleh Israelte leh Judahte tengteng in David a-it uh; alak ua lut a pawt zel lah ahi ngal a.David In Saul Tanu Akitenpih Saul in David kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka tanu upazaw Merab na zi ding in ka hon neisak ding. Hangtak in hon gum peuhmah lechin. Toupa kidounate dou in,” achi hi. Saul in, “Ke'n zaw atung a khut kha lou in Philistia mite'n atung ah khut kha zaw uhen,” achi hi. David in Saul kiang ah, “Kua ahia ka hih a, ka hinna leh Israelte lak a ka pa inkuante leng bang ahia ahih uh, kumpipa makpa ka hihna ding?” achi hi. Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, David toh Saul tanu Merab kitensak ahong hun in, Meholath mi Adriel zi ding in ape mawk hi. Saul tanu Mikal in David a-it a; Saul ahilh ua; huai in akipaksak hi. Saul in, “A-awkna ding thang ahong hihtheihna ding leh Philistia mite'n atung a khut akhaktheihna ding un amah ka pe ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in Saul in David kiang ah, “Tuni in ka makpa na hihna ding hunlem anihveina na nei,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul in asikhate thu apia a, “Asimtham in David houpih unla, ngai in, kumpipa na tung ah akipak mahmah a, asikhate tengteng in leng nang ahon it uh. Huchi in kumpipa makpa in om in, chi un,” achi hi.

Saul sikhate'n huai thu David bil ah agen uhi. David in, “Mizawng leh kuamah theih phak ngel louh kei a ding in kumpipa makpa hih thil namai in na sep ua hia?” achi hi. Saul sikhate'n, “David in huchibang in achi,” chi in ahilh uh. Saul in David kiang ah hichibang in na chi ding uh, “Kumpipa'n kumpipa melma phulakna ding in Philistia mite zekvun zakhat chih louh man bangmah adeih kei achi, chi un,” achi hi. Saul in David lah Philistia mite khut a sihsak lungsim in anei bikbek hi. Asikhate'n huai thu David ahilh uleh kumpipa makpa hih David akipak mahmah hi. Huchi in ni chiamte abei ma in, David leh amite athou ua, Philistia mite zanih ava that uhi. David in azekvun uh ahon pua a, kumpipa makpa ahihtheihna ding in kumpipa kimtak in apia hi. Huchi in Saul in atanu Mikal azi ding in apeta hi. Saul in David kiang ah Pathian a-om chih atheitelta hi. Saul tanu Mikal in amah a-it hi. Huchi in Saul in David alau semsem a, Saul bel David melma ahi denta hi. Philistia' miliante ava kuankhe zel uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, akuankhiak peuhmah chiang ua Saul sikha tengteng sang a piltak a David agamtat ziak in amin athang semsem hi.

Huan Saul in atapa Jonathan leh asikha tengteng kiang ah David thah ding thu agen hi. Himahleh Saul tapa Jonathan in David adeihthoh mahmah hi. Jonathan in, “Ka pa Saul in thah ding in hon zong hi, huaiziak in, zingchiang zingsang in pilvang inla mun-guk ah bu nilouh in. Ka pawtkhe dia, na omna gamlak ah ka pa kiang ah ka va dingh dia, na tungtang thu ah ka pa ka houpih ding. Huchi in ka muhdan ka hon hilh ding,” achi hi. Jonathan in apa Saul ma ah David aphat a, akiang ah, “Asikha David tung ah kumpipa khial het kei hen. Na tung ah lah akhial kei a, athilhihte lah nang a dia hoih pipi ahi zaw ngal ua. Sih khawk sa lou in Philistia mi asual a, Toupa'n Israel tengteng a ding in hotdamna thupitak asepkhiaksak hi. Huai nang ngei in na mu a, na kipak mahmah hi. Huaiziak in sisan poi khoih lou tung ah bang ding in ahia na khelh ding, aziak bangmah om lou a David na thah ding?” achi hi. Huchi in Saul in Jonathan thugen azui hi. Saul in kichiam in, “Toupa ahin lai teng amah thah ahi kei ding,” achi hi. Jonathan in David asam a, huai thil tengteng ahilh hi. Jonathan in Saul kiang ah David api a, tuma lam mah bang in akiang ah a-om nawnta hi. Kidouna ahong om nawn a, David akuankhia hi. Philistia mite ava sual a, tamtak ava that a, ama ah ataikek uhi. Saul bel a-inn a teipi tawi a, atut lai in atung ah Toupa sawl kha gilou ahong tung hi. David in kaihging atum hi. Saul in ateipi in David baang toh khohden atum hi. Himahleh Saul kiang a pan akitholhkhe geih a, teipi pen baang ah akhohtal hi.

Huchi in David ataikhia a, huai zan in asuakta hi. Saul in azingsang a David tang a that ding in mi asawl hi. David zi Mikal in, tuzan a na hinna na humbit keileh zingchiang in hon that ding uh, chi in ahilh hi. Mikal in David tohlet ah akhaikhesuk a; huchi in ataimang a, asuakta hi. Mikal in milim ala a, lupna ah alumsak a, alulam ah kel mul lukham akoih a, puan in akhuh hi. David pi dia Saul in mi ahon sawl kiang ah, “Achi ana,” ana chi hi. Saul in David va en ding in mi asawl nawn a, “Alupna toh hon zawngtou le uchin ka na that ding,” achi hi. Amisawlte ava lut uleh, ngai in, lupna ah milim alulam a kel mul lukham kham in ana om hi. Saul in Mikal kiang ah, “Bangziak a hichibang a hon khem a, bitna dia ka melma pawtsak na hia?” achi hi. Mikal in Saul adawng a, “Hon paisak in, bangziak a nang hon that ding ka hia? ahon chi,” achi hi. Huchi in David ataimang a, asuakta hi. Ramah a Samuel kiang ava tung a, Saul in atung a athilhih tengteng ava hilh hi. Amah leh Samuel akuan ua, Naioth ah a-om uhi. Saul In David Asawi Huchi in David pi ding in Saul in thupotu asawl hi. Zawlnei pawlte thugenkhol a a-om lai uh leh Samuel atung ua heutu a om ava muh un Saul in amisawl thupote tung ah Pathian Kha ahong tung a, amau leng thugenkhol in a-om sam uhi. Huai Saul ahilh uleh, thupotu dang asawl nawn a, amau leng thugenkhol in ava om zel uhi. Saul in athumveina ding in thupotu dang asawl nawn a, amau leng thugenkhol in ava om nawn zel uhi.

Amah leng Ramah ah ava hoh a, Seku mun a tuileh lian mahmah ava pha hi. “Samuel leh David koi a om ahi ua?” chi in adong hi. Mi kuahiam khat in, “Ngai in, Ramah a Naioth ah a-om uh,” achi hi. Ramah a Naioth ah ahoh a; Pathian kha atung ah ahong tung samta a, apai zel hi. Ramah a Naioth atun matan thugenkhol in a-om lai hi. Ama'n apuansilhte leng asuah a, Samuel ma ah thugenkhol in a-om a, huai ni nitum leh huai zankhua in vuaktang in alum hi. Huaiziak in “Saul leng zawlnei lak a tel sam ahi maw?” achi uhi.

Huan David bel Ramah a Naioth a pan atai a, Jonathan kiang ava tung hi. “Bang ka hih a ahia? Bang ahia ka tatsiatna? Na pa tung ah bang ahia ka hihkhelh, hichitak a hon thah atup maizen?” achi hi. Ama'n, “That lou e. Na si het kei ding. Ngai in, ka pa'n kei hon theisak lou in bangmah himhim lian in neu taleh, ahih ngei kei hi. Bang ding in ahia hiai thute kei ahon iim ding? Ahon iim kei hial ding,” achi hi. David in, “Na mitmuh in deihsakna ka tang chih na pa'n atheichian mahmah ngal a, alungsim in, hiai zaw Jonathan in thei dah hen, huchi lou in zaw alungkham lo kha ding, chi ahi ding. Himahleh Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi, sihna toh ka kikal uh kal khat lel ahi,” chi in uangtak in agen hi. Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Na hinna in adeih peuhpeuh ka hon hihsak zel ding,” achi hi. David in Jonathan kiang ah, “Ngai in, zingchiang a kha thak ding ahi. Kumpipa kiang a ankuang um ngeingei ding ka hi. Himahleh ani thum ni nitaklam tanpha in gamlak a kibu ding in ka kuan zaw ding. Na pa'n ka om louh lam ahon theihkhiakleh, David in akhua Bethlehem a va hoh zual ding hon ngen ngutngut a; a-inkuan ua dia kum teng a akithoih hun uh ahi,” na chi in. “Ahoih vo oi, achihleh na sikha alungmuang ding. Himahleh ahehleh thil hoih lou hih atum, chih thei mai in. Huaiziak in na sikha hoihtak in hih in. Na sikha lah Toupa thukhun ah na lutpihta ngal a. Himahleh tatsiatna nei ka hihleh nangmah in hon that mai in. Bangziak a na pa kiang a hon pi chitchiat ding na hia?” achi hi.

Jonathan in, “That lou e. Ka pa'n na tung a thil hoih lou hih atum chih ka theih peuhmah leh nang hilh lou in ka om mahmah dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in David in Jonathan kiang ah, “Na pa'n hehngoh in hon na dawng taleh kua'n ahon hilh dia?” achi hi. Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Pai dih, gamlak ah i va hoh peuhmah ding,” achi hi. Huchi in gamlak ah ava hohkhawm uhi. Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Toupa Israelte' Pathian atheihpihtu hi hen. Zingchiang hichih hun hiam, ani thum ni hiam a ka pa ka va dawp hun a, ngai in, David tungtang thu ahoih lam ahihleh na kiang a mi hon sawl in ka hong hilh kei dia hia? Ka pa'n na tung ah thil hoih lou hih ut bang hitaleh, ka hon hilh louh a, lungmuangtak a na paitheihna dia ka hon khah keileh, Toupa'n Jonathan abawlbawl in bawl henla, huai sang a thupi in leng. Ka pa kiang a a-om zel bang in Toupa na kiang ah om hen. Ka sihlouhna dia ka damsung kia a Toupa hehpihna hon musak hilou in, tangtawn in ka inkote leng na hehpih tawp ke'n. Toupa'n David melma leitung a pan ahihman khit vek pha in leng tawp ke'n,” achi hi. Jonathan in David inkote toh thukhun bawl in, “David melmate khut tan in leng Toupa'n phut hen,” achi uhi. Huchi in Jonathan in David akichiamsak nawn hi; amah hinna a-it bang geih in lah a-it ngal a. Huchi in Jonathan in akiang ah, “Zingchiang a kha thak ding ahi. Na tutna avuak ding ziak in na om louh akilang ngei ding hi.

Ni thum na om nung in paisuk pah inla, tuma a thil ahong om lai a na kibukna mun ah hoh inla, Ezel suang chin ah ana om gige in. Jonathan In David Apanpih Ngai in, kuan inla, thaltangte va mukhia in, chi in naupang ka sawl ding hi. Naupang kiang a, en in, thaltangte na nunglam ah a-om, la inla hong pai in, ka chihleh Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, nang a ding in agalmuanhuai in lauh ding om lou ahi ding. Himahleh naupang kiang a, en in, thaltangte na pamlam ah a-om uh, ka chihleh paimang mai in. Toupa'n ahon paimangsak ahi ding. Nang leh ke'n thil i gensa tungthu ah ngai in, nang toh i kikal ah Toupa a-om tawntung hi,” achi hi. Huchi in David gamlak ah akibu a; kha ahong thak a, kumpipa ankuang um in atu hi. Hun dang a atutna ngei bang in atutna ah kumpipa atu hi. Jonathan adingh a, Saul kiang ah Abner atu a; David mun bel avuak hi. Himahleh Saul in huai ni in bangmah agen kei, “Atung ah thil banghiam a-om a, siang lou hiam ahi ding, siang lou ahi ngei ding,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, khadet zing ani nih ni in David mun avuak lailai hi. Huchi in Saul in atapa Jonathan kiang ah, “Bang achia Jesse tapa zan leh tuni a ankuang um dia hong pai lou ahia?” achi hi. Jonathan in Saul adawng a, “David in Bethlehem a hoh ding ahon ngen ngutngut hi. Hon hohsak teitei in, ka inkote'n khua ah kithoihna nei ding in ahon thukhak tinten uh. Huchi in na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh hon hohsak inla, ka unaute ka va veh ding, achi hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa dohkan ah ahong kei hi,” achi hi.

Huchi in Jonathan tung ah Saul aheh guih a, akiang ah, “Nang, numei genhak leh helhat tapa, Jesse tapa na zahlakna ding leh na nu vuaktanna zahlaksak ding in na tel chih thei lou hon sa na hi hiam? Jesse tapa hiai a a-om sung teng hihkip na hi kei dia, na gam leng. Huaiziak in samsak pah inla, ka kiang ah hon pisak in, asih ngeingei ding ahi,” achi hi. Jonathan in apa Saul adawng a, akiang ah, “Bang ding in maw thah ding ahih? Bang ahih a ahia?” achi hi. Saul in thah tum in teipi in akhoh a, huchi in Jonathan in apa'n David thah atum ngei, chih achian hi. Jonathan bel dohkan a pan heh mahmah kawm in adingh a, huai kha ani nih ni in an a-um kei hi. Apa'n David azahlaksak mahmah ziak in alungkhampih hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, zingsang in Jonathan in naupang khat pi in gamlak ah David toh amun sehsa uah ahoh uhi. Anaupang kiang ah, “Tai inla, ka thaltang kapkhiakte va zong in,” achi hi. Naupang atai lai in, apam lam ah thaltang akap hi. Jonathan in akapkiakna mun a naupang ava tun in Jonathan in naupang asam a, “Thaltang na pamlam ah ahi kei maw?” achi hi. Jonathan in anaupang asam a, “Hong pai meng in, kin in, zekai ke'n,” achi hi. Jonathan naupang in thaltangte atawmkhawm a, apu kiang ah ahong paita hi. Himahleh, naupang in bangmah athei kei, Jonathan leh David kia in thil omdan athei uhi. Jonathan in anaupang kiang ah athal leh avante apia a, akiang ah, “Pai inla, khua ah ana paipih in,” achi hi.

Jonathan in apaitak in David omna mun simlam pang a pan adingh a, amai a lei si in thumvei akunsuk a, akitawptuah ua, akikahkhum ua, David anak kahzaw hi. Jonathan in David kiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in pai in aw, nang toh kei kikal ah leh ka suante leh na suante kikal ah tangtawn in Toupa om hen, chi in Toupa min in i kichiam tuak khinta hi,” achi hi. Huchi in adingh a, apaita a, khua ah Jonathan alutta hi.

Nob a siampu Ahimelek kiang ah David ahong hi. Ahimelek in ling kawm in David ana dawn a, akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia tangtat na chia, kuamah tonpih na neih louh?” achi hi. David in siampu Ahimelek kiang ah, “Kumpipa'n thilhih ding in thu ahon pia a, ka kiang ah, ka hon thilhihsak tup leh ka hon thupiak kuamah in thei kei heh, achi bikbek hi. Ka sikhate amun ding uh ka sehsakta,” achi hi. Huaiziak in tu in, “Na khut ah bang a-om a? Tanghou beu nga ahihkeileh na neih lamlam hon pia in,” achi hi. Siampu in David adawng a, “Tanghou vantang ka nei kei a, himahleh tanghou siangthou bel ka nei hi, tangvalte numei a pan akihepkhiak nak uleh,” achi hi. David in siampu adawng a, akiang ah, “Tu ni thum sung numei a pan ka kihemkhe vek taktak uhi. Ka hong pawtkhiak dek lai in leng tangvalte tui-um belsuan asiangthou a, tanghou leng vantang ahi a, ahi, tuni tui-um belsuan sung asiansak mah bang in,” achi hi. Huchi in siampu in tanghou siangthou apeta hi. Huai ah lah tanghou koih alak ni ua tanghou lum a khen dia Toupa ma a pan lak pen kia lou ngal tanghou dang a-om ngal kei hi. Huai ni in Saul sikhate lak a mi khat Toupa ma a zekaisak a-om a; amin Doeg ahi. Amah Edom mi, Saul ganchingmi lak a heutupen ahi. David in Ahimelek kiang ah, “Teipi hiam, namsau hiam na kem kei maw? Kumpipa hon sawlna thukin ahih ziak in ka namsau leh ka galvan bangmah ka hon tawi man kei hi,” achi hi. Siampu in, “Philistia mi Goliath, Elah Phaizang a na thahpa namsau, ngai in, siampu puanak nung ah puan a tuam in a-om hi. Huai na laknopleh la in.

Huai lou ngal adang a-om kei,” achi hi.David in, “Huai val a-om ding hia, hon pe dih ve,” achi hi. Huchi in David adingh a, huai ni in Saul lau in ataimang a, Gath kumpipa Akish kiang ah apaita hi. Akish sikhate'n akiang ah, “Hiai mi huai gam kumpipa David ahi kei maw? Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing, chih lou kawm in atungtang la in asa zuazua uh ahi kei maw?” achi uhi. David in huai thute alungsim in apai a, Gath kumpipa Akish alau mahmah hi. Huchi in ama ah a-omdan ahihlamdang a, amitmuh un akihaisak hi. Akhut in kongkhakte aham ekek a, akhamul ah achil aluangsak zengzung hi. Huchi in Akish in asikhate kiang ah, “Enta unla, mihai ahih na thei ua, bangziak a ka kiang a hon pi na hi ua? Mihai ka kitaksap ziak in hia hiai mi ahaidan hihlang dia ka ma a na hon pi uh? Hiai mi ka inn ah ahong lut tel mahmah ding maw?” achi hi. Saul A Pan David Ataimang

Huchi in David bel huai a pan apawtkhia a, Adullam kokhuk ah a-omta hi. Asanggamte leh apate inkote tengteng in azak un huai ah akiang ah ahohsuk uh. Lungkham peuhmah, leiba nei peuhmah leh lungkim lou peuhmahte akiang ah akikaikhawm uh. Huchi in aheutu un a-omta hi. Akiang ah mi zali hiamtak a-om uhi. David bel huai a pan Moab gam a Mizpah ah ahoh hi. Moab kumpipa kiang ah, “Pathian in ahon hihsak ding thil ka theih masiah ka nu leh ka pate na kiang ah na om le uh,” achi hi. Moab kumpipa ma ah amaute api a; huchi in kokhuk a David a-om lai teng akiang ah a-om uhi. Zawlnei Gad in David kiang ah, “Kokhuk ah om nilouh ke'n. Pawt inla Judah gam ah pai in,” achi hi. Huchi in David apawt a, Hareth gammang ah alutta hi. Saul in, “David leh akiang a omte amuta uh,” chih ana za hi. Saul bel Gibeah a Ramah a tamarisk sing nuai ah teipi tawi in atu hi. Akim ah asikha tengteng adingh uhi. Saul in akim a dingh asikhate kiang ah, “Nou Benjamin mite aw, ngaikhia un; Jesse tapa in loute leh grephuante hon pia in asepaih sangkhat heutu leh asepaih zakhat heutu in ahon bawl dia hia? Na vek un na hon sawm ua, ka tapa in Jesse tapa kiang a thu akhun ka kiang a hihlang himhim na om kei uh. Ka tapa in ka sikha kei hon dou ding leh tuni nangawn a kei hon tang dia ahanthawn thu ka kiang a hihlang na om louh uh?” achi hi. Huchi in Saul sikhate kiang a ding Edom mi Doeg in adawng a, “Jesse tapa Nob a Ahitub tapa Ahimelek kiang a, ahong lam ka mu hi.

Ama'n Toupa adotsak a, nek ding apia a, Philistia mi Goliath namsau leng ape lai hi,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n Ahitub tapa Ahimelek leh Nod a siampu a pang apa inkote tengteng asamsak hi. Saul in, “Nang, Ahitub tapa, na ngaikhia in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Ka toupa, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Saul in akiang ah, “Tanghou leh namsau na pia a, Toupa bang dotsak a, tuni a kei hon dou ding leh hon tang dia bang ding a nang leh Jesse tapa in hon guksawm na hi ua?” achi hi. Ahimelek in kumpipa adawng a, “Kumpipa makpa, na thumang, na inkuan sung ua mizahtakhuai David bang a muanhuai na sikhate tengteng lak ah kua a-om ua? Amah a dia Pathian thu ka dotsak amasapen ahi a hia? Ahi kei. Kumpipa'n asikha hiam, ka pa inkote kuapeuh hon ngoh mahmah kei hen. Na sikha in hiai thu bangmah ka thei kei hi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ahimelek, na sih ngeingei ding ahi, nang leh na pa inkote tengteng toh,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang a dingh sepaihte kiang ah, “Kihei unla, Toupa siampute that un, David lam a apan ua, taimang ahi chih thei napi a ka kiang a agen louh ziak un,” achi hi. Himahleh kumpipa sikhate'n Toupa siampute sual ding in khut azak nuam kei uhi. Kumpipa'n Doeg kiang ah, “Nang kihei inla, siampute sual in,” achi hi. Edom mi Doeg akihei a, siampute asual a, huai ni in puanmalngat siampu puanak silh, mi sawmgiat-le-nga athat hi. Nob, siampu khua namsau in asual a; numei leh pasal naupang leh nawi ne laite nangawn, bawngte, sabiltungte leh belamte toh namsau in asatlum hi. Ahitub tapa Ahimelek tapate lak a khat, amin Abiathar ataikhia a, David kiang ah ataitung hi. Abiathar in Saul in Toupa siampute athah thu David ahilh hi. Siampute Thahna Nang ka kiang ah om inla, lau ke'n. Kei thah hon tumte'n nang leng thah ahon tum ding uh. Ka kiang ah om lechin na bit ding hi,” achi hi.

Huan ngai in, “Philistia mite'n Keilah khua asual ua, phual a buhte alaksak vek uh,” chi in David ahilh uhi. Huchi in David in, “Toupa, huai Philistia mite ka va sual diam?” chi in adong hi. Toupa'n David kiang ah, “Philistia mite va sual inla, Keilah khua va humbit in,” achi hi. David mite'n akiang ah, “Ngai in Judah gam a om nangawn i lau ua, Keilah a hohsuk a Philistia sepaihte va sual lauhuaizaw sem na'n chia,” achi uhi. David in Toupa adong nawn hi. Toupa'n adawng a, akiang ah, “Thou inla, Keilah ah hohsuk in, Philistia mite na khut ah ka hon pe ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Keilah ah David leh amite ahoh ua, Philistia mite ava sual ua, agante uh alaksak ua, tamtak athat uh. Huchibang in David in Keilah khomite ahumbitta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Keilah a David kiang a Ahimelek tapa Abiathar atai lai in siampu puanak tawi in apaisuk hi. Keilah ah David ahoh chih Saul ahilh uhi. Saul in, “Pathian in ka khut a amah hon pia ahita ve. Kulh kongpi leh akalhna nei khua ah lah lut in akikhumta ngal a,” achi hi. Saul in mi tengteng kidou ding in Keilah khua va sual a David leh amite va um ding in asamkhawm hi. David in Saul in atung ah thil hoih lou asawm chih a na thei hi. Siampu Abiathar kiang ah, “Siampu puanak hon la dih ve,” achi hi. Huchi in David in, “Aw Toupa, Israelte' Pathian, kei ziak a khua hihse ding in Keilah ah Saul hong paisuk atum, chih kei na sikha in ka za hi. Keilah a mite'n akhut ah hon pe ding uam? Na sikha in ka zak bang in Saul ahong paisuk diam?

Aw Toupa, Israelte' Pathian, hehpih in na sikha hon hilh in,” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Ahong suk ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in, “Keilah khua mite'n kei leh ka mite Saul khut ah ahon pe ding uam?” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Ahon pe ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in David leh amite, zaguk hiamtak athou ua Keilah a pan apawt ua, alemna lamlam ah apaita uh. Keilah a pan David ataikheta, chih Saul ahilh ua; huchi in kuankhiak akikhelsakta hi.Tanggam Ah David David gamdai ah, leikohawm ah a-om hi. Ziph gamdai a tanggam ah a-om nilouh hi. Saul in niteng in amah azong a, himahleh Pathian in akhut ah ape kei hi. David in amah thah tum in Saul ahong kisa chih athei a; huchi in Ziph gamdai Horesh ah David a-om hi. Saul tapa Jonathan athou a, Horesh ah David kiang ah ahoh a, Pathian ah akhut ahatsak hi. Akiang ah, “Lau het ke'n, ka pa Saul khut in ahong zongkhe kei ding, Israelte tung ah kumpi na hong hi dia, kei nang hon zom pa ka hi ding. Hiai leng ka pa Saul in athei kilkel hi,” achi hi. Anih un Toupa ma ah thukhun abawl ua, Horesh ah David a-om nilouh a, Jonathan bel a-inn lam ah apaita hi. Huchi in Ziph mite Gibeah ah Saul kiang ah ahohtou ua, “I kiang ua Horesh a leikohawm, gamdai simlam pang Hakilah mual a David na kibu nilouh akei maw? Huaiziak in aw kumpipa, hong paisuk na lunggulh lamtak ahih bang in hong paisuk inla, kou ka hih ding uh ahihleh kumpipa khut a amah hon piak ahi ding,” achi uhi. Saul in, “Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen. Noute'n na hon hehpih mahmah uhi.

Pai unla, va chian nawn sem unla, anung va zui unla, amumi leng va chian hoih nawn sese un. Lepchiah piltak in thil ahih nak chih mi'n ahon hilh uhi. David In Keilah Khua Ahondam Huchi in athou ua, Saul ma in Ziph ah ahoh uh. Himahleh David leh amite gamdai simlam Arabah a Maon gamdai ah a-om uhi. Huai mun Jashimon simlam a om ahi. Saul leh amite amah zong ding in ahoh uh. David ahilh ua, huchi in suangpi zuan in apawtkhia hi. Maon gamdai ah David adelhta hi. Saul tang langkhat lam pang ah apai a, David leh amite bel tang langkhat lam pang ah apai uhi. David Saul lau in kintak in atai a; Saul leh amite'n lah David leh amite mat tum in a-umkimvel ngal ua. Himahleh Saul kiang ah, “Kin meng inla, hong pai in, Philistia mite'n i gam uh ahong sual uh,” chi in thangkou ahong tung hi. Huchi in Saul in David adelh lai akiksan hi. Philistia mite sual ding in apaita hi. Huaiziak in huai mun Sela-hammahlekoth achi uhi. David huai a kipan apaitou a, En-gedi leikohawm ah a-om hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul in Philistia mite va delh ahong paikik in ngai in, “En-gedi gamdai ah David a-om,” chih hilh in a-om hi. Huchi in Saul in Israel mi tengteng lak a telkhiak tuam mi sangthum api a, sathakte tenna suangpi lak lam ah David leh amite zong in ahohta uhi. Lamkal ah belam huang kokhuk omna ava tung ua, khawl tawldam ding in Saul ava lut hi. Kokhuk sunggil lam ah David leh amite a-om uhi. David mite'n akiang ah, “Ngai dih, Toupa'n na kiang ah, ngai in, na khut ah na melma ka hon pe dia, atung ah hoih na saksak in na hih ding, achih ni ahita ve,” achi uhi. Huchi in David athou a, simthamtak in Saul puan mong ava tan hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, aden chiang in Saul puan mong ava tan in David lungsim asun mahmah hi. Huchi in amite kiang ah, “Amah Toupa sathau nilh ahi, chih thei napi a, atung a khut zang a Toupa sathau nilh ka toupa tung a hiai thil ka hih louh ding hi a,” achi hi. David in huai thu in amite akhamdai a, Saul sual dia akuan uh aphalta kei hi. Saul bel kokhuk a pan apawt a, apai nawnta hi. Anung zek in David leng athou a, kokhuk a pan apawt a, “Kumpipa, ka toupa,” chi in Saul anungsap hi. Nunglam ah Saul ahong kihei a, David in amai a lei si in akunsuk hi. David in Saul kiang ah, “Ngai in, David in na siatna azong, chi a mite'n na kiang a, agen uh bangziak a gingta na hia? Ngai in, tuni in Toupa'n kokhuk ah ka khut ah nang ahon pia chih na mit mahmah in na mu hi. Mi khenkhatte'n nang that ding in ahon chi uh.

Himahleh ka hon hawi hi. Ka toupa tung ah ka khut himhim ka kha kei ding, Toupa sathau nilh ahi ngal a,” ka chi hi. Huai kia leng hilou in, pa, en in, na puan mong leng ka tawi hi. Na puan mong ka tan theih a, ka hon thahlouhna ah ka khut ah thil hoih lou leh tatlekna a-om kei, chih leh ka hinna lak tum in hon zongzong lechin leng, na tung ah ka khial kei chih thei in. Toupa'n nang leh kei kikal ah vaihawm henla, Toupa'n na tung ah ka phu hon laksak hen. Himahleh ke'n zaw na tung ah khut ka kha kei himhim ding. Nidanglai a paunak in, “Migilou a pan gitlouhna apawt zel,” achi hi. “Himahleh ke'n bel na tung ah khut ka kha kei ding. Israel kumpipa kua zong in ahia ahong pawtkhiak? Kua ahia na delh? Ui sisa, uihik lel mo? Huaiziak in Toupa vaihawmpa hi henla, nang toh kei kikal ah vaihawm hen, hon mu in hon genpih henla, na khut a pan hon hunkhia hen,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, David in Saul kiang a hiai thute agen khit in, Saul in, “Hiai ka tapa David aw hilou amaw?” achi hi. Huchi in aw suah in Saul akapta hi. David kiang ah, “Kei sang in na diktatzaw, nang zaw ka tung ah thil hoih na hih a, ke'n bel thil hoih lou ka hih. Tuni in ka tung a thil hoih na hihdan na hihlang a, Toupa'n na khut a kei ahon piak a leng na hon thahlouhna ah. Mi'n amelma mu taleh bangmah lou in akhah mawk diam? Huaiziak in tuni a ka tung a na thilhih ah Toupa'n thil hoih in nang hon thuk hen.

Ngai in, kumpipa na hong hi ngei dia, Israel gam na khut ah hihkip in a-om ding chih ka theita hi. Huaiziak in ka nung a ka suan hong om dingte hihmang lou ding in Toupa min in ka kiang ah kichiam inla, ka pa inkote a pan ka min thaimang ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul kiang ah David akichiam hi.Huchi in inn ah Saul apai a, David leh amite leikohawm ah apaitou uhi. David In Saul Hinna Ahawi

Huan Samuel asita a; Israel mi tengteng ahong paikhawm ua, amah kah in Ramah ah a-inn uah avui uhi. David athou a Paran gamdai ah ahohsuk hi.David Leh Abigail Maon ah mi khat a-om a, Karmel tang ah aneih-le-lam a-om hi. Amah mithupitak ahi a, belam sangthum leh kel sangkhat anei hi. Karmel tang ah abelam mul amet hi. Amin Nabal ahi a, azi min Abigail ahi. Huai numei teitak leh melhoihtak ahi. Himahleh pasal pen mi chihhaktak leh giloutak ahi a; amah Kaleb suan ahi. David in gamdai a pan Nabal in abelam mul amet chih ana za hi. Huchi in David in tangval sawm asawl a, tangvalte kiang ah, “David in Karmel tang ah va hohtou unla, Nabal kiang ah hoh unla ka min in chibai va buk un. Mineizoupa kiang ah huchi in va chi un: ‘Nang tung ah, na inkuante tung ah leh na neih tengteng tung ah khamuanna om hen. Na belam mulmet mite a-om uh chih ka na za hi. Na belamching mite ka kiang ah a-om zel ua, apoi uh bangmah ka khoih kei ua, Karmel tang a a-om sung un bangmah amangsak kei uh. Na tangvalte dong lechin hon hilh mai ding uh. Huchi in hiai ka tangvalte'n na mitmuh in deihsakna tang uhen, ni hoih ni tak a hong hoh lah ka hi ngal ua. Na neih bangbang na sikhate leh na tapa David na pe dih ve, achi, chi un, ” achi hi. David tangvalte ava tun un David min in huai thu tengteng Nabal kiang ah agen ua, huchi in adaita uh. Nabal in David sikhate adawng a, “David kua ahia oi? Jesse tapa kua ahia oi? Tulai in sikha tampi pute taimangsan atam mai uh.

Ka tanghou, ka tui leh ka belam mulmet mite a dia ka gohsa kuate ahi ua chih ka theihlouhte ka pe peuhmah dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in David tangvalte akihei ua, akik nawn ua; huai thu tengteng ahong hilh uh. David in amite kiang ah, “Na namsau uh kuah chiat un,” achi hi. Anamsau uh akuah chiat uh. David in leng anamsau akuah a, mi zali in David azuitou ua; mi zanih van veng in a-om uhi. Tangval khat in Nabal zi Abigail kiang ah, “Ngai in, David in gamdai a pan ka pu uh chibai buk ding in mi ahon sawl a, ama'n ana sal hi. Himahleh huaite lah ka tung uah ahoih mahmah ua, ka poi uh bangmah akhoih kei uh. Gamlak a ka om lai ua ka omkhawm sung tengteng uh bangmah ka tan kei uhi. Belamching a akiang ua ka om sung tengteng un sun leh zan kou a ding in baang ahi mai uhi. Huaiziak in bang ahia na hih ding hoihtak in ngaihtuah dih ve. Ka pu uh tung ah leh a-inkuan tengteng tung ah thil hoih lou tup in anei hi. Amah lah a Belial tapa mahmah a, kuamah houpih theih ahi kei hi,” chi in agen hi. Abigail in kintak in tanghou beu zanih, uain thawl nih, belam nga huan dia mansa, vaimim kan buk nga, grep gah phoukeu bawk zakhat leh theipi beu zanih alakhawm a, sabiltung aposak hi. Asikha tangvalte kiang ah, “Ka ma ah na pai zel unla, ngai un, ka hon zui ding,” achi hi. Himahleh apasal Nabal ahilh kei hi. Huchi in hichibang ahi a, asabiltung tung a tuang a tang sang sing lak a apaisuk lai in, ngai in, David leh amite'n ahon zuan ua, huchi in amau atuakta hi.

David in, “Bangmah amansaklouhna dia gamdai a hiai mipa neih tengteng athawn lel in ka na vensak ana hi mahmah ve; thil hoih lah thil hoih lou in ahon dinta ngal a. Zingchiang zingsang khovak pha a amah a tengteng lak a pasal naupang khat kia lel leng ka hawi peuhmahleh Pathian in David melmate thupizaw sem in bawl hen,” achi hi. Abigail in David amuh in asabiltung a pan akumsuk zok a, David ma a lei si in akunsuk hi. Akhebul ah abokkhup a, “Keimah in, ka toupa aw, kei mahmah in thulimlouhna ka khu ding. Na sikhanu'n na bil a zak ding in thu gen henla, na sikhanu thugen hehpih in ngaikhia in. Samuel Sihna Huaiziak in tu in, toupa aw, Toupa hinna leh na hin bang in ka gen ahi. Ka mu mahmah kei hi, Toupa'n sisan suah lou ding leh na khut a phu la lou ding in lah nang ahon bawl hi. Na melmate leh ka toupa hoihlouhna zong mite Nabal bang himai uhen. Hiai ka toupa a dia na sikha in vualzawlnate ka hon tawi ka pu hon zui tangvalte piak hi hen. Na sikhanu tatlekna hehpih in ngaidam in. Toupa'n ka toupa inkuan kiptak in aphut ngeingei dia, ka pu Toupa kidounate dou ahi ngal a. Na damsung teng in nangmah gitlouh man muh ding a-om kei ding. Nang hon delh ding leh na hinna hihmang ding in mite hong kisa mah le uh, ka toupa hinna zaw Toupa na Pathian toh hinna a gak ahi dia; na melmate hinna bel vaisuanglot a suanglot bang in alawnmang ding hi.

Huan hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n na tungtang thu a thil hoih a chiam bang teng ka toupa tung a ahih chiang a, Israelte kumpipa dia ahon bawl chiang in, Aziak om lou a sisan na suah louh a, ka toupa'n phu na lak louh nang a ding in lungkhamna himhim ahi kei ding. Ka toupa a ding in leng lungkimlouhna himhim ahi sam kei ding. Toupa'n ka toupa tung a thil hoih ahih hun chiang in na sikhanu theigige in,” achi hi. David in Abigail kiang ah, “Tuni a kei hon na dawn dia hon sawlpa Toupa, Israelte' Pathian phat in om hen. Na lemtheihna vualzawl in om henla, nang sisan suah mohna a pan hon humnu leh keimah khut a phu la lou dia hon bawlnu vualzawl in om hen. Kei hon dawn dia hong pawtkhe pah lou hi lechin, Toupa, Israelte' Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi, zingchiang khovak pha in Nabal ka hawisak het kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in athiltawite ala a, akiang ah, “Lungmuangtak in na inn ah paitouta in. Na thu ka mang hi. Na nget pen ka hon sansak hi,” achi hi. Nabal kiang ah Abigail ahohtou hi. Ngai in, a-inn ah kumpipa ankuanglui bang mai in ankuang a na lui hi. Akham mahmah ziak in Nabal amaitai ngial hi. Huaiziak in azingsang khovak masiah bangmah ahilh kei hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, zinglam a Nabal uain kham ahong halh in azi in huai thute ahilhta a, alung adaiduak a, suang bang in ahong om hial hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni sawm nung in Toupa'n Nabal tung ah khut akha a, asita hi.

David in Nabal asi chih azak in, “Ka minsiatna dia Nabal thilhih a pan hon genpih a, asikha thil hoih lou hih lou dia hon khampa Toupa phat in om hen. Nabal thil hoih lou hih Toupa'n amah tung mah ah akesakta,” achi hi. Huchi in David in Abigail azi dia va houpih ding in mi asawl hi. David sikhate'n Karmel tang a Abigail kiang atuntouh un, “David in azi dia nang hong pi ding in ahon sawl,” chi in amah ahoupih uhi. Athou a, amai a lei si in akunsuk hi. “Ngai dih ua, na sikhanu uh ka toupa sikhate khe sil ding sikha ka hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Abigail athou zok a, sabiltung tung ah atuang a, anungzui nungak ngate toh David misawlte azui ua, azi in a-omta hi. David in Jezreel a mi Ahinoam leng ana pi khin a; huchi in azi ding in a-om tuaktuak uhi. Saul in lah atanu Mikal, David zi Gallim a mi Laish tapa Palti toh ana kitengsak zouta hi.

Huan Ziphte Gibeah ah Saul kiang ah ahoh ua, “Gamdai chin a Hakilah mual ah David akibu kei maw?” chi in ava gen uhi. Huchi in Saul athou a, Ziph gamdai ah Israel mite lak a pan telkhiak mi sangthum pi in Ziph gamdai ah David zong ding in ahohsukta uhi. Saul in gamdai chin, lampi gei suahlam a om, Jeshimon toh kigalsai, Hakilah mual tung ah panmun akhoh a, gamdai ah David a-om lai a, Saul amah zong in gamdai ah ahong chih athei hi. Huaiziak in David in enkhe mite asawl a, huchi in Saul ahong taktak chih atheitelta hi. David athou a, Saul panmun khohna ah ahoh hi. David in Saul leh asepaih heutu, Ner tapa Abner lupna amu hi. Giahphual um sung ah Saul alum a, akim ah mite'n a-umkual uhi. David in Hit mi Ahimelek leh Joab unau Zeruiah tapa Abishai kiang ah, “Saul panmun ah kua ahia ka kiang a hong ding?” chi in agen hi.Abishai in, “Kei na kiang ah ka hong suk sam ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David leh Abishai mipite omna ah zan in ava hoh uhi. Ngai in, Saul bel giahphual um sung ah lum in a-ihmu hi. Alulam ah ateipi lei ah asiat tal a, Abner leh mite bel akim ah lum in a-ihmu uhi. Abishai in David kiang ah, “Tuni in Pathian in na melma na khut a hon pia ahita ve. Huaiziak in teipi in khatvei in lei ah ka hon sunden suk ding aw? Nihvei sut tuan angai kei ding,” achi hi. Himahleh David in Abishai kiang ah, “Hihmangthang ke'n, Toupa thaunilh tung a khut kha amoh lou kua a-om thei a?” achi hi. David mah in, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Toupa'n atung ah khut kha na ve.

Ahihkeileh leng asih ni ahong tung na ding. Ahihkeileh leng, kidouna ah ahoh dia, amangthang mai ding. Toupa thaunilh tung ah khut ka kha het kei ding. Alu kiangchin a teipi leh tuithawl ahihleh la inla, pai ni,” achi hi. Huchi in David in Saul lu kiangchin a teipi leh tuithawl ala a, apai nawnta uh. Kuamah in amu kei ua, kuamah in phawk in akhanglou kei. Toupa'n nuamtak a a-ihmutsak ziak in avek un nakpi in a-ihmu uhi. Huchi in gal khat lam ah David ahoh a, gamla kuam ah mualvum ah adingh a; akikal uh gamlapi ahi. David in mipite leh Ner tapa Abner zak in akikou a, “Abner, na hon dawng kei dia hia?” chi in asam hi. Huchi in Abner in adawng a, “Kumpipa sam nang kua na hia?” achi hi. David in Abner kiang ah, “Mihangsan na hi kei maw? Israelte lak ah nang bang kua a-om a? Bangchidan ahia kumpipa, na toupa na ven louh? Kumpipa, na pu hihmang ding in kuahiam khat ahong pai hi. Na thilhihdan ahoih kei. Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Toupa thaunilh toupa na ven hoih louh ziak in si dia kilawm na hi. Kumpipa lu chin a teipi leh tuithawl om koi a om ahita ua? En him dih,” achi hi. Saul in David aw athei a, “Tua nang aw hia, ka tapa David?” achi hi. David in, “Hi, toupa, kumpipa aw, ka aw ahi,” achi hi. “Bangziak in ahia ka toupa in asikha adelh? Bang thil ka hih a ahia? Akhut ah thil gilou bang ahia om? Huaiziak in toupa, ka kumpipa'n asikha thu ngaikhia hen. Kei dou dia na lungtang tokthoupa Toupa ahihleh thillat pom teitei hen. Mihing tate ahih uleh Toupa ah hamsia thuak in om uhen.

Pai inla, pathian dangte nna sem in, chi a Toupa gou ka luah theihlouhna dia tuni a hon delhmang lah ahi ngal ua. Huaiziak in Toupa muh phak louh in lei ah ka sisan luang kei hen. Vengkeng gem dia tang a mi agamvak bang un Israel kumpipa, uihik leltak zong ding a paikhia ahi ve,” achi hi. Saul in, “Ka na khialta. Ka tapa David, hong pai nawn in. Tuni a na mitmuh a ka hinna amanphat mahmah ziak in bangmah himhim ka hihta kei ding hi. Ngai in, thil haihuai mahmah ka na hihta a, ka nak khelh mahmah hi,” achi hi. David in adawng a, “Toupa aw, teipi en dih, tangval khat hong henla, hong la hen. Toupa'n michih adiktat man uleh amuanhuai man uh ape ding. Tuni in Toupa'n ka khut ah nang ahon pe na a, Toupa thaunilh tung ah ka khut ka lik nuam kei a ahi. Ngai in, tuni a na hinna ka hon mantamsak mahmah bang in Toupa'n ka hinna hon mantamsak henla, mangbatna tengteng a pan hon hunkhia hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul in David kiang ah, “Ka tapa David, vualzawl in om in. Thilhihtheitak in na om dia, na zou zel ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David apai a, Saul leng amun ah apai nawnta hi. David In Saul Hinna Ahawi Nawn

Huan David in alungsim in, “Chikchiang hiam a zaw Saul khut a mangthang khongkhong ding ka hi ve. Philistia mite gam a taimang sang a hoihzaw om lou ding ahi. Huchi in Saul in Israel gam a hon zonna alungdong dia, huchi in akhut a pan ka suakta ding,” achi hi. David athou a, amah leh akiang a mi zaguk omte Maok tapa Gath kumpipa Akish kiang ah apaita uhi. David leh amite, michih a-inkuankuan un, David zi nihte, Jezreel mi Ahinoam leh Nabal zi Karmel mi Abigailte toh Gath ah Akish kiang ah atengta uhi. Gath ah David atai chih Saul ahilh ua, huchi in azong nawnta kei hi. David in Akish kiang ah, “Na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, na gam a khua khat ah tenna ding mun hon pe sam inla, huai ah ka teng ding uh. Na sikha bang ding in kumpipa khopi ah na kiang ah a-om nilouh dia?” achi hi. Huchi in Akish in huai ni in Ziklag khua apeta hi. Huaiziak in Ziklag tuni tan in Judah gam kumpipate a ahi nilouh hi. Philistia gam a David a-om sung kum khat pumpi leh kha li ahi. David leh amite ava hohtou ua, Geshur mite, Girzi mite leh Amalek mite ava dou uhi. Huai namte Telam a pan Shur gam lam pang Aigupta gam pha a om ahi uhi. David in gam asual a, numei leh pasal hawi himhim anei kei. Belamte, bawngte, sabiltungte, sangawngsaute leh apuansilhte uh alaksak hi. Apai nawn a, Akish kiang ah ahoh hi. Akish in, “Tuni in koilam na dou a?” achi hi. David in, “Judah sim gam, Jerahmeelte sim gam leh Kente sim gam,” achi hi. “Philistia gam a a-om sung mawngmawng in ‘David in hichibang in ahih zel, ” achi kha ding ua, chi in numei pasal Gath a pi ding hawi himhim anei kei hi. Akish in David thugen ataksang a, “Ami Israelte akimudahsak mahmah ziak in, tangtawn in ka sikha ding in a-om ding,” achi hi. David Philistiate Lak ah

Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai lai in Philistia mite'n asepaihte uh Israel mite sual a dou ding in akaikhawm uh. Akish in David kiang ah, “Nang leh na mite kei toh galdou dia na hong kuan ngeingei ding uh ahi, chih thei in,” achi hi. David in Akish kiang ah, “Aw le, na sikha in bang ahihthei a chih na thei ding,” achi hi. Akish in David kiang ah, “Ahoih ve, kei hon vengpa ding in ka hon bawl den ding,” achi hi.Saul In Dawisiam Adong Samuel asita a, Israel mi tengteng in akah ua, amah khua mah Ramah ah avui uhi. Saul in dawi aisan siam zawlte leh dawisiamte agam a pan adelhkhe khin hi. Philistia mite akikaikhawm ua, Shunem ah panmun akhoh uh. Saul in Israel mi tengteng akaikhawm a, Gilboa ah panmun akhoh sam hi. Saul in Philistia sepaihte amuhtak in alau a, alungsim aling tonton maimah hi. Saul in Toupa adot in leng Toupa'n mang hiam, Urim hiam, zawlnei hiam in leng adawng himhim kei hi. Saul in asikhate kiang ah, “Dawi aisan siam zawl numei akiang a ka hoh a ka dot ding hon zonkhiaksak un,” achi hi. Asikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in, Endor a dawi aisan siam numei om ei ve,” achi uhi. Saul akibawl lamdang a, puan dang asilh a, amah leh midang nih ahoh uh. Zan in numei kiang ava tung uhi. “Dawi aisanna in ai hon sansak inla, na kiang a, amin ka gen peuhmah hon sapsak in,” achi hi. Numei in akiang ah, “Ngai in, Saul thilhih na thei a, agam a dawi aisan siam leh dawisiamte ahihmang khinta a, bangziak a ka sihna dia ka hinna thang kamkhum dia kisa na hia?” achi hi. Saul in, “Toupa min lou in, Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi.

Hiai thil ziak in na tung ah gawtna atung kei ding,” chi in akiang ah akichiam hi. Numei in, “Kua ka hon sapkhiaksak dia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Samuel hon sapkhiaksak in,” achi hi. Numei in Samuel amuhleh ngaihtak in akikou a, Saul kiang ah, “Bangziak a hon khem, Saul lah na hi ngal a?” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Lau ke'n. Bang a na muh?” achi hi. Numei in Saul kiang ah, “Lei a pan pathiante hong pawtkhia ka mu,” achi hi. Akiang ah, “Bangchibang ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Putekpi ahong pawt a, puanaktual asilh,” achi hi. Saul in Samuel ahi chih athei a, amai a lei si in akun hi. Samuel in Saul kiang ah, “Bangziak a hihbuai a hon samkhia na hia?” achi hi. Saul in adawng a, “Ka lung azing mahmah a ahi. Philistia mite'n ahon dou ua, Pathian in lah ahon lehngatsan a, zawlnei hiam, mang hiam in leng lah ahon dawng himhim kei hi. Huaiziak in ka hih ding hon hilh ding in ka hon sam ahi,” achi hi. Samuel in, “Huchi a Toupa hon lehngatsan in na melma ahong hita, chih theigige kawm a bangziak a thu hon dong? Kei hon zang a, agen bang in Toupa'n na tung a hih ahita ve. Toupa'n na khut a pan gam ahon sut a, na invengpa David apeta hi. Toupa thu na man louh ziak leh Amalekte tung a aheh mahmah dungzui a na tangtun louh ziak in. Tu in na tung ah hiai thil ahihta hi. Huai lou leng, Toupa'n nang leh Israelte leng Philistia mite khut ah ahon pe dia; zingchiang in nang leh na tapate ka kiang ah na hong om ding uh. Toupa'n Israel sepaihte leng Philistia mite khut ah ape ding,” achi hi.

Huchi in Samuel thugen ziak in Saul alau mahmah a, lei ah apuk vialvual maimah hi. Tha leh zung himhim anei kei; nitum leh zankhua a an ne lou ahi ngal a. Saul kiang ah numeinu ahoh a, adah mahmah chih athei hi. Akiang ah, “Ngai in, na sikhanu'n na gen ka taksang a, sih-le-sih ka kiang a na thugente ka zui hi. Huaiziak in nang leng na sikhanu thu taksang sam in. An tawmchik bek ka hon lui dia, huchi in na pai chiang a hatna na neihtheihna ding in ne in,” achi hi. Himahleh a-ut kei a, “Ka ne kei ding,” achi hi. Himahleh asikhate'n numei toh asawl teitei ua; a thu uh amangta hi. Lei a pan athou a, lupna ah atuta hi. Numei in a-inn ah bawngnou vak thau anei a, agou zok a; tangbuang ala a, amek a, silngou soh louh tanghou abawl hi. Saul leh asikhate ma ah alui a, aneta uh. Huchi in athou ua, huai zan in apaita uhi.

Philistia mite'n asepaih tengteng uh Aphek ah akaikhawm vek ua, Israel mite'n Jezreel a tuikhuk kiang ah panmun akhoh uhi. Philistia makaite azaza in, asangsang in apai ua, David leh amite'n Akish toh anung uh azui uhi. Philistia makaite'n, “Hiai Hebrute'n bang ahia ahih uh?” achi uhi. Akish in Philistia makai kiang ah, “Hiai David Israelte kumpipa Saul sikha, hichi tan a ka kiang a om khin a, ka kiang a, ahong lut nung a lah tutan a leng adiklouhna ka muhlouhna pa ahi kei maw?” achi hi. Himahleh Philistia kumpipate atung ah aheh uhi. Philistia kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Hiai mi na mun sehsak a pai ding in kiksak inla, kidouna ah i kiang uah hong suk kei heh. Huchi lou in zaw kidouna ah i melmate lam ah apang kha ding. Hiai mite lu ding in hiai mipa leh apu kilem nawn ve un teh aw? Hiai David mah ahi kei maw, Saul in asang asang athat, David in asing asing, chi a, atungtang thu la a asak uh?” achi uhi. Huchi in Akish in David asam a, akiang ah, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Midik mahmah na hi a, sepaihte lak a ka kiang a na kuan leh na hong leltak ka mitmuh in ahoih mahmah hi. Ka kiang a na hong ni a pan tuni tan in na tung ah bangmah hoihlouhna himhim ka mu het kei hi. Himahleh makaite'n ahon ngai kei uhi. Huaiziak in Philistia kumpipate na hihlungkim louhlouhna ding in kik inla, lungkimtak in pai in,” achi hi. David in Akish kiang ah, “Ahihleh, bang thil ahia ka na hih?

Na kiang a ka om sung teng tuni tan in, ka toupa kumpipa melma dou lou a ka kik nawn maimah ding, na sikha tung ah bang mu na hia oi?” achi hi. Akish in adawng a, David kiang ah, “Ka mitmuh in Pathian angel bang in na hoih chih ka thei hi. Himahleh Philistia kumpipate'n, kidouna ah i kiang ah ahong sam kei ding, achi bikbek mawk uhi. Huaiziak in na kiang a om na pu sikhate toh zingkhang in thou unla, zingkhang a na thoh phet ua khua avak chiang in pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in David leh amite Philistia gam a kik nawn ding a zingsang a pawtkhe ding in athouta uh. Jezreel ah Philistia mite ahohtou uhi. Philistiate'n David Adeih Kei Uh

Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni a David leh amite Ziklag atun un, Amalekte'n simlam leh Ziklag khua ana sim khin uh. Ziklag khua ana sual ua, mei in ana hal uhi. Numeite leh khua a om peuhmah aneu-alian sal in ua, kuamah that lou a pi in apaipih khinta uhi. David leh amite khua ava tun un, ngai in, ana kangsiang khinta hi. Azite, atapate leh atanute uh sal in ana man khinta uhi. David leh akiang a omte'n aw suah in kah leng kap zou nawn lou khop in akap uhi. David zite nih: Jezreel mi Ahinoam leh Karmel mi Nabal zi Abigail leng sal a pi in a-om uhi. Michih atapate uh leh atanute uh ziak a lungkham in amah suang a den ding thu agen ziak un, David alungzing mahmah hi. Himahleh David bel Toupa a Pathian ah akihihhat hi. David in Ahimelek tapa siampu Abiathar kiang ah, “Siampu puanak hon va laksak dih ve,” achi hi. Abiathar in David siampu puanak ava laksak hi. David in, “Hiaite delh leng ka pha lai diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Delh in, na pha ngeingei ding, na la nawn vek ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David, amah leh akiang a mi zaguk toh akuankhia a, Besor lui ava tung ua, ami nutsiatte uh huai ah a-om uhi. David in adelh zel a, amah leh mi zalite toh, mi zanihte'n abah tak ziak un Besor lui akan zou kei uhi. Gamlak ah Aigupta mi amu ua, David kiang ah api ua, tanghou apia ua, ama'n ane a, tui adawnsak uhi. Theipi beu them khat leh grep gah phoukeu bawm nih apia uhi. Hiaite anekleh ahong halh nawn a

ni thum leh zan thum an ne lou leh tui dawn lou lah ahita ngal a. David in akiang ah, “Kua na hia? Koi a kipan a hong na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Aigupta gam tangval, Amalek mi sikha ka hi. Ni thum ahita a, ka chi anat ziak in ka pu in hon nusia maimah hi. Kereth sim gam leh Judah sim gamte ka sim ua, Kaleb sim gam leng ka sim ua, huchi in Ziklag khua leng ka hal uh,” achi hi. David in akiang ah, “Huaite omna ah na hon pisuk thei diam?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hon that lou ding leh ka pu khut a hon pe nawn lou ding in Pathian min lou in ka kiang ah kichiam inla, huchi in huaite omna ah ka hon pisuk ding,” achi hi. Apisukleh, ngai in, Philistia gam leh Judah gam a gallak tampi alak ziak un ankuang alui ua, ane un adawn ua mun teng ah ana om dalh phengphung uhi. Huchi in David in nitum a pan zingsang nitaklam tan in amau asual hi. Tangval zali sangawngsau tung a tuang a taikekte kia lou ngal kuamah dam a suakta himhim a-om kei uh. David in Amalek mite puakmang tengteng ala nawn vek a, David in azi nihte leng ahunkheta hi. Huchi in aneu-alian in, atapate uh, atanute uh, agallak uh leh athil lak himhim bangmah tan anei kei ua, David in alaksak nawn vek hi. David in belamhon leh ganhon tengteng ala a, gan dangte ma ah ahawl ua, “Hiaite David gallak ahi,” achi uhi. Mi zanih abah ziak ua David zuizou nawn lou a Besor lui a a-omsakte uh kiang ah David ava tung hi. Amau David dawn ding leh akiang a omte dawn ding in apawtkhia uh.

Mite kiang atun in David in amaute chibai abuk hi. David kiang a hohte lak a migiloute leh Belial mi teng in adawng ua, “I kiang ua ahong tel louh ziak un gallak thil i va lak nawn himhimte amau i pe kei ding uh. Api ua apaitheihna ding un azite chiat uh leh atate chiat uh ahihleh api uh i phal ding uh,” achi uhi. David in, “Unaute aw, Toupa eite hon kembitpa'n ahon piakleh eite dou dia hong kuante i khut ua hon pepa thilte huchi in hih kei un. Kua'n ahia hiai thu a na thu uh zui ding? Kidouna a hohte tan bangmah van veng a na omte'n leng atan sam ding uh ahi; kibang vek a tan ding ahi,” achi hi. Huai ni a pan tuni tan in Israelte a dia thupiak leh dan thuseh ding in abawlta hi. David, Ziklag khua atun in, gallak khenkhat, hiai, Toupa melmate lak a gallak, nang a dia thilpiak, chi in Judah upate, alawmte ngei kiang ah, gallak khenkhat akhak hi. Bethel a omte kiang ah, Ramoth sim a omte kiang ah, Jattir a omte kiang ah, Aroer a omte kiang ah, Siphmoth a omte kiang ah, Eshtemoa a omte kiang ah; Rakal a omte kiang ah, Jerahmeel a omte kiang ah, Kente a omte kiang ah; Amalekte Toh Kidouna Hebron a omte kiang ah, David leh amite tatna mun tengteng kiang ah.

Huan Philistia mite'n Israelte asual ua; Philistia mite a pan Israelte ataikek ua, Gilboa tang ah thah in a-om zelzul uhi. Philistia mite'n Saul leh atapa adelhzui vengveng uh. Philistia mite'n Saul tapate: Jonathan, Abinadab leh Melkishua athat uhi. Saul anak sual mahmah ua, thalkap mite'n akapkhata ua, thalkap mite'n nasatak in akapliam uhi. Huchi in Saul in agalvan tawipa kiang ah, “Na namsau dok inla, hon sun pailet in. Huchi lou in zaw hiai zeksumlouhte ahong pai ding ua, hong sun pailet ding ua, hon bawlse kha ding uh,” achi hi. Himahleh agalvan tawipa'n ahih ut kei; alau mahmah ngal a. Huaiziak in Saul in anamsau ala a, abohkhumta hi. Agalvan tawipa'n Saul asi chih atheih in ama'n leng anamsau abohkhum samta a, asikhawmta uh. Huchi in Saul, atapa thumte, agalvan tawipa leh ami tengteng huai ni mah in asikhawm vek uhi. Guam gal khat lam a Israel mi omte leh Jordan gal a omte'n Israel mite ataikek uh, chih leh Saul leh atapate asi uh chih atheih un khuate apawtkhiaksan ua, ataimangta uhi. Huchi in Philistia mite'n ava luahta uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingsang in Philistiate agalthahte uh puansilh suahsak ding a ava pai uleh Saul leh atapate thum Gilboa tang a si ava mu uhi. Alu atan ua, agalvan asuahkhiaksak ua, mite kiang leh amilimte inn a suah ding in akim ua Philistia mite gam teng ah akhak uhi. Ashtaroth inn ah agalvan akoih ua; Beth-shan kulhbaang ah aluang atak uhi. Jabesh-Gilead a omte'n Philistia mite'n Saul abawldan thu ana zak un, mihangsan tengteng athou ua, zankhua in apai ua, Saul luang leh atapate luang Beth-shan kulhbaang a pan alakhia uh. Jabesh atung ua, huai ah ahal uhi. Aguhte ala ua, Jabesh a sing nuai ah avui ua, ni sagih sung an angawl uhi. Saul Leh Atapate Sihna( Kro. )

David In Saul Sih Thu Athei Hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni in, ngai in, mi khat Saul panmun a kipan apuante bohkeksa leh alu a lei kai niaunuau in ahong pai hi. David kiang ahong tun in lei a bokkhup in zahtakna apia hi. David in akiang ah, “Koi a pan hong pai na hia?” achi hi.Ama'n akiang ah, “Israel mite panmun a pan hong taikhia ka hi,” achi hi. David in akiang ah, “Bangchibang in thil a-om a? Hon hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Kidouna a pan mite ataikek ua, mi tampi puk in asi uh. Saul leh atapa Jonathan leng asi tuaktuak uh,” achi hi. David in amah hilhpa tangval kiang ah, “Bangchi in ahia Saul leh atapa Jonathan asih uh na theih?” achi hi. Ahilhpa tangval in, “Bangchi chi hiam in Gilboa tang ah ka na om kha zenzen hi. Ngai in, ateipi ngai a Saul dingh ka mu a, kangtalaite leh sakol tungtuang mite'n hon naihta uhi. Anunglam angatleh ahon mu a, hon sam hi. Ke'n, ‘Hiai ah ka om, chi in ka dawng hi. Ka kiang ah, ‘Kua na hia? ahon chi hi. Ke'n, Amalek mi ka hi, chi in ka dawng hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, ‘Ka kiang ah hong dingh inla hong that mai dih, ka hing lai vanglak a, lungdonna in lah hon manta ngal a, achi hi. Akiang ah ka dingh a, huchi a pukgawp khinsa, damzou nawn lou ding chih ka theih ziak in ka thatta mai hi. Alu a lallukhu leh aban a tau ka la a, ka pu kiang ah ka hon tawi hi,” achi hi. David in apuansilhte abotkekta a, huchi mah bang in akiang a mi om tengteng in leng ahih uhi.

Saul leh atapa Jonathan leh Toupa mite leh Israel inkuante asuun ua, akah ua, nitaklam tan in an angawl ua, namsau a thah ahih ziak un. David in amah va hilhtu tangval kiang ah, “Koilam mi na hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Gamdangmi, Amalek mi tapa ka hi,” chi in adawng hi. David in akiang ah, “Toupa thaunilh hihmang dia atung a khut khak bangchidan a lau lou na hia le?” achi hi. David in tangval khat asam a, “Va naih inla, that in,” achi a, ama'n ava sat a, asita hi. David in akiang ah, “Na sisan nangmah lutung ah om hen. Nangmah kam ngei in, Toupa thaunilh ka that ahi, chi a na puan tak man in,” achi hi.David In Saul Leh Jonathan Akah David in Saul leh atapa Jonathan hiai kahtam in asuun hi: Thalkapdan Judah suante sinsak ding in asawl a, ngai in, Jasher laibu ah hiai gelh ahi: Aw Israel, na kilawmnamun sangte ah athat ua,na mihatte apukta uh. Gath ah gen kei unla,Ashkelon kongzingte ah puang kei un.Huchi lou in zawPhilistia tanute akipak ding ua,zeksum louh tanute avualzou kha ding uhi. Nou Gilboa tangte aw,na tung uah daitui lehvuah ke kei hen.Thillat dingte leng suah sam ke'n.Huai ah lah mihat lum Saul lum,thaunilh louh mi lum bang mai in giloutak in apaimang uhi. Thah a omte sisan a pan leh mihat thau a pan Jonathan thal akik nawn kei a,Saul namsau avuak in akik nawn kei hi. Saul leh Jonathan hindanadeihhuai in akilawm a,asih un leng akikhen kei uh.Mupite sang in ahatzaw ua,humpinelkaite sang in ahatzaw uhi. Nou Israel tanute aw, Saul kah un,puansan kilawmte na tung uah abaang a,na puan uah dangka-eng a zephoihnate hon koihsakpa ahi. Kidou laitak a mihatte apuk maizen uh!Aw, Jonathan, na mun sangte ah nang ahon thatta uhi.
