Ka unaupa Jonathan, na tungthu ah ka lungzing petmah hi.Ka tung ah na hoih mahmah a,N'on itna alamdang a,numei itna akhup hi. Mihatte apuk ua, kidouna galvante leng amangthang khinta!

Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in David in, “Judah gam a khua khatpeuh ah ka hohtou diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Hohtou in,” achi hi. David in, “Koi ah ahia ka hohtouh ding?” achi a, Ama'n, “Hebron ah,” achi hi. Judah Kumpipa A David Bawl Ahi David in akiang a om mi tengteng apitou a, michih a-inkuante chiat uh toh, Hebron khuate ah atengta uhi. Judah gam a mite ahong hoh ua, huai ah Judah inkote tung a kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uhi. Huchi in “Saul vui mite Jabesh-gilead mite ahi uh,” chi in David ahilh uhi. Jabesh-gilead mite kiang ah David in mite asawl a, akiang uah, “Na pu uh Saul na hehpihdan uh hihlang a na vui ziak un, Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen. Tu in Toupa'n na tung uah zahngaihna leh thutak langsak henla; hiai thil na hih ziak un ke'n leng na chit man uh ka hon thuk ding. Huaiziak in tu in na khutte uh hong hat henla, hangsantak in om un. Na pu uh Saul asita hi. Judah inkote'n atung ua kumpipa ding in thau ahon nilh khinta uhi,” chi in ava gensak hi.Israel Kumpipa A Ishboshet Bawl Ahi Himahleh Ner tapa Abner, Saul sepaihte heutu in, Mahanaim ah Saul tapa Ishboshet apaipih hi. Gilead, Ashur, Jezreel, Ephraim leh Israel tengteng tung a kumpipa in abawlta hi. Saul tapa Ishboshet in Israel tung a vaihawm apat in kum sawmli a upa ahi a, kum nih sung vai ahawm hi. Himahleh Judah mite'n David azui uh. David in Hebron a Judah chite tung ah kum sagih leh kha guk vai ahawm hi.Israel Leh Judah Kidouna Ner tapa Abner leh Saul tapa Ishboshet sikhate Mahanaim a pan apawtkhia ua, Gibeon ah apai uhi.

Zeruiah tapa Joab leh David sikhate apaikhia ua, Gibeon dil ah akituak uhi. Pawl khat dil gal khat lam ah atu a, pawl khat pen dil gal langkhat ah atu hi. Abner in Joab kiang ah, “Tangvalte hong kuan uhenla, i ma uah hong kisual uhen,” achi hi. Joab in, “Hong kuan le uh ake,” achi hi. Huchi in akuan ua, azah chiang sep in agalkah phei ua, Benjamin chi, Saul tapa Ishboshet lam a pang sawm-le-nih, David sikha sawm-le-nih ahi uh. Alangte uh lu chiat ah akimantuah ua, amau tumte chiat namsau in anak ah akidawt ua; apukkhawm vek uhi. Huaiziak in huai mun Helkath-hazzurim achi ua, huai Gibeon a om ahi. Huai ni a akisual uh athupi mahmah a, David sikhate ma ah Abner leh Israel mite zoh in a-om uhi. Huai mun ah Zeruiah tapate thum, Joab, Abishai leh Asahel a-om uhi. Asahel zukpi bang a ngalhat ahi. Asahel in Abner adelh a; Abner adelh taklam hiam veilam hiam a pialsan het lou in adelh vengveng hi. Abner alehngat a, “Nang na hi maw, Asahel?” achi hi.Ama'n adawng a, “Ka hi,” achi hi. Abner in akiang ah, “Na taklam hiam, na veilam hiam ah pialkhia inla, tangval khat man inla, agalvan laksak in,” achi hi. Himahleh Asahel in amah adelh apialsan nuam tuan kei hi. Abner in Asahel kiang ah, “Hon pialsan in. Bangziak a lei a hon satpuk ding ka hia? Na unaupa Joab mel ka mu ngam dia hia?” achi nawn hi. Himahleh apial nuam tuan kei. Huaiziak in Abner in ateipi tolam in anakguh ngana nuaitak asun a, anunglam ah teipi apaisuak a, huai mun a puk in asita hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Asahel puk a, asihna mun a hong pai teng huai mun ah akhawl zel uhi.

Himahleh, Joab leh Abishai in Abner adelhzui ua; Gibeon gamdai lampi a Giah chin a Ammah mual atun un ni atumta hi. Benjamin suante Abner kiang ah akikaikhawm ua, pawl khat in akibawl ua, mualvum ah ava dinghta uh. Abner in Joab asam a, “Namsau in hon negai den ding hia? Atawplam in ahong kha mahmah ding, chih na thei kei maw? Bang tan ahia a-unaute uh delh tawpsan a kik nawn dia mipite hilh lou a na om ding?” achi hi. Joab in, “Pathian ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Bangmah na gen lou hi lechin zingchiang a pan mite paimang khinta ding ua, a-unaute uh delh lou ding hi ve un,” achi hi. Joab in pengkul amut a, mite adingh depdup uh. Israel mite adelhta kei ua, kuamah asual nawnta kei uhi. Abner leh amite zankhua in phaizang tawnsuak a pai in Jordan akan ua, Bithron akantan ua, Mahanaim atung uhi. Joab bel Abner delh akik nawnta a, mipi tengteng akaihkhawm vek leh David sikhate sawm-le-kua leh Asahel akimta kei uhi. Himahleh David sikhate'n Benjamin mite leh Abner mite zathum-le-sawmguk athat uhi. Asahel luang ala ua, Bethlehem a apa han ah avui uh. Joab leh amite zankhua in apai ua, khovak in Hebron atung uhi.

Saul inkuante leh David inkuante sawtpi akidou ua; David in hatlam amanoh a, Saul inkuante'n hat louh lam amanoh uhi. David in Hebron ah tapate anei a, ata masapen, Amnon, Jezreel mi Ahinoam lak a ahi. David Tapate Alina Adonijah, Haggith tapa ahi a; angana Shephatiah, Abital tapa. Agukna Ithream, David zi Eglah lak a ahi. Hiai teng David tapa Hebron a piangte ahi uh.David Lam Ah Abner Ahong Pang Huan hichi ahong hi a, Saul inkuante leh David inkuante akidou sung un Saul inkuante a ding in Abner akihatsak semsem hi. Saul in mei anei a, amin Rizpah ahi. Amah Aiah tanu ahi. Ishboshet in Abner kiang ah, “Bangziak a ka pa mei kithuahpih na hia?” achi hi. Ishboshet thugen in Abner ahehsak mahmah hi. Judahte ui lutang leltak ka hi a hia? Tuni tan in na pa Saul inkuante leh a-unaute leh alawmte tung ah zahngaihna ka hihlang a, David khut ah ka hon pe kei hi. Hinapi a nang hiai numei tung a khial a na hon ngoh mawk! Pathian in Abner alohloh in loh henla, huai sang a sezaw in leng. David kiang a Toupa akichiam bang a, huchibang ngei atung a ka hih keileh. Saul inkuante lak a pan agam laksak ding, Israel leh Judahte tung a Dan a pan a Beer-sheba tan a David laltutphah tunding ding. Huchi in ama'n Abner alau mahmah ziak in dawn himhim leng adawng thei kei hi. Abner in amah sik in David kiang ah mi asawl a, “Hiai gam kua a ahia? Ka kiang ah thu khung in. Huchi in ngai in, Israel mi tengteng na lam a pang ding in ka khut nang lam ah apang ding,” chi in ava gensak hi. Ama'n, “Hi hen. Na kiang ah thu ka khung ding.

Himahleh na tung ah thil khat ka hon phut hi. Huai tuh hiai ahi. Hong mu ding a na hong pai chiang in Saul tanu Mikal na hon pi phot keileh ka mel na mu thei kei ding,” achi hi. David in Saul tapa Ishboshet kiang ah, “Philistia mite zekvun zakhat a ka leisa, ka zi Mikal hon pia in,” chi ding in mi asawl hi. Ishboshet in mi asawl a, apasal Laish tapa Paltiel mahmah a pan apita hi. Apasal in kap kawm in Bahurim tan anung azui zel hi. Abner in akiang ah, “Pai in, kik nawn in,” achi hi. Huchi in akik nawnta hi. Abner in Israel upate ahoupih a, “Tuma siah David na kumpipa ding un na zong uh. Tu in na kumpipa un bawl un. Toupa'n David tungtang thu ah, ka sikha David khut in ka mi Israelte Philistia mite khut a pan leh amelma teng khut a pan ka hunkhe ding ana chi,” achi hi. Abner in Benjamin mite bil a zak in agen hi. Israel mite leh Benjamin inkuan tengteng in hoih asak bangbang un Hebron a David bil a zak dia gen ding in Abner ahoh hi. Abner leh amite sawmnih Hebron a David kiang ah apai uhi. David in Abner leh akiang a mi sawmnihte a ding in ankuang alui hi. Abner in David kiang ah, “Ka thou ding a, na kiang a thu akhuntheihna ding un leh na deihthusam bangtak a vai na hawmtheihna ding in Israel mi tengteng ka toupa kiang a kaikhawm ding in ka kuan ding,” achi hi. David in Abner asawlkhia a, lungmuangtak in akuanta hi.Abner Thah In A-om Ngai in, David mite leh Joab galdou zou ahong tung ua, gallak tampi ahon pua uh.

Himahleh Abner bel Hebron a David kiang ah ana om nawn kei hi. Ana paikiksak khinta a, amah leng lungmuangtak in ana paita hi. Joab leh akiang a mipi tengteng ahong tun un, Ner tapa Abner kumpipa kiang ah ahoh hi. Ama'n ana paisak nawn khin a, “Lungmuangtak in apai nawnta,” chi in Joab ahilh uhi. Kumpipa kiang ah Joab ahoh a, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia oi? Ngai in, Abner na kiang ah ahong a, bangziak a paimangsak a, apaimang vengveng mawk? Ner tapa Abner na thei a, nang hong khem ding a na pawt lam leh na lut lam leh na thilhih peuhmah theih tum a hong pai ahi,” achi hi. David kiang a pan Joab ahong pawtkhiak in Abner delh ding in mi asawl hi. Sirah a tuileh a pan ava pikik uh. Himahleh David in athei kei hi. Hebron a Abner ahong tun in Joab in sim houpih ding in kulh kongpi ah apituam hi. A-unaupa Asahel sisan pawt thukna ding in anakguh ngana nuaitak ah adawt a, huchi in asita hi. Anung a David in azak in, “Ner tapa Abner sisan thu ah kei mahleh ka gam Toupa mitmuh in tangtawn in ka siang uh. Joab lutung ah kia henla; apa inkote tengteng tung ah toh. Joab inkote lak ah meima sia vei hiam, phak natna nei hiam, chiangkhun ngai a pai hiam, namsau a si hiam, kial thuak hiam kitatlak lou in hong om hen,” achi hi. Huchi in a-unaupa uh Asahel Gibeon a kidouna a athah ziak in Joab leh a-unau Abishai in Abner athat uhi.Abner Vui In A-om David in Joab leh akiang a mi om tengteng kiang ah, “Na puante uh botkek unla, sai-ip puan silh unla, Abner suun in ama ah pai un,” achi hi. David in leng siluang azui hi.

Hebron ah Abner avui ua, kumpipa'n a-aw suakkhesak in Abner han ah akap a, mipi tengteng leng akap uhi. Kumpipa'n Abner akah a:“Abner, mihai sih in asi dia hia? Na khut hen ahi kei a,na khete leng sikkol butsak ahi sam kei.Migiloute ma a mi apuk bang a na puk maizen? achi hi.”Mi tengteng in akah nawn uhi. Huchi in sun ahih lai in mi tengteng David an nesak ding in ahong pai uh. Himahleh David in, “Nitum ma a an nek hiam, thil dang hiam leng ka nekleh Pathian in alohloh hon loh hen; huai sang a sezaw in leng,” chi in akichiam hi. Mi tengteng in huai atheih un akipak mahmah uh. Kumpipa thilhih peuhmah in mite akipaksak hi. Mi tengteng leh Israel mi tengteng in huai ni in Ner tapa Abner thah ahih kumpipa thu ahi kei chih athei uhi. Kumpipa'n mite kiang ah, “Tuni in Israel milian, mithupitak asi, chih thei lou na hi uh maw? Kumpipa dia thaunilh himah leng, tuni in ka hat kei hi. Hiai Zeruiah tapate kei a ding in athuakhak lua uh. Toupa'n thil hoih lou hihmi agitlouh dungzui zel in thuk hen,” achi hi.

Huan Saul tapa Ishboshet in Hebron ah Abner asi chih ana zak in akhutte ahong hat kei ua, Israel mi tengteng apatau uhi. Saul tapa Ishboshet in sepaih pawl heutu nih anei hi. Khat min Baanah ahi a, adang min Rekab ahi. Amau Benjamin suan Beeroth mi Rimmon tapate ahi uh. Beeroth bel Benjamin nam a simtel a ngaih ahi. Beeroth a mite Gittaim ah atai ua, tuni tan in huai ah ateng uhi. Ishboshet Thah In A-om Beeroth mi Rimmon tapate Rekab leh Baanah apai ua, Ishboshet inn ah sun nisat laitak a lupna a alup lai in akiang ah ahoh uhi. Huit buh la ding hileh kilawm in insung lam ah alut ua, anakguh ngana nuaitak ah adawt ua, huchi in Rekab leh a-unaupa Baanah ataimang uhi. Inn ava lut un alupna dantan a lupna a lum lai ava dawt ua, athat ua, alu atan ua, alu ala uh. Arabah kantan in zankhua in apaimang uhi. Ishboshet lu Hebron ah David kiang ah ahon pua ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, nang hon thah tum, na melma Saul tapa Ishboshet lu hiai ah a-om; Toupa'n ka toupa phu Saul leh asuante tung ah tuni in alaksakta,” achi uhi. David in Beeroth mi Rimmon tapa Rekab leh a-unaupa Baanah adawng a, akiang uah, “Toupa ka mangbatna tengteng a hon tanpa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Tanchinhoih hon tun akisep in, ‘Ngai in, Saul asita, chi a mi khat in ahon hilh lai in, amah ka man a, Ziklag ah ka that hi’. Huai atanchinhoih hon puakman a ka na piak ahi. Midiktat, ama insung a ama lupna tung ngei a lum, migilou in athah uh sisan man na tung uah ka hon phut nawn sem dia, leitung a pan alamang kei dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in David in atangvalte thu apia a, amaute athat uh. Akhutte uleh akhete uh atansak ua, Hebron a dil tung ah akhai uhi. Ishboshet lu bel ala ua, Hebron a Abner han ah avui uhi.

Huchi in Israel chi tengteng Hebron a David kiang ah ahong pai ua, “Ngai in, na guh leh na sa ka hi uh. Hun paisa in leng Saul ka tung ua kumpipa ahih lai a leng Israelte pikhia leh pilutpa na hi. Toupa'n na kiang ah, ka mi Israelte na vak dia, Israelte tung ah heutu in na om ding, achi,” achi uhi. Israel upa tengteng Hebron ah kumpipa kiang ah ahoh uh. Kumpipa David in Hebron ah Toupa ma ah amau toh thu akhung hi. Huchi in Israelte tung a kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uhi. Vai ahawm pat tung in David kum sawmthum a upa ahi a, kum sawmli sung vai ahawm hi. Judah Leh Israel Kumpipa In David Apang( Kro.. ) Kumpipa leh amite huai gam a teng Jebus mite sim ding in Jerusalem ah ahoh uhi. Huai mite'n David ahong lut theih louh gingta in, David kiang ah, “Hiai ah na hong lut het kei ding. Mittaw leh khebaite'n hon na dal ding uh,” achi uhi. Himahleh David in Zion kulhpi alazou a, huai tuh David khopi ahi. David in huai ni in, “Jebus mi sual peuhmahte tuiluanna ah paitou uhenla, David mudah khebai leh mittawte that uheh,” achi hi. Huaiziak in ahi, “Mittaw leh khebaite inn ah ahong lut kei ding uh,” achih uh. Huchi in David kulh ah ateng a, David khua achi uhi. David in Millo a pan akimvel leh asunglam ah kulh abawl hi. David in Toupa, Sepaihte' Pathian akiang a a-om ziak in thupi lam amanoh zel hi. Tura kumpipa Hiram in David kiang ah mi asawl a, sidar singte akhak a, khutsiamte leh suangseksiamte asawl a, David a ding in inn alamsak uhi.

David in Toupa'n amah Israel mite tung a kumpipa ding in akipsak a, ami Israelte ziak in alalgam atawisang chih athei hi. David in Hebron apawtsan nung in Jerusalem a pan mei leh zi aneih behlap hi. Huchi in David in tapate leh tanute anei nawn lai hi. Jerusalem a aneihte min hiaite ahi: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan leh Solomon, Ibhar, Elishua, Nepheg leh Japhia, Elishama, Eliada leh Eliphalet.Philistiate Tung A Vualzohna( Kro. ) Himahleh Israel mite kumpipa ding in David thau anilh uh chih Philistia mite'n azak un Philistia mi tengteng David zong ding in ahohtou uh. David in ana za a, kulh sung ah apaisuk hi. Philistia mite Rephaim Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi. David in, “Philistia mite sual ding in ka hohtou diam? Amaute ka khut ah na hon pe diam?” chi in Toupa adong hi. Toupa'n David kiang ah, “Hohtou in. Philistia mite na khut ah ka hon pe ngeingei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David Baal-perazim ah ahoh a, huai ah David in amaute asual a, “Toupa'n ka melmate tuichin khah bang mai in ka ma ah ahon hihdalhsakta,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai mun min, “Baal-perazim,” asa hi. Huai ah amilimte uh anusia ua, David leh amite'n ahal uhi. Philistia mite apaitou nawn ua, Rephaim Phaizang ah akiphalh uhi. David in Toupa adotleh Ama'n, “Hohtou ke'n. Anunglam uah khelh inla, singtheimi kung zawn ah sual in. Hichi ahi ding, singtheimi lek a pai husa na zakleh gamtang in. Philistia sepaihte sual ding in na ma ah Toupa akuankheta chihna ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa'n thu apiak bang in David in ahih a; Philistia mite Geba a pan Gazer tan in asual hi.

David in Israel mite lak a mi teltuam singthum akaikhawm nawn hi. Huchi in David athou a, Judah gam a Baale a pan cherubte tung a tuang sepaihte' Toupa min aputsak uh Pathian bawm latou ding in akiang a mi om tengteng toh akuan uhi. Pathian bawm kangtalai thak ah akoih ua, mual tung a om Abinadab inn a pan alakhia uh. Abinadab tapa Uzzah leh Ahio in kangtalai thak ahawl uhi. Abinadab inn a pan Pathian bawm alakhia ua; Pathian bawm ma ah Ahio apai hi. David leh Israel mi tengteng in Toupa ma ah thil ging thei chi tuamtuam meilah sing a bawl leh kaihgingte, pekgingte, khuangtate, pengkul bineite, dakkhutbette atum uhi. Jerusalem A Thukhun Bawm Laklutna( Kro.. —. ) Uzzah tung ah Toupa hehna akuang a, athilhihdiklouh ziak in Pathian in huai ah athat a, Pathian bawm kiang ah asita hi. Toupa hehna Uzzah tung a apuahzak ziak in David alungkim kei a, huai mun Perez-uzzah asa a, tuni tan in ahi lai hi. Huai ni in David in Toupa alauta hi. “Bangchi in Toupa bawm ka kiang ahong tung theita dia?” achi hi. David in Toupa bawm David khua a amah kiang ah asuan nuam kei hi. Himahleh David in Git mi Obed-edom inn ah akoih zawta hi. Git mi Obed-edom inn ah kha thum Toupa bawm a-om hi. Huchi in Obed-edom leh a-inkuan tengteng Toupa'n avualzawl hi. “Pathian bawm ziak in, Obed-edom inkuan leh aneih-le-lam tengteng Toupa'n avualzawl,” chi in kumpipa David ahilh uh. Huchi in David in Obed-edom inn a pan Pathian bawm, David ah kipaktak in ava lata hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa bawm zawng mite'n kal guk asuantak un bawngtal leh gan vak thau alan hi. Toupa ma ah atheihtawp in David alam a, puanmalngat puanak asilh hi.

Huchi in David leh Israel mi tengteng in kikou zuazua leh pengkul mut kawm in Toupa bawm alatouta uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Toupa bawm David khua a alut lai in, Saul tanu Mikal in tohlet a pan ana en a, Toupa ma a David tawm leh lam amu a, alungtang in asimmohta hi. Huchi in Toupa bawm alalut ua, akoihna dia David in akaih, puanin sung a amun ding ah akoihta uhi. David in Toupa ma ah halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan hi. David in halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alat khit in sepaihte' Toupa min in mite avualzawl hi. Mi tengteng anumei apasal michih tanghou phel khat leh sa bak khat leh grep gah phoukeu bawm khat chiat apia hi. Huchi in michih ama inn lam chiat ah apaita uh. Hiai zoh in a-inkuante vualzawl ding in David apaikik hi. David dawn ding in Saul tanu Mikal ahong pawt a, “Tuni in Israel kumpipa thupi hi na mai e, migina lou, zumna thei lou kisuahkhete bang mai in tuni in asikha nungakte mitmuh in akisuahkhia a,” ana chi hi. David in Mikal kiang ah, “Na pa leh a-inkuante tengteng sang a kei hon tel, Toupa, Israelte tung a kumpipa dia hon seppa Toupa ma ah ahi ka lam. Huaiziak in Toupa ma ah nuamsa in ka om ding hi. Hiai sang mah in leng ka zumpihhuai lai ding. Keimah mitmuh in leng ka sithuai lai ding. Himahleh huai sikha nungak na gente pahtawi in ka om ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Saul tanu Mikal in asih ni tanpha in ta anei kei hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa a-inn a om a, Toupa'n akimvel a melmate tengteng a pan galmuang a a-omsak nung in; Kumpipa'n zawlnei Nathan kiang ah, “Tu in en in kei sidar sing inn ah ka teng a, himahleh Pathian bawm puanin ah a-om,” achi hi. Nathan in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na lungsim a om bangtak in va hih in, na kiang ah Toupa a-om hi,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai zan mah in Nathan kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. “Ka sikha David va hilh in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ka tenna ding inn na hon lamsak ding maw? ” Israel suante Aigupta gam a pan ka pikhiak a pan tuni tan in inn ah ka teng kei a, puanin ah leh biakbuk ah ka teng zaw hi. David Kiang A Nathan Thugen( Kro. ) Huaiziak in ka sikha David kiang ah, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Belam tatna mun a pan belam na ven lai in ka mi Israel mite tung a heutu ding in ka hon la hi. Na hohna peuh ah na kiang ah ka om zel a, na ma ah na melmate ka hihmang zel hi. Lei a mithupitakte bang in min thupitak ka hon bawlsak hi. Hiai ban ah ka mi Israelte a ding in mun ka sep dia, amau ka suan ding a, amau mun mah ah ateng ding ua, tuma lam bang in gitlouhna tate'n ahihbuai nawn kei ding uh. Na melmate tengteng lak a pan ka hon khawlsak hi. Huai lou him in Toupa'n inn ka hon bawlsak ding, chi in ahon hilh hi. Na ni abei a na pute kiang a na lup chiang in, na nung a na suan na gil a gah ding ka tungding ding a, agam ka hihkip ding.

Ama'n ka min a ding in inn alam dia, agam laltutphah tangtawn a ding in ka hihkip ding. Apa ka hi ding a, amah ka tapa ahi ding. Thil ahihkhelhleh, mihing chiang leh mihing tapate khetna in ka thunun ding. Himahleh, na ma a ka suanmang Saul kiang a pan ka lakmang bang in ka zahngaihna in ahon paisan kei ding hi. Na inkuan leh na gam tangtawn a hihkip ngiungeu ahi dia, na laltutphah lah tangtawn in hihkip ahi ding,” chi in. Huai thute tengteng bang zel leh huai kilakna bang geih in Nathan in David kiang ah agen hi.David Kipahthugen Thumna( Kro. ) Huchi in kumpipa David alut a, Toupa ma ah atu hi, “Toupa Pathian aw, kua ahia ka hih a, ka inkuante bang ahia ahih uh, hiai tantan na hon pi? Toupa Pathian aw, huaite leng nang mitmuh in thil bangmah tham ahi kei uh. Himahleh na sikha inkuan omdan ding thu kum tampi sung a ding in leng na gen khinta hi. Toupa Pathian aw, hiaite mihing hihdan ahi a hia? David in na kiang ah bang agen nawn tuan dia? Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha lah na thei vek ngal a. Na sikha theih ding in na thu ziak leh nangmah lungtang bang zel in hiai thil thupi tengteng na hihta hi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian aw, nang na thupi hi. Ka bil ua ka zak bang un nang bang kuamah a-om kei a, nangmah lou ngal Pathian a-om kei hi. Aigupta gam a pan leh namte leh apathiante ua pan tankhia a, min bawlsak ding leh na gam a dia na mite ma a thil thupitak leh thil lauhuaitak hih ding na mi Israelte bang leitung ah namdang kua a-om a?

Huchi in Israel mite tangtawn a na mite ahong hihtheihna ding un nang a ding in na hihkipta hi. Toupa, nang a Pathian uh na hong hita hi. “Huchi in Toupa Pathian aw, na sikha tungtang thu leh a-inkuante tungtang thu na gen tangtawn a ding in hihkip inla, na gensa bang in hih in. Sepaihte' Toupa Israelte' Pathian ahi, chi in na min tangtawn in pahtawi in om hen. Huchi in na sikha David inkuante na ma ah hihkip in a-om ding uhi. Sepaihte' Toupa aw, Israel Pathian, na sikha kiang ah, inkuan ka hon phuhsak ding, chi in lah na puangta ngal a. Huaiziak in na sikha in hiai thumna na kiang ka hon tun ngam hi. “Tu in Toupa Pathian aw, nang huai Pathian na hi a, na thu dik hen, hiai thil hoih na sikha kiang ah na chiamta hi. Huaiziak in tu in na sikha inkuante na ma a tangtawn a a-om gige theihna ding un vualzawl in. Toupa Pathian aw, nang lah na genta ngal a. Na vualzawlna in na sikha inkuante tangtawn in vualzawl in om uhen,” achi hi.

Huan huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David in Philistia mite sual in azou hi. Huchi in David in Philistia mite khut a pan Metheg-ammah alaksak hi. Moab mite asual a, lei a lumsak in khau in ateh a; vual nih athat a, vual khat bel ahinghawi hi. Huchi in Moab mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, thilpiakte ahon tawi uhi. David in Euphrates Luipi a, gam la nawn dia hoh in Zobah kumpipa Rehob tapa Hadadezer leng athat hi. Huchi in David in asakol tungtuangmi sangkhat-le-zasagih leh lei sepaih singnih amatsak hi. Huchi in kangtalai kai ding zakhat chih louh sakol tengteng athagui uh asattansak hi. Damaskas a Siria mite Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer huh dia kuante David in Siria mite lak a mi singnih-le-sangnih athat hi. Huchi in David in Siria gam a Damaskas ah sepaih akoih hi. Siria mite David sikhate ahong hita ua, siah aliau uhi. Toupa'n ahohna peuh ah David avualzousak zel hi. David in Hadadezer pawlte dangka-eng lumte alaksak a, Jerusalem ah apaipih hi. David Vualzohnate( Kro. ) Hamath kumpipa Toi in Hadadezer sepaih tengteng David in azou chih azak in, Hadadezer asual a, azou chih azak in chibai buk ding leh vualzawl ding in Toi in David kiang ah atapa Joram asawl a; David in lah Hadadezer dou in ana that khinta hi. Huchi in Joram in dangka belte, dangka-eng belte leh dal belte ahon tawi hi. Huaite leh namdang azoh tengteng a pan alak dangka leh dangka-eng kumpipa David in Toupa kiang ah alan hi: Siriate, Moabte, Ammon suante, Philistiate, Amalekte leh Zobah kumpipa Rehob tapa Hadadezer a kipan agallakte. David in Chi Phaizang ah Siria mi singkhat-le-sanggiat ava that a, apailam in aminthangta hi. Edom ah sepaih akoih a; Edom gam teng ah sepaih akoih hi.

Huchi in Edom mi tengteng David sikha ahong hita uh. Huchi in Toupa'n David apaina peuh ah avualzousak hi. Huchi in David in Israel mi tengteng tung ah vai ahawm a; David in ami tengteng tung ah diktattak in vai ahawm hi. Zeruiah tapa Joab sepaih heutupen ahi. Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat bel tanchin gelhpa ahi. Ahitub tapa Zadok leh Abiathar tapa Ahimelek siampute ahi ua; Seraiah bel laigelhmi ahi. Jehoiada tapa Benaiah Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi ua, David tapate bel vaihawmtu liante ahi uh.

David in, “Jonathan ziak a hehpihna ka latsak theihna ding in Saul inkote lak a mi om lai a-om hia?” achi hi. Saul inkote sikha khat amin Ziba a-om hi. David kiang a hoh ding in asam uhi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Ziba na hi hia?” achi a; ama'n, “Na sikha amah ka hi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Pathian hehpihna ka latsak theihna ding in Saul inkote lak a mi om lai om lou uhia?” achi hi.Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Jonathan in tapa khat anei lai a, amah khebai ahi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Koi a om ahia?” achi hi.Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, Lo-debar ah Amiel tapa Makir inn ah a-om,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa David in mi asawl a, Lo-debar a pan Ammiel tapa Makir inn a pan mi ava pisak hi. David kiang ah Saul tapa Jonathan tapa Mephibosheth ahong hi. Amai a lei si in zahtakna apia hi. David in, “Mephibosheth,” achi a; ama'n, “En in, na sikha,” chi in adawng hi. David in akiang ah, “Lau ke'n. Na pa Jonathan ziak in hehpihna ka hon musak ngeingei ding. Na pu Saul gam tengteng ka hon pe nawn dia, ka dohkan ah an na ne gige ding,” achi hi. Huchi in akun a, “Ui sisa bang lel na hon limsak, kei na sikha bang ka hi a?” achi hi. David Leh Mephibosheth Amah a ding in lei na lehsak dia, nang leh na tapate leh na sikhate teng in na pu tapa in nek ding aneihtheihna ding in na sepkhiakte na hon la ding. Na pu tapa Mephibosheth in bel ka dohkan ah an a-um gige ding,” achi hi. Ziba in tapa sawm-le-nga leh sikha sawmnih anei hi.

Huchi in Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa ka toupa'n asikha thu apiak bang zel in na sikha in ahih ding,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Mephibosheth in ka dohkan ah kumpipa tapa bang in an a-um ding,” achi hi. Mephibosheth in tapa naupang anei a, amin Mika ahi. Ziba inn a om tengteng Mephibosheth sikhate ahi uh. Huchi in kumpipa dohkan a an a-um gige ziak in Jerusalem ah Mephibosheth atengta hi; amah akhe lang tuak bai ahi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai nung in Ammon suante kumpipa asi a, atapa Hanun in amun ah vai ahawm hi. David in, “Apa'n hon na hehpih bang in ke'n leng Nahash tapa Hanun ka hehpih sam ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in apa tungtang thu a lungmuan ding in amah mite asawl a, huchi in David mite Ammon suante gam ava tung uhi. Himahleh Ammon suante makaite'n atoupa uh Hanun kiang ah, “David in na pa azahtak ziak a na kiang a lungmuanmi hon sawl hi in na um a hia? David in na mite khuate ahong hihsiatna dia zongkhe ding leh enkhe dia hon sawl ahi kei a hia?” achi uhi. Huchi in Hanun in David mite a, akhamul langkhat uh ametsak a, apuansilhte uh alaitak ah ataw uh phazou lel in atansak a, asawlkheta hi. David ahilhtak un, amau dawn ding mi asawl hi; amau lah azum mahmah ngal ua. Kumpipa'n, “Na khamul uh asau nawn ma in Jeriko ah om tadih unla, huai nung in hong paikik un,” achi hi. Ammon suante'n David huat lam ana hihta uh, chih atheih un, Ammon suante'n Beth-rehob a Siriate leh Zobah a Siriate sepaih singnih leh kumpipa Maka mi sangkhat, Tob mite singkhat-le-sangnih toh thukhak in aguai uhi. David in huai azak in Joab leh sepaih hangsan tengteng asawl hi. Ammon suante ahong kuan ua, kholutna kongkhak lam ah panmun akhoh uh. Zobah a mite leh Rehob a Siriate leh Tob leh Maakahte bel atuam in loubuk ah a-om uhi. Huchi in amalam uh leh anunglam uah ahon sual ding uh chih Joab in atheih in, Israel mite lak a mihoih tata atelkhia a, Siria mite sual ding in panmun ana khoh hi.

David In Ammonte Leh Siriate Azou( Kro. ) Hangtak in om unla, i mite leh i Pathian khua hum in i kipasalsak ding uh. Toupa'n hoih asak bangbang in hih hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab leh akiang a mite'n Siria mite sual ding in kidouna mun anaih ua; ama uah ataikek uhi. Ammon suante'n Siria mite ataikek uh chih atheih un amau leng Abishai ma ah ataikek samta ua, khosung ah alut uhi. Joab in Ammon suante akiksan a, Jerusalem ah apaita hi. Siria mite'n Israelte ma ah thah in a-om uh chih akitheih un akikaikhawm uhi. Hadadezer in mi asawl a, Lui khen lam a Siria mite apikhia a, Hadadezer sepaih heutu Shobak in ma kai in lehlam ah ahong pai uhi. Huai David ahilh ua, ama'n Israel mi tengteng asamkhawm a, Jordan lui kan in Helam ah apai uhi. David dou ding in Siria mite'n panmun khoh in ahong dou uhi. Israelte ma ah Siria mite ataikek ua, David in Siria mi kangtalai zasagih tung a tuang leh sakol tungtuangmi singli athat a, asepaih heutu uh Shobak leng athat a, huai ah asita hi. Huchi in Hadadezer sikha a om kumpipa tengteng in Israelte ma ah tamtak thah ahi uh chih atheih un, Israelte toh kilemna abawl ua, asikha un a-omta uh. Huchi in Siria mite'n Ammon suante apanpih ngam nawn kei uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum ahong kivei a, kumpipate galdou dia akuankhiak lai un, David in Joab leh asikhate tengteng asawl a, Ammon suante ahihmang ua, Rabbah khua a-umkhum uhi. Himahleh David bel Jerusalem ah a-om nilouh hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, nitaklam ninem in alupna a pan David athoukhia a, kumpipa' inn tung ah akahtou hi. Inn tung a pan numei khat kisil lai amu hi. Huai numei bel melhoihtak ahi. David in huai numei tanchin dongtel ding in mi asawl hi. Huai mi in, “Eliam tanu, Bathsheba, Hit mi Uriah zi ahi kei maw?” achi hi. David in thupote asawl a, ava pita uh. Akiang ahong tung a, ana kithuahpihta hi. Asianlouhna a pan siansak khit ahita hi, huchi in a-inn ah paikikta hi. Huchi in numei ahong gaita a, “Nau ka paita,” chi in David atheisak hi. David in Joab kiang ah, “Hit mi Uriah ka kiang ah hon sawl in,” chi in athukhak hi. Joab in David kiang ah Uriah asawlta hi. Uriah akiang atun in David in, “Joab leh mite bang achi ua, kidouna ah bang achi ua?” chi in adong hi. David in Uriah kiang ah, “Na inn ah pai inla, na khete va sil in,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa' inn a pan Uriah apawtkhia a, kumpipa'n an nek ding thawnpiak azuisak hi. Himahleh atoupa sikha tengteng lak a kumpipa' inn kongkhak bul ah Uriah agiak a, a-inn ah apai kei hi. “A-inn ah Uriah apai kei,” chi a David ahilhtak un, David in Uriah kiang ah, “Khualzin hong tung hilou na hi maw? Bangziak a na inn a pai lou na hia?” achi hi. David Leh Bathsheba David in Uriah kiang ah, “Tuni leng hiai ah om lai inla, zingchiang in na pai na ding,” achi hi.

Huchi in Uriah huai ni leh azingchiang leng Jerusalem ah a-omta hi. David in amah asam a, ama ah ne in adawn hi. Adawn khamsak hi. Nitaklam in a-inn a pai lou in atoupa sikhate lak ah agiak hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, azingchiang in David in Joab lai akhak a, Uriah aposak hi. Huai laikhak ah, “Gal khawkna pen ah Uriah ma phusak inla, athah ua asihna ding in kikhinsan un,” chi in agelh hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Joab in khua a-um lai in, mihangsante omna hi a atheihna ah Uriah apangsak hi. Khua a mite apawtkhia ua, Joab asual ua, David sikhate khenkhat asi ua, Hit mi Uriah leng asi hi. Huchi in Joab in mi asawl a, kidou tungtang thil tengteng David ahilhsak hi. Amisawl kiang ah, Kumpipa kiang a kidou tanchin tengteng na gen khit in, ahong heh guih a, “Bangziak a dou dia huchibang a khobul chin a hoh na hi ua? Kulh a pan a hon kap ding uh chih thei lou na hi uh maw? Jerubeseth tapa Abimelek that kua ahia? Buh gawizanna suang tungnungpen numei in kulhbaang tung a pan atung ah akhesuk a, Thebez a si ahi kei maw? Bangziak a hichibang a kulh kiangchin a pai na hi ua?” achihleh, “Na sikha Hit mi Uriah leng si ei ve, na chi ding uh,” chi in thu apia hi. Huchi in amisawl akuanta a, ava tung a, Joab in asawlsan tengteng David ahilh hi. Amisawl in David kiang ah, “Mite'n ahon na zou ua, loubuk ah hon sual ua, kou akho lutna kongkhak tanpha in ka nohkik uhi. “Thalkap mite'n kulh a pan na sikhate ahon kap ua, huchi in kumpipa sikha khenkhatte asi ua, na sikha Hit mi Uriah leng asi,” achi hi.

Huchi in David in misawl kiang ah, Joab kiang ah huchi in va gen in, “Hiaite'n na lungsim kipaklousak kei hen. Namsau in kuamah akhentuam ngal kei a, naksem in khua sual unla hihsia un, chi in hanthawn in,” achi hi. Uriah zi in apasal Uriah asi chih azak in apasal asuun hi. Asuun hun abei nung in David in a-inn ah api a, azi ahong hita a, tapa khat aneihsak hi. Himahleh David thilhih in Toupa akipaksak kei hi.

Huan Toupa'n David kiang ah Nathan asawl hi. Akiang ah ava hoh a, hichi in achi, “Khua khat ah mi nih a-om ua; khat pen mihausa ahi a, khat pen mizawng ahi. Mihausa in belamhon tampi leh ganhon tampi anei hi. Mizawng in bel belamnou anu neuchik khat lei a, avulh kia lou ngal bangmah dang anei kei hi. Amah leh atate toh khangliankhawm in akuang sawkpih leh anou kikoppih, a-angsung a om, atanu bang geih a angaihtuah ahi. Mihausa kiang ah khualzinmi khat ava tung hi. Akiang a mikhual tung ama belam leh gan goh ding phal lou in mizawngpa belamnou leh ganhon a pan agohsak zawta hi,” achi hi. Huchi in huai mi tung ah David aheh mahmah a, Nathan kiang ah, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, huai thilhihmi asih ngeingei ding ahi. Hichibang thil ahih ziak leh hehpihna aneih louh ziak in abelamnou amun li a adit ding ahi,” achi hi. Nathan in David kiang ah, “Huai mipa nangmah na hi. Toupa, Israelte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte kumpipa ding in thau ka hon nilh a, Saul khut a pan ka hon hunkhia hi. Na pu in ka hon luahsak a, na pu zite na angsung ah ka koih hi. Israel leh Judah inkote ka hon pia a; huaite atawm luat uleh thil dangte leng hon piakbeh lai ding ka hi. Bangziak a Toupa thupiak ngaineu a, amitmuh a thil hoih lou na hih maizen? Hit mi Uriah namsau in na that a, azi na zi ding in na neihsak a, Ammon suante namsau in amah na that hi. Huaiziak in namsau in na insung anuse ngei nawn kei ding. Kei hon ngaineu a, Hit mi Uriah zi na zi dia na lak ziak in.

Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, nangmah inkote mah nang kalh ding thil hoih lou ka tungkhe dia, na mitmuh mahmah in na zite ka hon laksak dia, na inveng ka pe dia, ama'n hiai sun khovak in na zite akithuahpih ding. Nathan Thugen Leh David Kisikna David in Nathan kiang ah, “Toupa tung ah ka khialta,” achi hi. Nathan in David kiang ah, “Toupa'n leng na khelhna akoihmangta. Na si kei ding. Himahleh hiai na thilhih a Pathian gensiatna dia hun lemtang thupitak Toupa melmate na piak ziak in nang a pan hong piang ding naupang asi ngeingei ding,” achi hi.David Tapa Sihna Huchi in Nathan in a-inn ah apaisanta hi. Uriah zi in David asuansak naupang tung ah Toupa'n akhut kha in, achi ana mahmahta hi. Huaiziak in David in naupang a ding in Pathian kiang ah angen ngutngut a, an angawl a, alut a, zankhua in lei ah alum hi. A-inkote lak a upate athou ua, lei a pan kaithou ding in akiang ah adingh uhi. Himahleh athou nuam kei a, akiang uah leng ane sam kei. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani sagih ni in naupang asita hi. David sikhate'n naupang asita chih ahilh ngam kei uh, “Ngai in, naupang adam lai in akiang ah thu i gen ua, angaikhe nuam kei a. Naupang asita chih bangchi in i hilh ngamta ding ua? Bangchi hiam in thil hoih lou akihih kha ding,” achi uhi. Himahleh David in asikhate kisimhou amuh in naupang asita chih atheita hi. David in asikhate kiang ah, “Naupang sita hia?” achi a, amau, “Asita,” achi uh. Huchi in David lei a pan athou a, akisil a, sathau akinilh a, apuante akheng a; Toupa' inn ah ahoh a, Pathian abia hi.

A-inn ah apai nawn a, an akan a, ama ah alui ua, aneta hi. Huchi in asikhate'n akiang ah, “Na thilhih bangchidan ahia? Naupang adam lai in an na ngawl a, na kap a, himahleh naupang asihtak in na thou a, an na ne a,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Naupang adam lai in an ngawl in ka kap hi. Naupang adamna ding in Toupa'n hon hehpih khamoh kei ding chih kua ahia thei? Ka chi hi. Himahleh tu in asita ngal a, bang ding in an ka ngawl dia? Ka pikik nawn thei dia hia? Akiang ah ka pai dia, himahleh amah ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn kei ding,” achi hi.Solomon Pianna Huchi in David in azi Bathsheba alungmuan a, akiang ah alut a, akithuahpih a, tapa asuang a, amin Solomon asa hi. Toupa'n amah a-it hi. Huchi in zawlnei Nathan athukhak a, ama'n Toupa ziak in amin Jedidiah asa hi.David In Rabbah Ala( Kro. ) Huchi in Joab in Ammon suante khopi Rabbah sim in alata hi. Joab in David kiang ah mi asawl a, “Rabbah ka sim a, tuite khopi ka lata hi. Tu in mi om lai teng kaikhawm inla, khopi sual tum in zuan inla, la in. Ke'n khopi la leng ka min apu kha ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in mi tengteng akaikhawm a, Rabbah ah ahoh ua, ava sim ua, alata uhi. Akumpipa uh lallukhu khuk lai alaksak a, agikdan dangka-eng talent khat ahi a, suangmantamte leng atel hi. David akhusak ua, khopi ah gallak tampi ala uhi. Huchi in asung a om mipite apikheta a, sing-atnate, leilehna sikzumte leh sik heipite zang in nna asemsak hi. Lei haltakte abawlsak a; Ammon suante khopi tengteng ah huchibang in ahih hi. Huchi in David leh mi tengteng Jerusalem ah apaikik nawnta uhi.

Huai nung in hichi ahong hi a, David tapa Absalom in sanggam numei melhoih khat anei a, amin Tamar ahi. David tapa Amnon in amah a-it hi. Huchi in asanggamnu Tamar ziak in Amnon abuai mahmah a; achi ana hi. Amah lah nungak siangthou ahih ziak in atung a thil banghiam hih haksapi ahi chi in Amnon in angaihtuah hi. Himahleh Amnon in lawm anei a, amin Jonadab ahi. Amah David unaupa Shimea tapa ahi. Jonadab migitlouhpil mahmah mi khat ahi. Ama'n Amnon kiang ah, “Aw, nang kumpipa tapa bangchidan ahia, aniteng a na gawn hulhul mawk? Hon hilh lou ding maw?” achi hi. Amnon in akiang ah, “Ka unaupa Absalom sanggamnu Tamar ka it a ahi,” achi hi. Jonadab in akiang ah, “Na lupna ah lumlum inla, kichinasak in. Na pa'n ahong veh chiang in akiang ah, Hehpih in ka sanggamnu Tamar ka kiang ah hong hoh henla, tanghou nek ding hong pia hen. Ka muh theih in ka mitmuh mahmah in nek ding hon bawlsakleh, akhut ngei ah ka na ne ding, na chi in,” achi hi. Huchi in Amnon alum a, akichinasakta hi. Kumpipa'n amah ava et in Amnon in akiang ah, “Hehpih in ka sanggamnu Tamar hong pai henla, ka mitmuh mahmah in tanghou pek nih hiam hon bawlsak henla, amah khut mahmah ah ka ne ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David in Tamar kiang ah, “Na sanggampa Amnon inn ah hoh inla, nek ding va bawlsak dih ve,” chi ding in a-inn ah mi asawl hi. Huchi in Tamar, asanggampa Amnon inn ah ahoh hi. Amah ana lum hi. Tangbuang ala a, amek a, amitmuh a tanghou pek bawl in akang hi. Akanna bel ala a, ama ah abungkhia hi. Himahleh ama'n ane nuam kei hi.

Huan Amnon in, “Mi tengteng in hon pawtkhiaksan uhen,” achi hi. Huchi in apawtkhiaksan vek uhi. Huan Amnon in Tamar kiang ah, “Na khut mahmah a ka nektheihna ding in nek ding dantan ah hon la in,” achi hi. Tamar in atanghou pek bawl ala a, asanggampa Amnon kiang ah dantan ah alalut hi. Nesak dia akiangnai a ava paipih in ana len a, akiang ah, “Ka sanggamnu, ka kiang ah hong lum in,” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Hilou e, ka sanggampa, hon chi teitei ke'n. Israelte lak ah hichibang thilhih ding ahi kei. Hiai thil gilou haihuaitak hih ke'n. Ammon Leh Tamar Himahleh athu azui kei a, amah sang in ahatzaw ngal a, thagum in akithuahpih teiteita hi. Huchi in Amnon in huat chihtak in ahota a, a-itna sang in ahuatna alianzaw hi. Huchi in Amnon in akiang ah, “Thou inla, paimang in,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Huchi ding ahi kei. Hichibang a dikloutak a na hon delhkhiak ka tung a na gamtatsa sang in ahoih kei zaw hi,” achi hi. Himahleh azui nuam tuan kei hi. Huchi in anasem sikha asam a, “Hiai numei ka kiang a pan pawtsak inla, kong khak bikbek in,” achi hi. Minu'n puanaktual ze tuamtuam a gial asilh hi. Huchibang puanaktual kumpipa nungak siangthoute'n asilh uh ahi. Huchi in asikha in apikhia a, kong akhak bikbekta hi. Tamar in alu ah meivu akoih a, apuanaktual silh ze tuamtuam abotkek a, asip ah akhut akoih a, ngaihtak a kap kawm in apaita hi. Asanggampa Absalom in akiang ah, “Na sanggampa Amnon na kiang a om ahi maw? Himahleh tu in dai mai in, ka sanggamnu, na sanggampa aka, limsak dah in,” achi hi. Huchi in Tamar asanggampa Absalom inn ah nguitak in akikhumta hi.

Himahleh kumpipa David in huai tengteng azak in aheh mahmah hi. Absalom in Amnon kiang ah asia-apha hitaleh bangmah agen nuam kei hi. Asanggamnu Tamar achih teitei ziak in Absalom in Amnon aho mahmah hi.Absalom Phulakna Kum nih vengveng abei nung in hichi ahong hi a, Ephraim kiang a Baal-hazor ah Absalom in belam mul ametsak hi. Hiai ah kumpipa tapa tengteng achial hi. Kumpipa kiang ah Absalom ahoh a, “Ngai in, na sikha in belam mul ametsak a, kumpipa leh asikhate na sikha kiang ah hoh le uh akei dia,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n Absalom kiang ah, “Hilou e, ka tapa, ka vek un hoh lou e, ka hon hihtuailuai lo kha ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in ama'n chial teitei mahleh a-ut tuan kei a, himahleh avualzawl hi. Huchi in Absalom in, “Ahihkeileh ka unaupa Amnon bek ka kiang uah hong hohleh ake,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang ding in ahong hoh tuamse dia?” achi hi. Himahleh Absalom in angen teitei a, huchi in Amnon leh kumpipa tapa tengteng azuisak hi. Absalom in, asikhate kiang ah, “Ngai un, Amnon uain dawn a nuam asak lai in na kiang ua Amnon that un, ka hon chihleh, that unla, lau kei un, thu ka hon pe khin hilou hia? Hangsantak in om unla, kipasalsak un,” chi in thu apia hi. Huchi in Absalom sikhate'n Amnon tung ah Absalom thupiak bang in ahih uhi. Huchi in kumpipa tapa tengteng athou ua, asabiltung uah atuang chiat ua, ataimangta uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, lampi a a-om lai un, Absalom in kumpipa tapate tengteng athat vek a, khat lel leng ahawi kei, chi in David kiang ah thu ana tung hi. Huchi in kumpipa athou a apuansilhte botkek in lei ah alumta hi.

Asikha tengteng in leng apuansilhte uh botkek in akiang ah adingh uhi. David unau Shimea tapa Jonadab in adawng a, “Ka toupa'n kumpipa tapa tangval tengteng athat vek uh chih gingta kei hen. Amnon kia ahi asi. Asanggamnu Tamar achih teitei nungsiah Absalom in hichibang a hih atup him ahi. Huaiziak in tu in ka toupa, kumpipa'n kumpipa tapa tengteng asi uh chih gingta in lunghimoh kei hen. Amnon kia ahi asi,” achi hi. Huai sung in Absalom ataimangta hi. Galvil tangval adak a, a-en a, ngai in, anunglam a tang pang a lampi ah mi tampi ahong pai uhi. Jonadab in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, kumpipa tapate ahong pai uh, na sikha in agen bang geih ana hi na,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, agen khittak in ngai in, kumpipa tapate ahong tung ua, a-aw uh suah in akap uhi. Kumpipa leng asikhate toh kah petmah in akapta uhi. Himahleh Absalom ataimang a, Geshur kumpipa Ammihud tapa Talmai kiang ah ahoh hi. David in niteng in atapa asuun hi. Absalom ataimang a, Geshur gam atung a, huai ah kum thum ava om hi. Absalom kiang ah kumpipa David hoh a-ut mahmah a, Amnon tungtang thu ah alung amuangta hi. Amah lah asi khinta chih athei ngal a.

Huchi in Zeruiah tapa Joab in kumpipa lungsim Absalom tung ah a-om chih ana thei hi. Huchi in Joab in Tekoa ah mi asawl a, huai a numei pil khat ava pisak hi. Akiang ah, “Lusuun bang in kibawl inla, lusuun puan silh inla, sathau leng kinilh lou in numei sawtpi misi suun bang in om in. Kumpipa kiang ah hoh inla, akiang ah hichibang in thu va gen in aw,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab in akam ah thute amuam hi. Tekoa a numei in kumpipa kiang a thu gen ding in amai a lei si in abokkhup a, zahtakna pia in, “Kumpipa aw, hon huh in,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Meithai petmah ka hi a, ka pasal asita hi. Na sikhanu'n tapa nih anei a, anih un lou ah akisual ua, kuamah phelh ding lah a-om kei a, akhat pen in adang asat a, athatta hi. Ngai in, a-inkuan tengteng in na sikhanu adoukhawm ua, a-unaupa thatpa, a-unaupa athah ziak a ka thah sam theihna ding un hon pekhia in, huchi in gouluah dingpa leng ka that pah ngal ding uh, achi uh. Huchibang in ka mei-am omsun amitsak ding ua, ka pasal min nei lou leh leitung a suan himhim nei lou in a-om mai ding,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n numei kiang ah, “Na inn ah pai inla, na tungtang thu ah thu ka pe mai ding,” achi hi. Tekoa a numei in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, huai gitlouhna moh ka tung leh ka pa inkote tung ah ke mai hen. Kumpipa leh alaltutphah in moh po kei hen,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Kuapeuh na tung a banghiam gen peuhmah ka kiang ah hon pi inla, ahon khoih nawn het kei ding uh,” achi hi.

Ama'n, “Sisan suah mite tung a phula mite'n hihmang nawn lou ding in kumpipa'n Toupa na Pathian theigige hen aw, huchi lou in zaw ka tapa ahihmang kha ding uh,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi, na tapa samzang khat lel leng lei ah ake kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in numei in, “Na sikhanu in toupa ka kumpipa kiang ah thu kam khat kia ka hon gen nawn peuhmah ding aw,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Gen ve,” achi hi. Numei in, “Ahihleh bangziak in ahia Pathian mite dou a hichibang a hih tum na hia? Hiai thu a pan kumpipa moh in akilang ahi, kumpipa'n adelhmangpa apikik nawn louh ziak in. Joab In Absalom Hong Kikdan Ding Agel Huchi in toupa ka kumpipa kiang a hiai thu gen dia ka hong leng mite'n ahon lauhsak ziak uh ahi. Na sikhanu'n, kumpipa kiang ah ka gen phot dia, kumpipa'n asikhanu nget ahihsak khakleh, ka chi a ahi. Kumpipa'n kei leh ka tapa Pathian gouluah lou dia hihman tum mi lak a na sikhanu hunkhe ding in ana ngaikhe ding, ka chi hi. Huchi in na sikhanu a ding in, toupa ka kumpipa thu lungmuanhuaitak hi henla; asia-apha na khen ding in toupa ka kumpipa lah Pathian angel bang mai ahi ngal a. Toupa Pathian na kiang ah om hen, ka chi ahi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, numei kiang ah, “K'on dot peuhmah bangmah hon iim ke'n aw,” achi hi. Numei in, “Toupa ka kumpipa'n genleh ake,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Hiai thu himhim ah Joab in panna anei hia?” achi hi. Numei in adawng a, “Toupa ka kumpipa, na kha ahin bang in ka gen ahi, toupa ka kumpipa'n agensa kuamah in taklam hiam, veilam ah hiam apel thei kei ding uh.

Na sikha Joab in hon sawl a, hiai thu tengteng na sikhanu ahon muam vek hi. Thil omdan hihlamdang ding in hiai thil na sikha Joab in ahih ahi. Ka toupa bel leitung a thil om tengteng theithei Pathian angel bang a pil ahi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n Joab kiang ah, “Ngai in, ka hih samta hi. Huaiziak in pai inla, tangval Absalom va pi nawn lechin maw,” achi hi. Joab in amai a lei si in abokkhup a, kumpipa kiang ah kipahthu agen hi. Joab in, “Toupa ka kumpipa aw, toupa'n asikha ngetna alohchinsak ziak in tuni in na sikha in na mitmuh in deihsakna atang chih ka na theita hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab athou a, Geshur ah ahoh a, Jerusalem ah Absalom ahon pita hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ama inn ah pai henla, ka mel hong mu kei hen,” achi hi. Huchi in ama inn ah Absalom apai a, kumpipa mel amuta kei hi.Kumpipa Toh Absalom Kilem Nawn Israel tengteng lak ah Absalom bang a melhoih a phat loh kuamah a-om kei uh. Akhenuai a pan alusip pha in gensiatna himhim a-om kei hi. Asam amet chiang in, kum kivei teng in ametsak a, asam lah agik ziak in amet zel hi, abuk zel a, kumpipa bukna shekel zanih apha hi. Absalom in tapa thum leh tanu khat anei a, amin Tamar ahi a, melhoihtak ahi. Absalom kum nih hilhial Jerusalem ah a-om a; himahleh kumpipa mel himhim amu kei hi. Absalom in kumpipa kiang a amah sawl ding in Joab athukhak hi. Himahleh ahoh nuam kei a, athukhak nawn in leng ahoh nuam tuan kei hi. Huchi in asikhate kiang ah, “I aw, Joab lou, kei lou kiang ahi a, barli buh anei a, va hal un,” achi hi. Huchi in Absalom sikhate'n lou ava hal uhi.

Huchi in Joab athou a, Absalom kiang ah a-inn ah ahoh a, “Bangziak a na sikhate'n ka lou hal ahi ua?” achi hi. Absalom in Joab adawng a, “Ngai dih, bang ding a Geshur a pan hong pai ka hia? Huai ah omden leng kei a dia hoihzaw mah ding hiven. Kumpipa kiang a sawl dia hon thukhak ka hi. Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa mel hon musak in. Tatlekna nei ka hihleh hon that maileh ake,” achi hi. Kumpipa kiang ah Joab ahoh a, ahilh hi. Ama'n Absalom asam a, kumpipa kiang ah ahoh a, kumpipa ma ah amai a lei si in abokkhup a; huchi in kumpipa'n Absalom atawp hi.

Huai khit in hichi ahong hi a, Absalom in kangtalai leh sakolte leh mi sawmnga ama a tai ding in abawlkhol hi. Absalom zingkhang in athou a, kulh kongkhak lampi nawl ah ana dingh hi. Thubuai khensak dia kumpipa kiang a hong pai peuhmah ana sam a, “Nang koi khopi a kipan na hia?” ana chi zel hi. Amau, “Na sikha Israel namte lak a khat ka hi,” achi zel uh. Absalom in, “I aw, na thu ahoih in adik hi. Himahleh angaikhe ding mi kumpipa'n kuamah asep kei,” ana chi zel hi. Absalom mah in, “Michih thubuai gen ding nei hiam, nget ding nei hiam peuhmah ka kiang a ahong paina ding un, gam vaihawmpa in bawl in om leng chi na tel ing e aw! Huchi in diktak in vai ka na hawmsak ding,” ana chi zel hi. Hichi leng ahi lai a, kuapeuh amah zahtakna pe dia hong paitou peuhmah akhut a sawk in alen a, ana tawp hi. Israel mi kumpipa kiang a thugen dia hong kuan peuhmahte Absalom in huchibang in ana hih zel hi. Huchi in Absalom in Israel mite lungtang aguksak hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, kum li ahong bei in Absalom in kumpipa kiang ah, Hebron a Toupa kiang a ka thuchiam tangtun ding in hon hohsak in. “Na sikha in Siria gam a Geshur a ka om lai in Jerusalem a ahon pikik peuhmahleh Toupa nna ka sem ding, chi in thu ka chiam khinta ngal a,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Khamuangtak in kuan in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, Hebron ah ahohta hi. Himahleh Absalom in, “Pengkul ging na zak peuhmah chiang un, Hebron ah Absalom kumpipa ahita, na chi ding uh,” chi in Israel nam tengteng kiang ah mi asimsawl khinta hi.

Jerusalem a pan asap mi zanih in Absalom azui uhi. Amau bel lungsim siangtak pu in ahoh ua, thil omdan bangmah athei kei uh. Absalom in kithoihnate alat lai in Gilon mi Ahithophel, David thudotmi, Giloh a pan athukhak hi. Athusawmguk uh athupi mahmah a; Absalom lam ah lah mipite apung hulhul uhi.Jerusalem A Pan David Ataikhia David kiang ah, Israel mite lungtang Absalom lam ah a-awn mahmah, chih thupotu khat in ahong hilh hi. David in Jerusalem a om, asikha tengteng kiang ah, “Thou unla i taikhe ding uh. Kuamah lah Absalom a pan suakta lou ding i hi ngal ua. Pawtkhe meng un. Huchi lou in zaw ahon pha pah mai dia, i tung uah thil hoih loutak ahon tun dia, namsau in khua ahong sual kha ding,” achi hi. Absalom Hel Sawmna Kumpipa apawt a, a-inkote tengteng in azui uhi. Kumpipa'n inn ngak ding in numei sawm, ameite akoih hi. Kumpipa apawt a, mi tengteng in azui uh. Gamla kuam mun khat, inn tawpna ah akhawl tadih uhi. Asikha tengteng in apaikheng ua; Kerit mite, Pelet mite, Git mite, mi zaguk Gath a pan amah hon zuite kumpipa ma ah apai uhi. Huchi in kumpipa'n Git mi, Ittai kiang ah, “Bangchidan ahia nang na hong tel? Paikik nawn inla, kumpipa kiang ah om in. Nang zaw mikhual gamdangmi leng na hi ngal a, nangmah mun lam ah kik nawn mai in. Zan zek a hong na hi a, tuni a ka kiang ua asuk atou a hon zui sam ding in ka hon chi ding maw? Ka pai theihtheihna a pai ding ka hi, nang zaw kik nawn inla, na unaute tengteng pikik nawn in. Hehpihna leh thutak na kiang ah om hen,” achi hi.

Ittai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Toupa hinna leh kumpipa, ka toupa ahin bang in ka gen ahi. Kumpipa, ka toupa na omna peuh ah, sih leh sih, dam leh dam, na sikha a-om sam ding,” achi hi. David in Ittai kiang ah, “Pai inla, va galkai in,” achi hi. Huchi in Git mi Ittai, amite tengteng leh ataneute tengteng toh agalkai uhi. Ngaihtak in huai gammi teng akap ua, mipite apai vek uhi. Gamdai lampi zuan in apai ua, kumpipa'n leng Kidron lui akan a, mipi tengteng in leng akan uhi. Huan ngai in, Pathian thukhun bawm zawng in Zadok leh Levite tengteng akiang ah ahong pai uhi. Pathian bawm anga ua, mipi in khua apawtkhiaksan vek tan in Abiathar ahohtou hi. Kumpipa'n Zadok kiang ah, “Pathian bawm pen khopi sung ah zawnglut nawn un. Toupa mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh ahon pikik nawn dia, Pathian bawm leh a-omna ahon musak nawn ding. Himahleh, nang ah kipahna mahmah ka nei kei achihleh, ngai in, hichi mai ka hi a, hoih asak bangbang in ka tung ah hih mai hen,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n siampu Zadok kiang ah, “Mutheipa na hi kei a hia? Na tapate nih, na tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar tapa Jonathan toh lungmuangtak in khopi ah pai nawn un. Ngai in, kei zaw tanchin ahong theihsak masiah uh gamdai a lui kannate ah ka na om ding,” achi hi. Zadok leh Abiathar in Jerusalem ah Pathian bawm apaipih nawn ua; huai ah a-omta uh. Olive tang paitouhna ah David akahtou a, apaitouh kawm in akap kawmkawm hi. Alu akhuh a, khevuak in apai hi. Akiang a mi om tengteng in alu uh akhuh chiat ua, kap kawmkawm in apaitou uhi. Kuahiam khat in Ahithophel, Absalom lam a pang in thusawm mite lak ah apang sam, chih David ahilh hi.

David in, “Toupa aw, Ahithophel lemtheihna haina suaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi,” achi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pathian biakna tang vum a David akahkhiak touhleh, ngai in, Arki mi Hushai apuanak bohkek silh a, alu a lei kai niaunuau in amah dawn ding in ahong pai hi. David in akiang ah, “Ka kiang a na hong samleh zaw, kei a ding in puakgik na hi ding. Himahleh khopi a na kik nawn a, Absalom kiang a, toupa aw, na sikha in ka om ding. Tuma lam a na pa sikha a ka om bang in, tu in na sikha in ka om leuleu ding, na va chihleh Ahithophel lemtheihna hon dalsakpa na hi zaw ding hi. Huai ah na kiang ah siampu Zadok leh Abiathar leng a-om sam uh ahi kei maw? Huan hichi ahi ding a, kumpipa' inn a thupawt na zak peuhmah siampu Zadok leh Abiathar na hilh zel ding. Ngai in, atapate uh nih Zadok tapa Ahimaaz leh Abiathar tapa Jonathan leng akiang uah a-om uhi. Na thil zak peuhmahte hon theisak ding in amau na hon sawl zel ding,” achi hi. Huchi in David lawm, Hushai khopi ah alut a; huchi in Jerusalem ah Absalom alutta hi.

Huan David in tang vum kahkhiakna akhen zek nung in, ngai in, Mephibosheth sikha Ziba in sabiltung nih toh ana dawn hi. Sabiltung nihte'n tanghou beu zanih, grep phoukeu bawk zakhat, nipithei zakhat leh uain thawl khat apua uhi. Kumpipa'n Ziba kiang ah, “Hiaite bangchidan ahia?” achi hi. Ziba in, “Sabiltungte kumpipa inkuanpihte tuanna ding ahi. Tanghou leh nipitheite tangvalte nek ding; uain bel gamdai a bah peuhmahte dawn ding ahi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ahihleh na pu tapa koi ah?” achi hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiang ah, “Ngai in, Jerusalem ah a-om. ‘Tuni in Israel inkote'n ka pa lalgam ahon pekik nawn ding uh, chi a angaihtuah ziak in, ” achi hi. Kumpipa'n Ziba kiang ah, “Ngai in, Mephibosheth thil neih tengteng nang a ahi vekta,” achi hi. Ziba in, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, na mitmuh a deihsakna mu ding in kingainiamtak in ka hon ngen,” achi hi.David Leh Shimei Kumpipa David, Bahurim atun in, ngai in, Saul inkote lak a mi Gera tapa, amin Shimei ahong pawtkhia a; hamsia lou kawmkawm in ahong paitou hi. Suang in David adeng a, kumpipa David sikha tengteng leng; mi tengteng leh sepaih hat tengteng ataklam leh veilam ah a-om uhi. Shimei in hamsiat in hichi in achi, “Paimang vengveng in, paimang vengveng in, nang sisan suah hat leh Belial mipa: Asik a vai na hawm Saul inkote tengteng sisan Toupa'n na tung ah ahon kiksak nawnta. Toupa'n gam na tapa Absalom ana pe khinta. Ngai in, sisan suah hatmi na hih ziak in nangmah siatna na kitun ve,” achi hi. Huchi in Zeruiah tapa Abishai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangziak a hiai ui sisa in toupa, ka pu hamsiat mawkmawk ahia? Ka kuantou ding a alu ka tansak mai ding?” achi hi.

Kumpipa'n, “Nou Zeruiah tapate aw, nou na hon theihsak ding uh bang a-om a? Toupa'n akiang a, David hamsiat in, achihleh ahamsiat ahi mai kei dia. Bangziak a huchibang a hih kua'n achi dia?” achi hi. David in Abishai leh asikhate tengteng kiang ah, “Ngai un, ka tapa, ka gil a gah mahmah in hon thah atum. Hiai Benjamin mi'n nak tup sem na'n chia! Bangmah loh kei unla, hamsia ahihleh loh hen. Toupa hihsak ahi. Toupa'n ka haksatna ahon mu dia, Toupa'n tuni a hon hamsiat ahoih lam in hon thuk nawn kha maithei hi,” achi hi. Huchi in David leh amite lampi ah apai zel uh. Shimei bel agal tang pang ah apai zel a, apai kawm in ahamsiat zom zel a, suang in adeng a, leivui in atheh hi. Huchi in kumpipa leh akiang a mi om tengteng Aiphim atungta uh. Huchi in huai ah akhawl tawldam uhi.Jerusalem Ah Absalom Absalom leh Israel mi tengteng Jerusalem ah ahoh ua, alak uah Ahithophel leng atel hi. David Leh Ziba Absalom in Hushai kiang ah, “Hichibang ahi maw na lawm na hehpihna dan? Bangziak a na lawm kiang a hoh lou?” achi hi. Hushai in Absalom kiang ah, “Ka hoh kei ding. Toupa leh hiai mite leh Israel mi tengteng atelpa uh thuthu in ka om dia, akiang ah ka om zaw ding. Kua nna ka sem dia? Atapa ma ah nna ka sem ding ahi kei maw? Na pa ma a ka sep bang in nangmah ma ah ka sem ding,” achi hi. Absalom in Ahithophel kiang ah, “Bangchi in i hih diam aw, na ngaihdan gen dih ve,” achi hi. Ahithophel in Absalom kiang ah, “Na pa mei, inn ngak a akoihte kithuahpih in. Israel mi tengteng in na pa'n nang hon mudah chih ana za ding ua; nang lam a pang tengteng khut ahat ding,” achi hi. Absalom a ding in inn tung ah puanin akai uh. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng mitmuh in apa meite akithuahpih hi. Huai lai in Ahithophel lemtheihnate, Pathian thu dongpa lemtheihna bang ahi a; huchi mah bang in David leh Absalom in leng Ahithophel ana ngai uhi.

Huai lou leng Ahithophel in Absalom kiang ah, “Mi singkhat-le-sangnih ka telkhe dia, tuzan in David delh ding in ka kuan ding. Abah lai leh hat louh laitak ka va phanon dia, ka va lausak ding. Huchi in akiang a mi tengteng ataimang ding uh. Huchi in kumpipa kia ka va that mai ding. Na kiang ah mipite ka hon pikik nawn vek ding. Na mizonpa mi tengteng hong kik toh kibang ahi. Huchi in mi tengteng khamuang in a-om ding uh,” achi hi. Huan hiai thugen in Absalom leh Israel upate akipaksak hi. Huchi in Absalom in, “Arki mi Hushai sam peuhmah phot inla, amah gendan i ngaikhe peuhmah ding uh,” achi hi. Absalom kiang a Hushai ahong tun in Absalom in, “Ahithophel in hichibang in agen a, agen bang a hih ding i ding uam? Hih lou ding hi leng nang hon gen himhim dih,” chi in ana houpih hi. Hushai in Absalom kiang ah, “Tutung a Ahithophel lemtheihna ahoih kei,” achi hi. Hushai in, “Na pa leh amite na thei a, sepaih hangsantak, gam a vompi anou laksak bang mai ahi uh. Na pa lah galdoumi ahi a, mipi lak ah agiak khol kei ding. Ngai in, tu in leng koi lai leihawm hiam ah, koi lai mun ah hiam a kibu ahi ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, akisual tung ua mi khenkhat apuk ualeh aza peuh in, Absalom zuite athat ek uh, achi mai ding uh. Huchi in mihangsantak, humpinelkai lungsim bang pumi hial leng ahong lungke mahmah ding uh. Israel mi tengteng in lah na pa sepaih hangsantak ahihdan leh akiang a mi omte mihangsan taktak ahihdan uh athei vek ngal ua.

Kei hoihsak sam dan, Israel mi tengteng Dan a pan Beer-sheba pha in tuipi a piaunel zah hial ding na kiang ah samkhawm vek lehang; kidouna ah nang nangawn kuan lechin. Huchi in koi lai mun peuh ah i kituahna na ah lei a daitui kia bang mai in i boh ding ua; amah leh akiang a mi om tengteng khat lel leng i hawi kei ding uh. Huai lou leng, khua a alutleh Israel mi tengteng, khauhual tawi in huai ah i va hoh ding ua, suang neuchik leng om lou hial khop in lui ah i kaikhe vek ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Absalom leh Israel mi tengteng in, “Ahithophel thuhilhna sang in Arka mi Hushai thuhilhna ahoihzaw,” achi uhi. Toupa'n Absalom tung a thil hoih lou atunsak theihna ding in Ahithophel thuhilhna hoihtak nuaisiah ding in ana sep khin him hi.David Hilhkholh In A-om A, Asuakta Huchi in Hushai in siampu Zadok leh Abiathar kiang ah, “Huchibang khachibang in Ahithophel in Absalom leh Israel upate hoih ding in angaihtuahpih a; ke'n huchibang khachibang in hoih ding in ka ngaihtuah hi. Huaiziak in tuzan in gamdai lui kainate a giak nawn lou in kan ngeingei un. Huchi lou in zaw kumpipa leh akiang a om tengteng ahihmang vek kha ding uh chi in David hilhsak zok un,” achi hi. Hushai In Absalom Apikhial Himahleh naupang in ana mu a, Absalom ahilh hi. Himahleh anih un ataimang pah ua, Bahurim a mi khat, a-intual a tuileh nei inn ah ava hoh ua, tuileh sung ah alutsukta uhi. Numei in tuileh asitna in asin a, atung ah buh aphou a, kuama'n athei kei hi.

Absalom sikhate numei kiang ah ava hoh ua, “Ahimaaz leh Jonathan koi a om ahi ua?” achi uhi.Numei in akiang uah, “Luita tui akanta ding uh,” ana chi hi. Ava zong ua, amu kei ua, Jerusalem ah akik nawn uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, apaitum khit un tuileh a pan ahong pawtkhia ua, kumpipa David ava hilh uhi. David kiang ah, “Pawtkhia unla, tui kan pah un, huchi in Ahithophel in ahon tum hi,” achi uh. Huchi in David leh akiang a mi om tengteng apawtkhia ua, Jordan lui akan uh. Khua ahong vak in Jordan lui kan lou khat lel leng a-om kei uh. Ahithophel in ahoihsakdan azui kei uh, chih atheih in asabiltung avan a, apawtkhia a, akhua ah apai hi. A-inkuante khosakna ding abawlsak sipsip a, huchi in a-awklumta hi. Amah asita a, apa han ah avui uhi. Huchi in David, Mahanaim ava tung hi. Absalom in akiang a Israel mi tengteng toh Jordan lui akan uhi. Absalom in Joab sik in Amasa sepaih heutu ding in akoih hi. Amasa bel mi khat amin Ithra tapa ahi. Ithra ahihleh Israel mi, Joab nu sanggam Nahash tanu Abigail zi a neipa ahi. Israel mite leh Absalom in Gilead gam ah panmun akhoh uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Mahanaim a David atun in, Ammon suan Rabbah a mi Nahash tapa Shobi, Lo-debar a mi Amiel tapa Makir leh Rogelim a Gilead mi Barzillaite'n lupnate, maiphiat kuangte, leibelte, huit buh, barli buh, tangbuang, be kankeu, khuaizu, mokhon, belamte, ganhon a pan nawikhalte, David leh akiang a om mite nek ding ahon tawi uhi, “Gamdai ah mite agilkial ua, atawl ua, adangtak uh,” achih ziak un.

Huan David in akiang a om mite asim a, sepaih sangkhat tung a heutute, zakhat tung a heutute abawl hi. David in mite asawlkhia a, mun thum a khen mun khat Joab in aheu a, mun thum a khen mun khat Joab unaupa Zeruiah tapa, Abishai in aheu a, mun thum a khen mun khat Git mi Ittai in aheu hi. Kumpipa'n mite kiang ah, “Keimah leng nou toh ka kuan ngeingei ding,” achi hi. Himahleh mipite'n, “Kuan lou e. Koute zaw na taimang hita le ung leng, khawk asa kei ding uh. Akimkhat hiam va si le ung leng khawk asa kei lai ding uh. Nang koute singkhat sang in na manphazaw hi. Huaiziak in khopi a pan hon panpih dia na na om ahoihzaw hi,” achi uh. Kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Hoih na sak bangbang un ka hih ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa kulh kongpi bul ah adingh a, mipi tengteng azaza in leh asangsang in apaikhe zungzung uhi. Kumpipa'n Joab, Abishai leh Ittai kiang ah, kei ziak in tangval Absalom tung ah nemtak in hih un aw, chi in thu apia hi. Mipi tengteng in Absalom tungtang thu a kumpipa'n sepaih heutute tengteng thu apiak lai aza uhi. Huchi in mipite Israel mite dou ding in kidouna mun ah ahohta ua; akidouna uh Ephraim gammang ahi. Huai ah David mite ma ah Israel mite avuallel ua, huai ni in sepaih singnih athat uhi. Akidouna un huai gam tengteng a-uap vek ngal a. Huai ni in namsau sang in leng gammang sung a mang a si atamzaw hi. Absalom in David mite abingtuah guih hi. Absalom asabiltung tung a tuang ahi a, tosaw singhiang bawkphatak nuai ah sabiltung alut a, tosaw sing ah alu a-awkta hi. Lei leh van kikal ah aluai nilouh hi. Sabiltung ataisuak hi.

Kuahiam in mu in, Joab ahilh a, “Ngai in, tosaw sing ah Absalom kikhai nilouh ka mu,” achi hi. Joab in ahilhpa kiang ah, “Ngai in, huai lah na mu ngal a, bangziak a hihlum a lei a kesak pah ngal lou? Huchibang a hih hi lechin dangka sawm leh kawnggak hon pe pah ding hi veng in,” achi hi. Huai mi'n Joab kiang ah, “Dangka sang mu ding hi leng le kumpipa tapa tung ah ka khut ka kha kei himhim ding, i bil ua i zak mahmah in kumpipa'n nang leh Abishai leh Ittai kiang ah, tangval Absalom kuamah in khoih het kei un, chi in thu ahon pe ngal a. Ginom huai loutak in na that mawk leng, kumpipa lak ah lah bangmah sel theih ahi ngal kei a, nang lah na kihulsak nawn maimah tuak ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab in, “Hichibang in na kiang ah ka om nilouh thei het kei,” achi hi. Teipi thum atawi a, tosaw sing lak a na hing lai Absalom lungtang adawt pailet hi. Joab galvan tawi tangval sawm in ahong um ua, Absalom asun ua, athatta uhi. Joab in pengkul amut a, Israelte delh mipite ahong kik nawn ua; Joab in mite ana nang bikbek hi. Absalom luang ala ua, gammang ah leihawm thukpi ah apai ua, atung ah suang asekhawm venvon uhi. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng amau puanin chiat ah ataikekta uhi. Absalom Zoh Leh Thah In A-om Huchi in Zadok tapa Ahimaaz in, “Ka va tai dia, Toupa'n amelma phu alaksakdan tanchin kumpipa ka va hilh ding,” achi hi. Joab in akiang ah, “Tuni in zaw tanchin va hilh nai ke'n.

Nidang chiang in tanchin va hilh zaw in, kumpipa tapa asih ziak in, tuni in zaw tanchin bangmah va hilh dah in,” achi hi. Joab in Kush mi kiang ah, “Kuan inla, na thil muh kumpipa va hilh dih ve,” achi hi. Huchi in Kush mi akun a, ataikhe pah hi. Zadok tapa Ahimaaz in Joab kiang ah, “Akoi abang hitaleh, Kush mipa ka va delh ding,” achi hi. Joab in, “Ka tapa aw, tanchin hilh man lah na mu kei dia, bangziak a tai ding na hia?” achi hi. Himahleh ama'n, “Akoi abang hitaleh ka tai ding,” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Tai mai ve leh,” achi hi. Huchi in Phaizang lampi ah Ahimaaz atai a, Kush mipa amakhelh hi. Kulh kongpi chial kikal ah David ana tu hi. Galvilpa kulh kongpi ponungzaw pen tunglam ah apaitou a, adak vialvial hi. Ngai in, mi khat amah kia in ahong tai hi. Galvilpa akikou a, kumpipa ahilh hi. Kumpipa'n, “Mi khat kia ahihleh tanchin hong gen ding nei ahi ding,” achi a; ahong tai mengmeng a, ahong naih hiaihiai hi. Galvilpa'n midang hong tai amu nawn hi. Galvilpa'n kongkhak vilpa asam a, “Ngai in, midang amah kia in ahong tai nawn,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ama'n leng tanchin hong tun sam ding nei ahi ve,” achi hi. Galvilpa'n, “Amasapen taidan Zadok tapa Ahimaaz taidan bang mahmah in ka thei,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa'n, “Amah mihoih mahmah ahi, tanchinhoih hon tun ding ahi,” achi hi. Ahimaaz in asam a, kumpipa kiang ah, “Bangkim ahoih e,” achi hi. Amai a lei si in kumpipa ma a kun in, “Toupa, ka toupa sual a khut khak tum mite daltanpa Toupa na Pathian phat in om hen,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Tangval Absalom adam na maw?” achi hi.

Ahimaaz in adawng a, “Joab in kumpipa sikha, kei na sikha mahmah ahon sawlkhiak lai in abuai nuainuai uh ka mu a, himahleh bang ahia chih ka thei kei,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n, “Ka pam ah hong dingh tadih in,” achi hi. Huchi in apam ah ana dingh hi. Ngai in, Kush mi ahong tung hi. Kush mi'n, “Toupa ka kumpipa a ding in tanchin ka hon tun hi. Na tung a helte tengteng phu tuni in Toupa'n ahon laksak hi,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n Kush mi kiang ah, “Tangval Absalom adam na maw?” achi hi. Kush mi in adawng a, “Toupa, ka kumpipa melmate leh na siatna zong mite tengteng huai tangval bang in om vek uheh,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa alungdong mahmah a, kulh kongpi tung a dantan ah ahohtou a ava kap hi. Apaitouh kawm in, “Aw, ka tapa Absalom, ka tapa Absalom, na sih sik in si zaw mai leng maw, Aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa,” achi hi.

Huan Joab ahilh ua, “Ngai in, kumpipa'n kap in Absalom asuun hi,” achi uh. Huai ni a avualzohna uh mi tengteng a ding in suunna ahong hi zawta hi. “Atapa ziak in kumpipa alungkham mahmah,” achih uh huai ni in mite'n lah ana zata ngal ua. Mite kidouna a mi taimang azum ziak a aguk a paimang bang in huai ni in aguk in khopi ah alut uhi. Kumpipa'n amai ahum a, “Aw, ka tapa Absalom, aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa!” chi in kumpipa akap huphup hi. Inn ah kumpipa kiang ah Joab alut a, “Na hinna, na tapate hinna, na tanute hinna, na zite leh na meite hinna humbit mite tuni in zumtak in na bawlta hi. Nang hon hote na it a, nang hon itte na hua hi. Heutute leh sepaihte nang a dia bangmah hilou bang in tuni in na hihlangta hi. Absalom dam in, kou midang tengteng tuni in si zaw vek le ung, na kipah lamtak hileh kilawm in ka thei hi. Huaiziak in thou inla, pawtkhia in. Na mite lungmuansak ding lam thu gen in. Na pawtkhiak keileh Toupa min lou in ka kichiam hi. Mi khat lel leng tuzan in na kiang ah a-om kei ding. Huai lah nang a ding in na tuailai a pan tutan a na tung a thil hoih lou hong tung teng sang in ahoih kei zaw ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa athou a, kulh kongpi ah ava tu hi. “Ngai un, kumpipa kulh kongpi ah atu hi,” chi in mipi tengteng ahilh uhi. Mipi tengteng kumpipa ma ah ava hoh uhi.

Israelte bel amau puanin chiat ah ataikek uhi.Jerusalem Ah David Akik nawn Israel nam a mi tengteng akisel vengvung ua, “Kumpipa'n i melmate khut a pan hon hunkhia a, Philistiate khut a pan hon hondamta. Tu in Absalom ziak in gam ataikhiaksan hi. Absalom i kumpipa dia thau i nilhpa uh lah kidouna ah asita a; bang achia kumpipa pikikna ding kam khat bek na gen louh uh?” akichi uh. Kumpipa'n siampu Zadok leh Abiathar kiang ah asawl a, Judah upate kiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa a-inn a pikik thu a, azekaipen a pang na hi ua? Israel mite'n kumpipa pikik thu agen uh lah kumpipa kiang atungta ngal a. Ka unaute na hi ua, ka guh leh ka sa lah na hi ngal ua, bang achia azekaipen a pang peuhmah na hi ua? chi in va gen un,” achi hi. Amasa kiang ah, “Ka guh leh ka sa na hi kei a hia? Joab sik a ka ma a sepaihte heutu a ka hon bawl keileh, Pathian in alohloh hon loh mai henla, huai sang a thupizaw in leng, achi,” chi ding in mi asawl hi. Huchi in Judah mi tengteng lungtang mi khat lungtang bang mai in a-awnsakta hi. Huchi in kumpipa kiang ah, “Na mi tengteng toh hong kik nawn un,” chi ding in mi asawl uhi. Huchi in kumpipa apai nawn a, Jordan ahong tung hi. Kumpipa dawn a, Jordan a na pi galkai ding in Gilgal ah Judahte ahoh uhi. Hahurim a Benjamin mi Gera tapa Shimei leng kintak in kumpipa dawn ding in Judahte mah toh kiton in apawtkhia hi. Akiang ah Benjamin mi sangkhat toh, Saul inkote sikha Ziba, atapa sawm-le-nga leh asikha sawmnih toh ahi ua, kumpipa ma in Jordan agalkah uhi.

Kumpipa inkote pi galkahna ding leh hoih asak bangbang a hih ding in long apaipih uh. Jordan lui agalkahleh kumpipa ma ah Gera tapa Shimei abokkhup hi.David In Shimei Tung ah Itna Alangsak Joab In David Amohsa Na sikha in thil ka hihkhial chih ka kithei hi. Huaiziak in ngai in, Joseph inko tengteng lak a ka toupa kumpipa mu dia tuni a hong pawt masapen ka hi,” achi hi. Himahleh Zeruiah tapa Abishai in adawng a, “Toupa thaunilhpa ahamsiat ziak in Shimei pen thah ding ahi kei dia hia?” achi hi. David in, “Nou Zeruiah tapate aw, nou na hon na theihsak ding uh bang ahia om? Tuni a kei hon doute na hi ding uh maw? Tuni a Israelte lak a mi thah ahi dia hia? Tuni in Israel mite tung a kumpipa ka hihthei lou ka hi maw?” achi hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa'n Shimei kiang ah, “Na si kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Kumpipa akiang ah akichiamta hi.David In Mephibosheth Itna A-ensak Kumpipa mu ding in Saul tapa Mephibosheth ahong hi. Kumpipa apawtkhiak ni a pan galmuang a ahong pai nawn ni tan in akhete azun kei a, akhamul atan kei a, apuan leng asawp sam kei. Huan hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa mu dia Jerusalem ahong tun in kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Mephibosheth, bangziak a ka kiang a hong sam lou?” achi hi. Ama'n adawng a, “Ka toupa, kumpipa aw, ka sikha in ahon khem a; na sikha in, kumpipa kiang a hoh ding in ka tuanna ding sabiltung ka van ding, ka chi a; na sikha lah akhe abai ngal a. Kumpipa ka toupa kiang ah na sikha ahek hi. Himahleh toupa ka kumpipa Pathian angel ahi. Huaiziak in hoih na sak bangbang in hih in.

Ka pa inkote tengteng toupa ka kumpipa ma a thah vek dia kilawm ahi uh. Himahleh na sikha na an umpihte lak ah na pangsak hi. Huaiziak in kumpipa kiang ah thil dang phut ngam lai dia kilawm ka hi maw?” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Na tungtang thu bangziak a gen nawn nak na hia? Nang leh Ziba gam kihawm un ka chi hi,” achi hi. Mephibosheth in kumpipa kiang ah, “Eh, ama'n tang vek hen, toupa ka kumpipa lah ama inn mah ah galmuang in ahong pai nawnta ngal a,” achi hi.David In Barzillai Tung Ah Itna Alangsak Rogelim a pan Gilead mi Barzillai ahong suk a; kumpipa Jordan a pi galkai ding in amah toh Jordan ah ahoh hi. Barzillai upapi ahi a, kum sawmgiat a upa ahita. Mahanaim a kumpipa om sung in nek ding apia a, amah mineizoutak ahi. Kumpipa'n Barzillai kiang ah, “Ka kiang ah hong inla, ka kiang ah Jerusalem ah ka hon vak ding,” achi hi. Barzillai in kumpipa kiang ah, “Jerusalem a kumpipa toh hohtou ding in bang tan ka dam lai dia? Tu in kum sawmgiat ka hita a; asia leh apha ka khen thei a hia? Na sikha in ka nek-le-dawn, a lim leh lim louh leng a theikak thei a hia? Pasal leh numeite lasak ging leng ka za thei nawn a hia? Huaiziak in na sikha bang ding a toupa ka kumpipa a dia puakgik ka hih maizen ding? Na sikha in kumpipa toh Jordan galkah lel ka tup ahi. Bang ding in kumpipa'n huchibang in hoih man ahon thuk chitchiat dia? Hehpih in na sikha hon paisak nawn mai in, ka hon ngen ahi. Ka nu leh ka pa han omna koumau kho ngei ah ka si ding. Himahleh en in, na sikha Chimham

toupa ka kumpipa toh hong galkah henla, atung ah hoih na sak bangbang in hih in,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Chimham ka kiang ah agalkah sam dia, hoih na sak bang zel in atung ah ka hih ding. Thil na hon nget peuhmah ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in mi tengteng Jordan gal akah ua, kumpipa leng agalkah hi. Kumpipa'n Barzillai atawp a, avualzawl hi. Huchi in amah amun ah apai nawnta hi.Judah Leh Israel Kumpipa Tungtang Ah Akisel Uh Huchi in Gilgal ah kumpipa agalkah a, amah toh Chimham agalkah sam hi. Juda mi tengteng in kumpipa api galkah ua, Israel mi leng akimkhat apang uhi. Ngai in, Israel mi tengteng kumpipa kiang ah ahong ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Bang achia ka unau uh Judah mite'n nang hon gukhia a, kumpipa leh a-inkote leh David mite teng Jordan gal a apikhawm vek mawk uh?” achi uhi. Judah mi tengteng in Israel mite adawng ua, “Kumpipa ka kinaihpih uh ahih ziak ahi. Bangziak a hiai thu a heh mawk? Kumpipa neih muang a om ka hi mahmah uh maw? Thilpiak banghiamte leng ahon nei a hia?” achi uh. Israel mite'n Judah mite adawng ua, “Kumpipa ah tan sawm ka nei ua, David ah noute sang in anglaitanna ka nei zaw uh. Bangziak a hon ngaineu maw? Kumpipa pikik nawn sawm masate ka hi kei uh maw?” achi uh.Huchi in Judah mite thu Israel mite thu sang in akhauhzaw hi.

Huan Benjamin mi Bikri tapa Sheba, Belial mi khat ana om hi. Ama'n pengkul amut a, “David ah tantuan i nei kei ua, Jesse tapa ah leng gouluah ding i nei sam kei, Israel mite aw, na puanin lam chiat uah pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in Israel mi tengteng in David azuih uh alehngatsan ua, Bikri tapa Sheba azuita uhi. Judah mite'n Jordan a pan Jerusalem pha in akumpipa uh alen tinten uhi. Jerusalem a a-inn ah David ahong pai hi. Kumpipa'n numei sawm ameite inn ngak dia akoihte api a, inn khat ah akhum a, anek ding uh pia in avak a, himahleh amaute akithuahpih kei hi. Kumpipa'n Amasa kiang ah, “Ni thum sung in Judah mite hon sapkhawmsak inla, nang leng hong om sam in,” achi hi. Huchi in Amasa leng Judah mite samkhawm ding in akuan hi. Himahleh ahun sehsak sang in ava tam sawt zawta hi. David in Abishai kiang ah, “Bikri tapa Sheba in Absalom sang in i poi uh akhoihzaw dia hia? Na toupa mite pi inla delh un. Huchi lou in zaw khokulh nei ah alut man dia, muh phak louh in i khahsuah kha ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Joab mite, Kereth mite, Pelet mite leh amihat tengteng un amah azuikheta uh. Jerusalem a pan Bikri tapa Sheba delh ding in apawtkhia uhi. Gibeon a suangpi omna ava tun un, Amasa in amaute ana dawn hi. Joab in kidouna van asilh a, atung ah namsau apai toh kawnggak ah akuah hi. Mailam a apai kawm in huai namsau aphawi hi. Joab in Amasa kiang ah, Unaupa, “Na hoih tadih na maw?” achi hi. Huai khit in Joab in Amasa tawp ding in akhut taklam in akhamul hi. Himahleh Amasa in Joab in atawi namsau alimsak kei hi.

Joab in agil ah adawt a, agilzangte lei ah atolhkhe zelzul a, adawt tuan nawn kei hi. Huchi in asita hi. Joab leh a-unaupa Abishai in Bikri tapa Sheba adelh uhi. Akiang ah Joab mite lak a tangval khat adingh a, “Joab lam a pang leh David lam a pang peuhmah in Joab zui hen,” achi hi. Amasa bel lamlian laitak ah si a kidiah in ana lum hi. Huai mi'n mi tengteng dingh dide amuh in lamlian a pan Amasa luang gamlak ah asuan a, akiang a hong pai peuhmah khawl zel a amuh ziak in puan in atuam hi. Lamlian a pan suankhiak ahih nung in Bikri tapa Sheba delh ding in mi tengteng in Joab azui uhi. Abel leh Beth-maaka pha in Israel nam tengteng leh Ber mi tengteng atawn vek a; amau akikaikhawm ua amah azuita uhi. Beth-maaka a Abel ah amah a-um ua; kho zulzul ah lei achiang ua, kulh zul ah adingh uhi. Joab kiang a mi om tengteng in chimsak ding in kulh akhoh ok-ok uhi. Huchi in khua a pan numei pil khat ahong kikou a, “Ngai un, ngai un; Joab kiang ah, hong pai nai in, na kiang ah thu ka gen ding, va chi un,” achi hi. Akiang ava naihtak in numei in, “Joab na hi hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi e,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in akiang ah, “Na sikhanu thugen ngaikhe dih,” achi a, ama'n, “Ka ngaikhia hi,” chi in adawng hi. Huai numei in, “Nidanglai in Abel ah akikum ngeingei ding uh,” achi zel uh. Huchibang in thu atawpsak zel uhi. Kei Israel lak a kituah ut leh muanhuai mite lak a khat ka hi. Nang zaw Israel khua, akho bulpi pen hihsiat tum na hi lim ve. Bangziak a Toupa gou nawmvalh tum na hia?

achi hi. Sheba Helna Huchibang thu ahi kei. Ephraim tanggam a mi Bikri tapa amin Sheba in kumpipa kalh in, David hilhial kalh in akhut alik hi. Amah hon pekhe le uchin khua ka pawtsan mai ding,” achi hi. Numei in Joab kiang ah, “Ngai in, kulh a pan alutang lotkhiak ahi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in numei in apilna in mi tengteng kiang ah ava pai a, Bikri tapa Sheba lutang atan ua, Joab kiang ah alawnkhia uhi. Huchi in pengkul amut a, amau puanin chiat zuan in khua a pan apaita uhi. Jerusalem ah kumpipa kiang ah Joab apaikikta hi.David Miliante Israel sepaih tengteng heutu Joab ahi a; Jehoiada tapa Benaiah ahihleh Kereth mi leh Pelet mite heutu ahi. Adoram phutluih nasem dia goih a omte heutu ahi a, Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat tanchin gelhmi ahi. Sheva, laigelhmi ahi a; Zadok leh Abiathar ahihleh siampute ahi uh. Jair mi Ira leng David vaihawmtu lian ahi.

Huan David dam lai in kum kizom in kum thum kial akia hi. David in Toupa adong a, Toupa'n, “Saul leh sisan suahmi a-inkote ziak ahi. Amau Gibeon mite athat ngal ua,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n Gibeon mite asam a, akiang uah, Gibeon mite Israel suante ahi kei ua, Amor mi khosuaksunte ahi zaw uh. Israel suante amau kiang ah ana kichiam khin ua; Saul in Israel suante leh Judah suante a dia phatuam angaih ziak in thah atum nak hi. David in Gibeon mite kiang ah, “Bang ahia ka hon hihsak ding? Toupa gou na vualzawl theihna ding un bangchibang in hihdik thak nawnna ka bawl dia?” achi hi. Gibeon mite'n akiang ah, “Saul leh a-inkote dangka leh dangka-eng ka la kei ding uh. Kou ziak in Israel ah mi kuamah na that kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Na gen peuhmah uh ka hon hihsak ding,” achi hi. Amau kumpipa kiang ah, “Hon hihmangpa leh Israel gamsung himhim a om lou dia hihmang hon sawmpa, tapa sagihte hon pia inla, Toupa miseh Saul omna Gibeah ah Toupa ma ah ka khailum ding uh,” achi uh. Kumpipa'n, “Hon pe leng ake,” achi hi. Himahleh kumpipa'n, David leh Saul tapa Jonathan kikal a, anih ua kal a Toupa kichiamna ziak in Saul tapa Jonathan tapa Mephibosheth ahawi hi. Kumpipa'n Aiah tanu Rizpah in Saul tapa nih aneihsak Armoni leh Mephibosheth api a, Meholath mi Barzillai tapa Adriel, Saul tanu Mikal in tapa nga aneihsakte toh Gibeon mite khut ah apekhia a, mual a Toupa ma ah akhailum uhi. Huchi in asagih un asikhawm uhi. Buh lak hun, barli buhlak pat lai in athatta uhi. Aiah tanu Rizpah in sai-ip puan ala a, amah a ding in suangpi tung ah aphah hi.

Buh lak kipat tung a pan huai siluangte tung a van vuahtui in abuah tan in, sun chia siluangte tung a vasate atuk ding uh leh zan chia gamsate khoih ding aphal kei hi. Aiah tanu, Saul meinu Rizpah thilhih David ahilh uhi. Huchi in David akuan a, Philistia mite'n Gilboa a Saul athah ni ua Philistia mite'n Beth-shan mun lian a akhai uh aguhte uh, Jabesh-gilead mite'n ava guklak uh, Saul guh leh atapa Jonathan guhte ala hi. Huai a pan Saul guhte leh atapa Jonathan guhte alatou a; akhailupte uh guhte leng alakhawm hi. Saul guhte leh atapa Jonathan guhte Benjamin gam a Jelaha apa Kish han ah avui uh. Kumpipa thupiak dungzui in ahih uhi. Huai khit in huai gam tung ah Pathian alungkimta hi.Philistia Miliante Douna( Kro. ) Philistia mite'n Israel mite adou nawn uhi. David, amite toh ava kuansuk ua; Philistia mite ava sual ua, David abah mahmah hi. Ishbi-benob, milian tapate lak a khat, ateipi gikdan dal shekel zathum, namsau thak kuah in David thah atum hi. Himahleh Zeruiah tapa Abishai in ahong hunkhia a, Philistia mi sual in athatta hi. David mite'n, “Israelte khawnvak na mihsaklouhna ding in kidou ding in ka kiang uah nang zaw na kuan nawn kei ding,” chi in akiang ah akichiam uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Gob ah Philistiate toh kidouna dang khat a-om nawn hi. Huai hun in Hushat mi Sibbekai in milian suante lak a khat Saph kichi athat hi. Philistia mite toh Gob ah akidou nawn uh. Bethlehem mi Jaar oregim tapa Elhanan in Git mi Goliath unaupa athat a, huai mi teipi tuh siam kolpi bang ahi. Gath ah kidouna a-om nawn hi.
