Huai ah mi khat asan a sang, akhut langkhat tuaktuak a khutzung guk, akhe langkhat tuaktuak a khezung guk, avek a sawmnih-le-li nei a-om hi. Amah leng milian suan ahi. Saul Suante Thah In A-om Uh Huai lite Gath a milian suante ahi ua, huchi in David leh amite khut in asita uhi.

Huan amelma tengteng khut a pan leh Saul khut a pan Toupa'n ahutkhiak ni in David in hiai la thu Toupa kiang ah agen hi. Ama'n, “Toupa tuhka suangpi leh ka kulhpi leh hon humbitpa ahi. Ka suangpi Pathian,amah ka muang ding a;ka phaw leh ka hotdamna kii,ka insang leh ka bukna ahi.Ka hondampa,hiamgamna a pan na hon hondam hi. Phat tak Toupa ka sam ding a;huchi in hon doute lak a pan hotdam in ka om ding hi. “Sihna tuikihot in hon umkimvel a,Pathian limsak loumite tui lian in ahon lausak hi. Sheol khauhualte'n hon gaksuak a;sihna thangte'n hon awksak uh. Ka lungzin in Toupa ka sam a, ahi,ka Pathian ka sam hi:Atempul a pan ka aw aza a,ka kikou husa abil ah alut hi. “Huaitak in lei aling a, akisat hi.Aheh ziak in van kingaknatenangawn kisat in alingta uhi. Anak a pan meikhu azamtou a,akam a kipan katmang hat meikuang apawt a,huai in meihol akuangsak hi. Ama'n vante akunsak a,ahong suk ua; akhenuai ah mialna a-om hi. “Cherub tung ah atuang a,alengta hi, huih khate tung ah amah muh in a-om hi. Khomial in aki-umkimvel a,tui vomte, van meipi sah miuhmeuhte abawl hi. Ama a vakna tawn inmeiholte akuang hi. “Toupa van a pan ahong ging a,Tungnungpen in a-aw asuaksak hi. Thaltangte akapkhia a,amau adalhzaksak a;khua aphesak a, abuaizaksak hi. Toupa salhna,anakvangte a hu in tuipi lampite ahong kilang a,lei kingaknate hihlat in a-omta hi. “Ama'n tunglam a pan honsawksuk a, ahon len a;tuipi a pan hon kaikheta hi. Kei hon dou hattak a panhon humbit a,kei hon hote a pan leng;kei a ding in lah ahat lo ngal ua. Ka tuahsiat ni in ahon sual ua,himahleh Toupa ka kingakna ahi. Ama'n mun awngthawltak ah hon pikhia a;ka tung a akipah ziak in hon humbitta hi.

“Toupa'n ka diktatna dungzui in ka tung ah ahih a;ka khutte sianthoudan dungzui in hon thuk hi. David Vualzohna La(Sam ) Avaihawmna tengteng ka ma a a-om ziak in:adan thusehte ka kilehheisan ngei kei hi. Ama ah leng gensiatbei ka hi lai a, ka thulimlouhna a pan ka kihuikhia hi. Huaiziak in Toupa'nka diktatdan bang zel inhon na thukta a;amitmuh a ka sianthoudan bang zel in. “Chingtheite kiang ah chingthei in na kilang ding a,mihoihkimte kiang ah hoihkim in na kilang ding hi. Misiangthoute kiang ahsiangthou in na kilang ding a;migenhakte kiang ahgenhak in akilang ding. Haksa thuak mite na hondam ding a;mikisatheite na niamsak theihna ding in atung uah na mit atu gige hi. “Toupa aw,ka khawnvak na hi ngal a. Toupa'n ka mialna avaksak ding. Nang panpih in sepaihhon toh ka tai a,ka Pathian panpih mah in kulh ka tawmkan hi. “Pathian lampi ahoihkim a; Toupa thu etchetsa ahi;amah muangte tengteng a ding inamah lum ahi. Toupa lou kua Pathian a-om a?I Pathian lou kua suangpi a-om a? Pathian ka hatna leh thilhihtheihna ahi a,Ama'n ka lampite hoihkim in abawl hi. Ka khepekte zukpikhepek bang in abawl a;ka mun sangte ah hon omsak zel hi. Ka khutte galdou ding in asinsak a;huchi in ka bante'n dal thalpeu atansak hi. “Nang na hotdamna lum na hon pia a;na nunnemna in na hon bawl lianta hi. Ka nuai a ka kalsuante na liansak a,huchi in ka khete atolh kei uhi. Hon doute ka delhpha a,ka hihmang a;hihmanthat sipsip a a-ommasiah uh ka nungkik kei hi. Athohnawn theihlouhna ding un ka hihmang sipsip a,ka satzan ngiingei a; ahi,ka khenuai ah apukta uh. Nang galdou ding in hatna in na hon gak a;hon sual mite ka nuai ah na nuaisiahta hi.

Hon hote ka hihmanthat theihna ding in,kei hon doute ngawng na hon pia hi. Amaute adak kimvel ua,himahleh hondam ding kuamah a-om kei uh. Toupa a-en ua,himahleh adawng kei. Huaitak in ke'n lei a leivui bang inka khennel dimdem a,kholak buannawi bang mai in ka tuanzak a, ka thehzak vekta hi. “Nang ka mite kisualna a pan leng na hon humbit a;namte lutang hi ding in na hon kemhoih hi.Ka theih ngei louh nam in ka nna asemta ding. Ka kiang ah namdangte ahong kipe ding ua;ka tanchin azaktak un ka thu azui ding uh. Namdangte atulmang ding ua,a-insang ua kipan ling kawm in ahong paisuk ding uh. “Toupa ahing hi.Ka suangpi phat in om henla; ka hotdamna suangpiPathian tawisang in om hen: Phu hon laksakpa leh ka nuai a mite koihpa Pathian; Hon doute a pan hon domtoupa:Kei hon doute tunglam ah na hon domkang a,hiamgammi lak a pan na hon humbit hi. “Huaiziak in aw Toupa,namte lak ahkipahthu ka hon hilh ding a,na min phat in la ka sa ding hi. Akumpipa a dia amah hotdamna insang ahi a,athaunilh, David leh asuante tung ah tangtawn inhehpihna alangsak,” achi hi.

Hiaite David thu nanungpen ahi. Jesse tapa David, sangtak a dopsang a ompa, Jakob' Pathian thaunilhpa, Israelte la phuaktu in achi hi. Toupa Kha in kei hon zang in agen a,athu ka lei ah a-om hi. Israelte' Pathian in agen a,Israelte' Suangpi'n ka kiang ah agen hi.Mi tung a vaihawmmi adik ngeingei diaPathian lau kawm a vai ahawm ding ahi. Amah ni ahong suah a,meipi om het lou zingsang vak bang ahi dia,vuahzuk khit a khua hong siang a lei a loupa selnou mitmet bang ahi ding ahi. Pathian a ding in ka inkuan hiai bang hi kei mahleh,kei toh tangtawn thukhun abawl a,bangkim kizentak in ahihkip hi.Ama'n khangsak kei mahleh hiai ka hotdamna leh ka deihlam tengteng ahi. Himahleh Belial tate bel avek un ling paihkhiak bang ahi ding uh,khut a lak theih louh ahih ziak un. Himahleh amau khoih ding misik leh teipi a, akivat ding ahi.Huchi in amun mah ah hal ahi ding uh.David Sepaih Minthangte( Kro. ) Hiaite David sepaih hangsante min ahi. Tekmon mi Joseph Bashebeth sepaih heutute lak a heutupa ahi a; amah khatvei thu a mi zagiat thatpa Eznit mi Adino achih mah uh ahi. Ama zom in Ahoh tapa Dodo tapa Eleazar ahi. Amah Philistia mite kidou dia akikaihkhop ua, achou ua, Israel mite a paimang vek lai ua David kiang a sepaih hangsan thumte lak a khat ahi. Amah athou a, Philistia mite akhut a kham matan namsau leng khah lou khop in athat hi. Huai ni in Toupa'n nakpitak in azouta a, mite ama nung ah gallak thil la ding lel in ahong kik nawn uhi. Amah nung in Harar mi Agee tapa Shammah ahi. Behiang tampi omna lou a Philistia mite akikaihkhop lai un, Israel mite ataikek uhi.

Himahleh amah huai mun ah adingh a, aveng a, Philistia mite athat a, Toupa'n nakpitak in azohsak hi. Sepaih hangsan sawmthum lak a thumte ahohsuk ua, buhlak laitak in David kiang ah Adullam kohawm ah ahoh ua; Philistia sepaihte'n Rephaim Phaizang ah panmun akhoh uh. Huchih lai in David insung ah a-om a, huchih lai mah in Bethlehem ah Philistia sepaihte a-om uhi. David in tui alunggulh mahmah a, “Bethlehem a tuileh tui, kulh kongkhak kiang a dawn ding hong pia om le uh aw!” achi hi. Huchi in sepaih hangsan thumte'n Philistia sepaihte apaltan ua, kulh kongkhak kiang a Bethlehem tuileh ava tawi ua, David kiang ah apaipih uh. Himahleh ama'n ana dawn ngam kei a, Toupa a ding in abungkhe zawta hi. “Aw Toupa, hiai ka hih louh ding dan; sih ngap a kuante sisan ka dawn dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in adawn nuam kei hi. Huai thilte sepaih hangsan thumte'n ahih uh ahi. Zeruiah tapa Joab unau Abishai thumte lak a aheutupen uh ahi. Teipi in mi zathum sual in athat a, thumte lak ah minhoih aloh hi. Thumte lak ah pahtawi tuak pen ahi kei maw? Huaiziak in aheutu ding un abawl uhi. Himahleh tungnungpen thumte lak atung zou kei hi. Kabzeel mihangsan tapa Jehoiada tapa Benaiah thil thupitak hihpa in Moab mi Ariel tapate nih athat a; huchi in ahohsuk a, vuk kiak hun lai in leikohawm ah humpinelkai leng ava that hi. Aigupta mi, miliantak athat a; huai Aigupta mi in teipi atawi hi. Himahleh ama'n chiangkhun tawi in ava zuan a, Aigupta mi teipi tawi ava sut a, ama teipi in asunlumta hi. Jehoiada tapa Benaiah in huchibang thil ahih ziak in sepaih hangsan thumte lak ah minhoih aloh hi.

David Thu Nanungte Sawmthumte lak a khat Joab unau Asahel ahi: Bethlehem a mi Dodo tapa Elhanan; Harod mi Shammah, Harod mi Elika; Pal mi Helez, Tekoa mi Ikkesh tapa Ira; Anethot mi Abiezer, Hushath mi Mebunnai; Ahoh mi Zalmon, Netophah mi Maharai Netophah mi Baanah tapa Heleb, Benjamin suan, Gebeah a mi Ribai tapa Ittai; Pirathon mi Benaiah, Gaash luite a mi Hidai; Arbath mi Abi-albon, Barhum mi Azmaveth; Shaalbon mi Eliaba, Jashen tapate lak a Jonathan; Harar mi Shammah, Arar mi Sharar tapa Ahiam; Mankat mi Ahasbai tapa Eliphelet, Gilon mi Ahithophel tapa Eliam; Karmel mi, Hezrai, Arba mi Paarai; Zobah mi Nathan tapa Igal, Gad mi Bani; Ammon mi Jelek, Beeroth mi Nahari, Zeruiah tapa Joab galvan tawi; Ith mi Ira, Ith mi Gareb; Hit mi Uriah ahi uh. Avek un sawmthum-le-sagih ahi uh.

Huan Toupa hehna Israelte tung ah ahong tung nawn hi. Amaute kalh a David tokthou in, “Kuan inla, Israel mite leh Judah mite sim vek in,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n akiang a om sepaih heutu Joab kiang ah, “Israel nam tengteng lak ah Dan a pan Beer-sheba pha in vialvak inla, mi bangzah ahi ua ka theihtheihna ding in sim vek in,” achi hi. Joab in kumpipa kiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian in mite pungsak in bangzah a tam, amun za leng, toupa ka pu in muta ve, himahleh toupa ka kumpipa'n bangziak a huai thei ut se ahia?” achi hi. Himahleh kumpipa thu in Joab leh sepaih heutute thu azouta hi. Huchi in Joab leh sepaih heutute Israel mite sim ding in kumpipa kiang a pan apaikheta uhi. Jordan gal ava kah ua, Gad Phaizang laitak taklam a khopi om Aroer ah Jazer pha in om mun akhoh uhi. Gilead gam leh Tahtim-hodshi gam atung ua; Dan-jaan leh Zidon kimvel atung uhi. Tura kulh leh Hiv mite kho tengteng leh Kanaan mite kho tengteng ava tung ua; Beer-sheba a, Judah simlam ah apaikhia uhi. Huchi in gam tengteng atotsuah khit uh, kha kua leh ni sawmnih abei in Jerusalem ahong tungkik uhi. Joab in mihing phazah kumpipa apia a; Israel gam ah namsau tawi mihangsan nuaigiat a-om uhi. Judah mi bel nuainga a-om hi. Mihing asim khit un David lungtang anuam het kei. David in Toupa kiang ah, “Ka thilhih ah nakpitak in ka na khialta hi. Himahleh tu in aw Toupa, na sikha thulimlouhna koihmang ding in ka hon ngen hi. Haihuai mahmah in ka na hihta,” achi hi. Zingsang a David athohleh David zawlnei Gad kiang ah Toupa thu ana tung hi.

“Kuan inla, David kiang ah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Thil thum ka hon tah a, na tung a ka hih ding in khat tel in, achi, ” chi in. Huchi in David kiang ah Gad ahoh a, ahilh a, akiang ah, “Na gam a na tung a kum sagih sung kial akiak hia? Na melmate'n hon delh ua kha thum sung amau a pan na taimang hia? Na gam a ni thum sung hipi ahong len? Hon sawlpa bangchi in ka dawng dia? Kingaihtuah inla, hon hilh in,” achi hi. David in Gad kiang ah, “Ka lung azing mahmah mai hi. Toupa khut sung ah hon puklutsak in; azahngaihna lah athupi mahmah ngal a. Mihing khut sung ah zaw hon puklutsak ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa'n Israel mite tung ah zingsang a pan hun seh tan hipi alengsak hi. Huchi in Dan a pan Beer-sheba tan mi singsagih asi uh. Angel in hihse dia Jerusalem lam a, akhut alikleh Toupa'n thil hoih lou hih atup alunghei thak a, mite hihmangpa angel kiang ah, “Ahunta; na khut lik nawn ke'n,” achi hi. Toupa angel bel Jebus mi Araunah phual chin ah a-om hi. David in mi that angel amuh in Toupa ahoupih a, “Ngai in, ka na khialta, dikloutak in thil ka na hihta hi. Himahleh hiai belamte'n bang ahih ua? Na khut in kei leh ka pa inkote hon khoih zaw hen,” achi hi.Araunah Phual A David Maitam Huai ni in David kiang ah Gad ahoh a, akiang ah, “Kuantou inla, Jebus mi Araunah phual ah Toupa a ding in maitam va doh in,” achi hi. Huchi in David, Toupa thupiak bang a Gad in ahilh bang in akuantouta hi. Araunah in amalam a-etleh, amah lam zuan a kumpipa leh asikhate hong pai amu hi.

Huchi in Araunah apawt a, amai a lei si in kumpipa ma ah abokkhup hi. Araunah in, “Bang achia ahia toupa ka kumpipa, asikha kiang a ahong?” achi hi. David in, “Mipite lak a hipi akhawltheihna dia Toupa a dia maitam doh ding a na phual lei ding in ahi ka hong pai,” achi hi. Araunah in David kiang ah, “Toupa ka kumpipa'n hoih asak bang in la henla, lan hen: En in, halmang a lat ding in bawngtalte a-om ua, sing ding in phual vanzatte leh bawng vante a-om uhi. Aw toupa, hiai tengteng Araunah in kumpipa ape vek hi,” achi hi. Araunah in kumpipa kiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian in hon dawng hen,” achi hi. David In Kisimpina Abawl( Kro. ) David in huai ah Toupa a ding in maitam adoh a, halmang thillatte leh lemna thillatte alan hi. Huchi in Toupa agam tung ah alungkimta a, Israel gam a pan hipi akhawlta hi.

Kura In Judahte Kik Nawn Ding Thu Apia Hichibang in Persia kumpipa Kura in achi,“Toupa, van Pathian in,Lei gam tengteng kei ahon peta hi;Judah a om Jerusalem a amah inn lamsak ding in kei thu ahon pia hi. Amite tengteng na lak ua om peuhmah, akiang ahPathian om henla, Judah a omJerusalem ah hohtou henla, Toupa Israel' Pathian,amah Pathian ahi,Jerusalem a om inn lam hen. Kuapeuh akhualtamna koi mun peuh a nutsiat a omna mun a mite'n,amah dangka leh dangka-eng,vante leh gantate in panpih uhenla, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn a ding aut thu a thillat chih louh,” chi in. Huchi in Judah leh Benjamin intekpate inkuan a lupente, siampute leh Levite, Pathian in Jerusalem a om Toupa' inn lam dia hohtou dia akha uh atohthohte tengteng, athouta uhi. Huan akimvel ua omte tengteng in akhut uh dangka tui-um belsuan dangka-engte, vante, gantate leh thil manphate in ahihhat ua, uttak a piakte tengteng sim louh in. Kumpipa Kura in leng Toupa' inn a tui-um belsuan Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a kipan alakkhiak, pathiante inn a akoihte alakhe vek hi; Huaite Persia kumpipa Kura in sumkempa Mithredath khut in alakhe vek a, Judah vaihawm, Sesbazzar pia in asimsak hi. Huchi in hiai amuh zah uh ahi:dangka-eng kuang sawmthum,dangka kuang sangkhat,gimlim halna kuang sawmnih-le-kua; Dangka-eng noubem sawmthum,dangka noubem ahoih lou deuhte zali-le-sawmkhat leh tui-um belsuan dangte sangkhat. Dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan tengteng sangnga-le-zali ahi uh. Saltangte lak ate Babulon a kipan Jerusalem a pitouh a a-om lai un, hiai tengteng Sesbazzar in atawitou vek hi.

Hiaite pimang a om koltanna a kipan a paitou, bial a tate, Babulon lam a akumpipa Nebukadnezzar in apimang, Jerusalem leh Judah a, michih ama khua chiat a hong kik nawnte ahi uh. Saltang Kik Nawnte Min Gelhkhiakna(Neh. ) Parosh suante sangnih zakhat sawmsagih-le-nih. Shephatiah suante, zathum sawmsagih-le-nih. Arah suante, zasagih sawmsagih-le-nga. Pahath-moab suante, Jeshua leh Joab tate, sangnih zagiat leh sawm-le-nih. Elam suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. Zattu suante, zakua sawmli-le-nga. Zakkai suante, zasagih-le-sawmguk. Bani suante, zaguk sawmli-le-nih. Bebai suante, zaguk sawmnih-le-thum. Azgad suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnih-le-nih. Adonikam suante, zaguk sawmguk-le-guk. Bigvai suante, sangnih sawmnga-le-guk. Adin suante, zali sawmnga-le-li. Ater suante, Hezekiah tate, sawmkua-le-giat. Bezai suante, zathum sawmnih-le-thum. Jorah suante, zakhat leh sawm-le-nih. Hashum suante, zanih sawmnih-le-thum. Gibbar suante, sawmkua-le-nga. Bethlehem suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-thum. Netophah mite, sawmnga-le-guk. Anathoth mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat. Azmaveth suante, sawmli-le-nih. Kiriath-arim, Kephirah leh Beeroth suante, zasagih sawmli-le-thum. Ramah leh Geba tate, zaguk sawmnih-le-khat. Mikmas mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-nih. Bethel leh Ai mite, zanih sawmnih-le-thum. Nebo suante, sawmnga-le-guk. Magbish suante, zakhat sawmnga-le-guk. Elam dang suante, sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. Harim suante, zathum-le-sawmnih. Lod, Hadid leh Ono tate, zasagih sawmnih-le-nga. Jeriko suante, zathum sawmli-le-nga. Senaah suante, sangthum leh zaguk-le-sawmthum. Siampute: Jedaiah suante, Jeshua inkote, zakua sawmsagih-le-thum. Immer suante, sangkhat sawmnga-le-nih. Pashur suante, sangkhat zanih sawmli-le-sagih. Harim suante, sangkhat leh sawm-le-sagih. Levi mite: Jeshua leh Kadmiel suante, Hodaviah suante, sawmsagih-le-li. Lasa mite: Asaph suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat. Kongkhak ngak mite: Shallum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub, Hatita leh Shobai suante, avek un zakhat sawmthum-le-kua. Nethinim mite: Ziha, Hasupha lehTabbaoth suante; Keros, Siaha leh Padon suante; Lebanah, Hagabah leh Akkub suante; Hagab, Shalmai leh Hanan suante; Giddel, Gahar leh Reaiah suante; Rezin, Nekoda leh Gazzam suante; Uzza, Paseah leh Besai suante; Ashna, Meunim leh Nephusim suante; Bakbuk, Hakupha leh Harhur suante; Bazluth, Mehida leh Harsha suante; Barkos, Sisera leh Thamah suante

Neziah leh Hatipha suante, Solomon sikhate tate:Sotai, Hassopheret leh Peruda suante; Jaalah, Darkon leh Giddel suante; Shephatiah, Hattil, Zebaim mi Pokereth leh Ami suante. Nethinim mite teng, Solomon sikhate tate, zathum sawmkua-le-nih. Huchi in hiaite Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan leh Immer a kipan a paitoute ahi uh: himahleh apipute inkote, asuan uh, Israel a kipan ahi uhia chih ataklang thei kei uh: Delaiah, Tobiah leh Nekoda suante, zaguk sawmnga-le-nih. Huan siampute suante: Habaiah, Hakkoz leh Barzillai Gilead mi Barzillai tanute a kipan azi kitenpihpa suante, amau min zui a sak in a-om hi. Hiai khangthu sutna a sim mite lak a min gelhna azong ua, himahleh amu kei uh. Huaiziak in buah a sim in a-om ua siamputna a kipan dangkoih in a-om uhi. Huan Tirshatha in, siampu Urim leh Thummim toh ahong dinkhiak mateng, thil siangthoupente ne lou ding in amau ahilh hi. Omkhawm tengteng avek un singli sangnih zathum-le-sawmguk ahi. Apasal sikhate uleh anumei sikhate uh, sangsagih zathum sawmthum-le-sagihte sim louh in pasal lasami leh numei lasami sangnih anei uhi. Asakolte uh zasagih sawmthum-le-guk ahi ua; sakol neute, zanih sawmli-le-nga; Sangawngsaute, zali sawmthum-le-nga; sabiltung uh, sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnih. Huan Jerusalem a Toupa' inn ahong tun un, apipute uh inkuan lak a alupente akhen in, Toupa' inn alamna ding in ut thu a thillat alan uhi. Nasepna sumbawm ah ahihtheihdan un dangka-eng darik singguk-le-sangkhat, dangka paun sangnga leh siampute puansilh zakhat. Huchi in siampute, Levi mite, mite lak a akhenkhat leh lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite leh Nethinim mite, akhopite uah ateng ua, Israel mite akhopite uah ateng uhi.

Huchi akha sagihna ahong tun a, khopite a Israel suante a-om lai un, mite Jerusalem ah mi khat bang in akikhawmkhawm uhi. Huchi in Jozadak tapa Jeshua leh a-unaute siampute leh Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh a-unaute adingh ua, Pathian mipa Mosi Dan a akigelh bang a, atung a halmang thillatte lan ding in, Israel' Pathian maitam abawl uhi. Jerusalem A Biakna Pat Thak Nawnna Huan akigelh bang in, biakbukte ankuangluina abawl ua, ahih ding zah in niteng halmang thillatte, dan dungzui in, niteng a sep ding kiphamoh bang in alan uhi. Huai nung in halmang thillat ngeinate, kha thakte thillatte leh hihsiangthou a om Toupa ankuanglui sehkhiakte tengteng leh michih a kipan Toupa a dia uttak a ut thu a thillatte alan uhi. Akha sagihna ani khat ni a kipan in Toupa a ding in halmang thillatte alan pan ua; himahleh Toupa tempul suangphum akiphum nai kei hi.Tempul Lam Thak Nawnna Sumte suangsek mite kiang leh khutsiam mite kiang ah apia ua; Kura Persia kumpipa a kipan aphalna amuh bang ua tuipi a, Joppa tan a Lebanon tang a kipan sidar singte hon la ding in, Zidonte kiang leh Turate kiang ah, sa, dawn ding leh sathau apia uhi. Huchi in akha nihna, Jerusalem a Pathian inn ahong tun uh akum nihna in, Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak tapa Jeshua leh a-unaute siampute leh Levi mite leh koltanna a kipan a Jerusalem a hong paite akipan ua; Levi mite kum sawmnih a upa leh atunglam Toupa' inn nasepna a heutute hi ding in asep uhi. Huchi in Pathian inn a nasem mite heutu ding in, Jeshua atapate leh a-unaute, Kadmiel leh atapate, Judah tapate, Henadad tapate, atapate uh leh a-unaute uh Levi mite toh adingkhawmta uhi.

Inn lam mite'n Toupa tempul suangphum akoih lai un, Israel kumpipa David thupiak bang in, Toupa phat ding in, siampute pengkulte toh apuan uh asilhsak ua, Levi mite Asaph tapate dakkhutbette aguan uhi. Huchi in Toupa phatna leh kipahna piakna in la asakhawm chiat ua,“Amah lah ahoih ngal a,azahngaihna tangtawn inIsrael lam ah a-om gige ngal a,” chi in.Huchi in Toupa' inn suangphum akoih ziak un mite tengteng aw ngaihtak a kikou in Toupa aphat uhi. Himahleh siampute leh Levi mite leh pipute inkote lak a mi tampi, amit mahmah ua hiai inn suangphum akikoih lai a, tua inn masa mute putekte, ngaihtak in akapkhia ua; mi tampi nuamsa in ngaihtak in akikou uhi. Huchi in mite'n nuamsa a kikouna husa, mite kahna husa toh atheikak thei kei ua: mite ngaihtak in akikou ua, ahusa uh gamlapi ah akiza hi.

Huchi a Judah leh Benjamin melmate'n saltangte tate'n Toupa, Israel' Pathian a ding in tempul alam uh chih azak un; Zerubbabel leh pipute inko lupente kiang ah ahong pai nai ua, akiang uah, “Hon lampih le ung ake: noute bang in, na Pathian uh lah ka zong ngal ua; Assuria kumpipa Esarhaddon in hiai mun ahon pipa dam lai nite a kipan amah kiang ah ka kithoih uhi,” achi uhi. Himahleh Zerubbabel leh Jeshua leh Israel pipu inko lupente'n akiang uah, “Ka Pathian uh a dia inn na hon lampihna ding ziak bangmah na nei kei uh; himahleh Persia kumpipa Kura in kou thu ahon piak bang in, Israel' Pathian, Toupa a ding in koute'n ka lam ding uhi,” achi uhi. Tempul Lam Thak Ding Dalna Persia kumpipa Kura dam lai tengteng, Persia kumpipa Darias lal lai tanpha in, athiltup uh kalhse ding, amaute siatna ding in thuhilh mite aguai uhi.Jerusalem Lam Thak Ding Dalna Ahasueras vaihawm pat tung lai in, Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte hekna lai agelh uhi. Huan Artaksarses dam lai in Bishlam, Mithredath, Tabeel leh akithuahpihte'n Persia kumpipa Artaksarses kiang ah lai agelh ua; laikhak gelhdan Siria laimal a gelh a, Siria pau a bawlkhiak ahi. Sepaih heutu lian Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai in Jerusalem siatna ding in kumpipa Artaksarses kiang ah hichibang in laikhak agelh uhi. Sepaih heutu lian Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh akithuahpihte un huchi in agelhta ua; Dinai mite, Apharsatki mite, Tarpe mite, Aphar mite, Arki mite, Babulon mite, Susan mite, Deha mite, Elam mite leh, Osnappar lian leh thupi in apikhiak, Samaria khopi leh luipi khen a gamdang leh adangdang a kikoih namte tan in. Kumpipa Artaksarses kiang a alaikhak uh teisawn hiai ahi:“Luipi khen lam leh adangdang a na sikhate.

Na kiang a kipan a hong tou Judate Jerusalem ah kou kiang ah ahong uh chih kumpipa kiang ah theih in om hen: Khopi helhat leh hoih lou alam lellel ua, akulhbaangte azouta ua, asuangphumte apuah khinta uh. Kumpipa'n thei hen, hiai khopi lam a a-om a, akulhbaangte zoh in omleh zaw, leimante, siahte sumsinna leimante hiam lamlian leimante ape kei ding ua, atawptawp in kumpipa siatna ahi ding. Tu in koute kumpi inn a pan huhna ngahte ka hih ziak un, kumpipa zahlakna muh koute ding in akilawm kei a, huaiziak in kumpipa thudik ka hon khak uhi. Na pipute chiamtehna laibu sung ah kizong hen: huchi in chiamtehna laibu sung ah na mu ding a, hiai khopi helhat, kumpipate leh bialte a dia poikhoih hat chih leh nidanglai mah in leng huai sung mah a helna ana bawlta uh chih na thei mai ding; huaiziak a hiai khopi kihihsegawp lah ahi ngal a. Hiai khopi akilam a, akulhbaangte hichibang a akihih khitleh zaw, luipi khen lam ah tan na nei kei ding chih kumpipa ka hon theitelsak uhi,” chi in. Huchi in dansiam Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh Samaria leh luipi khen a gam a teng akithuahpih tengteng kiang ah kumpipa'n dawnna akhak hi:Chibai, “Laikhak ka kiang a na hon khak uh ka ma ah teltak a sim ahita. Huchi in thu ka pia a, akizong khin a, nidanglai in hiai khopi in kumpipate tung ah helna abawl a, huai ah helpina leh helna a na kibawlta chih muhkhiak in a-om hi. Huai lou in kumpipa thilhihthei taktak, luipi khen gam tengteng tung a vaihawm, Jerusalem tung a vaihawmte ana om ua; van leimante, sumsinna leimante leh lamlian leimante amau kiang a piak ahi hi.

Huchi in keimah in thupiak ka bawl masiah, huai mite khawl ding leh hiai khopi lam lou ding in, thupiak bawl un. Hiai thu a ze-ol lou ding in pilvang un: Bang ding in kumpipate siatna ding in hoihlouhna akhang dia?” chi in. Huchi a kumpipa Artaksarses laikhak teisawn Rehum leh laigelhmi Shimshai leh akithuahpihte ma a asim khit un, kintak in Jerusalem a Judate kiang ah ahoh ua, kihatsakna leh thilhihtheihna zang in amau akhawlsakta uhi. Huchi in Jerusalem a Pathian inn nasep akhawl a: Persia kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum nihna tan in akhawl hi.

Huan zawlneite, zawlnei Haggai leh Zekariah Iddo tapa in Judah leh Jerusalem a om Judate kiang ah athu agenkhol ua; akiang uah Israel' Pathian min in thu agenkhol uhi. Huchi in Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak tapa Jeshua athou ua, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn alam panta ua; amaute panpih in akiang uah Pathian zawlneite a-om uhi. Huchih lai mah in akiang uah Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa leh Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpihte uh ahong ua, akiang uah hichibang in, hiai inn lam ding leh hiai kulhbaang zou ding in kua'n thu ahon pia a? achi uhi. Huai ban ah ka kiang uah, “Hiai inn lam mite min bang ahia?” chi in ahong dong uhi. Tempul Lamna Nasep Pat Nawnna Laikhak teisawn Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa leh Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpih Abharsa mite, luipi khen a omte'n kumpipa Darias akhak uhi. Akiang ah laikhak akhak uh hichibang a gelh ahi.“Darias kumpipa kiang ah khamuanna kim om hen. Kumpipa'n thei hen, Judia bial ah ka pai ua, suang thupite a lam, Pathian thupi inn ah, kulhbaangte singte akikoih a, hiai nasep thanopna toh apai zel a, akhut uah ma asawn zel hi. Huai upate thu ka dong ua, hichibang in akiang uah, ‘Hiai inn lam ding leh hiai kulhbaang zou ding in nou kuan thu ahon pia a? ka chi uhi. Nang kiang a tel mahmah gen thei ding in, aminte uh leng ka dong ua, huchi a amau makaipen a om mite min ka gelhkhiak theihna ding un. Huchi in hichibang in kou ahon dawng uhi, ‘Van leh lei Pathian sikhate ka hi ua, hiai inn kum tampi a na kilamsa, Israel kumpipa thupi in alam leh azohsa inn ka lam uhi.

Himahleh ka pipute un van Pathian a na suk heh nung un, amaute Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, Kaldai mi khut ah apia a, ama'n hiai inn ahihsia a, mite Babulon lam ah apimang hi. Himahleh Babulon kumpipa Kura akum khatna kum in, kumpipa Kura in hiai Pathian inn lam ding in thupiak abawl hi. Dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan Pathian inn ate leng, Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a om Pathian inn a kipan a alakkhiak a, Babulon tempul a laklutte, huaite kumpipa Kura in Babulon tempul a kipan alakhia a, mi khat Sesbazzar, ukpipa dia abawl kiang ah huaite apekhia hi. Ama'n akiang ah, ‘Hiai tui-um belsuan la inla, pai in, Jerusalem a om tempul ah koih in, amun ah Pathian inn lam hi hen, achi hi. Huai lai in Sesbazzar ahong a, Jerusalem a om Pathian inn suangphumte aphum a: huai hun a kipan tutan in lam in a-om a, hinapi in lah zoh ahi kei hi. Huaiziak in tu in kumpipa'n hoih asakleh, Babulon a om, kumpipa laigelhte koihchingna insung kizong henla, Jerusalem a hiai Pathian inn lam ding kumpipa Kura in thupiak bawlna hiam abawlleh, hiai thu ah kumpipa'n akipahna kou hon khak hen,” chi in.

Huchih lai in kumpipa Darias in thupiak abawl a, Babulon a goute koihkhawmna, laibute insung azong uhi. Huchi in Akmetha ah, Media bial a om inpi ah laizial akimukhia a, huai ah chiamtehna ding in hichibang a gelh ahi. “Kumpipa Kura akum khatna kum in, Kura kumpipa'n thupiak abawl hi: Jerusalem a Pathian inn tungtang, a-inn lam hi henla, kithoihnate a latna mun uh leh huai a suangphumte kiptak a koih hi hen; asanlam tong sawmguk, azatlam tong sawmguk; Suang thupi taktak vual thum leh sing thak vual khat toh, huan sum sennate kumpipa' inn a kipan piakkhiak hi hen: Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem tempul a kipan a alakkhiak, Babulon lam a alak, Pathian inn a dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuan piak nawn vek hi henla, Jerusalem a om Pathian insung ah amau mun chiat ah koih nawn vek hi hen.”Kumpi Darias Laithon “Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa, Shethar-boznai leh na kithuahpihte uh Apharsa mite, luipi khen a omte: huai inn lamna a kipan gamla ah om un: Kura Thupiak Muhkhiak Thakna Hiai Pathian inn nasepna subuai kei un; Judate ukpipa leh Juda upate'n amun ah hiai Pathian inn lam uhen. Huai lou in hiai Pathian inn lamna ding a hiai Juda upate kiang ah na hih ding uh thu ka bawl hi: kumpipa vante a kipan, luipi khen a siah a kipan mahmah in, hiai mite kiang a sumzatnate thanopna chiteng toh apiak ding ahi, huchi a dal a a-omlouhna ding un. Huan ataksapnate uh, bawngtalnoute, belamtalte, belamnoute, van Pathian kiang a halmang thillat ding huit buh, chi, uain leh thaute, Jerusalem a om siampute thu bang zel in, tatlak lou in niteng in amau piak ding ahi: Huchi a van Pathian kiang a gimlim kithoihnate alat theih ua, kumpipa hinna leh atapate hinna a dia athumtheihna ding un.

Thupiak ka bawl lai a, kuapeuh in hiai thu a suklamdan leh a-inn a kipan inkam dohkhiak hi henla, huai ah amah dopkang touh leh henden in om hen; hiai ziak in a-inn ekvum a bawl hi hen. Huai mah hihlamdang ding, Jerusalem a om hiai Pathian inn hihse ding a akhut uh kuansak ding kumpipate tengteng leh mite tengteng Pathian huai lai a teng ding a amin omsakpa'n paithal vek hen. Kei, Darias in, thupiak ka bawlta; thanopna tengteng toh sepkhiak in om hen,” chi in.Tempul Latna Huchi in Tattenai, luipi khen a ukpipa, Shethar-boznai leh akithuahpihte un, kumpipa Darias in asawl ziak in, thanopna tengteng toh huchibang in asemkheta uhi. Juda upate'n zawlnei Haggai leh Iddo tapa Zekariah genkholhna pansan in inn alam ua ma asawn zel uhi. Israel' Pathian thupiak dungzui leh Kura, Darias leh Persia kumpipa Artaksarses thupiak dungzui in inn alam ua azouta uhi. Kumpipa Darias vaihawm akum gukna kum a om, Adar kha ani thum ni in hiai inn zoh ahita hi. Huchi in Israel suante, siampute leh Levi mite leh saltanna ta dangte'n, hiai Pathian inn latna nuamtak in aneita uhi. Hiai Pathian inn latna ah bawngtal zakhat, belamtal zanih, belamnou zali alan ua; Israel tengteng a dia khelhna thillat ding in, keltal sawm-le-nih, Israel namte zah dungzui in. Huchi in Jerusalem a om, Pathian nasepna a ding in, Mosi laibu a kigelh bang in, siampute atan hawmna uah, Levi mite amun tan uah akoih uhi.Paikan Ankuang Huan saltanna tate'n akha khatna ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang alui uhi. Siampute leh Levi mite lah akisiangsakkhawm vek ngal ua; avek un asiang uhi: huchi in saltanna tate a ding leh a-unaute uh siampute a ding leh amau mah a ding in, Paikan belamnou agou uhi. Saltanna a kipan a hong paikhe nawn, Israel suante leh Toupa, Israel' Pathian zong ding a, gam a khovel mite buahna a kipan amau leh amau kihuikhetuam tengteng in, ane uhi. Nuamtak in ni sagih sung Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ankuangluina abawl uhi: Toupa'n amaute nuam asasak in, Israel' Pathian, Pathian inn a nasepna khutte uh hatsak ding in amau lam ah Assuria kumpipa lungtang akiheisak hi.

Hiai thilte nung in, Persia kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm lai in, Seraiah tapa Ezra, Azariah tapa, Hilkiah tapa, Shallum tapa, Zadok tapa, Ahitub tapa, Amariah tapa, Azariah tapa, Meraioth tapa, Zerahiah tapa, Uzzi tapa, Bukki tapa, Abishua tapa, Phinehas tapa, Eleazar tapa, Aaron siampu lian tapa: Babulon a kipan in hiai Ezra apaitou a; amah Mosi Dan, Toupa Israel' Pathian in apiak, dan theisa ahi a: atung a Toupa a Pathian khut a-om dungzui in, angetna tengteng kumpipa'n aphalsak hi. Jerusalem Ah Ezra Ahong Tung Huchi in kumpipa akum sagih kum akha ngana in Jerusalem ah Ezra ahong pai hi. Babulon a kipan akha khatna ani khat ni in akuantou pan a, akha ngana ani khat ni in a Pathian khut hoih atung a a-om bang zel in, Jerusalem ah ahong pai hi. Ezra in bel Toupa Dan zong ding, zui ding leh Israel tua dan thusehte leh vaihawmnate sinsak ding in alungtang akoihkip hi.Ezra Kiang A Kumpipa Artaksarses Lai Piak Tu in kumpipa Artaksarses in siampu, laigelhmi, Toupa thupiakte thu gelhmi leh Israel kiang a adan thusehte gelhmi Ezra kiang a apiak laikhak teisawn hiai ahi. Artaksarses, kumpipate' kumpipa'n, siampu, van Pathian Dan gelhmi, buching leh huchibang zel in, Ezra kiang ah, “Thupiak ka bawl hi, huchi a Israel a mite lak a amaute tengteng, ka gamsung a, asiampute uh leh Levi mite, amau ut thu petmah a Jerusalem a pai ding a theihsakte, nang kiang ah pai uhen. “Kumpipa leh athudot mi sagihte'n, na khut a om na Pathian Dan dungzui a, Judah leh Jerusalem tungtang thu kan ding a, nang ahon sawl bang un

atenna Jerusalem a om, Israel' Pathian kiang a man nei lou a kumpipa leh athudot mite'n apiaksate uh dangka leh dangka-eng po ding in, Babulon bial tengteng a dangka leh dangka-eng na muh tengteng, mite leh siampute'n amau ut thu a thillat, Jerusalem a om a Pathian uh inn a dia uttak a alat tengteng uh toh. “Huaiziak in thanopna toh hiai sum in bawngtalte, belamtalte, belamnoute na lei ding a, a-anpiak thillatte uleh adawn ding thillatte uh toh, huchi in Jerusalem a om na Pathian uh inn maitam tung ah huaite na lan ding hi. Dangka leh dangka-eng om lai hihdan ding nang leh na unaute'n hoih na sak dandan uh, na Pathian uh deihlam bang in hih un. Na Pathian inn a nasepna ding a tui-um belsuan ka hon piak uh, Jerusalem Pathian ma ah pia in. Na Pathian inn ding a kiphamoh dangdangte, piakna ding na neih dingte, kumpipa gou koihkhawmna a kipan in pekhia in. “Kei, kumpipa kei Artaksarses mahmah in luipi khen a om sumkem mite tengteng kiang ah thupiak ka bawl hi, huchi a Ezra siampu, van Pathian Dan, laigelhmi in nou ahon nget, thanuamtak a hih zel ahihtheihna ding in. Dangka talent zakhat, huit buh tehna zakhat, uain bath zakhat, sathau bath zakhat leh aphazah gen lou in chi nangawn. Bangpeuh van Pathian in thu apiak, van Pathian inn a ding in hih in om zel hen; aziak bel bang ding in kumpipa leh atapate gamsiatna ding in thangpaihna a-om dia? Huai lou in leng ka hon chitaktak uh hi, siampute leh Levite, lasa mite, kongkhak ngak mite, Nethinim mite hiam hiai Pathian inn sikhate lak a akuakua tungtang ah, van leimante, sumsinna leimante hiam lamlian leimante amau liausak dan ahi kei ding hi.

Huan nang, Ezra, na khut a om na Pathian pilna zui in, thukhenmi leh vaihawmmi, tuipi khen a omte mite tengteng vaihawm ding in sep in; na Pathian dante tengteng, huaite theiloute nou sinsak un. Kuapeuh na Pathian dan leh kumpipa dan zui lou, sihna chiang hizong leh thanuamtak in atung ah vaihawmna bawl in om hen, ahihkeileh, khakmangna hiam, vankhakna hiam, suangkul lutna tan in,” chi in.Ezra In Pathian Aphat Jerusalem a om Toupa' inn kilawmsak ding a, kumpipa lungtang a hichibang a thil koih, i pipute Pathian, Toupa nuamsa in om hen; Kumpipa leh athudot mite leh kumpipa vaihawmpih thilhihthei tengteng ma a ka tung a zahngaihna hon pepa amah ahi. Huchi in ka tung a Toupa ka Pathian khut dungzui in hihhat in ka omta a, ka kiang a hoh ding in Israel a kipan mikizen tungtuan ka kaikhawmta hi.

Huan hiaite apipute uh inkote lak a alupente ahi ua, kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm lai a kei hon zuite khangthu suina ahi. Phinehas tapate lak ah, Gershom: Ithamar tapate lak ah Daniel: David tapate lak ah, Hattush, Shekaniah tapate lak ah; Parosh tapate lak ah, Zekariah: amah toh pasalte khangthu suina a suikhawmte zakhat-le-sawmnga ahi. Pahath-moab tapate lak ah, Elihoenai Zerahiah tapa; huan amah toh pasal zanihte. Shekaniah tapate lak ah, Jahaziel tapa; amah toh pasal zathumte. Adin tapate lak ah, Jonathan tapa Ebed; amah toh pasal sawmngate. Elam tapate lak ah, Athaliah tapa Jeshaiah; amah toh pasal sawmsagihte. Saltanna A Kipan A Hong Kik Nawnte Joab tapate lak ah, Jehiel tapa Obadiah; amah toh pasal zanih sawm-le-giatte. Shelomith tapate lak ah, Josiphiah tapa; amah toh pasal zakhat-le-sawmgukte. Bebai tapate lak ah, Bebai tapa Zekariah; amah toh pasal sawmnih-le-giatte. Azgad tapate lak ah, Hakkatan tapa Johanan; amah toh pasal za-le-sawmte. Adonikam tapate lak ah, ananungpente; hiaite amin uh ahi, Eliphelet, Jeiel, Shemaiah leh amau toh pasal sawmgukte. Bigvai tapate, Uthai leh Zabbud; amau toh pasal sawmsagihte.Tempul A Ding Levi Mi Ezra In Amu Huchi in Ahava pha a luang luipi tan in amaute ka kaikhawm a; huai ah ni thum ka giak uhi. Mite leh siampute ka en vialvial a, huai ah Levi tapate kuamah ka mu kei. Huan Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekariah leh Meshullam, mikizen tungtuante, sinsak mite Joiarib leh Elnathan leng ka thukhak hi. Kasiphia mun a Iddo hausapa kiang ah amau ka sawlkhia a; Iddo kiang ah leh Kasiphia mun a a-unaute Nethinimte kiang a agen ding uh ka hilh a, i Pathian inn ua ding a nasemmi ei a dia hon tonpih ding in.

Huchi in i tung ua i Pathian khut hoih a om dungzui in pasal khat lunggelsiam, Mahli tapate lak a, Levi tapa, Israel tapa ei ding in Sherebiah atapate leh a-unaute, sawm-le-giat toh ahon pi uhi. Hashabiah, amah toh Merari tapate lak a Jeshaiah toh, a-unaute leh atapate uh, sawmnih toh; Nethinimte, David leh avaihawmpihte'n Levi mite nasepna ding a apiakte uh, zanih-le-sawmnih Nethinimte: avek un minkhumna ah akhum uhi.Ezra In Mipite Thumna Leh An Ngawlna Ah Amakaih Huchi in huai ah, Ahava lui ah, an ngawl ka puang a, huchi a ei a ding leh i nau neute a ding leh i neih i lamte tengteng a dia lampi tang amah lak a zong ding a i Pathian uh ma a ei leh ei i kiniamkhiak theihna ding in. Lampi a melma dou ding a ei hon panpih ding a kumpipa kiang a sepaih pawl leh sakol tungtuangmi nget lah ka zum ngal a: hoihna ding a, amah zongte tung ah i Pathian khut a-om a; himahleh amah mangngilh tengteng siatna ding in athilhihtheihna leh athangpaihna a-om hi, chi a, kumpipa kiang a thu i gen tak ziak in. An i ngawl ua hiai ding in i Pathian i ngen ngutngut ua: huchi in ama'n i thumna uh hon dawng hi.Tempul A Dia Thilpiak Huai lai in siampute lak a amakai lianpente lak a sawm-le-nih, Sherebiah, Hashabiah leh akiang ua om a-unaute uh lak a sawmkhat ka sehkhen a, amau a ding in dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuante, kumpipa leh athuhilh mite leh avaihawmpihte'n Toupa' inn a alatte uh huai lai a om Israel tengteng puak ding in ka buksak hi. Akhut sung mahmah uah dangka talent zaguk-le-sawmnga leh dangka tui-um belsuan talent za ka buksak a; dangka-eng lak ah talent za

dangka-eng noubem sawmnih, darik sangkhat lak ah; dal hoih nawttet, dangka-eng bang a manpha bel nih. Huan akiang uah, “Toupa a ding in na siangthou ua, tui-um belsuante asiangthou uh; dangka leh dangka-eng Toupa, na pipute uh Pathian a dia ut thu a thillat ahi uh. Toupa' inn dantante, Jerusalem a siampute lak a lupente leh Levi mite leh Israel pipute inko vaihawmte ma a huaite na buk masiah uh, pilvan suah in, amaute kem un,” ka chi hi. Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite'n i Pathian inn ua Jerusalem a apuak ding un dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan bukkhiakte ala uhi.Jerusalem A Tun Kik Nawnna Huai lai in Jerusalem lam a pai ding in, akha khatna ani sawm-le-nih ni in Ahava lui a kipan i pawtkhia ua: huan i Pathian khut i tung uah a-om a, melma khut leh lampi a buk mi a kipan ama'n hon tankheta hi. Huchi in Jerusalem i tung ua huai ah ni thum i om uhi. Ani li ni in dangka leh dangka-eng leh tui-um belsuan i Pathian inn uah Uriah siampu tapa Meremoth khut ah buk in a-om a; akiang ah Phinehas tapa Eleazar a om; akiang uah Jeshua tapa Jozabad leh Binnui tapa Noadiah, Levi mite a-om uhi; aphazah leh agikdan tengteng sim ahi a, huai hun in laibu a chiamteh ahi. Pimangna a kipan a hong pai, saltanna tate'n Israel' Pathian kiang ah halmang thillatte, bawngtal sawm-le-nih Israel tengteng a ding in, belamtal sawmkua-le-guk, belamnou sawmsagih-le-sagih, keltal khelhna thillat ding in sawm-le-nih alan uhi: hiaite tengteng Toupa a ding a halmang thillat ahi. Kumpipa thukhen mite kiang leh tuipi khen a ukpipate kiang ah kumpipa thupiakte apekhia ua: huchi in mite leh Pathian inn apanpih uhi.

Huchi a hiai thilte hih khit ahih lai in, ka kiang ah vaihawmtute ahong pai nai ua, “Israel mite leh siampute leh Levi mite, gamte a mite a kipan amau leh amau akikoihtuam kei ua, amaute kihhuainate, Kanaan mi, Hit mi, Periz mi, Jebus mi, Ammon mi, Moab mi, Aigupta mi leh Amor mite, dungzui in a-om uhi. Amau a ding leh atapate uh a ding in atanute uh ala ua; huchi in chi siangthou gamte mite toh amau leh amau akihelkhawmta hi: ahi, hiai tatlekna ah vaihawmtute khut leh vaihawmte amakai lianpente ahi uhi,” achi hi. Huchi a hiai thil ka zak in, ka puansilh leh ka puanak ka botkek a, ka lu a sam leh ka khamul ka botkhia a, lamdang sa in ka tusuk hi. Huai lai in saltanna a amaute tatlekna ziak a, Israel' Pathian thute ziak a lau a ling michih ka kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua; nitaklam kithoih hun masiah lamdang sa in ka tu hi. Nitaklam kithoih hun lai in ka tunggikna a pan ka thou a, ka puansilh leh ka puanak bohkeksa toh; ka khukdin a, Toupa ka Pathian lam ah ka khutte ka zakkhia a; “Aw ka Pathian, na kiang a daktou ding in ka zum in ka zakta hi, ka Pathian: ka thulimlouhnate uh ka lutunglam uah apung deuhdeuh a, ka mohna un vante asunta hi. Ka pipute uh dam lai hun a kipan tuni pha in nakpi in ka mohta ua; huchi in ka thulimlouhnate uh ziak in kou, ka kumpipate uh leh ka siampute uh, gamte kumpipate khut ah, namsau ah, saltanna ah, lohna ah leh zahlakna ah, hiai ni bang in piakkhiak in ka omta uhi.

Huan tu in sawt lou sung a ding in Toupa ka Pathian ua kipan in hehpihna hong lang a, suakta ding a om lai dia nutsiat ding in leh amun siangthou a omkipna hon pe ding in, huchi a ka Pathian un ka mitte uh ahon sukvaksak a, ka tanna ua halhna neukha ahon piaktheihna ding in. Ezra In Judah Hiloute Toh Kitenpolhna Thu Aza Na sikha zawlneite zang in thu na hon pia a: ‘Luah ding a na paina uh, huai gam, gamte a mite nitna ziak a gam nin ahi. Akihhuainate un gam tawp khat lam a kipan khat lam tawp tan ahihdimna ziak in. Huaiziak in na tanute uh atapate uh kiang ah pe kei unla, atanute uh leng na tapate uh a ding in la sam kei un, amuanna uhiam ahauhsakna uhiam leng tangtawn in zong sam kei un: huchi a na hat ua, gam a ahoih na nek ua, tangtawn a na tate uh a ding a gouluah dia na nutsiat theihna ding un. Huchi a ka gamtat giloute uh ziak leh ka mohna thupi mahmah ziak ua, ka tung ua hong tung tengteng zoh in, nang ka Pathian un ka thulimlouhnate uh gunzah sang a hon gawt tawmzaw a, akhosuaksun om lai na hon piak mu in. Na thupiakte bohse nawn in, kihhuaite hih mite toh kituak in ka om ding uam? Akhosuak ding hiam, suakta ding himhim leng om lou khop a na bawlgawp matan ka tung uah na heh nilouh dia hia? ‘Aw Toupa Israel' Pathian, nang na diktat a; hiai ni bang a akhosuak omlaite na hon nutsiat ziak in. Ngai in, ka mohna un na ma ah ka om uhi; hiai ziak in lah kuamah na ma ah adingh thei kei ding uhi.”

Huchi a Ezra kap a Pathian inn mai a lei kidenna a nei in, athum a, thupha atawi lai in, Israel a kipan pasal leh numei leh naupang tampi kikhawmte akiang ah hong kikaikhawm ua: mite lah anak kah mahmah ngal ua. Elam tapate lak a khat, Jehiel tapa Shekaniah in adawng a Ezra kiang ah, “I Pathian tung ah i talekta ua, gammi numei namdangte i kitenpihta uh: Himahleh hiai thil thu ah Israel a ding in lametna a-om lai hi. Huaiziak in tu in zite tengteng leh amau a kipan a huchibang a piangte, ka toupa thuhilh dungzui in leh i Pathian uh thupiak a lau a lingte thuhilh dungzui in, koihmang ding in i Pathian toh thu i khung ding uh; huan dan dungzui a hih hi hen. Thou in, athu lah nang a ahi ngal a, kou leng na kiang ah ka om ding uh; hangsantak in om inla, hih in,” achi hi. Huchi in Ezra athou a, hiai thu dungzui a ahih ding un, siampute leh Levi mite lak a amakai lianpente leh Israel tengteng akichiamsak hi. Huchi in akichiamta uhi. Pathian inn mai a kipan Ezra athoukhia a, Eliashib tapa Jehohanan dantan sung ah alut a: huai lai a ahong pai lai in, tanghou ane kei a, tui lah adawn kei hi; saltanna a tatlekna ziak in asuun hi. Judah leh Jerusalem teng a saltanna tate tengteng kiang ah Jerusalem a kikaikhawm vek ding in thu apuangkhia ua; kuapeuh ni thum sung a hong pai lou, vaihawmte leh upate thu bang zel in, avan tengteng laksak ahi ding a, amah mah saltanna omkhawmte a kipan a tuamkoih ahi ding hi. Huchih lai in Judah leh Benjamin mi tengteng Jerusalem ah ni thum sung in akikaikhawm ua; hiai akha kuana, akha ni sawmnih ni ahi.

Huchi in mi tengteng Pathian inn kongtual a mun awng ah atu ua, hiai thu leh vuahpi ziak in aling uhi. Kitenpolhna Sukbeidan Ding Gelna Huaiziak in tu in na pipute uh Pathian, Toupa kiang ah thupha tawi unla, akipah lam hih un; gam a mite a kipan, numei namdangte a kipan kituamseh un,” achi hi. Huchi in kikhawmte tengteng in adawng ua, aw ngaihtak in, “Ka tungtang uh na gen bang in, huchibang in ka hih ding uh,” achi uhi. Himahleh mite tampi ahi ua, vuah tampi zuk lai ahi a, huchi in inkuan ah ka dingh thei kei ua, hiai lah ni khat hiam nasep ahi kei; hiai thu ah lah nakpitak in i talekta ngal ua. Tu in omkhawmte a ding in i vaihawmte ding seh in om henla, i Pathian uh thangpaihna ei a kipan a akihei a, hiai thu hihbei ahih masiah, numei lamdangte kitenpihte i khopite a omte hun sehsate ah, khopi chiteng a upate amau toh, huai lai a vaihawmte toh, hong pai uhen. Asahel tapa Jonathan leh Tikvah tapa Jahaziah kia in hiai thu asel uh: huan Meshullam leh Levi mi Shabbethai in amaute apanpih uhi. Huchibang in saltanna a kipan kik nawnte'n ahihta uhi. Siampu Ezra, apipute uh inkote dungzui a, pipute inkuan lak a vaihawm makai kuate hiam toh leh aminte ua amaute tengteng, tuam sehkhiak in a-om ua; huchi in athu entel ding in akha sawmna ani khat ni in atuta uhi. Huchi in akha khatna ani khat ni in numei namdang kitenpih mite ahih khin uhi.Namdangmi Zi A Neite Huchi in siampute tapate lak ah numei namdang kitenpih muh in a-om a: huaite, Jeshua tapate, Jozadak tapa leh a-unaute, Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib leh Gedaliahte. Huchi in azite uh koihmang ding in pha asa ua

amoh ziak un, amohna a ding in belamhon lak a belamtal alan uhi. Immer tapate lak ah: Hanani leh Zebadiah. Harim tapate lak ah: Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel leh Uzziah. Pashur tapate lak ah: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethaneel, Jozabad leh Elasah. Levi mite lak ah: Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah, huai mah Kelita ahi, Pethahiah, Judah leh Eliezer. Lasa mite lak ah: Eliashib: huan kongkhak ngak mite lak ah; Shallum, Telem leh Uri. Israel lak ah: Parosh tapate lak ah; Ramiah, Jeziah, Malkijah Mijamin, Eleazar leh Malkijah leh Benaiah. Elam tapate lak ah: Mattaniah, Zekariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth leh Eliah. Zattu tapate lak ah: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad leh Aziza. Bebai tapate lak ah; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, Athlai. Bani tapate lak ah: Meshullam, Malluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal leh Ramoth. Huan Pahath-moab tapate lak ah: Adna, Kelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui leh Manasseh. Harim tapate lak ah: Eliezer, Isshiah, Malkijah, Shemaiah, Simeon, Benjamin, Malluk leh Semariah. Hashum tapate lak ah: Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, Shimei. Bani tapate lak ah: Maadai, Amram leh Uel; Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kelluh, Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib; Mattaniah, Mattenai leh Jaasau; Bani, Binnui, Shimei; Shelemiah leh Nathan leh Adaiah, Maknadebai, Shasai, Sharai; Azarel leh Shelemiah, Shemariah; Shallum, Amariah, Joseph. Nebo tapate lak ah: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel leh Benaiah. Hiai tengtengte'n namdang zite api ua: huchi in alak ua khenkhatte'n hiai zite a kipan tate anei uhi.

Nehemiah In Jerusalem A-awlmohna Hananiah, ka unaute lak a khat ahong a, amah leh Judah a kipan mi kuate hiam; amaute kiang ah saltanna a kipan a nutsiat a omte, Juda suaktate tanchin leh Jerusalem thu ka dong hi. Amau ka kiang ah, “Huai lai bial a saltanna a kipan omlaite gimthuakna thupi thuak leh simmoh in a-om uh: Jerusalem kulhbaangte leng achim a, akongpite leng mei in akang,” achi uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, hiai thute ka zak lai in, ka tu a ka kap a, ni bangzah hiam ka suun a; van Pathian ma ah an ngawl in ka thum hi. “Aw Toupa, van Pathian, Pathian thupi leh lauhuai, amah it a, athupiakte zuite tung a thukhun theigige leh zahngaihna nei gige. “Tu in na bil in hon ngeingaih henla, na mitte hong kihong hen, huchi a na sikha thumna, huai hun a, sun leh zan a, na sikhate Israel suante a dia, nangmah tung a ka hihkhelh uh, Israel suante khelhna thupha tawi a, ka thumna na hon ngaihkhiaksakna ding in: Ahi, kei leh ka pa inkote ka khialta uhi. “Thanghuaitak in na tung ah ka na gamtata ua, na thupiakte ka zuita kei ua, na sikha Mosi kiang a na thupiak, dan thusehte leh vaihawmte. “Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi, na sikha Mosi kiang a thu na piak, na tatlek uh leh mite lak ah ka hon thehzak ding. “Himahleh ka kiang a na hong kik ua, ka thupiakte na zuih ua na hih uleh, delhkhiak a na omna uh van tawp mun ah himahleh, huai a kipan in amaute ka kaikhawm ding a, ka min omna dia ka mun telsa ah amaute ka pikhawm ding, chi in. “Tu in hiaite, na thilhihtheihna thupi leh na banhat a na tatsa, na sikhate leh na mite ahi uh. “Aw Toupa, ka hon ngen ahi, na min laudan siam nuamsa, na sikha thumna leh na sikhate thumna na bil in ngeingaih hen: ka hon ngen ahi, tuni in na sikha lohchingsak inla, hiai mi mitmuh in akiang ah zahngaihna pia in,” achi hi.Kei bel kumpipa nou dompa ka hi.

Kumpipa Artaksarses vaihawm akum sawmnih, Nisan kha in, ama a uain a-om lai in hichi ahong hi a, uain ka la a, kumpipa kiang ah ka pia hi. Ama ah nidang in dahmel ka pu ngei nai kei hi. Jerusalem Ah Nehemiah Ahoh Kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa tangtawn in dam hen: ka pipute hante omna, khopi kisegawp a om a, huai a kongpite mei in kangtum hiven bangchi in ka mel adah lou dia?” ka chi hi. Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, “Ahihleh bang ahia na nget?” achi hi. Huchi in van Pathian kiang ah ka thumta hi. Kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa kipah lam ahih a, na mitmuh a na sikha in deihsakna atanleh, Judah gam ah, ka pipute han omna khopi ka bawltheihna ding in kei hon sawl in,” ka chi hi. Kumpipa'n ka kiang ah, (kumpinu leng akiang a tu ahi a), “Na khualzinna bang tan a sawt ahi dia? Chikchiang in na hong kik nawn dia?” ahon chita hi. Huchi in kei hon sawl ding kumpipa kipah lam ahi a; amah hun ka pia hi. Huai lou in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa kipah lam ahih a, Judah gam tan ka tun mateng a kei ahon paisak zel theihna ding un, luipi khen a ukpipate kiang a piak ding laikhakte hon pe lechin. “Inn toh kizom kulh kongpite a ding leh khopi kulhbaangte a ding leh ka lutna ding inn a dia bawl ding inkamte bawlna dia sing ahon piakna ding in, kumpipa gammang kempa Asaph kiang ah laikhak hon khaksak lechin, ka chi hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n ka tung a ka Pathian khut hoih a-om bang in hon phalsak hi. “Huchi in luipi khen a ukpipate kiang ka hong tung a, akiang uah kumpipa laikhakte ka pia hi.

Huchi in kumpipa'n hon zui ding in sepaih pawl heutute leh sakol tungtuang mite asawl hi. “Horon mi, Sanballat leh sikha Tobiah, Ammon mi in azaktak un, Israel suante hoihna zongmi kuahiam khat ahong pai ziak in nakpitak in alungkim kei mahmah uhi.Nehemiah In Kulhbaang Kisia Avelchian “Huchi in Jerusalem ah ka hong a, huai ah ni thum ka omta hi. “Zan in ka thou a, kei leh ka kiang a om mi tawmchikte; Jerusalem a dia hih ding ka lungtang sung a ka Pathian in bang ahia a koihmi kuamah ka hilh kei a: atung a ka tuanna ganta chih louh ngal ka kiang ah ganta a-om kei hi. “Zan in Gulpi Tuileh lam, Ekvum Kongpi lam ah, Phaizang Kongpi a pai in ka pawtkhia a, achimsa, Jerusalem kulhbaangte leh mei a kangsa kongpite ka velta hi. “Tuikhuk Kongpi leh Kumpipa Dil ah ka hoh a: himahleh ka nuai a om ganta paina ding mun a-om kei hi. “Luita zui in zan in ka paitou a, kulhbaang ka vel a; ka kik nawn a, Phaizang Kongpi ah ka lut a, huchi in ka kik nawnta hi. “Huchi in ka paina lam hiam, ka hih hiam vaihawm mite'n athei kei uh; Judate kiang ah leng, siampute hiam, miliante hiam, vaihawmte hiam leh nasep sem midangte kiang ah leng ka gen nai kei hi.Kulhbaang Bawl Dia Thutanna “Huan akiang uah, ‘I dinmun uh hoihlouhdan na mu ua, Jerusalem asiat khitdan, huai a kongpite mei a akat khitdan: simmoh a i om nawnlouhna ding in, kisa un Jerusalem baang i lam nawn ding uh, ka chi hi. “Huchi in ka tung a hoih ka Pathian' khut tanchin ka kiang a agen kumpipa thute leng amau ka hilh a; huchi in amau, ‘Thou ni in lam ni, achi uhi.

Huchi in nasep hoih sem ding in akhutte uh ahatsakta uhi. “Himahleh Horon mi Sanballat leh Ammon mi sikha Tobiah leh Arabia mi Geshem in azak un, ahon nuihsan ua, ahon simmohbawl ua, ‘Bang thil ahia na hih uh? Kumpipa tung a hel sawm na hi uhia? achi uhi. “Amau ka dawng a, akiang uah, ‘Van Pathian in koute ahon lohchingsak ding, huaiziak in kou asikhate ka thou ding ua ka lam ding uh: himahleh nou Jerusalem ah thuneihna, theihgigena leh tan na nei kei uhi, ” ka chi hi.

Huchi in siampu lianpen Eliashib a-unau siampute toh athou ua, Belam Kongpi abawl ua; ahihsiangthou ua, akongkhakte atung ua; Hameah insang tan in ahihsiangthou ua, Hananel insang tan in. Amah zom in Jeriko mite'n alam uhi. Amau zom in Imri tapa Zakkur in alam hi. Jerusalem Kulhbaang Lamna Amau zom in Uriah tapa, Hakkoz tapa, Meremoth in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Berekiah tapa Meshullam, Meshezabel tapa in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Baana tapa Zadok in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Tekoa mite'n abawlhoih ua; himahleh amiliante un a Toupa uh nasepna ah anak pan nuam kei uhi. Kongpi lui pen Paseah tapa Jehoiada leh Besodeiah tapa Meshullam in abawlhoih ua, a-inkamte akhung ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte toh. Amaute zom in Gibeon mi Melatiah leh Meronoth mi, Jadon, Gibeon mite, Mizpah mite, luipi khen a ukpipa laltutphah toh kizomte'n abawlhoih uhi. Amah zom in Harhaiah, dangka-eng sek mite tapa Uzziel in abawlhoih hi. Amah zom in gimlim bawl mite tapa Hananiah in abawlhoih a, kulhbaang za tanpha in Jerusalem abubitsak uhi. Amaute zom in Jerusalem seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Hur tapa Rephaiah in abawlhoih hi. Amaute zom in Harumaph tapa Jedaiah in, ama inn sun hial in abawlhoih hi. Huan amah zom in Hashabneiah tapa Hattush in abawlhoih hi. Malkijah, Harim tapa leh Pahath-moab tapa Hasub in amun dang leh meipi insang abawlhoih uhi. Amah zom in Jerusalem seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Hallohesh tapa Shallum in, amah leh atanute toh abawlhoih uhi. Guam Kongpi pen Hanun leh Zanoah a tengte'n abawlhoih ua, alam ua, akongkhakte atung ua, akalhnate leh akalhna tawnte leh Ekvum Kongpi lam a kulhbaang tong sangkhat toh. Huchi in Beth-hakkerem seh a vaihawmpa, Rekab tapa Malkijah in Ekvum Kongpi abawlhoih a, akongkhakte, akalhnate leh atung a akalhna tawnte alam hi.

Mizpah seh a vaihawmpa, Kol-hozeh tapa Shallum in tuikhuk kongpi abawlhoih a; alam a, avuk a, kongkhakte, kalhnate leh kalhna tawnte leh kumpipa huan kiang a Shiloah Dil baang, David Khopi a kipan a sukpai leichial tan in abawl hi. Amah nung in Azbuk tapa Nehemiah, Beth-zur gam kimkhat a vaihawmpa'n, David han toh kimatuah mun leh dil bawltawm chiang leh mihatte inn tan in abawlhoih hi.Kulhbaang Bawlna A Nasem Levite Amah nung in, Levite, Bani tapa Rehumte'n abawlhoih uhi. Huan amah zom in Keilah seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa Hashabiah in ama seh ding in abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in a-unaute uh, Keilah seh kimkhat a vaihawmpa, Henadad tapa Bavai in abawlhoih hi. Amah zom in Mizpah vaihawmpa, Jeshua tapa Ezer in seh dang, kulhbaang kawina tak a galvan koihkhawmna tan a paitouhna sun in abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in Zabbai tapa Baruk in seh dang, kulhbaang kawina a kipan siampu lianpen Eliashib inn kongkhak chiang abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in Hakkoz tapa Uriah tapa Meremoth in seh dang, Eliashib in kongkhak a kipan Eliashib inn tawpna chiang abawlhoih hi.Kulhbaang Bawlna A Nasem Siampute Amah nung in, phaizang mite, siampute'n abawlhoih uhi. Amaute nung in Benjamin leh Hasub in a-inn pha un abawlhoih ua. Amau nung in Ananiah tapa Maaseiah tapa Azariah in amah inn sik ah abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in Henadad tapa Binui in seh dang, Azariah inn a kipan kulhbaang kawina tan leh aning chiang abawlhoih hi.

Uzai tapa Palal in kulhbaang kawina sun chiang abawlhoih a, kumpipa' inn tungnungzaw a kipan a hong dingkhetou insang, venna pisa kiang a om toh, amah nung in Parosh tapa Pedaiah, leh tempul nasem Ophel a tengteng suahlam pang Tui Kongpi leh insang lawkkhia zawn tan abawlhoih uhi.Kulhbaang Bawlna A Nasemtu Dangte Amah khit in Tekoa mite'n seh dang, Ophel kulhbaang chiang pha, insang thupi dingkhetou sun in abawlhoih uhi. Siampute'n Sakol Kongpi tunglam, michih in ama inn tung sun chiat in abawlhoih uhi. Amaute nung in Immer tapa Zadok in ama inn tung suntou chiang abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in suahlam kongpi ngakpa Shekaniah tapa Shemaiah in abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in Shelemiah tapa Hananiah leh Zalaph tapa gukna Hanun in seh dang abawlhoih uhi. Amah nung in Berekiah tapa Meshullam in adantan tung zawn abawlhoih hi. Amah nung in dangka-eng sek mite tapa Malkijah in Nethinimte inn leh sumsin mite inn chiang, Hammipkad Kongpi zawn chiang leh aning a kahtouhna chiang abawlhoih hi. Huan aning a kahtouhna leh Belam Kongpi kikal dangka-eng sek mite leh sumsin mite'n abawlhoih uhi.

Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang i lam uh chih Sanballat in azak in, ahehta a, nakpitak in athangpai a, Judate akouta hi. Huchi in a-unaute leh Samari sepaih pawl ma ah thu agen a, “Hiai Juda zawngkhalte'n bang ahia ahih uh? Kihihhat ding uhia? Kithoih ding uh hia? Ni khat a zoh sawm uhia? Akangsa ahi chih mu napi in, ninneng sunvum a kipan a suangte bawl thak ding uhia?” achi hi. Huai lai in Ammon mi Tobiah akiang ah a-om a, “Ama'n, a-inn lam uh, sihal nangawn va kaltouleh, asuang baang uh alaichim ding,” achi hi. Nehemiah In Anasep A Doudalnate Azou Aginatlouhna uh khuh ke'nla, na ma a kipan akhelhna uh nulmang in omsak ke'n: inn lamte ma ah nang ahon hehsakta uhi. Huchi in baang ka bawl ua; baang tengteng, asandan kim chiang in akizom ta hi: mite'n lah nna sem ding in lungsim anei ngal ua. Himahleh hichi ahong hi a, Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite leh Ashdod mite'n Jerusalem kulhbaangte bawlphatna in ma asawntou zel a, akichipsiatna akibawlpha, chih azak un, athangpai mahmah uhi. Huchi in avek ua hong kuan a Jerusalem dou ding leh huai a buaina omsak ding in akikumkhawmta uhi. Himahleh i Pathian kiang ah i thum ua, amau ziak in sun leh zan in amaute vil ding i koih uhi. Judah in, “Puakgik pote hatna abahta a,ninneng tampi a-om;huchi in kulhbaang bawl thei lou i hi uh,” achi hi. I melmate un, “Alak uh i hong tun ua, amaute i thah ua, nasep i khawlsak matan athei kei ding ua, muh leng amu kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, amau kiang a teng Judate ahong pai lai un, “Sawmvei i kiang uah mun tengteng a kipan hon dou ding uh ahi,” ahon chi uhi.

Huaiziak in kulhbaang nunglam mun a mun niam penpen, mun awngthawlte ah, ka koih a, mite a-inkuankuan uh dungzui in anamsaute uh toh, ateipite uh toh, athalpeute uh toh ka koih hi. Huchi in ka en a, ka thou a, miliante leh vaihawmte leh mipi dangte kiang ah, “Amau lau kei un: Toupa thupi leh lauhuai theigige unla, na unaute uh, na tapate uh leh na tanute uh a ding in gal dou un, na zite uh leh na innte uh a ding in,” ka chi hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, i melmate thil sawm i na theita ua, Pathian in athusawm uh bangmah lou asuaksak a, kulhbaang bawl ding in i vek un michih anasepna mun ah i kileh nawnta uh chih aza lai uhi. Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, huai hun a kipan in, ka sikhate lak a kimkhat nasepna ah apang ua, alak ua kimkhat in lum, teipi leh thalpeu leh sik puanakte alen ua; vaihawmte Judah inkote nung ah a-om vek uhi. Kulhbaang bawlte leh van-gik pote'n apuak lai un, michih in akhutte uh khat nasepna a nna sem in, akhut khat lam a galvan tawi in. Inn lam mite'n, michih in anamsau apang ah khaisa a nei in, huchi in alamtou zel uhi. Pengkul mutpa ka kiang ah a-om hi. Huchi in miliante kiang leh vaihawmte kiang ah leh mite lak a adangdangte kiang ah, “Nasep athupi in, atam a, kulhbaang tung ah i kikhenzak ua, kigamlattak in: Koi lai mun peuh a pengkul ging na zakna uah, i kiang uah huai lam ah kuan un; i Pathian un gal hon dousak ding ahi,” ka chi hi. Nna i sem ua: alak ua akimkhat in zingsang kipat a kipan aksite ahong kilat matan teipi atawi uhi. Huchi mah bang in huai lai in mite kiang ah, michih asikha toh Jerusalem sung ah giak hen, zan chiang a eite a dia galvil ahih a, sun chiang a nna aseptheihna ding un, ka chi hi. Huchi in kei hiam, ka unaute hiam, ka sikhate hiam, kei hong zui galvil mite, i lak ua kuamah in i puante uh sawp ding nasan in i suah man kei uhi.

Huai lai in a-unaute uh Judate dem a nakpitak a kikouna, mite leh azite ua kipan ahong omta hi. Kou, ka tapate leh ka tanute uh, tampi ka hi ua: “Ka nek ua ka hintheihna ding un, buh-le-bal hon pia un,” chi pawl ahong om uhi. “Ka loute uh, ka grephuante uh, ka innte uh ka zuak ua; kial ziak in, buh-le-bal hon pia un,” chi kuate hiam leng a-om uhi. “Ka loute uh leh ka grephuante ua dit ding in kumpipa siah ding in sum ka leitawi uh, chimi khenkhat leng a-om uhi. Migentheite Nuaisiahna Huchi a akikouna uleh hiai thute ka zak in ka heh mahmah hi. Huchih lai in ka kingaihtuah a, miliante leh vaihawmte ka sal a, akiang uah, “Michih in a-unau lak ah apung na phut uh,” ka chi hi. Huchi in amaute demna kikhawmpi thupi ka nei hi. Akiang uah, “Khovel mite kiang a zuak a omsa, i unau Judate i theih bang un i tanta ua; nou na unaute uh zuak in, i lak ua khot a om ding uh ahi maw?” ka chi hi. Amau adai dide ua, thu khat leng anei kei uhi. “Na thilhih uh ahoih kei; i melmate khovel mite'n hon simmohna ziak un, i Pathian laudan siam a na om ding uh hilou hia? ka chih behlap hi. Huchi mah bang in, ‘ka unaute leh ka sikhate leh ke'n amau kiang ah sum leh buh-le-bal ka leitawisak uhi. K'on ngen ahi, apung omsak kei ni. ‘Pe nawn un, ka hon ngen ahi, akiang uah, tuni mahmah in, aloute uh, agrephuante uh, a-olive huante uleh a-innte uh, asum uh aseh zakhatna leng, buh-le-bal, uain, leh sathau, amau a kipan na phutkhia uhi,” ka chi hi.

Huchi in amau, “Ka pe nawn ding ua, amau a kipan bangmah ka phut kei ding uh; huchibang in ka hih ding ua, na chih mah bang in,” achi uhi. Ke'n siampute ka sam a, akichiamna uh ka la a, huchi a hiai thuchiam bang a ahihna ding un. Ke'n leng ka pheipi ka vuangsak a, “Hiai thuchiam bawl lou peuhmah, a-inn a kipan, anasepna a kipan Pathian in hichibang in vuangsak hen; hichibangtak a vuankhiak ahi ding a, ahawm ding,” ka chi hi. Huan khawmpite tengteng in, “Amen, Toupa phat in om hen,” achi uhi. Huchi in mite'n hiai thuchiam dungzui in ahih uhi.Nehemiah Angmasial Louhna Huai lou in Judah gam a a-ukpipa ding ua seh a ka om lai a kipan, kumpipa Artaksarses akum sawmnihna leh akum sawmthum-le-nihna chiang, huai bel, kum sawm-le-nih ahi a, kei leh ka unaute'n ukpipa tanghou ka ne kei uhi. Himahleh kei ma a ukpipa masate mite tung a mohsak theih ahi ua, amau a kipan in tanghou leh uain ala uh, dangka shekel sawmli sim louh in; ahi, asikhate uh nangawn in mite tung ah vai ahawm uhi. Himahleh ke'n Pathian ka kihtak ziak in huchibang in ka hih kei hi. Ahi, huai lou leng hiai kulhbaang nasepna ah ka pang nilouh a, gam himhim leng i lei kei uh: ka sikhate tengteng huai lam ah nasepna ah kaihkhawm in a-om uhi. Huai ban ah ka dohkan ah Judate leh vaihawmte lak a mi za-le-sawmnga, i kim i vel ua om khovel mite lak a pan i kiang ua hong paite chih louh, a-om uhi. Ni khat a ding a bawlkholhsa bawngtal khat leh belam hoih ngenta guk ahi ua; vasate leng kei dia bawlkholhsa in a-om ua, huan ni sawm sung a khatvei uain chi chih a kipan koih hoih: hinapi in hiai mite tung a tanna agik ziak in, ukpipa tanghou hiaite tengteng ziak in ka phut kei hi. Aw ka Pathian, hoihna ding in, hiai mite a dia ka hih tengteng kei lam hon theigige in.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang ka lam khin a, huai ah khangkham a-om nawnta kei chih, Sanballat, Tobiah, Geshem Arabia mi leh i melma dangdangte kiang a akitut lai in; huai hun tan in kongpi kongkhakte tung nai kei mah leng; Sanballat leh Geshem in ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl ua, “Hong pai in, Ono Phaizang a khuate lak a khat ah i va kimu ding,” chi in. Himahleh ka tung ah gilou hih angaihtuah uhi. Huchi in akiang uah sawltakte ka sawl a, “Nna thupitak sem ka hi, ka hong paisuk thei kei; bangziak a ka nna nusia a, na kiang ua ka hong suk ziak a, nasep khawl ding ahia oi?” ka chi hi. Huan hichibang ngen in livei ka kiang ah mi ahon sawl ua; angeingei in amaute ka dawng zel hi. Huchi in Sanballat in ka kiang ah hichibang in angaveina ding in asikha akhut a laikhak honsa toh ahon sawl a; huai ah, “Namte lak ah akigen a, Gasmu in achi a, nang leh Judate'n hel na tum uh; huai a ding in kulhbaang na lam hi: huchi in nang akumpipa uh hi ding in, hiai thute dungzui in, Nehemiah Kalh A Thusawmguk Jerusalem a nang tanchin gen ding in zawlneite leng na sep a, Judah ah kumpipa a-om chi in. Huchi in tu in hiai thute dungzui in kumpipa kiang a tut ding ahi; huaiziak in hong kuan inla, kihouna i nei ding,” chi in. Akiang ah mi ka sawl a, “Na gen bang a huchibang thilhih a-om kei a, himahleh na lungtang a kipan na phuahtawm ahi,” chi in. Amau lah, hih louh ahihna ding in, “Nasepna a kipan akhutte uh hatsak louh in a-om ding,” chi a hon lauhsak a-ut ngal ua.

Himahleh tu in, Aw Pathian, nang ka khutte hatsak in. Khum a om, Mehetabel tapa Delaiah tapa Shemaiah inn ah ka hoh a, ama'n, “Tempul sung ah, Pathian inn ah i kikhawm dia, huchi in tempul kongkhakte i khak ding, nang that dia hong ding uh lah ahi ngal ua; ahi, zan in nang that ding a hong ding uh ahi,” achi hi. Ke'n bel, “Kei bang mi, taise ding hon sa maw? Huan kua ahia, huchi a kei bang a om a, ahinna humbitna ding a tempul sung a hoh nuam ding? Ka lut kei ding,” ka chi hi. Ka ngaihtuah a, huchi in ngai in, Pathian in amah asawl kei a; himahleh ka siatna ding in hiai genkholhna agenkheta hi: Tobiah leh Sanballat in amah aguai uhi. Hiai a ding a goih ahi, ka launa ding leh huchibang a hih a, khial a, thutut gilou ding a thubuai aneihtheihna ding ua, kei ahon simmoh theihna ding un. Aw ka Pathian, Tobiah leh Sanballat anasepte uh bang zel leh zawlneinu Noadiah leh zawlnei dangte, lausak hon tumte, theigige in.Nasep Zohsianna Huchi in Elul kha ani sawmnih-le-nga ni, ani sawmnga-le-nih sung in, kulhbaang zoh in a-omta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, i melmate tengteng in huai azak un, i kim i vel ua om namte teng in alauta ua, amitmuh ngei uah nakpitak in alunglelta uhi; hiai nasep i Pathian hih ahi chih athei ngal ua. Huai lou in huai lai in Judah miliante'n laikhak tampi Tobiah kiang ah akhak ua, amau kiang ah Tobiah laikhakte ahong tung hi. Amah Arah tapa Shekaniah tanu pasal ahih ziak in, Judah ah mi tampi amah lam a kichiam lah a-om ngal ua; atapa Jehohanan in Berekiah tapa Meshullam tanu zi in anei hi. Huai lou leng ka ma ah athil hoih hihte agen ua, amah kiang ah ka thute atun zel uhi. Huchi in Tobiah in kei hon hihlau ding in laikhakte akhak hi.

Hichi ahong hi a, kulhbaang lam khit ahih a, kongkhakte ka tun khit a, kongkhak ngak mite leh lasa mite leh Levi mite seh ahih khit nung un, ka unau Hanani leh Hananiah kulh ukpa kiang ah Jerusalem kepna ka pia a: amah miginom ahi a, tampi sang a Pathian laudan siam ahih ziak in. Akiang ah, “Ni asat mateng Jerusalem kongpite hon hi kei hen; galvilmi adin lai un, kongkhakte khak uhenla, amaute kalhkhum un; Jerusalem a tengte vengmi sep inla, michih ama dinmun ah, michih ama inn zawn chiat ah,” chi in.Saltanna A Kipan Hong Kik Nawnte(Ezr. ) Khopi aza in alian a: himahleh huai ah mite atawm ua, innte lah lam ahi kei uhi. Huchi in ka Pathian in ka lungtang miliante, vaihawm mite, mipite, khangsutna a sim ahihtheihna ding ua kaikhawm ding in akoih hi. Huan amasapen a hong lang amaute khangsutna laibu ka muta a, huai ah gelh a om ka mu hi. Hiaite bial naupangte ahi ua, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in apimangte, huai pimang a omte lak a saltanna kipan a paitoute, Jerusalem leh Judah akik nawn, michih amah khopi a kik; Jerusalem Kongpi A Vengmi Sehna Israel mite lak a pasal zah:Parosh suante, sangnih zakhat sawmsagih-le-nih. Shephatiah suante, zathum sawmsagih-le-nih. Arah suante, zaguk sawmnga-le-nih. Pahath-moab suante, Jeshua leh Joab tate, sangnih zagiat sawmkhat-le-giat. Elam suan sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. Zattu suan zagiat sawmli-le-nga. Zakkai suan zasagih-le-sawmguk. Binnui suan zaguk sawmli-le-giat. Bebai suan zaguk sawmnih-le-giat. Azgad suan sangnih zathum sawmnih-le-nih. Adonikam suan zaguk sawmguk-le-sagih. Bigvai suan sangnih sawmguk-le-sagih. Adin suan zaguk sawmnga-le-nga. Ater, Hezekiah suan sawmkua-le-giat. Hashum suan zathum sawmnih-le-giat. Bezai suan zathum sawmnih-le-li. Hariph suan zakhat sawmkhat-le-nih. Gibeon suan sawmkua-le-nga. Bethlehem leh Netophah suan zakhat sawmgiat-le-giat. Anathoth mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-giat. Beth-azmaveth, mite sawmli-le-nih. Kiriath-jearim, Kephirah, Beeroth suante, zasagih sawmli-le-thum.

Ramah leh Geba mite, zaguk sawmnih-le-khat. Mikmas suante, zakhat sawmnih-le-nih. Bethel leh Ai mite, zakhat sawmnih-le-thum. Nebo dang mite, sawmnga-le-nih. Elam dang suan sangkhat zanih sawmnga-le-li. Harim suan zathum-le-sawmnih. Jeriko suan zathum sawmli-le-nga. Lod, Hadid leh Ono suante, zasagih sawmnih-le-khat. Senaah suan sangthum zakua-le-sawmthum. Siampute:Jedaiah suante, Jeshua inkuan a kipan, zakua sawmsagih-le-thum. Imer suante, sangkhat sawmnga-le-nih. Pashur suante, sangkhat zanih sawmli-le-sagih. Harim suante, sangkhat sawm-le-sagih. Levi mite: Jeshua, Kadmiel suante,Hodevah suante, sawmsagih-le-li. Lasa mite: Asaph suante, zakhat sawmli-le-giat. Kongkhak ngakte: Shallum, Ater, Talmon, Akkub,Hatita leh Shobai suante,zakhat sawmthum-le-giat. Tempul nasem, Nethinim mite:Ziha, Hasupha, Tabbaoth; Keros, Sia, Padon; Lebana, Hagabah, Shalmai; Hanan, Giddel, Gahar; Reaiah, Rezin, Nekoda; Gazzam, Uzza, Paseah; Besai, Meunim, Nephishesim; Bakbuk, Hakupha, Harhur; Bazlith, Mehida, Harsha; Barkos, Sisera, Tamah; Neziah leh Hatipha suante. Solomon sikhate tate:Sotai, Sophereth, Perida; Jaala, Darkon, Giddel; Shephatiah, Hattil, Zebaim mi Pokereth leh Ammon suante. Nethinim mite tengteng leh Solomon sikhate' suante, zathum sawmkua-le-nih. Huan hiaite Telmelah, Tel-harsha, Kerub, Addon leh Immer a kipan paitoute ahi uh, himahleh apipute uh inkote, Israel a kipan ahi hiam chih bel a-ensak thei kei uhi: Delaiah, Tobiah leh Nekoda suante, zaguk sawmli-le-nih. Siampute a kipan: Habaiah, Koz leh Barzillai suan Gilead mi Barzillai tanute lak a zi neipa min atamsak uhi. Hiaite'n khangthu suina a sim a omte lak ah amin gelhna uh azong ua, himahleh muh in a-om kei; huaiziak in nin a sim ahi ua siamputna a kipan koihkhiak ahi uhi. Ukpipa in akiang uah, siampu khat Urim leh Thummim toh ahong suah mateng thil siangthoupente lak a nek louh ding chih agen hi. Omkhawm tengteng avek un singli sangnih zathum-le-sawmguk, Apasal sikhate uh leh anungak sikhate uh, sangsagih zathum sawmthum-le-sagihte sim louh in:pasal lasa leh numei lasa zanih sawmli-le-nga anei uhi. Asakolte uh zasagih sawmthum-le-guk;asakolneute uh, zanih sawmli-le-nga; Asangawngsaute, zali sawmthum-le-nga;asabiltungte uh sangguk zasagih-le-sawmnih.

Pipute inkote lak a lupente lak a kipan khenkhatte nasem ding in akipia uhi.Ukpipa'n sumbawm ah dangka-eng darik sangkhat,maiphiat kuang sawmnga,siampute puan zanga-le-sawmthum apia hi. Huan pipute inkote lak a lupente lak a khenkhatte'n dangka-eng darik singnih leh,dangka paun sangnih-le-zanih apia uhi. Mipite lak a adangdangte piak dangka-eng darik singnih leh dangka paun sangnih leh,siampute puan sawmguk-le-sagih ahi. Huchi in siampute, Levi mite, kongkhak ngakte leh lasa mite, mite lak a akhente leh Nethinim mite leh Israel tengteng a khopite uah atengta uhi. Akha sagihna ahong tun in, Israel suante akhopite uah a-om uhi.

Huchi in mite tengteng Tui Kongpi mai a om mun lian ah mi khat bang in akikhawmkhawmta ua; Toupa'n Israel kiang a apiak, Mosi Dan laibu hon tawi ding in laigelhmi Ezra kiang ah thu ahilh uhi. Siampu Ezra in omkhawmte, pasal leh numei, theihsiamna toh za thei ding tengteng ma ah akha sagihna ani khat ni in dan thu ahon lata hi. Pasal leh numeite leh theisiam thei dingte ma ah, zingkhang a kipan sun lai tanpha in Tui Kongpi mai a om mun lian ma ah asimta hi; huchi in mite tengteng in Dan Laibu abildoh chiat uhi. Huai ding mah a abawl uh, sing dohkang tung ah laigelhmi Ezra adingh a; asik ah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah leh Maaseiah, ataklam pang ah adingh ua; aveilam pang ah, Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkijah, Hashum, Hashbaddana, Zekariah leh Meshullam. Huchi in Ezra in mite mitmuh in laibu ahong a; mite tunglam ah a-om ngal a; huan ahongta a, mite tengteng adingh uhi: Ezra in Toupa, Pathian thupi avualzawl hi. Huchi in mipi tengteng in adawng ua, “Amen, Amen,” chi a akhutte uh lik kawm in alute uh akunsak ua amai ua lei si in Toupa abia uhi. Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan, Pelaiah leh Levi mite'n mipite dan theisiam ding in abawl ua: huchi in mite amau mun ah adingh uhi. Ezra In Dan Laibu Asim Huan Nehemiah, amah Tirshatha ahi a, huan siampu leh laigelhmi Ezra, leh Levite mite sinsakte'n, mite tengteng kiang ah, “Tuni Toupa na Pathian uh a dia ni siangthou ahi; dah kei unla kap kei un,” achi ua. Dan thute azak un lah mite tengteng akap ngal ua.

Akiang uah, “Pai unla, thaute ne unla, akhumkhum dawn un, amah a dia bangmah bawlkhol a om lou kiang ah tantuante khak un: tuni lah i Toupa uh a dia ni siangthou ahi ngal a. Dah kei unla; Toupa a kipahna na hatna uh ahi,” achi hi. Huchi in Levite'n mite tengteng adaisak ua, “Tuni siangthou ahih ziak in, dai sipsip unla; dah kei un,” chi in. Huan mite tengteng ne ding leh dawn ding leh vualnopna thupi bawl ding in apaita ua, akiang ua phuankhiak a om thute atheisiamta uhi.Biakbuk Ankuangluina Ani nih ni in mite tengteng pipute inko lupente, siampute leh Levi mite, laigelhmi Ezra kiang ah, Dan thute ngaikhe ding in akikhawmkhawm uhi. Toupa'n Mosi zang a Israel suante akha sagihna ankuangluina a aidakbuk a atendan ding ua thu apiakdan dan a kigelh amu uhi: “Tang ah kuankhia unla, olive hiang, gam olive leh muising hiang, tum hiang, sing vunsah hiang, akigelh bang a, aidakbuk bawlna ding in va la un, akhopi tengteng uh leh Jerusalem a apuankhiak theihna ding un,” achi hi. Huchi in mite akuankhia ua, ava la ua, michih in a-inn tung ah, ahuangsungte uah, Pathian huangsungte ah, Tui Kongpi a mun lian ah leh Ephraim Kongpi a mun lian ah aidakbukte akibawlta uhi. Huan saltanna a kipan hong pai nawn omkhawmte tengteng in aidakbukte abawl ua, aidakbuk ah ateng uhi. Nun tapa Joshua dam lai a kipan huai ni tanpha in Israel suante'n lah huchibang in ahih nai kei uhi. Huchi in nakpi a kipahna mahmah a-omta hi. Huai lou in niteng in ani masapen a kipan ani tawp ni tan in Pathian Dan laibu sung ah asim hi. Huan ankuangluina ni sagih anei ua; ani giat ni in paidan dungzui in kikhopna thupi a-omta hi.

Hiai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni in Israel suante an ngawl kawm leh sai-ip puansilh kawm leh atung ua lei kibuak kawm in akikhawm ua. Huchi in Israel chite mikhual tengteng a kipan in akikoihtuam ua, adingh ua akhelhnate uleh, apipute uh thulimlouhnate thupha atawi uhi. Amun uah adingh ua, Toupa a Pathian uh Dan laibu sung ah ni khat a aseh lina teng asim ua; aseh lina teng thupha atawi ua, Toupa a Pathian uh abeta uhi. Huchih lai in Levi mite, Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebiah, Bani leh Kenanite dohkan tung ah adingh ua, Toupa a Pathian kiang uah aw ngaihtak in akikou uhi. Huai lai in Levi mite, Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabneiah, Sherebiah, Hodiah, Shebaniah leh Pethahiahte'n,“Dingh unla tangtawn a kipantangtawn pha in Toupa na Pathian uhvualzawl un:huchi in vualzawlna lehphatna tengteng tunglam a tawisang a om,na min thupi vualzawl in om hen.”Khelh Kipuanna Thumna “Nang, nang kia mahmah Toupa na hi;van, vante' van a,sepaihte tengteng,lei leh asung a thil om tengteng,tuipite leh asung uaom tengteng na bawl a,avek un na hawi a;van sepaihte'n nang ahon bia uhi. Abram tel a, Kaldaite Ur a kipan a amah pikhia a,akiang a Abrahammin pepa, Toupa Pathian na hi; Na ma a lungtang ginom na mu a,Kanaan mite, Hit mite,Amor mite, Jebus mite lehGirgas mite gam pe ding aamah toh thukhun bawlpa,achite kiang a pe ding in,na thute bawl piching a;nang lah na diktat ngal a. Mipite'n Akhelhna Uh Apuang Uh Pharaoh tung leh,asikhate tengteng tung leh,agam a mite tengteng tung ah chiamtehna lehthillamdangte na ensak a;amaute siatna ding in kisatheitak in agamtang uhchih lah na thei ngal hi;tuni a bang in, min na kimuh hi.

Ama uah tuipi na khen a,huchi in gam hul tung ahtuipi lak ah apaisuak ua;amau delhte nangtui thuk sung ah, tui hattak sung a suang bang in na pailut hi. Huai lou in sun in meipi kitung in amaute na pi a; zan in meikuang dingh in,apaina ding lampi ua vaknaamaute kiang a pe ding in. Sinai Tang ah leng na hohsuk a,van a kipan in amau na houpih a,vaihawmna dikte leh dan dikte,dan thuseh leh thupiak hoihte na pia hi. Amau kiang ah na Sabbathsiangthou na theisak a,na sikha Mosi khut in,thupiakte leh dan thusehte leh dan amaute na thupiak in na pia hi. Agilkial un van a kipantanghou na pia a,adangtak un suangpi a kipanamaute a ding in tui na pawtkhesak a,amaute pe ding a na khut na lik a,gam luah ding a kuan ding inamaute thu na pia hi. Himahleh amaute leh apipute un kisatheitak in ahih ua,apaupeng ua, na thupiakte angaikhe kei uhi, Thu amang nuam kei ua,alak ua na hih na thillamdangte leng alimsak sam kei uh;himahleh aki-uangsak ua,ahelna uah atanna ua kik nawn ding in heutu khat asep uhi;himahleh nang ngaidam dia mansa,lainatna a dim leh hehpihsiam,heh mengmeng lou, zahngaihna hau,amaute lehngatsan lou Pathian na hi. Ahi, bawngnou sun abawl lai un,Aigupta a kipan a nang hon pikhepahiai na Pathian ahi, achi ua,nakpitak a thangpaihnate abawl lai un. Huchi napi in na zahngaihna tampiteziak in amaute gamdai ahna lehngatsan kei hi:sun in atung ua kipan meipi dingh apaimang kei a,vakna amau pe ding,zan a meikuang dingh leng, apaina lampi uah amaute pi ding in. Amaute chil ding in na kha hoihna pia a, akam uah na Manna na phal lou kei a,amaute adangtak un tui na pia hi.

Ahi, gamdai ah kum sawmliamaute na vak a,bangmah atasam kei ua;apuansilhte uh atul kei a,akhepekte uh abawk kei hi. Huai ban ah lalgamte lehmite amau na pia a,atantuante uh dungzui a na piakkhiakte:Sihon gam, Heshbon kumpipagam leh Bashan kumpipaOg gam alata uhi. Van aksite bang in atate uhna pungsak a, nei ding inalut ding uh chi a, api-le-pute kiang a na gen bang in,gamsung ah na pilut hi. Huchi in tate alut ua gamaneita ua, ama uah gam atengte na satpuk a,Kanaante, akumpite leh,gam a mite, amau khut ah na pia a,huchi a a-utdan ua atung ua ahihtheihna ding un. Khopi hatte, gam hoihte ala ua,thil hoih tengteng a dim innteanei ua, tuibel sekte, grephuante,olive huante, atam a tamtheikungte: huchi in ane ua,avah ua, ahong thau ua,na hoihna thupi ziak in akipak mahmah uhi. Hinapi'n lah thu amang kei ua,na tung ah ahel ua,na dan anunglam uah apai ua,na kiang lam amaute ngasak nawn ding a,amaute dem a thugen na zawlneite athat ua,thangpaihna thupi mahmah abawl uhi. Huaiziak in amelmate uh khut ahamau na pia a,amau ahihgenthei uh:abuai ni ua na kiang aahong kah lai un, van a kipan in na za a;na zahngaihna tampi dungzui in amelmate uhkhut a kipan a amaute hondam ding inakiang uah hondam mite na pia hi. Himahleh atawldam nung un,na ma ah gilou ahih nawn zel ua;huaiziak in amelmate uh khut ah amau na nusia a,huchi in amau atung uah thu anei ua:hinapi in ahong kihei ua,na kiang a akah un,van a kipan na za a;na zahngaihnate dungzui in amautetamveipi na hunkhia hi. Na dan a na pilut theih nawnna ding in,amau na dem a:himahleh kisatheitak in ahih ua,na thupiakte alimsak kei ua,na vaihawmte tung ahakhial zosop uhi,huai mi'n ahihleh,huai ah ahing ding,liang asawisak ua,aki-uangsak ua,aza nuam kei uhi.

Himahleh kum tampi amau na thuakzou a,na zawlneite in na kha zang in amaute na dem a,himahleh angaikhe nuam kei ua;huaiziak in gam mite khut ahamaute na peta hi. Huchi napi in na zahngaihna tampiteziak in amaute na hihbeikeuhkeuh kei a,na lehngatsan kei;nang lah hehpih thei leh chingthei Pathian na hi ngal a. Huaiziak in tu in,ka Pathian uh,thupi Pathian hat leh kihtakhuai,thukhun leh zahngaihna vompa,na ma ah, ka tung uh,ka kumpipate uh tung,ka vaihawmte uh tung,ka siampute uh tung,ka zawlneite uh tung,ka pipute uh tung, na mite,Assuria kumpipate dam lai akipan a tuni tan,na mite tung a,nauveina bangmah tham lou bang in kilang kei hen.
