Akoi abang hitaleh ka tung uahong tung tengteng ah nangna diktat a; nang lah diktak inna hih ngal a,kou bel giloutak in ka hih uhi. Kumpipate leh ka vaihawmteuh hiam, siampute uh hiam,ka pipute uh hiam inna dan azui kei ua,na thupiakte leh na thu theihpihnate,amaute dem a na theihpihnate lahangaikhe nuam sam kei uhi. Agam uah nang nna asem kei ua,na hoih mahmahna ziak aamau na piak, ama ua na piak gam lian leh hoih,anasep gilou ua kipan akilehhei sam kei uhi. Ngai in, tuni in sikhate ka hi ua,agah nekna ding leh huaiahoihte neihna dia ka pipute uh kiang ana piak gam ahihleh, ngai in,asung ah sikhate ka hi uhi. Ka khelhna ziak ua ka tung uana koih kumpipate a ding in anak pun mahmah a,athuthu un, ka pumpite uleh,ka gantate uh tung athilhihtheihna anei ua,kou ka nak gim mahmah uhi.” Huan hiaite tengteng huchibang hita mahleh thukhun muanhuai ka bawl ua, ka gelh ua; ka vaihawmte uh, ka Levi mite uleh ka siampute un, huai ah suai akai uhi.

Suaikaite hiaite ahi uh Nehemiah Tirshatha, Hakaliah tapa leh Zedekiah; Seraiah, Azariah, Jeremiah; Pashur, Amariah, Malkijah; Hattush, Shebaniah, Malluk; Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah; Daniel, Ginnethon, Baruk; Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin; Maaziah, Bilgai, Shemaiah:hiaite siampute ahi uh. Levi mite: huaite,Jeshua, Azaniah tapa,Henadad tapa Binnui, Kadmiel; Mipite'n Kithukimna Suai Akai Uh Mika, Rehob, Hashabiah; Zakkur, Sherebiah, Shebaniah; Hodiah, Bani, Beninu. Mite hausate:Parosh, Pahath-moab,Elam, Zattu, Bani; Bunni, Azgad, Bebai; Adonijah, Bigvai, Adin; Ater, Hezekiah, Azzur; Hodiah, Hashum, Bezai; Hariph, Anathot, Nebai; Magpiash, Meshullam, Hezir; Meshezabel, Zadok, Jaddua; Pelatiah, Hanan, Anaiah; Hoshea, Hananiah, Hasub; Hallohesh, Pileha, Shobek; Rehum, Hasabnah, Maaseiah; Huan Ahijah, Hanan, Anan; Malluk, Harim, Baanah.Kithukimna Thu Huan mipi lak a adangte, siampute, Levi mite, Kongkhak ngakte, Lasa mite, Nethinim mite leh gamte a mite lak a kipan amau leh amau Pathian dan lam a kituamsehte tengteng, azite uh, atapate uh, atanute uh, michih theihna leh theihtheihna neite. A-unaute uh, amiliante uh lam ah abelh tinten ua, Mosi Pathian sikha in apiak Pathian Dan a om ding leh Toupa i Toupa uh thupiak tengteng zui ding leh hih ding a, avaihawmte leh adan thusehte hih ding in hamsia leh kichiamna abawl uhi. Huan i tanute gam a mite pe lou ding leh i tapate a dia atanute uh la lou ding in. Gam a mite'n Sabbath ni a van hiam an nek hiam zuak ding ahon tawi uleh, Sabbath hiam, ni sianthou ni hiam in huaite i lei kei ding uh; huchi in akum sagihna louhaite lak leh leiba chiteng sik i kidek ding uh. Huai lou leng i Pathian uh inn a nasepna ding a kum teng a shekel seh thumna kibasak ding in, thupiakte i kibawl uhi.

Tanghou koihna ding, anpiak thillat gige a ding, halmang thillat gige a ding, Sabbathte, kha thakte, sehsa ankuangte a ding, thil siangthoute a ding, Israel a dia lemna kithoihna bawlna dia khelhna thillatte a ding leh i Pathian inn ua nasepna tengteng a ding in. Ai i san ua, siampute, Levi mite leh mite, sing thillat a ding in, dan a kigelh bang a, i Pathian uh Toupa maitam tung a khul ding, kum teng a, hun sehsa, i pipute inkote dungzui a, i Pathian inn ua laklut ding in. Toupa' inn a, kum teng a, i lei theigah masapente, sing chiteng a gah tengteng a kipan gah masapente, tawi ding in. Dan a kigelh bang in, i tapate lak a piang masapen leh i gantate lak a leng, i bawnghonte lak leh i belamhonte lak a nou masapente, i Pathian inn ua nasem siampute kiang a i Pathian inn ua tawi ding in. I tangbuang mek masakpen uleh, i vei thillatte uleh, sing chiteng gah, uain leh thau, i Pathian uh inn a dantante ah, siampute kiang ah i tawi ding uh; huan i louma a sawm-a-khatte Levi mite kiang ah; amau, Levi mite'n, singtang khopi tengteng uah sawm-a-khat ala uhi. Aaron tapa siampu, Levi mite'n sawm-a-khat alak chiang un, Levi mite kiang ah a-om ding: huchi in Levi mite'n sawm-a-khatte' sawm-a-khat i Pathian inn uah, dantante ah, sumbawm inn ah atawitou ding uhi. Israel suante leh Levi tate'n buh-le-bal, uain, thau, thillat mun siang tui-um belsuan nasem siampute, kongkhak ngakte leh lasa mite omna, mun siangthou a atawi ding uh ahi.Huchi in i Pathian inn i nuse kei ding uhi.

Huchi in mite vaihawmte Jerusalem ah ateng ua: midangte'n leng, khopi siangthou Jerusalem a teng ding sawm lak a khat leh khopi dangte a teng dia seh kuate theihna ding in ai asan uhi. Mite'n Jerusalem a teng ding a uttak a amau leh amau kipete tengteng avualzawlta uhi. Huchi in Jerusalem a teng bial sung a hausate hiaite ahi uh; himahleh Judah khopite ah michih amau khopite uah michih atan chiat uah amau ateng ua, huaite, Israel siampute, Levi mite leh Nethinim mite leh Solomon sikhate tate. Jerusalem ah Judah tate lak a leh Benjamin tate lak a kuate hiam ateng uhi. Judah tate lak ah: Athaiah Uzziah tapa, Zekariah tapa, Amariah tapa, Shephatiah tapa, Mahalalel tapa, Perez tate lak ah; Maaseiah Baruk tapa, Kol-hozeh tapa, Hazaiah tapa, Adaiah tapa, Joiarib tapa, Zekariah tapa, Shiloni tapa. Jerusalem a teng Perez tapate tengteng pasal hangsan ngen zali sawmguk-le-giat ahi uh. Hiaite Benjamin tapate ahi uh: Sallu, Meshullam tapa, Joed tapa, Pedaiah tapa, Kolaiah tapa, Maaseiah tapa, Ithiel tapa, Jeshaiah tapa. Huai nung in Gabbai, Sallai, zakua sawmnih-le-giat. Huan Zikri tapa Joel aheutu uh ahi: huan Senuah tapa Judah khopi tung a nihna ahi. Siampute lak ah: Joiarib tapa Jedaiah, Jakin tapa, Jerusalem A Tengte Levi mite lak ah: Hassub tapa Shemaiah, Azrikam tapa, Hashabiah tapa, Bunni tapa; Shabbethai leh Jozabad, Levi mite hausate lak a, Pathian inn polam nasep a heutu; Mika tapa Mattaniah, Zabdi tapa, Asaph tapa, thumna a kipahthu genna pankhe pipen ahi. Huan Bakbukiah, a-unaute lak a nihna; huan Shammua tapa Abda, Galal tapa, Jeduthun tapa. Khopi siangthou sung a Levi mite tengteng zanih sawmgiat-le-li. Huai ban ah kongkhak ngakte, Akkub, Talmon leh a-unaute uh kongpite ngakte, za sawmsagih-le-nih ahi uhi.

Huan Israel lak a omlaite, siampute lak a Levi mite, Judah khopite tengteng ah a-om ua, michih agouluahna chiat uah. Himahleh Ophel ah Nethinim mite ateng uh; huan mite tung ah Ziha leh Gispa Nethinim a-om uhi. Jerusalem a Levi mite heutu leng Bani tapa Uzzi ahi, Hashabiah tapa, Mattaniah tapa, Mika tapa, Asaph tapate, Pathian inn a nasepna a lasa mite; amau tungtang thu ah kumpipa a kipan a thupiak, niteng a akiphamoh bang in; lasa mite a ding a dan kipsa lah a-om ngal a. Huan Pethahiah, Meshezabel tapa, Judah tapa Zerah tate lak a mipite tungtang thu tengteng amah kumpipa khut ah a-om hi.Kholian Leh Khopi Dang A Tengte Khuate, aloute uh toh ahihleh, Judah tate lak a akhenkhatte Kiriath-arba leh akhotate ah, Dibon leh akhotate ah, Jekabzeel leh akhotate ah ateng ua; Jeshua leh Moladah leh Bethphelet ah; Hazar-shual leh Beer-sheba leh akhotate ah; Ziklag leh Mekonah leh akhotate ah; Enrimmon leh Zariah leh Jarmuth ah; Zanoah, Adullam leh akhotate uah, Lakish leh huai aloute, Azekah leh akhotate. Huchi in Beer-sheba a kipan Hinnom Phaizang tan in giahbuk abawl uhi. Benjamin tate leng Geba a kipan in atengtou zel ua, Mikmash leh Aija ah, Bethel leh akhotate ah; Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah ah; Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim; Hadid, Zeboim. Neballat; Lod leh Ono, khutsiamte phaizang ah. Huan Judah a Levi mite sehkhen bangzah hiam Benjamin toh akizom uhi.

Huan hiaite Joshua leh Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel toh tontou siampute leh Levi mite ahi uh. Siampute:Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra, Amariah, Malluk, Hattush; Shekaniah, Rehum, Meremoth; Iddo, Ginnetho, Abijah; Miamin, Maadiah, Bilgah; Shemaiah, Joiarib, Jedaiah; Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah.Hiaite siampute lak leh a-unaute uh lak aJeshua dam lai a makai lianpente uh ahi. Levi mite mah leng:Jeshua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Sherebiah, Judah, Mattaniah, kipahthu genna tung a om, amah leh a-unaute. Bakbukiah leh Unni leng, a-unaute uh toh venbuk sung ah a-om uh.Siampu Lian Joshua Suante Huan Joshua in Joiakim asuang, Joiakim in Eliashib asuang, Eliashib in Joiada asuang, Joiada in Jonathan asuang, Jonathan in Jaddua asuang hi. Siampute Leh Levite Ezra a pan Meshullam;Amariah a pan Jehohanan; Meliku a pan Jonathan;Shebaniah a pan Joseph; Harim a pan Adna;Meraioth a pan Helkai; Iddo a pan Zekariah;Ginnethon a pan Meshullam; Abijah a pan Zikri; Miniamin lak ah,Moadiah a pan Piltai; Bilgah a pan Shammua;Shemaiah a pan Jehonathan; Joiarib a pan Mattenai;Jedaiah a pan Uzzi; Sallai a pan Kallai;Amok a pan Eber; Hilkiah a pan Hashabiah; Jedaiah a pan Nethaneel.Siampute leh Levite Chiamtehna Eliashib, Joiada, Johanan, Jaddua dam lai in Levi mite, pipute inkote vaihawm makai a gelh ahi uh: Persia mi Darias vaihawm lai a, siampute toh in. Levi tapate, pipute inkuan a lupente, khangthubu ah, Eliashib tapa Johanan dam lai tan a gelh ahi.Tempul A Nasepdan Ding Guanna Huan Levi mite hausate: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, Kadmiel tapa Jeshua, a-unaute uh toh amau hunbi chiat ah Pathian mipa David thupiak dungzui a kipahthu gen ding in kimaituah in adingh uhi. Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkubte kongpite vankoihna dantan kem kongkhak ngakte ahi uhi.

Hiaite Jozadak tapa, Jeshua tapa, Joiakim hun lai a damte ahi ua, huan huai tuh ukpipa Nehemiah leh laigelhmi, siampu Ezra hun lai ahi.Nehemiah In Khopi Kulhbaang Alan Huan Jerusalem kulhbaang latna a ding in a-omna tengteng uah Levi mite azongkhia ua, kipahna toh, kipahthu genna leh lasak, dakkhutbet, tumgingte leh kaihgingte toh Jerusalem a amaute hon pi ding a, kipahna bawl ding in. Huchi in lasa mite tapate akikaikhawm ua, Jerusalem kimvel a phaizang a kipan leh Netophah mite khotate a kipan in; Beth-gilgal a kipan in leng, Geba leh Azmaveth loute a kipan in; lasa mite'n lah Jerusalem kimvel in khotate ana bawlta ngal ua. Huchi in siampute leh Levi mite akihihsiangthou ua, mite leh kongpite leh kulhbaangte ahihsiangthou uhi. Huchih lai in kulhbaang tung ah Judah vaihawmte ka pitou a, kipahthugen leh ahon a pai pawlpi nih ka sep a; huai ah pawl khat kulhbaang tung ah Ekvum Kongpi lam ah apai uhi. Amaute nung in Hoshaiah leh Judah vaihawmte lak a kimkhat, Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam, Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah, Jeremiah, leh siampute tapate lak a kuate hiam pengkulte toh, Zekariah Jonathan tapa, Shemaiah tapa, Mattaniah tapa, Mikaiah tapa, Zakkur tapa, Asaph tapa; a-unaute, Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethaneel, Judah, Hanani Pathian mipa David tumging theihte toh; ama uah Ezra laigelhmi a-om hi. Tuikhuk kongpi kiang ah, amazawntak uah, David khopi dohkang ah apaitou ua, kulhbaang toupaina ah, David inn tunglam ah, suahlam pang a Tui Kongpi pha in. Huan alak ua pawl dang kipahthugente amaute tuak ding in apai ua, kei amau nung ah, kulhbaang tung a, meipi insang tunglam ah, kulhbaang lian tanpha in; Ephraim kongpi tung ah, kongpi lui kiang, ngasa kongpi kiang a Hananel insang, Meah insang, Belam Kongpi tanpha in Venna Kongpi ah adingh den uhi.

Huchi in Pathian insung a kipahthugen pawl nihte leh kei leh ka kiang a vaihawmte lak a akimkhatte adingh ua: Siampute, Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Mikaiah, Elioenai, Zekariah, Hananiah, pengkulte toh; huan Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malkijah, Elam leh Ezer. Huchi in lasa mite'n ngaihtak in, aheutupa uh Jezrahiah toh la asa uhi. Huai ni in kithoihna thupite alan ua, nuam asa uhi; Pathian in lah nopsakna thupi in amau nuam asasak hi; numeite leh naupangte toh akipak uhi: huchi in Jerusalem kipahna husa gamlapi tan ah leng zak in a-om hi.Tempul A Biakna Thilpiakte Huai ni in thilpiakte, vei thillatte, haithak masapente, sawm-a-khatte koihkhawmna dantante a heutu, Dan in aseh bang a, siampu leh Levite tantuan kho chih in ana hihzoh bang zel ua lakhawm ding mite asep uhi. Judahte bel nasemmi siampute leh Levite ziak in akipak mahmah uhi. A Pathian uh indan leh siansakna indan akem ua, huchibang in lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite'n David leh atapa Solomon thupiak bang in ahihta uhi. David leh nidanglai a Asaph dam lai in lasami heutupen leh Pathian kiang a phatna leh kipahthu genna lasate lah a-om ngal a. Huan Zerubbabel dam lai leh Nehemiah dam lai in Israel tengteng in, niteng a akul bang in lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite tantuan ape zel uhi: Levi mite a ding in thilsiangte asepsiang ua; Levi mite'n Aaron tapate a ding in asepsiangthou uhi.

Huai ni in mite zak in Mosi laibu asim ua; Ammon mi leh Moab mi tangtawn in Pathian khawmpi sung a alut ding uh ahi kei chih, huai sung a kigelh amu uhi. Tanghou leh tui a Israel suante dawn lou a, amaute hamsiat ding a, amaute siatna ding a Balaam alak ziak un: himahleh i Pathian in hamsia vualzawlna asuaksakta hi. Dan azak lai un, hichi ahong hi a, gamdangmi suante a pan Israel mite akikhenkhe tuamta uhi.Nehemiah Puahthaknate Huan hiai ma in, siampu Eliashib i Pathian inn ua dantante tung a seh a ompa, Tobiah toh kizom in, ama a ding in dantan thupi abawlkhol a, huai ah amalam in anpiak thillatte, begaw leh tui-um belsuante leh buh-le-bal, uain leh thaute sawm-a-khatte akoih ua, huaite bel Levi mite leh lasa mite leh kongkhak ngak mite kiang a thupiak a piak ahi a; huan vei thillatte siampute a ding in. Himahleh hiai hunte in, Jerusalem ah ka om kei: Babulon kumpipa Artaksarses kum sawmthum-le-nih kum in kumpipa kiang ah ka hoh a, ni bangzah hiam nung in kumpipa phalna ka ngen hi. Huchi in Jerusalem ah ka hong a, Pathian inn pisate sung dantan amah a dia abawlsakna ah, Eliashib in Tobiah a dia gilou ahihdan ka theisiam hi. Huchi in kei hon dahsak mahmah a: huaiziak in dantan a kipan in Tobiah inn van tengteng ka lawnkhia hi. Huan thu ka pia a, dantante ahihsiang ua: huai ah anpiak thillatte leh begaw toh, Pathian inn a tui-um belsuan ka hon la nawn hi. Levi mite tante amau kiang ah piak nai louh in a-om chih ka thei a; huchi in Levi mite leh lasa mite, nasep semte michih aloulam ah ataizak uhi. Kei tuh vaihawmte toh ka kiselta ua, bang ding a Pathian inn mangngilh a om ahia?

ka chi hi. Amau ka kaikhawm a, amun uah ka koih hi. Judah tengteng in buh-le-bal leh uain leh thau sawm-a-khat sumbawm ah ahon tawi uhi. Namdang Mite Toh Kikhenna Aw ka Pathian, hiai thu ah hon theigige inla, ka Pathian inn a ding a ka nasep hoih ka hihte leh huai a zuih dingte nulmang ke'n. Huai lai in Judah ah Sabbath ni a kuate hiam uain suknate chil a, buhphalte hon tawi a, huaite toh asabiltungte van guang ka mu a; uain, grep gahte, theipite van puakgik chi chih, Sabbath ni a Jerusalem a hon tawilutte leng; huan an nekte azuak ni uh huai ni in amaute dem in thu ka gen hi. Huai ah Tura mite leng a-om ua, ngasa ahon tawi ua, van chi tuamtuam toh, Judah tate kiang leh Jerusalem ah Sabbath ni in azuak uhi. Huchi in ke'n Judahte miliante ka kiselpih a, akiang uah, “Bang thil gilou ahia hiai na hih ua, Sabbath na hihnit uh? Na pipute un huchibang in ahih ngei ua hia, i Pathian in eite tung leh hiai khopi tung ah hiai hoih lou tengteng hon tun ahi kei maw? Hinapi in nou Sabbath hihnin in Israel tung ah thangpaihna tamsem na tun ua,” ka chi hi. Huan Jerusalem kongpite Sabbath ni ma a khua amial pat in, hichi ahong hi a, kongkhakte khak ding in thu ka pia a, Sabbath ni abei matan kihong lou ding in thu ka pia a, ka sikhate lak a akhen kongpi tung ah ka pangsak a, huchi a Sabbath ni a puakgik ahong kilaklutlouhna ding in. Huchi in khatvei hiam nihvei hiam sumsin mite leh van chiteng zuak mite Jerusalem polam ah agiak uhi. Amaute dem in thu ka gen a, akiang uah, “Bangziak a kulhbaang kim a giak na hi ua?

Na hih nawn uleh, na tung uah khut ka kha ding,” ka chi lai hi. Huai hun a kipan in Sabbath ni in ahong pai nawnta kei uhi. Kihihsiangthou ding leh hong kuan a kongpite ngak ding, Sabbath ni siangsak ding in, Levi mite thu ka pia hi. Aw ka Pathian, hiai ah leng kei hon theigige in, na zahngaihna letdan dungzui in kei hon hawi in. Huai lai in Judate Ashdod, Ammon leh Moab numeite kitenpihte leng ka mu hi: Huchi in atate'n Ashdod pau kimkhat leh namdangte pau azang ua, Judate pau in apau thei kei uhi. Amaute ka kiselpih a, ka hamsiatkhum a, alak ua kuate hiam ka khen a, amul uh ka bohkhiaksak a, Pathian min lou in ka kichiamsak a, “Na tanute uh atapate uh a ding in na pe kei ding ua, na tapate uh a ding hiam, noumau a ding hiam in leng atanute uh na la ding uh ahi kei chi in. Israel kumpipa Solomon hiaite in akhial kei maw? Hinapi in lah nam tampite lak ah amah bang kumpipa a-om kei a, a Pathian it in a-om a, Israel tengteng tung ah Pathian in kumpipa in abawl hi. Himahleh amah nangawn numei lamdangte'n akhialsak uhi. Ahihleh hiai gilou mahmah hih ding in, numei lamdangte kitenpih a i Pathian tung a talek ding in, na thu hon zui ding ka hi uh maw?” Joiada tapate lak a khat, siampu lianpen Eliashib tapa, Horon mi Sanballat tanu' pasal ahi a; huaiziak in kei a kipan ka delhkhia hi. Aw ka Pathian, siamputna, siamputna thukhun leh Levi mite ahihnit ziak un, amaute theigige in. Huchi in mikhualte tengteng a kipan in amaute ka hihsiang a, siampute a ding leh Levi mite a ding in, michih anasep uah, nasepdante ka sehsak a; hun sehsa a sing thillat a ding leh gah masa a ding in. Aw ka Pathian, hoihna ding in kei hon theigige in.

Kumpipa Ahasueras In Kumpinu Vasti Azahlaksak Huai lai a, Susa Inpi a kumpipa Ahasueras a gam laltutphah tung a atut lai, avaihawm kum thum kum in, avaihawmte leh asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuangluina abawl a; Persia leh Media thuneihna, bialte a miliante leh vaihawmte ama ah a-om uhi. Agam thupi hauhsaknate leh avaihawmna sang zahtakhuaina ni tampi, ni za-le-sawmgiat a-ensak hi. Huchi in hiai nite zoh in, kumpipa'n Susa Inpi a om mite tengteng, aneu leh alian a ding in kumpipa Kulhpi huangsung ah, ankuangluina ni sagih abawl hi. Puan kang khaite, ahing, adum, puanmalngat hoih leh sandup khauzangte a dangka zungbuhte leh suangpak khuamte a henden a-om a, tutna nemte dangka-eng leh dangka a bawl, suangchian suangpak san, ngou, eng leh vom a bawl tung ah a-om uhi. Dangka-eng noute in dawn ding amau apia ua, noute akibang kei vek uh; kumpipa uain tampi, kumpipa khuttawi letna dungzui zel in. Huchi in dan bang zel in uain dawnna a-om a; kuamah phutluih a-om kei; kumpipa'n a-inn heutu tengteng kiang ah, michih in nuam asak bang zel ua ahih ding un atheisak khin hi. Kumpinu Vasti in leng kumpipa Ahasueras inn a om numeite a ding in ankuangluina abawl sam hi. Ani sagih ni a, kumpipa lungtang uain a kipak a a-om lai in, Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha leh Abagtha, Zethar leh Karkaste, kumpipa Ahasueras omna a nasem michilgehte thu apia hi. Kumpipa ma a kumpi lukhu toh Vasti hon tonpih a, akilawmna mite leh vaihawmte ensak ding in, amah et in ahoih hi. Himahleh kumpinu Vasti in michilgehte zang a kumpipa thupiak hoh lou ding in asel a, huaiziak in kumpipa aheh mahmah a, asung ah ahehna akuang hi.

Huchih lai in hunte thei mipilte kiang ah kumpipa'n, huchibang lah kuapeuh dan leh vaihawmna theite lau a kumpipa omdan sek ahi him hi. Amah zom in Karsena, Shethar, Admatha, Tarshish, Meres, Marsena leh Memukan, Persia leh Media vaihawmtu sagihte kumpipa mai mute leh gamsung a tu masate ahi uhi. “Michilgehte zang a kumpipa Ahasueras chih ahih louh ziak in, dan dungzui in kumpinu Vasti tung ah bang i hih ding ua?” achi hi. Kumpipa leh vaihawmte ma ah Memukan in adawng a, “Kumpinu Vasti kumpipa tung ah kia thil diklou hih ahi kei a, kumpipa Ahasueras bial sung a om vaihawmte tengteng tung leh mite tengteng tung ah leng hih ahi. Kumpipa Ahasueras in ama a hong pai ding in kumpinu Vasti thu apia a, himahleh ahong pai kei, chih akigenthang chiang in, hiai kumpinu thilhih numei tengteng kiang atung ding a, amit uah apasalte uh simmohna suaksak ding ahi. Tuni a kumpinu thilhih na za Persia leh Media vaihawmte'n kumpipa vaihawmte tengteng kiang ah huchi mah bang in agen ding uh. Huchi in nakpi a kisimmohna leh thangpaihna ahong kipankhe ding hi. Kumpipa deihlam ahihleh, amah a kipan kumpi thupiak pekhia henla, kumpipa Ahasueras ma ah Vasti hong pai nawn het lou ding chih, hihlamdan theih louh ding in, Persia mite leh Media mite dante lak ah gelh in om hen; huan kumpipa'n amah sang a hoihzaw midang khat amah kumpi mun leh mual peleh. Huchi in kumpipa'n thupiak abawl ding a, gamsung pumpi a akithehzak chiang in, athupi ngal a; zi tengteng in apasalte uh, aliante leh aneute kiang ah zahtakna ape ding uh,” chi in. Huchi in thugen in kumpipa leh lalte akipaksak a; huchi in Memukan thu dungzui in kumpipa'n ahihta hi. Ama'n lah huai a kigelh dungzui in, kumpipa bial tengteng, bial chiteng leh mi chiteng kiang ah apau uh dungzui in, huchi a michih in ama insung mahmah a dante apuaklut theih a, amite pau dungzui a, athehzak theihna ding in laikhakte akhakta hi.

Hiai thilte zoh in, kumpipa Ahasueras thangpaihna lungkimsak a om in, Vasti bang ahia ahih, asiatna dia bang ahia thupiak chih atheigige hi. Esther Kumpinu Hong Hi Huchi in nungak kumpipa lungkimsak pen Vasti sik in kumpinu hi hen,” achi uhi. Huai thil in kumpipa alungkimsak a; huchibang in ahihta hi. Susa Inpi ah Juda mi kuahiam, amin Mordekai, Jair tapa, Shimei tapa, Benjamin mi a-om a; amah bel Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jekoniah apimang a om salte toh pimang in a-om uhi. Ama'n Hadassah, huai tuh Esther, apaneu tanu akem piching hi; ama'n nu leh pa anei kei. Huai nungak akilawm in amel ahoih hi, anu leh pa asih un Mordekai in atanu ding in ala hi. Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl akizak in, nungak tampi Susa Inpi, Hegai in akaihkhawm a-om lai un, Esther leng kumpipa' inn ah, Hegai, numeite kempa nuai ah ahon pi uhi. Huchi in nungak in amah alungkimsak a, ama deihsakna angahta a; ama'n siansakna ding in athilte amah ape pah a, atantuante toh, amah piak ding akilawm, kumpipa' inn a kipan nungak sagih toh; amah leh anungakte numeite inn a mun hoihpen ah asuanta hi. Esther in ahihna agenkhe kei a, atanaute hihna leng agenkhe sam kei hi; Mordekai in lah genkhe lou ding in amah athuhilh ngal a. Huchi in Mordekai bel niteng in numeite inn mai ah Esther in bangchi in ahih zel a, bang ahong chi dia chih thei ding in ahoh zel hi. Numeite a dia dan dungzui a kha sawm-le-nih, murrah thau toh kha guk, gimnamtuite toh kha guk leh numeite siansakna ding a thilte toh, huchibang in asiansakna nite hihkim a a-om nung in, nungak chih kumpipa Ahasueras kiang a ava lut hun uh atungta hi.

Nungakte kumpipa kiang a alut chiang un, kumpipa' inn a hohpih ding in numeite omna a kipan adeihdeih uh piak in a-om uhi. Nitaklam in apai a, azing nawn in numeite inn nihna ah, kumpipa michilgeh Shasgaz, meite kempa inn ah ahong kik a, kumpipa amah ah kipak napi in, kumpipa kiang ah ahong lut kei a, amin a sap in a-om hi. Huchi a amah atanu ding a lapa, Mordekai paneu Abihail tanu, Esther kumpipa kiang a ava lut hun ahong tun in, Hegai kumpipa michilgeh, numeite kempa a seh chih ngal louh bangmah akan kei hi. Huchi in amah ente tengteng mitmuh in Esther in deihsakna atang hi. Huchi in Esther kumpipa Ahasueras kiang a kumpi inn ah akha sawmna, Tebeth kha a avaihawm kum sagihna kum in laklut in a-omta hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n numei tengteng sang in Esther a-it a, nungak siangthoute sang in amitmuh in hehpihna leh deihsakna atang hi. Huchi in alutung ah lallukhu akoih a, Vasti sik in kumpinu ding in amah abawlta hi. Huchih lai in kumpipa'n avaihawmte tengteng leh asikhate tengteng a ding in ankuang thupi, “Esther Ankuang mahmah,” aluita a; bialte kiang ah khawlna abawl a, kumpipa siamna bang zel in, thilpiakte apia hi.Mordekai In Kumpipa Hinna Ahondam Huchi a nungak siangthoute nihveina dia kaihkhawm a-om lai un, Mordekai bel kumpipa kongpi ah atu hi. Esther in atanaute leh amite hihna agenkhe kei; amah kiang a khanletsak a om bangtak in Mordekai thupiak bang in ahih hi. Huai lai a, Mordekai kumpipa kongpi a atut lai in, kumpipa michilgeh lak a nih, Bigthan leh Teresh, kongkhak ngakte aheh ua, kumpipa Ahasueras tung a khut kha ding in azongta uhi. Huai thil Mordekai in athei a, ama'n kumpinu kiang ah atheisak hi. Esther in Mordekai min in huai akumpipa ahilhta hi. Huchi in athu akikanleh, huchibang ahi ngei chih akimukhia a, anih un sing dawn ah khailup in a-om uhi. Hiai thu tanchin gelhna laibu ah kumpipa ma ah akigelh hi.

Hiai thilte nung in kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman akaisangsak a, malam anawtsak a, akiang a om vaihawmte tengteng tunglam ah atutphah akoih hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n amah tungtang thu huchibang a apiak bang in kumpipa sikha tengteng, kumpipa kongpi a omte Haman azahna pia in akun uhi. Himahleh Mordekai akun kei a, amah zahna abawl kei hi. Judate Thahgamna Dia Haman Thilgel Huan hichi ahong hi a, niteng a amah ahoupih lai un, amau angaikhe kei a, Mordekai thu pai ding hia pai lou ding chih thei ding in Haman ahilh ua; amah Juda mi ahi chih amaute ahilhta hi. Huchi a Mordekai niamchik a kun lou in, amah azahtak kei chih Haman in atheih in, aheh mahmah hi. Himahleh Mordekai tung kia a khut khak bang tham lou in angaihtuah a; Mordekai mite lah amah a-ensakta ngal ua; huchi in Haman in Ahasueras gam pumpi a om Judate tengteng, Mordekai mite, hihgawp ding in azongta hi. Kumpipa Ahasueras vaihawm akum sawm-le-nih ni, akha khatna, Nisan kha in, “Pur,” asan ua, huai tuh aisan ahi, Haman ma ah, niteng in, kha teng in, akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha tan in. Huan Haman in kumpipa Ahasueras kiang ah, “Mi kuate hiam kithehzak a na gam bial sung tengteng a mite lak a dalh a-om ua; adante uh mi tengteng dan toh akibang kei a; kumpipa dante azui kei uhi. Huaiziak in amaute thuakzoh kumpipa punna ding ahi kei hi. Kumpipa deihlam ahihleh, hihsiat a a-omna ding un lai kigelhleh, kumpipa nasepna a heutute khut ah ke'n dangka talent singkhat ka pe ding, kumpipa sumbawmte a tawilut ding in,” achi hi. Huchi in akhut a kipan kumpipa'n azungbuh asuah a, Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman, Judate melmapa kiang ah apia hi.

Huchi in kumpipa'n Haman kiang ah, “Dangka na kiang a piak ahi, mipi leng, amau tung a pha na saksak hih ding in,” achi hi. Huchih lai in akha khatna, ani sawm-le-thum ni in, kumpipa laigelhmite asamlut ua, kumpipa heutu liante leh kumpipa bial chih a omte tengteng leh mi chiteng vaihawmte Haman in thu apiak peuhmah dungzui in akigelhta hi. Bial chih kiang ah huai a kigelh dungzui in, michih kiang ah apau bang zel un; kumpipa Ahasueras min in akigelh a, kumpipa zungbuh in suai akisawn hi. Huchi in Adar kha, akha sawm-le-nih, ani sawm-le-thum ni mahmah a, ni khat a, Juda mite tengteng atek-akhang naupang noute leh numeite hihsiat ding, that ding leh mangthangsak ding in, kumpipa bial sung tengteng ah dak in laikhakte akhak ua, asum uh gallak a laksak ding in. Laigelh teisawn, thupiak bial teng a piakkhiak ding leh huai ni a dia mansa a om chiat ding in, mi tengteng kiang ah asuah uhi. Kumpipa thupiak in dakte kinohtak in asawlkhia ua, Susa Inpi ah thupiak akipekhia hi. Huchi in dawn ding in kumpipa leh Haman atu ua; himahleh Susa khopi ahamhaihsak hi.

Huchi a thil kihih tengteng Mordekai in atheih in, apuante abotkek a, vut toh sai-ip puan asilh a, khopi laizang ah apaikhia a, ngaihtak leh nakpi in akap hi. Kumpipa kongpi mai pha in ahong pai a, sai-ip puansilh mi kuamah lah kumpipa kongpi sung ah alut thei kei hi. Huchi in bial chiteng a, koi lai peuh a kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl tunna ah, Judate lak ah nakpitak a suunna, an ngawlna, kahna, mauna a-om hi. Huchi in mi tampi sai-ip puan silh in, vut lak ah alum uhi. Mordekai In Esther Panpihna Angen Huchi in Esther in Hatak, kumpipa michilgehte lak a khat asam a, amah vil ding a kumpipa'n aseh, Mordekai kiang a hoh ding in thu apia hi, hiai bang thu ahi, bangziak a hichi ahia chih thei ding in. Huchibang in kumpipa kongpi mai a om, khopi mun za ah Mordekai kiang ah Hatak ava pawtkhia hi. Mordekai in atung a tung tengteng thu amah ahilh a, Judate a dia, amaute hihsiatna ding, kumpipa sumbawmte a Haman in dangka sum piak ding a achiam zah geih ahilh hi. Huai lou leng Esther kiang a lak ding leh akiang a puan ding in amaute hihsiatna ding a Susa a thubawl piakkhiak laigelh kiteisawn amah apia a; kumpipa kiang ava hoh ding a hilh ding in, akiang athumna va bawl ding leh amite a dia, ama a ngetna va bawl ding in. Huchi in Hatak ahong a Mordekai thute Esther ahilh hi. Huchih lai in Esther in Hatak kiang ah thu agen a, Mordekai a ding thukhah apia hi.

“Kumpipa sikhate tengteng leh kumpipa bialte a mite'n athei kilkel uhi, mi kuapeuh numei, pasal leng, sap louh a, kumpipa pisa sungnungzaw pen a ahoh uleh, amah a ding in dan khat a-om a, ‘Sihsak ding, chih leh ‘Ahing ding, chi a, kumpipa'n dangka-eng kumpi chiang aletkhumte chih louh ngal, himahleh hiai ni sawmthum sung kumpipa kiang a hong pai ding in sap in ka om nai kei hi,” chi in. Huan Esther thute Mordekai ahilh uhi. Huchih lai in Mordekai in Esther kiang a dawnna va tun nawn ding in amau achi a, “Juda tengteng sang a, kumpipa insung a nang na suahtak tuan ding kingaihtuah het ke'n. Nang hiai hun a bangmah gen lou a na daih dideleh, mun dang a kipan in Judate ding in panpihna leh hutkhiakna ahong om ding a, himahleh nang leh na pa inkote na mangthang ding uh: hun hichibang a dia hong lal na hih mel kua'n athei a?” Huchi in Esther in Mordekai kiang a dawnna va tun ding in amau achi hi. “Kuan inla, Susa a om Judate tengteng kaikhawm inla kei a ding in an ngawl unla, ni thum, zan hiam sun hiam: nek lah ne kei unla, dawn leng dawn kei un. Huchi mah bang in ke'n leng ka nungakte toh an ka ngawl ding uh; huai chiang in kumpipa kiang ah ka hoh ngeingei ding, dan bang zaw ahi kei a, huchi a ka manleh, mang ka himai ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Mordekai akuan a, Esther in amah thu apiak tengteng bang in agamta hi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, ani thum ni in, Esther in akumpi puansilh asilh a, kumpipa' inn zawn a, kumpipa pisa sungnungzaw pen ah ava dingh a; kumpipa bel inn lutna zawn a, kumpi inn ah alaltutphah tung ah atu hi. Hichibang ahi a, kumpipa'n pisa a kumpinu Esther dingh amuh in, amitmuh in deihsakna atangta: kumpipa'n akhut a om dangka-eng kumpi chiang Esther lam ah alik hi. Huchi in Esther ahong painai a, kumpi chiangdawn ahong khoih hi. Kumpipa'n akiang ah, “Bang na deih a, kumpinu Esther? Na ngetna bang ahia? Gam kimkhat tan leng piak na hi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Esther in, “Kumpipa'n hoih asakleh tuni in kumpipa leh Haman amah a dia ka bawl an nekna ah hong pai un,” achi hi. Esther In An Ne Ding In Kumpipa Leh Haman Achial Huan uain adawn lai un kumpipa'n Esther kiang ah, “Bang ahia na thumna? Phal ahihtheihna ding in bang ahia na ngetna? Gam kimkhat tan in leng piak ahi ding,” achi hi. Esther in adawng a, “Ka thumna leh ka ngetna hiai ahi: Kumpipa mitmuh a deihsakna ka tanleh, ka thumna phal ding leh ka ngetna bawl ding a kumpipa alungkimleh, kumpipa leh Haman, amau a dia ka bawl ding an nekna ah hong le uh, kumpipa'n achih bang in zingchiang in ka hih ding,” achi hi.Haman In Mordekai Thah Atum Huchi in huai ni in nuamsa leh lung kipak in Haman apaikheta a: himahleh Mordekai kumpipa kongpi a om, Haman in ama a Mordekai dingh lou a tat leng tang lou amuh in, atung ah aheh mahmah hi. Huchi in leng Haman aki-ip teitei a, inn ah apaita; huan mi asawl a alawmte leh azi Zeresh ahon tonpih hi.

Haman in akiang uah, ahauhsakna thupina leh atate tamdan leh kumpipa'n akaisansakna thil tengteng leh kumpipa sikhate vaihawmte tung a amasak tuamdan agen hi. Haman in, ahi, “Esther in an nekna abawl ah kumpipa toh kei chih louh ngal mi kuamah ahohsak kei; zingchiang in leng kumpipa toh kei ahon sam hi. Himahleh Mordekai huai Juda mipa, kumpipa kongpi a tu ka muh lai teng hiaite tengteng kei a ding in bangmah aphatuam kei,” achi lai hi. Huchi in azi Zeresh leh alawmte'n akiang ah, “Khailupna khuam tong sawmnga a sang kibawl henla, zingsang in nang kumpipa kiang ah thu gen inla, huai a Mordekai khailup ahihtheihna ding in; huchi in vualnuamtak in kumpipa toh an nekna ah na hoh ding uh,” achi uhi. Hiai in Haman akipaksak a; huchi in khailupna khuam abawlsakta hi.

Huai zan in kumpipa a-ihmu thei kei; tanchin chiamtehna laibu hon tawi ding in thu apia a, huaite kumpipa ma ah asim uhi. Kumpipa michilgehte lak a mi nih Bigthan leh Teresh, kongkhak vengte'n, kumpipa Ahasueras tung a khut khak sawmte tanchin Mordekai in agen chih kigelhna muh in a-om hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n, “Hiai ziak in Mordekai tung ah bang zahtakna leh thupina hih in a-om a?” achi hi. Kumpipa sikha amah nasemte'n, “Amah a ding in bangmah hih a-om kei,” achi uhi. Kumpipa'n, “Pisa a om kua ahia?” achi a. Huchi in Haman, kumpipa' inn pisa ponungzaw ah, kumpipa kiang a abawlkholhsa khailupna khuam a Mordekai khai ding thu gen ding in ahong hi. Kumpipa sikhate'n akiang ah, “Ngai in pisa ah Haman adingh nilouh hi,” achi ua. Kumpipa'n, “Hong lut heh,” achi hi. Kumpipa'n Mordekai Apahtawi Haman in kumpipa kiang ah, “Kumpipa'n apahtawi nopmi a ding in, kumpipa'n asilh zel kumpi puansilh hon lakhia henla, sakol kumpipa tuan zelna leng, aluzang a lallukhu akoihna zel: Huchi in puansilh leh sakol kumpipa vaihawmpih thupi penpente lak a khat khut ah pekheleh, huaite akumpipa'n zahtak a-utpa azeptheihna ding un leh khopi kongzing lak ah sakol tung ah tuangsak henla, ama ah, huchibang in kumpipa'n apahtawi nopte kiang ah hih in a-om ding, chi in puang leng,” achi hi. Huai laitak in kumpipa'n Haman kiang ah, “Kin inla, na chih bang in, puansilh leh sakol la inla, kumpipa kongpi a tu zel Juda mi Mordekai tung ah hih in: na gen tengteng bangmah vuaksuak kei hen,” achi hi. Huchi in Haman in puansilh leh sakol ala a, Mordekai azem a, khopi kongzing lak ah atuangsak a, ama ah, “Hichibang in kumpipa'n azahtak nopmi tung a ahih ahi ding,” chi in apuangta hi.

Huan kumpipa kongpi ah Mordekai ahong pai nawn hi. Himahleh Haman bel suun leh alutang khuhsa in a-inn lam ah kintak in apai hi. Huchi in Haman in azi Zeresh kiang leh alawmte tengteng kiang ah atung a thil tung tengteng agen vek hi. Huaitak in amipilte leh azi Zeresh in akiang ah, “Ama a na puk patna Mordekai, Juda chi a mi ahihleh, amah na zou kei ding, himahleh ama ah na puk ngei ding,” achi uhi.Haman Kiakniamna Amah toh ahoulim san lai un, kumpipa michilgehte ahong pai ua, Esther in an nek ding abawlna a ding in kintak in hong pita uhi.

Huchi in kumpipa leh Haman kumpinu Esther toh an nekna ah ahong uhi. Uain adawn lai un ani nih ni in kumpipa'n Esther kiang ah, “Bang ahia na thumna, kumpinu Esther? Ahon phalsak ding uh bang ahia na ngetna? Gam kimkhat leng piak in na om ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Esther kumpinu'n adawng a, “Aw kumpipa, na mitmuh a deihsakna ka tan a, kumpipa kipahna ahihleh, ka thumna ah ka hinna leh ka mite hinna piak in om hen: Zuak in ka omta ua, kei leh ka mite, hihgawp a om ding in, thah a om ding in leh hihmang ding in. Sikhapa ding leh sikhanu ding a zuak a om hi le ung zaw, melma in kumpipa siatna gun bawl theita kei mahleh, dai dide ding hi veng in,” achi hi. Kumpipa Ahasueras in thu agen a, kumpinu Esther kiang ah, “Kua ahia, koi a om ahia, huchibang a lungtang sung a tum ngam?” achi hi. Esther in, “Melma leh gal, hiai giloupa Haman mah,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa leh kumpinu ma ah Haman alauta hi. Huchi in uain dawnkhamna a kipan aheh ziak in kumpipa adingkhia a, inpi huansung ah alut a; huchi in kumpinu Esther kiang a ahinna ngen ding in Haman adingh hi; kumpipa'n asiatna ding in hoih lou a tup a-om chih lah athei ngal a. Kumpipa Kulhpi huan a kipan uain an nekna mun ah ahong kik a; huchi in Esther omna tutphah nem tung ah Haman apuk hi. Kumpipa'n, “Inn sung a ka ma a kumpinu nangawn sual ding ahi hia?” achi hi. Kumpipa kam a thupawt bang in, Haman maitang atuamsakta uhi. Huai lai in kumpipa ma a om zel michilgehte lak a khat, Harbonah in, “En un, Haman in Mordekai, kumpipa gum a thugenpa a dia abawl, khailupna khuam tong sawmnga a sang, Haman inn ah adingh hi,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa'n, “Huai ah amah khailum un,” achi hi. Huchi in Mordekai a dia abawlkholhsak khailupna khuam ah Haman akhailumta uhi. Huchi in kumpipa thangpaihna adaita hi.

Huai ni in kumpipa Ahasueras in kumpinu Esther kiang ah Judate melmapa Haman inn apia hi. Kumpipa ma ah Mordekai ahong a; Esther in amah a ding in kua ahia chih agen khinta hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n azungbuh asuah a, Haman a kipan alak, Mordekai kiang ah apeta hi. Esther in Haman inkote tung ah Mordekai akoihta hi. Esther in kumpipa ma ah thu agen lai a, akhebul a puk in, Agag mi Haman gilou bawl leh Judate siatna ding a alunggel khitsa a lunggelna koihmang ding in khitui toh amah angen ngutngut hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n Esther lam ah adangka-eng kumpi chiang alen a. Huchi in Esther athou a kumpipa ma ah adingh hi. Ama'n, “Kumpipa lungkimna ahih a, amitmuh a deihsakna ka tan a, kumpipa ma a thil dik a alat a, amuh a lungkimhuai ka hihleh, Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman in laikhak abawlte kumpipa bial a om Judate hihsiatna ding a agelh sut in om hen. Huchi lou in ka mite tung a gilou tung ding ke'n bangchi in ka en ngam dia? Ahihkeileh ka tanaute siatna bangchi in ka mu ngam dia?” achi hi. Kumpipa Ahasueras in kumpinu Esther kiang leh Juda mi Mordekai kiang ah, “Ngai un, Judate tung a akhut akhak ziak in, Haman inkote leh khailupna khuam a akhailuppa uh amah Esther kiang ah apeta hi. Kumpipa Ahasueras Thuseh Thak Huchi in kumpipa laigelhmite asam ua, akha thumna Sivan kha a, ani sawmnih-le-thum ni in

Judate tungtang thu Mordekai in thu apiak bang in gam heutute kiang leh India a kipan Ethiopia pha a om bialte ukpipate leh vaihawmte, bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagih, huai a kigelhdan bang zel a bial chiteng kiang, mi chih apau uh dungzui zel in, alaigelh uh bang zel a Judate, apau uh bang zel in akiang uah gelh in a-omta hi. Kumpipa Ahasueras min in agelh a, kumpipa zungbuh in asawn a, kumpipa nasepna a kizangsek sakol man-gang, hoihtak a vulhte a tuang in sakol tung ah dak in laikhakte akhakta hi. Huai ah kumpipa'n khopi chiteng a om Judate kikhawmkhawm a, ahinna ua dia pang a, amaute sual ding a anau neute uleh anumeite uh, asum uh gallak a la ding a kisa mite leh bial thilhihtheihna hihse ding leh mangthangsak ding in phalna apia hi. Kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng ah ni khat in, huai bel, akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha ahi a, ani sawm-le-thum ni geih in. Bial chih a piak ding chi a thupiak, kigelh a teisawn mite tengteng kiang ah suah in a-om a, huai ni chiang a Judate'n amelmate uh tung a phu la dia mansa a a-om chiat theihna ding un. Huchi in dak kumpipa nasepna a zat sakol man-gangte tung a tuangte apaikhia ua, kumpipa thupiak in amau anoh in akhawksak ngal ua; thupiak pen Susa Inpi a piakkhiak ahi. Huchi in Mordekai bel kumpi puandum leh kang, dangka-eng lallukhu thupitak toh, puanaktual puanmalngat hoih leh sandup toh kumpipa ma a kipan apaikheta hi: Susa khopi akikou a, akipak hi. Huchi in Judate'n kouzanna leh kipahna, nopna leh zahna anei uhi. Bial chih leh khopi chih a koi lai peuh a kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl paina peuh ah, Judate'n ankuangluina leh ni hoih kipahna leh nopna anei uhi. Huchi in gam a mite lak a tampite Judate ahong hi ua; Judate launa lah atung uah ahong omta hi.

Huan akha sawm-le-nih, Adar kha, huai mah ani sawm-le-thum ni, kumpipa thupiak leh athubawl tangtunna ding ahong nai lai in, Judate melmate'n atung ua vaihawmna neih akilamet ni uh; hinapi a, ahilou lam a hong kilehbut a, Judate'n amau mudahte tung a vaihawmna ahon neih lai un; Kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng akhopite uah Judate, amau siatna zongte tung a khut kha ding in, akikhawmkhawm ua: kuamah in lah amaute anangzou kei uhi; mite tengteng tung ah lah amaute launa ahong omta hi. Huchi in bialte a vaihawmte leh gamuk mite leh ukpipate leh kumpipa nasemte'n, Judate apanpih ua; Mordekai launa lah atung uah ahong om ngal a. Kumpipa' inn ah Mordekai athupi a, bial tengteng ah amin athangkheta hi: hiai mipa Mordekai lah ahong thupi semsem hi. Huchi in namsau a sat in Judate'n amelmate tengteng athat ua, thahna leh hihsiatna in, amaute mudahte tung ah ahih ding uh ahihta uhi. Susa Inpi ah Judate'n mi zanga athat ua ahihgawp uhi. Parsandatha, Dalphon, Aspatha, Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, Judate'n Amelmate Uh Ahihsia Uh Judate melmapa Hammedatha tapa Haman tapate, athat ua; himahleh gallak ah akhut uh anga kei uhi. Huai ni in Susa Inpi a thah a om zah kumpipa ma ah ahon tawi uhi. Huan kumpipa'n kumpinu Esther kiang ah, “Judate'n Susa Inpi sung ah mi zanga athat ua ahihsia uh, Haman tapa sawmte toh; kumpipa bial dangte ah bang achi bawlta phet ding uam ah: Khai le, bang ahia na nget? Na kiang ah phal ahi ding; ahihkeileh bang ngetbeh na nei lai a? Suk pichin ahi ding,” achi hi. Esther in, “Kumpipa' lungkimna ahihleh, zingchiang a tuni a thupiak bangbang a gamtang ding in Susa a om Judate phal inla, Haman tapa sawmte khailupna khuam ah kikhai le uh,” achi hi.

Huchi in huchibang a hih ahi ding chi in kumpipa'n thu apia hi: Susa ah thubawl akipekhia a: huchi in Haman tapa sawmte akhaita uhi. Adar kha mah ani sawm-le-li ni in Susa a om Judate akikhawmkhawm ua, Susa ah mi zathum athat uh; himahleh gallak tung ah akhut uh anga kei uhi. Huchi in kumpipa bialte a om Juda dangte akikhawmkhawm ua, ahinna uh ahum ua, amelmate ua kipan khawlna anei ua, amau mudahte lak ah mi singsagih-le-sangnga athat ua; himahleh gallak tung ah akhut uh anga kei uh. Adar kha ani sawm-le-thum ni in hiai tuh hih ahi; huai mah ani sawm-le-li ni in akhawl ua, ankuanglui ni leh kipahna ni in azang uhi. Himahleh Susa a om Judate akikhawm ua, ani sawm-le-thum ni in leh ani sawm-le-li ni in; huai mah ani sawm-le-nga ni in akhawlta ua, ankuanglui ni leh kipahna ni in azang uhi. Huaiziak in khoneute a Judate, kho kulhbaang nei lou a tengte'n, Adar kha ani sawm-le-li ni kipahna ni leh ankuanglui ni in, ni hoih, khat-le-khat tantuan kikhaktuahna ni in azang uhi.Purim Kut Kipatna Huan Mordekai in hiai thilte agelh a, kumpipa Ahasueras bial tengteng a om Judate, gamla leh nai a omte kiang ah akhak hi. Kum teng a, Adar kha ani sawm-le-li leh ani sawm-le-nga ni, kum teng a tan ding ahilhna ding in, Judate amelmate ua kipan akhawl ni uh, amau a dia lungkhamna kipahna ahong hihna kha, misi suunna ni hoih ahong hihna kha bang in: huai nite ankuangluina leh kipahna ni a a-om ua, tantuante khat-le-khat akikhaktuah uhi; gentheite kiang a thilpiakte piakna aneihtheihna ding un. Huchi in Judate'n apatkhitsa bang un leh Mordekai in amaute kiang a agelh khitsa bang in hih ding in atheisiam uhi.

Agag mi Hammedatha tapa Haman, Juda tengteng melmapa'n Juda tengteng siatna ding amau hihse ding, angaihtuah a, amaute hihgawp ding leh amaute hihse ding a, Pur, (huai tuh aisan ahi) ana paih ziak in. Himahleh athu kumpipa ma ahong tun in, angaihtuah gilou, Judate siatna ding a angaihtuah, ama lutung mahmah a kibung ding in laikhakte in thu apeta a; huchi a amah leh atapate khailupna khuam a khai a a-omna ding un. Huchibang ahih ziak in hiai nite Pur min zui in Purim asa uhi. Huaiziak in hiai laikhak thute tengteng ziak leh hiai thu tungtang thu amuhsa uh, atung ua ahong tun ziak in. Judate'n ahihkip ua, amau tung leh asuante uh tung leh amaute huchibang akizomkhawm bangte tengteng tung ah akisuanta uhi, huchi a pel lou a, huai a laigelh dungzui leh huai a hun sehsa dungzui a, kum chiteng a hiai ni nihte atantheihna ding un. Huchi a hiai nite akhang-akhang a, a-inkuankuan a, bial chiteng leh khopi chiteng atheihgigeleh tan a a-omtheihna ding in; huchi a hiai Purim nite Judate lak a kipan a azuau louh a, huaite theihgigena leng asuante uh a kipan amanlouhna ding in. Huchi in kumpinu Esther, Abihail tanu leh Juda mi Mordekai in, hiai Purim laikhak nihna sukkipna ding in thuneihna tengteng in agelhta uhi. Judate tengteng kiang ah, Ahasueras gam a bial zakhat sawmnih-le-sagihte kiang ah, lungmuanna leh thutak thute, laikhakte akhakta hi. Hiai Purim nite a hun asehsa uh, Juda mi Mordekai leh kumpinu Esther in huaite pha asak uh dungzui leh amau a ding leh asuante uh a dia, an ngawlna leh akahna thu ua ana hihkip bang ua hihkip ding in. Esther thupiak in hiai Purim thute ahihkip a; laibu ah kigelh ahita hi.

Huan kumpipa Ahasueras in gam tung leh tuipi tuikulh gam tung ah siah abawlta hi. Huchi in athilhihtheihna leh ahatna thilhihte tengteng leh Mordekai, kumpipa'n amah akoihsanna, letna genna kim, Media leh Persia kumpipate chiamtehna laibu a gelh ahi kei uh maw? Juda mi Mordekai, kumpipa zom a Judate lak a lian ahi, a-u anau mi tampi in apom uh ahi. Ama'n mite hoihna ding zong a nasem achipihte tengteng kiang ah lemna thu agen hi. Mordekai Minthanna

Setan In Job Aze-et Ama'n tapa sagih leh tanu thum anei hi. Aneih-le-lam leng belam sangsagih, sangawngsau sangthum, bawngtal zanga leh sabiltungnu zanga leh inkuan thupi mahmah ahi, huchi in hiai mipa suahlam tate tengteng lak a thupipen ahi. Huan atapate akuan ua khat chiat inn ah, ani ni in ankuangluina anei ua; huchi in mi asawl ua asanggam numei thumte uh amau kiang a ne ding leh dawn ding in asamsak uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, a-ankuanglui san laitak un, Job in mi asawl a amaute ahihsiangthou a, zingsang beltak in athou a, avek ua zah dungzui in halmang thillatte alan a: Job in, “Ka tapate'n thil ahihkhial un, alungtang un Pathian ahamsiat kha ding uh,” achi hi. Hichibang in Job in ahih gige hi. Huchi in Toupa ma a Pathian tapate ahong kilak ni uh a-om a, alak uah Setan leng ahong pai hi. Huchi in Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Koi a hong kipan na hia?” achi hi. Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Leitung langkhat langkhat tawn a, asung a sukvak-touvak ka hi,” achi hi. Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ka sikha Job na ngaihtuah ngei hia? Amah bang a hoihkim leh mitang, Pathian kihta a hoih lou mudah lei ah lah kuamah a-om ngal kei a,” achi hi. Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Bangmah lou dia Job in Pathian kihta ahi maw? Amah kimvel in, a-inn kimvel in leh aneih tengteng kimvel in, ning chiteng ah umna na bawl kei maw? Akhut nasep na vualzawl a, gamsung ah aneih-le-lam apung hi. Himahleh tu in na khut zankhia inla, aneih tengteng khoih in, huchi in na maitang ah nang ahon gense mai ding hi,” achi hi. Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ngai in, aneih tengteng nang thu ahi

amah mah tung ah kia na khut kha ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa ma a kipan in Setan akuankhia hi.Job Tate Leh Ahauhsakna Hihsiatsak In A-om Huan atapate leh atanute'n a-unaupa uh upapen inn a ne a uain adawn ni uh a-om a, Job kiang ah sawltak khat hong pai in, “Bawngtalte'n lei alet ua, sabiltungte akiang ah agamta ua, Sheba mite'n amau adelh ua, apimang uh; ahi, namsau hiam in sikhate athat ua; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. Huchi a thu agen lai in midang khat leng ahong a, “Van a kipan in Pathian mei akia a, belamte leh sikhate akangmang a, amau akangtum hi; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. Huchi a thu agen lai in, midang khat ahong lai a, “Kaldai mite'n pawl thum abawl ua, sangawngsaute adelh ua, apimang uh, huan namsau hiam in sikhate athat ua; huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. Huchi a thu agen lai in, midang khat mah ahong a, “Na tapate leh na tanute'n a-unaupa upapen inn a anek ua uain adawn lai un, ngai in gamdai a kipan in huih thupi ahong nung a, huai inn ning lite ahon nuai a, tangvalte tung ah achim a, asi uh: huan nang hilh ding in kei keleu ka suakta hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Job athou a, apuanaktual abotkek a, asam ametsiang a, leitual kidenna in anei a, Pathian abeta hi. Ama'n, “Ka nu sul a kipan vuaktang in ka hong a, huan vuaktang in ka kik ding, Toupa'n apia a, huan Toupa'n alamangta; Toupa min phat in om hen,” achi hi. Hiai tengteng ah Job in ahihkhial kei a, haihuaitak in Pathian leng amohsa kei hi.

Toupa Pathian tapate ahong kilak ni uh a-om nawn a, huan Toupa ma a kilak ding in alak uah Setan leng ahong pai hi. Setan In Job Aze-et Nawn Huan Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ka sikha Job na ngaihtuah ngei hia? Amah bang a hoihkim leh mitang, Pathian kihta a hoih lou mudah lei ah lah kuamah a-om ngal kei a; ama siatna ding in hon tangsak mah lechin, aginomna alen tinten hi,” achi hi. Setan in Toupa adawng a, “Vun sik in vun, ahi, mihing in aneih tengteng hinna sik in ape ding hi. Himahleh tu in na khut kha inla, aguh leh asa khoih lechin, na maitang ah nang hon gense ding hi,” achi hi. Toupa'n Setan kiang ah, “Ngai in, amah na khut ah a-om hi; ahinna lel hawi in,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa ma a kipan in Setan apawtkhia a, meimatum in akhepek nuai a kipan aluzang tan in Job agawt hi. Huchi in ama'n kikhuatna ding in belpei ala a; meivu lak ah atu hi. Huai lai in azi in akiang ah, “Na ginomna len tinten lailai na hi hia? Pathian gensia inla, si in,” achi hi. Himahleh akiang ah, “Numei hai thugente lak a khat bang in thu na gen a. Bang ahia? Pathian khut ah hoih i mu dia, hoih lou leng i mu kei dia hia?” achi hi. Hiai tengteng ah Job in amuk in thil ahihkhial kei hi.Job Lawmte'n Hong Veh Uh Huchi a Job lawm thumte'n atung a hiai hoih lou hong tung tengteng azak un, michih ama mun a kipan in ahong ua: Teman mi Eliphaz, Shuah mi Bildad leh Naaman mi Zophar, amah kah ding leh amah lungmuan ding in hohkhawm ding in hun seh abawl uhi. Huchi a gamlapi a pan adaktouh uleh, amah athei kei ua, nakpi in akikoukhia ua, akapta uhi. Apuanaktual uh michih in abotkek ua, alutang uah van lam ah leivui akibuak uhi. Huchi in akiang ah leitual ah ni sagih leh zan sagih atu ua, akiang ah kuamah in thu khat leng agen kei uh; alungkhamna anasa mahmah chih amu uhi.

Hiai khit in Job in akam aka a, ani ahamsiat hi. Job in adawng a, hichi in achi.Job “Ka pian ni leh zan,pasal naupang pai in a-om,akichihna mangthang hen. Pathian Kiang A Job Phunna Huai ni mialna hi hen;tunglam a kipan Pathian in ngaihsak kei hen, atung ahleng khovak tang kei hen. Khomial leh sihna lim in amau a ding in huai ngen uhen;atung ah meipi kai hen;khua nimsak tengteng in huai tuh lausak uhen. “Zan ahihleh, mial sahbikbek atung ah tu hen;kum nite lak ah telsak kei hen;khate simna ah tel kei heh. Ngai in, huai zan hut henla;huai ah kipah aw ging kei hen. Huai ni hamsiatte amau hamsiat uhen,Leviathan tokthou ding amansa a omte. Huai a khomui aksite mial uhen; khovak zong henla,himahleh bangmah nei kei hen;zingsang mitvunte leng mu sam kei hen. Ka nu sul kongkhakte akhak louh ziak in,ka mit a kipan abuaina asel louh ziak in. “Sul a kipan bangziak a si lou ka hia?Gil a kipan ka hong paikhiak lai a bangziak a kha khah lou ka hia? Bangziak a khukte'n kei hon dom ahia?Ahihkeileh bangziak a ka tep ding nawi na om ahia? Tu a na lum khin a,na dai mai ding lah ka hi ngal a;ka na ihmuta dia;huchi in ka na khawlta ding hi. Lei kumpipate leh thudot mite,amau a ding a mun sia bawlte toh. Ahihkeileh dangka-eng nei kumpite,a-innte uh dangka a dimsakte toh. Ahihkeileh muh louh a ahun lou a piang bang na hilou ka hia,naungek khovak mu ngeiloute bang? Huai ah migiloute'n sukbuai atawpsan ua;huai ah mitawlte akhawl uhi. Huai ah salmatte nuam ina-omkhawm uh;nasem heutute aw aza kei uhi. Huai ah aneu leh alian a-om ua;apu a kipan in sikha anuamlen.

“Bangziak a dah a omte kiang a khovak piak ahia,kha a haksa sa kiang ah hinna; Sihna deih a,atunlouhnate kiang ah;gou selguk zon sang a thupi azong mite kiang ah. Han atun lai ua,nakpitak a kipakte kiang ah? Bangziak a mi alampi sel a om kiang lehPathian in a-umsuak kiang a khovak piak a om ahia? An ka nek ma in ka thumna ahong tung a,ka maunate tui bang a leihbuak in a-om hi. Ka kihtak thil lah ka tung ah ahong tung ngal a,ka laulau ka tung ah ahong tung hi. Nuam ka sa kei a, ka lung amuang kei, khawlna leng ka nei kei hi;himahleh buaina ahong pai hi.”

Huai lai in Eliphaz, Teman mi in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Mi'n nang hon houlimpihtumleh na zadah diam?Himahleh pau lou in kua a-om thei dia? Ngai in, mi tampi na hilhta a,khut hatloute na hihhatta hi. Kihoulimna Masa(Job. —. )Eliphaz Thugen Masa Himahleh tu in na tung ahahong tung a, na bah a;nang ahon khoih a, na buaita hi. Pathian na kihtakna, na muanna hilou hia,na lametna na lampite muanhuaina? Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi,hoih hinapi a,mangthang ngei kua ahia?Ahihkeileh koi lai ah ahia midik satkhiak a a-om? Kei muh in,thulimlouhna lei lette ahi ua,buaina tuh a huai mah atte. Pathian hu in amangthangua, hehna a mut a hihmang in a-om uhi. Humpinelkai humham leh,humpinelkai hangsan aw leh,humpinelkai tuailai hate,akitanta hi. Samat taksap ziak in humpinelkai tek amangthang a,huan humpinelkaipi nouteadalhzak uhi. “Tu in aguk in thil ka kiang a hong tung ka bil in huai a huauna asangta hi. Zan mengmuhna a kipan angaihtuahnate ah,mite nakpitak a a-ihmut san lai un, ka tung ah launa ahong tung a,linna in ka guhte tengteng asing hi. Huai lai in ka mai ah kha apai a;ka chimul adinghta hi. Ka dingh kinken a,himahleh huai a kilatdan ka theikak theita kei a;alim tuh ka mit ma ah a-om a;daihna a-om a, aw ka za hi, Pathian sang in sithei mihing dikzaw ding hia?Abawlpa sang in mihing siangthouzaw ding hia? chi in. Ngai in, asikhate ah muanna akoih kei a;angelte hai in angoh hi: Tungman inn a tengamaute hi sem na un chia,asuangphum leivui a om a,leikha ma a chimsia. Zingsang leh nitak kikal in hihsiat in a-om ua;theih louh hial in tangtawn in amangthang uhi. Amau sung a apuanin khau uh bohkhiak touh hilou hia?Pilna tel lou in asi uhi.”

“Tu in sam in;nang hon dawng kua a-om a?Misiangthoute lak ah akua lam na nga dia? Lungzinna in lah mihai athat a,huan thikna in mimawl athat sek hi. Mihai zungkai ka muta a;himahleh thakhat in atenna ka hamsiat hi. Bitna a kipan gamlapi ah atate a-om ua,kongpi ah hihgawp in a-om uh,kuamah amaute hunkhe ding a-om kei uhi. Agilkial in ling lak a kipan nangawn a-an kaihkhawm agaihsak a,suamhat in aneih-le-lam anawmvalhsak hi. Gimthuakna leivui a kipan inahong pawt kei a,lei a kipan in buaina leng ahong dawnkhe sam kei hi. Himahleh mihing buai ding mah apiang ahi,mei-ekte atoulen bang in. “Himahleh ke'n ahihleh,Pathian lam ah ka zong ding a,Pathian kiang ah ka thu ka koih ding hi. Thil thupite hihpa lehzonkhiak theih louh;sim zoh louh thillamdangte, leitung a vuah pepa leh,loute tung a tui sawlpa. Huchi in ama'n aniamsatetungsang ah akoihtou a;misi suunte muanna ah atawisang hi. Zekhem hatte lunggeltebangmah lou asuaksak a,huchi in akhutte unathiltup uh ahihthei kei uhi. Mipilte akhemhatna un a,mihoihloute thilgel athalpaihsak hi. Sun lai in khomialna athuak ua,zan lai bang in suntang lai in amai maimah uhi. Himahleh ama'n gentheite mihatte kamleh khut a kipan leh tasamte mahmah namsau a kipan ahondam hi. Huchi in mizawng in lametna anei a,thulimlouhna in akam ahumsak hi. “Ngai in, Pathian in abawlhoihmi in nuam asa hi;huaiziak in Bangkim hihthei sawina musit ke'n. Ama'n lah meima abawl a,atuam a, aliamsak a,akhut in adamsak hi. Buaina guk ah ahonsuaktasak ding a;ahi, sagih ah gilou in nangahon khoih kei ding hi. Kial chiang in nang sihna akipan ahon tan ding;namsau thilhihtheihna a kipan, kidou chiang in. Kam sung a leizepna a kipanahon sel ding a;siatna ahong tun chiang in na lau sam kei ding hi.

Siatna leh kialna ah na nui ding a,lei gamsate na kihta kei ding hi. Gam a suangte toh na kithuahtheih ding ziak un;huan gam a gamsate nang toh na kituak ding uhi. “Na puanin muang in a-omchih na thei ding a;na ganhuang na veh ding a,bangmah kim lou a-om kei ding hi. Na chite leng athupi ding a,na suante lei a loupa bang ina-om ding uh chih na thei ding hi. Kum ching in na hankhuk na zuan ding a,ahun a buhlak a-om bang in. Ngai in, hiai thu i zongta ua,adik mah ahi,za in na hoihna ding in thei in.”

Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Aw ka lungzinna kibuk thei hi henla,ka tuahsiatna selbukna ah kikoihkhawm thei hileh! Tu in tuipite a piaunel sang inagikzaw ding: huaiziak inka thugente leng akhauh hi. Bangkim hihthei thalte lahka sung ah a-om ngal a,agu uh huai a kipan a ka kha in adawnvek;kei dou ding in Pathian mulkimhuainate akivual uhi. “Anek ding loupa mu, gam sabiltung aham a hia?Ahihkeileh gan an mu bawngtal aham a hia? Job Thugen Masa Ka kha in amaute akhoih nuam kei;kei a ding in an kihhuai bang ahi uhi. “Aw ka nget tang thei leng zaw;ka thil deih Pathian in hon phalleh zaw. Kei hon hihgawp ding inPathian deihlam hi lai henla;akhut zan in,kei hon satkhe maileh. Huchi in lungmuanna ka nei lai dia;ahi, damlou natna ah ka kipak ding hi;Mi Siangthou thute ka kitheihmohbawl ngal kei a. Ka hatna bang ahia,ka ngak ding?Huan ka beina bang ahia,ka kuhkal ding? Ka hatna suangte hatna hi hia?Ahihkeileh ka sa dalsik hia? Kei ah panpihna a-om het kei a,kei a kipan theihsiamna hawlmang in. “Bah dia mansa a om kiang ah alawm in siamna a-etsak ding ahi kei maw;huchi lou in Bangkim hihthei kihtakna tawpsan ahi kei ding maw. Luita bang in ka unaute alepchiah uh;luita mangthang luanna bang in. Huai tui khal ziak a vom a;huai a vukkhal akisel. Alum hun chiang in atuimang ua,asat chiang in amun ua kipan amangthang uhi. Huai lampi a khualzinte apial ua,bangmah omlouhna mun ah apaitou ua,amangthang uh. Tema khualzinte'n azong ua,Sheba pawlte'n alamen uh. Akilamet hang unazahlak uh; huai lam ahava pai ua azahlak uh. Tu in bangmah na hi ngal kei ua;mulkimhuaina na mu ua, na lau uhi. Kei hon pia un?Ahihkeileh na neih-le-lam ua kipan in kei a ding in thilpiak lan un, ka chi hia?

Ahihkeileh, melma khut a pan hon tan un,mihat khut a pan hon hukhia un ka chi hia? “Hon sinsak in, huan ka dai ding:ka diklouhna hon theisiamsak un. Thudikna thute hat hi nah e:himahleh miselna in bang aselphou a? Thute selphou ding a um na hi uhia?Chimoh mi thugente huih bang ahi chih thei in. Ahi, pa neiloute tung ah ai na san ua,na lawm uh sumsinna van in na bawl uh. Tu in hehpih in hon en un;na ma uah thuzuau ka gen kei a. Kik nawn un ka hon ngen ahi,diklouhna om kei hen; ahi,kik nawn un, ka thu adik ahi. Ka lei ah diklouhna a-om hia?Ka lei in thil hoih louatheikak thei kei dia hia?”

“Leitung ah mihing a ding inkidouna a-om kei maw?Anite kilohmi nite bang ahi kei a hia? Limliap deih mahmah sikha bang in, aloh lamenkilohmi bang in. Huai bang in bangmah lou khate nei ding a bawl ka hi,huan kei a ding in zan chimhuaite seh ahi. Ka lup chiang in, chikchiang in ka thou dia? ka chi a;himahleh zan asawt hi; lehlam lehlam ah nisuah matan kilumlet in ka om hi. Ka sa than leh leivui khal in atuam a;ka vun kimat in apuakkham hi. Ka nite siamganmi khohthei sang in akinzaw a,lametna bei a zatbei ahi. “Aw ka hinna huih ahi chih theigige in;ka mit in hoih amu nawn kei ding hi. Kei hon mu mit in ahon en thei nawnta kei ding a;ka tung ah na mitte a-om ding ua himahleh ka omta kei ding hi. Meipi mangthang a-om nawn louh bang in,huchi in kuapeuhSheol a paisuk ahong paitou nawnta kei uhi. A-inn ah akik nawn kei ding a,amun in amah athei nawn kei ding hi. Huaiziak in ka kam ka khou kei ding a;ka lungsim gimna ah thu ka gen ding;haksatna ah ka kha ka phun ding hi. “Tuipi ka hi hia, ahihkeileh tua tuipi ngapi lian ka hi a hia,huchi a kei na hon chin nak? Ka lupna in hon lungmuan ding a,ka tutna nem in ka phunna azangkhaisak ding,ka chih chiang in. Huai chiang in mang inna hon lausak a,mengmuhna in na hon mulkimsak hi. Huchi in ka kha in heklup leh sihna atel a,hiai ka guhte sang in. Ka hinna ka chimtak a;ka hing gige kei ding, hon omsak maimai un;ka nite lah bangmah lou ahi ngal a. “Mihing bang ahia,hichi tel a na pahtawi ding a,amah tung a na lungtang na koih ding?

Zingsang teng a amah na veh a,mitphiat kal chih a amah na ettel ding? Bang tan vei kei hon lehngatsan lou ding na hia,bang tan vei ka chil ka nawmvalh matan hon omsak maimai lou ding na hia? Na khial hi taleng,na tung ah bang ka hih a,Aw mite chingpa nangmah?Bangziak a nang a diachiamtehna bang a hon koih na hia,huchi a keimah a dia puakgik ka hih maimah? Bangziak a ka tatlekna ngaidam lou a,ka thulimlouhna lamang lou oi?Kei tu in leivui a lum ding ka hi a;kuhkaltak in na hon zong dia,himahleh ka omta kei ding hi.”

Huchi in Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Bang tan hiai thilte gen ding na hia?Bang tan na kam a thute huih hat bang ding ahi ua? Pathian in vaihawmna ahekkawi a hia?Ahihkeileh Bangkim hihthei in dikna ahekkawi ahia? Atung ah na tate akhial ua,huai tatlekna ziak a akhut a amaute apikhiakleh, Pathian lam kuhkaltak a na zon a, huaiBangkim hihthei kiang a na thilnget na bawlleh; Na sianthou a na dikleh;nang ziak in tu in ka khanglou dia,na diktatna omna alohchingsak ding hi. Na kipatna neu mahleh,na tawpna nanung lam nakpi in athupi ding hi. “Huaiziak in ka hon ngen hi,hun masa thu kan inla,apipute un ana zonkhiak uh lam ah kisuk in. Bildad Thugen Masa: Ei lah zan a lel i hi ua,bangmah i thei kei uh,leitung ah i nite uh lah limliap ahi a. Amaute'n nang ahon sinsak un, ahon hilh un,alungtang ua kipan in thute agen kei ding ua hia? Buannawi lou in phaiphekakhangkhe thei a hia?Tui lou in loupa akhangthei a hia? Hing a om a,satpuk louh ahih lai in,loupa dangte ma in avuai nak hi. Huai bang mah inPathian mangngilhte tengteng lampi ahi;Pathian limsakloumi lametna amangthang ding: Amuanna akitan ding a,akingakna maimomlen ahi hi. A-inn tung ah akingai dia,himahleh adingh kei ding; huai ah alen tinten ding a,himahleh apang sawt kei ding hi. “Nisuah ma in ahing a,ahuan ah aselte amengkhia uhi. Azungte leivum kim ah azam ua,suangte omna mun ah ahing hi. Amun a kipan lakmang hileh,huchi in amah akitheihmohbawl ding a,Ka hon mu ngei kei, chi in. Ngai in, hiai alampi kipahna ahi a,lei a kipan adangte ahong suak ding uh. Ngai in, Pathian in mihoihkim apaikhe kei ding,gilou hih mite leng atungding sam kei ding hi. Na kam nuih in ahon dimsak lai dia,na mukte kikouna in. Hon mudahte zumna in akhuh ding a;gilou puanin a-omta kei ding hi.”

Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Chihtaktak in huchi ahichih ka thei hi, himahlehPathian lak ah mihing bangchi in adik thei dia? Amah kiselpih a-utlam ahihleh,sangkhat lak a khatvei zongamah adawng thei kei ding hi. Amah lungtang in apil a,hatna in thil ahihthei ahi,amah dou in kua akikhauhsak in,alohchingta a oi? “Mualte asuan a, athei kei ua,heh a amaute alumleh lai in. Amun a kipan in lei asing a,huan huai a khuamte aling uhi. Nisa thu apia a, asuak kei;aksite abilhkhum ngiungiau hi. Amah kia'n vante aphalhkhia a,tuipi kihot tung ah apai hi. Job Thugen Nihveina Ama'n sui theih vual louhthil thupite sim zoh louhthillamdangte ahih hi. “Ngai in, ka kiang ah apai a,amah ka mu kei, apai lailai a,himahleh amah ka mu kei hi. Ngai in, alamang a,amah kua'n akham thei dia?Bang hih na hia?Kua'n akiang ah achi dia? Pathian in ahehna alakik kei ding;Rahab panpih mite amah nuai ah akun petmah uhi. Bangchi phet a tawmzaw inamah ka dawng in,amah toh ngaihtuah ding in ka thute ka telkhe dia hia? Diktat himah leng amah ka dawng kei ding hi;ka thukhentu kiang ah thilngetna ka bawl thei lel ding hi. “Amah sam in hon dawng mahleh;ka aw angaikhia chih ka um kei ding hi. Huihpi in ahon kitamsak a,asan om lou in ka liamnate apungsak hi. Ka nak ahon phal kei a,himahleh thangpaihna in hon dimsak hi. Hatna thu gen leng, ngai in,Amah ahat hi,vaihawmna thu,kua'n hun ahon pe dia? Kidiktatsak leng, ka kam mah in ahon mohpaih hi,hoihkim ka hi, kichi taleng,hoih lou in ahon telsak ding hi. Hoihkim mah leng,ka kilimsak kei;ka hinna ka musit hi. “Akibang ahi vek a;huaiziak in ke'n,hoihkim leh gilou ahihse tuak, ka chi hi. Jepna in thakhat in thatleh,mihoih thuakna anuihsan ding hi.

Lei migilou khut a piak a a-om chiang in huai a vaihawmte amaituam a;amah ahihkeileh, kua ahita dia? Tu in ka nite laihawmmi sang in akinzaw a ataimang ua,hoih amu kei uh. Long kinte bang in apaimangua, muvanlai samat tung angumkiak bang in. Ka phunna ka mangngilh dia,ka mel lungkham ka pai dia,ka kipak ding, chi leng. “Ka lungkhamna tengteng ka lau a,hoih na hon sa kei ding chih ka thei hi. Mohpaih in ka om dia;bangziak a athawn a semgim ka hia? Vuk tui in kisil in,ka khutte siangsak kei leng; Hinapi in phaizang ah na hon pailutdia, keimah puante'n ahon kih ding uhi. “Kei bang in amah lah mihing ahi kei a,amah ka dawn theih a,vaihawmna a ka hohkhawm theihna ding un. Ka kikal uah kou gel honmattheihna ding in,thulai genmi a-om kei hi. Kei a pan in achiang lamang henla akihtakhuaina in kei hon lausak kei hen. Huai chiang in thu ka gen dia,amah ka lau kei ding:keimah ah huchibang ka hi ngal kei hi.”

“Ka kha in ka hinnaachimtak a,ka utdan dan in ka phun ding;ka kha thangpaihna in thu ka gen ding. Pathian kiang ah,Hon mohpaih ke'n;bangziak a hon kinakpih na hia hon theisak in,ka chi ding hi. Na nuaisiah nang a diahoih ahi maw,na khutte thilhih na muhsit a,giloute thugen tung a na maitai? Sa mitte nei na hi hia,ahihkeileh mihing muh bang amu na hi hia? Na nite mihing nite bang hi a,ahihkeileh na kumte mihing kumte bang, Ka thulimlouhna na kan a,ka khelhna na nungdelh hi. Ka gilou kei chih thei napi a,na khut a kipan hon suaktasak ding a-om louh? “Na khutte'n ahon sek un ahonbawl kimvel sipsip ua;tu'n kihei in na hon hihse dia hia? Theigige in, ka hon ngen ahi,tungman bang a na hon mekdan;leivui hon tun nawn ding na hi hia? Nawitui bang in na hon sungkhia in, nawituidat bang in na hon tok kei maw? Vun leh sa in na hon tuam a,guhte leh thagui in na hon phankhawm hi. Hinna leh deihsakna na hon phal a,huan na hon vehna in ka kha ahawi hi. “Himahleh hiai thilte na lungtang sung ah na sel a;hiai bel na tup ahi chih ka thei hi. Thil ka hihkhelhleh na honchiamteh a,ka thulimlouhna a kipan na hon khah kei ding hi. Ka gitlouhleh, ka tung agik hi;midiktat himah leng, ka lutang ka sangsak kei ding hi.Lungbuaina in ka dim a, huaiziak in ka gimthuakna en in. Ka lutang akiletsakleh,humpinelkai bang in nang na hon beng a,ka tung a na lamdandan na hon ensak nawn hi. Kei kalh in na palainate na thaksak a,ka tung a na hehna na khangsak a;hon dou ding sepaihhon thak na hon sawl hi. “Bangziak a sul a pan hon lakhia na hia?Na si in kuamah muh louh na hi leng.

Om lou mah bangta ding hi ing a;sul a pan a han a puak a om ding hi ing. Ka nite atom kei maw? Huchi ahihleh, tawp in,hon omsak maimai in, huchi a neukha a ka lungmuan theihna ding in. Ka kik nawnlouhna a ka pai ma in khomialna gam leh sihna limliap gam mahmah ah. Mialna mah bang a,mialna sahna gam a: sihna limliap gam,dan himhim omlouhna, khovak khomial bang a a-omna mun ah.”

Huan Naamath mi Zophar in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Thu tampite dawn louhding ahi a hia?Mi houlimna a dim siamtansak ding hia? Na khemnate'nmite daisak ding hia?na simmoh chiang in,kuamah in nang hon zahlaksak lou ding uhia? Ka thuhilh asiangthou a,na mit uah ka siang hi, na chi ngal a. Himahleh Pathian inthugen maizenleh zaw,nang dem in amukte hongleh; Huchi in pilna thugukte nang ahon ensak ding a,atheihna ah thuah tampi ahi chih,huaiziak in na thulimlouhna sang a tawmzaw na lak ahPathian in nang ahon phut chih thei in. “Zon in Pathian na mu thei diam; hoihkimna ahBangkim hihthei na mu thei diam? Van bang in asang a; bang na hihthei dia?Sheol sang in athuk a; bang na theithei dia? Huai a tehna lei sang in asauzaw a,tuipi sang in azazaw hi. Paisuak henla, man henla,vaihawmna ah samleh, huchi in kua'n amah adal thei dia? Zophar Thugen Masa Mihing theihsiamna bei intheihsiamna anei ding,mihing a sabiltungnou apian chiang in. “Na lungtang na koih dik a,amah lam a na khutte na zakleh; Na khut a thulimlouhna a-om a, gamlapi a na koihkhiak a,gitlouhna na puanin a na tensak keileh; Gensiatna ding om lou in na mai na daksak ding a;ahi, na kip ding a,na lau kei ding. Na haksatna na mangngilh ding ziak in;tui luangmang bang in na theigige ding hi. Sun lai sang in na hinna achiangzaw ding a;khomial om mahleh,zingsang bang in na tangkhe ding hi. “Lametna a-om ziak in,na kipta ding hi; ahi, ama tanchin na zong ding a,muang in na khawlta ding hi. Lup leng na lum ding a, kuamah in nang hon lausak kei ding uhi;ahi, mi tampi'n nang hon zong ding uhi. Himahleh gilou mitte azuausuak ding a,asuakta kei ding ua, alametna uh kha khah ahi ding hi.”

Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Ginlelh vual louh in mite zaw na hi peuhmah ua,nou toh pilna asi ding hi. Himahleh noute bang in theihsiamna ka nei;nou sang in ka niamzaw kei, ahi, hiaite bang thilte kuan athei kei a? Kei zaw mi invengte a dia nuihzabuk ka hi a, kei,huai Pathian sam a, huai ama'n amah adawnpa,midik, mihoihkim, nuihzabuk ka na hi. Om nuam a om ngaihtuahna ah vangsiatna muhsitna a-om a;himahleh akhe uh teute a ding in mansa in a-om hi. Suamhatte puaninte alohching a, Pathian hehsakte abit ua;akhut a pathian tawite Pathian in tampi apia hi. “Himahleh gamsate dong in, huchi in amau nang ahon sinsak ding uh;huan huihkhua a vasate'n, nang ahon hilh ding uhi. Ahihkeileh lei kiang ah thu gen in nang ahon sinsak ding ua;tuipi a ngasate'n na kiang ah apuang ding uhi. Hiai tengteng ah, Toupa khut in ahih khin chih kua ahia thei lou? Amah khut ah thil hing chiteng kha leh,mihing tengteng hatna a-om hi. Bil in thute enchian in,Kam in ana chiam kei maw? “Mi upate kiang ah pilna a-om a nite sauna ah theihsiamna a-om hi. Job Thugen Thumveina Amah kiang ah pilna leh hatna a-om;ama'n thupha leh theihsiamna anei. Ngai in, akaipuk a,akilam nawn thei kei ding; mihing akhakbing a,kuama'n ahong thei kei ding. Ngai in, tui aching a akang hi;akhahkhia a, lei atum vek hi. “Akiang ah hatna leh pilna a-om a;khem a omte leh khempa amah a ahi. Thuhilh mite loh sam in apimang a,huan vaihawmte mihai in abawl hi. Kumpipate kolte asut a,kawnggak in akawng uh agak hi. Siampute loh sam in apimang a, mihatte azou hi. Muan mite thugen asuan a,upate theihsiamna alamang hi. Lalte tung ah muhsitna abuak a mihatte kawnggak aphel hi. “Mial a kipan in thil thukte amukhia a,sihna limliap khovak ah ahon lakhia hi. Namte apungsak a, amau hihsia in,namte athehzak a, alakhawm nawn hi. Lei a mite hausate lungtang alamang a,gamdai a lampi omlouhna ah amau avakvaisak hi. Vakna bei in khomial ah amai ua,huchi in zukhammi bang in amaute ahoisak hi.”

“Ngai in, ka mit inhiai tengteng amu a,ka bil in huai za in atheisiamta hi. Na thei uh,huai mah ke'n leng ka thei a,nou sang in ka niamzaw kei hi. Bangkim hihthei kiang ah thu ka gen mahmah ding,Pathian toh houlim ka ut hi. Himahleh nou zuau phuakte na hi ua, phattuamna beidamdawisiam na hi vek uhi. Aw na vek un dai sipsip le uchin maw;na pilna uh hi ding hiven. “Tu in ka thusut za un,ka mukte ngetna ngaikhia un. Pathian a ding in dikloutak inthu na gen ding uam,amah a ding in khemhattak inna houlim ding uam? Ami na zahtak ding uam?Pathian a ding in na sual ding uam? Nou ahon zonkhiak ahoih hia?Ahihkeileh mi'n mi akhem bang in,amah na khem ding uam? Nou ahon sal mahmah ding,aguk a mite na zahtak uleh. Ahoih tungtuanna in nou ahon lausak kei dia hia,nou tung ah akihtakhuaina ake kei diam? Na thupilte uh vut bang lel ahi,manna bei paunak ahi a,na kidalnate uh tungman kidalnate ahi. Dai unla,thu ka gentheihna ding in,hon omsak maimai un,ka tung ah ahong tung ding hong tung hen. “Bangziak a ka ha in ka sa kei a, ka khut a ka hinna koih ding ahia? Ama'n hon that mahleh,amah ka ngak lai ding;ama ah ka lampite ka kemhoih lailai ding hi. Hiai leng ka hotdamna ahi ding;Pathian limsakloumi ama ahong pai lou ding ahih ziak in. Ka thugen thanuamtak in za un,ka thupuanna na bil sung uah om hen. Ngai un, tu in ka thu ka bawlhoihta a;ka diktat ahi chih ka thei hi. “Kei hon kiselpih ding amah kua ahia?Kei tu in ka dai dia kha ka khah ding hi. Ka tung ah thil nih hih kei phot le uchin,huchi in na mai a kipan ka bu kei ding hi.

Kei a pan gamlapi ah na khut kaikik in;na lauhuaina in hon lausak ke'n. “Huai chiang in hon sam lechin,ka hon dawng ding;ahihkeileh hon pausak inla,hon dawng in. Ka thulimlouhnate leh khelhnate bang ahia?Ka tatlekna leh ka khelhna hon theisak in. Bangziak a na mai sel a na melma dia hon bawl na hia? Singnah mutleng na hihbuai dia hia?Buhpawl keu na delh dia hia? “Nang lah kei dem in khatak in na gelh a,ka tuailai thulimlouhnate na hon luahsak hi. Ka khete leng kol na bunsak a,ka lampite tengteng na chiamteh hi;ka khenuai kim ah gi na khung hi. Mihing zaw thilmuat leh nget nekgawp puansilh bang in amangthang hi.”

“Mihing, numei a panpian nite tomchik ahi a,buaina ngen in adim hi. Pak bang in ahong dawnkhia a,avuai nawn pah a, limliap bang in atai a, a-om gige kei. Mi huchibang tung ah na mit hak in,vaihawmna ah kei na hon pi dia hia? Thilnin a kipan kua'n ahia thilsiang lakhe thei?Kuamah in. Anite sehsa ahi chih thei in,na kiang ah akhate simna a-om a,akan thei louh ding inagamgite na septa hi. Amah en ke'n, akhawltheihnading in, kiloh bang a,ani ahihkim matan. “Phukpaih in om mahleh,ahong sel nawn ding a,ahiang nou atawp kei ding,chih sing a ding in lametna lah a-om ngal a. Lei ah azung upa mahleh,akungpi lei ah sita mahleh; Tuigim ziak in ahong nou thak dia,sing suan bang in bawkte ahon neikhe nawn ding hi. Mihing asi a, amang zel hi;ahi, mihing in akha akhah a,huan koi ah a-om a? “Tuipi a kipan tuihute alenmang bang in, luipi bel atul a, akang hi. Huai mah bang in mihing alum a athou kei hi,vante a-om nawn louh matan,akhanglou kei ding uh,a-ihmu uh leng ahalh khe sam kei ding uhi. “Aw Sheol ah hon sel lechin aw, na thangpaihna masiahhon na gukkep lechin, hun sehsa hon na pia in,kei hon theigige lechin aw; Mi sileh ahing nawn diam?Ka galdouna leh nasepna ni tengteng ka ngak ding a,ka suahtakna ahong tun matan in. N'on na sam dia, k'on dawng ding hi,na khut nasep na hon lunggulh ding hi. Tu in ka kalsuante na sim a:ka khelhnate na chiamteh hi. Ip sung ah ka tatlekna bilh in a-om a,ka thulimlouhna na gonggak hi. “Tang kipuk bangmah louahong hi taktak a,amun a kipan in suangpi suan in a-om hi; tuite'n suang akiamsak ua;leivui a kibawl mun sangte na taimang a;huan mihing lametna na hihsia hi. Tangtawn in amah na zou a,apai a; amel na lamdangsak a,na sawlmang hi. Atapate zah in a-om ua,ama'n athei kei;hihniam in a-om ua,himahleh ama'n amau ahi chih athei kei hi. Himahleh atung a sa in natna anei a,asung ah akha in asuun hi.”

Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Mipil in theihnabangmah lou toh dawnna abawl in, suahlam huih in agilpi adimsak diam? Houlimna phatuam lou thu angaihtuah in, ahihkeilehhoih ahihtheihlouhna ding a thugente angaihtuah diam? Ahi, launa na hihmang a,Pathian ma a kipiakzohna na dal lai hi. Na kam in na thulimlouhnaasinsak a, khemhatmi lei na tel ngal a. Nang mahmah kam in siam louh ahon tangsak a,kei hilou in; ahi, nang dem in nangmah mukte mah inhon theihpih hi. “Mihing piang masapen hi hia?Ahihkeileh mualte om ma a lakkhiak na hi maw? Pathian thuguk na zata hia?Huan pilna na kikoih hoih hia? Ka theih louh uh bang na thei a?kou a om lou bang na theisiam a? Ka lak uah samkang lehupa mahmah a-om tuaktuak,na pa sang a nakpi a upazaw. “Pathian nepnate lehsiamtak a hon hilhtenang a dia neu lua uhia? Bangziak a na lungtang innang hon pimang ahia?Bangziak a na mitte phia ahia? Huchi a Pathian dem ana lungsim na hei a,na kam a pan a huai thutena pawtkhiaksak. “Mihing bang ahia, asian ding?Numei a pan piang amah kua ahia diktat ding? Houlim Nihveina(Job. —. )Eliphaz thugen nihveina Mikihhuai leh sia,tui bang a thulimlouhna dawnmi,siang kei sem na in chia. “K'on ensak ding, hon za in;huan ka muhsa ka puang ding. Mipil kuate in ahia apipute uakipan na thu gen a, a-iim louh uh Amau kiang kia ah gam piak in a-om a,mikhual kuamah alak uah apai kei uh. “Migilou in adamsung niteng in natna athuak a,nuaisiah hatmi a dia kholkhawm kumte zah mah. Abil ah launa ging a-om a;hauh lai in lokmi atung ah ahong pai ding hi. Khomial a kipan ahong kik dingchih a-um kei a,namsau a ngak in a-om hi. Tanghou zong in avakvai a,Koi a om ahia?

chi in.Khomial ni akiangchin ah mansa in a-om chih athei hi. Dahna leh haksatna in amah alausak a;kumpipa galdou dia mansa bang in,amah azou uhi. “Pathian dou ding a khut alikkhiak ziak in,Bangkim hihthei dou a kisatheitak in, alum, atuamna sahtak nei tohamah dou a atai teitei ziak in; athau in amaitang akhuh a,agil ah thau akholkhawm hi. “Khopi tulsa ah ateng a,kuamah ten tuaklouhna innte ah,segawp ngiingei dingte aluah ziak in. Ahau kei ding a, aneih-le-lam a-om gige kei ding a;amah lei ah zung akai kei ding. Khomial a kipan asuakta kei ding a, meikuang in aselnoute akangkeu ding a,apaklun laite amutmang ding. Amah kikhem in,bangmah lou ah muang kei hen:bangmah lou lah athukna hi ding ahi ngal a. “Ahun ma in hihzoh in a-om dia,huan ahiang nou kei ding hi. Grepgui bang in agah min louasingpulh dia, olive bang inapak apaikhe ding. Pathian limsak loukithuahkhawmna hut ding ahi a,golhna puaninte lahmei in akangmang ding hi. Siatna apai ua, thulimlouhna asuakkhesak uh,alungtang un khemna a-opkeuh uhi.”

Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Huchibang thil tampi ka zata hi: lungmuanmi chimtakhuai ngen na hi uh. Thu bangmah loute'ntawp hun anei ding uam?Ahihkeileh dawng ding a nang hon hihheh bang ahia? Nou bang in kei leng ka pauthei sam hi; na kha uh ka kha mun a om hileh,noute dem a thute kaikhawm a,ka lu hon sinkhum thei ding hi veng in. Himahleh ka kam in nou ka hon hatsak ding a,ka muk a muanna in na lungkhamna uh ka hon nem ding. “Thu gen mah leng,ka dahna nep in a-om kei a:doh mah leng,hihnop in ka om a hia? Himahleh ahon chimtaksakta a;ka lawmte tengteng na hihgamta hi. Huan kiptak in na hon len a,huai kei demna theihpihna ahi:huchi in ka gawnna kei dem in athou a,ka maitang ah atheisak hi. “Ahehna in kei ahon botkek a,ahon sawi hi;aha ahon gawikhum a: ka tung ah ka gal in amit atat-hiam hi. Akam uh lianpi in ahon katkhum ua;simmohtak in ka biang ah ahon beng ua; kei douding in akikaikhawm uh. Pathian in Pathian limsakloute kiang ah ahon pekhia a,migiloute khut ah ahon paikhia hi. Om nuam in ka om a, himahlehahon kitamsak a; ahi,ka ngawng in ahon man a,hon pai nen hi; amuitum ding in ahon tungtou hi. Athalkap mite'n ka kimvel ahahon um ua, ka sisan guite abottan a, ahawi kei;lei ah ka sinkha asungkhia hi. Siatna tung ah siatna in ahon sesak a;galhat bang in ka tung ah atai hi. Ka vun tung ah sai-ip ka khui a,leivui ah ka kingata hi. Job Thugen Liveina Ka khut ah hiamgamna om kei mahleh,ka thumna siangthou mahleh. “Aw leitung, ka sisan khuh ke'n,huan ka kahna in mun nei kei hen. Tu mahmah in, ngai in,van ah kei hon theihpihpa a-om a,tungsang ah kei hon genpihpa a-om hi. Ka lawmte'n hon nuihsan ua,himahleh ka mit in Pathian ah khituite asungkhia hi. “Huchi a Pathian lak a mihing dikna aletkip theih a,invengte lak a mihing tapa dikna aletkip theihna ding in. Kum tawmchik ahong tun chiang in,ka kik nawnlouhna ding lampi ah ka paita ding hi.”

“Ka lungsim hihgawp in a-om a,ka nite abei a, kei a ding in han mansa in a-om hi. Ka kiang ah musit mite a-om taktak ua,ahehna uah ka mit a-om gige hi. Tu in thuchiam hon pia in,nangmah toh kei a ding in moh khu hong hi in;kei toh khutte beng ding kua a-om a? Theihsiamna a kipan alungtang uh na sel ngal a;huaiziak in amau na hihlian kei ding hi. “Kuapeuh mat ding a alawmte hek a,aneih-le-lam tan tummi, atate nangawn mit azuausuak ding hi. Mite houlimna ding in ahon bawl lai a;huchi in tangpi kih ka hong hita hi. Lungkhamna ziak in ka mit leng amial a,ka hiangte tengteng limliap bang ahi. Midikte'n hiai ah lamdang asa ding ua, mihoihPathian limsakloute dou ding in akitokthou ding. Himahleh midiktat alampi ah apang zouzou dia,kuapeuh khut siangneite ahat semsem ding uhi. Himahleh hong kik un,na vek un, tu in hong un;huchi in na lak uah mipil ka mu kei ding. “Ka nite abeita,ka thiltupte asegawpta hi,ka lungtang ngaihtuahte tan in. Zan, sun in akheng ua;khovak in khomial anaih, achi uh. Ka inn bang in Sheol en leng;khomial ah ka lupna phah taleng; siatna kiang ah,‘Ka pa na hi, chi leng;tangtel kiang ah, ‘Ka nu leh ka sanggamnu na hi, chi leng; huchi hileh ka lametna koi a om ahia?Lamet nei hi leng kua'n ahon musak dia? Sheol mundaite ah paisuk inleivui ah ka kikkhawm ding ua adiam?”

Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Thute zong a bang tan thang kam ding na hi ua?Ngaihtuah in, huai zoh chiang in ka pau ding uh. Bangziak a gamsa bang a sim a om a, na mitmuh ua siang lou ka hi ua? Nang na hehna kipumpei ziak in lei mangngilh in a-om diam?Ahihkeileh amun a kipan in suangpi suankhiak in a-om diam? “Ahi, migilou vakna mihsak in a-om ding a,amei-ek atang kei ding. Apuanin ah vakna amial dia,atung a khawnvak mihsak ahi ding. Ahatna kalsuante hihtuailuai ahi dia,amah thupha gen in apaikhe ding hi. Amah khe mahmah in len sung ah amah apailut ua,len ah a-awksak hi. Thang in akhetul ah dia,thang in amah alen ding hi. Lei ah amah a ding in thangkual sel in a-om a,lampi ah amah a ding in thang. “Kihtakhuaite'n ning chiteng ah amah alausak dia,akhetul ah adelhzui ding hi. Ahatna gilkial nek in a-om dia,akhawlna ding in mansa in tuahsiatna a-om ding. Apumpi hiangte anegai ding a,ahi, ahiangte sihna ta masapen in anegai ding hi.
