Asuan apuanin a kipan zungkalhkhiak in a-om dia lauhuainate kumpipa kiang a pi in a-om ding hi. Amah a hilou puanin ahteng a-om ding,atenna ah kat thehzak in a-om ding hi. “Nuailam ah azungte akeu dia,tunglam ah ahiang satkhiak ahi ding. Lei a kipan in atheihgige amangthang ding;kongzing ah min anei kei ding. Bildad Thugen Nihveina Amite lak ah tapa anei kei dia,tute leng atenna ah kuamah om lai a-om kei ding hi. “Amalam a omte'n ani lamdang asa ding uh;nunglam a omte hihlau a a-om bang un. Huchibang midiktatloutetennate ahi petmah a,Pathian theiloumi mun ahi hi.”

Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Bang tan ka kha hihbuai a,thute a hon hihzan gawp ding na hi ua? Hiai sawmvei na hon kouta ua;ka tung a giloutak ana hih uh na zum kei uh. Ana paikhial taleng maw,keimah kiang a ka diklouhna a-om gige hi. Kei dem in nou kiliansakpetmah ve ni uchin,ka minsiatna ka tung ah na gen ding ua, Pathian in ka thu ah hon zoutachih tu in thei un,huchi in alen in ahon umsuak hi. “Ngai un, ‘Hiamgamna, chi in ka kikoukhia a,himahleh zak in ka om kei,panpih deih in ka kikou a,himahleh vaihawmna a-om kei hi. Ka pai theihlouhna ding in ka lampi a-um a,ka paina dingte ah khomial akoih hi. Ka thupina hon suahsak a,ka lu a kipan lallukhu alakhia hi. Ning chiteng ah ahon hihniam a, ka mangta hi;huchi in sing bang in ka lametna abotkhia hi. Ka tung ah ahehna leng asou a,amah a ding in agalte lak akhat bang in ahon sim hi. Asepaih pawlte ahong kuankhawm ua,ka siatna ding in alampi uh abawl ua ka puanin kimvel in puanin akai uhi. “Kei a pan in ka unaute gamlapi ah akoih a,ka meltheihte kei a pan in atuam vekta uh. Ka tanaute'n ahon zuausan ua,ka lawm theihngeite'n ahon mangngilhta uhi. Ka inn tengte leh,ka sikhanute'n, mikhual ahon sa ua: amitmuh unnamdangmi ka hi. Ka sikha ka sam a, hondawng kei, ka kam in amah khem mah leng. Ka zi a ding in ka hu kihhuai ahi a,sanggamte ziak in pumpi hahsiang mah leng ka namsia hi. Naupang neute nangawn in hon simmoh ua; ka thohleh,ka siatna ding in thu agen uhi. Job Thugen Ngaveina Ka vun ah leh ka sa ah ka guh abelh bikbek a,ka ha vun toh ka suakta hi.

Hon hehpih un, hon hehpih un,Aw nou ka lawmte;Pathian khut in kei ahon khoihta ngal a. Bangziak a Pathian bang a nou hon sawi na hi ua,ka sa a bangziak a lungkim lou na hi ua? “Aw ka thute tu in gelh in om le uh aw;Aw laibu ah kigelh lutleh aw. Sik leh ngen gelhna zum intangtawn a ding in suangpia gelh hi le uh aw; Ka Tanpa ahing chih leh,atawp chiang in leitung ah adingh nawn dingchih ka theih ziak in. Ka vun huchibang a hihsiat a a-om khit nung in,himahleh ka sa a kipan Pathian ka mu ding hi. Keimah a ding in amah kei mahmah in ka mu dia,ka mitte'n a-en ding, midang hilou in;ka sung ah ka lungtang asidang hial hi! “Amah bangchibang in i sawita phet ding uam,na chih uleh, kei ah thubul muh in a-om chih thei in. Namsau kihta un;hehna in lah namsau gawtnate ahon tun ngal a,huchi a vaihawmna a-om chih na theihtheihna ding un.”

Huan Naamath mi Zophar in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Huaiziak in ka ngaihtuahnate'nkei dawnna ahon pia a,ka sung a om ka kinohna thu ziak mahmah in. Kei hon zahlaksak salhna ka zata a, ka theihsiamna kha in ahon dawng hi. “Leitung a mihing a-om nungsiah, hun lui thu hiai na thei kei maw; Giloute vualzohna atom a,Pathian limsakloute nopsakna mitphiat kal sung lel ahi chih? Ahoihkimna in vante suntou in,alu in meipite phatou mahleh; Himahleh amah ek bang in tangtawn in amangthangding a, ‘Koi a om ahia?’Amah mute'n achi ding uh. Mang bang in alengmang dia,muh in a-om kei ding hi;ahi, zan mengmuh bang in hawlmang in a-om ding hi. Amah mu mit in amah amuta kei ding hi;amun in leng amah amuta kei ding hi. Atate'n gentheite deihsakna azong ding ua,akhutte'n athil hoih ape nawn ding hi. “Atuailai hatna in aguhtedim mahleh, leivui ah amah toh alum ding uhi. Akam ah gitlouhna khum in alei nuai ah sel mahleh; Sit in, paisak kei in, akam ah kem gige zou mahleh; Agil a an akitok a,asung ah gulgu bang in akha hi. Hauhsaknate anawmvalh a,alokhe nawn ding hi.Pathian in agilpi a kipan in apaikhe ding hi. Sokval gu atawp dia,gulngan in amah athat ding. Luipite, khuaizu leh nawituidat lui luangte a-en kei ding hi. Sepgim gah ape nawn dia anawmvalhsuk kei ding a;amuhsa ah kipahna anei kei ding. Ama'n lah gentheite anuaisiah a, amangngilh hi;alam louhpi inn hiamgamtak in alata uhi. Zophar Thugen Nihveina Anekgaih louh bangmah om lai a-om kei hi;huaiziak in ahauhna in adaih sawt kei ding. Ahauh san lai in haksa sakna anei dia,thulimloumi khut ahong tung ding hi. Agilpi hihdim ding a akisak lai in,Pathian in atung ah athangpaihna kihtakhuaina akhe ding a,anek lai in atung ah azusak ding hi.

Sik galvan a kipan atai dia,dal thal in amah akap pailet ding. Adokkhia a, apumpi a kipan in ahong paikhia;ahi, asinkha a pan amukzumte velvel hong paikhia a launate atung ah ahong tung hi. Agou ding in mialna tengteng kholkhawm in a-om;mei mut louh in amah anegai ding; apuanin a nutsiat a om anegai ding hi. Vante'n abohsiatna ataklang ding ua, lei amah dou ding in athou ding. A-inn a punna apaimang dia,aheh ni in avante aluangmang ding hi. “Hiai Pathian a pan a migilou tantuan ahi,agouluah dia Pathian in asehsak.”

Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Ka thugen hoihtak in ngaikhia unla, hiai na khamuanna thu uh hi hen. Hon thuak teitei unla,ka hon gen ding a,ka gen khit chiang in nuihsan na ni uteh. “Kei phunna mihing tung ah hia?Bangziak a kuhkal lou aom lou ding ka hia? Hon en unla, lamdang sa unla,khut in na kam uh hum un. Ka ngaihtuah in ka lung adong a,linna in ka sa nak. “Bangziak in ahia migilou ahin a,tekkun a adam a,ahong thupikhiak? Asuante uh akiang uah amitmuh uah ahihkip a,agil ua gahte amai ma uah. A-inkuante uh lauhuai lak ah abit a,atung uah Pathian chiang ake kei hi. Abawngtal un chi akhah a,ahut ngei kei,abawngpi un nou anei a,anou ase ngei kei. Ganhon bang in ataneute uhapawtsak ua,atate uh alam uh. Apekging uleh kaihgingtoh kituak in la asa ua,atamngai ging uah akipak uh. Anite uh lamzangtak in azang ua, lungmuang inSheol ah apaisuk uh. “Pathian kiang ah, ‘Hon paisan in,na lampite theih ka kilawp kei uh. Bangkim hihthei bang a ahih,a-nna ka sep ding uh,akiang a ka thum un punna bang a ka muh ding uh? achi uhi. Ngai in, alamzanna uh akhut ua om ahi kei a hia?Migilou lemtheihna kei a kipan a gamlapi a om ahi. “Migilou meisel bangzah vei amit a,vangtahna atung ua atun a,Pathian in athangpaihna inlungkhamna apiak chiat? Bangzah vei ahia buhpawl huih mut bang ahih ua,buhsi huihpi mutmang bang ahih uh? “Pathian in gitlouhnate atate uh a ding in akholkhawm,na chi ua, amau tung ah tungsak le ake; atheihsiamna ding un. Amau mit ngei in asiatna uh mu uhenla,Bangkim hihthei thangpaihna dawn uhen. Job Thugen Gukveina Kua'n ahia Pathian theihna sinsak ding?ama'n sangpi a omte vai ahawmsak ngal a. “Alut lai in mi asi a,nuam leh bit lai in.

Anawite nawizu in adim a,aguhngekte thau in adim hi. Midang lungkhamtak in asi a,Nuamsa a a-an chiam ngei lou in. Vut lak ah kibang in alum ua,than in apumtuam hi. Ngai in, na ngaihtuah uh ka thei, dikloupi a ka tung a na sawmte uh. ‘Koi ah ahia kumpi inn a-om,migilou tenna puanin koi ah a-om a? na chi uh. “Zinzin mite na dong ngei kei ua hia?Agente uh na pom kei ua hia? Migilou vangtah ni in hawi in a-om a,thangpaih ni in hotkhiak in a-om, chih. Kua ahia amaitang a alampi pulak ding,kua ahia athilhih bang a amah din ding? Han lam a puak ahih in,ahan ven ahi. Lui phaizang a leitang amah a ding in anuam a;mi tengteng in amah nung azui ua,amah ma a na paite sim seng louh ahi uh. Bangchi in thu mumalomloupi a hon khamuan ding na hia?Na dawnnate uah zuauthu lou ngal bangmah a-om kei hi.”

Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz in hichi in achi: “Pathian a ding in mihing aphatuam thei diam?Kuapeuh apil amah mah a ding in aphatuam ngei a. Na diktat, Bangkim hihthei a ding akipahna ahi a hia?Ahihkeileh na lampite na hoihkimsak,amah a dia punna hia? Nang ahon salh a,vaihawmna a nang toh alut,amah na kihtak ziak hia? Na gitlouhna alian kei maw?Na thulimlouhna ah lengtawpna a-om sam kei hi. “Bangmah lou ding in na unau thuchiamte na la a,vuaktangte puansilh na suahsak hi. Bahte a ding in dawn ding tui na pe kei a,gilkial a ding in tanghou na it hi. Himahleh mihat in gam anei a;asung ah ami deihthoh ateng hi. Khutvuak in meithaitena sawlmang a, pabeitekhutte hihtan in a-om hi. Huaiziak in na kim ah thangte a-om ua,lauguihna in nang ahon hihbuai hi. Ahihkeileh khomial,na muh theih louh,leh tui tampi in nang ahon khuh hi. “Van sang ah Pathian a-om kei a hia?Aksite sandan en in, sang hi na tel uh e; Nang, ‘Pathian in bang athei a?Khomial bikbek ah vai ahawm thei dia hia? Ama'n hon muhlouhna ding a,meipi sah in liah a,van dum khen a vak ahi, na chi hi. Migiloute totsa lampi lui na kem ding hia? Ahun ma ua lakmang a-om a,akingakna ua tui luang bang a butkhiak a omte. Pathian kiang a,‘Hon paimangsan in; huan ei a ding inBangkim hihthei in bang ahihthei a? chite. Himahleh a-innte uh thil hoih in adimsak ua,himahleh migiloute thugen kei a kipan agamla hi. Midiktatte'n amu ua,akipak uh; mihoihte'n amau anuihsan ua, Chihtaktak in ei dou ding a thoute satkhiak in a-om ua,amaute lak a khosuaksunte mei in ahulta,” chi in. “Tu in amah kimeltheihpih inla,muangtak in om in.Huai ah hoih na kiang ah ahong pai ding hi.

Houlim Thumveina(Job. —. )Eliphaz Thugen Nanungpen Bangkim hihthei kiang ana kik nawnleh, lamkip na hi ding;na puaninte a kipan gamlapi ah diktatlouhna na koihmang ding ahi. Huan na gou leivui ah koih inla,luite suangte lak ah Ophir dangka-eng; Bangkim hihthei na gou ahi dia,dangka manpha nang a ding in Bangkim hihthei ah kipak in,Pathian kiang ah daktou ding na hih ziak in. Amah kiang ah na thum ding a,ama'n hon na za ding a, na thuchiam na tangtun ding hi. Thil khat tung ah thupuknabawl in thu na pe dia, nang a ding in hihkip in a-om ding;huchi in na lampite ah khovak atang ding hi. Ahon sawnpuk chiang un,‘Thohtouhna a-om, na chi ding.Hihniam a omte ama'n ahondam ding hi. Ama'n ahoih lou nangawn asuaktasak ding a;ahi, na khutte sianna ziak in amah suahtaksak in a-om ding.”

Huchi in Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: Tuni mahmah in ka phunna helhuai ahi,ka mauna sang in ka thuakna agikzaw hi. Aw amah ka muhna mun thei leng la,atutna mahmah ah hoh thei leng aw! Ama ah ka thu ka bawlhoih dia,thugente in ka kam dimsak ding hi veng. Ahon na dawnna ding thute ka thei dia,huchi in bang ahia ka kiang aagen ding ka theisiam ding. Athilhihtheihna thupina in kei ahon sel diam?Ii, himahleh kei hon hatsak ding hi. Huai ah midik in amah thu asutpih thei dia;huchi in ka vaihawmmi a pansuahtaksak in ka om tawntungta ding hi. “Ngai in, mailam zuan in ka pai a, himahleh huai ah a-om kei;nunglam zuan in,himahleh amah ka mu kei hi. Veilam pang ah, na sep lai in,himahleh amah ka mu thei kei a;taklam pang ah abu,amah ka muh theihlouhna ding in. Himahleh ka zuih lampi athei a; ahon ze-et lai in,dangka-eng bang in ka hon suakkhe ding hi. Ka khe in akalsuante alenkip a;alampite ka zuita a, ka pial kei hi. Amukte thupiak a kipanka paikik kei a,akam a thute akiphamoh ka an sang in ka kholkhawm zaw hi. “Himahleh amah lungsimkhek lou ahi a,amah kua'n ahei thei dia?Akha in adeih,huai mah ahih zel hi. Kei a dia sehsa ahih ngal a;thil huchibang tampiakiang ah a-om hi. Huaiziak in a-omna ah ka buai a;ka ngaihtuah chiang in amah ka lau hi. Pathian in ka lungtang abahsakta a,Bangkim hihthei inahon hihbuaita hi. Khomial ma in satkhiak in ka om ngal kei a,ka mai a kipan khomial sah leng akhuh sam kei hi.” Job Thugen Sagihveina

“Bangziak a Bangkim hihtheiin vaihawmna hunte bawl lou ahia?Amah theite'n bangziak a anite mu lou uh ahia? “Gamgi suan a-om ua;hiamgamtak in ganhon alamang ua,avak uhi. Pabeite sabiltung ahawlmang ua,thuchiamna ding inmeithai bawngtal ala uh. Lampi a kipan tasamte aheikhia ua;lei a gentheite akiselkhawm uhi. “Ngai in gamkeu a sabiltungte bang in athilhihna lam uah,an thanuamtak a zong in apaikhia ua,atate uh a ding in gamdai in amau an asuaksak hi. Gam lam ah agan an a-at ua;migiloute grep gah ala uh. Zankhua in puan bei in vuaktang in alum ua,khovot ah khuhna nei lou in. Tangte vuahpi in amaute akawt ua,belh ding deih man in suangpi akawi uhi. “Pa neiloute nawi a kipan kaikhia a-om ua,huan, gentheite thuchiam la in. Huchi in tasamte puan bei in vuaktang in avialvak ua,buhphalte gilkial in apua uhi. Olive a pan sathau abawl ua;a-uain sukna uh achil ua,himahleh adangtak uhi. Khopi a kipan mite amau ua,liamte kha akikoukhia ua;Pathian in alimsak kei hi. “Hiaite khovak tung a helte lak a ahi ua;huai lampite athei kei ua,alampite ah a-om gige sam kei uhi. Khovak tung in tualthatmi athou a,gentheite leh tasamte athat a; ahi,zan in guta bang in a-om hi. Ang kawm mi mit in leng khomui angak a,kuamah in hon mu kei ding, chi in amai abawl lamdang hi. Khomial in innte avut pailet ua,sun chiang in akikhumbilh ua;khovak athei kei uh. Amaute tengteng a ding in zingsang sihna limliap bangahi a; zan mial lauhuaite lawm in anei uhi.”Zophar Thugen Nanungpen “Tuite tung ah kintak a taihmang in a-om ua,atantuan uh lei ah hamsiat in a-om;agrephuante sukmi in anaih kei. Khokhal leh nisa in vuk tuite atawpkang a,huai mah bang in thil hihkhialteSheol in ahih hi.

Sul in amah amangngilh dia;than in limsatak in amah kivakna in anei ding uh;theihgige in a-omta kei dia,diktatlouhna sing bang a hihtan in a-om ding. “Ta nei lou numei ching anegai a;meithai a ding in hoih ahih kei hi. Ahi a lah Pathian in athilhihtheihna in mihatteadomkang a, hinna alamet phak louh lai unadingtou uh. Bitna Pathian in amaute apia a,huchi in huai ah akhawl uh;alampite uah amitte a-om hi. “Hihlet in a-om ua;himahleh sawt lou kal in,abei uhi; ahi, sukniam in a-om ua,midang tengtengbang in lampi a kipan lakkhiak in a-om ua,buhvui bang in atkhiak in a-om uhi. Huchibang na hi kei taleh kua ahiazuauthei a hon chian a,ka thugen bangmah lou suah ding?”

Shuah mi Bildad in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Pathian kiang ah lalna leh launa a-om;ama'n amun sangte ah muanna abawl hi. “Asepaihhonte kua'n asim seng dia?Kua tung ah ahiaavakna tanlouhna a om? Huchi ahih chiang inPathian ma ah bangchi in mihing adik thei dia?Ahihkeileh amah numei suan bangchi in asiang thei dia? Ngai in, khapi nangawn invakna anei kei a,amitmuh in aksite asiangthou kei hi. “Mihing, tangtel sang a bangzah a neuzaw?Pathian mitmuh ah mihing bangchi phet ahi diam,mihing tapa, lungnou leltak!” Bildad Thugen Nanungpen

Huan Job in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Thilhihtheihna nei lou amah bangchi a panpih in;hatna nei lou ban bangchidan a hondam thei na hia? Pilna nei lou amah bangchi in na thuhilh a,nakpitak a theihna hoih na puangkheta a; Kua kiang ah ahia thute na genkhiak?Kua kha ahia nang a kipan hong paikhia?”Bildad “Sisate leh huai a tengte tuite nuai a kipan ahi uh. Ama ah Sheol vuaktang in a-om a, Abaddon inkikhuhna anei kei hi. Ama'n mal mun awng ah aphalhkhia a, bangmah lou tung ah lei akhai hi. Ameipi sah in tuite atun a;anuai ah meipi akikek kei hi. Ama'n laltutphah mai akhuh a,atung ah ameipi aphalh hi. Tuite tung ah, khovak lehkhomial kigitna ah,kawlmong akaikual hi. Asalhna ah van khuamte aling ua, lamdang asa uh. “Athilhihtheihna in tuipi akhawlsak a, huan atheihsiamna inRahab asat hi. Ahu in vante bawlhoih ina-om a; akhut in gulpi kinoh tai lai abawl hi. Ngai in, hiaite a thilhih among lel ahi uh.Ngatchik a ahuau siausiau lel!Athilhihtheihna van-ging kua ahia theisiam ding?” Job Thugen Giatveina

Huchi in Job in agentehna thu apan nawn a,hichi in achi: “Pathian ahin bang in, ama'n ka dikna alamang a;Bangkim hihthei in, ama'n ka kha ahihbuai a; Ka sung a ka hinna a-om lai teng, Pathian hu ka nakvang a a-om lai teng? Ka mukte'n thutak lou agen kei ding,ka lei in leng khemna thu agen kei ding. Siam ka hon tangsak kei ding a,ka sih ma kei a pan ka dikna ka koihmang kei ding. Ka diktatna ka len tinten a,ka khah kei ding hi,ka dam lai teng ka lungtang in kei hon kou kei ding. “Ka melma gilou bang hi henla,kei dou ding a thou midiktat lou bang hi hen. Punna muta mahleh, Pathian limsakloumi lametna,Pathian in akha alakmang ngal in, bang ahia? Atung a buaina atun in,Pathian in akikou aza diam? Bangkim hihthei ah nuam asa in, chik lai peuh inPathian sap nuam asa diam? “Pathian khut tungtang ahnang ka hon sinsak ding;Bangkim hihthei kiang a om ke'n ka iim kei ding hi. Ngai un, noute tengteng in huai na muta ua;ahih ngalleh, bangziak abangmah lou hong hi na hi ua?”Zophar “Hiai Pathian lak a migilou tantuan leh,nuaisiah hat mite goutan,Bangkim hihthei a pan amuh uh ahi. Atate apun uleh,namsau a ding ahi;huan asuan tanghou in atai kei ding hi. Anung a omlaite hi leng in avui dia,ameithaite un kahna abawl kei ding uh. Leivui bang a dangka vum in,tungman bang in puansilh bawl mahleh; Abawl thei, himahleh midikte'n asilh ding ua,mihoihte'n dangka pen ahawm ding uh. Maimomlen bang in inn alam a,vengmi in abawl aidakbuk bang lel ahi. Hausa in alum a, himahleh khop in a-om kei ding;amit ahak a, huan amah a-om kei. Tuite bang in launate'n amah apha a;zan in huihpi in amah agumang hi. Suahlam huih in amah apomang a, apaimang hi;huchi in amun a kipan in amah amutmang hi. “Pathian in amah nakpi in alawn dia, adawm kei ding;akhut a pan ataimang ding hi. Mite'n amah akhut uh abetkhum ding ua,amun a kipan in amah anuihsan ding uhi.” Job

Lei a pan in sik akilakhia a,suang a kipan in dal akisungkhia hi. Mihing in khomial phak tawp aneisak a,bukimna azongkhia hi; khomial leh sihna lim phak tawp tan in. Mite omlouhna ah kokhuk lutna hawm atouvang ua,mite a pan gamla ah akikhai ua,lehlam lehlam ah akivei uh. Lei ahihleh, huai a kipan intanghou ahong suak a;anuai ah mei ahih bang in akilumlet hi. Huai suangte sapphir suangmun ahi a dangka-eng nen anei hi. Huai lampi sasial ne vasa in athei kei a, mu-akla mit in leng amu ngei sam kei hi. Gamsa kisatheite'n asik kha ngei kei ua,humpinelkai lun lai leng huai ah apai kha nai kei hi. “Meisah suangpi tung ah akhut akoih a; azung in mualte alumlet hi. Suangpite lak ah tuilam ahong a; amit in thil manpha chiteng amu hi. Atakkhiaklouhna ding un lui luangte atuam a;thil kisel khovak ah ahon lakhia hi. Himahleh koi lai ah apilnaakimu dia?Theihsiamna koi lai a om ahia? “Mihing in alampi athei kei;mihing gam ah leng muh in a-om kei. Thukna in, ‘Kei ah a-om kei, achi a, tuipi in, ‘Ka kiang ah a-om kei, achi hi. Dangka-eng a lei theih ahi kei a, huai man ding in dangka buk theih ahi kei hi. Ophir dangka-eng toh amanphatna teh theihahi kei ding, Onik mantamhiam Sapphir toh hiam. Dangka-eng leh limlang in akimpih thei kei ua,huai khenna ding in dangka-eng hoih leh suangmantam lengahi thei kei ding hi. Suang dum hiam suang muhpaisuak theih akigen kei ding,Ahi, pilna man rubi suang sang in asangzaw hi. Ethiopia topaz suang in apha kei dia,dangka-engtak toh leng amanphatna teh ding ahi kei. “Ahihleh pilna koi a kipan ahong pai ahia?Theihsiamna koi a om ahia?

Mihing tengteng mit a kipan a sel ahi chih leh,huihkhua a vasate a kipan sitsa a om ahi chih thei in. Abaddon leh Sihna in,‘Huai a thuthang ka bil un ka za uh, achi uhi. Pathian in huai alampiatheisiam a, amun athei hi. Lei mong tan in a-en ngal a,van nuai thil tengteng amu hi. Huih a ding a gikna apiak lai in leh tuite tehna a ateh lai in; Vuah a ding a thupiak abawl a,vanpiging khophia a dia lampi abawl lai in; Huai lai in ama'n amu a,apuang a; ahihkip a,ahi, azongkhia hi. “Mihing kiang ah, ‘Ngai in, Toupa kihtak, huai pilna ahi;hoih lou a kipan paimang theihsiamna ahi, achi hi.” Job In Pathian Pilna Thuguk Agen “Chihtaktak in dangka a ding in khuk a-om a,ahihsiang uh dangka-eng a ding in mun.

Job in agentehna thu agen nawn a, hichi in achi.Job “Aw nidanglai khate bang a om hi leng, Pathian inahon veh lai nite bang in; Ka lutung a akhawnvak atan a, amah vakna a khomial a ka vak lai; Ka tuailai nite a ka om bang a,ka puanin tung a Pathian thuguk a-om lai in; Ka kiang a Bangkim hihtheia-om a,ka tate ka kim a-om lai un; Ka kalsuante bawngnawi a sawp ahih a,suangpi in sathau luite abutkhiak lai in. Khopi a kongpi zuan a ka pai lai in, kongzing a ka tutna ka bawl lai in, Tangvalte'n ahon mu ua, abuua; upate athou ua adingh uh. Lalte houlim akidek ua,akam uah akhut uh akoih uh. Miliante aw adai a, akam dangtawng uah alei uh abelh hi. “Bil in ahon zak lai in,hampha ahon chi a;mit in ahon muh lai in,pom ahon chi a; Migenthei,panpih ngai a kap,Pa nei lou, panpihtu bei ka hutkhiak ziak in. Mangthang ding a mansa a kipan vualzawlna ka tung ah ahong tung a;meithai lungtang kipah ziak a lasa ding in ka omsak hi. Diktatna ka silh a,ahon tuam hi; ka dikna puanak thupi leh lukhum bang leh suangmantam bang ahi. Mittaw a ding in mitte ka hi a,khebai a ding in khete ka hi. Tasam a ding in pa ka hi a;ka theih louh thubul ka zongkhia hi. Diktatloumi haizek ka hihtan a,aha a kipan asamat ka khahsak. “Huchi in ke'n,ka bu ah ka si ding a,piaunel bang in ka nite ka pungsak ding, ka chi a. Ka zungte tuite pha inadalhzak a, ka hiangte ahzankhua in daitui akai. Kei ah ka thupinaathak gige a, ka khut ahka thalpeu athak gige. Mite'n ahon ngai ua,angak ua, ka thuhilh a ding in adai dide uhi. Ka thute zoh in apau nawn kei uh; ka thugen atung uah atakkhia. Vuah ngak bang in ahon ngak ua;vuah nanungte a ding bang in lianpi in akamka uh. Kimuanna aneih louh chiang un atung uah ka nuihmai a;huchi in ka mel tang apaikhe kei uh. “Alampi ding uh ka telsak a,hausa bang in ka tu a; sepaih pawl lak a kumpipa bang in ka leng a,suun mite lungmuanmi bang in.” Job In Athubuai Agen Tawpna

“Huan kei sang a naupang,apate uh, ka ganching uitetoh koih dia ka sitte'n,kei nuihza bawlna in ahon zang uh. Ahi, akhutte uh hat a,kei bang ahon loh tak dia, huai ahatna uh beisate'n? Taksapna leh kialna in atuikang ua;lei keu leh sia akheuh uh, Pawn a anteh alou ua;huan lou kha zungte a-an uh ahi. Mite lak a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om ua; guta bang in amau nung ah akikou ua. Guam a hengte ah ateng ding ua, lei leh suangpi hawmte ah. Pawn lak ah aham ua; lahou nuaite ah akisekhawm uh. Mihaite tate ahi ua, ahi,mithulim lou tate; gam a pan in delhkhiak ahi uhi. “Huan tu in kei ala uh ka hong hi ahi,amau a ding in houlimna ka hi. Ahon kih ua, kei a kipan atuam ding in uh,ka mai a chilsiat akidek kei uh. Pathian in ka khau akhah a,ahon hihgim a,huan ka ma ah kamkaihna akhahkhia uh. Ka khut taklam ah tuailaiteathou ua; ka khe anawlkhinua, siatna lampi ka ma ah akoih uhi. Ka lampi hihsia in,ka tuahsiatna azong ua,kuama'n akham kei uh. Awng zapi apaisuak bang in ahong ua, siatna lak ah ka tung ah akikhuk uh. Ka tung ah launate ahei ua,huih bang in ka minphatna adelhmang uh;meipi bang in ka hauhna apaimang hi. “Huchi in tu in ka sung ah ka kha buakkhiak in a-om;gimthuakna nite'n kei ahon man uhi. Zan in ka guhte asawi a,kei hon sun natnate'n khawl chih anei kei uh. Ka natna hi hat mahmah ziak in ka puansilh anin a:ka puanak ngawng bang in kei ahon gak hi. Buannawi ah ahon pailut a,leivui leh meivu bang ka hi hi. “Na kiang ah ka kikou a,na hon dawng kei hi.Ka ding a, kei na hon en maimah a.

Ka tung a gilou ding in na kilumlet a, na bantha hatna inkei na hon sawi hi. Huih ah na hon domkangtou a,huai tung ah na hon tuangsak;huchi in huih ah na hon lumlet den hi. Sihna na hon tun ding chih ka thei hi, mihing tengteng a dia sehsa inn ah. Himahleh siatna a pukgawp mi'n aban zak lou ding hia?Atuahsiatna ah panpihna ngen in kikou lou ding hia? Buaina a ding in ka kap kei diam?tasam a ding in ka kha adah kei ding a hiam? Hoih ka ngak chiang in, hoih lou ahong pai a;khovak ka ngak chiang in, khomial ahong pai. “Ka lungtang abuai, khawl hun amu ngei kei;gimthuakna nite ka tung ah ahong tung. Hihvom a om in ka vialvak,himahleh ni hihvom hilou in;khawmpi ah ka dingh a panpih deih in ka kikou hi. Sehalte unaupa ka hi a,simbute lawm ka hi. Ka vun avom a,kei a kipan apilh uh,kholum in ka guhte akang hi. Huaiziak in ka kaihging suunna asuak a,ka mutging mikapte aw.”

“Ka mit toh thukhunka na bawl khinta; bangchi in nungak ka en theita dia? “Ahihleh tunglam Pathian akipan in ka tantuan bang ahia,tungsang a Bangkim hihthei a kipan in ka goutan? Midikloute tung ah siatna,gitlouh nasemte tung ah gawtna atung kei maw? Ama'n ka lampite amu kei a hia?ka kalsuante asim vek kei a hia? “Thuzuau toh na om a,huai a ka khe khem ding a kinoh ahihleh; bukna diktak ah hon buk dih ua,Pathian in ka thutakna thei hen! Ka kalsuan lampi a kipan a na pial hiam,ka lungtang in ka mitte na zui hiam,ka khutte ah nin himhim na belh hiam; Huchi ka hihleh, chi tuh ning,midang in ne hen;ahi, ka lou a piang bulkalh khiak hi hen. “Ka lungtang numei lam a khem a om a,ka inveng kongkhak ka na ngak takleh; huchi ahih takleh ka zi in midang a ding in an su henla,midangte amah tung ah kun uhen. Huchibang gitlouhna hoihhet lou ahi; ahi, vaihawm mitegawt ding khelhna ngei, siatna ding a Abaddon tan a kangbei leh,ka punna tengteng zungkalh ding mei hi ding lah ahi ngal a. “Ka tung a phunna aneih lai ua,ka sikhapa hiam ka sikhanu hiam makhua na musit a,na khualsak lou ka hihleh; Pathian athohkhiak chiang inbang ka hihta dia?Thu akan hun chiang in bang in ka dawngta dia? Kei sul a pan hon bawlpa'n amah abawl kei maw?Khat in ahon bawl tuak ahi kei maw? “Migentheite alunggulh uh ka piak louh a,ahihkeileh vuaksuak ding a meithai mitte ka na omsakleh; Ahihkeileh kei kia in ka an ka nek a, huai a pabei in an anek keileh; Ii, ka tuailai a kipan in pa bang ka hi, ka kiang ah ana khanglianta;ka nu sul a kipan amah pipa ka hita hi.

“Kuapeuh taksap ziak a mangthang hiam,ahihkeileh tasam khuhna nei lou hiam ka na muhleh; Akawngte'n kei hon vualzawllou a, ka belam mul a lumsak a ana om keileh. “Kongpi a panpihna ka muh ziak a pabeite siatna ding aka khut ka na likleh; Huchi ka hihleh, ka liang ka liangzang a kipan kia henla,aguh a kipan ka ban kitan hen. Pathian a kipan tuahsia kei ading in launa ahi ngal a,athupina ka tuak ngam kei hi. “Dangka-eng lametpen a ka na bawl a, dangka-eng hoih kiang ah, ka muanna na hi,ka na chihtak a; Ka hauhna thupi ziak a hiam,ka khut in tam alam ziak a ka kipah a; Avak lai a ni ka na et a, khathupitak paikhia ka na et a, Ka lungtang guk a khem a a-om a, ka kam in ka khut ana tawp takleh; Hiai leng thulimlouhnavaihawmte gawt ding ahi,tung a Pathian kiang a na zuauta hi ding ka hih ziak in. “Kei hon mudah siatna a ka na kipah a,ahihkeileh hoih lou atung a atun chiang a ka na kipah luatleh; Ka melma hamsiat ding leh ahenna thum ding in ka kam ka na khialsak kei. Ka puaninte a,‘A-an a kihihvah lou kua a-om a?’hon na chih kei ualeh; Kongzing ah mikhual agiak ngei kei a;khualzin a ding in ka kongte ka na hongta. “Adam bang a ka angsung athulimlouhna na sel a,ka tatlekna na khuh ka hih a, aziak, mi tampi launa thupitakka neih ziak ahih a, sungtehon muh daina launa ziak ahuchi a dai dide a,popawt lou ka hihleh, Aw, kei hon za ding mi nei leng maw.Ngai in, ka deihlam hiai ahi.Bangkim hihthei in hon dawng henla;ka melma in laibu ah gelhkhiak hen. “Chihtaktak in ka liangzang ah ka po dia; lallukhu bang inkei ah ka kan den ding hi. Akiang ah ka kalsuan zah ka puang ding a;lal bang in akiangnai ah ka hoh ding hi. “Ka gam kei dem a akikou a,lei lehsate akahkhawm uleh; Sum lou a huai gahte ka na nek tak a, ahihkeileh huai a aneite ahinna uh ka na tansakleh, Buh hilou in louling neite,barli buh hilou in loubualte pou zaw hen,”Job thute abeita hi.

Huchibang in hiai mi thumte Job dawn atawpta ua, amah mit a diktat ahih ziak in. Huai lai in Job tung ah Ram inkuan a Buz mi Barakel tapa Elihu hehna akuangkhia a, Pathian hi zaw lou a amah siam akitansak ziak in. Alawm thumte tung ah leng ahehna akuangkhia a, dawnna ding nei lou a, hinapi a lah Job amohpaih ziak un. Amah sang a a-upat zawk ziak un, Job kiang a thu gen ding in Elihu in angak hi. Hiai mi thumte kam a dawnna a-om kei chih atheih in, ahehna akuangkhia hi. “Huchi in Buz mi Barakel tapa.Elihu in adawng hi:Ka naupang a,noute na upa mahmah uh;huaiziak in ka dai a, ka lungsim ka hon ensak ngam kei hi. Huchi in ka chi, ‘Nite'n thu agen ding uh,kum tampi in pilna a sinsak ding hi. Himahleh mihing lungsim a om a, Bangkim hihthei intheihsiamna apia hi. Apilte mithupite ahi kei ua,vaihawmna theisiamte upate ahi sam kei uh. Huaiziak in hong ngaikhia un;ke'n leng ka lungsim ka ensak ding, ka chi. “Ngai un, na thute uh ka ngak a,gen ding na zonkhiak lai un,na thusutte uh ka ngaikhia. Ahi, ka hon limsak a,ngai un, kuamah Job thuzohzou na om kei uh,ahihkeileh na lak uah,athute dawng. Pilna i muta, chi lou ding in pilvang un; mihing hilou inPathian in amah azou thei hi. Ama'n kei siatna ding inathute ahih kei a;ke'n leng nou thugente in amah ka dawng sam kei ding. “Lamdang sa in, adawng nawn kei ua,gen ding thu khat leng anei kei uh. Thu ging neih louh ziak in adingh kinken ua,adawn nawn louh ziak un ke'n ka ngak diam? Ke'n leng ka dawnna ding ka nei hi, ka lungsimka ensak sam ding, ka chi hi. Thu in ka dim a

ka sung a ka kha in hon sawl teitei hi. Ngai un, ka gilpi pawtkhiaknanei lou uain thawl bang ahi;uain thawl thakte bang in puakzak ding in mansa in a-om hi. Ka halhtheihna ding in,ka pau ding; ka mukte ka hong dia, ka dawng ding hi. Mihing mihinna zahtaksakkei un, ka hon ngen hi;kuamah kiang ah leng maitang phatna min ka pe kei ding hi. Maitang phatna minte piak ding ka thei ngal kei a;huchi lou in zaw kei hon bawlpa'n ahon lazok ding hi.” Elihu Thugen(Job. —. )

Ngai in, tu in, ka kam ka ka a,ka kam in ka pau hi. Ka thute'n ka lungtang dikna agenkhe ding uh;Ka mukte'n atheih ngei uh chihtaktak in agen ding uhi. Pathian Kha in ahon bawl a,Bangkim hihthei hu in hinna ahon pia hi. “Na theihleh hon dawng in;ka ma ah na thute akizom in koih inla na panna ah dingh in. Ngai in, nang bang in Pathian lam ah ka om hi;kei leng tungman a bawl ka hi. Ngai in, ka lauhuaina in nang ahon lausak kei ding,ka hahkatna leng na tung ah agik kei ding hi. “Chihtaktak in ka zak in na pauta a, huchi in na thute ging ka zata hi. Ka siang hi, tatlekna bei;ka hoih a, kei ah thulimlouhna leng a-om kei, chi in. Ngai in, kei demna ding ziak amu a melma in ahon simta hi; Ka khete kol abunsak a, kalampite tengteng achiamteh hi. “Ngai in, ka hon dawng ding,hiai na diklouhna ah; mihing sang in Pathian alianzaw hi. Bangziak a amah dou na hia,Ka thute a bangmah mah lah adawng kei ding, chi in? Pathian in lah khatvei agen a,ahi, nihvei, mihing in limsak kei mahleh. Zan a mang ah, mengmuhna ah, mite tung a ihmut kip akiak lai un,lupna tung a ihmut laite un; huai lai in mite bilte ahong a,vaunate in amau ahihlau a, Huchi a athiltup a kipan a mihing alakkik a,mihing a kipan akisaktheihna asatkhiak theihna ding in; Ama'n kokhuk a kipan akha akepkiksak a,namsau a kipan ahinna. “Alupna tung ah natna asawi in leng a-om,aguhte akinakna om gige toh in. Huchi in ahinna in tanghou,akha in an lim akih hi. Asa atummang a, huchi inmuh theih in a-om kei;Akimu lou a guhte hong dawkkhia uhi. Ahi, han kiang ah akha ahong nai a,ahinna hihse mite kiang ah.

“Akiang a angel, kamlet,sangkhat lak a khat,mihing kiang a amah a diadik bang ahia chihetsak ding a-omleh; Huchi a amah a ding a zahngai thei,Kokhuk a paisukna a kipanamah suaktasak un, tatna ka muta. Asa naupang a sang in nou zaw hen;atuailai nite lam ah kik nawnta hen. Pathian kiang ah athum a,amah ding in deihsak theih in a-om hi;huchi in nopna toh amai amu a;adiktatna akiang ah ape nawn hi. Mite ma ah la asa a,ka khialta a, adik ka nahekkawi a, thuk in ka om kei! Kokhuk sung a paisukna akipan akha atanta hi,ahinna in vakna amuta ding hi, achi a. “Ngai in, hiai thilte tengtengPathian in, mihing lak ah ahih a, nihvei, ahi thumvei. Kokhuk a kipan akhapikik ding in, huchi a mihingvakna ahihvak a a-omtheihna ding in. “Chiamteh in, Aw Job, ngaikhia in, dai inla, thu ka gen ding. Gen ding na neihleh,hon dawng in, pau in,siam hon tansak ka ut ngal a. Elihu In Job Ataihilh “Akoi abang hitaleh, Job,ka hon ngen hi, thugen za inlaka thugen tengtengngaikhia in.

Huai lou in Elihu in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Ka thute za un,nou mipilte; nou theihna neite,bil hon doh un. Dangtawng in an achep bang in,bil in thute a-enchian hi. Adik ei a ding in i tel ding uh;i lak ua hoih bang ahia i thei ding uh. Job in, ‘Ka dik a, Pathian in ka dikna a lamang,’achi ngal a. Ka dikna huchi hita mahlehzuauthei a sim ka hi a; tatlekna bei himah leng,ka liamna hihdam theih louh ahi. “Muhsitna tui bang a dawn bei,Job bang mihing kua ahia? Thulim lou nasem mite toh ahon a pai, migiloute toh omkhawm mi. Ama'n lah, ‘Pathian lak a ka kipahna ding bangmahka loh tak kei, achi ngal a. Huaiziak in nou theisiam mite,hon ngaikhia un. Pathian in, gilou bangchi in ahih ngei dia;Bangkim hihthei in thulim lou bangchi in ahih mahmah dia. Ama'n lah mihing thilhih amah kiang apekik ding a,mi chiteng alampite kiang apekik ding ahi. “Ahi, moh khuksakna thu ah,Pathian in giloutak in ahih kei dia,Bangkim hihthei in leng vaihawmna ahihse sam kei ding hi. Kua'n ahia amah leitung a heutu hihna pia?Ahihkeileh khovel pumpi kua'n ahia athu a koih? Mihing tung a alungtang nga a,ama lam a akha leh ahu lakhawm; Sa tengteng amangthang vek ding ua, mihing leivui asuak nawn ding hi. “Theihsiamna na neihleh, hiai za in;ka thu aw ngaikhia in. Mi thudik hua in vai ahawm ding hia?Dik leh hat amah na mohpaih ding hia? Kumpipa kiang a, ‘Na hoih kei’chih akilawm hia?Ahihkeileh miliante kiang a,‘Na gilou uh? chih. Milalte mihinna zahtak lou a,Genthei sang a mihausate limsak zawte kiang a chihakilawm sem lou ding hia?Amaute lah akhut nasep ahi ngal ua. Mitphiat kal lou in asi uazankim lai mahmah in;mite aling ua apaimang ua,mihing khut hilou in mihatte lakmang in a-om uhi.

“Amitte mihing lampite tung ah a-om a, apainate amu hi. Thulim lou nasem mite buknading khomial hiam limliap hiam a-om kei hi. Vaihawmna a Pathian ma apai ding in, mihing angaihtuah lailai akiphamoh kei hi. Lamte theih phak vual louh in ama'n mihatte ahihzan vek a,amun uah midang atungkhia hi. Huaiziak in anasepte uh athei hi;zan in amau alumlet a,hihsiat in a-om uhi. Midang mitmuh mahmah in migiloute bang in amau agawt hi. Amah zuihna a kipan apialkhiak ua,alampite a koimah alimsak louh ziak un. Huchi in mizawng kahna akiang tung ding in abawl ua,gimthuak kahna aza hi. “Amah na pau keileh, kua'n siam louh atangsak dia?Ama'n amai aselleh, kua'n amah amu thei dia?Namte kiang a hih hiam, ahihkeileh mihing kiang a hih hiam akibang hi. Huchi a Pathian theiloumi in vai ahawm louh a,amite thang a awksak ding a-omlouhna ding in. “Kuapeuh in Pathian kiang ah,Gawtna ka thuakta,ka gilou nawn kei ding, Ka muh louh nang hon sinsak in, gilou ka hihleh ka hih nawn kei ding, achi uhia? Athukna huchi a na nial na deih bang in a-om diam?Kei hilou in, nang na tel ngeingei ding ahi. “Theisiam mite'n ka kiang ah,‘Ahi, achi ding uh,aza mipil teng in. Job in theihna bei in thu agen a, athute pilna bei ahi uh. Mihaite bang a adawnna ah,atawp chiang in Job tungtang ngaihtuah le uh. Ama'n akhelhna ah helna abehlap a,i lak uah akhut abeng a, Pathian kalh in athu apungsakta hi.”

Elihu in adawng a, hichi in achi: “Hiai na dikna hi in na ngaihtuah hia, ahihkeileh,kei a mawng ahi,Pathian mai ah na chi hia? Kei a ding in bang phattuamna a-om dia?Khial lou a ka om in bang phattuamna ka nei a? na chih. Nang leh na kiang a na lawmte ka hon dawng ding. “Vante lam en inla, mu in; vante, nang sang a sangzaw, en in. Na hihkhelhleh, amah dem a bang hih na hia?Na tatleknate punsak hileh,amah tung a bang hih na hia? Diktat na hihleh, amah bang na pia a?Ahihkeileh na khut a kipan bang amu a? Na gitlouhna in nang bang in mi ahihna thei a;na diktatna in mihing tapa ahih hampha thei hi. Nuaisiahna atam mahmah ziak in akikoukhia ua;mihat ban ziak in panpih deih in akikou uh. Kuamah in, ‘Zan chia late hon pia, Pathian kei honBawlpa koi a om ahia; Lei a gamsate sang a hon sinsak tamzaw leh,van a vasate sang a hon pilsakzaw? achi kei uh. Huai ah akikou ua, himahleh,migilou kisaktheihna ziak in,kuamah in dawnna ape kei. Chihtaktak in Pathian in bangmah lou aza kei dia,Bangkim hihthei in leng alimsaksak kei ding hi. “Nang ngial in houh, ‘Amah ka mu kei, athu ma ah a-om,Amah ka ngak hi, na chih vial. Himahleh tu in, heh a aveh louh a,ki-otsakna leng alimsak louh ziak in; Huaiziak in Job in bangmah lou in akam aka ahi;theihna bei in thu atamsak ahi.”

Elihu mah in agenzom zel a, hichi in achi: “Hon na thuakzou zek inla,huan ka hon ensak ding;Pathian sik in lah banghiam khat gen ding ka nei ngal a. Gamla a kipan ka theihna ka hon la ding a,kei hon Bawlpa tung ah diktatna ka nga ding hi. Diktak in ka thute zuau ahi kei a;hoihkim khat ka kiang ah a-om hi. “Ngai in, Pathian in thil ahihthei a, kuamah amusit kei;theihsiamna hatna ah thil ahihthei hi. Gilou hinna ahawi kei a;himahleh gimthuakte kiang ah adikna uh apia hi. Midiktat a kipan amit alakik kei;himahleh laltutphah tung a kumpipa toh amau tangtawn in akoih a,huchi in hihlet in a-om uhi. Huan sikkhaute a gak a a-om ua, gimthuakna guite alak a a-om uleh; Huchi in athilhih uh amau a-ensak a, atatlekna uh,huchi a kisatheitak a ana omna uh. Thuhilhna lam ah abil uh ahonsak a,thulimlouhna a kipan kik ding in thu apia hi. Amah thu angaihkhiak ua,a-nna asep uh leh,anite uh hauhsakna in ahihbei ding ua,akumte uh kipahna in. Himahleh angaihkhiak kei ualeh,namsau in amangthang ding ua, huchi in theihna bei in asi ding uh. “Himahleh amau lungtang aPathian limsaklouhnate'n hehna akholkhawm hi;amau ahen lai in panpih deih in akikou kei uh. Tuailai in asi ua,siangloute lak ah ahinna uh amangthang hi. Agimthuakna in gimthuakte asuaktasak a, nuaisiahna ah abil uh ahonsak hi. Ahi, gakchihna omlouhna,mun lian lam ah dahna a kipan nang ahon pimang ding a;na dohkan tung a kilui thauna in adimta ding hi. Himahleh giloute vaihawmna in na dim a; vaihawmna leh diktatna in nang hon len hi. Thangpaihna a-om ziak in,pilvang in huchi lou in zaw na hauhna in nang ahon pimang kha ding hi;golhgukna tampi in leng nang hon pialsak kei hen. Dahna ana omlouhna ding in,na hauhsaknate ahun diam,ahihkeileh na hatna thilhihtheihna tengteng?

Mite tengteng amun uasatkhiak a a-om zan uah lunggulh ke'n. Pilvang in, gilou limsak ke'n;gimthuakna sang in hiai lah na telzawta ngal a. “Ngai in, Pathian in athilhihtheihna in sangtak in ahih;amah bang sinsakmi kua ahia? Kua'n amah alampi thu apia a?Ahihkeileh, ‘Diklouhna na bawlta, kua'n achi thei dia? Mite'n la asak uh, athilhih hihlian ding in theigige in. Huai ah mite tengteng a-en ua;huai mihing in gamlapi ah amu hi. Ngai in, Pathian alian a,amah i thei kei;akumte zah zontheih ahi kei. “Tui takte ama'n atawi khin a,huai a tuihu a kipan vuah azu. Huai vante'n asungkhia ua,mihing tung ah tampi in atak. Meipi kiphahte leh a-inn vanpigingte kua'n atheisiam dia? Ngai in, akim ah akhovak azak a; tuipi nuai atuam hi. Hiaite in mite avai hawmsak a;an tampi apia hi. Akhutte in khophia atawi a;chiamtehna khoh ding in thu apia hi. Huai husa in atungtang thu agen a,ganhonte'n leng hong kuantou huihpi tungtang thu athei uh.”

“Hiai ah leng ka lungtangaling a,amun a kipan suan in a-om hi. A-aw ging leh akam a kipanavan-ging paikhia noute'n ngaikhia un. Van pumpi nuai ah asawlkhia a,akhophia lei tawpnate tan in. Huai zoh in aw akikou a;alalna aw in vanpi agingsak a:a-aw zak a a-om chiang in amau alen kei hi. Pathian in a-aw in lamdangtakin vanpi agingsak a;i theihtheih louh,thil thupite ahih zel hi. Ama'n lah vuk kiang ah,‘Lei ah kia in, achi ngal a;huchi mah bang in vuahmal phin kiang ah leng. Mi chiteng khut atuambit a;abawlsa mite tengteng inhuai atheihtheihna ding un. Huai lai in gamsate amun uah alut ua, akuate uah a-om uhi. Simlam dantan a kipan huihpi ahong a;mallam a kipan khovot. Pathian hu in tui khal piak ahi;tuite nakna hihhaksat in a-om. Ahi, meipi nawnna aposak a;akhophia meipi aphalhsak hi. Amah pi in akivial heihei ua,tentheihna khovel maikaih aamaute thu apiak peuhmah ahihna ding un. Bawlhoihna ding hiam,agam a ding hiam,ahihkeileh zahngaihna ding hiam a,ahon paisakna ah. “Hiai ngaikhia in, Aw Job;dingh kinken inla,Pathian thilhih lamdangte ngaihtuah in. Amaute tung a Pathian thupiak akoih a, ameipi khophia atansakdan na thei hia? Meipite kibuk diknate,amah theihna hoihkim thilhihlamdangte na thei hia? Sim huih ziak a lei adaih sipsip lai a,na puansilhte alumdan? Amah toh van, suntawm limlang bang a khauh na phalh thei hia? Akiang a ka gen ding uh hon sinsak in;mialna ziak in ka thugen ding uh ka gelkhol thei kei ua. Thu ka gen ding chih amahhilh ding ahi diam?Ahihkeileh mihing in valh khit a om ut ding ahi diam? “Huchi in mite'n meipi a om khovak amu kei ua:himahleh huih anung a,amaute ahihsiang hi. Mal a kipan in dangka-eng bang a thupi ahong pai a;Pathian alalna ah athupi hi. Bangkim hihthei thu ahihleh,mu thei kei hang; thilhihtheihna ah athupi petmah hi.Huan vaihawmna leh dikna hauhna ah gim athuaksak kei ding hi. Huaiziak in mite'n amah alau ua; lungtang a pil kuamah alimsak kei hi.”

Huchi in Toupa'n pingpei a kipan inJob adawng a, hichi in achi: “Theihna bei thute a thuhilhhihmial hiai kua ahia? Kipasalsak in tu in na kawnggak inla; hon dong ding ka hi,ka kiang a na gen ding ahi. Lei kingaknate ka koih lai in nang koi ah na om a?Gen in,theihsiamna nei na hihleh. Atehnate kua bawl ahia?Thei na hihleh!Atung a tehna khau kua zan ahia? Anuai suangphumtekua phum ahia?Huai aning a suang kua koih ahia? Zingsang aksite'n la asakkhawm ua,Pathian tapate tengteng kipak a akikou lai un? “Ahihkeileh kua'n kongkhakte in tuipite akhakbing a?Gil a kipan hong pawtkhia bang a,ahong puahkhiak lai in. Huai a puansilh meipi leh,khomial bikbek, huai a ding atuamna puan ka bawl a, huai a ding a ka thupiak bawl a,kalhnate leh kongkhakte koih a, hiai tan na hong pai ding,himahleh aban hilou in, kachih a; hiai lai ah aki-uangsakna tuikihotte kholsak in a-om ding uh, ka chih lai in? Na nite akipat nungsiahzingsang thu na pia in,phalvak amun thei ding in na bawlta hia? Lei tawpnate amat theih a,huai a kipan a gilou sinkhiakahihtheihna ding in? Chiamtehna nuai a tungman lei bang in mel akikheng a;puansilh bang in thil tengteng zenei in adingkhia hi. Gilou a kipan a akhovak uhlettangsak ahi a,aban liksang uh akitan hi. “Tuipi nak sung ah na lutta hia?Ahihkeileh tui thuk tawp ah na paita hia? Sihna kongpite na kiang ah taklat in a-omta hia?Ahihkeileh sihna limliap kongpite na muta hia? Leitung zatdan na theisiamta hia?Puangkhia in, huai na theihleh. Khovak tenna zotna lampi koi ah a-om a,huan khomial omna mun koisan ahia? Huchi a gamgi tan a na tonpih theih a,huai a inn tan a lampite na theihna ding in? Thei mah niteh maw,huai lai a piangta hi ding hi chin a?Na nite atam mahmah ngal a!

“Vuk koihkhawmna ah na lut ngei hia,ahihkeileh gial koihkhawmna na muta hia? Huai buaina hun a ding leh kidou leh kisat ni a dia ka koihkholhte? Bang lampi ah ahia khovak akikhen hiam leitung asuahlam huih adalhzak? Kua'n ahia tui tampi luanna ding a tuilam khuak a,kekkia a dia lampi sial? Mihing omlouhna mun gam tung a vuah zusak ding in;mihing omlouhna,gamdai tung ah. Lei kisia leh segawpsalungkimsak ding; loupa hing nou khangkhesak ding? Vuah in pa anei hia?Ahihkeileh daitui takte kua suan ahia? Kua gil a kipan a tui khal hong pai ahia?Van daitui khal ngou, kua suahsak ahia? Suang bang in tuite atak a,tui thuk maite akhal hi. “Siguk khaute na khihkhawm thei hia?zuheisuktun khaute na phel thei hia? Ama hunbi ah Aksi lamvak achiamtehnate na pikhe thei hia?Ahihleh Zaangkhua leh tate na pi thei hia? Van thupiakte na thei hia?Huai lalna lei ah na dingkhesak thei diam? Nang tui tampi in akhuhtheihna ding in meipi kiang ah aw na suah thei diam? Amau kiang ah,‘Hiai ah om ung, chi a apaikhiak theihna ding un khophiatena sawlkhe thei a hia? Sunggil lam ah pilna kua'n akoih a?Ahihkeileh lungsim kiang ah kua'n theihsiamna apia a? Pilna in kua'n meipite asim thei dia?Van tuithawlte kua'n abokhe thei dia? Toupa'n Job Adawng Akua ua aboh ua,buk ding a abukna mun ua a-om nilouh lai un? Va-ak a ding a an kua'n pia ahia?Anoute Pathian kiang akikou aan duh man a avakvak lai un?”

“Suangpi a gam sathakte'nnou asuahsak hun uh na thei hia?Ahihkeileh nou aneih lai uh na chiamteh thei hia? Akha chinsak zah uh na thei hia?Ahihkeileh apian hun na thei hia? Akun ua, atate uh asuang uh,alungkhamnate uh apaikhia uhi. Atate uh deihhuaitak in a-om ua,gamlak ah akhanglian ua; akuankhia ua,ahong kik nawn kei uh. “Kua'n gam sabiltung akhahkhia a?Ahihkeileh kua'n gamsabiltunghonte aphel a? Kua ahia a-inn ding a gamdai ka piak a,atenna ding a gamkeu ka bawlsak? Khopi buai nuanua amusit a,hawltute kikounate aza kei hi. Mual dungte agantatna mun ahi a,huan thil hing chiteng azong hi. “Na nna sem ding in gam bawngtal alungkim hia?Ahihkeileh na anpiakna kiang ah a-om gige diam? Leilehna ah khau in gam bawngtal na khihthei diam?Ahihkeileh na nung ah phaizangte atoktam diam? Ahatna athupi ziak in,amah na muang diam?Ahihkeileh akiang ah na sepgimna na khiak diam? Na buhchi inn ahon tut a,na buhphual a buh akaihkhawm theihna ding inamah na muang diam? “Ostrik kha kisatheitak inakizap a; akhavengte lehamulte amigi hia? Atuite lah leitung ah anusia a,leivui ah alumsak a, Khe in asikkham thei chih amangngilh a, ahihkeilehgamsa in asikgawp thei, chih. Amah a hilou bang in, anoute siatna ding in akhauh a;asepgimna bangmah lou himahleh, alau kei hi. Pathian in pilna angolhsakziak in, theihsiamna leng ape sam kei hi. Tungsang lam a akitawisangchiang in, sakol lehatungtuangmi anuihsan. “Sakol hatna nang piak hia?Mul nem in angawng na tuam hia? Khaukhup bang in na tawmsak hia?Ahamna thupi alauhuai ve. Guam ah lei akhuat a,ahatna ah akipak a,mi kigalthuamte tuak ding in apaikhia. Lauhuai anuihsan a,alungdong kei a,namsau leng anungngat sam kei hi. Amah ah thalbawm aging lengleng a,teipite zelzel leh chiangzum. Kihtakhuaina leh hehna inlei anawmvalh a;Pengkul aw ahi chih leng agingta sam kei hi.

Pengkul agin teng in, ‘Hah’achi a, kidouna, heutute vanpiging leh kikou,gamlapi a pan athei. “Na pilna in mu sangpi a lengsak in, akhate simlam ah aphalh hia? Nang thupiak in hia muvanlai in tungsang a leng a abu aseh? Suangpi tung ah ateng a,huai ah giahna anei a,suanghengte leh kulh muanhuaite ah. Huai a kipan in mat ding amu a;amitte'n gamla amu hi. Anoute'n leng sisan atawpbei ua;thah a a-omna mun, huai ah a-om hi.”

Huai lou in Toupa'n Jobadawng a, hichi in achi: “Kuapeuh awlmoh nei lou in thil Bangkim hihthei akiselpih diam?Kuapeuh Pathian kiselpih,huai tuh amah dawngsak un.”Job Thuphatawina Job in Toupa adawng a,hichi in achi: “Ngai in, bangmah ka hita kei a;bangchi in ka hon dawng dia?Ka kam ah ka khut ka koih. Khatvei ka pauta a,ka dawng kei ding;ahi, nihvei himahleh ka pau nawn kei ding.”Pathian In Job Achouna Toupa'n pingpei a kipan inJob adawng a, hichi in achi. Toupa' Thugen “Kipasalsak inla, tu in na kawng gak in.Nang a kipan ka hon phut dia, kei kiang ah na hon puang ding hi. Ka vaihawmna bangmah lou a koih ding na hiam?Siam na tantheihna dia,kei hon mohpaih ding na hi hia? Ahihkeileh Pathian bang in ban na nei hia?Amah bang in aw in vanpi na gingsak thei hia? Tu in nang hoihkim lehzahna in kizem in;zahna leh lalna in kivan in. Na hehna dimlette sungkhia in;michih kisatheite en inla,hihniam in. Michih kisathei en inla,kainiam in; adinna uah migiloute tuanchil in. Leivui ah amaute selkhawm in;mundai ah amai uh kan in. Huchi in na khut taklam in nang ahondam thei chih ka hon thei ding. “Ngai dih, nang ka hon siam bang a ka siam,tu in behemoth en in;bawngtal bang in loupa ane hi. En in tu in, akawng ah ahatna a-om a, agilpi thate ah ahatna a-om hi. Sidar sing bang in amei atangsak a, apheite thaguitephankhawm in a-om hi. Aguhte dal lawng ahi a, aguh leh tangte siktawn bang ahi. “Pathian lampite amakai lianpen ahi,amah bawlpa kia in anamsau amah kiang lam naih ding in abawl thei ding. Chihtaktak in mualte'n amah an apuak ua; gamsate tengteng mawlna mun ah. Singbawk limte nuai ah alum a,pumpeng kawm leh chiknawng lak ah. Tui lili singte'n alim un akhuh ua; lui gei singnah kaite'n atuam kimvel uhi. Ngai in, lui adimletleh,aling kei a; akam chiang pha hial in Jordan khang mahleh, amuang hi. Akiven lai in kuapeuh in amah sikkawi in diam,thang in anak avut pailet diam?”

“Ngakuai inLeviathan na kaikhe thei diam?Ahihkeileh akhau in alei na sawntum thei diam? Anak sung ah khauhual na thun thei diam?Ahihkeileh sikkawi in ahaizek na vut pailet thei diam? Na kiang ah thilnget tampi abawl diam?Ahihkeileh na kiang ah thu nemte agen diam? Tangtawn a ding in amah sikha dia na laktheihna ding in,nang toh thukhun abawl diam? Vasa toh bang in amah tohna mawl diam?Ahihkeileh na sikhanutea ding in amah na hen diam? Ngaman mite'n amah sumsinnading in abawl ding uam?Sumsin mite lak ah amah azuak ding uam? Siklen in avun na dimsakthei diam,ahihkeileh alu ngalingte in? Atung ah na khut koih in;kidouna theigige in, huchi in na hih nawn kei ding hi. “Ngai in, amah lametnabangmah lou ahi; amah muhmahmah in mi paihkhiak in a-om kei dia hia? Amah hihhalh ngam khop dingin kuamah ahang kei;ka ma a dingh kua ahia le? Amah ka dit ding, ka kiangah kua'n ape masa a le?Van nuai a om peuhmah kei' a ahi. “Aguh-le-tang thu ah ka dai kei ding, ahatna mahmah leh,apum kilawmna ah leng. Apuansilh tungnung kua'n asuahsak thei dia?Akamkaih thuah nih sung ah kua ahong pai dia? Amai kongkhakte kua'nahong thei dia?Aha kimvel ah lauhuaina a-om. Alip hattakte akisaktheihna ahi,namkipsa bang a khakkhum ahi. Akal ua huihzam alut theihlouhna ding in,khat in adang anaih mahmah. Khat leh adang akizom ua,akisoumat ua,khen theih louh in a-om uh. Ahahchhiaite'n avaksak a,amitte zingsang mitvunte bang ahi. Akam a pan meikuangte apawtkhia,mei-ekte atawmkhia hi. Anakvangte a kipan inmeikhu apawt a, halsiannabel leh chiklak loupa kanga kipan bang in. “Ahu in suang akuangsak a,akam a pan meikuang apawtkhia hi. Angawng ah hatna a-om gige a,ama ah lauhuaina alam hi. Asa thate akizomkhawm ua,atung ah akip ua;hihtat theih in a-om kei uh. Alungtang suang bang inakip a; ahi, buhgawina suangnuainung bang ahi.

Amah athoh chiang in,mihatte alau uh;lauh luatna ziak in omdan ding athei kei uh. Mi'n amah namsau in satleh,aphatuam kei hi; teipi hiam,thal hiam, sikmuk zum hiam in leng. Buhpawl bang in sik asim a,sing muatsa bang in dalsik. Thal in amah ataisak thei kei ding;amah lak ah vaisuanglot suangte buhpawl asuak hi. “Khetbukte buhpawl bang a sim ahi.Teipi ging anuihsan hi. Anuailam pangte belpei ahi,buannawi tung ah buhkhetna chiang bang in akiphah hi. Tui thukte belpi sou bolhbolh ding in abawl a,tuipi nuh theih bawm in abawl hi. Anung ah lampi avaksak a;tui thuk samkang nei asa uhi. Leitung ah amah bang a lauh nei lou a-om kei a, Thil sang chiteng a-en a,kisathei tapate tengteng tung ah kumpipa ahi.”

Huchi in Job in Toupa adawng a, hichi in achi.Job Thugen Nanungpen “Thil bangkim na hihthei chih leh nang thiltup kham theih ahi kei chih ka thei hi. Hiai thuhilhna theihna tel lou a sel kua ahia?Huaiziak in ka theihsiam louh,ka theih louh, kei a dia thillamdang luate ka genkhia hi. “Za in, ka hon ngen ahi, ka pau ding;nang ka hon phut ding, kei lam ah nang puang in, na hon chi hi. Zakna bil in nang ka hon za a;himahleh tu in ka mit in ka hon mu a, Huaiziak in ka kikih a, leivui leh meivu ah ka kisik hi.”Thukhitna Thu Huan hichi ahong hi a, huchi a Toupa'n Job kiang a hiai thute agen khit in, Toupa'n Teman mi Eliphaz kiang ah, “Ka hehna nang tung leh na lawm nihte tung ah akuang, ka sikha Job bang a noute'n ka tanchin thil dik na gen louh ziak un,” achi hi. “Huaiziak in tu in, bawngtal sagih leh belamtal sagih la unla, ka sikha Job kiang ah hoh unla, nou a ding in halmang thillat lan un; huchi in noute a ding in ka sikha Job athum ding a; amah vang in ka sang dia, huchi in na haina uh dungzui in na tung uah ka hih kei ding; ka sikha Job bang in lah ka tanchin thil dik na gen kei uh,” chi in. Huchi in Teman mi Eliphaz leh Shuah mi Bildad leh Naamath mi Zophar akuan ua, Toupa'n thu apiak bang in ahihta uhi. Toupa'n Job asangta hi.Job Lehnih Vualzawlna Alawmte a dia Job athum zoh in Toupa'n Job saltanna akiheisak a, Toupa'n Job ama a aneih zahnih apeta hi.

Huai lai in akiang ah, a-unaute tengteng leh asanggamnute tengteng leh tuma lam a amel theihsa tengteng leh a-insung a tanghou amah toh nete ahong pai ua, amah anem ua, Toupa'n atung a hoih lou atunsak tengteng tungtang thu ah amah alungmuan uhi. Michih in leng ama sum leh michih in dangka-eng bilbah apia uhi. Huchi in Toupa'n Job tawpna lam a kipatna lam sang in anak vualzawl zaw hi. Belam singkhat-le-sangli leh sangawngsau sangguk leh bawngtal sangkhat leh sabengtungnu sangkhat anei hi. Tapa sagih leh tanu thum leng anei hi. Amasapen, Jemima achi a; anihna min, Kezia; athumna min, Keren-happuk. Huchi in gamsung pumpi ah Job tanute bang a melhoih a-om kei uh; apa un a-unaute lak ah goutan amaute apia hi. Huai nung in Job, kum za-le-sawmli adam a, atapate leh atapate' tapate, khang lina tan amu hi. Huchi in Job atek mahmah a, a-upat tak ziak in asita hi.

Jeremiah Judah Kumpipa, Ammon tapa Josiah hun lai, avaihawm akum sawm-le-thumna ah akiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. Judah kumpipa, Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm lai in leng ahong tung a; Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Zedekiah akum sawm-le-khatna tawp, Jerusalem sal a pi akha ngana tan in.Jeremiah Sapna Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Gilsung a ka hon bawl ma in ka hon thei a, sul a kipan a na pawtkhiak ma in leng ka hon koihtuam a, namte kiang a zawlnei hi ding in ka hon sep khin,” chi in. Huan ke'n, “Eh, Toupa Pathian, ngai dih, thu ka gensiam kei, ka naupang ngal a,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Ka naupang, chi ke'n, ka hon sawlna peuhmah kiang ah na hoh ding a, ka hon thupiak peuhmah na gen ding ahi. Amaute lau ke'nla, nang hon hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om hi,” chi in. Huchi in Toupa'n ahon sawk a, ka kam akhoih a, Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Ngai in, na kam ah ka thute ka koihta, en dih, namte leh kumpipa gamte tung ah, botkhe ding, phel ding, hihse ding, paikhe ding, bawlhoih ding leh dingkhesak ding in tuni in ka hon koih na hi,” achi hi.Mengmuhna Nihte Huai lou leng ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, “Jeremiah, bang na mu?” achi hi. Ke'n, “Vaisuaklu singhiang ka mu,” ka chi hi. Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Na mu kha mahmah ve; ka thu tangtun ding in ka kigalging gige ahi,” achi hi. Huan anihveina ding in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Bang na mu a?” chi in. Ke'n bel, “Bel sou bolhbolh, agong mallam nga ka mu,” ka chi hi.

Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Gam a tengte tung ah mallam a kipan thil hoih lou ahong tung ding. Ngai dih, mallam kumpipa gam nam tengteng ka sam ding; chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ahong pai ding ua, Jerusalem kongpi lutna ah, akimvel kulhbaang tengteng chin ah leh Judah khopi teng ah alaltutphah uh atung chiat ding uh. Hon paisan in, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, amau khutsuak mah abia ua; hiai athulimlouhna teng tungtang ua ka thugelte ka puang ding hi. Huaiziak in puan teng inla, thou inla, ka hon thupiak teng akiang uah va gen in; ama uah lunglel ke'n, huchi lou in zaw ama uah ka hon lunglelsak kha ding hi. Ngai in, tuni in nang, agam pumpite, Judah kumpipate, aheutute, asiampute leh agam mipite dou in khopi kulh a um leh sik khuam leh dalsik khuam in ka hon bawl ahi. Hon sual ding ua, himahleh ahon zou kei ding uh; hon hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Ka kiang ah Toupa thuahong tung a, hichi in achi: “Kuan inla, Jerusalem zak in kikou in, Toupa'n hichi in achi,‘Na tuailai a na migitdante,kikham lai a na hon itdante ka theigige hi;gamdai a khoh louh gam a na hon zuihdan bang. Pathian In Israel Akepna Israel bel Toupa a dia hihsiangthou,agahpung masa ahi,amah negaimi peuhmah amoh ding a,atung uah siatna ahong tung ding, ”chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Israel Suangtute Khelhna Aw Jakob inkote leh Israel inkote tengteng aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un; Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Na pipute un kei ah diktatlouhna bang ahia amuh uh,kei a kipan gamlapi ahavakmang ua, bangmah loudelh a, ana ki-otsak uh? ‘Toupa, Aigupta gam a kipan hon pikhia a, gamdai, gamkeu,kokhuk mun, sihna limliap leh gamkeu mun,kuamah paisuak ngeilouhna,kuamah omlouhna mun a hon pi paisuakpa koi a om ahia? achi kei uh. Gam hoihtak ah, agah leh hoihna ne ding in, ka hon pilut a,himahleh na lut uleh ka gam na hihnin ua, ka goutan thilkihhuai in na bawl uh. Siampute'n, ‘Toupa koi a om ahia? achi kei ua,Dan zang mite'n ahon thei sam kei uh,vaihawmte ka tung ah ahel ua,zawlneite'n Baal min in thu agen ua,thil phatuam lou dingte adelh uh.”Amite Toh Kal A Toupa Thubuai “Huchi in ka hon langbawl ding a, na tate uh ta nawnte leng ka langbawl lailai ding,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Kittim tuikulh ah va hoh unla,en un, Kedar ah mi sawl unla,chiktak in ngaihtuah un,hichibang thil a-omngeina hiam chih theihna ding in. Namte'n apathian uh akhenguhia, pathiantak hiloupi leng?Ka mite'n bel athupina uh,thil phatuam loutak in akhek uh. “Aw vante, lamdang sa unla,hon mulkimsak henla,mau tuaituai un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Ka mite'n thil nih ahihkhial uhi:kei, hinna tuikhuk ahon paisan ua,tui ching thei lou dingtuivungte atoukhia uhi.Israel Muanhuai Louhna Gahte Israel sikha ahi hia?Sikha mawng a piang hia?Bangziak a nuaisiah a om ahia? Humpinelkai tuailaite'n hamkhum in,atung ah aw asuah ua,agam ahihgawp khinta uh,akhopite leng luahmi nei lou in akangsiang khin hi. Memphis mi leh Tahpanhes mite'n,na luzang agiausak khinta uh. Toupa na Pathian in lampi aahon pi lai a, na taimangsanziak in, huai na tung ana tunsak ahi kei maw? Nile tui dawn ding aAigupta lampi na zuih, nang ding a bang aphatuam a?Luipi tui dawn ding aAssuria lampi na zuih,nang ding in bang aphatuam a? Na thulimlouhna in honthuaksak ding a,na nungkinna in nang ahon sal ding hi;hon launa nei lou Toupa naPathian na paisan a, thil giloutakleh kha mahmah ahi na hih,na theikhia inla, mu telta in,chih, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupathupawt ahi.Israel In Toupa Biak Ding Anial Nidanglai a pan na hakkolhihtan in, na khaute leng nahihtatta hi, ‘Na nna ka sem nawn kei ding, na chi a, mual sangte,singbawk nuai ah na kizuak hi. Chi dik zang in grepgui hoihmahmah ka hon phut a,bangchidan a kikheng a,kei a dia grep tak lou hong suakta na hia? Tangal in kisil in sahbon tampizang mah lechin, na thulimlouhnaka mitmuh in adawk teitei,chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. ‘Ka kihihnin sam a, Baalteka delh sam a, bang achiachi thei na hia, phaizang kuak ana omdante en inla,na thilhihsate thei in;sangawngsaula huk diangngongngong na hi vele. Gam sabiltung gamdai a om,ahuk lai a dak uau-uau a dikvutvut bang;a-utna kua'n ahia dalzou ding?Azongmi kihihgim nuam dah hen,ahun in amu na ding uh.

Na khe ah khedap bun lou in omke'nla, na dang leng hul kei heh;nang bel, lamet abeita,pau tuam mite ka ngai a,amau ka delh ding, na chi hi.Israel Gawt Tak Him Ahi “Guta aphawk ua azum bang in, Israel inkote azumta uh, amau, akumpipate uh, aheutute uh, asiampute uh, azawlneite uh leng. Singbul kiang a, ‘Ka pa na hi, chi a, suangbul kiang a, ‘Kei hon suangtu na hi, chi mite; masuan lou in adekkhuk sah uh ahon suan zaw ua, amangbat hun un bel, ‘Thou in, hon hondam tanla, achi ding uh, na pathian, huai na bawlte koi a om ahita ua? “Amau thou zaw uhenla, na mangbat lai in ahon hondam thei khamoh ding uhia; aw Judah, na pathiante bel na khopite zah mah ahi ve ua oi! Bangziak a ka tung a vui nak? Na vek un ka tung ah thil na hihkhial ngal ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na tate uh ka khen a, aphatuam kei, ahoih loh tuan kei uh; humpinelkai duhgawl bang mai in, noumau namsau in na zawlneite uh ane khin uhi. Aw khangthakte aw, Toupa thu thei un, Israel a ding in gamdai gam bang ka hi maw? Mial sah meuhmouh gam ka hi maw? Ka mite'n bangdia, ka pawt kichianta ua, ka hong kik nawn kei ding uh, chi uh ahia? Nungak siangthou in akizephoihnate amangngilh thei in, mouthak in akivatna amangngilh thei ding maw? Ka mite'n ni sim seng louh sung in ahon na mangngilhta uhi. Deihtakmi muhtheihna ding in na omdan ngentel na chia! Numei gilou kiang ah leng na omdan na sinsakta ve. Na nikte ah leng migenthei poi khoihloute hinna sisan alang a; na inn abuluh lai khutmat ahi kei uhi.

“Ka moh kei a, kei a kipan ahehna lakmang ahi, na chi nawn ngal a, ngai in, ‘Ka gilou kei hi, na chih ziak in, na tungthu ka ngaihtuah ding. Na omdan kheng mengmeng a, bangziak a vialvak vak na hia? Assuria na zumpih mah bang in, Aigupta leng na zumpih lai ding hi. Na khutte lukhuk in akiang ua pan na pawtkhe nawn dia, Toupa'n lah na muannate apaikheta ngal a, amau ah na lamzang kei ding hi.”

Mi'n zi ma henla, amah a pan paikhia in pasal dang neileh, ama'n aneikik nawn diam? Agam in nitloh hial lou ding hia? chih a-om. Nang bel tangval tampi kiang ah na hukmang in, huchipi in ka kiang ah na hong kik nawn ding maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Tang giau viauvuau lam ah na mitte lengtousak inla, en in, ahon kithuahpihlouhna mun koi ah? Gamdai a Arabia mi bang mai in amau ngak in lampi geite ah na tu nilouh sek, na hukna leh na thulimlouhnate in gam na hihnin khinta hi. Amuanhuai Lou Israel Ka pa, ka tuailai a hon pipa na hi, chi in tua kipan in na sam kei ding maw? Na heh tawntung ding a hia? Athangpaihna a omden ding ahia? Ngai in, huchibang in na pau ngei a, himahleh agilou theipen in thil na hih hi.Israel Leh Judah Akisik Ngeingei Ding Uh Ahi Huai lou leng Josiah vaihawm lai in Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi, “Nungkinhat Israel thilhih na mu hia? Tang sang chih a kuantou a, singbawk chih nuaite a ahukna thil ahihte? Huan ke'n bel hiai thil tengteng ahih nung in ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn ding, ka chi a; himahleh ahong kik tuan kei; huchi in asanggamnu, khemhat Judah in amu samta hi. Ama'n nungkinhat Israel a-angkawm ziak a ka mak a, makna lai ka piak amuh in leng asanggamnu, khemhat Judah in alau tuan kei, huchih nak sang in ava hoh a, hukna thil ava hihteita hi. Huan ahuk mawkmawk zenhouh ziak in gam ahihnin khinta a; singbul, suangbul kiang ah ang akawmta hi. Huchipi in leng asanggamnu, khemhat Judah lungtangtak a ka kiang a hong kik lou in azuaulel in ahong kik a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi, “Nungkinhat Israel in asanggamnu, khemhat Judah sang in diktatzaw in akihihlang a. Kuan inla, hiai thu mallam ah va puang in; Nungkinhat Israel hong kik in,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Heh melpu in ka hon en kei ding a, zahngaitheitak ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, ka heh tawntung kei ding hi. Toupa na Pathian tung a na helnate, singbawk nuai a pau tuam mite kiang a na kiphal gaihnate, ka paukam suak na manlouhnate a na thulimlouhna ah thupha tawi in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Aw nungkinhat tate aw, hong kik un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Nou hon honpa ka hi ngal a, na lak ua kipan khopi a mi khat, inkuan a mi nih ka hon la ding a, Zion ah ka hon pi ding hi. Ka lung toh kituak belamchingte ka hon pe ding a, amau theihna leh theihsiamnate in noute ahon vak ding uhi. Huchi in na hong tam ua, gam a na hong pun chiang un, huai ni chiang in amau, Toupa thukhun bawm, achi ngei nawn kei ding uh; alungsim uah alut kei ding a, theih leng atheigige sam kei ding uh; akhelah nawn kei ding ua, abawl nawn kei ding uh. Huai nung in Jerusalem bel Toupa laltutphah achi ding ua, huai ah nam tengteng Toupa min in Jerusalem ah ahong paikhawm ding uh; alungtang gilou khauhna uh bang in apaita kei ding uh.

Huai ni chiang in Judah inkote Israel inkote toh a-omkhawm ding ua, mallam gam a kipan in, na pipute uh kiang a gouluah ding a ka piak gam ah, ahong pawtkhe ding uh.Pathian Mite Milim Biakna Ke'n bel, “Nam chih lak a gouluah ding hoihpen,gam nuamtak hon pia in,tate lak a hon koih ka utdan!Ka pa, chi a na hon sap a, na hon zuihna a kipan na pialmang kei ding,chih ka na um hi. Zi khemhat pasal ang kawmsan bang in,Aw Israel inkote aw,hon khem na hita ve ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Tang giau velvul tung ah husaa-om hi, Israel suante kap leh thil ngen husa, Toupa Pathian amangngilh ua,a-omdan uh ahihgawp ziak un. Anungkin hat tate aw, hong kikunla, na nungkin seknate uh ka hihdam ding hi; en dih, na kiang ah ka hong pai uhi, nang Toupaka Pathian uh na hi. “Mualte a hotdamna lamet athawn ahi, tang tung a husa chiak vengvungte; Israel hotdamna zaw Toupa i Pathian kia ah ahi a-om. Himahleh huai thilkihhuai mahmah in i tuailai a kipan i pipute'n tha asukbeina uh anebeita hi; abelamhonte uh, aganhonte uh, atanute uh, atapate uh tan in. Zum in lum ni e, i zahlakna in hon khuh heh; Toupa i Pathian tung ah thil i hihkhial ua, ei leh i pipute'n i tuailai a kipan tuni tan in Toupa i Pathian paukam i mang kei uhi.”

Toupa ahin lai teng, chi a na kichiamleh namte amah ah nuamsa akichi ding ua, amah asuangta ding uh. “Judah mite leh Jerusalem kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na lei sit uh let unla, lingte lak ah chi theh kei un. Kisik Ding A Sapna “Aw Israel, na hong kikleh, ka kiang ngei ah na hong kik ding ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na kihhuainate ka mitmuh louh a na koihmang a, chihtaktak a, thugel diktak zang a diktattak a; Judah gam ah hilh unla,Jerusalem ah puang un,Gam pumpi ah pengkul mut unla, ngaihtak in kikou un.Hong kikhawm unla, kulh neikhopite ah i lut ding uh, chi un; Zion lam ah puanzak khai unla,bitna zong in tai unla,zekai kei un, mallam a panthil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding,nakpi a siatna. Gammang nuai ning kitel a kipan in humpinelkai apawt hi,namte hihse ding; amun a kipan apawtta,ahong pai lellel hi, na gam hihse ding leh na khopite teng mi nei lou khop a sugawp ding in. Huaiziak in sai-ip puan teng unla,kap un, mau vongvong un;i lak ua kipan in Toupa hehna thupi lah akikaikhe ngal kei a.” “Huai ni chiang in hichi ahong hi ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; kumpipa lungtang a lungke khin ding a, heutute lungtang leng; siampute'n gen ding athei kei ding ua, zawlneite'n lamdang asa ding uh.” Huan ke'n, “Ah, Toupa Pathian, hiai mite leh Jerusalem nakpitak a khem na hi ve, ‘Muanna na nei ding uh, na chi a, namsau in hinna asun zawta,” ka chi hi. Huai hun chiang in hiai mite leh Jerusalem kiang ah, “Gamdai tang giau velvul a kipan huih sa, ka tanu, ka mite zapsiang ding hilou; siangsak ding hi sam lou; Huih hat lua, ka thu in ahong tung ding ahi

tu in leng atungthu uh ngaihtuahpa kei ka hi,” chih ahi ding.Judah, Melmate Umkimvelna Ngai dih, ahong paitou ding, meipi bang in, akangtalai pingpei bang maite; asakolte muvanlai sang in ahatzaw uh, i tung gik na e! Buluh a om i hi ve ua. Aw Jerusalem, thulimlouhna a kipan na lungtang silsiang inla, hotdam a na omtheihna ding in; bang tan ahia na ngaihtuahna gilou na pai ding? Dan gam a kipan aw ahong pawtkhia a, Ephraim tang a kipan in thil hoih lou apuang hi. Namte hilh unla, Jerusalem ah puang un, “Ngai dih, gam gamlapi a kipan sual mite ahong tung uh, Judah khopite tung ah a-aw uh asuah uhi. Louma veng mite bang mai in akimvel in a-um ua, ka tung a ahel ziak un chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Na omdan leh na thilhihte'n, hiaite na tung ah atun ahi, hiai na siatna ding ahi, ana mahmah a na lungtang sun ei ve.”Amite Ziak A Jeremiah Lungzinna Ka lung ana, ka lung ana,ka lungtang mahmah ana,ka sung ah ka lungtang abuaita a, ka om maimai thei kei,aw ka hinna, pengkul ging,kidouna husa ka zak ziak in. Siatna tung ah siatna atungta,gam pumpi loh in a-omta,ka puaninte ahihse guih ua,ka puanzakte leng mitphiat kal lou in. “Bang tan ahia kidouna puanzakka muh ding a,pengkul ging ka zak ding? Ka mite ahai mahmah ua lah athei ngal kei ua,naupang haitak,theihna nei lou bang mai ahi ua,thil gilou hih asiam ua,thil hoih hihdan asiam kei uh.”Siatna Hong Tung Ding Jeremiah In Amuhdan Leitung ka etleh, ngai dih,segawp leh vuak in a-om a;vante'n vakna anei kei uh. Tangte ka etleh, ngai in,aling uh, mual tengteng leng atang zualzual uh. Ka etleh, ngai in,mihing a-om kei ua, tunglengvasate alengmang khinta uh.

Ka etleh, ngai in, louma hoihtegamdai asuak khin a,khopite leng achim khin, Toupa leh ahehna mahmah ah. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Gampumpi asegawp ding, himahleh ka hihtawp tawntung kei ding.” “Huaiziak in lei in asuun ding a,tunglam vante leng amial ding;thu ka genta a, ka tumta hi,ka kisik kei a, ka lunghei kei hi. Sakol tung a tuang leh thalpeuzang mite husa ah,khopi pumpi ataikek ua,gammang ah alut ua,kho chih anusia ua,luahmi khat lel leng om lou in. “Huan nang, loh a na om hun chiang in bangchi in na hih dia?Puan san-au a kizem in,kivatna dangka-eng a kivan in,na mitte nuh mah lechin,na kihih lawm thawn ahi,na tangvalte'n ahon simmoh ding ua, na hinna lak atum uhi. Numei nauvei kikou husa ka za,tachil neinu thuak lai,Zion tanu nak ging, akhutte zak a,ka tung gik hi na mai e!Tualthat mite ma ah ka hinna abah khinta,” chi in.

Jerusalem kholakte ah vialtaiunla, chiamteh un! Amualtamte zong unla, mi khat bekdiktattak a hih a, thutak zongmahmah na muh theih uleh,Jerusalem ka ngaidam ding. “Toupa ahin a ahin sung,chi mah le uh, zuau inakichiam lel uh ahi. Aw Toupa, thutak namuhnop ahi kei a hia?Amau na sat a, himahlehalungkham tuan kei uh,amau na hihmang a,na thuzohna apom nuam tuan kei uh,suangpi sang a tak in atal uh ataksak ua,akilehhei nuam kei bikbek uhi. “Ke'n, hiaite miphalou,ahai lai ua, Toupa dan,a Pathian uh thugel athei kei uhi. Jerusalem Khelhna Huaiziak in gammang nuai ahumpinelkai in amaute akeiding a, gamdai ngia inamaute ane bei ding a,gialbem in akhopite a tang in,huai a hong pawt peuhmah abotzan ding;atatleknate uh atam a, anungkinnate uh athupi mahmah ziak in. “Bangchi in ka hon ngaidam thei dia?Na tate'n ahon paisan ua,Pathian hiloupite sam inakichiam ua, taitak a ka vaknung in ang a kawm ua,kizuak innte ah akivel hehu uh. Amaute zingsang a sakol vakvahbang mai ahi ua,michih ama invengpa zienlah in aham hi. Hiai thilte ziak in ka gawt kei ding maw?chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Hichibang nam tung ahphu ka kilaksak kei ding a hia? Abaangte ah kaltou unla,hihsia un, himahleh hihse khinvek kei un, ahiangte lamangun, Toupa a lah ahi ngal kei hi. Israel inkote leh Judah inkote'n ka tung ah lepchiahtak in ahih uh,”chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n Israel Apampaih Toupa bel zuauthei dia sep in, “Bangmah ahihthei sam kei ding, siatna i tung uah atung kei ding, kial hiam namsau hiam i thuak kei ding. Zawlneite leng huihzam lel ahi ding ua, amau ah thu a-om kei a; atung uah hichibang a hih ahi ding,” achi uhi.

Huaiziak in Toupa, Sepaihte' Pathian in achi: “Huchibang thu na gen ziak un, ngai in, na kam a ka thute mei ka suaksak ding a, hiai mipi singte akang khin ding.” Ngai un, aw Israel inkote aw, gamlapi a kipan, nam khat na kiang ah ka hon pi ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Nam hattak, nidanglai a kipan a, apau uh na theih louh, athugen uh na theih louh namte. Athalbawm uh han kihong ahi a, avek un mihattak ahi khin uh. Na buhlaksa leh na nek ding ane khin vek ding uh; na tanute na tapate nek ding mahmah; na ganhonte, na belamhonte ane ding ua, na grep guite, na theipi kungte ane ding ua, na khopi kulh nei, na muanpi pente mahmah namsau in ahihse ding uhi. “Himahleh huai nite ah leng ka hon hihchimit kei ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hichi ahong hi ding a, “Bangziak a Toupa i Pathian un hiai thil tengteng i tung ua hih ahia?” Na mite un achih hun chiang un, “N'on paisan ua, na gam ua pathian dangte nna na sep bang un, na gam lou uah, paudang mite nna na sem ding uh, akiang uah na chi ding ahi.” Toupa'n Amite Avauhilh “Jakob inkote lak ah hiai genkhia unla, Judah gam ah puang un. Aw theihtheihna nei lou, mihaite aw, mit nei a lah mu lou, bil nei a lah zaloute aw, hiai ngaikhia un. N'on kihta kei uh maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ka ma ah na ling kei ding uh maw? Kei, tuipi huap chiang a dia piautak, tangtawn a aletlouhna ding a daikaihna, tuipi kihot zou mahleh alet tuan theih louh a, ging honhon mahleh akhen theih louh ding bawlpa ka hi. Himahleh hiai mite'n genhakna leh helhat lungtang apu ua, ahel ua, ataimangta uh.

Alungtang un leng, Toupa i Pathian, ahuntak a vuah masa leh vuah nanung zusakpa, buh leh hunbi hon sehsakpa laudan i siam ding uh, achi sam kei uh. Hiai thilte na thulimlouhnate un ahihmang a, na khelhnate un thil hoih nou ahon tansak ahi. “Ka mite lak ah migilou a-om ngal ua, vasa gemmi in atan bang in atang gige ua, thang akam ua, mite uh. Bawm vasa a dim bang mai in, a-innte uh khemna in adim a, huaiziak in ahong lian ua, ahong hauhsak lohta uhi. Ahong thau ua, ahong zol ua, ahi, agitlouhna thilhihte un hun chiang anei kei, pa neiloute lamzanna ding in amau lam ah apang kei uhi. “Hiai thilte ziak in ka gawt kei dia hia?” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Hichibang nam tung ah ka hinna in phu ala kei ding a hia? Huai gam ah thillamdangtak leh mulkimhuaitak ahong tung hi. Zawlneite'n zuauthu agen ua, siampute'n lah amau thuthu in vai ahawm ua, ka mite'n lah huchibang hih a-ut uhi, atawp ah bangchi in na hih ding ua le?”

Benjamin tate aw, Jerusalem sung a kipan na bitna ding un taimang unla; Tekoa ah pengkul mut unla Beth-hakkerem ah theihsakna suaksak un. Mallam a kipan in siatna ahong kuan hi, hihsiatna thupi mahmah. Zion tanu melhoihtak leh noutak ka hihmang ding. Belampute, abelamhonte uh toh akiang ahong tung ding ua, akim ah apuaninte uh akaihkhum ding ua, amau mun chiat ah ake ding uh. Amah dou ding in kisa un, thou unla, sun lai in i sual ding uh, ei a ding in khawk hi na e! Ni akihekta a, nitaklam limliap ana sauta hi. Thou unla, zan in i sual mai ding uh! A-inn hoihhoih uh hihsia ni. Melmate'n Jerusalem A-umsuak Uh Tuileh in tui apawtsak bang mai in agitlouhna apawtsak sek, asung ah hiamgamna leh kilohna a-om chih zak ahi, ka ma ah natna leh kiliamsaknate a-om nilouh hi. Ka lungsim in ahon nutsiat vengveng ma in aw, Jerusalem, pilvang in, huchi lou in zaw luahmi nei lou gam dia hon bawl in, ka hon hihgawp kha ding hi.”Helhat Israel Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel khosuaksunte grep bang in lou siang vek unla, grep lou mi bang in ahiangte ban tuantuan un. “Angaihkhiak theihna ding un kua ka houpih in, kua ka theisak dia? Ngai in, bil lam zeksum louh ahi ua, angaikhe thei kei uh; ngai in, Toupa thu amau a ding in thil simmohhuai ahi a, kipahna mahmah anei nawn kei uh. Huaiziak in Toupa hehna in ka dim a, ka kidek zou nawn kei; kholak a naupang tung ah ka bungkhe dia; tangval omkhawmte tung ah leng, azi toh kiton in pasal leng lak ahi ding a, upate leh teksiate leng. A-innte uh midang kiang a piak ahi ding a, aloumate uleh azite uh toh

huai gam a tengte tung ah ka khut lik ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in leng michih huaihamna in adim ua; zawlneite leh siampute nangawn leng, michih azuautat mahmah uhi. Ka mite liamna, awlmoh loutak buaipih in, muanna a-om louh laitak in Muanna, muanna, achi ua. Thilkihhuai ahih un leng azum ua hia? Zum lou hial, azum het kei uh, amai uh leng asan sam kei; huaiziak in pukte lak ah apuk tei ding ua; amaute ka gawt hun chiang in paihkhiak in a-om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.Pathian Lampi Israel In Anial Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Lamka thuam ah dingh unla, en un, lampi hoih omna lampi luite tawn un, huai ah pai unla, na kha uh a ding in khawlna na mu ding uh,” amau bel, “Huai ah ka pai kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Huan nou a ding in galvil mite ka sep ding a, “Pengkul ging ngaikhia un,” chi in; amau bel, “Ka ngaikhe kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Huaiziak in “Aw, namte aw, ngaikhia unla, aw, kikhawmte aw, atung ua hong tung ding thei un. Aw, leitung, ngaikhia in, ngai in, hiai mite tung ah siatna ka hon tun ding; angaihtuahna gahte uh; ka thute angaihkhiak louh ziak un; ka dante lah apaikhe hithet ua. Bangziak a Sheba a kipan begaw, gamlapi a kipan kawltute ka kiang hong tung nak ahia? Na halmang kithoihnate uh kipahpihtak ahi kei a, na kithoihnate un ahon kipaksak sam kei hi.

Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Hiai mite kiang ah puknate ka koih ding a, huai ah pate atapate uh toh apukkhawm ding ua, inveng leh alawm leng amangthang ding uh, ” chi in.Mallam A Kipan A Douna Huan Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, mallam gam a kipan mite ahong pai uh, lei mun tawp a kipan nam thupi mahmah ahong kuankhia hi. Thalpeu leh teipi atawi ua, hiamgam mahmah, zahngaihna himhim nei lou ahi uhi, ahusa uh tuipi ging honhon bang ahia; sakol tungte ah atuang ua, michih galkapmi bang a kivan in, aw, Zion tanu, nang ahong sual dek uhi,” chi in. “Aminthanna uh i za ua, i khutte azaw khinta, numei nauvei lunggimna bangbang lunggimna'n ahon manta hi. Gam ah paikhe kei un, lampi ah leng pai sam kei un, huai ah lah melma namsau a-om ngal a, kil chih ah launa a-om hi.” “Aw, ka mi, ka tanu, sai-ip puan teng inla, vut lak ah tubial in; tapa tang khat suun bang in suun inla, kap vongvong dih, i tung uah hihsemi ahong tung guih dek ngal ua. Ka mite lak a chiamtehmi ding leh ze-etmi ding in ka hon bawl a, a-omdan uh na theih a, na ze-et theihna ding in. Avek un genhaktak a helhat, gensiat ching a vialvak, dal leh sik bang ahi uh, hoihloupi in agamtang uhi. Pum in azap huhu a, mei ah asuan zulbei a, hihsiangthou tupna athawn lel ahi; migiloute lah paihmang ahi ngal kei ua. Mite'n dangkasik ek hoih lou achi ding uh, Toupa'n amaute apampaih ziak in,” achi hi.

Toupa a pan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung: “Toupa' inn kongpi ah dingh inla, huai ah hiai thu puang inla, hichi in chi in; Nou Judah mi tengteng, Toupa be ding a hiai kongpi a lutte'n Toupa thu ngaikhia un.” Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh bawlhoih unla, hiai mun ah ka hon tengsak ding hi. Hiai, “Toupa tempul, Toupa tempul, Toupa tempul ahi,” chih zuauthute gingta kei un. “Na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh na bawlhoih petmah ua, mi leh invengte kikal a thu diktak a na vai hawmsak ua, namdang mite, pa neiloute, meithaite na nuaisiah louh ua, hiai mun a midiktat sisan na suah louh ua, na hoihlouhna ding ua pathian dangte na delh sam kei ualeh, hiai gam, tuma lam a na pipute uh kiang a ka piak ah tangtawn in ka hon tengsak ding hi. Tempul a Jeremiah Thugen Ngai un, zuauthu, phattuamna om het lou na gingtazaw ua. Gukgu in, tualthat in, angkawm in, zuau a kichiam in Baal kiang a gimlim hal in, pathian dang, na theih ngeilouhte uh na delh uhi. Hiai inn, ka min mahmah a loh ah ka ma ah hong ding in, hiai thilkihhuai tengtengte hih zel kawm in, hotkhiak ka hita, na chi ding ua hia? Hiai inn ka min mahmah a loh, na mitmuh un suamhatte kokhuk bang lel ahi hia? Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in ka mu hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Atung a ka min ka tensakna, ka mun Shiloh ah hoh dih ua, ka mi Israel gitlouhna ziak a ka thilhih va en un.

Tu in hiai thil tengteng na hih ua, phalvak a thou a na kiang ua thu ka gengente na ngaihkhiak louh ua, nou ka hon sap a, na dawn louh ziak un; Shiloh tung a ka hih bang in hiai ka min lohna inn, noumau leh na pipute uh kiang a ka mun piak, na muan uh tung ah ka hih dek ahi. Na unau tengteng uh, Ephraim nam pumpi nangawn ka paihkhiak bang in ka mitmuh a kipan nou ka hon paikhe ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Mipite Thumanlouhna “Huaiziak in hiai mite a ding in thum ke'nla, kikoukhia in thum ke'nla, ka kiang ah leng ngetsak sam ke'n; ka hon ngaikhe kei ding hi. Judah khopite a leh Jerusalem kholakte a athilhih uh na mu kei a hia? Naupangte'n sing atom ua, apate un mei atoh ua, numeite'n van kumpinu kiang a lat ding tanghou amek ua, pathian dangte ding in dawn ding thillat atungkhia ua, ahon hehsakna lel ding un. Kei ahi maw hon hehsak uh?” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amau zumna ding in amau ahi zaw kei uh maw? Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai dih uh, hiai mun tung ah ka hehna leh thangpaihna ka sungkhe ding a; akang dia, amit kei ding. Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kithoihnate uah halmang kithoihnate behlap unla, sa ne un. Halmang thillat hiam, kithoihnate hiam tungthu ah zaw na pipute uh kiang ah thu ka gen kei a, Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak lai in leng thu ka pe sam kei. Ka aw ngaikhia unla, na Pathian uh ka hi ding a, nou leng ka mite na hi ding uh; na hoihtheihna ding un na omdan ding uh ka hon hilh tengteng zui un, chi in thu ka pe zaw hi.

Himahleh angaikhe kei ua, bil adoh sam kei uh; alungtang gilou ua angaihtuah uh zui in a-om zaw uh, malam zot sang in anungtawn zawta uhi. Na pipute uh Aigupta gam a kipan apawt ni ua kipan a tuni tan in ka nasemmi, zawlnei tengtengte phalvak a thou in na kiang uah niteng in ka sawl zel a, himahleh ahon ngaikhe tuan kei ua, bil adoh sam kei uh; alungsim uh akhauhsak ua, apipute uh sang in agilou zawta uhi. “Hiai thu tengteng akiang ua na gen ding ahi; himahleh ahon ngaikhe kei ding ua; amau na sam ding a, ahon dawng kei ding uh.
