Akiang uah, ‘Hiai nam Toupa a Pathian uh aw ngaikhe lou a, thununna tang lou nam ei ve ua, na chi ding a; thudik amangthangta, akam ua kipan paihmang ahita.Hinnom Phaizang A Khelhna Thilhihte Na sam tan inla, paimang in,mun sang giaute ah kapkhia in; Toupa'n ahehna khang paikhia in anawlkhinta hi. “Judah tate'n lah ka mitmuh in thil gilou ahih ngal uh chih Toupa thupawt ahi; ka min lohna inn ninsak ding in athilkihhuaite uh akoih khin uhi. Atanute uh, atapate uh hal ding in Ben Hinnom Phaizang ah Taphet mun sangte abawl ua; huaite ka thupiak ahi kei a, ka lungsim ah leng alut ngei sam kei. Huaiziak in ngai dih uh, nite ahong tung dek,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai phaizang pen Tophet, chih ahi nawn kei ding a, Ben Hinnom Phaizang, chih leng ahi sam kei ding a Kithahna Phaizang chih ahita ding; Tophet ah avui ding ua, vuina ding mun a-omta kei ding. Mite luang tung a leng vasate leh gamsate an ahi ding; kuamah in adelhmang kei ding uh. Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kholakte ah nuamsa husate leh kipahna gingte, mouneipa awte, mou awte leng ka daisak ding; agam segawp ding ahi ngal a.

Huai hun chiang in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; Judah kumpipate guhte, aheutute guhte, siampute guhte, zawlneite guhte, Jerusalem a tengte guhte ahan ua kipan alakhe ding ua; nite, khate, van a om tengteng, a-it ua, nna asep ua, adelh ua, azon ua, chibai abukte uh ma ah aphoukhe ding uh; lakkhawm ahi nawnta kei ding ua, vui ahi sam kei ding uh; leitung a ekvut lel ding ahi ding. Hiai inkuan gilou mahmah om lai sung tengteng, ka hawlzakna mun a omlaite'n hin sang in sih atel zaw ding uh, chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi.Khelhna Leh Agawtna Huai lou leng akiang uah huchi in na gen ding hi, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Mi apuk un athounawn kei ding ua hia? Mi avakmang in ahong kik nawn kei dia hia? Bang achia hiai Jerusalem mite, tangtawn a nungtawn ding a atolhpuk uh? Khemna alenkip ua, kik nawn a-ut kei uh. Ka bildoh in ka ngaikhia a, kuamah in thudik agen kei uh, kuamah in, “Bang ahia ka hih?” chi in athulimlouhna uh akisik sam kei uh; michih in amau lampi anga chiat uh; kidouna mun a sakol dianglut bang mai in. Ahi, van a tuivapi in ahunbite athei a, vakhute, lensiamte, tuivanelkaite, ahun geihgeih in ahong tung zel uh. Ka mite'n bel Toupa thukhendante athei kei uh. Bangchi in ahia, mipil i hi ua, Toupa dan i kiang uah a-om, na chih uh? Ngai un, laigelhmi laigelhna zuauthei in, zuau in asuaksak zaw uhi. Mipilte azum un alungdong ding ua, mat in a-om ding uh; ngai un, Toupa thu apaikhia ua, amau ah bang pilna a-om a hia? Huaiziak in azite uh midangte kiang ah ka pe ding a, aloute uh leng ahon neimi a dingte kiang ah; michih, aneupen a kipan athupipen tan in en hat ahi uhi.

Zawlnei a kipan a siampu tan in leng michih khemhat ahi uhi. Ka tanu, ka mite liam awlmoh loutak in, muanna om lou napi, “Muanna, muanna,” chi in athoih uhi. Thilkihhuai ahih un azum uhia? Ii, azum het kei ua, amel uh leng asan kei. Huaiziak in pukte lak ah apuk tei ding ua, amaute gawt hun chiang in paihkhiak in a-om ding uh chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Amau ka hihmang vek ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; grep guite agah kei ding a, theipi kungte agah sam kei ding; anah leng avuai ding a, amaute tummang dingte ka sep khinta hi. Bangziak a tulai lai i hi ua? Kikaikhawm unla, khopi kulh neite ah lut unla, huai ah i mangthang diam ding uh; Toupa tung a i gitlouh tak ziak in; Toupa i Pathian un gutui dawn ding hon pia in manthatna ah ahon koih hi. Muanna i zong ua, hoihna bangmah ahong tung kei, hihdamna hun ding leng, ngai in, lungdonna lel! Asakol nak ging uh Dan a kipan a zak ahi a, asakol uh ham ging in gam pumpi aling a, ahong tung ua, asung a om teng, agai vek ua, khopi leh asung a tengte toh. Ngai un, na lak uah gulpi ka sawl ding a, gulgu nei, khoizual vuallouhte; huaite'n nou ahon tu ding ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Amite Ziak A Jeremiah Lungkhamna Aw lungkhamna ah kilungmuanthei leng aw! Sunggil ah kalungtang abah khinta hi. Ngai un, gam gamlapi a kipan,ka mite tanu kah husa, Zion ah Toupa a-om kei a hia?Asung a akumpipa om lou ahi maw?milim bawltawmte leh namdang milimte'n bang achia hon hehsak ahi ua? Buh lak hun akikhelta, nipi abeita,hotdam in i om kei lailai. Ka mite, ka tanu natna ah ka na a,ka suun a, lungdonna in ahon len hi. Gilead a singnai damdawi om lou hia?huai ah hihdam mi a-om kei a hia?bangziak a ka mite,ka tanu damthei lou ahia?

Ka lu tui hi in, ka mit khituinak hileh aw, ka mi,ka tanu thahte a ding inasun-azan in ka kap ding, Gamdai ah khualbuk nei thei leng aw!Ka mite paisan inom mangsan leng aw;angkawm hatmi ahi vek ngal ua,khemhat omkhawm lel ahi uh. Alei uh thalpeu bang in zuau in azang ua, gam ah akhanglian ua,thutak a khang lou ingilou lam ah akhang ua,kei hon thei lou in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Noumau inveng lak ah pilvang chiat unla,na unaute himhim uh muang kei un;unaute lah khemhat ahi ngal ua;invengte leng gensiat hat ahi uh. Amau inveng chiat akhem dingua, thudik agen kei ding uh;alei uh zuaugen akisinsak ua,thulimlouhna sem in agim uhi. Khem hat lak ah na teng a,akhemna uh ziak in keiahon thei nuam kei uh,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngai un, amau ka tuisuaksak ding a,ka ze-et ding;ka mi, ka tanu ziak in bangdang ahia ka hihtak ding aw? Alei uh sihna thal ahi a, khemna thu agen zel,mi'n kam in invengte kiang ah kituahna thu gen mahleh,alungtang ah amah atang giugiau hi. Zawlnei Thumna Tangte a ding in ka kap dia,ka mau vungvung ding,gamdai loupa munte ka suun ding a,kuamah pai nawnlouhna ding a akat khit tak ziak in,mite'n ganta husa aza nawnta kei ding ua, tung a leng vasate leh gamsate leng ataikek ua, apaimangta uh. Huan Jerusalem bel thil sia omkhawm lel in ka bawl dek a,sehalte tenna mun ahi ding;Judah khopite tengmi om lou in ka hihgawp ding. Hiai theisiam ding in mipil kua ahia? Puangkhe ding a Toupa thugen na sang mi pen kua ahia? Bangziak in ahia gam asiat khit a, kuamah pailouhna ding a gamdai bang a akat khit?

Huan Toupa'n, “Ka dan, ama ua ka koih apaisan ua, ka paukam suak amang kei ua, azui kei uh, alungtang khauh uh zui a, apipute un asinsak uh Baalte adelh zawk tak ziak un; Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, amau, hiai mite mahmah gamsai in ka vak ding a, tui kha leng ka dawnsak ding. Nam, amau leh apipute un leng atheih ngeilouhte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a; ka hihmanthat vek mateng namsau ka delhsak ding.”Panpihtu Ngen In Jerusalem Mipite Akikou Uh Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngaihtuah unla, numei kapmite hong pai ding in sam un,numei kahsiamte hong pai ding in sam lai un. Hong kin uhenla, hong kahkhum peuhmah le uh,i khitui aluan a, i mitte ua tui apawttheihna ding in. Zion a kipan kah husa zak ahi ngal a,i naksiat khit takdan uh; gen ding i thei mahmah kei ua,i gam i paisan ziak uleh, i tennate apaihkhiak tak ziak un. Aw nou numeite aw, Toupa thungaikhia unla, akamsuak thu na bil uah lut henla, na tanute uh kah sinsak un; michih in a-invengnu kiang ah suunna la. I tawlet uahte sihna kal lut in i kumpipa' inn uahte alutta hi;inn polam a kipan naupang hihmang ding leh,kholak a kipan tangval hihmang ding. Toupa thupawt in hichi in achi:Mi luangte gamlak ah ekvutbang in apuk ding ua,buh lami buhmaih bang in;kuamah in alakhawm kei ding, chi in. Toupa'n hichi in achi:Mipil in apilna suang keihenla mihat in ahatnasuang sam kei hen,mihau in asum-le-pai suang kei hen. Asuang peuhmah in hiai suang hen,Kei Toupa, zahngaihna, vaihawmdikna,diktatna lei a zangpa ka hi chih atheih a, atheihsiamnatak;hiai thilte ka kipah lam ahi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, zeksum hi ngal, sum louh bang zaw ka gawt ding. Aigupta, Judah, Edom, Ammon leh Moab, gamdai a teng, baksam metgiaute; hiai nam tengteng zeksumlouhte ahi ngal ua, Israel inkote tengteng leng lungtang a zeksumlouhte ahi uh.

Aw, Israel inkote aw,na kiang ua Toupa thugen ngaikhia un, Toupa'n hichi in achi:Namte omdan ching kei unla,van a chiamtehnate ziak in leng lunglau sam kei un;huaite ah namte lunglau in a-om nak uhi. Mite dante bangmah lou ahi ngal a,Gamnuai ah sing aphuk ua, heipi a mikhutsiam khut in asep ahi. Dangkasik leh dangka-eng inazem ua, atatlouhna ding insikkilhna leh sek in akilh uh. Tangmai huan a vasa lauh ding milim bang ahi ua, apau thei kei uh.Amau apai theih louh ziak un,puak suan akiphamoh sek uh;amaute lau kei un, thil sia ahihthei kei ua, thil hoih leng ahihthei sam kei uh. Aw Toupa, nang bangkuamah a-om kei ua, na thupi a,na min hatna in athanglian hi. Aw namte Kumpipa, kua'n ahiahon kihta lou ding?Huai lah na tuakzou him ngal a.Namte mipil tengteng lakte ah,alalgam lak uah leng,nang bang mahmah a-om kei uh. Amau khawksak nei lou mihaiahi ua, manna bei sing milimte sinsak ahi uhi. Tarshish a kipan dangkasik sekahon la ua, Uphaz a kipandangka-eng, mikhutsiam bawl,dangka-eng sekmi khutsuak,puansilh dumpuang leh sandup,mikhutsiam khutsuak vek ahi uhi. Milim Biakna Leh Biakna Dik Akiang ua hichibang a na chih ding uh ahi: Pathian, lei leh van bawl hiloupi lei a kipan amangthang ding ua, van nuai a kipan amang vek ding uh.Pathian Pahtawina La Athilhihtheihna in lei abawl a,apilna in khovel atungding a,alemtheihna in van akaipalh hi. A-aw asuah chiang in, van ah tui aging honhon a, kawlmong a kipan meipi akahtousak a,vuah zukna ding in khua aphesak a,agoubawm a kipan huih anungsak hi. Michih amawl ua, theihnaanei kei uh, dangka-eng sekmi inalimsek azumpih a,amilim sun lah zuau lel ahi a,amau ah hinna leng a-om kei hi. Bangmah lou ahi ua, khemnanasep lel, agawt hun chiang unamang ding uh. Jakob tantuan bel hichibangahi kei, thil tengteng bul ahingal a

Israel agouluah namahi a, amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi.Hong Tung Ding Saltanna Aw nang, um a om lellel in, lei a kipan na puanthuah lakhawm in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, tu in gam a tengte ka singkhe ding, aphawk tham un ka hihgenthei ding.” Ka natna ziak in ka tung agik hi,ka liamna ana a, himahleh,“Hiai hial haksatna ahi,ka thuak mai ding ahi,” ka chi. Ka puanin aseta, ka khautengteng akitat vek a,ka kiang a kipan ka tateapawt ua, a-om nawn kei uh;ka puanin kaipalh ding a-omta kei uh,ka puanzak hon lepsak ding. Belamching mite amawl ua, Toupa thudotdan athei kei uh;huaiziak in alamzang kei ua,abelamhonte uh adalhzak khinta. Ngai un, mallam a pan husaahong tung, buaina thupi mahmah,Judah khopite hihgawp in,sehal tenna ding a suaksak ding in. Aw Toupa, mihing omdan bel,amah thu lel ahi kei chih katheita hi; mihing akalsuanteama kipi hilou hi. Aw Toupa, hon thunun inla,ahun lel in, heh lou in,huchi lou in zaw na hon hihmang kha ding hi. Nang hon thei ngeiloute tung leh na min lou ngei lou namte tungah na hehna bungkhia in;Jakob ane khin ua, ahi,ane khin ua, anemang ua,atenna gam ahihsia uhi.

Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung: Hiai thukhunte ngaikhia unla, Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte kiang ah gen un. Nang akiang uah, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai thukhun thute ngaikhe loumi hamsethuak in om hen. Huai bel na pipute uh, Aigupta gam, sik haltuina kipan a ka pikhiak ni a, ka paukam suak mang unla, thu ka hon piak tengteng hih un, chi a ka thupiak tak ahi; huchi in ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding; Na pipute uh kiang a khuaizu leh nawitui a luang gam kichiam a piak ka chiamtak ka tangtun theihna ding in tuni a a-om bang in, hichi in achi: Huan ke'n, “Amen, Aw Toupa,” chi in ka dawng hi. Huchi in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kholakte ah hiai thu tengteng puang inla: Hiai thukhunte ngaikhia unla, zui un. Na pipute un Aigupta gam a kipan ka pikhiak ni a kipan tutan in ka paukam suak mang un, chi in ka theisak sek hi. Himahleh amang kei ua, bil adoh kei ua, michih, amau lungtang gilou bang zel in a-om zaw uhi. Huaiziak in hiai thukhun thu, hih ding a thu ka piak, ahih louh tengteng uh atung uah ka hon tungsakta ahi,” achi a. Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte lak ah phialgukna a-om. Apipute uh, ka thu ngaikhe nuamloute thulimlouhna lam ah akilehhei nawn ua; pathian dangte nna sem ding in akuan ua; Israel inkote leh Judah inkote'n apipute uh kiang a ka thukhun bawl pen ahihseta uh.” Jeremiah Leh Thukhun Huan Judah khopite leh Jerusalem a tengte'n pathian, akiang ua gimlim ahal seknate uh asam ding ua, himahleh abuai hun chiang un huaite'n amau ahumbit het kei ding hi.

Aw Judah, na pathiante na khopi zah ahi ngal ua; thil zumhuaitak, Baal kiang a gimlim halna ding maitam hial leng Jerusalem kongzing zah in na dingsakta hi. Huaiziak in hiaite thumsak ke'nla, amau a ding in ngetna hiam aw hiam suah sam ke'n; abuai hun chiang ua ahon sap uleh ka ngaikhe kei ding hi. Thilkihhuai hih kawm in, ka deih mahmah in ka inn ah tantuam bang ahia aneih? Thu kichiamte leh Setan in na siatna ding uh ahon pelsak thei ding ahia? Na suang thei ua hia? Toupa'n na min ding in olive sing hing, gah hoih kilawmpi, ahon chi a, lum honhon in atung ah mei atoh a, ahiangte leng akitan khinta. Sepaihte' Toupa, nang hon phutpa'n, Israel inkote leh Judah inkote khelhna, Baal kiang a gimlim lan a, hon hehsak thil uh, amau a dia asepkhiak tung ua thil hoih lou ding thu na tung ah apuangkheta hi.Jeremiah Thah Ding A Sawmgukna Toupa'n hon theisak a, ka theita; huchi in nang mahmah in athilhihte uh na hon kawkmuhta. “Kei bel belamnou nunnemtak, goh ding a pi bang ka hi, sing pen agah toh, hihse ni e, mihing gam a kipan amah zaw i hihmang vengveng ding uh, amin mawngmawng theih ahihlouhna ding in, chi a ka tung a athil sawm uh ka na thei het kei.” Himahleh, aw sepaihte' Toupa, diktak a vaihawmpa, sunggil lam leh lungtang entelpa, atung ua na phulak hon musak in, ka tungthu lah na kiang ah ka hon kemsak hi, chi in.

Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n Anathoth mi, na hinna zongpa, “Ka khut ua na sihlouhna ding in Toupa min in thu gen ke'n,” chi mite tungtang ah hichi in achi: “Ngai un, amau ka gawt ding a, tangvalte namsau in asi ding ua, atanute uh, atapate uh kial in asi ding uh; khosuak kuamah a-om kei ding uh; Anathoth mite tung ah thil hoih lou ka tun dek ngal a; agawtna kum ding uh atun hun chiang in.”

AwToupa, na kiang a kaphun in leng, nang zaw na dik nilouh a;himahleh ka vuina thu pen ka gen ding hi.Bangchi in ahia mithulimloute lam alamzan zel uh?Bangchi in ahia khemhat peuhmah nuamsa a a-om nak uh? Amau na phut a, ahi, zungakaita ua, akhang ua, ahi,gah asuahta uhi; amuk unhon naih ua, asunggil unhon gamlat uhi. Aw Toupa kei bel na hon thei a,na hon mu a, nang lam ah ka lungtang na entel sek a,amaute goh ding belam bang mai in kaikhia inla,agohna ni ding uh sep in. Gam in bang tan ahia asuun ding a,anteh louhingte avuai ding uh?Ateng mite thulim louh ziak ingamsate amang khin ua,vasate leng, “I hun nanung uh amu kei ding uh,” achih ziak un.Pathian Dawnna “Khe a pai mite toh na kitaiteh a,nang ahon bahsak khit uleh bangchi in sakolte na kitaitehpih thei dia?Muanna gam ah bittak in omlechin leng, Jordan gammangah bangchi in na hih dia? Na unaute, na pa inkuantengei in, amau nang ahon khemta ngal ua;amau nang hon delh in ngaihtak in ahon sam ua,thuhoihtak gen mah le uh taksang himhim ke'n.”Amite Ziak A Toupa Lungkhamna “Ka inn-le-lou paisan in ka gouluah ding ka paimangta;ka hinna in a-it mahmah nu,amelma kiang ah ka peta hi. Ka gouluah ding gamnuai humpinelkai bang ahong hita,ka siatna ding in a-aw asuah a,huaiziak in ka mudah ahi. Ka gouluah ding kei a ding insasial ne vasa gial ahi hia?Sasial ne vasate'n akimvel in asual ua hia?Gamsa teng va kaikhawm unla,nek bei ding in hon pi un. “Belamchingmi tampi in kagrephuan ahihsia ua, ka tanasikden ua, ka tantuannuam mahmah mai gamdaigam segawp asuaksakta uh. Gamsia in abawlta ua,asegawp a, ka kiang ah avui hi, agam pumpi asegawp a,himahleh kuamah in adonsak kei uh.

Jeremiah In Toupa Adong Buhchi atuh ua, ling ala ua,akihihgimgawp ua,punna lah a-om tuan kei, Toupa heh mahmah ziak in gah na suahte uh na zumpih ding uh.”Israel Invengte Kiang A Toupa Thuchiam Ka mi Israel kiang a gouluah ding a ka piak khoihsemi, ka inveng giloute tengteng tungtang ah Toupa'n hichibang in achi: “Ngai un, agam ua kipan ka botkhe ding a, alak ua kipan Judah inkote ka phawikhe ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, ka bohkhiak nung in amau ka hehpih nawn ding a, michih gouluah ding leh michih ama gam mah ah ka hon pi ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, Baal kiang a ka mite kichiam a asinsak mah bang un, ka min a, ‘Toupa ahin a ahin sung’, chi a kichiam a akisin ua, ka mite omdan ngenteltak a asin uleh ka mite lak ah ka dingkhesak ding. Himahleh angaihkhiak kei ualeh huai nam aboh in ka botkhe ding a, ka hihse ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Puanmalngat kawnggak lei inla, kawtsak lou in gak in.” Huchi in Toupa thu bangbang in kawnggak ka lei a, ka gakta hi. Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Na kawnggak lei, huai na kawng a om pen la in, thou inla, Euphrates Luipi zuan inla, huai a suangheng kal ah sel in,” chi in. Huchi in Toupa'n thu hon piak bang in ka kuan a, Euphrates Luipi chin ah ka selta hi. Ni tampi nung in Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, Euphrates Luipi zuan inla, kawnggak ka hon selsak lakhia in,” achi hi. Huchi in Euphrates Luipi ah ka hohta a, ka thai a, ka selna a kipan kawnggak ka pholhkhia hi. Huan ngai dih, kawnggak ana ngot khin vek a; bangmah ding in leng aphatuamta kei hi. Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, Toupa'n hichi in achi: hichi mah bang in Judah kisathei pipi leh Jerusalem ki-otsakna mahmahte ka hihse dek hi. Hiai nam giloute, ka thute ngaikhe nuam lou a, amau lungsim genhak zui a pathian dangte' nna sem leh be ding a delh mite kawnggak bangmah ding a phatuam lou bang ahi ding uh. Kawnggakmi kawng a abelh gige bang in Israel inkote pumpi leh Judah inko pumpi ka mite, ka minthanna, ka kilawmna leh ka thupina ahong hihtheihna ding ua ka kiang a belh gige ding a ka bawl ahi uhi; himahleh alimsak kei uh.Uain Thawl Hiai thu akiang ua na gen ding ahi: Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, “Thawl chiteng uain in adim ding,” chi in. Huan amaute'n na kiang ah, “Thawl chiteng uain in adim ding chih ka theih louh uh ahi maw?” achi ding uh.

Puanmalngat Kawnggak Amau ka kiphusak ding a, pate atate uh toh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amau ka hihmanlouhna ding khop in ka hehpih in hiam ka hawi in hiam ka zahngai kei hial ding.”Jeremiah In Kisaktheihna Kalh In Avauhilh Ngaikhia unla, bildoh un; kisathei kei un, Toupa'n thu akhahta hi. Toupa na Pathian uh pahtawi unla,mialna atunsak ma a khomui tung ate na khe uh akipal ma in, vak na lamet laitak un mial asuaksak a,mial bikbek ding in abawl ding hi. Himahleh na ngaihkhiak kei uleh na kisaktheihna uhziak in mundai ah ka kap nilouh ding a,ka khitui leng nakpitak in aluang gige ding; Toupa belamhon sal a kaih ahih ziak un. Kumpipa leh anu kiang ah, “Niam tut un, na lukhute uh aketa hi, na lallukhu thupi uh,” chi in. Sim khopite abing khin a, kuamah hon vual louh in; Judah tengteng sal in atang ua, avek un atang khin uhi. Na mit uh daktou unla, mallam a kipan ahong kuan en un. Na belamhon neih koi ah, huai na belamhon deihhuaitak? Nangmah in lawm ding a na bawlte na tung a akoih hun chiang un bangchi in na chi dia? Numei nauvei bang mai in na na sa ngial kei ding maw? Bangziak in ahia hiaite ka tung a ahong tun? Chi sim na hihleh, na thulimlouhna ziak in ahi na nik lem ahih a na vuaktanna akimuh. Ethiopia mivom in avun ahihlamdang in gialbem in azia asel thei a hia? Huchi ahihleh nou thil gilou hihhatsekte'n leng thil hoih hihthei na ve uteh! Gamdai huih in buhsi amutleng bang mai in amau ka dalhsak ding. Hiai na tantuan, na tuam dia ka hon sehsak ahi, na hon mangngilh a, zuau a na kingak ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huchi in kei mahmah in na mai khuh hial in na nik ka hon lemsak ding a, na zumhuaina adawk ding hi. Gamlak a mualte a na angkawmnate, na huk kikou husate, na kiphalgaih thupidante, huai na thilhih kihhuaite ka muta. Aw Jerusalem, na tung agik hi; hihsiang na hih ma bang tan hi ding ahia?

Khokheng tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung; Judah in asuun a, akulhkongpite angui; lei ah puanvom khu in akun ua,Jerusalem kah ging atungkah. Amilalte'n asikhate uh tui atawisak ua,tuichin azuan ua, tui amu kei uh,tuibel hawm in akik ua;abeidong ua, gen ding athei kei ua, alu uh akhuh uhi. Gam pum a vuahtui a-om louh ziak in lei akhang a,lei let mite alungdong ua, alu uh akhuh uh. Ahi, zukpi in leng loubuk ahnou anei a, louhing a-omlouh ziak in ataisan hi. Gam sabiltungte mualvum ahadingh ua, sehal bang inhuihkhua ngai in anakhuhu ua; nek ding loupaom louh ziak in amit uh amial dundun hi. Ka thulimlouhna un hon hekmahleh na min ziak in aw Toupa hong kuan in;ka puknate uh lah atamta ngal a,na tung mahmah ah thil ka na hihkhial uhi. Aw nang Israelte lamet,mangbat lai a hondampa,bangziak a hiai gam a mikhual bang zen a zan khat giak a zin bang lel a om na hia? Bangziak a mi lungkegawp bang phet leh pasalpha hondam thei lou bang lel a om na hia?Himahleh nang zaw, aw Toupa,ka lak uah na om lai a, na min ka pu ua, hon paisan ke'n. Toupa'n hiai mite tungtang ah hichi in achi: Vakmang a-ut nak ua, akalsuan uh akidek kei uh; huchi in Toupa'n amau apom kei a, athulimlouhna uh atheigigeta ding a, akhelhna uh agawt ding hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mite hoihna ding ngetsak ke'n. An ngawl mah le uh akikou uh ka ngaikhe kei ding a, halmang leh buh-le-bal thillat lan mah le uh ka dawng kei ding; namsau, kial, hipi in amau ka hihmang zaw ding,” achi hi.

Ke'n, “Eh, Toupa Pathian, ngai dih, akiang uah zawlneite'n, ‘Namsau na tuak kei ding ua, kial leng na thuak kei ding uh, hiai mun ah muan mahmahna ka hon pe zaw ding hi, achi sek ngal ua, ” ka chi hi. Keuna Mulkimhuai Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ka sawl louh a ka min lou a, ‘Hiai gam ah kial leh namsau atung kei ding, chi a zawlnei thugen genmi, huai zawlneite namsau leh kial in amangthang ding uh. Huan athugenna uh nam leng kial leh namsau ziak in Jerusalem kongzing ah paihkhiak ahi ding ua, atanute uh atapate uh toh, vuimi himhim anei kei ding uh. Athulimlouhna uh amau tung ah ka sung dek ngal a.” Huan akiang ua hiai thu na gen ding ahi:“Sun leh zan in ka khitui luang hen,hul himhim kei hen, ka mi,ka tanu nungak siangthou in nakpi a liamna atuak hi,khutkhak na mahmah toh. Gam a ka pawtleh, maizen,namsau a thahte!Khopi a ka lutleh, maizen,kialpi a misi!Gam chih ah zawlneite,siampute avakvai chiat ua,adan mahmah athei kei uh,” chi in.Mipite'n Toupa Angen Uh Judah paikhe siang na hi hiam?Zion kih na hi maw?Kou a dia hihdamna om lou bikbek a bangziak a hon thuaksak na hia?Muanna ka zong ua, hoihnabangmah ahong tung kei;hihdamna hun ding leng,ngai dih buaina lel. Aw Toupa, ka thulimlouhdan uh ka kitheihmohbawl kei uhi,ka pipute uh ginatlouhna toh,na tung ah ka hihkhialta uhi. Na min ziak in hon musit ke'n,na laltutphah thupi minsesak ke'nla,ka kiang ua na thukhun theigige in hihse ke'n. Namdangte pathiante lak ah vuahzusak thei a-om uhia?Ahihleh, van in vuahpi atungsak thei hia?Aw Toupa ka Pathian uh,huai pen nang na hi kei maw?Hiai thil tengteng na hih ahi a,ka lamet uh nang na hi.

Huan Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Mosi leh Samuel ka ma ah hong dingh mah le uh, ka lungsim hiai mite lam anga tuan kei ding. Ka muh phak louh ah delhkhia inla, paimang uhen! Huan koi ah ka pai ding ua chi a nang a hon dot uleh hichi in akiang uah na chi ding hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi:Sihna a si dingte, sihna ah;namsau thuak dingte, namsau ah;kial thuak dingte, kial ah;saltang dingte, saltanna ah. Thil li ka sehsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; that ding in namsau, keizan ding in ui, ne khin leh hihmang ding in tung leng vasate leh gam sahangte. Judah kumpipa Hezekiah tapa Manasseh in Jerusalem a athilhih ziak in lei kumpipa gam tengteng lak a vial sepsep ding in ka bawl ding. “Kua'n ahon hehpih dia aw Jerusalem?Kua'n hon lungkhampih dia?Na omdan dong ding in kua alampial dia oi? Nang na hon paikhia a, na nungtawn tawn a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.“Huchi in kisik ka chimtak a,na tung ah ka khut ka lik a,ka hon hihmang hi. Gam pumpi a kulh kongpite ahkizapna in amau ka zap a,ta bei in ka bawl a, ka mite ka hihmang a; a-omdan uhakiheisan louh ziak un. Tuipi piaunel sang a tam in ameithaite uh ka pungsak ding a,suntang lai in tangvalte siatnading in atung uah lokmi katungsak a, mangbatna lehthil mulkimhuai ka tungsak guih hi. Sagih suangnu abahgawp a;akha akhahta; sun ahih lai in ani aketa,zahlak in alungbuai a;huan akhosuaksunte, amelmate uh khut ah namsau a thah ding in ka pe ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa Kiang A Jeremiah Thutut “Nu ei, gam pumpi a kituahlouhna mi leh kikalhna mi a na hon na suan ka tung gik hi na tel e! Ka leitawisak kei a, mite'n leng ahon leitawisak kei uh

himahleh avek un hamsia ahon loh uhi. Toupa'n, chihtak ngial in thil hoih a ding in ka hon hihkip ding; chihtak ngial in siatna ni leh haksatna ni in melma na kiang ah khut ka dohsak ding,” achi hi. Sik in mallam sik leh ngen akitansak thei dia hia? “Gam pumpi a na khelhna tengteng ziak in na hauhsakna leh na goute, bei in gallak ding in ka pe ding. Na theih ngei louh gam ah na melmate nna ka hon semsak ding. Ka heh ziak a na tung a mei ampha ding akuangkheta hi,” achi hi. Judah Mipite Tunggikna Na thute hihlat ahia, ka ne a, na thute kei a ding in kipahna leh ka lungtang nopna ahi; aw Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, na min lah ka puta ngal ua. Nopbawl mite lak ah ka tel kei a, ka kipahpih sam kei; nang khut ziak in ka tu tuam a, lungkimlouhna in na hon dimsak hi. Bangziak a ka natna dai thei lou a, ka liamna damthei lou ahia, hihdam ut lou bang mai a? Ka tung ah phaizang khemhat tui kang sekte bang na hi ding a hia? Huchi in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kiheileh angei ka hon bangsak ding, ka ma ah na dingh nawn ding. Thil gina lou a kipan thil manpha ngen na genkhiakleh keimah kam bang na hi ding. Amau nang lam hong nga uhenla, nang bel amau lam na nga ding ahi kei. Hiai mite lak ah ngen kulhbaang in ka hon bawl ding a, ahon sual ding ua, himahleh ahon zou kei ding uh, nang hon hondam ding leh hunkhe ding in na kiang ah ka om ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Migiloute khut a kipan ka hon hunkhe ding a, mi lauhuaite khut a kipan ka hon pawtkhesak ding.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Zi na nei ding ahi kei a, hiai mun ah tanu tapate leng na nei ding ahi sam kei,” chi in. Tanu tapa hiai mun a piangte leh hiai gam a nu leh pa amaute suangte tungtang Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hipi in asi ding ua, kuamah vui louh leh kuamah suun louh in a-om ding uh; leitung ekvut bang lel ahi ding uh. Namsaute, kialte in amangthang ding ua, aluangte uh tungleng vasate leh gamsate an ahi ding hi.” Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Lusuunna inn ah lut ke'nla, suun ding in hoh ke'nla, amaute kah ke'n; hiai mite lak a kipan ka lungmuanna ka hawkta ngal a, zahngaihna leh lainatnate toh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hiai gam ah milian leh mineu a si ding ua; vui ahi kei ding ua; kuama'n asuun kei ding ua, aki-at un akimetgiau loh kei ding uh. Lusuun mite amisi ngaih uh lungmuan ding in kuamah in nek ding alui kei ding ua, anu uh hiam apa uh hiam ziak in leng nepna nou dawn ding kuamah in atun kei ding uhi. Huan ne leh dawn ding in alak ua tu ding in ankuangluina inn ah na lut ding ahi kei. Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai dih ua, na mitmuh un, na damsung un mou awte, mouneipa awte, nopsakna husate, kipahna gingte hiai mun ah ka daisak ding.” Hiai thu tengteng hiai mite kiang a na hilh hun chiang in amau, “Bangziak in ahia Toupa'n ka tung ua hichitak a thil hoih lou ahon genkhiak? Bang ahia ka thulimlouhna uh?

Toupa ka Pathian uh tung a ka thilhihkhelh bang ahia?” ahon chih uleh, hichi in na chi ding hi: “Na pipute un ahon paisan ziak uh ahi, pathian dangte adelh ua, a-nna uh asem ua, abia ua, ahon paisan ua, ka dan azui kei ua; huan noute'n na pipute uh sang a lek lua in na hih ua, ngai un, michih in noumau lungtang gilou paupeng na zui ua, kei na hon ngaikhe kei uh. Huaiziak in ka gam a kipan noute leh na pipute un leng na theih ngei louh uh gam ah ka hon delhkhe ding, huai ah sun leh zan in pathian dangte nna na sem ding ua, deihsakna ka hon lak dek ngal kei a,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Saltanna A Kipan Kik Nawnna Huchi in ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung dek hi, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Israel suante Aigupta gam a kipan a pikhepa ahin a ahin sung, chita lou in, mallam gam leh adelhzakna gam tengteng a kipan a Israel suante pikhepa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, achi zawta ding uh,” apipute uh kiang a ka piak, amau gam mahmah ah lah ka pikik nawn ding hi.Hong Tung Ding Gawtna “Ngai dih ua, ngamanmi tampi ka thukhak ding a, amau ding ua; huai khit in gamvakmi tampi ka thukhak ding a, tang chiteng leh mual chiteng a kipan amaute abengkhe ding ua, suangpi heng kal a kipan in leng. Jeremiah Hih Ding A Toupa Thupiak A-omdan tengteng uah lah ka mit atu nilouh ngal a; kei a kipan sel in a-om kei ua, athulimlouhna uh leng ka mit a kipan sel in a-om sam kei hi.

Huchi in athilkihhuai luangte ua ka gam ahihnit ualeh akihhuaina ua ka goutan gam adimsak ziak un athulimlouhna uh leh akhelhna uh azahnih in ka thuk ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Jeremiah In Toupa Amuang Aw Toupa, ka hatna leh ka kulhpi, mangbat ni a ka kihumbitna, kawlmong a kipan in namte ahong pai ding ua: “Ka pipute un zuau, thil gina lou, punna nei hilou kia lou ngal bangmah gouluah in anei kei uh. Mi'n pathiante akibawlsak thei ua hia? Huaite pathian ahi sam ua,” achi ding uh. “Huaiziak in ngai dih ua, tutung in amau ka theisak peuhmah ding; ka khut leh ka thilhihtheihna ka theisak ding, ka min Toupa ahi chih athei ding uh.”

Judah khelhna sik laigelhna leh suangmantam hiam mukzum a gelh ahi; alungtang pek ua khuak in a-om a, amaitam uahte leng; sing hing bul leh mual pawngte ah atate un amaitamte uleh a Asherahte uh atheigige ngal ua. Aw nang gam a ka tang, gam dung tawn a na khelhna ziak in na sum leh na gou tengteng, na mun sangte toh gallak ding in ka pe ding hi. Huai na tantuam ka hon piak na tan ding a, na gam theih ngeih louh ah na melmate nna ka hon semsak ding, ka hehna mei, tangtawn a kang ding lah na mut kuangta ngal ua. Toupa'n hichi in achi:Mihing muang a,mihing bantha hatna muang a, Toupa lehngatsan lungtangneimi hamsethuak in om hen. Gamdai a loupa keu gaw bang ahi a,thil hoih pawt ding amu kei ding.Gamdai gamkeu, chi gam, kuamah luah louh ah ateng zaw ding hi. Toupa muangmi, alametpen Toupa hi in nuam asa hi. Tui kiang a sing suan,lui gei a zungkai, kholumhong tung ding patau lou,anahte hing gige,khokhen kum khawk sa lou,gah suan kikhelsaktuan lou bang ahi ding hi. Lungtang bel thil tengteng sangin khemhat pen, hoih lou pumlum ahi a;kua'n ahia theithei ding? Kei Toupa bel michih a-omdanbang zel uleh athilhih gah bang zel a pe ding a lungsim enkhepa,lungtang enchianpa ka hi. Mi, kilawm lou a hong haubel vengkeng, ama tuiloupikeuhsak dia op bang ahi,adam lai ngei in amah atuansan ding ua,atawp in mihai ahong himai ding. Ka mun siangthou omna bellaltutphah thupi mahmah,atung a kipan a tawisang a om ahi.

Aw Toupa Israel lamet, nanghon paisan mi tengteng azahlak ding uh;kei hon lehngatsan mite lei a leivui a gelh bang lel ahi ding uh, Toupa hinna tuikhuk pen lah apaisanta ngal ua.Jeremiah In Toupa Panpihna Angen Aw Toupa hon hihdam inla, huchi in ka dam ding a, hon humbit lechin, huchi in ka bit ding, ka phat gige nang na hi. “Ngai in, ka kiang ah, Toupa thu koi ah? Hong tung leh ake,” achi sek uh. Thil hoih lou tungsak ding ka hon phut kei a, siatna ni lah ka deih het kei chih na thei hi; ka kam a thupawt lah na maima a om ahi ngal a. Judah Khelhna Leh Gawtna Hon simmohte zahlak uhenla, kei bel zahlak kei leng; amau bel lungzing uhenla, kei bel lungzing kei leng; mangbat ni atung uah tun inla, nakpi in amaute hihmang in.Sabbath Tan Thu Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: Kuan inla, Judah kumpipate lutna zel leh pawtna zel, mipite tate kongpi ah leh Jerusalem kongpite tengteng ah va dingh inla; akiang uah, “Nou Judah kumpipate, Judah tengtengte, Jerusalem a teng tengteng hiai kongpi a lut sekte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un.” Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na hinna uh pilvang mahmah dih ua, Sabbath ni in puak nei kei unla, Jerusalem kulh kongpi ah lutpih sam kei un. Huan Sabbath ni in na inn ua kipan puak na pokhe ding uh ahi kei a, nna na sem ding uh ahi sam kei; na pipute uh kiang a ka thupiak bang in Sabbath na tang siangthou zaw ding uh ahi. Amau zaw angaikhe kei ua, bil adoh kei ua

thununna azak ua atanlouhna ding un akigenhaksak zaw uhi.” Toupa thupawt in hichi in achi: “Khawksatak a na hon ngaihkhiak ua, Sabbath ni a hiai khopi a kongpi a thil na puaklut louh ua, nna na sep louh ua Sabbath na tan siangthou uleh, hiai khopi kongpi ah leh heutute, David tutphah a tu dingte kangtalaite leh sakolte ah tuang in ahong lut ding ua, amau leh amiliante uh Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte toh; huchi in hiai khopi ah mi atengdenta ding uh. Judah khopi leh Jerusalem kim a kipan, Benjamin gam a kipan, gam niam gam a kipan, tanggam a kipan leh Sim gam a kipan in ahong pai ding ua, halmang thillat leh kithoihnate buh-le-bal thillat leh gimlimte, kipahna kithoihnate Toupa inn ah ahon tawi ding uh. Himahleh Sabbath tang siangthou ding leh Sabbath ni a puak neih louh leh Jerusalem kulh kongpi a lutpih louh ding thu ah na hon ngaihkhiak kei uleh akulh kongpite ah mei ka pawtsak ding a, Jerusalem kumpipa' inn te akangbei ding a, amit kei ding hi.”

Toupa a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung in hichi in achi: “Thou inla, belvelmi inn ah hohsuk inla, huai ah ka thute ka hon theisak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in belvelmi inn ah ka hohsukta a, abel bawlna khawl ah nna asem hi. Tung a bel abawl lai ahong hoih keileh belvelmi'n hoih asak bang in bel dang ding in abawl nawn zel hi. Huchi in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Aw Israel inkote aw, hiai belvelmi hih bang in nou ka hon hihthei kei a hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai dih ua, belvelmi khut a tungman bang lel in ka khut ah na om uhi, aw Israel inkote aw,” Chik lai in leng nam hiamgam hiam tungtang thu ah, ka hon dokkhe ding, ka hon phel ding a, ka hon hihse ding, chi in na gen mah leng, Huai nam in atungthu ka gen ziak a athil hoih lou hih alehngatsan leh atung a thil hoih lou hih ka tup ka kikhelsak ding. Huan chik lai in leng nam hiamgam tungtang thu ah, ka hon bawl ding a, ka hon dingsak ding, chi a na gen hi leng zong, ka paukam suak ngaikhe lou a ka mitmuh a thil hoih lou ahihleh ama a ding in thil hoih hih ka tup ka kikhelsak sam ding. Huaiziak in Judah mite leh Jerusalem a tengte kiang ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, na tung uah thil hoih lou ka ngaihtuah a, nou ka hon sawm lai na hi uh, michih in a-omdan hoih lou uh lehngatsan uhenla, na omdan uleh na thilhihte uh bawlpha un,” va chi peuhmah in. Himahleh amau zaw, “Kilawm kei e!

Koumau phasak bangbang in ka om ding ua, michih koumau lungtang gilou genhak bang zel in ka om ding uh,” achi sek uhi.Mipite'n Toupa Anial Uh Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi:Namdangte dong him dih ua,hichibang mahmah kua'n athei a?Nungak siangthou Israel inthil lauhuai mahmah ahihta. Lebanon vuk in amualvum anuse ngei a hia?Gamla a kipan a tui vot hong luangsukte akangtat ngei a hia? Ka mite'n ahon mangngilh ua,bangmah lou phet kiang ah gimlim ahal ua, huaite'n atuma lamlampi ua kipan akisuisak a, lampi pen hiloulamkhem lam azui uh; agam uh hihsiatgawp ahi dia,tangtawn a enghou ding;kivialleh min lamdang sa in alu uh asing ding ua. Suahlam huihpi bang in melma ma ah ka thehzak ding,avangtah ni un ka mel hilou,ka dek ka musak ding hi.Jeremiah Kalh A Doudalna Belvelpa Inn A Jeremiah Hon limsak inla, aw Toupa ka hon ngetna thu limsak in. Thil hoih a gilou dit ahi dia hia? Amau lah ka kha a ding in kokhuk atou ngal ua. Amau a kipan a na hehna heimang ding leh amau a dia thil hoih gen ding a na ma a ka din sek theigige in. Huchi in atate uh kialpi kiang ah pekhia inla, namsau hatna kiang ah pia in; huan azite uh ta nei lou in, meithai uhen; apasalte uh hipi in si uhenla, atangvalte uh leng kidouna ah namsau in si uhen. Sim mite akiang uh na tunsak guih lai in a-inn ua kipan kap husa thangkhia hen; kei a ding in kokhuk atou ngal ua, ka khe awkna ding in thang akam uhi. Himahleh nang, aw Toupa kei hon that ding a ahon sawmna tengteng uh na thei hi; athulimlouhna uh ngaidam ke'nla, na mitmuh in akhelhna uh thaimang sam ke'n. Na ma ah kipuk uhenla, na heh ni in amaute soisa in.

Toupa'n hichi in achi: Kuan unla, belvelmi leibel va lei un; mipite upate leh siampu lak a upate pi inla; belvelmi kongpi lutna chin a Ben Hinnom Phaizang ah hoh inla, huai ah na kiang a thu ka hon hilh ding na puang ding hi. Hichi in na chi ding hi, “Judah kumpipate leh Jerusalem a tengte aw, Toupa thu za un.” Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, hiai mun ah aza peuhmah bil am khop hial a thil hoih lou ka hon tun ding hi. Mite'n ahon paisan ua, hiai mun ahihnin un, amau leh apate uh leh Judah Kumpipate'n leng atheih ngei nai het louh uh, pathian dangte kiang ah gimlim ahal ziak uleh hiai mun mihoih sisan a adimsak ziak un leh Baal kiang a halmang thillat ding a atate uh ahalna ding ua Baal mun sangte alamkhiak ziak un; Huai zaw ka thupiak ahi kei a, gen leng ka gen sam kei a, ka lungsim ah leng a-om ngei kei hi. Huaiziak in ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi; huai nite chiang in hiai mun Tophet chih ahita kei ding a, Ben Hinnom Phaizang chih ahi sam kei ding; kithahna Phaizang chih ahi zawta ding. Huan hiai mun ah Judah leh Jerusalem thiltupte ka vuaksuaksak ding a; amau pen namsau in amelmate uh ma ah leh ahinna uh lak tum mite khut ah ka puksak ding; aluangte uh tung a leng vasate leh lei a gamsate an ding in ka pe ding. Huchi in hiai khopi lamdangsak ding leh enghou ding in ka bawl ding a, avialpai peuh in siatna atuahte ziak in lamdang asa ding ua, a-enghou lai ding uhi. Atanute uleh atapate uh sa ka nesak ding a

amelmate uh leh ahinna uh lak tum mite'n a-um ua amangbatsak hun chiang un kuapeuh in a-invengte uh sa ane ding uh. Huan na paipihte mitmuh in bel na hihtam ding a, akiang uah huchi in na chi ding. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hichi mah bang in hiai mite leh hiai khua ka hihtam ding; mi'n belvelmi bel akitapsak a, bawlhoih nawn vual ahih louh bang in Tophet ah avui ding uh; vuina ding mun dang a-om louh ziak in. Huchi hial in hiai mun ka bawl ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; hichi mah bang in hiai khua Tophet bang a bawl hial in, asung a tengte tung ah leng ka hih ding; Jerusalem innte leh Judah kumpipate innte, inn chiteng mahmah atung a van lam thilte kiang a gimlim halkhitna tengteng leh pathian dangte kiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiaknasa tengtengte Tophet mun bang hial a hihnit ahi ding hi.” Huan Jeremiah bel, Toupa'n thugen ding a asawlna mun Tophet a kipan in ahong pai a; Toupa' inn um sung ah adingh a, mipi tengteng kiang ah hichi in achi: Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih ua, thil hoih lou ka gen tengteng hiai khopi leh akho dang tengteng ah ka hon tungsak ding; ka thu ngaikhe lou ding a alungtang uh akhauhsak ziak un.” Tuibel Kitam

Huan Immer tapa, Toupa' inn a heutupa pen, siampu Pashur in Jeremiah in huai zawlnei thugente agen chih ana za hi. Huchi in Pashur in zawlnei Jeremiah akhen a, Toupa' inn a Benjamin Kongpi saknung a koltanna ah atangsak a. Azing in Pashur in Jeremiah akhahkhia a, huan Jeremiah in akiang ah Toupa'n na min ding in Pashur achi kei a, Magermissabib ahon chi zaw hi. Toupa'n lah hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai in, nang a ding leh na lawmte tengteng a ding in kihtak in ka hon bawl ding; amau amelmate uh namsau in apuk ding ua, nang zaw na mit in na en lel ding. Judahte tengteng Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe vek ding; ama'n Babulon ah sal in api ding a, namsau in athat ding hi. Huai ban ah, khopi hauhna tengteng, asepkhiak tengteng, athil manpha tengteng leh Judah kumpipate gou tengteng amelmate uh khut ah ka pe ding a, amau alok ding ua, ding ua, Babulon ah api ding uh. Huan nang Pashur, na insung a om tengtengte toh sal ah na tang ding ua; Babulon ah na pai tei ding; huai ah na si ding a, huai ah vui in na om ding a, nang leh na lawm zuauthu na hilhsekte tengteng toh,” achi hi. Toupa Tung A Jeremiah Phunna Aw Toupa, nang na hon khem a, khem a om ka hita ve,nang zaw kei sang in na hat a,na hon zou a; nitum in nuihsanka hita, mi kuapeuh in ahon nuihsan uhi. Thu ka gen peuhmah chiang in,ka kikoukhia a, hiamgamna leh siatna, chi in ka kikou; Toupa thu bel kei a ding in,nitum a dem leh muhsit lohna kia ahi.

Amah ka kan kei ding a, aminin leng thu ka gen nawn sam kei ding, chi mah leng,ka guh sung a meikuang kikhum khin bang mai in ka lungtang sung ah a-om a,ka pai kinken zou kei a,ka phazou mahmah kei hi. Mi tampi aguk phun uh ka za;kil chih ah lauhuai a-om,hek unla,i hekkhawm ding uh, chi in.Ka lawmte ka puk ding tang gigete'n, “Khem in a-om kha dia,i zou ding, atung ah phu i la kha ding,” achi uhi. Himahleh Toupa mihangsankihtakhuai mahmah bang inka kiang ah a-om a,hon simmohte apuk ding ua,ahon zou kei ding uh.Zahlaktak in a-om ding ua,alohchin sin louh ziak un.Tangtawn a aminsiatna uhmangngilh in a-om kei ding. Aw sepaihte' Toupa,midiktatte enchianpa,lungtang leh lungsim mu paisuakpa, atung ua na phulak hon musak dih ve,ka tungtang thu ka hon kemsakta hi. Toupa kiang ah la sa unla, Toupa phat un; thil gilouhih mite khut a kipan panpihdeihte hinna ahumbitta hi. Ka piankhiak ni hamsethuak in om hen,ka nu'n ahon piansak ni vualzawl in om dah hen. Ka pa kiang a, “Tapa na neita,”chih thu hon tun a,hong kipaksakmi pen hamsethuak in om hen. Huai mi, Toupa'n hehpih het lou a asukgawp khuate bang in om hen,zingsang lam in kikou husa za henla,sun ahih chiang in galdou husa; sul sung a ahon hihlup louh ziak in; huchi hihleh ka nu ka han himai ding hi a,asul in tangtawn a hon pai ding hiven. Bangziak a sul a kipan hong pawt chitchiat ka hia,semgim leh lungkham a om ding a zahlak mawngmawng a ka damsung nite zang ding in? Jeremiah Leh siampu Pashur Kituahlouhna

Kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang a Malkijah tapa Pashur leh siampu Maaseiah tapa Zephaniah asawl lai a Jeremiah kiang a Toupa a kipan a thu hong tung ahi, “Babilon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in ahon dou a, Toupa'n athilhih thupitak ahih sek bang in ahon huh nuam in, akiksak nawn mai kha diam chih Toupa hon dotsak dih ve,” chi in. Huan Jeremiah in akiang uah, Zedekiah kiang ah hichibang in va gen un; Israel' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, Babulon kumpipa leh Kaldai mi, kulh pua a nang hon umbichilhpa na douna galvan zat ka kiksak ding ahi; hiai khopi sung ah amaute ka pikhawm ding. Kei mahmah in leng heh leh lungkim lou mahmah leh thangpaitak in ban zak a ban thahat zang in nang ka hon dou ding. Hiai khua a teng mihingte leh gante ka that ding a, hipi in asi ding uh.” Huai nung in, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Kumpipa Zedekiah leh anungzuite leh midang hiai khua a hipi leh namsau leh kial a siloute, Babulon kumpipa leh amelmate uh khut leh amau thah tum mite khut ah ka pe ding. Namsau hiam in athat ding a, ahehpih het kei ding, ahawi het kei ding a, azahngai sam kei ding.” Huan hiai mipite kiang ah huchi in va gen in; Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, sihna lampi leh hinna lampi ka hon koihsak hi. Hiai khopi sung a om namsau in hiam kial in hiam hipi in hiam asi ding uh; Kaldai mite nou hon umbichilhpa kiang a pawt a kipete bel ahing ding uh, ahinna uh kidouna kipahman ahi ding hi. Hiai khopi hoihna ding hilou, asiatna ding ka tum bilbel ahi

Babulon kumpipa khut a piak ahi ding a, ama'n mei in ahal ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Judah Kumpipa Inkuante Tung A Toupa Thukhenna Judah kumpipa inkote tungtang thu ah; Toupa thu ngaikhia un, Aw David inkote aw! Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Zingsang in vai diktak in hawm unla, simmohmi khut a kipan loh thuakmi hunkhia un, huchi lou in zaw ka hehna mei bang in apawt ding a, kuamah phelh vual louh ding in akang dia, na thilhih giloute uh ziak in.” “Ngai dih ua, phaizang zang a tengte aw, nou phaizang zang suangpi a teng a, ‘Kuate ahia i omna ua hong lut ding? chite aw, nou ka hon lang ding hi. Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Na thilhih uh gah bang zel in ka hon gawt ding a, agam gammang ah mei ka khah ding a, akim tengteng akangmang ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Jerusalem Melmate Zoh A Om Ding Genkholhna

Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Judah kumpipa' inn ah hohsuk inla, hiai thu va gen in. ‘Aw Judah kumpipa, David tutphah tung a tu, nang leh na nungzuite leh na mi hiai kongkhak a lutte toh, Toupa thu ngaikhia un, ” chi in; Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Diktak leh hoihtak in vai hawm unla; simmohmi khut a kipan loh thuakmi hunkhia unla; mikhualte, pa neiloute leh meithai tung ah diklouhna hiam hiamgamna hiam ching kei un; hiai mun ah mihoih sisan leng suah sam kei un. Hiai thu zui ngei hi le uchin zaw, David tutphah tung a kumpipate kangtalaite leh sakolte tung a tuang in, amaute, anungzuite uh leh amite uh hiai na inn kongkhakte ua lut ngeingei ding uh hiven. Himahleh hiai thute na ngaihkhiak kei uleh, hiai inn asegawp ding a, chi in kei-le-kei kilou in ka kichiam ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n Judah kumpipa inkuan tungtang thu hichibang in agen hi: “ ‘Nang zaw kei a ding in Gilead bang, Lebanon mualvum bang na hi, hinapi in gamdai ka hon suaksak ding; luahmi om lou khopi bang mai in. Nang hihmang dingte, galvan nei chiat in, ka bawlkhol ding a; na sidar sing telte aphuk ding ua, mei ah akhul ding uh. ” “ ‘Huan nam tampite'n hiai khopi apal paisuak ding ua, michih in amau invengte kiang ah “Toupa'n hiai khopi thupi mahmah bangziak a hichitak a hih hi ding ahia eita?” achi ding uh. A Pathian uh Toupa thukhun alehngatsan ua pathian dangte abiak ua, a-nna asep ziak uh ahi, chi in adawng ding uh. ”Jehoahaz Tungtang A Jeremiah Thugen Misi kah kei unla, suun samkei un; paimangmi bel nakpimahmah in kah un,ahong kik nawn kei ding a,apianna gam amuh nawn louh ding ziak in.

Judah kumpipa Shallum, Josiah sik a vaihawmpa, hiai mun a kipan paikheta tungtang thu bel Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hiai ah ahong kik nawnta kei ding. Sal a apina mun uah, huai mah ah asi ding a, hiai gam amu nawnta kei ding.”Jehoiakim Tungtang A Jeremiah Thugen “Diktatlouhna a inn lam a,diklouhna a dantan tungnungte bawlmi,athawn a amah invengte tha zang,loh pe nuam lou mite tung agik hi; ‘Inn thupi mahmah ka kilam ding a,dantan tungnung zapite nei inn,tohlette ka hong ding a,sidar sing in ka thuapsuak ding a,zesan ka nuh ding, chimi tung mah. Sidar sing a na ten ziak in,kumpipa kisa na hi maw!Na pa'n ne in adawn a,diktak in vai ahawm kei maw?Huai amah a ding in ahoih ahi. Migenthei leh tasamtevai ahawmsak a, huai ahoih ahi.Hiaitak na hon theihdan ding ahi maw?chih Toupa thupawt ahi. ‘Himahleh na huaihamte a ding in,mihoih sisan suahna ding,nuaisiahna ding leh hiamgamna ding lel in na mit leh na lungsim na pu ahi. ” Huaiziak in Judahte kumpipaJehoiakim, Josiah tapa tungthu bel Toupa'n hichi in agen a;“ ‘Aw ka unaupa, chi in hiam,‘Aw ka sanggampa, chi in hiam amah asuun kei ding ua,‘Aw toupa, chi in hiam,‘Aw thupipen, chi in hiam amah asuun sam kei ding uh. Jerusalem kulh polam alotkhiak a, paih in,sabiltung vui in avui ding uh.Jerusalem Tuah Ding A Genkholhna Lebanon ah paitou inla, kikou in,Bashan ah na aw suah inla,Abarim a pan in kikou in, na itte tengteng amangthangta ua. Na lohchin in na kiang ah thu ka gen a, nang lah ka ngaikhe kei ding, na chia, ka kamsuak ngaihkhiak louh na tuailai kipan in hiai na omdan ahi.

Judah Kumpipa Inkuante Kiang A Jeremiah Thupuak Aw Lebanon tang a teng, sidar sing lak a buseptu na tung a natna atun a na hong hehpihhuai ding dan mai zaw!numei nauvei na bang mai in.”Jehoiachin Tung A Pathian Thukhenna Ahin a ka hin sung, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; Judah kumpipa Koniah, Jehoiakim tapa bel ka khut taklam a sawnna zungbuh himah lechin, huai a kipan ka hon botkhe ngeingei ding. Thah ding a nang hon zongmi khut ah, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah leh Kaldaite khut ah ngeingei nang ka hon pe ding hi. Na pianna hilou gamdang ah nang leh na nu nang hon suangtu ka hon paikhe ding a, huai ah na si ding uh. Alungsim ua kik nawn a-utna mahmah gam uah akik nawn kei ding uh. Hiai Koniah pen bel kitamgawp, simmohhuai ahi kei a hia? Bel asung a lungkimna omlouhna ahi kei maw? Bangziak a amah leh asuante paihkhiak a gam atheih ngei louh ua paihkhiak a a-om uh? Aw, gam, gam, gam, Toupa thu ngai in, Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Hiai mi ta nei lou, adamsung a lohching lou ding mi ahi,asuante kuamah lohching a,David tutphah tung a tu ding leh Judah gam a vaihawm nawn ding a-om kei ding uh,” chi in gelh in.

Huaiziak in Toupa Israel' Pathian in ka mite chingpa belamching mite tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: “Ka ganhonte na dalhsak ua, na delhmang ua, na veh kei uh, ngai un, na thilhih uh gilou ziak in nou ka hong veh ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huan ka ganhon khosuaksunte ka delhzakna gam tengteng a kipan ka pikhawm nawn ding a, ahuangsung uah ka hawlkhawm ding a, gah nuam mahmah ahi ding ua, apung ding uh. Amaute limsak ding, amaute a ding in belamchingmi ka koih ding a, alau nawnta kei ding ua, kuamah amang nawn kei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Ngai dih ua, David a ding in Hiang diktat ka suahsak hun ding ahong tung dekta hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; amah kumpipa in atu ding a, piltak in agamta ding a, gam pumpi ah dikna leh diktatna atangtungsak ding. Ahun sung in Judah hotdam ahi ding a, Israel bittak in a-om ding. Huai amin ding a asak ding uh hiai ahi, “Toupa i diktatna uh ahi,” chih. “Huaiziak in ngai dih ua, ahun atung sinta,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Israel mite, “Aigupta gam a kipan a hon pikhepa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, chi nawn lou in. Mallam gam leh adelhzakna gam tengteng a kipan Israel inkote suante pikhia a, pikik nawnpa Toupa ahin a ahin sung, achi zawta ding uhi.” Huchi in amau gam ngei ah ateng ding uh.Zawlneite Tungtang A Jeremiah Thugen Zawlneite tungtang thu pen,ka sung ah ka lungtangapuakkham hi, ka guh tengaling a, zukham bang mai ka hi,zu in azelh zoh mi bang mai in, Toupa ziak leh athu siangthou ziak in. Gam angkawm in adim a,hamsia ziak in gam in asuun a,gamdai louhing munteakeu khinta;alampi uh agilou a,ahatna uh adik kei hi.

Zawlneite leh siampute'nPathian khawk asa kei ua,ka insung mahmahah leng akhelhna uh ka mu. Huaiziak in amaute a ding in apaina lampi uh,zan khomial lampi nal bang ahi ding a, huai ah delh in a-omding ua atolhpuk ding ua,atung uah thil hoih lou ka tungsak ding a, amau gawtna hun, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Samaria zawlneite tung ah kihhuai ka mu,Baal lou in thu agen ua,Israelte apimang uhi. Jerusalem a zawlneite tung ah thil mulkimhuai ka mu,ang a kawm ua, zuau in agamta ua, thil gilou hihte khut ahatsak ua, kuamah in agitlouh uh kisik atup louh loh uhi;kei a ding in Sodom a mite bang ahong hi vek ua,akhosung a mite tengteng leng Gomorrah a mite bang hial in. Huaiziak in zawlnei hon tungtang thu ahsepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:“Ngai dih ua, gamsai in ka vak ding a,thil kha ka dawnsak ding;Jerusalem a zawlneite kiang a kipan in gam pumpi ah Pathian poisaklouhna lah apawtta ngal a.” Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Zawlnei na kiang ua thugente thu ngaikhe kei un; bangmah lou ahon sinsak ua, Toupa kam a kipan hilou amau lungsim geltawmte agen uhi. Toupa thu musit mite kiang ah, ‘Nang ding in ahoih ding, achi vial ua; amau deihlam engtat a hih teitei mite kiang ah, ‘Thil hoih lou bangmah na tung ah ahong tung kei ding, ” achi uh. Toupa thugelna ah kua apang ngei a, athu sang a thei ding kua ahia om? Ahihleh athu pen kua'n ahia limsak a ngaikhia om? Ngai dih ua, Toupa huihpi, hehna apawtta, ahi, pingpei huihpi; migiloute lutang anuai ding. Toupa hehna amawk kik kei ding, alungsim a atup tinten atangtungsak a, ahih khit phot masiah; ni nanung lam ah na hon theichian ding uh.

Zawlneite bel ka sawl louhpi in atai ua, akiang ua thu ka gen louh in leng thu agen uh. Ka thugelna a om tei hi le uh zaw, ka mite kiang a ka thu puang ding hi ve un, athilhihdiklou ua kipan lehngatsak ding hi ve un. Hun Hong Tung Ding A Lametna “Agantatna mun a belam hihmangthang a dalhzaksak belamching mite atung uh agik hi!” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Mun kisel ah ka muh theih louh dia kibu thei mi a-om ua hia? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Lei leh van ah ka dim ahi kei maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Mang ka nei, mang ka nei, chi a ka min a zuaugen zawlneite thugen ka zata hi.” Zawlnei zuaugente, amau lungtang kikhem tawm a thu sek mite lungtang ah hiai bang tan ahia a-om ding? Amau bel a-invengte uh kiang ah amang uh ahilh ua ka mite ka min mangngilhsak atum ua, apate un Baal ziak a ka min amangngilh khit bang un, zawlnei mang nei in amang gen hen aw, ka thuneimi in ka thutak diktak in gen hen. Buhpawl leh buhtang in kibatna bang anei ua? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ka thu mei bang ahi kei maw, sek suang seknenna bang? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huaiziak in ngai un, zawlnei hon, ka thu kiguksak tuah sekte ka dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai dih ua, zawlnei amah dangnalsak a, Toupa'n achi, chisekte ka dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai dih ua, mang zuau leltak gen a, hilh a, azuauthute uh leh aki-otsakna thuginaloute uh ziak a ka mite pimang zawlneite ka dou ahi, Toupa thupawt in achi; ka sawl ngal kei a, thu lah ka pe kei a, hiai mipite aloh taksak kei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Toupa Lunggimna Hiai mipite lak a mi kuahiam, zawlnei kuahiam in, siampu kuahiam in, “Toupa puakgik bang ahia?” chi a ahon dot leh hichi in na dawng ding hi, “Noumau mah puakgik pen na hi uh, ka hon paimang ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Zawlnei hiam, siampu hiam, mi kuahiam, Toupa puakgik, chi a-om uleh, huai mi leh a-inkote ka gawt ding. Huchi in mi kuapeuh in a-invengpa kiang ah leh kuapeuh in a-unaupa kiang ah Toupa'n bangchi in adawng a, Toupa'n bang agen a? chi in na kidong ding uh. Toupa puakgik na lou kha nawn kei ding ua, mi kuapeuh amah mah thugen apuakgik ahi ding hi. Pathian hing, sepaihte' Toupa, i Pathian thu uh lah na lehbulh khinta ngal ua. Zawlnei kiang ah, “Toupa'n bangchi in nang ahon dawng a? Toupa'n bang ahia agen?” na chi ding. Huan “Toupa puakgik, na chih peuhmah uleh, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Toupa puakgik na chi ding uh ahi kei,” chi a ka hon sawl a, Toupa puakgik chi a thu na gen ziak in; huchi in ngai un, “Ka hon mangngilh keuhkeuh ding a, noute leh hiai khopi na kiang uleh na pate uh kiang a ka na piaksa toh ka hon paimang ding hi. Huan tangtawn demsiatna leh zahlak nilouhna mangngilh vual louh na tung uah ka hon tun ding hi.”

Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judahte kumpipa Jekoniah, Jehoiakim tapa leh Judah heutute, mikhutsiamte leh siksek mite toh Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon sal dia api nung in, Toupa'n hiai mengmuhna ahon ensak a, ngai dih, theipi bawm nih Toupa tempul ma ah akitung hi. Bawm khat ah theipi hoihtak, theipi min masa bangtak a-om a; bawm dang ah bel theipi hoih lou, nek tak louh khop a sia a-om hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Bang ahia na muh, Jeremiah?” achi a. Ke'n, “Theipi, theipi hoih, hoih mahmah; leh ahoih lou, nek tak louh khop a sia,” ka chi hi. Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Judah saltangte, Kaldaite gam a athahna ding ua ka sawlkhiakte, hiai theipi hoih bang in ka en ding hi. Ahoihna ding un atung uah ka mit ka tusak ding a, hiai gam ah ka pikik nawn ding; amau ka dingsak ding a, ka phel kei ding; ka suan ding a, ka botkhe kei ding. Huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na hon theihna ding in lungtang ka hon pe ding a; ka mite ahi ding ua, a Pathian uh ka hi ding; alungtang tengteng uh toh ka kiang ah ahong kik ding uhi.” Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Theipi sia, nek tak louh khop a sia bang in Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh aheutute uh leh Jerusalem a nituang hiai gam a omlaite leh Aigupta gam a tengte, ka lehngatsan ding hi. Haksatak a leitung gam teng lak ah sep leng ding in, ka delhmangnate gensiat leh tehpih leh tai leh hamsiatkhum hi ding in ka tawpsan ding. Amau leh apate uh kiang a ka piak gam a kipan valh khit ahih tanpha un alak uah namsau, kial leh hii ka sawl ding hi.” Theipi Bawm Nih Muhna

Judahte kumpipa, Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa kum lina a Judah mite tengteng tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung; huai hun bel Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kum khatna ahi a, huai thu zawlnei Jeremiah in Judah mi tengteng leh Jerusalem a om tengtengte kiang a agen ahi. Kum sawmnih-le-thum sung, Judahte kumpipa Josiah, Ammon tapa kum sawm-le-thumna a kipan tutan in, Toupa thu ahong tung zel a, phalvak a thou in na kiang uah ka gengen a, himahleh na ngaikhe kei uh. Toupa'n na kiang uah anasemmi zawlneite tengteng asawl a, phalvak a thou in asawl a, himahleh na ngaikhe kei ua, thei ding in na bil uh na doh sam kei uh. Huai, zawlneite'n, “Michih noumau lampi gilou a kipan hong kik unla, Toupa'n na kiang ua leh na pipute uh kiang a nidanglai a kipan tangtawn a ding a nou ahon piak gam ah teng un. Pathian dangte kiang ah a-nna uh sem ding leh amaute be ding leh na khut nasep ua kei hon lungkim lousak ding in hoh kei un; huchi in ka hon hihna kei ding hi,” achi uh. Himahleh nou ding a hoih lou ding a na khut nasep ua hon hehsak ding in na hon ngaikhe kei uh, Toupa'n achi. “Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka thu na ngaihkhiak louh ziak un, ngai dih ua, mallam nam tengteng ka thukhak ding a, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leng ka thukhak ding a, amaute hiai gam leh asung a omte leh hiai kim a nam om tengteng sual ding in ka hon pi ding; ka hihmang sipsip ding a, lamdangsak ding leh enghou ding leh segawp nilouh ding in ka bawl ding.

Huan akiang ua kipan nopsakna husa leh kipahna husate, mouneipa aw leh mou awte, buhgawi husa ging leh khawnvak vakte ka lamang ding hi. Hiai avek in ase ding a, lamdangsak ahi ding a; hiai namte'n Babulon kumpipa nna kum sawmsagih asem ding uh. Huan kum sawmsagih hun chiang in Babulon kumpipa leh huai nam, Kaldaite gam, agitlouhna uh ziak in ka gawt ding a; tangtawn in ka segawpsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai gam tung ah ka thu atung ua ka gen tengteng, Jeremiah in namte tung a agen, hiai laibu a gelhsa tengteng ka tungsak ding hi. Nam tuamtuam leh kumpipa thupitakte'n amaute'n nna akisep un, amau mahmah in leng amau nna ahon sepsak ding uhi.Namte Tung A Pathian Thukhenna Toupa Israel' Pathian in ka kiang ah hichi in achi: “Ka khut a hiai hehna uain nou la inla, ka hon sawlna ding nam chih dawnsak in. Adawn ding ua, ahoi dongdong ding ua, ahai ding ua, akiang ua ka sawl ding namsau ziak in,” chi in. Huchi in Toupa khut a kipan nou ka la a, Toupa'n hon sawlna nam chih ka dawnsak hi. Jerusalem leh Judah khopite, huai kumpipate leh heutute, siatgawpnate, lamdangsakte, enghou dingte, hamsiatte tang ding in, tua a-omdan bang uh; Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh leh asikhate,aheutute leh ami tengtengte; Amau lak a mikitokpolh tengteng;Uz gam a kumpipa teng;Philistia gam a kumpipa tengteng,Ashkelon leh Gaza leh Ekron lehAshdod khosuaksunte; Edom leh Moab leh Ammon suante; Tura kumpipa tengteng leh Sidonkumpipate leh tuipi gei kumpipate; Dedan leh Tema leh Buz lehabaksam uh met a omte tengteng; Arabia kumpipa tengteng,Gamdai a teng nam kihelte kumpipate; Mallam A Kipan A Melma Mallam kumpipa tengteng,agamla leh anai a mi akizom zel in;leitung a kumpi om tengteng in adawn khit chiang inSeshak kumpipa'n adawn ding hi.

Huan akiang uah sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Dawn unla, kham un, lau unla, kipuk in thoutou nawn kei un; na lak ua namsau ka sawl ding ziak in,” chi in. Huan na khut a nou pen dawn ding a alak nop kei uleh huchi in na chi ding; sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na dawn ngeingei ding uh ahi! Ka min tam khopi ah thil hoih lou ka hih pan a, noute gawt louh hial in na om ding uh maw? Gawt louh in na om kei ding ua; lei a teng tengteng tung ah namsau ka samkhe ding,” chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. Huaiziak in atung ah hiaite gen inla, akiang uah huchi in chi in:“Toupa mun sang a kipan in athum ding,atenna siangthou a kipan a-aw asuah ding, ahuang tung ah nakpi inathum ding; grep suk mite bang in akikou ding, lei luahte teng tung ah. Lei tawp pha in husa athangkik ding a, Toupa'n namte alang a,sa tengteng tung ah vai ahawm ding,namsau kiang ah migilou ape ding,” Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, thil hoih lou in nam chih ahon nuai ding hi, huihpi hat mahmah lei mun tawp a kipan in ahong kuan ding hi. Huai ni chiang in Toupa thahte'n lei tawp a kipan in lei tawp pha in akhak ding ua; suun louh leh khop louh leh vui louh in a-om ding ua; leitung a eklei lel ahi maimah ding uh. “Belamching mite aw kikou tuaituai unla, kap un, nou belamhon lak a makaite aw, kitung buatbuat un, thah a na om ni uleh na dalhzak nite uh ahong tung petmahta hi. Bel deihhuai bang in na puk ding uh. Belamching mite'n taimangna lampi anei kei ding ua, belamhon lak a makaite'n leng pelhna lampi anei kei ding uh. Belamching mite kah husa, belamhon lak a makaite mau ging toh, Toupa'n atatna mun uh asuksiat lel ziak in. Huang muanhuaite daihsak sipsip in a-omta uh, Toupa heh mahmah ziak in. Abukna pawtsanta, humpinelkai bang in, nuaisiahna namsau lauhuai ziak leh aheh mahmah ziak in agam uh ase khinta hi.”

Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim in vaihawm apat tung in hiai thu Toupa kiang a kipan ahong tung hi: Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Toupa' inn huangsung ah dingh inla, Judah khopi tengteng Pathian be ding a Toupa' inn a hong paite kiang ah akiang ua gen ding a thu ka hon piak tengteng khat lel leng iim lou in gen vek in. Michih in a-omdan gilou uh paisan in angaikhe zenzen khamoh ding uhia, athilhih gilou uh ziak a atung ua thil hoih lou hih ka tup ka khektheihna ding in.” Nang akiang uah, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na hon ngaihkhiak louh ua, ka dan na ma ua ka koih na zuih louh ua, zingsangpi a thou a amau na kiang ua ka sawl ka nasemmi zawlnei thu na limsak kei uleh; hiai inn Shiloh bang in ka bawl ding a, leitung a nam tengtengte hamsia thuak ding in ka bawl ding,” na chi ding hi. Huan siampute, zawlneite leh mipi tengteng in Toupa' inn a Jeremiah in hiai thu agen angaikhia uhi. Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, mipi tengteng kiang a gen ding a Toupa'n apiak teng agen khit in, siampute, zawlneite leh mipi tengteng in amah amanta ua, “Si peuhmah niteh!” Bangziak a Toupa min lou a, “Hiai inn Shiloh bang ahi ding, hiai khopi luahmi om lou in asegawp ding, chi a gen na hia?” achi ua. Huchi in Toupa' inn a mipi tengteng in Jeremiah aboh lutlut uhi. Judah heutute'n hiai thu azak un, kumpipa' inn a kipan in Toupa' inn lutna Toupa' inn Kongpi Thak ah atu uhi. Huchi in siampute leh zawlneite'n heutute leh mipi tengteng kiang ah, “Hiai mi si tak ahi, khopi siat ding thu, na bil ua na zak bang un agenkhol ngal a,” achi uhi.

Huan heutute leh mipi tengteng kiang ah Jeremiah in, “Na thu ngaihkhiak khitsate uh bang in hiai inn leh hiai khopi siat ding thu gen ding in Toupa'n kei hon sawl ahi. Huaiziak in tu in na omdan uleh na gamtatdan uh bawlhoih unla, Toupa na Pathian uh thu mang un; huchi in Toupa'n na tung ua thil hoih lou tung ding aphuankhiaksa akikhelsak thei ding hi. Kei ka hihleh, na khut ua om ka hi. Dik leh hoih na chih bang un hon bawl un. Na hon thah uleh, noumau leh hiai khopi leh khua-le-tuite tung ah mihoih sisan na tungsak ding uh chih thei mai un; adiktak in na bil ua hiai thute gen dia Toupa'n na kiang ua hon sawl ka hi,” achi hi. Huchi in heutute leh mipite'n, siampute leh zawlneite kiang ah, “Hiai mi asih ding ahi kei, Toupa i Pathian min a i kiang ua thu gen ahi,” achi uhi. Huan huai gam Upa kuate hiam ahong dingh ua, mipi omkhawmte kiang ah, “Mikah, Moreseth mi'n Judah kumpipa Hezekiah vaihawm lai in thu agen a, Judah mi tengteng kiang ah, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Lou bang in Zion leh ahi ding a, Jerusalem thil se omkhawm asuak ding, tang a inn gammang mun sang bang ahi ding,” achi hi. Judah kumpipa Hezekiah leh Judahte tengteng in amah athat uhia? Toupa lau in Toupa deihsakna angen ua, Toupa'n atung ua thil hoih lou tung ding apuan akikhelsak ahi kei maw? E'n zaw i tung ua thil hoih lou tungsak ding i hi ve ua! achi hi. Huan midang, Toupa min a thugen Keriath-jearim mi Shemaiah tapa Uriah mah leng a-om a, Jeremiah thugen tengteng mah bang in hiai gam leh khopi siat ding thu agen hi.

Kumpipa Jehoiakim leh amithupite leh heutute'n azak un kumpipa'n hihlup atum a; himahleh Uriah in azak in alau a, ataimang a, Aigupta gam ah apaita hi. Kumpipa Jehoiakim in Akbor tapa Elnathan leh midangte toh Aigupta gam ah mi asawl hi. Huchi in Aigupta gam a kipan in Uriah apikhia ua, kumpipa Jehoiakim kiang ah ahon pi ua, huai in namsau in athat a, aluang vantang han ah apailut ua, achi uhi. Himahleh Shaphan tapa Ahikam in Jeremiah agum a, huchi in hihlup ding in mipite kiang ah piak ahita kei hi. Jeremiah Vau A Omna

Judah Kumpipa Josiah tapa Zedekiah, vaihawm apat tung lai in, Toupa kiang a kipan in hiai thu ahong tung hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah hichi in achi: Hakkolte leh akhaute bawl inla, na ngawng ah bat in. Huan Edom kumpipa, Moab kumpipa, Ammon mite kumpipa, Tura kumpipa, Sidon kumpipa kiang ah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang a amisawl, Jerusalem a hong paite khut ah khak in. Hiai thute apute uh kiang ah gensak in; hichi in Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: huchi in na pute uh kiang a na gen ding uh ahi: “Ka thilhihtheihna thupitak leh ka ban zak in leitung, mihingte leh leitung a sate toh ka bawl vek a, piak tuak ka chihte kiang ah ka pia hi. Tu in leng ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah hiai gam tengteng ka pe khinta hi, gamsate leng amah nna sem ding in ka pe lai hi. Amah gam huntak atun ma in nam tengteng in amah leh atapate leh atapa tate nna asem ding ua, huai nung in bel nam tampite leh kumpipa thupi mahmahte'n amah sikha ding in abawl ding uh.” Huan hichi ahi ding a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hakkol po nuam lou leh a-nna sem nuam lou nam leh lalna gam namsau leh kial leh hipi a amah khut a ka hihman vek masiah amau ka gawt zel ding. Noute'n zaw na zawlneite uh, na aisan siamte uh; na mangte uh, na bumsiamte uh, na kiang ua, “Babilon kumpipa nna na sem kei ding uh,” chi a gen mite ngaikhe kei un. “Na gam ua kipan a gamlapi a pimang a na omtheihna ding un, na kiang uah zuauthu agenkhol uh ahi; ka hon delhkhiak a na manthatna ding un.

Himahleh Babulon kumpipa hakkol pua a, nna sem nuam namte bel agam ngei uah ka omsak ding a, lei alet ding uh, huai ah ateng gige ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huan Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah hiai thu tengteng bang zel in ka gen a, “Babilon kumpipa hakkol pua unla, amah leh amite nna sem unla, hing un! Babulon kumpipa nna sem nuam lou namte tungtang Toupa'n agensa bang in bangziak a namsaute, kialte, hipite a nang leh na mite si ding na hi ua? Zawlnei na kiang ua, Babulon kumpipa nna sem kei un, chite thu ngaikhe kei un; na kiang ua zuauthu gen lel ahi ngal ua. Ka sawl ahi kei ua, ka min sial in zuauthu agen nak ua, nou leh na kiang ua thugen zawlneite ka delhkhia a, na manthat theihna ding un,” Toupa'n achi. Siampute leh hiai mipite tengteng kiang ah leng ka gen sam a; Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na kiang ua zawlnei thugen, “Ngai un, Toupa' inn a belsuante Babulon a kipan inn hon tut ahi pah ding hi,” chi mite thu ngaikhe kei un, na kiang uah zuau agen uhi. Amaute ngaikhe het kei un; Babulon kumpipa nna sem unla, hing un; bang ding in hiai khopi akisegawp dia? Himahleh zawlnei ahih ua, Toupa thu akiang ua om mah ahihleh Toupa' inn leh Judah kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem a belsuan nutsiat a omlaite Babulon a tut ahihlouhna ding in sepaihte' Toupa kiang ah ngen uhen. Sepaihte' Toupa'n, khuam sangte, dal tuipangte, kingaknate leh hiai khopi a belsuan nutsiat a omsunte, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tapa, Jekoniah leh Judah leh Jerusalem a mihoih tengteng Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon sal a dia api lai a alak val tungtang thu huchi in agen hi. Ahi, sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in Toupa' inn leh Judah kumpipa' inn leh Jerusalem a belsuan nutsiat a om lai tungtang thu agen ahi; Babulon ah lakmang ahi ding ua, amaute ka hong veh masiah huai ah a-om nilouh ding uh; amau ka latou nawn ding a, hiai mun ah ka koih nawn ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Jeremiah In Hakkol Abat

Hichi ahong hi a, huai kum mah in, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah, vaihawm pat tunglam, akum lina, akha ngana ah zawlnei Hananiah, Azzur tapa Gibeon min siampute leh mipi tengteng ma ah, Toupa' inn ah hon houpih hi. Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Babilon kumpipa hakkol ka hihtanta. Kum nih sung vengveng in Toupa' inn a belsuan Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in hiai mun a kipan a alak a, Babulon tan a apaipih tengteng, hiai mun mahmah ah ka hon tun nawn vek ding. Hiai mun ah Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tapa, Jekoniah leh Babulon a hoh Judah saltang tengteng ka pikik nawn ding; Babulon kumpipa hakkol lah hihtan ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi,” chi in. Huan zawlnei Jeremiah in siampute leh Toupa' inn a ding mipi tengteng ma ah zawlnei Hananiah kiang ah, Zawlnei Jeremiah ngei in, “Amen, Toupa'n huchibang in hih ngei hen; Toupa' inn a belsuante leh saltanna a mi tengteng Babulon a kipan hiai mun a hon tun ding a na gen Toupa'n hih ngei hen. Himahleh mipi tengteng leh na bil a ka thugen ngaikhia in. Kei leh nang ma a nidang a zawlneite'n gam tampi tung ah leh lalna gam thupi pite tung ah kidounate, thil hoihloute leh hipi thute agen sek uh. Zawlnei muanna thugenmi thugen ahong tun hun chiang in, huai zawlnei pen Toupa'n asawl ngei ahi, chih akithei mai ding,” achi hi. Huan zawlnei Hananiah in hakkol, zawlnei Jeremiah puak ala a, ahihtan hi. Mipi tengteng ma ah Hananiah in, Hichi in Toupa'n achi: “Hichibang ngei in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hakkol kum nih sung vingveng in nam tengteng ngawng a kipan ka hihtan ding, achi hi.” Huchi in zawlnei Jeremiah in apaisanta hi.

Huan zawlnei Hananiah in zawlnei Jeremiah ngawng a kipan hakkol ahihtan nung in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, Kuan inla, Hananiah kiang ah huchi in va chi in. Hichi in Toupa'n achi: “Sing hakkol na hihtan a, atang in sik hakkol na bawlsak zaw ahi. Hichi in Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi ngal a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar nna aseptheihna ding un hiai nam tengteng sik hakkol ka posak ding ahi; amah nna asem ding uh; gamnuai a gamsate leng amah ka pe lai ahi,” chi in. Huan zawlnei Jeremiah in zawlnei Hananiah kiang ah, “Ngai in, Hananiah, Toupa'n nang ahon sawl peuhmah kei hi; hiai mite zuau na muangsak lel ahi zaw.” Huaiziak in huchi in Toupa'n achi: “Ngai dih, leitung a kipan ka hon hihmang vengveng ding; Toupa tung a helna thu na gen ziak in tukum mahmah in na si ding,” achi hi. Huchi in huai kum mah, akha sagihna ah zawlnei Hananiah asita hi. Jeremiah Leh Zawlnei Hananiah

Zawlnei Jeremiah in Jerusalem a kipan a saltang upate, siampute, zawlneite, midangte, Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon a api khit, akhosuaksunte kiang a alaikhak thu hiai ahi: Kumpipa Jekoniahte, kumpinute, michilgehte, Judah leh Jerusalem heutute, mikhutsiamte, siksek mite Jerusalem apaikhiak nung ua; Shaphan tapa, Elasah leh Hilkiah tapa, Gemariahte khut ah akhak hi; amaute bel Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in Babulon gam a Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang a asawlte ahi uh. Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n saltang tengteng, Jerusalem a kipan Babulon sal dia ka pisaksate kiang ah hichi in achi: Inn lam unla, huai ah teng un, huan bawl unla, agah ne un, zi nei unla, tanute tapate nei un. Na tapate uh zi neisak unla, na tanute uh pasal neisak unla, tanu tapa aneihtheihna ding un; huai ah va pung unla, kiam lam nawt kei un; sal dia ka hon tansakna khopi hoihna ding zong unla, Toupa kiang ah ngetsak un; ama hoihna ah nou leng hoihna na mu ding uhi. Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Na lak ua zawlneite leh aisan siamte'n hon khem kei uhenla, amang mat uh leng ngaikhe sam kei un. Ka min sial in zuauthu na kiang ah agen uhi; kei sawl ahi kei uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a, Babulon a ding in kum sawmsagih achin chiang in ka hong veh ding a, na kiang ua ka thuchiam hoihtak ka tungsak ding, hiai mun ah ka hon kiksak nawn ding. Nou lam a ka lungsim putdan ka kithei hi, na hun nanung tawp ua lametna leh tunung hon pe ding in thil hoih lou hilou in hoihna ngaihtuah ka hi. Huan na hon kan ding ua, ka kiang ah na hong thum ding ua, ka hon ngaikhe ding hi.

Na hon zong ding ua, na lungtang tengteng ua na hon zon hun chiang un na hon mu ding uh. Huchi in na hon muh un ka om ding, Toupa thupawt in achi, “Na vangphatnate uh ka tungding nawn ding a, nam tengteng lak a ka hon dalhsakna mun a kipan ka hon pikhawm nawn ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; sal dia ka hon matsakna mun ngei ah ka hon tungsak nawn ding,” chi in. “Toupa'n Babulon gam ah leng zawlnei ahon bawlsak,” na chi uhi. Toupa'n David tutphah ah kumpipa tungtang thu leh hiai khopi a teng mipi tengteng, sal dia pi tel louh, na unaute uh tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, atung uah namsau, kial leh hipi in ka delhzui ding a, theipi hut, ahoih louh mahmah ziak a nek tuak het lou bang mai in ka bawl ding. Namsau, kial, hipi in ka delhzui ding a, leitung alalna gam tengteng thil mulkimhuaitak in ka bawl ding a, amau ka dalhsakna nam tengteng lak ah hamsethuak ding in, lamdangsak chiat ding in, hamsiatkhum, selphou leh gensiat hi ding in ka bawl ding hi. Phalvak a thou a ka nasem, zawlnei zang a ka thu na kiang ua ka hon tut khawk asak louh ziak un. Toupa thupawt in achi; na ngaikhe nuam ngal kei ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huaiziak in nou Jerusalem a kipan a Babulon a ka sawl, saltang tengteng aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un. “Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n Kolaiah tapa, Ahab leh Maaseiah tapa, Zedekiah ka min sial a na kiang ua zuauthu gen mite tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: Ngai un, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah ka mansak ding hi; na mitmuh ngei un athat ding

Amau thu ah Babulon gam a Judah saltang tengteng in, Babulon kumpipa'n mei a a-em Zedekiah leh Ahab bang mai in Toupa'n na tung ah hih hen, chih hamse lohna in aneihloh ding uh. Israel gam ah thil haihuaitak ahih ua, invengte uh zite ang a kawm ua, ka min sial in ka thupiak louh zuauthu agen ziak un; kei atheipa leh atheihpihpa ka hi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Shemaiah Kiang A Laikhak Nehelam mi, Shemaiah tungtang thu ah nang hichi a na gen ding ahi. Israel' Pathian, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi, Jerusalem mipi tengtengte kiang ah nangmah min mahmah in lai na khak hi. Toupa'n siampu Jehoiada sik in siampu ding in nang ahon bawl a, Toupa inkemmi na hi ua, mihai, zawlnei kichi peuhte kemte, sikkolte na butsak ding ahi. Huchi in bangziak a Anathoth a mi Jeremiah, na kiang ua zawlnei kichi na taihilh louh uh? Babulon gam ah i kiang uah, “Saltanna ding asawt ding a, inn lam unla, hiai ah teng un, huan bawl unla, agah ne un, chih thu ahon khak hi,” chi in. Saltangte Kiang A Jeremiah Laikhak Huchi in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tungta. Saltangte tengteng kiang ah, Nehelam mi Shemaiah tungtang thu ah Toupa'n huchi in achi: Ka sawl het louh in Shemaiah in na kiang uah thu agen a, zuauthu nou ahon gingtasak a, huaiziak in Toupa'nhichi in achi: Ngai un, Nehelam mi Shemaiah leh asuante ka gawt ding a, hiai mite lak ah mi khat lel leng anei kei ding, ka mite a ding a thil hoih ka hih ding amu kei ding; Toupa tung ah helna thu agen ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in khak in achi hi.

Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa a kipan thu ahong tung a; Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kiang a thu ka gen tengteng laibu ah gelh in,” chi in. Ngai in, Israel leh Judah, ka mite omdan ka kikhelsakna ding nite ahong tung lellel hi; gam, apipute uh kiang a ka piak ah ka pikik nawn ding a, aluahta ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in Toupa'n achi. Huan Judah leh Israel tungtang thu a Toupa thugen hiaite ahi: Toupa'n hichi in achi:Lauhthawnna husa ka za uh,muanna hilou,launa kikou husa. Dong vialvial unla, en vialvial dih ua,pasal in nau avei thei hia?Bangziak a numei nauvei bang zen a,pasalte'n atai uh adep chiat ua,amelte uh ahong molh khit? Maizen aw! Huai ni thupi hinamai e, akibatpih mahmah a-om kei,Jakob mangbat ni ahi mah ngut hi,himahleh hotkhiak in a-om ding. Huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, ahakkol puak ka hihtan ding a, akhau leng ka kitatsak ding; pau tuam mite'n amah nasempa ding in azang ngei nawn kei ding uh. Toupa a Pathian uh leh akumpipa uh hi ding a ka tunding ding David nna asem zaw ding uhi. Huaiziak in aw ka nasempaJakob aw, lau het ke'n aw,Israel aw, lunglel het ke'n,chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Ngai in, gamlapi a kipan in ka hong hunkhe ding a,asaltanna ua kipan na suante ngei,huan Jakob akik nawn ding a, kuamah in alausak ngei nawn kei ding uh. Nang hon hun ding in na kiang ah ka om gige ngal a,ka hon dalhsakna nam tengteng,ka beisak ding a, nang bel beisak lou in; ahun lel in ka hon gawt ding a,gawt louh in na pawt het kei ding,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a,na liamna hihdam theih ahi kei a,na meima athupi hi.

Nang hon panpih ding a-om keiua, na damna ding damdawi a-om sam kei hi. Nang hon itte'n ahon mangngilhta ua,hon limsakta kei uh;melma liamna in ka hon liamsak a,dawm lou in ka hon gawt hi,na thulimlouhna athupi a,na thilhih giloute apun ziak in. Bangziak a na liam ziak a kap na hia?Na liamna hihdam theih ahi kei,na thulimlouhna athupi a,na thilhihkhelhte apun ziak in,hiai thilte na tung a hih ka hi. Himahleh nang hon negaite,nekgaih in a-om ding ua, namelmate michih, sal dia pi in a-om ding uh,nang hon lokte loh in a-om ding ua, gallak a hon late gallak in ka la ding hi. Ka hon damsak nawn ding a,na liamnate ka hihdam ding; Toupa thupawt in achi;delhkhiak, ahon chi ua,kuamah limsak louh Zion ahi,ahon chih ziak un. Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Ngai in, Jakob puanin saltangte ka lehhei ding a,atenna munte ka zahngaihsak ding a, a-omna mual ngei ah akhopi lam ahi ding a, akumpipa' inn a-omdan ngei in adingh nawn ding. Kipahthu Genna leh nopsaknahusa, huaite a pan ahong pawtkhe ding a,Mite ka pungsak ding a,atawm kei ding uh,amau ka hih thupi ding a,aneu kei ding uh. Atate uh leng nidanglai bang in a-om ding ua,ka ma ah a-omkhopna uh akip ding a;amaute nuaisiah mite peuhmah ka gawt ding hi. Aheutupa uh amau mi mahahi ding a, avaihawmpa uhamau lak a hong pawt mah ahiding; ahon naih ding a, amah ka bawl dia, ama'n ahon naih ding;kua ahia amah thu a hon naih ngam ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huan ka mite na hi ding ua,kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding.” Ngai un, Toupa huihpi, ahehna huihpi hat mahmah apawtkheta a; migiloute lu anuai ek ding hi. Alungtang tupnate tangtun a ahih khit masiah, Toupa hehna lauhuai mahmah akikhel kei ding; ni nanungte ah na hon theisiam ding uhi. Amite Kiang A Toupa Thuchiamte

Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Namsau thah valte, gamdai gam a ka khawl tawldamsak lai in hehpihna amu ua, Israel mahmah ka tawldamsak lai in. Nidang a ka kiang a Toupa hong kilang in, hichi in achi: Ahi, it tawp lou in ka hon it a, huaiziak in lainatna in ka hon kai hi. K'on dingh thaksak ding, nungak siangthou Israel aw, dingh in kipsak na hong hi ding a, na khuangte toh kizem in na om nawn ding a, nopsak lai lamna munte ah na tel ding hi. Samaria tang dung tawn in grephuante na bawl ding a, teng mite'n aching ding ua, agahte ane ding uhi. Ephraim tanggamte ah, ching mite kikou ni atung ding hi. Thou un, Zion ah i hoh ding uh, Toupa i Pathian uh kiang ah,” chi in. Toupa'n hichi in achi,“Jakob a ding in nuam in la sa unla,nam thupipen a ding in kikoukhia un, puang unla,pahtawi unla,‘Toupa Israel khosuaksun,na mite hondam in, chi un. Ngai un, mal gam a kipan ka hon pi ding,kawlmong tawp a kipan ka kaikhawm ding,mittaw, khebai,numei naupaite,nauvei lelte toh, mipi tampitak ahong tungkhawm ding uh. Khitui toh ahong pai ding ua,khamuangtak in ka pi ding,tui luang lamte ah ka vaksak ding a, akisuihlouhnading uh lamtangte ah;Israel a ding in pa ka hi a,Ephraim bel ka tachil ahi. Aw namte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia unla, tui gei gam gamlapi ah puang unla,Israel dalhsakpa'n apikhawm nawn ding a,Belamchingpa'n abelamte akep bang in akem ding chi in. Jakob bel Toupa'n atankhia a,asang a hat a pan ahunkheta hi. Zion vum ah lasa in ahong pai ding ua, Toupa hoihna ah akipak ding ua, buhte, uainte, thaute,belam leh ganhon noute tungte ah akipak ding uh;ahinna uh tui avak huan bang ahi ding a,tangtawn in alungkham nawn kei ding uh.
