Huan nungak siangthoute kipak a lamin anuam ding ua, tangvalteleng atek-akhang in anuamding ua, alusuunna uh kipahna ka suaksak in ka khamuan ding,adahna ua pan ka kipaksak ding. Siampute hinna thau in kataisak ding a, ka hoihna inka mite leng atai ding uh,”chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Israel Tung A Toupa Lainatna Toupa'n hichi in achi:“Ramah ah husa aza ua,misi ngai a kap huphup,Rakil in atate akah a, atate a-om nawn louh ziak inakhamuan theih kei hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi:Kap lou ding in na aw dek inla,na khitui hul hen, na thilhih inkipahman anei ding chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Gal gam a kipan inahong pai nawn ding uhi. Na hun tawp lam a ding inlametna a-om a, amau gam ahna tate ahong kik nawn ding uh,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ephraim kah leh mauna kaza hi, nang na hon gawt a,bawngtaltuai sawi bang mai in sawi ka hi a,na kiang ah hon kiksak inla, ka kik ding hi, Toupa ka Pathian na hi ngal a. N'on kiksak khit nung in ka kisik a,na hon thuzoh nung in ka pheipi ka beng a, ka zum a,ahi, ka tuailai minsiat thuak in ka am ahai hi,” achi hi. Ephraim, ka tapa deihtak,ka nau deihtak ahih ziak hia amah ka thunun teng a ka lungtang a aten tinten nak?Huchi in ka lungtang in amahalainat sek a, atung ah zahka ngai ding,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Lampi chiamtehna kibawl inla,nang a ding in lampi kawkmuhna phut in, na va pawtna lam lampi,lampi pen lam ngei chiamteh tinten in; aw nungak siangthou Israel, hongkik nawn in, na khopi ngei ah. Aw, nang tanu nungtawn,bang tan ahia na vialvak vak ding?

Toupa'n lei ah thil thak asiamta a,numei in pasal ahum zawta hi.Hun Hong Tung Ding A Israel Lohchinna Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Asaltanna ua kipan ka pikik hun chiang in Judah gam leh akhopite ah hichibang paukam azang nawn ding uh;“Aw, diktatna tenna mun,Aw tang siangthou, Toupa'n hon vualzawl hen,” chih. Huai ah Judahte leh akhopi uah mi tengteng atengkhawm ding ua, lounei mite leh ganvul mite toh. Mibahte ka taisakta a, milungkham peuhmahte leng ka hihhalhta hi. Huchi in ka hong halh a, ka nga vialvial a, mang hoihtak ana hi. Ngai dih, nite ahong tung ding hi, Israel inkote leh Judah inkote ah mihing chi leh gan chi ka tuh ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huan hichi ahi ding a, amau botkhia a, hihzan leh paikhia a, hihmang a, hihgim ding a ka tan bang in amau ding hoihsak ding leh tungding ding in ka enkhe nawn ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai nite in,“Pate'n grep thuk ane ua,atate uh ha azau a,achi nawn ngei kei ding uh.” Michih in amau gitlouhna asihpih zaw ding ua, grep thuk ne peuhmah ha azau ding hi. Israel Tunding Nawnna “Huai hun chiang in kei Israel inkuante Pathian ka hi ding a, amaute leng ka mite ahi ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Apipute uh Aigupta gam a kipan a pikhe ding a akhut uh ka let ni a ka thukhun bang hilou in, amaute a dia apasal uh ka hih in leng ka thukhun abohsia ua, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai ni khit chiang a Israel inkote kiang a ka thukhun ding bel hiai ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi

asunggil uah ka dan ka koih ding a, alungtang uah ka gelh lai ding a, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding a, amau ka mite ahi ding uh; Kuamah in, “Toupa thei in, chi in amau invengte leh amau unau ahilh kei ding ua; aneupen a kipan in alianpen tan in avek un ahon thei chiat ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi, “Abohsiatna uh ka ngaidam ding a, akhelhna uh leng ka theigige kei ding,” chi in. Hichi in Toupa,sun vaksak ding a ni pepa,kha leh aksite a dia dante sehsak a,zan vaksak ding a pepa,tuikihotte ging honhon ding a tuipi tokthoupa'n achi hi;amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi. “Hiai dansehte ka ma a kipanamanleh Israel suanteka ma a kipan in nam hihatawp den sam ding uh,”chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Tunglam van teh theih ahih a, lei kingaknate zonkhiak theih ahihleh Israel suante athilhihsate uhziak in ka paimang sam ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Ngai in, nite ahong tung lellel hi, Hananel insung a kipan in kulh ning kongpi tan in Toupa a ding in khopi lamkhiak ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Atehna khau bel Gareb mual tan in tangtak in apai zinzen ding a, Goath lam ah akawi ding hi. Misi luang leh vut paihna phaizang pumpi leh gamlak tengteng, Kidron lui phaizang tan in, suahlam pang Sakol Kongpi ning tan Toupa ding a tan ding ahi; huai tuh chikchiang mah a hihzak leh phelsiat ahi nawn kei ding hi.”

Judah Kumpipa Zedekiah akum sawmna, huai tuh Nebukadnezzar akum sawm-le-giatna ahi, Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung. Huai in Babulon kumpipa sepaihhon in Jerusalem a-um ua; huan Judah kumpipa' inn ngakmi huangsung ah zawlnei Jeremiah atang hi. Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in, “Bangdia, Toupa'n hichi in achi: ‘Ngai in, hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe ding a ala ding; Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leng Kaldai mite khut a kipan apawt kei ding, Babulon kumpipa khut a matsak in a-om zaw ding a, kimaituah in akihoupih ding ua, amit ngei in amel amu ding; Zedekiah bel Babulon gam ah api ding a, amah ka veh mateng huai ah a-om nilouh ding; Kaldaite dou mah le uchin na lohching kei ding uh? ” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huan Jeremiah in, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: Ngai in, na paneu Shallum tapa Hanamel in Anathoth a ka lou nang a ding in lei in, “Gouluah thei na hih ziak in na hon leisak ding ahi chi in na kiang ah ahong pai ding,” chi in. Huchi in ka paneu tapa Hanamel in, “Anathoth a ka lou hon leisak tanla, gouluah thei na hih ziak in na tat ding ahi, nang a ding in lei mai in,” achi a. Huchi in hiai Toupa thu ahi chih ka theita hi. Huan ka paneu tapa Hanamel Anathoth a lou ka leita a, dangka ka buksak a, adangkasik shekel sawmsagih tak ahi. Huchi in lai ka gelh a, ka hilh a, theihpihmi ka sam a, dangka pen bukna ah ka khai a. Kileina lai akileidan leh a-omdan gelhna bilh leh bilhlouhte ka la a.

Huan ka paneu tapa Hanamel mitmuh in leh theihpihmi kileina amin tuang teite mitmuh in leh ngakmi huangsung a Juda tute tengteng ma ah Mahseiah tapa Neriah tapa Baruk ka pia hi. Baruk bel ama uah thu ka pia a, Israel' Pathian sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Hiai lai, kileina lai, bilhlouhte la inla, a-om sawttheihna ding in leibel ah koih in. Israel' Pathian, sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a; hiai gam ah innte, loute, grephuante mite'n ahon lei nawn ding uh,” chi in.Jeremiah Thumna Huan Neriah tapa Baruk kiang ah aleina lai ka piak nung in Toupa kiang ah ka thum hi. Aw Toupa Pathian, ngai in, na thilhihtheihna thupi leh na khut zak in lei leh van na bawl a; nang a ding in thilhih haksa lua a-om het kei hi. Sang tampite kiang ah hehpihna na musak sek a, pate thulimlouhna anung ua atate uh tung ah na thuk a; aw Pathian thupi leh thilhihthei; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi; thilgel siamtak, thilhihtheitak, mihing tate omdan tengteng muchianpa; michih a-omdan uleh athilhih uh bang a thukpa; Aigupta gam a chiamtehnate leh thillamdang hihpa, tuni tan a Israel leh midang lak a hih zelpa, tuni bang mahmah a min kibawlpa. Na mi Israelte, Aigupta gam a kipan chiamtehnate, thillamdangte, khut hat leh ban zak leh thil mulkimhuai thupitak in na pikhia hi. Hiai khuaizu leh nawitui a luang gam apipute uh kiang a kichiam a piak na chiam na peta a; ahong lut ua, aluah vek ua, himahleh na paukam taksang lou in, na dan azui kei uh; hih ding a na piakte ahih kei ua, huaiziak in hiai thil hoih lou tengteng atung uah na tungsak hi. En dih, khopi lakna ding a panmun leivupte ahong omta ve

namsaute, kialte, hipite ziak in khopi leng asimmi Kaldaite khut ah piak ahita; na gensa ahong tungta; en dih, na muta hi. Ahi a lah, Aw Toupa Pathian, nang ka kiang ah, “Na sum in lou lei inla, thu thei mite sam in; khopi bel Kaldaite khut a piak ahita, na chi,” achi hi. Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi: “Ngai in, kei Toupa sa nei tengteng Pathian ka hi, kei a ding in haksa lua a-om a hia? chi in. Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in hiai khopi Kaldaite khut ah leh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut ah ka pe ding a, ala ding hi. Huchi in hiai khopi simmi Kaldaite ahong pai ding ua, hiai khopi ahal ding ua, akang ding, hon hehsak ding a Baal kiang a gimlim latna, pathian dangte kiang a dawn ding lat butkhiakna inn tung nei inn tengteng toh. Israel suante leh Judah tate'n atuailai chik ua kipan in ka mitmuh in thil hoih lou ngen ahih uh; Israel suante'n akhut nasepte un ahon hehsak phet uhi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hiai a khopi alam tung ua kipan tutan in hon hehsaktu leh hon thangpaisaktu ahi nilouh ngal a; ka ma a kipan ka hihman vengveng theihna ding in; Israel suante leh Judah tate hon hehsak ding a athil hoih lou hihsate tengteng uh ziak in, amau, akumpipate uh, aheutute uh, asiampute uh, azawlneite uh, Judah mite Jerusalem luah mite tengteng toh. Jeremiah In Lou Alei Kei lam hong nga lou in adeksah uh ahon ngat ua, tawlnga lou hial in sinsakta mah leng, sinsakna lasawn ding in angeingaih kei uhi. Ka min tuanna inn hihthanghuai ding in akihhuainate uh akoih zaw uhi.

Ben Hinnom Phaizang a Baal biakna mun sangte alamkhia ua, atanute uh, atapate uh Molek kiang a mei a apaihna ding un, Judahte thil gilou hihsak ding a hiai kihhuai ahih uh ka thupiak ahi het kei hi, ka lungsim ah leng alut ngei kei hi.Lametna Thuchiam “Huaiziak in tu in zaw Toupa Israel' Pathian in, ‘Hiai khopi, namsau, kial leh hipi in Babulon kumpipa khut ah piak ahita, na chih nak uh thu ah hichi in achi’: Ngai dih, ka hehna, ka lung hihlouhna, ka thangpaihna thupi mahmahte a amau ka delh manna gam teng a kipan ka pikhawm ding a, hiai mun ka hon tun ding a, bittak in ka omsakta ding. Huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei amaute Pathian ka hi ding. Tangtawn a ahon lauhdet theihna ding un lungtang kibang leh omdan kibang ka bawlsak ding; amau leh anung ua atate uh hoihna ding in. Akiang uah tangtawn thukhun ka bawl ding a, amau lehngatsan lou in, ahon launa ka hih gige ding; ahon kiheisanlouhna ding un alungtangte uah ahon lauhna uh ka koih ding. Ahi, ahoihna uh hih ka kipah lam ahi ding a, ka lungtang tengteng in hiai gam ah ka phut ngeingei ding. “Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mite tung a thil hoih lou thupi mahmah ka tut bangtak in amaute kiang a thil hoih ka chiam tengtengte ka tungsak ngeingei ding. Gam kisegawp, Kaldaite khut a piaksa, mi leh sa om nawn lou, na chih gam uah loute akilei nawn ding uhi. Benjamin gamte ah, Jerusalem khopi kim munte ah, Judah gam khopite leh simlam khopite ah mite'n dangka in lou alei ding ua, leina lai agelh ding ua, abilh ding ua, theihpih mite asam ding uhi; a-omdan uh ka hei ding hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.”

Huan Jeremiah kiang ah, vengmi huangsung a khum a a-om lai in, anihveina ding in Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. Lei bawlpa Toupa, kip ding a bawlpa Toupa'n, amin Toupa ahi, chi in achi: Hon sam lechin, ka hon dawng ding a, thil thupi leh thil kisel na theih ngei louh ka hon ensak ding. Israel' Pathian Toupa'n hiai khopi innte leh Judah kumpipa' inn te, namsau leh leivupte lak a venna bawl ding a aphelsiat uh tungtang thu ah hichi in achi: Kaldaite sual ding in amau ahong kuan ua, ka hehna leh thangpaihna a ka thah luangte in adimsak zaw ding uh, agitlouhna tengteng ziak un hiai khopi lak ah ka mel ka na sel hi. Ngai in, damna leh hihdamna ka hon tun ding a, ka hon damsak ding; muanna leh bitna kiptak ka hon musak ding. Judah omdan leh Israel omdan ka hei ding a, atung a ka dinsak bang in ka dingsak nawn ding. Huan athulimlouhna uh, ka tung a athilhihkhelhna lak ua kipan ka sawpsiang ding a, athulimlouhna uh, ka tung a athilhihkhelhna uleh ka tung a atatleknate tengteng uh ka ngaidam ding. Huchi in hiai khopi lei a nam tengteng, amau a dia ka hihhoih tengteng mu mite ma ah kei a ding in nopna, pahtawina leh thupina ahi ding a; hoihna muanna atung ua ka tut tengteng ziak in lau in aling ding uhi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mun, Judah khopi a mi leh sa om nawn lou a loihsa, Jerusalem kholak a mi leh sa leh tengmi om lou a loihsa, achih uah: “Sepaihte' Toupa kiang ah kipahthu gen un.

Toupa lah ahoih ngal a;azahngaihna lah tangtawn in a-om ding hi,chi mite aw leh Toupa' inn a kipahna kithoihna hon tawi lasa mite aw leh mou awte mouneipa awte ahon za nawn ding uh, atung a a-om bang in gam ka omsak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai mun, mi leh sa om lou khop a loihsa leh akhopi tengteng ah, belamchingmi abelamhon uh kualsak mite tenna mun ahong om nawn ding. Tanggam khopi ah, phaigam khopi ah, simlam khopi ah, Benjamin gam ah, Jerusalem kim munte ah, Judah khopi ah, amau simmi khut nuai ah belamte apai zungzung ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai in, nite ahong tung lellel hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, Israel inkote tungtang ah leh Judah inkote tungtang a thuhoihtak ka na gen pen ka tangtungsak ding. Huai nite leh huai hun chiang in diktatna Hiang David kiang ah ka khangkhesak ding, huai gam ah diktak leh diktattak in vai ahawm ding. Huai nite in Judah humbit in a-om ding, Jerusalem bittak in a-om ding; huan, amin put ding hiai ahi ding, “Toupa i diktatna,” chih. Toupa'n hichi in achi: David in Israel inkote laltutphah a tu ding mi atasam ngei kei ding; Siampu Levi chite'n leng ka ma a halmang na lan ding leh buh-le-bal thil lan ding leh kithoih zel ding in mi atasam sam kei ding. Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka sun seh leh ka zan seh thu na phel theih ua, sun leh zan ahuntak ua om lou ding a na hihtheih uleh, ka nasempa David kiang a ka thukhun leng alaltutphah a tu ding tapa aneihlouhna ding a hihsiat ahi phet ding hi; Levi chite, siampute, ka nasem mite kiang ah leng.

Van a omte sim seng louh leh tuipi a piaunel sim seng louh bang mai in ka nasempa David suan leh Levi chi kei na hon sepsak mite ka pungsak ding. Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a: “Inkuan nih Toupa'n atelte apaimangta,” chi a hiai mite'n agen uh na ngaihtuah ngei kei a hia? Amitmuh ua nam chih tham ahihlouhna ding un hichibang in ka mite amusit uhi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ka sun leh zan thuseh a-omdet louh a, lei leh van omdante ka seh louh ahihleh, Jakob suante leh ka nasempa David suante ka paimang ding, Abraham, Isak leh Jakob suante tung ah vaihawmmi asuan a kipan ka la kei ding; a-omdante uh ka kiheisak in atung uah zahngaihna nei ding ka hi ngal a. Tunding Nawnna Thuchiam

Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzarte, asepaihhon tengteng, amah thunuai a lei a vaihawmna gam tengteng leh mipi tengteng in Jerusalem leh akhopi tengteng asual lai ua Toupa kiang a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung: Israel' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah va houpih in, hichi in achi: Ngai in, hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka pe ding a, mei in ahal ding; akhut a kipan na suakta het kei ding; mat na hi ding a, akhut ah ahon pe ding ua, na mit ngei in Babulon kumpipa na mu ding a, paukam ngei in na kihoupih ding ua, Babulon gam ah na hoh ding hi. Himahleh, aw Judah kumpipa, Zedekiah, Toupa thu ngaikhe zel dih; na tungtang thu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: Namsau in na si kei ding a, muangtak in ahi na sih ding; na ma a kumpipa masa, na pipute gimlim ahalsak bang un, nang leng ahon halsak ding uh; ahon suun ding ua, “Ehe heh, ka pu,” chi in. Thu ka khahta hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in. Zawlnei Jeremiah in hiai thu tengteng Jerusalem a Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah agen a; Babulon kumpipa sepaihhonte'n Jerusalem leh Judah khopi om lai tengteng, Lakish leh Azekah asual lai un; Judah khopi lak a kulh neite hiaite kia ahita uhi.Sikhate Zekhemna Nasep Kumpipa Zedekiah in Jerusalem a om mipi tengteng kiang ah, michih in asikhanu toh asikhapate uh, Hebru nu hiam Hebru pa hiam ahih uleh, akhah ding uh ahi; Michih in Hebru pasal hiam numei hiam sal a aneih peuhmah asuahtaksak ding ahi, kuamah in ama Juda sanggampih sal a aneihlouhna ding in.

Michih in nasemnu hiam nasempa hiam akhah ding ahi, amau nna sepsak in kuamah a-om ding uh ahi kei, chih thukhun pommi heutu tengteng leh mipi tengteng in thukhun amang ua, akhahta uhi. Himahleh huai nung in akihei ua, anasemnu uh leh anasempa uh akhahsate uh akaikik ua, athunuai uah nasemmi ding in akoih nawn uh. Huaiziak in Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Aigupta gam, saltanna inn a kipan ka pikhiak ni in na pipute uh kiang ah thukhun ka bawl a, michih in a-unaupa, Hebru mi, akiang a zuaksa, kum guk a na nasemsa, akum sagihna tawp in akhah ding ahi, chi in; na pipute un bel ahon ngaikhe kei ua, abil uh adoh sam kei uh. Tu in noute'n, na hong kihei ua, michih in a-invengpa kiang a noplenna thu puang in ka mitmuh in thil dik na hon hihta ua; ka min tam inn ah ka ma ah thukhun na hong kibawlta ua; himahleh na kihei nawn ua, ka min na hihbuah un a-ut bangtak ua na khahsa nung uh, na sikhanu leh na sikhapa uh na pikik nawn ua, na thunuai uah nasemmi ding bang sikhanute ding bang in na koih nawn uh. “Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: Michih ama unau leh ama invengte kiang a noplenna thu puang ding in ka thu na ngaikhe kei ua; ngai un, ke'n na kiang uah noplenna thu ka puang hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; namsaute, hipite, kialte in ahi ding; lei a kumpigamte tengteng lak a paihkhiak ding in ka hon bawl ding hi. Huan ka thukhun bohsete, ka ma a bawngnou atphel kikal a paisuak hial a thuchiam a tangtungsak lou mi.

Judah heutute leh Jerusalem heutute, michilgehte, siampute, mipi tengteng, bawngnou atphel kikal a paite; amelmate uleh ahinna zong mite khut ah ka pe ding a; huchi in aluangte uh tung a leng vasate leh lei a gamsate an ding lel ahi ding. Huan Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh alawite amelmate uleh ahinna zong mite leh Babulon kumpipa sepaihhon, nou hon paisansate khut ah ka pe ding hi. Ngai un, hiai khopi a hong kik nawn ding in thu ka pe ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, huchi in asual ding ua, ala ding ua, mei in ahal ding uh; luahmi om lou in Judah khopite ka hihgam vek ding,” chi in. Zedekiah Vauhilhna

Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm lai a Toupa kiang a kipan a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung in: “Rekab inkote kiang ah hoh in va houpih inla, Toupa inn a dantan khat ah pilut inla, uain dawn ding pia in,” achi a. Huan Habazziniah tapa, Jeremiah tapa, Jaazaniah leh a-unaute, atapa tengteng Rekab inkote tengteng toh ka pi a; Pathian mipa Igdali tapa Hanan tate dantan, Toupa inn ah ka pilut a; huai dantan bel heutute dantan chin kongpi ngakmi Shallum tapa Maaseiah dantan tung a om ahi. Huchi in Rekab inkuante tapate ma ah belhbute, noute uain dim ka tung a, akiang uah, “Uain dawn un,” ka chi hi. Amau bel, “Uain ka dawn kei hial ding uh; kou hon suangpa Rekab tapa Jonadab in, ‘Noumau leh na suante un leng tangtawn a uain na dawn ding uh ahi kei; inn na lam un haichi na tuh un, grephuan leng na bawl un na nei ding uh ahi sam kei hi; na damsung nite un puanin a na ten zawk ding uh ahi, na omna gam ua na damsawt theihna ding un, chi in thu ahon pia hi. Huchi in kou hon suangpa Rekab tapa Jonadab in paukam a thu hon thukhah tengteng, ka damsung ua kou leh ka zite uh, ka tapate uleh ka tanute un uain dawn louh ding un, ka tenna inn uh lam louh ding, grephuan hiam lou hiam haichi hiam neih louh ding tan in ka zui uhi. Puaninte ah ka teng zaw ua, kou hon suangpa Jonadab thupiak tengteng mang in ka zui vek uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in gam ahong sual lai in kou, ‘Kisa un, Kaldai sepaihhonte leh Siria sepaihhonte lau ziak in Jerusalem ah i hoh ding uh, ka chi ua, huchi in Jerusalem ah ka tengta uhi,” achi uhi. Huan Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ahong tung nawn a Israel' Pathian Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Judah gam a mite leh Jerusalem a mi tengte kiang ah va gen inla, “Ka thute ngaikhe ding in sinsakna na sang kei ding uh maw? chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Rekab tapa Jonadab thu, atapate kiang a apiak, uain dawn louh ding pen azui ua, tuni tan in bangmah adawn kei ua, amau suangpa thupiak azui mahmah uh hi; ke'n bel phalvak a thou in na kiang uah thu ka gen a, himahleh na hon ngaikhe kei uh. Ka nasem zawlneite phalvak a thou in na kiang uah ka sawl a, michih na omdan gilou ua kipan hong kik vek unla, na thilhihte uh bawlhoih unla, pathian dangte zaw a-nna uh sem ding in zui kei unla; nou leh na pipute uh kiang a gam ka piak ah na teng ding uh chi in; himahleh na bil uh na doh kei ua, na hon ngaikhe sam kei uh. Rekab tapa Jonadab suante'n amau suangpa thupiak azui ua, hiai mite'n zaw ahon ngaikhe kei uh. Huaiziak Toupa Israel' Pathian sepaihte' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Judah leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah thil hoih lou atung ua hong tung ding ka gen khiaksate ka hon tun ding; akiang uah thu ka gen a, angaikhe kei ua, amau ka sam a, ahon dawng sam kei uh,” chi in. Huchi in Jeremiah in Rekab suante kiang ah, Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na pa Jonadab thupiak na zui ua, athupawt tengteng bang a na hih ziak un; Rekab tapa Jonadab in tangtawn in ka ma a dingh ding mi atasam ngei kei ding,” chi in Sepaihte' Toupa Israel' Pathian in achi hi. Jeremiah Leh Rekabte

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm akum lina ah hiai thu Toupa kiang a kipan Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi: “Laibuzial la inla, hiai ah na kiang a thu ka gen tengteng, Israel tungthu, Judah tungthu, nam tengteng tungthu, na kiang a thu ka gen ni a kipan, Josiah hun lai a kipan, tuni tanpha a thu gelh in. Judah inkote'n atung ua thil hoih lou hih ka tup tengteng, angaikhia un michih in a-omdan gilou uh ahei thei khamoh kei ding uh, athulimlouhna uh leh akhelhna uh ka ngaihdam theihna ding in,” achi hi. Huchi in Jeremiah in Neriah tapa Baruk asam a, huchi in Baruk in Toupa thu tengteng, akiang a agensa Jeremiah paukam a kipan laibuzial ah agelh hi. Huan Jeremiah in Baruk kiang ah, “Khakkhum ka hi a, Toupa' inn ah ka hoh thei kei, huaiziak in nang hoh inla, Toupa thu ka paukam a kipan laibuzial a na gelh an ngawl ni in, Toupa' inn a mipite bil a zak in va simkhia in; akhopi ua kipan a hong pawt Judahte tengteng bil a zak in leng na simkhiak ding ahi. Michih in a-omdan gilou uh hei in, Toupa ma a hehpihna angetna uh, atun thei kha zenzen ding uam, hiai mite tung a hehna leh thangpaihna Toupa'n agenkhiak lah athupi mahmah ngal a,” chi in thu apia hi. Huchi in Neriah tapa Baruk in zawlnei Jeremiah thupiak tengteng bang in Toupa' inn a Toupa thu laibu a om asimta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim vaihawm akum ngana, akha kuana ah Jerusalem mi tengteng leh Judah khopi a kipan a Jerusalem a hong pai tengteng in an ngawl thu apuangta uhi.

Huan Baruk in Toupa kongpi thak lutna ah, um sung tungnungzaw a laigelhmi Shaphan tapa Gemariah dantan, Toupa' inn a om ah Jeremiah thu laibu a om, mi tengteng bil azak in asim hi.Laibuzial Nasemte Kiang A Simna Huan Shaphan tapa Gemariah tapa Mikaiah in laibu a om Toupa thu tengteng ana zak in, Kumpipa' inn ah ahohsuk a, laigelhmi dantan ah alut a, huan, ngai dih, huai ah heutu tengteng ana tu ua, laigelhmi Elishamate, Shemaiah tapa Delaiah, Akbor tapa Elnathan, Shaphan tapa Gemariah, Hananiah tapa Zedekiah leh heutu tengteng. Huan Mikaiah in mite bil a zak in Baruk in laibu asim thu ana zak tengteng ahilh hi. Huan heutu tengteng in Kushi tapa, Shelemiah tapa Nethaniah tapa Jehudi Baruk kiang ah asawl ua, akiang ah, “Mite bil a zak a na sim laibu tawi in hong pai in,” chi ding in. Huchi in Neriah tapa Baruk bel laibuzial tawi in akiang uah ahong hi. Akiang ah, “Tu inla, ka bil ua ka zak ngei un sim dih ve leh,” achi ua, huchi in Baruk in abil ua azak un asimta hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, huai thute azak uleh lau in aki-entuah chiat ua, Baruk kiang ah, “Hiai thu tengteng kumpipa ka hilh ngeingei ding uh,” achi uhi. Baruk kiang ah, “Hiai thu tengteng na kam a kipan bangchidan a gelh na hia, hon hilh in?” chi in adong uhi. Baruk in, “Hiai thu tengteng apaukam in ahon hilh a, laitui in laibu ah ka gelh mai ahi,” chi in adawng hi. Heutute'n Baruk kiang ah, “Kuan unla, Jeremiah toh kibu un; kuamah in na omna uh thei kei hen,” achi uhi.Kumpipa Jehoiakim In Laibuzial Ahalna Huchi in huangsung ah kumpipa kiang ah alut ua; laibuzial bel laigelhmi Elishama dantan ah akoih ua

athu tengteng paukam in kumpipa ahilh uh. Huchi in kumpipa'n laibuzial la ding in Jehudi asawl a, laigelhmi Elishama dantan a kipan ala uhi. Huan Jehudi in kumpipa leh kumpipa kiang a dingh heutu tengteng bil a zak in asim hi. Akha kuana ahi a, kumpipa bel aphalbi inn ah atu a, ama a meihol thuk ah kuang a-om hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jehudi in khep thum hiam khep li hiam a sim in kumpipa in atemta in alaibuzial a-attan a, meikhuk ah pum katmang vek ding in alawnlut zel hi. Kumpipa leh anasem mite'n hiai thu tengteng ngaikhe mite kuamah alau kei ua, apuansilh uh leng abotkek sam kei uh. Huai phet hilou in Elnathan leh Delaiah leh Gemariahte'n laibuzial hal lou ding in kumpipa kiang ah angen ua, himahleh angaikhe nuam kei. Huan kumpipa'n kumpipa tapa Jerahmeel leh Azriel tapa Seraiah leh Abdeel tapa Shelemiah Baruk laigelhmi leh zawlnei Jeremiah man ding in thu apia a; himahleh Toupa'n amau asel hi.Jeremiah In Laibuzial Dang Agelh Huan laibuzial leh Jeremiah kam a kipan Baruk in agelh tengteng thute kumpipa'n ahalmang khit in Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung hi. Laibuzial dang la inla, laibuzial masa a thu tengteng, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in ahal mangsate gelh nawn vek in. Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tungtang thu ah huchi in na gen ding hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Babilon kumpipa hong pai a, hiai gam hihsia in, hiai mi leh sa ahihmang vek ding chih, bangziak a huchibang thu gelh na hia? chi in laibuzial na halta hi. Huaiziak in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim tungthu ah Toupa'n hichi in achi: David tutphah a tu ding mi anei kei ding; aluang leng sun nisa ah leh zan vuk nuai ah paihkhiak ahi ding.

Athulimlouhna uh ziak in amah leh asuante leh anasem mite ka gawt ding; amau leh Jerusalem a tengte leh Judah mite tung ah atung ua ka phuansa, angaihkhiak kei uleh thil hoih lou tengteng ka hon tun ding,” chi in. Huchi in Jeremiah in laibuzial dang ala a, Neriah tapa Baruk laigelhmi apia a, ama'n huai ah Jeremiah kam a kipan laibu gelhsa tengteng, Jehoiakim in mei a akhulmangsa thute agelh a; huai ban ah akibatpih thu tampi abehlap lai hi. Tempul Ah Baruk In Laibuzial Asim

Huan Josiah tapa Zedekiah, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in, Judah gam kumpipa ding a abawl Jehoiakim tapa Koniah sik in vai ahawmta hi. Himahleh amah leh anasem mite leh agam a mite'n Toupa thu zawlnei Jeremiah kam a gen angaikhe kei uh. Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Shelemiah tapa Jehukal leh Maaseiah tapa siampu Zephaniah bel zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah, “Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah hon thumsak in,” chi ding in asawl hi. Jeremiah bel mipite lak ah a-utut in avak thei lai a; tanin ah lah akoih ngal kei ua. Pharaoh sepaihhonte Aigupta a kipan ahong pawtkheta ua; huchi in Kaldaite Jerusalem um mite'n atanchin azak un Jerusalem atawpsanta uhi. Huchi in Toupa thu zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a, Toupa Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Judah kumpipa hon dong ding a nou hon sawl kiang ah, ‘Ngai in, Pharaoh sepaihhon, nou hon panpih ding a hong paite amau gam Aigupta ah akik nawn ding uh. Kaldaite hong pai in, hiai khopi asual ding ua, ala ding ua, mei in ahal ding uh. “Kaldaite'n ahon paisan ngei ding uh,” chi in nou kikhem kei un, ahon paisan kei ding uh. Noute hon sual Kaldai sepaihte bawl ek mah le uchin, alak ua miliam omsunte kia in leng amau puanin a kipan hong thou in hiai khopi mei in ahal thouthou ding uh, chi in na gen ding ahi, ” chi in.Suangkul Ah Jeremiah Khum In A-om Huan hichi ahong hi a, Pharaoh sepaihhonte lau ziak a Kaldai sepaihhonte'n Jerusalem apaisan lai un, Jeremiah in mite lak a atantuan la ding in Benjamin gam a lut ding in Jerusalem apawtsan hi. Benjamin kongpi atun in ngakmi heutu Hananiah tapa Shelemiah tapa amin Irijah ana om a

huai in, “Kaldaite kiang a kipia na hi,” chi in zawlnei Jeremiah ana man hi. Jeremiah in, “Zuau ahi; Kaldaite kiang ah ka kipe kei,” achi a; himahleh angaikhe kei a, huchi in Irijah in Jeremiah ana man a, heutute kiang ah apia hi. Huan heutute Jeremiah tung ah aheh mahmah ua, asat ua, laigelhmi Jonathan inn ah akhum uh; huai tan inn ding a azat him uh ahi. Huchi in Jeremiah lei nuai kokhuk ah alut a, ni tampitak a-om nung in kumpipa Zedekiah in asamkhia hi. Huan kumpipa'n a-inn ah aguk in akiang ah, “Toupa kiang a kipan thu banghiam bek a-om hia?” chi in adong hi. Jeremiah in, “Om e,” achi hi. Akiang ah, “Babilon kumpipa khut ah matsak in na om ding,” achi lai hi. Jeremiah in kumpipa Zedekiah kiang ah, “Nang hiam na nasemmi hiam hiai mite tung ah bang thil ahia ka hihkhelh a na hon matsak? Nang kiang a ‘Babilon kumpipa nang leh hiai gam dou ding in ahong pai kei ding, chi a thugenmi na zawlneite koi a om ahita ua? Aw, ka pu, kumpipa ngaikhia in, ka hon ngen ahi, ka ngetna na sang in, ka hon ngen hi; laigelhmi Jonathan inn ah hon kiksak nawn ke'n, huai ah ka va si kha ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa Zedekiah in thu apia a, Jeremiah bel ngakmi huangsung ah atangsak a, tanghou bawl mite kongzing a kipan niteng in tanghou beu khat, khopi a tanghou a-om lai siah apia ua, huchibang in Jeremiah bel ngakmi huangsung ah a-om nilouh hi. Jeremiah Kiang A Zedekiah Ngetna

Huan Mattan tapa Shephatiah leh Pashur tapa Gedaliah leh Shelemiah tapa Jukal leh Malkijah tapa Pashurte'n, mipi tengteng kiang ah Jeremiah in, “Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai khopi a om nilouhte zaw namsau, kial leh hipi in asi ding ua, Kaldaite kiang a kipia bel ahing ding uh, ahinna akihumbit ding a ahing ding,” chi in. Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hiai khopi Babulon kumpipa sepaihhonte khut ah piak ahi ngei ding a, ala ding, chi a agen angaikhia uhi. Huchi in heutute'n kumpipa kiang ah, “Hiai mi hihlup hi hen, ka hon ngen uh; ama'n akiang ua hiai thute gen in hiai khopi a galkapmi omlaite leh mipi tengteng tha hat lousak in; hiai mi'n hiai mipite hoihna azong kei a, asiatna azong zaw,” achi uhi. Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in, “Ngai un, amah na khut ua om ahi; kumpipa'n na deih louh lam uh hihthei ahi sam a,” achi hi. Huchi in Jeremiah api ua, ngakmi huangsung a om kumpipa tapa Malkijah tuibem ah apailut ua; Jeremiah bel khau in akhesuk ua, huai tuibem ah buannawi kia lou ngal tui a-om kei a; buannawi ah Jeremiah akia hi.Ebed-melek In Jeremiah Ahunkhia Huan Ethiopia mi, michilgeh kumpipa' inn a om sek Ebed-melek in Jeremiah tuibem ah akoih uh chih ana za a; huchih lai in kumpipa bel Benjamin kongpi ah atu a; Ebed-melek bel kumpipa' inn a kipan apawt a, kumpipa kiang ah, “Ka pu, kumpipa, hiai mite'n zawlnei Jeremiah tuibem a ana paihkhiak uh thil gilou thupi mahmah hih ahi uh, gilkial ziak in a-omna mun ah si mai ding akei maw; khopi ah tanghou a-om nawn kei a,” achi a.

Huan kumpipa'n Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek thu apia a, “Hiai a kipan in mi sawmthum pi inla, tuibem a kipan in asih ma in zawlnei Jeremiah va lakhia un,” chi in. Huchi in Ebed-melek in mite api a, kumpipa dangka inn nuai ah alut ua, puanak lui paihte leh puansilh siate alakhia ua, tuibem ah Jeremiah kiang ah khau in akhaikhesuk uhi. Huan Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Hiai puanak luite leh puansilh siate na lenuai ah khau in gakkhum in,” achi hi. Huan Jeremiah in huchibang in ahih hi. Huan Jeremiah bel tuibem a kipan khau in akaikhia ua; huchi in ngakmi huangsung ah Jeremiah a-om nilouh hi.Zedekiah In Jeremiah Thuhilhna Angen Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah asam a, Toupa' inn a lutna thumna ah akiang ah apilut a; huan, kumpipa'n Jeremiah kiang ah, “Thil ka hon dong ding; ka lak ah bangmah iim nei ke'n,” achi hi. Jeremiah in Zedekiah kiang ah, “Hon hilh leng na hon that mahmah kei dia hia? Thu hon hanthawn leng lah hon ngaikhe lou ding chin a,” achi hi. Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Toupa hiai ka hinna bawlpa ahin a ahin sung teng ka hon hihlum kei hial ding, na hinna zong mite khut ah leng nang ka hon pe sam kei ding,” chi in asim in akichiam hi. Huchi in Jeremiah in Zedekiah kiang ah, “Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi, ‘Babilon kumpipa heutute kiang ah na kipiak leh na hinna na bitsak ding a, hiai khopi leng mei in akang kei ding, nang leh na inkote leng na hing ding uh. Babulon kumpipa heutute kiang a na kipiak keileh bel hiai khopi Kaldaite khut a piak ahi ding a, ahal ding ua, akhut ua kipan na suakta het kei ding achi,” achi hi.

Huan kumpipa Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Kaldai mite kiang a kipia Judate khut ah ahon mansak in nuihzat in ahon bawl kha ding uh ka lau hi,” achi hi. Jeremiah in bel, “Ahon mansak kei ding uh; na kiang a ka gen Toupa aw mang mai in. Huchi in nang a ding in ahoih ding a, hin leng na hing ding. Kipiak na ut keileh bel Toupa'n hon thu kawkmuh hiai ahi: “Ngai in, Judah kumpipa' inn a numei omlaite tengtengBabulon kumpipa heutute kiang ah pi in a-om ding ua, huai numeite'n,na lawm hoihhoihte'n ahon khem ua, ahon zouta ua,na khe buannawi a atumtak in ahon lehngatsan ua,” achi ding uhi. “Na zite, na tanute Kaldai mite kiang ah api vek ding ua, akhut ua kipan na suakta kei ding a, Babulon kumpipa khut ah mat in na om zaw ding a, nang ziak in hiai khopi akang ding,” achi hi. Huan Zedekiah in Jeremiah kiang ah, “Hiai thute kuamah in thei kei uhen, huchi in na si kei ding. Himahleh heutute'n ka hon houpih azak ua, na kiang a ahong ua, na kiang a, ‘Kumpipa kiang a na gen hon hilh in; ka lak uah bangmah iim nei ke'nla, ka hon that kei ding uh; na kiang a kumpipa thugente leng, achih uleh, nang akiang uah, ‘Jonathan inn a hon kiksak lou a, huai a va si lou ding in kumpipa kiang ah ngetna ka pelut lel ahi, na chi ding hi, ” achi hi. Jeremiah kiang ah heutu tengteng hong pai in, adongta ngei ua, kumpipa'n thu apiak tengteng bang in amau ahilh hi. Huchi in akihoupih uh atawp ua; athu theih phak ahita kei hi. Huchi in Jeremiah bel Jerusalem lak ni tan in ngakmi huangsung ah a-om nilouh hi. Tuibem Sung Ah Jeremiah

Huan Judah vaihawm akum kuana akha sawmna ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh asepaihte'n Jerusalem asual ua, a-um uh. Zedekiah vaihawm kum sawm-le-khatna akha lina, ani kuana ah khopi kulh aphu pailet uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem alak un Babulon kumpipa heutute a hong lut ua, kongpi laita ah atu ua, Nergal-shar-ezar, Samgar-nebo, Sarsekim, Rab-saris mi Nergal-shar-ezar, Rab-mag mi leh Babulon kumpipa heutu dangte toh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh galkapmi tengteng in amau amuh un ataikek ua, khopi a kipan zan in kumpipa huai lampi lam ah kulhbaang nih kikal kongpi ah ataikhia ua, amah pen Arabah lampi lam ah apawt hi. Himahleh Kaldaite sepaihhon in amah adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah Zedekiah apha ua; huchi in amat nung un Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah, Hamath gam a Riblah ah api ua, ama'n atungthu angaihtuah hi. Huchi in Babulon kumpipa'n Riblah ah amah mitmuh ngei in Zedekiah tapate athat a, Babulon kumpipa'n Judah mihoih teng leng athat lai hi. Huai lou leng Zedekiah mit akhelkhia a, kol abunsak a, Babulon ah apita hi. Kaldaite'n kumpipa' inn leh midang inn tengteng ahal ua, Jerusalem kulhbaangte leng ahihsia uh. Huan ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in khopi a mipi khosuaksun akiang a amau a kipiate leh mipi omlaite Babulon ah sal in api hi. Himahleh ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Judah gam migenthei bangmah neiloute anusia a, grephuan leh loute ape pah ngal hi.Jeremiah Khahkhiakna Huan Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Jeremiah tungtang thu a ngakmi Nebuzaradan kiang ah, “Amah pi inla, hoihtak in bawl inla, hihna himhim ke'n, na kiang a agen bangbang in hih zel zaw in,” chi in thu apia hi.

Huan ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Rab-saris mi Nebushazban, Rab-mag mi Nergal-shar-ezar leh Babulon kumpipa sepaih heutu deuhdeuhte athukhak vek a, amau Jeremiah ngakmi huangsung a kipan asamkhia ua, Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah a-inn a puak ding in akemsak ua, huchi in mite lak ah a-omta hi.Ebed-melek Dia Lametna Huan ngakmi huangsung a khakkhum a a-om lai in, Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. Ethiopia mi Ebed-melek kiang ah, “Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, ahoihna ding hilou in, hiai khopi siatna ding in ka thute ka hon tun ding a, huai ni mahmah in na ma ah tangtunsak ahi ding. Huai ni in nang bel ka hon hunkhe ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, na mi kihtakte khut ah piak na hi kei ding. Nang ka hon humbit ding a, namsau in na puk kei ding a, kei na hon muan ziak in, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, chi in va gen in,” achi hi. Jerusalem Pukna

Judah leh Jerusalem sal tengteng, Babulon sal a apite uh lak a Jeremiah khainiang len kawm a api lai a ngakmi apawtsak nung a Toupa a kipan Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung hi. Ngakmi heutu in Jeremiah api a, akiang ah, “Toupa i Pathian in hiai mun a thil hoih lou tung ding ana puang khin hi. Toupa'n ahon tungsakta ngei a, agen bangbang in ahihta hi; Toupa tung ah thil na hihkhial ua, apaukam na man louh ziak un hiai thil na tung ua ahong tung ahi. Tu in, ngai in, tuni in na khut a khainiang but ka hon phelsak hi. Babulon a ka kiang a hong na utleh hong inla, na ut keileh hong dah mai in; en dih, gam tengteng na ma ah a-om hi, hong hoh pha na sakleh hoih na sak bang in pai in. Akik ma in ama'n, Judah khopite tung a ukpi dia Babulon kumpipa'n abawl Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah kik inla, mite lak ah akiang ah om in, ahihkeileh hoh pha na sakna ah va hoh mai in,” achi hi. Huchi in ngakmi heutu in nek ding leh thilpiak apia a, apaisakta hi. Jeremiah bel Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah Mizpah ah ahoh a, akiang a gam a omsun mite lak ah a-om teita hi.Judah Gam Ukpipa Gedaliah( Kum. ) Huan sepaih pawl heutu tengteng gamlak a omte'n, amaute leh aheute uh Babulon kumpipa'n, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah huai gam a migenthei penpen, Babulon sal a pilouhte akemsak chih azak un Mizpah khua ah; Gedaliah kiang ah ahong pai ua, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael, Kareah tapate Johanan leh Jonathan, Tanhumet tapa Seraiah, Netophah a Ephai tate leh Maakath mi tapa Jezaniah, amau leh amite uh toh.

Huchi in Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah in amau leh aheute uh kiang ah, “Kaldaite nasep kihta kei un; gam ah om dinden unla, Babulon kumpipa na sem unla, noute a ding in ahoih mai ding hi. Kei zaw Mizpah ah ka om ding a, Kaldai mi ka kiang a hong dingte ma ah noute sik in ka dingh ding; noute'n ahihleh uainte, nipitheite, thaute lakhawm in na bel uah koih unla, na khopi laksate uah teng un,” chi in akichiam hi. Huchi mah bang in Juda mi tengteng, Moab gam a tengte, Ammon mite lak a tengte leh Edom gam a tengte leh gamdang a omte'n Babulon kumpipa'n Judah khosuaksunte nusia a, atung uah Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa, Gedaliah akoih chih azak un; Juda mi tengteng ahawlzakna gam tengteng ua kipan in ahong paikik ua, Judah gam a Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah ahong tung ua, uain leh nipithei alakhawm uhi.Gedaliah Thahna( Kum. ) Huai lou leng Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawlte heutu, gamlak a om tengteng Mizpah ah Gedaliah kiang ah, “Ammon mite kumpipa Baalis in na hinna la ding in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael asawl chih na za hia?” achi uhi. Huan Kareah tapa Johanan in Mizpah a Gedaliah kiang ah, “Hon paisak dih ve, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael ka va that mai ding, kuamah in athei kei ding uh; Juda mi na kiang omkhawm tengteng adalh vek ua, Judah mi khosuaksunte manthatna hih ding in bangziak a na hinna la ding ahia?” chi in asimtham in agen hi. Ahikam tapa Gedaliah in bel Kareah tapa Johanan kiang ah, “Hiai thil na hih ding ahi kei; Ishmael na gendan adik kei hi,” achi hi. Gedaliah Kiang Ah Jeremiah A-om

Huan hichi ahong hi a, akha sagihna ah Elishama tapa Nethaniah tapa Ishmael, kumpi chi a mi, kumpipa upate lak a khat, mi sawmkhat pi in Mizpah ah Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah ahong ua; Mizpah ah an anekhawm uhi. Huan Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel amipi sawmkhatte toh adingh ua, namsau in Shaphan tapa Ahikam tapa, Babulon kumpipa'n gam ukpipa dia abawl Gedaliah athat uhi. Akiang a Juda mi om tengteng, Mizpah a Gedaliah kiang a omte leh Kaldai galkapmi om teite Ishmael in athat lai hi. Gedaliah athah nung ni nih in hichi ahong hi a, kuamah in atheih ma un, Shekem a kipan, Shiloh a kipan, Samaria a kipan in mi sawmgiat, akhamul uh met a, apuansilhte uh kek a, amau ki-atkeh in, tanghou latte leh gimlimte tawi in Toupa inn ah lan ding in ahong uhi. Amau dawn ding in Mizpah a kipan in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael apawtkhia a, lamtawn in akapkap a; huan, hichi ahong hi a, amaute amuh in akiang uah, “Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang ah hong pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, khopi sung atun uleh Nethaniah tapa Ishmael leh amipite'n amau ana that ua, kokhuk ah apai uhi. Alak ua mi sawmkhatte'n bel, “Hon that kei un, gam ah buh, buhman, sathau leh khuaizu tampi ka sel ngal ua,” achi uhi. Huchi in amau ahawi ua, a-unaute uh lak ah athat telta kei hi. Huan Ishmael in Gedaliah toh amithahte luang apaihna kokhuk bel kumpipa Asa in Israel kumpipa Baasha akihtak ziak a abawl ahi. Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in huai luangte in adimsak hi. Huchi in Ishmael in Mizpah a mihing a-omsun, kumpipa tanute, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah kiang a ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in akepsak, Mizpah a om lai tengteng toh sal in api vek a

Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in huaite sal dia pi in Ammon mite zuan in apawt hi. Himahleh, Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a om sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in Nethaniah tapa Ishmael thil hoih lou hih tengteng ana zak un mi tengteng apikhia ua, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael sual ding in akuan ua, tui tampi omna mun Gibeon ah ava mu uh. Huan hichi ahong hi a, Ishmael kiang a mi tengteng in, Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a sepaih heutu tengteng ava muh un ana kipak lo mahmah uhi. Huchi in Ishmael in Mizpah a kipan a sal a api tengteng akihei ua, akik nawn ua, Kareah tapa Johanan kiang ah apai diam uhi. Nethaniah tapa Ishmael bel mi giat toh Johanan a kipan ataikhe geigei ua, Ammon mite kiang ah apaita uhi. Huan Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang a sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in, Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in Ahikam tapa Gedaliah athah nung a Mizpah a kipan Nethaniah tapa Ishmael lak a Johanan in ahutkhiaksa mi akhosuaksunte tengteng, kidou mite, numeite, naupangte, michilgehte, Gibeon a kipan a api nawnte api vek hi. Huchi in apawt ua, Kaldaite ziak a Aigupta gam a tailut tum in Bethlehem kho kiang ah Geruth Chimham ah akhawl uhi. Nethaniah tapa Ishmael in, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah, Babulon kumpipa'n huai gam ukpipa dia abawl athah ziak in amau akihta mahmah uhi.

Huan sepaih pawl heutute leh Kareah tapa Johanan leh Hoshaiah tapa Jezaniah leh mipi tengteng, aneupen a kipan a alianpen tan in ahong nai ua, zawlnei Jeremiah kiang ah: “Na ma ah ka ngetna uh pom hi henla, hiai akhosuaksun mi tengteng a ding ngei in na Pathian kiang a hon thumsak ding in ka hon ngen uhi; na hon muh bang ngei in mi tampite lak a kipan tawmchik kia nutsiat in ka omta uh. Toupa na Pathian in ka paina ding thil uh hon kawkmuh theihna ding in,” achi uhi. Huchi in zawlnei Jeremiah in akiang uah, “Na thu uh ka za hi, ngai un, na thu uh bangbang in Toupa na Pathian kiang uah ka ngen ding hi; huan, hichi ahi ding a, Toupa'n nou ahon dawn peuhmah ka hon hilh zel ding; na lak uah bangmah ka iim kei ding,” achi hi. Amau Jeremiah kiang ah, “Toupa na Pathian in ka kiang ua nang ahon sawlna thu tengteng bang zel a ka hih kei uleh ka lak uah Toupa thu theipa dik leh muanhuai hi hen. Asia hiam apha hiam ka hon sawlna uh Toupa ka Pathian uh paukam suak ka mang ngeingei ding uh; Toupa ka Pathian uh paukam suak ka man uleh kou hoihtheihna ding ahi,” achi uhi.Jeremiah Thumna Toupa'n Adawng Huchi in hichi ahong hi a, ani sawm nung in Toupa thu Jeremiah kiang ah ahong tung a.

Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh akiang asepaih heutu om tengteng leh sepaih tengteng, aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in asam a, akiang uah, Toupa na Pathian uh, ama a na ngetna uh tun dia na hon sawlna pa un hichi in achi: Hiai gam a na omdet uleh ka hon tungding ding a, ka hon phelzak kei ding, ka hon phutkip ding a, ka hon botkhe kei ding, na tung ua thil hoih lou ka tutte lah ka lungheita ngal a. Babulon kumpipa na lau sek uh lau nawn kei un, amah lau kei un chih Toupa thupawt ahi; akhut a kipan noute hondam ding leh hunkhe ding in na kiang uah ka om hi. Na tung ua zah angaihtheihna ding in zahngaihna nou ka hon phal ding a, na gam mah uah ka hon kiksak ding hi. Himahleh, hiai gam ah i om kei ding uh, chi a Toupa na Pathian uh aw na man louh ua, “Ahi het lou Aigupta gam ah i pai zaw ding ua, huai ah kidouna himhim i tuak kei ding a, pengkul ging leng i za kei ding a, an taksapna a-om sam kei ding, huai ah i teng zaw ding uh,” na chih uleh, Aw Judah khosuaksunte aw, Toupa thu ngai dih ua; sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Aigupta gam a lut ding leh huai a teng ding a kihei teitei na hih uleh hichi ahong hi ding a, namsau na kihtak ngei un Aigupta gam ah hon pha ding a, kial na kihtak sek un leng Aigupta gam ah nou ahon delhzui ding a, huai ah na si ding uh.

Aigupta gam a teng ding a kihei teiteite tengteng huchibang in a-om ding ua, namsau, kial leh hipi in na si ding uh, thil hoih lou atung ua ka tut ding a kipan kuamah asuakta un abit kei ding uh. Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in huchi in achi hi, “Jerusalem a tengte tung a ka hehna ka sun mah bang in Aigupta gam na lut hun chiang un na tung uah ka hehna ka sung sam ding; hamsethuak leh lamdangsak chiat, mi kamse banna, gensiat na hi ding ua, hiai mun na mu nawn kei ding uh. “Aw Judah khosuaksunte aw, Toupa'n na tungtang uh agenta hi, Aigupta gam ah lut kei un, hiai ni in nou ka hon theichiansak ahi chih thei mahmah un. Na hinna uh, Toupa na Pathian uh kiang ah na hon sawl ua, Toupa ka Pathian uh kiang ah hon thumsak inla, Toupa ka Pathian un achihchih hon hilh inla, ka hih zel ding uhi na chi ngal ua. Tuni in na kiang uah ka puangta ahi; himahleh na kiang ua ahon sawlna bangmah in Toupa na Pathian uh paukam lah na mang ngal kei ua. Huaiziak in tu'n zaw theita un, tenna na lunggulhna mun ngei uah namsau, kial leh hipi in na si ngeingei ding uh,” chi in achi hi. Mipite'n Amau Thumsak Ding In Jeremiah Angen Uh

Huan hichi ahong hi a, Jerusalem mipi tengteng kiang a Toupa a Pathian uh thu tengteng Toupa Pathian in gen ding a asawlna thu, huai thu tengteng agen khit in; Hoshaiah tapa Azariah leh Kareah tapa Johanan leh mikiphasak tengteng in, Jeremiah ahoupih ua, akiang ah, “Zuaugen na hi, Toupa ka Pathian un, ‘Aigupta gam a teng ding in na pai ding uh ahi kei, chi a gen ding in nang ahon sawl sam a; Kaldaite khut a matsak a ka om ua hon thahtheihna ding un leh Babulon sal dia hon pitheihna ding in Neriah tapa Baruk in kou hon sual ding a hon sawl ahi zaw ve,” achi uhi. Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawl heutu teng leh mipi tengteng in Judah gam a teng ding in Toupa aw amang kei uh. Huchi in Kareah tapa Johanan leh sepaih pawl heutu tengteng in Judah khosuaksun tengteng, Judah gam a teng ding a hawlzak a a-omna namte uh lak a kipan a hong kik; pasalte, numeite, naupangte, kumpipa tanute leh michih ngakmi heutu Nebuzaradan in Shaphan tapa, Ahikam tapa Gedaliah leh akiang a anutsiatte uh zawlnei Jeremiah leh Neriah tapa Baruk leng, apikhawm vek zawta uhi. Huchi in Aigupta gam atungta ua, Toupa aw amang kei ua, huchi in Tahpanhes khua ngei atung uhi. Tahpanhes ah Jeremiah kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, Suang lianpi la inla, Tahpanhes a Pharaoh inn lutna chin a teklei lep zutna ah Judah mite mitmuh ngei in phut in. Akiang uah, Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, ka nasempa Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ka thukhak ding a, ama'n hiai ka suang phumguk tung ah alaltutphah atung ding; ama'n atung uah akumpi puanin akai ding hi.

“Huan ahong ding a, Aigupta gam ahong gawt ding a, sihna a si dingte, sihna ah; saltang dingte, saltanna ah, namsau thuak dingte namsau ah. Aigupta mite pathian innte ah meikuangte akhah ding a, akang ding, sal in api ding a; belamchingmi in puan asilh bang in Aigupta gam asilh ding, huai a kipan in galmuang in apawt ding. Aigupta gam a Beth-shemesh khuam zeknei sang pipite achimsak ding a, Aigupta pathian innte mei in ahal ding, achi, chi in,” achi hi. Aigupta Ah Jeremiah Tonpih In A-om

Aigupta gam a Juda om tengteng, Migdol khua, Tahpanhes khua, Memphis khua leh Pathros gam a tengte tungtang a Jeremiah kiang a thu hong tung, Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Jerusalem leh Judah khopite tung a thil hoih lou ka hon tutte na muta uh; ngai dih ua, tu in ahong segawpta a, kuamah ateng kei uh, amau nou leh na pipute un pathian dangte atheih ngei nai louh uh na sem ding leh akiang ua gimlim hal in, kei hon hehsak ding uh; aginatlouhnate uh ahih khit tak ziak un. Huchi pipi in na kiang uah nasem zawlnei tengteng phalvak a thou in ka sawl a, akiang uah, “Aw, hiai thu kihhuai, ka huat lamtak hih kei un,” chi in. Himahleh angaikhe tuan kei ua, aginatlouhna uh pathian dangte kiang a gimlim hal louh ding pen angeingaih kei uh. Huaiziak in ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna Judah khopite leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah ka sung a akuangta a, tuni a a-om bang in asia a, asegawpta hi. Huaiziak in tu in zaw Toupa sepaihte' Pathian, Israel' Pathian in na lak ua kipan numei pasal, naungekte leh nawi ne laite Judah lak a kipan kuamah hawi lou a gawimang vek ding in bangziak a hiai thil hoih loutak na hinna uh tung a hih na hi ua? Na va tenna uh Aigupta gam pathiante kiang a gimlim hal in leitung gam teng a nam chih lak a hamsethuak leh gensiat na hihtheihna ding uh leh gawimang na hihtheihna ding ua na khut thilhih ngei ua hon hehsak na hi uh. Na pipute uh gitlouhnate, Judah kumpipate gitlouhnate leh na zite uh gitlouhna, Judah gam leh Jerusalem kongzing a ahih khitsate uh na mangngilhta ua hia?

Tuni tan in leng akisik tuan kei ua, na pipute uh leh noumau ma a ka taklat ka dan leh ka dan thusehte na zui kei ua, na lau sam kei uh. Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, na siatna ding un Judah tengteng gawimang vek ding in nou ka hon maituah ding hi. Huan Judah khosuaksun, Aigupta gam a ten tum a kihei teiteite ka man ding a, achimit vek ding uh; Aigupta gam ah apuk ding ua, namsau leh kialte a hihman in a-om ding uh; aneupen a kipan alianpen tan in namsau leh kial in asi ding uh. Jerusalem ka gawt bangmah in Aigupta gam a tengte namsaute, kialte leh hipite a gawt ding ka hi ngal a. Huchi in Aigupta gam a teng ding a kuan Judah khosuaksunte Judah gam, a-omna ding ua kik nawn a-utna mahmah gam uah kik ding in khat lel leng hingdam in asuakta kei ding uh, asim a taikhete kia lou ngal kuamah akik kei ding uh.” Huchi in mi tengteng, azite un pathian dang kiang a gimlim ahal chih theite leh numei huai a dinghte mipi tampi, Aigupta gam a teng mipi tengteng in, Pathros ah Jeremiah adawng ua, hichi in achi uh; “Toupa min a ka kiang ua na thugente zaw ka hon ngaihkhiaksak kei ding uh. Kou leh ka pipute uh, ka kumpipate uh leh ka heutute un Judah khopite ah leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah ana hih zel bang un van kumpinu kiang a gimlim halte leh akiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiakte, ka paukam suak peuhmah bang un ka hih ngeingei ding uh; huchih lai in ka lamzang ua, nek-le-dawn ding atam a, siatna himhim ka mu sam ua.

Van kumpinu kiang a thil hal leh akiang a dawn ding thillat butkhiakte ka tawp nungsiah uh bangpeuh ka tasam zawta ua, namsau leh kialte a hihman in ka omta uhi.” Huan numeite'n, “Van kumpinu kiang a gimlim ka hal lai uh leh akiang a dawn ding thillatte ka butkhiak uh?” achi uhi. Huchi in Jeremiah in mipi tengteng, numei pasal amah dawng mite tengteng kiang ah, “Judah khopite leh Jerusalem kongzingte ah, nou leh na pipute uh, na kumpipate uh leh na heutute uh leh gam a mipite'n gimlim ahalte uh Toupa'n atheigige in alungsim ah akhum kei maw? Na thil gilou hih ziak uleh na thilkihhuai hihte uh ziak in Toupa'n athuak ngap nawnta kei hi; huaiziak in, na gam uh tua a-om bang in asia a, lamdangsak chiat, hamsethuak, tengmi om lou, ahong hita hi. Gimlim na hal ua, Toupa tung ah na gilou ua, Toupa paukam suakte na mang kei ua, adan hiam adan thusehte hiam athu theihsakte hiam na zuih sam louh ziak un hiai thil hoih lou tua a-om bang in na tung uah ahong tungta hi,” achi a. Huai lou leng Jeremiah in mipi tengteng leh numeite kiang ah, “Aigupta gam a Judah tengteng aw, Toupa thu za un, sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Nou leh na zite un, van kumpinu kiang a gimlim hal leh dawn ding thillat butkhiakte ka na chiamsa bang zel in ka hih ngeingei ding, chi in na kam un na genta ua, na khut un na pichingsak lai uhi.

‘Na thuchiamte uh hihkip unla, na thu tupte uh tangtungsak vanglak un. Huaiziak in nou Judah, Aigupta gam a tengte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un: Ngai un, Toupa Pathian ahin bang in chi in Aigupta gam pumpi a teng, Judah mi kua kam mah ah ka min aging nawn ngei kei ding, chi in ka min thupi lou in ka kichiam ahi chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai in, ahoihna ding uh hilou in asiatna ding un amau ka tang thek ahi; huchi in Judah mi, Aigupta gam a omte tengteng, namsau leh kialte ahihman in a-om ding uh, amanthat vek matan un. Namsau hihman val tawmchik Aigupta gam a kipan a pawt in Judah gam ah alut ding uh; huan, Judah mi khosuaksunte tengteng, Aigupta gam a teng ding a kuan mite'n kua thu ahia pai zaw ding, ka thu hia amau thu, athei ding uh. “Huan hiai nou a ding in chiamtehna ahi ding; na tung uah thil hoih lou lam in ka thu apai ngei ding chih na theihna ding un hiai mun ah nou ka hon gawt ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Pharaoh Hophra, Aigupta kumpipa bel amelma, ahinna zong mite khut ah ka mangsak ding, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah, amelma, ahinna zongmi Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut a ka piak bangmah in,” achi hi. Milim Biakna Ziak A Siatna

Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim, Josiah tapa akum lina ah Jeremiah kam a kipan, hiai thute laibu a agelh lai a, Neriah tapa Baruk kiang a zawlnei Jeremiah thugen: Baruk aw, Toupa Israel' Pathian in, na kiang ah hichi in achi: Nang, “Ka tung gik hi na mai e, Toupa'n ka thuakna ah lungkhamna ahon behlapta ngal a; ka mauna ka bahpih a, tawldamna ka muzou kei,” na chi a. Akiang ah hichi in na gen ding ahi, “Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, ka lamsa ka phel nawn ding a, gam pumpi mahmah ah ka phuhsa ka botkhe nawn ding. Huan nang a ding in thil thupi na zong hia? Zong dah mai in; sa tengteng tung ah thil hoih lou ka hon tungsak ding a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi; himahleh na hinna bel mun chih a na paina ah gallak ding in ka hon pe ding,” chi in. Baruk Kiang A Pathian Thuchiam

Namte tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung; Aigupta thu, Euphrates Luipi gei a Karkhemish a om, Judah kumpipa Josiah tapa Jehoiakim, akum lina a Nebukadnezzar in anuaisiah leh Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh Neko sepaihhonte tungtang thu: “Lum bemte, lum zawlte mansa in om unla, gal nawt un, Sakol van unla, sakol tuangmite aw, tuang un, dal lukhu khu in dingkip unla,tei tat-hiam in sik puanak silh un. Bangchidan a amaute lau-le-ling a taikek a mu ka hia!Agalkap mite uh avuallel uh,baksam leng zen in atai ua,nunglam nga het lou in,ning chih ah gal alang chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Mizuanzaang ataimang thei kei,galkapmi apawt tuan kei uh,huai a mi Euphrates Luipi gei ahahawi ua, apuk khinta uh. Nile lui bang a khang kua ahia?Luipi tuikihot kimvel bang in? Aigupta Nile lui bang in akhang a luipi tuikihot kimvel bang mai in,ka khang ding a,leitung ka luahsuak ding,khopi leh aluahte ka hihse ding,” achi hi. “Aw sakolte aw, nawk zel unla,aw kangtalai aw, nakpi in pang un;galdou mite'n ma phu uhenla,Ethiopia mi leh Put mi,lum tawi mite, Lud mithalpeu zang siamte toh. Huai ni ahi,Toupa sepaihte' Toupa ni, phulak ni,amelmate tung a phu alaktheihna, namsau in agai ding a,atai ding, asisan uh taitak in adawn ding;Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n mal gam ah Euphrates Luipi gei ah mi tampi agou phengphung mai ve. Aw, Aigupta tanu siangthou,Gilead ah hohtou inla,singnai nuhchi va la in,damdawi tampi athawn in na zangta,nang a ding in damna himhim a-om kei hi.

Namte'n na zahlakna aza ua,na kah in leitung pumpi adim hi, galhatmi leh galhatmi akiphu ua,lei ah apukkhawm uh,” chi in.Nebukadnezzar Hong Paina Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar hong pai a, Aigupta gam ahong bawl ekdan ding thu Toupa'n zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a agen: “Aigupta gam ah gen unla,Migdol ah puang un;Memphis leh Tahpanhes ah puang unla;dingkip in kigalging un;na kim a mi namsau in agaita ngal a. Bangziak a na mihattephiatmang a om ahi ua?Adingh zou kei ua, Toupa'napaihkhiak ziak in. Mi tampi akisuisak a, ahi,akiphupuk lemlum ua,Nuaisiahna namsau taisan inkisa un, i kik ding uh,i pianna gam ah i mite kiang ah, achi uhi. Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh penhusa lian lel, ahun sehsa a paimangsak a om,chi in huai ah akikou uhi. Ahin a ka hin sung in chihKumpipa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi hi,tangte lak a Tabor tang bang in tuipi chin aKarmel tang bang in ahong pai ngei ding. Aw nang, tanu,Aigupta gam a teng, saltang ding in kibawl mai in;Memphis akisegawp dek a,teng ding om lou in akangmang ding hi. Aigupta bel bawngla hoihtakahi, himahleh mal a kipan nasemmi ding hong kuan in ahong pai hi. Alak ua sepaih goihlaite bel bawngtuai vak thau bang mai ahi ua,adek uh angat ua,ataikek ua, khawl lou in,atung uah asiatna ni uh atungta,agawtna hun ding uh; Gulpi kitholh bang mai in husa anei a,amelmate kiton in ahong pai ua,singphuk mite bang in hei toh ahong sual uh. Agam gammang vaksuak zohlouh ahong hihse ding uh,khaukhup sang in atamzaw ua,sim seng louh ahi uh. Aigupta tanu azahlak ding,mallam a mi khut a matsak in a-om ding.” Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Thebes khua a Ammon, leh Pharaoh leh Aigupta leh apathiante, akumpipate, Pharaoh ngei leh amah muang mite ka gawt ding.

Ahinna uh, zong mite khut ah leh Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh anasem mite khut ah ka mansak ding; huai hun chiang in luah in a-om ding, nidanglai nite mah bang in,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Toupa'n Amite Ahondam Ding “Jakob aw, ka nasempa,lau ke'nla, aw Israel,lunglel sam ke'n, ngai in,gamlapi a kipan nang ka hon hunkhe ding a,na suante leng asaltanna gam ua kipan,Jakob ahong kik ding a,muangtak in a-om hiathiat ding a,kuamah in alausak nawn kei ding uh. Jakob aw, ka nasempa, lau ke'n,ka hon ompih ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi;ka hon delhzakna nam tengteng ka beisak ding a,nang zaw ka hon beisak het kei ding;diktak in ka hon gawt ding a,gawt louh in ka hon khak kei ding hi. Karkhemish Ah Aigupta Zoh In A-om

Pharaoh in Gaza agawt ma a Philistia mite tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung. Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngai un, mal a kipan in tui ahong khang hi, akuang dim in aluanglet ding;gam atum ding a asung a om tengteng toh,khopi leh asung a tengte leng;mite akap ding ua,gam a mi tengteng amau tuaituai ding uh. Asakol hat chinte leitot ging in kidou kangtalai ging dopdop in,akangtalai ging in,pate alunglel ua,atate uh en lou zen in. Philistia mi tengteng lohna ni,Tura leh Sidon a kipan apanpih mi khosuaksunte sattanna ni ziak in, Toupa'n tuipi gei Kaphtor omlaite ahihse ding hi. Gaza mite lu ahong giauta,Ashkelon achimitta a,agam phaizang a teng khosuaksunte;bang tan kiat ding na hia? Aw Toupa namsau, na omkinken ma bang tan a sawt ahia?Na pai ah kikhum in;khawl inla om kinken ve. Toupa'n Ashkelon leh tuipi gei tung a gamtang ding a,ahon seh a, hih ding ahon piak ngalleh bangchi in na om kinken thei dia? Philistia Tungtang A Toupa Thugen

Moab tungtang thu; sepaihte' ToupaPathian in hichi in achi:“Nebo tung agik hi;hihgawp in a-omta;Kiriathaim zahlaksak in a-omta, laksuan ahi.Misgab bel zahlak leh hihsiat in a-omta. Moab minthanna amangta;Heshbon ah asiatna ding gen in,‘Kisa un, nam ahihna kipan i hihmang ding uh, ” achi ua.Aw Madmen khua, nang leng daihsak sipsip na hi ding a,namsau in ahon delh ding. Horonaim a kipan akikou husa,lohna leh siatna thupi mahmah. Moab suksiat ahi a, atate kap ging zak in a-om hi, Luhith ah kap in apaitou ua,Horonaim sul ah manthatnakikou ging lunglelhhuai aza uh. Taimang unla, na hinna uh humbit un,gamdai gam sabiltung bang in om un. Na nasep leh na sum-le-pai na muan ziak in nang leng mat in na om ding hi,Khemosh sal a pi ahi ding;asiampute leh aheutute toh. Kho chih ah hihsemi ahong tung ding,kho khat lel in leng apel kei ding;phaizang gam leng amang ding;phaizang hihsiat ahi ding. Toupa'n achihsa bang in. Alenmang theihna ding inMoab kha pia un,tengmi om lou in,akhuate akisegawp ding. Limsak loutak a Pathian nna semmi hamsethuak in om henla, sisan suah ding a anamsau zang nuamloumi hamsethuak in om hen.Moab Khopite Siatna Atuailai a kipan Moab in nuam asa a, a-uain abohkhum a, bel dang a teituah leng atuak kei a, sal a pi in a-om ngei sam kei hi, alim ngeingei a lim gige in, agim leng alamdang tuan kei. “Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, abungkhe ding mi ka hon sawl ding a, huan amau abungkhe ding uh,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi; abelte avuaksak ding ua, a-umte ahihkek ding uh. Israel inkote'n amuanpi pen uh Bethel azahpih bang un Moab in Khemosh azahpihta ding hi. Pasal hoih leh galdou mihangsan i hi ua,bangchidan a chi na hi ua?

Moab bel hihgawp in a-om a,akhopi meikhu in azam khinta,atangval hoih teng apuk khinta chih Kumpipa, amin Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. Moab siatna ahong tung lellel,athuakna ding akinoh hi. Nou akim a mi teng in amah suun in amin thei teng inchiangkhun khauh lehchiang thupi akitanta hi, chi un. Aw nang tanu, Dibon a teng,na thupina paisan inla,dangtak in tu in;Moab lokmi'n nang ahon sual a,na kulhte ahihseta hi. Aw Aroer a teng nu, kongbul ahdingh in, enkhia in, taikekpa,suaktanu dong inla,Bang amaizen a? chi in. Moab zahlaksak in a-omta,achimgawpta ngal a,mau tuaituai in kap un, Moab hihsiat ahita!chih Arnon ah puang un. Gam tampi tung ah; Holon, Zahjah, Mephaath, leh Dibon, Nebo, Beth-diblathaim, leh Keriathaim, Beth-gamul, Beth-menon, leh Kerioth, Bozrah leh Moab gam a khua tengteng, agamla leh anai ah vaihawmna ahong tungta hi. Moab ki-attan in a-om a, aban hihtan in a-omta, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Moab Hihniam Ahi Ding Amah dawnkhamsak un; Toupa tung ah akiliansak ngal a; huan, Moab bel amah luak ah akitholh ding a, nuihsan in a-om lai ding hi. Israel nang ding nuihza bawlna ahita kei maw? Gutate lak ah atel a hia? Amah tungtang na gen teng in na lu na sinkhum hilou hiam? Moab a tengte aw, khopite taisan unla, kawl kikal ah teng un, vakhu, kohawm gei a bu bawlsek bang in om un. Moab kisaktheihna ka zata ua, akisathei ngut ve, akikoih sandan, akisaktheihdan, aki-otsakdan leh alungtang kideihkhopdante. Ahehna bangmah ahi kei chih ka thei; aki-otsaknate'n bangmah ahih ko kei, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huchi in Moab tung ah ka mau tuaituai ding a, ahi, Moab pumpi a ding in ka kap ding, Kir-hareseth mite suun ahi ding uh.

Jazer kap sang a thupi in ka hon kah ding a, aw Sibmah grep kung, na hiangte tuipi tung ah akiphalh a, Jazer tuipi leng atung hialta a, na nipithei leh grep gahte hihsemi in abawm hi. Nopna leh kipahna amang khin hi, theibil leh Moab gam a kipan; uain sukna khuk a ka uain ka beisakta a, kuamah in nuamsa a kikou in achil nawn kei ding uh. Heshbon leh Elealeh ah akikou ua, Jahaz tan in aw asuah ua, Zoar a kipan Horonaim tan, Eglath-shelishijah tan in leng, Nimrim tui kim adai ding hi. Huai lou in Moab mun sangte thil lanmi leh apathiante a dia gimlim halmi ka hihmang ding, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Huchi in tamngai bang in ka lungtang Moab a ding in aging a, Kir-hareseth mite a ding in tumging bang in ka lungtang aging hi; huaiziak in niang-le-tai a thil amuhsate amangthang khinta hi. Lu chiteng metgiau ahi a, khamul chiteng met ahi; khut tengteng at ahi a; kongte ah sai-ip puan a-om chiat hi. Moab inn tung tengteng, kongzing leh mun chih ah kahna a-om a; Moab bel phatuam nawn lou bang in ka hihkham khinta hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Seta namai e! Segawp zou hi na tel e; Moab zahlak in alehngatta ve; huchi in Moab bel akimvel a mite tengteng a ding in nuihza bawlna leh mulkimhuai ahong hita hi.Moab Asuakta Kei Ding Toupa'n hichi in achi: Ngai in, mu bang in aleng ding a, Moab tung ah akha azak ding. Kerioth lak ahi a, akulhte aphawng guih a, huai ni in Moab pasalphate lungtang numei nauvei lungtang bang mai ahi ding. Moab amangthang ding, nam aching nawn kei ding; Toupa anuaisiah zawk ziak in.

Launa, kokhuk leh tangte, aw Moab luahmi, na tung ah atung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Launa taisanmi kokhuk ah ake ding a, kokhuk a pawt thang ah a-awk ding, agawtna kum ka hon tun sin ngal a, atung ah, Moab tung ah ngei, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Heshbon lim ah taikekpawl bahgawp in akhawl ding ua, Heshbon a kipan in mei apawt a, Sihon lak a kipan in meikuang, chiak vengvung mite sip a sam toh Moab baksam akang khin hi. Na tung agik hi, aw Moab! Khemosh mite amangta ua; na tapate sal a pi in, na tanute sal in atangta uhi. Himahleh ni nanung chiang in Moab omdan ka hei ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Hichi tan Moab tungthu ahi. Moab Suksiatna

Ammon mite thu, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel in tate anei kei a hia? Gouluahmi nei lou hia? Bang achia ahia akumpipa'n Gad atantak a, khopite a amite aten uh? Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ammon tate Rabbah ah kidou husa ging ka kizasak ding, thil sia omkhawm lel ahong hi ding hi, atanute mei in akang ding a, huchi in Israel in amah neimi anei thuk ding, Toupa'n achi. Aw Heshbon, mau tuaituai inla, Ai alok khinta ua; Rabbah tate aw, kap un, kap unla, umna sungte ah vialtai un. Kumpipa, siampu leh amiliante toh sal a pi in a-om ding uhi. Bangziak a na phaizang hoihte suang na hia, aw muanhuailounu aneih hoihhoihte muang a, ‘Kua ahia hon sual ding? chichi nak mi. Ngai in, na tung ah launa ka hon tun ding a, na kim a mi tengteng a kipan, chih Toupa sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi; michih delhkhiak na hi vek ding uh, kuamah in taikekpawl akaikhawm kei ding uh. “Huai khit chiang in bel Ammon tate omdan ka kiheisak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Edom Tung A Toupa Thukhenna Edom thu, Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Teman a pilna om nawn lou ahi maw? Lemthei lemtheihna amang khinta a hia? Apilna uh mang khin hia? Aw Dedan a tengte aw, taikek unla, lehngat unla, tummang vengveng un; amah ka gawt hun chiang in, Esau siatna atung ah ka hon tun ding hi. Grep lou mite na kiang a ahong pai un, maih anei kei ding ua hia? Zan a guta mite'n adeihzah uh angah masiah un alok zel kei ding ua hia? Esau ka vuaktang sakta a, agukkhuhte ka hongta, abu thei nawn kei ding. Asuante hihsiat ahi ua, a-unaute, a-invengte toh a-omta kei.

Na tagahte limsak ke'n, ke'n ka hum ding, na meithaite'n kei hon muang uhen.” Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Nou dawn lou dingte'n leng adawn mawk uleh, nang gawt louh hial in na suakta ding a hia? Gawt louh in na pawt kei ding, na dawn mahmah ding hi. Toupa'n keimah kilou in ka kichiamta ngal a, Bozrah lamdangsak chiat, gensiat, hihgawp, hamsethuak ahi ding, akhua tengteng leng asegawp tawntung ding,” achi hi. Toupa kiang a kipan thupuan ka zata, namte kiang ah sawltak sawl ahita, “Kikaikhawm unla, amah sual unla, kidou ding in kuan un! Ngai in, mihingte muhsit in namte lak ah nang ka hon neusakta hi. Na kihih mulkimhuaina tak na lungtang kisathei in ahon khemna ahi, aw nang kawl suangkal a, mualvum a teng zel, mu bang in, sangpi ah bu sep mah lechin, huai a kipan in ka hon lakhesuk ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huchi in Edom bel lamdang asak uh ahong hi ding a, mi vialvak peuh in lamdang asa ding ua, asiat luat ziak in atekkhum ding uh. Sodom leh Gomorrah leh akim a khopite hihsiat a om mah bang in, kuamah ateng nawn kei ding ua, mihing ta kuamah huai ah a-om ngei nawn kei ding uh. Ngai un, Jordan gam gammang a kipan a humpinelkai, gan khahna mun ah ahong tou ding a; amah a kipan amau ka taimangsak pah ding a, atung a thunei ding in ka ut-ut ka sep ding. Keimah bang kua ahia om? Kua'n ahia hunbi hon bikhiahsak ding? Belamchingmi kua ahia ka ma a dingh ding pen? Huaiziak in Edom tung a Toupa thuhilh leh Teman mite tung a athilseh, hih atuppente ngaikhia un; ganhon nou neute ngei kaihmang in a-om ding ua; atenna uh ahihgawp ding hi. Apuksiatna husa uah lei akising a

akah husa uh Tuipi san ah leng zak ahi ding. Ngai un, muvanlai bang in ahong lengtou ding a; Bozrah tung ah kha azak ding; huai ni in Edom mihangsante lungtang numei nauvei lungtang bang lel ahi ding hi.Damaskas Tung A Toupa Thukhenna Damaskas thu: Hamath zumta, Arpad toh, thuhoih lou azata ngal ua, azulta uh; tuipi kihot om kinken thei lou bang in abuai uh. Damaskas athazaw, taikek atum a, linna in alap a, lungkhamna leh natna in numei nauvei bang mai in alenta hi. Ka nopsakna khopi, khopi minthang bangziak a nutsiat a om lou ahia? Huchi in huai ni in atangval honte kongtual ah apuk ding ua, galdoumi tengteng amangthang ding uh, chih sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. Damaskas kulhbaang ah mei ka khah ding a, Ben-hadad kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi.Kedar Leh Hazor Tung A Toupa Thukhenna Kedar leh Hazor gamte Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in agawtna thu; Toupa'n hichi in achi: Thou unla, Kedar sual unla, suahlam tate bawl ek un. Apuaninte uh, aganhonte uh alaksak ding ua, apuanzakte uh, atui-um belsuan tengteng uh, asangawngsaute uh apaimangpih ding uh, ning chih ah launa a-om a, chi in mite'n akikoukhum ding uh. Taikek unla, vakmang vengveng un, tummang vengveng unla, Hazor a tengte aw, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in nang ahon sawm a, na tung ah hihtup aneita hi. Thou unla, lungmuangtak a om, amah a khosa, kulh kongkhak leng nei lou, kalhna siktawn leng nei lou nam sual un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Asangawngsaute uh gal in ala ding ua, abawnghonte uh alok ding uh. Baksam metgiau honte ning chih ah ka dalhsak ding, asiatna ding uh ning chih a kipan in ka hon tun ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Huan Hazor bel sihna tenna mun ahi ding a, asegawp tawntung ding, huai ah kuamah ateng nawn kei ding uh, mihing tate a-omta kei ding uh.Elam Tung A Toupa Thukhenna Judah kumpipa Zedekiah vaihawm pat tungna Elam tungtang a Toupa thu, zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a hong tung; Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai un, Elam thalpeu, ahatna bulpi pen uh, ka kitansak ding; Kawlmong li a kipan in huih lite ka hon tun ding, Elam tung ah ka dalhsak ding, kawlmong chih ah, Elam delhkhiak mite phak louh nam a-om kei ding uh. Amelma uh, ahinna uh zong mite ma ah, Elamte ka lunglelsak ding, atung uah siatna ka hon tun ding, ka hehna thupitak, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Amau ka hihman vek masiah namsau ka delhsak ding hi. Akumpipate uleh aheutute uh hihmang in Elam ah ka laltutphah ka tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Himahleh ni nanungte ah hichi ahi ding, Elam omdan ka kiheisak ding,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ammon Tung A Toupa Thukhenna

Babulon tungtang, Kaldai mite gam tungtang a zawlnei Jeremiah kam a Toupa thugen: Namte lak ah gen unla,puang un, puanzak khai in,puang un, sel kei un,Babulon lak ahita.Bel azahlak a,Merodak mulkimna in adim a,milimte ase khinta. Mallam a kipan amah nam khat in ahon sual a, huai in agam ahihgawp ding a, huai ah kuamah ateng nawn kei ding ua; ataikek ua, mi leh sate leng amang khinta uhi.Saltanna A Pan Israel Kik Nawnna Huai nite in leh huai hun chiang in Israel suante ahong pai ding ua, amau leh Judah tate toh; kap kawm in ahong pai ding ua, Toupa a Pathian uh azong ding uh; chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Zion lam nga in akalsuanna ding uh adong ding ua, “Kisa un, tangtawn thukhun mangngilh nawn lou ding in Toupa hong len un,” achi ding uh. Ka mite zaw belam mang ahi ua; amau ching mite'n apimang ua, mualte ah apaimangsak ua, tang a pan mual dungte ah apai ua, ahuang uh amangngilh khinta uhi. Amu peuh in ane zel ua, amelmate un, i gilou kei, Toupa dikna omna apipute uh lamet Toupa hilhial tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak ahi, achi uhi. Babulon sung a kipan in taikhia unla, Kaldaite gam a kipan paikhia un, kelhon lak a keltalte bang in om un. Ngai dih ua, Babulon hong sual ding in mal gam a kipan nam honpi thupitak kikaikhawm ka tokthou ding a, amah dou ding in akisa ding ua; huai a kipan in lak ahi ding uh; athalte uh lah galbawl siamtak vuaksuak ngei lou bang ahi ding uh.

Huan Kaldai loh in a-om ding, alok mite atai ngial ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Babulon Pukna Kipak mah le uchin, nuamsa mah le uchin, aw ka goutan lok mite aw, lou lak a bawngla takhialkhial bang leh sakoltal ham ngekngek bang himah le uchin; Na nu uh ahong zum mahmah ding a, nou hon suangnu ahong zahlak ding hi. Ngai un, namte lak a nuainungpen, gamdai, gamkeu, gamvuak ahi ding. Toupa hehna ziak in luahmi a-om kei ding a, ase vek zaw ding hi, Babulon hoh peuhmah amulkimsak ding a, asiatna tengteng ziak in atek ding uhi. Thalpeu tawimi tengteng aw, Babulon umsuak in kivual unla, kap unla, thalte chil kei un, Toupa tung ah akhialta uhi. Akimvel in awng unla, amah-le-amah akipeta, akulhte apukta a, abaangte achimta, Toupa phulakna ahi ngal a, atung ah phu la unla, ahih bangbang in atung ah hih un. Babulon a kipan chi thehmi attan unla, buhlak lai a kawite tawimi toh, nuaisiahna namsau lau in amau mite lam azuan chiat ding ua, amau gam chiat ah atai ding uh.Saltanna A Pan Israel Kik Nawnna Israel bel belam dalhzak ahi a; humpinelkaite'n adelhmang ua; Assuria kumpipa'n amah ane phot a, atawp in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in aguhte ahaizanta hi. Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Assuria kumpipa ka gawt bang in Babulon kumpipa leh agam ka gawt ding. Huan Israel agantatna ah ka pi nawn ding a, Karmel leh Bashan ah ata ding a, Ephraim tang ah leh Gilead ah amah ata ding hi. Huai nite leh huai hun chiang in Israel thulimlouhnate azong ding ua, muh ding a-om kei ding; Judah thilhihkhelhte leng muh ding a-om sam kei ding

omsun ding a ka koihte ngaidam ding ka hi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Babulon Tung A Toupa Thukhenna Merathim gam sual un, agam leh Pekod luah mite mahmah that unla, hihgam sipsip un, thu ka hon piak bangbang in hih un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huai gam ah gal husa a-om, siatna thupi mahmah husa toh. Khovel pumpi sek kitam in, nak keknen hi na tel e; namte lak ah Babulon kinaksiat hi na mai e! Aw Babilon, nang ding in thang na kam a, thei lou a awk na hita ve; muhkhiak leh mat in na omta, Toupa na sual ziak in. Toupa'n agalvan bawm ahongta, ahehna vanzatte alakhia a, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n Kaldaite gam ah hih ding anei hi. Gamgi tawp pek a kipan in hon sual unla, athil koihkhawmna innte hong vek unla, paikhawm un, hihse vek unla, abangmah hawi kei un. Abawngtal tuaite that vek unla, goh in om uhen. Atung uh gik hi na tel e! Ani uh, amaute gawtna ni mahmah ahong tungta hi. Toupa i Pathian phulak, atempul phulakna ngei Zion a gen ding a Babulon a kipan a taikhete leh taimangte husa ngei. Babulon sual ding in thalkap siam, thalpeu zangmi tengteng samkhawm un; akimvel in buk bawl unla, kuamah suakta kei uhen. Athilhih bangbang in thuk un, ahihsa bang tengteng amah tung ah hih un; Toupa, Israel Mi Siangthou lah achou ngam hi. Huaiziak in akholakte ah tangvalte apuk ding ua, galkapmi tengteng huai ni in amangthang ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai in, nang mikisathei, ka hon dou ahi, Toupa, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi hi. Na ni ahong tungta, na gawtna ding ni mah.

Huan mikisathei akisui in apuk ding a, kuamah in aphong kei ding ua, akhopite ah mei ka khah ding a, akimvel a om tengteng ka kangsiangsak vek ding. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: Israel suante leh Judah tate nuaisiah in a-om khawmta ua; sal a amaute pi mite tengteng in amau alen tinten ua, akhah nuam kei uhi. Amaute tanpa bel ahat a; amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi. Amah amau lam ah apang a, Babulon a tengte hihbuai in, leitung a khawlna atuttheihna ding in. Kaldai mite tung ah namsaualeng hi, Babulon a tengte,aheutute uh leh amipilte uh tung ah leng,chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Mizuautheite tung ah namsau,mihai ahong suak ding uh;agalkapmi tung ah namsau,alunglel khin ding uh. Asakolte uh leh kangtalaite uh tung ah namsau,asung a mi kilak hel tengtengte tung ah leng,numei bang phet ahong hi ding uh;agou thil tung ah namsau lok in a-om maimai ding uhi. Atuite kang in akeu khin a,milimte gam lah ahi ngal a,milimte lah ahailoh uhi. Huaiziak in gamdai gam sahangte, ngiate toh huai ah ateng ding ua, ostrikte leng huai ah ateng ding uh; luah in a-om ngei nawn kei ding; suan tengteng pha in leng luah in a-om kei ding hi. Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah leh akho invengte ahihsiat bangbang in; huai ah kuamah atengta kei ding ua, mihing tapa kuamah in aveh nawnta kei ding uh, Toupa thupawt in achi hi. Ngai un, mallam gam a pan mite ahong ua,mun tawp a kipan nam thupitak leh kumpipa tampi ahong kuan uhi. Thalpeu leh tei atawi ua,hiamgamtak, zahngaihna nei lou ahi uh.Ahusa uh tuipi ging huhu bang ahi a, sakol tung ah atuang ua,michih galkapmi bang a kivan in,Babulon tanu aw,nang ahong sual ding uhi.

Ahusa uh za in Babulon kumpipa khut azawgawpta a,numei nauvei lai natna bang in,natna thupitak in amanta hi. Ngai un, Jordan gammang a kipan humpinelkai, kahna mun a ahong tou bang in ahong paitou ding a; amah a kipan in amaute ka taimangsak pah ding; atung a thunei ding ka ut-ut ka sep ding. Kei bang kua a-om a! Kua'n sep ding. Kei bang kuakua a-om a? Kua'n ahia hunbi hon sehsak ding? Belamchingmi kua ahia ka ma a dingh ding? Huaiziak in Babulon tung ah Toupa thuhilh, Kaldai mite tung a athilseh ngaikhia un. Ganhon noute ngei kaihmang in a-om ding ua, gan khahna mun a mite amulkimsak ding. Babulon lakna husa ah lei aling ding a, akahna husa namte lak a zak ahi ding hi. Babulon Luh A Omna

Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai dih, Babulon leh Kaldai mite tung ah, hihse ding huihpi ka sawl ding hi. Zapsiangmi ka sawl ding, Babulon tung ah, amah zap in agam azapsiang ding ua, siatna ni a um a sual ding ahi ngal ua. Thalpeu zangmi in thalpeu lai a, sik puanak silh in, dingh heh, tangvalhon khat leng hawi lou in, asepaih tengteng nuaimang un. Kaldai gam ah thah in apuk ding ua, akholakte uah sut pailet in a-om ding uhi. Israel leh Judah, agam uah Israel Mi Siangthou tung ah khelhna in adim na ua, a Pathian uh sepaihte' Toupa'n amangngilh kei hi. Taimang unla, Babulon khosung a kipan, michih in amah hinna humbit hen; athulimlouhna manloh kei un, Toupa phulak hun ahi ngal a, ama'n athuk ngeigngei ding hi. Babulon bel Toupa khut a dangka-eng nou, leitung pumpi hihkhamna ahi a, namte'n kham in alung uh amawl khinta hi. Babulon apuk guih a, amangta, amah kah ekek un, hihdam theihdan ding ahihleh singnai damdawi nuhchi laksak un. Babulon hihdam ka tum a, adam tuan kei, amah nusia in eimah gam chiat uah pai ni, amohna in van asun a, van dum pha a dopkang ahi. “Toupa'n ka dikna apuangta; kisa un, Toupa i Pathian thilhih, Zion ah i puang ding uh. “Thalte tat-hiam unla, lumte len un, Media kumpipate lungsim Toupa'n atokthouta a, athiltup Babulon hihsiat ahi. Huai Toupa'n atempul ziak a phulakna ahi. Babulon kulh bul ah kidouna puangzak thak un, venna hihhat in, galvilmi koih un, galbuknate bawl unla, Babulon mite tungtang thu ah Toupa'n agen tak, angaihtuah in ahih khinta hi. Aw nang, tui tamna mun a tengmi, sum-le-pai hau mahmah, na tawpna atungta, na hinna khau akitanta hi.

Sepaihte' Toupa amah kilou in achiamta hi, khaupete bang mai in mihing in ka hon dimsak ngeingei ding, nakpi in ahon otkhum ding uh.”Pathian Phatna La Athilhihtheihna in lei abawl a,apilna in khovel adingkhesak a,alemtheihna in van aphalhsak. A-aw asuah a, van a tui aging hawhaw a,kawlmong a kipan meipi apaitousak a, vuah zukna ding in khua aphesak a,agoubawm a kipan huih anungsak hi. Michih amual ua, theihna louin, dangka-eng sekmichih in alimsek pen azumpih ua,amilim sun lah zuau ngen ahi a,amau ah nakna a-om kei lai hi. Bangmah lou, khemna nasep lel ahi ua,agawt hun chiang in amang ding uh. Jakob tantuan bel hichibang ahi kei, thil tengteng bul ahi ngal a;Israel agouluah nam ahi a,amin sepaihte' Toupa ahi. Toupa Khetbuk Nang bel ka galdouna heipi lehvanzat na hi a,nang hon zang in namte kahihzan a, nang zang in lalnagamte ka hihmang hi. Nang hon zang in sakol lehatung a ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in kangtalaileh atung a tuang ka hihzan a; Nangmah zang in numei leh pasal ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in putek leh tuailai ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in nungak leh tangval ka hihzan hi. Nangmah zang in belamchingleh belamhon ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in louneimi leh bawngtal kop ka hihzan a,nangmah zang in gam ukpipate leh upate ka hihzan sek ahi.Babulon Tung A Gawtna Nang mitmuh ngei in Zion tung a athil hoih lou hih tengteng uh Babulon leh Kaldai mite tung ah ka thuk ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ngai in, leitung pumpi hihsia, aw hihsetu tang lian, nang ka hon dou ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, kawl sang a kipan ka hon khukkhe ding, tang kang mit khinsa in ka hon bawl ding.
