Nang a kipan suang ning ding leh suangphum ding lakkhiak ahi nawn kei ding; tangtawn in na segawp zaw ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. “Huai gam ah kidou puanzak tak unla, namte lak ah pengkul mut un, amah dou ding namte kisasak unla, Araratte, Minnite, Ashkenaz gamte, amah sual ding sepaih sep unla, khaupe zuanzaang bang mai in sakolte kaikhawm un. Amah dou ding namte kisasak un; Media kumpipate, ukpipate leh upate, athuneihna gam tengteng toh. Huai gam nat thuak in aling a, Babulon gam, tengmi om lou a hihsiat ding in, Babulon tung a Toupa thiltup adingh gige hi. Babulon galdou mite'n galkap ding ngapta lou in, akulhpi uah aton maimah uh, apasalphatna uh akhing a, numei bang mai ahong hita ua, atenna munte akang khin a, adeidanna siktawn akitan hi. Thangkou tai in midang leng akituahpih a, misawl in leng midang atuak a, Babulon kumpipa kiang a akhopi ning chih ah amanta uh chih hilh ding in. Lui kannate ua, phailuangte ahal siang ua, kidou mite leng alunglelta uh. Sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian in hichi in achi: Babulon tanu phual sikngil lai bang ahi a, sawt lou nung in buhchil hun atung ah ahong tung ding hi.” “Hon negaita, Babulon kumpipaNebukadnezzar in, hon haizan a,bel vuak lel in ahon bawlta,gulpi bang in ahon nawmvalhta,ka thil limte'n agilpi adimsak a,ahon paikhe nawnta hi. Kei leh ka satung a hiamgam thilhih,Babulon tung ah om hen;ka sisan Kaldai mite tung ah om hen,Jerusalem in achi ding.” Toupa'n Israel Apanpih Ding Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ngai in, nang lam ah ka pang ding a, na phu ka hon laksak ding, atuipi ka kangsak ding a, atuikhuk leng ka keugawsak ding.

Huan Babulon bel hoih lou paihkhawm lel, sehal tenna mun, lamdangsak chiat leh enghou, tengmi om lou mun ahong hi ding. Akikou ton ding ua, humpinelkai lun lai bang in, angik tuaktuak ding uh; humpinelkai nou bang in. Akham mahmah lai un ankuang ka luisak dia, khothei het lou in ka khamsak dia, khanglou het lou ding a a-ihmut dettheihna ding un, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Ka pikhe ding a, belam goh ding bang in, belamtalte leh keltalte bang mai in.”Babulon Tuah Ding Shesak lak ahita ve; leitung pumpi pahtawi zel mat in a-omta ve, namte lak ah Babulon asegawpta ve. Babulon tuipi in atumta, akihot thupi mahmah in akhuh khinta. Akhopi asegawpta a, gamkeu, gamdai, mihing tenlouhna mihing ta kuamah phak louh gam ahong suakta hi. Babulon bel ka gawt ding, avalhkhitsa akam a kipan asuahkhe ding, namte bel akiang ah aluangkhawm nawn kei ding uh, ahi Babulon kulhpi achim ding. Ka mite aw, asung a kipan hong pawt unla, Toupa hehna lauhuai mahmah a kipan, michih amau kihumbit chiat un. Na lungtang uh bah kei hen, huai gam a thuthang leng lau kei un; kum khat in thuthang ahong tung ding a, kum dang in thuthang ahong tung nawn ding ahi, kumpipa leh kumpipa kisual in gam ah hiamgamna a-om ding. Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi. Babulon milim sektawmte tung a vai ka hawm a, agam pumpi zumna ni ding; huan, asung ah amithahte apuk ding uh. Huchi in lei leh van leh asung a om tengteng in, Babulon tung a kipak in la asa ding uh; mallam a kipan sim mite akiang a tung ding uh ahi ngal a, chih Toupa thupawt ahi.

Babulon in Israel mithahte apuksak bang in Babulon ah gam chih a thah a omte apuk ding uh.Babulon A Israel Kiang A Toupa Thugen Nou namsau pel mite aw, kuan unla, dingh maimai kei un, gamlapi a kipan in Toupa theigige unla, na lungsim uah Jerusalem lut hen. Babulon A Dia Thukhenna Huaiziak in ngai un, nite ahong tung hi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi, amilim sektawmte uh tung a ka vaihawmna ding leh agam pumpi tung a miliamte thumna ni ding ngei. Babulon bel van sun in sang mahleh, akulh sangte hihkip mahleh, atung ah ka kiang a kipan hihsemi ahong tung ding, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Babulon a kipan kah husa lehKaldai gam a kipansiatna thupitak husa; Toupa'n Babulon asim a, ahusa uh thupitak ahih daihsak hi.Agamtat husa uh tui tampi ging hawhaw bang ahi, a-awng zuazua ua. Atung ah simmi ahong tung,Babulon tung ngei ah pang ni,amihatte mat in a-om ua,athalpeute uh akitangawpta, Toupa bel thukna Pathian ahi a,athuk ngeingei ding. Huan aheutute leh amipilte,a-ukpipate leh upate leh mihatte ka khamsak dia;alumden ding ua, akhanglou kei ding uh, chih, kumpipa,Sepaihte' Toupa thupawt ahi. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Babulon kumpipa kulhbaang sahtakte achim vek ding a,akongpi sangte akang vek ding;amite'n athawn in asem ua,namte'n meihal a ding lel a kihihgim uh ana hi.Jeremiah Thukhah Babulon Akhakna Judah kumpipa Zedekiah vaihawm akum lina a Babulon ahoh lai a akiang a hoh sam, Seraiah Neriah tapa, Maaseiah tapa kiang a zawlnei Jeremiah thupiak. Seraiah bel kumpipa insung heutupen ahi a, Jeremiah in Babulon tung a siatna hong tung ding tengteng, Babulon tungtang a hiai thu gelh tengteng laibu ah agelh hi.

Huan Jeremiah in Seraiah kiang ah, Babulon na tun hun chiang in hiai thu tengteng sim ngeingei inla, Aw Toupa hiai nam tungtang ah kuamah, mi leh sa leh tenlouhna ding suksiat a om in, tangtawn a kisegawp zaw ding in thu na genta a, na chi ding. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, hiai laibu na sim khit chiang in suang toh gakkhawm in Euphrates Luipi ah pailut inla, Babulon hichibang mai in atum ding a, atung a siatna ka hon tut ding ziak in athounawn kei ding; abah mahmah ding uh, chi in na gen ding ahi, achi a. Hichi teng Jeremiah thu ahi.

Zedekiah in vaihawm apat tung in kum sawmnih leh kum khat a upa ahi a; Jerusalem ah kum sawm-le-khat vai ahawm a; anu min Hamutal ahi a, Libnah a Jeremiah tanu ahi. Jehoiakim hih bangbang in Toupa mitmuh in thil gilou ahih hi. Toupa aheh mahmah ziak in Jerusalem leh Judah gam ah ama a kipan a paihkhiakna khop in thil ahong tungta a; huchi in Babulon kumpipa tung ah Zedekiah ahelta hi. Huan avaihawm akum kuana ah hichi ahong hi a, kha sawmna, huai kha ani sawm ni in Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar leh asepaihhonte Jerusalem dou ding in ahong kuan ua, buk abawlkhumta ua; akim ah kulh abawl uhi. Huchi in kumpipa Zedekiah kum sawm-le-khatna tan in khopi um in a-omta hi. Akha lina, huai kha ani kuana ah khopi ah kial ahong uang mahmah a, gam mipite a ding in nek ding a-omta kei hi. Huchi in khopi kulhbaang asunvang ua, kidoumi tengteng ataimang ua, kumpipa huan a baang nih kikal a kongpi a pawt in, zan in khopi a kipan ataikhia ua; Kaldai mite' khopi a om ahi uhi. Himahleh Kaldai sepaihte'n kumpipa adelh ua, Jeriko Phaizang ah Zedekiah apha ua, sepaihhonte akiang a kipan adalhzak uhi. Huchi in Zedekiah ua, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Hamath gam a Riblah ah apaipih ua; ama'n atung ah vai ahawmkhum hi. Babulon kumpipa'n Zedekiah tapate amitmuh ngei in athat a; Riblah ah Judah heutu tengteng leng athat lai hi Zedekiah mit akhelkhia a, Babulon ah apaipih hi; asih ni tanpha in suangkul ah akoih hi.Jerusalem Tempul Hihsiatna( Kum. Huan kumpipa vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan, amah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar ma a dingh sek, akum sawm-le-kuana, akha ngana, huai kha ani sawmna in Jerusalem ah ahong lut hi.

Toupa' inn leh kumpipa' inn ahal a, Jerusalem inn tengteng toh, inn thupi chitengte mei in ahal hi. Huan Kaldai sepaihhon tengteng, kumpipa vengpa pawl heutu kiang a omte'n Jerusalem kulhte akimvel in ahihchim vek uhi. Huchi in vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in mipi lak a genthei pawl khenkhat khopi a nutsiat a omte, Babulon kumpipa kiang a kipesate leh mikhutsiam omsun tengtengte toh sal in apivekta hi. Himahleh vengpa pawl heutu Nebuzaradan in gam a migenthei pen khenkhatte grephuan kemmi leh vengmi ding in anusia hi. Toupa' inn a dalkhuamte leh akingaknate, dal maiphiat kuang lian Toupa' inn a omte Kaldai mite'n ahihtamgawp ua, dal tengteng Babulon ah ala uhi. Belte leng, vutluahte, khawnvak mihsaknate, maiphiat kuangte, sikkeute, dal tui-um belsuan tengteng a zat sekte uh ala vek uh. Noute leng, meivu koihnate, maiphiat kuangte, belte, khawnvak koihnate, sikkeute leh belhbute; dangka-eng a bawl huai dangkasik in vengmi pawl heutu in ala vek hi. Khuam nih, dal a bawl bawngtal sawm-le-nih, maiphiatna kuang kingakna, kumpipa Solomon in Toupa' inn a dia abawl, hiai tui-um belsuan tengteng dalte tamdan teh vual ahi kei hi. Huan khuamte khuam khat sandan, tong sawm-le-giat ahi a, tong sawm-le-nih in akimvel zou phet ahi; asahdan zung za delh ahi a, asung ahawm hi. Atung ah dal lubawk a-om a, alubawk sandan tong nga ahi a, alubawk kimvel leh theibuhfai, dal ngen a zep ahi a; khuam nih in leng hichi mah bang in theibuhfai a-om hi. Asik ah theibuhfai sawmkua-le-guk a-om a, akim a azepna theibuhfai tengteng zakhat ahi.Judah Mipite Babulon Ah Sal A Pi In A-om Uh( Kum. ) Huan vengpa pawl heutu in siampu lianpen Seraiah leh siampu nihna, Zephaniah leh kongkhak ngakmi thumte hi.

Kidou mite tung a heutu dia seh michilgeh leh mi sagih, kumpipa mel mu sekmi, khopi a omte leh sepaih heutu gelhmi, gam mite min kempa leh gam mipi lak a mi sawmguk, khopi a na omte khopi a kipan in apikhia hi. Nebuzaradan, vengpa pawl heutu in amaute api a, Babulon kumpipa kiang ah Riblah ah atun hi. Babulon kumpipa'n Hamath gam a Riblah ah atung ua khut kha in, athat vek hi. Huchi in Judah nam agam ua kipan in sal a pimang in a-omta. Hiaite Nebukadnezzar in mipi sal a apite ahi uh; akum sagihna ah Juda mite sangthum sawmnih-le-thum; Nebukadnezzar kum sawm-le-giatna ah Jerusalem a kipan in mi zagiat sawmthum-le-nih sal in api hi. Nebukadnezzar akum sawmnih-le-thumna ah Nebuzaradan vengtu pawl heutu in Juda saltang mi zasagih sawmli-le-nga api a, saltang tengteng avek un sangli-le-zaguk ahi uh. Kumpipa saltan kum sawmthum-le-sagihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani sawmnih-le-nga ni geih in hichi ahong hi a, Babulon kumpipa Evil-merodak in avaihawm akum khatna ah, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakin lutang adopkangsak a, suangkul a kipan apikhia hi. Akiang ah hoihtak in apau a, Babulon a akiang a om Kumpipate tutphah sang a sang in laltutphah atunsak hi. Asuangkul puansilhte akikhengsak a, adamsung teng ama ah an ane den hi. Huan amah vakna ding adamsung ni tengteng, asih ni tan in aniteng tantuan Babulon kumpipa'n ape gige hi. Jerusalem Siatna( Kum. —. )

Ezekiel In Pathian Amuhna Masa(. —. )Pathian Laltutphah Huai kha ani ngana ah, huai tuh kumpipa Jehoiakin saltan akum ngana ahi, Kaldai gam a Kebar lui a Buzi tapa siampu Ezekiel kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: huai ah Toupa khut atung ah a-om hi. Huan ka en a, ngai in, mallam a kipan huihpi thupi mahmah ahong kuan a, meipi asah a sah, kuang zoizoi, akim tengteng tanvak puappuap asung mei laitak ah sik am bang a am a-om hi. Huchi in huai lai a kipan in thil hing li kibatpih ahong pawtkhia ua, akimuhdan uh hichibang ahi a: Mihing batna anei ua, mai li anei chiat ua, kha li anei chiat uhi. Akhete uh atang a; akhepek nuailam uh bawngnou khepek bang ahi a; huan dalte mahmah bang in avakkhe zualzual uhi. Apang lite ua akha nuai uah mihing khut bang anei ua; huchi in ali un amel uleh akhate uh hichibang in apu uhi: Akhate uh akizom a; apai un leng akihei ngei kei ua, amazawn uah apai chiat uhi. Amel un akibatpihte mihing mel bang ahi a, ali un ataklam pang uah humpinelkai mel apu ua, ali un aveilam pang uah bawngtal mel apu ua, ali un muvanlai mel apu nawn ua, amel uh huchibang ahi. Huan akhate uh azakkhia ua, akha nihte un akizak zom chiat ua, nih in apumpi uh akhuh uh. Malam ah apai chiat ua, kha paina lam ding ah apai ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uhi. Thil hingte lak ah suangkuangthei ampha bang, meisel bang mai asuk leh tou in apai a; meibel a-ampha mahmah a, mei a kipan khophia ahong suakkhe zualzual hi. Thil hingte khophe zualzual bang in avialtai uhi.

Huan thil hingte ka et lai in, ngai in, thil hingte zul ah amel lite uh a ding in lei ah kangtalai liim khat zel ka mu hi. Kangtalai khe leh atatdan beril suang zia bang mai in alang a, ali un latdan khat anei ua, alatdan uh leh atatdan uh kangtalai liim khat sung a kangtalai liim dang om bang ahi hi. Apai chiang un sik li in apai thei ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uh. Akangtalai liim kual sangtak leh mulkimhuaitak ahi a; ali un akual teng mit in adim uhi. Huchi in thil hingte apai chiang un azul uah kangtalai peite apai sam uhi; thil hingte lei a kipan dopkang a a-om uleh kangtalai liimte leng dopkang in a-om sam uhi. Kha apai utna lam peuhmah ah apai ua; huai lam a kha apai zel ziak in; huchi in kangtalai liimte azul uah dopkang in a-om ua, thil hing kha kangtalai liimte ah a-om hi. Huaite apai chiang un hiaite apai uhi; huaite adin chiang un hiaite adingh ua; huaite lei a kipan a dopkang a a-om chiang un kangtalai liimte amau zul ah dopkang in a-om ua, kangtalai liimte ah thil hingte kha a-om hi.Pathian Thupina Muhna Thil hingte lutung ah van kibatpih a-om a, kristal vak bang a te mulkimhuaitak alutung uah akiphalh zeizoi hi. Van dum nuai ah akha uh akop khat thil hing dangte sun in azak ua, akha uh kop khat in apumpi uh akhuh uhi. Huan alen chiang un akha ging uh tui tampi mahmah ging bang, bangkim hihtheipa aw bang mai, mipi ging vengvung husa, sepaihhon husa bang mai in ka za a; adin uleh akha uh akaisak uhi. Alutung ua vansin tung ah aw ahong om a, adin uleh akha uh akaisak uhi.

Huan alutung ua vansin tung ah laltutphah bang, sapphir suang bang mai a kimu a-om a; huai laltutphah batpih tung ah mihing bang a kilang a-om hi. Akawng chiang tunglam sik hal-ap bang mai in ka mu a, akawng hileh kilawm chiang nuailam mei bang mai hi in ka mu a, avak kimvel lelaw hi. Vuahzuk ni a meipi tung a sakhituihup latdan bang in akim vak alang hi. Hiai Toupa thupina latdan bang ahi. Huan ka muh in akhup in ka puk a, thugenpa aw ka za hi.

Huan ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na khe in dingh in, na kiang ah thu ka gen ding hi,” achi hi. Zawlnei Ding A Ezekiel Sapna Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel suante kiang ah, helhat nam, ka tung a helnakte kiang ah ka hon sawl hi; amau leh apipute leng hiai ni pha nangawn in ka tung ah atalek uhi.” Suan lungkhauh leh genhakte ahi ua, akiang uah nang ka hon sawl hi; akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi,” na chi ding ahi. Huchi in amau angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, (amaute lah helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua), alak uah zawlnei a-om chih atheigige ding uhi. “Nang, mihing tapa, amaute kihta ke'nla, athu uah leng lunglel sam ke'n, na kiang ah khaulingnei leh louling neite om in, aikam lak a teng himah lechin; helhatmi himah le uh, athu uh kihta ke'nla, alatdan uah leng lunglel sam ke'n. Angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, akiang uah ka thu na gen ding ahi; amaute lah helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua. “Himahleh nang mihing tapa, na kiang a ka gen ngaikhia in; mihelhat inkuan bang in helhat ke'nla; na kam ka inla, ka hon piak ne in,” achi hi. Huan ka en a ngai in, khut in ahon sawk a, ngai in huai ah laibuzial a-om hi. Ka ma ah aphalh a, asunglam leh apolam gelh ahi a; huai ah kahna, lusuunna leh tunggikna gelhna a-om hi.

Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na muh ne in; laibuzial ne inla, Israel inkote kiang ah thu va gen in,” achi hi. Huchi in ka kam ka ka a, laibuzial ahon nesakta hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ka hon piak hiai laibuzial in na gil ah vahsak inla, hiai in na gilsung hihdim in,” achi hi. Huchi in ka neta a, akhumdan ka kam ah khuaizu bang ahi hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa kuan inla, Israel inkote kiang ah ka thute zang in va gen in. Pau tuam leh pau haksate kiang a sawl na hi kei a, Israel inkote kiang a sawl na hi zaw a; nam pau tuam leh pau haksa athu uh na theihtheihlouhte kiang a sawl na hi kei hi. Akiang ua nang ka hon sawl in pel lou in na thu angaikhe mahmah ding uh. Himahleh Israel inkote'n ahon ngaikhe kei ding ua, kei ahon ngaikhe kei ding uh, Israel inkote tengteng taltangtak leh lungtang genhak mahmah ahi uhi. Huan ngai in, na mai amau mai lak ah khauhsak in, na taltang leng amau taltang sang a takzaw in ka bawl hi. Suang tak mahmah, meisuang sang a takzaw in na tal ka bawl a, lau ke'nla, amit hah uah lunglel sam ke'n, helhat inkuan himah le uh,” achi hi. Huai lou leng ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na kiang a ka thugen ding tengteng na bil in ngaikhia inla, na lungtang ah khum in. Kuan inla, na chipih saltangte kiang va tung inla; angaikhia uhiam, angaikhe kei uhiam, ‘Hichibang Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in gen inla, hilh in,” achi hi. Huchi in kha in ahon domkangta a, amun a kipan Toupa thupina adinkhiak lai in, ka nunglam ah zinling thawm ka za hi.

Huai tuh thil hingte kha kisukha leh akiang ua kangtalai peite, zinling thawm bang nei ahi uhi. Huchi in kha in hon domkang a, ahon lamangta a, heh mahmah leh ut lou pipi in ka kuanta hi; Toupa khut lah ka tung ah ahat ngal a. Huchi in Telabib a saltangte, Kebar lui a tengte kiang ka va tung a, atutna uah ka tu a; lamdang satak in huai ah ni sagih ka tuta hi.Amite Vengtu Ding In Toupa'n Ezekiel Asep(Eze. ) Huchi in ni sagih abei in hichi ahong hi a, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Israel inkote vilpa in nang ka hon sep hi; huchi in ka kam a thu na za ding a, kei sik in amaute vauna na pe ding hi.” Migilou kiang a ka thu, “Na si mahmah ding,” ka chih a, huai migilou ahinna hum ding a agitlouhna lampi paisan ding a vauna na neih louh a, vauna thu leng na hilh sam louh a, huai migilou agitlouhna a asihleh asisan moh nang lak ah ka hon sik ngeingei ding hi. Himahleh huai migilou na vau a, agitlouhna apaisan louh a, agitlouhna lampi alehngatsan sam keileh, agitlouhna ah asi ding a, nang bel na hinna na humbit ahi zaw ding hi. “Huan midiktat in adiktatna lehngatsan a gitlouhna ahih a, ama a pukna ka koihleh, asi ding; vauna na neih louh ziak in akhelhna ah asi ding a; athil diktat ahihsate theihgige ahi kei ding; asisan moh ahihleh na lak ah ka hon sik ding hi. Himahleh midiktat khial lou ding a na vauhilh a, akhelh keileh vauna akhawksak ziak in ahing ding

nang leng na hinna na humbit ding hi,” achi hi.Ezekiel Apau Thei kei Ding Huan huai ah Toupa khut ka tung ah a-om a, ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, phaizang ah pai inla, huai ah ka hon houpih ding,” achi a. Huchi in ka thou a, phaizang ah ka paita hi. Ngai in, huai ah Toupa thupina, Kebar lui a ka muh thupina bang ahong dingh a, kei ka khuppukta hi. Huchi in kei ah kha ahong lut a, ka khe in ahon dingsak a, ahon houpih a, “Pai inla, na inn ah kikhakkhum in. Nang zaw, mihing tapa, khauhual in ahon khih ding ua, ahon gak ding ua, alak uah na pawtkhe nawn kei ding. Na dangtawng ah na lei ka belhsak ding a, na pau nawn kei ding a, amaute salpa na hi nawn kei ding; helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua.” Himahleh na kiang a thu ka gen hun chiang in na kam ka hon ka sak ding a, akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Angaikhia in ngaikhia henla, angaikhe lou in ngaikhe kei hen, helhat inkuan ahi ngal ua, achi, ” chi in na gen ding hi.

Akim a um in kulh khohkhum inla, mual pawng bawlkhum in sepaih giahbukte bawlkhum inla, kulh suksiatnate akim in bawlkhum in. Sikpek la inla, nangmah leh khopi kikal ah sik baang ding in tung in; huai lam masuan inla, um in a-om ding a, nangmah in na um ding ahi. Hiai Israel inkote a dia etsak kholhna ahi ding. “Huan nang bel na veilam pang delh in lum inla, atung ah Israel inkote gitlouhna nga in; atung a na lup sung ani zah bang zel a agitlouhna uh na puak ding ahi. Jerusalem Luhna Ding Ezekiel In Aching “Nang mihing tapa, teklei pek la inla, na ma ah koih in, huai tung ah khopi Jerusalem khopi lim bawl in. Agitlouhna kumte uh nang a ding a nite hi ding in lah ka septa ngal a, ni zathum-leh-sawmkua; huchibang in Israel inkote gitlouhna na po ding ahi. Hiaite na khit hun chiang in na taklam pang delh in na lum leuleu ding a, Judah inkote gitlouhna na po ding, ni sawmli nang ding in ka sep hi; ni khat kum khat zel hi ding in. “Na ban khuh lou a zak in Jerusalem kiluhna lam nga inla, atungthu genkhia in. Ngai in, khauhual in ka hon hentom a, khopi kiluh sung nite abei masiah koilam ah leng na kihei ding ahi kei hi. “Buh, buhman, be, behiang, vai buhman la inla, bel khat ah koih in, huan tanghou in bawl in; na pang khat lam delh a na lup sung teng, ni zathum-le-sawmkua sung, huai na ne ding ahi. Na an nek ding teh vek ding ahi, ni khat in shekel sawmnih ahi ding ahi; hunbi neitak in na ne ding ahi.

Tuite leng teh vek in na dawn ding ahi, hin khat seh guk suah seh khat ahi ding ahi, hunbi neitak in na dawn ding ahi. Amitmuh un mihing ekgaw sing dia zang in na kang ding a, buhman tanghou nek in na ne ding,” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa'n, “Hichibang an thanghuai Israel suante'n ka delhmangna ding namte lak ah ane ding uh,” achi hi. Huan ke'n, “Eh! Toupa Pathian, Ngai dih, ka hinna hihnit ahi ngei kei a, ka tuailai a kipan tutan in leng, amah sih a si hiam, gamsa keih hiam ka ne ngei nai kei a, sa kihhuai ka kam ah alut ngei nai kei hi,” ka chi hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “En in, mihing ek sik in bawng ek ka hon pia, huaite zang in nek dingte na bawl ding hi,” achi hi. Huai lou leng ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ngai dih, Jerusalem ah, an hinna bul ka hihse ding a, a-an uh teh vek in lauthawngtak in ane ding uh; tui leng teh vek in, lungkhamtak in adawn ding uhi. An leh tui tasam a, lungkhamtak a ki-entuah a, agitlouhna ua athammang khitna ding un.”

Seh thum a khen seh khat sim a a-om sung nite abei hun chiang in khopi lai a mei ah na hal ding ahi; seh thum a khen seh khat nawn na la dia, akim ah namsau in na satnen ding ahi; huan, seh thum a khen seh khat nawn huih mutleng ding in na thehzak ding a, ke'n namsau in ka delhzui ding hi. Huan tawmchik na la ding a, na puanaktual mong ah na tun ding hi. Hiaite lak a tam lou na la ding a, mei ah na thehlut ding a, na hal ding ahi; huai a kipan in Israel inkote tengteng ah mei ahong pawt ding,” achi hi. Ezekiel Samtanna “Huan nang mihing tapa, namsau hiam mahmah la inla, na lu leh na khamul metna ding in sammetmi tem zang in; huan bukna la inla, sam khen in. Namte sang a nakpi a gitlouhna hih zaw in ka thugel tung ah ahel a, akim a gamte sang a thupizaw in ka dan bawl tung ah ahel uhi. Ka thugelte apaikhia ua, ka dan bawlte bang in a-om kei uhi.” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na kim a namte sang a buai hatzaw in na om a, ka dan thusehte bawl bang in na om kei a, ka thukhennate leng na zui kei ua, namte a dia ka thukhendan a na hih louh ziak un, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, kei, kei nangawn in leng ka hon nang ahi, namte mitmuh ngei in na lak uah vaihawmna ka tangtungsak ding hi. Na kihhuaina tengteng uh ziak in thil ka hih ngei nai louh, hih leng ka hih ngei nawn louh ding na tung uah ka hih ding hi.

Huchi in pate'n na sung ah atate uh ane ding ua, tate'n leng apate uh ane ding uh; nang a mikhosuaksun tengteng ka dalhsak vek ding.” Huchi in hiai Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi: “Na nitna leh na kihhuainate a ka mun siangthou na hihnit ziak in, kei ka hin bang in, ka hon kiamsak ding a, ka mit in ahon maih het kei ding a, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding hi. Seh thum a khen seh khat hipi in hiam, kial in hiam na lak uah asi ding uh; seh thum a khen seh khat nawn ka hihdalh ding a, namsau in ka delhzui ding hi.” Hichibang in ka hehna ka tangtungsak ding a, atung uah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a, ka om anuamta ding hi; kei Toupa'n atung ua ka hehna ka lungdamsak hun chiang in phatuamngaitak in ka genta chih atheikhe ding uh. Huai lou in, na kim a namte lak ah leh vialvak tengtengte mitmuh in kho segawp leh simmohhuai in ka hon bawl ding hi. Huchi in thangpai leh heh mahmah a, nakpi a taihilh a, na tung a thugelte ka tunsak hun in na kim a namte mitmuh in nuihsan leh kouna leh hilhna leh mulkimhuai na hi ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita hi. Atung uah kialna thaltang hoih loutak manna ding, noumau manna ding ka hon kesak ding; na tung uah kialna ka uangsak ding a, na an uh, hinna bul ka hihse ding hi. Huchi in na tung uah kialna leh gamsa hangte ka hon sawl ding a, ta leh nau tan in ahon laksak ding uh; hipi leh sisan suahna na lak uah aleng ding a; na tung uah namsau ka hon sawl ding, kei Toupa'n ka chita hi, chi in.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Israel tang lam nga inla, akiang uah thu gen inla, Israel tangte aw, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia un; Toupa Pathian in tangte leh mualte kiang ah, leh phaizangte leh kuamte kiang ah hichi in achi: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in na tung uah namsau ka hon lik ding a, na mun sangte uh ka hihse vek ding. Na maitamte uh loihsan in a-om ding a, na ni pathian limte uh akitamzan ding; na mithah luangte uh na milimte uh ma ah ka pai ding hi. Amilimte uh ma ah Israel suante luang ka koihkhawm ding a, na guhte uh na maitam kim uah ka thehzak ding hi. Milim Biakna Mohpaihna Huan na lak uah mithahte apuk ding ua, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. “Himahleh gam chih a na dalhzak hun chiang un namte lak ah namsau a suakta a-om ding ziak un akhen ka hon hawi ding. Huan na lak ua kipan a pawtte'n sal a apina namte uh lak ah kei ahon theigige ding ua, a-angkawmna lungtang uh ka lakmang sakleh amit uh, amilim lam ua angkawmte ka hihsiat sakdante athei ding uh; thil gilou a na hih ziak uleh akihhuai ziak un amau mitmuh ngei in leng kihhuai akisa ding uh. Huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding ua, hiai thil hoih lou akiang uah ka hih ding a, amawk in ka chi kei chih athei ding uh, chi in,” achi hi. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na khut beng in na khe pek inla, Maizen! Israel inkote kihhuaina gitlouh ziak maw! Namsau in, kial in, hipi in apuk ding uhi.

Gamlapi a om hipi in asi ding ua, anai a om namsau in apuk ding ua, aval, um a omte kial in asi ding uh; hichibang in ka hehna mahmah atung uah ka bukimsak ding hi. Mual sang teng ah, tang vumte ah leh sing hing peuhmah nuai ah leh tosaw bawkpha chih nuai a amilimte uh kiang a gimlim alatna mun ua amaitam kim ua amilimte uh lak a amisi luangte uh a-om hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Atung uah ka khut ka lik ding a, gamdai a kipan Diblah lam a atenna mun tengteng uh gamsia suaksak in ka loihsan vek ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Nang mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in Israel gam kiang ah hichi in achi: Tawpna, tawpna gam ning li ah ahong tung hi. “Tu nang a ding in tawpna ahi, na tung ah ka hehna ka hon tungsak ding a, na omdan bang zel in vai ka hon hawmsak ding a, na kihhuaina tengteng na tung ah ka hon tun ding hi. Ka mit in ahon maih kei dia, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding hi; na omdan bang in na tung ah ka hon tun zaw ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Siatna, siatgawpna mah, ngai dih, ahong tung hi. Tawpna ahong tung hi, tawpna ahong tung hi, na tung ah ahong thouta, ngai in, ahong tung hi. Israelte Hun Tawp Naina Huan ka mit in ahon maih kei dia, ka hon hehpih sam kei ding; na omdan bang zel in na tung ah ka hon tun ding a, na kihhuaina leng na lak uah a-om ding; huchi in kei Toupa gawt theipa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. “Ngai in, ani, ngai in, ahong tung hi, na siatna ding apawtta, satna chiang apakta, kisaktheihna apakmumta hi. Hiamgamna gitlouhna chiang asuakta ahi; kua mahmah a-omta kei ding a, ahusa uhiam, ahauhsakna uhiam leng; kuamah in a-it sam kei ding uh. “Hun ahong tungta, ani ahong naita; aleimi kipak kei henla, akhawngmi leng dah kei hen; thangpaihna avek ua tung ah a-omta hi. Azuakmi in, dam lai mahleh, athil zuak amu nawn kei ding; muhkholhna zaw avek ua tungthu ahi a, kuamah akik kei ding uh, kuamah ahinna thulimlouhna uah akhosa suak sam kei ding uh. Pengkul amut ua, bangkim akimanta; himahleh kidouna ah kuamah ahoh kei uh

avek ua tung a ka hehna a-om ziak in.Israel Khelhna Ziak A Sawina “Inpua ah namsau, asung ah hipi leh kial; gam a om namsau in asi ding ua, khopi a om kial leh hipi in ane khin ding hi. Himahleh ataikhete, apawt ding ua, tangte ah phaizang gam vakhu bang in; avek un, lungzuangtak in amau thulimlouhna chiat ah a-om ding uh. Khut tengteng azaw ding a, khuk tengteng tui bang in anem ding. Sai-ip puan ateng ding ua, mulkimna in amau atuam ding a, mel chiteng ah zumna alang ding a, alutang tengteng uh agiau khin ding hi. Adangkasik uh leh adangka-engte un Toupa heh ni chiang in ahunkhe thei kei ding a, ahinna uh ataisak kei ding a, agil uh avahsak sam kei ding; athulimlouhna uh pukna ahih khit tak ziak in. Akizepna kilawmna uh akisaktheihpih ua, akihhuaina milim un leh anitna thil un asuaksak zaw lel uhi; huaiziak in amau a ding in thilkihhuai ding in ka na bawlta hi. “Huan gallak ding in namdang khut ah ka pe dia, lei a migiloute kiang ah gallak ding in ka pe ding a, amau ana hihnin ding uh. Amaute ka nungngatsan ding a, ka mun siang ahihnin ding uh; huan guta ahong lut dia, ahihnin ding uh. “Gamsung lah sisan suah hat vaihawmna a dim a, hiamgamna a khopi adim ziak in khainiang bawl un. Huchi in namdang giloupente ka hon pilut ding a a-innte uh aneihsak ding ua; ahatna otpih uh ka hihtawp ding a, amun siangte uh hihnit in a-om ding hi. Lungzinna ahong tung a, muanna azong ua, a-om het kei hi.

Siatna tung ah siatsemna, thuthang tung ah thuthang ahong om ding a, zawlnei lak ah kilakna azong ding ua, himahleh dante siampu lak ah amang ding a, upate lak ah thudot a-om kei ding hi. Kumpipa adah ding a, kumpi tapa lungdonna puansilh in akivan ding a, vantang khut leng aling ding. Akiang uah a-omdan bang un ka hih ding a, athilhih bang zel un vai ka hawmsak ding; huan Toupa ka hi chih atheita ding uh,” achi hi.

Akum gukna, akha gukna, huai kha ani nga ni in hichi ahong hi a, ka inn a ka tut a, Judah upate ka ma a atut lai un Toupa Pathian khut ka tung ah ahong om hi. Huchi in ka en a, ngai in, mi meikuang bang a kimu ahong om a; akawng chiang nuailam hi dia kilawm meikuang bang ahi a; akawng chiang tunglam bel sik hal-ap bang a vaktak ahi. Huchi in khut melput ahon sawkkhia a, ka talsam a hon man in, kha in lei leh van kikal ah ahon domkang a, Pathian kilakna in Jerusalem ah ahon pi hi, Jerusalem mallam huang sungnung kongpi khakna kiang ahon tun a, huai ah mullitna lim tutna mun a-om a, huai in amullitsak hi. Huan ngai in, phaizang a ka muh bang mah in huai ah Israel' Pathian thupina a-om hi. Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, mallam nga in na mitsuan dih ve leh,” achi hi. Huchi in mallam nga in ka mit ka suan a, ngai in, maitam kongpi mallam lutna ah hiai mullitna lim ana om hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, athilhih uh na mu hia? Israel inkote'n thilkihhuai mahmah, hiai a ahih ngei uh, ka inn siangthou a kipan a gamla a ka paimangna ding a ahih uh? Himahleh thil dang kihhuaizaw na mu nawn lai ding,” achi hi. Huan huangsung lutna ah ahon pi a; ka en a, baang ah vang ana om hi. Ezekiel In Pathian Amuh Nihveina(. —. )Jerusalem A Milim Biakna Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Lut inla, hiai a khelhna kihhuaitak ahih uh en dih,” achi hi. Huchi in ka lut a, ka mu a, ngai in, thil hing chi chih limte, gamsa kihhuai limte, Israel inkote milim tengteng baang ah akimvel in ana tuang hi.

Huan ama uah Israel inkuan, upate lak a mi sawmsagihte adingh ua, alaitak uah Sephan tapa Jaazaniah adingh a, michih in belhbu atawi chiat ua; huan gimlim khu gim azamtou ngoingoi hi. Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel inkuan upate mial nuai a thilhih na mu hia? Michih in milim dantan a ahih uh? Toupa'n ahon mu kei a, Toupa'n gam apaisanta aka,” achi uhi. Ka kiang ah, “Athilhih uh kihhuai sem dang leng na mu nawn lai ding,” achi lai hi. Huchi in Toupa' inn mallam panglutna kongkhak ah ahon pi a, ngai dih, huai ah numeite Tammuz ngai in kap in atu uhi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw mihing tapa, hiai na mu hia? Hiai sang a kihhuaizaw sem na mu nawn lai ding,” achi hi. Huan Toupa' inn um sungnungzaw ah ahon pilut a, ngai in, Toupa tempul lutna ah inliim leh maitam kikal ah mi sawmnih-le-nga, Toupa tempul lam anungngat a, amaite uh suahlam nga in ana om ua, suahlam ah ni ana bia uhi. Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai na mu hia, aw mihing tapa, athilkihhuai hih uh, hiai ahih uh Judah inkote a ding in thil neutham ahi hia? Gam hiamgamna in ahihdim ua, hon hehsak nawn sem ua, anak uah singhiang abat uhi. Huaiziak in ke'n leng hehtak in ka hih ding a; ka mit in amaih kei dia, ka hehpih sam kei ding; aw ngaihtak in ka bil ah hong kikou mah le uh ka ngaikhe kei ding,” achi hi.

Huchi in bil a ka zak in, “Khopi kem mite michih hihmanna van tawi in hong nai uhen,” chi in ngaihtak in akikou hi. Huan ngai in, mallam kongpi tungnung paina a kipan in mi guk ahong pai ua, michih in hihlupna van atawi chiat ua; alai ua mi khat puanmalngat silh in laituibuk akuah hi. Alut ua, dal maitam kiang ah adingh uhi. Huan Israel' Pathian thupina a omna cherub a kipan in huai inn kongpi kiang ah apaitou a; puanmalngat silh, laituibuk kuahpa asam hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Khopi sung tawnsuak inla, Jerusalem tawnsuak in; asung a thilkihhuai hihsate ziak atunggik a kapte atal uah chiamteh in,” achi hi. Huan midangte kiang ah ka zak mahmah in, “Anung ah khopi tawnsuak unla, khut kha un, na mit un mumaih kei henla, hehpih sam kei un. Putekte, tangvalte, nungakte, naupangte leh nute that siang vek un. Chiamtehna neite bel hon naih kei un; ka Mun Siangthou ah pan un,” achi hi. Huchi in inn kong a upate ah apan uhi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Inn hihbuah unla, ahuangsungte mi luang in dimsak unla, pawt un,” achi hi. Huan apawtta ua, khopi ah agamtangta uhi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, khopi ah agamtat lai un kei bel nutsiat in ka na om a, akhup in ka puk hi. “Ah! Toupa Pathian, Jerusalem tung a na hehna na sunbuak ah Israel khosuaksunte leng hihman vek sawm na hi hiam?” chi in ka kikou hi. Jerusalem Sawi In A-om Kei toh kisai in leng, ka mit in amau ka mumaih kei ding a, ka hehpih sam kei ding hi; agitlouhna uh avekpi in amau ka khusak ding,” achi hi. Huchi in ngai in, puanmalngat silh a laituibuk kuahpa'n thu atun a, “N'on thupiak bang in ka hih khinta,” achi hi.

Huchi in ka en a, ngai in, cherubte lutung a vansin om ah sapphir suang hileh kilawmtak, laltutphah bangtak a kimu ahong lang hi. Ama'n puanmalngat silhpa kiang ah, “Cherub nuai a kangtalai peite kikal ah va lut inla, cherubte kikal a meivu na khut langnih dim in va luak inla, khopi tung ah thehzak in,” achi hi. Ka mitmuh lai mahmah in akuanta hi. Huan mi ahoh lai in tempul taklam pang ah cherubte adingh ua; huang sungnungpen meipi in adimta hi. Toupa thupina cherubte a kipan apaitou a, inn kongpi tung ah ava dinghta a, huai inn meipi in adim a, Toupa thupina vak in huangsung adimta hi. Cherubte khazap gingte huangsung ponungzaw leng Pathian Bangkim hihthei in ahon houpih lai a a-om bang mai in akiza hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, puanmalngat silhpa kiang ah, “Cherubte kikal a kangtalai pei kikal a kipan mei va la in,” chi a thu apiakleh, amah ava lut a, kangtalai liimte bul ah ava dinghta hi. Huan cherubim, cherubte kikal a kipan in, cherubte kikal a mei om sawk in, ala a, puanmalngat silhpa khut ah apia a, ama'n ana la a, apawtkheta hi. Huchi in cherubte bel akha nuai uah mihing khut bangtak ahong lang a. Huan ka en a, ngai in, cherubte sik ah kangtalai liim li, cherub khat kiang ah, kangtalai liim khat, cherub dang kiang ah kangtalai liim dang ka mu a; kangtalai liim latdan bel beril suang zia bang ahi. Pathian Thupina In Tempul Anusia Apai chiang un sik li in apai thei ua, apai un leng akihei ngei kei uh; himahleh amasa ngatna lam azui zel ua, apai un akihei tuan kei uh.

Huan apumpi uh apum in anungte uh, akhutte uh, akhate uleh kangtalai liimte leng akim in mit in adim a, ali ua kangtalai liimte leng. Akangtalai liimte bil a ka zak mahmah in, “Kangtalai liimte kipei,” chih ahi. Michih in mel li chiat anei ua, mel khat cherub mel ahi a, anihna mihing mel ahi a, athumna humpinelkai mel, alina muvanlai mel ahi. Huchi in cherubte apaitou ua; hiai bel Kebar lui gei a thil hing ka muh ahi. Huan cherubte apai uleh kangtalai liimte leng agei uah apai tei a, cherubte'n lei a kipan paitou ding a akhate uh azak uleh kangtalai liimte'n alehngatsan ngei kei uh. Adin uleh hiaite adingh tei ua, apaitouh uleh hiaite leng apai tei zel ua, thil hingte kha amau ah a-om hi. Toupa thupina inpi kongpi tung a kipan apawtkhia a, cherubte tung ah adinghta hi. Huan cherubte'n akha uh azak ua, apawt un ka mitmuh mahmah in lei a kipan apaitou ua; kangtalai liimte akiang uah a-om zel a; huan Toupa Inn lutna suahlam kongkhak chin ah adinghta a; Israel' Pathian thupina atung uah a-om hi. Hiai bel Kebar lui a Israel' Pathian nuai a ka thil hing muh mah ahi; cherubte ahi uh chih ka thei hi. Avek un maitang li leh kha li anei chiat ua, akha nuai uah mihing khut bang mai a-om hi. Huan amel lam uh ahihleh Kebar lui a ka muh melte mah bang, alatdan uleh amau mahmah leng ahi uh; huan amazawn zel uah apai chiat uhi.

Huan kha in ahon domkang a, Toupa' inn suahlam lutna, suahlam muhna ahon tun a; ngai in, lutna kongkhak chin ah mi sawmnih-le-nga ana om ua; alak uah Azzur tapa Jaazaniah leh Benaiah tapa Pelatiah, mipi heutute ka mu hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiaite gitlouhna sawmkhete ahi ua, hiai khopi a gitlouh sawmkhe mite ahi uh. Inn lam hun ahi nai kei; hiai khopi sa uina bel ahi a, eite asa i hi uh,” chite. “Huaiziak in thu gen inla, aw mihing tapa, atung uah thu gen in,” achi hi. Huan ka tung ah Toupa kha ahong tung a, ama'n ka kiang ah, “Gen in, Toupa'n hichi in achi: Hichibang in na hihsek ua, aw Israel inkote aw, na lungsim ua thil hong tungte ka theisiang vek hi. Hiai khopi ah na mithahte uh na pungsak huthut ua, akongzingte na mithah un na dimsakta uhi.” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na mithah uh alai a na koihte uh asa ahi ua; hiai khopi ahihleh sa uina bel ahi, himahleh alai a kipan suankhiak in na om ding uhi. Namsau na kihta ua, na tung uah namsau ka hon tun ding, Toupa Pathian in achi. “Alai a kipan ka hon pawtkhesak ding a, namdangte khut ah ka hon mansak ding a, na tungthu uh angaihtuah ding uh. Namsau in na si ding ua, Israel gamgi lam ah na tungthu uh ka ngaihtuah ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. Jerusalem Mohpaih In A-om Huan Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh, ka dan bawl na zui kei ua, ka thupawt leng na zui sam kei ua; na kim ua namte hihdan na zui zawta uh, achi,” chi in.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, thu ka genleh Benaiah tapa Pelatiah ana sita mai a, huchi in ka khuppuk a, aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Ah, Toupa Pathian, Israel khosuaksunte chimihna na bawl ding a hia?” ka chi hi.Saltangte Kiang A Pathian Thuchiam Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na unaute, na chi-le-kuangte ngei leh Israel inkote tengteng, avek un, Jerusalem luah mite'n Toupa a kipan paimang un, hiai gam kou a dia piak ahita hi,” achihnate uh ahi uhi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamlapi ah namte lak ah ka suanmang a, gam tampi ah ka hihdalh na a, sawt lou kal in ava tunna gam uah amaute a ding in Mun Siangthou ka hi ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Namdangte a kipan in ka hon pikhawm nawn ding a, na dalhna gam ua kipan ka hon kaikhawm nawn ding a, Israel gam ka hon pe ding hi. Huchi in huai ah ahong pai ding ua, thil huathuai tengteng leh thilkihhuaite a kipan alamang ding uhi. Lungtang khat ka pe ding a, na sung uah lungsim thak ka koih ding. Huan asa ua kipan lungtangsak ka lamang ding a, akiang uah lungtang nem ka pe ding hi. Ka dan thusehte azuih ua, ka thupiakte avom ua, ahihtheihna ding un, huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei leng a Pathian uh ka hi ding. Ahuathuaina uleh akihhuaina laigil lungtang zuite bel akhelhna uh avek in amau ka khusak ding, Toupa Pathian in achi.Pathian Thupina In Jerusalem Anusia Huchi in cherubte'n akhate uh azak ua, akiang uah kangtalai liimte a-om a, atung uah Israel' Pathian thupina a-om hi. Khopi lai a kipan in Toupa thupina apaitou a, khopi suahlam pang a tang sang ah ava dinghta hi. Huan kha in ahon domkang a, kilakna ah Pathian kha in Kaldai gam a saltangte kiang ah ahon tun hi. Huchi in ka kilakna muh in ahon paitouhsanta hi. Huchi in saltangte kiang ah Toupa'n thil ahon etsak tengteng ka genta hi.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, helhat inkuan, muhna ding mit nei a mu lou, zakna ding bil nei a zaloute lak a om na hi; helhat inkuan ahih himhim ziak un. “Huaiziak in nang mihing tapa, saltanna a pai ding bang in na vante lomgak dimdiam inla, sun khovak ah amitmuh mahmah un paikhia in; amuh mahmah na mun ua kipan mun dang ah na paikhe ding ahi; helhat inkuan ahi ua, akingaihtuah loh kha mai ding uh. Huan na van sun khovak in amitmuh mahmah uah, saltang pai ding van lakkhiak in na lakhe ding a, nang mahmah leng amitmuh uah gamdang a khakmang ding pai in na pai ding ahi. Amitmuh mahmah uah kulhbaang vangsak inla, huai ah lakhia in. Amitmuh mahmah uah na po ding a, mial ah na paikhe ding a, lei na muhlouhna ding in na mai na khuh ding ahi; Israel inkote a ding in etsak kholhna ding in nang ka hon bawl ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka hihta a, ka van saltang ding van bang in sun khovak in ka lakhia a, ka khut in baang ka sunvang a, khomial lai in ka lakhia a, amitmuh mahmah uah ka pua hi. Huan zingsang in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. Mihing tapa, Israel inkuan, helhat inkuante'n na kiang ah, “Bang hih na hia?” ahon chi uh ahi kei maw? Akiang uah, “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai thuphuan Jerusalem heutute leh Israel inkote pumpi, a-omna uh mite tungthu ding ahi. Nou a ding in etsak kholhna ka hi a, ka chih bang geih a atung ua hih ahi ding; khakmang in, saltang ding in apaimang ding uh,” chi in.

“Huan alak ua heutu omsun in mial nuai ah aliang in apo ding a, apaikhe ding; alakkhiakna ding un baang avangsak ua, amit in gam amuh nawn louh ziak in amai akhuh ding ahi. Galtai A Om Bang Limching Zawlnei Amah ka len in ka khuh ding a, ka thang a awk ahi ding; Kaldai gam a Babulon ah ka hon pi ding a, muh zaw amu kei ding; huai ah asi ding hi. Amah panpih dia akiang a omte leh asepaihte tengteng gam chih ah ka hihzak ding a, namsau dokkhia in ka delh ding hi. “Huan namte lak a ka delhzak a, gam chih a ka hihdalh hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Himahleh namsau, kial, hipi a kipan mi tawmchik ka hawi ding; huaite'n ahong paina gam ua namte kiang ah akihhuaina tengteng aphuanna ding un; kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.Zawlnei Linna Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. “Mihing tapa, na an ling vonvon kawm in ne inla, na tui lungzing a ling kawm in dawn in. Huan gam a mite kiang ah Toupa Pathian in Jerusalem a tengte tungtang ah leh Israel gam tungtang ah hichi in achi: Lau kawm in a-ante uh ane ding ua, lungzingtak in atui uh adawn ding ua, agamsung a tengte hiamgamna ziak in asung a thil om tengteng a kipan hihgawp in a-om ding hi. Huchi in mite tenna khopite loihsan in a-om ding a, agam hihsiat in a-om ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.Paunak Minthang Leh Limsak Louh Thugen Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi: “Mihing tapa, Israel gam a hiai paunak na neih uh bang chihna ahia?

Anite asawt chiang in kilakna peuhmah avuaksuak nawn zel,” na chih uh. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hiai paunak ka hihbei ding a, Israel gam ah azang nawn ngei kei ding uh; kilakna tundik ni ding anaita, chi in akiang uah gen zaw in. “Israel inkuante lak ah kilakna hong vuaksuak leh aisan hoih lam a maitang phatna a-omta kei ding. Toupa ka hi a, ka gen ding a, ka gen tangtun ahi ding a, sit ahi kei ding; Aw helhat inkuante aw, na dam lai mahmah un thu ka gen ding hi, ka tangtungsak pah ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi. Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, ngai in, ‘Israel inkote a min kilakna amuhte bel ni tampi a ding ahi a, agenkholhte leng gamlapi a ding ahi, ” achi uhi. Huaiziak in akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ka thu bangmah sit ahi kei ding a, ka thugen peuhmah hihtangtun in a-om zaw ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in hilh in,” achi hi.

Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Mihing tapa, Israel zawlnei, amah lungtang kia a kipan a gen chingte tung ah thu gen inla, ‘Toupa thu ngai un. ” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Zawlnei hai, amau ngaihdan zui a, bangmah muloute tung agik hi! Aw Israel, na zawlneite khopi sesa a sehal om bang lel ahita uh. Toupa ni a kidouna a dingzou ding a kulhbaang dingkipsak ding leh Israel inkote hum ding a kulhbaang lam ding in na paitou kei uhi.” “Toupa thupawt ahi,” chi mite'n bangmah lou lel leh genkholhna lim lel atang ua, Toupa sawl ahi kei uh; athu uh hi ngei ding bang in mite agingtasak ua. Kilakna hong vuaksuak lel na mu un, thugenkholh diklou na gen uh ahi kei maw? “Toupa thupawt ahi,” na chi nawn ngal ua, ke'n ka gen a hia? Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Bangmah lou phet na gen ua zuau lel na muh ziak un, ngai un, ka hon nang ahi, chih Toupa thupawt ahi. Huan ka khut in bangmah lou mute leh zuau genkhol mite anang ding a, ka mite kidotkhawmna ah atel kei ding ua, Israel inkuante min gelhna ah gelh in a-om sam kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh. Galmuanna omloupi a, “Muanna,” chi a mite apimang ziak un leh mi baang bawl a, sunu nuh mite'n, “Ake nawn mai ding, vuahpi ahong zu ding a, nou gial lianpite aw, na hong ke ding ua, huih thupi in ahihse ding,” chi in.

Ngai un, baang achip khit chiang in, “Na sunu nuh uh koi ah, ahon chi kei ding ua hia?” “Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ka heh in huihpi thupi in ka hihse vek ding, ka heh in vuahpi ahong zu ding a, ka heh in gial thupitak hihmang ding in ahong ke ding. Zawlnei Taklou Pasalte Kalh A Thugen Huchi in sunu na nuhngou bang uh ka chimsak ding a, lei pha in achim dia, huchi in asuangphumte adawk hial ding hi; huan achim ding a, baang kichim ah hihmang in na om ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. “Hichibang in baang tung ah leh sunu nuh mite tung ah ka hehna ka damsak ding; huan, baang a-om nawn kei a, abaang zutte leng a-om nawnta kei uh, ka hon chi ding hi. Huai bel Israel zawlnei Jerusalem tungthu gen a, galmuanna omloupi a galmuanna musak mite ngei, a-om nawn kei uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Numei Zawlnei Dikloute Kalh A Genkholhna “Nang mihing tapa, na mite tanute, alungtang lel ua gen mite masuan inla, amaute kalh in thu gen in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Numei, mite ban a sik bunsak leh mi hinnate mat belhna ding a miliante lukhuhna khui mite atung uh agik hi! Nou hinna ding in ka mite hinna na man ding uh maw? Buhman tawmchik leh tanghou them mu ding a si lou ding sisak ding leh hing lou ding hingsak ding in na zuaugen uh ka mite'n a-up ziak un ka mite lak ah ka min athanghuai ahi. “Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, mi hinna, vasa bang a man ding a na thil butsakte uh ka mudah ahi

na bante uh ka bot ding a, na mimat dingte uh vasa bang a na mat dingte uh hinna ka pawtsak vek ding hi. Na lukhuhnate uh leng ka botkek ding a, ka mite na khut ua kipan ka suaktasak ding, na mat theih ding un na khut uah a-omta kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. “Kei lungkhamsak hilou a, midiktatte lungtang zuau a na hihnat ziak un leh migilou hingdam a a-omna ding a akhelhna lampi a kipan akilehheilouhna ding in migilou khutte na hihhat uh ahi. Huaiziak in bangmah lou lel, thugenkholh diklou hiam zaw na mu nawn kei ding uh; huan na khut ua kipan ka mite ka hunkhe ding a, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh, achi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.

Huchi in Israel upa khenkhatte ka kiang ah ahong pai ua, ka ma ah atu ua. Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tungta, ka kiang ah; “Mihing tapa, hiai mite'n amilimte uh alungtang uah alalut ua, ama uah athulimlouhna pukna uh akoih uhi; kei ahon dong peuhmah ding ua hia?” Huaiziak in amau houpih inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel inkuan a michih alungtang ua milim lalut a, ama ua athulimlouhna pukna koih a, zawlnei kiang a hong pai peuhmah, kei Toupa'n amilim uh tamdan bang zel in ka dawng ding. Israel inkote amilim uh ziak a hon na omtuamsan ziak ua alungtang ua ka mattheihna ding in.” Huaiziak in Israel inkote kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Hong kik unla, na milimte ua kipan in hong kik un, na kihhuaina tengteng uh lehngatsan un. “Israel inkote lak a mi kuapeuh hiam, mikhual Israel gam a teng hiam, kei a kipan a kihihtuam, alungtang ua milim lalut a, ama ua thulimlouhna pukna koih kawm a, atungtang ua hon dong ding a zawlnei kiang a hoh kei leh Toupa ngei in ka dawng ding hi. Huai mi ka masuan ding a, mi'n lamdang asak ding in tangtawn tangtawn a gen ding in ka mite lak a kipan ka hihmang ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uhi. “Huan zawlnei khem a om in thu gen henla, kei Toupa'n zawlnei ka thuzoh ahi a, atung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, ka mi Israelte lak a kipan ka hihmang ding. Athulimlouhna uh apo ding ua; zawlnei thulimlouhna amah dong mite thulimlouhna bang mai ahi ding hi.

Israel inkote kei a kipan nawn louh ua, atatleknate tengteng ua akihihnit nawn samlouhna ding un, ka mite ahih zawk ua a Pathian uh ka hihtheihna ding in, Toupa Pathian in achi, chi in gen in,” achi hi.Noah, Daniel Leh Job Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, gam mite'n tatlekna thilhih a, ka tung a thil hihkhial a, ke'n ka khut ka lik a, a-an uh, hinna bul ka hihsiat a, atung ua kial ka tunsak a, mi leh sate ka hon hihmanleh hiai mi thum, Pathian In Milim Biak Mohpaih Gam sahangte a gam uh ka tuansuaksak a, gam ahihsiat ua, ahong kigawp a, gamsa ziak a kuamah paisuak ding a-om kei uleh, hiai mi thumte om le uh, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanute uh, atapate uh ahumbit tuan kei ding uh; amau kia hotdam in a-om ding ua, gam asegawp ding hi. Ahihkeileh huai gam ah namsau ka lik dia, “Namsau aw, gamsung teng tawnsuak in,” mi leh gamsa ka gawimang ding hi. Hiai mi thumte om le uh leng, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanute uh, atapate uh ahumbit tuan kei ding ua, amau hinna kia humbit in a-om ding uh. Ahihkeileh, huai gam ah, hipi ka hon lensak a, mi leh sa hihmang ding a sisan suah a ka hehna huai gam tung a ka hon sunleh; Noah, Daniel leh Job hial leng na om le uh, kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, atanu uhiam, atapa uhiam ahumbit kei ding ua, adiktatna un amau hinna ngei ahumbit lel ding uhi.

Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a, “Jerusalem tung a ka vaihawmna na mahmah lite, namsaute, kialte, gam sahangte, hipite, mi leh sa gawimang vek ding a ka hon tut hun chiang in bangzah a thupi ahi diam aw? Himahleh ngai in, huai lai a akhosuaksun pikhiak dingte nutsiat in a-om ding ua, tanute leh tapate leng; ngai un, akiang uah ahong pawtkhe ding ua, a-omdan uh athilhihte na mu ding uh, Jerusalem tung a thil hoih lou ka hon tut thu ah lungmuan in na om ding ua, atung a ka hon tut tengteng thu ah leng. A-omdan uleh athilhihte uh na muh hun chiang un ahon lungmuan ding uh; atung a ka thilhih tengteng hihsan nei lou in ka hih kei chih na thei ding uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, sing dang sang in gammang nuai a sing lak a grepgui bang ahi tuam a le? Thil bawlna dia asing zat ahi hia? Tui-um belsuan khaina ding in kua'n azang ngei a le? Ngai in, mei a paihlut ahi a, toh ding in mei in akangmang, among langnih, akang khin a alai ah phattuamna anei a hia? Ngai in, abit lai nangawn in aphatuam kei; akatmang khit nung in, phatuam sin kei na tel e!” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamnuai sing lak a grep guite, toh ding in mei ah ka khul maimah bang in, Jerusalem luah mite ka bawl ding. Amau ka masuan ding a, pawt mah le uh, mei a kipan, akangbei ding, mei in, Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh; amaute ka masuan hun chiang in. Agam uh ka hihgawp ngei ding ahi, thulimlouhna ahih ziak un chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. Grepgui Tungthu Gentehna

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, Jerusalem akihhuainate theikhesak inla, akiang ah, Toupa Pathian in Jerusalem kiang ah hichi in achi: Na pawtna gam leh na pianna gam Kanaan mite gam ahi a, na pa Amor mi ahi a, na nu Hit mi ahi. Huan na pianna thu bel na pian ni in na laigui at ahi kei a, nang hihsiang ding a tui a sil na hi sam kei, chi nuh na tuak kei a, tuamlum na hi kei. Lainat ding a na tung a hiaite hih ding in kuamah mit in nang ahon hehpih kei ua; gamlak a paihkhiak na hita, na pian ni a kipan kih a om na hi hi.” Huan na kiang a ka hong pai in sisan lak a kital in ka hon mu a, na kiang ah, “Sisan ah om lechin leng ‘hing in! ka hon chi a,” ahi, ka hon chi ahi, “Sisan ah om mah lechin ‘hing in! Gam thil pakmum bang in ka hon khangsak a, khanglian a piching in, na hong melhoih mahmah hi. Na nawite ahong kisa ua, na sam ahong hoih a; himahleh savuak leh vuaktang lel na hi lailai hi.” Huan na kiang a ka hong pai a ka hon et in, deihhuai tham na hong hita a, ka puan ka hon zawn a, na vuaktanna ka hon khuhta hi; ahi, na kiang ah ka kichiam a, thukhun ah ka hon lutpih a, kei a na hita hi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huchi in tui in ka hon sil a, ahi, na sisan ka hon hihsiang sipsip a, sathau ka hon nuh hi. Puanzem in ka hon van a, saham vun khedap ka hon bunsak a, puanmalngat hoih in ka hon van a, silk puan ka hon khusak hi.

Kizepna hoih in ka hon zem a, na khut ah taute, na ngawng ah dangka-eng khainiangte. Na nak ah nakbulhte, na bil ah bilbahte, na lu ah lallukhu hoihtak in ka hon zem hi. Huchi in dangka-eng leh dangkasik a zephoih na hita a, na puansilhte puanmalngat hoihtak leh silk puan leh puankhui kilawm ahi ua; na nek tangbuang nel leh khuaizu leh sathau ahi, na kilawm mahmah a, kumpi chi leng na ching hi. Na kilawmna ziak in namte lak ah athangkhia a, ka thupina a kivan in na buchingta, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Himahleh na kilawmna na muang lua a, na minthanna na hukloh a, mi vialvak peuh leh na muh peuh na kithuahpih hi. Aginom Lou Jerusalem Ka dangka-eng leh ka dangkasik tui-um belsuan hoih taktak ka hon piakte na la a, pasal limbawlna ding in na zang, na hukpihta hi. Puansilh khui kilawmte na la a, amau na tuam a, ka sathaute leh ka gimlimte ama uah na tung hi. Ka hon tanghou piak leng ka tangbuang hoih leh sathau leh khuaizu ka hon vaknate gimlim ding in ama uah na lui a; hichi ahong hita, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huai lou leng na tanu, na tapa, na hon suansakte akiang uah kithoihna ding in zatbei ding in na pia a; na hukna thil namai ahi a hia? Ka tate na thah a, meipi a pailut a akiang ua na latte? Na kihhuaina leh na hukna tengteng ah na naupan lai avuaktang a na omleh na sisan a na tal maimah hunlaite na thei nawnta kei hi.Kizuak Bang A Jerusalem Hinkhua Huan hiai na thulimlouhna tengteng khit in leng, hichi ahong hi a, na tung agik hi! Toupa Pathian in achi hi. Mun kiphoute na kibawlna, kongzing chiteng ah mun sangte na lam hi.

Lampi kipatna teng ah mun sang na lam a, na kilawmna kihhuai in na bawl a vialvak peuhmahte kiang ah na kilemdawk a, na hukna a-uang semsem hi. Aigupta mi, na inveng, sami mahmah toh kingaihna khelhna leng na hihta; hon hehsak ding in na hukna na uangsakta ahi. Huaiziak in ngai in, na tung ah ka khut ka lik a, na an nek ka kiamsak a, nang hon mudah Philistia tanute, na hukdan zumpih mahmah nute kiang ah ut-ut a ahon bawl ding un ka hon peta hi. Assuria mite kiang ah leng na kizuak a, huntawk chih lah nei tel lou; ahi, akiang uah kizuak in na pang a, na kham tuan sam kei hi. Kanaan gam ah, Kaldai mite kiang ah na hukna na uangsak lailai a, na kham tuan kei hi. Nang lungtang sia hina mai e, na tatdan numei genhak gilou mahmah mai thil na hih a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Lamka thuam teng a milim biakna inn na bawl a, kongzing chih a mun sang na bawlte loh na delh louh ziak in kizuak leng na bang kei hi. Zi angkawm, pasalte sang a mi tuam deihzaw nu! Kizuakte kiang ah thil apesek ua, nang bel na lehpiak a hon deihmi ang ah, gam chih a kipan ahong pai ua, ahon kithuahpih theihna ding un na nou zaw nak ahi. Huan na huk thu a kuamah in ahon zot louh midang toh na kibatlouhna uh ahi; nang na pe zosop a; kuamah in man ahon piak louh uh na lamdanna ahi.Jerusalem Tung A Pathian Thukhenna Huaiziak in aw mihuknu, Toupa thu ngai in

Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na kihhuaina buakkhiak ahih a, na mingaihte toh na kithuahna lam ua na vuaktanna suklat ahih ziak leh na kihhuaina milim tengteng ziak leh akiang ua na piak na tate sisan ziak in; ngai in, nang hon ngaimi na nuamtatpihte tengteng leh na na ngaih khitsa tengteng leh na muhdahte tengteng ka samkhawm ding a, ahi, na kim ah ka pikhawm ding a, na vuaktanna tengteng amuhtheihna ding un akiang uah na vuaktanna ka hihlang ding hi. Huan numei pasal khen a, amah ta sisan suah tungthu a bang in ka hon vaihawmkhum ding; hehna leh mullitna sisan na tung ah ka tungsak ding. Akhut uah ka hon pe dia, na mun kidohte ahihpuk ding ua, na mun sangte achimsak ding ua; na puansilhte asuah ding ua, na suangmantamte ahon sut ding ua, savuak leh vuaktang in ahon nuse ding uh. Na tung ah mipi akaikhawm ding ua, suang in ahon deng ding ua, namsau in ahon kui pailet ding uhi. Na innte mei in ahal ding ua, numei tampi mitmuh in na tung ah vaihawmna atangtungsak ding ua; na hukna ka tawpsak ding a, loh leng na peta kei ding hi. Huchi in ka hehna na tung ah ka lungdamsak ding a, ka hon mullitna adaita ding, ka dai dide dia, ka heh ngei nawn kei ding hi. Na tuailai nite na theihgige louh a, hiai thilte a na hon vuisak zawk ziak in, ngai in, na tatdan dan, na tung ah ka tun ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huan na kihhuaina tengteng behlap in hiai hukna na hih nawn kei ding hi.Tanu In Anu Asuun “Ngai in, paunak zang peuhmah in hiai paunak azang ding uh, ‘Atanu in anu asuun, chih.

Na nu, amah pasal leh tate mudahnu tanu na hi a, kitanauna lam ah bel, ama pasal leh tate mudahnu tanau na hi; na nu Hit mi ahi a, na pa Amor mi ahi. “Huan na tanau, na u Samaria, na veilam a teng amah leh atanute toh ahi uh; na tanau, na nau, na taklam a teng Sodom leh atanute ahi uhi. Himahleh amau omdan na zui kei a, akihhuaina bang uh na hih kei na a, na omdan tengteng a na thulim louh zawkdan ngaihtuah in huaite bangmah tham ahi kei hi. “Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, nang leh na tate'n ahih bang uh na tanau Sodom leh atanute'n leng ahih het kei uh. Na tanau Sodom thulimlouhna hiaite ahi: kisaktheihna, nekvah luatnate, amah leh atanute nuamtat mawkmawkte, migentheite leh tasamte apanpih tuan sam kei uh. Huan mi uang ahi ua, ka ma a thilkihhuai hihsa ahi uh; huchi in hoih ka sak bang in ka hihmangta ahi. “Samaria in na khelhna kimkhat leng ahih sam kei; amau sang a na kihhuainate na nak hih zawk ziak in na hihsa na kihhuaina tengteng in na sanggamnute siam na tangsak hi. Na sanggamnute dikzaw a na suklat ziak in nangmah in na zahlakna na puak ding ahi; amau sang in thilkihhuai uangzawte na hih a, na khelhnate ziak in amau nang sang in adiktatzaw uhi; ahi, na sanggamnute siam na tansakna ah nang anen-aham in zahlakna na tang ding ahi.Sodom Leh Samaria Tunding Nawn Ahi Ding Uh “Huan a-omdan uh, Sodom leh atanu omdante, Samaria leh atanu omdante, amaute toh ton in nang omdan mahmah ka hei ding. Amau a dia lungmuanna na na hih sekna a na thilhihsa tengteng ziak a na zumtheihna ding in.

Huan na sanggamnute, Sodom leh atanute, Samaria leh atanute a-omdan uh masa bang in a-om nawn ding ua; nang leh na tanu leng na omdan uh masa bang in na om nawn ding uh. Na thulimlouhna muhkhiak a hih ma a na kihih thupi nite in na sanggamnu Sodom na kamse khuahna ahi sek kei maw? Tu'n zaw Siria tanu leh akim a mi tengteng, Philistia tanute na kim a hon simmoh mite'n ahon genseta uhi. Na hukna leh na kihhuaina na po zel ahi,” chih Toupa thupawt ahi.Tangtawn Daih Thukhun Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Thukhun bohsia in thuchiam na khawksak louhdan bang zel in na tung ah ka hih tei sin ahi. Himahleh na naupan lai a na kiang a ka thukhun ka theigige ding a, na kiang ah tangtawn thukhun ka bawl ding hi. Huchi in na sanggamnute ka pom hun chiang in na omdante na hon theikhe ding a, na kizumpih ding; amau lah na tanu ding in ka hon pia hi, na thukhun ziak bel hilou in. Na kiang a ka thukhun ka hihkip ding a, Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh. Na thilhih tengteng ka hon ngaihdam vek hun chiang in na theihgigena na zum ziak a na kam kat nawnlouhna ding in,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah: “Mihing tapa, Israel inkote kiang ah thuhaksa bawlkhia inla, gentehna in gen in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, chi in; Muvanlai lianpi, kha zapi, khaveng saupi gial em-um, mul bittak Lebanon tang ah aleng a, sidar sing zik atuah hi. Ahiang ziknou pen akitan a, mi vialvakna gam ah alenpih a, sumsinna khopi ah aphut hi. Huai gam haichi leng atuah a, lei hoih ah apawipou a, tui tampi gei ah aphut a, muisum sing bang in aphut hi. Huan akhang a, grepgui niam bilbial ahong hi a, selnoute ahon suah a, ahiangte ahong dawn hi. “Muvanlai lianpi dang a-om nawn a, kha zapi leh mul bittak anei a, ngai in, hiai grep kung amah lam ah azung azam a; asuanna mun a kipan in amah lam ah hiangte apoukhia a, amah tui a avaktheihna ding in. Hiangte asuah a, grep hoihtak ahihtheihna ding in tui tampi gei a lei hoih aphuh ahi.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Apiching den dia hia? Avuai maimah theihna ding in anahte satkhia in, azung toh abotkhe kei dia hia? Anah sel thak tengteng in leng avuailoh ding; azung toh botkhe ding in thilhihtheihna thupitak hiam, muvanlai tampi akiphamoh tuan kei dia hia? “Ahi, ngai in, phuh hileh leng apiching den dia hia? Suahlam huih in ahon nuai hun chiang in avuai khin maimah kei dia hia? Apouna mun mah ah avuai maimah ding chi in,” achi a.Gentehna Hilhchetna Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah: “Helhat inkote kiang ah gen in, hiai thil omdan athei kei ua hia?

Hilh in, ngai un, Babulon kumpipa Jerusalem ah ahong pai a, akumpipa uleh aheutu uh a, amah kiang ah Babulon ah api a, akumpipa uh suan khat a, thukhun abawlpih a, thu achiam teitei a, gam a miliante apimang vek a, alalna gam akeniam a, amah a adinkhiak theih nawnlouhna ding in athukhun len kawm kia a adintheihna ding in. Himahleh sakolte leh mi tampi hon sawl ding a ngen ding in Aigupta gam a palai sawl in atung ah ahelta hi. Alohching ding hia? Hichibang hihmi asuakta ding hia? Thukhun hihse ngal in apawtkhe thou ding hia?” Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; kumpipa, kumpipa dia bawlpa tenna ngei ah akichiamnate musit leh athukhunte bohsia a, amah kiang mahmah ah Babulon ah asi ding hi. Muvanlaite Leh Grepgui Gentehna Thukhun bohsia in kichiamna amusitta ngal ua; thu akichiam nung in hiai thil tengteng ahih nawn a, asuakta peuhmah kei ding hi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka kichiamna amusit a, ka thukhun abohsia a, kei ka hin bang in, ama tung ah ka bung ngeingei ding hi. Len in ka khuh ding a, ka thang ah a-awk ding a, Babulon ah ka hon pi ding a, huchi in abohsiatna, ka tung ngei a abohsiatnate ziak in amah ka sual ding. Huan apawl tengteng a taikekte tengteng namsau in asi ding ua, a-omlaite kawlmong chih ah adalh ding uh; huan kei Toupa'n ka genta chih atheikhe ding uh.Pathian Lametna Thuchiam Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:“Sidar sang mahmah dawn ke'n ka la ding a, ka phut ding;azikpi pen aziknou ka khiak ding a,tang sang kidoh ah ka phut ding. Israel sanna tang ah ka phut ding a, hiangte ahong sel ding ua, ahong gah ding,sidar thupitak ahi ding;anuai ah tungleng vasa chi chih ateng ding ua,ahiang liimte ah a-om ding uh. Huan gam sing tengteng in kei Toupa'n sing sangte ka niamsak a,sing niamte ka sangsak a,sing hingte ka keusak a, sing keute ka hingphasak a,ka chi nalai hi,” achi hi.Kei Toupa'n ka genta a, ka gen bang in ka hih ding hi.

Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. “Israel gam tungtang a hiai paunak azat uh bang chihna ahia,‘Pate'n grep thuk ane ua,atate uh ha azau hi, chih? “Kei ka hin bang in, Israel ah hiai paunak zat nawn chih na nei kei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Ngai un, hinna tengteng kei a vek ahi, pa hinna kei a ahih bangmah in tapa hinna leng kei a ahi; kha khial peuhmah asi ding. “Himahleh mi adiktat a, siang leh dik ahih a, mun sangte a ne lou a, Israel inkote milim lam nga sam lou a, numei kizen lou leng naih lou a, kuamah tung a thil hihkhial lou a, leibami thil khamna koih pe kik zaw a, kuamah hiamgam a lok lou a, gilkial kiang a nek ding pia a, vuaktang puan silhsak a; apung delh ding a leitawisak lou a, asumpung leng la sam lou a, thil gilou hih dia akhut kidek a, mi leh mi kikal a diktak a vai hawmsak a; ka dan bawlte zui a, diktak a hih a, ka vaihawmnate azuihleh, amah midiktat ahi a, ahing ngei ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. “Himahleh ama'n tapa guktak ching asuan a, sisan suahmi ahih a, hiai bang ahih a, ahih ding zaw pen ahih louh a, mun sangte a anek zawk a, invengte zi ahihbuah a, genthei leh tasamte asimmoh a, aloh a, akhamna koih apiak louh a, milimte lam nga, thilkihhuai ahih hi. Apung delh a apiak a, apung alakleh, ahing ding hia? Ahing het kei ding; hiai thilkihhuai tengteng ahihta a, asi ngeingei ding, amah sisan moh ama tung ah atu ding ahi.

“Huan ngai in, tapa na nei tei taleh, apa thil gilou hihsa tengteng amuh a, lau a, huchibang ahih teitei louh a, mun sang a anek louh a, Israel inkote milim lamte angat louh a, invengte zi ahihnit louh a, kuamah tung a thil ahihkhelh louh a, khamna koih bangmah la lou a, kuamah lok lou a, gilkialte nek ding pe zaw a, savuakte asilhsak a; genthei lak a akhut akideksak a, anou leh apung la lou a, ka thupiakte zang a ka dan bawlte zuimi ahihleh, apa thulimlouhna ziak in asi kei ding a, ahing zaw ngei ding hi. Mimalmal Mohpuakna Kha khial asi ding; tapa in apa thulimlouhna athuak kei ding a, pa in leng tapa thulimlouhna athuak sam kei ding; midiktat diktatna amah mah tung ah a-om ding, migilou gitlouhna amah mah tung ah a-om ding hi. “Himahleh, migilou in akhelhna hih tengteng alehngatsan a, ka dan bawlte azuih a, dan zui a thil diktat ahihleh ahing ngei ding a, asi kei ding. Tatlekna a na hihsa theihsak ahita kei ding; ana hihsa adiktatna ah ahing ding, Migilou sihna ah kipahna ka nei a hia? Alampite alehngatsan a, ahong hin ding chih louh ngal? chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. “Himahleh midiktat in adiktatna lampi alehngatsan a, thulimlouhna ahih a, migiloute hih bang zel a thilkihhuaite ahih in ahing dia hia? Athil diktat hihsa bangpeuh leng theihgige ahi nawnta kei ding a, atatlekna hih ah leh akhelhna hih ah, huai mahmah ah asi ding hi. “Hinapi in, Toupa hihdan akibang gige kei hi, na chi sek uh. Israel inkote aw, ngai un; ka hihdan akibang gige kei maw? Na hihdan uh akibang kei gige zaw ahi kei maw? Midiktat in adiktatnate alehngatsan a, thulimlouhnate ahihleh huai ah asi ding a, thulimlouhna ahih ah asi ding.

Huai lou leng, migilou in akhelhna ahihsate lehngatsan a, dan azuih a, thil diktat ahihleh ahinna ahumbit ding. Akingaihtuah a, atatlekna a hihsa tengteng alehngatsan ziak in ahing ngei ding, asi kei ding hi. Hinapi in Israel inkote'n, Toupa hihdan akibang gige kei, achi uhi. Aw Israel inkote aw, ka hihdante kibang gige ahi zaw kei maw? “Huaiziak in aw Israel inkote aw, michih, noumau hihdan bang zel in vai ka hon hawmsak ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Kihei unla, na tatlekna tengtengte uh lehngatsan un; huchi in thulimlouhna na puksiatna uh ahi kei ding hi. Na tatlekna tengteng uh, na tatleksate uh paimang vek unla, lungtang thak leh lungsim thak kibawl un! Israel inkote aw, bangziak a si ding na hi ua? Mi sihna ah kipahna mahmah ka nei kei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; huaiziak in kihei unla, hing un.”

Huai lou in leng Israel heutute tungtang ah suunna la phuah ahi; Na nu bang ahia ahih?Humpinelkaipi ahi!Humpinelkaite lak ah akual a,humpinelkai lunlaite lak ah anoute avaklian hi. Huan anoute lak ah khat avaktei a;humpinelkai lun lai ahong hi; samat asiam a,mite anegai hi. Namte'n leng atanchin aza ua;akokhuk uah mat in a-om;huan Aigupta gam ah sikkawi in amah api uh. Huchi in angak a, alametnaavuaksuak chih atheih in,anoute lak ah khat ala a,humpinelkai lun lai in abawl hi. Humpinelkai lak ah apaisukpaitou a, humpinelkai lun laiahong hi a; samat asiam a,mite anegai hi. Ama'n a-inpi kisesate uh athei a,akhopite uh ahihgawp a,gam asegawp a, ahumhamhusa ziak in, huai a tengteng. Huchi in bialte a kipan inning chih a namte'n amah adou ua;atung ah alen uh azak ua;akokhuk uah mat in a-omta hi. Sikkawite in bawm sung ahakoih ua; Babulon kumpipa kiang ah api ua;kulh muanhuaite sung ah apilut uh;huchi a Israel tang sangte tung a aw akizak nawnlouhna ding in. Na nu na sisan a grepgui bangahi, tuite kiang a suan;tui tampite ziak ingahpha leh hiangte in adim. Huan vaihawmna potelalchiang sikchiang khauh anei in, nah bawkpha lak ah asandan uh hihsang in a-om hi,huchi in ahiang tampite uh tohsangpi amuh in a-om uhi. Himahleh thangpaihna abohkhiak in a-om a, lei ahpaihkhiak in a-om a,suahlam huih in agah amutkeu a;akung khauhte kitan in akeu a;mei in amaute akang beita. Huan tu in gamdai ah, gamkeuleh tui om lou ah phuh in a-om. Huchi in ahiang a sikchianga pan mei apaikhia, agahahulbei a, huchi in amah ahvaihawm ding in lalchiangding sikchiang khauha-om kei hi.Hiai kahla ahi, kahla a dia sak ahi ding hi. Dahla

Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sagihna, akha ngana, huai kha ani sawm ni in Israel Upa kuate hiam Toupa thu dong ding in ahong pai ua, ka ma ah atu uhi. Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel upate houpih inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Kei thudong dia hong pai na hi uh hia? Kei ka hin bang in, noute thudot in ka om kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. Amaute vai na hawmsak ding hia, mihing tapa, amaute vai na hawmsak ding hia? Apate uh kihhuainate thei uh hen. Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Israelte ka tel ni a Jakob inkote telte kiang ah ban zak hial a Aigupta gam a akiang ua ka kitheihsak a, akiang ua ka khut ka zak a, Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, ka chih. Huai ni a Aigupta gam a kipan pikhia a, amah a dia gam kham, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, gam tengteng a kilawmpen a pilut ding a ka khut ka zak ni in akiang uah: Michih in na mit ua muh thilkihhuai paimang unla, Aigupta gam a milimte in kihihnin kei un, kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, chi in ka gen hi. Himahleh, ka tung ah ahel ua, hon limsak kei ua, michih in amit ua muh thilkihhuaite leng apaimang kei ua, Aigupta milimte leng alehngatsan sam kei uh. Huai ah atung ua ka hehna lungdamsak ding in Aigupta gamsung ngei ah atung uah ka hehna ka leihbo kei na diam, ka chi hi. Himahleh, keimah min ziak in ka gamtang zawta a, a-omna namte uh mitmuh in Aigupta gam a kipan pikhia in akiang uah ka kitheisakta

huai namte mitmuh a ka min gensiat a a-omlouhna ding in. Huchi in Aigupta gam pawtsan ding in ka chita a, gamdai ah ka hon pilut hi. Ka dan bawlte amaute ka pia a, ka dan thukhunte ka ensak a, huai tuh mi'n azuih ua ahinna ding un. Huai lou leng kei leh amaute kikal achiamtehna ding in ka Sabbathte amau ka pia a, kei Toupa, amaute koihtuampa ka hi chih atheihtheihna ding un. Himahleh Israel inkote gamdai ah ka tung ah ahel ua, ka dan bawlte azui kei ua, ka thugelte, mi'n ahih a ahinna ding tak uh apaikhia ua, nakpitak in ka Sabbath abohsia ua; huchi in gamdai ah amaute hihmang ding in atung uah ka hehna ka leih kei na diam aw, ka chi hi. Ka pikhiak lai in athei mite nam mahmah mitmuh a hihsiat a a-omlouhna ding un ka min ziak in ka gamtang zawta hi. Huai lou in huai gamdai ah ka gam piak, nawitui leh khuaizu a luang gam, gam tengteng a kilawmpen ah ka pilut kei ding, ban zak hial in ka chi hi. Ka thugelhte apaikhia ua, ka dan bawlte azui kei ua, ka Sabbathte abohsiat ziak un; alungtang un amilimte uh azui uhi. Himahleh hihmang lou ding in ka mit in amuh maihta a, gam ah leng ka hihmang vekta kei hi. Huan gamdai ah atate uh kiang ah: Na pipute uh dan bawl zui kei unla, athugelte uh zui kei unla, amilimte un kihihnin sam kei un; Kei Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi, ka dan bawlte zui unla, ka thugelte vom unla, zui un.

Toupa Deihlam Leh Mite Simmohhuaina Himahleh atate uh ka tung ah ahel ua, ka dan thukhunte azui kei ua, ka thugelte, mi'n ahih a ahinna ding tak, zui ding in avom sam kei uh. Sabbath ni abohseta ua; gamdai ah ka hehna lungdamsak ding in atung uah ka hehna ka leih kei na hiam, ka chi hi. Himahleh ka khut ka kideksak a, ka pikhiak lai athei mite nam ngei mitmuh a hihsiat a a-omlouhna ding un ka min ziak in ka gamtang zawta ahi. Huai lou leng, namte lak ah amau ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak ding, gamdai ah ban zak hial in ka na chi hi. Ka thugelte zui lou a, ka dan bawlte paikhia a, ka Sabbath ni bohsia a, apipute uh milim lam angat ziak un. Huai lou leng, dan bawlhoih lou ka pia a, ahinlouhna ding ua thugelte toh; athiltan uh, sul hong tengtengte'n mei a apaihna uah amaute ka hihnin a, ka lungzuangsak a, atawp a Toupa ka hi chih atheihna ding un. Huaiziak in mihing tapa, akiang uah thu gen inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na pate un hiaite ah ahon gense lailai uhi, ka tung a tatlekna thil ahihte uah. Ban zak hial a amaute ka chiam gam ah ka hon pilut in, mual sang leh singbuk lian amuh peuhmah uah akithoihnate uh alan ua, athillat uh hehhuai mahmahte apia uh. Agimlimte uh abawl ua, adawn ding thillatte uh abungkhia uh,” chi in. Huchi in ke'n akiang uah, mun sang a na hoh nak uh bang na chihna uh ahia? ka chi a; huchi in amin a ding in tuni tan in, Bamah, chih ahita hi.

Huchi in Israel inkote kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na pipute uh bang zel in noumau na kihihnin un akihhuaina bang un hupmang na hi ding uh maw? Na thil tan uh na lan un, na tate uh mei ah na pai ua, tuni tan in na milimte tengteng un na kihihnin uh ahi kei maw? Noute thudot ding ka hi a hia, aw Israel inkote aw? Kei ka hin bang in noute thudot in ka om kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. I kim ua namdang pau tuam mite bang a singbul suangbul be ding i hi uh, na lungsim ua na chih uh, atangtung himhim kei ding.Pathian Gawtna Leh Ngaihdamna Kei ka hin bang in, khut thagui hattak in, ban zak kawm leh heh suah in na tung uah vai ka hawm ngeingei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Namte lak a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, dalhsak a na omna gam ua kipan khut hattak leh ban zak leh heh suah in ka hon pikhawm ding. Pau tuam mite gamdai gam ah ka hon pilut ding a, kimaituah in i kisual ding uh. Aigupta gam gamdai a na pipute uh ka sual bangtak in nou leng ka hon sual ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Chiang nuai ah ka hon lutsak ding a, thukhun delhkhumna nuai ah ka hon pilut ding hi; Huan na lak ua kipan mihelte leh ka tung a talek mite ka khuahsiang ding a, a-omna gam ua kipan in ka pikhe ding a, himahleh Israel gam ah alut het kei ding uh; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.

Noute ahihleh, Aw Israel inkote aw, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ka thu na ngaihkhiak kei uleh tunung chiang in na milim nna uh sem chiat maita unla; himahleh ka min siangthou bel na thilpiakte uleh na milimte un na hihninta kei ding uhi. Ka tang siangthou, Israel sanna tang ah, huai ah Israel inkote tengteng in avek un, huai gam ah ka nna asem ding uh; huai ah amaute ka paktata dia, huai ah na thillatte uh na thilpiak hoih tatate uh, na thil tan tengteng uh ka deihta ding. Namte lak a kipan ka hon lakkhiak hun chiang in leh gam chih a na dalhna ua kipan ka hon pikhawm hun chiang in, gimlim ding in noute ka hon sangta ding a, namte mitmuh in noute ah ka sianthoudan alangta ding, Toupa Pathian in achi hi. Huan Israel gam, ban zak hial a na pipute uh piak ka chiam gam a noute ka hon pilut hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. Huan huai ah na omdante uleh na thilhih uh, na kihihnitna tengteng uh na theita ding uh; huchi in na thil hoih lou hih tengtengte uh ziak in noute mitmuh ngei in na kihta ding uhi.

Na omdan hoihloute uh bang hilou a, na thilhih uh thulimloute bang leng hi sam lou a, ka min ziak a noute ka hon pichinsak hun chiang in, aw Israel inkote aw, Toupa ka hi chih na theita ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in.Simlam A Mei Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, simlam masuan inla, simlam nga in na thu khah inla, simlam gammangpi lam ah thu gen inla, simlam gammangpi kiang ah, Toupa thu ngai in, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, nang ah mei ka toh ding a, nang ah sing hing tengteng akangbei ding a, sing keu peuhmah leng; meikuang luahluah adai kei ding, sim a kipan mal tanpha in, matuah teng akangvom ding hi. Huan mi tengteng in kei Toupa meikhahpa ka hi chih amu ding ua, amit kei ding, chi in,” achi hi. Huchi in ke'n, “Ah! Toupa Pathian, gentehna thugenmi lel ahi kei maw? ahon chi ding uh,” ka chi hi.

Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Jerusalem maituah inla, amun siangthou lam nga in na thu gen inla, Israel gam tung ah thu gen in; Israel gam kiang ah, huchi in Toupa'n achi hi: Ngai in, ka hon dou ahi, ka namsau apai a kipan ka phawi ding a, na lak ua midiktat leh diktat lou kibang sap in ka phuk ding. Huchi in na lak ua midiktat leh diktat lou ka phuk ding ziak in ka namsau apai a kipan apawt ding a, simlam a kipan mallam pha in mihing tengteng aphuk ding hi. Huchi in mi tengteng in, kei Toupa'n ka namsau apai a kipan ka phawi ahi chih athei ding uh, akikhum ngei nawnta kei ding hi.” Huaiziak in nang mihing tapa, thum huthut inla khasetak in amitmuh un thum in. Huan “Bangziak a thum na hia?” ahon chih uleh, “Thuthang ziak in ahi, ahong tung sin ngal a, huai hun in lungtang chiteng azul ding a, khut tengteng azaw ding a, lungsim teng abah ding a, khuk tengteng tui bang in azaw ding a; ngai in, ahong tung hi, atangtun ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi. Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, thu gen inla, huchi in Toupa'n achi hi: “Namsau, namsau tat-hiam ahita, tetsak ahita,mi satna ding a tat-hiam ahita, tetsak ahi,khophia bang in!I nuamsa lailai ding maw?ka tapa, chiang na simmoh,sing a bawl peuhmah toh, tetsak ahi, khut a let ding in ahi namsau tat-hiam tetsak ahi,thatmi khut a tuang ding in. Mihing tapa, kikou inla;sehal ham in, ka mite tung ahi ngal a;Israel miliante teng tung mahmah;piak ahi ua, ka mite toh, namsau nuai ah;huaiziak in kikou inla, na pheipi beng in.

Hiai namsau midang tung achiamtehsa ahi ngal a,na ngaihsak kei hitaleh bang suak ding chihToupa Pathian thupawt ahi hi.” “Huaiziak in nang, mihing tapa,khut beng hial in thu gen in;thah a om dingte a ding namsau nihvei liksuk in om hen, ahi, thumvei;tampi thahna ding namsau ahi. Lungtang zul, apukna uh apunna ding in,namsaute kongbiang teng ah ka giaksak hi;Ah! Khophia bang inate zolzol, sihna namsau. Nakpi'n gamtang in, taklam ah,gamtang in veilam ah lengvan zel inla, na mazawnpeuhmah ah leng. Ke'n leng khut ka beng ding a,ka tangtun ngei ding,ka hehna, kei Toupa'n hiai ka genta hi, chi in,” achi hi.Babulon Kumpipa Namsau Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Babulon kumpipa namsau hong tuntheihna ding in lampi nih na bawl in; huai lampi nihte gam khat a kipan in ahong pawtkhe ding uh ahi; lampi kawkmuhna bawl inla, kho pilut na khomual ah bawl in. Ammon mite khua Rabbah a namsau ahong tuntheihna ding in lampi sep inla, Judah gam lai Jerusalem kulh ah leng. Toupa Namsau A-aisanna ah akhut taklam ah Jerusalem ana tuang a, kulh suksiatnate galsual awng zuazuate, kongpi zawn a kulh suksiatnate, mual pawngsunte, kulh bawlte toh. Aisan vuaksuak lel bang ahi a, himahleh mat a a-omna ding ua athulimlouhna uh theihkhiakna lel ding ahi.” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Theihgigena ding a na thulimlouhna uh na bawl ziak un na tatleknate uh ahong kilang, na thilhih tengteng uah na khelhnate uh akimu kilkel a, theihkhiak na hong hih tak ziak un khut a mat na hong hi ding uhi. Huan nang, Israel heutu, migilou si ding a liampa, na gitlouhna gawtna tawp ni ahong tung e

Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Heutu lukhu paihsak unla, lallukhu suhsak un, hiai angei in a-om kei ding; mivuallelte tawisang unla, miliante vuallelsak un. Ka lumlet ding, ka lumlet ding, ka lumlet ding; hiai leng angei in a-om kei ding, aneimi diktak ahong pai mateng amah ka pe ding hi.”Namsau Leh Ammonte Huan nang mihing tapa, thu gen inla, hichi in chi in; Toupa Pathian in Ammon tate tungtang ah leh agensiatna thu uah hichi in achi:“Namsau, namsau phawi ahita,mithahna ding leh hihmanna ding khophia bang a tetsak ahita. “Kilakna taklou nang ahon musak ua, zuau in ai ahon sansak ua, namsau bel migilou si ding a liam, agitlouhna ni uh tawp hong tung dingte ngawng ah na golh ding, ahon chih un azuau uh ahi. Apai ah thun in. Na pianna siam a na omna gam ngei ah na thu ka ngaihtuah ding.
