Na tung ah ka hehna ka sung dia, ka thangpaihna mei na tung ah ka toh ding, minunsetak, hihman siamtak khut ah ka hon mansak ding. Mei a khul ding na hi ding a, gam lai ah na sisan abo ding a, theih mahmah na hita kei ding, kei Toupa'n ka genta ngal a, chi in,” achi hi.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Nang mihing tapa, sisan suah hat khopi na vaihawmkhum ding hia? Na vaihawmkhum ding hia? Akihhuaina tengteng theisak dih ve. Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Khopi, ahun hong tunna ding a amah sung a sisan suah leh amah kihihnin ding a milim bawl! Na sisan suahna ah mohna na pua a, na milim bawl ah na kihihnin ahi; na hunte na naisak a, na kumte na tung phialphial a; huaiziak in namte kiang ah gensiat ding leh gam tengteng engbawl ding in ka hon bawl ahi. Nang naih a om mite leh gamla a om mite'n ahon simmoh ding ua, nang, minsiat pua leh buaina a dimmi; Ngai in, Israel heutute michih in athilhihtheihna bang zel ua sisan suah mai ding in nangmah ah a-om uhi. Nang ah mi'n nu leh pate amusit ua, nang ah mikhualte anuaisiah ua, nang ah tagahte leh meithaite amawkbawl uh. Ka thiltante na musit a, ka Sabbathte na bohsia hi. Nang ah sisan suah ding in mi hekhatte a-om ua, nang ah tang sang a nete a-om ua, nang ah hukna aching uh. Nang ah apate uh vuaktanna lemsak a-om ua, nang ah numei kizen louh lai kithuahpih a-om uh. Huan mi'n a-inveng' zi tung ah thilkihhuai ahih a, midang in huktak in amou ahihnin a, midang in nang ah asanggamnu, apa tanu ngei azahlaksak hi. Nang ah sisan suah ding in golhna ala ua, anou leh apung na la a; na inveng nuaisiah in huaihamtak in na lepguksak hi; kei mahmah leng na hon mangngilh a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. “Huaiziak in ngai in, na lepgukna thu ah, nang a sisan pawt thu ah khut ka hon betkhum ding.

Nang ka hon sual ni chiang in na lungtang in athuakzou in na khut ahat thei diam maw? Kei Toupa ngei in ka genta a, ka hih lai ding. Huan namte lak ah ka hon hihdalh ding a, gam chih ah ka hon thehzak ding; nang a kipan in na nitnate ka hihmang vek ding. Namte mitmuh in nangmah kihihnin na hi ding, huan, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding, chi in,” achi hi.Pathian Halsianna Mei Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Israel inkote ei a ding in eksia lel ahong hita ua; avek un haltuina mei lai ah dalte, langvate, sikte, suante ahi ua, dangkasik eksia lel ahita uh. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Eksia lel na hong hih ziak un, ngai un, Jerusalem lai ah ka hon khawm ahi. Dangkasikte, dalte, sikte, suante, langvate haltuina mei a akoihkhawm ua, tuisak ding a atung a mei atoh bang un ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna ah nou ka hon khawm ding, huai ah ka hon koih ding a, ka hon tuisak ding. Ahi, ka hon khawm ding a, na tung uah ka hehna mei ka toh ding a, alai ah na tui khin ding uhi. Jerusalem Khelhna Huaisia Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, akiang ah gen inla, gam khuahsiang louh hehna ni chia vuahtui tang lou na hi. Humpinelkai in humham a samat azon bang mai in nang ah zawlnei sawmnate a-om ahi; mi hinnate ane khin ua, goute leh thil manphate alaksak ua, alai ah meithai tampi abawl uh.

Asiampute leng nakpitak in ka dan ah atalek ua, ka thil siangthoute ahihnin uh ahi, thiltante leh thil namai akhen kei ua, mite'n lah siangthou leh siangthou lou akhen tuan kei uh; ka Sabbathte akitheihmohbawl ua, alak uah hihminsiat in ka om hi. Alai a heutute lah nge duhgawl nek ding zong bang lel ahi ua, sisan suah a mi hinnate hihmang in ginom loutak a aleptheihna ding un. Huan azawlneite un sunu in baang anuh ua, kilakna bangmah lou lel amu ua, zuau in ai asan ua, Toupa'n bangmah a gen louh in leng, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi,” achi uh. “Gam a mipite'n nuaisiah aching ua, loh ahat ua, ahi, migenthei leh tasamte amawkbawl ua, dikloutak in mikhualte anuaisiah uhi. Gam ka hihsiatlouhna ding in alak ua dai kai ding leh gam hum a ka ma a pang ding mi ka zong a, ka mu kei hi. Huaiziak in atung uah ka hehna ka sungbota a, ka thangpaihna mei in ka halmangta ahi; a-omdan ngei uh atung uah ka tungsak ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, numei nih, nu khat ta a-om uhi. Aigupta gam ah ahukmang ua, atuailai neu ua huk ahi ua, huai ah a-angnem uh azawtsak ua, atuailai nawi uh ameksak ek uhi. Khat, a-upapen min Oholah ahi a, asanggamnu bel Oholibah ahi; huan kei a ahong hita ua, tapate tanute asuang ua. Amin uh, Oholah pen Samaria ahi a; Oholibah bel Jerusalem ahi. Huan Oholah kei a ahih nung in ahukmang nawn a, adeihtak, a-invengte, Assuria anou a; ukpipate, vaihawm mite, tangval iplahhuai mahmah ngen, sakol tungtuangmi, puan sandup a kizemte. Hiai Assuria tangval hoihte tengteng lak ah akiphal vek ua, a-etlahte milim tengteng in akihihnin nawn behlap hi. Atuailai neu a kipan anawite ameksak uh leh akithuahpih ziak un Aigupta a kipan in ahukna atawp tuan kei a, amau leng ahukna uh atung uah ahih pichin uhi. Adeihtakte, Assuria, anouhnouhte khut ngei ah ka mansak ahi. Hiaite'n avuaktanna alemdawk ua, atanu leh atapate alaksak ua, amah leng namsau in athat ua, numeite lak ah akikhemlauna pen uh ahong hita a, ama tung a gel bang amualsuahta hi. “Huan asanggamnu Oholibah in hiai amu a, himahleh a-unu sang in adeihtak nouhnouhna ah a-uangzaw in, ahukna a-uang semsem lai hi. Assuria mi, invengte gam ukpipa leh vaihawmpa tangval etlahhuaitak ngen, sakol tungtuangmi, kilawmtak a kivante anounou hi. Hihnit in a-om chih ka mu a, anih un lam kibang atawn uhi. “Huchi in ahuknate a-uangsak sem a, baang a pasal lim tuang, Kaldai mite lim, san-au tak a kizem, akawng ah kawnggak agak a, dial kilawmtak khim in, avek ua milian bang in, Kaldai gam, apianna gam ua Babulon mite bangtakte amuh ziak in. Amau amuhtak in anounou a, akiang uah Kaldai pha in mi asawl hi.

Huchi in Babulon mite akiang ah, kingaihna lupna ah ahong pai ua, ahukna un ahihnin ua, akihihbuah khinta ua, amau amah anel mahmah uhi. Huchi in ahukna ahihlang a, avuaktanna alemsak a, asanggamnu a pan ka kiheisan bang in amah ka kiheisanta hi. Himahleh atuailai a Aigupta gam a ahuk lai atheihgige ziak in ahuk semsem hi. A-angkawmpihte van, sabiltung a bang mai ahi a, athilpawtte leng, sakolte a thilpawt bang mai ahi. Huchibang in na tuailai hukna Aigupta min na tuailai nawite ahon khoihsak lai na theikhe nawnta ahi.”Sanggamnu Nauzaw Tung A Pathian Thukhenna Huaiziak in aw Oholibah, hichibang in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Ngai in, nang hon it, na lungsim in anelsate ka tamsak ding a, kil chih a kipan ka pikhawm ding. Mikhial Unau Numeite Galvante, kidouna kangtalaite, kangtalaite leh mipi omkhawm in ahong sual ding ua; lum lian leh lum neu, dal lukhute toh na kim ah ahon um ding ua; akiang uah vaihawmna ka kemsak ding a, athugel bang zel un na tung ah ahihtangtung ding uhi. Huan na tung ah ka lung hihlouhna ka tungsak ding a, heh mahmah in nang ahon sual ding ua, na nakte leh na bilte asatkhe ding ua, akhosuaksunte namsau in asi ding uh, na tanu leh na tapate ahon laksak ding ua, akhosuaksunte mei in akanglum ding uh. Na puansilhte ahon hawksak lai ding ua, na kizepna kilawm taktakte alamang ding uh. Na hukna leh Aigupta gam a kipan a na kizuakna ahon tawpsak ding ua, huchi in amau lam ah na mit na lengsak nawn kei dia, Aigupta gam na theigige nawn kei ding hi.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a: “Ngai in, na huat mahmah, nang hon chimtakte khut mahmah ah ka hon mansak ding.

Huat petmah in ahon ho ding ua, na sepgim gah tengteng ahon laksak ding ua, vuaktang in kihawmkhai in ahon taisan ding uh; na kizuakna vuaktanna, na hukna leh na kizuakna ngei hihlat in a-om ding hi. Hiai thilte na tung ah ahong tung ding, namdangte delh in na hukmang ding a, amilimte ua na kihihnit ziak in. Na sanggamnu lampi na tawn sam a, huaiziak in amah nou na khut ah ka hon pe ding.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na sanggamnu nou thuk leh lian na dawn ding a,nuihsan leh simmoh in na om ding; Khamna leh lungkhamna inna dim dia, lamdangsakna leh siatna nou, na sanggamnuSamaria nou toh na dawn gai keuhkeuh ding hi. Na dawn ding a, anou leng natawpsiang vek ding;na sam na botkhe dia,na nawite na hamkek ding. Kei, Toupa Pathian in ka chita hi.” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “N'on mangngilh a na hon na dal ziak in na hukna leh na kizuakna moh na po mai ding hi.”Sanggamnute Tung A Pathian Thukhenna Huai lou leng Toupa'n ka kiang ah agen nawn a, “Mihing tapa, Oholah leh Oholibah na langsin ahia? Akihhuaina uh akiang uah puang in. Ang akawmta ua, akhut uah sisan abang a, amilim kiang ah ang akawmta uhi; atapate uh kei a dia asuan uh akiang ua kangmang ding in mei ah apai uhi. Huai lou in leng, ka kiang ah hiai achi uhi; amau mah in ka Mun Siangthou ahihnin ua, ka Sabbathte leng abohsia uhi. Amilimte uh a dia atate uh athah nung un, amau mah in ka mun siangthou hihnin ding in alut ua; ngai in, hichibang in ka insung mahmah ah ahih uhi.

“Huai lou leng, gamlapi a pan mi hong pai ding in na thukhak ua, mi na sawl ua, ngai in, ahong ua, amau hel in na kisilsiang a, na mit na nuh a, kizephoihna dangte na silh a, lupna thupitak ah na tu hi. Ama ah dohkan na bawl a, ka gimlim leh ka sathaute huai ah na lui hi. Huai ah mipi noptal husa zak ahi a, mi namai kia lou leng gamdai a kipan in zukhamte ahon pi ua, anih un taute abun ua, lukhu kilawmte akhu uhi.” Huan ke'n, “Angkawmnu tek nung a kithuahpih nuam un, ama'n leng angap peuhmah diam maw?” ka chi hi. “Huchi in kizuak kiang a ahoh bang un akiang ah alutta thou ua; huchi in numei huk Oholah leh Oholibah kiang ah alutta uhi. Himahleh midiktatte'n angkawmnute leh sisan suah hat numeite vai ahawm bang un ahawmsak ding ua, angkawmnute ahih ua, akhut ua sisan aban ziak in.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Na tung uah mipi ka kaikhawm ding a, ka hon loksak ding a, ka hon bawlsak ding hi. Mihonte'n suang in adeng ding ua, anamsau un asatlum ding ua, atanute uh, atapate uh athat ding ua, a-innte uh ahalsak ding uh. Hichibang in hukna gam a kipan ka hihmang ding a, numei tengteng in na hukna uh chin louh hial ding ahi chih na theihna ding un. Huchi in na tung uah na hukna uh ahon thuk ding ua, na milim khelhnate uh na thuak ding uh, kei Toupa Pathian ka hi chih na thei ding uh,” achi hi.

Akum kuana, akha sawmna, huai kha, ani sawm ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn a, “Mihing tapa, tuni ngei, hiai ni min ngei gelhkhia in. Hiai ni ngei in Babulon kumpipa'n Jerusalem ahong sual pan hi. Huan helhat Inkote kiang ah gentehna thu gen inla, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sa uina bel suang inla, suangnilouh inla, asung ah tui sung in;sabakte kha inla,asa hoih tengteng,apheite, aliangte,aguhbawk hoih tata in hihdim in. Ganhonte lak a ahoih tata la inla,anuai ah singkhuah khul ek inla,sou bolhbolh hen;ahi, aguhbomte ki-ui hen.” Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sisan suah hat khopi, sa uina bel, asung kanggem, agem dai ngei nai lou tung agik hi! Tel tuan lou in, asa bak khatkhat in thuk in. Asisan suah amah tung ah a-om a, leivui vuhtheihna dia lei a sunbuak gen tak louh, suangpi keu tung ah asungbo zawta hi. Phu la ding a hehna ahong kisaktheihna ding in vuh louh in asisan suah suangpi keu tung ah ka sung ahi.” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sisan suah hat khopi tung agik hi! Kei mahmah in ka vum venvon ding. Singtum sevum venvon unla, mei chihsa unla, sate ui min unla, satui chiktak in, aguhte leng kangmang hen. Huchi in bel avuak in meivu tung ah suan hi nilouh henla, ahong sa ding a, adal ahong am ding a, anitna ahong zulmang ding, akangkhem akatmang theihna ding in. Chimtak khop a sual in leng akangkhem asiang tuan kei a, mei in leng akangsiang sam kei hi.

Na nitna hukna ahi a, ka hon khuah a, na sian tuan louh ziak in na tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak mateng chik mah chiang in na nitna a kipan khuahsiang na hi nawnta kei ding hi. Kei Toupa'n ka chita ahi, ahong tung mahmah ding, ke'n ka hih ding, ka nungkin kei ding a, ka hawi sam kei ding a, ka lunghei sam kei ding; na omdante leh na thilhih bang zel in vai ahon hawmsak ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.Zawlneipa Zi Sihna Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, ngai in, thakhat in na mittaina pen ka hon laksak ding a, na suun ding ahi kei dia, na kah ding leng ahi sam kei, na khitui leng akiak ding ahi kei hi. Asim in thum inla, misi suunna nei ke'n, na dial khim inla, na khedap bun inla, na muk hum ke'nla, mite an leng ne ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in zingsang lam in mipite kiang ah thu ka gen a, nitaklam in ka zi asi maimah a; zingsang lam in ahon thupiak bang in ka hih hi. Mite'n ka kiang ah, hichibang na thilhihte kou ding in bang ahia ahih na hon hilh kei dia hia? achi uhi. Huchi in ke'n akiang uah, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a. Israel inkote kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ka mun siangthou, na hatna suan pen uh, na mittaina pen uh, na deihlam pen uh ka hihnin ding hi; na tanute uh; na tapate uh, nunglam a na nutsiatte uh namsau in apuk ding uh. Ka hih bang geih in na hih tei ding uhi

na muk uh na hum kei ding ua, mite an leng na ne sam kei ding uh. Na dialte uh leng na khim ding ua, na khedap uh na bun ding ua; na suun kei ding ua, na kap sam kei ding ua, na thulimlouhnate uah na mangthang ding ua, na kikahtuah ding uhi. Sa Uina Bel Huai ni chiang in taikhemi kiang ah na kam na ka ding a, akiang ah thu na gen ding a, na dai maimah kei ding; huchi in amaute a ding in etsakna na hi ding a; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, ka kiang ah; “Mihing tapa, Ammon tate masuan inla, atungtang thu uh gen in. Ammon tate kiang ah, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia unla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka mun siangthou hihnit a om a, Israel gam hihgawp a a-om a, Judah Inkote sal a pi a a-om lai ua, ‘Awi ing e! na chih ziak in, ngai in, suahlam mite kiang ah ahon tan ding un ka hon pe ding ahi; nang ah buk akoih ding ua, nang ah tenna abawl ding uh; na theigahte ane ding ua, na nawitui adawn ding uh. Rabbah khua sangawngsau inn ding in ka bawl dia, Ammon tate mun ganhon kualna mun ding in ka bawl ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel gam tung a na khut na bet a, na khe na pek a, lungsim tengteng a asiatna tung a na kipah ziak in, ngai in, na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, namte kiang ah gallak ding in ka hon mansak ding a; mite a kipan ka hon phuk ding a, huai gam a kipan in ka hon hihmang vengveng ding, ka hon hihse ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding,” chi in.Moab Kalh A Genkholhna Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Moab leh Seir in, ngai in, Judah inkote namdang bang ahi uh, achih ziak un. Moab pang khat, khopite lam pang, gamgi zul a khopi, agam thupina pente, Beth-zeshimot, Baal-meon leh Kiriathaim lam pang ka hong ding a, suahlam tate tan ding in Ammon tate toh ka pe ding a, namte lak a Ammon tate theihgige ahih nawnlouhna ding un.

Moab gam tung ah thu gel ka tangtungsak ding a, huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.Edom Kalh A Genkholhna Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Edom in Judah inkote tung a phuba la in nakpitak in thil ahihkhial hi, amah thu kia a atung ua phu alak ziak in. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Edom tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, alak ua kipan mi leh sate ka phukmang vek ding; Teman a kipan in ka hihgawp ding a; Dedan pha in namsau in asi ding uh. Huchi in ka mi Israelte khut in ka phulakna ka tungsak ding a, Edom tung ah ka hehna bang zel leh ka thangpaihna bang zel in ahih ding ua, ka phulakna ana thei ding uh,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Philistia Kalh A Genkholhna Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Philistia mite'n phu la a, tangtawn kimelmakna a, mi hihman utna lungsim sia pu a phu alak ziak un. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, ngai in, Philistia mite tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, Kareth khomite ka phuk vek ding a, tui gei a mi omsunte ka hihmang vek ding. Huan heh mahmah in sal in atung uah phu ka la ding a, huchi a atung ua ka phulakna ka tunsak hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih atheita ding uh,” achi hi. Ammon Kalh A Genkholhna

Akum sawm-le-khatna huai kha ani masapen in hichi ahong hi a, ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Tura in Jerusalem tungthu a, ‘Nuam e! Namte kongkhak aseta, kei lam ah akihong, hihsiatgawp a a-om vek ziak in, ka tan hoih ding ahita, ” huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, “Ngai in, aw Tura, ka hon dou ahi, tuipi in tuihualte avoktouh bang mai in na tung a hong pai ding in nam tampi ka hon sawl ding. Huchi in Tura kulhte ahihse ding ua, a-insangte achimsak ding ua, amah a kipan aleivui tengteng ka kheuhsiang ding a, suangpi keu lel in ka bawl ding hi. Tui lai a len phoukeuna mun ahi mai ding, ke'n ka chita ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huchi in namte a ding in gallak ahi mai ding. Huan atanu gam a omte namsau a hihlup ahih chiang un Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. “Ngai in, Tura tung ah Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, Kumpipate' kumpipa mallam a kipan in, sakolte toh sakol tungtuang mite, apawl leh mipi tampi mahmah ka hon pi dek ahi. Gam ah namsau in na tanute athat ding; kulh abawl ding a, nang nanna ding in, nang douna ding in abawl ding, mual pawngte, nang douna kidalna abawlkhe ding hi. Kulhbaang suksiatna bawl in, na kulh phelna ding, heipi in na insangte achimsak ding hi. Asakol tam luat ding ziak in aleivuite un nang ahon tuam ding a, khopi akiphutvang nung a mite alut sek bang a, na kongpi a ahong lut hun chiang un, na kulhpi aling ding; sakol tungtuangte husa leh kidou kangtalai husa in. Sakol khechin in achilse ding, na kongzingte; na mite athat khin ding, namsau in; na hatna bangbang lei ah achim ding hi.

Na gou thil gallak in ala ding ua; na van tengteng agubei ding uh; lei ah na kulhbaang achimsak ding ua, na inpi nuam ahihse vek ding uh, na suangte, na singte, na leivuite tui lai ah apai ding uh. Ka khawlsak khin ding a, na lasak husate, na kaihging leng adai den ding hi. Suangpi keu lel in ka hon bawl ding a, len phoukeuna ding na hong hi ding hi, dinsak nawn na hi kei ding, kei Toupa'n ka chita ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi hi. Toupa Pathian in Tura khua kiang ah hichi in achi, na sung a kithahnate a-om hun a, miliamte athum hun chiang in na puk ging in tuipi gei gamte aling kei ding ua hia? Tuipi tung a heutute tengteng atutphah ua kipan apaisuk ding ua, apuan thupite uh akoih ding ua, apuansilh zephoihte uh asuahkhe ding ua; linna in akivan zawta ding ua, lei ah atu ding ua, alingling ding ua, lamdang ahon sa ding uh. Huchi in nang suunna la aphuak ding ua, na kiang ah,Khopi minthang, tuipi tung a hat,tuisiammi tengteng tenna sek,amah leh asung a tengte tengteng,mivialvakte'n ahon lauhlauhuh toh, na siatna thupi hi na tel e; Na pukna ni in aling uh,tuikulh gamte; tuipi tuikulh alunglel ua, na man ni in,achi ding uh chi in. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi, khopi gam, kuamah luah louh khopi bang a ka hon bawl hun chiang in, tui thukpi ah ka hon tumsak ding a, tui thupi mahmah in ahon tum ding hi. Lei nuailam ah, nidang a segawpsa, khuk thuk a paisate kiang ah ka hon tengsak ding a, kuamah in ahon luahlouhna ding un leh mihingte lak a thupina na muh nawn hetlouhna ding in. Ka hon hihmang vengveng ding a, na om nawnta kei ding, mi'n hon zong mah le uh leng, ahon mu nawnta kei ding uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Tura Kalh A Genkholhna

Ka kiang ah Toupa thu hong tung a, ka kiang ah, “Nang, mihing tapa, Tura kho suunna la phuak inla, Tura khua kiang ah, Aw nang tuipi gei a teng sek, tuipi gei gam tampite kiang a sumsin, Toupa Pathian in huchi in ahon chi: Aw nang Tura, ka kilawm bukim na chi maw; “Na gam in tuipi lai asun hi,nang hon bawlte'n hon kilawmtungtuansak mah ve ua; Na singzat Senir meilah inabawl ua; na longpeu ding in,Lebanon a sidar in abawl uhi; Bashan tosaw na longzapnading in abawl ua;saiha suangphum na long pialkhang ding in,taksing tuipi gam Kupra a kipan in. Na long puanzak Aigupta puanmalngat gial,nang chiamtehna ding in ana tung hi,nang a dia limzak dumpuang,sandup, Elishah tui gei a kipan; Na longkalmi Sidon,Arvad mi ahi;na long hawl mite lengZemir misiamte ahi ua; Gebal upa leh mikhutsiam,na long bulhtuah mite ahi ua,tuipi long teng leh amite'n,nang hong dawr ding in ahong zuan uhi. “Na galdoumi, na sepaihhon, Persia, Lud, Put mite ahi ua, alum uh leh adal lukhu uh na baang ah akhai ua, nang kilawmsakte ahi uhi. Na sepaihhon leh Arvad mite'n na kulhpi kimvel in aveng ua, Gammadim mite'n na insang aveng ua, alum uh na kulhpi kimvel in akhai ua, nang kilawmsakte ahi uhi. Na hauh ziak in, sum-le-pai gou thil chiteng, Tarshish nang hon dawr mi ahong hi a, na van lei in ahon lam hi, dangkasik, sik, langva leh asuante leng. Zavan, Tubal, Meshek, nang hon dawrte'n sal leh dal tui-um belsuan in ahon dawr ua, na van neihna ding in. Togarmah a mite'n sakol, kidouna sakol leh sabiltung in na van alei uhi. Dedan mite nang hon dawr mite ahi ua, tui gei mun chih na sumsinna mun ahong hi a, saiha leh eboni ahon puak uhi.

Van na hauh ziak in, Edom nang hon dawr ahong hi a, emerald suang, puan sandup, puanzep, puanmalngat, khibah, agate suangte in nang ahon dawr uh. Judah leh Israel teng nang hon dawrte ahi ua, Minnith buh leh Pannag, khuaizu, sathau leh singnai in ahon dawr uh. Na hauh ziak in, sum-le-pai gou thil chiteng, Damaskas nang hon dawr ahong hi a, Helbon uain leh belam mulkaang in ahon dawr hi. Uzal uain hon tawi in alei ua, na vante, sikseksa, singguithak leh kawltute na sumsinna. Dedan in sakol tungphah puante in nang ahon dawr hi. Arabia leh Kedar kumpipate nang hon dawrte ahi vek uh, belamnoute, belamtalte, keltalte in ahon dawr uh. Sheba leh Raamah sumsin mite nang hon dawrte ahong hi ua, gimlim hoihpente, suangmantam chi chih leh dangka-engte in, nang ahon dawr uh. Haran, Kanneh leh Eden, Sheba, Assuria leh Kilmad sumsin mite nang hon dawrte ahi uh. Huaite ahi uh, nang hon dawr, puansilh hoih chi, puandum buang, puanzep, pialkhang phah ze kilawm toh, khauhual chiptak a hek in, hiaite in nang ahon dawr uh. “Tarshish longhon leh long lian vanpote ahi ua,na hong inbul in tuipi tung ah na hong thupita hi. Na long hawlpa'n tuipi kihotah ahon hawllut a,suahlam huih in nang ahon nuaimang, tuipi lai ah. Tura Vuina La Na long hawl mite kikou husain na kim a mite aling uhi. Longkalhna peu len mitetengteng, long mite leh,tuipi a hawl mite tengteng paisuk in,luipiau ah adingh uh. Na tungthu ah a-aw uh zak tham in asuah ding ua,khasetak in akap ding ua;alu ua leivuite buak in,vut lak ah akitholh ding uh. Nang ziak in kimetgiau in,sai-ip puan ateng ding ua;khase lua in nakpitak a kap in nang ahon suun ding uh.

Nang hon suun in kahla asamding ua, nang suun in Tura bang khopi kua a-om a,amah tuipi lai ah, adai sipsip hi. Na vante'n tuipi a pan pawt inmi tampi avak kham sek;na dangka leh na van in lei kumpipate na hausak hi. Tuipi thuk a na siat ni in,na sumsinna thil, na mite,nang toh athelthang uhi. “Tui gei a teng mi tengteng in mulkimhuai ahon sa ua; akumpipate uh lau in asibup ua, amel uh alamdang hial hi. Mite lak a sumsin mite'n nang ahon khoisatkhum ua, mite a ding in launa na hong suakta a, na kilang ngei nawn kei ding, chi in ahon kahkhum uhi.”

Toupa Pathian thu ka kiang ah ahong tung nawn a, “Mihing tapa, Tura heutupa kiang ah gen inla, Toupa Pathian in, hichi in achi: Na lungsim akisathei a, Pathian ka hi a, tuipi lai a Pathian tutmun ah ka tu, na chi a; himahleh mihing lel na hi a, pathian na hi kei a, pathian lungsim bang in kingaihtuah mah lechin; Daniel sang in na pilzaw a, na lak ah thuguk a-om thei kei a; na pilna leh na lemtheihna in na na kihihhau a; na goubawm ah dangka leh dangka-eng na khum hi. Na pilna thupi mahmah leh na sumsaina in sum na hihpung a; na hauhsak ziak in na lungsim ana kisatheita hi.” Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Pathian lungsim bang pu a na kingaihtuah ziak in, ngai in, na kiang ah gamdangmi, nam lauhuaitak ka hon pilut sin ahi; huan, na pilna gah kilawm tung ah anamsau uh alek ding ua, na thupina ahihse ding uh. Khuk thuk ah ahon sawllut ding ua, tuipi lai a athahte uh sih in na si ding. Nang hon thatmi ma ah, Pathian ka hi, na chi lailai dia hia? Nang hon liamsakmi khut ah pathian na hi kei a, mihing lel na hi zaw. Pau tuam mite khut ah, zeksum louh sih in na si ding; ka pauta ngal a,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Tura Kumpipa Pukna Huai lou leng ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi. “Mihing tapa, Tura kumpipa suunna la phuak inla, akiang ah, Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Hoih buchingtak, pilna a dim, kilawmna chiteng; Pathian huan, Eden ah na teng a; suangmantam chiteng in na kituam a, sardi, topaz leh diamond, beril, onik, jasper, sapphir, emerald, karbankul, aphumkipna leh agelh kilawmna dangka-eng a bawlte, nang siam ni a kisiamte.

Nang chingmi cherub sathau nilh na hi; Pathian tang siangthou ah ka hon omsak a, meisuangte lak ah na vak hi. Na hoih buching; siam a na om ni a kipan, nang a diktatlouhna a-om mateng in. Na sumsinna apun hulhul ziak in hiamgamna in na dim a, khelhna ah na pukta hi. Pathian tang a kipan in bangmah lou in ka hon paita a; chingmi cherub in meisuangte lak a kipan ahon delhkhia hi. Na kilawmna ziak a hong kisathei in, na thupina a na pilna hihsia in, lei ah ka hon pai a, etnop ding in kumpipate ma ah mual ah ka hon phou hi. Na sumsin diktatlouhnate ah, na siatna ziak in, na mun siangthoute na hihbuah a, huaiziak in mei ka khah a; na sung a kipan ahong kangbei a, ahon musekte tengteng muh in lei ah leivui ka hon suaksakta. Mite lak a ahon thei peuhmah lamdangsak, launa na hong suakta; na om ngei nawn kei ding,” chi in.Sidon Dem A Genlawkna Huan ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Sidon masuan inla, atungthu gen in. Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Ka hon nang ahi, aw Sidon, ka hihlang ding, ka thupina; nang ah Toupa ka hihdan athei ding ua, amah ah vai ka hawm hun chiang in, ka sianthouna ka ensak mahmah ding. Akongzing ah sisan leh hipi ka tungsak ding, asung ah miliam apuk ding; mun kil chih a kipan namsau in. Huan Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.Israel Vualzawl In A-om Ding “Huchi in Israel inkote sun ding loulingnei a-om kei ding a, akim a amau musit mite lak ah hihna ding ling a-omta kei ding

kei Toupa Pathian ka hi chih athei ding uh.” Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Israel inkote adalhna gam mite lak a kipan ka pikhawm nawn hun chiang in Jakob kiang a ka piak, agam mahmah uah atengta ding uh. Huchi in bittak in a-omta ding ua; ahi, innte alam ding ua; grephuante abawl ding uh. Bittak in a-om ding ua; akim ua musit mite tengteng tung a vai ka hawm chiang in kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in. Tura Kumpipa Kalh A Genkholhna

Akum sawmna, akha sawmna, huai kha ani sawmnihna ah ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh masuan inla, atung ah leh Aigupta mi tengteng tung ah thu gen in. Gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aigupta kumpipa, Pharaoh luipite lai ah Olepi thupitak, ‘Ka luipi kei a ahi, keimah ngei a dia ka bawl, chipa ka hon dou ahi. Na haizekte ah ngakuai in ka hon man ding a; luipi a ngasate na lip ding in ka belhsak ding a; luipi lai a kipan na lip ah ngasate tengteng toh ka hon botkhe ding. Huan gamdai ah ka hon pai ding a, nang leh na luipi a ngasa tengteng leng; gamlak ah na puk ding a; na luang kaihkhop ahi kei ding a, vui na hi sam kei ding; gam sahangte leh tungleng vasate kiang ah an ding in ka hon pia hi. Israel inkote a dia sialluang chiangkhun lel na hong hih ziak in Aigupta gam a teng tengteng in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Khut a ahon let ua, aliangzang uh na tansak a, na satkhia; hon ngai ua, akongte uh kitan a tang lou in na omsak hi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, na tung ah namsau ka hon tun ding a, na lak a kipan mi leh sa ka phukmang ding. Huan Aigupta gam, gam segawp leh kho sia ahi mai ding a, kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. ‘Luipi kei a ahi a, ka bawl ahi, na chih ziak in.” Huaiziak in ka hon dou ahi, na luipi leng; Seveneh kulh a kipan in Ethiopia gamgi pha in Aigupta gam bel gam segawp leh kho sia in ka bawl ding.

Mihing khe in asik ngei kei ding a, sate leng apai ngei kei ding ua; kum sawmli sung luah in a-om kei ding hi. Aigupta gam segawpte lak a khat in ka bawl ding a, akhopite ka khopi siate lak ah kum sawmli akigawp ding; Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka dalhsak ding hi. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Kum sawmli nung in adalhna munte ua kipan Aigupta mite ka lakhawm nawn ding a; Aigupta mite omdan ka hei ding a, apianna gam uh, Pathros gam ah ka kiksak ding; huchi in huai ah vualleltak in alal ding uh. Lalna gam a vuallel pen ahi ding, namte lak ah leng akilalsak nawn sam kei ding hi. Namdangte tung a thu aneih nawnlouhna ding un amau ka neusak ding hi. Amau lam nga peuhmah in athulimlouhna uh atheihkhiakpih ziak in Israelte muanpi ahi nawnta kei ding uh; huan Toupa Pathian ka hi chih athei ding uh, achi,” chi in.Kumpipa Nebukadnezzar In Aigupta Azou Ding Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawmnih-le-sagihna, akha khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi: “Mihing tapa, Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in Tura tung ah na thupitak sem ding in asepaihhon asawl a, michih lu agiauloh a, michih liangzang in adulhloh lai a; himahleh amah leh asepaihhonte'n anasepna uah Tura a kipan punna bangmah amu tuan kei uh. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, Aigupta gam Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah ka pe ding a, athil hauh ziazuate alamang ding a, alok ding a, agallaksak ding; huai asepaihhonte loh ahi mai ding. Ka nna asep ziak un aloh ding un Aigupta gam ka pia hi,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi. Huai ni chiang in Israel inkote a ding in kii ka poukhesak ding a; alak uah na kam ka kasak ding hi; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh, chi in. Aigupta Tungtang Genkholhna

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, thu gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi. “Kikou un, maizen! Maizen,tua ni tel; ni anai hi, Toupa ni anai hi, mei kai ni,pau tuam mite siatna ding. Ahong tung ding, namsau,Aigupta tung ah;sinlai natna, Ethiopia tung ah,Aigupta ah mithah apuk un;athil hauh ziazuate alamang ding ua, asuangphumte achimse ding.” “Ethiopia, Pud leh Lud, nam chih omkhawm, Kush leh gam tate tel teite tengteng, namsau in apuk ding uh.” “Toupa'n hichi in achi: Aigupta tungding mite leng apuk ding ua, ahatna suanpen uh leng avuallel ding;Migdol a kipan Suene pha in namsau in apuk ding uh,Toupa Pathian in achi hi. Gam hihgawpsate lak a khat ahi ding a, akhopite leng khopi gawpsate lak a ahi mai ding uh. Aigupta gam ah mei ka khah ding a, amau panpih mite tengteng ka hihsiat hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh.” Huai ni chiang in Ethiopia mi kigingloute lunglelsak ding in ka kiang a kipan mi sawl long in apai ding ua; Aigupta ni mah bang in lungtang mangbatna mahmah atung uah atung sam ding hi; ngai in, ahong tung lellel hi. “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Babulon kumpipa Nebukadnezzar khut in Aigupta thil hauh ziazuate ka hihmang ding. Gam hihse ding in amah leh alawite, namte lak a kihtakte tunsak ahi ding uh; Aigupta tung ah anamsau uh alik ding ua, misi luang in gam adimsak ding uh. Huan luipite ka kangsak ding a, migiloute kiang ah gam ka khawng ding; agam leh asung a om tengteng pau tuam mite khut in ka hihgawp ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita ahi. “Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Milimte ka hihse ding a, Memphis a kipan milimte ka hihmang ding, Aigupta ah heutu a-omta kei ding uh

huchi in Aigupta gam ah launa ka omsak ding. “Pathros ka hihgawp ding a, Zoan ah mei ka khah dia; Thebes ah ka tangtungsak ding. Huan Aigupta kulh Sin tung ah ka hehna ka lungdamsak ding a, Thebes a mipite ka phukmang ding. Huan Aigupta ah mei ka khah ding a, buaitak in Sin a-om ding a, Thebes leng achim vek ding; Memphis in sun chiang in melma anei nilouh ding hi. Aven leh Pibeseth kho tangvalte namsau in apuk ding ua, huai khuate sal a pi in a-om ding uh. Aigupta hakkol ka hihtan a, ahatna akisaktheihpih ka hihbei hun Tehphanhes ah ni amial ding; amah zaw meipi in aliah ding a, atanute sal a pi in a-om ding uh. Hichibang in Aigupta gam ah thu ka tangtungsak ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in.Aigupta Kumpipa Thilhihtheihna Kisia Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-khatna, akha khatna, huai kha ani sagih ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ban ka kitansak a, ngai in, namsau tawi ding ahat nawnna ding in damdawi nuh leh tuam aloh kei hi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh ka dou ahi, aban hoih lam leh akitansa nunglam leng ka kitansak ding a; huchi in akhut a kipan namsau ka kitansak ding hi. Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak ding. Babulon kumpipa bante ka hatsak ding a, akhut ah namsau ka tawisak ding a; Pharaoh bante ka kitansak ding a, ama ah sihpih khop liam mau in amau ding hi. Huchi in Babulon kumpipa bante ka hatsak ding a, Pharaoh bante bel aluaikhe ding; Babulon kumpipa khut ah ka namsau ka tawisak a, Aigupta kumpipa tung a alik hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Aigupta mite namte lak ah ka dalhsak ding a, gam chih ah ka thelthangsak vek ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” chi in. Toupa'n Aigupta Gawt Ding

Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-khatna, akha thumna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh leh akhua leh amite kiang ah gen inla: Na thupina ah kua toh na kibang a ahia? “Ngai in, Assuria tuh Lebanon a sidar ahi a, hiang kilawm leh bawkpha, lim sah,sang kilawm, mei lak ah adawn a-om hi. Tui in ahon vak a, tui thuk inakhangsak hulhul, aphuhna luite'n aluan kual ua, gam sing chih vakna ding in aluangsak hi. Huchi in gam sing teng zou in asang tuan a;tuite akidaih zoh ziak inakungpite khanglian in,ahiangte asau uaamengkhesak hi. Ahiang ah tungleng vasate'nbu abawl ua; ahiang nuai ahsa chiteng in nou anei ua;alimnuai ah nam thupi teng ateng uhi. Huchi in athupina ah akilawm a,ahiangte sauna bang zel in;azungte lah tui tampite kiang ah a-om ngal a, Pathian huan a sidar singte'naphazou kei ua; abawk,meilah sing in adem zou kei a;ahiang sesing in aphazou sam kei; akilawmna ah Pathian huan a sing abang zou kei hi. Ahiang tamsak in ka bawlhoiha, Pathian huan a Eden sing teng in ahaza uhi,” chi in. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ahong san mahmah a, meipi lak a adawn alen a, alungtang a asandan akisaktheihpih ziak in, namte lak ah mihattak khut ah ka mansak ding a; athulimlouhdan bang in agawt ding a, ka delhkhe ding. Huchi in gamdangmi, namte lak a kihtakhuai mahmahte'n aphuk ding ua, anuse ding uh; tangte, phaizangte ah ahiangte ake lemlum ding a, huai gam tuiluanna phaizang tengteng ah ahiangte akitan lemlum ding; leitung a mi tengteng alimnuai a kipan apawtkhe ding ua, amah apaisan ding uh. Asiatna ah tungleng vasa tengteng ateng ding ua, abawk tung ah gamsate a-om ding uh.

Hiai bel tui a vak sing tengteng akisansak louh ua, adawn uh meipi kal a lengsak lou a, tui a vak sing in asandan uh asuan samlouhna ding uh ahi; lei mun nuainungpen a kokhuk a paisukta, mihing tate lak ah pai ding in, sihna a matsak ahi vekta ngal ua.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Sheol a apaisuk ni in amah ka sunsak a, luitui thuktakte ka khawlsak a; huai ah tui tampi let dingte ka daltan a; Lebanon amah ka sunsak lai a; gam sing tengteng amah ziak in agim khin uhi. Namte leng apuk ging ah ka lingsak a, kokhuk a paisuksate kiang a Sheol a ka paihkhiak ni in; Eden sing tengteng, Lebanon sing hoih tata, tui a vak tengteng lei nuainungpen ah lungmuang in a-omta uhi. Namsau a thahte kiang ah Sheol ah apaisuk ua; ahi, namte lak a, alimnuai a tengte leh namte lak a akizoppihte toh hankhuk atungsuk uhi.” “Thupina leh letna ah Eden singte lak a kua ahia nang bang om? Himahleh Eden singte toh lei mun nuainungpen ah paihkhiak na hi ding; namsau a thah, zeksumlouhte lak ah na lum ding hi. Hiai bel Pharaoh leh akhua-le-tuite ahi uh,” chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Aigupta, Sidar Sing Toh Tehpih Ahi

Huan hiai ahi, akum sawm-le-nihna, akha sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani khat ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung hi: Mihing tapa, Aigupta kumpipa Pharaoh suunna la phuak inla, akiang ah, “Namte humpinelkai lun lai kibatpih; tuipi a olepi na bang zaw hi; na nak a tuite phuansak in, na khe in na toknin a, aluite uh na ninsak vekta. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ka len in ka hon khuh ding a, mi tampi toh, ka len in nang ahon man ngeingei ding uh. Gamlak ah ka hon nuse ding a, gamlak ah ka hon pai ding; tung a leng tengteng ka samkhawm ding a, na tung ah; nang in leitung pumpi gamsa ka taisak ding hi. Tang chih ah na sa ka lui ding a; na luang in phaizangte ka dimsak ding. Na tenna gam tang tan in, na sisan in ka sil ding a, phaizang chih leng nangmah in adim ding hi. Ka hon chimihsak hun chiang in, van ka khuh in aksi ka mialsak ding a; meipi in nisa ka liahmang ding; huan kha in avakna asuah kei ding hi. Na tung ah van a vak tengteng ka mialsak ding a; na gam ah khomial ka lengsak ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. Na theih louh gam a namte lak a na siatna ka tunsak hun chiang in mi tampite lungtang ka lungzingsak ding. Ahi, mi tampi nangmah ah lamdang sa in ka bawl ding a, ama ua ka namsau ka leh hun chiang in nang ziak in akumpipate uh leng mulkimhuai asa un alau mahmah ding uh; na puk ni in michih in ahinna uh tan lau in alingling ding uhi. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi ngal a; Babulon kumpipa namsau na tung ah ahong tung dek hi.

Na mite ka puksak ding, galhat mite namsau in, namte lak a kihtakhuai pente ahi ua, ahihse ding uh. Aigupta mite thupina, amipite tengteng ahihmang ding uh. Tui tampi gei gamsa teng ka hihmang ding a; mi khete'n angap ninta kei ding; gamsa khete'n leng angap nin sam kei ding hi. Huchi in tui ka chimsak ding a, ka luangsak ding, luite, sathau bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Aigupta gam ka hihsegawp ding a, ahauhna tengteng ah vuaktang in, asung a tengte ka phukmang hun in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ngei ding uh. Hiai akahla ding uh ahi; namte tanute'n hiai kah in Aigupta leh ami tengteng asuun ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Misite Khovel Huan hichi ahong hi a, akum sawm-le-nihna, huai kha ani sawm-le-nga ni in ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Aigupta mipite kah ekek inla, amah leh nam minthangtak tanu kokhuk a paisuk khinte toh lei nuainung lam ah paikhia in. “Kilawmna ah kua akhup a?Paisuk inla zeksumlouhte lak ah lum in. “Namsau a thahsate lak ah apuk ding ua, namsau kiang a piak ahi khin ua, amah leh amite tengteng kaimang un. Sheol a om galhatmi mahmahte'n amah leh apanpih mite ahoupih ding ua; apaisuk ua, alum nilouh uh, namsau a thah, zeksumlouhte. “Huai ah Assuria leh aheute tengteng a-om ua; ahante uh amah kim ah a-om a; avek un thah, namsau a puk vek ahi uh. Ahante uh kokhuk thukpen ah a-om a, ahan kim ah aheute a-om uh; avek ua thah, namsau a puk vek, mihing gam galmuangsak lou mite ahi uh. “Huai ah Elam leh ahan kim ah aheute a-om ua

avek ua, namsau a puk, lei nuainung a zeksum louh apaisuk ua, mihing gam galmuangsak lou mite, azahlakna uh kokhuk a paipih sukte ahi uhi. Mithahte lak ah amah leh aheute lupna abawlsak ua, ahante amah kim ah a-om a; avek un zeksum louh, namsau a thah ahi ua; akihtakhuaina uh mihing gam gallauna ahi nak a; kokhuk a paisuktate toh azahlakna uh apua ua, mithahte lak ah a-omsak uhi. “Huai ah Meshek leh Tubal, aheute uh toh a-om ua; ahante uh amau kim ah a-om a; avek un zeksum louh, namsau a thah ahi uh; akihtakhuaina un mihing gam ahihmang zel hi. Zeksum louh, mihat pukte, kidouna galvan toh Sheol a paisuktate, anamsau uh lukham a nei, aguhte uh tung a alum uh omte kiang ah alum kei uh; amau lah mihing gam a mihatte launa ahi. “Nang zaw zeksumlouhte lak ah kitan lemlum in na om ding a, namsau a site kiang ah na lum ding hi. “Huai ah Edom, akumpipate leh aheutute tengteng a-om ua; ahatna ua; namsau a thahte lak ah asial uh hi; zeksum louh, kokhuk a paisuksate kiang alum uhi. “Huai ah mallam heutute, avek un, Sidon mi tengteng, thahte lak a paisuksate a-om ua, ahatna un mi agallausak nak a, azum ua, zeksum louh in namsau a thahte lak ah alum ua; kokhuk a paisuk khinte toh azahlak khawmta uhi. “Pharaoh in amaute amu ding a, amite tengteng a lungmuan loh ding, Pharaoh leh asepaihhon tengteng, namsau a thahte ngei leng, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. “Mihing gam ah gallauna alengsak a, zeksum louh, namsau a thahte lak ah alum ding uhi, Pharaoh leh ami tengteng ngei, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi. Aigupta Kumpipa Ole Toh Tehpih Ahi

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, na nam tate kiang ah thu gen inla, akiang uah, gam tung a namsau ka hon tutleh gam mite'n alak ua pat mi khat atelkhiak ua, galvilmi dia akoih uleh, ama'n gam tung a namsau hong tung amuhleh pengkul amut ding a, mipite akigalgingsak ding hi. Huchi in pengkul ging za a poisaloumi kuapeuh, namsau hong tung in manloh tamahleh, asisan moh amah mah in apo ding ahi. Pengkul ging azak a apoisak louh ziak in asisan moh akipuak mai ding ahi; ana poisakleh bel ahinna ahumbit ding ahi. Himahleh galvilmi in namsau hong tung amuh a, apengkul amut louh a, mipite akigalgin louh ua, namsau ahong tun a, alak ua mi kuahiam in amanlohleh athulimlouhna in amangthang ding a, galvilmi khut ah asisan phu ka ngiat ding,” chi in. Huchibang in nang, mihing tapa, Israel inkote a dia galvilmi dia ka hon bawl na hi; huaiziak in ka kam a thupawt ngaikhia inla, ka kiang a kipan kigalginna ding thu akiang uah hilh in. Migilou kiang ah, “Aw migilou, si mahmah ding na hi,” ka chih a, migilou a-omdan paisan ding a na hilh keileh migilou agitlouhna ah asi ding a, asisan phu bel nang a kipan ka la ding. Himahleh migilou a-omdan paisan ding a na hilh a, a-omdan apaisan kei laileh, agitlouhna ah asi ding a, nang bel na hinna na humbit ding hi.Mimal Mohpuakna Huan mihing tapa, nang Israel inkote kiang ah thu gen inla, hichibang in na chi ua, “Ka tatleknate uh leh ka khelhnate un ahon delhkhum a, huaiziak in ka thanggawp uh ahi, bangchi in ka hing nilouh thei ding ua?” na chi uhi.

Kei ka hin bang in, migilou sihna ah kipahna ka nei kei a, migilou in a-omdan apaisan a ahin ka kipah lam ahi zaw. Na omdan hoih lou ua kipan kik un, kik un, Aw Israel inkote, bangziak a si ding na hi ua? chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in gen in. “Nang, mihing tapa, na nam tate kiang ah gen inla, midiktat diktanna in atatlekna ni in amah ahumbit kei ding a, migilou gitlouhna in leng athulimlouhna alehngatsan ni in apuksak kei ding a, midiktat lah akhelhna ni in adiktatna in ahing thei tuan sam kei ding. Midiktat kiang ah, na hing ngeingei ding, chih ka gen in, adiktatna muang a thil ahihkhelhleh athil dik hih khat leng theihgige ahi kei ding; athilhihkhelhsa ah asi zaw ding. Huan migilou kiang ah, ‘Na si ngeingei ding, ka chih nawn leuleu in, agitlouhnate alehngatsan a asiang leh adik ana hih a, migilou in mi koih khamnate pekik a, athilgukte apiak nawn a, hinna dante azuih a, thulimlouhna bangmah ahihkeileh ahing ngeingei ding a, asi kei ding hi. Khelhna ana hihsa bangmah theihgige ahita kei ding a, asiang leh adik ana hihta a, ahing ngeingei ding hi. “Himahleh na nam tate'n, ‘Toupa thilhihdan akikim kei, achih un amau hihdan adiktat kei zaw hi. Midiktat in adiktatna alehngatsan a, thil gilou ana hihleh huaiziak in asi mai ding. Huan migilou in agitlouhna alehngatsan a, asiang leh adik ahihleh huaiziak in ahing ding.

Himahleh, ‘Toupa hihdan akikim kei, na chi ua, aw Israel inkote michih noumau hihdan bang in vai ka hon hawmsak ding hi,” achi hi.Jerusalem Pukna Thuthang Huan hichi ahong hi a, i saltan akum sawm-le-nihna, akha sawmna, huai kha ani nga ni in Jerusalem a kipan taikhia mi khat ka kiang ah ahong pai a, “Khopi zoh ahita,” ahong chi hi. Huai mi taikhia ahong tun ma nitaklam in Toupa'n ka tung ah akhut anga a; zinglam a ka kiang a hong pai in ka kam ahon kasak a, huchi in ka kam ka ka a, pau thei lou in ka om nawnta kei hi.Mipite Khelhnate Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, Israel gam a mun segawpsa nung a omte'n, ‘Abraham khat ahi a, gam aluah a; eite bel tampi i hi ua, gam gouluah ding a piak hita ve hang, chi in agen uhi. Huaiziak in akiang uah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Sa sisan na ne ua, na milimte uh lam ah na mitte uh na lengtousak ua; sisan na suah ua, noute'n gam na tang ding uh maw? Na namsau uh na muang ua; thilkihhuai na hih ua; michih in invengpa zi na hihbuah ua; noute'n gam na tang ding uh maw? Hichibang a akiang ua na gen ding ahi, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: ‘Kei ka hin bang in, mun segawpsa nung a omte namsau in apuk ngeingei ding ua, gamlak a omte sahang kiang ah nek khit dia pe ding ka hi; kulh kip leh khuk a omte hipi in asi ding uh. Gam leng ka hihsia in, mulkimhuaitak in ka bawl ding a; athilhihtheihna, akisaktheihpih abeita ding; Israel tangte asegawp ding a, kuamah avialvak nawnta kei ding uh.

Thilkihhuai ahih ziak ua gam ka hihgawp a, mulkimhuaitak a ka bawl hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. ”Zawlnei Thugen Gahte Huan nang, mihing tapa, baang bul ah kongpite ah na nam tate'n ahon ngen susup ding ua, michih in a-unaute kiang ah, “Kisa dih ua, Toupa kiang a kipan thupawt i ngaikhe ding uh, akichi ding uh. Huchi in ahonhon in na kiang ah ahong pai ding ua, ka mite bang mai in na ma ah ahong tu ding ua, na thu ahong ngaikhe ding ua, himahleh azui tuan kei ding uh; akam un itna thupitak ahihlang ding ua, alungtang un bel punna lam azuan ding. Ngai in, nang bel amau a ding in itna la, kilawmtak a sak leh tum bang na hi ding; na thute angaikhia ua, himahleh azui tuan kei ding uh. Amite Vengtu Ding In Pathian In Ezekiel Asep(Eze. )

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Israelte belamchingte tung ah thu gen in, thu gen inla, akiang uah, belamchingte kiang mahmah ah, huchi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Israelte belamching, amau kivak maimahte tung agik hi; belamchingte'n belamte vak lou ding ahi uhia? Athaute na ne ua, amul in na kizem ua; athauthau na gou ua, belamte na vak kei uhi. Natna veite, avakmangte na hon pi kei ua; amangte na zong kei ua; khauhtak leh na mahmah in na thunun zaw uh. Belampute a-om louh ziak un dalhsak in ana omta ua; ana dalh ua, gam sahangte an lel ahong hita uhi. Ka belamte tang chih leh mual chih ah avakmang ua; ahi, ka belamte leitung tengteng ah ana dalh khin uh; limsakmi leh zongmi a-om kei uh, chi in gen in,” achi hi. Huaiziak in belamchingte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un; Kei ka hin bang in, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, belamching a-om louh ua, belamchingte'n ka belamte azon louh ua, belamchingte'n ka belamte avak louh ua, amau akivak zawksop ziak un ka belamte gam sahangte an lel ahong hi ua; ka belamte samat lel ahong hi petmah uh. Huaiziak in nou belamchingte aw, Toupa thu za un. Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Ngai un, belamchingte ka dou ahi; akhut ua kipan ka belamte ka sut ding a, ka belamte akepna uh ka tawpsak ding a, belamchingte leng amau akivakta kei ding uh; a-angsung ua kipan ka belamte ka lakhe ding a, amau dia nek ding ahih nawnlouhna ding un, chi in.Belamchingpa Hoih Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi ngal a: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in ka zong ding a, ka zongkhe ding hi.

Belamching in abelam dalhte lak a abelamhonte azon lai bang in ka belamte ka zongkhe ding; khonim ni leh mial nuai a adalhna tengteng ua kipan ka zongkhe ding, Huan mite lak a kipan ka lakhe ding a; gam chih a kipan ka kaikhawm ding a; amau gam ngei ah ka pilut ding; Israel tangte ah, lui geite ah, mi tenna mun tengtengte ah ka tasak ding. Loupa hoihna munte ah ka tasak ding a; ahuangsung uh Israel tang sangte ah a-om ding; huang hoihtak sung ah leng a-om ding ua, Israel tang tung a loupa dawng munte ah ata ding uh. Kei mahmah in ka belamte ka vak ding a; ka kualsak kinken ding a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Amang ka zong ding a, delhmangte ka pikik nawn ding a, akhe kitante uh ka tuam ding a, ka hatsak ding; athau leh ahatte leng ka ching ding a; diktak in ka vak ding hi. Huan nou tungthu ahihleh, aw ka belamhonte, hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi: Ngai un, ka belamte kal thu ka gensak ding a, belamtalte, keltalte leng. Gantatna mun hoihtak tung a tat nou ding in thil bang tham lou bang alang in, na tatna neihsun na chilse zosop uh ahi maw? Huan tuichim mahmahte na dawn khit un na ngap nin mawkmawk uh ahi maw? Ka belamte'n na siksa uh ane un, na ngahsa uh adawn ding uh maw? Huaiziak in hichi in Toupa Pathian in akiang uah achi: Ngai un, kei, kei mahmah in gan gawngte leh gan thaute kal thu ka ngaihtuah ding hi. Ahatloute na liang un leh na sikte un na phu ua, na khete un na pik ua, na dalhsak uhi. Huaiziak in ka belamte ka humbit ding

samat lel ahi nawn kei ding ua, belamte kal thu ka gensak ding hi. Huan atung uah belamchingpa khat, ka sikhapa David ngei ka koih ding a; ama'n amaute avak ding a; amah amau chingpa ahi ding a, amaute avak ding hi. Huchi in kei a Toupa Pathian uh ka hi ding a, ka nasempa David atung ua heutu ahi ding; kei Toupa ngei in ka chita hi. Amau toh lemna thukhun ka bawl ding a, sahangte gam a kipan ka hihmang ding; gamdai ah leng bittak in ateng ding ua, gammang nuaite ah a-ihmu hithit ding uhi. Amau leh ka mual kim munte ka vualzawl ding a; ahun geihgeih in vuah ka zusak ding a, vualzawl vuahte azu ding hi. Huan gam a sing in gah asuah ding a, lei in apunna asuah ding a; agam uah bittak in a-om ding uh; ahakkolte uh ka kitansak a, sikha a bawl mite khut a kipan ka hutkhiak hun chiang in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Namdangte samat lel ahi nawnta kei ding ua, gam sahangte nekmang mai ahi nawn kei ding uh; bittak in a-om zawta ding ua, kuamah in alausak ngei nawn kei ding uh. Thilsuan minthang mahmah ka bawlsak ding a; huai gam ah kial in ahihmang nawn kei ding a, namdangte muhsitna leng athuak nawn kei ding uh. Huan kei Toupa a Pathian uh akiang uah ka om chih athei un, amau Israel inkote leng ka mite ahi uh chih athei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huan nou ka belamte, ka gantatna mun a belamte na hi ua; kei na Pathian uh ka hi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in. Israel Chingtu Kilembawlte

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, Seir tang masuan inla, atung ah thu gen in. Akiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi:Ngai in, Aw Seir tang, ka hon dou hi,na tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a,ka hon hihgawp in mulkimhuaitak in ka hon bawl ding. Na khopite ka hihse ding a,na kigawp ding;huan Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding.” Na nitna uh gawtna nanungpen a asiat ni ua Israel inkote namsau thilhihtheihna a na lat a, na kinakpih gige ziak in, kei ka hin bang in, sisan a ding in ka hon bawl ding a, sisan in ahon delh ding; sisan na huat louh ziak in sisan in ahon delh ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Hichi in Seir tang bel mulkimhuaitak a bawl in ka sugawp ding; atung a mi vialvakte ka tawpsak vek ding hi. Atangte amah mithahte in ka dimsak ding; na tangte ah, na phaizang leh na lui phaizang kuakte ah namsau a thahte apuk phengphung ding uh. Ka hon sugawp den ding a, na khopite luah in a-om kei ding; huan kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding hi. Toupa zaw a-om gige na a, “Hiai nam nihte leh gam nihte kei a ahi ding a, ka tang mai ding uh,” na chih ziak in. Kei ka hin bang in chih, Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, na hehna bang zel leh na huatna ziak a hazatna na suklatdan bang zel in ka hih ding ahi; na tungthu ka ngaihtuah hun chiang in alak uah ka hihlang ding hi. “Hihgawp in a-omta ua, ka kiang ah piak in a-omta uh,” chi a Israel tangte na gensiatna tengteng kei Toupa'n ka za vek chih na thei ding hi.

Ka tung ah na kam in na kiliansak in ka tung ah thu na tamsak a, ka za vek hi. Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: Lei pumpi kipahna ding in ka hon sugawp ding hi. Israelte gouluah asiat ziak a na kipah mah bang in na tung ah ka hih ding; Aw Seir tang leh Edom tengteng, avek in akisegawp ding; huchi in Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. Edom Gawtna

Huan nang mihing tapa, Israel tangte kiang ah thu gen inla, “Nou Israel tangte aw, Toupa thu ngaikhia un. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na tung ah na melmate'n, ‘Aha! Nidang mun sang tengtengte kei a ahita, achih ziak un, ” thu gen in. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Nam omsunte a ding a kil chih a nang ahon nek ua, hon sukgawp ziak un leh mikamtamte houlimna leh gensiat a ahon omsak ziak un; Nou Israel tangte aw, Toupa Pathian thu ngaikhia un, Toupa Pathian in tangte, mualte, luiguamte, phaizangte leh mun sesate, khopi kigawpsa, akim a nam omsunte samat lel ding leh nuihsan dingte kiang ah hichi in achi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Nam omsun leh Edom tengteng lungsim kipaktak a ka gam na na kiseh tawm ua; na hon musit mahmah ua, gallak a bawl mite tung ah ka mullitna thangpaih mahmahna in thu ka gen ngei ahi. Huaiziak in Israel gam tungthu ah thu gen inla, tangte, mualte, luiguamte leh phaizangte kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, namdangte simmohna na thuak ziak un mullit mahmah leh thangpaitak in thu ka gen ahi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Na kim a namte'n amau zahlakna apo ngei ding uh chi in ka khut ka zak hi. Nou bel, Aw Israel tangte aw, hiang na suah ding ua, ka mi Israelte a ding in gah na suah ding uh; ahong pai dek uhi. Ngai un, nou lam a pang ka hi ngal a, nou lam ka nga ding a, kalhnen in na om ding ua, chi tuh in na om lai ding uh. Na tung uah mihing ka pungsak ding a, Israel inkote tengteng, avek un

mun sesate bawlphat in a-om ding a, khopite luah in a-om ding. Na tung uah mi leh sa ka pungsak ding a, apung un alamzang ding uh; na omdan masa bang in luah in ka hon omsak ding a, atung a na omdan sang ua hoihzaw in ka hon bawl ding hi; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. Ahi, na tung uah mi ka vaksak ding a, ka mi Israelte ngei; ahon luah ding ua, agoutan uh na hi ding a, tuban siah atate uh na tansak ngei nawn kei ding hi. Hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Nang mihingte nemang, na mite tansek na hi, ahon chih ziak un, mihingte na ne bei nawnta kei ding a, na mite leng na tan ngei na hon sam kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Pau tuam mite muhsitna ka hon thuaksak nawn kei ding a, mite gensiat na thuak ngei nawn kei ding; na mite na tan ngei nawn kei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi, chi in,” achi hi.Israel Hinkho Thak Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a, “Mihing tapa, Israel inkote amau gam a aten lai un a-omdan uleh athilhihte un akihihnin ua; ka ma a a-omdan uh numei kizen louh lai a asianthoulouhna bang mai ahi. Huaiziak in gam tung ah sisan asuah ua, amilimte ua akihihnit ziak un atung uah ka hehna ka lungdamsak hi. Namte lak ah ka dalhsak a, gam chih ah athehthangta ua; a-omdan uleh athilhihte uh bang zel in atungthu uh ka gensak hi. Ava hohna namte kiang atun un ka min siangthou ahihbuah ua; mite'n, ‘Hiaite Toupa mite ahi ua, gam a kipan hong pawtkhete ahi uh, ” ana chih nakna uah.

Himahleh Israel inkote'n ava hohna namte lak a ahihbuah uh, ka min siangthou ka lainat ahi. Huaiziak in Israel inkote kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, Israel inkote, noute ka hon lainat ziak hilou in, na va hohna namte lak a na hihbuah uh, ka min siangthou ka lainat ziak zaw in hiai ka hih ahi. Ka min thupitak, namte lak a buah, alak ua noumau ngei in na hihbuah uh ka siangthousak ding ahi; huchi in amitmuh ua noute a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Namte lak a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, gam tengteng a kipan ka hon kaikhawm ding a, na gam mahmah uah ka hon pilut ding hi. Huan na tung uah tui siang ka theh ding a, na hong siangthou ding ua, na nitna tengteng uleh na milimte lak ua kipan ka hon khuahsiang ding. Lungtang thak ka hon pe ding a, na sung uah kha thak ka koih ding; na taksa ua kipan suang bang a sak lungtang ka lamang ding a, taksa bang a nip lungtang ka hon pe zaw ding hi. Na sung uah ka kha ka koih ding a, ka dan bawl ah ka hon vaksak ding a, ka thupiakte na kem ding ua, na zui ding uh. Na pipute uh kiang a ka piak gam ah na teng ding uh; nou ka mite na hi ding ua, kei na Pathian uh ka hi ding. Na nitna tengteng ua kipan ka hon hunkhe ding a, buh-le-bal ka sam ding a ka hon pungsak ding, na tung uah kial ake nawn kei ding hi.

Singgahte ka pungsak ding a, louma ka pungsak ding a, kial ziak in namte lak ah zahlakna na thuak kei ding uh. Huchi in na omdan giloute uh, na thil hihhoihloute uh na theigige ding ua, na kihhuaina uleh na thulimlouhna uh ziak in noumau mitmuh mahmah in na kihta ding uhi. Noute ziak a hiai hih ka hi kei chih na thei mai un, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Aw, Israel inkote aw, na omdan ziak un zum unla, lamdang sa un. Na thulimlouhna tengteng ua kipan ka hon khuahsiang ni chiang in, khopite ka hon luahsak nawn ding a, mun sesa ka bawl nawn ding. Huchi in gam sesa, tuma lam a mi vialvakte mitmuh a sesa nung himahleh lei leh in a-om ding hi. Hiai gam sesa nung Eden huan bang mai ahong hi nawnta, achi ding uh; khopi sia a, na kigawpsate luah leh um in a-om nawn ding hi. Israel Tung A Pathian Vualzawlna Huan Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Huai lou in hiai Israel inkote ka hon dingsak ding a; ganhon bang mai a amite uh hihpung ding in. Kithoihna ding ganhon, a-ankuanglui sehsa a Jerusalem ganhonte bang mai in; huchibang in khopi sesa nung mipi tampi in ahong dim ding ua; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh,” achi hi.

Toupa khut ka tung ah a-om a, Toupa kha in ahon pikhia a, phaizang laitak ah hon koih a; guh ngen in huai phaizang adim hi. Huan alak uah ahon pi vialvial a; phaizang ah guh tampi ana om lemlom a; ngai dih, akeu ngen ahi. Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai guhte ahing thei diam?” achi hi. Ke'n, “Aw, Toupa Pathian, nang na theizaw hi,” ka chi hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Thu gen inla, akiang uah, ‘Aw, nou guh keute aw, Toupa thu ngai un. Hiai guhte kiang ah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, noute ah nakna ka lutsak ding a, na hing ding uh. Noute ah thagui ka koih ding a, sa in ka hon tuam ding a, vun in ka hon khuh ding; huan na sung uah nakna ka omsak ding a, na hing ding ua, kei Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh, chi in,” achi hi. Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka genta a; ka gen leh husa ahong om a, ngai in, aging luilui a, guhte amau kizoppih chiat ah akisutuah khawmta uh. Ka etleh ngai in, amau ah thagui ahong om a, sa in atuam a, vun in akhuhta a; nakna bel amau ah a-om nai kei hi. Huchi in ama'n ka kiang ah, “Huih kiang ah thu gen inla, mihing tapa, gen mahmah in, huih kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, nakna, kawlmong li a kipan in hong pai inla, hiai mithahte tung ah nak in, ahintheihna ding un, chi in,” achi hi. Huchi in ahon thupiak bang in ka gen a, amau ah nakna ahong lut a, ahingta ua, amau khe chiat in ahong dingh ua, sepaihhon thupitak ahong hita hi.

Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai guhte Israel inkote pumpi ahi ua; ngai dih, amau, ‘Ka guhte uh akeu khin in, ka lamet uh abei khinta, phukmang in ka omta uh, achi uhi. Huaiziak in thu gen inla, akiang uah Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ahante uh ka hong ding a, aw, ka mite aw, na han ua kipan ka hon khah ding a; huchi in Israel gam ah ka hon pilut ding hi. Na hante uh ka hon a, na han ua kipan ka hon pawtsak hun chiang in, aw, ka mite aw, Toupa ka hi chih na thei ding uh. Huan noumau ah ka Kha ka koih ding a, na hing ding uh, na gam ngei uah ka hon koih ding; kei Toupa'n ka chita a, ka hih lai ding ahi chih na thei ding uh, chih Toupa thupawt ahi,” achi hi.Judah Leh Israel, Lalgam Khat Ah Ka kiang ah Toupa thu ahong tung nawn hi. Nang, mihing tapa, chiang khat la inla, atung ah, “Judah leh akithuahpih Israel suante,” chih gelh in; chiang dang leng la inla, atung ah, “Joseph leh Ephraim chiang leh akithuahpih Israel inkote tengteng,” chih gelh in. Huan chiangte peh inla, na khut a khat ahihtheihna ding in. “Hiaite bang chihna ahi ua, na hon kawkmuh kei dia hia?” Na nam tate un na kiang ahon chih uleh, akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, Ephraim leh akithuahpih Israel chite khut a om Joseph chiang ka la ding a, huaite Judah chiang toh ka peh ding a, khat in ka bawl ding a, ka khut ah khat ahong hi ding, na chi ding hi. Chiang, atung a na gelhnate mahmah amitmuh ngei uah na khut ah a-om ding hi.

Huan akiang uah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai un, ava tunna gam ua namte lak a kipan Israel tate ka pikhe ding a, ning chih a kipan ka kaikhawm ding a, agam uah ka pikik ding hi. Huan huai gam, Israel tangte ah nam khat in ka bawl ding a, kumpipa khat avek ua kumpipa ahi dia; huan, nam nih ahi nawnta kei ding ua, vaihawmna gam nih in leng akikhen nawn sam kei ding hi. Amilimte uh, athilkihhuaite uh, atatleknate un leng akihihnin ngei nawnta kei ding ua; apuk ua akhelhna nak tengteng ua kipan ka hunkhe ding a, ka khuahsiang ding; huchi in ka mite ahi ding ua, kei a Pathian uh ka hi ding hi. Ka nasempa David atung ua kumpipa ahi ding a, avek ua tung ah belamchingtu khat a-om ding; ka thupiakte amang ding ua, ka dan bawlte azui ding ua, azang ding uh. Ka nasempa Jakob kiang a ka gam piak, na pipute uh na tenna sek ah ateng ding ua; huai ah tangtawn in ateng ding ua, amau leh atate uh, atate uh tate leng; ka nasempa David tangtawn in aheutu uh ahi ding hi. Huai lou leng amau kiang ah lemna thukhun ka bawl ding a, amau a ding in tangtawn thukhun ahi ding a, akiang uah ka pe ding a, amau ka pungsak ding a, alak uah tangtawn in ka biakbuk ka dingsak ding hi. Ka biakbuk leng akiang uah a-om ding a, a Pathian uh ka hi ding a, amau ka mite ahi ding uh. Huan alak ua tangtawn a ding a ka biakbuk adin hun chiang in kei Toupa, Israel hihsiangthoupa ka hi chih namte'n athei ding uh, achi, chi in. Guh Keu Phaizang

Toupa thu ka kiang ah ahong tung a: “Mihing tapa, Magog gam a mi, Rosh leh Meshek leh Tubal heutupen Gog masuan inla, atung ah thu gen in. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Ngai in, aw Gog, Rosh, Meshek leh Tubal heutupen, ka hon dou ahi. Ka hon lehngatsak ding a, na haizek ah ngakuai in ka hon kuai ding a, ka hon khaikhe ding; na sepaihhon tengteng, sakol leh atungtuang mite, galvan buching a kithuam tengteng, pawl thupitak, lum lian leh lum neu zang a namsau tawi chiatte toh in. Persia, Kush, Put toh, avek ua lum leh sik lukhu neite; Gomer leh asepaihhon tengteng; Togarmah inkote, mal tawp a mi leh asepaihhon tengteng; na kiang a mi tampite toh leng. Kigalgin inla, ahi, na man in, nang leh na kiang a omkhawm, na kithuahpih tengteng toh; huan amau vengpa na hi in. Ni tampi nung in sap na hi ding a, kum nanungte ah namsau a kipan hotkhiak, nam tampite lak a kipan lakkhawmte omna gam, Israel tanggam kise gigete na hon sual ding a; himahleh namte lak a kipan huai mite pikhiak ahi ua, tu in avek un lungmuangtak in akhosa ding uhi. Na kuantou ding a, huihpi bang mai in na hong tung ding a, meipi in gam atuam moimoi bang mai na hi ding, nang leh na kiang a sepaihhon tengteng leh na kiang a mi tampite.” Huan hichi in Toupa Pathian in achi hi: “Huai ni chiang in hichi ahi ding a, na lungsim ah thil a hong lut ding a, thil hoih lou na suangtuah ding.

Huchi in kulh nei lou khuate gam ka sim ding a, mi bittak a om hiathiat, avek ua kulh lou a teng, kulh kongkhak leh akalhna sik neiloute ka sual ding, na chi sim ding hi. Gallak sum leh vante la ding leh mun sesa nung luah nawn mite leh namte lak a kipan pikhawmsa, ganhon leh vante hau a, lei laizang a tengte tung ah na khut lik na tum ding hi. Sheba leh Dedan leh Tarshish sumsin mite leh ahumpinelkai lun lai tengtengte'n na kiang ah, gallak la ding in na hong pai maw? Hon lok ding a na pawlte hon khawm na hi maw? Dangkasik, dangka-eng, ganhon leh van, thupitak suhsak a lamang ding na hi maw? ahon chi ding uh,” chi in. Huaiziak in mihing tapa, thu gen inla, Gog kiang ah, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Huai ni, ka mi Israelte bittak a a-om hun ding uh na thei kei maw? Mallam gam tawp pek, na mun a kipan in na hong pai ding a, nang leh na kiang a mi tampi sakol tungtuang chiat, pawl thupi mahmah, sepaihhon thupitak mai. Meipi in gam atuam lunglung bang in ka mi Israelte tung ah na hong pai ding a; huan hichi ahi ding a, ni nanungte ah ka gam dou ding in ka hon pi ding a, namte'n ahon thei ding ua, Aw, Gog, amitmuh ua nang a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in. Huan Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Tuma lam a ka nasempa Israel zawlnei, huai lai kum tampi sung a thu na gente'n amaute sual ding a ka hon pi ding thu agen sekpa uh na hi hia?

chi in,” achi hi.Pathian In Gog Agawtna Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Israel gam sual ding a Gog ahong kuan hun in ka mel ah ka thangpaihna akilang ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Ka mullit a ka thangpaih laitak in, huai ni in Israel gam ah zin nakpi in aling ngeingei ding hi. Huchi in tuipi ngate, tungleng vasate, gamsate, leitung a vak ganhing tengteng, leitung a mihing tengteng ka ma ah aling ding ua, tangte niamsak in a-om ding a, kawlte achim ding a, kulhbaang teng lei ah apuk ding, chi in ka gen hi. Ka tang tengteng ah amah sualna ding in namsau ka sam ding a; michih in namsau in a-unaupa adou ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huan sisan pawt leh hipi in amah ka sual ding a; amah leh asepaihhonte leh akiang a mi tampite tung ah vuahpi leh gial thupi leh mei katte ka zusak ding. Huan ka thupidan leh ka sianthoudan ka hihlang ding a, nam tampite mitmuh in ka kihihlang ding, huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Gog, Pathian Vanzat

Huan nang, mihing tapa, Gog tung ah thu gen inla, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Ngai in, Aw Gog, Rosh, Meshek leh Tubal heutupen, ka hon dou ahi. Ka hon lehngatsak ding a, ka hon pi zel ding a, mal tawp pek a kipan ka hon pikhe ding a, Israel tangte ah ka hon tun ding hi. Na khut veilam a kipan na thalpeu ka kitansak ding a, na khut taklam a kipan na thalte ka kesak ding hi. Israel tangte ah na puk ding a, nang leh na sepaihhon tengteng leh na kiang a mipi omte toh, sasial ne vasa chitengte kiang leh gam sahangte kiang ah nekgaih ding in ka hon pe ding hi. Gamlak ah na puk ding a; ke'n ka chita a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. Magog leh tui gei gam a bittak a tengte tung ah mei ka khah ding; huchi in kei Toupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Huan ka mi Israelte lak ah ka min siangthou ka hihlang ding a, ka min siangthou hihbuah ka phal nawnta kei ding a; huchi in namte'n kei, Toupa Israel Mi Siangthoupa ka hi chih athei ding uh. Ngai un, ahong tung hi; hihtangtun in a-om ngei ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi; hiai ni ahi ka na gen. Huan Israel khopi a tengte apawtkhe ding ua, meikuang ah galvante akhul ding ua, akangmang ding; lum lian leh lum neute, thal leh apeute, teipi leh chiangzumte kum sagih sung meikuang ah akhul ding uhi. Huchi in gam sing apo kei ding ua, gammang singte aphuk kei ding uh, galvante sing khul ding a zang ding uh ahi ngal a

gallak la mite gallak in ala tei ding ua, lok mite alokthuk ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Gog Vuina Huan huai ni in hichi ahi ding a, Gog a ding in Israel gam ah vuina mun ka pe ding a, tuipi suahlam, Abarim Phaizang ngei; huai in khualzinte adal ding a, Gog leh alawite avui ding ua; huchi in huai phaizang Hamongog Phaizang asa ding uhi. Huan Israel inkote'n agam uh khuahsiang in kha sagih sung avui ding uh. Ahi, agam ua mi tengteng in avui ding ua; pahtawi a ka om ni in ka minthanna ahi ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Agam uh khuahsianna ding in, luang vuilouhte teng zongkhia avui ding in nasep a nei ding mi aseptuam ding uh, kha sagih bei nung in azong pan ding uhi. Gam vel mite'n avel un, mihing guhte amuh uleh chiamtehna abawl ding ua, Hamongog Phaizang a vui mite'n avui ma uh. Huan Hamonah khopi min ahi ding. Huchibang in gam akhuahsiang ding uhi. Nang, mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Vasa chichihte leh sa chichihte kiang ah thu gen inla, pungkhawm unla, hong pai un, sa na nek ua sisan na dawntheihna ding un Israel tang a kithoihna thupitak, nou a dia ka bawl kim ah hong kikhawm un. Mithupi sate na ne ding ua, lei a heutute sisan na dawn ding ua; belamtalte, belamnoute, kelte, Bashan gam a bawngtal vak thau tengteng sisan toh. Nou a dia kithoihna ankuang ka lui thau, vah kikeih in na ne ding ua; asisan kham khop in na dawn ding uh.

Huchi in sakolte, kangtalai kai mite, mithupite leh galdoumi tengteng in ka ankuang ah na tai ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Israel Tunding Nawnna Huchi in namte lak ah ka thupina ka koih ding a, nam tengteng in athugel hihpuksate leh atung ua ka khut khakdante amu ding uh. Huai ni a kipan Israel inkote'n kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih atheita ding uh. Namte'n Israel inkote athulimlouhna ziak un sal in atang uh chih athei ding ua; ka tung a aginom louh mahmah ziak un amau tung ah ka mel ka sel a, huchi in amelmate uh khut ah ka pia a, namsau in apuk vek uhi. Asianthoulouhna bang zel uleh atatlekna bang zel un atung uah ka hih tei a; amau a kipan ka mel ka sel ahi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Tu'n zaw Jakobte omdan ka hei ding a, Israel inkuan pumpi tung ah zah ka ngai ding, ka min siangthou gum in ka thikthu ase ding hi. Kuamah lausakmi om lou a, agam ua bittak a aten hun un leng atatlekna tengteng uh, ka tung a atatlekna uh leh azahlakna uh apo ding uhi. Mite lak a kipan ka pikhiak nawn a, amelmate uh gam a kipan ka kaihkhawm a, amau nam tampi mitmuh a hihsiangthou a ka om hun chiang in. Huan namte lak a sal a ka tansak nawn a, agam ngei ua ka pikhawm nawndan ah kei Toupa a Pathian uh ka hi chih athei ding uh; huai ah alak ua khat lel leng ka nuse kei ding hi. Amau a kipan ka mel ka sel nawnta kei ding; Israel inkote tung ah ka kha ka sungta ngal a, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” chi in. Gog Vuallehna

I saltan akum sawmnih-le-ngana, huai kum bul, huai kha ani sawmna, khopi siat nung akum sawm-le-lina, huai ni mahmah in Toupa khut ka tung ah ahong om a, huai ah ahon pi hi. Pathian mengmuhna ah Israel gam ah ahon pi a, tang sangtak ah ahon koih a, huai simlam ah khopi dinsaksa bangtak a-om hi. Huai ah ahon pi a, ngai dih, mi khat ana om a, amel latdan dal bang mai ahi a; khauzang leh tehna chiang atawi a, kongpi ah adingh hi. Huan huai mi in ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, na mit in en inla, na bil in za in; ka hon etsak ding lam ah na lungsim nga tinten in; huai ka hon etsak ding ziak a hiai a ka hon pi na hi ngal a; na muh tengteng Israel inkote kiang ah puang in,” achi hi.Suahlam Kongpi Huan ngai dih, tempul kimvel ah kulhbaang ana om a, huai mi'n tehna chiang, tong guk a sau atawi a, atong khat bel tong khat leh khutpek bok chia ahi a; kulhbaang sahlam ateh a, chiang khep khat ahi a, asanlam leng chiang khep khat mah ahi. Huchi in suahlam chial kongpi ahong tung a, akalbi ah apaitou a; kongpi lutna dantan ateh a, chiang khep khat a za ahi. Huan vilna dantante adunglam chiang khep khat, availam chiang khep khat chiat ahi; vilna dantan kikal tong nga chiat ahi a; huan Inpi lam kongpi sumtawng kongpi lutna dantan chiang khep khat ahi. Inpi lam sumtawng leng ateh a, tong giat ahi. Abaangkate tong nih chiat ahi a, kongpi sumtawng inpi lam ah ahi. Huan suahlam kongpi vilna dantante alang tuak ah thum tuaktuak ahi a, athum un akikim vek uhi; huan, baangkate leng alang tuak ah akikim ahi.

Kongpi lutna vailam ateh a, tong sawm ahi a; kongpi paisuakna vailam tong sawmthum ahi. Huan vilna dantan ma ah deidanna langkhat ah tong khat a sah tuaktuak a-om a; huchi in vilna dantante lang tuak tong guk tuak ahi hi. Huan kongpi ateh a, vilna dantan khat tung a kipan alangkhat tung pha in tong sawmnih-le-nga a za ahi; kongkhak leh kongkhak kizom chiat in. Sumtawng leng ateh a, tong sawmnih ahi a; kongpi sumtawng pua bel huangsung ahi kei hi. Huan kongpi ponungpen a kipan kongpi sumtawng sunggilpen chiang tong sawmnga ahi. Huan kongpi sunglam ah akimvel in dantante ah tohlet hon theih louh a-om a, akikal a khuamte ah leng; asumtawngte ah leng, huchibang mah in asunglam ah leng akimvel in tohlet a-om a, akhuamte ah tum sing lim a-om chiat nawn hi.Huang Ponungzaw Huan huangsung ponungzaw ah ahon pi a; ngai dih, dantante a-om a, huangsung kimvel suanglep ahi a; huan, suanglep ah dantan sawmthum a-om hi. Huan suanglep bel kongpi a kipan a lep ahi a, kongpi tan ding mah a lep ahi, huai tuh suanglep nuainungzaw ahi. Huchi in kongpi nuaizaw pen zawn a kipan in huang sungnungzaw pen polam pha in ateh a, azatdan suahlam leh mallam tong zakhat ahi.Mallam Kongpi Huan huangsung ponungzaw pen kongpi mallam pang a adung leh avai leng ateh hi. Huan vilna dantante alang tuak ah thum tuaktuak a-om a, abaangkate leh akongpi sumtawngte leng amasa bang vek ahi; adung tong sawmnga ahi a, avai tong sawmnih-le-nga. Atohlette, asumtawngte, atum sing limte suahlam kongpi toh kikim vek ahi; kalbi sagih a-omtou a; asunglam ah asumtawng a-om hi. Huang sungnungzaw pen lutna ding kongpi bel kongpi dang zawn ah a-om zel a, mallam leh suahlam ah leng

kongpi leh kongpi kikal ateh a, tong zakhat ahi.Simlam Kongpi Huan simlam ah ahon pi nawn a, ngai in, simlam kongpi ana om a; atehdan ngei in abaangkate leh asumtawng ateh hi. Huai ah adangte bangmah in akimvel in tohlette a-om a, asumtawng ah leng; adung tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi. Huan kalbi sagih a-omtou a, asunglam ah sumtawng a-om a; alang tuak abaangkate ah tum sing lim a-om zel hi. Simlam ah huang sungnung lutna ding kongpi a-om a, simlam kongpite kikal ateh a, tong zakhat ahi.Huang Sungnung: Simlam Kongpi Huan simlam kongpi ah huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pi a, tehna ngei in simlam kongpi ateh a; vilna dantante, abaangkate sumtawngte tehna mah in huai ah tohlette a-om a, sumtawng leng akimvel in; adunglam tong sawmnga, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi. Huan akimvel ah sumtawngte a-om a, adunglam tong sawmnih-le-nga, availam tong nga ahi. Asumtawngte'n huangsung ponungzaw lam anga a; abaangkate ah tum sing lim a-om a; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.Huang Sungnung: Suahlam Kongpi Huan suahlam ah huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pi a, atehna ngei in kongpi ateh hi. Avilna dantante, abaangkate, asumtawngte tehna mah in; huai ah tohlette a-om a, sumtawng leng akimvel in; adunglam bel tong sawmnga, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga ahi. Asumtawngte'n huangsung ponungzaw pen lam anga a, abaangkate ah lang tuak ah tum sing lim a-om a; akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.Huang Sungnung: Mallam Kongpi Huan mallam kongpi ah ahon pi nawn a; atehna ngei in ateh a; avilna dantante, abaangkate, asumtawngte; huai ah akimvel in tohlette a-om a; adunglam tong sawmnga ahi a, availam tong sawmnih-le-nga. Abaangkate huangsung ponungzaw pen lam ah a-om a; abaangkate ah alang tuak ah tum sing lim a-om hi

akahtouhna in kalbi giat anei hi.Mallam Kongpi Kiang A Innte Kongpi sumtawng a kipan a lut theih in dantan a-om a, huai ah halmang kithoihna ding asil zel uhi. Kongpi sumtawng lang tuak ah; halmang kithoihnate, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, moh ziak a thillatte gohna ding dohkan nih tuak a-om hi. Tunung Tempul Ding Mengmuhna(. —. )Jerusalem Khopi Ah Ezekiel Huchi in kongpi sik langkhat ah dohkan li a-om a, alangkhat ah dohkan li a-om nawn a; kithoihna gan gohna dohkan giat ahi. Huan halmang kithoihna dia dohkan li, suangsek a bawl, adunglam tong khat-le-akim, availam tong khat-le-akim, asanlam tong khat a-om a; huai ah halmang kithoihna leh thillat gohna ding vanzatte akoih zel uhi. Huan asunglam ah akimvel in kuaika, khutpek khuh a sau abulh ua; dohkan tungte ah thil latsate a-om hi. Huan huang sungnungzaw pen ah ahon pilut a, ngai dih, huang sungnungzaw pen ah dantan nih ana om a; khat pen mallam kongpi chin ah, simlam nga in a-om a, khat pen simlam kongpi chin ah mallam nga in a-om hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai dantan simlam nga, tempul kemtu siampute omna ahi a; dantan mallam nga maitam kem siampute omna ahi; hiaite Zadok tate, Levi tate lak a ama nna sem ding a Toupa hong naih sekte ahi uh,” achi hi.Huang Sungnungzaw Leh Tempul Inn Huan huangsung ateh a, adunglam tong zakhat, availam tong zakhat, kimvel ahi; maitam bel tempul maitak a om ahi. Tempul inlim ah ahon pi a, sumtawng baangkate ateh chiat a, alang tuak ah tong nga a sah tuaktuak a-om a, alutna tong sawm leh tong li a za ahi; asik tuak a kongpi baangkate tong thum tuaktuak ahi. Asumtawng adunglam tong sawmnih, availam tong sawm-le-nih ahi a; luttouhna ah kalbi sawm a-om a, baangka chin ah alang tuak ah khuam lian a-om hi.

Huan tempul ah ahon pilut a, abaangkate ateh a, asik tuak ah tong guk a sah tuaktuak a-om a, huai tuh biakbuk vailam chia ahi. Huan alutna tong sawm a za ahi a; asik tuak ah baangkate tong nga tuaktuak ahi; huan asunglam ateh a, adunglam tong sawmli leh availam tong sawmnih ahi. Dantan sungnung ah alut a, alutna baangkate tong nih a sah tuaktuak ahi a; alutna tong guk a za ahi a; alutna baangkate tong sagih tuaktuak ahi. Dantan sungnung ateh a, asungpi ban ah adunglam tong sawmnih ahi a; tempul kantan availam leng tong sawmnih ahi. Huan ka kiang ah, “Hiai Mun Siangthoupen ahi,” ahon chi hi.Tempul Baang Lam Doh A Pindan Lamte Huan atempul baang ateh a, tong guk a sah ahi; huan tempul sik chih ah dantan tong li a za chiat a-om hi. Huan chial thumte ah pang dantante a-om ua, huchi a huai lai a letkipna aneih theihlouhna ding un, tempul baang a letkipna nei lou in. Huchi in apang dantante hong san hiaihiai in aza semsem a; tempul azuih touh ziak in, akimvel in asungpi anaih hulhul hi. Huchi in dantan nuainungpen a kipan atungnungpen pha a pai ding in alai a kantan ding ahi. Huan tempul kim ah suanglep vum om in ka mu a; pang dantan suangphum tehna chiang, tong guk hial a sau tan a sang ahi. Pang dantan polam bang tong nga a sah ahi; tempul pang dantan polam baang ban ah tong nga a-awl lai hi. Inpi suanglep vum leh tempul huangsung dantante kikal akimvel in tong sawmnih a za ahi. Pang dantan kongkhakte mun awng lam a hon ahi a, khat in mallam, adang khat in simlam anga a

akim a mun awng tong nga a za ahi.Tumlam A Inn Huan tumlam a phaitam khekhiakna lam nga inn tong sawmsagih a za ahi; huai inn baang akim in tong nga a sah vek ahi a, adung tong sawmkua ahi.Tempul Letdan Avek A Teh Sipsip Ahi Huan tempul ateh a tong za a sau ahi; inn phaitam mun awng leh huai tempul baang sahdan simtel in tong za ahi nawn hi. Tempul kongtual mun awng tong za a sau ahi. Huan aphaitam mun awng khen inn dunglam ateh a, apang tuak abaangte huap in tong zakhat ahi.Tempul Zatdan Tehna Huan asungpite, tohlet khuam neute, polam sumtawngte singpek in athuap ua; athum un akimvel in hon theih louh tohlet leh inchial anei a; inpi lutna kongpi tan in apialkhang a kipan tohlet pha a apum a singpek a thuap ahi, tohlet leng thuap ahi lai hi. Kongpi lutungte, dantan sungnung tanpha leh apolam toh, baang tengteng asunglam leh apolam tan in. Huaite cherub limte leh tum sing limte a zep ahi a, cherub leh cherub kikal ah tum sing a-om zel a; cherubte'n mai nih anei chiat uhi. Mihing mel bang in alangkhat in tum sing lam anga a, humpinelkai tuailai mel bang in alangkhat in tum sing lam anga nawn hi. Hiaite tempul kimvel vek in agelh uhi. Apialkhang a kipan in kongpi tung pha in cherub leh tum sing lim a zep vek ahi; tempul baang bel huchi vek ahi.Sing Maitam Tempul kongpi biang khuamte tuh asah azat kibang ahi. Mun Siangthou ma ah sing a bawl maitam bangtak a-om hi. Tong thum a sang, tong nih a za, aningte, atawte leh apangte sing a bawl vek ahi.

Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai Toupa ma a dohkan ahi,” achi hi.Kongkhakte Tempul leh Mun Siangthou in kongkhak nih tuaktuak anei hi. Kongkhak in phel nih anei tuaktuak a; aphel khat bel kheptheih chiat ahi; kongkhak khat ah phel nih, adang ah phel nih anei hi. Baang a agelh mah bang un tempul kongkhakte ah cherub leh tum sing lim agelh chiat lai ua; sumtawng pua ah singpek sah mahmah aphalh uhi. Huan sumtawng baang lang tuakte leh singpek phalhte ah tohlet hon theih louh leh tum sing lim a-om lai a; atempul pang dantan leh singpek phalh leng huchibang mah ahi.

Huan huang sungnungzaw malam pang ah ahon pikhia a; mun awng zawn mallam kulh khuam doh dantan ah hon pilut hi. Mallam pang a dantante tong za a sau tong sawmnga a za ahi. Huang sungnungzaw pen mun awng tong sawmnih lam nga leh huang ponungzaw suanglep lam doh inchial thum a-om tuaktuak hi.
