Dantante kikal ah tong sawm a za, tong za a sau paisuakna a-om a, akongkhakte'n mallam anga hi. Dantan tungnungte akochikzaw a; inchial nuainungzaw leh alaitate sang in a-inchialte'n mun lian aluah zaw uhi. Chial thum a lam ahi a, huangsung khuamte bang in khuam anei kei a; huchi in alaita sang in atungnungpen akochikzaw a, alaita leng anuainungpen sang in akochikzaw lai hi. Huan dantan pang polam ah huangsung ponungzaw pen lam doh baang tong sawmnga a sau a-om hi. Huangsung ponungzaw a dantante tong sawmnga a sau ahi ua; tempul zul a pen tong za a sau ahi. Huan huai dantante nuai ah suahlam pang ah huangsung ponungzaw a kipan polam ah alutna a-om hi. Simlam ah leng mun awng zawn a kulhbaang doh in dantante a-om nawn hi. Ama a paina leng mallam dantante paina mah bang ahi a; adung leh avai leng, apawtkhiaknate, alepkhawmdante, akongkhakte'n simlam anga chih kia lou ngal akibang vek ahi. Huai dantante lutna ding paisuakna tawp suahlam baangchin ah kongkhak a-om hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Simlam leh mallam dantan, mun awl hon dohte dantan siangthoute ahi ua; thil siangthoute akoihkhawm ua; nek ding latnate, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, moh ziak a kithoihnate alatna ding uh ahi; amun lah asiangthou ngal a. Huai lai a siampute alut phot uleh, mun siangthou a kipan in huangsung ponungzaw ah apawtkhe ding uh ahi kei; huai ah anasepna puansilhte uh akoih zaw ding ua, puansilh siangthou ahi ngal ua

puansilh dang silh kia in vantang lak ah agamtang thei ding uh,” achi hi.Tempul Huangsung Tehna Tempul sungnungzaw pen ateh khit in suahlam nga kongpi ah ahon pikhia a, tempul kimvel in ateh hi. Tehna chiang in suahlam pang ateh a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga ahi. Mallam pang ahon teh nawn leuleu a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga ahi. Simlam pang ateh nawn a, tehna chiang a teh in tong zanga mah ahi. Huan tumlam ahon teh nawn a, atehna chiang a teh in tong zanga mah ahi. Apang li in atehta a; adunglam tong zanga, availam tong zanga ahi; akim in kulhbaang nei ahi; huai mun siang leh siang lou deidanna ding a bawl ahi. Tempul Kiang A Inn Nih

Huchi in kongpi ah, suahlam kongpi ah ahon pi hi. Ngai dih, Israel' Pathian thupina suahlam a kipan in ahong tung a; ahusa tui tampi ging bang ahi a, athupina in leitung atanvak hi. Kilakna ka muh a alatdan, khopi hihse ding a hong pai leh Kebar lui gei a kilakna ka muh bangmah ahi a; huchi in bokkhup in ka pukta hi. Suahlam nga kongpi ah tempul sung ah Toupa thupina alut hi. Kha in ahon domkang a, huang sungnungzaw ah ahon pilut a; huan, ngai in, Toupa thupina in tempul aluahdim hi. Huan mi khat ka kiang a adin lai in mi kuahiam tempul polam a kipan hon houpih in ka za a, ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai ka laltutphah omna mun, ka khepek ngakna, Israel suante lak a tangtawn a ka tenna ding mun ahi; ka min siangthou Israel inkote'n amau inn hiam, akumpipate uh hiam, ahukna uleh akumpipate uh luangvuina a zang in ahihthanghuai nawnta kei ding uh. Akongpi uh ka kongpi chin mahmah a bawl in, akongpi biang uh ka kongpi biang zul a koih in amau leh keimah kikal ah baang kia omsak in athilhih kihhuaite un ka min siangthou ahihthanghuai uhi; huaiziak in ka hehna in amau ka hihmangta hi. Tu a kipan in kizuaknate, akumpipa uh luangte kei a kipan gamlapi ah koihmang le uh; huchi in alak uah tangtawn in ka teng ding hi. “Nang mihing tapa, Israel inkote kiang ah tempul lim ensak in; athilhihkhelh uh azumpih theihna ding un, abawldan ding leng na teh uhen. Huan athilhih tengteng uh azumpih ua atempul omdante, apawtkhiaknate, alutnate, ageldante, azatdante, akepdante ensak inla, amitmuh mahmah uah gelh in; adan pumpi leh azatdan tengteng avom ua, azuihtheihna ding un. Hiai tempul a dia dan ding ahi

tang vum tau kim tengteng mun siangthoupen ding ahi; ngai dih, hiai tempul a dia dan ding ahi.Maitam “Huan tong a teh in hiai maitam let lam ahi, tong khat chih tong khat leh khutpek tuam ahi a, akingakna tong khat a sang, tong khat a za, agei akim a khap khat a pawng zel ahi. Huan maitam sanlam hichibang ahi; lei a akingakna a kipan dohdan nuainungzaw pen tong nih ahi a, azatlam tong khat; adohdan neuzaw pen a kipan dohdan lianzaw pen tong li ahi a, tong khat a za ahi. Amaitam tau tong li a sang ahi nawn a, maitam tau a kipan leh atunglam kii li ding ahi. Maitam tau adung leh avai tong sawm-le-nih tuaktuak ahi; adung-avai kikim ahi. Dohdan dung leh vai tong sawm-le-li tuaktuak ahi; adung-avai kikim ahi; agei tong kimkhat ahi; akingakna akim in tong khat ahi; akalbi in suahlam angat ding ahi,” achi hi.Maitam Latna Huan ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Abawl khit chiang ua maitam zatdan ding hichibang ahi; halmang kithoihna dingte, sisan thehna dingte ahi. Levi chi siampu Zadok suan a mi, nna hon sepsak ding a hon naih sekpa kiang ah khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai na piak ding ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Asisan na la ding a, maitam kii lite leh adohdan ning lite, agei kimvel in na luan ding a; huchibang in maitam na hihsiang in na siangsak ding hi. Khelh ziak a kithoihna bawngtaltuai na la ding a, huai ding a tempul aseh uh, mun siangthou polam ah hal ahih ding ahi. Huan ani nihna in keltal dembei, khelh ziak a kithoihna ding a lat ding ahi; huchi in maitam bel bawngtaltuai a ahihsiang mah bang un na siangsak ding hi.

Maitam hihsiang pen na hih khit chiang un ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei leh belamtal, gensiatbei, ahon lak a na lan ding hi. Toupa ma ah na lan ding a, siampu in chi asoh ding a, Toupa kiang ah halmang a ding in alan ding. Ni sagih sung niteng khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in keltal na zang ding ahi; ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai leh belamtal, ahon lak a, gensiatbei leng azat ding uh ahi. Maitam hihsiang leh siansakna in ni sagih ala ding a; huchi in maitam siangthou ahita ding hi. Huan huai nite ahihtangtun khit chiang un, ani giat ni a kipan in siampute'n na halmang kithoihnate uh leh lemna kithoihnate amaitam uah alan ding ua, huan ka hon na sang ding chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi,” achi hi. Tempul Ah Toupa Akik

Huan mun siangthou kongpi ponungzaw, suahlam nga ah hon pikik nawn a, kong khaksa ana hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai kongpi akikhak gige ding a, akihong ngei kei ding a, kuamah alut sam kei ding uh; Toupa, Israel' Pathian ahong lut khit ziak in; akikhak gige ding ahi. Kumpi bel Toupa ma a an ne ding in huai ah atu phet ding; sumtawng kongkhak ah alut ding a, huai mah ah apawt nawn ding,” achi hi.Tempul Lut Phalna Dante Huan mallam nga kongpi ah tempul intual ah ahon pi a; ka en a ngai dih, Toupa thupina in Toupa tempul aluahdim vek a; huchi in bokkhup in ka pukta hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, Toupa tempul zatdan leh adan tengteng na kiang a ka gen tungtang ah na bildoh inla, na mitsuan inla, na lungsim ah chiamteh hoih dih; atempul a lutdante, amun siangthou a kipan pawtdante, na lungsim ah hoihtak in chiamteh in. “Huan helhat, Israel inkote ngei kiang ah huchi in na gen ding ahi; Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, nou Israel inkote aw, na thilhih kihhuai tengteng uh ahunta, lungtang leh sa zeksum louh, ka tanghoute, thaute na lat lai ua ka mun siangthou, ka tempul mahmah hihbuah ding a na pilut ua, ka thukhun a na tatlek uh, na kihhuaina tengtengte uh na tawpta hen.

Ka thil siangthoute nou na kem kei ua, hiai pau tuam mite ka mun siangthou ah nou sik a kemmi in na sep zaw uhi.” Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Gamdangmi kuamah, lungtang leh sa zeksum louh, Israel suante lak a gamdangmi kuamah ka mun siangthou ah alut ding uh ahi kei hi.”Siamputna Ah Levite Posiah Ahi Uh Levi chi, Israelte milim delh a avakmang lai ua kei a kipan a gamlapi a paisate'n bel athulimlouhna uh apo ding uh. Ka mun siangthou ah nasemmi in apang ding ua; tempul kongkhakte angak ding ua; tempul sung ah nna asem ding uh; halmang kithoihnate, mipi a dia kithoihnate agou ding ua; mipi nna sepsak ding in ama uah adingh ding uhi. Amilimte uh ma ah a-nna uh asepsak ding ua; Israelte inkote a ding in thulimlouhna a pukna ahih nak ziak un atung uah ka khut ka lik ding a; athulimlouhna uh apo ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Huchi in ka kiang ah siampu nna sem ding in ahon naih ngei kei ding ua; ka thil siangthoute, thil siangthoupente ahon naih ngei sam kei ding uh; azahlakna uleh athilkihhuai hihsate uh apo zaw ding uh. Tempul kem mite ding in ka bawl ding a, nasepna tengteng leh hih ding om peuhmahte hih ding in.Siampute Siampu Levi chi, Zadok ta, kei a kipan a Israel suante avakmang lai ua ka mun siangthou kem mite'n bel ka nna sem ding in ahong naih ding uh; thau leh sisan lan ding in ka ma ah adingh ding uh, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Ka mun siangthou ah alut ding ua, nna hon sepsak ding in ka dohkan ahong naih ding ua, kei hon kemmi in apang ding uh.

Huan huang sungnungzaw kongpite a alut un puanaktual malngat in akithuam ding ua, huang sungnungzaw leh insung lam a nna asep sung un samul puan asilh ding uh ahi kei hi. Dial malngat akhim ding ua, puanmalngat pheitom abun ding ua, kho-ulsak thei asilh ding uh ahi kei hi. Huan huangsung ponungzaw, vantang kiang a ahong pawtkhiak uleh anasepna puansilhte uh asuah ding ua, dantan siangthou ah akoih ding uh, puansilh dang asilh ding uh; mipite apuansilh ua misiangthou a abawl teilouhna ding un. Alute uh ametgiau ding uh ahi kei a; asam uh leng ahawisau ding uh ahi sam kei; amet lel ding uh ahi. Siampu kuapeuh huang sungnungzaw pen alut chiang un uain adawn ding uh ahi kei hi. Meithai hiam maksa nung hiam zi in anei ding uh ahi sam kei hi; Israel inkote, nungak siangthou hiam siampu sihsan meithai akitenpih zawk ding uh ahi. Ka mite thil siangthou leh thil nin kibatlouhdan ahilh ding ua; siang leh siang lou akhentuamsak ding uhi. Thubuaite leng angaihtuah ding uh ahi; ka ngaihtuah bang zel in angaihtuah ding uh; ka ankuanglui sehsa tengteng ah ka dante leh ka dan thuseh bawlsate azuih ding uh ahi; ka Sabbathte leng atan ding uh ahi. Amau kihihbuah ding in misi luang anaih ding uh ahi kei; himahleh nu hiam, pa hiam, tanu hiam, tapa hiam unaupa hiam sanggamnu pasal nei lou hiam a ding in bel akihihbuah thei ding uh. Huan akisiansak nung in amah a ding in ni sagih simsak nawn ding ahi. Huang sungnungzaw mun siangthou a nasem ding a alut ni in khelh ziak a kithoihna amah a ding in alan ding, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Goutan bangmah anei kei ding ua; agoutan uh kei ka hi ding.

Israel ah tan bangmah na pe ding uh ahi kei, atan uh keimah ka hi. Nek ding latte, khelh ziak a thillatte, moh ziak a thillatte ane ding ua; Israel lak a thil latsa peuhmah amau a ding ahi. Gah masate lak a ahoihpente, na thillat chiteng ua ahoihpen, na thillat tengteng ua siampute a ding ahi; na inn ua vualzawlna atamdet theihna ding in tangbuang meklom hoihpen siampu kiang ah na pe ding uh ahi. Siampute'n sapul anek louh ding uh ahi. Vasa hiam gamsa bohzan hiam, amah sih a si hiam anek ding uh ahi kei hi. Suahlam Kongpi Kizatna

Huai lou in leng goutan ding a gam na hawm hun chiang un gamseh siangthou, Toupa kiang ah thilpiak na bawl ding uhi. Adunglam tong singnih-le-sangnga, availam tong singnih, apum in gam siangthou ahi ding hi. Hiai ah mun siangthou a ding in adung leh avai tong zanga tuaktuak, kimvel ahi ding a, akimvel in tong zanga a za mun awng a-om ding ahi. Huan hiai tehsa a kipan in adung tong singnih-le-sangnga leh avai tong singkhat na tehkhe ding a, huai ah Mun Siangthoupen a-om ding ahi. Gamseh siangthou bel, mun siangthou a nasemmi, a-nna sem ding a Toupa hong naih siampute a ding ahi ding a, a-inn mun ding un leh mun siangthou ding in gam siangthou ahi ding hi. Mun dang adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singkhat, Levi chi tempul a nasem mite tuam ding in, atenna khopi ding in a-om ding ahi. Gamseh siangthou latsa zul ah khopi tan avai tong zanga leh adung tong singnih-le-sangnga na sep ding uhi, Israel inkote pumpi a ding ahi ding.Kumpi Tapa Gam Ding Huan kumpi tapa tan bel gam siangthou latsa leh khopi tan malam ah tumlam a tumlam nga in, suahlam a suahlam nga in a-om ding ahi. Adung bel tumlam gamgi a kipan a suahlam gamgi pha in, gamseh dang tan mah ahi. Huai bel Israel gam a amah tantuam ahi ding ahi; ka vaihawmte'n ka mite anuaisiah nawn kei ding ua, Israel inkote anam tuamdan bang zel un gam ape zaw ding uhi.Vaihawmtupa Dia Dan Khun Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Aw, Israel vaihawmte aw, hunta hen, hiamgamna leh kigapna tawpsanta unla; diktattak a vaihawm leh diktak a hih chingta unla, ka mite delhkhiak nak pen tawpsanta un, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Bukna dik, ephah dik leh bath dik na zat ding uh ahi.

Ephah leh bath akikim ding uh ahi, bath homer seh sawm a khen seh khat ahi ding a, ephah leng homer seh sawm a khen seh khat ahi sam ding; homer a kipan a tehkhiak ding ahi ding. Huan shekel bel gerah sawmnih ahi ding a; shekel sawmnih toh shekel sawmnih-le-nga toh shekel sawm-le-nga gawmkhawm na mina uh khat toh kikim ahi ding hi. Huan hiai thillat na lat ding uh ahi ding; buh homer khat zel ah ephah seh guk a khen seh khat leh buh man homer khat zel ah ephah seh guk a khen seh khat na pe ding uhi. Huan sathau latdan ding kor khat zel ah bath seh sawm a khen seh khat; kor bel bath sawm ahi. Israel gantatna mun hoih a kipan belamhon lak a zanih zel ah anou khat, nek ding lat ding in, halmang kithoihna ding in lemna thillat ding in amaute hihsianna bawlna ding in alat ding uh ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Gam a mi tengteng in Israel vaihawmpa kiang ah hiai thillat ape ding uh. Ankuang luina ah, kha thak ah, Sabbath ni ah, Israel ankuanglui ni sehsa tengteng ah halmang kithoihna, nek ding lat, dawn ding latte lan in angaihtuah ding a; khelh ziak a kithoihna, nek ding lat, halmang kithoihna, lemna thillat Israel inkote kisiansakna ding in ama'n atumsak ding ahi.Nopbawl Nite Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Kha khatna, huai kha ani khat ni in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei na la ding a, mun siangthou na siangsak ding ahi. Huan siampu in khelh ziak a kithoihna sisan ala ding a, tempul kongpi biang leh maitam dohdan ning lite leh huang sungnungzaw pen kongpi baangka ah atat ding hi.

Huai kha ani sagih ni in hihkhak hiam theih louh ziak hiam a thil hihkhialmite a ding in leng huchi mah bang in na hih ding a, huchibang in tempul hihsianna na bawl ding hi. “Akha khatna, huai kha ani sawm-le-li ni in Paikan Ankuang na lui ding ua; huan, ni sagih sung tanghou silngou soh louh na ne ding uh. Huai ni in vaihawmpa'n amah leh agam a mi tengteng a ding in, khelh ziak a kithoihna ding bawngtaltuai atum ding ahi. Ankuanglui hun ni sagih sung teng in bawngtaltuai gensiatbei sagih leh belamtal sagih zel Toupa a ding in halmang kithoihna ding in atum ding; huan khelh ziak a kithoihna ding in niteng in keltal khat toh. Huan tanghou lat ding in bawngtal khat zel ah ephah khat, belamtal khat zel ah ephah khat leh ephah khat zel ah sathau hin khat atum ding hi. “Akha sagihna, huai kha ani sawm leh ni nga ni a ankuangluina ah ni sagih sung huchibang mah in ahih ding a, khelh ziak a kithoihnate, halmang kithoihnate, tanghou latte leh sathau latte atum ding ahi,” achi hi. Gamsung A Toupa Tan

Huchi in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Huang sungnungzaw pen kongpi suahlam nga pen nasep ni, ni guk sung a kikhak ding a, Sabbath leh kha thak ni in akihong ding ahi. Huan vaihawmpa bel kongpi sumtawng ah alut ding a, kongpi baangka chin ah adingh ding a, siampute'n ahalmang kithoih leh lemna thillatte abawlsak ding ua, lutna kongpi dantan ah Pathian abe ding; huchi in apawtkhe ding a, nitaklam tan kong khak louh ahih ding ahi. Huan vantang in bel Sabbath leh kha thakte ah kongpi lutna chinte ah Toupa ma ah Pathian abe ding uhi. Sabbath ni in vaihawmpa'n Toupa kiang a halmang kithoihna a lat ding bel belamnou gensiatbei guk leh belamtal gensiatbei khat ahi ding. Belamtal khat zel ah tanghou lat ephah khat, belamnou pen ah bel apiak theih bangbang leh ephah khat ah sathau hin khat zel ahi ding hi.Kha Thak Kha thak ni in ganhon a pan bawngtaltuai gensiatbei khat, belamnou guk leh belamtal khat ahi ding a, gensiatbei ahih vek ding uh ahi. Huan tanghou lat abawl ding a, bawngtaltuai ah ephah khat, belamtal ah ephah khat, belamnou pen ah atheih bangbang leh ephah khat zel ah sathau hin khat ahi ding hi. Vaihawmpa alut chiang in kongpi sumtawng ah alut ding a, huai mah ah apawtkhe nawn ding hi. Vantangte bel ankuanglui ni sehsa a Toupa ma a ahong pai uleh Pathian be ding a mallam kongpi a hong lut simlam kongpi ah apawtkhe ding ua; simlam kongpi a hong lut mallam kongpi ah apawtkhe leuleu ding uh; alutna kongpi uah akik ding uh ahi kei a, amalam uah apai zaw ding uh ahi. Huan alut chiang un alak uah vaihawmpa alut ding a, apawt chiang un apawtkhe nawn ding hi.

Nopbawlna leh sehsa ankuanglui nite, tanghou lat bawngtaltuai khat ah ephah khat, belamtal khat ah ephah khat, belamnou pen ah apiak theih bangbang, ephah khat ah sathau hin khat zel ahi ding hi. Huan vaihawmpa'n ut thu a thillat alat dekleh halmang kithoihna hiam lemna thillat hiam Toupa kiang a ut thu a athillat bang a alat dekleh suahlam nga kong ahonsak ding a, Sabbath ni a hih bangmah in, halmang kithoihnate leh lemna thillatte abawl ding; huchi in apawtkhe ding a, apawtkhiak nung in kong akhak ding uhi.Niteng Thillat “Niteng a Toupa kiang a halmang kithoihna ding in belamnou kum khat a upa, gensiatbei na zang ding a, zingsang in na zat ding ahi. Zingsang teng in tanghou lat na bawl ding a, ephah seh guk a khen seh khat leh sathau hin khat seh thum a khen seh khat tangbuang nel mahmah anomsakna ding; huai tuh tangtawn a Toupa kiang a tanghou latdan ding ahi. Hichibang in halmang thillat gige ding in belamnou, tanghou latte, sathaute zingsang teng in na bawl ding ahi,” chi in.Kumpi Tapa Leh Gam Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Vaihawmpa'n atapate, kua kiang ah leng, goutan bangpeuh apiakleh atapate a ahi ding a, agou uh luah ahi mai hi. Himahleh agoutan a pen anasemmi kuahiam kiang a apiakleh sal pawtna kum tan in anei ding a, huai ah vaihawmpa kiang ah apekik nawn ding hi. Amah gou ngeingei bel atapate a ding ahi ding. Huai lou in vaihawmpa in mite goutan asuhsak ding ahi kei a, aneih-le-lam ua kipan adelhkhe ding ahi sam kei; amah a pen mah atapate kiang ah goutan in ape ding a; amau neih-le-lam a kipan mite avakzaklouhna ding un,” achi hi.Tempul Anhuan Innte Huan kongpi pang a siampute a dia dantan siangthou mallam nga ah ahon pilut a

ngai dih, aphaitam tumlam pang ah mun ana om hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai siampute'n moh ziak a thillat leh khelh ziak a thillat ahuanna mun uh, tanghou lat omna mun ahi; huangsung ponungzaw a atawikhiak ua mite hihsianna dia abawllouhna ding un,” achi hi. Huang ponungzaw ah ahon pikhia a, huangsung ningzul ah ahon paisak a; ngai dih, ahuangsung ning chiat ah huang ana om nawn hi. Huangsung ning li ah huang, bang nei, adung tong sawmli, avai tong sawmthum ana om a; huai aning ate ali un akikim vek uhi. Huai mun li sunglam ah akimvel in suang vual in alem ua, huai vual nuai ah akim in huanna ding thuk a-om hi. Huchi in ka kiang ah, “Hiai an huanna innte ahi, tempul nasem mite'n mite kithoihna sa ahuanna dingte uh,” achi hi. Sabbath

Huchi in tempul kongkhak ah ahon pikik a; ngai dih, tempul kongpi chin nuai a kipan, suahlam nga in tui ahong luangkhia a; tempul suahlam nga ahi a, huan tui maitam simlam tempul pang taklam nuai a kipan in ahong luangkhia hi. Huan mallam nga kongpi tawn in ahon pikhia a, inpua ah suahlam nga pawtkhiakna lampi ponungzaw tawn in ahon pi a; ngai dih, taklam pang ah tui ahong luangkhia hi. Huan huai mi'n tehna khau tawi kawm a suahlam nga a pai in tong sangkhat ateh a; tui ahon ngap galkahsak a, siakmit tan ahi. Huchi in tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; tui ahon ngap galkahsak nawn a, khuk tan ahi. Huan tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; hon ngap galkahsak nawn a, tui kawng tan ahi. Huan tong sangkhat ateh nawn a; ngah galkah vual louh luipi ahong hita a; tui ahong sang zel a, angah a ngah galkah vual louh, aleuh a leuh tham luipi ahong hita hi. Ka kiang ah, “Mihing tapa, hiai na mu hia?” achi hi.Huan lui gei a kik nawn ding in ahon pikikta hi. Huchi in ka kik a, ngai dih, lui gei tawn in, lui gei lang tuak in sing tampi ana om hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai suahlam gam lam a tui luang Arabah gam a luanglut ding ahi; tuipi ah aluanglut ding a, tuipi tui al tui siangthou asuaksak ding. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; luite aluanna peuh uah ganhing chiteng in ahinloh ding ua, ngasate a-om huthut ding uh; tuipi tui asianthouna ding leh aluanna peuh a ganhingte'n ahinlohna ding ua hiai lui hong luang ahi. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; agei ah ngaman mite adingh ding ua; Engedi a kipan Eneglaim pha in lenpaihna mun ahi ding

angasa pen achi bang zel un, tuipi lian ngasa bang mai in atam mahmah ding uh. Buannawi leh chiklakte bel asiangthou kei ding ua, chikhuk ding a nutsiat ahi ding hi. Alui gei ah agei langnih in theikung chi chih apou ding a, huaite anah avuai ngei kei in agah lou ngei sam kei ding, mun siangthou a kipan a lui hong luangkhia a vak ahih ziak in kha teng in agah ding; agah nek ding ahi ding a, anah bel hihdamna ding ahi ding,” achi hi.Gam Gamgite Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Hiai Israel nam sawm-le-nih lak a gam kihawmdan ding ahi hi; Joseph in tan nih atang ding. Kibang chiat in na tang ding uh ahi; na pipute uh kiang a piak ding a ka kichiamsa ahi; hiai gam na gam tan un apuk ding ahi. Hiai a gam pumpi gi ding ahi; mallam ah Tuipi Lian a kipan Hethlon a paisuak in Hamath lutna phaizang ah Zedad atung a; Berothah, Damaskas leh Hamath kigitna lai a om Sibraim, Hauran gamgi zul a om Hazor-hattikon pha in. Huchi in gamgi bel Tuipi Lian a kipan in Damaskas gamgi zul a Hazar-enan pha in ahi ding a; mallam ah Hamath gamgi ahi ding hi. Hiai mallam gamgi ahi. Huan suahlam ah Hauran leh Damaskas kikal ah Gilead leh Israel gam kikal a Jordan luidung azui ding; mallam gamgi a kipan in suahlam tuipi ah Tamar apha ding. Hiai suahlam gamgi ahi ding hi. Simlam ah Tamar a kipan in Meibothkadesh tuite pha in Aigupta lui zui in Tuipi Lian atung ding. Hiai simlam gamgi ding ahi. Tumlam ah Tuipi Lian in agi ding a, simlam gamgi a kipan in Hamath lutna phaizang zawn pha in. Hiai tumlam gamgi ahi ding hi.

Huchi in hiai gam Israel nam dungzui in na lak uah na hawm ding uh. Huan hichi ahi ding a, na gam tan ding uleh na lak ua namdang teng, zi leh ta neisate gam tan ding bel na hop ding uh ahi. Amau lah Israel ta ding a piang mawng ahi ding uh ahi; Israel namte lak ah noute bang in tan aneih ding uh ahi. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a; kua nam lak ah leng namdang ana teng taleh, huai lai a agam tan ding na sehsak ding uh ahi, chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi. Tempul A Kipan Lui Hong Luangkhia

Hiaite anam minte uh ahi: Mallam gamgi Tuipi Lian a kipan a Hethlon paisuak in Hamath lutna phaizang ah Damaskas gamgi a Hamath kiang mallam pang Hazar-enan pha in, suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Dante tan ahi. Dante tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Asherte tan ahi. Asherte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Naphtalite tan ahi. Naphtalite tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Manassehte tan ahi. Manassehte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Ephraimte tan ahi. Ephraimte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Reubente tan ahi. Reubente tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Judahte tan ahi.Gam Lai A Mun Poimohte Judahte tan toh kigi in suahlam leh tumlam ah, thilpiak na lat ding uh avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding a; adung suahlam leh tumlam sang ah tan dang bangmah in ahi a, alai a mun siangthou om in. Thilpiak Toupa kiang a na lat ding uh adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singnih ahi ding ahi. Huan hiai ah siampute a ding in gam siangthou thilpiak ding ahi ding a; mallam ah adung tong singnih-le-sangnga leh tumlam ah avai tong singkhat leh suahlam ah avai tong singkhat, simlam ah adung tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding ahi. Alaizang ah Toupa mun siangthou a-om ding hi. Siampu siansaksa, Zadok tapate ka thu kem mite a ding ahi ding, amaute Israel suante avakmang lai ua Levi chite avakmang bang ua vakmangloute ahi uhi. Huan gam thilpiak pumpi a kipan amau a dia piak tuam, mun siangthoupen ahi ding; Levi chi tan toh akigi in. Siampu tan zulzul ah Levi chite'n tan anei ding ua, adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singkhat ahi ding hi.

Huan azuak ding uh ahi kei a, akhen ding uh leng ahi sam kei; agam hoihna tata leng midang kiang a piak ding ahi kei hi; Toupa a dia siangthou ahi ngal a. Huan avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ban ah tong sangnga vantang tan, khopi dinna ding, tenna inn dingte leh khopuate a ding ahi ding; khopi bel alaizang a a-om ding ahi. Huchi in ateh vialdan hichibang in ahi ding: Amallam pang tong sangli-le-zanga, asimlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga; asuahlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga, atumlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga. Akhopi in khopua anei ding a; mallam pang in tong zanih-le-sawmnga; simlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga, suahlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga, tumlam pang tong zanih-le-sawmnga ahi. Adunglam val lai, thilpiak siangthou zul a pen suahlam ah tong singkhat, tumlam ah tong singkhat ahi ding; thilpiak siangthousa zulzul ahi ding hi; huai a thilpawtte khopi a nasem mite nek ding ahi ding. Huchi in khopi a nasemmi Israel nam tengteng a mite'n alei alet ding uhi. Thilpiak pumpi adung tong singnih-le-sangnga, avai tong singnih-le-sangnga ahi ding; thilpiak siangthousa, dung leh vai kikim khopi tan toh na lat ding uh ahi. Aval thilpiaksa siangthou leh khopi tan pang lang tuaktuak vaihawmpa tan ahi ding a, suahlam sang ah thilpiak tong singnih-le-sangnga ban, gamseh dangte zulzul vaihawmpa tan ahi ding; huchi in thilpiak siangthousa leh tempul mun siangthou bel alaizang ah a-om ding. Huan Levi chi tan leh khopi tan vaihawmpa tante kikal ah a-om ding a; vaihawmpa tan Judah tan leh Benjamin tan toh akigi ding. Huan nam omlaite tungthu ah, suahlam leh tumlam ah tan khat Benjaminte tan ahi ding. Benjaminte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam ah tan khat Simeonte tan ahi. Simeonte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam Issakarte tan ahi.

Issakarte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam tan khat Zebulunte tan ahi. Zebulunte tan toh kigi in suah leh tumlam tan khat Gadte tan ahi. Gadte tan simlam pang gamgi Tarmar a kipan in Meribah-kadesh tuite tan in Aigupta lui zui in Tuipi Lian atung ding hi. Hiai Israel namte goutan ding a gam kihawmdan ding leh agam sehtuamte ahi uh chih Toupa Pathian thupawt ahi.Jerusalem Kongpite Huan hiaite khopi a kipan pawtnate ahi uh; mallam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; khopi kongpite Israel nam min bang zel a sak ding ahi a; mallam kongpi thumte, Reuben kongpi khat, Judah kongpi khat, Levi kongpi khat; suahlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Joseph kongpi khat, Benjamin kongpi khat, Dan kongpi khat ahi ding hi. Simlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Simeon kongpi khat, Issakar kongpi khat, Zebulun kongpi khat ahi ding. Tumlam pang tong sangli-le-zanga ah kongpi thum; Gad kongpi khat, Asher kongpi khat, Naphtali kongpi khat ahi ding hi. Akimvel in tong singkhat-le-sanggiat ahi ding a; huai ni a kipan in khopi min bel, “Toupa omna mun” chih ahi ding hi. Namte Lak A Gam Hawmna

Daniel Leh Alawmte Tangthu(. —. )Nebukadnezzar Vaihawmna Inpi A Judah Tuailaite Huan Toupa'n akhut ah Judah kumpipa Jehoakim apia a, Pathian in atui-um belsuan khenkhat toh; ama'n Shinar gam ah apathian inn ah huaite apua a; huchi in tui-um belsuante apathian sumkoihna inn ah alalutta hi. Kumpipa'n amichilgehte heutupa Ashpenaz, Israel suante lak a kuate hiam, kumpi chite a kipan leh miliante a kipan hon pi ding in akiang ah thu agen hi. Tuailaite amau a gensiatna om lou, himahleh hoihtak a deihsakna tang leh pilna tengteng a siamtheihna leh pilna theihsiamna lungpilte, kumpipa inpi a dingh thei ding, huchibang mite; huchi a Kaldai laisiamna leh pau amaute asinsak theihna ding in. Huchi in kumpipa'n amau niteng tantuan ding in kumpipa an leh adawn uain a kipan in asehsak a, huchi a kum thum sung a kisinsiamsak a; huchi a huai hun abei chiang a kumpipa ma a adintheihna ding un. Huchi in hiaite lak ah, Judah tate a kipan, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael leh Azariah a-om uhi. Michilgehte heutupa'n amaute min ding aphuahsak a; Daniel min ding in Belteshazzar; Hananiah min ding in Shadrak; Mishael min ding in Meshak leh Azariah min ding in Abednego aphuak hi. Himahleh Daniel in kumpipa an hiam adawn uain hiam a kihihnit louh alungtang in atum tinten hi. Huaiziak in michilgeh heutupa kiang ah akihih nitlouhna ding in angenta hi. Huchi in Pathian in Daniel michilgehte heutupa mitmuh in deihsakna leh lainatna amusak hi. Huan michilgehte heutupa'n Daniel kiang ah, “Ka toupa kumpipa na an uleh na dawn uh seppa ka lau; bang ding in na khanvualpih uh tuailaite sang a na mel uh hoih lou zaw a hon mu ding ahia oi? Huchi in kumpipa lak ah ka lutang na lauthawngsak dia hia?” achi hi.

Huchi in Daniel in sumkempa, michilgehte heutupa'n Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael leh Azariah tung a asehpa kiang ah, “Na sikhate ni sawm sung enkhia in, ka hon ngen ahi; nek ding in anteh-louhing leh dawn ding in tui hon pia uhen. Huai chiang in na ma ah ka mel uleh amau kumpipa an ne tuailaite mel et hi hen; na muh bang in, na sikhate tung ah hih in,” achi hi. Huchi in amau thu angaikhia a, ni sawm sung a-enkhia hi. Ni sawm abei in tuailai kumpipa an nete tengteng sang in amel uh hoihzaw in akilang a, asa uh leng athauzaw hi. Huchi in sumkempa'n a-an uleh adawn ding uh uain alamang a, amaute kiang ah anteh-louhing ape zawta hi. Hiai tuailai lite ahih uleh Pathian in amaute kiang ah laisiamna leh pilna tengteng atheihna leh kivakna apia a; huchi in Daniel in mengmuhna leh mang tengteng ah theihsiamna anei hi. Kumpipa'n amaute hon pilut ding achih nite abei in michilgehte heutupa'n amaute Nebukadnezzar ma ah ahon pi hi. Kumpipa'n amau ahoulimpih a; amau lak ah Daniel, Hananiah Mishael leh Azariah bang kuamah muh in a-omta kei hi; huaiziak in kumpipa ma ah adinghta uhi. Huchi in pilna leh theihsiamna thu chiteng, amaute kumpipa'n adotte ah agamsung a om mitkhialdawi tawi leh bummi tengteng sang in amun sawm a hoihzaw in amaute amu hi. Kumpipa Kura in kum khatna vai ahawm tanpha in Daniel apaisuaktou hi.

Nebukadnezzar vaihawm akum nih kum in Nebukadnezzar in mang anei a; alungsim abuai mahmah a, a-ihmutheita kei hi. Kumpipa Nebukadnezzar Mangneihna Huchi in kumpipa'n akiang uah, “Mang ka nei a, huai mang thei ding in ka lungsim abuai mahmah hi,” achi hi. Kaldai mite'n kumpipa kiang ah Siria pau in, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in dam in; na sikhate na mang hilh in, ahilhchetna ka ensak ding uh,” achi uhi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Kaldai mite kiang ah, hiai thil kei a kipan apaikheta; mang leh ahilhchetna ka kiang a na hon theihsak kei ualeh atnen in na om ding ua, na innte uh ekvum asuak ding. Himahleh mang leh ahilhchetna na hon theihsak ualeh kei a kipan in thilpiakte leh kipahman leh nakpitak a zahtakna na mu ding uh; huaiziak in mang leh ahilhchetna hon ensak un,” achi hi. Anihveina ding in amau adawng ua, “Kumpipa'n mang hon hilh henla, kou ahilhchetna ka ensak ding uh,” achi uhi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Kei a kipan hiai thil apaikheta chih na muh ziak un, hun hihsau tum na hi uh chih ka theitel hi. Himahleh mang ka kiang a na hon theihsak kei uleh, nou a ding in dan khat kia a-om; hun akikhen tan a, ka ma a thuzuau leh sia gelkhol na hih ziak un; huaiziak in mang hon hilh unla, ahilhchetna na hon ensak thei uh chih ka thei ding,” achi hi. Kaldai mite'n kumpipa adawng ua, “Kumpipa thudot ensak thei leitung ah kuamah a-om kei; kumpipa hiam, toupa hiam, vaihawmmi kuamah in mitkhialdawi tawi kuamah hiam, bummi kuamah hiam, Kaldai mi kuamah mah huchibang thu adot ngei louh ziak un.

Kumpipa thil deih vangtak ahi, mihingte lak a sa a om lou pathiante chih louh ngal, midang kuamah in kumpipa ma ah huai a-ensak thei kei ding uh,” achi uhi. Hiai ziak in kumpipa aheh mahmah a, athangpai tuntun a, Babulon mipil tengteng hihmang ding in thu apeta hi. Huchi in thupiak piakkhiak ahita a, mipilte thah ding ahong hita ua; Daniel leh alawmte thah ding in azong uhi.Pathian In Mangkhiakna Daniel Atheisak Huchi in Daniel in kumpipa veng sepaih zaheutu Ariok, Babulon mipilte that ding a kuankhe pa kiang ah thuhilhna leh thupil toh dawnna akiksak hi. Ariok kumpipa sepaih zaheutu adong a akiang ah, “Bangziak a kumpipa a kipan thupiak huchi tel a kin ahia?” achi hi. Huchi in Ariok in Daniel kiang ah athil omdan atheisak hi. Daniel alut a, amah a dia hun sehsak ding in kumpipa angen hi, huchi a ahilhchetna kumpipa a-etsak theihna ding in. Huchi in Daniel a-inn ah apai a, Hananiah, Mishael, Azariah, alawmte kiang ah huai thil atheisakta hi. Huchi a amaute'n hiai thuguk tanchin a van Pathian zahngaihnate angettheihna ding un; huchi a Daniel leh alawmte Babulon a mipilte alakte toh amanthatlouhna ding un. Huchi in zan mengmuhna ah Daniel kiang ah thuguk taklat in a-omta hi. Daniel in van Pathian aphat hi. Daniel in adawng a:Tangtawn tangtawn in Pathian min phat in om hen;pilna leh hatna amah a ahi. Ama'n hunte leh hunbite ahihlamdang a; kumpipate asuankhia a,kumpipate atungkhia a; mipilte kiang ah pilna apia a,theihsiamna theite kiang ah theihna apia hi. Thil thukte leh thil gukte ataklang a, mial a om bang ahia chih athei a,akiang ah khovak a-om hi.

Na tung ah ka kipak a, ka hon phat hi,Aw nang ka piputePathian, pilna leh hatna hon pepa,nang ka hon nget uh ka kiang ua hon theisakpa'n;kumpipa thu ka kiang uah na hon theisakta ngal a,chi in.Daniel In Kumpipa Mang Leh Hilhchetna Agen Huaiziak in kumpipa'n Babulon mipilte hihse dia asehpa Ariok kiang ah Daniel ava hoh a, akiang ah, “Babilon mipilte hihmang ke'n; kumpipa ma ah hon pilut inla, kumpipa kiang ah ahilhchetna ka ensak ding,” ava chi hi. Huchi in Ariok in kintak in kumpipa ma ah Daniel apilut a, akiang ah, “Judah saltangte lak ah mi khat ka mu a, ama'n kumpipa kiang ah ahilhchetna atheisak ding,” achi hi. Kumpipa, amin Belteshazzar in adawng a Daniel kiang ah, “Mang ka neih na hon theisak thei in, ahilhchetna na hon theisak thei ding maw?” achi hi. Daniel in kumpipa ma ah adawng a, “Thuguk kumpipa'n anget mipilte hi in, mitkhialdawi tawite hi in, bum mite hin in, aisan mite hitaleh, kumpipa kiang ah a-ensak thei kei ding uhi. Himahleh van ah Pathian a-om a, ama'n thugukte ataklang hi; ni nanung lam a bang om ding ahia chih, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah atheisak hi. Na lupna tung a na lutang mengmuhna leh na mang hiaite ahi. “Nang na hihleh aw kumpipa na lupna tung ah na lungsim sung ah na ngaihtuahnate ahong om ua; tunung chiang a bang ahia hong om ding thu; huan amah thugukte na kiang a taklangpa'n bang ahia hong om ding na kiang ah atheisakta hi. Himahleh kei bel pilna mihing dangte sang a pilna ka neih tam zawk ziak a hiai thuguk ka kiang a taklat ahi kei a; himahleh ahilhchetna kumpipa kiang a theihsak ahihtheihna ding leh nang na lungtang ngaihtuahte na theihna ding ahi zaw hi.

“Aw kumpipa, ngai in, nang milim thupitak na muta hi. Hiai milim hattak mai, avakna thupi mahmah, na ma ah adingh a; amel a kihtakhuai mahmah hi. Hiai milim ahihleh alutang dangka-eng hoih ahi a, a-awm leh abante dangka, agil leh apheipite dal, akhete sik, akhezungte sik leh tungman khenkhat kihel ahi. Suang khut a sek louh huai milim a khepek sik leh tungman deng a kitam nensak dimdem tan in na mu hi. “Huchi in sik, tungman, dal, dangkate leh dangka-eng toh akitam nenkhawm vek ua, nipi buhphual a buhsi bang mai ahong hi ua; huchi in huih in huaite amutmang a, huai milim dengzan suangpi pen tang thupitak ahong suak a, leitung pumpi adimta hi. Hiai mang ahi a; kumpipa ma ah ahilhchetna ka gen ding uhi. “Aw kumpipa, nang kumpipate' Kumpipa, van Pathian in akiang a gam leh thilhihtheihna, hatna leh thupinate a piakna na hi. Koipeuh a mite tate atenna uah, gam a sate leh van a vasate na khut ah ahon pia hi; amau tengteng tung a vaihawm ding a abawl dangka-eng lutang na hi. Nang nung in nang sang a niamzaw gamdang khat ahong dingkhe ding; huchi in lalgam thumna dang, leitung tengteng a thunei ding in. Huan gam lina sik bang in ahat ding a, sik in akeknensak a thil tengteng anuaisiah bang in sik in hiaite tengteng adelhzan bang in, akeknensak in, adelhzan ding hi. “Huan khepek leh khezung na muhte, akhen belvelmi tungman leh akhen sik ahihleh gam hawmzak ahi ding a; himahleh asung ah sik hatna a-om ding a, sik tungman toh helkhawm na muh bangtak in. Huan khepek khezungte, akhen sik leh akhen tungman pen ahihleh, huchibang in gam hatna chiang nei, kitapna chiang nei ahi ding hi.

Huan sik leh tungman kihel na muh pen ahihleh, mite chi toh amau akitok hel ding uh; himahleh sik leh tungman akigawm theih louh bang in akikawikip kei ding uhi. “Huai kumpipate dam lai in van Pathian in gam suksiat a om ngei lou ding, athuneihna midang kiang a nutsiat a om ngei sam lou ding, ahon dingkhesak ding a; himahleh hiai gam tengteng akitam nensak ding a, ahihse vek ding, amah bel tangtawn in adingh ding hi. “Huchi in tang a kipan khut a sek louh suangpi ahong omkhia a, sik, dal, tungman, dangka leh dangka-engte a kitamsak dimdem na muh pen ahihleh; tunung chiang a bang ahia hong om ding kumpipa kiang ah Pathian thupi in atheisakta hi; mang omzia theihsa ahi a, akhiakna akichian hi,” achi hi.Kumpipa'n Daniel Kipahman Apia Huaitak in Nebukadnezzar in amai a lei si in Daniel abia a, thillat leh gimnamtui akiang a lan ding in amaute thu apia hi. Kumpipa'n Daniel adawng a, “Chihtaktak in na Pathian, pathiante' Pathian leh kumpipate' Toupa leh thugukte taklangpa ahi; hiai thuguk taklang ding a hihtheihna na neih ziak in,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n Daniel aliansak a, thilpiak tampi apia hi, Babulon bial pumpi a heutu leh Babulon mipilte tengteng tung a ukpipapen ding in abawlta hi. Daniel in Shadrak, Meshak, Abednego, Babulon bial thu leh la tung a koih ding in kumpipa kiang ah angen hi; himahleh Daniel bel kumpipa kongpi ah a-om hi.

Kumpipa Dangka-eng Milim Biak Ding Thupiak kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in dangka-eng milim, tong sawmguk a sang, tong guk a lian abawl a; Babulon bial a Dura Phaizang ah adingsak hi. kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in bial heutute, vaihawm mite, ukpipate, thukhenmi, sumkemmi, thudotmi, dansiammi leh bial vaihawmmi tengteng akaikhawm a, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiak milim kipahpihna bawlna a hong pai ding in mite asawlkhia hi. Huaitak in tangkou ngaihtak in akikou a, “Na kiang ua thupiak ahi, Aw mite, namte, paute, pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging, tumging peng nih nei leh tumging chi chih ging na zak chiang un, puk unla, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in adinkhiaksak dangka-eng milim bia un. Huan kuapeuh puk lou a beloute meipi kuang zuazua sung ah huai hun mah a paihlut ding ahi,” achi hi. Huaiziak in huai lai a mi tengteng in pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging leh tumging chi chih ging azak un, mi tengteng, namte, paute apuk ua, kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in atunkhiak dangka-eng milim abia uhi.Daniel Lawm Thumte Heksiatna Huchih lai in Kaldai mi kuate hiam ahong pai nai ua, Juda tuailaite ahong hekta uhi. Adawng ua kumpipa Nebukadnezzar kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in dam in! Aw kumpipa, nang thupiak na bawl a, mi chiteng in pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem leh nawtging, tumging peng nih neite leh tumging chi chih azak chiang ua, apuk ding ua dangka-eng milim abiak ding uh chi in. Kuapeuh puk lou a beloute meipi kuang zuazua ah paihlut ahi ding, chi in Babulon bial a thu leh la tung a na sehsa Juda kuate hiam a-om ua, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego. Hiai mite'n, Aw kumpipa, nang ahon limsak kei ua; na pathiante nna asem kei ua na dinkhiaksak dangka-eng milim leng abe sam kei uh,” chi in.

Huchi in Nebukadnezzar heh leh thangpai in Shadrak, Meshak, Abednego hon pi ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in hiai mite kumpipa ma ah ahon pi ua, Nebukadnezzar in adong a, akiang uah, “Aw Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, ka pathian nna na sep louh ua, dangka-eng milim ka tunkhiak na biak louh uh, na tup mawng uh hia?” achi hi. Tu in na kimansak unla chik hun peuh a pengkul, tamngai, kaihging, gosem, nawtging leh tumging peng nih nei leh tumging chi chih ging na zak chiang un puk unla milim ka tunkhiak bia un, hoihtak in; himahleh na biak kei ualeh meipi kuang zuazua sung ah huai hun mah in ahon paihlut ding uh; huchi in ka khut a kipan a nou hon hunkhe ding huai pathian kua hi ding ahia? Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego in adawng ua kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw Nebukadnezzar, hiai thu ah ka hon dawn uh akiphamoh kei hi. Huchibang ding ahihleh, Aw kumpipa, a-nna ka sep uh ka Pathian un meipi kuang zuazua a kipan koute ahon hunkhe thei hi, na khut a pan ahon hunkhe ding hi. Huchi ahihkeileh leng, na thei in, Aw kumpipa, na pathiante nna ka sem kei ding ua, na dinkhiak dangka-eng milim leng ka be sam kei ding uh,” achi uhi.Daniel Lawm Thumte Thah Dia Thutanna Huchi in Nebukadnezzar athangpai petmah a, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego tung ah amel putdan akikheng hial hi. Huaiziak in meipi asat ngeina sang a mun sagih a asatsak ding in thu apia hi. Huan asepaih pawl lak a om mihat kuate hiam Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego hen ding leh meipi kuang zuazua sung a paihlut ding in thu apia hi.

Huchi in hiai mite apuansilh lai uh, samul puanak toh, puanak kawnggak nei leh apuansilh dangte uh toh, meikuang zuazua lak ah apailutta uhi. Huchi in kumpipa thupiak akhawk mahmah ziak leh meipi asat mahmah ziak in huai mi Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego domte meikuang in ahul lumta hi. Hiai mi thumte, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednegote, meipi kuang zuazua lak ah hensa in apuk uhi. Huchih lai in Nebukadnezzar in lamdang asa mahmah a; kintak in athoukhia a; amah thudot mite kiang ah, “Mei lak ah mi thum hensa in i pailut uh ahi kei maw?” chi in agen hi. Amau adawng ua kumpipa kiang ah, “Dik mah e, kumpipa aw,” achi uhi. Ama'n adawng a, “Ngai un, mi li phelsa a om, mei lak a vak in ka mu a, bangmah achi kei uh, ami lina melputdan Pathian tapa abang,” achi hi.Daniel Lawm Thumte Hotkhiakna Leh Kaisanna Huchi in Nebukadnezzar meipi kuang zuazua gei chin ah ahong pai a; thu agen a, “Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, nou Pathian Tungnungpen sikhate, hong pawtkhia unla, hiai lam ah hong pai un,” achi hi. Huchi in Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, mei lak a kipan in ahong pawtkhia uhi. Huan bial heutute, vaihawm mite, ukpipate leh kumpipa dan thei mite, omkhawmte'n hiai mite, mei in apumpi tung uah hihtheihna anei kei a, aluzang ua sam leng akangdang kei a, apuansilh uh leng alamdang kei a, meigim leng anam kei uh chih amu uhi. Nebukadnezzar in thu agen a, “Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego Pathian in a-angel sawl a, amah muang asikhate hunkhia a, kumpipa thu hihlamdang a, amau Pathian lou ngal pathian nna asep louh ua abiaklouhna ding ua apumpite uh pepa phat in om hen. “Huaiziak in thupiak ka bawl hi, michih, nam chih, pau chih, Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego Pathian gensiatna thil banghiam gente, atnen in a-om dia, a-innte uh ekvum a bawl ahi ding hi; hichibang a hunkhe thei pathian dang a-om louh ziak in,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa'n Shadrak, Meshak leh Abednego, Babulon bial ah akaisangsak hi.

Kumpipa, Nebukadnezzar mite tengteng, namte leh paute, leitung pumpi a tengte kiang ah, na kiang uah lemna hihpun in om hen. Tungnungpen Pathian in kei lam a abawl chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte etsak, kei a ding in hoih hi in ka ngaihtuah hi. Achiamtehnate thupi hi na mahmah e;athillamdangte thilhihthei hi na mahmah uh e;agam tangtawn gam ahi a,avaihawmna akhang-akhang in a-om hi. Nebukadnezzar Mang Nihna Hon lausak mang ka nei hi; ka lupna tung ah ngaihtuahnate leh ka lungtang mengmuhte'n hon hihbuai uhi. Huaiziak in hilhchetna ka kiang a akitheihsak ding un, Babulon mipil tengteng ka ma a pi ding thupiak ka bawlta hi. Huchi in mitkhialdawi tawite, bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite ahong pai ua; ama uah ka mang ka genta hi; himahleh ahilhchetna ka kiang ah ahon theisak thei kei uhi. Himahleh atawptawp in ka ma ah, Daniel amin ka pathian min dungzui a Belteshazzar hiven, amah a Pathian siangthoute kha a-omna ma ah mang ka genta hi. Aw Belteshazzar, mitkhialdawi tawite heutupa, nang ah, Pathian siangthoute kha a-om a, thuguk bangmah in nang ahon hihbuai kei chih ka theih ziak in ka mang a ka muh mengmuhte leh ahilhchetna hon hilh in, ka chi hi. Ka lupna tung a ka lutang mengmuhte hichibang ahiz: Ngai in, lei laizang ah sing khat ka mu a, huai sing sandan athupi mahmah hi. Huai sing akhangtou a, ahong hat a, asanna in van asuntou a, lei mong tengteng tanpha huai ah akimu hi. Anahte ahoih un, agah pha mahmah a; huai ah mi tengteng a ding in an a-om hi; anuailim ah gamsate a-om ua, ahiangte ah van a vasate ateng ua, sa tengteng huai a kipan in akivak uhi.

Ka lupna tung a ka lup in mengmuhte ka mu a, ngai in, van a kipan in vengmi siangthou khat ahong paisuk hi. Ngaihtak in akikou a, hichibang in achi a: “Sing phuk inla, ahiangte satkhia in, anahte singkhia inla, agah thehzak in; anuai a kipan gamsate leh ahiang a kipan vasate hawlmang in om uhen. Himahleh abulsum leh azungte zaw hawi in, sik leh dal gui a henkhawm in, gam a loupa nou lak ah nutsiat in om hen. Van daitui in kawt henla, atantuan lei a loupa lak a gamsate toh hi hen. Huan atung a hun sagih abei mateng mihing lungsim kikheng in akiang ah gamsa lungtang piak hi hen. Tungnungpen in mite gam ah vai ahawm a, a-utna peuh kiang ah apia a, miniampente adingkhesak chih mihingte'n atheihna ding un veng mite'n agenkhia ua, misiangthoute'n apuangkhia uhi. “Hiai mang kei kumpipa Nebukadnezzar in ka man hi. Huan nang, Aw Belteshazzar, ahilhchetna genkhia in, ka gam a mipilte tengteng in ka kiang ah ahilhchetna ahon theisak thei kei ua; himahleh nang na hihthei, nang a pathian siangthoute kha a-om ziak in,” achi hi.Daniel In Mang Ahilhchian Daniel, amin Belteshazzar in, sawt lou kal lamdang asa a, angaihtuahnate'n amah apatausak hi. Kumpipa'n adawng a, “Belteshazzar, mang hiam ahilhchetna hiam in nang hon patausak kei hen,” achi hi. Belteshazzar in adawng a, “Ka toupa, mang nang hon mudahte lam thu hi henla, ahilhchetna na galte lam thu hi zawleh maw. Na sing muh, hong khang a, hong hat a, asanna in van asuttouh a, hiai a kipan lei mong tengteng akimuhna; anahte hoih a, agah pha mahmah a, mi teng a dia an om a

huai nuai a gamsate teng ua, ahiang a van a vasate atenna uh, Aw kumpipa, huai hong khang a, hong hat na muh, nangmah na hi; na thupina akhang in, van asun in, na vaihawmna lei mong tawp pha in ahi. Van a kipan a kumpipa'n vengmi siangthou hong paisuk amuh, Sing phuk inla, hihgawp in; himahleh abulsum leh azungte zaw hawi in, sik leh dal gui a henkhawm in gam a loupa nou lak ah van daitui in kawt henla, huan atantuan gamsate kiang ah hi in, atung a hun sagih abei matan, chih thu ahihleh; Aw kumpipa, ka toupa kumpipa tung a hong tung Tungnungpen thupiak ahilhchetna hiai ahi: Mite a kipan hawlkhiak in na om dia; gamsate kiang ah na khosa ding a, bawngtalte bang a loupa neksak in na om ding a; van daitui in na kawt ding a; na tung ah hun sagih abei ding; mite gam ah Tungnungpen in vai ahawm a; a-ututna kiang ah apia chih na theih matan. Huan sing bulsum leh azungte nutsiat ding a thupiak a om pen ahihleh; van Pathian in vaihawm petmah ahi chih na theih khit hun chiang in na gam nang kiang a piakkik ding genna ahi. Aw kumpipa, huaiziak in ka hon thuhilh nang a ding in pom tuak leh tagahte kiang a zahngaihna etsakna in na thulimlouhnate tawpsan in; na lamzanna suksau a a-om khak zenzenleh,” achi hi.Nebukadnezzar Hihniamna Hiai tengteng kumpipa Nebukadnezzar tung ah ahong tung hi. Kha sawm-le-nih abei in Babulon a kumpi Inpi sung ah avialvak hi. Kumpipa'n thu agen a, hiai Babulon thupi, kumpipa tenna mun ding a, ka thilhihtheihna hatna leh ka thuneihna thupina ding a ka lam ahi kei maw? chi in.

Kumpipa kam a thu a-om lai mahmah in, van a kipan aw ahong suakkhia a, “Aw kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, na kiang a thugen ahi; nang a kipan gam apaimangta hi. Tungnungpen in mite gam ah vai ahawm a, a-ututna kiang ah apia chih na theih matan, mihingte a kipan in hawlkhiak na hi ding a, na tenna gamsate kiang ah ahi ding; bawngtalte bang a loupa ne ding a bawl in na om dia; na tung ah hun sagih abei ding,” achi hi. Kintak in huai bang thil ahong tungta, mite a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om a; bawngtalte bang in loupa ane petmah hi; apumpi van daitui in akawt a; asam muvanlai multe ahong bang a, achinte vasate chinte ahong bangta hi.Nebukadnezzar In Pathian Aphat Huan nite abei in kei Nebukadnezzar in van lam ah ka mitte ka suantou a, ka theihtheihnate ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn a, huchi in Tungnungpen ka pahtawi hi; amah tangtawn a om gige phat in ka zahtak hi.Avaihawmna tangtawn vaihawmna ahi a, agam akhang-akhang in ahi, chi in; Huan leitung a teng tengtengbangmah lou bang a ngaih ahi ua;huan van sepaih pawl leh leitung a teng tengtengtelak ah adeihlam bang in ahih zel a;kuamah in akhut alen thei un,akiang ah, “Bangziak a hih na hia?”achi thei kei uhi. Huai lai mah in ka theihtheihna ka kiang ah ahong kik nawn a; ka gam thupina, ka lalna leh hoihna ka kiang ah ahong kik a; ka midotte leh ka toupate'n kei ahong zong ua; huchi in ka gam ah kiptak in ka dingh a, kei a ding in thupina lian mahmah behlap in a-omta hi. Huchi in kei Nebukadnezzar in van Kumpipa phat a pahtawi in ka zahtak a; athilhih tengteng thutak ahi a, alampite vaihawmna ahi a, kisatheitak a omte ahihniam thei hi.

Belshazzar kumpipa'n atoupate lak a mi sangkhat a ding in ankuang thupitak abawl a, sangkhatte ma ah uain adawn hi. Belshazzar in uain achep lai in, apa Nebukadnezzar in Jerusalem a om tempul a kipan a alak dangka-eng leh dangka tui-um belsuante kumpipa leh atoupate, azite leh ameite'n huaite a adawntheihna ding un hon la ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in Jerusalem a om Pathian inn, tempul a kipan alakkhiak dangka-eng tui-um belsuante ahon la ua; kumpipa leh atoupate, azite leh ameite'n, huaite in adawn uhi. Uain adawn ua, dangka-eng, dangka, dalsik, sing leh suang pathiante aphat uhi. Belshazzar Ankuangluina Huai lai in kumpipa mel ahong lamdang a, angaihtuahnate'n amah apatausakta hi; akhut akhe akipzouta kei a, akhukte akisat tuah nomnom uhi. Bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite hon pi un chi in nakpitak in kumpipa akikou hi. Kumpipa'n thu agen a, Babulon mipilte kiang ah, “Kuapeuh in hiai laigelh sim a, ahilhchetna hon ensak, puan sandup silhsak ahi ding a; angawng kimvel in dangka-eng khainiang a-ok ding a; gamsung ah vaihawmmi thumna ahi ding,” achi hi. Huchi in kumpipa mipilte tengteng ahong lut ua; himahleh laigelh asim thei kei ua, ahilhchetna leng kumpipa atheisak thei kei uhi. Huchi in kumpipa Belshazzar apatau mahmah a; amah ah amel ahong lamdang a; akhawnbawlte alungzing uhi. Huchi in kumpipa leh khawnbawlte thu ziak in ankuangluina insung ah kumpinu ahong lut hi; kumpinu'n thu agen a, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in hing in, na ngaihtuahnate'n hon patausak kei henla, na mel leng lamdang kei hen. Na gamsung a mi khat, amah a pathian siangthoute kha omna a-om a; na pa dam lai in vakna leh theihtheihna leh pilna, pathiante pilna bang, amah ah muh in a-om

kumpipa Nebukadnezzar, kumpipa, na pa'n, amah mitkhialdawi tawite leh bum mite, Kaldai mite leh aisan mite heutu in abawl hi. Lungsim hoihpen, theihna, theihtheihna, mangte hilhchetna, thugen haksa etsakna, ginlelhna hihvenna kumpipa'n Belteshazzar min asakpa, huai Daniel mah ah muh in a-om hi. Tu in Daniel sapsak in om henla, ama'n hilhchetna ensak hen,” achi hi.Daniel In Laigelh Ahilhchian Huan kumpipa ma ah Daniel ahon pi ua, Kumpipa'n thu agen a Daniel kiang ah, “Daniel, ka pa'n Judah gam a kipan Judah salmat hon pilut na hi hia? Nang ah pathian kha a-om a, vakna leh theihtheihna leh pilna hoihpen nang ah muh in a-om chih na tanchin ka za hi. Tu in ka ma ah mipilte, bum mite ahon pilut ua, hiai laigelh sim a, ahilhchetna ka kiang a theisak ding in; himahleh huai thil hilhchetna a-ensak thei kei uhi. Himahleh hilhchetnate na bawl thei a, ginlelhnate na bawlhoih thei chih na tanchin ka na za hi. Tu in laigelh na sim theih a, ahilhchetna na hon hilh theih leh puan sandup ka hon silhsak ding a; na ngawng kimvel in dangka-eng khi na ok ding a; gamsung ah vaihawmmi thumna na hi ding hi,” achi hi. Huchi in Daniel in adawng a kumpipa ma ah, “Na thilpiakte nangmah kiang ah hi zaw henla, na kipahmante midang kiang ah pe zaw in; ahi a, kumpipa kiang ah laigelh ka sim ding a, ahilhchetna amah ka theisak ding hi. Aw nang kumpipa, Tungnungpen Pathian in na pa Nebukadnezzar gam leh thupina, letna leh vaihawmna ahon pia hi. Huai amah apiak letna ziak in ama ah mi tengteng, namte, paute aling un alau ua; a-utut athat a, a-utut hinghawi in; a-utut akaithou a, a-utut asawnniam hi.

Himahleh alungtang ahong kisaktheih a, ki-uangsaktak a gamta a alungsim hihkhauh a a-om lai in, alaltutphah a kipan suan in a-om a, amah a kipan athupina alakheta hi. Huan mite tapate a kipan hawlkhiak in a-om a; huchi in alungtang gamsate a bang a bawl in a-om a; bawngtalte bang a loupa a vak in a-om a, apumpi van daitui in akawt a; Tungnungpen Pathian in mihing gam ah vai ahawm a, a-ututte atung ah adingkhesak chih ahon theih matan. “Huan nang atapa, Aw Belshazzar, hiai tengteng na theih in leng na lungtang na niamkhiak kei hi. Himahleh van Toupa dem in na kihihsang a; amau na ma ah toupa inn a tui-um belsuante na lasak a; nang leh na toupate, na zite leh na meite'n, huaite in uain na dawn uh a; bangmah mu thei lou, za thei lou, theithei lou dangka leh dangka-eng, dal, sik, sing leh suang pathiante bia in na phat a; Pathian akhut a na hatna omna leh na lampite tengteng neipa na pahtawi zaw kei hi. Huchi in amah a kipan huai khut banghiam tan sawl in ahong om a, hiai laigelh gelh in ahong omta hi.Baang A Thu Kigelh “Huan gelh a om laithu hiai ahi: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPHARSIN. Huai hilhchetna hiai ahi. MENE: Pathian in na gam asimta, abeisakta hi. TEKEL: bukna a buk in na om a, na chingzou kei hi. PERES: na gam hawm in a-om a, Mid mite leh Persia mite kiang ah piak ahita,” achi hi. Huchi in Belshazzar in thu apia a, dangka-eng khainiang angawng kimvel in a-oksak ua; gamsung a vaihawmmi athumna hi ding in amah tung ah thu apuang uhi. Huai zan mah in Kaldai kumpipa Belshazzar thah in a-om hi. Mid mi Darias, kum sawmguk-le-nih a upa in gam atangta hi.

Darias in agam pumpi bial za-le-sawmnih omsuak ding bial heutu za-le-sawmnih gam tung ah akoih hi. Huan amaute tung ah, heutu lian thum, huaite lak ah Daniel akhatna ahi a; huchi a hiai bial heutute'n huaite kiang a thu atut ua, kumpipa'n siatna aneihlouhna ding in. Huchi in hiai Daniel, amah a lungsim hoihpen a-om ziak in, heutu liante leh bial heutute tung ah akan-aval a bawl in a-om a; kumpipa'n gam pumpi tung ah amah koih ding angaihtuah hi. Huai lai in heutu liante leh bial heutute'n gam thu ah Daniel demna ding azong uhi; himahleh amah miginom ahih ziak in thupatna ding in adiklouhna amu kei ua, amah ah diklouhna leh khelhna muh in a-om kei hi. Huchi in hiai mite'n, “Hiai Daniel demna ding bangmah i mu kei ding; a Pathian dan toh kisai a amah demna ding i muh kei ngalleh,” akichi uhi. Humpinelkai Kul Ah Daniel Gam heutu lian tengteng, heutute leh bial heutute, dan thei mite leh ukpipate, kumpi dan thuseh bawlkhiak a, khamna khauhtak bawl ding in akikumkhawm uhi. Huchi in mi kuapeuh, nang chih louh, Aw kumpipa, ni sawmthum sung a pathian hiam mihing hiam lak a ngetna abawlleh, humpinelkai huangsung ah paihlut in a-om ding hi. Tu in, Aw kumpipa, khamna hihkip inla, laigelh ah na min gelh in; huchi a Mid mite leh Persia mite dan bang a akihih lamdanlouhna ding in,” achi uhi. Huchi in kumpipa Darias in laigelh leh khamna ah amin agelhta hi. Daniel in laigelh ah min akigelhta chih atheih in a-insung ah alut a; adantan sung a atawlette Jerusalem lam a hon hi ve un, akhukdin a, ni khat in thumvei, huchi in athum a, amalam a ahih bang in, a Pathian ma ah kipahthu agen hi.

Huchi in hiai mite akikhawm ua, Daniel a Pathian ma a thu ngen leh thum in amu uhi. Huchi in ahong pai nai ua, kumpipa khamna tungtang kumpipa ma ah ahong genta uhi, “Aw kumpipa, nang chih louh michih kuapeuh in ni sawmthum sung a pathian hiam mihing hiam kiang a ngetna abawlleh humpinelkai huangsung ah paihlut ahi ding chih khamna ah na gelh ahi kei maw,” achi uhi. Kumpipa'n, “Mid mite leh Persia mite dan lamdang thei lou bang in huai dan kip lai ahi,” achi hi. Huan amau adawng ua kumpipa ma ah, “Huai Daniel, Judah saltang tate lak a mi in nang leh na min gelhna khamna leng ahon limsak kei, Aw kumpipa, ni khat in thumvei ngetna abawl hi,” achi uhi. Hiai thute azak in, kumpipa alungkim het kei a, amah suaktasak ding in Daniel tung ah alungtang anga a; amah hutkhiak tum in nitum tan asemgim hi. Huchi in hiai mite kumpipa kiang ah ahong kikhawm ua, kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, khamna hiam dan thuseh hiam kumpipa'n ahihkipsa hihlamdan theih ahih louh Mid mite leh Persia mite dan ahi chih thei in,” achi uhi. Huchi in kumpipa'n thu apia a, Daniel ahon pi ua, humpinelkai huangsung ah apailut uhi. Huan kumpipa'n thu agen a, Daniel kiang ah, “A-nna na sep gige na Pathian in ahon suaktasak ding,” achi hi. Huan suang khat ahon la ua, huangsung gong ah akoih ua; kumpipa'n amah suaisawnna zungbuh leh atapate suaisawnna zungbuh in suai anamta hi; Daniel tungtang thu a bangmah hihlamdan theih ahihlouhna ding in. Huchi in kumpipa a-inpi ah apai a, an ngawl in, tumging leh nopbawlna khawlsak in azanhak a; amah lah a-ihmu thei kei hi. Huchi in zingsang beltak in kumpipa athou a, humpinelkaite huangsung lam ah kintak in ava hoh hi.

Huangsung lam a Daniel kiang a ahong pai nai lai in, kah aw in akikou a; kumpipa'n thu agen a, Daniel kiang ah, “Aw Daniel, Pathian hing sikha, a-nna na sep gige, na Pathian in humpinelkaite a kipan nang hon suaktasak thei hiam?” achi hi. Daniel in kumpipa kiang ah, “Aw kumpipa, tangtawn in hing in! Ka Pathian in a-angel hon sawl a, humpinelkaite kam ahong chihsak a, ahon hihna kei uh; amah ma a keimah a hoihna muh a a-om ziak leh Aw kumpipa nangmah ma a leng gilou ka hih louh ziak in,” achi hi. Huchi in nakpitak in kumpipa akipak a, huangsung a kipan Daniel lakhe tou ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in huangsung a kipan in Daniel alakhe tou ua, a Pathian amuan ziak in atung ah bangmah natna akimu kei hi. Huan kumpipa'n thu apia a, Daniel hekte huai mite ahon pi ua, humpinelkai huangsung ah apai ua, amau, azi leh tate uh; humpinelkaite'n amaute huangsung taw ahong tun ma un ana man ua, aguhte uh ahihnen vek uhi. Huchi in kumpipa Darias in mite tengteng, namte, paute leitung pumpi a tengte kiang ah lai agelh a, “Na kiang uah lemna hihpun in om hen! Ka gam seh thum tengteng ah Daniel Pathian ma ah mite aling un alau ding uh;Amah Pathian hing, tangtawn a omkip,agam hihsiat ahi ngei kei ding a;athuneihna a-omden ding hi, chi in thupiak ka bawl hi. Ama'n asuaktasak a, atankhia a,van leh lei ah chiamtehna leh thillamdangte ahih a;ama'n humpinelkaite thilhihtheihna a kipan in Daniel asuaktasak hi.” Huchibang in Darias vaihawm lai leh Persia mi Kura vaihawm lai in hiai Daniel alamzang mahmah hi.

Babulon kumpipa Belshazzar kum khatna kum in Daniel in alupna tung a alup lai in mang anei a, alungsim ah mengmuh ahong kilang a, mang agelh a athute akim in agen hi. Daniel in thu agen a, “Zan a ka mengmuhna ah, ngai in, van huih lite tuipi thupi tung a hong nungkhia un ka mu hi. Huan tuipi a kipan sa thupi li, kibang lou chiat ahong paitou ua, akhatna humpinelkai abang a, muvanlai kha anei hi; huchi a ka et lai in akhate bohkhiak in a-om ua; lei a kipan phottouh a mihing bang a khe nih a dinsak a om in; akiang ah mihing lungsim piak in a-om hi.” Huan ngai in, sa dang, anihna, vompi bang, apang langkhat tung ah photkang in a-om a; akamsung ah ahate kikal ah nakguh thum a-om a; hichibang in akiang ah hilh in a-om a, “Thou inla, sa tampi negai in,” chi in. Hiai khit in ka en a, huan ngai in, sa dang khat, gialbem bang, anungzang a vasa bang a kha li nei ka mu hi. Huai gamsa in lu li anei a; akiang ah thuneihna piak in a-om hi. Daniel Mengmuhnate(. —. )Daniel In Gamsa Lite Amuhna Kite ka ngaihtuah lai in, alak uah kii dang aneu khat hong poukhia a, huai ma ah huai kii masa thumte azung uah bohkhiak in a-om uh, hiai kineu ah mit, mihing mit bang leh kam thil thupite gen a-omta hi.Tanglai Mipa Muhna Huchi a ka et lai in, laltutphah akikoih a, Tanglai Mipa'n alaltutphah aluahta hi; apuansilh vuk bang in angou a, samul siang bang in alu a sam angou hi; huai alaltutphah meikuang zuazua ahi a, huai akangtalai khete meikuang lai bang ahi. Meikuang luipi hong pawt a ama a kipan ahong paikhia a, asang asangte'n amah nna asepsak uh

ama ah singkhat mun singkhat adingh ua; vaihawmna atungkhia ua, laibute ahong uhi. Huai kii in athugen thupite ziak in ka en nilouh hi. Huchi a ka et lai in, huai gamsa thah in ahong om a; apumpi hihsiat in ahong om a; meikuang a apaih dong uh ka en gige hi. Huan sa dangte ahihleh athuneihna uh lakmang in a-om a; hun seh khat leh hun khat tan ahinna uh hihsau in a-om hi. Zan mengmuhna in ka mu a, ngai in, van meipite toh mi khat mihing tapa toh kibang ahong pai a, Tanglai Mipa kiang mahmah ah ahong a, amah ama chin ah ahon pi uhi. Huan thuneihna, thupina leh gam piak in a-om a; huchi a mi tengteng, namte leh paute'n amah nna asepsak theihna ding un; athuneihna tangtawn thuneihna ahi a, amang kei ding, agam hihsiat in a-om kei ding hi.Mengmuhnate Hilhchet Ahi Uh “Kei Daniel ahihleh ka sung ah ka lungsim adah a, ka lutang mengmuh in kei ahon patausak hi. Akiangnai a dinghte lak a khat kiang ka zuan a, hiai tengteng thu ah thutak amah ka dongta hi. Huchi in huai thilte hilhchetna ka kiang ah ahon theisakta hi. Hiai gamsa thupi lite etsak bel lei a hong dingkhe ding kumpipa lite ahi uhi. Himahleh Tungnungpen misiangthoute'n gam atang ding ua, tangtawn, tangtawn in, gam aneiden ding uhi,” achi hi. Huchi in sa lina, amaute tengteng toh kibang lou, kihtakhuai mahmah, ahate sik hi a, achinte dal, ne khin a, botnen a, a-omlaite akhepek a chil tungtang thutak theih ka ut hi. Huan kii sawmte aluzang a omte lak ah kii dang khat hong poukhia a, huai ma a kii thumte apukna

huai kii mitte nei leh kam nei a thil thupite gen a, alatdan a lawite sang a hat tuakzaw pen tanchin ka thei nuam hi. Huchi a ka etleh huai kii in misiangthoute dou in, gal abawl a, Tanglai Mipa'n Tungnungpen misiangthoute gum in thu akhen a, amau lalgam aneih masiah ua ding in amaute azouta hi. Huchi in sa lina pen leitung ah gam lina ahi ding a, huai gam tengteng toh akibang kei ding a, leitung pumpi agai ding a, asikden dia, abotnen ding achi hi. Huan kii sawmte ahihleh, hiai gam a kipan in kumpipa sawm hong dingkhe dingte ahi ua; amau nung in adang khat; amasa toh akibang kei ding a, ama'n kumpipa thumte azou ding hi. Tungnungpen dem in agense ding a, misiangthoute anuaisiah ding hi; hunte leh dan khen ding angaihtuah dia; hun khat leh hunte leh hun kimkhat abei masiah misiangthoute akhut ah piak in a-om ding uhi. Huaite zoh in vaihawmna a-om ding a, athuneihna lakmang ahi ding a, atawp tan a hihgawp ding leh suksiat in a-om ding hi. Huan leitung gam leh thuneihna leh van nuai pumpi nuai a gamte thupina, Tungnungpen misiangthoute kiang ah piak in a-om ding; agam tangtawn gam ahi a, avaihawmnate'n amah nna asepsak un athu amang ding uhi. Hiai ah thu leh la tawpna a-om hi. Kei Daniel ahihleh ka ngaihtuahnate'n nakpi in hon hihbuai a, kei ah ka mel amual hi; himahleh ka lungtang in huai thu ka kem khinkhian hi.

Kumpipa Belshazzar vaihawm akum thumna kum in kei, Daniel kiang a amasa a kilang pen mah ahong kilat khit nung in mengmuhna ka kiang ah hong kilang nawn hi. Ka mengmuhna ah hichi ahong hi a, Elam bial a Susa inpi ah ka om a; huan mengmuhna in Ulai lui kiang ah om in ka mu hi. Huchi in ka dakleh ngai in, huai lui gei ah belamtal khat kii nih nei adingh a, akii nihte asau uhi. Himahleh khat sang in adang pen asauzaw a, asauzaw pen ahong pou nanung pen ahi. Huai belamtal in akii a si ding in tumlam, mallam leh simlam nawt in ka mu hi; ama ah sate adingh thei kei ua, akhut a kipan suaktasak thei leng kuamah a-om kei uh; himahleh ama deihlam in ahih a ahong thupi hi. Huchi a ka ngaihtuah lai in, ngai in, leitung pumpi tawnsuak in tumlam a kipan in keltal khat lei sukha lou in ahong pai a, huai kel in amitte kikal ah kii minthang khat anei hi. Belamtal kii nih nei lui malam a dingh ka muh kiang ah ahong pai a, athilhihtheihna toh heh in amah adelhta hi. Belamtal kiangchin ah ahong pai ka mu a, atung ah nakpitak in athangpaita a, belamtal aboh a, akii nihte ahihtan a; huchi in belamtal in amah adinna ding thahatna aneita kei hi. Lei ah asipuk a, amah achilzial a; akhut a kipan belamtal suaktasak ding kuamah a-om kei hi. Daniel In Belamtal Leh Keltal Muhna Huan huai kiite lak a kii neu thupi mahmah khat, simlam, suahlam leh gam kilawm lam nga in ahong khangkhia hi. Huchi in van sepaihte bang hial in ahong thupi mahmah a; aksihonte lak a khenkhatte lei ah apaikhesuk a, amau achil hi.

Ahi, van sepaihte' Toupa tung nangawn ah akiliansak a; amah a kipan in niteng halmang thillat alamang a, amun siangthou apaikhesuk hi. Huan tatlekna ziak in halmang thillatte toh van sepaihte amah kiang ah piak in a-om ua; huchi in lei ah thutak apaikhia a, asep leh bawlte ah alohching hi. Huchi in misiangthou khat in misiangthou dang khat kiang ah, “Hiai mengmuhna a kimu tatlekna mulkimhuai in niteng halmang thillat bang tan luahtou ding a, mun siangthoupen leh van sepaihte akhenuai a bang tan nuaisiah a omsak ding ahia,” achih ka za hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Nitaklam leh zinglam sangnih-le-zathum sung tan in; huai chiang in mun siangthoupen silsiang ahi ding hi,” achi hi.Gabriel In Mengmuhte Ahilhchian Huan hichi ahong hi a, kei, Daniel in ka mengmuh lai in, theihchet ka na tum a; huchi in ka ma ah mihing kibatpih bang ahong dingh hi. Huan Ulai luipiau kikal ah, mihing aw kikou in, “Gabriel, hiai mipa mengmuhna theichiansak in,” achih ka za hi. Huchibang in ka dinna mun naih in ahong pai a; huchi a ahong pai lai in, ka lauta a, ka mai in lei ka si hi; himahleh ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw mihing tapa, mengmuh lah hun tawp a ding ahi a, theisiam in,” achi hi. Huan kei ahon houpih lai in, lei lam nga in nakpitak in ka ihmuta a; himahleh ahon khoih a, ahon dingtangsak hi. Huan ama'n, “Ngai in, thangpaihna hun tawp lam a bang ahia hong om ding ka hon theisak ding; hun tawp sehsa a ding lah ahi ngal a,” achi hi. “Belamtal na muh kii nih nei, Media leh Persia kumpipate ahi uh. Huan huai keltal huham Grik kumpipa ahi; amitte kikal a om kii thupi kumpipa khatna ahi.

Huan akitan pen mun luah kii lite ahihleh, huai nam a kipan in gam li hong dingkhe dingte ahi ua; himahleh amau bang in thilhihtheihna anei kei ding uh. Huan agam vaihawm hun tawp na uah, talek mite ahong hat mahmah chiang un, kumpipa lauhuai melpu, zuau a khem siam khat adingkhe ding hi. Huchi in athilhihtheihna ahat dia, himahleh amah mah thilhihtheihna hilou in; siatna lamdangtak atun dia, athilhih khempeuh alohching ding hi; huchi in mihatte leh misiangthoute ahihsegawp ding hi. “Huan amah dan zui in khemna nasep ah alohching zel ding hi; huan alungtang akiliansak ding a, mi tampite bit akisak lai un ahihse ding a; kumpite Kumpi dou ding in akisa ding; himahleh mihing khut hilou in hihkhap in a-om ding hi. Huan nitak lamte leh zingsang lamte toh kisai mengmuhna kigen adik ahi; himahleh ahong tung ding ni tampi a ding ahih lai ziak in hiai mengmuhna khak bikbek in,” achi hi. Huchi in kei, Daniel ka sibup a; ni bangzah hiam ka china hi; ka thou a, kumpipa nna ka sem a hiai mengmuhna lamdang ka sa hi, himahleh kuamah in hiai atheisiam kei.

Media mi, Ahasueras tapa Darias, Kaldaite tung a kumpipa ding abawl, vaihawm akum khatna, avaihawm akum khatna kum in kei, Daniel in laibute a kipan Jerusalem hihsiatna in kum sawmsagih daih ding ahi chih zawlnei Jeremiah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung tanchin a kipan in ka theisiam hi. Huchi in Toupa Pathian lam ah ka mel ka koihkip a, thumna leh thilngette, an ngawlna leh sai-ip puan silh in, vut lak a tu in Toupa Pathian kiang ah ka ngen ngutngut hi. Huan Toupa ka Pathian kiang ah ka thum a, thupha ka tawi hi, “Aw Toupa, Pathian thupi leh mulkimhuai, nang hon it a na thupiakte zuite tung a thukhun leh zahngaihna vom; ka na khialta ua, hoih loutak in ka gamtang ua, giloutak in ka na hihta ua, ka hel ua, na thuseh leh na vaihawmte ka na lehngatsanta uhi. Ka kumpipate uh, ka vaihawmtute uleh ka pipute uh leh gam a mi tengteng kiang a na min a thugen, na sikha zawlneite thu leng ka na ngaikhe kei uhi. Aw Toupa, diktatna nang a ahi a, himahleh tuni bang in, kou a bel zahlakna leh buaina ahi; Judah a mite, Jerusalem a tengte, Israel tengteng, anai leh gamla a omte, na tung a atatlekna ziak un amaute gam tengteng ah delhzak in ka om uhi. “Aw Toupa, ka kumpipate, ka vaihawmte uh, ka pipute uh leh kou hon suangtute'n na tung a dikloutak a akhelh ziak un zahlakna in hon khuh hi. Daniel In Amite Athumsak Toupa ka Pathian uh aw leh adante a om ding a asikha zawlneite zang a ka ma ua hon na koihsakte ka na mangta kei uhi. Ahi, Israel tengteng in na dan atatleksan ua, ahilou lam ah apial ua, na aw amanlouhna ding un

huaiziak in na tung a ka hihkhelhte ziak in Mosi, Pathian sikha dan sung a gelh a om kichiamna hamsia ka tung ah sunbuak in a-omta hi. “Huan koute demna leh ka tung ua vaihawmte demna thute leh ka tung ua siatna thupitak in ahihkip khinta hi; Jerusalem tung a kihih bang van nuai pumpi ah lah akihih ngei ngal kei a. Mosi Dan sung a gelh ahih bang in, hiai siatna tengteng ka tung uah ahong tung hi; huchipi in leng ka thulimlouhnate uh kiheisan a, na thutak a theihkhen theihna ka neihtheihna ding un Toupa ka Pathian uh deihsakna ka ngen nai kei lai uhi. Huaiziak in Toupa ka Pathian uh athilhihte tengteng a adiktat gige man in, Toupa'n thil hoih lou en gige in, ka tung uah ahon tungsakta hi; hinapi in kou lah a-aw ka na mangta kei uhi. Huan tu in, Aw Toupa ka Pathian uh, khut hattak a na mite Aigupta gam a kipan pikhepa leh tuni bang a minthanna kimuhpa, tuni bang in ka khialta ua, giloutak in ka na hihta uhi. “Aw Toupa, ka hon ngen ahi, na diktatna tengteng ziak in, na hehna leh thangpaihna, na khopi Jerusalem leh na tang siangthou a kipan kihei mangsak in; ka khelhnate uh ziak leh ka pipute uh thulimlouhna ziak in, Jerusalem leh na mite lah ka kim ka vel ua omte tengteng simmoh ahong hita uhi. Huaiziak in tu in, Aw ka Pathian uh, na sikha thumna leh athilngette ngaikhia inla, Toupa ziak in, asegawpsa na mun siangthou tung ah na mel vaksak in. Aw ka Pathian, na bil hon doh inla, za in; na mitte hak inla, na min a kilou na khopi siatgawpnate en in

ka diktatna ziak un na ma a hiai ka thilngetnate uh lan ka hi ngal kei ua, na zahngaihna thupite ziak in ahi zaw hi. Aw Toupa, za in, Aw Toupa ngaidam in, Aw Toupa, ngaikhia inla hih in; hal ke'n; nangmah ziak mahmah in, Aw ka Pathian, na khopi leh na mite nang min pute ahi uhi,” achi hi.Gabriel In Genkholhna Ahilhchian Huchi a thu ka gen a, ka thum a, ka khelhna leh ka mi Israel khelhna thupha ka tawi a, Toupa ka Pathian ma a ka Pathian tang siangthou a dingh a thilngetna ka piak lai in; ahi, thumna a thu ka gen lai in, pasal Gabriel, achil a mengmuhna a ka muh pa, kintak a leng dia bawl a om in, nitaklam thillat hun ding in ahong khoih hi. Huan ahon thuhilh a, ahon houpih a, “Aw Daniel, theihsiamna a siam mahmah a hon bawl ding in tu in ka hong paikhia hi,” achi hi. Na thilngetna kipat phet in adawnna piak ahi; nang hilh ding a hong pai ka hi, nakpitak a it lah na hi ngal a; huaiziak in thu ngaihtuah inla, mengmuhte theisiam in. “Na mite leh na khopi siangthou a ding in tatlekna hihbeina ding, khelhnate tawpsakna ding leh thulimlouhna a dia kilemna bawlna ding, tangtawn diktatna laklutna ding leh mengmuhte leh genkholhnate khakkhum bikbekna ding leh asiangthoupen thaunilhna ding in na tung ah nipikal sawmsagih hun seh leh thu piak ahi. Huaiziak in thei inla, theisiam in, Jerusalem tungding nawn ding leh lam ding a thupiak apaikhiak a kipan sathau nilh a ompa, vaihawm tan in, nipikal sagih ahi ding; huan nipikal sawmguk-le-nih sung in hun haksa mahmahte akongzing leh bukna phaizang toh akilam nawn ding hi.

“Nipikal sawmguk-le-nih khit chiang in sathau nilh a ompa satkhiak in a-om ding a, bangmah anei kei ding hi; huchi in ahong om ding vaihawmpa leh mite'n khopi leh mun siangthou ahihse ding ua; hun tawpna tui khang bang in ahong tung ding, huan atawp dong kidouna leh siatgawpnate om ding a guankholhsa ahita hi. Huchi in nipikal khat a ding in tampi toh thukhun khauhtak abawl ding a; nipikal kimkhat a ding in kithoihna leh thillat atawpsak ding hi; mun siangthou ah mulkimhuai leh kihhuai atungkhe ding a; amah tung a tung dia guankholhsa hun tawp leh thangpaihna atung ah sunbuak ahih tan a-om ding hi,” achi hi.

Persia kumpipa Kura vaihawm kum thumna ah Daniel, amin Belteshazzar kiang ah thu khat ahong kihil hi; huan huai thu atak ahi a, kidouna thupi mahmah thu ahi; huchi in huai thu atheisiam a, mengmuhna theihsiamna anei hi. Huai lai in kei, Daniel in nipikal pumpi kal thum ka suun hi. Tanghou lim ka ne kei a; sa hi in uain hileh ka kam ah alut kei; nipikal thum tunkim masiah sathau ka kinilh kei himhim hi. Huan akha masapen ani sawmnih-le-li ni in, lui lian, Tigris pang ah ka dingh hi. Ka dak a, ngai in, mi khat puanmalngat silh, akawngte Uphaz dangka-eng siang a gak ka mu hi. Apumpi leng beril suang bang ahi a; amaitang khophia bang ahi; amitte meisel kuangpha abang a, abante leh akhepekte dal nawttet abang a; athugen ging mipi aw abang hi. Huchi in kei, Daniel kia in hiai mengmuhna ka mu a; ka kiang a om mite'n lah huai mengmuhna amu ngal kei ua; himahleh atung uah nakpi a linna ahong tung a, kibu ding in ataikek uhi. Huchi in kei kia a nutsiat in ka om a; hiai mengmuhna thupi ka muta hi; huchi in kei ah hatna a-om nawnta kei a; ka kilawmna kei ah siatna ahong suakta a; hatna ka neita kei hi. Hinapi in ka muh mipa aw ka za a; athute ka ngaihkhiak lai in, akhup in ka mai lei lam nga in nakpitak in ka ihmu hithit hi. Tigri Lui Gei A Daniel Mengmuhna Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Aw Daniel, nang nakpitak a-it a ompa, na kiang a ka thugente theisiam in dingtang in; na kiang a sawl a ompa ka hi,” achi a; hiai thu ka kiang a agen lai in, ling kawm in ka dinghta hi.

Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Lau ke'n, Daniel, theisiam ding leh na Pathian ma a kiniamkhiak ding a, na lungtang na koihkip ni masapen a kipan, na thugente zak a omta ahi; na thugente ziak a hong ka hi. Himahleh Persia gam kumpipa'n ni sawmnih-le-khat kei ahon dal hi; himahleh ngai in, Persia kumpipa kiang ah hentang a ka om nilouh ziak in Mikael, angel lianpen kei hon panpih ding in ahong pai hi. Huchi in ni nanung lam chiang a na mite tung a hong tung ding bang ahia chih nang hon theisiamsak dia hong pai ka hi; mengmuhna tunung ni tampi a hong tung ding ahi lai hi,” chi in. Huan hiai thute bang a ka kiang a ama'n thu agen khit in lei lam ah ka mai ka nga a, ka pau thei kei hi. Huan ngai in, mi khat mite tapate toh kibang in ka mukte ahon khoihsak a; ka kam ka a, thu ka gen a, ka ma a dingpa kiang ah, “Aw ka toupa, mengmuhna ziak in lungkhamnate ka tung ah hong kibung a, hatna ka neita kei. Bangchi in ahia ka toupa sikha in ka toupa ahoulimpih theih ding? Kei ah lah thahatna a-om kei a, nak leng nak lah sim ka hi,” ka chi hi. Huai lai in mi khat mihing toh kibang in ahon khoih nawn a, ahon hatsakta hi. Huan ama'n, “Aw nakpitak a it mipa, lau ke'n; na kiang ah muanna om hen, hattak in om in; ahi, hattak in om in,” achi hi. Ama'n ka kiang a thu agen khit in, ka hatta hi, “Ka Toupa thugen heh, ka chi a; nang na hon hatsakta ngal a,” chi in. Ama'n, “Na kiang a bang ding a hong pai ka hia chih na thei hia? Tu in Persia gam makaipa kidoupih ding in ka kik nawn ding; huchi a ka paikhiak chiang in, ngai in, Grik makaipa ahong pai ding hi,” achi hi. Himahleh thutak laibu sung a kigelh nang ka hon hilh ding; na makaipa Mikael chih louh kuamah hiaite kalh a kei hon doupih a-om kei.

Huan kei ka hihleh, Mid mi Darias akum khatna kum in, amah hihkip ding leh hihhat ding in ka dingh hi. Huchi in thutak ka hon ensak ding hi. “Ngai in, Persia ah kumpipa thum ahong dingkhe lai ding ua; alina pen amaute tengteng sang in nakpitak in ahausazaw ding hi. Huchi a ahauhna ziak a ahong hat mahmah chiang in, Grik dou ding in mi tengteng atokthou ding hi. Huan kumpipa hattak ahong dingkhe ding a, thuneihna thupi toh vaihawm ding leh adeihdan a hih ding in. Ahong dinkhiak chiang in agam akek ding a, van huih lite lam ah hawmzak ahi ding; amah suan hilou in vai ahawm ding a, himahleh ama'n thilhihtheihna anei kei ding; agam bohkhiak leh midangte kiang ah piak in a-om ding hi. “Huchi in simlam kumpipa ahat ding a, asepaih heutu khat amah sang in ahatzaw ding a, gam anei ding a; avaihawmna thupi ahi ding. Huan kum bangzah hiam nung in, akizomkhawm ding ua; simlam kumpipa tanu mallam kumpipa kiang ah kituahna bawl ding in ahong pai dia; himahleh hiai kizopna in hun sawt adaih kei ding; huai ni in amah veng mite leh apa leh amah kithuahpih pa leng piakkhiak in a-om ding hi. “Himahleh azung a kipan ahiang selnou mun ah mi khat ahong dingkhe ding a; huai tuh sepaih pawl kiang ah ahong pai dia; mallam kumpipa kulhpi sung ah alut dia; amaute dou in thil ahih ding a, avualzou ding hi. Huchi in apathiante u leng, amilim sunte uh toh, huan adangka leh dangka-eng tui-um belsuan hoihte uh toh, Aigupta ah ama'n asal in alakik ding a; huan mallam kumpipa a kipan kum bangzah hiam akidangkoih ding hi. Huan simlam kumpipa gam ah ahong pai dia, himahleh ama gam lam ah akik nawn ding hi.

Huchi in atapate'n adou ding ua; sepaih thupi tampi akaikhawm ding ua; huaite adimlet in ahong kuan ding ua, apaisuak ding uh; huan akik nawn ding ua, amah kulh tanpha hial in adou ding uhi. Aigupta Leh Siria Lalgam Huan mipite pimang in a-om ding ua, alungtang sansak in a-om ding a; huchi in sing tampite apuksak ding a, himahleh avualzou kei ding hi. “Huan mallam kumpipa ahong kik dia, ama sang a thupizaw mipi ahon tungkhe ding a; kum bangzah hiam nung in sepaihhon thupi leh van tampi toh ahong kuan ding hi. Huan huai hunte ah simlam kumpipa dou in mi tampi adingkhe ding uh; na mite lak a hiamgam tate leng mengmuhna hihkip ding in ahong kidomkang ding ua; himahleh apuk ding uhi. Huchibang in mallam kumpipa ahong kisa dia, panmun abawl dia, khopi kulh neite ala ding; simlam sepaihte leh amitelte'n leng anang kei ding ua, nanna ding in hatna leng a-om kei ding hi. Himahleh amah dou dia hong paipa'n ama deihlam bang in ahih ding a, ama ah kuamah adingh kei ding; gam thupi ah adingh dia, akhut ah siatna a-om ding hi. Agam pumpi thahatna toh hong pai atum tinten ding a, simlam kumpigam toh kizopna bawl ding in atanu akiang ah ape ding hi; himahleh athil sawm alohsam ding a, aphattuampih sam kei ding. “Hiai khit in tuikulh lam anga dia, gam tampite azou ding hi; himahleh gamdangmi sepaih heutu khat in amah azou dia, ami simmohna atawpsak ding; ahi, ami simmohna amah tung ah akibungsak ding hi. Huai hun chiang in ama gam kulhpi lam ah akik nawn dia; himahleh kisuipai in apuk dia, muh in a-om nawnta kei ding hi.

Huai hun chiang in ama mun ah mi khat ahong dingkhe dia, ama'n agamsung puahna ding in leiman khonpa gam thupi tan apalsuaksak dia; himahleh ni tam lou zoh in hehna leh kidouna hilou in hihsiat in a-om ding hi.Siria Kumpipa Hoih Lou “Huan amun ah mizahpihhuai khat ahong dingkhe ding a, huai lalgam in zahtakna apiaklouhna pa uh; himahleh mite bit akisak lai un ahong pai dia, maitang phatna in gam ala ding hi. Huan sepaihhonte ama ah taihmang in a-om ding uh, thukhun heutupa tanpha tel in. Huchi in amah toh pankhawmna kibawl nung in lepchiahtak in thil ahih ding a; ahong kuantou dia, nam neuchik toh hong hat ding ahi. Gam khen a hausa mahmah namte abit lai pen un dou ding in akuantou dia, apipute'n ahihzoh louh uh ahon hihzou ding a, apipute'n leng ahih ngei louh uh alak uah samat leh gallakte leh vante ahawmzak dia, ahi, kulh nei khopite dou ding in aguksawm ding hi, himahleh hun khat kia adaih ding hi. “Huan sepaih thupi toh simlam kumpipa dou ding in athilhihtheihna leh ahatna atokthou ding a; huchi in simlam kumpipa'n sepaih athupi a thupi leh hat in kidouna ah adouthuk ding hi. Himahleh ama siatna ding a aguk a thusawm ahih ziak in adingh zou kei ding hi. Ahi, a-an nete'n amah ahihmang ding ua, asepaihte phiatmang in a-om ding uhi; huchi in tampi thah in apuk ding uhi.
