Kumpipa nihte ahih uleh gilou lungtang pu kawm in dohkan khat ah atukhawm ding ua, zuau in akikhemtuah ding uh. Himahleh hun tawp atung ding a sehsa ahih ziak in alohching kei ding uhi. Huai hun chiang in simlam kumpipa tuh gallak thupi toh agam lam ah akik nawn dia; huchi in alungtang in thukhun siangthou adou ding

a-utut ahih ding a ama gam ngei ah akik nawn ding hi. “Hun sehsa ah akik nawn dia, simlam ah ahong pai dia; himahleh hun masa hiam hun nanung bang ahi kei ding hi. Amah dou dia Kittim longte hong pai ding ahih ziak in; huaiziak in adah ding a, akik nawn dia; thukhun siangthou dou in ahehna asungbo ding a a-utut ahih ding a; ahong kik nawn ngeingei dia, thukhun siangthou nungngatsante deihsakna alak ding hi. Amah lam ah sepaihte apang ding ua, mun siangthou kulhpi mahmah abuahsak ding ua; halmang thillat gige ahihbei ding ua ahihgawp ding in kihhuai atungkhe ding uhi. Huan thukhun nungngatsante maitang phatna in giloutak in, ama'n ahekkawi dia; himahleh mi a Pathian uh theite bel ahat ding ua, thilhih minthangpente ahih ding uhi. Huchi in mite lak a theihsiamna neite, ni tampi sung, namsau leh meikuang, saltanna leh siatna ah puk mah le uh, mi tampi athuhilh ding uhi. Huan apuk chiang un, panpihna tawmchik angah ding ua, himahleh maitang phatnate toh mi tampi in amau apawlbawl ding uhi. Alak ua theihsiamna neite lak a mi khenkhatte, amaute bawlhoih ding leh siangthousak ding leh amaute ngousak ding in, apuk ding uhi. Hun tawp tanpha; hun sehsa a ding ahih lai ziak in. “Huan kumpipa'n adeihlam bang in ahih dia; akiliansak ding a, pathian chiteng tung ah akikoih lian dia, pathiante' Pathian dem in thillamdangte agen ding hi; thangpaihna apichin matan alohching ding; atup tintensa ahih ding hi. Apipute pathiante leh numeite lunggulh leng azahtak kei dia, pathian leng azahtak kei ding; mi tengteng tung ah akiliansak ding hi. Himahleh ama'n kulhpite pathian apahtawi dia; api-le-pute theih ngei louh dangka-eng leh dangka leh suangmantamte leh thilthawnpiak manphate in amah abe ding hi. Huan gamdang pathiante panpihna in kulh muanhuaipen pente asual ding a

kuapeuh amah hihna pomte kiang ah zahna lianzaw ape ding a, tampi tung a vaihawm ding in abawl dia, man nei in gam ahawm ding hi. “Huan hun tawp chiang in simlam kumpipa'n amah akidoupih ding; mallam kumpipa amah dou ding in pingpei bang in, kangtalaite toh, sakol tungtuang mite toh, long tampi toh ahong kuan ding; huchi in gamte ah alut dia, adimlet dia apaisuak ding hi. Ama'n gam siangthoupen leng asim ding a, huchi in gam tampi zoh in a-om ding hi; himahleh Edom leh Moab leh Ammon tate hausapate akhut a kipan suahtaksak in a-om ding hi. Gam tampite tung ah akhut azan ding a; Aigupta gam asuakta kei ding hi. Himahleh dangka-eng leh dangka goute tung leh Aigupta thil manphate tengteng tung ah thilhihtheihna anei dia; huan Libia mite leh Ethiopia mite akalsuanna ah a-om ding uhi. “Himahleh suahlam a kipan leh mallam a kipan a thuthang in amah ahihlau dia; thangpaihna thupi a mi tampi hihse ding leh hihmang ding in akuankhe ding hi. Huan tuipi leh tang siangthou thupi kikal ah a-inpi puaninte akai ding a, himahleh amah abeina hong tung dia, kuamah in amah apanpih kei ding uh.”

Huai hun chiang in Mikael, heutu thupi na mite tapate vengbittu ahong dingkhe ding hi. Leitung pianchil a kipan tu hun tanpha a om ngei nai lou, mangbat hun ahong tung ding hi, huai hun chiang in laibu sung a gelh a om a, muhkhiak a om na mite hutkhiak in a-om ding uh. Huan alak ua mi tampi leitung a leivui a ihmute akhanglou ding ua, akhen tangtawn hinna tang ding in, akhen zumna leh tangtawn simmohna tang ding in. Apilte vansin vakna bang in avak ding ua; mi tampi diktatna lam a heite tangtawn tangtawn in aksite bang in atang ding uhi. Himahleh nang, Aw Daniel, hun tawp tan a ding in thute khakkhum bikbek inla, laibu bilh in; mi tampi avialtai ding ua, theihna apung ding. Huai lai in kei, Daniel in ka en a, ngai in, midang nih, lui gei hiai lam pang ah khat, lui gei lang lam pang ah khat adingh uhi. Huan khat in puanmalngat asilh a, luituite tung a ompa kiang ah, “Hiai thillamdangte tawpna ding bangchi a sawt hi ding ahia?” achi hi. “Puanmalngat silh a, luituite tung a ompa'n van lam a akhut taklam leh akhut veilam liktou in, amah tangtawn a hingpa min a kichiam in hun khat, hunte leh hun kimkhat ahi ding achih ka zata hi; misiangthoute thilhihtheihna asuknen dimdem khit chiang un, hiai thil tengteng zoh ahi ding,” chi in. Huai ka za a, himahleh ka theisiam kei. Ke'n, “Aw ka Toupa, hiai thilte tawpna bang hi ding ahia?” ka chi hi. Ama'n, “Pai in, Daniel; thute khakkhum bikbek ahita ua, hun tawp matan a bilh bikbek ahita hi,” achi hi. Mi tampi akihihsiangthou ding ua, angou ding ua, akibawlhoih ding uh; himahleh giloute agilou sem ding ua; giloute lak a kuamah in atheisiam kei ding uh; himahleh apilte'n atheisiam ding uh. Huchi in halmang thillat gige lakmang a om a, hihgawptu kihhuai tunkhiak a hong om ding hun a kipan, ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmkua a-om ding hi. Hun Tawp Thugente Himahleh atawp matan nang zaw pai in; na khawl ding a, nang a dia piakna mun ah nite beina ah na goutan sang ding in na thoukhe ding hi.

Khaupe In Gam Ahihsiatna Putekte aw, hiai za un;hiai, nou hun lai leh na pute uh hun lai in a-om kha ngeita a hia? Huai pen na tate uh hilh unla,na tate un amau tate hilh uhenla,ata nawnte un suan dang hilhsawn zel uhen. Singnget khaupe in anek bangteng khaukhuphon in ane a,khaukhuphon in anek bang teng khaupehon in ane a;khaupehon in anek bang teng khaupenouhon in ane khinta hi. Nou zukhamte aw, halh unla kap un;uain dawn tengteng aw, a-uain khum ziak in kap vongvong un;na kam ua kipan lah uain lakmang ahita ngal a. Nam hat mahmah,sim seng louh in ka gam ahong douta uh,ahate humpinelkai liante ha ahi a,humpinelkai pite hapak anei hi. Ka grepgui ahihsia a, katheipi sing hawng akheuh a,akheuhsiang vek a, apaimang a;ahiangte akiatngou vek hi. Nungak in, sai-ip puan teng a,atuailai pasal asuun bang in kap vongvong un. Tangbuang latte,dawn ding latte Toupa' inn a kipan hihman ahi a;siampu Toupa nasemte alungkham uhi. Lou hihsiat ahi a,gam alungkham a;buh hihsiat ahi a,uain thak akang a,sathau aginata kei hi. Aw, nou lounei mite aw, suununla; aw, nou grepguikem mite aw, huit buh leh barli buh ziak in dah in mau tuaituai un;lou a buhlak ding amangthang vekta hi. Grepgui avuai a, theipi kungavuai a; theibuhfai zung,tum leh epul theikung,lou a sing tengteng leng avulta hi;mihing tate lak a kipahna lah avuaimangta ngal a.Kisik Ding A Sapna Nou siampute aw, sai-ip puanteng unla kap un; nou maitam nasem mite aw, chiau vengvung un; nou ka Pathian nasem miteaw, hong pai unla, sai-ip puansilh in zankhua in hong lum un;na Pathian inn ua pan tangbuang lat leh dawn ding lat lah kham ahita ngal a.

An ngawl hun tang siangthou in,khawmpi taksuak bawl unla, Toupa na Pathian inn ah putekte leh hiai gam a teng mi tengteng pikhawm unla, Toupa sam un. Huai ni atung agik hi; Toupani lah anai ngal a,Bangkim hihtheipa a kipan manthatna ahong tung ding hi. Ka mitmuh in nek ding hihman ahi kei a hia, ahi,i nopna leh i kipahna i Pathian inn a kipan hihman ahi kei a hia? Leikhal nuai ah haichitang amuat a;pangte lah akigawp a,buh innte phel in a-om a, abuhte avuaita uhi. Gante nak thum hi na tel uh e!Bawnghonte abuaizak ua,loupa hing mun aneih louh ziak un; ahi,belamhonte asegawp uhi. Aw, Toupa ka hon sam hi,mei in gamdai gam loupa mun akangsiangta a,meikuang in gam a sing tengteng akangsiangta hi. Ahi, gamsate nang hon ngaiin anak huhu ua;luitate akangtat a, mei in gamdai gam loupa mun akangsiangta hi.

Zion ah pengkul mut unla, katang siangthou ah kigalginnapuang un; hiai gamsung a mi tengteng ling uhen; Toupa ni hong tung ding, anaita hi. Khaukhup A Gawtna Mulkimhuai Amaban uh mei in akangsiang a;anunglam uh meikuang in ahul a;ama ua gam lah Eden huan bang ahi, anunglam ua gamdai gamkeu ahi a; ahi,bangmah in huai apel kei uh. Alatdan uh sakol latdan bang ahi; sakol tungtuangmi bang in atai uhi. Kidouna kangtalai ging bang in tang tung ah akilek suausuau ua,buhpawl kang kuang luahluah leh kidouna a mipi hattak mansa abang uhi. Amaute mu mipite alau ua; amelte uh ahong mual khin uhi. Mihattak bang in atai ua;kidoumi bang in baang ah akah ua, amau zawn chiat ah apai ua,akivolhdan uh ahihbuai kei uhi. Akiphu kha tuan kei ua;amau lampi ah apai chiat ua;galvante anawk paisuak ua,apialzak kei uh. Khopi tung ah atawm ua;kulh tung ah atai ua;insungte ah akaltou ua;guta bang in tohlette ah alut uhi. Ama uah lei aling a;vante aling hi;ni leh kha amial a,aksite'n avak uh asel uhi; Huan Toupa'nasepaihhonte ma ah a-aw asuah a;agiahbukte lah athupi ngal a;athu tangtungsakpa ahat a, Toupa ni athupi in amulkimhuai ngal a,kua'n athuak thei mahmah dia?Kisik A An Ngawl Ding A Chialna Toupa'n, huchipi in leng tu in na lungtang tengteng ua an ngawl a, kap a, lungkham in kei lam hong nga le uchin. Na puante uh hilou in na lungtang uh botkek unla, Toupa na Pathian lam nga un;amah hehpih theitak leh lainatna a dim, lungnel leh zahngaihna hau,thil hoih lou a kipan kik nawn sek ahi, achi hi. Toupa na Pathian un lungsimkihei in tangbuang leh dawn ding thillat ah vualzawlna nutsiat in a-om kei ding chih kua'n athei a? Zion ah pengkul mut unla,an ngawl hun tang siangthou un,khawmpi taksuaktak bawl un.

Mipi kaikhawm unla,omkhawmte hihsiangthou unla, putekte, naupangte,nawitui ne laite kaikhawm unla;mouneite adantan a kipan in hong pawt uhenla,mou leng adantan sunggil a kipan in hong pawt hen. Siampu, Toupa nasem miteinlim leh maitam kikal ah kap uhenla; Toupa aw, “Na mite hawi inla,na goutante gensiat a om namte'n atung ua vai ahawmsak ding un pe ke'n;‘A Pathian uh koi a om ahia,’chi in amipite lak ah bangziak a chi ding ahi ua?” chi uhen.Toupa'n Gam Avualzawl Toupa'n agam thikthuse khop inadeihthoh a,amite ahehpih hi. Toupa'n amite kiang ah,Ngai unla, na kiang uah buhte,uainte, sathaute ka hon tungsak ding a,huaite in na tai ding ua;namte lak ah gensiat in ka hon omsak nawn kei ding. Himahleh na kiang ua kipan inmallam sepaihhon ka suanmang ding a,gamkeu leh sia ah ka paisak ding, amasa pawl suahlamtuipi ah, ananung pawl tumlam tuipi ah; ahong uihkhe ding a,namsetak in ahong nam ding,thil thupitak ahih ziak in,chi in adawng hi. Aw gam, lau ke'n, nuam in kipak in; Toupa'n thil thupite ahihta hi. Gante aw, lau kei un, gamdai loupa mun ahong sel a,sing ahong gah a,theipi kung leh grepgui ahong selpha ding hi. Nou, Zion tate aw, kipak un, Toupa na Pathian uah nuamun; noute a ding in vuah azusak a,akha khatna a vuah masa leh vuah nanung ahun lel ahon pe ding hi. Pialkhangte buh in adim ding a,uain leh sathau belteadimlet ding uhi. Na lak ua ka sepaihhon tampika sawl, khaukhupte,singnget khaute, khauhonte,leh khaupete'n anek khit kumte nou ka hon din nawn ding hi. Tampi na ne ding ua, na tai ding ua, nou lamdangtak a hon ngaihtuah sekpa Toupa na Pathian min na phat ding uh;ka mite azahlak ngei kei uhi.

Huan Israelte lak ah ka omchih leh Toupa na Pathian uh ka hi,kuamah dang a-om kei uh chih na thei ding uh;ka mite azahlak ngei nawn kei ding uhi. Toupa Kha Sunbuak Chiamna Huai nung chiang in hichi ahong hi ding a,mi tengteng tung ah ka kha ka sung ding;huchi in na tapate, na tanute un ka thu agen ding ua,na putekte un mang ding ua, na tangvalte un kilaknate amu ding uh; Huai ni chiang in sikhapate,sikhanute tung ah leng ka kha ka sungbo ding hi. Vante leh leitung ah thillamdangte,sisan, mei leh meikhu ding ka musak ding hi. Nisa mial asuak ding a, kha sisan asuak ding hi, Toupa ni thupitak leh mulkimhuai ahong tun ma in. Huan hichi ahong hi ding a, kuapeuh Toupa min lou peuhmah humbit in a-om ding; Toupa'n agen bang in,Zion tang ah leh Jerusalemkhua ah akhosuaksunte a-om ding uhi.

Ngai dih ua, huai nite leh huai hun a,Judah leh Jerusalem saltangteka kaihkhop hun chiang in, nam chih ka kaikhawm ding a, amaute Jehoshaphat Phaizang ah ka pisuk ding hi.Huai ah, nam chih lak a athehdalh uh,ka mi, ka goutan Israelte tung a agamtatna uh leh,ka gam akihawmna ziak un, atung uah amaute toh thukhenna ka bawlpih ding; ka mite a ding in ai asan ua,kizuakna man ding in pasal naupang apia ua,uain adawntheihna ding un, ding in numei naupang azuak uhi. “Ahi, aw Tura leh Sidon leh Philistia gam tengteng aw, kei a ding in bang na hi ua le? Na thuk ding ua hia? N'on thuk uleh, hattak in, kintak in na thukna uh na lutung mahmah uah ka hon thuk sam ding hi. Namte Tung A Pathian Thukhenna Ka dangkasik leh adangka-eng na la ua, ka thil hoihtak deihhuaite na tempul sung uah na tawilut uhi; Judah tate leh Jerusalem tate leng agamgi ua kipan gamlapi a na suanmang theihna ding un, Grik tapate kiang ah na zuakta uhi. Ngai dih ua, na zuakna mun ua kipan in tokthou in ka pawtsak ding a, na thukna uh na lutung mahmah uah ka thuk sam ding hi. Judah tate khut ah na tapate uh leh na tanute uh ka zuak ding, amau gamlapi ah Sheba mite kiang ah azuak ding uhi,” Toupa'n achita hi. Namte lak ah hiai puang unla;kidou ding in kisa unla; mihat mahmahte tokthou un;kidoumi tengtengte hong nai uhenla, hong paitou uhen. Na leilehna mukzumte uhnamsau ding in sek unla, teipi ding in na theikung kuaika temtate uh sek un;mihat lou in leng ka hat chi hen. Akim a nam tengteng aw,kin unla, hong pai unla kikaikhawm un;Aw Toupa, huai ah na mihat mahmahte paisuksak in.

Namte kitokthou uhenlaJehoshaphat Phaizang ah hong paitou uhen;huai ah akim a nam tengteng tung a vaihawm ding in ka tu ding hi. Na kawite uh suah un,buhlak ahun hi;hong pai unla, childen un;grep sukna khuk adim a, bel adimlet a;akhelhna uh athupi hi. Mipi tampite,thukhenna phaizang a mipi tampite!Thupukna Phaizang ah, Toupa ni anaita hi! Ni leh kha hihmial in om ding ua,aksite'n avakna uh asel ding uh.Pathian In Amite Avualzawl Ding Toupa Zion tang a kipan in ahumham ding a, Jerusalem a kipan in a-aw asuah ding;leitung leh vante aling ding ua;himahleh Toupa zaw amite a ding in kihumbitna leh Israel suante a ding in insang ahi ding hi. Huchi in Toupa na Pathian uh ka tang siangthou Zion a teng ka hi chih na thei ding uh;huchi in Jerusalem asiangthou ding a,mikhual kuamah apaisuak nawn kei ding. Huai ni chiang in hichi ahiding a, tang sangte'n uain khumakaisak ding ua, nawitui in mualte aluang ding a; Toupa' inn a kipan in tuikhuk ahong kikhohkhe ding a,Shittim lui phaizang anomsak ding hi. Judah tate tung ah engbawltak a agam ua sisan asuah ziak un,Aigupta asegawp ding a,Edom gam gamdai gamkeu asuak ding hi. Judah gam tangtawn in luah in a-om gige ding a,Jerusalem khua suan a kipan suan zel tan in luah in a-om ding. Huan asisan suahna uh ka sawpsiang louh ka sawpsiang ding a, Zion ah Toupa ateng gige hi.

Judah kumpipa Uzziah vaihawm lai leh Israel kumpipa Joas tapa Jeroboam vaihawm lai a zinling ma kum nih in, Tekoa mun ganhon veng mite lak a mi Amos thu Israel tungtang amuh: Huan ama'n,“Zion tang a kipan Toupa ahumham ding a,Jerusalem a kipan in a-aw asuah ding;belam veng mite gantatna munte alungkham ding ua,Karmel tang vum avuai ding,” achi hi.Namte Tung A Pathian ThukhennaSiria tung a thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Damaskas kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Gilead gam buhgawina sikte a agawi ziak un. Himahleh Hazael inn ah mei ka sawl ding a, Ben-hadad kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi. Huan Damaskas kho kongkhak sik ka hihtan ding a, Aven Phaizang a kipan luah mite leh Eden inn a kipan kumpipa chiang tawipa ka mangsak ding a; Siria gam mite Kir gam ah sal in a-om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.Philistia tung a thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Gaza kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka hihtawp kei ding; Edom kiang a piak ding in mi tengteng sal a api ziak un. Himahleh Gaza kulh tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding hi. Huan Ashdod a kipan luahmi leh Ashkelon a kipan kumpipa chiang tawimi ka hihmang ding a; huan, Ekron kho tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a, Philistia mi khosuaksunte amang ding uh,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi.Tura tung a thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Tura kho tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Edom kiang a mi tengteng apiak ua, unau tung a athukhun atheihgige louh ziak un.

Himahleh Tura khokulh tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” achi hi.Edom tung a thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Edom tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, gawtna ka daisak kei ding; a-unau namsau in adelh a, ahehpihna tengteng apaimang a, ahehna in abotkek gige a, tangtawn a ahehna avom nilouh ziak in. Himahleh Teman tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Bozrah kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” achi hi.Ammon tung a thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ammon tate tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; agam uh azatsak theihna ding un, Gilead kho numei naupaite akuihkek ziak un. Himahleh Rabbah khokulh tung ah mei ka mutkuang ding a, huan, kidouna ni a kikou toh, pingpei ni a huihpi toh, akumpipa' inn te akang khin ding. Akumpipa uh sal in ding ua, amiliante toh kiton in,” Toupa'n achi.

Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Moab tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Edom kumpipa guhte sunu bang zen a ahal ziak in. Moab tung a thukhenna Huai lak a kipan vaihawmmi ka hihmang ding a, amiliante tengteng, amah toh ka that ding,” Toupa'n achi.Judah tung a thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Judah tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; Toupa dan adeih kei ua, athupiakte azui kei uh, apate uh chih sek azuaugente un amaute apimang ziak in. Himahleh Judah tung ah mei ka sawl ding a, Jerusalem kumpipa' inn te akang khin ding,” chi in.Israel tung thukhenna Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Israel tatlekna thumte ziak in, ahi lite ziak in, agawtna ka daisak kei ding; dangkasik a midiktat azuak uleh khedap but khat a mitasam azuak ziak un. Gentheite leivui bang a sikden ut tuntun a, mizawngte vaihawmna akaikawi uhi; huan, mi khat leh apa nungak khat kiang ah ka min hihnin ding in ahoh zel uhi. Maitam tengteng kiangchin a khamna puanphah tung ah alum zel ua, a Pathian uh inn a mi aliausakna mante un uain adawn zel uh,” chi in. “Himahleh amau ma a Amorte, Sidar bang a sang leh tosaw bang a khauh hihmang a; tunglam a kipan agah leh nuailam a kipan azung leng hihmangpa ka hi. Huan Amorte gam nei ding in Aigupta gam a kipan in ka hon pikhia a, gamdai ah kum sawmli sung ka hon pi hi. Huan zawlnei hi ding in na tapate uh lak a mi leh Nazaritte hi ding in na tangvalte uh lak a mi ka bawl a, Aw Israel suante aw, huchibang in ahi kei a hia? Toupa'n achi.

Himahleh Nazarit mite kiang ah uain dawn ding na pia ua, zawlneite kiang ah, thu gen kei un, chi in thu na pia uhi. Ngai dih ua, kangtalai a buhphal sawnsip bang in, na mun uah ka hon sawn ding hi. Huan mitaihatte hatna amang ding a, mihat in tha asuah thei sam kei ding hi; mihat mahmah leng akihumbit thei kei ding hi. Thalpeu zangmi leng adingh thei sam kei ding; paihat thei mi leng akihumbit thei kei ding, sakol tungtuangmi leng akihumbit thei kei ding hi. Huai ni chiang in mi thilhihthei mahmah lak a mihangsan leng vuaktang in ataimang ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.

Aw, Israel suante aw, Aigupta gam a kipan a ka hon pikhiak inkote aw, Toupa'n hichibang a nou ahon demna thu ngaikhia un, “Noute kia leitung a inkuan tengteng a ka theih na hi ua; huaiziak in na thulimlouhna tengteng uah ka hon gawt ding,” achi hi.Zawlnei Nasep Israelte Thuhilhna Humpinelkai in gammang a sa amat lai louh ngal in, ahumham ngei a hia? Humpinelkai lun lai in bangmah amat keileh akohawm sung a kipan ahumham ngei a hia? Amah a dia tah a-om keileh, leitung a thang ah vasa a-awk thei a hia? Thang pen bangmah awk lou in lei a kipan in akisai dia hia? Khopi ah mi launa lou ah pengkul amut ding ua hia? Toupa hih louh in khopi ah hoihlouhna ahong om dia hia? Diktak in Toupa Pathian in anasemmi, azawlneite kiang ah athuguk hilh lou in bangmah ahih kei ding hi. Humpinelkai ahumham a, kua ahia lau lou ding? Toupa Pathian in thu agen a, kua'n ahia gen lou thei ding?Samaria Tunggikna Ashdod kumpipa' inn te leh Aigupta gam kumpipa' inn te ah gen unla, “Samaria tang tungte ah kikhawm unla, huai a buaina liantak omte leh huai lak a simmohna omte en un,” chi in. “Akumpipa uh innte a hiamgamna leh kisuamna koihkhawm mite'n lah hihdik dan asiam ngal kei ua,” Toupa'n achi. Huaiziak in Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: Gam kimvel in melma a-om lai ding a; na kiang a kipan na hatna alakhe ding a, na kumpipa' inn te ahihse ding uhi. Toupa'n hichi in achi, “Belampu in humpinelkai kam a kipan akhe nih hiam, bil them hiam, ahonkhia bang in, huchibang in Samaria a teng Israelte lupna ning leh lupna maimom puanphan lukham them toh hutkhiak in a-om ding uhi. Ngai unla, Jakob inkote tung ah theisak un,” “Israel tatleknate amah tung ah ka gawtleh, huai ni chiang in, Bethel a maitamte leng ka gawt ngal dia; maitam kiite tankhiak in a-om ding ua, lei ah ake ding uh,” sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa Pathian in achi hi. “Huan phalbi leh nipi inn ka satse ding a; saiha innte amangthang ding a, inn thupite'n tawpna anei ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.

Nou Bashan bawngpite, Samaria tang tung a om a, gentheite simmoh a, tasamte nuaisiah a, atoupate uh kiang a, “Hon la unla i dawn ding uh,” chite aw, hiai thu za un; Toupa Pathian in ama sianthouna in akichiam a, “Ngai dih ua, sikkuaika a nou ahon lakmang a, na lak ua omsun ngakuai a ahon lakmang ni ahong tung ding hi. Huan awngvang ah na paisuak ding ua, michih tangtak in apai ding uh; Harmon ah paih in na om ding uh,” Toupa'n achi.Israelte'n Biakna Limsak Lou “Bethel ah hong unla, talek un; Gilgal ah hong unla, tatlekna pungsak un; huan, na kithoihnate uh zingsang teng in hon la unla, ni khat hal zel in na sawm ua khatte uh hon la un. Israelte Tung A Vauhilhna Huan silngou pang kipahthu gen kithoihna lan unla, amau deihdan a lante hilh unla, puang un; Aw Israel suante aw, hiai lah na deih ngal ua,” Toupa Pathian in achi hi. “Huan ke'n leng na khopi tengteng uah hasianna leh na mun tengteng uah taksapna ka hon pia a; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. “Buh lak hun ding kha thum ahih lai in na tung ua vuah zu ding leng ka len a; khopi khat tung ah ka zusak in, khopi dang tung ah ka zusak kei hi; mun khat tung ah ka zusak sek a, azuklouhna mun akeu hi. Huchi in khopi nih leh thum ah tui dawn ding zong in khopi dang ah ataikhawm ua, adeihkhop kei uh; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. “Keuna leh apna in ka hon gawt a; na huante uh, na grephuante uh, na theipi kungte uh, na olive singkungte uh singnget lung in ane khin vekta hi

huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. “Aigupta gam bang in na lak uah huihpi ka sawl a; namsau in na tangvalte uh ka that a, na sakolte uh ka pimang a; na giahphualte uh gim namsia na nak ua nam khop in ka hon omsak a; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. “Pathian in Sodom leh Gomorrah khua achipsak lai bang in, na lak uah mi khenkhat ka hihchim a, singkang lakkhiak bang na hi ua; huchi in leng ka kiang ah na hong kik kei uh,” Toupa'n achi. Huaiziak in “Aw Israel, na tung ah hichibang in ka hih ding; na tung a hiai ka hih ding ziak in, Aw Israel, na Pathian tuak ding in mansa in om in!” “Ngai in, tangte dingkhesak a,huih bawl a, mihing kiang a angaihtuahna bang ahia chih genkhesak a,zingsang mialsak, lei mun sangte chilpa amin Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian ahi!”

Aw Israel inkote aw, hiai thu noute suunna ding ka gen za un. Nungak, Israel, apukta hi;adingh nawn kei ding;agam tung ah paihkhiak ahita;amah tungding ding kuamah a-om kei. Toupa Pathian in hichi in achi: “Israel chite kiang ah, khopi sangkhat pawtna in zakhat anuse ding a, khopi zakhat pawtna in sawmkhat anuse ding hi.” Toupa'n Israel inkote kiang ah hichi in achi: “Hon zong un, na hing ding uh; himahleh Bethel khua zong kei unla, Gilgal ah lut sam kei un, Beer-sheba ah galkah kei unla; pel lou in Gilgal khua sal in ding a, Bethel khua ahong vuaksuak ding hi.” Kisik Ding A Chialna Toupa zong unla, na hing ding uh; huchi lou in zaw Joseph inn ah mei bang in apawt ding a, akang khin ding a, Bethel ah mitsak ding kuamah a-om kei ding uhi. Vaihawmna singkha suaksak a, diktatna lei a paikhete aw; siguk leh zuheisuktun bawlpa leh sihna limliap lak a tangsakpa leh sun zanmial a bawlpa,tuipi tuite sam a,leitung a luangsakpa, amah tak zong le uchin;amin Toupa ahi; kulh tung a manthatnahong tung guih zou hial a,mihatte tung a manthatna tungsakpa pen.Pathian Deih Louh Khohei Gamtat Kongpi ah taihilhmi amudah ua, thudiktak genmi akih uhi. Huaiziak in migentheite tuanden in buh na laksak ua; suangsek in innte na lam ua, himahleh asung ah na teng kei ding uh. Grephuan nuamte na bawl ua, himahleh uain na dawn kei ding uhi. Na tatleknate uh tamdan leh na khelhnate uh athupidan lah ka thei ngal a; midiktatte na simmoh ua, golhna la a, kongpi a tasamte ahih ding him ua pampaihte aw. Huchi in hun hoih lou ahih ziak in mipil zaw huai hun chiang in adai dide ding hi. Na hintheihna ding un hoihlouhna zong lou in, hoihna zong unla

huan na gen bang un, Toupa sepaihte' Pathian na kiang uah a-om ding hi. Khelhna hua unla, hoihna it un; kongpi ah vaihawmna kiptak in tungding un; Joseph inkuan akhosuaksunte tung ah Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian in hehpihna anei kha mai ding hi. Huaiziak in Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Kongzing teng ah nakpi a kahna a-om ding a, lamliante tengteng ah, khawk hi na mah e; achi ding uh; lungkham ding in lounei mite leh nakpi a kap ding in sisuun siamte asam ding uhi. Grephuan teng ah nakpi a kahna a-om ding a; na lak uah ka paisuak ding,” Toupa'n achi. Toupa ni deihte aw, na tung uh agik hi! Bangziak a Toupa ni deih na hia ua? Vak hilou in mial ahi zaw hi. Humpinelkai taisan a, vompi tuak mi bang leh inn a lut a, baang tung a khut nga a gul in atuk bang ahi. Toupa ni vak hilou in mial ahi sin kei a hia? Mial sah leh vakna nei lou in? “Na ankuangluite uh ka hua in ka musit a, na kikhawmpi pisuakte uah leng ka kipak sam kei hi. Ahi, na thillat uleh na buh lat uh hon lan mah le uchin, ka sang kei ding, na gan thau uh lemna thillatte leng ka limsak sam kei ding hi. Na kaihging ging kilawm uh ka ngaikhe kei ding; huaiziak in kei a kipan bil aphuai na late uh lamang un. Himahleh vaihawmna bel tuite bang in leh diktatna lui lian bang in luang hen,” Toupa'n achi. “Aw Israel inkote aw, kum sawmli sung in gamdai ah kithoihnate leh thillatte ka kiang ah na hon lan ngei ua hia? Ahi, na milim uh Molok leh na milimte uh Kaiuan, na aksi pathian uh, noute ding in na tawisang zaw uhi. Toupa amin sepaihte' Pathian in, noute Damaskas kho khen ah sal in ka hon paisak ding,” Toupa'n achi.

Kalneh ah hoh unla, en un; huai a kipan in Hamath kho thupi ah hoh un; Philistia gam Gath ah paisuk unla; hiai gamte sang in noute na hoihzaw uhia? Nou gam sang in agam uh azazaw a hia? Nou ni hoih lou gamlapi a koih leh hiamgam tunna naihsakte aw, saiha lupna a lum a, atutphah sau tungte ua kizia a, belamhon lak a belamnoute leh bawnghonte lak a kipan bawngtuaite ne a; David bang a kaihging tumtum a, lasak ding na bawlbawl uh; belhbu lian a uain dawn a, sathau hoihpen a kinuhte mah; himahleh Joseph haksatna ziak in alungkham kei uhi. Israel Hihsiatna “Zion tang a nuam lua a omte leh Samaria tang a bittak a omte leh Israel nam lian lak a inkuan mithupite tung agik hi! Huchi in tua sal dia pai masate toh sal in apai ding ua, nuam sa a kiziate nopsakna lakmang in a-om ding hi.” Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian, Toupa Pathian in amah-le-amah kilou in akichiam a, “Jakob kisaktheihna ka kih a, akumpipa' inn te ka mudah a; huaiziak in khua leh asung a om tengteng ka mansak sin ahi.” Hichi ahong hi ding a, inn khat a mi sawm a-omleh asi vek ding uhi. Huan vui ding a thaunilh, misite tanau, amaute halpa ngei in insung a kipan a aguh lakhe ding in, insung tawng pen a mi om kiang ah, “Na kiang ah kuahiam midang a-om lai uhia?” achih a, ama'n, “Om lou,” achihleh; ama'n, “Dai sipsip in! Toupa min i lou ding uh ahi ngal kei a,” achi ding hi. Ngai dih ua, Toupa'n thu apeta hi; inn lian achim lemlum ding a, inn neu leng akhangkham ik-iak ding hi. Sakolte suangpi tung ah atai ding ua hia? Huai ah mi'n bawng in lei alet ding ua hia? Noute'n vaihawmna lah gu na suaksak ua diktatna gah singkha na suaksak uh. Nou thil bangmah lou tung a kipak a, i hatna in ahi kei maw kiite i lak ua? chite aw. “En dih ua, Aw Israel inkote aw, nou hon dou ding in nam ka dingkhesak ding a; huan Hamath khomual a kipan in Arabah lui tan in nou ahon engbawl ding uh,” Toupa, sepaihte' Pathian in achita hi.

Huchibang in Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; ngai dih ua, haichi poi nanungzaw pen adot pat tungna ah khaukhup abawl a; ngai dih ua, kumpipa tangseu khit a pou nanungzaw ahi. Huan huchi ahong hi a, huai gam a loupa anek khit nung un, “Aw Toupa Pathian, ngaidam in, ka hon ngen ahi; bangchi in Jakob adingh thei dia? Amah lah aneu ngal a,” ka chi hi. Hiai thu ah Toupa'n alung hei in, “Toupa'n, hiai hong tung nawn kei ding,” achi hi.Meikuang Muhna Huchibang in, Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; huan en dih ua, Toupa Pathian mei a dou ding in asam a; mei in tui thuk lian akang khin a, gam leng kat a-ut lai hi. Ke'n, “Aw Toupa Pathian, khawl in ka hon ngen ahi; bangchi in Jakob adingh thei dia? Amah lah aneu ngal a,” ka chi hi. Hiai thu ah Toupa'n alungsim hei in, “Toupa Pathian in, huai leng ahong tung nawn kei ding,” achi hi. Khaupehon Muhna Huan ka kiang ah Toupa'n, “Amos, bang na mu a?” achi a. Ke'n, “Ulum,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n, “Ngai in, ka mi, Israelte lak ah ulum ka koih ding a; amau ka paikheng nawnta kei ding; Isak mun sangte ahong segawp ding a, Israel mun siangthoute hihsiat ahi ding ua; Jeroboam inkote namsau in ka dou ding,” achi hi.Amos Leh Amaziah Huan Bethel kho siampu Amaziah in Israel kumpipa Jeroboam kiang ah, “Amos in Israel inkote lak ah nang hon kalh a; gam in athu tengteng athuak thei kei,” chi in. Amos in lah hichi in achi ngal a, “Jeroboam namsau in asi ding, pel lou in agam a kipan in Israel sal in apikhe ding,” chi in thu akhak hi.

Huan Amos kiang ah Amaziah in, “Aw nang zawlnei, kuan inla, Judah gam ah taimang in, huai ah an ne inla, thu hilh in. Himahleh Bethel ah thu hilh nawn ke'n; kumpipa mun siangthou leh kumpipa' inn ahih ziak in,” achi lai hi. Huan Amaziah kiang ah Amos in, “Zawlnei ka hi kei a, zawlnei tapa leng ka hi sam kei; ganhon vengpa leh theipi sing kempa ka hi zaw hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, ‘Kuan inla, ka mi Israelte kiang ah thu gen in, hon chi hi. Huchi in tu in Toupa thu za in; nang Israel kalh in thu gen ke'nla, Isak inkote kalh in thu khak ke'n, na chih. Huaiziak in Toupa'n hichi in achi, ‘Khopi ah na zi kizuaknu ahi ding a, na tapate, na tanute namsau in apuk ding ua, tehna khau in na gam ahawm ding ua; nang leng siang lou mun ah na si ding a; pel lou in Israel a gam a kipan sal in apimang ding uh, achi, ” chi in adawng hi.

Hichibang in Toupa Pathian in ahon ensak a; en dih ua, nipithei bawm na hi hi. Ama'n, “Amos, bang ahia na muh?” achi a. Ke'n, “Nipithei bawm,” ka chi hi. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Ka mi Israelte tung ah tawpna ahong tungta; amaute gawtna ding ah ka lungsim ka kheng nawn kei ding hi, chi in. Toupa Pathian in, huai ni chiang in tempul a lasakte dahna la ahi ding a; mun chih ah siluang tampi a-om ding a, dai dide in apaikhe ding uh,” achi hi.Israel Tunggikna Hiai ngaikhia in, aw tasamte ne bei nuam a; gam a migentheite hihmang nuamte aw, “Buh ka zuaktheihna ding un chikchiang a kha thak bei ding a, tangbuang buh ka zuaktheihna ding ua chikchiang a Sabbath ni bei ding ahia, chi in; Ephah hihneu a shekel hihlian, dikloupi a bukna khemna in na zang ua, huchi a dangkasik a migentheite lei a, tasamte khedap buh khat a i lei a, buhsi i zuaktheihna ding in,” chi in. Toupa, Jakob thupina sial in akichiam a, “Pel lou in anasep himhim ka mangngilh het kei ding,” chi in. Nipithei Bawm Muhna Toupa Pathian in, huai ni chiang in, hichi ahong hi ding a, sun lai in ni ka tumsak ding a, nisat lai in lei ka mialsak ding hi. Na ankuangluite uh lungkhamna leh na la tengteng uh kahna ka suaksak ding a; kawng tengteng sai-ip puan ka tengsak ding a, lu chih sip ah giauna ka hon tungsak ding; tapa tang neih suunna ding in lungkhamna leh atawpna khatna ni bang in ka bawl ding hi. “Toupa Pathian in, ngai dih ua, nite ahong tung lellel

huai ni chiang in gam ah kial ka sawl ding a, an kialna hilou, tui a kialna hi sam lou, Toupa thu theihna kialna pen,” achi hi. Huan tuipi a kipan tuipi ah leh mal a kipan suahlam ah leng avakvai ding ua; Toupa thu zong ding in ning chih ah atai ding ua, amu kei ding uh. Huai ni chiang in nungak siangthou leh tangvalte dangtak in abah ding uhi. “Samaria khelhna sial a kichiam a, ‘Aw Dan, na Pathian ahin bang in’ leh ‘Beer-sheba Lampi ahin bang in’ chi, huai mite leng apuk ding ua, athounawn het kei ding uh,” achi hi.

Maitam chin a Toupa dingh in ka mu a, ama'n, “Kongpi bulte alin theihna ding ua alu bawkte uh khen inla, avek ua lutung ah hihzan vek in; ke'n asibangte namsau in ka that ding a; khat lel leng ataimang kei ding uh, khat lel leng asuakta het kei ding uh,” achi hi. Misikhua pha in paisuak mah le uh, huai a kipan ka khut in ka lakhe ding a; van ah kaltou mah le uh huai a kipan ka kaikhe ding hi. Karmel mualvum ah bu mah le uh ka zong ding a, huai a kipan amau ka lasuk ding a, tuipi taw ah ka mitmuh louh in bu mah le uh, huai a kipan gulpi thu ka pe ding a, amau atu ding hi. Amelmate uh ma ah sal in pai mah le uh, huai a kipan namsau thu ka pe ding a, amau asatlum ding ua; hoihna hilou in, hoihlouhna ding in atung uah ka mit ka nga ding hi. Gam khoih a, zulsakpa Toupa,sepaihte' Pathian ahi ngal a;huai lai a omte tengteng alungkham ding ua;luipi bang in akhang ding ua,Aigupta lui bang in akiam nawn ding uh; van a adantante bawl a,leitung a adantan kual bawl a,tuipi tuite sam a, leitung a sungbopa,amin Toupa ahi. Toupa'n “Aw Israel suante aw, ka tung ah Ethiopia tate bang in na om kei ding ua hia? Aigupta gam a kipan Israel leh Kaphtor gam a kipan Philistia mite leh Kir gam a kipan Siria mite ka pikhe kei a hia?” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Ngai dih ua, Toupa Pathian mit gam gilou tung ah atu a, leitung a kipan ka hihmang ding a; himahleh Jakob inkote ahihse vek kei ding,” achi hi. “Ngai dih ua, thu ka pe ding ahi

hakvang a buh ahaih bang un, nam tengteng lak ah Israel inkote ka haih ding a; himahleh tang neupen leng leitung ah ake kei ding hi. ‘Ka mite mikhial tengteng, hoihlouhna in ahon delhpha kei ding a, hon pha sam kei ding, chite namsau in asi ding uh,” achi hi.Israel Tundingna Ding Toupa Thukhenna Toupa, hiai thilhihpa'n, “Huai ni chiang in David biakbuk chim ka tungding ding a, a-awngvangte ka hu ding a; asiate ka lemtou ding a, nidanglai a a-om bang in ka lam thak ding hi, chi in; Edom mun a khosuaksunte leh ka min a sap nam tengtengte aneihtheihna ding un,” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Ngai dih ua,nite ahong tung lellel ahi,huai ni chiang in leiletmi in buh atmi adelhpha ding a,grep chil mi'n chi thehmi adelhpha ding a; tang sang in uain khum ataksak ding;mual tengteng azul ding uhi. Huan ka mi Israelte sal a kipanka pikik nawn ding a;khua kigawpsate abawl nawn ding ua,aluah ding uh;huan grephuante abawl ding ua,a-uain adawn ding uh;huante leng abawl ding ua,agah ane ding uhi. Agam uah amau ka phutkip ding a, akiang ua ka piak agam ua kipan bohkhiak in a-om nawnta kei ding,” Toupa na Pathian in achi hi.

Obadiah Mengmuhna, Toupa'n Edom Agawt Ding Aw nang, suangpi kitam kal a teng, mun sang luah,kua'n ahia lei a hon kesak ding lungsim a chipa?Na lungtang kisaktheihna in nang ahon khemta hi. Muvanlai bang in sangpi ah lengtou mah lechin,na bu leng aksi lak ah seh in om mahleh,huai a kipan ka hon kaikhesuk ding,” Toupa'n achi. “Na kiang ah gutate, suamhatte zan in hong pai le uh,hihman nak hih na ni chia,adeihzah un agu kei ding ua hia?Na kiang ah grep lakhawm mite hong pai le uh,grep lak ding khenkhatte anuse kei ding ua hia? Esau thilte zonkhiak ahita a;agoubawm selgukte maikhiak ahita! Nang lawmte khem in na om a,gamgi pha in hon delhkhe ding ua;na kituahpihte'n nang ahon zouta ua;na tanghou nete'n na nuai ah thang akam ua;amah ah theihsiamna a-om kei hi. Huai ni chiang in Edom a kipan mipilte ka hihmang in,Esau tang a kipan theihsiamna ka hihmang kei dia hia?” Toupa'n achi hi. Aw Teman, Esau tang ah michih thahgam a a-om vekna ding ua,na mihatte nakpitak in alunglel ding uh.Edom Gawt A Om Ziak “Na unaupa Jakob tung a na hiamgamna ziak in zumnain nang ahon khuh ding,tangtawn in hihmanthat in na om ding hi. Langkhat a na din ni a,mikhualte'n asum alakmang ni ua,namdang mite akulh kongkhak a ahong lut ua,Jerusalem tung a ai asan lai un,nang leng amau lak atel bang in na om hi. Himahleh na unaupa asiat lai in awibawl ke'nla,Judah tate amanthat ni un kipak ke'n;ahaksat ni in kisatheitak in pau ke'n. Ka mite avangsiat ni un akulh kongpi uah lut ke'nla;avangsiat ni un athuakna uh en ke'n,avangsiat ni un asum-le-paite uh tung ah na khutte uh nga sam kei un.

Ami khenkhat taikhete that ding in lamka thuam a dingh in, haksat ni in ami omsunte mansak ke'n.Namte Tung A Thukhenna Nam tengteng tung ah Toupa ni lah anai ngal a;na hihsiat mah bang in na tung ah hih ahi ding;na hihdan nangmah luzang ah hong kik ding hi. Ka tang siangthou a na dawn bang un, nam tengteng inadawn gige ding uh, ahi,adawn ding ua, avalh ding ua,piang lou bang in a-om ding uh.Israelte Vualzohna Zion tang ah bel suaktate a-om ding ua,asiangthou ding uh;Jakob inkote'n agoutante uh atang ding uhi. Jakob inkote mei ahi ding ua,Joseph inkote meikuang ahi ding,Esau inkote buhpawl ahi ding ua, amau lak ah akuang ding ua, akangmang ding uh;Esau inkote khosuak a-om kei ding uh; Toupa'n lah achita ngal hi. Simlam mite'n Esau mual atang ding a; phaizang mite'nPhilistia atang ding uh;amaute'n Ephraim leh Samaria lou atang ding uh;Benjamin inGilead gam atang ding hi. Kanaan mite lak a hiaiIsrael suan saltang mipite'nZarephath gam tan atang ding ua; Sepharad gam aJerusalem khomite saltang insimlam khopite atang ding uhi. Zion tang a pan Esau dou ding in akuantou ding ua,atung ah vai ahawm ding uhi;huan gam Toupa a ahi ding hi.”

Nineveh A Jonah Sawlna Himahleh Jonah bel Toupa ma a kipan Tarshish ah taimang ding in athou a; Joppa ah ahohsuk hi. Tarshish zuan ding long amu a; huchi in atuanman pia in, Toupa ma a kipan Tarshish zuan dingte toh ton ding in long ah alutsuk hi. Himahleh Toupa'n huih hat mahmah tuipi ah anungsak a, tuipi ah huihpi hat mahmah anung hi, huchi in long tamzak ding bang in a-omta hi. Long mite'n lau in, amau pathian chiat asam ua; long zanna ding in long sung a vante tuipi ah apaikhia uhi. Jonah bel long sunggilpen ah na lutsuk pah a, huai ah lum in, ana ihmu hithit hi. Huchi in longheutu akiang ah ahong pai a, “Aw nang ihmu, bangchidan ahia? Thou inla, na Pathian sam in, Pathian in, i manlouhna ding in ahon ngaihtuah khamoh ding hiam,” achi hi. “Khai, hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua hong om kua ziak ahia chih i theihna ding in, ai i san ding uh,” chi in akihou uhi. Huchi in ai asan ua, aisan Jonah tung ah atuta hi. Huchi in akiang ah, “Hiai thil hoih lou i tung ua om kua ziak ahia, hon hilh in, ka hon ngen uh; na nasep bang ahia? Koi a kipan a hong na hia? Koi gammi na hia? Bang mi na hia?” achi uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Hebru mi ka hi; tuipi leh gam bawlpa Toupa, van Pathian ka lau ahi,” achi hi.

Huchi in mite'n akihta mahmah ua, akiang ah, “Bangziak a hiai bang hih na hia?” achi ua ahilhkhitsa ahih ziak in mite'n Toupa ma a kipan taimang ahi chih lah athei ngal ua.Long A Pan Jonah Paihkhiakna Huchi in akiang ah, “Kou a dia tuipi kihot adaihna ding in na tung ah bang ka hih ding ua?” achi ua; tuipi lah akihot sang hulhul ngal a. Ama'n akiang uah, “Hon domkang unla, tuipi ah hon lawnkhia un; huchi in nou a ding in tuipi akihot nawn kei ding; kei ziak in na tung uah hiai huihpi thupitak anung ahi chih ka thei hi,” achi hi. Himahleh mite'n gam a kik ding in nakpi in long akal ua; himahleh ahi thei kei; tuipi lah atung uah anak kihoh semsem ngal a. Huaiziak in Toupa asam ua, “Aw Toupa, hiai mipa hinna ziak in hon hihmang ke'nla, mihoih sisan moh ka tung uah nga mahmah lou ding in nakpitak in ka hon ngen uhi; Toupa, hiai lah nang na deih bang a na hih ahi ngal a,” achi uhi. Huchi in Jonah adomkang ua, tuipi ah alawnkheta ua; huchi in tuipi kihot phul vonvon adaita hi. Huchi in mite'n nakpitak in Toupa alau ua; Toupa kiang ah kithoihna alan ua, thu achiam uhi. Toupa'n Jonah valh ding in nga liantak anasep khin a; huai ngapi gilsung ah Jonah, ni thum leh zan thum a-om hi.

Huan ngapi gilsung a kipan in Toupa a Pathian kiang ah Jonah athum a, hichi in achi a; “Ka haksatna ziak in Toupa ka sam a,ama'n ahon dawng a;Sheol gilsung a kipan in ka kikou a, nang ka aw na zata hi. Jonah Thumna Leh Hotkhiakna Thukpi ah, tuipi sunggil ah na hon pailut a,tui tampi ka kimvel ah a-om a; na tuikihot leh na tuikisep tengteng in ahon tum zel hi. ‘Huan na mitmuh a kipan paihkhiak ka hi a;himahleh na tempul siangthou lam ka nga nawn ding,’ka chi hi. Tuite'n ka hinna tan in ahon umkimvel ua; tui thuk ka kim ka vel ah a-om hi;louhingte'n ka lu atuamsuak hi. Tangte taw ah ka paisuk a;lei in tangtawn a ding in akalhnate'n ahon khakkhum a;himahleh nang Aw Toupa ka Pathian,kohawm a kipan ka hinna na lakhia hi. Ka sung a ka hinna abah lai in, Toupa ka theigige ding a;na tempul siangthou ah ka thumna na kiang ahong tung hi. Thil gina lou leh zuau leltaklimsak mite'n amau zahngaihna alehngatsan uh ahi. Ke'n zaw kipahthu genna aw toh na kiang ah kithoihna ka lan ding;ka chiamsa thu ka tangtun ding.Hotdamna Toupa a ahi.” Huan Toupa'n ngapi ahoupih a, gam ah Jonah alokheta hi.

Huan Toupa thu Jonah kiang ah ahong tung nawn leuleu a, “Thou inla, Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak ah hoh inla, thu gen ding ka hon chih pen va tangkoupih in,” chi in. Jonah Sawl Nawnna Leh Mite Kisikna Jonah ni khat pai zoh chiang khopi sung ah ava pai phot a, “Ni sawmli in, Nineveh hihman ahi ding hi,” chi in akikou hi. Nineveh mite'n Pathian agingta ua; an ngawl apuang ua, alak ua alianpen a kipan aneupen tan in sai-ip puan asilh uhi. Huai thu Nineveh kumpipa bil ahong tungta a, alaltutphah a kipan athou a, akumpi puan asuah a, sai-ip puan silh in, vut ah atuta hi. Kumpipa leh amiliante thupiak in kumpipa'n Nineveh khosung ah thu apuang in apulakta hi. “Mihing hiam, ganta hiam, ganhon hiam, belamhon hiamte in bangmah chiam kei uhen; banghiam ne in tui leng dawn kei uhen; mihing leh ganhingte'n sai-ip puan silh uhenla, nakpitak in Pathian sam uhen; ahi, michih in amau lampi hoih lou leh akhut ua hiamgamna lehngatsan uhen. I manlouhna ding in, Pathian lunghei in lungsim kilehhei in, ahehna mahmah a kipan akilehhei kei ding chih kua'n ahia theithei?” achi hi. Huchi in Pathian in athilhihte uh en in, alampi hoih lou uh alehngatsan uh chih amu a; akiang ua achihsa, hih atup thil hoih lou Pathian in alehngatsan a; ahihta kei hi.

Himahleh huai in Jonah alungkim het kei a, ahehta hi. Toupa kiang ah athum a, “Aw Toupa, ka hon ngen ahi, hiai ka gam ua ka om lai a ka gen hilou hia? Hiai ziak in Tarshish lam ah ka taimang pah a; hehpih thei Pathian, lainatna a dim, heh mengmeng lou, zahngaihna hau, thil hoih lou lehngatsan sek na hi chih ka thei hi. Huaiziak in Aw Toupa, tu in ka hinna hon laksak ding in ka hon ngen hi; kei a ding in hin sang in sih ahoihzaw hi,” achi hi. Pathian Itna Leh Jonah Hehna Huchi in khopi a kipan Jonah apaikhia a, khopi suahlam pang ah atu a, huai ah sawlbuk alam a, khopi tung a thil hong tung ding muh tum in anuailim ah atu nilouh hi.Umgui A Kipan Sinlai Toupa Pathian in umgui Jonah tung ah azamsak a, ahaksatna a kipan hunkhe ding a alu liah ding in ana sepkhol hi. Huchi in Jonah umgui ziak in akipak mahmah hi. Himahleh Pathian in, azingsang phalvak in, leikha ana sepkhol a, huai in umgui akeitan a, ahong vuaita hi. Huan hichi ahong hi a, ni ahong suah in Pathian in suahlam huih ana sepkhol a; ni in Jonah lu ahai a, asibup a, amah a ding in sih angen hi, “Kei a ding in hin sang in sih ahoihzaw,” achi hi. Pathian in Jonah kiang ah, “Umgui tungtang thu a na heh mawk, na hihdik hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Sih ut hial a ka heh, ka hihdik hi,” achi hi. Toupa'n, “Na gim pih louh, na khansak leng hi sam lou, zan khat thu a hong om a, zan khat thu a mang nawn umgui na hehpihleh; Nineveh khua, khopi thupitak, asung a mi nuaikhat-le-singnih sang a tam, ataklam uleh aveilam uh leng khen theiloute leh ganhon tampi omna, ka hehpih kei dia hia?” achi hi.

Nineveh Tung A Toupa Hehna Toupa zaw mullit hat Pathianleh phulak ching ahi; Toupa'n phu ala a, hehna in adim hi; Toupa'namah dou mite tung ah phu ala a, amelmate a ding in hehna akholkhawm hi. Toupa alungnel a,nakpi a thilhihthei ahi,mimohte siam atangsak mahmah kei ding; Toupa'n pingpei leh huihpi ah alampi anei a,meipite akhe a leivui ahi. Tuipi asal a, akangtatsak a,lui tengteng leng akangsak khin a;Bashan gam abah a,Karmel tang leh Lebanon tang paklunte avuai uhi. Amah ziak in tangte aling ua, mualte azulmang ua; ama ah lei avuak a,ahi leitung leh asung a om tengteng toh in. Alung hihlouhna mai ah kua ahia dingh thei a,ahehna thupitak ah kua ahia om thei ding?Ahehna mei bang a sunbuak ahi a,suangpite akekzaksak vek hi. Toupa zaw ahoih a, mangbat ni a kulhkip ahi;amah a aginna uh koih mite athei hi. Himahleh tui khang luanglet zang in huai mun manthat vekna atungsak ding a, khomial a amelmate delhlut ding in. Toupa kalh in bang na gel ua?Bei sipsipna atungsak ahi,haksa nihveina atung kei ding hi. Lingnok bang a om in a-uain dawn un diahkawt dimdem bang in om mahleh,buhpawl keu bang mai a hihman vek in a-om ding uhi.Nineveh Pukna Nang a pawt mi khat Toupa kalh a thil gilou ngaihtuahmi, gitlouhna thuhilhmi a-om hi. Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Ahat theihtawp un hat mah le uh, tam leng tampi himah le uh, huchipi in leng vatpuk in a-om ding ua, amangthang ding uhi. Hon na hihgim khin mah leng ka hon hihgim nawnta kei ding hi. Tu'n zaw na kiang a kipan ahakkol ka kitansak ding a, nang gakna khaute ka kitatsak vek ding. “Toupa'n na tungtang thu ah thu apia hi, na min chi bang a tuh ahi nawnta kei ding a; na pathiante inn a kipan milim bawltawm leh milim sunte ka hihmangthang ding a; na han ka bawl ding; na gilou ngal a,” chi in. Tangte a tanchinhoih tun a, lemna thu tangkoupihte khe en dih; Aw Judah, na ankuang lui inla, na thuchiamte tangtun in; mi thugina lou in ahon pal paisuak nawn kei ding a; hihmanthat vek ahita hi.

Kitamgawpsakpa doutuna mai ah ahong pawt hi;kigalthuam inla, na lampi veng in,na kawng khauhsak inla na thilhihtheihna hattak in bawlhoih in. Nineveh Pukna Leh Siatgawpna Amihatte lum sansak ahi a,mihangsante asan-au in akivan ua;akisakna ni in kangtalaite kahpasik tet in ate kelkel ua,teipite mulkimhuaitak in aphe zolzol hi. Kangtalaite kongzing ah ataigomgom a; lamlian zate ah akiphu noknok ua;meisel bang in alang ua,khophia bang in atai zualzual uhi. Amiliante atheigige a;apai lai un akisuipai ua;baang lam zuan in akinoh ua,kihumbitna ding abawl uhi. Lui kongkhakte hon ahi a,kumpipa' inn hihsiat in a-om hi. Huan Huzzab salmat in apaimangpih ua,asikhanute'n a-awm uh tum in vakhu bang a ham in akah uhi. Nidanglai a kipan Nineveh khuazaw dil a tui luangkhia bang ahi;himahleh ami tampi ataikhe ding ua, khawl in, khawl in,chi in kikou mah le uh kuamah akihei kei ding uh. Dangkasik gallak in laksakunla, dangka-eng leng gallak in laksak un;gou manpha a dim ahih ziak in thil kisekkhawm leh vanhoihte tawi bei ni anei kei ding hi. Sukvuak in a-om a, avuak keuhkeuh a,asiang sipsip; lungtang azulmang a,khukte akihot ua,kawng tengteng ana tuntun a,amelte amual khin vek hi. Humpinelkai khosakna mun,humpinelkai pite leh anoute nek ding abalnenna leh alausak ding om lou ahumpinelkai leh humpinelkai tekte pai vialvialna koi mun hita ahia? Humpinelkai tal in anoute kham khop abotnen a,humpinelkai pite a ding in akeilum a, akokhukte uh sa keih in adimsak a,a-omna kokhuk samatte in adimsak hi. Sepaihte' Toupa'n, “Ngai dih, ka hon dou ahi, akangtalaite ka halkhu vungvung ding a, na humpinelkai noute namsau in ahihmang ding; lei a na sa keih ka sutawp ding a, na palaite aw zak ahi nawnta kei ding,” achi hi.

Sisan suah hat khopi tung agik hi!Zuau leh kilohna in adim khin a;asa keih uh tatlak lou ahi. Zepna ging, kangtalai khe ging,sakol tawmte, kangtalai tai gopgopte toh. Nineveh Siatna Thupi Huai kizuak melhoih, bumsiamnu,a-angkawmna ziak a nam zuak a,abumhatna ziak a inkuan zuaknu angkawmna thupi mahmah ziak a hon gawm ahi. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi:Ngai in, ka hon dou ahi;na mai ah na puan ka lem ding a;na vuaktanna namte kiang ah leh na zahlakna kumpipa gamte kiang ah ka ensak ding. Nin kihhuai mahmah in ka hon theh ding a,zumhuai mahmah in ka hon bawl dia,muhnop a ding in ka hon koih ding. Huan hichi ahi ding a, nang hon mu peuhmah nang a kipan ataimang ding ua,Nineveh khua ahong segawpta hi;kua'n amah suun dia, ahehnemtu ding koi a zong ding ka hia? Nile Luite kikal a om Thebes, akim a tui in a-um, akulh ding a tuipi zang a kulhbaang ding a tuipi nei sang in na hoihzaw a hia? Ethiopia leh Aigupta ahatna ahi a, huai tuh tawp hun nei lou ahi; Put leh Libiate ahihleh nang hon panpihte ahi uh. Huchipi in leng lakmang in a-om a, sal in atang a; kongzing teng tawp ah anaupang neute apaihnensak uh; amithahte uh a ding in ai asan ua, amiliante tengteng khainiang a gak ahi uh. Nang leng na kham sam ding a, sel in na om ding; melma ziak in kulh kip na zong lai ding hi. Na kulh tengteng theipi kung, gah min masa pulh bang ahi ding ua; alin peuhmah uleh nemi kam ah akelut zel uhi. Ngai in, na sung a na mipite numei ahi ua; na melmate a ding in na kongpi akihong heuhou a; na kikalhna siktawnte mei in akangtum hi.

Umkimvel a na om sung a ding in tui tawi inla, ka kulhte hihkip in; tungman omna ah hoh in, belhkipna chil in, lei haltakna thuk hihkip in. Huai ah mei in ahong kangtum ding a, namsau in ahon satlum ding a, singnget bang in ahon hihmangthang ding hi. Singnget bang in kipungsak inla, khaukhup bang in kihihpung in. Na sumsin mite van aksi sang a tam in na khangsak a; singnget in ahihsia a, alengmang mai uhi. Kumpi lukhu khu na mite lah khaukhup bang ahi ua, na sepaihte khovot ni a huandai a khaupehon bokkhawm bang ahi uh, himahleh ni ahong suak a, alengmang ua, a-omna mun uh theih ahi kei hi. Assuria kumpipa aw, na belamching mite alusu uhi; na miliante akhawl ua; na mipite tangte ah adalh ua, pikhawmmi kuamah a-om kei uhi. Na natna damna ding a-om kei; na liamna athupi mahmah hi; na husa za peuh in khut ahon betkhum ua; na gitlouhna thuak kha lou kua a-om a?

Toupa Tung A Habakkuk Phunna Aw Toupa, kei bang tan kikou a, nang hon za lou ding na hia? Hiamgamna thu ah na kiang ah ka kikoukhia a, nang lah na hon dawng nuam kei hi. Bangziak a thulimlouhna hon musak a, ginatlouhna hon ensak na hia? Lohna leh hiamgamna lah ka ma ah a-om ngal ua; kilanna a-om a, kinakna a-om hi. Huaiziak in dan a ze-ol a, vaihawmna akuankhe ngei kei; giloute'n lah diktatte a-umsuak vek ua; huaiziak in vaihawmna pawtkhia hekkawi in a-om hi. Toupa Dawnna Namte lak en unla, thei un, lamdangtak in lamdang sa unla; noute hun sung in nna khat ka sem ding, huai hon hilh mah le uh na gingta nuam kei ding uhi. Ngai un, Kaldaite ka bawlkhia hi, huai nam hiamgam leh ngongtat; huaite'n amau tenna mun hilou tang ding in lei vailam khaktan in apai uh. Amulkimhuai un alauhuai ua; avaihawmna uh leh athuneihna uh amau ngei a kipan apawtkhia hi. Asakolte uh leng gialbemte sang in akinzaw ua, nitaklam ngiate sang in alauhuaizaw uh; asakol tungtuang mite uh akiphalh ua; ahi, gamlapi a kipan asakol tungtuang mite uh ahong pai ua; negai ding a kinoh muvanlai bang in aleng uhi. Hiamgam ding in avek un ahong ua; suahlam huih bang in kilawptak in amailam uh en in atai ua; piaunel bang in salte akaikhawm uhi. Ahi, amaute'n kumpipate anuihsan ua, amau a ding in thuneite nuihzatna ahi uhi; kulh muanhuai chiteng anuihsan ua; leivui a vum a, alak zel ziak un. Huai chiang in huih bang in apaisuak ding ua, mailam anawt zel ding ua, athahatna uh Pathian a neite gilou mohtansak ahi uhi.Habakkuk Phunna Nihna Aw Toupa ka Pathian, ka Mi Siangthou, tangtawn a kipan na hi kei a hia?

Ka si kei ding uh, Aw Toupa, vaihawm ding in amah na hihkipta hi. Nang, Aw suangpi, bawldik ding in amau na tungkheta hi. Gilou muhna ding a nang mit chiimzaw, hoihlouhna ensim thei lou, bang ding a lepchiahtak a thilbawlte mu a, gilou in ama sang a diktatzaw mi anawmvalh lai a dai maimah na hia? Mite tuipi ngasate bang, atung ua vaihawmtu nei lou leh bokvak ganhingte bang a bawl maimah na hi. Ngakuai in avek un akhaikhe tou a, alen in amau a, amaute alenpi a huaikhawm a om in nuamsa in akipak uhi. Huaiziak in len a ding in kithoihna alan ua, alenpi ua ding in gimlim ahal hi; amaute ziak a atan uh hoih a, asa uh atam ziak in. Huaiziak in amau lente hihvuak a, namte hihse gige tel ding ahi uh maw?

Ka galvenna ah ka dingh dia, insang ah ka pang ding a, ka kiang a bang ahia agen chih thei ding in leh ka phunna tungtang bangchi in ka dawng dia chih thei ding in ka ngak ding hi. Toupa'n Habakkuk Adawnna Mengmuh lah hun sehsa a ding ahi lai a, atawplam ah akinoh a, azuau kei ding; om tadih mahleh, ngak in; ahong tun ding ziak in, azekai kei ding hi. Ngai in, akha kiliansak amah midiklou ahi, himahleh midiktat tuh ginna in ahing ding hi.Midiktatloute Tunggikna Ahi, uain in lepchiahtak in a-omsak a, miki-uangsak, om kinken lou ahi; gawtmun bang a adeih hihlian, sihna bang ahi a, suklungkim theih ahi kei, nam tengteng amah ah akaikhawm zaw a, atung ah mipite tengteng asekhawm hi. Hiaite tengteng in amah dem in gentehna agen un, amah demna paunak enghouna hiai bang a gen in, “Amah a lou hihpungpa tung agik!” Bang tan? chi in agen kei ding ua hia! Bang tan thil khamna zang a kihih inbulpa; na leibatnate thakhat a hong thoukhia a, nang hon hihbuai ding a hong khanglou lou ding uhia? Nang amaute a ding a gallak suak ding hilou na hi maw? Nam tampi na loh ziak in, mipi akhosuaksunte tengteng in nang ahon lok ding ua; mite sisan ziak in leh gam tung, khopi tung leh asung a teng tengteng tung a hiamgam na hihna ziak in. “Tunglam sang a abu asehtheihna ding leh gilou khut a kipan tatkhiak a-omtheihna ding a, a-inn a dia punna gilou mumi tung agik!” Mi tampi satkhia in, na hinna tung a khial in na inkote tung ah zumhuaina na zong ahi. Baang a kipan suang akikoukhe ding a, sing a kipan inkam in dawng ding ahih ziak in.

“Sisan a khua lam a, khopi gitlouhna a dingsakmi tung agik!” Ngai in, mite sepgimna mei a khul ding singkhuah bang leh namte kisukgimna uh bangmah lou a suah ding sepaihte' Toupa thilgelsa ahi kei maw? Tuite'n tuipi akhuh bang in, Toupa thupina theihna a leitung pumpi dim ding ahih ziak in. A-inveng dawn ding pia a, huai a gu hel a, avuaktanna uh a-ettheihna ding a, amah khamsak lai mi tung agik hi! Thupina deihna in zumhuaina in na dim a; nang leng dawn inla, zeksumloupa bang in om in; Toupa khut taklam nang lam ngatsak ahi ding a, na thupina tung ah zumhuaina hoih lou a-om ding hi. Lebanon tung a hiamgam hihna in nang ahon khuh ding a, gamsate siatna in nang ahon lausak ding; gam tung, khopi leh asung a teng tengteng tung a hiamgam a mite sisan na suah ziak in. A gelhmi in agelh, milim gelh; milim sun, zuaute sinsakpa, milim pau thei lou bawl ding a, huai a anasep bang phatuam ahia? Sing kiang a, Halh in; suang pau thei lou kiang a, Thou in, chimi tung agik hi! Ngai in dangka-eng leh dangka a luan milim, amah ah nakna om lou in asinsak thei diam? Himahleh Toupa atempul siangthou ah a-om a; ama ah leitung pumpi dai sipsip hen.

Zawlnei Habakkuk thumna, Sigionoth toh kituak a bawl. Aw Toupa, na tanchin agen uhka za a, ka lau hi.Aw Toupa, kumte lak ah nasep hihhalh in,kumte lak ah kitheisak in;thangpaihna zahngaihna theigige in. Habakkuk Thumna Amah thupina vak bang ahi a;akhut a pan nizung ahongsuakkhia hi;athilhihtheihna huai ah akhuh hi. Ama ah hipi apai a,akhepekte ah suangkuangthei kuang apaikheta hi. Adingh a, lei alingsak a;amu a, namte ahawlzak hi;tangtawn tangte hihdalh in a-omta ua,tangtawn mualte akun ua,apaina nidang a bang ahi. Kushan puaninte gimthuak in ka mu a;Midian gam mite alinggawp uhi. Luite tung a Toupa lungkim lou ahi diam aw?Luite tung a na hehna om hiaahihkeileh tuipi tung a na thangpaihna,na sakolte tung a na tuanna leh hotdamna na kangtalaite tung a na tuanna? Na thalpeu avuak petmah a bawl ahi;namte kiang ah kichiamnate thutak ahi uh, SelahLuite'n lei akhangkhamsak hi. Tangte'n nang ahon mu ua, alau uh;tui khang in akheng a,tui thuk in a-aw asuah a,tungsang ah khutte aliktou hi. A-omna uah ni leh khaadingh kinken ua;apai bang un na thalte vak ah,na teipi te zolzol in avak uhi. Heh in gam na palsuak petmah a,thangpai in namte na chil hi. Na mipite hondam ding inna kuankhia a,na thaunilh hotdamna ding in;giloute inn a kipan lutangna hihliam a;ngawng chiang pha hial in suangphum na hihse vek. Selah Agalhatte lutang amah chiangte ngei in na sun a;kei hon dalhsak ding in pingpei bang in ahong pai uhi;nuam asakna uh gentheite aguk a ne khin ding in ahi. Na sakolte in tuipi lehtui hatte sunvumte na chil hi.

Ka za a, ka gilpi akising a,ka kam a awte aling pupulh a;ka guhte ah muatna ahong lut a,ka mun ah ka linggawp hi;buai ni a amah sim dia hong kuan mite dou ding a ahong paitouh chiang a ka linlouhna ding in,dai dide in ka ngak ding hi. Theipi kung pak pha lou in,grep guite ah agah om lou in;olive sepgimna vuaksuak in,loute'n nek ding piangsak lou in;huang a pan ganhonte satkhiak a om in,huangsung ah ganta omta kei mahleh; huchipi in leng Toupa ahka kipak ding a,ka hotdamnaPathian ah ka nuam ding hi. Jehovah, Toupa, ka hatna ahi,ka khepekte zukpi khe bang in abawl a,ka mun sangte ah ahon vaksak ding hi.Lapu lian a ding,tumging guineite a sak ding.

Judah kumpipa, Ammon tapa Josiah dam lai a, Kushi tapa, Gedaliah tapa, Amariah tapa, Hezekiah tapa, Zephaniah kiang a Toupa thu hong tung. Toupa Vaihawmna Ni “Leitung a thil om tengteng ka hihbei sipsip ding,” Toupa'n achi. “Mihing leh sa ka hihbei ding; van a tungleng vasate, tuipi a ngasate, giloute toh kipalpuknate ka hihbei ding; leitung a pan mihing ka satkhe ding,” Toupa'n achi. “Judah tung leh Jerusalem a tengte tung ah ka khut ka lik ding a; hiai mun a kipan in Baal omlaite leh milim biak ching siampute min ka satkhe ding; Intung a van aksihon bia; Toupa kiang a kun a kichiam khin napi a, Milkom mai a kichiamte; Toupa zuihna a kipan kilehheite leh Toupa zong lou a, amah kanloute ka satkhe ding hi.” Toupa Pathian ma ah dai sipsip in, Toupa ni lah anaita ngal a; Toupa'n lah kithoihna abawlkhol khin a, amisapte ahihsiangthou khinta hi. Toupa kithoih ni in hichi ahi ding, heutute leh kumpipa tapate leh gamdang puan a kizem huchibang tengteng ka gawt ding hi. Huai ni chiang in, phual kan a tawmte, hiamgamna leh khemna a apu uh inn hihdimte, ka gawt ding hi. “Huai ni chiang in,” Toupa'n achi, Ngasa Kongpi a pan kah thawmging a-om dia, Kongpi Nihna a pan mauna leh mualte a kipan nakpitak a siatna husa a-om ding. Mau un, nou Maktes a tengte, na sumsin mite tengteng a-omta kei ua; dangka teh mite satkhiak ahita uhi. Huai hun chiang in hichi ahi ding hi, khawnvak tawi in Jerusalem zong ding ka hi; mi uain dawn a tengden, alungtang ua, Toupa'n thil hoih hi in thil gilou leng ahih sam kei ding chi mite ka gawt ding hi. Huchi in ahauhna uh gallak ahong hi dia, a-innte uh asegawp ding

innte alam ding ua, himahleh aluah kei ding uh; grephuante abawl ding ua, himahleh huai a uain adawn kei ding uhi. Toupa ni thupi anai a, anai a, akinoh mahmah, Toupa ni in kah aw athupi ding a; mi thilhihtheitakte huai ah akap loloih ding uhi. Huai ni thangpaihna ni ahi, lungzinna leh dahna ni, mialna leh lungkiakna ni, meipi leh khomial bikbek ahi; pengkul leh gallauna ni, khopi daikaih siatna, aning a insangte siat ni. Huan mite tung ah dahna ka tun ding a, mittawte bang in avak ding uh, Toupa tung a thil ahihkhelh ziak un; huchi in asisan uh leivui bang leh asa uh eklei bang in butkhiak in a-om ding hi. Toupa thangpaihna ni chiang in adangka uhiam adangka-eng uhiam in amaute atan thei kei ding; himahleh amullitna mei in gam pumpi akangbei ding a; hihbei a om ding ahih ziak in, beina mulkimhuai, gamsung a tengte tengteng tung ah a-om ding hi.

Kikaikhawm un, ahi, kikaikhawm un, zumna nei lou namte aw; thupiak akuankhiak ma a, buhsi bang a hon mutmang ma in, na tung ua Toupa hehna kihtakhuai ahong tun ma in, na tung ua Toupa hehna ni ahong tun ma in kikaikhawm un. Kisik Ding A Ngetna Avaihawmna zui, nou lei a minunnem tengtengte aw, Toupa zong un; diktatna zong un, migitna zong un; Toupa hehna ni ah sel in na om kha thei uhi.Israel Kim A Namte Tunggikna Gaza lah nutsiat in a-om dia, Ashkelon hihgawp in; suntang lai in Ashdod ahawlkhe ding ua, Ekron akizungkalh ding hi. Tuipi piau a teng Kereth namte aw na tung uh agik hi! Toupa thu in noute ahon dem hi, Kanaan aw, Philistiate gam a teng om lou ding in ka hon hihgawp ding. Huchi in tuipi, piaute louhing nou mun ahi ding a, belamchingte innte leh belamhonte ahuangte ahi ding hi. Huai piau bel Judah inkuan khosuaksunte a ding ahi ding; huai ah abelamhonte uh avak ding uh; nitaklam in Ashkelon innte ah akual ding uh; Toupa a Pathian un amaute aveh in, sal a atang uh pikhe nawn ding ahih ziak in. Moab hon kouna leh Ammon tate gensiatna ka zata hi. Akigitpihte uh tung a kiliansak a, ka mite gam dou asawm uhi. Huaiziak in sepaihte' Toupa, Israel' Pathian ka hin bang in, “Chihtaktak in Moab, Sodom bang ahi ding a, Ammon tate Gomorrah bang, lou bineite leh chikhukte mun sia asuakden ding a, ka mi omlaite'n alok ding ua, ka nam omlaite'n amaute aluah ding uhi.” Sepaihte' Toupa mite tung a akiletsak ua, akou ziak un, akisaktheihna ziak un sawi in a-om ding uhi. Amaute tung ah Toupa alauhuai ding a

lei pathiante tengteng kial in ahihbei chiang in michih in amau mun chiat leh namte' tuikulh gam tengteng nangawn in amah abe ding uhi. Nou Ethiopiate leng, ka namsau a thah a om ding na hi uhi. Huan ama'n mallam dou in akhut alikkhe ding a, Assuria ahihse ding; Nineveh akisegawp ding a, huchi in gamdai bang in akeu ding uh. Alai ah belamte akual ding ua, namte ganta tengteng; vangawngsau leh sakuh achial tungnung ah agiak ding ua; tohlet ah a-aw in la asa ding uh; sangkilte ah siatgawpna a-om ding; sidar sing a nasepte ahihsiat ziak in. Hiai khopi nuamsa pilvang loutak a teng a, “Alungtang a keimah ka hi, kei lou kuamah dang a-om kei,” chi ahi; bangchidan a hong segawp a, gantate a dia kualna ding hi ahia; kuapeuh akiang a pai in anuihsan in, akhut alehkhum ding uhi.

Khopi helhat leh buah, nuaisiah ching tung agik hi! Kuamah thu angaikhe kei a, bawlhoihna leng asang thei kei. amuanna leng Toupa ah a-om kei a; a Pathian anaih sam kei hi. Jerusalem Khelhna Leh Tatna Azawlneite uh lah mizuauthei leh lepchiah ahi ua; asiampute un mun siangthou ahihbuah ua, dan tung ah ahiamgam uhi. Asung ua Toupa bel adiktat a; thil thulim lou ahih kei ding; zingsang teng in avaihawm khovak ah alak a, avuaksuak ngei kei a; himahleh midiktatloute'n zaw zumna athei kei uhi. Namte ka satkheta a, a-insangte uh akisegawp hi; akongzingte uh ka susia a, kuamah apai kei uhi; akhopite uh hihsiat in a-om a, huchi a mi kuamah om lou in, ateng leng a-om kei uhi. Chihtaktak in kei na hon kihta ding ua, bawlhoihna na kipahpih ding, ka chi a; huchi in atenna satkhiak in a-om kei dia, amah tungtang a sehsa tengteng bang in; himahleh beltak in athou ua, ahih tengteng uh asesak uhi. “Huaiziak in mat ding zuan a ka thoh ni atun masiah hon na ngak un,” Toupa'n achi. Namte kaihkhawm ka tup ahi ngal a, lalgamte ka suktuah a atung ua ka hehna ka sunbuak theihna ding in, ka thangpaihna lauhuai tengteng; ka mullitna mei a leitung pumpi nekgaih a om ding lah ahi ngal a. Huai hun chiang a mite'n Toupa min aloh ua, thukhat sat a amah nna aseptheihna ding un, akiang uah muk siangthou ka pe ding hi. Ethiopia luite khen lam a kipan gimlim hal mite, dalhsa ka mite tanu mahmah in ka thillat ahon tawi ding hi. Huai ni chiang in ka tung a na tatlekna, na thilhihte tengteng ziak in na zahlak kei ding

huai hun chiang a na lak a na mikisathei leh ki-uangsakte lakhe ding ka hih ziak in, huchi in ka tang siangthou ah na ki-uangsak nawnta kei ding uhi. Himahleh na lak ah mi gimthuak leh genthei ka nuse ding a, Toupa ah amuang ding uhi. Israel khosuaksunte'n gilou ahih kei ding ua, zuau agen sam kei ding uh; akam uah leng lei khemhat akimu kei ding hi; ne a, lum a, amaute kuamah in ahihlau louh ding ziak un.Kipahna La La sa in, Aw Zion tanu;kikou in, aw Israel!Jerusalem tanu aw,na lungtang tengteng toh kipak inla, nuamsa in! Toupa'n na vaihawmnate alamangta a,na melma adelhkhia a, na lak ah Israel kumpipa, Toupa a-om hi;gilou na lau nawn kei ding hi. Huai ni chiang in, Jerusalemkiang ah, “Lau ke'n,” chih ahi ding;Aw Zion, na khutte ze-olsak ke'n. Na lak ah Toupa na Pathian a-om hi,hondam ding mihat; na itna ah akhawl ding,la sa in na tung ah anuam ding hi. Khawmpi kulmut ziak a dahnate,noute a dia puakgik leh gensiatna hiite ka lamang ding hi. Ngai in, huai hun chiang in,nang hihgimte tengteng ka bawl ding a,panpih kiphamohnu ka hondam ding a, hawlmang a omnu ka lakhawm ding;huchi in leitung pumpi a azahlakna uh ana omkhitnate ah, phatna lehminthanna amaute ka pe ding hi. Huai hun chiang in ka hon la nawn ding a,huai hun chiang in nou ka hon kaikhawm ding hi;na mitmuh ua na saltanna ua kipan ka hon pi nawn hun chiang in,lei a mi tengteng lak ah min lehphatna in nou ka hon bawl ding, Toupa'n achita hi.

Tempul Lam Thak Ding A Toupa Thupiak Hichibang in sepaihte' Toupa'n thu agen, “Hiai mite'n, eite i kisak a Toupa' inn lam hun ahi kei,” achi uh. Huchi in zawlnei Haggai a kipan in Toupa thu ahong tung a, “Hiai inn kigawpsa a om a, nou a dia na intung dalneite ua na ten hun uh ahi maw?” chi in. Huaiziak in tu in sepaihte' Toupa'n, “Na lampite uh ngaihtuah un,” achi hi. Tampi na tuh ua, tawmchik na la uh; na ne ua, himahleh na vah kei uh; na dawn ua, himahleh na dawnkham zou kei uh; na kisilh ua, himahleh kuamah na lum kei uh; loh mu in iptaw vangsa a koih ding in loh amu hi, chi in. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Na lampite uh ngaihtuah un. Tang ah hohtou unla, sing va la un, inn lam unla; huai ah ka kipak ding a, hih thupi in ka om ding,” Toupa'n achi. Tampi na lamen ua, ngai un, tawmchik ahong hi hi; inn na hon tut chiang un, ka na mutmang hi. Bangziak in? Sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Michih noumau inn tuam ah na tai chiat ua, kei inn pen kisegawp a a-om ziak in. Huaiziak in noute ziak in van in adaitui akhou a, lei in agah akhou hi. Huchi in gam, tang, buh leh uain, sathau leh lei a pan piangkhia thil peuhmah, mi, ganhon leh khut nasep tengteng tung ah keuna ka samta hi.Zerubbabel Leh Joshua In Tempul Lam Pan Nawn Huchi in Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel leh siampu lianpen Jehozadak tapa Joshua in mikhosuaksunte tengteng toh Toupa a Pathian uh aw leh Toupa a Pathian un asawl, zawlnei Haggai thute amang ua; huan mite'n Toupa alau taktak uhi. Toupa thukhah in Toupa sawltak Haggai in mite kiang ah thu agen a, Toupa'n, “Na kiang uah ka om, achi,” chi in. Judah ukpipa Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel kha leh siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa Joshua kha leh mikhosuaksunte tengteng kha Toupa'n atokthou a; akuan ua sepaihte' Toupa, a Pathian uh inn ah nna asemta uh; huai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni, akha gukna, kumpipa Darias vaihawm kum nihna in.

Akha sagihna, huai kha ani sawmnih-le-khatna in, zawlnei Haggai a kipan Toupa thu ahong tung hi: “Judah ukpipa Shealtiel tapa Zerubbabel kiang ah leh siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa Joshua kiang leh mikhosuaksunte kiang ah tu'n thu gen in,” chi in. Tempul Thak Thupina Tuma a athupina a hiai inn mu, na lak uah kua na om lai ua? Huan tu in bangchibang in na mu ua? Na mitmuh un bangmah lou bang ahi maw? chi in. Himahleh, Zerubbabel aw, hattak in om in, Toupa'n achi, Joshua, siampu lian, Jehozadak tapa aw, hattak in om in; nou gam a mite tengteng aw, hattak in om unla, nna sem un, Toupa'n achi; na kiang ua ka om ziak in, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Aigupta gam a kipan a na hong paikhiak lai ua na kiang ua thu ka khun a, na lak ua ka kha a-om gige dan theigige un; lau kei un. Toupa'n hichi in achi ngal a: Khatvei lai, sawt lou kal in, vante, leitung leh tuipi, gamhulte tan in ka sing ding hi. Nam tengteng ka sing ding a, huchi in nam tengteng thil deihte ahong tung ding, huchi in thupina in hiai inn ka dimsak ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Dangka kei a ahi, dangka-eng kei a ahi, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi. Hiai inn thupina nanung, amasa sang in athupizaw ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi: hiai lai mun ah muanna ka pe ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.Ginomlouhna Gawtnate Darias akum nihna, akha kuana ani sawmnih-le-lina in, zawlnei Haggai a kipan in Toupa thu ahong tung hi. Sepaihte' Toupa'n hichi in achi: “Tu in dan lam thu a siampute dong un; mi'n apuansilh puanten ah sa siangthou lou leh apuanten in tanghou hiam, meh hiam, uain hiam, sa hiam sukha taleh, siangthou ahi lai diam?” chi in. Siampute'n, “Ii” chi in adawng uhi.

Haggai in, “Misi luang ziak a minin in hiaite abangpeuh khoih kha taleh siang in a-om diam?” achi hi. Siampute'n adawng ua, “Siang lou in a-om ding,” achi uhi. Haggai in adawng a, “Toupa'n, huchibang in hiai mite leh huchibang in hiai nam ka ma ah ahi uh; huchibang in akhutte uh nasep chiteng; leh huai lai a athillat uh asiang kei, achi,” chi in. Toupa'n Vualzawlna Achiam Huchi in tu in, ka hon ngen ahi, tuni a kipan leh abanban in, Toupa tempul a suang akichian ma in ngaihtuah un; mi'n tehna sawmnih kivum ahong muh lai, huai nite a-om nungsiah, sawmkhat kia a-om hi; bawm sawmnga a dimkhe ding a mi'n uain thau ahon muh lai in, sawmnih kia a-om hi. Na khut nasepte tengteng uah keuna leh kawt luatna leh gial in ka hon gawt a; huchipi in leng kei lam na hong nga kei uh, Toupa'n achi. Tuni a kipan leh abanban in ngaihtuah un, Toupa tempul suangphum akiphum ni a kipan, akha kuana ani sawmnih-le-li ni a kipan, ngaihtuah un. Buhpang ah haichi a-om lai hia? Ahi, grepgui, theipi kung, theibuhfai, olive sing ahong suak kei lai a; tuni a kipan in ka hon vualzawl ding hi.Zerubbabel Kiang A Toupa Thuchiam Huai kha ani sawmnih-le-li ni in Haggai kiang ah anihveina in Toupa thu ahong tung hi: Judah ukpipa Zerubbabel kiang ah, “Van leh lei ka sing ding a, lalgam leh laltutphahte ka lumlet ding a, namte, lalgamte hatna ka hihse ding a, kangtalaite leh huai a tuangte ka pai ding; huchi in sakolte leh atung ua tuang mite ahong kum ding uh, michih a-unau namsau in satlum ding achi, chi in thu gen in. Huai ni chiang in, Aw Zerubbabel, ka sikha, Shealtiel tapa, ka hon la ding, sepaihte' Toupa'n achi, suainamna in ka hon bawl ding, Toupa'n, achi; nang ka hon telta ngal a,” sepaihte' Toupa'n achi.

Thumakai Kha Siangthou tawn a asawltak telte kiang a thupiak tampi apiak khit a van a pitouh a a-om ni tan a thute ahi. Huai sawltakte kiang ah gimna athuak nung in theihna zuau lou tampi in ahing in akimusak a, ni sawmli hial akiang uah akilak a, Pathian lalgam thu agen hi. Huan a-omkhawm uh akithuahpih a, “Jerusalem khua paisan kei un, Pa thilchiam ka gen na zak uh ngak un, achi tinten hi. Johan in tui in abaptis zel a, himahleh, ni sawt lou nung in Kha Siangthou a baptis in na om ding uh,” achi hi.Jesu Vankahna(Mar. Luk. ) Huan amaute ahong kikhop un akiang ah, “Toupa, tu in hia Israelte kiang a lalgam na piak nawn ding?” chi in adong uhi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Pa in ahun leh ani amah thuthu a om dia aseh, nou theih ding ahi kei hi. Himahleh, Kha Siangthou na tung ua ahong tun chiang in thilhihtheihna na nei ding uh; huchi in Jerusalem ah, leh Judia gamsung pumpi ah, leh Samaria leh kawlmong pha in ka theihpihte na hi ding uh,” achi hi. Huai thu agen khit in amuh laipi un, van a pitouh in a-omta a, meipi in amuh phak louh uah apitouta hi. Huan apaitouh lai a van lam a-et nilouh lai un, ngai in, mi nih, puanngou silh in, akiang uah ahong dingh uhi. Huai mite'n, “Galili gam a mite aw, bangziak a van lam en a dingh na hi ua? Hiai Jesu na kiang ua kipan a van apitouh a om, van a paitou na muh bang un amah mah ahong kik nawn ding,” achi uhi.Nungzuite Kithuahkhawmna Huan Olive tang achih ua kipat Jerusalem ah akik nawnta uhi. Huai tang Jerusalem kho kiang ahi a, Sabbath ni a hohna hun lel ahi.

Huan alut un, a-omna dantan tungnung uah apaitou ua, Peter leh Johan, Jakob leh Andru, Philip leh Thomas, Bartholomai leh Matthai, Alphai tapa Jakob, Simon Zealot Pawl a leh Jakob tapa Judas toh ahi uh. Huai tengteng numei kuate hiam leh Jesu nu Mari toh, Jesu unaute toh, lungsim mun khat a, phatuamngaitak a thum in a-om nilouh uhi.Mathia Sehna(Mat. ) Huan huai ni in unaute lak ah Peter adingh a, avek un za-le-sawmnih ahi uhi. “Unaute aw, Kha Siangthou in, David kam a, Jesu mante makai Judas thu agenkholh Laisiangthou thu ahong tung ding him ahi.” Amah zaw i lak ua simtel ahi a, hiai nasepna ah tan leng anei sam hi. Himahleh huai mi'n akhelhna man in mun khat alei a, akhuplam in akia a, alai ah apuakkham a, agil tengteng alawt vek hi. Huai thu Jerusalem a omte tengteng in ana za uhi; huchi in huai mun amau pau in, Akeldama, achi ua, huai tuh Sisan Mun, chihna ahi. “Sam Laibu ah hiai thu gelh ahi.‘A-omna mun hihgam in om hen,asung ah kuamah om kei hen, ‘huan aheutu hihnamidang in tang hen, chih ahi. “Huchi in Toupa Jesu i lak ua lut zel pawt zel a a-om sung teng a, Johan baptisma nungsiah, i lak ua kipan van a pitouh a a-om ni tan hiai hon kithuahpihte lak a mi khat athohnawnna theihpih ding in a-om ding ahi,” achi hi. Huan mi nih asepkhia ua, khat Joseph Barsabbas kichi ahi a, aminkhem Justas leh midang khat Mathias ahi. Huan athum ua, “Toupa, Nang, mihing tengteng lungtang thei, hiai nihte akua zaw pen ahia na tel hon hilh in, Judas in amah omna a pai ding in hiai nasepna leh sawltakna akiaksan sik a ding in,” achi uhi. Huan ai asan ua, a-aisan uh Matthias tung ah atu a; huchi in amah sawltak sawm-le-khatte lak a simtel ahita hi.

Pentikost ni ahong tun in, avek un mun khat ah a-omkhawm uhi. Kha Siangthou Tunna(Joe. ) Huchi in avek un Kha Siangthou in aluahdimta a, Kha in hihtheihna apiak a apausak bang zel in pau dangte in apauta uhi. Huan van nuai nam chih lak a kipan Pathian limsak Juda kulmutte Jerusalem ah a-om uhi. Huan ging husa azaktak un mipi ahong kikhawm ua, michih in apau uh amau pau chiat a azak ziak un alungsim uh ahong buai hi. Huan avek un amangbang ua, lamdang asa mahmah uhi, “En dih uh, hiai a pau tengteng Galili gam a mi ahi kei ua hia? Bangchi in ahia i vek ua pianpih pau chiat a i zak uh? Eite Parthai nam, Medes nam, Elam nam; khenkhat Mesopotamia gam a om, Judia gam a om, Kappadosia gam a om, Pontas gam a om, Asia gam a om, Phrigia gam a om, Pamphilia gam a om, Aigupta gam a om, Kurini kho kiang a Libia gam a om i hi ua; khenkhat Rome a pan mikhualte, Judate leh aphungkaite uh toh i hi ngal ua, khenkhat Krit tuikulh leh Arab gam a mite i hi ngal ua; himahleh, Pathian thilhih thupite agen uh eimau pau chiat in i za ngal ua!” achi uhi. Huan avek un lamdang asa mahmah ua, akhiakna dan thei lou in, “Hiai bangchidan ahia?” akichi uhi. Khenkhat in, “Uain thak akham ua ahi,” chi in anuihsan uhi.Peter Thugen Himahleh Peter in sawm-le-khatte toh dingkhawm in, aw ngaihtak in akiang uah agen a, nou Judia gam a mite aw, nou Jerusalem a om tengteng aw, hiai thei unla, ka thu leng ngaikhia un. Hiaite na gin bang un akham kei uh, dak thumna hun ahi.

Hiaite zawlnei Joel in agen ahi zaw: “Pathian in, ni nanungte ahhichi ahi ding,mi tengteng tung ah ka kha ka sungbo ding a;na tapa leh na tanute'n ka thu ahilh ding uh;na tangvalte un kilaknate amu ding ua, na putekte un mang anei ding uh. Ahi, huai ni in ka sikhapate,ka sikhanute tung ah leng ka Kha ka sungbo ding a,ka thu agen ding uhi. Huan tunglam van ah thillamdang nuailam lei ah chiamtehna ka musak ding a;sisan, mei, meikhu hu toh, Nisa mial asuak ding a,kha sisan asuak ding,Toupa ni thupitak leh lauhuaitak ahong tun ma in. Huan hichi ahi ding a,Toupa min lou peuhmah hotdam in a-om ding hi. “Nou Israel mite aw, hiai thu za un: Nazaret Jesu, Pathian in amah zang in na lak uah thil thupite, thillamdangte, chiamtehnate ahih in ahon theichiansak hi; nou ngei in tuate na theichian uhi. Huai mi Pathian' tupkholhsa leh theihkholh bang in na mansak ua, nou migiloute khut a kilhden in na hihlumta uhi. Amah, Pathian in sihna thuaknatna phelsak in, akaithouta a; ama sihna letdet vual ahih louh ziak in. Huan David in athu agen a,‘Ka ma ah chik lai peuh inToupa ka mu gige hi.Ka mangbatlouhna ding in ka taklam ah a-om hi. Huaiziak in ka lungtang anuam a, ka lei leng akipak a,ka sa lamentak in a-om behlap lai hi. Misikhua ah ka kha na nuse kei ding a,muatna na Mi Siangthou na musak sam kei ding hi. Nangma'n hinna lampite na hon theisak a;nangma'n na mel in kipak in na hon hihdim ding, ” chi in. “Unaute aw, chikhahpa David thu lau lou in na kiang uah ka gen thei hi; amah zaw asi a, vui leng avui khinta ua, ahan leng tutan in i kiang ah a-om lai hi.

Amah tuh zawlnei ahi a, Pathian in akhal a mi kuahiam sadan a achite lak a mi khat Khrist laltutphah a tu ding in akaithou ding chih kichiam in agen chih athei hi. Huchi in huai tuh atheihkholh him ziak in Khrist thohnawn ding thu agen hi,‘Misikhua a nutsiat in a-om kei a,aluang leng amuat sam kei hi, ” chi in. “Pathian in Jesu akaithouta chih theihpihte i vek un i hi uhi. Pathian khut taklam ah pahtawi in a-om a, Kha Siangthou chiam Pa kiang a kipan in amu a, na muh uh leh na zakte uh ahon sunbuak ahi uhi. David zaw van ah akahtou kei, amah ngei in,Jehovah in ka Toupa kiang ah, ‘Na melmate na khepek ngakna dia ka bawl masiah,Ka taklam ah tu kinken in, ” achi, ana chi hi. “Huchi in Jesu, na kilhden uh, Pathian in Toupa leh Khrist hikhawm in abawlta chih Israel inkuan chih in kichiantak in thei uhen,” achi hi.Piangthak Masate Huan huai thu azak un alungtang ua sut bang ahong hi ua, Peter leh sawltak dangte kiang ah, “Unaute aw, bangchi in ka hihta ding ua?” achi ua. Peter in akiang uah, “Na khelhnate uh ngaihdamna ding in lungsim khek unla, Jesu Khrist min in baptisma tang chiat un; huchi in Kha Siangthou thawnpiak na tang ding uhi. Achiam nou a ding, na tate uh a ding, gamlapi a mi tengteng a ding leh Toupa i Pathian in akiang a asap peuhmahte a ding ahi,” achi hi. Huan thudang tampi in ahilhchian a; hiai khang thulimloute lak ah kihumbit un, chi in ahanthawn hi. Huan athu zui peuhmah in baptisma atang ua, huai ni in mi sangthum vel behlap in a-om uhi.

Huan sawltakte thusinsakte sin in, kithuah in, tanghou balkham in, thum in, phatuamngaitak in a-omkhawm uhi.Saptuam Masate Hihna Huan michih in alauta ua; sawltakte'n thillamdang leh chiamtehna tampi ahih uhi. Agingta peuhmah in bangkim akikopkhawm uhi. Agoute uh, athil neihte uh azuak ua, adeihdong ching lel chiat in avek ua kiang ah ahawm zel uhi. Huan niteng in, lungsim mun khat in, tempul ah phatuamngaitak in a-om zelzel ua, a-innte uah leng tanghou balkham in, nuam leh lungkim in, a-an uh ane zel uhi. Pathian aphat ua, mi tengteng deihsak in a-om uhi. Huan ahotdam lel peuhmah Toupa'n niteng in akiang uah abehlapsak zel hi.

Huan Peter leh Johan, dak kuana ah thum hun lai in tempul a lut ding in ahohtou uhi. Piching kuahiam apian tung a pan khebai ahon zawng ua, tempul a lutte kiang a khutdoh ding in, tempul Kongkhak Kilawm kichi bul ah niteng in alumsak uhi. Khebai Hihdamna Peter in amah a-en gegu a, Johan in leng; huan Peter in, “Hon en in,” achi hi. Ama'n amau a pan banghiam muh akilamen a, a-en pah hi. Himahleh Peter in, “Dangka leh dangka-eng bangmah ka nei kei; himahleh ka neihsun ka hon pe ding, ‘Nazaret Jesu Khrist min in khe in paita in, ” achi hi. Huan akhut taklam alen a, akaithouta a; huchi in thakhat in akhete leh asiakmit guhte ahong hat pah hi. Amah atawmtou a, adingh a, khe in apai pah hi. Khe a paipai, diangdiang leh Pathian phat kawm in tempul ah alut hi. Huan khe a pai leh mi tengteng in Pathian aphat lai amuh un; Tempul Kongkhak Kilawm bul a khutdoh a tupa ahi chih athei ua; atung a thil tunglamdang asa mahmah ua, abuaipih uhi. Huan ama'n Peter leh Johan alet lai in, mi tengteng in lamdang asa mahmah ua, inlim Solomon a achih uah akiang uah ahong taikhawm uhi.Tempul A Peter Thugen Peter in huai amuh in, mite ahoupih a, “Nou Israel mite aw, hiaite bangziak a lamdang sa? Koumau thilhihtheihna leh Pathian ka limsak ziak ua amah ka paisak bang zen ua bang achia hon en gige?
