Abraham, Isak leh Jakob' Pathian, i pipute Pathian in, asikha Jesu apahtawita ahi; amah na mansak ua, Pilat in khah atup hun in leng ama ah na ut kei uhi. Mi Siangthou leh Dik na deih kei ua, tualthatpa na kiang ua piak na ngen zawta uhi. Hinna Siampa na that ua

himahleh Pathian in amah misi lak a pan akaithou nawn a; huai theihpihte ka hi uhi. Ama min gintak ziak in amin in hiai mi na muh uh leh na theih un ahihhatta hi. Amah ziak a ginna ahong om in na vek ua mitmuh in ahihdam vilvelta hi. “Himahleh unaute aw, na heutute un atheih louh ziak ua ahih bang un, na theih louh ziak un hiaite na hih uh ahi, chih ka thei uhi. Himahleh Pathian in zawlnei tengteng kam in, Khrist in gim athuak ding thu atheikholsak hi, huchibang in atungsak zawta hi. Huaiziak in na khelhnate uh thaimanna ding in kisik unla, kihei nawn un, huchi in Toupa a pan halh hun ahong tung ding hi. Khrist Jesu nou a dia aseh mah leng, ahon sawl ding hi. Himahleh Pathian in thil bangkim abawlhoih hun ahong tun masiah amah van a a-om ding him ahi; huai bawlhoih ding thu Pathian in leilung pian tung a kipan azawlnei siangthoute kam a agen khit ahi. Mosi ngei in ‘Toupa Pathian in keimah ahon bawl bang in na unaute lak ah zawlnei khat ahon bawlsak ding; ama'n thu tengteng na kiang ua agen peuh na ngaihkhiaksak ding uhi. Huan mi kuapeuh huai zawlnei thu ngaihkhiaksak lou tuh, mi lak a kipan hihmangthang ahi ding, achi hi. Ahi, Samuel om a kipan zawlnei tengteng, anung ua mite toh, thugen peuhte'n, tulai tanchin agenkhol uhi. Noute zawlneite leh thukhun tate na hi ve ua; Pathian in Abraham kiang ah, ‘Na suante ziak in khovel a nam chih avualzawl ding uh, chi in na pipute uh kiang ah achiam hi. Pathian in a Tapa Jesu, misi lak a kipan kaithou in, na khelhnate uh kiheisanna ding leh kisik mite vualzawl ding in noumau kiang ah ahon sawl masapen hi, ” achi hi.

Huan Peter leh Johan in mite kiang a thu agen lai un, siampute, tempul heutute leh Saddukaite akiang uh ahong tung guih ua; mite asinsak uh leh Jesu ziak a misi lak a kipan thohnawnna thu ahilh ziak un alungkim kei hial uhi. Huan amaute ua nitaklam ahih ziak in azingsang pha in suangkul ah akhumta uhi. Upate Mai Ah Peter Leh Johan Azing in aheutute uh, upate, laigelhmi te, siampu lianpen Annas leh Kaiapha, Johan, Alexander, siampu lianpen tanau tengtengte leng Jerusalem ah a-omkhawm uhi. Peter leh Johan alai ah adingsak ua, “Bang thilhihtheihna in ahia, kua min in ahia hiai na hih uh?” chi in adong uhi. Huchi in Peter Kha Siangthou in adim a, akiang uah, “Nou mipite vaihawmte leh Israel upate aw, hiai mi damlou tung a nna hoih ka sep thu uah, hiai mi bangziak in ahia ahong dam tak chi in tu in salh leh dot a om ka hi uh maw; nou tengteng leh Israel mi teng in leng thei hen, kros a Nazaret Jesu Khrist na kilhden uh, Pathian in misi lak a kipan in akaithou nawn a, amah min ngei in hiai mi hiai ah na ma uah dam in adinghta ahi. “Nou inn lam mite aw,na suangpaih uh, aning a,suang phatuampen ahong hita,huai amah ahi achi uhi.” “Midang kuamah kiang ah hotdamna a-om kei, van nuai a mihing min sak lak ah, hon hondam ding min dang a-om kei,” achi hi. Peter leh Johan hansandan amuh un, milaisiam lou leh minautang maimai ahi uh chih atheih un lamdang asa mahmah uhi; huchi in Jesu kiang ah a-om khinta uh chih athei uhi. Huan mi ahihdam uh akiang ua dingh amuh un, bangmah agense thei tuan kei uhi.

Huchi in avaihawmna ua pat a apaituamsak nung un, akihou ua, “Hiai mite bangchi in i hih dia? Thillamdang chiamteh tham ahih uh Jerusalem a om tengteng in teltak in atheita uh; en leng i sel thei tuan kei hi. Himahleh midang kiang a athan semsemlouhna ding in tunung siah kuamah kiang ah hiai min a thu agenlouhna ding un i vau ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in amau asam ua, Jesu min a thu gen het lou ding leh hilh het lou ding in achi tinten uhi. Himahleh Peter leh Johan in akiang uah, “Pathian mitmuh in Pathian thuman sang in noumau thuman adikzaw hia ngaihtuah un. Kou zaw ka thil muh uh leh ka zakte uh gen lou in ka om thei kei uh,” achi uhi. Huan amau avau semsem ua, akhahta uh, mipi ziak in gawtna lemtang amu kei uh; athilhih ziak un mi tengteng in Pathian apahtawi uhi. Hiai ahihdamna chiamtehna uh kum sawmli sang a tamzaw ahi.Nungzuite'n Hansanna Angen Uh Huan Peter leh Johan apawt un amau lawmte kiang ah ava hoh ua, siampu liante leh upate'n akiang ua agen peuh uh ahilh vek uhi. Huchi in angaikhete'n akituak in aw ngaihtak in Pathian kiang ah, “Toupa, nang tuh van leh lei, tuipi leh asung a omte tengteng bawlpa na hi; Nang Kha Siangthou in, ka pu uh na sikha David kam in, hiai thu na gen ahi:‘Zentelte bangchi in ahita aheh uh?Mite'n bangchi in ahia thil phatuam lou angaihtuah uh? Khovel kumpipate adingh ua,heutute leng akikhawm ua,Toupa leh ama Khrist kalh in, chi in. “Hiai khua ah na sikha siangthou, na thaunilh Jesu tung ah, Herod leh Pontias Pilat toh, Zentelte leh Israel mite toh akikhawmta uh; na khut leh na lungsim a hong tung ding a na sehkholh peuh hih ding in.

Huchi in tu'n ah, Toupa, ahon vaudan uh ngai in; na sikhate kiang ah na thu hangsantak a gentheihna pia in. Damsak ding a na khut na zak a, na sikha Jesu min a chiamtehnate leh thillamdangte hih ahih lai in,” achi uhi. Huan athum khit un a-omkhawmna mun uh ahong ling a, avek un Kha Siangthou in adim ua, hangsantak in Pathian thu ahilhta uhi.Thilneihte Kikopna Huan agingta mipite lungsim mun khat leh ngaihtuah mun khat in a-om ua; alak ua kuamah in athil neihte, kei a tuam ahi, achi kei ua, thil tengteng akikop uhi. Sawltakte'n thilhihtheihna thupitak in Toupa Jesu thohnawn thu ahilhhilh ua; avek ua tung ah hehpihna thupitak a-om hi. Huan alak uah leng tasam kuamah a-om kei uh; gam leh inn nei peuh in azuak ua, athil khotte uh ahon tawi uhi. Huan sawltakte khebul ah akoih zel ua, amau deihdong ching hun chiat in ahawm chiat zel uhi. Huan Levi chi a mi khat, Kupra tuikulh a kipan, Joses kichi, sawltakte'n Barnabas achih uh, (huai min omdan, “Hanthawnna Tapa,” chihna ahi), hiai mi in agam neih azuak a, ahon tawi a, sawltakte khebul ah akoih hi.

Himahleh mi khat amin Ananias in azi Sapphira toh athil neih uh azuak hi. Huan azi theih in ama'n akhen a-iim a, akhen hon tawi in sawltakte khebul ah ahong koih hi. Himahleh Peter in, “Kha Siangthou khem ding leh gam man akhen iim ding in bangziak a Setan in na lungtang hihkhauh ahia? A-om lai teng leng nang a ahi gige kei a hia? Na zuak nung in leng na thuthu in a-om kei a hia? Bang achia hiai thute na lungtang a ngaihtuah? Mihing khem na hi kei a, Pathian khem na hi zaw,” achi hi. Ananias Leh Sapphira Tangvalte athou ua, tuam in azawngkhia ua, avuita uhi. Dakkal thum ding hiam nung in, thil omdan thei lou in azi ahong lut hi. Peter in akiang ah, “Hon hilh in, hiai zah phet in maw gam na zuak uh?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi, hiai zah phet in ahi,” achi hi. Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Bang achia Toupa Kha ze-et ding a kithutuak na hi ua? Ngai in, kongkhak bul ah na pasal vuite khepek ahong omta, nang leng ahon zawngkhe ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in thakhat in akhebul ah apuk pah a, asi hi; tangvalte ahong lut ua, amah si in ahong mu ua, azawngkhia ua, apasal kiang ah avuita uhi. Huan saptuamte leh huai thu za peuhmahte'n alau mahmah uhi.Chiamtehna Leh Thillamdangte Huan mi lak ah Pathian in sawltakte khut in chiamtehna leh thillamdang tampi ahih zel hi. Huan amaute avek un lungsim mun khat in Solomon inlim ah akikhawm zel uhi. Midang bel kuamah alak uah apang ngamta kei uhi; himahleh mi'n amaute angaisang uhi. Huan Toupa lam ah numei leh pasal gingthak tampi behlap semsem in a-om uhi.

Huchi in mi damloute kongzing ah alumsak ua, Peter pai kawm a alim bek in alak ua khat bek aliahtheihna ding in, achi uhi. Jerusalem kho kim a kipan mipite leng huai damloute dawi nin hihgimte hon pi in ahong paikhawm ua; huaite leng ahong dam chiat uhi.Vaihawm Upate Ma Ah Peter Leh Johan Adingh Nawn Uh Huan siampu lianpen akisa a, akiang a omte tengteng toh, alawmte tuh Saddukai pawl ahi ua; amau hazatna in adim uhi. Sawltakte ua, vantang khumna ah akhumta uhi. Zankim in Toupa angel khat in kongkhakte hong in, apikhia hi. “Tempul ah pai unla, va dingh in mite kiang ah hiai hinna thu va gen un,” achi hi. Huan huai thu azak un, khua hong vak phet in tempul ah ava lut ua, thu ava gen uhi. Himahleh, siampu Lian leh alawmte ahong ua, vaihawmte leh Israel suante upate tengteng asamkhawm ua, sawltakte va pi ding in suangkul ah mi asawl uhi. Suangkul ah heutute va hoh mah le uh, amau ava mu kei ua; huchi in akik nawn uhi. “Suangkul bittak a kikhak in, avengte leng kongkhak bul a dingh amu uhi, himahleh ka hong ua, asung ah kuamah ka mu kei uh,” chi in agen uhi. Huan tempul upa leh siampu liante'n huai thute azak un, hiai bangchi phet in athang diam aw? chi in athu ah amangbang petpet uhi. Huan mi khat ahong pai a akiang uah, “Ngai un, suangkul a na mikhumte un tempul a dingh in thu agen uh,” chi in ahong gen hi. Huchi in sepaih heutupa toh heutu liante ava kuan ua, vantang akihtak ziak un hiamgamna om lou in sawltakte ahon pi ua, huchi hi keileh suang a den ahi kha ding uhi. Huan apitung un, vaihawmte ma ah adingsak uhi.

Siampu lianpen in akiang uah, “Huai min in thu hilh louh ding ka hon chita ua; thei un na thuhilh un Jerusalem ahihdim vekta hi, hiai mipa sisan hon khuksak tum na hi ve ua,” chi in asal hi. Himahleh Peter leh sawltakte'n, “Mihing thu sang in Pathian thu i man zawk ding ahi,” achi uhi. “Nou sing ah Jesu khaikang in na that ua, i pipute Pathian in akaithou nawnta hi. Amah mah Pathian in Kumpipa leh Hondampa a om ding in ataklam ah ahihlianta hi. Israelte khelhna a pan kiheisak ding leh ngaidam ding in. Huai thute kou atheihpihte ka hi ua; Kha Siangthou, Pathian in athu zui peuhte kiang a apiak tak, atheipa ahi nawn lai,” chi in adawng uhi. Amau huai thu azak un asin uh athak mahmah a, hihlup atumta uhi. Himahleh vaihawmte lak ah, amin Gamaliel, Pharisai, dan sinsakmi, mi tengteng lak a minthangpi khat adingtou a, huai mite inn polam a omsak takdih ding thu apia hi. Huan vaihawmte kiang ah, “Nou Israel mite aw, hiai mite tung a na thilhih tup uah pilvang un. Tuma lam in Theuda kichi, mi khat ahong om a, huai mipa kiang ah mi tampi, zali phial, a-awn uhi, amah tuh hihlup in a-omta a; athu zui peuhmah avek un adalhzakta ua bangmah ahita kei uhi. Huai mi om nung in kisimpi lai in, Galili gam ah mi khat Judas kichi ahong om nawn hi; alam ah mi khenkhat ahip nawn hi; himahleh amah leng asita a, athu zui peuhmah avek un adalhzakta uhi. Huaiziak in tu in ka hon hilh ahi, hiai mite khoih kei unla, amau om-om in omsak un; hiai athiltup uh leh athilhih uh mihing a kipan ahihleh amang ding hi. Himahleh Pathian a kipan ahihleh amau na hihmang thei kei ding uh

huchi lou in zaw Pathian dou na hi zaw kha ding uh,” achi hi. Huan agen lem asata ua; huchi in sawltakte asam ua, avua ua; avuak khit un, Jesu min a thu gen lou ding chi bikbek in akhahta uhi. Huchi in vaihawmte lak a kipan apawtkhia ua, Khrist min ziak a daina thuak tak a seh ahih ziak un akipak mahmah uhi. Huan niteng in tempul leh amaute inn ah, Jesu Khrist ahi, chi in thuhilh leh sinsak atawp kei uhi.

Huai lai a, nungzuite apunpun lai un, aniteng thilhawm uah Grik pau zang Juda meithaite limsak lou chi in Hebru pau zang Judate tung ah Grik Judate aphun uhi. Huan sawm-le-nihte'n nungzui mipite asamkhawm ua, “Pathian thugen tawpsan a dohkan a nek-tak ka bawl uh ahoih kei. Huaiziak in unaute aw, na lak uah Kha leh pilna a dim mi minhoih ngen sagih tel un, amau hiai thil gel ding in ka bawl ding ua; kou ahihleh thum leh thu nasem in ka om gige zaw ding uh,” achi uhi. Huai thu in mi tengteng akipaksak a; huchi in ginna leh Kha Siangthou a dim ngen, Stephen, Philip, Prokoras leh Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas leh Judate phungkai Antiok a mi Nikolas atel uhi. Sagih Sehna Huchi in Pathian thu ahong dalh zom zel a; Jerusalem ah nungzuite apungta mahmah ua; siampute lak ah leng mi tampi'n ginna lam ahong ngata uhi.Stephen Matna Huan Stephen, hehpihna leh thilhihtheihna in adim in, mi lak ah thillamdang leh chiamtehna thupite ahih zom zel hi. Himahleh Kurini, Aleksandria leh Silisia gam leh Asia gam a kipan Juda pawl khat Salsuakte sinagog kichite leh mi khenkhat ahong kisa ua, Stephen hong kiselpih uhi. Himahleh apilna leh agenpihpa Kha aselkhe thei kei uhi. Huan mi khenkhat aguai ua; huai mite'n, “Mosi leh Pathian agensiat ka za uh,” achi uhi. Huan mite, upate leh laigelhmite atokthou ua, Stephen asual ua, ua, vaihawmte kiang ah api uhi. Theihpih zuauthei bawlkhia in, amaute'n, “Hiai mi'n hiai mun siangthou leh Dan agense gige, Nazaret Jesu'n hiai mun ahihse dia, Mosi in hon piak dante ahihlamdang ding chih, agen ka za uh,” achi uhi. Huan vaihawmte tengteng in Stephen a-ensal chiat ua, amel angel mel bang in amu uhi.

Huan siampu lianpen in, “Hiai thute adik ahi na hia?” achi hi. Stephen in, “Unaute aw, pate aw, ngai un. I pu Abraham, Haran a a-om ma, Mesopotamia gam a a-om lai a, thupina Pathian akiang a hong kilak in akiang ah, ‘Na kholam leh na chite lak a kipan pawt inla, gam ka hon etsak ding lam ah pai in, ” achi hi. Huan amah tuh Kaldaite gam a kipan apaikhia a, Haran ah ava om a; huan apa sih nung in huai a kipan in tua na omna kholam uah Pathian in apemlutsak hi. Huan hiai ah zaw mun luah ding, khe ngakna tham bangmah ape kei. Himahleh tapa aneih ma nangawn in ama gou ding leh anung a asuante gouluah ding in gam piak achiam hi. Pathian in hichibang in agen, asuante mi kholam ah kum zali ataam ding ua mi'n sikha in abawl ding ua, asawi behlap ding uh. Stephen Thugen Pathian in akiang ah tua zeksum thu akhung a; huchi in Abraham in Isak asuang a, ani giat ni in azek asum a, huan Isak in Jakob asuang a; Jakob in suangtubul ding sawm-le-nihte ahon nei hi. “Huai suangtubul dingte'n Joseph ahaza ua, Aigupta gam ah azuak ua; himahleh akiang ah Pathian a-om hi. Agimthuak tengteng ah ahunkhe zel a, Aigupta gam kumpipa Pharaoh deihsakna angahsak a, mipiltak ahi chih atheisak behlap hi; huchi in ama'n Aigupta gam leh a-inn a mi tengteng tung ah gam-ukpa in abawlta hi. Aigupta leh Kanaan gam tengteng ah kial ahong tung a, gimthuakna thupitak ahong tungta hi; i pipute'n lah nek ding himhim amuta kei ua. Himahleh Jakob in Aigupta gam ah buh a-om chih azaktak in i pipute asawlkhia a; huai tuh ahoh pat tungna pen uh ahi.

Huan anihvei hohna uah, a-unaute kiang ah Joseph kitheisakta a, huchi in Joseph chite tuh Pharaoh kiang ah akitheisakta uhi. Huan Joseph in apa Jakob leh a-unau tengteng mi sawmsagih leh nga asamsak hi. Huchi in Aigupta gam ah Jakob ahohsuk a; huai ah amah leh i pipute asita uhi. Shekem ah apotung ua, Abraham in Shekem a Emmor tapate lak a dangka sum a alei han ah avuita uhi. “Pathian in Abraham kiang a athuchiam ahong tun ding in Aigupta gam ah mite ahong pung ua, ahong tam deuhdeuh uhi. Huan Aigupta gam ah Joseph thei lou kumpi dang khat ahong lal hi. Huai mi in i chipihte akhem a, i pipute asawi a, anaungekte uh hing lou ding in apaikhesak hi. Huai lai in Mosi ahong piang a, Pathian muh in melhoih mahmah ahi; apa inn ah kha thum akem uhi. Akoihkhiak un Pharaoh tanu in ama tapa ding a la in akem hi. Huan Aigupta gam a pilna tengteng Mosi ahilh ua, thu ah leh athilhih ah athupi mahmah hi. “Huan amah kum sawmli achin kuan in, a-unau, Israel suante aveh hi. Huan alak ua mi khat gimthuak lai amu a, apanpih a, ahihgimpa Aigupta mi athat a, aphu alaksakta hi. Mosi in ama khut in Pathian in amaute ahondam chih a-unaute'n thei na uhiam asa a, himahleh athei kei uh. Huan azing in alak ua mi nih akilai un akiang uh ava naih a, ‘Pute aw, unau nei ve ua; bangziak a dikloutak a kibawl na hi ua? chi in lep atum hi. Himahleh a-invengpa tung a thugilou bawl zaw pen in Mosi tuh asawnhang a, koute tung a heutu leh vaihawm ding a kua'n hon bawl ahia? Zan a Aigupta mi na thah bang a hon thah tum na hi maw? achi hi.

Huai thu ziak in Mosi ataimangta a, Midian gam ah ataam nilouh a, huai ah tapa nih ava nei hi. “Huan kum sawmli nung in Sinai Tang gamdai ah; loubuk ah meikuang lak ah angel khat akiang ah ahong kilak hi. Mosi in amuh in, athil muh tuh lamdang asa mahmah a; huan en ding a apai lai in, Toupa aw in: ‘Kei na pipute Pathian, Abraham' Pathian, Isak' Pathian, Jakob' Pathian, ka hi, ana chi hi. Huchi in Mosi aling a a-en ngamta kei hi. Huan Toupa'n akiang ah, ‘Na khepek a kipan na khetuam suah in; na dinna Mun Siangthou ahi, achi hi. Aigupta gam a om ka mite gimdan ka mu gige hi, athum uh leng ka za gige, amau hunkhe ding in ka hong suk hi. Hong in, Aigupta gam ah ka hon sawl ding,” achi hi. “Kou tung a heutu leh vaihawm ding a kua'n hon bawl ahia, chi a adeih louh uh, Mosi, loubuk a angel kilak tungtawn in, Pathian in amah mah heutu leh hunkhepa hikhawm ding in asawlta hi. Ama'n Aigupta gam ah Tuipi San leh gamdai mun ah, kum sawmli sung in thillamdang leh chiamtehnate amusak phot a, amaute apikheta ahi. Israel suante kiang ah, ‘Pathian in keimah bang in, na unaute lak a mi zawlnei khat, athu na ngaihkhiak ding uh ahon bawlsak ding chipa Mosi ahi. Hiai mi ahi gamdai a omkhawmte lak a ompa, Sinai Tang a angel in ahoupihpa leh i pipute kiang a ompa; huai mi eite hon piaksawn ding a thuhingte lasawnpa mah ahi. “I pipute'n amah thu amang kei ua, ahua ua, Aaron kiang ah, ‘I makai ding in pathiante hon bawlsak in

Aigupta gam a kipan a hon pikhepa Mosi lah atanchin ka thei nawnta kei uhi, chi in alungtang uh Aigupta gam lam ah anga nawnta uhi. Huai lai in bawngnou lim abawl ua, amai a kithoihna alan ua amau khutsuak milim tung ah akipak uhi. Huchi in Pathian in alehngatsan a, van a aksi abiak theihna ding un amaute akilehngat santa hi. Zawlnei laibu a,‘Aw nou Israel inkote aw,gamdai ah kum sawmli sung in gan sisan a kithoih in thillat toh in kei na hon bia ua eita? Molok biakna maitam leh na pathian uh, Remphan aksi leh,na milim bawltawmte uh,vialpuak in biak ding in na zong ua, huaiziak in Babulon kho khen lam ah sal in ka hon pomang ding,’chih gelh bang in. “I pi-le-pute'n gamdai ah theihpihna biakbuk, Mosi kiang a theihsak a a-om bang leh alim amuhsak bang in ana bawl uhi. Huai biakbuk mah i pipute suansawnte'n leng aneisawn zel ua, Pathian in i pipute ma a Zentel adelhkhiakte gam aluah lai un, Joshua makaih in biakbuk alutpih uhi. David hong om tan in huai ah a-om gige a, amah Pathian mitmuh a deihsakna tang, Jakob' Pathian a ding in inn bawlsak angen hi. Himahleh Solomon in huai inn alamsak zawta hi. “Himahleh zawlnei gen bang in khut a bawl innte ah Tungnungpen a-om kei; “Toupa'n van ka tutphah ahi a,lei ka khepek ngakna ahi; inn bangchibang na hon lamsak ding ua?Ka khawlna mun ding koi mun ahia? Hiai thilte keimah khut in ka bawl kei a hia?” chi a, agen bang in. “Migenhakte, lungtang leh bil a zeksumlouhte aw, chik lai peuh in Kha Siangthou na dal gige uh; na pipute uh hih bang in na hih nilouh uhi. Na pipute un zawlneite lak ah kua ahia asawi louh uh?

Mi Diktak hong ding thu genkholte athat ua; huai midiktak mansakte leh thatte noumau na hi uhi. Dan angelte piaksawn mu masa a zuiloute aw,” achi hi.Jesu Muhna leh Stephen Sihna Huan huai thu azak un asin uh athakta a, Stephen tung ah aha uh agawita uhi. Himahleh amah Kha Siangthou in adim a, van lam a-en a, Pathian thupina leh Pathian taklam a Jesu dingh amu hi. “Ngai un, van kihong ka mu a, Pathian taklam a Mihing Tapa dingh leng ka mu,” achi hi. Huchi in amau aw ngaihtak in akikou ua, abil uh ahum ua, kituaktak in apang ua, khua a kipan adelhkhia ua, suang in adeng ua, atheihpihte'n tangval khat amin Saul khebul ah apuante uh akoihkhawm chiat uhi. Amaute'n Stephen suang in adengta ua; ama'n Pathian sam in, “Toupa Jesu, ka kha la in,” achi hi. Huan khukdin in aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Toupa, hiai akhelhna tung uah moh posak ke'n,” achi hi. Huchi in huai agen zoh in, a-ihmuta hi.

Saul in leng asih hoih asa hi. Huai ni in Jerusalem a saptuam omte tung ah nakpitak in sawina atung a; sawltakte kia lou ngal Judia leh Samaria bial teng ah adalhzak vekta uhi. Huan Pathian limsak kuate hiam in Stephen avui ua, nakpitak in asuun uhi. Saul in bel saptuam pawlte asawi a, inn teng a lut in, numei pasal akaikhia a, suangkul ah akhum hi.Samaria Ah Philip Huan adalhzakte kho teng ah apaita ua, thu agen zel uhi. Samaria ah Philip ahohsuk a, akiang uah Khrist thu atangkoupih hi. Huan athillamdang hihte azak ua, amuh un, mipite'n lungsim mun khat in, Philip thugente alimsakta uhi. Dawi nin paimi tampi amatte uh sung a kipan in aw ngaihtak a kikou a pawt leh mizaw leh khebai tampi hihdam a a-om ziak un. Saptuamte Sawina Leh Dalhzakna Huan mi khat amin Simon a-om a; ama'n mithupi ka hi, chi in tuma lam in huai khua ah mitkhialdawi in Samaria khomite lamdang satak in abawl nilouh hi. Mi tengteng, aneupen a pan alianpen tan in, “Hiai mi Pathian thilhihtheihna thupi achih uh ahi,” chi in athu alimsak chiat uhi. Amitkhialdawi in sawtpi lamdang satak a abawl nak ziak in athu alimsak uhi. Himahleh Philip in Pathian lalgam tanchinhoih leh Jesu Khrist min agen pen agintak tak un, numei leh pasalte'n baptisma atangta uhi. Huan Simon nangawn in leng agingta a, baptisma atan zoh in Philip kiang ah a-om gige a, chiamtehna leh thillamdang thupite amu a, lamdang asa thei mahmah hi.Samaria Gam A Peter Leh Johan Zinna Huan sawltak Jerusalem a omte'n Samaria mite'n Pathian thu agingtata uh chih azak un, akiang uah Peter leh Johan asawl uhi. Huai mite ava tunsuk uleh Kha Siangthou atantheihna ding un athumsak uhi.

Huai ma in alak uah kuamah tung ah atung nai kei a; Toupa Jesu min in baptisma atang phet uhi. Huan sawltakte'n atung uah akhut uh akoih ua, Kha Siangthou atangta uhi. Huan sawltakte khut ngakna ziak a Kha Siangthou piak ahi chih Simon in amuh in; dangka piak asawm hi. “Hichibang thuneihna hon pe sam un, kuapeuh tung a leng khut ka koihna in Kha Siangthou atan samna ding in,” achi hi. Himahleh Peter in akiang ah, “Na dangka nang toh mangkhawm hen, Pathian thilpiak dangka sum a lei na tup ziak in. Hiai thu ah nang zaw na pang kei, tan leng na nei kei hi; Pathian ngaih in na lungtang adik kei hi. Huaiziak in hiai na gitlouhna tawpsan inla, Toupa kiang ah thum in, huchi in na lungtang a na ngaihtuah ahon ngaidam khamoh ding hiam. Thil khakna sinkha ah leh gitlouh gaklopna ah na om chih ka thei hi,” achi hi. Huan Simon in, “Na thil gen uh bangmah ka tung a hong tunlouhna ding in noumau in Toupa kiang ah hon thumsak un,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in amau Toupa thu atheihsak ua, agen zoh nung un, Jerusalem a kik nawn in, Samari mite tenna khua tampi ah tanchinhoih agen zel uhi.Philip Leh Ethiopia Michilgeh Huan Toupa angel khat in Philip ahoupih a, “Thou inla, simlam a Jerusalem a kipan Gaza kho sunsuk lampi huai gamdai ah hoh in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou a, apaita hi; huan ngai in, Ethiopia gam a mi khat, Ethiopia kumpinu Kandas gou tengteng kempa, michilgeh thuneitak, Jerusalem ah Pathian be ding in ahohtou hi. Apaikik lam kangtalai a tu in zawlnei Isai laibu asim hi. Huchi in Kha in Philip kiang ah, “Huai kangtalai va naih inla, va kithuahpih in,” achi hi.

Michilgeh kiang ah Philip ava tai a, zawlnei Isai laibu asim aza a, “Na laibu sim na theisiam hia?” achi hi. Ama'n, “Kuamah hon hilhchet louh in bangchi in ka theisiam dia?” chi in akiang a kaltou a tutpih ding in Philip achialta hi. Laisiangthou asim lai tuh hiai ahi:“Goh ding belam bang in amah api ua;belamnou amulmetpa ma a adaih dide bang in ama'n leng akam aka kei; avuallelh lai in atung ah thugen aphal kei ua;asuante tanchin kua'n ahon gen ding ua?Khovel a kipan in ahinna alaksak ngal ua,” chi in. Michilgeh in Philip ahoupih a akiang ah, “Zawlnei in hiai thu kua thu ahia agen, amah thu hia, midang thu? Ka hon dong hi,” achi hi. Huan Philip in adawng a, Laisiangthou thu abul a pan in, akiang ah Jesu thu ahilhta hi. Huan lampi a apai kawm un koi mun hiam tui omna khat atung ua; huan michilgeh in, “En dih, hiai ah tui a-om, baptisma ka tan ding bang in hon dal ahia?” achi hi. Philip in, “Na lungtang tengteng a na gintakleh na hi thei,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Jesu Khrist, Pathian Tapa ahi chih ka gingta,” chi in adawng hi. Huchi in kangtalai akhawlsak ua, anih un, Philip leh michilgeh, tui ah ahohkhawmsuk ua; huchi in ama'n abaptista hi. Huan tui a pan apaitouh un Toupa Kha in Philip alamangta a; huan michilgeh in amah amu nawnta kei, nuamsatak in apai zel hi. Himahleh Azotas ah Philip muh in a-om nawn hi; huan apaisuak kawm in Kaisaria atun masiah kho teng ah tanchinhoih agen zel hi.

Saul in Toupa nungzuite vau leh thah atup thu agen lailai man in siampu lianpen kiang ah ava hoh hi. Damaskas a sinagog tengteng amite kiang a piak ding in lai angen a, hiai Lampi zui mi kuapeuh amuhleh, numei leh pasal leng, hen a Jerusalem a hon pitheihna ding in. Huan apai lai in, Damaskas atun kuan in, thakhat in van a kipan vak akim ah ahong vak puap hi. Huan lei ah apuk a, akiang ah, “Saul, Saul, bang achia nang hon sawi na hia?” chi in aw aza hi. Huan ama'n, “Toupa, kua na hia?” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Na sawi Jesu ka hi; kilhna sikzum na tot nang ding in ahaksa hi,” achi hi. Huan ling leh lamdang sa kawm in, “Toupa bang sem ding a hon deih na hiam?” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, khopi ah lut in, huchi in na hih ding hilh in na om ding hi,” achi hi. Atonpihte gen ding thei lou in adingh ua, aw zaw aza ua, himahleh kuamah amu kei uh. Huan lei a kipan in Saul athou a; ahong hak a kuamah amutheita kei hi; huchi in akhut in akai ua, Damaskas ah apilut uhi. Saul Pianthakna Huan Damaskas ah amin Ananias nungzui khat a-om hi. Toupa'n mengmu bang in akiang ah, “Ananias,” achi hi. Huan ama'n, “En in, Toupa, hiai ah ka om,” achi hi. Toupa'n akiang ah, “Thou inla, Kongzing Tang achih uah hoh inla, Judas inn ah, Tarsas khomi, amin Saul kichi kankhia in. Ngai in, athum laitak ahi. Ama'n mengmuhna in mi khat amin Ananias akiang ava lut a, amit hihvakna ding a atung akhut nga in amuta hi,” achi hi.

Ananias in, “Toupa huai mi Jerusalem a na misiangthoute tung a atatsiat thu mi tampi kam ah ka za hi. Huan hiai ah na min lou peuhmah hen ding in siampu liante a kipan thuneihna toh hong pai ahi,” chi in adawng hi. Himahleh Toupa'n akiang ah, “Hoh mai in; Zentelte, kumpipate leh Israel suante kiang a ka min polut ding a ka belseh ahi. Ka min ziak in gimna bangchi a thupi ahia athuak ding akiang ah ka theisak ding,” achi hi. Huan Ananias ava hoh a, inn ah alut a, huan atung ah akhut anga a, “Unau Saul, na mitvakna ding leh Kha Siangthou dim a na omtheihna ding in, Toupa, na hong paina lampi a na kiang a kilak Jesu'n hon sawl ahi,” achi hi. Huan thakhat in amit a kipan lip bang aketa a, amit avak nawnta a; athou a, huan baptisma atangta hi. Huan an ane a, ahalhta hi. Huan Damaskas a nungzui omte kiang ah ni bangzah hiam ataam hi.Paul In Damaskas Ah Thu Agen Huan Sinagog ah, “Jesu, Pathian Tapa” ahihdan thu atangkoupih zui ngal hi. Huan athu zate tengteng in lamdang asa ua, “Hiai mipa Jerusalem a hiai minloute sawi zelpa ahi kei a hia? Huai mite siampu liante kiang a hensa a piak sawm a hong hohpa hilou hia?” achi uhi. Saul bel ahong hattuam a, huai mi Khrist ahi taktak chih ahilhchian a, Damaskas a Juda omte gen ding bei in akoih hilhial hi. Huan ni sawttak nung in Saul that ding in Judate akihou uhi. Himahleh ama'n athiltup uh ana thei hi. Huan amah thah tum in kulh kong teng ah sun leh zan in atang uhi.

Himahleh anungzuite'n zan in api ua, kulh tohlet ah bawm in akhaikheta uhi.Jerusalem Leh Tarsas Khua Ah Saul Huan Jerusalem a Saul atuntak in nungzuite kithuahpih atum a; amau bel avek un amah akihta ua, nungzui ahih sam agingta kei uhi. Barnabas in amah api a, sawltakte kiang ah apaipih a, lampi a Toupa amuh a, ahoupihdan bang, Damaskas a Jesu min a hangtak a thu ahilhdan khawng leng akiang uah agenta hi. Huchi in Jerusalem ah Saul tuh akiang uah lut zel pawt zel in a-omta a, Toupa min in hangsantak in thu agen zel hi. Huan Grik pau zang Judate kiang ah thu agen a, asel a; amau bel amah hihlup atum uhi. Huan unaute'n huai atheihtak un, Kaisaria ah apisuk ua, Tarsas ah asawlmangta uhi. Huchi in saptuamte Judia, Galili leh Samaria gam kimvel ah akip deuhdeuh ua, muangtak in a-omta ua; huan Toupa laudan siam kawm in, Kha Siangthou khamuan in a-om ua, ahong pung deuhdeuh uhi.Lidda Khua A Peter In Ahihdamna Huan Peter in kho kim atot vialvial kawm in, Lidda a Mi Siangthou omte kiang ah leng ahohsuk hi. Huai ah mi khat amin Ainias, azawt ziak a kum giat lupna a lumden amu hi. Huan Peter in akiang ah, “Ainias aw, Jesu Khrist in ahon hihdam, thou inla, na awngphah zial in,” achi hi. Huchi in athou pahta hi. Huan Lidda khua leh Sharon phai a omte tengteng in Ainias amu ua, Toupa lam anga duam uhi.Dorka Huan Joppa ah amin Tabitha nungzui khat a-om a, Tabitha minkhiakna tuh Dorkas ahi, huai numei in thil hihhoih leh thilpiak ahau mahmah hi. Huai lai in, achi ana a, asi hi; huchi in asilsiang ua, indan tungnung ah asial uhi.

Huan Lidda khua tuh Joppa kho kiang ahih ziak in, nungzuite'n Peter huai ah a-om chih aza ua, “Sawt hal lou in ka kiang uah hong pai in,” chi a va thum ding in akiang ah mi nih asawl uhi. Huan Peter athou a akiang uah apaita hi. Huan atuntak in indan tungnung ah api ua; meithai tengteng dingh in, akiang ua Dorkas a-om lai a apuanak bawlte, apuan bawlte lak kawm in akap chiat uhi. Himahleh Peter in avek un apawtsak a, akhukdin a, athumta hi; huan luanglam anga a, “Tabitha, thou in,” achi hi. Huchi in amit ahong hak a, Peter amuhtak in atutou hi. Huan Peter in akhut apia a, akaithou hi, misiangthoute leh meithaite asam a, hingdam in apeta hi. Huan huai Joppa kho tengteng in athei vek ua; mi tampi in Toupa agingta uhi. Huan Joppa ah savunbawlpa Simon inn ah ni tampitak Peter ataam nilouh hi.

Kaisaria ah mi khat amin Kornelia a-om a; amah Itali pawl achih uh, huai pawl a sepaih zaheutupa ahi. Amah Pathian limsakmi ahi a, a-inkuanpihte tengteng toh Pathian laudan asiam uhi, mite kiang ah thilthawnpiak tampi ape zel a, Pathian kiang ah leng athum gige hi. Hiai mi'n sun dak kuana ding khawng in mengmuhna in Pathian angel khat akiang ah alut a, “Kornelia” chi a asap lai chiangtak in amu hi. Huan Kornelia in lau in amah ana en kilkel a, “Toupa, bang ahia?” achi hi. Ama'n akiang ah, “Na thumnate leh na thilpiakte theihgigena ding in Pathian ma ah atungtouta hi. Tu'n ah Joppa khua ah mi sawl inla, mi khat Simon Peter achih uh va pisak in; amah huai tuipi gei a om, savunbawlpa Simon inn a tung ahi a, ama'n na hih ding hon na hilh ding hi,” achi hi. Ahoupihpa angel apaitak in, Kornelia in asikhate lak a mi nih leh anek bawl gigete lak a Pathian limsak sepaih khat asam hi. Thu tengteng akiang ua ahilh khit in Joppa khua ah asawlta hi.Peter Mengmuhna Huan azing nawn in, khopi zuan a pai, khua atun kuan un, thum ding in dak gukna vel in intung ah Peter akaltou hi. Peter Leh Kornelia Van kihong in, banghiam bawm, puan liantak bang, ning li a khih, lei a luai a khaikhiak a om in amu hi. Huai sung ah leitung a khe li nei ganhing chi chih leh gamsa leh ganhing bokvak, tungleng vasa chichihte a-om uhi. Huan akiang ah aw in, “Peter, thou in gou inla, ne in,” achi hi. Himahleh Peter in, “Toupa hilou e; siang lou leh nin bangmah himhim ka ne ngei kei,” achi hi. Aw in, anihveina in, “Pathian in ahihsiangthousa nang siang lou chi ke'n,” achi hi.

Huchibang ngen in thumvei ahong om a; huan van ah bawm khaitouh in a-om nawnta hi. Huan Peter in mengmu bang a amuh theisiam lou a, abuai lai in, Kornelia mi sawlte'n Simon inn ana kankhia ua, kongkhak bul ah ana dingh ua asam ua, “Simon, Peter achih uh, huai a atun leh tun louh,” ana dong uhi. Peter in mengmu bang a amuh angaihtuah lai inla, Kha in akiang ah, “Ngai in, mi thum in ahong zong uh. Huaiziak in thou inla, kumsuk in, bangmah ginglel lou in amaute zui in; amau ka sawl ahi uh,” achi hi. Huchi in Peter huai mite kiang ah ahohsukta a, akiang uah, “Ngai un na mizon uh ka hi; bang ahia na hong nasan uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Angel siangthou khat in, Kornelia, sepaih zaheutupa, midiktak, Pathian laudan siam, Juda nam tengteng lak a mihoih kiang ah, na thugen azakna ding in, a-inn ah nangmah sam ding in ahilh hi,” achi uhi. Huchi in mite asamlut a, agiaksakta hi. Huan azing in Peter athou a, akiang uah apai a, Joppa khomi unau kuate hiam leng akiang uah apai sam uhi.Kornelia Inn Ah Peter Huan azing nawn in Kaisaria ah alutta uhi. Kornelia in, asanggamte leh alawm deihpente samkhawm in, amau ana ngak nilouh hi. Peter ahong lut dek laitak in Kornelia in ana dawn a, akhebul a bokkhup in, abia hi. Himahleh Peter in amah akaithou a, dingh in, “Kei leng mihing mai ka hi,” achi hi. Amah toh kihou kawm in alut a, mi tampi omkhawm amu hi. Akiang uah, “Juda mi namdang toh kithuah leh pai asianlouhdan noumau mah in na thei uhi; himahleh kuamah siang lou leh nin ka chih ding ahi kei chih Pathian in ahon theisak hi.

Huaiziak in na hong saptak in sel lou in ka hong pai hi. Huchi in ka hon dong ahi, bangziak a hon sam na hi ua le?” achi hi. Huan Kornelia in, “Ni li ahita, tu hun bang tan in, ka inn ah, dak kuana hun thumna ah ka thum a; ngai in, ka ma ah puan vaktak silh mi khat ahong dingh a, ‘Kornelia, na thumna zak in a-omta, mi kiang a na thilthawnpiakte leng Pathian in atheigige hi. Huaiziak in Joppa ah Simon, Peter achih uh, sam ding in mi sawl inla, na kiang ah sam in; amah tuipi gei ah savunbawlpa Simon inn a tung ahi, amah ahong tun chiang in na kiang ah thu agen ding hi, achi hi. Huaiziak in na kiang ah mi ka hon sawl pah hi; na hong pai ahoih ahi. Huchi in Toupa'n thu ahon piak peuhmah thei ding in tu'n ah Pathian mitmuh in i vek un hiai ah i om uhi,” achi hi.Kornelia Inn A Peter Thugen Huan Peter in agen a, “Pathian in mi deihsak tuam anei kei chih, diktak in ka thei hi. Himahleh nam chih lak ah kuapeuh amah kihtakdan siam a, diktak a gamta peuhmah, apahtak mi ahi naknak uhi. Ama'n khamuanna tanchinhoih, Jesu Khrist tungtawn in Israel suante kiang ah agen a (amah mi tengteng Toupa ahi), Johan in atangkou pihpih baptisma nung in, hiai tanchinhoih, Galili gam a kipan ahong thang pan a, Judia gam tengteng ah athangsuak a, noumau leng na thei uhi. Nazaret Jesu tungtang thu, huchi a Pathian in amah Kha Siangthou leh thilhihtheihna a athaunilhdan, Pathian akiang a a-om ziak in amah mi tung a thil hoih hih leh diabol gawt tengteng hihdam in avialvak vak hi.

Judate gam ah leh Jerusalem a athilhih tengteng theihpihte ka hi uh, amah sing dawn ah khai in athat uhi. Amah Pathian in ani thum ni in akaithou nawn a, chiantak in akitheisak hi. Himahleh mi tengteng kiang ah ahi kei, Pathian in theihpih dia asehkholhte kiang kia ah ahi koute, misi lak a kipan athohnawn nung a akiang a ne a dawnte kiang ah. Amah misi leh mihingte tung a Vaihawmpa dia Pathian seh ahi chih, mi kiang a tangkoupih leh theisak ding in Pathian in thu ahon pia hi. Kuapeuh amah gingta amin ziak in khelhnate ngaihdam in a-om ding uh chih hiai a tanchin zawlnei tengteng in ana theihsak det uh ahi,” achi hi.Zentelte Tung A Kha Siangthou Tunna Peter in huai thu agen laitak in thuzate tengteng tung ah Kha Siangthou ahong tung hi. Zeksumte lak a agingtate Peter hon zui peuhmah in Kha Siangthou thawnpiak Zentelte tung ah leng sunbuak ahih ziak in lamdang asa mahmah uhi. Paute a thu gen in Pathian phat in aza uhi. Huan Peter in apuang a, “Hiai mite, eimah bang a Kha Siangthou tang sam, baptisma ding in tui zat kuama'n akham thei dia hia?” achi hi. Huchi in Toupa min a baptisma tan ding thu apia hi. Huai khit in ni bangzah hiam taam ding in akhou uhi.

Huan Judia gam a sawltak leh unau omte'n Zentelte'n leng Pathian thu agingta uh chih azata uhi. Huchi in Peter, Jerusalem atuntouhtak in, zeksumte'n akiang ah, “Zeksumloute inn ah lut in, akiang uah na ne,” chi in akalhta uhi. Himahleh Peter in abul a kipan in kizom zel in akiang uah ahilhchian hi. “Joppa ah thum in ka om a, huan ihmu bang in ka om a, banghiam bawm, puan liantak bang aning li a kikhih, van a kipan khiaksuk bang in ka mu a; ka kiang ngeingei ahong tung hi. Huai tuh ka en kilkel a, ka ngaihtuah a, ‘Lei a ganhing khe li nei leh gamsate chi chih, awm a kitholh ganhingte leh tungleng vasate ka mu hi. Huan aw in, ‘Peter, thou in; gou inla, ne in, hon chi in’ ka za hi. Himahleh ke'n, ‘Toupa, hilou e, siang lou leh nin bangmah ka kam ah alut ngei kei, ka chi hi. Himahleh van a kipan aw in, anihveina in, ‘Pathian in ahihsiangthousa nang siang lou chi ke'n, chi in ahon dawng hi. Huchibang ngen in thumvei ahong om a; huan bangkim van ah khaitouh in a-om nawnta hi. Peter In Athilhih Agum Huan Kha in kuamah khentuam nei lou a amau zui ding in ahon sawl hi. Hiai unau guk in leng ahon zui sam ua, huai mi inn ah ka lutta uhi. Huan ama'n ka kiang uah, a-inn a angel kilak amuhdan leh angel in akiang a, Joppa ah mi sawl a, Simon Peter achih uh, pisak ding leh; ‘Ama'n thu ahon hilh ding a, huai mi thu in nang leh na inkuanpihte hotdam in na om ding uh’ achihdan leng ahon hilh hi.

Huan thu ka gen patleh, achil a eite tung a ahong tun bang mah in, atung uah Kha Siangthou ahong tungta hi. Toupa thu, Johan in tui in abaptis zel; himahleh nou zaw Kha Siangthou a baptis in na om ding uh achih ka hon theikhe nawn uhi. Huchi in Toupa Jesu Khrist i gintak ua, Pathian in thilthawnpiak ahon piak amaute kiang a apiak sam, kei Pathian sel vual ka hi a hia?” achi hi. Huai thu azak un adaita ua, huchi ahihleh, “Pathian in Zentelte leng hing ding a kisik phalta ahi ve maw,” chi in Pathian aphat uhi.Antiok Khua A Saptuamte Huan Stephen ziak a sawina thuak dalhzakte, Phoinisia gam, Kupra tuikulh leh Antiok khua pha in apai ua, Judate kiang kia ah lou ngal kuamah kiang ah thu agen kei uhi. Himahleh alak ua akhen tuh Kupra tuikulh leh Kurini a mite ahi ua, huai mite'n Antiok khua atun un Grikte leng ahoupih ua, Toupa Jesu tanchinhoih ahilh samta uhi. Huan Toupa khut in amaute apanpih a; mi tampi in agingta ua, Toupa lam ahong nga chiatta uhi. Huan atanchin thu uh Jerusalem a saptuam omte bil ah alutta a; huchi in Antiok kho pha in Barnabas asawlkhia uhi. Amah ava tung a, Pathian hehpihdan amuh in akipak a, phatuamngaitak in Toupa len gige ding in avek un ahanthawn hi. Barnabas mihoihtak ahi a, Kha Siangthou leh ginna a dim ahi. Huan Toupa kiang ah mi tampi a behlap in a-omta uhi. Huan Saul zong ding in Tarsas ah Barnabas ahoh hi. Amuh in Antiok ah ahon pi hi. Huan kum khat hilhial saptuamte kikhopna ah apang zel ua, mi tampi leng thu ahilh uhi. Antiok ah ahi nungzuite, “Khristian,” achih masakpen uh. Huai lai in zawlnei kuahiam Jerusalem a kipan in Antiok ah ahohsuk hi. Alak ua mi khat amin Agabas kichi adingh a, khovel tengteng ah kial thupitak atung dek chih Kha hilh in atheisak a; huai kial tuh Klaudias vaihawm lai in ahong tungta hi. Huchi in nungzuite'n atheihdan chiat un Judia gam a unau omte kiang ah panpihna khak atum uhi. Huai tuh ahihta ngei uhi, Barnabas leh Saul khut ah upate kiang ah akhak uhi.

Huai lai in Kumpipa Herod in saptuamte lak a kuate hiam hihgim tum in akhut alikta hi. Huan Jakob, Johan unau, namsau in asatlum hi. Huai in Judate akipaksak chih atheih in, Peter leng mat atum zel hi. Huai ni tuh Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh Ni ahi.Peter Suangkul Tanna Huan amat nung in suangkul ah akhum a, sepaih pawl li, li chiat zel in, akivenkhelsak hi; Paikan Ankuanglui nung in mi tengteng kiang ah pikhiak atum hi. Huaiziak in suangkul ah Peter a-omsak tadih hi; himahleh, saptuamte'n amah a ding in phatuamngaitak in Pathian kiang ah athumsak uhi. Herod in apikhiak ding zan in sepaih nih kikal ah khainiang nih bun in Peter a-ihmu a; avengte kongkhak bul a om in suangkul aveng uhi. Ngai in, Toupa angel khat akiang ah ahong dingh a, suangkul sung ah vak ahong tang hi; huan Peter nak ah abenghalh a, “Thou meng in,” achi hi. Huan akhut a kipan khainiangte atolhkhesuk hi.Peter Hutkhiakna Huan angel in akiang ah, “Na puan silh inla, na khetuam bun in,” achi hi. Huan ama'n huchibang in ahih hi. Angel in akiang ah, “Na puan silhhoih inla, hon zui in,” achi hi. Huan Peter apawt a azuita hi, angel tatdan atak hia ahih athei kei, mengmu bang a amuh hiam akisa hi. Huan chingmi masa leh azom akhen nung un, khopi lutna sik kongpi ava tung ua, huai tuh amau a ding in akihong tawmta hi; huan apawt ua, kongzing khat akheng ua; huai a kipan angel in amah paisanta hi. Huan Peter ahalhtak in, “Herod khut leh Juda mite lametna tengteng a kipan a hunkhe ding a Toupa'n a-angel hon sawlkhia ahi chih tu in diktak in ka theita,” achi hi.

Martar Jakob Kongpi kongkhak a kiuhtak in, nungak khat amin Rhoda, adawng ding in ava hoh hi. Peter aw azaktak in akipah ziak in kong hon lou in atailut nawn a, kongkhak bul ah Peter adingh chih ava gen hi. Himahleh amau akiang ah, “Ahai na hita ve,” ana chi uhi. Ama'n bel, “Hi petmah ahi,” chi in apang teitei hi. Amau, “A-angel hi in teh,” achi lai uhi. Himahleh Peter in kongkhak akiukiu a; ahon ualeh amah amu ua, lamdang asa uhi. Huchi in ama'n amaute dai ding in akhutvan a, Pathian in suangkul a kipan amah apikhiakdan ahilhta hi. “Hiai thute Jakob leh unaute kiang ah va hilh un,” achi hi. Huan apawt a mun dang ah ava pai hi. Ni ahong suahtak in, Peter tung a bang thil tung hiam, chi in buai chihtak in sepaihte abuai uhi. Huan Herod in amah azong a amu kei, avengtute a-enchian a, thah ding in thu apeta hi. Huan Judia gam a kipan Kaisaria ah ahohsuk a, huai ah a-om nilouh hi.Herod Sihna Huan Tura leh Sidon a mite tung ah Herod alung hi kei mahmah hi; amau thukhat sat in Blastas, kumpipa lupna ngakpa, alawm in abawl ua, kumpipa kiang ah hong pai ua, amah a kipan nek-le-dawn ngah zel ahih ziak un akholamte uh toh kilemna angen uhi. Huan ani chiam ni in kumpipa Herod in kumpi puan asilh a, alaltutphah a tu in akiang uah thu agen hi. Mi tengteng in, “Hiai pathian aw ahi, mihing aw ahi kei,” achi ua, akikou zuazua uhi. Ama'n Pathian kiang a thupina apiak louh ziak in Toupa Angel in amah pah a, hut in ane a, asita hi. Pathian thu bel adalh a, apung zel hi. Barnabas leh Saul in nna asep khit un, Jerusalem a kipan akik nawnta ua, Johan, amin dang Marka achih uh leng atonpih uhi.

Antiok a saptuam omte lak ah zawlnei leh thuhilhmi kuate hiam a-om ua; huaite Barnabas, Niger achih uh Simeon, Kurini khomi Lusias, kumpipa Herod toh khangkhawm Manaen leh Saul ahi uhi. Huan Toupa nna sem a an angolh lai un, Kha Siangthou in, “Barnabas leh Saul ka sapna nna sem ding in kei a ding in hon koihtuamsak un,” achi hi. Huchi in an angawl ua, athum khit un atung uah akhut uh akoih ua, apaisakta uhi.Kupra Tuikulh Ah Paul Leh Barnabas Huchi in Kha Siangthou sawlkhiak in apai ua, Seliusia ah ahohsuk ua, huai a kipan in Kupra tuikulh ah long in apai uhi. Salamis a a-om lai un Judate sinagog ah Pathian thu agen ua; Johan leng amaute panpih ding in atonpih uhi. Huan tuikulh gam Paphos kho pha in anawksuak ua, bumsiam, zawlnei tak lou, Juda mi khat amu ua, amin tuh Bar Jesu ahi. Huai mi gam-ukpa Serjia Paulus, mipiltak kiang a om ahi. Huai gam-ukpa'n Barnabas leh Saul asam a, Pathian thu zak atum hi. Himahleh bumsiam Elimas, (huai tuh ama minkhiakna ahi a), amau nasep dal in ginna a kipan gam-ukpa heimang atum hi. Huchi in Saul, Paul leng kichi; Kha Siangthou in adim a, amah a-ensal hi. “Nang, mi khem leh huathuai chiteng a dim diabol tapa, diktatna tengteng melmapa aw, Toupa lam diktatte hihsiat na tawp kei ding maw? Thei in, tu in Toupa khut na tung ah atu hi, na mit ahong taw ding a, bang tan hiam khovak na mu kei ding,” achi hi. Huchi in khomui leh mial in amah akhuh pah a, khut a kai ding mi zong in amai puampuam hi.

Huan gam-ukpa'n huai thilhih amu a, Toupa sinsakna lamdang asa mahmah a, agingtata hi.Pisidia Antiok A Paul Thugen Paul Leh Barnabas Sawlkhiakna Himahleh amau Perga a kipan apai zel ua, Pisidia gam a Antiok khua atung uhi; huan Sabbath ni in sinagog ah alut ua, atu uhi. Dan leh zawlneite laibu asim khit un, sinagog upate'n akiang uah mi asawl ua, “Unaute aw, mite hanthawnna thu banghiam na neih uleh gen un,” achi uhi. Huan Paul adingh a, akhut a zap in agen a, “Israel mite leh Pathian laudan siamte aw, ngai un. Hiai Israel chite Pathian in i pipute atel a, Aigupta gam a ataam lai un ahih thupi mahmah a, ban thahat in amaute huai a kipan in apikheta hi. Huan kum sawmli gamdai ah athilhihte uh athuak teitei hi. Kanaan gam a nam sagihte ahihsiat khit in, agam uh aisan a hawm in, aluah ding un apia hi. Huaite nung kum zali-le-sawmnga sung teng, zawlnei Samuel hun tan in vaihawmte ape zel hi. Huan huai nung in kumpipa angen ua; Pathian in, Saul kichi, Benjamin nam a Kish tapa, kum sawmli sung amau apia hi. Amah asuanmang nung in akumpipa ding un David abawlta hi; Pathian in huai thu theisak in, David, Jesse tapa, ka lungtang bang pumi ka mukheta, ama'n ka deihlam ahih ding,” achi hi. Hiai mi suan a kipan in Pathian in athuchiam bang in Israelte kiang ah Hondampa, Jesu kichi ahon dinkhia hi. Amah ahong pai ma in Johan in kisikna baptisma thu Israel mi tengteng kiang ah ana hilh masa hi. Huan Johan in asep ding azoh kuan in, “Noute'n kei kua na hon sa ua? Amah zaw ka hi kei hi.

Himahleh ngai un, ka nung ah mi khat ahong pai dek, kei zaw akhepek a khetuam phel tak leng ka hi kei,” achi hi. “Mite leh unaute, Abraham suante leh Pathian laudan siam Zentelte tengteng aw, noute kiang ah hiai hotdamna thu piak in a-omta hi. Jerusalem a omte leh amakaite un, amah atheih louh ziak ua siam louh atansak lai un, zawlneite thute Sabbath teng a asimte uh tangtungsak ana hi uhi. Asihna ding khop atung a bangmah amuh louh nung un leng, Pilat kiang ah hihlup ding in angen uhi. Huan athu zawlneite'n agelhkholh tengteng uh ahihtangtun khit un, sing a kipan in alakhia ua, han ah asialta uhi. Himahleh Pathian in misi lak a kipan akaithou nawnta hi. Huchi in Galili gam a kipan Jerusalem a amah toh hohtoute kiang ah ni sawtpi akilak a; huai mite mah mi kiang a athu theihpihte ahi uhi. Kou leng pipute kiang ah huai thuchiam a Tanchin kipahhuai ka hon puangzak uhi. Huchi a Pathian in Jesu akaihthoh, ei atate kiang ah huai thuchiam tuh ahihtangtung hi. Sam nihna ah, ‘Nang zaw ka tapa na hi a, tuni in ka hon neikhia hi, chih gelh bang in. Muatna mun a pai nawn lou ding in Pathian in amah misi lak a kipan akaihthohdan ding hiai bang in agen hi, David kiang a hehpihna ka chiamte nangmah ka hon pe ding,” chi in. “Huaiziak in Sam dang ah, ‘Na Mi Siangthou muatmang na phal kei ding, achi behlap hi. David zaw, Pathian vai hawmsak bang in ama khang hun a nna asep khit in, a-ihmu a, apipute kiang ah asial ua, amuatmangta hi. Himahleh Pathian kaihthoh pen in zaw muatna amu kei hi. Huchi in unaute aw thei un; amah ziak in khelhna ngaihdamna thu na kiang ua gen ahi.

Kuapeuh agingta tuh bangkim ah amah siamtansak in a-om, huai lah Mosi Dan in siamtansak in na om thei kei uhi. Huaiziak in pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw zawlneite a agen uh na tung uah ahong tung kha ding hi.” “Musitte aw, en un,lamdang sa unla, mangthang un;na damsung un nna khat ka sem hi,huai nna mi'n hon hilh mah le uh,na gingta kei hial ding uhi, chih,” achi hi. Huan apawt un, Sabbath nawn chiang a huai thute gen nawn ding in angen uhi. Huan omkhawmte akikhentak un, Judate leh phungkaite Pathian limsak lak a mi tampi in Paul leh Barnabas azui zel ua; amau ana houpih ua, Pathian hehpihna a om gige ding in ahanthawn uhi.Zentelte Kiang Lam Ngatna Huan Sabbath nawn in akhozang phial un Pathian thu ngaikhe ding in ahong kikhawm uhi. Himahleh Judate'n mipite amuhtak un ahaza mahmah ua; Paul thugente kalh in agensia uhi. Huchi in Paul leh Barnabas in hangsantak in adawng ua, “Pathian thu noumau kiang ah gen masak ding him ahi; himahleh na nial ua, tangtawn a hing tak lou a na kiseh nung un, thei un, Zentelte lam ka ngata uh,” achi uhi. Huchibang in Toupa'n thu ahon pia hi, “Zentelte hihvakpa ding in ka hon sep a, kawlmong pha a Hondampa dia na omtheihna ding in, chih gelh bang in,” achi hi. Zentelte'n huai thu azak un, akipak ua, Toupa thu apahtawi ua, tangtawn a hing ding a sehkholh peuhmah in agingta uhi. Toupa thu huai gam kimvel ah adalhta hi. Himahleh Judate'n numei zahtakhuai Pathian limsakte leh kho upate hanthawn in, Paul leh Barnabas soisasak in, agam ua kipan adelhkhia uhi. Amau leng atung uah akhepek ua leivui asingkhia ua, Ikoniam ah apaita uhi. Huan nungzuite kipahna leh Kha Siangthou in adim chiat uhi.

Ikoniam ah Judate sinagog ah alutkhawm ua, thu agen zel uhi, huchi in Judate leh Grik mipi tampi in leng agingtata uhi. Himahleh agingta nuam lou Judate'n Zentelte lungsim atokthou ua, unaute ahosak uhi. Huaiziak in Toupa ah hangtak a thu gen in huai ah sawt sim a-om uhi. Ama'n chiamtehna leh thillamdangte akhut ua hihsak in, ahehpihna thu atheisak zel hi. Himahleh khua a mipite akilangta ua, akhen in Judate agum ua, akhen in sawltakte agum uhi. Zentelte leh Judate aheutute uh toh pangkhawm in sawltakte simmohhuaitak a bawl a suang a den atup lai un, amau ana thei ua, Likonia gam mah, Listra leh Darbi ah leh akim gam ah ataimang uhi. Huai ah tanchinhoih agen zom zel uhi.Listra Ah Paul Leh Barnabas Listra ah khezaw kuahiam atu a, apian tung a pan khebai him ahi a, khe in apai ngei kei hi. Huai mi'n Paul thugen angaikhia a; huan Paul in a-en gegu a, damna ding in ginna anei chih athei a, aw ngaihtak in, “Na khe in dingtang in,” achi hi. Huan amah atawm a, khe in apaita hi. Mipite'n Paul thilhih amuh un, Likonia pau in aw ngaihtak in, “Mihing melpu in i kiang uah pathiante ahong sukta uh e!” achi uhi. Amaute'n Barnabas pen, “Jupiter” achi ua, Paul bel thugenpi pen ahih ziak in, “Hermes” achi uhi. Huan Jupiter siampu, khopi lutna a atempul om in, bawngtalte leh pakkhigui limte kongpi ah ahon tawi a, mipite toh biakna ding in lat atum uhi. Paul Leh Barnabas Ikoniam Ah Pathian in nidanglai in nam chih amau lampi chiat zuih aphal hi.

Himahleh amah theihsakna om lou in akibawl kei, huchi in thil ahihhoih zel a, van a kipan in vuahtui ahon pia a, na lungtang uh nek ding leh kipahna a hihdim gige akei hiam,” achi uhi. Huchi in huai thu in mipite'n amaute biakna dia gan agoh ding uh akhamzou teitei hi. Himahleh Antiok leh Ikoniam ah Juda mi kuate hiam ahong ua, mipite akhempukta uhi; huchi in suang in Paul adeng ua, si hi a agintak ziak un khua a kipan akaikhia uhi. Himahleh nungzuite akim a adin lai un, ahong thou a, khua ah alut nawnta hi. Huan azing in Barnabas toh Darbi ah apaita uhi.Siria Antiok A Kik Nawnna Huan huai khuate kiang ah tanchinhoih ahilh ua, nungzui tampi abawl nung un Listra, Ikoniam leh Antiok khua ah akik nawn uhi. Gim tampi thuak in Pathian lalgam i lut ding ahi him ahi, chi in nungzuite lungsim ahihkip ua, ginna a om gige ding in ahanthawn uhi. Huan saptuam pawl teng ah upate asehsak ua, an ngawl kawm a athum khit un, agin uh Toupa kiang ah akemsak zelzel uhi. Pisidia gam atawnsuak ua, Pamphilia gam atung uhi. Perga a thu agen khit un Attalia ah ahohsuk uhi. Huai a kipan in long in apawt ua, Antiok khua ahong tung nawnta uhi. Huai mun ahi tua athilhih khitsa uh hih ding a unaute'n Pathian hehpihna a kemsak a asawlkhiakna uh. Huan a tun nung un asaptuamte asamkhawm ua, Pathian in, amaute zang a athilhihte leh Zentelte a dia ginna kongkhak ahonsakdan ahilh uhi. Huan nungzuite kiang ah sawt sim a-om uhi.

Mi kuate hiam Judia gam a kipan in ahong suk ua unaute kiang ah, “Mosi Dan bang a zek na sum kei uleh hotdam na hi thei kei ding uh,” chi in ahong gen uhi. Huchi in Paul leh Barnabas in amaute kalh in nakpitak a kisel a akilan ziak un, huai thubuai tungtang a Jerusalem a sawltakliante leh upate va mu ding in Paul leh Barnabas, leh alak ua kuate hiam asep uhi. Huchi in saptuamte'n ava kha ua, amau Zentelte hong kikhekdan thu gen zel in, Phoinisia gam leh Samaria gam atawnsuakta uh; huchi in unaute tengteng akipaksak mahmah uhi. Jerusalem atuntouh un saptuam pawlte, sawltakte, upate'n ana kipahpih ua; Pathian in amau zang a athilhihte apuangkhe zelzel uhi. Himahleh Pharisai pawl a mi gingta kuate hiam akisa ua, “Zentelte zeksum ding leh Mosi Dan azuih chiat ding uh ahi,” achi uhi.Jerusalem A Saptuam Khawmpi Huan sawltakliante leh upate, huai thu ngaihtuah ding in akikhawm uhi. Nakpi a akisel nung un Peter adingtou a, akiang uah, “Mite leh unaute aw, Zentelte'n keimah kam a tanchinhoih thu za a gingta ding a, Pathian in nidanglai a na lak ua kipan ahon sehdan na thei uhi. Lungsim theipa Pathian in eite hon piak bang mah in Kha Siangthou akiang ua pe sam in atung uah akipak chih atheisak hi. Huan eite leh amau khentuam nei lou in ginna in alungsim uh ahihsiangthou hi. Huchi in i pipute leh eite'n i zuih zoh louhsa hakkol, tu'n ah nungzuite tung a ngak tum a bangziak a Pathian kalh na hi ua? Amau gintak bang mah in eite'n leng Toupa Jesu hehpihna ziak a hotdam ding hi in i kigingta ngal ua,” achi hi.

Barnabas leh Paul in, amaute zang a Pathian in Zentelte lak a chiamtehna leh thillamdang ahih thu agen lai un mipite'n ngaikhia in adai sipsip uhi. Huchi a mipite adaih sipsip zoh un Jakob in adawng a, “Unaute aw, ka thu ngaikhia un, chi in agen sam hi. Simeon in, Pathian in amah min pu ding leh alak ua kipan mite lakhe ding in Zentelte aveh tungthu agenta hi. Zentel Gingtute Leh Mosi Dan Huai khit chiang in ka kik nawn ding a, David biakbuk chimsia ka bawl nawn ding a, asiatna lai ka puah ding a, ka tungding nawn ding. Midang akhosuaksunte leh ka min pu Zentelte ka min kikoppihte'n, Toupa azonna ding un huai thilte tengteng ahihta hi,” chi in. “Khovel siamchil a kipan hiai thu theisakpa Toupa'n achi,” chih gelh ahi. “Huaiziak in Zentelte lak a Pathian lam ngate hihgim kei ni chih ka thusawm ahi. Milim biakna in abuahsak thilsiang lou, kingaihna nin, sa heklup leh sisan nek atawpsanna ding un akiang uah laigelh zaw lehang, ka chi pen hi. Mosi Dan lah nidanglai a kipan kho teng ah athu tangkoupih ahih ban ah sinagog peuh ah Sabbath niteng in athu sim ahi,” achi hi.Jerusalem Khawmpi Thutanna Huan sawltakte, upate, saptuam tengteng toh, apawl ua mitel, Paul leh Barnabas kiang ah Antiok a hohsak hoih asa ua; atelte uh min Judas, Barnabas achih uh leh Silas ahi ua, huai mite unaute lak a heutu deuhte ahi uhi. Hichibang in agelh ua, akhut uah akhak uh:“Sawltakte leh unaute lak a upate'n Antiok khua, Siria gam leh Silisia gam a Zentel unaute chibai abuk uhi.

Ka pawl lak ua mi kuate hiam in noute kiang a thu gen in, zeksum ding leh Mosi Dan zui ding in ahon hihbuai ua, na lungsim uh ahon mangbangsak uh chih ka za ua, amaute hiai thu gen ding in ka sawl kei uhi. Huaiziak in thukhat sat a ka kikhop un, ka deihtak uh Barnabas leh Paul, Toupa Jesu Khrist min ziak a sih khawk saloute toh, mitelte na kiang ua hon sawl hoih ka sa uhi. Huchi in Judas leh Silas ka hon sawl uhi, amau leng hiai thu mah kam in ahon hilh ding uhi. Hiai thu poimohte ka gelhte uh chih louh ngal Kha Siangthou leh koute'n puakgik tuan na tung uah bangmah nga kei le ung hoih ka sa uhi. Milim biakna sa nek, sa sisan nek leh kingaih tawpsan le uchin ka chi uhi; hiaite na tawp uleh nou a ding in ahoih ding hi. Damtak in om un,” chi in.Zentel Gingtute Kiang A Laikhak Huchi in asawl un akuan ua, Antiok khua atungsuk ua; mipi asamkhawm ua, lai apia uhi. Huan asim khit un lungmuanna thu ziak in akipak mahmahta uhi. Judas leh Silas in, zawlnei leng ahi ua, thu tampi in unaute akhamuan ua, ahihkip uhi. Huan huai a sawt khop a-om nung un amau sawltakte kiang apai nawn ding in, unaute'n khamuangtak in apawtsak nawnta uhi. Bang teng hileh Silas in bel akiang ua om takdih hoih asa hi. Paul leh Barnabas bel midang tampite toh Antiok ah Toupa thuhilh leh gen in a-om nilouh uhi.Paul Leh Barnabas Kikhenna Huan ni bangzah hiam nung in Paul in Barnabas kiang ah, “Kho teng a Toupa thu i genna peuh a unau omte va veh nawn in, a-omdan uh va en lehang,” achi hi.

Barnabas in Johan, Marka achih uh, akiang ua tonpih atum hi. Himahleh Paul in bel, ama'n Pamphilia gam a amaute kiksan a, nasepna a akiang ua ahoh louh ziak in tonpih hoih asa kei hi. Huchi in nakpi in akiselta ua, huan akikhen ua Barnabas in Marka atonpih a, Kupra tuikulh lam ah long in apaita hi. Paul in Silas atel a, unaute'n Toupa hehpihna akepsak nung un apaikheta uhi. Huan saptuam pawlte hihkip zel in Siria leh Silisia gam atawnsuak uhi.

Huchi in Darbi khua leh Listra ah leng ahoh a; huai ah nungzui khat amin Timothi a-om hi. Amah gingta Juda numei tapa, apa bel Grik ahi; Listra leh Ikoniam khua a unau omte'n amah aphat mahmah uhi. Paul in akiang a hoh sam ding in adeih a; huchi in huai a Juda omte ziak in zek asumsak a, apa Grik ahi chih lah athei vek ngal ua. Kho teng a apai kawm un Jerusalem a sawltak leh Upa omte vaihawm zui ding in unaute kiang ah thupiak zuih ding ape zel uhi. Huchi in ginna ah saptuam pawlte akipta ua, niteng in akhang deuhdeuh uhi.Masidonia Sapna Huan Kha Siangthou in Asia gam a thugen akham ziak in Phrigia leh Galatia gam a tawnsuakta uhi. Misia gam ahong tun nung un, Bithinia gam lut atum ua; himahleh Jesu Kha in aphal kei hi. Huchi in Misia gam tawn in Troas ah ahohsukta uhi. Zan in Paul in mengmu bang in Masidonia gam a mi khat dingh a, “Masidonia gam ah hong galkai inla, hong huh in,” chi a thumthum in amu hi. Huan huai mengmuhna aneih khit in akiang ua tanchinhoih gen ding in Pathian in hon sam ahi, chih kichiantak a thei in, Masidonia gam ah hoh ka tum pah uhi.Philippi A Lidia Pianthakna Huan Troas a kipan long in ka pawt ua, tangtak in Samothrasi ah ka pai ua, azing in Neapoli ah ka pai nawn uh; huai a kipan in Phillippi ah ka pai ua, huai khua tuh Masidonia gam a khua khat Rome a mipemte khua ahi a, huai uk a kho poimohpen ahi. Huai khua ah ni tamsim ka tamta uhi. Huan Sabbath ni in kulh kongpi polam lui gei ah, thumna mun hi a ka gintakna uah ka hoh ua

huan ka tu ua, numei hong paikhawmte kiang ah thu ka gen uhi. Huan amin Lidia, puan sandup zuak, Thiatira khomi, Pathian bia numei khat in ka thu uh aza a; huan Paul thugen zui ding in Toupa'n alungtang ahonsak hi. Amah leh a-inkuanpihte'n baptisma atan khit un, “Toupa a ginom a na hon seh uleh ka inn ah hong tung un,” chi in ahon ngen a, ahon khou hi.Philippi Suangkul Sung Ah Timothi In Paul Leh Silas Azui Huai mi in Paul leh kou ahon zui a, “Hiai mite, hotdamna lampi nou hon hilhte, tungnungpen Pathian sikha ahi uh,” chi in akikou hi. Huchibang in ni tampi ahih hi. Huchi in Paul alungkimta kei a, akihei a dawi kiang ah, “Jesu Khrist min in asung a kipan pawt thu ka hon pia,” achi hi. Huchi in ahong pawtkhe pah hi. Huan apute'n asummuhna uh amang chih atheihtak un, Paul leh Silas ua, heutute ma ah dawr mun ah akailut uhi. Huchi in vaihawmte kiang ah api ua, “Hiai mite Judate ahi uh, ka khua uh ahihbuai mahmah uhi. Rome mite a dia kipahpih huai lou leh zuih siangloute chindan agengen uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in mipite sawltakte sual ding in ahong dingkhia ua, vaihawmte'n apuan uh asahkeksak ua, chiang a sat ding in thu apia uhi. Huan tamveipi asat khit un suangkul ah akhum ua, avengpa kiang ah bittak a ven ding, achi bikbek uhi. Huchi tel a thu apiak ziak un ama'n tanna sungnung ah akhum a, akhe uh singkol abunsak hi. Himahleh zan lai in, Pathian kiang ah Paul leh Silas athum ua, la asa ua, hentate'n angaikhia uhi. Thakhat in zin nakpitak in ahong ling a, huchi in suangkul suangphumte tan in alingsak a, kongkhak tengteng akihong pah a, saltang chih kolbutte akiphel vekta hi.

Huan asuangkul vengpa ihmu ahong halh a, suangkul kongkhakte kihong in amu a, hentate taimang uh asa a, anamsau adokkhia a, kithah atum hi. Himahleh aw ngaihtak in Paul akikou a, “Bangmah kichih ke'n, ka vek un hiai ah ka om lai uh,” achi hi. Huan suangkul vengpa'n khawnvakte azong a, asung a tawmlut in, ling kawm in Paul leh Silas ma ah abokkhup hi. Amaute apikhia a, “Pute aw, hotdam a ka omna ding in bang ahia ka hih ding?” achi hi. Huan amau, “Toupa Jesu ging inla, huchi in hotdam in na om ding, nang leh na inkuanpihte toh,” achi uhi. Amah leh a-inn a om teng kiang ah Toupa thu agen uhi. Huai zan lai mah in apikhia a, asatna golhte uh asilsiangsak a; amah leh a-inkuanpihte tengteng in baptisma atang uhi. A-inn ah apitou a nek ding alui a, Pathian agintak ziak un, amah leh a-inkuanpihte, akipak mahmah uhi. Khua ahong vak in vaihawmte'n, mimante sawl in, “Huai mite khah in,” achi uhi. Suangkul vengpa'n, Paul kiang ah athu uh ahilh a, “Vaihawmte'n nou khah ding in mi ahon sawl uh; huaiziak in tu'n hong pawt unla, khamuangtak in paita un,” achi hi. Himahleh Paul in akiang uah, “Rome khomi ka hi ngal ua, ka siamna uleh siamlouhna uh thei lou in vantang mitmuh in na hon sat ua, suangkul ah na hon khum ua; tua aguk a hon khah maw na hon sawm uh? Hilou! Amau mahmah hong uhenla, hong pikhia uhen,” achi hi. Huchi in mimante'n huai thute vaihawmte kiang ah ahilh uhi. Rome mi ahi uh chih azak un alauta mahmah uhi. Va hoh in thupha ava tawi ua, huan apikhia ua, khua pawtsan ding in angen uhi. Huan suangkul a kipan apawt ua, Lidia inn ah alut uhi. Unaute amuh un, akhamuan ua, apawtta uhi.

Amphipolis khua leh Appolonia khua tawn in, Thessalonika khua atungta ua, huai ah Judate sinagog a-om hi. Paul, adan ngeina bang in, akiang uah alut a, Sabbath ni thumvei Laisiangthou a kipan in teltak in asutpih hi. Khrist in gimthuak ding him ahihdan leh misi lak a kipan a thounawn ding ahihdan hilhchian in, ahihlang zel hi. “Hiai Jesu, athu ka hon hilh, amah Khrist ahi,” chi in agen behlap hi. Huchi in alak ua khenkhat in agingta ua, Pathian limsak Grik mipi tampitak leh numei makai tampi toh Paul leh Silas akithuahpihta uhi. Himahleh gingta lou Judate'n ahaza ua; dawr mun a migilou thadah kuate hiam akiang uah atonpih ua, mipi samkhawm in kho pumpi atokbuai ua, Jason inn aluh ua, vantang kiang a pikhiak atum uhi. Amau amuh louhtak un Jason leh unau dang kuate hiam kho heutute kiang ah akailut ua, akikou ua, “Khovel tokbuai a lumlette hiai ah ahong uh, Jason in ana zintun a; hiai mite'n Kaisar vaihawmna kalh in kumpipa dang khat, amin Jesu a-om,” achi uhi. Huan mipi leh kho heutute'n huai thu azak un abuaita uhi. Jason leh midangte tatkhiakna ding banghiam ala ua, amau tuh akhahta uhi.Beriah Khua Ah Paul Huan unaute'n azanzan in Beriah ah Paul leh Silas apaisak pah ua; huai lai ava tun un Judate sinagog ah alut uhi. Huai mite Thessalonika khote sang in ana hoihzaw ua, huchi in lungsim kipaktak in thu apom ua, athugen uh adik leh diklouh theihna ding in niteng in Laisiangthou azong zel uhi. Huchi in huaite mi tampi in agingtata ua; Grik numei zahtakhuai leh pasalte leng tampi mahmah in agingtata uhi. Himahleh Thessalonika a Judate'n, Paul in Beriah ah Pathian thu agen chih azaktak un, huai ah leng ava hoh ua, mipite hanthawn in, ahihbuai nawn uhi.

Huchi in unaute'n tuipi tan a pai ding in Paul asawlkhia ua, Silas leh Timothi bel huai ah a-om tadih uhi. Paul pitute'n Athen khua tan in api ua; Silas leh Timothi kintak a akiang a hong pai ding thupiak toh apaikikta uhi.Athen Khua Ah Paul Huan Paul in Athen a amau ana ngak lai in, huai khua milimte a dim in amu a, alungtang in na asa mahmah hi. Thessalonika Khua Ah Paul Huan Epikuria mi leh Stoik mi lak a mipil kuate hiam in leng amah ahong kiselpih uhi. “Hiai mi kamtam in bang ahia gen atup?” achi ua, akhen in, “Jesu thu leh thohnawnna thu agen ziak in gamdang pathiante thugenpa ahih tuak e,” achi uhi. Amah alen ua, Areopagus ah api ua, akiang ah, “Hiai sinsakna thak na gengen na hon theisak thei diam? Thillamdang banghiam ka bil uah na hon tun ahi; huchi in hiai thil omdan theih ka ut uh,” achi uhi. Athen khomi tengteng, huai amikhualte toh, peuh ualeh thu thak photphot gen hiam, angaikhe ding in ahunte uh azang zel uhi.Areopagus A Paul Thugen Huchi in Areopagus laitak ah Paul adingh a, “Nou Athen a mite aw, bangkim ah sabiak limsakmi na hi uh chih ka thei hi. Ka vak kawm a, na biaknate uh ka et lai in, maitam khat, atung a, ‘Theih louh pathian' a ding, chi a kigelh ka mu ahi. Huchi in thei lou a na biak uh, huai thu ka hon hilh ahi zaw hi,” achi hi. Pathian, khovel leh asung a thil tengteng siampa, lei leh van Toupa ahih ziak in khut a lam inn peuh ah a-om kei hi.

Thil tasam bang in mihing khut a nna sepsak in leng a-om kei, amah mah bangkim kiang a hinna, hatna leh thil tengteng pepa ahi zaw hi. Huan leitung maikaih teng a om ding in bul mun khat vek in nam chih asiam a, amau a ding in hunbi asehsak a, tenna ding gamgi akhunsak hi. Ama'n hon gamlat kei mahleh mi tengteng in Pathian azon ua, amai amai ua, amuh teiteina ding ua alemgel ahi. Noumau laphuahsiam kuate hiam in leng, “Eite leng asuante i hi uh, chi a agen bang un. Amah vang in i hing in i tang in, i om uhi.” Huchi in “Pathian suante i hih nung, Pathian zaw dangka-eng hiam, dangka hiam, suang hiam, mihing khutsiam leh suktuah sekte bang ahi chih i gingta ding uh ahi kei. Huchi in Pathian in i theih louh hun lai khawng akitheihmohbawl a; himahleh, tu'n ah zaw gam chih a mi tengteng kisik ding thu apeta, Pathian in amiseh zang a dikna a khovel vai ahawm ni ding achiam ziak in; amiseh tungthu amah misi lak a kipan a kaithou in, mi tengteng kiang ah atheisakta hi,” achi hi. Huan misi thohnawnna thu azaktak un, akhen in anuihsan ua; akhen in, “Hiai thu na kiang ah ka ngaikhe nawn ding uh,” achi uhi. Huchi in Paul tuh alak ua kipan apawtta hi. Himahleh mi kuate hiam amah lam ah apang tinten ua, agingtata ua, huaite lak a khenkhat Areopagus mi Dionisias leh numei khat amin Damaris leh akiang ua midangte toh ahi uhi.

Huai thilte zoh in Athen a kipan Paul apawt a, Korinth ah ahohta hi. Huan amin Akuila, Juda khat amu a, huai mi Pontus gam a piang ahi a, Klaudias in Judate tengteng Rome a kipan pawt thu apiak ziak a azi Priscilla toh Itali gam a kipan hong tung phet ahi uhi. Huai mite kiang ah Paul atungta hi. Anasep uh kibang ahih ziak in amau akikoppih in nna asemkhawm ua; anasep uh puanin bawl ahi. Sabbath teng in sinagog ah chitaktak in thu agen zel a, Judate leh Grikte thuzoh atum hi. Masidonia gam a kipan Silas leh Timothi ahong tun un, Paul tuh kha phutluih in thu nasem in a-om a, tua Jesu zaw Khrist ahi chih Juda mite kiang ah atheihpih zel hi. Himahleh akalh un agensia ua, Paul in apuan asing a, akiang uah, “Na sisan moh uh noumau lutung ah om hen; kei zaw ka hul ahi; tuban Zentelte kiang ah ka paita ding,” achi hi. Huan huai a kipan apai a, amin Titas Justas mi khat inn ah alut a, huai mi'n Pathian abe zel hi, a-inn leng sinagog toh kizom ahi. Huan Krispus pa sinagog heutu in a-inkuanpihte tengteng toh Toupa agingta a, Korinth a mi tampi'n leng za in agingta ua, baptisma atang uhi. Zan in Toupa'n Paul kiang ah mengmu bang in, “Lau ke'nla, dai lou in thu gen zel in; kei na kiang ah ka om akei hiam, sihna ding in kuamah in na tung ah khut akha kei ding uhi; hiai khua ah mi tampi ka nei ngal a,” achi hi.

Huan huai ah alak uah Pathian thu hilh in kum khat leh kha guk a-omta hi.Gallio Leh Paul Huan Akaia gam-ukpa Gallio ahih lai in Judate'n kituak in Paul kalh in buaina abawl ua, vaihawmna tutphah ma ah api uhi. “Huai mi'n dan lou bang in a Pathian be ding in mi athuzoh,” achi uhi. Paul in adawn dekleh Gallio in, Judate kiang ah, “Judate aw, hiai thil diklou thu hiam, thilhihkhelh thu hiam bek hileh, pel lou in ka hon awlmoh ding hi. Himahleh thumalte leh minte, noumau dan thu lel zaw noumau kingaihtuah zaw un; ke'n zaw huchibang thu ngaihtuah ka ut kei,” achi hi. Huan vaihawmna tutphah a kipan in amau adelhkheta hi. Huan Grik mi tengteng in sinagog heutu Sostheni ua, vaihawmna tutphah ma ah avua uhi. Gallio in athilhih uh khawk asa kei hi.Siria Antiok A Kik Nawnna Korinth Khua Ah Paul Huan Ephesa atung ua, huai ah amau anusia a; himahleh amah kia sinagog ah alut a, Judate kiang ah chitaktak in thu asutpih hi. Huan sawt deuh taam ding in akhou ua, himahleh ama'n lem asa kei a, “Pathian in aphalleh na kiang uah ka hong nawn ding,” chi in kampha in akhen a, Ephesa a kipan long in apaita hi. Huan Kaisaria ah ahong kai a, Jerusalem ah ahohtou a, saptuamte chibai buk in, Antiok ah ahohsukta hi. Huan huai a sawt kuam a-om nung in apai nawn a, nungzuite tengteng hihhat in Galatia gam leh Phrigia gam atawnsuak vek hi.Ephesa Ah Apollos Huan Juda mi khat, amin Apollos, Aleksandria a piang, mipiltak, Ephesa ah ahohsuk a; ama'n Laisiangthou anak theih mahmah hi. Hiai mi'n Toupa Lampi thu zilsa ahi a, lungsim a phatuamngaitak ahih ziak in Toupa thu ahilh zel hi, Johan baptisma thu kia athei hi.

Sinagog ah hangsantak in thu agen hi. Huchi in Priscilla leh Akuila in athugen azak un, a-inn uah leh akiang ah Pathian Lampi thu kichian sem in ahilhchianta uhi. Ama'n Akhaia gam a paikai atuptak in unaute'n ahanthawn ua, amah ana kipahpihna ding un nungzuite kiang ah lai agelhsak uhi. Huan atun in, Pathian hehpihna ziak a gingtate nakpitak in apanpih hi. Vantang theih in Judate nakpitak in aseldong a, Laisiangthou zang in tua Jesu zaw Khrist ahi ngei chih atheisak hi.

Korinth a Apollos a-om kal in Paul in saklam gamte tawnsuak masa kawm in, Ephesa khua atung a, huai ah nungzui kuate hiam amu hi. Ama'n akiang uah, “Na gintak chil ua pan Kha Siangthou na tang uhia?” achi hi. Amaute'n akiang ah, “Tang lou, Kha Siangthou a-om chih zak leng ka za kei uh,” achi uhi. Ama'n, “Bang baptisma ahia na tan uh?” achi hi. Amau, “Johan baptisma,” achi uhi. Huan Paul in, “Johan in zaw anung a hong paipa Jesu gingta ding a mite hilh in kisikna baptisma in abaptis zel ahi,” achi hi. Huan huai thu azaktak un Toupa Jesu min in baptisma atang uhi. Paul in atung uah akhut akoih a, Kha Siangthou atung uah ahong tungta hi. Huchi in pautuamte in thu agen ua; Pathian thu leng ahilhta uhi. Avek un piching sawm-le-nih vel ahi uhi.Ephesa Khua A Paul Nasep Huan sinagog ah Paul alut zel a, kha thum phial hangsantak in thu agen a, Pathian lalgam thu ahihna sutpih in, mi athuzoh zel hi. Himahleh akhen achihhak ua, agingta nuam kei uh, mipi ma a Lampi agensiattak un, ama'n amaute apaisan a, nungzuite apituam a, niteng in kisinsakna mun Tairanas ah thu hilh in asutpih zel hi. Huchibang ngen in kum nih phial ahih a; huchi in Asia gam a om tengteng, Judate leh Grikte'n leng Toupa thu azata uhi. Pathian in Paul khut in thillamdang taktak ahihsak hi. Huchi in ataksa sukha kinulna puan neu, puan tungsilh damloute kiang ah ahon tawi ua, anatnate uh adam zel hi, asung ua kipan dawite leng apawt uhi.

Huan Juda mi dawi hawlkhia chi a vakvai dawithu thei kuate hiam in, “Paul in athu tangkoupih Jesu Khrist min in ka hon vau hi, chi in dawimatte tung ah Toupa Jesu min alou uhi.”Skeva Tate Juda mi siampu lianpen khat Skeva in huchibang hih tapa sagih anei hi. Himahleh dawi in akiang uah, “Jesu ka gingta, Paul leng ka thei, nou kuate na hi ua?” chi in adawng hi. Huan dawipai in aboh a, avek un azou a, anuaisiahta hi; huchi in huai mipa inn a kipan vuaktang leh liam in ataikheta uhi. Huchi in Ephesa a om tengteng, Judate leh Grikte kiang ah huai mi thu athangta hi. Huan avek un alau ua, Toupa Jesu min alianta hi. Huan agingtate leng akhen tampi ahong ua, athilhihkhelhte uh thupha atawi ua, akipulak uhi. Ephesa Khua A Johan Nungzuite Huchi lawmlawm a thupi in Toupa thu adalh a, azou zel hi.Ephesa Khua A Buaina Huan huai khit in, Paul in Masidonia gam leh Akhaia gam tawtsuak takdih a, Jerusalem a hoh atum hi. “Huai a ka hoh khit chiang in Rome khua ka sik sam ding,” achi hi. Huchi in amah nasepsakte nih Timothi leh Erastas, Masidonia gam ah apaisak phot a, amah bel Asia gam ah ataam tadih hi. Huai lai in Lampi ziak in mi buai petmah in abuaita uhi. Mi khat amin Demetrias, dangkasik sek a Diana milim bawlpa a-om a, khutsiamte a ding in kilohna tampi apia hi. Hiai mi in amaute asamkhawm a, anasep bang uh semte toh; huan akiang uah, “Pute aw, hiai nasepna i hauhna uh ahi chih na thei uhi.

Hiai Ephesa khua kia hilou in, Asia gam kho kim teng phial ah leng, Paul in khut a bawl pathiante, Pathian ahi kei uh chi in mi tampi thuzoh in, akiheisak khinta chih noumau ngei in na mu un na za uhi. Huchi in i nekzonna un athuak ding chih alauhuai kia hilou in, pathiannu thupitak Diana tempul leng ahon ngaineu ding uh. Asia gam a mi tengteng leh khovel a mi'n abiak zel uh, athupipi toh, ahong neu ding chih alauhuai hi,” achi hi. Huai thu azaktak un, aheh mahmah ua, “Ephesa a Diana thupitak ahi,” chi in akikou uhi. Huchi in akhua in apumbuai vekta ua, Gaias leh Aristarkhas, Masidonia gam a mi, Paul nungzuite, ua, kituaktak in etnop inn ah ataipih kheukhou uhi. Paul in mipi lak a lut atupleh nungzuite'n aphal kei uhi. Asia gam a heutupente lak a khenkhat kuate hiam Paul lawmte ahi ua, akiang ah mi asawl ua, etnop inn ah lut teitei lou ding in akun uhi. Omkhawmte abuai ua, mi tamzaw in akikhopna san uh leng athei kei uh, khenkhat thukhat in akikou ua, khenkhat thudang in akikou uhi. Mipi lak a mi khenkhat in Alexander, asiamna thu gendan ding ahilhta ua, Judate'n amah malam ah asawnphei uhi. Huan Alexander in akhut in azap a, mi tengteng kiang ah asiamna thu gen atum hi. Himahleh amah Juda mi ahi chih atheihtak un, dakkal nih sung aw kituaktak in, “Ephesate Diana athupi hi,” chi ngen in akikou uhi. Huan khosung laigelhpa'n mipi asukdaih khit in, “Ephesa a mite aw, Diana thupitak tempul kemtu leh van a kipan a milim kia, Ephesa khuate a kem na hi uh chih, kua ahia thei lou om?

Huchi in hiai thu sel vual ahih louh nung in, na dai dide ding uh ahi, thunung veng lou in bangmah na hih ding uh ahi kei hi. Hiai mi hiai mun a na hon pite uh, tempul lokmi ahi kei ua, i pathiannu gensete leng ahi kei uh. Huchi in Demetrias leh alawm khutsiamte'n leng kua lak ah leng thubuai aneih uleh, thubuai genna innte honsa in a-om vele, gam ukpate leng a-om uhi; kihektuah uhen. Thil dang buaina nei him na hih uleh, kikhopna ngeina ah alem ding uh. Tuni a thu vengvung ziak in salh lauhuai in i omta uh, athu om ngel lou buaina bawl a ngoh theih i hi ngal ua, hiai kikhopna san bangmah gen ding thei lou ding i kei uhiam,” achi hi. Huan huchibang thu agen khit in omkhawm heutute akikhenzak sakta hi.

Buaina aven nung in, Paul in nungzuite asamsak a, ahanthawn a, kampha in akha a, Masidonia gam a pai ding in apawtta hi. Thu tampi anungzuite hanthawn in huai gam atawnsuak a, Grikte gam atungta hi. Huan huai ah kha thum ataam hi. Siria gam a long a azin dek kuan in, Judate'n amah thah asawm ziak un, Masidonia gam tawn a kilehkik atum zawta hi. Asia gam tan a amah zuite, Beriah khomi Pirhas tapa Sopater, Thessalonika a pan Aristarkhas leh Sekundas, Darbe khomi, Gaias, Timothi leh Asia gam a Taikikas leh Trophimaste ahi uh. Huaite'n ka ma uh akai ua, Troas ah hon na ngak uhi. Kou bel Tanghou Silngou Soh Louh ni abei in Philippi a kipan long in ka pawt ua, ni nga nung in Troas ah akiang uh ka tung uhi; huai ah ni sagih ka taam uhi.Tangval Eutikas Hihdamna Huan nipikal a ani masapen in, tanghou balkham ding a ka kikhop lai un, Paul in akiang uah thu agen hi; ama'n azingchiang a pai atup ziak in zankim tan hial thu agen hi. Huan indan tungnung, ka omkhawmna uah khawnvak tampi a-om hi. Huan amin Eutikas tangval khat tohlet ah atu a, nakpitak in ana ihmu hi. Huan Paul in thu agen sawt tak ziak in ama'n a-ihmut suak a thuakzou nawnta kei a, insawng thumna a kipan in aketa a, asisa in aphong uhi. Himahleh Paul akumsuk a, bohkhum in a-angpom a, “Lunglau kei un, alaitat kei lai hi,” achi hi. Huan Paul akahtou nawn a, tanghou balkham in an ane a, khovak pha in akiang uah thu agen a, huai nung in apaita hi.

Huan valnoupa dam in api ua, akhamuang petmah uhi.Miletas A Zinna Huan koute Assos khua zuan in long in ka na pai masa ua, long ah Paul tuansak ka tum uhi; ama'n khe a paina lam tot atup ziak in huchibang tuh amah geldan ahi. Huan Assos a ahon tuah chiang in, long ah ka tuangsakta ua, Mitilini khua ka tung uhi. Huan huai a kipan in long in ka pai nawn ua, azing in Khios tuikulh gal ka tung ua; huan azing nawn in Samo tuikulh ka tung ua, Troguliam ah ka giak uhi. Azing nawn in Miletas khua ka tung nawn uhi. Huan Paul in Asia gam a om sawt lou a, long a Ephesa khua khen atupsa him ahi a, ahihtheihleh Jerusalem a Pentikost ni huam tum in akinpai hi.Ephesa Saptuam Upate Kiang A Paul Thu Nanung Huan Miletas a kipan in Ephesa ah mi asawl a, akiang ah saptuam upate asamsak hi. Huan akiang ahong tun un, ama'n akiang uah, Asia gam ka tot chil ni a kipan na kiang ua ka om sung teng in ka omdan na thei uhi. Thunuailutpen kawm leh Judate'n hon thah asawm ziak ua khitui kai leh thil haksa ka tung a tungte thuak kawm in Toupa nna ka sem hi. Masidonia Leh Grik Gam Zinna Judate leh Grikte kiang ah leng Pathian lam a kisikna thu leh i Toupa Jesu Khrist lam a ginna thu ka theisak zel hi. Ngai un, tu in Kha in hon sawl teitei a ka theih ziak in, Jerusalem a hoh dia kisa ka hi, huai ah ka tung a thil hong tung ding bangmah ka thei kei; Kha Siangthou in, henna leh haksatna in nang ahon dawn hi, chi in kho teng ah ahon hilh zel hi, tuate kia ka theih ahi.

Himahleh ka kitaitehna lam ka maban tun ding leh Pathian hehpihna tanchinhoih a dia theihpihtu a pang ding a Toupa Jesu kiang a huai nasepna ka muh pen sem khin phot leng, ka hinna leng khiaklah tham in ka sep kei hi. “Huan thei un, noute tengteng, Pathian lalgam thu tangkoupih a ka vakvaknate'n ka mel na mu nawnta kei ding uh chih ka thei hi. Huaiziak in mi tengteng sisan ah ka hul ahi chih tuni in ka hon theisak hi. Pathian vaihawm tengteng avek in na kiang uah iim ka nei kei hi. Pathian saptuamte, ama sisan a aleite, vak ding in noumau leh na heute tengteng uh tung ah pilvang un, Kha Siangthou in atung uah nou heutu in ahon bawl hi. Ka pai nung in na lak uah ngehangte ahong lut ding ua, pawlte ahawi kei ding uh chih ka thei hi. Noumau lak a mi nangawn, nungzui pawlte amau lam a kaimang ding in thu tuam gen na hong om ding uh. Huaiziak in limsak unla; kum thum hilhial khitui ke kawm a, sun leh zan a michih taihilh ka tawplouhdan, theigige un. “Tu in noute Pathian leh ahehpihna ah ka hon kemsak hi, huai in noute ahon bawllian thei a, mi lungsim siangthoute kiang ah goutan ahon neisak thei lai hi. Kuamah dangka, dangka-eng leh puansilh ka eng ngei kei. Hiai khutte'n keimah leh ka lawmte taksap asepkhiak zeldan, noumau ngei in na thei uhi. Bangkim ka hih peuhmah na chin ding ua ka hih ahi, huchibang a semgim leh Toupa Jesu thu theigige kawm in mihatloute na panpih ding uh ahi; amah mah in, ‘Lak sang in piak in lukhawng anei zaw’ achih,” achi hi. Huai thu agen khit in akhukdin a, avek un athum uhi. Huan avek un akap huphup ua, Paul ngawng ah kawi in atawp uhi. Amel amuh nawn tak louh ding thu agen alungkhamna pen uh ahi. Huan long pha in amah ava kha uhi.

Huan hichi ahong hi a, amaute toh ka kikhen ua, long in ka pawt ua, huai khit in tangtak in Kos tuikulh ka tung ua, azing in Rhodes tuikulh ka tung nawn ua, huai a kipan in ka pai zel ua, Patara khua ka tung uhi. Phoinisia gam pai ding long khat ka mu ua, ka tuang ua, ka pai zel uhi. Huan Kupra tuikulh ka mu ua, veilam pang ah ka kheng ua, Siria gam ah ka pai zel ua, Tair ah long van nawnkhiak ding a-om man in ka kum phot uhi. Nungzuite ka zongkhia ua, huai ah ni sagih ka taam uhi; huan Kha theihsak in Paul kiang ah, Jerusalem a hohtou lou ding in achi uhi. Himahleh huai nite khit in ka pawt ua ka paita ua, unaute'n avek un, azi atate uh toh khopi pua dong ahong kha ua; tuipi piau ah ka khukdin ua, ka thum uhi. Huan mangpha ka kikhak zoh un, long ah ka tuang ua, amau bel a-inn uah apai nawnta uhi.Kaisaria Ah Tair a kipan long a ka pai khit un Ptolemais khua ka tung ua, unaute chibai ka buk uhi, akiang uah ni khat ka nituang uhi. Huan azing in ka pawt ua Kaisaria khua ka tung ua huai ah tanchinhoih genpa, Philip inn ah ka lut ua, amah ahihleh sagihte lak a khat ahi a, akiang ah ka taam uhi. Huai mi'n, amau zawlnei bang a thu agen zel nungak siangthou ngen, tanu li anei hi. Huai ah ni tampi ka taam ua, huai lai in Judia gam a kipan amin Agabas kichi zawlnei khat ahong suk hi.

Ka kiang uah ahong a, Paul kawnggak ala a, akhete, akhutte amah in akigak a, “Jerusalem a Judate'n hichibang in hiai kawnggak neipa agak ding ua, Zentelte khut ah ape lai ding uh, Kha Siangthou in achi,” achi hi. Huan huai thu ka zaktak un, kou leh huai khua a mite'n Jerusalem a Paul hoh lou ding in ka khou chiat uhi. Himahleh Paul in adawng a, “Bangchi na hi ua, na kahkah ua, na hon khasiatsak uh? Toupa Jesu min ziak in Jerusalem a hen kia hilou in, sih leng ngap ka hi,” achi hi. Huan khouhzoh vual ahih louhtak in, ka tawpta ua, “Toupa thuthu hi hen aw,” ka chi uhi.Jerusalem Ah Paul Huai nung in ka van uh ka bawl ua, Jerusalem ah ka hohtou uhi. Kaisaria a mi nungzuite kuate hiam, ka kiang uah apai ua, amau, amin Mnason inn, nungzui masa pawl Kupra tuikulh a mi khat ka tunna dingpa uh api sam uhi. Huan Jerusalem khua ka tun un unaute'n nuamtak in hon na kipahpih uhi. Azing in Paul toh Jakob kiang ah ka lut ua; huai ah saptuam upate tengteng leng a-om uhi.
