Paul in amau chibai abuk khit in, anasepna zang a Pathian in Zentelte lak a thil ahihsak peuhmah avek in agen hi. Unaute'n huai thu azak un Pathian apahtawi uh; huan Paul kiang ah, “Unaupa, Judate lak a gingtami tamdan na mu a; avek un dan lam ah phatuam angai lai uhi. Miletas A Kipan Tair Zinna Huaiziak in na kiang a ka gen bang un hih in; thuchiam nei pasal li ka kiang uah a-om uhi. Huai mite pi in la, akiang uah kisiangsak sam inla, asam uh amettheihna ding un amau a ding in sum seng in

huchi in mi tengteng in mi kam a na thu azak teng uh gen tham ahi kei chih athei ding ua, nangmah mah dan zui in kichiantak in na om zaw chih athei ding uhi. Zentelte lak a gingtate thu zaw, milim biakna thil nek lam ah, sa sisan nek thu ah, sa heklup nek lam ah, kingaih lam a kipan in akihulsak ding uh ahi, chi in ka gen ua, ka gelhta uhi,” achi uhi. Huan azing in Paul in pasalte atonpih a, amau toh akisiangsak a, tempul ah alut a, amaute a ding a kithoihna apiaksak chiat masiah kisiansakna ni anei phot ding uh chih, siampu kiang ah ahilh hi.Tempul Ah Paul Mat In A-om Kisiansuahna ni sagih achin dektak in Asia gam a Judate'n tempul ah Paul amu ua, mipi tengteng atokthou ua, amah ua, kikou in, “Israel mite aw, hong huh un! Hiai mi, gam teng a mi tengteng kiang a Juda mite dante, hiai mun siangthou gensepa ahi; huai lou leng, tempul ah Grik mite alutpih a, hiai in siangthou ahihbuah khin,” achi uhi. Huai ma in khua ah Ephesa a mi Trophimas akiang ah amu ua, Paul in huai mi tempul ah alutpih agingta uhi. Huan akhua in akising kheukhou ua, mite ataikhawm ua; Paul ua, tempul a kipan akaikhia ua; kongkhakte akhak pah ngal uhi. Amah hihlup atup laitak un Jerusalem a mi tengteng abuai uh chih sepaih pawl heutu lianpen kiang atungtou hi. Ama'n sepaihte leh sepaih za heutute api pah a, akiang uah ataisuk uhi; heutu lianpen leh sepaihte amuhtak un Paul vuak atawpta uhi. Sepaih heutu lianpen in ahong naih a, Paul alen a, khainiang nih butsak ding thu apia a; kua ahia ahih a, bang ahia ahih adong hi.

Mipite akhen thu khat in akikou ua, akhen thudang a akikou ziak un, buaina ziak diktak athei kei a, sepaihte giahbuk a pilut thu apia hi. Paul kalbi atun lai in mipi ahiamgam ziak un sepaihte'n amah apumzawn uhi. Mi tengteng in, “Hihmangthang un,” chi akikou in, azui uhi.Paul In Asiamna Thu Agen Sepaihte giahbuk sung a apilut dek lai un Paul in, sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah, “Na kiang ah thu kam khat ka gen thei diam?” achi hi. Huan ama'n, “Grik pau na thei maw? Tuma a mite hanthawn a, gamdai mun a mihing sangli suam a thatte heutupa Aigupta mi na hi kei maw?” achi hi. Paul in, “Silisia gam a Tarsas a om Juda mi ka hi, khopi neu liai lou khat khua-le-tui ka hi; hon hehpih inla, mi tengteng kiang ah thu hon gensak in,” achi hi. Huan alemsaktak in kalbi ah Paul adingh a, mi tengteng daihna ding in akhut avan a; huan adaih duamtak un Hebru pau in akiang uah thu agen hi.

“Unaute aw, pate aw, tu'n ah na kiang uah ka siamna thu ka hon hilh ding hi, ngaikhia un,” achi hi. Huan Hebru pau in akiang uah thu agen chih azaktak un, adai nawn sem ua; huan ama'n, “Juda mi ka hi a, Silisia gam a Tarsas a piang ka hi. Himahleh hiai khua ah Gamaliel khebul a zil a khanglian ka hi, i pipute Dan omdan kimtak zil zel a om ka hi a, tuni a noumau tengteng bang in Pathian a ding a phatuam na ngai sam ka hi. Hiai Lampi a mite that hial khop in ka sawi zel a, numei pasal ka hen a, suangkul ah ka khumsak hi. Siampu lianpen leh upate tengteng in leng huai thu hon theihpih ua, amau a kipan in leng unaute piak ding in lai ka mu hi, huan Damaskas a omte sawi ding leh hensa a Jerusalem a pi ding in ka hoh hi.Paul Pianthakna Thu(Nas.. ) “Huan hichi ahong hi a, ka pai a Damaskas kho kiang ka tun in, sun lai in, thakhat in van a kipan vak thupitak ka kim ah ahong vak hi. Huan lei ah ka puk a, ka kiang ah, ‘Saul, Saul, nang bang achia hon sawi? chi in aw ka zata hi. Huan ke'n, ‘Toupa kua na hia? chi in ka dong a. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, Nazaret Jesu na sawi ka hi,” achi hi. Ka lawmte'n vak amu ua, hon houpihpa aw aza kei uhi. Ke'n, “Toupa, bang ka hih dia?” ka chi a. Toupa'n ka kiang ah, “Thou inla, Damaskas ah lut in, thil tengteng na hih ding achih peuhmah ahon hilh ding uh,” achi hi.

Huan huai vak thupi ziak in khua ka mutheita kei a, ka lawmte'n khut in ahon kai ua, Damaskas ah ka lutta uhi. “Huan mi khat, Ananias Dan lam a Pathian limsak leh huai a Judate tengteng lak a minhoih, amah ahong a ka kiang ah ahong dingh a, ‘Unau Saul, mitvakna nei in, ahon chi hi. Huaitak in amah ka mutheita hi. Ama'n, ‘I pipute Pathian in adeihlam thei ding in ahon deih a, Diktatpa mu a, akamsuak za ding a hon sep ahi, achi hi. Na muh leh na zak thu ah mi tengteng kiang ah amah thu theihpihpa na hi ding. Huan bangziak a om maimai na hia? Thou inla, Toupa min sam in, baptisma tang inla, na khelhna hihsiang tanla, ahon chi hi. “Jerusalem a ka pai nawn nung, tempul a ka thum lai in, mengmu bang in ka om hi. ‘Kin inla, Jerusalem a kipan pawt in; ka tanchin na gen ding apom tuak kei uh, ahon chih lai ka mu hi. Huan ke'n, ‘Toupa sinagog teng a nang gingta peuhmah hentasak a, ka vuak zeldan athei uhi. Huan na thu theihpihpa Stephen sisan asuah lai un kei leng akiang uah ka dingh a, asih ding lem ka na sa a, ahihlumte puante leng ka na kem hi, ka chi hi. Huan ama'n, ‘Pai in, hiai a kipan in gamlatak a Zentelte kiang ah ka hon sawl ding ahi, ahon chita hi,” achi hi.Paul, Rome Mi Ahihna Huan huai thutan in angaikhia ua; aw ngaihtak in akikou ua, “Mi hichibang hing tak ahi kei, khovel a kipan hihmangthang un,” achi uhi.

Akikou ua apuan uh alem ua, apai ua, leivui avik uhi, huchi in sepaih heutu lianpen in Paul sepaihte giahbuk sung a pilut thu apia a, atung ah huchi tel a akikouna uh atheihna ding a soisak kawm a dottel ding in, achi hi. Savun khau a alehhensawm khit un, Paul in akiang a dingh sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, “Siam louh tansak louh Rome mi vuak ding chih nang a ding in dan toh kituak ahi hia?” achi hi. Sepaih zaheutu in huai azaktak in, sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah ahoh a, “Na thilhih ding ah pilvang dih aw; hiai mi Rome mi ana hi,” achi a, ahilh hi. Sepaih heutu lianpen ahong a, akiang ah, “Rome mi na hi maw? Hon hilh in,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Hi e,” achi hi. Sepaih heutu lianpen in, “Ke'n hiai khomi hihna sum tampi a ka lei ei ve,” chi in adawng hi. Paul in, “Kei zaw Rome mi a piang him ka hi,” achi hi. Huchi in amah dottel tumte'n apaisan pah ngal ua; sepaih heutu lianpen in Rome mi ahi chih atheih in akihta a, ahen ziak in alau hi.Sanhedrin Ma A Paul Thugen Azing in Judate'n bangziak a Paul hek ahi uhiam chih theihtel tum in, sepaih heutu lianpen in amah aphel a, siampu liante leh vaihawm tengteng kikhop ding thu apia a, Paul pisuk in, ama uah adingsak hi.

Paul in vaihawmte a-en kilkel a, “Unaute aw, tuni tan in Pathian mitmuh a ahoih lam hi a ka theih peuhmah hih in ka om hi,” achi hi. Huan siampu lianpen Ananias in, Paul kiang a dinghte kiang ah, akam betsak ding thu apia hi. Paul in akiang ah, “Nang baang nuhngou bang lelpa, Pathian in ahon beng zaw ding, nang dan bang a vaihawm ding a tu a, dan lou bang a mi bet ding na chi vial maw?” achi hi. Huan akiang a dinghte'n, “Bangziak a Pathian siampu lianpen tai?” achi uhi. Paul in, “Unaute aw, siampu lianpen ahi chih ka thei kei a ahi; na chipihte vaihawmte tung ah thuhoih lou gen ke'n, chih gelh ahi ngal a,” achi hi. Paul in akhen Saddukaite, akhen Pharisaite ahi uh chih atheih in vaihawmte lak ah akikou a, “Unaute aw, Pharisai ka hi, Pharisai tapa leng ka hi; misi lametna leh thohnawnna thu ah vaihawmte mai a dinsak a om ka hi,” achi hi. Huai agentak in, Pharisaite leh Saddukaite ana kisel ua, vaihawmte akilangkhenta uhi. Saddukaite'n, misi thohnawnna a-om kei, angelte, khate leng a-om tuan kei, achi ua; Pharisaite'n huaite teng a-om vek chih agen uhi. Huai thu in nakpitak in abuaita ua; Pharisaite lam a mi laigelhmite khenkhat adingh ua; asel ua, “Hiai mi bangmah agitlouhna i mu kei uh; kha hiam angel hiam in akiang a thu gen hileh, eite Pathian dou suak ding i hi uh,” achi uhi. Huan kituahlouhna lianpi ahong omtak in, sepaih heutu lianpen in Paul abohzan khak uh alau a, sepaihte kiang ah, ava hohsuk a, alak ua kipan giahbuk a va pitouh teitei ding achi hi.

Huan azan in, Paul kiang ah Toupa adingh a, “Khamuangtak in om in, Jerusalem a ka thu na theihsak bang in Rome ah leng na theisak ding hi,” achi hi.Paul Thah Sawmna Huan khua ahong vaktak in Judate apanghuan ua, Paul athah masiah uh bangmah ne lou dawn lou ding in akichiamta uhi. Huai thubawlte sawmli sang a tamzaw ahi uh. Amau siampu liante leh upate kiang ah ahoh ua, “Paul ka thah masiah uh bangmah chiam lou ding in ka kichiam uh achi uhi. Huaiziak in nou vaihawmte toh athu kichian nawn sem a ngaihtuah tum bang in, na kiang ua pekhe ding in sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah ahem deuh in va gentou un; kou bel na kiangnai uh ahong tun ma a amah that dia mansa ka hi uh,” achi uhi. Himahleh Paul sanggamnu tapa in athusawm uh ana za a, giahbuk ah ava lut a, Paul ava hilhta hi. Paul in sepaih zaheutu khat asam a, “Hiai tangval sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah pi in, akiang ah thu banghiam gen ding nei ahih tuak,” achi hi. Huchi in sepaih heutu lianpen kiang ah api a, “Paul, hentapa'n ahon sam a, hiai tangval na kiang a hon pi ding in ahon sawl a, na kiang ah thu banghiam gen ding nei ahih tuak,” achi hi. Sepaih heutu lianpen in akhut in alen a, asim in atuam paipih a, “Bang ahia hon hilh ding na neih?” chi in adong hi. Ama'n, “Paul tungtang kichian nawn sem a na ngaihtuah ding mah bang in, zingchiah vaihawmte kiang ah pisuk ding in Judate'n hon nget hoih asa chiat uh. Himahleh athu uh na gingta ke'n

alak ua mi sawmli sang a tamzaw in thah asawm ua, huai mite'n amah athah masiah uh bangmah ne lou dawn lou ding in akichiam uh; tu in na thu ngak in mansa in a-om uhi,” achi hi. Sepaih lianpen in tangval apaisak a, “Hiai thute na hon theisak chih kuamah hilh ke'n,” achi bikbek hi.Kaisaria Ah Paul Sawl In A-om Huan sepaih zaheutu nih asam a, “Zan ihsip hun in Kaisaria kho pha a pai ding in sepaih zanih, sakol tungtuangmi sawmsagih, tei tawimi zanih mansa in koih un, achi hi. Huan Paul tuanna ding sakol leng na ngaihtuahsak unla, gam-ukpa Felik kiang ah bittak in tun un,” achi hi. Huan hichibang in lai agelh hi. “Klaudias Lisias in Felik gam-ukpa hoihpa chibai abuk hi. Hiai mi Judate'n amu ua, athah dek lai un akiang uah sepaihte pi in ka hoh a, Rome mi ahi chih ka theih in ka hunkheta hi. Huan ahekna uh theih ut in, vaihawmte kiang ah ka pisuk a, huchi in adan uh banghiam a hek a om ahi chih ka thei a, himahleh ahekna thu uah sihna leh henna ding bangmah ka thei kei hi. Huan Judate'n amah tang uh ahi chih theihsak a ka omtak in, na kiang ah amah ka hon sawl ngal a, amah hekte leng atung a thubuai aneih peuh uh na ma a gen ding in thu leng ka pia hi,” achi hi. Huchi in sepaihte'n athupiak bang in Paul azanzan in api ua, Antipatris atunpih uhi. Huan azing in sakol tungtuang mite akiang a pai zel ding in anusia ua, amau giahbuk ah akik nawnta uhi. Huan amau Kaisaria khua atung ua, gam-ukpa kiang ah lai apia ua, Paul leng ama ah adingsak uhi.Felix Ma Ah Paul Gam-ukpa'n asim khit in, Paul omna gam adong hi. Huan Silisia gam a pan ahi chih atheih in, “Nang hon hekte ahong tun chiang un na thubuai ka ngaihtuah ding,” achi hi. Herod thukhenna inn a ven ding thu apia hi.

Huan ni nga nung in siampu lianpen Ananias ahong tungsuk a, upa kuate hiam toh, amin Tertullas thugen siam khat toh; Paul tung a thubuai gam-ukpa kiang ah agen uhi. Paul asapkhiak nung un Tertullas in amah ahek pan a, “Felik hoihpen, nangmah vang a khamuang petpet a ka om ziak un leh na hon kepna ziak a hiai namte a ding a kipuahthakna a-om zel ziak in, chik lai peuh in koipeuh ah leng lungkimtak in ka pom gige uhi. Akoi abang hitaleh, nang a dia chimtakhuai hih ka ut kei hi, na migitna in thu kam khat ahihleh hon ngaihkhiaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi. Hiai mihuathuaipi, khovel a Judate tengteng tokbuaipa leh Nazarit mite pawl a amakaipen khat uh ahih ka thei uhi. Tempul hihbuah leng atum a; huaiziak in ka man uhi. Ka dan bang ua atung a vaihawm tum zaw hi ung a, himahleh sepaih heutu lianpen Lisias ahong kuan a, thagum suah in ka khut ua kipan alakhia a, atung a thubuai neite na kiang a hong pai ding in thu apia hi. Nangmah ngei in amah dongtel in ka hekna tengteng uh na theithei ding hi,” achi hi. Huan Judate'n leng huai thu huchibang ahi, chi in apanpih uhi.Felix Leh Drusilla Ma A Paul Thugen Huan gam-ukpa'n thugen ding a Paul akhutvantak in, hichi in adawng a, “Ama'n nang kum tampi hiai namte vai hawmsakpa na hi chih ka theih ziak in kipaktak in ka siamna thu ka gen ding ahi. Jerusalem a Pathian be ding a ka hohtouh nung ni sawm-le-nih aval nai kei ding chih na na thei ding hi. Tempul ah hiam sinagog ah hiam, khua ah leng mi kuahiam ka sel leh mipi ka hanthawn lam amau zong ahon mu kei uh.

Tu'n ah leng ahon hekna thu uh na theih in abul asuikhe thei kei ding uh. Himahleh hiai thu na kiang ah ka genkhe ding, Dan leh zawlneite thugelh tengteng gingta in, pawl tuam achihte uh Lampi dan bang in ka pipute uh Pathian ka be zel hi. Pathian ah lametna nei in, hiai mite'n leng huai agintak sam uh, midiktatte leh diktatloute thohnawnna a-om ding hi. Huchi ahih ziak in Pathian leh mihing tung a hihkhial lou ding in sia-le-pha siangtak nei ding in ka kibawl gige hi. “Huan kum tampi nung in ka chipihte kiang ah thilpiak ding leh thillat ding hon tawi in ka hong hi. Huai thil ka piak lai in, Asia gam a kipan Juda mi khenkhatte'n mipi pang lou leh buaina om lou in, tempul ah kisiangsak in ahon mu uhi. Hiai mite'n ka tung a thubuai nei hi le uh na ma ah hong pai in ahong hek khinta ding uhi. Ahihkeileh hiai mite ngei in vaihawmte ma a ka din lai in, ka hihkhelh bang ahia amuh uh, gen uhen. Alak ua dingh a, ‘Misi thohnawnna thu ah tuni in na ma uah salh in ka om ahi, ka chih a hiai thu kam khat ziak houh ahih kei ngalleh, chi in adawng hi.” Huan Felik hiai thilte azak a, Lampi thu atheihchet ziak in, “Sepaih heutu lianpen Lisias ahong tunsuk hun chiah na thu uh ka lem ding,” chi in akoih tadih hi. Sepaih zaheutu kiang ah, Paul zalentak leh alawmte amah hong veh leh nek-tak abawlsak utte kham lou a, vensak ding in thu apia hi.

Judate'n Paul Ahekna Uh Paul in diktatna thu, kidek thu, thukhen vaihawmna hong tung dingte asuipih detdet lai in, Felik in lauhuai asa mahmah a, “Pai nawn phot inla, hunlem ka neih hun chiang in ka hon sam ding,” achi hi. Paul in dangka apiak peuh alamen a, huaiziak in asam mun hial a, ahoupih zihzeh hi. Himahleh kum nih akivei sung in Porsias Festas in Felik mun ahon kheng a; Felik in Judate deihsakna ngah a-ut ziak in, hensa in Paul anuseta hi.

Huchi in Festas in gamukna alak nung ni thum zoh in Kaisaria a kipan Jerusalem ah ahohtou hi. Siampu liante leh Juda makaite'n akiang ah Paul tungtang thu aselam in ana theisak uhi. Jerusalem khua a pitouhsak ding in adeihsakna leng ana ngen ua; lampi a na lamtan a thah ding atum uhi. Himahleh Festas in, “Kaisaria a Paul kep ding leh amah leng huai lam a hoh pah ding,” achi hi. Huaiziak in “Huai mi'n gitlouhna nei ahihleh na lak ua thunei peuhmah in hon zuisuk in hong hek uhen,” chi in adawng hi. Alak ua ni sawm val ataam nung in, Kaisaria ah apaisuk a; azing in thukhenna tutphah a tu in, Paul hon pi ding in thu apia hi. Paul ahong tun phet in, Jerusalem khua a kipan Juda hong sukte akim ah adingh ua, suikhiak vual louh ding thubuai tampi giktak tak agen uhi. Paul in asiamna thu agen a, “Judate dan hi in tempul thu hitaleh, Kaisar tung ah leng bangmah hihkhelh ka nei kei,” achi hi. Himahleh Festas in Judate deihsakna ngah a-ut ziak in Paul kiang ah, “Jerusalem a hohtouh a, huai lai a ka ma a hiai thute lepsak na deih hia?” chi in adong hi. Paul in, “Kaisar thukhenna tutphah ma a, vai hawmsak a om ding in ka dingh hi. Judate tung ah thil bangmah ka hihkhial kei chih nangmah in leng na theichian mahmah hi. Migilou ka hih a, sihna khop hial khelhna ka hihleh, sih leng ka nial kei; himahleh hiaite hon hekna abul bangmah a-om keileh kuamah in akiang uah hon pekhe thei kei ding. Kaisar kiang ah ka tun ding,” achi hi. Huan Festas in avaihawmpihte ahoulimpih kimvel nung in, “Kaisar kiang a thu tut ding na ngen maw?

Kaisar kiang ah na pai mahmah ding,” chi in adawng hi.Agrippa Leh Barnisi Ma Ah Paul Ni bangzah hiam nung in kumpipa Agrippa leh Barnis, Kaisaria khua ahong tung ua, Festas chibai abuk uhi. Huai a ni tampi ataam ziak un Festas in Paul thubuai kumpipa kiang ah aluikhia a, “Felik in mitang kuahiam anusia hi Jerusalem a ka om lai in siampu liante leh Juda upate'n atungtang thu ahon hilh ua, siam louh tansak ahon ngen uhi. Ke'n amaute kiang ah, ahekpa uleh amah hekte akimaituah ua, ahekna thu ua asiamna thu genna hunlem aneih ma in, mi kuahiam thah ding a piakkhiak Rome mite dan ahi kei, chi in ka dawng hi. Huchi in hiai lai ka hong tun un, sawt hal lou in azing in thukhenna tutphah ah ka tu a, huai mipa hon pi ding in thu ka pia hi. Ahekte adin lai un, ka muanmohdan ngohna atung ah gitlouhna thubuai agen kei uhi. Asabiak thu ua, Jesu, mi khat sisa, Paul in ahing nawn ahi, chi a agup ziak in atung ah thubuai anei uh ana hi zaw hi. Ke'n huai thute ngaihtuahdan ding ka thei kei a, Jerusalem a hoh a, huai lai a huai thu lepsak a-utleh ut louh ka dong hi. Himahleh Paul in Kumpipa lep dia sit angen zawta hi. Huaiziak in Kaisar kiang a ka sawl theih masiah veng ding in thu ka pia hi,” achi hi. Huan Agrippa in Festas kiang ah, “Hiai mi thu kei mahmah in zak ka ut gige ahi,” achi hi. Ama'n, “Zingchiah athugen na ngaikhe ding,” achi hi. Huchi in azing in Agrippa leh Barnis thupitak in ahong ua, thugenna inn ah alut ua, sepaih heutu liante toh, khua a milian deuhte toh; huan Festas thu in Paul apilutsak uhi.

Huan Festas in, “Kumpipa Agrippa leh hiai lai a om tengtengte aw, hiai mi na muh uh ahi, atungtang thu a Judate tengteng in, hing tak nawn lou ding chi a kikou a, Jerusalem khua leh hiai lai a ka kiang a ahek uh ahi. Festas Mai Ah Paul Himahleh ka toupa kiang ah atungthu ginatak in bangmah gelh ding ka thei kei hi. Huaiziak in na ma uah ka hon pikhia hi, Kumpipa Agrippa nangmah ma a hon pi tuanse ka hi a, etchet nung a banghiam bek gelh ding ka muhtheihna ding in. Hekna kiteltak omloupi a henta kuahiam Kumpipa kiang a sawl thil haihuai hi in ka thei hi,” achi hi.

Huai zoh in Agrippa in Paul kiang ah, “Na siamna thu na gen thei,” achi hi. Huan Paul in akhut avan a, asiamna thu agen hi. “Kumpipa Agrippa, Judate'n ahon hekna tengteng uah ka siamna thu gen ding a tuni a na ma a ka din theih hampha ka kisa hi. Judate tawndan leh pupa ngeinate theisiam leh pil mahmah na hih ziak in ka kipak tuanse hi. Huaiziak in thuakzoutak in ka thugen hon ngaihkhiaksak ding in ka hon ngen hi. “Ka tuailai hun a kipan ka chipihte lak leh Jerusalem a ka omdan Judate tengteng in athei uhi. Atung a kipan a ka tanchin theite ahi ua, huchi a ka sabiakdan ua ngentelpen a khosa Pharisai ka hihdan a-ut ualeh ahon genpih thei uhi. Pathian in ka pipute uh kiang a thu achiam lametna ziak in tu in hiai ah vai hawmsak in ka dingh hi. Huai thuchiam lametna ziak in ka nam uh sawm-le-nih in, sun leh zan in Pathian nna phatuamngaitak a sem in muh alamen uhi. Kumpipa aw, huai lametna tungthu ah Judate'n ahon hek uhi. Pathian in misite akaithou ding chih bangchidan a thil hi thei lou a ngaihtuah na hi ua? “Kei mahmah in Nazaret Jesu min kalh a hihtheih teng hih thil hoih hi in ka na ngaihtuah hi. Huai bang Jerusalem ah leng ka hih zel hi; siampu liante kiang a thu mu in, misiangthoute lak a mi tampi suangkul ah ka khum zel hi; ahihlup lai un lemsa lam ah leng ka na pang zel hi. Huan sinagog teng ah ka sawi gige a, Jesu thu gensiatsak ka tum teitei hi. Huan atung uah ka gilou mahmah a, gamdang khuate tanpha in leng ka sawi zel hi.Paul in Apianthak Thu Agen(Nas.

) “Huchibang a hih ding in siampu liante thu mu in leh asawlna lai uh tawi in Damaskas ah ka hoh hi. Kumpipa aw, huchi a ka pai lai in sun laitak in, nisa vak sang a vakphazaw van a kipan in keimah leh ka paipihte kim ah hong vak ka mu hi. Ka vek un lei ah ka puk ua, Hebru pau in, ‘Saul, Saul, nang bang achia hon sawi? Sutna chiangzum tot nang dia na ahi, hon chi in ka za hi. Ke'n, ‘Toupa, kua na hia? ka chi hi. Toupa'n, ‘Na sawi, Jesu ka hi, achi hi. Himahleh thou inla dingh in; hiai na thil muhte leh na kiang a ka hon lah lai dingte sem ding leh theihpih dia sikha a nang hon bawl ding in na kiang ah ka hong kilak ahi. Mi tengteng leh ka hon sawlna mite, Zentelte khut a kipan ka hon humhing ding; amit uh hihvak ding in akiang uah ka hon sawl ahi, huchi in mial a pan vak lam anga ding ua, Setan thuneihna Pathian lam angatsan ding uhi, khelhna ngaihdamna amuhna ding uleh ahon gintak ziak ua sehtuam siangthoute lak a goutan aneihna ding un,” achi hi.Paul In Anasep Thugen “Huaiziak in kumpipa Agrippa aw, van a kilakna ka sel kei hi. Atung in Damaskas a mite kiang ah, huan Jerusalem ah, Judia leh gam chih a mite kiang leh Zentelte kiang ah leng athilhih uh kisik a, Pathian lam angatna ding un ka hilh zaw hi. Hiaite ziak in Judate'n tempul ah ahon man ua, hon hihlup atum uhi. Himahleh Pathian kiang a kipan a panpihna ka muh ziak in tuni tan in mineute leh miliante kiang a thu theisak in ka om lai hi

zawlneite leh Mosi in hong tung ding achih thu kia uh lou ngal thudang gen lou in. Huchi a, Khrist in gim athuak ding a, misi lak a kipan athohnawn ziak a mi tengteng kiang leh Zentelte kiang a vak musakpa masapen ahi ding achih thu uh,” achi hi. Huchibang a asiamna thu agen lai in, Festas in, aw ngaihtak in, “Paul, hai na hi; na theih tamna in nang hon haisak ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh Paul in, Festas hoihpen, “Hai kei veng e; thu diktak leh thu piltak ka gen zaw ahi. Agrippa Ma A Paul Thugen Kumpipa Agrippa, zawlneite na gingta hia? Na gingta chih ka thei,” achi hi. Agrippa in Paul kiang ah, “Sawt louchik sung in Khristian na hon suaksak zou dek,” achi hi. Paul in, “Sawt in tom taleh, nang kia ka chi kei, tuni a ka thu za tengteng leng keimah bang a om ding in Pathian kiang ah ka ngen ahi, hiai kolbutte chih louh ngal,” achita hi. Huan thu agen zoh in kumpipa adingtou a, gam-ukpa, Barnis leh akiang ua tute leng adingh chiat uhi. Apaituam ua akihou ua, “Hiai mi'n sihna leh kolbutna khop hial thil bangmah ahih kei,” achi uhi. Agrippa in Festas kiang ah, “Hiai mi'n Kaisar kiang a tut ding na ngen lou hileh pawt mai ding hiven,” achi hi.

Itali gam a long a pai ding thu ahihpuktak un, Paul leh henta dang kuate hiam Augusta pawl a sepaih zaheutu, amin Julias akemsak uhi. Huan Adramittium kho long, Asia gam tuipi piau a kho omte tawn ding ah ka tuang ua, tuipi ah ka paita uhi. Ka kiang uah Masidonia gam a mi Aristarkhas, Thessalonika khomi a-om hi. Azing in Sidon khua ka tawn uhi. Julias in Paul alimbawl ngial a, kihihhalh ding in alawmte kiang ah apawtsak hi. Huai a kipan in tuipi ah ka pai nawn ua, huih in ahi lou lam a hon mut ziak in Kupra tuikulh zul huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai uhi. Silisia gam leh Pamphilia gamzul tuipi ka khen nung un, Lisia gam a Mira khua ka tung uhi. Huai ah sepaih zaheutupa'n Aleksandria kho long Itali gam tawn ding amu a; huai ah hon tuangsak hi. Ni tampi, awlawl in ka pai ua, Knidas kho zawn haksapi in ka tung teitei ua, huih in hon sawnkik ziak in Salmoni zuan in Krit tuikulh zul huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai uhi. Haksatak in tui geigei ah ka pai ua, Longkhawlna Kilawm achih mun uh ka tungta ua; huai kiang ah Lasea khua a-om hi.Paul In Long Siat Ding Agenkhol Huan ni tampi abei tak ziak in leh long a pai alauhuai ziak in, An Ngawl ni akhengta ngal a, Paul in amau athuhilh a, akiang uah, “Pute aw, tua long a tuangte siatna leh manthatna thupitak i tung ua tung ding ahi chih ka thei a, avante leh long tung ah kia ka chi kei a, eimah tung ah leng ka chi ahi,” achi hi. Himahleh sepaih zaheutu in Paul thugen sang in longpu leh long neipa thu agingta zaw hi.

Phalbi douna ding in longkhawlna aginat louh ziak in atamzaw in huai a kipan a tuipi a paikhiak a, bangchi hiam bek a Phoenik khua tun teitei a, huai lai a phalbi dou asawmpih ua; Phoenik ahihleh Krit tuikulh a longkhawlna khat ahi a, simtum leh maltum lam doh ahi.Tui Tung Ah Huihpi Sim huih awlawl a ahong nuntak in adeihlam uh mu akisa ua, sikkip akhaikhia ua, Krit tuikulh zulzul ah apai uhi. Himahleh sawt lou nung in huih hattak, Euroklidon kichi, gam lam a kipan in ahong nung hi. Long ahon mutkhata a, huihlam angat theih louhtak in ka khahta ua, hon mutleng hon mutlengta hi. Kauda tuikulh neuchik petmah pansan in huih hatlouhna lam ah ka tai ua, haksatak in long neu ka bitsak thei ham uhi. Akaihkhiak nung un panpihna khaute khawng azang ua, long nuailam ah vial kawm in akhih uhi. Puanzakna bangkim apuksak ua, huchi lou in zaw Sirtis piaunel kip lou a lenlut alau ua, huchi in huih mutdan dungzui in apai uhi. Tuikihot in hon sep ek ziak in, azing in tui lak ah long a vante apaikheta uhi. Huan ani thum ni in, amau khut in long vante apaikhe nawnta uhi. Huan ni tampi nisa leh aksi leng akimu kei a, huihpi hat petmah in hon nuai a, hin himhim ka lamen nawn kei uhi. Huan an ne lou a sawttak a-om nung un, alak uah Paul adingh a, “Pute aw, Krit tuikulh a kiphel lou dia, ka thu ngaikhia hi le uchin hiai siatna leh manthatna tuah louh ding hi zen a. Himahleh tu'n ah leng khamuangtak a om ding in ka hon hanthawn lai hi. Na lak uah kuamah in hinna na mangsak kei ding uh, long zaw amangthang ding.

Amah Pathian a ka hih a, a-nna leng ka sep, amah angel tuzan in ka kiang ah ahong dingh a, ka kiang ah, ‘Paul, lau ke'n, Kaisar ma ah na dingh ding. Ngai in, long a na kiang a zin tengteng leng Pathian in ahon pia hi, ahon chi hi. Huaiziak in Pute aw, khamuangtak in om un, Pathian ka gingta hi, hon hilh bang in a-om ding hi. Himahleh bang tuikulh hiam ah zaw ahon lenkhe ding,” achi hi.Long Siatna Rome Zuan A Paul Zinna Huchi in tui thukdan ateh ua, laam sawmnih hi in athei ua, huan sawt louchik in ateh nawn ua, laam sawm-le-nga hi in athei uhi. Huan longmei lam ah sikkip li akhia ua, huchi lou in zaw suang se mun ah hon lenkhe zenzen kha ding chih alau ua; huan khovak kal angaklahtak in a-om uhi. Huan long mite'n long malam a sikkipte khiak ding bawl a kineih in tuipi ah long neu akhia ua, long taisan atum uhi. Hiai lai in Paul in, sepaih zaheutu leh sepaihte kiang ah, “Hiaite long a a-om gige kei uleh abit kei ding uh,” achi hi. Huchi in sepaihte'n long neu khaute a-attat ua, akhahta uhi. Khovak kuan in, Paul in an ne ding in mi tengteng asawl a, “Tuni bangmah ne lou a na om ua, an na ngawlna uh ani sawm-le-li ni ahita. Huaiziak in an ne ding in ka hon sawl chiat ahi; na damna ding uh; na lak uah kuamah asamzang khat leng amangthang kei ding,” achi hi. Huai thu agen khit in tanghou ala a, Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen khit in, mi tengteng ma ah abalkham a, ane panta hi. Amau leng khamuangtak in a-om ua, an ane samta uhi. Long a mite ka vek un zanih sawmsagih-le-guk ka hi uhi.

An anek kham khit un, tuipi ah buh apai ua, long ahihzang deuh uhi. Huan ni asuah in, koi lai gam ahia chih athei kei ua; himahleh, koi lai longkhawlna hiam piautak nei khat amu ua, huai tung ah ahihtheih uleh long taikhiaksak atum uhi. Huan sikkip khihnate a-attat ua, tuipi ah anusia ua; huchih lai mah in kaihheina khihnate aphel ua, huih mut ding in malam puanzak akaitou ua; piautak azuanta uhi. Himahleh tuikihot khauh nih kituahna mun ah ka lutkha zenzen ua, long in lei hetkha in, huan, long mailam atang bikbekta a, hihtat zoh louh in a-omta a, tuikihot ahat ziak in longmei lam akekgawpta hi. Huan hentate, tui liau galkai khattou a om kha ding ua, ataimang kha ding uh chih alauh man un sepaihte'n amaute hihlup mai asawm uhi. Himahleh sepaih zaheutu in Paul humhing a-ut a, athiltup uh akham a; tuileuh siam peuhmah tuipi a tawmkhiak a gam na kai masa ding leh, midang akhen singpek tung leh akhen long van tung a kitholh galkai ding in thu apia hi. Huchi in avek un gam ah bittak in agalkai vek uhi.

Huan gam a ka suahtak un, tuikulh min tuh Malta ahi chih ka theita uhi. Tuikulh gam mite'n asiam theihtawp uh suah in hon na hehpih ua; vuah ahong zuk ziak leh khovot ziak in mei atoh ua, ka vek un hon na kipahpih uhi. Paul in singlom khat atom a mei ah achih a, asat ziak in gul ahong vakkhia a, akhut a tu in atangden hi. Tuikulh gam mite'n ganhing akhut a kikhaiden amuh un, “Hiai mi tualthat ahi ding, tuipi a kipan taikhe mahleh diktatna in ahin phalta lou ahi,” achi uhi. Himahleh ama'n mei ah gul asingkhia a, bangmah achi kei hi. Amau bel abawk hiam, thakhat a puk pah a si ding in agingta uh; hun sawtpi angak nilouh ua, bangmah achi kei chih atheih un alungsim uh akheng ua, Pathian ahi achi zaw uhi.Publias Hihdamna Huai mun kiang ah huai tuikulh a hausapa, amin Publias a-om a, huai mi in ahon na kipahpih a, ni thum siamtak in ahon tungsak hi. Publias pa khosik leh santen vei in ana lum a; akiang ah Paul alut a, athum a, atung ah akhut koih in ahihdamta hi. Huai ahihdam khit in tuikulh a midang natna nei peuhmah ahong ua; adam chiatta uhi. Huai mite'n nakpitak in ahon na pahtawi ua; ka pai ding un long ah ka vante uh ahong koih uhi.Rome Zuan A Zin Zelna Huan kha thum nung in, Aleksandria kho long, phalbi a tuikulh a omsa, unau phik, Kastor leh Pollux lutang kisuanna long ah ka pai uhi. Sairakus khua ka tawn ua huai ah ni thum ka taam uhi. Huai a kipan ka paikawi ua, Rejiam khua ka tung ua; ni khat nung in sim huih ahong nung a, azing nawn in Puteoli khua ka tung nawn uhi.

Huai ah unaute ka mu ua, akiang uah ni sagih taam ding in ahon khou ua; huchibang in Rome kholam ah ka pai zelta uhi. Huan unaute'n ka Tanchin uh azaktak un huai a kipan in Appii dawr leh Khualbuk thumte omna chiang ah hong dawn ding in ahong kuan ua; Paul in huai mite amuh in Pathian kiang ah kipahthu agen a, alungmuang mahmahta hi.Rome Khopi Ah Paul Rome a ka lut un Paul bel avengpa sepaih kiang a amah kia a om aphal uhi. Ni thum nung in, Paul in Juda heutute asamkhawm a; akihoukhawm ua, akiang uah, “Unaute leh mite aw, i pipute dan tung ah bangmah ka hihkhelh louh in leng Jerusalem a kipan in Rome a mite kiang ah ahon hentasak uhi. Amau ahon etchet khit un, sihna khop hial ka tung ah bangmah amuh louh ziak un khah ahon tum uhi. Himahleh Judate'n huai asel ziak un Kaisar kiang tun lou thei ka hita kei a; himahleh ka chipihte hekna nei a hih bel ka hi kei hi. Huai lam thu a noumau hon mu a hon houpih ding in ka hon sam ahi; Israelte lamet thilte toh kisai a khainiang bun ka hi ngal a,” achi hi. Amau akiang ah, “Na tanchin Judia gam a kipan lai in ka mu kei ua, unau hiai a hong omte kuamah in na tungtang thubuai bangmah apulak kei ua, gen leng agen ngei kei uhi. Himahleh hiai pawl zaw gam teng ah gensiat ahi ngal ua, nang bangchi in ahia na ngaih chih theih ka utzaw uhi,” achi uhi. Huan ni achiam ua, huai atunna ah akiang ah mi tampi ahong ua

zing a kipan nitaklam pha in akiang uah huai thu ahilhchian a, Pathian lalgam thu atheisak a, Mosi Dan laibu thu leh zawlneite laibu thu in Jesu lam ah amaute athuzoh zel hi. Khenkhat in athugen agingta ua, akhen in agingta kei uh. Huan akituakta kei ua, Paul in thu agen khit in apaikheta uhi. Athugen tuh hiai ahi: Kha Siangthou in zawlnei Isai kam a na pipute uh kiang a athugen adik mahmah ahi chi in: “Hiai chite kiang ah va gen in,bil in zaw na za na ding ua,angaihna ahihleh na thei kei hial ding uh; muh zaw na mu ding ua,theih ahihleh na thei kei hial ding uh. Hiai chite lungtang atakta a,abilte uh ana ngong deuh a,amit uh leng asi ua,huchi lou in zaw amit un amu ding ua, abil un aza ding ua,alungtang un leng athei ding uh, akiheikik ding ua,ke'n ka hihdam kha ding hi,” achi, achih pen ahi. “Huaiziak in Pathian hotdamna thu Zentelte kiang a khakkhiak ahi chih thei un, amau bel ngaih leng angaikhe ding uh,” achi hi. Malta Ah Paul Gul In Atu Huchi a hiai thute agen khit nung in, Judate apawtkheta ua, alak uah nakpitak in kiselna apiang hi. Huchi in kum nih vengveng ama inn luahna mun ah Paul a-om a, akiang a hoh peuhmah ana kipahpih hi. Pathian lalgam thu ahilh a, hangsantak in Toupa Jesu Khrist thu agen zel a, kuamah in amah akham kei uhi.

Chibai Bukna Pathian i Pa leh Toupa Jesu Khrist kiang a kipan hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen.Philemon Itna leh Ginna Ka thumnate ah na min lou gige in, ka Pathian kiang ah kipahthu ka gen hi. Toupa Jesu lam leh misiangthou tengteng lam a itna leh ginna na neih za in. Na ginna kikoppihna, noumau a om thil hoih chiteng theihkimna lam ah Khrist lam a ahong phattuam theihna ding in. Unaupa aw, nangmah ziak a misiangthoute lungtang ahong halh tak ziak in na itna ah ka kipak in ka kha amuang mahmah hi.Onesimas A Dia Ngetsakna Huaiziak in akilawm hun hih ding in nang thu hon piak Khrist ah kingap mah leng, itna ziak in, Paul putek hial hita leh, tu a Khrist Jesu hentapa hita in, anget in ka hon ngen zaw hi. Ka ta Onesimas, kolbun kawm a ka neihkhiak, amah a ding in na kiang ah ka ngetsak hi. Tuma lam in nang a ding in aphatuam kei a, tu'n zaw kei leh nang a ding in aphatuamta hi. Amah, ka lungtang mahmah na kiang ah ka hon sawlkik nawn hi. Amah tanchinhoih a ka kolbutna a nangmah sik a nna ahon sepsak theihna ding in ka kiang a omsak nilouh ka ut mahmah hi. Himahleh na hehpihna hehpihsak teitei bang hilou in, na thu bang ahihtheih zawkna ding in, na thu lou in bangmah hih ka ut kei hi. Sawt lou kal nang ahon khen tangtawn a amah na neih tawntungna ding ziak ahi kha mai ding hi, himahleh sikha bang hi nawn lou a, sikha sang a hoih unau deihtak bang zaw in; kei a ding in deihtak ahi diak a, nang a ding ngial in sa leh Toupa ah nak hihna in chia!

Huchi in lawm a na hon simleh keimah bang in amah na kipahpih in. Huan na tung a banghiam ahihkhelh a, na thil banghiam abatleh keimah bat in bawl in. Kei Paul in, keimah khut ngei a ka gelh ahi. Keimah in ka ditsak ding hi; ka kiang a nangma'n leng bat na neih sam dan hon hilh bel ka hi kei hi. Ahi, unaupa aw, nangmah ziak in Toupa ah kipahna hon neisak inla, Khrist ah leng ka lungtang hihhalh in. Ka gen sang a thupizaw tham in na hih ding chih ka theih ziak in, na hon thuman ding chih muang in na kiang ah ka gelh ahi. Akoi abang hitaleh, huai kia hih lou in, tunna ding hon na suktuahsak in; na thumnate uh ziak in na kiang ua piak ka hi ding chih ka kigingta hi.Chibai Bukna Nanung Epaphras, Khrist Jesu a ka hentakpihpa'n chibai ahon buk hi; huchi mah bang in ka seppih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas leh Lukate'n leng chibai ahon buk uhi. I Toupa Jesu Khrist hehpihna na kha uah om hen, Amen.

Chibai Bukna Pa Pathian theihkholh bang a Jesu Khrist thumanna leh sisan theh tang ding a Kha hihtuamna tungtawn a tel a omte kiang ah hehpihna leh khamuanna hihkhan in om hen.Lametna Hing I Toupa Jesu Khrist leh Pa Pathian phat in om hen! Ama'n azahngaihna thupitak bang zel in, misi lak a kipan Jesu Khrist thohnawnna ziak in lametna hing mu ding in ahon piang thaksak nawn hi; goutan setheilou, nin baang lou, tul thei lou, van a nou a ding a sit muhna ding in; hotdamna, hun nanung a lang ding a zohsa mu ding in, ginna ziak in Pathian thilhihtheihna a ven na hi uhi. Tu in ze-etna chiteng ziak in hun sawt lou lungkham tadih mah le uchin, huai ah nakpitak in na kipak uhi. Na ginna uh ze-etna, dangka-eng mei a ze-et nung nangawn a mangthang zel sang a manphazaw, Jesu Khrist kilak chiang a phatna leh pahtawina leh thupina ding ahong hihtheihna ding in. Mu ngei lou napi in amah na it ua, tu in mu tadih kei mah le uchin, amah na gingta ua, kipahna gen vual louh leh thupina a dim in na kipak mahmah uhi. Na ginna un atup pen na kha uh hotdamna na mu uhi. Huai hotdamna thu zawlneite hehpihna na kiang ua hong tung ding thugenkholte'n akankan ua, siamneltak in azongkhia uhi. Khrist kha amau a om in Khrist thuakna ding leh thupina hon zui dingte atheihkholhsak lai in, bang hun a bangchi a hong tung ding ahia chih zonkhiak atum uhi.

Huai thu in amau nasep kisep lou in, noumau nasep asem zaw uh chih akiang uah theihsak ahita, huai thute van a kipan a sawlkhiak Kha Siangthou panpih in tanchinhoih nou hon hilhte'n tu in ahon hilh ua, huai thilte angelte'n leng vel a-ut uhi.Khristian Omdan Siangthou Huaiziak in na lungsim puan uh teng in pilvang unla, Jesu Khrist kilak chiang a hehpihna nou ahon puak ding lungke lou in lamen un. Ta thumangte bang in, na theih louh lai ua na nidanglai duhgawlna uh bang a om lou in; nou hon sampa asiangthou bang in nou leng na tatdan tengteng uah hong siangthou un; “Noute na siangthou ding uh ahi, kei ka siangthou ngal a,” chih gelh ahi. Huan khentuam nei lou a michih nasep bang chiat a vaihawmpa Pa bang a na loh uleh, hiai lai a na taam lai teng un laudan siam in om un. Na pipute uh piaksawn, na omdan uh bangmah hilou a kipan, thil se thei, dangka leh dangka-eng a tat na hi kei ua, belamnou gensiatbei leh nin baang lou sisan bang a, Khrist sisan pha a tat na hi zaw uh chih na thei uhi. Amah leilung pian ma in sehkholh in a-om ngeitak a, himahleh hun nanung ah noumau ziak in kilak in a-om hi. Amah ziak in misi lak a kipan kaithoupa leh athupina pepa Pathian gingtate na hi uh, na ginna uh leh na lametna uh Pathian a a-omtheihna ding in. Unaute it taktak ding a thutak zui a na kha uh na hihsiangthou tak ziak un lungtang a phatuamngaitak in ki-ittuah chiat un. Chi se thei lak ah hilou in, Pathian Thu hing gige leh om gige chi setheilou lak a piangthak na hi zaw uhi. “Mi tengteng loupa bangahi ua, athupina uh lengloupa pak bang ahi.Loupa avuai a,apak apulh hi. Toupa bel tangtawn ina-om gige hi,” chih ahi ngal a.Hiai ahi tanchinhoih nou ahon hilh pen uh.

Huchi in gitlouhna tengteng, khemna tengteng, lepchiahna tengteng, hazatna tengteng, gensiatna tengteng tawpsan unla, naungek suak thakte bang in khalam nawitui, bangmah hel louh lunggulh un; huai a na khantheihna ding un: Toupa mihehpih theitak ahi chih na chep tak ngal uleh.Suang Hing Leh Nam Siangthou Amah suang hing, mihingte deih louh, Pathian theih a bel tel leh manpha ahi. Amah kiang a hong pai in, noute ngei leng suang hingte bang in Jesu Khrist ziak a Pathian kipah lam kithoihna lan ding a siampu siangthou hi ding in khalam inn ah leptouh in na om uhi. Huaiziak in Laisiangthou ah:“Ngai un, Zion ah aning a suang kiphamohpen tel a om leh manphatak ka lem hi;amah gingtate azahlak kei ding uh,” chih atuang hi. Nou agingtate a ding in huai manphapi ahi,agingtaloute a ding in bel;“Inn lamte suang deih louhpen,huai mah aning a suang phatuampen ahong hita hi.” Huan “Pukna suang lehdalna suangpi ahi.Thu kigente azuih louh ziak un akisuipuk ua;huchibang ding a sehsa ahi him uhi.” Himahleh mial a kipan pawt a, vak lamdangtak a lut ding a nou hon sampa hoihna na muhsak theihna ding un, nou zaw chitel, kumpi siampu, nam siangthou, Pathian mite na hi uhi; Nidanglai in nam himhim na hi kei ua; tu in zawPathian namte na hita uh;nidanglai in zahngaihna na mu kei ua, tu in zaw zahngaihna na muta uhi.Pathian Sikhate Thunuailutna Deihtakte aw, mikhual leh khualzin na hih ziak un kha dou nakpa taksa utnate tawpsan ding in nou ka hon ngen hi. Zentelte lak a na tatdan uh kilawmtak hi hen, huchi in thil hihkhial a, ahon gensiat chiang un leng na thil hoih hih amuhte uh ziak in veh a a-om chiang un Pathian apahtawi thei ding uhi. Toupa ziak in mihing dan bawl peuhmah ah lut un

thuneihna tawi kumpipa kiang ah hiam, thil hihkhialte tung a thuk ding leh thil hoih hihte phat ding a kumpipa'n aseh gam ukpate thunuai ah lut un. Hiai Pathian deihlam ahi, mihaite haina thil hoih hih in na hihdai thei ding uhi. Noplen na hi ua, himahleh na noplenna uh khelhna khuhna ding a zang lou in Pathian sikha a omna ding in zang zaw un. Mi tengteng zahtak un. Ki-unauna it un. Pathian laudan siam un. Kumpipa pahtawi un.Sikhate'n Khrist Etton Ding Sikhate aw, mihoih leh minunnemte lak kia hilou in migiloute lak ah leng laudan siam in nou hon heute thuthu in om un. Mi'n Pathian theihna ziak in thuak louh ding thuak a lungkhamna athuak teiteileh huai pen Pathian pahtak lam ahi. Nou na thilhihkhelh ziak ua vuak na thuak un, kuhkaltak in thuak mah le uchin phatna bang na loh ua? Himahleh na thil hoih hih ziak ua na thuak ua, kuhkaltak a na thuak teitei ualeh, hiai pen Pathian kipah lam ahi. Khrist in leng nou ahon thuaksak ziak in, huai bang hih ding a sap na hi uhi; akhap a na zuihna ding un zuih ding ahon nutsiat ahi. “Ama'n thil ahihkhial kei a, akam ah khemna leng a-om sam kei.” Enghou a a-om lai in, a-enghou thuk kei a, athuak lai in avau kei hi; diktattak a ngaihtuahpa kiang ah akipe zaw hi. Khelhna lam a si khin, adiktatna lam a i hintheihna ding in amah mah in tua sing ah asa in i khelhnate apua hi; avuakna golhte ah hihdam in na omta uhi. Belam mang bang in na mang ua, tu'n zaw nou hon chingpa leh heutupa kiang ah na kik nawnta uhi.

Huchibang in, nou zite aw, noumau pasalte thuthu in om un, huchi in alak ua khenkhat in Pathian thu zui kei mah le uh na tatdan uh zoh in a-om ding uhi. Laudan siam kawm a na tatdan siangthou uh en in. Pasalte Leh Zite Zuih Ding Huchibang in tuma lam a numei siangthou Pathian gingtate'n leng amau pasalte thuthu a om in akivan uhi. Sarah in Abraham, toupa chi a athuthu a a-om bang in; thil hoih hih a, khemlauna himhim lau lou a na om uleh Sarah tate na hi ding uhi. Huchi mah bang in, nou pasalte aw, numei zaw bel kitambaihzaw ahih bang un leh hehpihna hinna tanpihte ahih bang un, theihsiamna toh pahtawidan siam kawm in theihna bang zel in na zite uh kem un, na thumna uh dal a a-omlouhna ding in.Khristian Lungsim Putdan Atawp pen in, na vek un lungsim mun khat in om unla, kilainattuah unla, thunuailut in om un. Khelhna, khelhna in thuk kei unla, salhna, salhna a thuk sam lou in, vualzawl zaw un. Hiai vualzawlna tang ding a sap na hi uhi. “Hinna it a nihoihte muh ut in khelhna lak ah alei venghoih henla,amuk leng khemna thu gen lou ding in venghoih hen. Gilou nungngatsan in thil hoih hih henla;kituahna zong in delh zel hen. Midiktatte tung ah Toupa mit atu a,abil in leng athumna lam uah adoh zel hi,himahleh Toupa mel in thil hihkhialte adou nak,” chih gelh ahi.Engbawlna A Khrist Etton Ding Thil hoih lam a phatuam na ngaih uleh na poikhoih ding uh kua a-om dia? Himahleh diktatna ziak a na thuakta bang na hih uleh, na hampha ding uhi. Akihtakhuaina uh kihta kei un. Himahleh na lungtang uah Toupa in Khrist bawl un

noumau a om, na lametpen uh hon dong peuhmah dawng ding in mansa gige in thunuailuttak leh laudan siam kawm in om un; sia-le-pha theihna siangtak nei un, huchi in nou ahon gensiatna lam uah, Khrist a na omdan hoih uh gen thanghuaite hih zahlak in a-om ding uhi. Thil gilou hih ziak a thuak sang in Pathian hoihsak lam ahihleh thil hoih hih ziak a thuak ahoihzaw hi. Pathian kiang a hon pitheihna ding in Khrist in leng khelhnate a ding in khatvei athuakta hi, midiktat in midiktatloute sik in athuak a; sa ah sihsak in a-om a, Kha ah hinsak in a-omta hi. Huai kha in suangkul a kha omte kiang ah thu ava tangkoupih hi. Huai mite'n nidanglai a Noah dam lai a long bawl sung teng a, Pathian thuakzohna in angak lai in thu amang kei ua; huai long ah mi tawmchik, mi giat lel tui a pan humbit in a-om uhi. Huan huai tui in Jesu Khrist thohnawnna ziak a hotdamna baptisma lim hon ensak a, huai tuh pumpi nitna siansakna dan hilou in, sia-le-pha theihna siansakna ziak a Pathian kiang naihna ahi zaw hi. Amah van a pai in Pathian taklam ah a-om a; angelte, thuneihnate, thilhihtheihnate amah thuthu a omsak in a-omta hi.

Huchi in Khrist in taksa a athuak ziak in nou leng huchibang lungsim in kivan un; sa a thuak khinsa in gilou atawpsanta hi. Huchi in tunung sa a om lai teng mihing duhgawlna lam bang a om lou in, Pathian deihlam in a-omta hi. Zentelte ut lam hihna, huknate, tak taksa utnate, uain hainate, zu khamnate, milim biakna kihhuaitakte tuma lam a hihsa teng i na zang khin ngal a. Pathian A Ding A Hinna Amau mihing leh misite ngaihtuah ding a mansa kiang ah atanchin uh agen ding uhi. Hiai ziak in ahi, misite kiang a leng tanchinhoih gen a hih, sa a om mihingte bang a ngaihtuah in om mah le uh, kha a bel Pathian bang a ahintheihna ding un. Himahleh thil tengteng tawpna anaita, huaiziak in na thumtheihna ding un lungsim diktak pu in pilvang un. Bangdang teng sang in phatuamngaitak in ki-ittuah chiat unla; itna in gilou tampi akhuh zel hi. Phun lou in kizintun tuah unla; michih in thilpiak na muh bang zel un, Pathian hehpihna chiteng kemhoihte bang in huaite in nna kisepsaktuah chiat un. Mi kuapeuh in thu agenleh Pathian thute bang in gen hen; mi kuapeuh in nna asepleh Pathian in hatna apiak bang in sem hen; huchi in Jesu Khrist ziak in thil bangkim ah Pathian pahtawi in a-om thei ding, thupina leh vaihawmna tangtawn in amah a ahi, Amen.Khrist Min A Thuak Hamphatna Deihtakte aw, na lak ua ze-etna thupitak hong om, noumau ze-etna ding a na tung ua hong tung, thillamdang na tung ua tung bang in lamdang sa kei un. Khrist thuaknate thuakpihte na hihdan bang zel un kipak zaw un; huchi in athupina a ahong kilak chiang in noumau leng nuamtak in na kipak thei ding uhi.

Khrist min ziak a tai na hih uleh, na hampha uhi; na tung uah thupina kha leh Pathian kha a-om gige hi. Himahleh na lak uah kuamah in tualthatmi ahih ziak hiam, midangte thilhih gensakmi ahih ziak hiam in thuak kei hen. Himahleh, Khristian ahih ziak a athuakleh zum kei hen; huai min pu ahih ziak in Pathian pahtawi zaw hen. Pathian inkuanpihte ah vaihawmna pat ahunta hi; huan eite ngei a apan masakleh Pathian tanchinhoih thumangloute tawpna bangchi phet ahi diam aw? Huan,“Midiktat nangawn hotdam liailiai ahih in,Pathian limsak lou leh migiloute koi ah bang asuak ding ua?” Huaiziak in Pathian hoihsak bang a thuakte'n thil hoih hih in akhate uh Siampa muanhuaitak kiang ah kemsak hen.

Huchi in na lak ua saptuam upate kei na upatpih uh, Khrist thuaknate theipa leh thupina hong lang ding tang sam ding in hiai bang in ka hon hanthawn hi: Na lak ua Pathian belamhonte ching unla, enkol un, sawl teitei ziak hilou in, Pathian hon deihna bang hi zaw in, punna thanghuai deih ziak hilou in, kithalawptak zaw in, na tante uh tung ah kiliansak tuan lou in belamhonte zuih ding a kibawl zaw in, kem un. Huchi in Belamchingpa lianpen ahong lat chiang in, Thupina Lallukhu tul thei lou na mu ding uhi. Upate Leh Tuailaite Huaiziak in ahuntak a nou ahon pahtawi theihna ding in, Pathian khut hattak nuai ah kihihniam un; ama'n ahon limsak gige ziak in na mangbatna tengteng uh amah tung ah nga vek un. Pilvang unla, limsak un; na melma uh diabol, humpinelkai humham bang in anawmvalh ding zong in avialvak hi. Na unau uh khovel a omte tung ah huchibang thuaknate atung sam chih thei in gingkiptak a om in, amah dou un. Huan hehpihna tengteng Pathian, atangtawn thupina tang ding a Khrist a nou hon sampa ngei in, sawt lou kal na thuak nung un ahoih bukim a hon bawl in, hon hihkip in, ahon hihhat ding hi. Amah kiang ah vaihawmna tangtawn in om hen, Amen. Ka unaupa muanhuaitak Silvanas khut in, noumau hanthawn leh huai Pathian hehpihna taktak ahi chih thei in, tomchik in na kiang uah ka gelh ahi; huaite ah dingkip un. Babulon a om noumau bang a telnu'n chibai ahon buk hi; huchibang in ka tapa Marka in leng chibai ahon buk ahi. Itna kitawpna a tawp in chibai kibuk un, na lak ua Khrist a om peuhmahte kiang ah khamuanna om hen, Amen.

Chibai Bukna Pathian leh Jesu i Toupa theihna ah hehpihna leh khamuanna noute ah hihkhan in om hen.Pathian Sapna Leh Telna Ama thupina leh hoihna ziak a hon sampa, atanchin theih ziak in ama Pathianna thilhihtheihna in hinna leh Pathian limsakna lam thu ah thil tengteng ahon peta hi. Huaite ziak in athuchiam manphatak leh thupi mahmahte ahon pia hi; huchi in utna ziak a khovel a siatna hong om taikhiaksan in; huai thuchiam manphatak leh thupi mahmahte ziak in Pathian omdan na kikoppih thei sam ding uhi.Khristian Omdan Kilawm Ahi, huaiziak tak in, thanop himhim suah in, na ginna uah hoihna hel unla, na hoihna uah theihna hel unla, na theihna uah kidekna hel unla, na kidekna uah kuhkalna hel unla, na kuhkalna uah Pathian limsakna hel unla, na Pathian limsakna uah unaute itna hel unla, na unaute itna ah itna hel un. Hiai hoihnate nou a ahih a, akhan zelleh i Toupa Jesu Khrist theihna lam ah thadah lou leh gah lou lou in nou ahon bawl ding hi. Kuapeuh huai thilte nei lou mittaw, naichikte kia mu thei, anidanglai khelhnate siansakna mangngilhte ahi uhi. Huaiziak in unaute aw, nou ahon sapna leh ahon telna hihkip ding in thanop suah semsem un; huaite na hih uleh chik lai mah in na puk kei ding uhi. Huchi in Jesu Khrist i Toupa leh Hondampa'n tangtawn gam a lutna ahon musak lo mahmah ding hi.Thutak A Kiphuhkipna Huaiziak in huai thilte nei in na kiang ua om thutak a phuhkip hita mah le uchin, huai thutak mah ka hon theisak nawn ding hi. Huan hiai pumpi a ka om lai teng noumau hon theihpih in hon tohhalh gige hoih ka sa hi.

I Toupa Jesu Khrist in hon theihsak bang in ka pumpi puanin koihkhiak hun ding hong tung pah ding chih ka thei hi. Ahi ka paikhiak nung in huai thilte na theihgigena ding un ka kisuk ding hi.Zawlneite Leh Peter Theihpihna(Mat. Mar. Luk. ) I Toupa Jesu Khrist thilhihtheihna leh ahong paina thu ka hon theihsak lai un, tangthu piltak a ngaihtuahkhiak phet zui ka hi kei ua, athupina mute ka hi zaw uhi. Ama'n Pa Pathian kiang a kipan in pahtawina leh thupina amu a, huchih lai in thupina thupitak a kipan in hichibang aw akiang ahong tung hi, “Hiai ka Tapa deihtak, ka kipahna mahmah ahi,” chi in. Huan tang siangthou a akiang a ka om ziak un huai aw van a kipan a hong suak koumau ngei in ka za uhi. Huchi in genkholhna thu kip nawn sem i nei uhi. Khua ahong vak a, zingsol aksi na lungtang ua ahong suah masiah hiai thu khawnvak mun mial a vak alimsak bang ua, na limsak uleh na hihhoih ding uhi. Laisiangthou a thugenkholh himhim eimah kihilhchet ding ahi kei chih thei masa un. Thugenkholh himhim mihing thu a pawt ahi ngei kei a, mite'n Kha Siangthou sawl in, Pathian a kipan agen zaw uhi.

Himahleh mite lak ah zawlnei takloute leng ahong pawt ua, huchi mah bang in na lak uah heutu takloute ahong om ding uhi, amaute leipa Toupa hilhial tawpsan in mi hihse thei ginna tuam, aguk in ahon lutpih ding ua, amau tung ah thakhat in manthatna atungsak ding uhi. Sinsakmi Takloute Sum deihna ziak in zuauthu in sumsinna ding in nou ahon zang ding uh, himahleh nidanglai a omsa amohtanna ding uh akhawl kei a, amanthatna uh leng a-ihmu kei hi. Angelte'n thil ahihkhelh un Pathian in ahawi kei a, gawtmun ah apai a, vaihawm ding in phaizang khuk thuk mial ah akhum hi. Amah limsakloute omna khovel ah tuichim tungsak in, nidanglai khovel ahawi kei a, himahleh Noah, diktatna thugenpa midang sagih toh ahondamta hi. Sodom leh Gomorrah khuate amah limsak lou hong om dingte etsakna ding in azang a, vut suaksak in hihmangthang in siam louh atangsakta hi; huan midiktat Lot, migiloute omdan huktak ziak a lungkham mahmah pa ahondamta hi. Huai midiktatpa alak ua a-om in, amit in amu a, abil in aza a, dan lou bang a athilhihte un alungsim diktat niteng in ahih na mahmah hi. Toupa'n amah limsak mite khemna a pan hotkhiakdan leh diktatloute vaihawm ni a ding a gawt kawm a hawidan athei hi. Utna thanghuai lam a sa bang a om leh vai hawmsakna musit mite ngial houh vaihawm ni a ding a gawt kawm a hawidan atheisem hi. Haihan leh chihhak ahi ua, amithupite agensiat un leng aling kei uhi. Angel hatna leh thilhihtheihna neite'n amaute dem in Toupa ma ah agense ngei kei uhi. Himahleh hiaite'n bel ganhing ngaihtuahna nei lou, mat a hihman dingte bang in, thil atheihlouhte uh agensia uhi.

Amau diktatlouhna gah lou in asegawp ding ua, suntang lai a zu leh sa kham a buai nuamsami ahi uh. Na kiang ua ankuang alui un, amau kikhemna ankuanglui ahih ziak un, thanghuaina gensiatna ahi uhi. Mit angkawmna a dim, khelhna tawpsan theiloute anei ua; mikiploute akhempuk ua; en hat lungsim apu ua; hamsethuak tate ahi uhi. Beor tapa Balaam, thilhihkhelhna, loh deihpa lampi atot ziak un lam dik paisan in avakmang uhi. Himahleh amah atatlekna ziak in taihilh in a-omta a; sabiltung pau thei lou mihing pau in ahong pau a, zawlnei haina akham hi. Hiaite tuikhuk tui om lou leh tuimei huihpi mutleng ahi ua; amaute a ding in nuailam mial sah meuhmouh sit ahita hi. Thugina lou chiak zen a gen in gitlouhna lak a kipan a taikhete, taksa utna ah hukna in akhempuk nak uhi. Amau siatna sikha hi kawmpi in mite sikha suahtakna thu achiam nak uhi; mite'n zohsa achihte mah in amau sikha in abawl nak hi. Toupa leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist atheih ziak ua khovel thanghuainate ataikhiaksan nung ua, huai mah a apuk nawn ua, zoh a a-om nawn ualeh zaw, amasa sang in a-omdan nanung uh ahong hoih keizaw hi. Diktatna lampi pen theih nung a, thupiak siangthou akiang ua kepsak nungngatsan sang in, diktatna lampi thei lou hi le uh amau a ding in ahoihzaw ding hi. “Ui ama luak ah akik nawn a,vokpi kisilsiangsa leng buannawi ah kisil ding in akik nawn chih paunak diktak amaute tung ah atungta hi.”

Deihtakte aw, tua na kiang ua ka gelh laikhak nihna ahi. Hiaite gel ah theih thak nawnna in na lungsim siang uh ka tokthou hi. Zawlnei siangthoute thugenkholh leh na sawltakte uh kam a Toupa leh Hondampa thupiak na theihgigena ding un. Toupa Hong Paina Ding Thuchiam Ahong pai nawnna thuchiam koi ah? Siam tung a kipan bangkim a-om ngeingei bang in pi-le-pute ihmut ni a kipan in a-om zel ngal a! ahon chi ding uhi. Pathian thu in nidanglai pek in vante ahong om achih akitheihmohbawl ua, tui a kipan leh tui zang a leitung kibawl ahi a, huai tui mah in atum a, amangthangta hi. Himahleh tua vante leh lei omte huai thu mah in Pathian limsak lou mite vaihawm leh manthat ni a ding a sit in mei hihsiat ding a kholkhawm ahita hi. Himahleh deihtakte aw, hiai thu kam khat pen mangngilh kei un, Toupa ngaih in ni khat tuh kum sangkhat bang ahi a, huan kum sangkhat leng ni khat bang ahi, chih. Mi khenkhat in zekai asak bang un Toupa zaw athuchiam ah azekai kei hi; kuamah manthat deih lou a, mi tengteng hong kisik deih in noumau lam ah adohzou zaw ahi.Mansa A Om Poimohna Himahleh Toupa ni zaw guta bang in ahong tung ding; huai ni chiang in nakpitak a ging in vante amangthang ding, thilbulte mei a haitui in a-om ding a, lei leh asung a nasep omte, akangtum ding hi. Huai thilte huchibang a mangthang vek ding uh ahi chih na theih un, omdan siangthou leh Pathian limsakna lam ah mi bangchibang hi ding na hi ua. Pathian' Ni ahong tun baihna ding lamen leh phatuamngaitak a ngak in; huai ni atun ziak in vante hong kang in amangthang dia, thilbulte leng mei a haltui in a-omta ding hi.

Himahleh athuchiam bang in van thak leh lei thak, asung a diktatna omte i lamen hi. Huaiziak in deihtakte aw, huai bang thilte na lamet ziak un nin baang lou leh gensiatbei in, khamuangtak a na om uh ahon muhtheihna ding in thanop suah un. Huan i unaupa deihtak Paul in leng akiang a pilna piak bang zel a na kiang ua agelh bang in Toupa dohzohna hotdamna in sim un. Alaikhak tengteng ah huai thute gen in, huai mah bang in agelh hi. Huai ah thu theihhak thu thukte a-om a, huaite mipil lou leh mikiploute'n Laisiangthou dang angaihkawi bang un angaikawi ua, amau leh amau siatna ding in azang uhi. Huchi in deihtakte aw, noute'n tua thute na theihkholh ziak un pilvang un, huchi lou in zaw migiloute diklouhna a pimang a om in, na kipna ua kipan na pukkha ding uhi. Himahleh i Toupa leh Hondampa Jesu Khrist hehpihna leh theihna ah hong khang un. Tu leh tangtawn in amah kiang ah thupina om hen, Amen.

Thumasa Johan in Pathian thu leh Jesu Khrist tungtang a athil muhte tengteng atheisakta hi. Hiai genkholhna thute sim a, athute za a, huai a thil kigelhte zuite ahampha uhi; ahun anai tak ziak in.Chibai Bukna Leh Phatna Johan in Asia gam a om saptuam sagihte kiang ah, amah omlel, omsa leh hong pai ngei dingpa a kipan leh alaltutphah ma a om, Kha sagihte a kipan in hehpihna leh khamuanna na kiang uah om hen; huan Jesu Khrist, theihpihpa ginom, misite lak a piang masapen leh leitung a kumpipate vaihawmpa a kipan. Eite hon it a i khelhna a kipan a asisan a hon sawppa amah kiang ngei ah; leh lalgam hi ding a hon bawl, Pathian leh a Pa kiang a siampute hi ding a hon bawl, amah kiang ah thupina leh vaihawmna, tangtawn tangtawn in om hen, Amen. Ngai in, meipi toh ahong pai hi;mit teng in amah amu ding ua,amah sunte'n leng;leitung a nam tengteng in amah asuun ding uh, huai bang hi hen, Amen. “Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp,” Toupa Pathian, omsa, omlel leh hong pai ding Bangkim hihthei in achi hi.Khrist Muhna Kei, Johan, na unau uleh Jesu a om haksa thuakna leh lalgam leh kuhkalna a na tanpihpa uh, Pathian thu ziak leh Jesu theihpihna ziak in tuikulh gam Patmos kichi ah ka om hi. Toupa ni in Kha in ka om a, ka nunglam ah aw ngaihtak in pengkul ging bang mai ka za hi. Aw in, “Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp ka hi, na thil muhte laibu ah gelh inla, Asia gam a saptuam sagih, Ephesa, Smarna, Pergamos, Thiatira, Sardis, Philadelphia leh Laodisia kiang ah khak in,” achih ka za hi. Huan kei hon houpih huai aw muh tum in ka kihei hi.

Huchi a ka kiheileh dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sagih ka mu hi. Huai khawnvak koihna lai ah kuahiam Mihing Tapa toh kibang, akhepek tuampha puansilh, a-awm kimvel dangka-eng gakna a kigak ka mu hi. Alu leh asamte samul ngou leh vuk bang in angou a; amitte meikuang bang ahi. Akhepekte sumsan nawttet meipi a halsiangsa abang a, huan a-aw tui tampi ging bang ahi. Huan akhut taklam in aksi sagih atawi a; akam a kipan in namsau hiamtuah asuakkhia a; huan amel nisa asat san lai bang ahi. Huchi a amah ka muhtak in, misi bang in akhebul ah ka puk hi. Huan ama'n ka tung a akhut taklam koih in, “Lau ke'n, amasapen leh ananungpen ka hi. Huai ahingpa ka hi; ka sita a, ngai in tangtawn in ka hing hi, sihna leh misi kho chabi ka nei hi. Huaiziak in na thil muhsate, thil omlelte leh tunung a thil hong om dingte gelh in. Ka khut taklam a aksi sagih na muhte leh dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sagihte thuguk hiai ahi: Aksi sagihte saptuam sagihte angelte ahi ua; khawnvak koihna sagihte saptuam sagihte ahi uh,” achi hi.

Ephesa Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Ephesa saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Akhut taklam a aksi sagih tawi dangka-eng khawnvak koihna sagih lai a vialvakpa'n hiai thilte agen hi. “Na thilhihte, na sepgimdan leh na kuhkaldan, migiloute na ngaihmohdan leh hiloupi a amau sawltak kichite na ze-et a, amaute zuauthei ahi uh chih na muhkhiakdan ka thei hi. Huan thuakzohna na nei a, ka min ziak in na thuak teitei a, huchi in leng na bah kei hi. Himahleh na hon itna masapen na tawpsan thu ah ka hon dem hi. Huaiziak in na pukna laitak theigige inla, kisik in, na thilhih masapente hih nawn in; huchi lou in zaw na kiang ah ka hong pai dia, na kisik keileh a-omna a kipan in na khawnvak koihna ka suan ding hi. Himahleh hiai thu ah na hoih, Nikol pawlte thilhihte na hua a, ke'n leng huaite ka hua hi. “Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen. Avualzoupa kiang ah Pathian Paradis a om, anek ding in hinna sing ka pe ding achi,” chi in.Smarna Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Huan Smarna a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Amasapen leh ananungpen, huai si a hing nawnta in hiai thilte agen hi. “Na thilhihte, na gimthuakdan leh na zawndan, himahleh na hau hi, Judate hilou napi, ahi a kigen Setan sinagogte Pathian gensiatna ka thei hi. Na thuak pah ding thilte kihta ke'n; ngai in, ze-et a na omtheihna ding un diabol in na lak ua akhente suangkul ah ahon khum pah ding; ni sawm sung gimthuakna na nei ding uhi. Sihpha in ginom in om in, huchi in hinna lallukhu ka hon pe ding hi. “Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen.

Avualzoupa sih nihna hihnat in a-om kei ding achi,” chi in.Pergamos Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Huan Pergamom a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Namsau hiamtak hiamtuah nei in hiai thilte agen hi. “Na tenna leh Setan laltutphah omna leng ka thei; ka min kiptak in na lenden a, Setan tenna mun a ka palai ginom, Antipas thah a a-om lai in leng na ginna na tawpsan tuan kei hi. Himahleh demna zek ka hon nei, huai lai a mi khenkhat Balaam sinsakna zuite na ompih ziak in, Israel suante ma a kipukna koih ding leh milimte kiang a kithoihna thilte ne ding leh kingaihna khelhna hih ding in ama'n tuh Balak athuhilh hi. Huchibang mah in Nikol pawlte sinsakna zui, mi khenkhat mah na ompih hi. Huaiziak in kisik in; huchi lou in zaw na kiang ah ka hong pai pah dia, amau ka kam a namsau in ka dou ding hi. “Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen. Avualzoupa kiang ah manna selguk ka pe ding, huan suangpek ka pe dia, huai suang tung ah min thak, aneipa lou ngal kuamah in atheih louh a kigelh achi,” chi in.Thiatira Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Huan Thiatira a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Pathian Tapa, meikuang bang mit nei a, sumsan nawttet bang khe neipa'n, hiai thilte agen hi. Na thilhihte leh na itna leh na ginna leh na nasepna leh na thuakzohna ka thei hi, amasapen sang in na thilhih nanungte atamzaw hi. Himahleh hiai thu ah demna ka hon nei hi, huai numei Jezebel, zawlnei kichinu khawk na sak louh ziak in; ama'n ka sikhate kingaihna khelhna hih ding leh milimte kiang a kithoihna thilte ne ding a khem in ahilh hi.

Huchi in amah akisikna ding in hun ka pia hi; huan amingaihna khelhna ah akisik tuan kei hi. Ngai in, amah damlou lupna ah ka pai ding a, athilhihte akisik tuan keileh amah angkawm teng leng gimthuakna thupi ah ka pai ding hi. Huan hipi in atate ka that dia; saptuamte tengteng in lungsim kiheinate leh lungtang theipa kei ka hi chih athei ding uh; na thilhihte bangbang un na lak ua mi tengteng ka pe ding hi. “Himahleh, nou, Thiatira a om midangte hiai thuhilh nei lou a, ‘Setan thil thukte’ thei lou tengteng kiang ah tunggikna dang na tung uah ka hon behlap kei ding, ka chi hi. Himahleh ka hong mateng na neih pen uh lenkip un. Huan avualzoupa leh atawp pha a ka nnate kempa kiang ah, namte tung a thuneihna ka pe ding hi; ama'n sikchiang in amau tung ah vai ahawm ding a, leibel bang in amaute akhentam ding hi, hiai thuneihna ka Pa a pan ka muh ahi. Huan amah zingsol aksi ka pe ding hi. Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi,” chi in.

Kiveng in, thil omsunte, si dia kisate, tungding nawn in; ka Pathian ma ah na thilhih zohsa set theih ka mu kei hi. Sardis Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Huan Sardis a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Pathian Kha sagih leh aksi sagih neipa'n hiai thilte agen hi.“Na thilhihte ka thei, si napi in hingmin na pu hi. Himahleh Sardis ah min tawmchik apuante uh hihnit louh na nei hi; amaute puanngou silh a kei toh tonkhawm ding a kilawm him ahi uhi. Avualzoupa huchibang in puanngou in akizem dia, bangchi mah in hinna laibu a kipat amin ka hihmang kei ding, ka Pa ma leh a-angelte ma ah amin ka gum ding hi. “Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi, chi in.Philadelphia Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Philadelphia a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Huai siangthoupa, dikpa leh David chabi neipa, amah hon kuamah in akhak theih louh leh amah khak kuamah in ahon theih louhpa'n hiai thilte agen hi. “Na thilhihte ka thei, ngai in, na ma ah kuamah khak theih louh kong honsa ka koih hi; thilhihtheihna neuchik na nei a, ka thu na kem a, ka min na pai kei hi. Ngai in, zuau lel gen a Judate hilou napi, ahi a kigen Setan sinagogte ka hon pia hi; ngai in, amau ka hon paisak dia, na khebul ah ka kunsak ding; nang ka hon itdan atheihna ding un. Ka dohzohna thu na kep ziak in, ze-et a na om chiang in ke'n leng ka hon kem ding, huai hun khovel pumpi tung a hong tung ding ahi; leitung a om tengteng leng ze-et ding in. Ka hong pai pah ding. Kuamah in na lallukhu alaklouhna ding in, na neih pen kem kinken in.

Avualzoupa ka tempul ah khuam in ka pangsak dia, huai a kipan in apaikhe nawn kei ding, amah tung ah ka Pathian min leh ka Pathian khopi Jerusalem thak, ka Pathian a kipan van a hong paikhesuk min leh keimah min thak ka gelh ding hi. “Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi,” chi in.Laodisia Saptuamte Kiang A Laikhak “Huan Laodisia a saptuamte angel kiang ah hichibang in gelh in: Theihpihpa ginom leh dik, Pathian thilsiam bul Amen in hiai thilte agen hi. “Na thilhihte ka thei, lum lah lum lou, vot lah vot lou in na om a; na lumleh lum inla na votleh vot vanglak in! Lum lah lum lou, vot lah vot lou a na om pelhpulh ziak in, ka kam a kipan in ka hon sekhe ding hi. Migenthei nuamsa lou, zawng, mitdel leh vuaktang na hih lam kithei lou a, ‘ka hausa, hauhsaknate ka neita, bangmah ka kitasam kei, na chih ziak in. Kei a kipan in dangka-eng mei a hihsiangthousa lei ding in ka hon thuhilh ahi, na hong hauhsak theihna ding in; puanngoute na hon silh a, na vuaktang zumhuaina adawklouhna ding in; huan na muhtheihna ding in na mit a nuh ding mitlou lei in. Ka itte ka thuhilh in ka sawi a; huaiziak in phatuamngai inla, kisik in. Ngai in kongkhak a dingh in ka kiu hi; mi kuapeuh in ka aw azak a kong ahonleh akiang ah ka lut dia amah toh nitak an ka ne dia, ama'n leng kei toh ane ding hi. Avualzoupa ka laltutphah tung ah ka kiang ah ka tusak ding, kei leng ka vualzou a, laltutphah tung a ka Pa toh ka tut bang in. “Saptuamte kiang a Kha thugen bil nei peuh in za hen achi,” chi in achi hi.

Hiai thilte nung a ka etleh, ngai in, van ah kongkhak akihong a; ka aw zak masakpen pengkul aw ging bang in kei ahon houpih hi, “Hiai ah hong paitou in, huan tunung chiang a thil hong om dingte ka hon musak ding,” achi hi. Thakhat in Kha in ka om pah ngal a; ngai in, van ah laltutphah ahong kitungta a, laltutphah tung ah mi khat atu hi. Huai mi jasper leh karnelia suang bang in akimu a; huai laltutphah kimvel ah sakhituihup, emerald suang bang mai a kimu in azam hi. Van Muhna Huai laltutphah a kipan in khophiate, awte leh vanpigingte ahong suakkhia hi. Huan mei khawnvak sagih, laltutphah ma ah akuang a, huaite Pathian Kha sagihte ahi uhi. Huai laltutphah ma ah kristal bang a siang limlang tuipi a-om hi. Huai laltutphah kimvel ah thil hing nunglam leh malam mit a dim a-om uhi. Thil hing khatna humpinelkai bang ahi a, thil hing nihna bawngnou bang ahi a, thil hing thumna in mihing mai bang anei hi, thil hing lina muvanlai leng lai bang ahi. Huai thil hing lite'n kha guk anei chiat ua, akimvel leh asunglam mit ngen a dim ahi a; amaute'n sun leh zan khawl lou in:“Siangthou, Siangthou, Siangthou,Toupa Pathian,Bangkim hihthei,omsa leh omlel leh hong om ding,” achi uhi. Huan huai amah laltutphah tung a tupa leh huai amah tangtawn tangtawn a hingpa kiang a thil hingte'n, thupina leh zahhuaina leh kipahna thu apiak chiang un, amah laltutphah tung a tupa ma ah upa sawmnih-le-lite abokkhup uhi, huai laltutphah ma a alallukhute uh koih in, amah tangtawn tangtawn a hingpa abia uhi. “Nang ka Toupa leh kaPathian uh,thupina, zahhuaina,thilhihtheihna mu tak na hi;thil tengteng nang na siam a,nang thu ziak a om leh siam ahi uhi,” achi uhi.

Huai laltutphah tung a tupa khut taklam ah laibuzial, asunglam leh apolam kigelh chiamtehna sagih a kichiamteh ka mu hi. Angel hat khat in aw ngaihtak in, “Kua ahia laibuzial hong a, huai a chiamtehnate phel tham?” chi a puangkhia ka mu hi. Huan van tung hi in, leitung hiam, ahihkeileh lei nuai ah leng huai laibuzial hong thei hiam, ahihkeileh atung en thei kuamah a-om kei hi. Huchi in huai laibuzial hong a sim tak hiam, ahihkeileh atung en tak kuamah a-om louh ziak in ka kapkap hi. Laibuzial Leh Belamnou Huan huai laltutphah leh huai thil hing lite leh huai upate lai ah thahsa hileh kilawm, Belamnou, kii sagih leh mit sagih nei dingh ka mu a, huai mit sagihte Pathian kha sagih leitung tengteng a sawlkhiakte ahi uhi. Amah ahong pai a, laltutphah tung a tupa khut taklam a kipan laibuzial ala hi. Huai laibuzial alaktak in, thil hing lite leh upa sawmnih-le-lite, gosem khat chiat leh dangka-eng belhbute gimnamtui a dim chiat tawi in, Belamnou ma ah abokkhup ua, huaite gimnamtui misiangthoute thumna ahi. Huan la thak khat asa uhi:“Laibuzial la a, huai a chiamtehnate phel tham na hi;thah in na omta a,chi chih leh pau chih leh michih leh nam chih a mitePathian a ding a na sisan a na lei tak ziak in. Ka Pathian kiang uah amaulalgam leh siampute hi ding in na bawl a;amaute'n leitung ah vai ahawm ding uh,” chi in. Huan ka etleh, laltutphah leh thil hingte leh upate kimvel ah, angel tampi aw ka za hi. Atamdan uh singkhat mun singkhat leh asang mun sang tampi ahi uh; Amau aw ngaihtak in:“Thah a om,Belamnou in hatnate,leh hauhsaknate, leh thilhihtheihnate, leh zahtakhuainate, leh thupinate,leh vualzawlnate mu tham na hi,”chi in akikou uhi. Huan thilsiam khempeuh van a omte, leitung a omte, lei nuai a omte, tuipi tung a omte leh amau a thil omte tengteng in,“Laltutphah tung a tupa lehBelamnou kiang ah;Vualzawlnate, zahtakhuainate,thupinate leh vaihawmnate,tangtawn tangtawn in om hen,”achih uh ka za hi. Huan thil hing lite'n, “Amen!” achi ua, huan upate abokkhup ua, abia uhi.

Belamnou in chiamtehna sagihte lak a khat aphel lai ka mu a, thil hing lite lak a khat aw in, vanpiging bang mai in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. Huan ka etleh ngai in, sakol kang leh atung a tupa thalpeu tawi ka mu a; amah kiang ah lallukhu piak in a-om a; amah vualzou a vualzou zou zel ding in ahong paikhia hi. Huan chiamtehna nihna aphel lai in, thil hing nihna in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. Sakol dang asan khat ahong paikhia a; huai tung a tupa kiang ah leitung a kipan lemna lakhe ding a thupiak ahi a, huchi a amau akithahtuahna ding un; amah kiang a namsau thupi piak ahita hi. Huan chiamtehna thumna aphel lai in thil hing thumna in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. Ka etleh ngai in, sakol vom ka mu hi; atung a tupa'n akhut in bukna atawi hi. Chiamtehna Honna Chiamtehna lina aphel lai in, thil hing lina aw in, “Hong pai in,” achih ka za hi. Ka etleh ngai in, sakol daang ka mu hi; atung a tupa min Sihna ahi a, Misikhua toh akizui uhi. Namsau, kial leh sihna leh leitung a gam sahangte thah ding in amau kiang ah leitung seh li suah seh khat tung a thuneihna piak ahita hi. Chiamtehna ngana aphel lai in, Pathian thu ziak leh azuih uh theihsakna ziak a amau thah a omte maitam nuai ah ka mu hi. Amaute aw ngaihtak a kikou in, “Toupa Tungnungpen aw, siangthou leh dik bang tan ka sisan man uh amau leitung a tengte tung a thuk lou leh vaihawm lou ding na hia?” achi uhi. Amaute kiang ah puanngou thupi piak in a-om chiat ua

amau asikha hihpihte uleh a-unaute uh amau bang a thah a om dingte akim mateng uh na khawl tadih un chi a hilh in a-om uhi. Chiamtehna gukna aphel lai ka mu a, zinling thupitak a-om hi. Nisa tuh samul sai-ip puan bang in ahong vom a, kha leng apum in sisan bang in asan hi. Van aksite theipi kung huihpi in amutling a, ahutte apulh bang in leitung ah apulh uhi. Van laibuzial bang a kizial zou in suanmang in a-omta; tang sangte leh tuikulh gam teng amun ua pat suanmang in a-omta uhi. Huchi in leitung kumpipate, miliante, heutute leh ahat leh ahaute, salte leh sal lou teng leng tang sangte leh suangpi heng leh kokhukte ah akisel uhi. Tang sangte kiang leh suangpite kiang ah, “Hon delhlum unla, amah laltutphah tung a tupa leh Belamnou thangpaihna mai a kipan hon sel un; athangpaihna ni thupi hong tung hi; kua adingh zou dia?” achi uhi.

Hiai thilte zoh in angel li, lei kil li a dinghte'n leitung a huih lite leitung a nung lou ding leh tuipi tung hiam, ahihkeileh sing tung hiam a nung lou ding in akhawlsak uhi. Huan amau chiamtehna a pan angel dang kuantou ka mu hi, Pathian hing chiamtehna anei ua; ama'n huai angel lite leitung leh tuipi hihse ding a piak a omte kiang ah aw ngaihtak a kikou in. “Pathian sikhate atal ua i chiamteh zoh ma in leitung leh tuipi leh singte hihse kei un,” achi hi. Huai chiamteh a omte lak a tampi, nuaikhat singli-le-sangli, Israel suan chiteng a kipan chiamteh zah ka za hi. Judah chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih chiamteh in a-om ua.Reuben chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;Gad chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Asher chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;Naphtali chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih;Manasseh chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih; Israel Mi Nuaikhat Singli-le-sangli Chiamtehna Zebulun chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih,Joseph chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih,Benjamin chi a kipan singkhat-le-sangnih.Mipi Tampi Muhna Hiai thil teng zoh in ka etleh ngai in, mipi tampi kuamah sim seng louh, nam chih leh chi chih leh mi tengteng leh pau tengteng a kipan laltutphah leh Belamnou ma a dingh a, puanngou thupi a kizem a tumnah tawi ka mu a, huan amau aw ngaihtak in,“Laltutphah a tu i Pathian lehBelamnou kiang ah hotdamna,”chi in akikou uhi. Angel tengteng laltutphah leh upate leh thil hing lite kimvel in adingh ua; laltutphah ma a bokkhup in, Pathian abia uhi: “Amen! Vualzawlnate,leh thupinate, leh pilnate,leh zahtakhuainate,leh thilhihtheihnate, leh hatnate,tangtawn tangtawn in i Pathiankiang ah om hen,” achi uhi.

Huan upate lak a khat in ka kiang ah, “Hiai puanngou thupi a kizemte kuate ahi ua, koi a kipan a hong pai ahi ua?” chi in ahon houpih a, ke'n akiang ah, “Ka Toupa, nang na thei hi,” ka chi hi. Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai mite gimthuakna thupi a kipan hong paite ahi ua, apuan thupi uh sawp in, Belamnou sisan in ahihngou uhi.” “Huaiziak in Pathian laltutphah ma ah a-om ua, sun leh zan inatempul uah amah asepsak uhi;amah laltutphah tung a tupa'n amau tung ahapuanin azak ding hi. Agil uh kial nawn ke'n chin,adang uh tak nawn himhim ke'n teh,amau ni in kang ke'n chin, satna in leng ahihgim kei ding hi. Belamnou huai laltutphahlak a om abelamchingpa uh ahih ding ziak in,amau hinna tuikhuk ah api ding a;Pathian in amit ua kipan khitui anulhul ding,” achi hi.

Chiamtehna sagihna aphel lai in dakkal kimkhat sung van adai sipsip hi. Huchi in Pathian ma a angel sagih dinghte ka mu a, amaute kiang ah pengkul sagih piak in a-om hi. Huan angel dang khat ahong pai a, gimnamtui halna dangka-eng bel tawi in, maitam kiang ah adingh hi, akiang ah gimnamtui tampi laltutphah ma a om dangka-eng maitam teng a misiangthou tengteng thumna toh hel ding in, piak in a-om hi. Huai gimnamtui khu leh misiangthoute thumna angel khut a kipan Pathian ma ah azamtou hi. Angel in gimnamtui halna dangka-eng bel ala a; huai maitam amei in ahihdim a, leitung ah apaikhia a; huan awgingte, van-gingte leh khophiate leh zinlingte ahong om hi.Pengkulte Huan angel sagih pengkul sagih tawite mut ding in ahong kisa uhi. Angel masapen in amut a, sisan toh kihel gial leh mei ahong om hi, huaite leitung a paihkhiak in a-om ua; leitung mun thum a khen mun khat akangbei hi, huan sing mun thum a khen mun khat akangbei a; loupa hing tengteng akangbei hi. Chiamtehna Sagihna Huai tuipi a thil hingte hinna neite mun thum a khen mun khat asi ua; long mun thum a khen mun khat hihsiat in a-om hi. Huan angel thumna in amut a, van a kipan in aksi lianpi, meisel bang a kuang ahong kesuk a, lui mun thum a khen mun khat leh tui tuikhukte tung adeng hi. Huai aksi min Gamsai ahi; tui mun thum a khen mun khat gamsai asuak hi; tuite hihkhaat a a-om ziak un mi tampi asi uhi. Huan angel lina in amut a, huan ni mun thum a khen mun khat leh kha mun thum a khen mun khat leh aksi mun thum a khen mun khat hihsiat ahong hi a; huchi in avaknate uh mun thum a khen mun khat hihmial in a-om a; sun hun seh thum suah seh khat leh zan hun seh thum suah seh khat beisak in a-om hi. Huan ka etleh, angel khat van laizawl a leng in aw ngaihtak in, “Tunggik, tunggik, angel thum pengkul mut lai dingte leh huai ging hong om lai dingte ziak in leitung a omte tung agik,” achih ka za hi.

Angel ngana in amut a, van a kipan leitung a aksi kia ka mu a; amah kiang ah kokhuk taw nei lou honna chabi piak in a-om hi. Ama'n kokhuk taw nei lou ahong a; huai kokhuk a kipan in meikhu, meipi khu bang mai ahong pawttou a, huai kokhuk a meikhu ziak in ni leh huihkhua hihmial in a-omta hi. Huan meikhu a kipan in leitung ah khaupete ahong suak ua; aikamte'n thilhihtheihna aneih bang un amau thilhihtheihna piak in a-om uhi. Amau leitung a loupate, thil hing himhimte leh sing peuhmahte, hihse lou a, mi kuapeuh atal ua Pathian chiamtehna neiloute kia hihse dia hilh in a-om uhi. Amau that lou ding a, kha nga sung amau hihgenthei zaw ding a hilh in a-om ua; huai a hihgentheihna tuh aikam in mi kuahiam ateh a ahihgentheih bang ahi. Huai ni chiang in mi'n sihna azong ding ua, bangchi mah in amu kei ding uh; sih a-ut ding ua, himahleh sihna in amau ataimangsan ding hi. Huan khaupete kilatdan sakol kidouna a pang dia bawl bang ahi ua; alutung uah dangka-eng lallukhu hileh kilawm a-om a, amai uh mihingte mai bang ahi. Numei sam bang sam anei ua, aha uh humpinelkai ha bang ahi. Pengkul Ngana Leh Gukna Mutna Huan aikam bang in meigu nei anei ua, mihingte kha nga sung hihnatna ding in amei uah thilhihtheihna anei uhi. Amaute'n kokhuk taw nei lou neitu angel atung ua kumpipa in anei uhi; ama min Hebru pau in Abaddon ahi a, Grik pau in Appolion ahi. Tunggikna masapen abeita a, ngai in, tunggikna nih tunung chiang in ahong tung lai ding hi. Huan angel gukna in amut a, Pathian ma a om dangka-eng maitam kii a kipan in aw ka za a

huai aw in angel gukna pengkul nei kiang ah, “Euphrates luipi lianpi a angel li hen a omte phel in,” achi hi. Huan mi mun thum a khen mun khat athahtheihna ding ua dak khat, ni khat, kha khat leh kum khat sung kisa a na om, angel lite phel in a-om uhi. Huan sakol tungtuang sepaih atamdan uh sing ngen mun singnih ahi chi a atamdan uh kigen ka za hi. Huchibang in kilakna in sakolte leh atung ua tuangte, mei bang a san, engdup leh kaat bang a eng, awmphaw neite ka mu hi; sakolte lu humpinelkai lu bang ahi ua; akam ua kipan in mei leh meikhu leh kaat asuakkhia hi. Huan akamsung ua kipan a hong pawtkhia huai hipi thum, mei, meikhu leh kaat in mihing mun thum a khen mun khat thah in a-om uhi. Huai sakolte thilhihtheihna akam uh leh amei ua om ahi a; amei uh gulpi mei toh akibang ua, lu leng anei ua, huaite in mi ahih na uhi. Huan midang huai gawtna a siloute akhut ua sepkhiakte ah akisik tuan kei ua; dawite, dangka-engte, milimte, dangka milimte, suang milimte leh sing milimte; mu theiloute, za thei lou leh tang theiloute be nawn lou ding in akisik tuan kei uhi. Huan atualthahna uh, ami bumna uh leh akingaihna khelhna uh leh aguktakna uh akisik tuan kei uhi.

Huan meipi puansilh a kizem van a kipan angel hat dang hong paikhesuk ka mu hi; alutung ah sakhituihup a-om a, amai nisa mah abang a, akhete mei khuamte bang mai ahi. Akhut a laibuzial neuchik honsa atawi a; akhe taklam a tuipi tung sik in akhe veilam leitung ah anga hi. Humpinelkai humham bang in aw ngaihtak in akikou a; akikou khit in vanpiging sagihte'n a-aw uh asuah uhi. Huan vanpiging sagihte'n a-aw uh asuahtak un gelh ding in ka kisa hi; van a kipan aw in, “Vanpiging sagihte' thugen iim bikbek inla gelhkhe ke'n,” achih ka za hi. Huan tuipi tung leh leitung a angel dingh ka muh in van lam ah akhut taklam aliktou a; huchi in huai tangtawn a hing van leh leitung leh asung a om tengteng leh tuipi leh asung a om tengteng siampa min lou in azekai nawnlouhna ding chi in akichiam hi. Himahleh angel sagihna in amut ding pengkulpi agin chiang in, huai hun chiang in, “Pathian thuguk, asikha zawlneite kiang a agenkhiak tak hihkim in a-omta ding,” chi in. Van a kipan a ka aw zak in kei hon houpih a, “Kuan inla, tuipi tung leh leitung a angel dingh khut a laibuzial neuchik honsa va la in,” achih ka za nawn hi. Kei, angel kiang ah ka va hoh a, laibuzial neu hon pe ding in akiang ah ka va gen hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “La inla, ne zou vek in; huai in na gil hihkha in chin himahleh na kam ah khuaizu bang in akhum ding,” achi hi. Angel Hat Leh Laibu Huan ka kiang ah, “Mi tampite leh namte leh paute leh kumpipate kiang ah Pathian thusuak na genkholh nawn ngeingei ding ahi,” ahon chi hi.

Huan sialluang chiang bang tehna chiang khat piak in ka om a; angel in, “Thou inla, Pathian tempul leh maitam leh huai a bete teh in; tempul huangsung polam ahihleh nusia inla, teh ke'n; Zentelte kiang a piaksa ahih tak ziak in; huan kho siangthou akhenuai un kha sawmli-le-nih sung asikden ding uhi. Huan ka theihpihtu nihte kiang ah thilhihtheihna ka pe dia, amau sai-ip puan silh in ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmguk thu agenkhol ding uh achi hi.” Hiaite olive sing nihte leh khawnvak koihna nihte, leitung a Toupa ma a dinghte ahi uhi. Mi kuapeuh in amau suknat atup ualeh, akam ua kipan a mei hong suakkhia in amelmate akangtum vek dia; kuapeuh in amau hihnat atup ualeh huchibang a thah in a-om ding uhi.
