Hiai mite'n athugenkholh sung ua vuah azuklouhna ding in, van khaktheihna anei ua; huan a-ut hunhun ua sisan suaksak ding in tuite tung ah thu anei ua, leitung leng gawtna chiteng a gawt ding in thu anei uhi. Huan atheihpihna nasep uh azoh chiang un, kokhuk taw nei lou a kipan a hong pawtkhia huai gamsa in amau akidoupih ding a, amau azou dia, athat ding hi. Asiluang uh khopi thupi kongzing ah akisial a, huai khalam thu ah Sodom leh Aigupta kichi, kros a Toupa kilhlup a a-omna mah ahi. Mite leh chite leh paute leh namte lak a kipan mite aluang uh ni thum-le-akim a-en ua, aluang uh han a vui aphal kei uhi. Huchi in leitung a tengte amaute tung a kisial in akipak ua, kipahna abawl ua; thilpiakte akikhaktuah ua; hiai zawlnei nihte'n amau leitung a tengte athuakgimsak khit tak ziak un. Theihpihtu Nihte Van a kipan in aw thupitak aza ua, “Hiai ah hong paitou un,” chi in. Huan amau meipi lak ah van ah apaitou uhi

amelmate un amau amu chiat uhi. Huai dak in zinling thupitak ahong om a, khopi mun sawm a khen mun khat achim hi. Huai zinling ah mi sangsagih thah in a-om ua; adangte'n alau ua, van a Pathian kiang ah thupina apia uhi. Tunggikna nihna abeita a; ngai in, tunggikna thumna ahong tung pah ding hi.Pengkul Sagihte Huan angel sagihna in apengkul amut a; van ah aw thupitak in, “Khovel lalgam tuh i Toupa leh a Khrist a ahong hita hi; ama'n tangtawn in vai ahawm ding,” achi uhi. Upa sawmnih-le-li, laltutphah tung a Pathian ma a tute'n amai ua lei si in Pathian abia uhi. “Na tung ah ka kipak uhi,Toupa PathianBangkim hihthei, omlel leh omsa leh hong om ding;na thilhihtheihna thupi na lak tak ziak in lehvai na hawm tak ziak in, Namte aheh ua,tu in nang thangpaihna ni ahong tung hi,misite vai na hawmsak hun leh na sikha zawlneite leh misiangthoute kiang lehna min kihtate milian leh mineute kiang a kipahmanna piakna hun leh leitung hihsete hihsiat a a-om samhun uh ahong tungta hi,” achi uhi. Huan van a om Pathian tempul hon in a-om a; atempul sung ah thukhun bawm ahong kimu hi; huchi in khophiate, awte, van-gingte, zinlingte leh gial thupitak in azui ngal hi.

Van ah chiamtehna thupi leh lamdangtak; numei khat ni a kizem, akhenuai a khapi sikden leh alutung a lallukhu aksi sawm-le-nih khu hong kimu hi. Ama'n nau apai a, nauvei leh suakkhe ding natna in akapkhia hi. Huan van ah chiamtehna dang khat ahong kilang a; ngai in, dragon san lianpi, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei, alutung a lallukhu sagih khu hong kilang hi. Amei in van a aksite mun thum a khen mun khat akaikhia a, leitung ah apaikhia a; dragon in huai numei nau nei ding a kisa, aneih chiang a anau nek zoh tum in ama ah adingh hi. Ta pasal naupang, sikchiang a nam tengteng tung a vaihawm ding anei a; atapa pen Pathian leh alaltutphah ah laktouh in a-om a, numei pen gamdai ah, Pathian in amah a dia amun bawlsak ah, huai ah ni sangkhat zanih-le-sawmguk khoi a om ding in atai hi.Van Kidouna Huan van ah kidouna a-om a; Mikael leh a-angelte dragon toh kidou ding in akuankhia ua; dragon leh a-angelte'n leng adouthuk uhi. Huan azou kei ua, van ah amun himhim uh muh in a-omta kei hi. Dragon lian, gulpi tek, diabol leh Setan chih a ompa, khovel pumpi khempa leh amah nasem angelte toh van a kipan paihkhiaksuk in a-om uhi. Huan van ah aw ngaihtak mai ka za hi, “Tu'n ah i Pathian hotdamna ahong tungta, thilhihtheihna leh Khrist thuneihna; i unaute hekpa, i Pathian ma a sun leh zan a amau hekpa, paihkhiaksuk a a-om ziak in. Belamnou sisan ziak leh atheihpih uh thu ziak in amah tung ah avualzouta ua; sih tanpha in leng ahinna uh a-it kei uhi. Numei Leh Dragon Muhna Leitung a dragon paihkhiak ahita chih akitheihtak in, huai numei nau pasal neinu agawt hi.

Himahleh huai numei kiang ah muvanlai thupitak kha nih piak in a-om a, gulpi mai a kipan gamdai mun a alenlut theihna ding in, huai ah hun khat sung leh hunte leh hun kimkhat sung vak in a-om hi. Gulpi in akam a kipan in tuipi bang tui luang a numei ataihmangsak theihna ding in numei nung ah asekhia hi. Lei in numei apanpih a, lei in akam aka a, dragon in akam a kipan a atui siatkhiak ana valhzohsak vekta hi. Numei tung ah dragon aheh mahmah a, asuan omsun, Pathian thupiak zuite leh Jesu thu theihpihte kidoupih ding in akuankhia hi. Huan tuipiau ah dragon adingh hi.

Tuipi piau a ka dinleh tuipi a kipan gamsa khat, kii sawm leh lu sagih nei, akiite tung a lallukhu sawm om chiat, alutungte a Pathian gensiatna om, hong paikhetou ka mu hi. Ka gamsa muh gialbem abang a, akhe vompi khe abang a, akam humpinelkai kam abang hi; dragon in athuneihna thupi leh alaltutphah leh athilhihtheihnate amah apia hi. Alute lak a khat sihpih khop hial dia liam hileh kilawm in ka mu hi; sihpih khop hial dia liam pen hihdam in a-om a; huchi in leitung pumpi in huai gamsa lamdang sa in azuita uhi. Dragon, gamsa kiang a athuneihna petu abia ua; huchi in hiai gamsa abiak kawm in, “Hiai gamsa bang kua a-om a, amah kidoupih thei kua om ahia?” achi uhi. Huan gamsa kiang ah thil thupite leh Pathian gensiatnate genna ding kam piak in a-om a, huan akiang ah thuneihna piak in a-om hi; kha sawmli-le-nih thilhihtheihna piak ahi. Pathian gensiatna ding, amin gense ding leh a-omna, van a tengte ngei gensia in akamkata hi. Huan dragon in gamsa kiang ah misiangthoute kidoupih ding leh amaute zou ding in phalna apia a; chi chih, pau chih leh nam chih tung a thuneihna leng apia hi. Huan khovel om tung a pan thahsa Belamnou' hinna laibu a amin tuangloute tengteng leh leitung a teng tengteng in amah abe ding uhi. “Kuapeuh zakna ding bil nei in, za hen!” Kuapeuh sal a pi dingte sal a pi in a-om ding; kuapeuh namsau a thah dingte namsau a thah in a-om ding. Hiai ah misiangthoute kuhkalna leh ginna nei ding a chial ahi uh. Huan gamsa dang khat leitung a kipat a hong pawtkhetou ka mu a; belamnou bang in kii nih anei a, dragon bang in thu agen hi.

Gamsa masapen thuneihna tengteng amitmuh in azang hi. Leitung leh asung a teng tengteng gamsa masapen, si khop hial a liam hihdam a om, be ding in asawl hi. Gam Sahangte Muhna Huan gamsa sik leh amitmuh a thillamdang hihtheihna piak a a-omna in ama'n leitung a tengte akhem a; huai gamsa namsau a satliam leh dam nawn lim bawl ding in lei a tengte thu apia hi. Gamsa masa lim a nakna pe ding leh tua gamsa apau theihna ding in dragon in amah kiang ah thilhihtheihna apia a, huchi a gamsa lim be nuam lou tengteng leng athahsak theihna ding in. Mi tengteng, aneu leh alian, azawng ahau, sikha leh sikha lou, akhut taklam uh hiam, atal uh hiam ah chiamtehna piak in a-om chiat uhi; huchi a kuamah in huai chiamtehna hiam, gamsa min hiam, ahihkeileh amin nambat neiloute'n lei thei lou hiam, zuak thei lou a a-omna ding in. Hiai ah pilna a-om hi. Kuapeuh theihsiamna nei in, gamsa nambat sutkhia hen; huai lah mihing nambat ahi ngal a; huan ama nambat tuh zaguk sawmguk-le-guk ahi.

Huai nung in ka etleh ngai in, Zion tang tung a Belamnou dingh ka mu a, akiang ah mipi nuaikhat singli-le-sangli, atal ua a Pa min kigelh chiatte toh adingkhawm uhi. Tui tampi leh vanpiging bang a ging van a kipan in aw ka za a; ka aw zak gosem tumte'n agosem uh atumging uh abang a; laltutphah leh thil hing lite ma leh upate ma ah la thak hileh kilawm khat asa ua; leitung a kipat a huai leikhiaksate, nuaikhat singli-le-sanglite lou ngal kuamah in huai la atheithei kei uhi. Hiaite numei lak a kihihninloute ahi ua; nungak siangthou bang ahi uhi. Hiaite apaina lamlam ua Belamnou zuite ahi uhi. Pathian a ding leh Belamnou a ding a gah masapen hi ding a mite lak a kipan a leisate ahi uhi. Huan akam uah zuau a-om kei a; amaute lah Pathian laltutphah ma ah gensiatbei ahi ngal ua.Angel Thum Muhna Huan angel dang van laizawl a leng ka mu a, ama'n tangtawn tanchinhoih, leitung a tengte kiang leh nam chih leh chi chih leh pau chih leh michihte kiang a genkhiak ding anei hi. Aw ngaihtak in, “Pathian kihta unla, amah thupina pia un; avaihawmna hun ahong tungta ngal a; van leh lei leh tuipi leh tuikhukte siampa amah bia un,” achi hi. Huan angel nihna in ahon zui a, “Pukta, pukta Babulon kho thupi, nam tengteng a mingaihhatna, hehna uain dawnsaknu,” achi hi. Angel thumna in amau ahon zui a, aw ngaihtak in, “Kuapeuh gamsa leh alim bia, atal hiam akhut hiam a chiamtehna neite'n Pathian thangpaihna uain adawn ding ua, huai uain thangpaihna nou, bangmah toh hel louh hial a bawl ahi; angel siangthoute leh Belamnou muh in amah mei leh kaat in hihnat in om in teh. Huan ahihnatna meikhu uh tangtawn tangtawn in azamtou dia

huai gamsa leh alim bete leh kuapeuh amin chiamtehna nei taphot in sun leh zan in tawlngakna anei kei ding uh,” achi hi. Hiai ah misiangthou, Pathian thupiakte leh Jesu ginna zuite kuhkalna nei ding a chialna a-om hi. Huan van a kipan aw in hichibang in, “Gelh in, tua kipan in misite, Toupa a site ahampha uh,” Kha in, “Ahi, asepgimna uh akhawlsanta ding ua, athilhihte un hon zui ding ahih ziak in,” achih uh ka za hi.Leitung Buh Lak Hun Belamnou Leh Mipi Nuaikhat Singli-le-sangli muhna Angel dang tempul a kipan ahong paikhia a, meipi tung a tupa kiang ah ngaihtak in, “Na kawite lik inla, at in; at hun atungta; leitung buh amingawpta,” chi in akikou hi. Huai mei tung a tupa'n leitung ah akawite alik a; leitung at in a-omta hi. Huan van a om tempul a kipan in angel dang ahong paikhia a, ama'n leng kawite hiamtak atawi hi. Huan meikuang tung a thilhihtheihna nei, angel dang maitam ma a kipan in ahong paikhia a; ama'n aw ngaihtak in, huai kawite tawipa sam in, “Na kawite hiamtak lik inla, leitung a grep gahbomte lakhawm in; grepte amin mahmahta hi,” achi hi. Huai angel in leitung ah akawite alik a, leitung a grep gahte alakhawm a, Pathian thangpaihna, uain sukna thupi, uain sukna ah apailut hi. Kho polam ah uain sukna chil in a-om a, uain sukna a kipan sakol kamkaihna tanpha louching sangkhat-le-zaguk pha in sisan aluangkhia hi.

Huan chiamtehna thupi leh lamdang, angel sagih, hii nanung sagih, ananungpente, Pathian hehna toh kidim tawi, van ah ka mu hi. Huan limlang tuipi hileh kilawm, mei toh kihel leh gamsa leh alim leh amin nambat tung a vualzoute, akhut ua Pathian gosem tawi a, limlang tuipi kiang a dingh ka mu a, amau Pathian sikha, Mosi la leh Belamnou la asa uhi.“Na thilhihte thupi in alamdang hi.Aw Toupa Pathian,Bangkim hihthei!Na lampite adik in atang uhi,Misiangthoute Kumpipa, chi in. Toupa aw, kua'n ahia na min hih thupi a lau lou ding?Nang kia lah siangthou na hi ngal a.Namte tengteng hong pai in na ma ah ahong be ding uh,na thilhih diktatte lah hihlat in omta ngal ua,” achi uhi. Hiai thilte ka muh nung in, van a theihsakna biakbuk dantan sungnung hon in a-om a; huan hiai dantan sungnung a kipan in angel sagih, gawtna sagih nei, puanmalngat siangthou leh vak a kizem a, dangka-eng kawnggak a a-awm ua kigakte ahong paikhia uhi. Thil hing lite lak a khat in angel sagihte kiang ah tangtawn tangtawn a hing Pathian hehna a dim dangka-eng belhbu sagihte apia hi. Huchi in Pathian thupina athilhihtheihna a kipan meikhu in tempul hihdim in a-om hi; angel sagihte gawtna sagihte atunkim masiah asung ah kuamah alut theita kei uhi. Angel Sagih Leh Gimna Sagihte

Huan tempul dantan sungnung a kipan hong suak aw thupi in, angel sagihte kiang ah, “Kuan unla, leitung ah Pathian thangpaihna belhbu sagihte va sungkhia un,” achih ka za hi. Amasapen akuan a, leitung ah abelhbu asungkhia a, huai gamsa chiamtehna nei, alim bemite tung ah meima sia leh nai in ahong suak hi. Anihna in tuipi tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; misite si bang in sisan ahong suak a; tuipi sung a thil omte tanpha in hinna nei peuhmah asita uhi. Athumna pen in luite leh tui nakte tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; sisan ahong suak uhi. Tuite angel in, “Nang omsa leh omlel, nang Siangthoupa aw, hichibang a vai na hawm tak ziak in na diktat hi. Amau misiangthoute leh zawlneite sisan asuah ua, nang adawn ding ua sisan na piak, aphu tawk him uh ahi,” achih ka za hi. Huan maitam in, “Ahi, Toupa Pathian aw, Bangkim hihthei, na vaihawmte adik in adiktathuai hi!” achih ka za hi. Alina pen in nisa tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; amah kiang ah mite meikuang a hainat theihna piak in a-om hi. Asat a sa a mite hainat in a-om ua; hichibang natnate tung a thilhihtheihna nei, Pathian min agensia ua; Pathian kiang a thupina pe ding in akisik tuan kei uhi. Angana in gamsa tutphah tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; huan alalgam hihmial in a-om a; amau na sa in alei uh akei ua, anatna uh leh ameimate uh ziak in amau tuh van a Pathian agensia ua; athilhihte uah akisik tuan kei uhi. Agukna in Euphrates Luipi thupi tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; huai tui akang vek hi, huchi a suahlam a kipan kumpipate lampi ding bawlsa a a-omtheihna ding in.

Dragon kam a kipan leh gamsa kam a kipan leh zawlnei taklou kam a kipan in kha nin thum, ukeng bang mai hong paikhia ka mu hi. Amaute ahih uleh dawite kha, thillamdang hihte; khovel pumpi leh lei kumpipate kiang a hong a, Pathian Bangkim hihtheipa Ni thupi a kidouna a dia amaute pikhawmte ahi uhi. “Ngai in, guta bang in ka hong pai hi! Kiveng leh puan tengsa a ommi ahampha hi, huchi lou in zaw vuaktang in a-om dia; azumhuaina amu kha ding uhi.” Pathian Hehna Belhbu Sagih Muhna Asagihna in huihkhua tung ah abelhbu asungkhia a; huan laltutphah a kipan in dantan sungnung ah aw ngaihtak ahong suakkhia a, “Zoh ahita!” achi hi. Huchi in khophiate, awte, van-gingte, leh zinling thupi ahong om a, huchibang a thupi leh hat leitung a mihing om nungsiah om ngei nai lou zinling thupi ahi. Khopi thupi mun thum in akikhen a, namte' khopite achim ua; Babulon khopi thupi Pathian mitmuh in theihgige in a-om a, adawn ding in ahehna kihtakhuai uain nou piak in a-om hi. Tuikulh gam chiteng ataimang ua, tang sangte muh phak in a-omta kei hi. Huan van a kipan in gial lian pipi, talent khat a gik mite tung ah ahong kesuk hi; mite'n huai gial a gawtna ziak in Pathian agensia ua; huai gawtna athupi mahmah hi.

Huai thil nung in belhbu sagih tawi angel sagihte lak a khat hong pai in kei ahong houpih a, “Hong pai in, tui tampite tung a tu kizuaknu thupi tung a vaihawmna ka hon ensak ding. Leitung kumpipate amah toh akingai ua, huan amingaihna uain in leitung a tengte khamsak in a-om uh,” achi hi. Ama'n Kha in gamdai ah hon pomang a; huan gamsa san-au, Pathian gensiatna min a pumdim, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei tung a numei khat tu ka mu hi. Huai numei in puan sandup leh puan sandang asilh a, dangka-eng leh suangmantam leh tuikepsuang in akizem hi; akhut in dangka-eng nou, thilkihhuaite leh angkawm nitna a dim atawi hi. Huan ataltang ah, “Babilon thupi, kizuakte leh leitung a kihhuaite nu,” chih min khat akigelh hi. Huan huai numei, misiangthoute sisan leh Jesu martarte sisan dawnkham in ka mu hi.Huai minu ka muhtak in lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. Huan angel in ka kiang ah, “Bangziak a lamdang sa na hia? Huai numei leh amah pua gamsa, lu sagih leh kii sawm nei, thuguk ka hon hilh ding, achi hi. Huai na gamsa muh a-om khin a, huan a-om kei a; kokhuk taw nei lou a kipan a hong paikhe ding ahi, manthatna a pai ding ahi. Huan leitung a tengte, khovel siam tung a kipan a hinna laibu a min gelhlouhte'n tua gamsa om khin a, om lou leh hong om ding ahihdan amuh chiang un lamdang asa ding uhi. “Hiai ah pilna lungsim neih akul hi. Lu sagihte numei tutna tang sang sagihte ahi uhi. Huan kumpipa sagihte a-om ua; nga apuk khin ua, khat a-om lel a, khat ahong tung nai kei hi. Ahong tun chiang in, hun tomchik sung a-om ding hi.

Huai gamsa na om khinsa, tua om lou pen kumpi giatna ahi. Amah sagihte lak a tel ahi; huan manthatna ah apai ding hi. “Huan kii sawm na muhte, lalgam nei nai lou, kumpipa sawmte ahi ua; himahleh dakkal khat lel, huai gamsa toh amau kumpipate bang in thuneihna anei ding uhi. Hiaite'n lungsim khat nei in, gamsa kiang ah athilhihtheihna leh athuneihna uh apia uhi. Hiaite'n Belamnou akidoupih ding ua, Belamnou in amau azou dia, amah toupate' Toupa leh kumpipate' Kumpipa ahih ziak in; amah toh omkhawmte bel sapte, telte leh muanhuaite ahi uhi.” Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Kizuaknu tutna tui na muhte mite leh mipite leh namte leh paute ahi uhi. Kii sawm na muhte leh na gamsa muhte'n kizuaknu amudah ding ua, suanbei leh vuaktang asuaksak ding uhi, asa ane ding ua, amah mei in ahaltum vek ding uhi. Kizuaknu Leh Gamsa Muhna

Hiai thil nung in van a kipan angel dang, thuneihna liantak nei, van a kipan hong paikhesuk ka mu a; athupina in leitung avaksak hi. Aw ngaihtak in akikou a, “Chimta, chimta Babulon khopi thupi, dawite omna leh kha nin tengteng kulh leh vasa nin leh huathuai teng kulh ahong hita hi. Nam tengteng in amingaihna hehna uain a nam tengteng dawnkhamsak a-om ua, leitung Kumpipate'n amah akingaihpih ua, leitung sumsinte noptal luatna a ahong hauh tak ziak un,” achi hi. Huan van a kipan in aw dang in hichibang in agen hi:“Ka mite akhelhna ua na pan khaklouhna ding uh leh ahii na kailouhna ding un,amah a kipan in hong paikhia un,achih ka za hi. Akhelhna van atungta a,Pathian in akhelhnate atheigige hi. Ama'n hon piak bangmah akiang ah pia unla,amah gamtatna aleh nih in thukkik un;ahelna nou ah amah a ding in aleh nih in helsak un, Akithupisakna zahzah leh anoptalna zah in amah bawlgim un,hihlungkham un; ama'n alungsim a,‘Kumpinu in ka tu a, meithai ka hi kei, bangchi mah in kalungkham ngei kei ding, achih ziak in. Huaiziak in ni khat sung inhipi a gawtna, sihna, lungkhamna leh kialna ahong tung ding hi;huan amah mei in halmang vek in om in teh;atung a vaihawm ToupaPathian ahat ziak in.” Huan leitung a kumpipate amah kingaihpih leh nuamtat a omte'n, amah haltumna meikhu amuh chiang un, amah kah in amau ding uhi. Athuakna a hihnat a om ding lau in gamlapi a dingh in,“Maizen! Maizen!Khopi thupi Babilon!Dakkal khat sung a na tung a vaihawmna ahong tung ngal a,” achi ding uhi. Huan leitung a sumsinte'n, asumsinna van uh kuamah in alei louh ziak un, kap in asuun ding uhi.

Huan asumsinna vante uh dangka-eng leh dangka a sumsinna van, suangmantam, tuikepsuang, puanmalngat hoih, puansan, maimom puan, puan eng, singnamtui, saiha a bawl van, sing mantampen chi a van bawl tengteng, sumsan leh sik leh marbul suang a belsuan bawl tengteng; leh singguithak, namtui, namtui haichi, thaunamtui, chim, uain, thau, buhnel, buh, belam, huan sakol kangtalai leh sal, huai tuh mite hinna ahi. “Huan na lungsim a na deih gahte'n nang hon taimangsan ua, thil limchi leh hoih teng in nang ahon manthatsan ua, muh nawn ahi ngei kei ding,” achi uhi. Hiai thilte a sumsinte, amah ziak a hau a bawlte'n, amah hihnat a a-omna lau in gamlapi a dingh in, kap in asuun ding uhi. “Maizen! Maizen! Khopi thupi, puanmalngat hoih, asan leh a-eng a kizem a, dangka-eng, suangmantam leh tuikepsuang a kivannu! Dakkal khat in hichi tel a hauhna thupi bangmah lou a bawl a a-om ziak in,” achi ding uhi. Huan longpute leh akoilam lam a long a hong tungte leh long mite leh tuipi a nek zong tengteng gamlapi ah adingh uhi. Babulon Pukna Huan alutung ua leivui kibuak in akikou ua, kap leh suun in, “Maizen! Maizen! Kho thupi huai a tuipi a mi longnei tengteng ama hauhsakna ziak a hauhsak in a-om uhi! Dakkal khat sung a amah bangmah lou ahong hih tak mai, achi ding uhi. “Aw nang van, amah tung ah kipak unla, Aw nou misiangthoute leh nou sawltakte leh nou zawlneite; na tung ua avaihawmna Pathian in ama tung a vai ahawm tak ziak in kipak un!” achi uhi. Huan angel hat khat in buhgawina suang lianpi hileh kilawm suang khat adom a, tuipi ah apailut a, “Hichibang in khopi thupi, Babulon nakpi a hihchip in om in chin, muhkhiak nawn louh hial in a-om ding.

Gosem tumte leh lasiamte leh tamngai tumte leh pengkul tumte, na sung ah akiza nawn kei hial ding hi. Khutsiam siamna nei himhim, na sung ah muhkhiak in om nawn kei hial un chin; na sung ah khawl ging akiza nawn sam kei ding hi. Na sung ah meivak avak nawn kei ding a; mouneipa aw leh mou aw na sung ah akiza nawn kei ding; na sumsinte lah leitung kumpipate ahi ngal ua; na bumsiamna in nam tengteng khem in a-omta uhi! “Amah sung ah zawlneite sisan leh misiangthoute sisan leh leitung a thah a omte tengteng sisan akimukhia hi,” achi hi.

Hiai thilte nung in van ah mipi aw hileh kilawm in, “Hallelujah! Hotdamna leh thupina leh thilhihtheihna i Pathian a ahi; avaihawmna adik in akizen hi; kizuaknu thupi leitung a, amingaihna a hihsenu tung a vai ahawm tak ziak in, ama'n asikhate sisan ama tung ah athukta,” achih ka za hi. “Hallelujah! Huai khopi halna meikhu tangtawn tangtawn in azamtou hi,” chi in akikou nawn uhi. Upa sawmnih-le-lite leh thil hing lite abokkhup ua, Pathian laltutphah a tupa, “Amen, Hallelujah!” chi in abia uhi. Huan laltutphah a kipan in aw ahong pawtkhia a, “Nou asikhate aw, na vek un, aneu leh alian, nou amah laute, Pathian phatna pia un,” chi in. Mipi tampi aw hileh kilawm tui tampi ging bang leh vanpiging bang aw in, “Hallelujah! Toupa i Pathian Bangkim hihthei in vai ahawm ziak in, nuam ni, nakpitak in kipak ni, amah kiang ah thupina pia in; Belamnou zineih hun ahong tungta hi. Azi leng akisak khit tak ziak in; amah puanmalngat hoih leh siangthou a kizepna ding in piak in a-omta, achih ka za hi, tua puanmalngat hoih misiangthoute nasep diktatte ahi.” Huan angel in ka kiang ah, “Gelh in, Belamnou zineihna nitak ankuang um ding a chial a omte ahampha uhi,” achi hi. Huan amah be ding in akhebul ah ka puk hi. Huan ka kiang ah, “Hon be kei hial in; Jesu thu theihpihna kem nangmah unau leh sikha hihpih ka hi; Pathian be zaw in, Jesu thu theihpihna genkholhna kha ahih ziak in,” achi hi.Vualzou Khrist Huan van kihong ka mu a; ngai in, sakol kang leh atung a tuang Ginom leh Dik kichi leng ka mu hi; ama'n dikna a vaihawm in kidouna abawl hi.

Amit meikuang bang ahi a, alutung ah lallukhu tampi a-om a, min khat amah lou ngal kuamah theih louh kigelh anei hi. Amah puan sisan a diah in akizem a; amin, “Pathian Thu,” chih ahi. Amah van a om sepaihhon puanmalngat hoih, ngou leh siangthou silh a sakol kang tung a tuang in ahon zui uhi. Akam a kipan in namte asatna ding, namsau hiam khat ahong suakkhia a; amau tung ah sikchiang in vai ahawm dia; Pathian Bangkim hihthei hehna lauhuaina uain sukna achil hi. Apuan tung leh aphei tung ah min, “KUMPIPATE' KUMPIPA, LEH ToupaTE' Toupa,” chih akigelh hi. Huan angel khat ni a dingh ka mu a; amah aw ngaihtak a kikou in, van laizawl a vasa leng tengteng kiang ah, “Hong unla, Pathian nitak an thupi ah hong kikhawm vek un; Kumpipate sa, sepaih heutute sa, mihatte sa, sakolte sa, atung a tute sa, mi tengteng sa, sikha leh sikhaloute sa leh milian leh mineu sa na nektheihna ding un,” achi hi. Belamnou Zineihna Hallelujah Gamsa mat in a-om a, zawlnei tak lou, ama a chiamtehna hih a gamsa chiamtehna neite leh amah limbete akhempa toh amankhawm a; anih tuak un ahing in meidil, kaat a kang sung ah paihlut in a-om uhi. Huan adangte huai sakol tung a tupa kam a kipan a hong suak namsau a thah in a-om uhi; vasa tengteng amau sa in gilvah in a-om uhi.

Huan angel khat van a kipan a hong paikhesuk, akhut a kokhuk taw nei lou honna chabi leh khainiang lianpi tawi ka mu hi. Ama'n dragon, gulpi tek, diabol leh Setan a, kum sangkhat sung a ding in amah ahen hi. Kum sangkhat achin ma a namte akhem nawnlouhna ding in amah kokhuk taw nei lou ah paihlut in a-om a, akhakkhum a, amah akilhkhum hi; tunung in sawt lou kal amah khah nawn a om ding ahi. Huan laltutphahte leh atung a tute ka mu a, amaute kiang ah vaihawmna piak in a-om hi; Jesu thu theihsakna ziak leh Pathian thu ziak a angawng uh sattan a omte kha ka mu a, huaite gamsa leh alim beloute, atal ua leh akhut ua achiamtehna neiloute ahi ua; amaute ahong hing ua, Khrist toh kum sangkhat vai ahawm uhi. Hiai pen thohnawnna masapen ahi. Misi dangte bel kum sangkhat abei mateng ahingkik kei uhi. Thohnawnna masapen a pangte ahampha un asiangthou uhi; amaute tung a sih nihna in hihtheih aneih louh ziak in; himahleh amau Pathian leh Khrist siampute ahong hi ding ua, kum sangkhat sung amah toh vai ahawm ding uhi.Setan Khah Nawnna Leh Kidouna Nanung Huan kum sangkhat abei chiang in, atanna suangkul a kipan Setan khahkhiak in a-om dia, leitung kil li a om namte, Gog leh Magog khem a amau kidouna mun a pikhawm ding in amah ahong paikhe pah dia; atamdan uh tuipi piaunel bang ahi uhi. Huan amau leitung vailam khaksuak in apaitou ua, misiangthoute giahphual leh khopi it, akimvel in a-um uhi. Huan van a kipan in mei ahong kesuk a, amaute akangtum vek hi. Huan amaute khempa diabol gamsa leh zawlnei taklou omna, mei leh kaat dil ah paihlut in a-om uhi

tangtawn tangtawn in sun leh zan in hihnat in a-omta ding uhi.Vaihawmna Nanungpen Huan laltutphah ngou thupi leh atung a tu ka mu a; amai a kipan lei leh van ataimang a, amaute a ding in mun himhim a-om kei hi. Misite, aneu leh alian, huai laltutphah ma a dinghte ka mu a; laibute akihong a; laibu dang, hinna laibu leng akihong a; misite huai laibute a thil kigelhte a kipan in athilhih bang ua vai hawmsak in a-om uhi. Tuipi in asung a om misite ahon pawtsak a; sihna leh misikhua in asung ua misi omte ahon pawtsak ua; mi chiteng athilhih bangbang ua vai hawmsak in a-om uhi. Sihna leh misikhua meidil ah paihlut in a-om uhi. Hiai meidil pen sih nihna ahi. Kuapeuh hinna laibu a kigelh amuh louh uh, meidil ah paihlut in a-om uhi. Kum Sangkhat Sung Setan Henna

Huan van masapen leh lei masapen abei tak ziak un van thak leh lei thak ka mu a; tuipi leng a-om nawnta kei hi. Khopi siangthou, Jerusalem thak, mou apasal a ding a kizem bang a bawlzohsa a om, Pathian a kipan van ahong paikhesuk ka mu hi. Huan laltutphah a kipan aw thupitak ka zak in, “Ngai in, mihingte lak ah Pathian biakbuk a-om a, amau lak ah ateng dia amau amite ahi ding ua, Pathian mahmah in amaute a-ompih dia, a Pathian uh ahi ding hi. Huan amit ua kipan in khitui tengteng anulhul dia; sihna a-om nawn kei dia; lusuun leh kah leh natna himhim leng a-om nawn kei ding hi,” achi hi. Huan laltutphah tung a tupa'n, “Ngai in, thil tengteng ka siam thakta,” achi hi. “Gelh in, hiai thute amuanhuai in adik uhi,” achi hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Sep zoh ahita. Kei Alpha leh Omega, abul leh atawp ka hi. Dangtakte kiang ah bei in hinna tuikhuk a tui amau ka pe ding hi. Kuapeuh avualzoupa'n hiai thilte aluah ding; a Pathian ka hi dia, amah ka tapa ahi ding hi. Himahleh dawilokte leh gingtaloute leh kihhuaite leh tualthatte leh mingaihhatte leh bumhatte leh milim bete leh zuautheite tengteng tan tuh dil, mei leh kaat a kang, sih nihna ahi,” achi hi.Jerusalem Thak Huan angel sagih belhbu sagih leh gawtna sagih nanungpen tawite lak a khat ahong pai a; kei ahon houpih a, “Hiai ah hong pai in, mou, Belamnou zi ka hon ensak ding,” achi hi. Ama'n Kha in tang lian leh sangpi ah ahon pomang a, huchi in khopi siangthou Jerusalem, Pathian a kipan a van a hong paikhesuk ahon ensak a, Pathian thupina anei a; avakna suangmantam pen, jasper suang, kristal bang in asiang hi.

Kulhbaang thupi leh sangpi anei a; kong sawm-le-nih anei a, huai kongte ah angel sawm-le-nih a-om ua; huai kongtungte ah Israel suan nam sawm-le-nihte min akigelh hi: asuahlam ah kongpi thum a-om a; amallam ah kongpi thum, asimlam ah kongpi thum; atumlam ah kongpi thum a-om hi. Huan khopi kulhbaang in nuaiphah sawm-le-nih anei a, huaite tung ah Belamnou sawltak sawm-le-nihte minte atuang hi. Huan kei hon houpihpa'n khopi leh kongpite leh kulhbaangte tehna ding in tehna dangka-eng sialluang atawi hi. Huai khua in ning li anei a, adunglam availam chiachia in alian a; asialluang in khopi ateh a, lou chiing singkhat-le-sangnih ahi a, dunglam leh vailam leh asanlam akikim uhi. Huan angel in huai kulhbaang mihing tehna dan in ateh a, tong za-le-sawmli-le-li a sah ahi. Huan akhopi kulhbaang jasper suang a kibawl ahi a; huan akhopi dangka-eng siang, limlang siang bang ahi. Huai khopi kulhbaang suangphum suangmantam chiteng a zep ahi. Asuangphum khatna jasper suang ahi a; anihna sapphir suang, athumna kalsedoni suang; alina emerald suang; angana sardonik suang; agukna sardi suang; asagihna kristolait suang; agiatna beril suang; akuana topaz suang; asawmna krisopras suang; asawm-le-khatna zasinth suang; asawm-le-nihna amethis suang ahi uhi. Van Thak Leh Lei Thak Toupa Pathian Bangkim hihthei leh Belamnou atempul ahih ziak in, huai khopi ah tempul ka mu kei hi. Huan atung a tanvak ding in huai khopi in ni hiam, kha hiam leng apoimoh kei a, Pathian thupina in atanvak a, Belamnou ameivak uh ahi. Huai vak ah hotdam namte akhosa ding ua; leitung kumpipate athupina uh toh ahong lut ding uhi. Bangchi mah in huai kongpite sun a khak in a-om kei ding hi, huai lai a zan a-om louh ding ziak in. Huai mun ah namte thupina leh zahtakhuaina laklut ahi ding hi. Bangchi mah in huai ah thilnin hiam, ahihkeileh kihhuai leh zuaubawl himhim leng alut kei ding a; himahleh Belamnou hinna laibu a min gelhte kia alut ding uhi.

Huan hinna tui siang luanna lui ahon ensak a, huai lui bel kristal bang a siang, Pathian leh Belamnou laltutphah a pan hong luangkhia ahi. Huai a kongzing lai, alui lang tuaktuak ah hinna singgah chi sawm-le-nih nei, kha teng a gah a-om a; huai singnahte namte hihdamna ding ahi. Huan hamsia himhim a-om nawnta kei dia; huai ah Pathian leh Belamnou laltutphah a-omta ding hi; asikhate'n a-nna asem ding uhi. Amaute'n amel amu ding ua; atal uah ama min a-om ding hi. Huan zan himhim a-om nawn kei dia; khawnvak vak leh nisa vak hiam leng apoimoh nawn kei ding uh; Toupa Pathian in amau vakna apiak ding ziak in; amau tangtawn tangtawn in vai ahawmta ding uhi.Jesu Hong Paina Huan ama'n ka kiang ah, hiai thute amuanhuai un adik uhi; Toupa zawlnei siangthoute Pathian in thil hong om pah mahmah dingte asikhate kiang ah musak ding in a-angel asawl hi. “Ngai in, Ka hong pai pah ding. Hiai laibu a genkholhna thute zui peuhmah ahampha hi,” achi hi. Huan kei Johan, hiai thilte zapa leh mupa ka hi. Huchi a ka zak leh ka muhtak in, hiai thilte hon musakpa angel khebul ah be ding in ka puk hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hon be kei hial in, hiai laibu thute kem, na unau zawlneite leh nang sikha hihpih ka hi; Pathian be zaw in,” achi hi. Ama'n ka kiang ah, “Hiai laibu a genkholhnate bilhkhum ke'n, ahun anai tak ziak in. Kuapeuh midiklou in diklouhna hih nalai henla, kuapeuh minin, nin nalai hen; kuapeuh midiktat, diktat nalai henla; kuapeuh Mi Siangthou, siangthou nalai hen,” achi hi. “Ngai in, ka hong pai pah ding hi; michih athilhih bang zel ua piak ding in ka kiang ah ka kipahman a-om hi.

Kei Alpha leh Omega, amasapen leh ananungpen, abul leh atawp ka hi.” Hinna sing ahon zottheihna ding uleh, khopi kongpi a aluttheihna ding ua apuan uh sawpsiangte ahampha uhi. Apolam ah uite, bumhatte, mingaihhatte, tualthatte, milim bete leh kuapeuh zuauthu deih a, zuauthu bawlte a-om uhi. “Kei, Jesu in saptuamte a ding a hiai thilte na kiang ua hon theisak ding in ka angel ka hon sawl hi. David zung leh asuan zingsol aksi vak ka hi,” achi hi. Kha leh Mou in, “Hong pai in,” achi uhi. Aza peuh in, “Hong pai in,” chi hen. Kuapeuh a-ut in hinna tui bei in dawn hen.Thukhitna Hiai laibu a genkholhna thute za peuh kiang ah ka theisak hi: Mi kuapeuh in hiai thute abehlapleh Pathian in ama tung ah hiai laibu a kigelh gawtnate abehlap ding hi; huan kuapeuh in hiai genkholhna laibu a thute lakmang aneihleh Pathian in atan ding hiai laibu a kigelh, hinna sing leh khopi siangthou a kipan alamang ding hi. Hiai thilte theisakpa'n, “Ahi, ka hong pai pah ding hi,” achi hi. Amen! Hong pai in, Toupa Jesu. Toupa Jesu hehpihna noute tengteng tung ah om hen, Amen. Hinna Tuilui

I pi-le-pute uh khandan laia kigelh a tam het kei. A khandan uh leh tawndan tatdan suikik theihna khat tuh a late uh ahi Huan, pau luite leng ahi nawn. I late sakkhel khel dinga zat ding hilouim, I sin ding him uh ahi. Hiai labu leng tuabang dinga zat dingin a hoih. a I dinmun asan dungjuiin hiaia tuang I late leh adang I ngaihnatnaa sang ding. Hiai labu gelh pa kuhkalna leh phatuamngaihna phattak ahi. A sungate leng simtak ahi. T. Jam Khothang Paite

Leitunggam lim en lehang, manohnalam neia luang luite i mu hi. Tuate koia hongkipan ahi uhiam chih i theih kei a leh pen, i theihna a buching zoulou suak hi. Lamkim-mualsanga akuapeuh toh i kituah chiangin, Koia hongkipan na hi hiam? chiin i kikan hi. Tua mahbangin, la khenkhat telkhawm PAITE LA GOUSIAH chia minvoh a pianjiate atomlamin kisut hi. Unau tangthu theihdan zong kibanglou chih ahih chiangin, khenkhatte theihdan toh a kibang kholkei kha ding chih ka nial kei. Ahitazongin, athei ngeilou khargthakte adingin sui louh sangin mantakna bangtan hiam bek a neih ka lamen-na hi. Lapau haksate zong a khiaknate kipia hi. Hiaia tuang late akhen a nei-tuam bang a oma, huan kibatlouhna khat bang a om khak aleh bonna ngaisiam ding un ka ngen hi. Nidanglai peka khangluite tulai khangthakte banga laithei a nahi kei uhi. Lai a natheihlouh uh bangin a hat mahmah lungsim toh a teng uhi. Gen-le-sak a neih ua leh laia gelh louin, amahtuh lungsimin a vomthoh uhi. A dahnate uh, nuam a saknate uh leh, huan a hatzohdante uh abitazongin, la ngenta a natangsak zou uhi. Huaijiakin ahi upaten, Thu i chih la, la i chih thu, a nachih uh.

Adiakdiakin, nungak leh tangval kalah la a leng petmah hi. Kampaua genkhiak dinga kilawmlou pi thute la a tansak chiang un a gen nemtuan huaia, huan ngaihtuan kholin leh lungkhoih jawin a kithei hi. I pileputen a honnutsiat uh tuabang gou hcihtakte laiah gelhlut leng a kepna hoihpen hi ding chiin leh, i Paite deihin, i mailam skul a a zat theih bun bang a hongom khak aleh chia ngimin, hiai ka honkaikhawm nimnem hi. -T. Lian Khohau

LA i chiih hinna ze tuamtuam etchiaana dinga limlang poimoh ahi. Paite la gousiah itahpite kem hoih kei Tekhiag Khangthak om jel dingten thonmohsak hun uh thiingeingei ting hi. Tbu a genchian thelhlouh ban lain le genetian thei chih hiai bu atuahg ilaten a diksakthna. Hiai laten thugih leh tangthua poimoh pipi mihing hinna ze tuamtuam a om kiitna leh kikuatna, gentheihna leh lehsapna, lungkhamnaleh taipahna, lungjuanin leh lungnopna, lungkiakna leh lametnaiten thupiin nei uhi. Tunang zek chiangin skul leh tsinnai sangjawte ah hiai latersinina om ngei ding. Hiai la gousiahte Paite manpha ahi uhi. Lawm Lianin PAITE LA GOUSIAH tamilou a abu a honbawl hi poimoh tenten na semkha ahi. A hongpianjiate tomkim, chien leh ngaihnophuai leh, huan lapau mal haksai khiaknate a gelhelten bil vaksak mahmah. Hiai labu neuchik a lianzo sem hongpianma dinga bulsit patna poimoh ahi jawl La a lunglutna-nei-mii tak bawl labu ahibjiakin a manpha tuanse hi. H. Jel Shyam

A tuiin hal e, chiau a tuiin hal, Hal zoulou e, Jawl-Ching ngai ing e. A mualin hal e, kamkei mualin hal, Hal zoulou e, Jawl-Ching ngai ing e. Ka tun vabia aw, ka jua vabia aw, Khokhal tui bang kei hongla ve aw. Na tun lah bia'ng e, na jua lah bia'ng e, Khokhal tui bang lakna nai lou e. A sing jing nuaiah, tangnah lam nuaiah, Jawl-Ching sial bang giahpih nuam ing e. Thangvan ging dimdim, laikhun thawn chiai e, Gama tangnah silhpuanin nei e. Khupching' nu tongsuah, siahkuna ka ngaih, Ka luanli'n tui bang ei tum hi e. Laukha se lou aw, omlai tang thei leng, Na tun sungnek in nei nuam ing e. Ching aw na tunin, sanggah lua honchi, Sanggah muantui ah valual leng e. Ka silhpuan tang aw, ka khaupuan tang aw, Kei Sialching toh laitawi ton ve aw. Silhpuan sia non chih, kaihdial sia non chih, Nang Sialching toh laitawi ton lou leng. A u lah ngai ing, a nau lah ngai ing, A milai pen ka ngaih tungnung e.

Ching aw na tunin, na tun lungmawlin, Laltang pengju hai bang ngak aw, chi. Laltang pengju hai bang ngak lou leng aw, Chingta vang khuang bang kulpih nuam jaw'ng. Khupching khimin jing, honzil khawm ve ua, Banjal nang bang honhek khawm ve ua. Khupching ka ngaih aw, tuana ka ngaih aw, Khupching ka ngaih kulsin tangta e. Ka siallum panta'ng, ka kawlchiang panta'ng, Ching sesul sa bang ka jui moh e. A tui sukin luang, damdiaiin luang e, Ching aw vai bang na thamna hi e. Khupching leh Ngambawm, liangvai lua sa'ng e, Tuah ding simthu kilel lah hial hi. Ching aw na malnua'n, na tun lungmawlin, Pamlou sang sing khia'n honsawl hi e. Ka semgua panta'ng, kawl-hei liangbatin, Sang singlel ah khua vadon ing e. Ching aw na laukha, thangvan kim chiangah, Mel muh dingin khaimu'n hongleng aw. Khaimu'n hongleng e. Ching aw na laukha, Khaubang chiahna luogin gelmaw'ng e. Ching aw na laukha, tangbang ka kholhin, Tung sunni vai bang tham sawt hen aw. Ching aw na heina, melin nu nuam veng, Khattang koiah sawi bang na hei hiam? Ching aw na laukha, nau bang hongnuiin, Kei ka lungjuan mual sing bang sang hi. Khupching ka ngaih man, tuanglam i tungah, Khokhal phaikhi'n sema vuang ngelngel.

Seh I Liandou a nu'n kuangpi khuhkhum, A nuaiah siatlei a suak hi; Siatlei suak albang a dah manin, Geltui ah ni bang a lun hi. Geltui ah ni bang a lun hi, Kho-khang phaipipak a bang: Dohsuanga umbang ka tou leh, Nuhtunin ka mel hongma hi. Nuhtunin ka mel hongma, Janggam ah puvon hongsa; Janggam ah puvon hongsa, Ka dawn ding kain ka zak. Ka sial aw na pai na paiin, Ka khua Geltui lam na tawnin; Geltui suak mualphei a pha hi, Sang leh lai lapna'n a pha. Nuhtunin saulam a theita jaw maw, Sawmsialin saulam a theita jaw maw; Sawmsialin saulam a theita jaw e, Nuhtunin kankong a belta jaw hi. Seh II Inkhang mual ah um bang touta'ng, Ka lenlual toh umi lunsial vamu'ng e; Umi lamsial ka tan ni'n aw, Kho tuanglam ah ka thai aw ni bang lun e. Lamli leh lamtual jawl ah, Setang pal dialdial leng e; A sa nekim ton leng e, Guhsa nekin ton leng e. Thei ka sena ka mel non mak, Thaitong siangah buh ju non ngen e

Buh non piaka buhsi non piak, Sa non piaka a guhbawk non piak; A guhbawk tuh ka duh lou e, A tak nemnem peve aw Thaitong aw e. A mi kilel kilela e, Michih laish hau-i-ta mah tungnung e; A va kilel kilela e, Vachih laish jangphualva mah tungnung e. Ningju duh leng phualvan tang toh, Aisa duh leng ka laknuai en veng; Ka laknuai ka vaet leh aw, Ka lulvok aw luaisa tai bang e. Ka kuanlamin pal siausiau tang, Ka chiahlamin Guntui a lian e; Guntui tunga sawnbana kai; Ka Thaitong aw na pam lua hi e. Ka kianga thumthumte aw, Nemnem tamtam peve aw Thai tong aw e; Thai aw thou aw, ningju lup aw, I sumtual ah lenlual kawlva lam bang e. Thai ka lakin phualtaug hontawi, Mineh laiah sunnipi honsing hi e; Ka Thai pha phung sam bang tulta, Ngou sai melpuah ka enchimlou lai hi e. Tuipi uang luan-ni janin aw, Chiaua limnga sepsiau a ki sepsiau e; Tulvuah nang luan-ni janin aw, Mim leh sawmtang jua siangah honglawi-na e. Pamlou nawla khuvate aw, Awnsing lel ah lamdal bang ki sai u'ai ve; Kei zong ngabang ka lenlaiin, Jawl-luite toh ka vahuchi sek u'ai ve. A mi zong nunin nuam e, Laikhun tungah sawnban khamluin nei e; A va zong nunin nuam e, Awnsing lelah a kha silhpuanin nei e.

Ka jua laihen jingdam sol- nou suak bang, Ka kawi louh ding ka sinlai a honlun e. Na kawi louh dia na sinlai ka honlut leh, Henkol ka buh luainam bang hongsutim aw. Tun dong lou jua dong loua sa bang i tai, Khang dampiau ah na besam jun veni e; Khang dampiau ah na besam jun veni, Na jua thulsiah khang dumpuan toh lawm sa'ng e. Ka von simsal tangsa aw, kum sawtsa aw, Thai lungdeih toh tun siang lam bang zong hi e; Thai lungdeih jangsesum sengin pua, Kotkawl nenah tunin nau bang sang ing e. Ka tun ka ngai chia nau bang na kah, Kamkei chiam v'aw, na tun siang zong veni e; Kamkei chiam v'aw na tun siang zong veni, A khua chih ah tahpuan bang bang veni; A khua chih ah tahpuan bang bang veni, A mual chih ah khaimu bang lam veni e. Kijun lou aw, jang simsal kijun lou aw, Ka von zoujam nang kawi ding'n ka phal lou e. Na von zoujam kei kawi dia na phal louh leh, Muikho jinin na siang'h hual- khauin khit aw.

Ka jua phuigua leldawna dit sumlu aw, Hongtualkum aw, na namtem hongjunin aw; Hongtualkum aw, na namtem hongjunin, Ka jua sumlu tangjik bang hongbanin aw. Alvanu lamkhuang kaih ding ka dah manin, Phualngou sumlu khang dumpuan in jial ing e; Phualngou sumlu khang dumpuan in jial ing, Khang damtui ah ngaih aw tum ton ta ni. Ka chin simthu hi chi aw, tuai lianu aw, Simlei tungah huantu bang na chingin aw. Zaila ngaih sang'n simthu deih ching nuam jaw'ng, Chin lungching aw guikhauin khit nuam ing e. A tui luang dimdim tungah lumsuang tungah, Tuai toh zai-deih khiak ung e, kei tum ing. A va hongleng diaidiai e, liap ah tu, Lungjuang lianu leng leh damdiai ah tu e.

Vahkhuaiin ka bang chi e, Tullel vangkhuain nei e; Tullel vangkhuain nei e, Sau ka sak kansang chi e. Pama vahkhuai phungching kisa, Kumkhua khenna'n vala'ng e; Kumkhua khenna'n vala'ng e, Saumang toh etlawm sa'ng e. Vahkhuai a hangta jaw maw, Momnou a hangta jaw maw; Momnoute hanlung chiamna aw, Vahkhuai bel bang suang ing e. Vahkhuai a hang kemsang daw'ng, Mang tunnu'n ningbel vual e; Mang tunnu'n ningbel vual e, Lengkel tangkhauin khih e. A kum china vahkhuai lapna, Chin pahtang ging dimdim e; Chin lentawm leh chin chiandal, Kum chin tuibang luang aw e.

Gal La Pupa vual-gen Tuizum Lunmang, Phualngou tulpal kawm bang e ngaih aw; Phualngou tulpal a kawm lou buang, Lun aw na siam dang sa'ng e Lun aw. Kangtui vontawi lentang phaingek, Doulai kulluh ding aw juang nang e; Lungdeih kawlchiang paibang pom toh, Thangvan-jawl juite aw muang nang e. Tun simthu lou vaimang simthu, Doulai kulluh ding aw juang nang e; Kei aw juang nang nahsing nuaiah, Limlian gam mawngsing aw hongsel aw. Theihlouh singta hammawl laish, Nichin jang kawlva bang lam ing e; Mel ka theihlouh hammawl vontawi, Zata libang ching e, ching aw e. Vaimang simthu'n dougam manaw'ng, Gunpi tung kawlva bang lam ing e; Va bang lamtang nutsiah tuai teng, Siansiam zou tangbang na dam ve aw. Leidou Japan palbang nang ding, Ka banjal aw giabang hawmthaw'ng e; Ka banjal aw giabang hawmthaw'ng e, Luntawi phualngcute aw muang nang e. Dougal palbang nang leng ding, Ngaih aw dou lunlaipi manaw'ng e; Ngaih aw dou lunlaipi manaw'ng, Tuilim nga bang kullai manaw'ng e. Vaimang tuanglam damtui zilja, Sausuah toh luitum ing e ngaih aw; A lelah va bang tuang ing e, Lungjuan zatam sial lah bang maw'ng e.

Lunglen La Pham masa ding mel kitheilou, Maimit kisuan suan ni e ngaih aw; Maimit suan et lung chimlouh aw, Mel kimuh lai chi ni e ngaih aw. Vual kawia lou bang na tul sang'n, Masuan sing heisa'n na pal aw lawm; Masuan sing heisa'n na pal aw, Loh louhin gam bang na mang ve aw. Jing ka zinna malgam leiah, Sunni tum ding tulin sung diai e; Sunni tum ding tulin sung diai, Tang kei lailung juan kitawi sawn e. Gam kimchiang pan kidon ni e, Tuahnading lunglai ah lel leng e; Gamkuam thuk leh zou-jinglai ah, Ngaihnou jang vaiva'n honglam ve aw. I kikalah vualhek simthu, Zatam e lawm, ngaih na sang lou aw; Khang huantu bang a khum zongin, Ka san tongnem heilai na chi aw. Kei ngaih banga vual non ngaih leh, Simthu phuh banga khauh hi ning e; Phuh bang khauh ning na kungtungah, Simthu khau bang sutsa hi ning e. Sunkim lawk bang tauna dinga, Kawi-louh-ding lia tongsuah nem aw e; Vual ang munmuang ngaihnou tongdam, Pianna tun tongsuah sang'n nemjaw e. Hialnen lawkta taua kai dang, Singhem tongdam sangkha adiam aw

Singhem simthu'n vual tongdam chi, Hemlam luainau bang ken vei veng e. A gamkuam thuk ngaihnou heina, Koi pan don lang mel ka mu diam aw; Tulkung tungah ka tuang zongin, Ngaih mel mulou kei aw juang nang e. Na jua pahtang i tutkhawlna, Ka sial chiangin ka duangtham zen e; Nang na simthu lungtak hileh, I pal zou heisa'n kai ding hi e. Kei ka lungjuan tulin pou leh, A deldawn kuitung ding ngaih aw e; Hon dawng cih aw sen ka vualngaih, Kumsawt lailufig kong ngilhzou diam aw. Heina duangzen singlel heisa, Ngaihnou sanmun muangta ding aw e; Ngaihnou sanmun muangta ding aw, Jingdam lawk bang kei tau ding aw e. Na-minte Heina penh ah mualchin sangah, Vangngaih nang gimsi aw theng moh e; Vangngaih nang gimsi aw theng moh, Duangzen nang tongdam aw saug maw'ng e. Singtawi ommuang na khavang ngai, Mual tumtai bang vul ngiingei ing e; Mual tumtai bang vul ngiingei ing, Duangzen nang tongdam aw sang maw'ng e. Simlei kilpi'n heihei ding a, Lungjuan leakum ka vei zou diam aw; Kilpi simlei heihei ve aw, Ngaihnou toh tui bang hon gawm ve aw.

Va bang pil aw, u leh nau aw, Siamsinpawl pak bang na tawi ve aw; Sing gamlei leh jang gamlei zong, Zatam tong kaitui bang hongluang e. Lungjuan khang lanbang ka ngakna; Khua vannuai siam Tung Pathian aw; Ka kungtunga omlai lang ding, Nang na kham aw Tung Pathian aw. Banjal laileng ommuan munah, Na sang aw chin lungta ngaih aw e; Na sang aw chin lungta ngaih aw, Lungjuan simthu kong sutna hi e. Mantung luaikun pigozung suih, Pehsik themnou toh sum bang tuah e; Lianem banjal jangleng-buktui, Ka sanna hi lingliang nou aw e. Tongdam luansiam duanglai tulnah, Sialtam toh taikhua na val hiam aw; Sunkim lungjuan tam na sialua, Vualin jin sumtual hi hong chi e. Lungdeiha khak von lianu aw, Thulsiah patpuan kiang jawnpih ve aw; Kawi toh mun-in muangta ve aw, Lungdeih von zatam tayvita ve aw. Puvon banjal tulta lailak, Pahtang ah sun nau bang hongkap e; Sunni hamtang kai hiihiai, Momnou nau-oih zaikhian toh lawm e. Lemnang dit leh pehsik themnou, Tulta junsiam toh sum bang tuah e; Lianem banjal tawnpat peina, Palvanou khawidimbuk nou bang e. Pigo liang leh tulkai junsiam, Mimkhau jialna piana dang aw e; Banjala kaih gawm siam sa'ng, Pupa banjal gia bang tang sa'ng e.

Gal La Mualpi ka vangkhua aw, Zin leh leng banna hi; Zin leh leng banna hi, Ngousai tuangtunna hi. Sangkap laihen mabang a pan, Tuana ei pupa hi; Tuana pupa mabang patsa, Puan bang i tan nuam diam. Vangkho suan ding mualchin ah, Jangta kaihmin luang bang; Sumlu tangjik bang la ding, Kumchin sevaupak bang. Janglei dona hawmsiam Banjal, Tuktang bang hongtung tah; Gamchih sehsa bang hawm tah, Suihlung i kim chiat hiam. Tuana pianna phungmin loh nang, Kei hileng, chi chiat hang; Tuana namchih zatam pianna, Chimnuai-Geltui khua hi. Sa La Ka jalmangin nuaijin tunnu'n, Von leh sang tel aw chi; Von lah ngai sang lah ngai ing, Von momnou mah tel ing. Ka von suangmual kal aw e, Sangsawlkhai ni hal lou; Von momnou tangbang khang aw e, Sang phungia lou bang lel. Kawlchiang aw khua na ngai nam aw, Sangphung na khen nuam nam aw; Nahnuaia ta sanglian phungching, Tun toh gi bang khen ing. Simlei tual tuan sang a namchih, Nuhsawl bang bangkim ing, Lal leidou leh janga vuisai, Phaksap ah jalzou tah. Dah La Tong sanlouh jin-tunnu aw, Selung khuai bang hang aw

Von nih-thum hambang huai ding aw, Sawndawng lentualah khia'ng. Simthu lunmei jin laitaka, Chin lunglian zenzen aw; Khuakim vualgen Kawlkei lunglian, Sunni hawmching manlou. Vaimang ah Kamkei bang gial e, Zatam dot lunmang hi; Khan gui lohna chi bang na tel, Na Banjal dawnsuang hen. Ngeina Ka jua sangkap jang vuisaiin, Kulnu dawng hon ding hi; Khaimu lenglai tual na khiakiti, Vaimang tual tuan ding aw. Tangnisa lumbang honsung ding, Tunga leng tualah khia'ng; Lengvan vai thou na honpih ding, Sangmanga phungching aw. Nahsing tuai sang tel kihawma, Senninu din huai ing; Ninghai lian leh phunglai telsa, Laichin dingin khiing siang. Tungleng nuaileng ka sialma aw, Phualmul jang niliap bang; Kelsawn-gia leh buhi-al inelsai, Tulkung luaileng pal bang. Lunglen La Theisen jua ngaih na malnua in, Salimlian ngoubang la'ng; Ka jua banjal ka chih dingin, Simsingin ka pousak. Sumtual simsinggil i phuh aw, Vual tung i tuanna hi, Vual tungtuanna ningbel zatam, Saumang toh etlawm sa'ng. Tuntom aw e, tuntom aw e, Tuntom sangluang ka kaihna; Lai ka henna jangkhen kawlchiang, Tuntom sangluang ka kaihna. Ommuan muna vai-tunnu aw, Paivaleng tongdam kha'ng

Paivaleng tongdam ki khak aw, Chin munah vahil ve aw. Jingzin tuanglam ngoutui tungah, Pehsik khau bang khung aw; Machiang hei leng nungchiang hei leng, Jingzin hawlsuang vum bang. Vaimang tuanglam sausuan piandang, Pehsik sau pheiin gan; Heksiam banjal jang leia ta; A va lensiam zil aw. Pheiphung khai lou, kuizil jap lou, Ngoutui vangkhua in nei; A lelah va bang tuang ing e, Ngoutui ah khaubang chia'ng. Gawmsiam pehsik khaimu'n leng e, Jingzin ka tuanglam aw; Khodon mualchin nim dildial, Singgam jang tam diudeu. Omlai minthang zata vual-gen, I tungah khuai bang tu; I tungah khuai bang tu e, Vonteng suan gua bang mun.

Vual ngaih a natajaw maw e, Tun ngaih a natajaw maw; Tun ngaih gimsi a theng thei e, Vual ngaih laiah na sa'ng. Vual ngai ing e, duang vul ing e, Damtui bang ching kiam ing; Damtui bang ching kiam ing e, Tung thelnah bang kiak law'ng. Ka ngaih aw vual lianu aw, Sing duangah na bang lou aw; Sing duangah na bang lou aw, Pelmoha chiamsa hi.

Gal La Vaimang gam palva len zil van laijawl ah, I dou veita lummei bang kitawi aw: Lummei bang kitawi e i dou veita, Khua phaksap ah lamdal bang kisai aw. I khang vaimang hongkithang khua killam ah, Na tawi kawlchiang damtui ah pai ding chi; Na tawi kawlchiang lah damtui ah a pai lou, Vaimang na pal nuai silkia bang tom ing. Dah La Sang ka gah aw lenpuan bang jak thei bileng, Zatam nuhsawl bang ka bang kim ding hi e; Ngoumei bileng khua chipeuh jel ding hi'ng, Guikhau hileng phaksapa jam ding hi'ng e. Dah kho-lelliang tulsinga pou thei hileh, Hawkguama pon mualchin sang khup ding hi e; Hawkguama pon mualchin sang a khup zongin, A va lengin tuannan lung sit ding hi e. Tun aw honchi chi veng aw honlou lou veng, Lengvan kaisa na min lou kha nak ing e; Tun aw honchi chi lou aw honlou lou ken, Kei non loh leh ma na jam lah ding hi e. Tuanglam ka sikkhelha bawn tun min ka loh, Chikleh tun min loh ka bang thei ding hiam aw.

A va lengin sing chipeuh tuannan nei, Gahliang kei kawmding bei ven khua ngai ing e; Nunnuam dingin tung thangvan mau dimdim e, Gahliang dingin nuai simlei gial bang kia e. Theibang ka senlai lima jua pham hi, Nunkhum ka loihlai lima tun pham hi e; Mom milmialin nunkhum loih tualah khe veng, Dah luat zatam kei kana niang omlou e. Lungjuan sialin ka zaila vuiching tah, Sena vualin lungah tubang ching un aw; Sanggah'n naihtam ka sial toh lawnvual ngaih toh, Heina peuh ab lungjuan sial zaila hi e. A si ngai veng thangvan kanin sang hi, A hing ngai veng mual vih-thum in hal hi e; A si ka ngaihna leh aw a hing ngaihna, Tulvum nahneu khawlmun ah hilin pha e. Tunsung mimbang ka piana sanggah hi'ng, Ka kuah tun tong sang loua laileng hi'ng e; Tun tong sang lou bansam sawlbang heu ing, Si leh hing vang ngaia kumvei ding hi'ng e. Ning i nek ni'n sauah hul liiliai hang, Kha i kiak ni'n i laizom tuam om hi e; Kha i kiak ni'n i laizom tuam om hi, Naubang kah tangbang honhuan tuam om hi e.

Ka seui toh lulvok toh gil buh-al toh, Tong kum thei leng lungjuan sial chiat ding aw e; Ka seui vual ngai aw e, lulvok tun ngai, Keiin kawi ngai, gil buh-al von ngai aw e. Ka tun sunga damtuia ka vunlaiin, Sanggah ding melin ka thei lou hial hi e; Sanggah ding melin thei leng ka tunnu aw, Hawldam siktuiin ka luangmang ding hi e. Ka tun pianna sial ing e, ka jua pianna, Simlei ngaih khua tangbang khanpih zou ing; Simlei ngaih khua tangbang khanpih zou ing, Jua mel mulou lena kumkhua vei hi'ng e. Sung gilkial laiah na e, u leh nau aw, Vonteng khuatuah sakluang tulta'n pou ing e; Vonteng khuatuah sakluang tulta'n pou ing, Va jingthou leh lun-tan tong chiamnan nei e. Von aw lam gial na kiak ni'n hau sumtual ah Bahkhi pha bang zatan lambang vel hi e; Na tun ka zebzum aw e ka lelliang aw, Anglai ka henkolin zong liah zoulou e. Lunglen La A singin ka pal chi e sing chih pal e, Pal chiat na ven bengbah nop tuam om hi e

A miin ka pal chi e nam chih pal e, Pal chiat naven tongsan nop tuam om hi e. Ngaih aw na tun pauin e na jua pauin, Killam lumsuang a sel leh tuah ni chi e; Killam lumsuang thik kuma sel lou ding aw, Lailung kuai ma'n ngaih aw gibang khen ni e. Tun masa bang omlou e jua masa bang, Lenchil tongsan ngaih masak bang omlou e; Lenchil tongsan lenheisa tualah khe leng, Kumsawt gamgua bang ka hingzou ding hiam aw. A sing hileng tulnam khat a pou ding aw, A leljang phaikhi'n sema semkhen hi e; A tui bileng hawkguam khat a luang ding aw, Chiaua lumsuangin hal e, luan khen bang e. Hialnen tulta kai nena zou lawkta aw, Nang na san ding na tunin a nial hiam aw; Lawkta na tau bang dih aw tul-i-lel ah, Kei zong vual ngaih ka hemloh bang ta ning e. Taka na simtho hiam aw hembiak na tong, Tuibang luang e laish gibang khen maw'ng e; Hembiak simthu takin naubang sangkha leng, Lungtuak vual siangah non lel limn ding hi e.

Khuva juanglam leng tutkhawl tong na dawng ken, Nahkha luansiam buktuiin na hquin aw; Zatam simthu zonjam tong na dawng ken aw, Vuallel lui khau aw kiman nawn ve ni e. Tuibang luangin na chih leh luang ve ning; Zoulei tangbang na kuai leh kuaj ve ning e; Zoulei tangbang na kuai leh kuai ve ning, Lemnang diah bang na duai leh duai ve ning e. Deih zonjam lah kaitui bang jawl ngam la'ng, Lungsim kullaiah non zenta lua hi e; Chihtak luat lah selungmawl tanna hi, Kaibangzak luat tahpnam bang banna hi e. Na tun simthu hondong aw na jua simthu, Pianna ten tong a nem leh tuahi ve hi e; Khimjin deih-ang zong ding leh sawgpal lou ding'n, Tun simthu tubang ka dhing lou ding hi e. Tun-nial jua-nial ngaih aw heisa suak thei leng, Tulkung tungah nun khatin luai ton leng e; Tulkung tungah nun khatin luai ton leng, Vual-i-loh sawn om louin kansang leng e. Mal-juang huiva sun chianga honglailen leh, Ka sansa lia hounem aw na juang lou aw; Tulkai suka zou lawkta a hongtau leh, Sannem toh tuahding ka chiamzou hi chi aw.

Tangleng lungjuang janggam ah ka hei zongin, Singdang tongsuah luai naubang na sang lou aw; Singdang tongsuah luai naubang ra sang ken, Tangleng lungjuang mel na muh na chiam in aw. Lenkhang kawlni suah sima mabang ka pat, Vaimang siamsil guikhau bang jamsau sa'ng e; Jamsau naven a hiang kim kawia ka zuih, Juikim la'ng e selung ngoumei jing bang e. Vaitunnu siamsil bawl leh pigo lailak, Guijam gahlang a tong kaitui luang bang; Guijam gahlang a tong kaitui luang bang e, Tuana pupa sumbang tuah lungpil sa'ng e. Sang aw nang sinlai leh aw daiteng pigua, Tum khaua loih tang banjal nou agai ing e; Kamkhen lengthe nleuh tau lai nou bang, Killam jawl ah khimjin huiva mau bang e. Vaimang siansil tangin koulianga ka bat, Lentukuam uap sangmang naubang sial ing e; Leidou lengkel bang nohna vangkho suanna, Zatam vualgen tung khopi bang ging aw e. Ommuan muna vai-tunnu tongdam sanna, A lam nunnuam tungah aw jam jiijiai e; Sing bang a hiang chik kum a sel lou ding, Guikhau lelah tongdam naubang sang aw e. Vaimang banjal jang pehsik lihtui jawl ah, Pheiphung neilou limnga lensiam zil aw e

Tangbang dama tun sianglam zon na halin, Lawm aw lunglaia i ngilh louh ding hi e. Tuizum ngalliam minthang tan lal a nohna, Khodon gamleinou tungah mau dimdim e; Huihkhi dam lan kalnouin suangmual khum, Leidou gamlei jing daibang lap ding aw e. Tunnem phamsa siatlei suak ta ding sa'ng, Sau limliap ah voasen hambang huai hi e; Tongdam sanlouh sauneu haibang ngak hi, Sunkim lungjuan vonin lambang vel ing e. Phamsa vaivut suaksa leh buh-al nelkai, Jang pehsik pat bang sai e, ni bang lun e; Simtung gepkhuai bang mat leh tulta lailak, Zatam banjal pamchiang huihkhi lang bang e.

KHUPCHING LA Nidanglai pekin Manipur khanglama tua Palkhuang gam ah Mualkawi kichi khua khat a om hi. Tua khua ah akithuahthei mahmah nupi nih a om ua. I pi-le-puten, Khupching leh Ngambawm, chia a nagen gen uh tua nupi nihte tate a nahi nilouh uhi. Tua nupite gelin akitonin nau honpai tuak ua. Alam dangin, a gil uh nat bang a kiton se hi. A gil uh a nat chiangin a sutuah ua, a dam jel uh hi. Gil sunga a om tuak lai un a nute tuak un a naupai uh numei leh pasal hongbih leh kitensak din ki thukim uhi. Hun hongpai jela, ta a honneita ua, khat pasal, khat numei, a hongbia; pasal pen a min dingin Ngambawm a sa ua, numei min dingin ahihleh Khupching. A don chiang un nauluai tuam ah a sial tuak ua, nauoih la sain a khim ihmu sek ubi. A mohlouhkal un Ngambawm pen Khupching sikah a nalum jel hi. Lamdangsain a chiamteh kik ua, ahitazongin a nalum khawm hilhel jel uhi. Valnou a honghibtak un kiitdan a honthei panta uhi. Tuachi lai, Nahjual khua ah Ngambawm-te nuta a pem ubi.

Nahjual leh Mualkawi tuh kigamla lou, kigal muh ahia, a kal uah Ngajam Lui a luang hi. Ngambawmin khualgam ah Khupching a vahel sek hi: tang leh. Khupching leh Ngambawm tuh khenzohvuallouh dingin a hongkiitta ua. Ngambawmin, Kiteng nihang, a chihleh Khupchingin, Ka nuepa vadong phot in, chun a sang hi: tang. Ngambawm pen tagah-genthei mi hia, a vadot leh Khupching nu a naut deksuaikeia. Ngambawmin a lemlouhdan Khupching a hilh hi: tang. Kikben ding ngaingamlou ahihman un gamlak ah a taita ua. Sihleten ding gina nei louin gamnuai ah a giak uhi. Vanpi ging honhonin khopi ynah a hongju a, huihpi nung huhu a, nahtang nah a kikawm nipniap uhi: tang leh. Atawpin in a honjuanta uh. Ngambawmin bikha nuaiah Khupching nu a vangaigu hi. Khupching nu'n, Sihleten nangawn nei lou Ngambawm atheihsa, ka khan a kilumlet tazongin, makpain nei ngeikei ning, chia bang hakbakin a tanu thuhilhna'n a nei hi. Ngambawm tuh a khitui a luang zungzunga: tang. Ngambawmin a jakte Khupching a hilha, Ching, khase ken aw; dawi suak thei hileng na nu ka nawmvalh nuam, a chi hi: tang leh.

Ngambawmin Khupching samzang khat a botkbia a, a paipih hi. Tuachiangin Khupching a hongchinata. Khupching nu'n a tanuin Ngambawm a deih man hilhiala china mah ahi chih a theikhia hi. Tua ahihmanin Ngambawm sam ding a sawl hi. Ngambawm a vatun chiangin, Khupching nu'n, Khupching nat hibdam ngeingei leh kiteng nu teh, a chi hi. Ngambawmin a tawi samzang Khupching lu a bohkhiakna munah a siata, a hongdamta hi. Hmapin Khupching nu'n a phal samsom keia anau jawk Sialching adingin a kun hi. Sialching toh kiteng unla, neih-le-lam buchingin ka hon guan ding, a chi hi: tang leh. Tuachiangin Ngambawmin, A u hiin anan hitaleh ka ngai, ahihhangin a milaipen mah ka ngai pen hi, a chi hi: tang. Bangteng hileh, ui-hou jawng-houa na hon hou ngalin Sialching toh jaw teng kei nung, a chi. Tuachiangin Khupching nu'n beltung khat Ngambawm a lup a, ahihhangin a tep nuam keia, Khupching vang tulpih zomai ta ning, a chi hi: tang leh. Huan, Ngambawmin Khupching samzang khat a botkhe kika, a pai nawrta. Tungmanin Khupching lim a meka, a samzang tawi me beihin Ngajam Lui piau ah a nusia hi. Huaitakin Khupching a china ngalmai jela.

Ngambawm sam ding a sawl nawn leulen uhi. Ngambawm a vahoh nawnta. Tua janin vuah chin a, Ngajam Lui khanga, milim pen tuiin nataimang zou hi. Ngambawmin Khupching tuh si ahi chih a thei hi. A galvana kivan, kitomin a kisial a, sak-akhang a zong behu a, ahihhangin a mu zou nawnta kei, tang . Khupching vui dingin a kisota uhi. A banknanga a sial sin ua leh a ta kei hi. Huaiin Ngambawm a sam ua, Ching aw, thawl maiin, a chia, a thawlta. Ahia, khul ah a bankuang a thawl kei leuleua; Ngambawm a sam kik uhi. Ngambawmin jawl-ching aw, thawl nawn jel mai inla, mangpha aw; tu pen atunpna dinga i kimvhua hi kei ken a chihleh a thawl nawn jela, huan a vuita. Antazongin Khupching pen khaa om, a khohei leh gonotat toh Ngambawm kimillon ahihmanin, a kithuah theikei uhi. Khupechingin, I hedan leh tatdan kibangloua kithuah thei nai tadih lou bi hang. Inlam ah vapai phot ini, koute banga na hongsih chiangin hiaisanah na hongpai ding a, tuachiangin atawntungin i kithuah ta ding hi, chiin Ngambawm a sawl kikta hi.

Ngambawm zong a hongsitaa, a kha tuh misi khua ah a paia, khalam ah a it leh ngaih tawotung Khupching toh khohei gantat kibangin a beikhawmta hi. AKHIAKNATE Bia dong; ahia amaimaia dong hilouin, a kut a kun lamdeuh hi. Luikhun giahna. Tongnah nahtang nah. Sungnekin... ing e haigawp ahihke leh nawmvalh nuam ing. Laitawi ton k teng. Laltang pengju enghouna ahihkeileh selphouna ju. Khuang bung kulhpih tulpih. Khimin jing lunghamrain tuam. Vaibang tham sihna. Sesul sulnung; gamtatna. Malnuan sih nung. Tung... hen ov ni tum ngeikei hen. Phaikhi'n sem huihzamin mut hiauhiau. LIANDOU LA (Hiai late Liandou zi-neih nunga kiphuak ngen hiin a lang. Tua ahihmania la khat sungah a tagah lui uh leh a hauhsak nung uh a tuangkhawm nilouh a, athu toh ela a tonkhawm theikei. Dah late a dah lai ua phuah hilouin, a nopsak nung ua kiphualkhia hiin a lang.

A nop la uh zong a noplaitak ua phuahkhink om mung lou, a ji-sih nunga a ton ua kiphualthe deuh ngen hiin a lang.) Nidanglai pekin Chin a Chimnuai Geltui kichi khua khat ah unau pasal nih a om ua. A ujawk Liandou ahia, a naujaw Thanghou Neuchik a hib lai un a pa un sihsana, a nu uh toh tagahin a om uhi. Pasal neih kik a ut manin a nu un Liandou leh Thanghou tuh kuangpi a khuhkhuma, pasal nei dingin a kuan san hi. Tuabanga omlai a ni un vahongkhiaa, unauten a nu uh nungdelh uh: tang. A vadelhpha ua, a nu'n a kikpih hi. Khatvei mah, a nu un Thanghou tuium a taw vuhvangsakin, a nih un tui vatawi dingin a sawl hi. Tua kalin a nataisanta Vasa khatin, Liandou Thanghou, pasal nei dingin na nu kuan e, a chia. Liandouin, Ka nau tuium dim lou lai, a chi jela. Lamdangsea a et ua leh, a taw nakivutvang bi. A bubit ua, in ah a paita uhi. A nu uh a nungdelh chitchit uhi.

A galmuh ua, Nu, honnangakin, a chih chiang un, Liandou, lamsak leh lamkhang ah na nau leh na uital honsawnkhia inla, nang kiain hondelhin, a chi a. Liandouin, Nu, nang sangin ka nau leh ka uital it jaw ing, a chi hi. A nu'n lah a nangak tuankeia, pha zoulouin a pute uh mimphual ah a giak uhi. A nu'n gal tuakn, a mat dek na leh, Kei honman kei unla, paina mimphuale giak Liandou-te unau vamin un, a chia. Tuichin galten a khah ua, Liandou-te unau min dingin kuan uhi. Galten teiin mimphual lak a sun ua. Thanghou khe sunkha uhi Thanghouin U, a na lua, kap ding ka hi hiam? a chihleh Liandou-in. Galte hi uh, kapkenla, sazu hamin, bawi, a chi hi. Thanghou a sazu ham leh galten sazu spin phual bel uhi. Tua phual hal-khu juiin Liandou-te unau kigelkhia na vompi kua kawl hawm a bel uhi. A dang uh tak mahmah ahihumanin tui zong dingin Liandou a kuan hi. Tuakalin vompi valut a, a mulin Thanghou naksung sunkhaa, jau saa a hehthai leh lau in vompi tawmdoka, a khang kenlakab a tuk vatvut hi. Liandou hongtungta hi.

A va-et na leh vompi na si zoua, a semna ding temta khel dingin Liandouin a nau sawl hi. Neu i pute temta vukhel inla, thangpeu satna ding vachiin, a chia. Thanghou vakuana, a pu'n a nadot leh imtheilou a, genkheta hi. Husitakin a pu'n a tangkonpihta. A khojang un vompi sa po dingin a kuan uhi. A satak tengteng po bei keuhkeuh ua, Liandou-te unau tanding a gil kia nutsiat uhi. Liandou khasia kisaiu a kap hi. A nauin, U, kapkap ken, a ging lengleng banghiam khat om hi, chiin sem sawmin sa-gilpi a kai chit chit hi. Tualaitakin vasa khatin. A khangah li pha zo lailai, a nachia; lui tolahna kisuan sukiu a li khat ah a sem uhi. A atkek ua leh dakbu leh khivui tampi a om hi. Tuate puain in ah a pai uhi. In ah amau kiain a om ua, nekding zong nei louin jantang khat na-ngawn a kiphelbawm chipchip uhi. Tagah genthei mahmah ahihhang un tuabang donga kiit unau ahi uhi. A invengte un nekding a vakhol ua, ahihhangin buhvai lom leh sazu ek toh kihel peuh pia uhi. Sa a kholh chiarg un lah apuhbawk tata a khol, se uhi.

Tagah leh jawng mahmah ahihman un a invengte un a simmoh petmah uhi: tang. Atawpin a ni-te un a in nah a pi ua, a gang un a sepding uh na a guan hi. Tang kiphou Thanghou a hongsaka, Liandou pen sial chinesak hi. Ak hon kawmin Thanghouin sailim hualhuahm tang tang ton a hualkhawm jel hi. Lou-hal zohin gophelin sailim tuh loulaia singbul khempeuh kapnain a neia, tua tang chite hongpoua, hoih mahmah hi. Ni khat Liandou-te unauin lon a khohlai un movanlai in gul a hontuaha, a loulai uah a khia a, teksia khat unau a hehpih mahmah a, a nekding uh a nahuansak sek hi. Liandouin, ni khat, a etguk leh a pi'n a puankawm panin tung tang a singkhe zungzunga, tuate huan hi. A kiit mahmah Liandou-te unauin in ah a dakbu uh tum na, ngaih mahmah hi. Mi'n a vangaihguk ch'ang un a sel ua, a sikin um-hawm khat a khengeng uhi. Bang ahichiam na tum uh? chia a dot chiang un amau, bang mah hi kei e, um-hawm maimai hi, a chi uhi.

Tua umhawm tuh hausapa'n a siala lei a tumta Hongpuak un, a chia, a vapuak ua, teksia khat in ah zintung uhi. Tua hausapa'n sial hau lua ahihmanin Liandou-te unauin a telding pen uh a thei theikei ua. Tua teksia a dot uh leh, Sial hon laka a neupen pen kelpi chiah phet tel un, chin a nathubihih hi. Ni khat Liandou-te unauin sa a ai ua, puandum toh nungak tangval a lam ua, zumang samang nein tangpi tangta a niang uhi. (Tua i Paite puandum Liandou-Thanghou apana i luahtouh ahi.) Nidanglaia amau na simmohte zong meikhelian bawk a hongtam mahmah uhi: tang,. Liandou-te unau hauhdan kilchiha kithang venuvung a nu'n najaa, a veh dingin kuankhia hi. Liandou pen sial zongin suangdoh ah natu a, a nu'n haih a, Pu Liandou omna na thei hiam? a chi hi: tang leh. Liandouin, Thei e. Gal-ai tang-aiin ju-le-sa nein lun duldul uhi. Hiai sial juipeuh leteh a in uah hontun ding hi, a chi hi. A nu'n sial a nungzuiha, a pai nawnta hi: tang. Liandouin lamnai lamah namakhelha, in a natunsan hi. Adenmah chiangin a nu hongtung petmah hi.

Lut ngamlouin kongpi bulah ding nilouh a, huan a samiat uhi: tang. A giaka; tua janin innuaia kisi sial honte ki a ging bualbual hi. Liandou nu a ihmu theikeia, Liandou Thanghou sawmsial, api-atal kisita bualbual; hanktuam ah sevaupak bang hen, chiin a hamsiat hi. Ajing khua a vakin a seng pua a, in kimvela akbubah a aktui khat jela a donkhawmsak ua leh a seng dim zou hi. Tuate puain paikhia hi. A pai dingkuanin Liandouin, Nu, hongtunghei hetkenia, na sih chiangin ju hiam va hiam khatin hongkihilin aw, chiin a vaikhak hi. A nu a pai nungin Liandouin a goute a phoukhe zengzung hi. Liandou vaikhaknain a nu lung a khoiha, a nunghei leh Liandouin a phonkhiak gouten a tan hi. In a tunin a pasaiin, Aktui hiaizahta, na lu na tawa na lei hiam? a nacaia. Huan a ji tuh khakham veiin a puklumta. Adenchiangin vasa khatin, Liandou Thanghou, na nu si si, vachi hi. A nu uh luang la dingin Liandou te kuan uhi. Gun a palkai siausiau ua. A hongpailam un Liandouin a ji a bana lena tui a paipih leh a khahsuaha, tuiin a taihmangsak hi.

Liandou tuh ji-louin in a tungkik hi. Bem sungah a nu uh luang a koih uh a, a si-tui liak dingin uital khat a koih ua, a thante tu dingin aktal khat. Bangtan hiam nungin Liandou sial a sun hi. A lam juajua, ahihhangin Liandou pen khasiatna toh dim hi. A ji toh a kiten-ni ua tangpi-tangtain ju-le-sa a niandante uh a ngaihsutkik chiangin, Liandouin a ji a ngai lua hi: tang, leh. Liandou-te a hauh mahmah hang un a mangbei pah uhi. Khangluiten, A nu a lak nawn jiaka mangmoh a, mangbei ahi, a chi uhi. (Huaijiakin ahi, tuni tana tate taisana pasal nei nu, taisana omten a lakkik noplouh uh; i lak leh a zek a chi uhi. AKHIAKNATE Siatlei suak-lei suak; tagah genthei. Umbang tou-suang tunga tu. Nuhtun nu. Mel hongma-haih. Puvon pu. Kaiin zak- zakta. Sang leh lai gamsa leh gal. Kankong kong; khomual. Lenlual lawmte. Umi unaute. Lamsia! sasial ne. Tan a mat uh. Thai ji. Khua lun e a kidawn ua a sih uh genna. Lamli lamnalak.

Tang leh buh-le-bal, mim le-tang a ai ua, sial a sun ua, nek-le-tak ah tangpi tangta'a niang uhi. Bangteng hileh milrausa mahmah leitungdamsungin thupipeh e, chiin zukhamin a lamlam uhi. Setang neih-le-lam. Tang Liandou tuh ju duh lelah tui zata zang thei, sa duh lelah leitang laka la thei; a sial lah a kullsung dim, innuaia a vok lah ngalhon bang mai ahi. Tuabang zahtaa kiningching ahihmanin a utlehdah un a ta uni. Laknuai innuai. Lualsu ngalhon. Sumtual huangsong. Kaylon vasa. Thai ka lakin ka mou piin.
