Kumpi ahihciang a 'vaimang zuapa' kici hinapi, tua hunlai a England kumpi pen numei ahihman in kumpipa ci lou Suang: Suang tampite lak ah piau suangtum pena sakbel leh a toubel in kingaihsun a, akip akawi Jeh atou asawt thu a kigen ciang in hiai bang in kigenteh hi Ciau lumsuang bang gil hen aw ci in Tuum leh naanzg: Naang pen nem ngiingei a tuumsing pen om thimthiam.a, tuumkhau pen ahihleh zoi in nem nilnel hi Nung leh ka ma ka sialna'n ngaihtam sialna'n Ka duang lemnaang dit bang ing e Thanneen tuum bang huai ing e Singsawl: Singsawl a kisatkhiak leh nisa in haai in vul niingniang uhi. Tua bang toh kigenteh in Tulsawl thak bang vul ing kici hi Gul leh sial: Gul i muh ciang in lauhna khat kinei ahihhang in hoihna leh hoihlouhna aneihte pen a thuzui in kineisak hi. Gul a lup ciang in kikualsa in Juma, gul liante alup ciang un sialtal lum mah bang in kigen thei hi. Tua ahihman in, Zoumite' ngeina ah sialtal pen nasa mahmah a, a ki uanggen ciang in Se talvom kual ahihkeileh Tangsial gullum kici hi.

A letna leh a thupina ah zong 'Sial bang lian kici thei hi e Meipi ngoumei: Vuahzu lou a khua a phat hang in mei a kaaileh khua siangtak in kimuthei tuanlou hi. Tua mah bang in lawm kingaite kikal ah, thu tuamtuam ziak I vangkhua ah tual ngoumei a kai zong in Ngaih aw san sa ciam pel lou diing hi e kici hi Tumtai leh Loupa: K'on ngai na ci tuntai bang Tumtai kici loupa ci khat hi a, a vulleh zong a mel kikheklou hi Singliim: Nisat hun ciang in singliimte pen vot ngiingeiin zotnophuai hi. Tua bangte pen Tuliim liap kici hi Mi tampi in la phuak in a tuamtuam tamsak thei uhi. Khat le khat tapsak a kibat kim sipsip louh hang in akician leh mi kim ini zat deuh pawl a oma, tuate lak a pawl khat i gen ding hi Phualngounou: Zoumite' ngeina vasate lak ah vaphual pen a thupi leh akizahtaak mahmah khat hi a vaphual mou pi vaphual nupate' nuntakdan cih thute akigen mangmoh leh a kigenteh den ahi hi.

Zoumi nupa khosakna pen vaphual nupa toh genteh hi a, Zoumite in ngeina dan a zi khat pasal khat net ahihmah bang un, a zite uh mittaw khelbai in om mahle uh olsam in kima lou uhi. Zi in zong ta pasal a neith khit leh a pasal a sih hang in, tua a tapa ngak in, tulpih hi. Zi ina pasal Zong in, Zi in a pasal vang tang in, a pasal vang nuntakpih hi. Tua hi a, tua nupate in hiai leitung kia hi lou in vaantung dong ah khat vang khat in tang a omkhawm theihna diiig un Laukha hualna sialtang sun uh hi Nupate' laukha hualna ciamtehna in zi in vaphual mul vaphual mei ngah a, a pasal in mukha leh aakgia sawnkai ngah hi. Tua bang in Zoumi ngeina ah zi pen vaphual kitangsak in vaphual bang in kingaihsun hi Huci in zi akigen ciang in phualngou nou hong kici Sen angkawi aw, phualngou nou aw Lungdeth a zingzin sang e Zingzin hilou ka anglai pan Leenheisa tual ah kia e ci inna lou hi Leen heisa: Zougam ah heisa paak pen ahoih penpen a kigen khat ahi hi. Amel hoih kia hilou in.

agim zong namtui mahmah hi. Ahoihdan pen a polam kia ah hoih hi lou in, a sunggil akipat avek a hoih ahi hi. Tua ahihman in zi hoihte heisa paak toh kigenteh nuam Mualdawn heisa hong paal e Phung tutawm lai hong kuai e Ei kiakna tuum bang sa veng e Leen heisa tual ah kia e in, a zi hoihte uh nih sihna pen tual ah kia na ci uhi Tua pen paak hoih mahmah khat, vul in akung apan a nuai leilak ah kia hi cihna toh kibang hi. Zite' mel Paite Laie Leh Thute hoih leh mel siat toh kisai Jou in, ki itna toh kisai in khat leh khat vang kitang a nuntakna pen vaphual toh genteh in, mel hoihna toh gawmkhawm in, leen heisa tual ah kia na ci uhi Tauna, mauna leh thuumna: Mihingte lungleng leh khua ngaia aom ciang un, tau, mau leh thuum in a ki om hi. Tua bangte a gen ciang un vasa ham pawlkhat toh genteh uhi.

Tanghawm talawk ham pen lawkta tau, vahui ham pen huiva maw ci in, vamiim ham pen miimva thuuwm ci uhi Lawkta tau: Thelkiak La sung ah hi bang in lawkta tauna thu kimu hi Zoulei lawkta toh tau va ngei e Na tuun awi hiam zua na awi hiam Kei poh tuun awi ing zua awi ing e Lawkta na tau dungsun zel ing e Paamlou tuksuan selman dawn pan Zou lawkta'n sen gual awi e Nang guak sen gual na awi hiam aw Ka ngaih teng nau bang kah'ng e ii Huiva mau Sen puvon sa bang na kanna von cin aw Zougam huiva na mauna'n Lem in na zawngkhawm na'm aw ili Miimva thuum: Kalzang Gaal la ah hi bang in kici hi Thuumthuum ta thuumthuumta leh Miimva bang thuumthuumta cia Na pasal that kei hi'ng e Na ngaihman thuumthuumta cia Pi Niangzing in zong hi bang in vamiim thuum toh Thuumthuum ing e Nuati simlei ah miimva thuum zil ing e Tautau ing e Zoudamkuam ah lawkta na tau zil ing e Zouzam paak: Paak lak ah zouzam paak pena mel hoih khat hi in kigen hi. Nungak tangvalte zong zouzam paak toh na kigenteh hi.

Lou buuk kiang khawng leh loulai khawng ah zouzam a kiciing nuam deuh hi Buuktual zouzam cih khawng in kilou thei hi Suunni vei sawt lailung zuan ma bang pan ing Omnuam duangkuai ngaihnou in hon phawngta e Ka lohloh diing paal zouzam ka bah Ioh diing Zalai gual' gen tumtai bang vul ing e Suangkua paak kuahsuang paallun: Suangkua paak pen a mel zong hoih moh lou hi. Tua sang in,a paakzu thupizaw hi. Phuitong phuntong paak leh vaupaak sevaupaak te'n zong paakzu nei uhi. Hiai paakzute dawn diing in tungleng vasate'n bawk souhsouh uhi. Tuamah bang in, mihau leh mineizou leh micing misiamte tua paak toh kigenteh hi. Zoumite ngeina lak a fon athupi penpen a kigen ahihmah bang in hunpi khat ah kihauhsak kiletsakna kisak theihna hituan Jou in leng ahihbang in fon la ah hibang in kisa hi rene ele Ka dai li teng ah kuahsuang paal lun e Vaza'n bawm e Vaza'n bop thok tang Sumtual ah siang e Vaza'n bawm e Azu nei 'singpaakte toh kisai in, Damtui kul thuk limnga bang in zuan, Sing cin paal phial va'n bawm e kici hi Mikangte'n i pu i pate sahkhua biak animism a ci uhi.

Animism kict Latin te'n kha acihna uh anima kamma! a hong kilasawn ahi a, kumzabi na a scholarte'n kha biakna ahihkeileh sing leh suang a hinna om biakna cihna dan a ahon zat uh ahi. Adiktak in ci le'ng Khristian, Islam Hindu leh Buddhistte bang a tangthu taktak leh zattangzang neilou ahihman un lai theih ma a sahkhua preliterate reli gion cih toh kituak zaw Ieh kilawm zaw hi. Pupa sabiak in khalam nopsakna diing sang in taksa a cidam ludam buh le bal, vulh le khoi, thah le mat, silh le ten, suan le pak Jam a pibawlzaw hi. Taksa khosakna diing khualna bang napi'n sahkho zahna leh cihtakna toh a biak uh lungluttak in a bia uhi. Pupa sabiak ah thupha ngetna cidam ngetna leh kha kaihkhawmna cih bang in kikhen thet hi Thupha ngetna ah khua le tui aa dia ngetna leh innkuan khat mimal khat aa dia ngetna omsawn lai hi Khobiakna pen tualbaw! ahihkeileh tualbiakna zong kici hi.

Huai ban ah, Pusa thoihna, inntek thoihna, sumtawng thoihna i cihte thupha ngetna leh toukaina khat ahi uhi Cidam ngetna i cih ciang in cinate damna dia dawi hiam, kau hiam khaina ahihkeileh khem lungdamna ahi Dawite'n hong khem hong gawt in hong cinasak ua mihingte'n zong tua dawite gawt in lungdamsak uhi I pupate'n mihingte i sih ciang in kha leh taksa kikhen hi cih upna na nei uhi. Kha leh taksapum kikhen pen a kigawmkikna diing a a thilhihte uh khasapna ahihkeileh kha kaihkhawmna aci uhi. Innkuan kimit etna akmit et kikha khupna, khasapna i cihte hiaite pawl ahi hi Sahkhuaicih sa leh khua kigawm ahia,a nih un kibe tuaktuak hi. Sa i cih ciang in kha cihna hia sabiak cih ciang in kha biak cihna ahi hi. Pusaa kibiakna wiak pen i pute' khate'n hong hehsan Jouh ua. i tung a lungkimtak aa om theihna diing uh leh thupha lapha ahon piakna diing ua biakna kibawl ahi. Pusa biakna ah pu leh pate' min abanban in kilou hi.

Pupa sabiak ah pusa thupi leh aloutheilou ahi a, kum khat in khatvei kibe teitei hi Pusa biakna nam nih Thanghou' pusa pisa kici sumtawng biakna leh Innsung sutpi biakna in kikhen hi Beh bulpipa tulpi kici in pusa bia a, dawisa siampu khat pepeuh in pusa be thei lou hi. Tulpi i cih a kigamhluah hia, tul icih ciang in teipi hiam, ciangzum hiam beh bul leh thuneihna ciamtehna a kipia ahi. Tanu khakhesate'n tul nih tulka leh tultang a zang ua, tulka ah sacian kici sabak giat langkhat a li zel khil in sasin ina siin uhi Tultang pen innteek aa ahi a, salung kitak hi. Thanghou leh Liandoute' unau in ka khua Ciantung Geeltui leh Ciannuai Ciimnuai acihna ua kipat a sabak kici lou a sacian hong kici ahi hi. Khenkhat in tuithei bul bia uhi Mang siat, voknou neih teng leh ut hunhun in pusa kibe thei hi.

Pusa thoih ciang in innsung a tap tung ah sa kihuan a, ngeina dan a tanute huan diing himahleh tanute'n huan lou in inntekte' thallouhte'n a huan uhi Pusa biak ciang in pu min leh pa mina upapen apan a naupangpen' min tan abanban a lou in pusa pisa ci in salu tung ah tui kibuak a, Pusa, pasa na tai in; cidam ludam hon. pia:in; tanu tapa hon pia in; miim cipha tang cipha hon pia in ci in phui kisam hi. Pusa biakna ah vokpi leh aakpi kia kizang a, apa atal a kizat leh api anu siam in kisiam hi. Vok ahihleh cihna diing deihna ziak in nahhi sing khat kikaltehsak hi A kithoihna ni simlouh ni khat kizeh tang a, zehphi a omleh a gan goh cia mah alian goh thak kul hi. 'Zeh' kici aziak' cihna hi a, zeh tang ahihdan uh a kitheihna diing in kelkong ah nahhi sawl kibaang hi. Dawi thoihna dangdang ah singsawl khat peuh kizang thei hi Tulai in siampu leh siampi cih a kibang a a kizat hang in pupa biakna taktak ah hiai thumal min nihte pen ngenteltak in kizang hi.

Dawi thoihna ah siampu cih kizang a, pupa ngeina sih ciang a makai diing, sagoh, sa aih khobawl ciang in siampi kizang hi. Siampi in gui nei aa inn gap hialleh hausa in a muan khat peuh seh thei hi Huci lou in siampi kikhek thei lou hi. Hiai sinlai ah ahihleh siampu leh siampi a kibang in i zang tadih diing hi. Siampi diingte pen hausa in aseh leh aguan ahi hi Khua in khiakna nih nei hi. I teenna khua leh khua leh tui tung a thunei khat genna ahi. Khua leh loubuk kibatlouhna ahihleh khua ah rua kici khobiakna a om ziak ahi. Japante'ni gama hong doulai un Japante pen gaal ci ding i hi uhia a ci uhi. Khotual hileh thah diing in siang lou a, a thatte tualthat kici diing a, gaal ahi uh ci le ng a thattute pen tualthat in kisim lou diing hi na ci uhi Tualgal i ciang in mi kibang sa kibangte'? kidouna vuahpi a zuk ciang in khuasia kici a, huih lum a nia sat ciang in kholum kici a, dam i sak ciang in khodam khosik ict uhi.

Nang khodamsak banghang a khua in dam na sa kha ahia? Khodou ciang in galdou in khua kidou lou in in ahon kipahpihna dia zintunna cihna leh dawi le kaute hawlkhiakna ahi. Khobawl cih ciang in innlama khosung hahsiangna khawng genna hilou in mikhualte khakkhiakna ahi.Tangsampa'n ''Na zinte uh na ciahsak un ciaakikou ciang in khosung a inn khat in tungsial lem khat, buhsih tuun khat leh zuha tuun khat ciat khomual a va koih in hausapa' tanupa Ieh siampipa'n va kha uhi Hausa' inntual an siampipa'n ui siang khat lu tem in attan a, hausate kong pua ah vomgui a hen in sesing dawn ah taak suang hi. Ni khat sung khozang in zeh kitang a, khosung ah mikhual kilutsak lou hi. Hiai hun sung in husa thawm om phal ahi kei a, muinam hal theihlouh, tui tawi theihlouh, ann suk theih louh, mui kheek theihlouh cih ahihman in khosung a dai zikzek hi. kum bullam a Hanship khua a Guite hausa Pu Kamzamang leh Khristian tangval khenkhatte kinakna ziak leng hiai khobawl sung a zeh tanna thu ziak ahi hi tatleh hausa in a guan siampi in zawlgaipa' ui ngawng a a, khosung siansuahna a baw! hi.

Tuban hibang a kizawlgaihna a omlouhna dia pathian lungzai kiang a ngetna ahi. Hiai Guite kual a kizang ahi Geeltui khua a Thanghou Jeh Liandoute' pusa i cih ciang in Sumtawng biakna i cih toh kikhat ahi hi Thanghoute unau siamtu a pi un sumtawng aa tummang ma in kumteng in voknou aakpi in hon bia un ci aa vaikhah ziak in sumtawng biakna hong kipan hi. Thanghou leh Liandoute unau gamh pen Naulakte'n tom uh ahihman in Thanghoute' suan leh pakte pen Naulakte ahihkei ua leh leng a tanau nai mahmah uh ahi diing uhi. Naulakte' pu Elthuam in Thanghoute' kivuina Dim hankeen pen ka keenliang ci in tuni dong Naulakte'n han in neilai uhi. i Thanghou leh Liandou late pen Naulakte a diing in lazek suak hi. Naulakte asih ciang un Thanghou sih ngeina dan in kivui ua, Naulakte'n Thanghou leh Liandou sumtawng dawi pen beh dawi in na nei masapen uhi.Thangkam in Dimpi khua ah Khohlawm, Dawva, Munluah, Hanmau Zil om, Sukte, Naulak leh Hanzangte' unau beh khat ahi ua: hiai ci giatte'n midang beh dangte toh kibanglou in Dimpi khua thoih in sumtawng dawi na nei masa uhi, ci hi.

Thanghoute' unau in Geeltui khua pan in sumtawng dawi nei uh a, huai pen Thanghoute neih tuam a innkuan dawi uh ahi hi. Thanghou in Dimpi khua ah tua dawi keng a, Dimpi khua pan Naulakte'n Juahtou uhi. Vulh le khoi buh le bal, neih le lamh tung a hong siam ahihna ziak a kipahthu genna leh thupha ngetna a kibia ahi hi. Dimpi khua pan in beh dangte'n zong Thanghoute unau siamtu in ei zong hong siam thei hi cih upna toh sumtawng dawi pen pusa in kinet hi Pupa sabiak ah Gampi thoihna athupipen hi. Gam thoihna in gampi, gamnuh, muakmeng, gamkau, sumkhuk miliai, nuhpi leh bum Jeh thothnate a huam vek hi. Hiai gam thoihna a siampu in dawi thoihna dia a phuisam diing a hon pat ciang in. Pasian thu bei ci masa phot a huai khit clang ina dawi' la sam thei phet hi. Pasian' thu omna ah dawi la kisam theilou a, Pasian' thu a beina ah dawi kithoth thei lel hi I pu i pate'n dawi Ieh kau bia in singphung suangphung teng ana biak hang un tulai Pasian biak bang a zahtakna leh pahtawina toh a biak uh ahi kei.

Dawite'n i khate man in kolbulh ua, huaiziak a cinatna leh sihna tan hon tun ahi cih upna a nei uhi. Dawite lungkimna diing pia a, khakkhiak keileh hon sisak thei hon haisak thei in hon zawngkhalsak thei acih ziak un kihtak leh huatthuah in zekhem kawm in hawlkhiak a sawm uhi. Hiai omdan bel dawi in amaute khem in amau zong dawite khem kikhemtuah ahi uhi. Alehlam pang ah,Pasian i cih migi mahmah ahi a, kuamah tung a thilsia baw! lou ahihman in biak kul lou a ci uhi. Ahihhang in, lei leh vaan siampa leh kha ahi cih a mangngilh kei ua, dawi thoihna dia a sagoh leh ann khenkhat lakhia in, Pasian lungzai na tai in ci in pia uhi Pasian leh lungzai kikhat hia, ahihkeileh mi tuamtuak cih thu ah theihdan, nih a om hi. Khatna ah: Pasian leh lungzai kicr lou in Pasian lungzai i in beh leh phung cih bang in paukop a kizang ahi cih ahi. Lungzai i cih lungsim lian, lungsim za nei cihna ahi a, Pasian hihna gencetna toh Toupa loupipen cih bang dandeuh a kizang ahi aci uhi.

Laizou pau zangte'n ung acih ciang un suangpi cihna ahi a, lumsuang i cih bang a muanhuaina leh detdouna genna ahi aci uh. Nthna ah, khanglui tangthu khat Neinou Thu ah Pasiante' unau ci in Pasian khat sang a tamzaw dan in kigen hi. Sonchinlian in, Tung a om Pasian ahi a, leitung vaihawmpa pen lungzai ahi, ci hi. Huai Pasian min kiloukha nawnlou hi aci hi. Khozing khovak cih thu ah zong mituam tuak ahi uhia ahihkeileh mi khat genna hia cih thu ah ngaihdan akibang kei hi. Bangteng hileh ka siampu dotpa'n khozing khovak kici dawi nautang genna ahi ci in hon hilh hi. Tua mahbang in ziin leh ziinleng kici zong lapau a dawi cihna ahi ci hi. Zougam a Khristian sahkhua biakna ahong luutciil lai in Khalkha lamte'n Pasian leh Khozing akibang in zang mahle uh tuni ciang in Khozing cih pen zang nawn lou in Pasian cih kammal a zangzaw uhi. Hiai toh kisai in Prof Lehman in Luseite' huzapna ziak a 'Pathian' cih thumal hon Tedim gam Jam ate'n Pasian cih a zang ua. mallam ate'n Pathian cih kammal kizang tangpi hi.

Nidanglai in Khangluite'n tuahsiatna atuah ciang un, Khozing khovak Jeh lametna lim toh na pau uhi. Mihing leh nate tung a thunei, lei leh vaan bawl avanglian lua khat a om cih a phawk uhi. Hiaite ban ah Pusiam Pasiam cih kammial na nei uhi. Pu Phutthang in Pasian cih kammal pen tua Pasiam pan a kilou paisuak a hong piang hi ding in gen hi kum a Lt. Trant in Asiatic Researches sung a No tice Khyen Tribes cih a gelhna ah, Thuneihna sangpen nei Passine kichi a nei uh, cih na mu hi. Kum akigelh British Burman Gazetteer ah Pasian khat kha khat leh hiai leitung siamtu leh vaihawmtu khat aom cih a phawk thei ua himahleh amah a hoihluat ziak in bangmah kihtak diing a om kei a, biak zong a kul kei aci uh ci in kiciamteh hi. I gam sung tawng a Khristian sahkhua ahong luut maa hiai Jaibute na kigelh khin ahi ua, huaiziak sianthouna ziak a Pasian hong kizang hizaw leh kilawm hi Edward Tuite Dalton in kum kum aa laibu gelh Descriptive Ethnology Bengal ah, Thadoute'n Pathen aciuh, ci inna gelh hi.

Luseite'n siangthou acih ciang un Thianghlim aci ua, Thadoute'n thengthou aci uhi Pathian Lusei Pathen Thadou Pasian Paite cih kammalte i etleh thian leh thente pen thianghlim leh thengthou declined form ahi ua, sian cih zong siangthou declined form ahihlam kithei hi Kapkapta le'ng lah vannuai siah ah Kuata segul bang a lii hiam aw a Agul pah lii e, poh lii e Pa khat taang ci bang hong tengta e ciin khangluite'n Thelkiak Lapi in na nei uhi. Leitung ah gulte Hii in thete ii ahihmah bang in mihingte zong si in leitung ngak den lou diing hiacihnauh ahi a. silou in vaangam kikai lou diing hi naci uhi. Mihingte'n kha si theilou kinei a, kha leh hinnaa kitah ciang in khakia na ci ua, a sanggam pianpih a Jaizomte toh a kizopna uh hong bei ahihman in Jaitat aci uhi. Laitat leh khakia kici si cihna tuak himahleh kawk nei a kigen ahihziak a thumal tuam kizang ahi hi. Leitung taksa sihna pen a tawpna hilou in khalam hinkhua kipatna ahi aci uhi. A gelhsa pansan a kithuhilhna neilou uh ahihman in a theihdan uh leh a gintakdan uh a kibang kim sipsip kei hi.

Mi asih ciang in a kha in' misikhua lam manoh in pai a, abeh aphungte omna ah va om hi ci uhi. Hiai misikhua pen Guun gal gam koisan hiam khat hi diing a ummoh ahihman un pialgal gam leng aci uhi. Pial kiei thaang ahi a, hiai pial omna gallam ah sihna, natna leh dahna a om nawnkei a, lungmuanna, khamuanna leh vualzawina a omna mun ahi aci uhi. Sivui diing ciang a tanu khakna la leh beh lapi kisate pen misikhua zopna lampi kihilhna leng ahi Beh Lapia poimoh a, hiai lapi neiloute'n beh dangte lapi a koppih hial uh kul hi Misikhua pen dei dan nih a kiphasak a, Misikhua leh Sasikhua aci uhi. Sih ngeina a site leh kosah leh a dangdang hih a kivuite' khate pen Misikhua ah pai uhi Sihsia asi, saksi i cihte bel Sasikhua ah pai uh cih ahi Misikhua hi tuaktuak mahleh Sasikhua pen mun nuam louzaw dan aa up ziak un Sasikhua a paikhak diing alin Misikhua zotna diing lampi ah guun lui lian khata luang a.

hiai gun kanna diing in guun khau khat kul hi Hiai upna hang in langkhau laam kuaa sau tung ah misia tusak zel uhi.
